Exodus29:24 Byonna olibikwasa Arooni ne batabani be, babiweeyo gye ndi nga babiwuuba mu maaso gange." 
Exodus29:25 Olwo olibibaggyako, n'obyokera ku alutaari, awamu n'ebirabo ebiweebwayo ne byokebwa nga biramba, bibeere evvumbe eddungi lye nsiima Nze Mukama." 
Exodus29:26 “Oliddira ekifuba ky'endiga ey'omukolo ogw'okwawula Arooni, n'okiwaayo gye ndi, ng'okiwuuba mu maaso gange, era ekyo kiriba mugabo gwo." 
Exodus29:27 Mu kwawula kabona, ekifuba n'ekisambi eby'endiga ey'omukolo ogwo ogw'okwawula, binaaweebwangayo gye ndi nga biwuubibwa, era nga bisitulibwa, ne biba bya Arooni ne batabani be." 
Exodus29:28 Abayisirayeli bwe banaawangayo ebitambiro byabwe eby'okuliira awamu olw'okutabagana, ekifuba n'ekisambi eby'ensolo, binaabeeranga bya bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni ennaku zonna. Kino kye kirabo Abayisirayeli kye banampanga Nze Mukama." 
Exodus29:29 “Ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Arooni, biriba bya batabani be abalimuddirira, okusiigirwangamu omuzigo n'okwawulirwangamu." 
Exodus29:30 Mutabani we alimusikira mu bwakabona, anaayambalanga ebyambalo ebyo okumala ennaku musanvu, bw'anaayingiranga mu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, okuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus29:31 “Oliddira ennyama y'endiga ey'omukolo ogw'okwawula Arooni ne batabani be, n'ogifumbira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu," 
Exodus29:32 Arooni ne batabani be, ennyama eyo n'emigaati egiri mu kibbo, balibiriira ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Exodus29:33 Balirya ebyo ebiweereddwayo olw'okusonyiyisa ebibi nga baawulibwa, era nga batukuzibwa. Bakabona bokka be balibiryako, kubanga bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:34 Ku nnyama eyo, oba ku migaati egyo, bwe walibaawo ebisigaddewo okutuusa enkya, olibyokya mu muliro. Tebiririibwa, kubanga bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:35 “Ebyo by'olikola ku Arooni ne ku batabani be, nga bwe nkulagidde. Omukolo ogw'okubaawula, oligukolera ennaku musanvu." 
Exodus29:36 Buli lunaku onoowangayo ente ennume n'etambirwa olw'okusonyiyisa ebibi. Ekitambiro ekyo kirirongoosa alutaari. Olwo alutaari oligisiigako omuzigo okugitukuza. 
Exodus29:37 Olikola ekyo buli lunaku, okutukuza alutaari, okumala ennaku musanvu, olwo alutaari eribeera ntukuvu nnyo. Buli ekinaagikoonangako kinaabeeranga kitukuvu." 
Exodus29:38 “Kale by'onootambiranga ku alutaari buli lunaku obutayosa, bye bino: endiga ento bbiri, ezaakamala omwaka gumu." 
Exodus29:39 Emu onoogitambiranga ku makya, endala n'ogitambira akawungeezi." 
Exodus29:40 Awamu n'endiga ento emu esooka, onoowangayo kilo emu ey'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obulungi, obutabuddwamu lita emu ey'omuzigo gw'emizayiti omulungi. Ekiweebwayo ekinywebwa, onoowangayo lita emu ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Exodus29:41 Endiga ento endala onoogitambiranga akawungeezi, n'owaayo awamu nayo, obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano, n'ekinywebwa eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu nga ku makya, bibeere evvumbe eddungi lye nsiima Nze Mukama." 
Exodus29:42 Mu mirembe gyonna egijja, ekitambiro kino ekyokebwa, kinaaweebwangayo mu maaso gange, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu. Awo we nnaabasisinkaniranga okwogera nammwe." 
Exodus29:43 Awo we nnaasisinkaniranga Abayisirayeli, era ekitiibwa kyange kinaatukuzanga Eweema." 
Exodus29:44 Nditukuza Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, era nditukuza alutaari. Era nditukuza Arooni ne batabani be, okumpeerezanga mu bwakabona." 
Exodus29:45 Nnaabeeranga mu Bayisirayeli, era nnaabanga Katonda waabwe." 
Exodus29:46 Balimanya nga Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, eyabaggya mu nsi ey'e Misiri, ndyoke mbeerenga mu bo. Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
Exodus30:1 “Olikola alutaari ey'okwoterezangako obubaane. Oligikola nga ya muti ogwa akasiya. 
Exodus30:2 Eryenkanankana enjuyi zonna: sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano obuwanvu, ne sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano obugazi, ate sentimita kyenda obugulumivu. Amayembe gaayo galiba ga muti gwe gumu ng'ogwayo." 
Exodus30:3 Olibikka zaabu omulungi kungulu waayo, ne ku njuyi zaayo ennya, ne ku mayembe gaayo, era oligikolako engule eya zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus30:4 Olikolako empeta bbiri eza zaabu, n'oziteeka wansi w'engule, ku njuyi zaayo ebbiri, okusiba emisituliro egy'okugisitulirako." 
Exodus30:5 Olikola emisituliro egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, n'ogibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus30:6 Oliteeka alutaari eyo, mu maaso g'olutimbe oluli okumpi n'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, mu maaso g'entebe ey'obusaasizi, kwe nnaasisinkaniranga naawe." 
Exodus30:7 Arooni bw'ajjanga buli nkya okulongoosa ettaala, anaayoterezanga ku alutaari eyo obubaane obw'akawoowo." 
Exodus30:8 Era anaabwoterezanga, bw'anaakoleezanga ettaala akawungeezi. Obubaane bunaanyookeranga mu maaso gange, nze Mukama, obutasalako mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egijja." 
Exodus30:9 “Ku alutaari eyo, temwoterezengako bubaane obutakkirizibwa, oba okuweerako ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, wadde ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, era temuugiyiwengako kiweebwayo ekinywebwa." 
Exodus30:10 Omulundi gumu buli mwaka, Arooni anaakolanga omukolo ogw'okutukuza alutaari, ng'ateeka ku mayembe gaayo omusaayi gw'ensolo ettibwa olw'okusonyiyisa ebibi. Kino kinaakolebwanga buli mwaka mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egijja. Alutaari eyo entukuvu ennyo, yange Nze Mukama.”" 
Exodus30:11 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus30:12 “Bw'onoobalanga abantu ba Yisirayeli okumanya bwe benkana obungi, buli muntu abalibwa anaasasulanga Nze Mukama ensimbi, okununula obulamu bwe, balyoke baleme kuttibwa kawumpuli nga babalibwa." 
Exodus30:13 Buli muntu anaamalanga okubalibwa, anaawanga ekitundu kimu kyakubiri ekya sekeli, omuwendo ogwagerekebwa okusasulwanga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Anantoneranga ensimbi ezo ng'ekirabo." 
Exodus30:14 Buli muntu awezezza emyaka amakumi abiri oba okusingawo, anaamalanga okubalibwa, anampanga omuwendo gw'ensimbi ogwo." 
Exodus30:15 Omugagga taasasulenga zisingawo bungi, n'omwavu taasasulenga zitawera kitundu kimu kyakubiri ekya sekeli, nga bawaayo ensimbi ezo olw'okubasonyiyisa." 
Exodus30:16 Olikuŋŋaanya ensimbi ezo, Abayisirayeli ze bawaddeyo olw'okubasonyiyisa, n'ozikozesa emirimu egy'omu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu. Ensimbi ezo, zinaasasulwanga olw'okubasonyiyisa, era zinaabanga ekijjukizo mu maaso gange, Nze Mukama.”" 
Exodus30:17 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus30:18 “Olikola ebbenseni ey'ekikomo, ebe n'ekikondo eky'ekikomo, ogiteeke wakati wa alutaari n'Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, era ogiteekemu amazzi." 
Exodus30:19 Arooni ne batabani be, be banaanaabirangamu engalo zaabwe n'ebigere byabwe." 
Exodus30:20 Bwe banaabanga bagenda okuyingira mu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, oba nga bagenda okusemberera alutaari, kwe bampeerereza ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, banaanaabanga amazzi, baleme okufa." 
Exodus30:21 Banaanaabanga engalo zaabwe n'ebigere byabwe, baleme okufa. Kino kye kiragiro, bo ne bazzukulu baabwe kye banaakuumanga ennaku zonna.”" 
Exodus30:22 Mukama era n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus30:23 “Ddira ebyakawoowo ebisinga obulungi: kilo mukaaga eza mirra ow'amazzi ne kilo ssatu eza kinnamooni awunya obulungi, ne kilo ssatu eza kaani," 
Exodus30:24 ne kilo mukaaga eza kassiya, mu bipimo ebitongole eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ne lita nnya ez'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti," 
Exodus30:25 obikolemu omuzigo omutukuvu ogw'okusiiganga, ogutabuddwa ng'ebyakawoowo." 
Exodus30:26 Oligusiiga ku Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu ne ku Ssanduuko ey'Endagaano," 
Exodus30:27 ne ku mmeeza, ne ku bintu byayo byonna, ne ku kikondo ky'ettaala, ne ku bintu byakyo, ne ku kyoterezo ky'obubaane," 
Exodus30:28 ne ku alutaari ey'okwokerangako ebiweebwayo, ne ku bintu byayo byonna, ne ku bbenseni, ne ku kikondo kyayo." 
Exodus30:29 Ebintu ebyo olibitukuza bibe ebitukuvu ennyo, buli ekinaabikoonangako, kinaabeeranga kitukuvu." 
Exodus30:30 Era olifuka omuzigo ku Arooni ne batabani be n'obatukuza, okumpeerezanga mu bwakabona." 
Exodus30:31 Oligamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omuzigo guno omutukuvu, gunaabeeranga gwa kufuka ku byange mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egijja." 
Exodus30:32 Teguufukibwenga ku bantu ba bulijjo, era temuukolenga gugufaanana, nga mugutabula mu ngeri ye emu. Gwo mutukuvu, era gunaabeeranga mutukuvu gye muli." 
Exodus30:33 Buli alitabula ogugufaanana, oba buli aligukozesa ku muntu atasaanidde, aliba takyabalirwa mu bantu bange.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Ddira ebyakawoowo akalungi sitakite ne onika, ne galibanumu, awamu n'obubaane obulungi, byonna nga byenkana obuzito," 
Exodus30:35 obikolemu ekyokwoteza nga kitabuddwa ng'ebikolebwa omutabuzi w'obuwoowo. Kitabulemu omunnyo, okukikuuma nga kirongoofu era kitukuvu." 
Exodus30:36 Olikitoolako ekitundu n'okisekulasekula nnyo, n'okiteeka mu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano. Ekyokwoteza ekyo, kinaabeeranga kitukuvu nnyo gye ndi." 
Exodus30:37 Ekyokwoteza ekyo ky'olikola, temukyekoleranga mmwe, nga mukitabula mu ngeri ye emu. Kinaabeeranga kitukuvu gye ndi, ekyawuliddwa Nze Mukama." 
Exodus30:38 Buli anaakolanga ekikifaanana, okukikozesa ng'ekyakawoowo, aliba takyabalirwa mu bantu bange.”" 
Exodus31:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus31:2 “Nnonze Bezaleeli, mutabani wa Wuuri, era muzzukulu wa Huri ow'omu Kika kya Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Era mmujjuzizza mwoyo wange. Mmuwadde amagezi n'okutegeera, n'okumanya okukola emirimu egya buli ngeri:" 
Exodus31:4 okutetenkanya eby'okukola mu zaabu, ne mu ffeeza, ne mu kikomo;" 
Exodus31:5 okusala amayinja ag'omuwendo ag'okuwanga, okwola emiti, n'okukola emirimu egya buli ngeri." 
Exodus31:6 Era nnonze Aholiyaabu, mutabani wa Ahisamaki ow'omu Kika kya Daani, okukola awamu naye. Era abakozi bonna mbawadde amagezi, balyoke basobole okukola byonna bye mbalagidde:" 
Exodus31:7 Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, entebe ey'obusaasizi egiriko, n'ebintu byonna eby'omu Weema," 
Exodus31:8 emmeeza n'ebintu byayo, ekikondo ky'ettaala ekya zaabu omulungi, n'ebintu byakyo byonna, n'ekyoterezo ky'obubaane;" 
Exodus31:9 alutaari ey'okwokerako ebiweebwayo, era n'ebintu byayo byonna, ebbenseni n'ekikondo kyayo," 
Exodus31:10 ebyambalo ebikoleddwa obulungi, era ebitukuvu ebya Arooni ne batabani be, bye bambala nga baweereza mu bwakabona;" 
Exodus31:11 omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'obubaane obuwunya akawoowo, eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ebintu ebyo byonna, balibikola nga bwe nkulagidde.”" 
Exodus31:12 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Exodus31:13 okutegeeza Abayisirayeli nti: “Mukuumanga Sabbaato, olunaku olw'okuwummula, kubanga ke kabonero wakati wange nammwe mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egijja, okubalaga mmwe nti Nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Exodus31:14 Mukuumanga Sabbaato, kubanga lunaku lwammwe lutukuvu. Buli ataalukuumenga, n'amala alukolerako emirimu, alittibwa." 
Exodus31:15 Ennaku mukaaga ze zinaakolerwangako emirimu. Naye olunaku olw'omusanvu, lunaku lukulu, lwa kuwummula, lwawuliddwa Nze Mukama. Buli akola emirimu ku Sabbaato, alittibwa." 
Exodus31:16 Abayisirayeli kyebanaavanga bakuuma Sabbaato, nga ke kabonero ak'endagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Exodus31:17 Ke kabonero wakati wange n'Abayisirayeli ennaku zonna, kubanga Nze Mukama, nakola eggulu n'ensi mu nnaku mukaaga, ku lunaku olw'omusanvu ne ndekera awo okukola, ne mpummula.”" 
Exodus31:18 Katonda bwe yamala okwogera ne Musa ku Lusozi Sinaayi, n'amuwa ebipande ebibiri eby'amayinja, Katonda yennyini bye yawandiikako ebiragiro." 
Exodus32:1 Awo abantu bwe baalaba nga Musa aluddewo okukka okuva ku lusozi, ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Arooni, ne bamugamba nti: “Tetumanyi kyatuuka ku Musa, eyatuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Kale tukolere balubaale abanaatukulemberangamu.”" 
Exodus32:2 Arooni n'abagamba nti: “Muggyeeko empeta eza zaabu eziri ku matu ga bakazi bammwe, n'ag'abaana bammwe ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala, muzindeetere.”" 
Exodus32:3 Awo abantu bonna ne baggyako empeta zaabwe eza zaabu ezaali ku matu gaabwe, ne bazireetera Arooni." 
Exodus32:4 N'azibaggyako, n'azisaanuusa, zaabu n'amuyiwa mu lutiba, n'akolamu ennyana. Abantu ne bagamba nti: “Yisirayeli, bano be balubaale abaakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:5 Arooni bwe yalaba ennyana eyo, n'azimba alutaari mu maaso gaayo, n'alangirira nti: “Enkya wanaabeerawo embaga okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa.”" 
Exodus32:6 Enkeera ne bazuukuka mu makya, ne bawaayo ebitambiro eby'okwokya, n'ebirala ebiriirwa awamu olw'okutabagana. Abantu ne batuula ne balya era ne banywa, ne basituka okuzina." 
Exodus32:7 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Serengeta oddeyo, kubanga abantu bo, be waggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, boonoonye." 
Exodus32:8 Bavudde mangu mu kkubo lye nabalagira okutambulirangamu. Beekoledde ennyana mu zaabu, ne bagiwa ebitambiro, ne bagamba nti: ‘Yisirayeli, bano be balubaale abaakuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Abantu bano mbalabye nga ba mitima mikakanyavu. 
Exodus32:10 Kale kaakano ndeka, mbamalireko obusungu bwange, era mbazikirize. Naye ggwe, ndikufuula eggwanga eddene.”" 
Exodus32:11 Naye Musa ne yeegayirira Mukama Katonda we, n'agamba nti: “Mukama lwaki omalira obusungu bwo ku bantu bo, be waggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ng'okozesa amaanyi amangi era n'obuyinza?" 
Exodus32:12 Lwaki okuleka Abamisiri okugamba nti: ‘Yabaggya mu Misiri, ng'agenderedde okubattira mu nsozi, n'okubasaanyizaawo ddala ku nsi?’ Leka obusungu bwo obukambwe. Weerowooze, oleme kutuusa kabi ako ku bantu bo." 
Exodus32:13 Jjukira abaweereza bo Aburahamu ne Yisaaka ne Yakobo, ggwe wennyini be weerayirira n'ogamba nti: ‘Ndibawa abazzukulu bangi ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu, n'ensi eno yonna gye mbasuubizza mmwe, ndigiwa bazzukulu bammwe, ebe yaabwe emirembe gyonna!’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Mukama ne yeerowooza, n'atatuusa ku bantu be kabi, ke yali agambye okubatuusaako." 
Exodus32:15 Musa n'avaayo, n'aserengeta okuva ku lusozi, ng'akutte mu ngalo ze, ebipande by'amayinja ebibiri, ebiwandiikiddwako ebiragiro ku njuyi zaabyo zombi." 
Exodus32:16 Katonda yennyini ye yakola ebipande ebyo eby'amayinja, era ye yawandiika ebiragiro ng'abyolako." 
Exodus32:17 Yoswa bwe yawulira abantu nga baleekaana, n'agamba Musa nti: “Mpulira abantu mu lusiisira, nga baleekaana ng'abalwana.”" 
Exodus32:18 Musa n'agamba nti: “Eryo si ddoboozi ly'abaleekaana olw'obuwanguzi oba ery'abakaaba olw'okuwangulwa naye ddoboozi ly'abayimba lye mpulira.” 
Exodus32:19 Musa bwe yasemberera olusiisira, n'alaba ennyana n'abazina, n'asunguwala nnyo, n'akasuka ebipande by'amayinja bye yali akutte mu ngalo ze, n'abyasiza wansi w'olusozi." 
Exodus32:20 N'addira ennyana gye baali bakoze, n'agisaanuusa n'omuliro, n'agisekulasekula, n'efuuka ng'enfuufu, n'agitabula mu mazzi, n'aginywesa Abayisirayeli." 
Exodus32:21 N'agamba Arooni nti: “Abantu bano baakukola ki, olyoke obaleke okukola ekibi ekyenkanidde awo obunene?”" 
Exodus32:22 Arooni n'addamu nti: “Mukama wange, tonsunguwalira, omanyi ng'abantu bano bulijjo balowooza kukola bibi." 
Exodus32:23 Baŋŋamba nti: ‘Tukolere balubaale abanaatukulemberamu, kubanga tetumanyi kyatuuka ku Musa, eyatuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri.’" 
Exodus32:24 Nze ne mbagamba nti: ‘Buli alina zaabu amuleete.’ Ne bamumpa, ne mmuteeka mu muliro, ne muvaamu ennyana eno.”" 
Exodus32:25 Awo Musa bwe yalaba nga Arooni alese abantu okujeema ne basekererwa abalabe baabwe," 
Exodus32:26 n'ayimirira mu mulyango gw'olusiisira, n'agamba nti: “Buli ali ku ludda lwa Mukama ajje gye ndi.” Abaleevi bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira w'ali." 
Exodus32:27 N'abagamba nti: “Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Buli omu ku mmwe akwate ekitala kye, ayiteeyite mu lusiisira, okuva ku mulyango ogumu, okutuuka ku mulyango omulala, atte baganda be ne mikwano gye, ne baliraanwa be.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Abaleevi ne bakola nga Musa bwe yalagira: ne batta abantu ng'enkumi ssatu ku lunaku olwo. 
Exodus32:29 Musa n'agamba Abaleevi nti: “Olwaleero mwewaddeyo okuweereza Mukama, wadde nga mufiiriddwa abaana bammwe ne baganda bammwe, Mukama alyoke abawe mmwe omukisa.”" 
Exodus32:30 Enkeera Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mukoze ekibi kinene nnyo! Kaakano ka nnyambuke eri Mukama, oboolyawo nnaabafunira ekisonyiwo olw'ekibi kyammwe.”" 
Exodus32:31 Awo Musa n'addayo eri Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Kitalo! Abantu bano bakoze ekibi kinene nnyo: beekoledde balubaale aba zaabu." 
Exodus32:32 Nkwegayiridde, basonyiwe ekibi kyabwe. Naye bw'otoobasonyiwe, nsangula mu kitabo mwe wawandiika abantu bo.”" 
Exodus32:33 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Buli akoze ekibi mu maaso gange, gwe nnaasangula mu kitabo kyange." 
Exodus32:34 Kaakano genda, otwale abantu mu kifo kye nakutegeezaako. Kale malayika wange anaakukulemberanga. Naye ekiseera kijja kutuuka mbonereze abantu bano olw'ekibi kyabwe.”" 
Exodus32:35 Mukama n'abonereza abantu, kubanga baasinza ennyana, Arooni gye yakola." 
Exodus33:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Ggwe n'abantu be waggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, muve mu kifo kino, muyingire mu nsi gye nalayirira Aburahamu, Yisaaka ne Yakobo, nga ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ndigiwa bazzukulu bammwe.’" 
Exodus33:2 Ndituma malayika wange okubakulemberamu mmwe, era ndigigobamu Abakanaani, n'Abaamori, n'Abahiiti, n'Abaperizi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Muyingire mu nsi engagga era engimu. Naye nze sijja kugenda wamu nammwe, sikulwa nga mbazikiririza mu kkubo, kubanga muli bantu ba mitima mikakanyavu.”" 
Exodus33:4 Abantu bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo ebinakuwaza ne banakuwala, ne wataba n'omu ayambala bya kwewoomya." 
Exodus33:5 Mukama yagamba Musa nti: “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Muli bantu ba mitima mikakanyavu. Mbeera kugenda nammwe wadde akaseera akatono, nandibazikirizza. Kale kaakano mweyambulemu eby'okwewoomya, ndyoke ndabe kye nnaabakolera.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Abayisirayeli bwe baamala okuva ku Lusozi Horebu, tebaddamu kwambala bya kwewoomya." 
Exodus33:7 Abayisirayeli buli lwe baasiisiranga, Musa yatwalanga Eweema Entukuvu, n'agisimba walako ebweru w'olusiisira. Yagituuma Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Era buli muntu eyayagalanga okwebuuza ku Mukama, yagendanga gy'eri, ebweru w'olusiisira." 
Exodus33:8 Musa buli lwe yafulumanga olusiisira okulaga mu Weema eyo, abantu bonna baasitukanga, ne bayimirira ku mulyango gw'eweema zaabwe, ne batunuulira Musa, okutuusa lwe yamalanga okuyingiramu." 
Exodus33:9 Musa bwe yamalanga okuyingira mu Weema Entukuvu, empagi ey'ekire yakkanga, n'eyimirira ku mulyango gw'Eweema eyo, Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu bonna bwe baalabanga empagi ey'ekire ng'eyimiridde ku mulyango gw'Eweema Entukuvu, nga basituka, ne basinziza ku miryango gy'eweema zaabwe." 
Exodus33:11 Mukama n'ayogeranga ne Musa butereevu, ng'omuntu bw'ayogera ne mukwano gwe. Oluvannyuma Musa yaddangayo mu lusiisira. Naye omuweereza we, omuvubuka Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuuni, yasigalanga mu Weema Entukuvu." 
Exodus33:12 Musa n'agamba Mukama nti: “Kale oŋŋamba nti: ‘Twala abantu bano.’ Naye n'otombuulira gw'onootuma wamu nange, ate nga wagamba nti ommanyi bulungi, era nsiimibwa mu maaso go." 
Exodus33:13 Kale kaakano, nkwegayiridde, oba nga nsiimibwa mu maaso go, ntegeeza by'oyagala nkole, ndyoke nkuweereze, nnyongere okusiimibwa mu maaso go. Era jjukira ng'eggwanga lino bantu bo.”" 
Exodus33:14 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Nja kugenda wamu naawe, oleme okweraliikirira.”" 
Exodus33:15 Musa n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe bw'otogenda wamu nange, totuleka kuva wano," 
Exodus33:16 kubanga balimanya batya nti nze n'abantu bo, tusiimibwa mu maaso go, bw'otogenda wamu naffe? Ggwe okubeera awamu naffe, kye kinaatwawulanga mu bantu abalala bonna ku nsi.”" 
Exodus33:17 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Nja kukola nga bw'osabye, kubanga nkumanyi bulungi, era osiimibwa mu maaso gange.”" 
Exodus33:18 Musa n'asaba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, ndaga ku kitiibwa kyo.”" 
Exodus33:19 Mukama n'addamu nti: “Nja kuyita mu maaso go, olabe obulungi bwange bwonna, era nja kwatulira mu maaso go erinnya lyange: Nze MUKAMA. Nkwatirwa ekisa oyo gwe mba njagadde okukwatirwa ekisa, era nsaasira oyo gwe mba njagadde okusaasira.”" 
Exodus33:20 Era n'agamba nti: “Naye toyinza kundaba mu maaso, kubanga tewali muntu ayinza kundaba, n'aba omulamu." 
Exodus33:21 Naye waliwo ekifo ekiri okumpi nange, w'onooyimirira ku jjinja." 
Exodus33:22 Bwe nnaaba mpitawo mu kitiibwa kyange, nja kukuteeka mu mwagaanya oguli mu jjinja, nkubikkeko ekibatu kyange, okutuusa nga mmaze okuyitawo," 
Exodus33:23 olwo nja kuggyawo ekibatu kyange, olabe amabega gange. Naye tondabe mu maaso.”" 
Exodus34:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Bajja ebipande bibiri eby'amayinja, ebiri nga biri ebyasooka, nje mbiwandiikeko ebigambo ebyali ku bipande by'amayinja ebyasooka, bye wayasa." 
Exodus34:2 Enkya ku makya, obe nga weeteeseteese, oyambuke ku Lusozi Sinaayi, weeyanjule gye ndi ku ntikko yaalwo." 
Exodus34:3 Tewaba muntu ayambuka naawe, era tewaba n'omu alabikako mu bitundu byonna eby'olusozi, era tewaba endiga wadde ente eziriira mu maaso g'olusozi olwo.”" 
Exodus34:4 Musa n'abajja ebipande bibiri eby'amayinja, ebiri nga biri ebyasooka. Enkeera ku makya n'abikwata, n'ayambuka nabyo ku Lusozi Sinaayi, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus34:5 Mukama n'akkira mu kire, n'ayimirira eyo wamu naye, n'ayatula erinnya lye, MUKAMA." 
Exodus34:6 Mukama n'ayita mu maaso ga Musa n'ayatula nti: “Nze MUKAMA. Mukama, Katonda omusaasizi era ow'ekisa, alwawo okusunguwala, alina okwagala okungi n'obwesigwa," 
Exodus34:7 addiramu abantu enkumi n'enkumi, asonyiwa okwonoona, obujeemu n'ebibi, atalema kubonereza oyo azzizza omusango, era abonereza abaana n'abazzukulu, okutuusa ku bannakasatwe ne ku bannakana, olw'ebibi bya bazadde baabwe.”" 
Exodus34:8 Musa n'ayanguwa, n'akutamya omutwe gwe, n'asinza." 
Exodus34:9 N'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, oba nga ddala nsiimibwa mu maaso go, nkwegayiridde, genda wamu naffe. Abantu bano ba mitima mikakanyavu, naye tusonyiwe ebibi byaffe n'okwonoona kwaffe, era tukkirize okuba abantu bo.”" 
Exodus34:10 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Kaakano nkola endagaano n'Abayisirayeli. Mu maaso gaabwe bonna, nnaakolanga ebyamagero ebitakolebwanga mu nsi yonna, wadde mu ggwanga eddala lyonna. Era abantu bonna ababeetoolodde, banaalabanga ebikulu, Nze Mukama bye nkola, kubanga kye ndibakolera mmwe kya ntiisa." 
Exodus34:11 Mukuumenga ebyo bye mbalagira leero. Nga mmwe mutuuka, ndigobawo Abaamori, n'Abakanaani, n'Abahiiti, n'Abaperizi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Mwekuume, muleme okukola endagaano n'abantu abali mu nsi gye mulagamu, endagaano eyo ereme kubasuula mmwe mu mutego." 
Exodus34:13 Naye mulimenya alutaari zaabwe, mulizikiriza empagi zaabwe, era mulitemaatema ebifaananyi bya lubaale waabwe Asera." 
Exodus34:14 “Temuubengako mulala gwe musinza nga Katonda, kubanga Nze Mukama, ndi wa buggya, sivuganyizibwa." 
Exodus34:15 Temuukolenga ndagaano na bannansi, sikulwa nga bwe baliba bawaayo ebitambiro eri balubaale baabwe be basinza, balibayita okulya ku bitambiro ebyo." 
Exodus34:16 Era sikulwa nga muwasiza batabani bammwe abakazi mu bantu abo, abakazi ne baleetera batabani bammwe okunvaako, ne basinza balubaale baabwe." 
Exodus34:17 “Temwekolerenga balubaale mu kyuma ekisaanuuse. 
Exodus34:18 Mukuumenga Embaga ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiddwa. Ennaku musanvu mu mwezi gwa Abibu, munaalyanga migaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, nga bwe nabalagira, kubanga mu mwezi ogwo, mwe mwaviira mu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 Buli mwana ow'obulenzi omuggulanda, anaabanga wange, era ne mu nsolo zammwe, buli nnume esooka okuzaalibwa k'ebe ndiga oba nte, eneebanga yange." 
Exodus34:20 Naye endogoyi esooka okuzaalibwa, munaaginunulanga nga muwaayo omwana gw'endiga. Bwe munaabanga temwagala kuginunula, munaagimenyanga ensingo. Buli mwana ow'obulenzi omuggulanda, munaamununulanga. Tewaabenga ajja mu maaso gange ngalo nsa." 
Exodus34:21 “Mulina ennaku mukaaga ez'okukoleramu emirimu, naye ku lunaku olw'omusanvu temuukolenga mirimu, ne bwe bibanga biseera bye balimiramu oba bye bakunguliramu." 
Exodus34:22 “Mukuumanga Embaga ey'Amakungula, bwe mutandikanga okukungula ebibala byammwe ebisooka eby'eŋŋaano, era mukuumanga Embaga ey'Ensiisira, nga mutereka ebibala byammwe, ku nkomerero y'amakungula." 
Exodus34:23 “Emirundi esatu buli mwaka, abasajja bonna mu mmwe banajjanga okunsinza Nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Exodus34:24 Bwe ndimala okugoba ab'amawanga amalala nga mulaba, ne ngaziya ensalo z'ensi yammwe, tewaabenga n'omu agezaako kuwangula nsi yammwe, bwe munaabanga muzze okunsinza nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, emirundi esatu buli mwaka." 
Exodus34:25 “Ekitambiro ky'ensolo kye mumpa, temuukimpeerengako migaati gizimbulukusiddwa. Era temuukuumenga okutuusa enkeera ekitundu ky'ensolo gye mutta ku Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako." 
Exodus34:26 Muleetanga mu nnyumba ya Mukama, Katonda wammwe, ebibala by'ennimiro zammwe ebisooka okukungulwa. “Temuufumbenga mbuzi nto mu mata ga nnyina waayo.”" 
Exodus34:27 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Wandiika ebigambo ebyo, kubanga ebigambo ebyo bye neesigamizzaako endagaano gye nkoze naawe, era ne Yisirayeli.”" 
Exodus34:28 Musa n'amala eyo wamu ne Mukama ennaku amakumi ana emisana n'ekiro, nga talya era nga tanywa. N'awandiika ku bipande by'amayinja ebigambo eby'endagaano, Ebiragiro Ekkumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa bwe yakka okuva ku Lusozi Sinaayi, ng'akutte ebipande by'amayinja, ebiriko Ebiragiro Ekkumi, teyamanya nti ekyenyi kye kyali kyakaayakana, kubanga yali ayogedde ne Mukama." 
Exodus34:30 Arooni n'Abayisirayeli bonna bwe baatunula ku Musa, ne balaba ng'amaaso ge gaakaayakana, ne batya okumusemberera." 
Exodus34:31 Naye Musa n'abayita, Arooni n'abakulembeze bonna ab'ekibiina ne bagenda gy'ali, Musa n'ayogera nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Oluvannyuma Abayisirayeli bonna ne basembera w'ali. Musa n'abawa ebiragiro byonna, Mukama bye yamuweera ku Lusozi Sinaayi." 
Exodus34:33 Musa bwe yamala okwogera nabo, ne yeebikka ekitambaala mu maaso." 
Exodus34:34 Naye buli lwe yayingiranga mu Weema Entukuvu okwogera ne Mukama, nga yeggyako ekitambaala, okutuusa lwe yafulumanga. Bwe yafulumanga, n'ategeezanga Abayisirayeli byonna Mukama bye yabanga amulagidde okwogera." 
Exodus34:35 Abayisirayeli baalabanga ekyenyi kye nga kyakaayakana. Olwo Musa ne yeebikkanga ekitambaala mu maaso, okutuusa lwe yayingiranga okwogera ne Mukama." 
Exodus35:1 Musa n'ayita ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli. Ne bakuŋŋaana, n'abagamba nti: “Bino Mukama by'abalagidde mmwe okukola." 
Exodus35:2 Ennaku omukaaga ze zinaakolerwangamu emirimu, naye olunaku olw'omusanvu lunaabanga lunaku lwammwe, lukulu lwa kuwummula, oluweereddwayo eri Mukama. Buli anaakolanga omulimu ku lunaku olwo, anattibwanga." 
Exodus35:3 Temuukumenga muliro mu nnyumba zammwe ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato.” 
Exodus35:4 Musa n'agamba ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli nti: “Kino Mukama ky'alagidde. 
Exodus35:5 Muweeyo ekirabo eri Mukama. Buli alina omutima omugabi, aleetere Mukama ekirabo: zaabu, ffeeza n'ekikomo," 
Exodus35:6 olugoye olulungi olweru, n'olwa bbululu, n'olwa kakobe, n'olumyufu, n'olukoleddwa mu byoya by'embuzi;" 
Exodus35:7 amaliba g'endiga amannyike amamyufu, n'amaliba g'embuzi, omuti ogwa akasiya," 
Exodus35:8 amafuta g'ettaala, ebyakawoowo ebitabulwa mu muzigo ogusiigibwa, ne mu bubaane obw'okunyookeza;" 
Exodus35:9 amayinja ag'omuwendo agayitibwa onika, n'amayinja amalala ag'omuwendo, ag'okuwunda ku kkanzu ne ku kyambalo eky'omu kifuba, ebya ssaabakabona." 
Exodus35:10 “Buli mukozi omukugu mu mmwe, ajje akole byonna Mukama by'alagidde:" 
Exodus35:11 Eweema Entukuvu n'eky'okubikkako, amalobo gaayo n'embaawo zaayo, emikiikiro gyayo, n'ebikondo byayo, n'ebinnya byayo;" 
Exodus35:12 Essanduuko ey'Endagaano n'emisituliro gyayo, n'entebe ey'obusaasizi, n'olutimbe olwawulamu;" 
Exodus35:13 emmeeza n'emisituliro gyayo, n'ebintu byayo byonna, n'emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda," 
Exodus35:14 ekikondo ky'ettaala n'ebintu byakyo, ettaala zaakyo n'amafuta g'ettaala;" 
Exodus35:15 n'ekyoterezo ky'obubaane n'emisituliro gyakyo, omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'obubaane obw'akawoowo, n'olutimbe olw'omu mulyango gw'Eweema Entukuvu," 
Exodus35:16 alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo, era n'ekitindiro kyayo eky'ekikomo; n'emisituliro gyayo, n'ebintu byayo byonna; ebbenseni ne ky'etuulako;" 
Exodus35:17 entimbe ez'okutimba oluggya, n'ebikondo byalwo n'ebinnya byabyo, n'olutimbe olw'omu mulyango gw'oluggya;" 
Exodus35:18 enkondo ez'Eweema Entukuvu, n'ez'oluggya, n'emiguwa gyabyo;" 
Exodus35:19 n'ebyambalo ebirungi ebya bakabona, eby'okuweererezaamu mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ebyo bye byambalo ebitukuvu, Arooni ne batabani be bye bambala nga baweereza mu bwakabona.”" 
Exodus35:20 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kiva mu maaso ga Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Buli muntu eyayagala, n'aleetera Mukama ekirabo, olw'omulimu ogw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'okukola ebyetaagibwa mu yo, era n'okukola ebyambalo bya bakabona." 
Exodus35:22 Abasajja n'abakazi bonna abaayagala, ne baleeta ebikwaso, empeta ez'oku matu n'ez'oku ngalo, emikuufu egy'omu bulago, n'eby'omuwendo byonna ebya zaabu, ne babiwaayo eri Mukama." 
Exodus35:23 Buli muntu eyalina olugoye olulungi olweru, olwa bbululu, olwa kakobe, olumyufu, n'olukoleddwa mu byoya by'embuzi; amaliba g'endiga amannyike amamyufu, n'amaliba g'embuzi; n'abireeta." 
Exodus35:24 Buli muntu eyasobola okuwaayo ekirabo ekya ffeeza oba eky'ekikomo, n'akireetera Mukama. Buli muntu eyalina omuti ogwa akasiya oguyinza okukozesebwa ku mulimu, n'aguleeta." 
Exodus35:25 Abakazi bonna abamanyi eby'emikono, ne baleeta engoye eza bbululu, n'eza kakobe, n'Emmyufu, n'enjeru, ze baakola." 
Exodus35:26 Era ne bakola engoye mu byoya by'embuzi. 
Exodus35:27 Abakulembeze ne baleeta amayinja ag'omuwendo agayitibwa onika n'amalala ag'okuwunda ku kkanzu ne ku kyambalo eky'omu kifuba. 
Exodus35:28 Ne baleeta n'ebyakawoowo, n'amafuta, eby'okuteeka mu ttaala, ne mu muzigo ogw'okusiigibwa, ne mu bubaane obuwunya obulungi." 
Exodus35:29 Abayisirayeli bonna abasajja n'abakazi abaayagala okubaako bye baleeta ebyetaagibwa ku mulimu, Mukama gwe yalagira Musa okukola, ne babireetera Mukama, awatali kuwalirizibwa." 
Exodus35:30 Musa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Mukama alonze Bezaleeli, mutabani wa Wuuri, era muzzukulu wa Huri, ow'omu Kika kya Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Katonda amujjuzizza mwoyo we, era amuwadde amagezi n'okutegeera, era n'okumanya okukola emirimu egya buli ngeri," 
Exodus35:32 n'okutetenkanya eby'okukola mu zaabu ne mu ffeeza ne mu kikomo; 
Exodus35:33 n'okusala amayinja ag'omuwendo ag'okuwanga, n'okwola emiti, n'okukola emirimu egy'amagezi egya buli ngeri." 
Exodus35:34 Mukama amuwadde ye, ne Oholiyaabu, mutabani wa Ahisamaki, ow'omu Kika kya Daani, amagezi okuyigiriza abalala." 
Exodus35:35 Abawadde amagezi okukola emirimu egya buli ngeri, egikolebwa abasazi b'amayinja n'abayiiya; n'abalusi b'engoye ennungi eza bbululu, n'eza kakobe, n'Emmyufu, n'engoye endala. Basobola okukola emirimu gyonna egya buli ngeri, era n'okuyiiya eby'amagezi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezaleeli ne Oholiyaabu n'abakozi abalala, Mukama b'awadde amagezi n'okutegeera, era abamanyi okukola buli kintu ekyetaagibwa okuzimba Eweema Entukuvu, bajja kukola byonna nga Mukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Exodus36:2 Musa n'ayita Bezaleeli ne Oholiyaabu n'abalala bonna abakugu, Mukama be yawa amagezi abaali baagala okukola." 
Exodus36:3 Musa n'abakwasa ebirabo byonna, Abayisirayeli bye baaleeta okuzimba Eweema Entukuvu. Era abantu ne bongera buli nkya okuleetera Musa ebiweebwayo, awatali kuwalirizibwa." 
Exodus36:4 Awo abakugu bonna abaali ku mulimu ogw'okuzimba Eweema Entukuvu, ne bavaayo," 
Exodus36:5 ne bagamba Musa nti: “Abantu baleeta bingi, ebisukkiridde ku byetaagibwa okumala omulimu, Mukama gwe yalagira okukola.”" 
Exodus36:6 Musa n'alagira ne balangirira mu lusiisira lwonna nti: “Abasajja n'abakazi balekere awo okuwaayo eby'okukola ku Weema Entukuvu.” Abantu ne bayimirizibwa okuleeta ebintu," 
Exodus36:7 kubanga ebyali bireeteddwa, byali bingi okusinga ebyali byetaagibwa okumaliriza omulimu gwonna." 
Exodus36:8 Abakozi abaali basingira ddala okumanya omulimu, be baakola Eweema Entukuvu. Baagikola mu mitanda kkumi egikoleddwa mu lugoye olulungi, olulukiddwa mu langi eya bbululu n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, ne bagitungako bakerubi." 
Exodus36:9 Emitanda gyonna gyali gyenkanankana: nga buli gumu gwa mita kkumi na bbiri obuwanvu, mita bbiri obugazi." 
Exodus36:10 Emitanda etaano ne bagigatta gyokka, n'emitanda emirala etaano ne bagigatta gyokka." 
Exodus36:11 Ne bakola eŋŋango ez'olugoye olwa bbululu ku lukugiro lwa buli mutanda ogw'oku mabbali w'emitanda emigatte. 
Exodus36:12 Ne bateeka eŋŋango amakumi ataano ku lukugiro lw'omutanda ogw'oku mabbali ku buli mitanda emigatte, eŋŋango ez'oludda olumu nga zitunuuliraganye n'ez'oludda olulala." 
Exodus36:13 Ne bakola ebikwaso amakumi ataano ebya zaabu, ne bagatta wamu emitanda gyombi, ne bakolamu Eweema Entukuvu emu." 
Exodus36:14 Ate ne bakola eweema ya mitanda kkumi na gumu, egy'olugoye olukoleddwa mu byoya by'embuzi, ebikke ku Weema Entukuvu." 
Exodus36:15 Emitanda ekkumi n'ogumu gyali gyenkanankana: nga buli gumu gwa mita kkumi na ssatu obuwanvu, ne mita bbiri obugazi." 
Exodus36:16 Emitanda etaano ne bagigatta wamu gyokka. 
Exodus36:17 Ne bakola eŋŋango amakumi ataano ku lukugiro lw'omutanda ogw'oku mabbali, ku buli mitanda emigatte." 
Exodus36:18 Ne bakola ebikwaso amakumi ataano eby'ekikomo, bigatte Eweema ebeere emu." 
Exodus36:19 Ne bakolayo n'eby'okubikka ku Weema ebirala bibiri: ekimu nga kya maliba ga ndiga eza sseddume, amannyike amamyufu, n'ekirala ekyokungulu, nga kya maliba ga mbuzi." 
Exodus36:20 Ne bakola embaawo z'Eweema Entukuvu ez'obusimba, ez'omuti ogwa akasiya." 
Exodus36:21 Buli lubaawo lwali lwa mita nnya obuwanvu, ne sentimita nkaaga mu mukaaga obugazi;" 
Exodus36:22 nga luliko ennimi bbiri, embaawo kwe zisobola okugattirwa." 
Exodus36:23 Baakola embaawo amakumi abiri, ez'oludda olw'ebukiikaddyo." 
Exodus36:24 Era ne bakola ebinnya amakumi ana ebya ffeeza wansi waazo, ebinnya bibiri wansi wa buli lubaawo, omw'okuteeka ennimi zaalwo ebbiri." 
Exodus36:25 Ne bakola embaawo amakumi abiri ez'oludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'Eweema Entukuvu," 
Exodus36:26 n'ebinnya amakumi ana ebya ffeeza, ebinnya bibiri wansi wa buli lubaawo." 
Exodus36:27 Ez'oku ludda olw'Eweema Entukuvu olw'emabega mu bugwanjuba, ne bakola embaawo mukaaga," 
Exodus36:28 n'embaawo bbiri ez'omu nsonda. 
Exodus36:29 Ezo zombi baazigatta okuva wansi okutuukira ddala waggulu, ne bazisiba n'empeta emu. Bwe batyo bwe baakola embaawo zombi ez'omu nsonda ebbiri." 
Exodus36:30 Zaali embaawo munaana n'ebinnya byazo kkumi na mukaaga, bibiri wansi wa buli lubaawo." 
Exodus36:31 Era baakola emikiikiro kkumi n'etaano egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, etaano ku mbaawo ez'oku ludda olumu olw'Eweema Entukuvu," 
Exodus36:32 etaano ku mbaawo ez'oku ludda olw'emabega olw'ebugwanjuba. 
Exodus36:33 Omukiikiro ogwa wakati w'embaawo baaguyisaamu erudda n'erudda. 
Exodus36:34 Embaawo ne bazibikkako zaabu, era ne baziteekako empeta eza zaabu, ez'okusiba emikiikiro, era nagyo ne bagibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ne bakola olutimbe mu lugoye olulungi, olulukiddwa mu langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, ne balutungako bakerubi." 
Exodus36:36 Ne bakola empagi nnya ez'omuti ogwa akasiya, okuwanirira olutimbe, ne bazibikkako zaabu, era ne baziteekako amalobo aga zaabu. Ne bazikolera ebinnya bina ebya ffeeza." 
Exodus36:37 Omulyango oguyingira mu Weema Entukuvu ne bagukolera olutimbe, mu lugoye olulungi, olulukiddwa mu langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, era olutungiddwako omudalizo." 
Exodus36:38 Olutimbe olwo ne balukolera empagi ttaano. Amalobo gaazo n'emitwe gyazo, n'emiziziko gyazo, ne babibikkako zaabu. Ne bazikolera ebinnya bitaano eby'ekikomo." 
Exodus37:1 Bezaleeli n'akola essanduuko ey'omuti ogwa akasiya, sentimita kikumi mu kkumi obuwanvu, sentimita nkaaga mu mukaaga obugazi, ne sentimita nkaaga mu mukaaga obugulumivu." 
Exodus37:2 Munda ne kungulu n'agibikkako zaabu omulungi, n'agikolako omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus37:3 N'agikolera empeta nnya eza zaabu, n'azisiba ku magulu gaayo ana, ng'ebbiri ziri ku ludda lwayo olumu, n'endala bbiri ku ludda lwayo olulala." 
Exodus37:4 N'akola emisituliro egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, n'agibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus37:5 N'agiyingiza mu mpeta ku buli ludda olw'essanduuko. 
Exodus37:6 N'addira zaabu omulungi, n'akolamu entebe ey'obusaasizi, ya sentimita kikumi mu kkumi obuwanvu, ne sentimita nkaaga mu mukaaga obugazi." 
Exodus37:7 N'akola n'abakerubi babiri aba zaabu omuweese, n'abateeka ku nsonda zombi ez'entebe ey'obusaasizi:" 
Exodus37:8 omu ku nsonda emu, n'omulala ku nsonda endala, ne bafuukira ddala kitundu kya ntebe ey'obusaasizi, ku nsonda zaayo zombi." 
Exodus37:9 Bakerubi baatunuuliragana, era nga batunuulidde entebe ey'obusaasizi, n'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe ebyanjuluze ne bigibikka." 
Exodus37:10 N'akola emmeeza ey'omuti ogwa akasiya, sentimita kinaana mu munaana obuwanvu, sentimita ana mu nnya obugazi, ne sentimita nkaaga mu mukaaga obugulumivu." 
Exodus37:11 N'agibikkako zaabu omulungi, n'akola ku yo omuge ogwa zaabu okugyetoolooza." 
Exodus37:12 Yagikolako omukugiro gwa milimita nsanvu mu ttaano okugyetoolooza. Ne ku lukugiro n'akolako omuge ogwa zaabu okulwetoolooza. 
Exodus37:13 N'agikolera empeta nnya eza zaabu, n'aziteeka ku nsonda zaayo ennya, awali amagulu gaayo." 
Exodus37:14 Empeta ezo, ez'okuteekamu emisituliro gy'emmeeza, n'aziteeka kumpi n'omukugiro." 
Exodus37:15 N'akola emisituliro egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, n'agibikkako zaabu, emmeeza esitulirwenga ku gyo." 
Exodus37:16 N'akola ebikozesebwa ku mmeeza: essowaani n'ensaniya ez'okuteekako obubaane, ensuwa n'ebikopo eby'okukozesanga ku biweebwayo ebinywebwa." 
Exodus37:17 N'akola ekikondo ky'ettaala ekya zaabu omulungi. Yakola ekikolo kyakyo n'enduli yaakyo nga bya zaabu omuweese. Ebikopo byakyo n'ebituttwa byakyo n'ebimuli byakyo byali bya zaabu ye omu n'ow'ekikondo kyennyini. 
Exodus37:18 Amatabi mukaaga gaava ku njuyi zaakyo, amatabi asatu ku buli ludda." 
Exodus37:19 Buli limu ku matabi omukaaga, lyaliko ebikopo bisatu, ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'alumondi, okuli ebituttwa n'ekimuli." 
Exodus37:20 Ne ku nduli y'ekikondo ky'ettaala, kwaliko ebikopo bina, ebifaanana ng'ebimuli by'alumondi, okuli ebituttwa n'ebimuli." 
Exodus37:21 Wansi wa buli matabi abiri, ku matabi omukaaga agava ku nduli y'ekikondo ky'ettaala, waaliwo ekituttwa kimu, nga kya zaabu ye omu n'ow'ekikondo kyennyini." 
Exodus37:22 Ebituttwa n'amatabi byali bya zaabu ye omu n'ow'ekikondo kyennyini, nga kyonna awamu kya zaabu omulungi omuweese." 
Exodus37:23 Yakola ettaala musanvu ez'okuteeka ku kikondo, era n'akola ne makansi zaakyo, n'ensaniya zaakyo, nga bya zaabu omulungi." 
Exodus37:24 Yakozesa kilo amakumi asatu mu ttaano eza zaabu omulungi, okukola ekikondo ky'ettaala n'ebintu byakyo byonna." 
Exodus37:25 N'akola ekyoterezo ky'obubaane, eky'omuti ogwa akasiya. Kyali kyenkanankana ku njuyi zonna: sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano obuwanvu, ne sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano obugazi, ate sentimita kyenda obugulumivu. Amayembe gaakyo gaali ga muti gwe gumu ng'ogwakyo." 
Exodus37:26 N'abikka zaabu omulungi kungulu waakyo, ne ku njuyi zaakyo ennya, ne ku mayembe gaakyo, era n'akiteekako engule eya zaabu okukyetoolooza." 
Exodus37:27 N'akikolera empeta bbiri eza zaabu n'aziteeka wansi w'engule, ku njuyi zaakyo ebbiri, okusiba emisituliro egy'okukisitulirangako." 
Exodus37:28 N'akola emisituliro egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, n'agibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus37:29 Era n'akola omuzigo omutukuvu ogw'okusiiga, n'obubaane obulongoofu obutabuddwamu ebyakawoowo." 
Exodus38:1 N'akola alutaari ey'omuti ogwa akasiya, ey'okwokerangako ebiweebwayo. Yali yenkanankana ku njuyi zonna: mita bbiri n'ebitundu bibiri obuwanvu, ne mita bbiri n'ekitundu obugazi, ate mita emu n'ebitundu bisatu obugulumivu." 
Exodus38:2 N'akola amayembe gaayo ku nsonda zaayo ennya, nga ga muti gwe gumu n'ogwayo, n'agibikkako ekikomo." 
Exodus38:3 Era n'akola eby'okukozesanga ku alutaari: entamu, n'ebijiiko, n'ebibya, ne wuuma, n'ensaniya. Ebintu byayo byonna, n'abikola nga bya kikomo." 
Exodus38:4 N'agikolera ekitindiro ekiruke eky'ekikomo, n'akiteeka wansi w'omugo gw'alutaari, ne kibeera wakati w'obugulumivu bwayo." 
Exodus38:5 N'akola empeta nnya, n'aziteeka ku nsonda ennya ez'ekitindiro eky'ekikomo, okusiba emisituliro." 
Exodus38:6 N'akola emisituliro egy'omuti ogwa akasiya, n'agibikkako ekikomo," 
Exodus38:7 n'agiyingiza mu mpeta ku buli ludda olw'alutaari, okugisitulirangako. Alutaari yagikola nga ya mbaawo, era ng'erina ebbanga munda." 
Exodus38:8 N'akola ebbenseni ey'ekikomo n'ekikondo kyayo eky'ekikomo, ng'akozesa endabirwamu ez'abakazi abaaweerezanga ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Exodus38:9 N'akola oluggya lw'Eweema Entukuvu, n'alwetoolooza entimbe ez'olugoye olulukiddwa obulungi. Ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, entimbe zaali za mita amakumi ana mu nnya obuwanvu," 
Exodus38:10 nga ziwaniriddwa amalobo n'oluuma ebya ffeeza ku bikondo byazo amakumi abiri eby'ekikomo, ebisimbiddwa mu binnya byabyo amakumi abiri eby'ekikomo." 
Exodus38:11 Entimbe zaali kye kimu ne ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono, nga za mita amakumi ana mu nnya obuwanvu, nga ziwaniriddwa amalobo n'oluuma ebya ffeeza, ku bikondo byazo amakumi abiri eby'ekikomo, ebisimbiddwa mu binnya byabyo amakumi abiri eby'ekikomo." 
Exodus38:12 Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, entimbe zaali za mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri obuwanvu, n'ebikondo kkumi n'ebinnya kkumi, n'amalobo n'oluuma ebya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:13 Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba olwaliko omulyango, oluggya lwali lwa mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri obugazi." 
Exodus38:14 Ku buli ludda olw'omulyango waaliyo entimbe za mita mukaaga n'ebitundu mukaaga, ebikondo bisatu, n'ebinnya bisatu." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Entimbe zonna okwetooloola oluggya zaali zirukiddwa mu lugoye olulungi. 
Exodus38:17 Ebinnya by'ebikondo byali bya kikomo, ate amalobo n'oluuma n'emitwe gy'ebikondo bya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:18 Olutimbe olw'omu mulyango lwali lwa lugoye olulungi olulukiddwa mu langi eya bbululu n'eya kakobe n'Emmyufu, nga lutungiddwako omudalizo, nga lwa mita mwenda obuwanvu ne mita bbiri obugulumivu okwenkanankana n'ez'entimbe ez'oluggya." 
Exodus38:19 Lwali luwaniriddwa ku bikondo bina, ebiri mu binnya bina eby'ekikomo. Amalobo gaabyo n'emitwe gyabyo, n'oluuma lwabyo byali bya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:20 Enkondo zonna ez'eweema n'entimbe okwetooloola oluggya, zaali za kikomo." 
Exodus38:21 Luno lwe lukalala lw'ebintu ebikozesebwa mu Weema Entukuvu, eyaterekebwamu ebipande eby'amayinja, okwawandiikibwa ebiragiro ekkumi. Musa ye yalagira Abaleevi okukola olukalala olwo, nga balabirirwa Yitamaari, mutabani wa Arooni kabona." 
Exodus38:22 Bezaleeli mutabani wa Wuuri, era muzzukulu wa Huri, ow'omu Kika kya Yuda, ye yakola byonna, Mukama bye yalagira Musa." 
Exodus38:23 Era yayambibwako Oholiyaabu mutabani wa Ahisamaki, ow'omu Kika kya Daani, omusazi w'amayinja omutetenkanya, era amanyi okudaliza engoye ennungi, enjeru, n'eza bbululu, n'eza kakobe, n'Emmyufu." 
Exodus38:24 Zaabu yenna eyaweebwayo olw'omulimu ogw'okukola Eweema Entukuvu, yaweza talanta amakumi abiri mu mwenda, ne sekeli lusanvu mu asatu, mu bipimo ebitongole eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus38:25 Ate ffeeza eyava mu abo abaabalibwa mu kubalibwa kw'abantu, yaweza talanta kikumi, ne sekeli lukumi mu lusanvu mu nsanvu mu ttaano, mu bipimo ebitongole eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus38:26 Abo abeetaba mu kubalibwa kw'abantu, be bo abaali bawezezza emyaka egy'obukulu amakumi abiri n'okusingawo. Baali emitwalo nkaaga, mu enkumi ssatu, mu bitaano mu ataano. Buli omu yawangayo omuwendo ogwagerekebwa, ogwa beka emu, kye kitundu kya sekeli, mu bipimo ebitongole eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus38:27 Talanta kikumi eza ffeeza, ze zaakozesebwa okukola ebinnya ekikumi ebya Weema Entukuvu n'eby'olutimbe, talanta emu buli kinnya." 
Exodus38:28 Sekeli olukumi mu olusanvu mu ensanvu mu ettaano eza ffeeza eyasigalawo, Bezaleeli n'azikolamu obuziziko n'amalobo eby'oku bikondo, era n'azikozesa okubikka emitwe gy'ebikondo ebyo." 
Exodus38:29 Ekikomo ekyaweebwayo eri Mukama kyaweza talanta lusanvu ne sekeli enkumi bbiri mu bina. 
Exodus38:30 Ekyo kye yakozesa okukola ebinnya by'emyango egy'oluggi lw'Eweema Entukuvu, n'okukola alutaari ey'ekikomo, n'ekitindiro kyayo eky'ekikomo, n'ebintu byonna eby'oku alutaari," 
Exodus38:31 n'ebinnya okwetooloola oluggya, n'ebinnya eby'emyango egy'omulyango gw'oluggya, n'enkondo zonna okwetooloola oluggya." 
Exodus39:1 Ne bakozesa ewuzi eza langi eya bbululu n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, okukola ebyambalo ebirukiddwa obulungi, eby'okwambalibwanga bakabona, nga baweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ne bakolera Arooni ebyambalo ebitukuvu, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Ne bakola ekkanzu mu lugoye olulukiddwa obulungi n'amagezi mu wuzi eza langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, era n'eza zaabu." 
Exodus39:3 Ne baweesa zaabu, ne bamufuula ow'oluwewere, ne bamusalamu obutundu obuli ng'obuwuzi, okubutunga mu lugoye olwa bbululu n'olwa kakobe n'olumyufu, n'olweru, mu ngeri ey'amagezi." 
Exodus39:4 Ne bakola ku bibegabega by'ekkanzu obuwuzi bubiri obugatta enjuyi zaayo zombi: olw'omu maaso n'olw'emabega. 
Exodus39:5 Olukoba olulukiddwa obulungi n'amagezi mu lugoye lwe lumu nga yo, ne lutungirwa ddala ku yo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Ne bateekateeka amayinja ag'omuwendo agayitibwa onika, ne bagateeka mu mbu za fuleemu eza zaabu, nga bagoozeeko amannya ga batabani ba Yisirayeli." 
Exodus39:7 Ne bagateeka ku buwuzi obw'oku bibegabega by'ekkanzu, okujjuukirirangako batabani ba Yisirayeli, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Ne bakola ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba, mu nkola ye emu ey'amagezi nga gye baakolamu ekkanzu: mu lugoye olulukiddwa obulungi mu wuzi eza langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, era n'eza zaabu." 
Exodus39:9 Kyali kyenkanankana enjuyi zonna era nga kifunyiddwamu wabiri: sentimita amakumi abiri mu bbiri obuwanvu, ne sentimita amakumi abiri mu bbiri obugazi." 
Exodus39:10 Baakiteekamu ennyiriri nnya ez'amayinja ag'omuwendo. Olunyiriri olusooka lwali lwa sarudiyo ne topaazi ne safiro ne karubunkulo. 
Exodus39:11 Olunyiriri olwokubiri lwali lwa emeraludo ne safiro ne dayamondi. 
Exodus39:12 Olunyiriri olwokusatu lwali lwa yakinto ne agate ne ametisto. 
Exodus39:13 N'olunyiriri olwokuna lwali lwa berulo ne onika ne yasipero, nga gateekeddwa mu mbu za fuleemu eza zaabu." 
Exodus39:14 Buli limu ku mayinja ago ekkumi n'abiri, ne lyolebwako erinnya limu limu ku mannya ga batabani ba Yisirayeli, okujjukiranga ebika bya Yisirayeli ekkumi n'ebibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Ne bakola emikuufu egya zaabu omulungi, egy'oku kyambalo eky'omu kifuba, nga girangiddwa ng'emiguwa." 
Exodus39:16 Ne bakola embu bbiri eza fuleemu eza zaabu n'empeta bbiri eza zaabu. Empeta ezo ebbiri ne baziteeka ku nsonda zombi eza waggulu ez'ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba. 
Exodus39:17 Ne bateeka emikuufu gyombi egya zaabu mu mpeta ebbiri ku nsonda zombi ez'ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba. 
Exodus39:18 N'enkomerero endala ez'emikuufu gyombi, ne bazisiba ku mbu ebbiri eza fuleemu. Bwe batyo ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba ne bakigatta ku buwuzi obw'ekibegabega ky'ekkanzu, ku ludda lwayo olw'omu maaso." 
Exodus39:19 Ne bakola empeta bbiri eza zaabu, ne baziteeka ku nsonda zombi eza wansi ez'ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba, ku ludda lwakyo olwomunda, okuliraana ekkanzu." 
Exodus39:20 Ne bakola empeta endala bbiri eza zaabu, ne baziteeka ku buwuzi bwombi obw'oku bibegabega by'ekkanzu, mu kitundu kyabwo ekya wansinsi, ku ludda lw'ekkanzu olw'omu maaso, okumpi ne we yeeyasizaamu, waggulu w'olukoba olw'ekkanzu oluluke obulungi." 
Exodus39:21 Nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa, ne baddira akawuzi aka langi eya bbululu, ne basiba empeta z'ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba, ku mpeta z'ekkanzu, ekyambalo eky'omu kifuba kiryoke kibeere ku lukoba lw'ekkanzu olulukiddwa obulungi, era kireme kusumululwangako." 
Exodus39:22 Ne bakola omunagiro gw'oku kkanzu ogulukiddwa nga gwa langi ya bbululu gwonna. 
Exodus39:23 Ekituli omutwe mwe guyita, ne kinywezebwa n'olukugiro okukyetooloola, kireme kuyuzibwa." 
Exodus39:24 Ne bakola ku birenge by'omunagiro amakomamawanga ag'olugoye olulukiddwa obulungi mu langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu." 
Exodus39:25 Ne bakola n'endege eza zaabu omulungi, ne baziteeka wakati w'amakomamawanga," 
Exodus39:26 nga batobeka endege n'ekkomamawanga, n'endege n'ekkomamawanga, okwetooloola ebirenge by'omunagiro ogw'okwambalanga mu kuweereza, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Ne bakolera Arooni ne batabani be amasaati, mu lugoye olulukiddwa obulungi." 
Exodus39:28 Ne babakolera n'ekiremba eky'oku mutwe, n'enkuufiira, n'empale ennyimpi, byonna eby'engoye ezirukiddwa obulungi," 
Exodus39:29 n'olukoba olw'olugoye olulukiddwa obulungi mu langi eya bbululu, n'eya kakobe, n'Emmyufu, era okutungiddwa omudalizo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Ne bakola akapande aka zaabu omulungi, akabonero akategeeza okuweebwayo, ne bakoolako ebigambo bino nti: “AWEEREDDWAYO ERI MUKAMA.”" 
Exodus39:31 Ne bakasiba n'akawuzi aka langi eya kakobe mu maaso g'ekiremba eky'oku mutwe, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Bwe gutyo omulimu gwonna ogw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama ne guggwa. Abayisirayeli ne bakola buli kintu nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Exodus39:33 Ne baleetera Musa Eweema Entukuvu n'ebintu byayo, byonna: amalobo gaayo, embaawo zaayo, emikiikiro gyayo, ebikondo byayo, n'ebinnya byayo," 
Exodus39:34 eky'okugibikkako eky'amaliba g'embuzi, n'olutimbe olugyawulamu;" 
Exodus39:35 Essanduuko y'Endagaano n'emisituliro gyayo, n'entebe ey'obusaasizi;" 
Exodus39:36 emmeeza n'ebintu byayo byonna, n'emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda;" 
Exodus39:37 ekikondo ky'ettaala, ekya zaabu omulungi, ettaala zaakyo, n'ebintu byakyo byonna, n'amafuta g'ettaala;" 
Exodus39:38 alutaari eya zaabu, omuzigo ogusiigibwa, obubaane obuwunya akawoowo, n'olutimbe olw'omu mulyango gw'Eweema Entukuvu," 
Exodus39:39 alutaari ey'ekikomo, n'ekitindiro kyayo eky'ekikomo, emisituliro gyayo, n'ebintu byayo byonna, ebbenseni ne ky'etuulako;" 
Exodus39:40 entimbe ez'okutimba oluggya n'ebikondo byazo, n'ebinnya; olutimbe olw'omu mulyango gw'oluggya, n'emiguwa gyalwo, n'enkondo zaalwo; n'ebintu byonna eby'okukozesa mu Weema Entukuvu ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama;" 
Exodus39:41 ebyambalo ebirungi ebya bakabona eby'okuweererezangamu mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ebyo bye byambalo ebitukuvu, Arooni ne batabani be bye bambala nga baweereza mu bwakabona." 
Exodus39:42 Abayisirayeli baakola omulimu gwonna nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa n'akebera omulimu gwonna, n'alaba nga bagumalirizza, era nga bagukoledde ddala nga Mukama bwe yalagira. Musa n'abasabira omukisa." 
Exodus40:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Exodus40:2 “Ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogusooka, olisimba Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Exodus40:3 Oligiteekamu Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, era olitimba olutimbe mu maaso gaayo." 
Exodus40:4 Oliyingiza emmeeza n'oteekateeka ebintu ebigiriko. Era oliyingiza ekikondo eky'ettaala, n'oteekako ettaala zaakyo." 
Exodus40:5 Alutaari eya zaabu ey'okwoterezangako obubaane, oligiteeka mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, n'otimba olutimbe mu mulyango gw'Eweema Entukuvu." 
Exodus40:6 Oliteeka mu maaso g'omulyango gwayo alutaari, ey'okwokerangako ebiweebwayo." 
Exodus40:7 Oliteeka ebbenseni wakati w'Eweema eyo n'alutaari, n'ogiteekamu amazzi." 
Exodus40:8 Olisiba oluggya okwetooloola, n'otimba olutimbe mu mulyango gw'oluggya." 
Exodus40:9 “Awo olitukuza Eweema n'ebintu byonna ebirimu, n'obisiigako omuzigo omutukuvu, olwo erifuuka ntukuvu." 
Exodus40:10 Era oligusiiga ku alutaari ey'okwokerangako ebiweebwayo, n'ogusiiga ne ku bintu byayo byonna, n'ogitukuza. Olwo erifuuka ntukuvu nnyo." 
Exodus40:11 Era oligusiiga ku bbenseni n'ekikondo kyayo, n'ogitukuza." 
Exodus40:12 “Olwo olireeta Arooni ne batabani be ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, n'obanaaza n'amazzi," 
Exodus40:13 n'oyambaza Arooni ebyambalo ebitukuvu, n'omusiigako omuzigo, n'omutukuza, ampeerezenga mu bwakabona." 
Exodus40:14 Era olireeta batabani be n'obambaza amasaati," 
Exodus40:15 n'obasiigako omuzigo nga bw'osiize ku kitaabwe, bampeerezenga mu bwakabona. Era okusiigibwako omuzigo, kulibafuula bakabona obulamu bwabwe bwonna.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa n'akola byonna nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. 
Exodus40:17 Awo ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogusooka mu mwaka ogwokubiri okuva lwe baava e Misiri, Eweema Entukuvu n'esimbibwa." 
Exodus40:18 Musa n'ateekawo ebinnya byayo, n'asimba embaawo zaayo, n'agatta emikiikiro gyayo, n'awangiza empagi zaayo." 
Exodus40:19 N'ayanjuluza eky'okugibikkako, era n'agiteekako n'eky'okugibikkako ekyokungulu, nga Mukama bwe yalagira." 
Exodus40:20 N'atwala ebipande by'amayinja ebibiri, n'abiteeka mu Ssanduuko ey'Endagaano. N'ateeka emisituliro mu mpeta z'Essanduuko, era n'ateeka kungulu w'Essanduuko, entebe ey'obusaasizi." 
Exodus40:21 N'ayingiza Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:22 N'ateeka emmeeza mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ku ludda lwa Weema eyo olw'ebukiikakkono, ebweru w'olutimbe." 
Exodus40:23 N'agiteekako emigaati egiweebwayo eri Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:24 N'ateeka ekikondo ky'ettaala mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, mu maaso g'emmeeza, ku ludda lwa Weema eyo olw'ebukiikaddyo." 
Exodus40:25 N'akoleeza ettaala mu maaso ga Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:26 N'ateeka alutaari eya zaabu mu Weema eyo, mu maaso g'olutimbe," 
Exodus40:27 n'agyoterezaako obubaane obuwunya akawoowo, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:28 N'ateekawo olutimbe mu mulyango gwa Weema Entukuvu. 
Exodus40:29 N'ateeka ku mulyango gwa Weema eyo, alutaari ey'okwokerangako ebiweebwayo, n'aweerayo ku yo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:30 N'ateeka ebbenseni wakati wa Weema eyo n'alutaari, n'agiteekamu amazzi ag'okunaaba." 
Exodus40:31 Musa, Arooni ne batabani be, ne banaabirangamu engalo zaabwe n'ebigere byabwe" 
Exodus40:32 buli lwe baasembereranga alutaari, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Musa n'akola oluggya okwetooloola Weema Entukuvu n'alutaari, era n'atimba olutimbe mu mulyango gw'oluggya. Bw'atyo n'amaliriza omulimu gwe." 
Exodus40:34 Awo ekire ne kibikka ku Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, era ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kijjula mu yo." 
Exodus40:35 Musa n'atayinza kuyingira mu Weema eyo. 
Exodus40:36 Mu lugendo lwabwe lwonna ekire bwe kyavanga ku Weema Entukuvu, Abayisirayeli ne balyoka batambula." 
Exodus40:37 Naye ekire bwe kitaavangawo, tebaatambulanga, okutuusa lwe kyavangawo." 
Exodus40:38 Abayisirayeli mu lugendo lwabwe lwonna, baalabanga ekire kya Mukama nga kiri waggulu w'Eweema Entukuvu mu budde obw'emisana. Ate mu budde obw'ekiro, baalabanga omuliro nga gwakira waggulu waayo." 
Leviticus1:1 Mukama n'ayita Musa, n'ayogera naye mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'agamba nti:" 
Leviticus1:2 “Yogera n'Abayisirayeli obagambe nti bwe wabangawo mu mmwe awaayo ekitambiro eri Mukama, anaakiwangayo ng'aggya mu nte ze, oba mu ndiga ze, oba mu mbuzi ze." 
Leviticus1:3 Bw'anaawangayo ekitambiro ekyokebwa ng'aggya mu nte ze, anaawangayo nnume eteriiko kamogo. Anaagiweerangayo mu mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, alyoke akkirizibwenga mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus1:4 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'ekkirizibwa okuba ekitambiro eky'okuddaabiriza okuggyawo ebibi bye." 
Leviticus1:5 Anattiranga ente eyo mu maaso ga Mukama, bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni ne batwala omusaayi, ne bagumansira ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari eri ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus1:6 Awo anaabaaganga ensolo eyo, n'agisalaasalamu ebitundu." 
Leviticus1:7 Bakabona banaakoleezanga omuliro ku alutaari, ne bagutindirako enku." 
Leviticus1:8 Banaateekanga ku muliro ogwo ebifi by'ennyama, n'omutwe, era n'amasavu. Ebifi by'ennyama n'omutwe era n'amasavu banaabiteekanga ku nku ezo eziri ku muliro, ku alutaari." 
Leviticus1:9 Omuntu oyo anaayozanga n'amazzi ebyenda byayo, n'ebirenge byayo n'amagulu gaayo, kabona n'ayokera byonna ku alutaari, ne biba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Evvumbe lyakyo eddungi, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus1:10 “Bw'anaawangayo ekitambiro ekyokebwa ng'aggya mu ndiga ze, oba mu mbuzi ze, anaawangayo nnume eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus1:11 Anaagittiranga ku ludda lw'alutaari olw'ebukiikakkono, bakabona ne bamansira omusaayi gwayo ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus1:12 Awo anaagisalaasalangamu ebifi, kabona n'abiteeka ku muliro ku alutaari, awamu n'omutwe era n'amasavu." 
Leviticus1:13 Ebyenda n'amagulu anaabyozanga n'amazzi, kabona n'awaayo ekitambiro eri Mukama, era kyonna n'akyokera ku alutaari. Evvumbe lyakyo eddungi, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus1:14 “Era bw'anaawangayo ekitambiro ekyokebwa eky'ekinyonyi, anaawangayo enjiibwa oba ejjiba etto." 
Leviticus1:15 Kabona anaaleetanga akanyonyi ako ku alutaari, n'akanyoola obulago, n'akakutulako omutwe, n'agwokera ku alutaari, omusaayi gwako ne gutonnyolokokera ku mabbali gaayo." 
Leviticus1:16 Anaakaggyangamu ekisakiro kyako n'ebikirimu, n'abisuula ku mabbali g'alutaari, ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, awateekebwa evvu." 
Leviticus1:17 Anaakakwatanga ebiwaawaatiro, n'akayuzaamu, naye n'atakakutulamu wabiri, n'akookera ku alutaari ku nku eziri ku muliro. Evvumbe lyako eddungi, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:1 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo eri Mukama ekitone eky'emmere ey'empeke, anaamalanga kukisekulamu buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi. Anaayiwangako omuzigo, n'ateekako n'obubaane," 
Leviticus2:2 ekitone ekyo n'akireetera bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni. Kabona anaatoolangako olubatu olw'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, n'abwokya wamu n'omuzigo, n'obubaane bwonna, nga ke kabonero akalaga nti biweereddwayo eri Mukama. Evvumbe lyabyo eddungi, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:3 Ekyo ekisigaddewo ku kitone eky'obuwunga, kinaabeeranga kya bakabona. Kintu kitukuvu nnyo, kubanga kitooleddwa ku kitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama okwokebwa." 
Leviticus2:4 “Ekitone bwe kinaabeeranga eky'emigaati, ginaabanga egitazimbulukusiddwa, egy'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo, oba emigaati egy'empewere egitazimbulukusiddwa, egisiigiddwako omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:5 “Era oba ng'owaayo ekitone eky'emigaati egikaziddwa, ginaabanga gya buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi obutaliimu kizimbulukusa, obutabuddwamu omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:6 Onoogimenyangamu ebitundu, n'oyiwako omuzigo, n'ogiwaayo, nga kye kitone eky'emmere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus2:7 “Era bw'onoowangayo emigaati egifumbiddwa mu ntamu, ginaabanga gya buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, wamu n'omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:8 Onooleetanga eri Mukama ekitone ekikoleddwa mu ebyo, n'okireetera kabona, ye n'akitwala ku alutaari." 
Leviticus2:9 Kabona anaatoolangako ekitundu kyakyo, kibe akabonero akalaga nti kiweereddwayo eri Mukama, n'akyokera ku alutaari. Evvumbe ly'ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:10 Ekisigaddewo ku kiweebwayo eky'obuwunga, kinaabanga kya bakabona. Kitukuvu nnyo, kubanga kitooleddwa ku kitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama okwokebwa." 
Leviticus2:11 “Tewaabengawo kitone kya buwunga kinaaweebwangayo eri Mukama nga kikoleddwa n'ekizimbulukusa. Temuukozesenga kizimbulukusa wadde omubisi gw'enjuki, mu kiweebwayo eri Mukama okwokebwa." 
Leviticus2:12 Munaawangayo eri Mukama ebitone eby'ebibala ebisooka okukungulwa buli mwaka, naye tebiiyokebwenga ku alutaari." 
Leviticus2:13 Buli kitone eky'obuwunga, onookirungangamu omunnyo, kubanga omunnyo ke kabonero k'endagaano wakati wo ne Mukama. Ebitone byo byonna obirungangamu omunnyo." 
Leviticus2:14 Ng'owaayo eri Mukama ekitone eky'ebibala ebisooka okukungulwa, onoowangayo eŋŋaano enkube mu birimba ebikyali ebibisi, ng'eyokeddwako ku muliro." 
Leviticus2:15 Onoogiteekangako omuzigo n'obubaane. 
Leviticus2:16 Kabona anaayokyanga ekitundu ky'eŋŋaano, n'eky'omuzigo, wamu n'obubaane bwonna, nga ke kabonero akalaga nti biweereddwayo. Kye kitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama okwokebwa." 
Leviticus3:1 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo ekitambiro olw'okutabagana, anaawangayo ente enkazi oba ennume eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus3:2 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Awo bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku nsonda zonna ennya ez'alutaari," 
Leviticus3:3 ne bawaayo eri Mukama ebitundu bino eby'ekitambiro: amasavu gonna agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:4 n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaziriko, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba." 
Leviticus3:5 Bakabona banaayokyanga ebyo byonna ku alutaari, awamu n'ekitone ekyokebwa ekiri ku nku ku muliro. Evvumbe ly'ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa, lisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus3:6 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo endiga, oba embuzi ng'ekitambiro olw'okutabagana, oba nkazi, oba nnume, anaawangayo eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus3:7 Bw'awangayo omwana gw'endiga, anaaguweerangayo mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus3:8 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gw'ekitone kye, n'akittira mu maaso g'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Bakabona banaamansiranga omusaayi gwakyo ku nsonda zonna ennya ez'alutaari," 
Leviticus3:9 ne bawaayo eri Mukama ebitundu bino eby'ekitambiro: amasavu, n'omukira ogwassava omulamba okusalira ku ggumba ery'omugongo, n'amasavu gonna agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:10 n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu gonna agaziriko, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba." 
Leviticus3:11 Kabona anaayokeranga ebyo byonna ku alutaari ng'ekitone eky'ebyokulya ekiweebwayo eri Mukama. 
Leviticus3:12 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo embuzi, anaagiweerangayo mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus3:13 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira mu maaso g'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Bakabona banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku nsonda zonna ennya ez'alutaari," 
Leviticus3:14 n'awaayo eri Mukama ebitundu byayo bino, bibe ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa: amasavu gonna agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:15 n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaziriko, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba." 
Leviticus3:16 Kabona anaabyokeranga ku alutaari. Kye kitone eky'ebyokulya ekyokebwa, ekisanyusa Mukama. Amasavu gonna ga Mukama." 
Leviticus3:17 Temuulyenga ku masavu, wadde ku musaayi. Eryo linaabanga etteeka ery'olubeerera, lye munaakuumanga buli we munaabeeranga, ennaku zonna.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus4:2 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti buli anaakolanga ekibi, n'asobya nga tagenderedde mu kintu kyonna ku ebyo Mukama bye yalagira, anaakolanga bino:" 
Leviticus4:3 Ssaabakabona bw'anaakolanga ekibi, bw'atyo n'aleetera abantu be omusango, anaawangayo eri Mukama olw'ekibi kye, ente ennume envubuka eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:4 Anaagireetanga ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'ateeka ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus4:5 Awo Ssaabakabona anaatoolanga ku musaayi gw'ente eyo, n'aguleeta mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus4:6 Anannyikanga engalo ye mu musaayi, n'agumansira emirundi musanvu mu maaso g'olutimbe olutukuvu." 
Leviticus4:7 Awo anaatoolanga ku musaayi, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari eyoterezebwako obubaane obw'akaloosa mu maaso ga Mukama mu Weema. Omusaayi gwonna ogusigaddewo anaaguyiwanga ku ntobo y'alutaari eyokerwako ebitambiro, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus4:8 Ente eyo eweebwayo olw'ekibi, anaagiggyangamu amasavu gonna agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus4:9 n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaziriko," 
Leviticus4:10 nga bwe biggyibwa mu nte ey'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, n'abyokera ku alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo." 
Leviticus4:11 Naye eddiba lyayo, n'ennyama yaayo yonna, n'omutwe gwayo, n'amagulu gaayo, wamu n'ebyenda byayo, n'obusa bwayo," 
Leviticus4:12 kwe kugamba ente yonna, anaagitwalanga wabweru w'olusiisira, mu kifo ekirongoofu, ekiyiibwamu evvu, n'agyokera eyo ku muliro ku nku. Eyo awayiibwa evvu, gy'eneeyokerwanga." 
Leviticus4:13 Oba ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli bwe kinaakolanga ekibi olw'okumenya ekimu ku ebyo Mukama bye yalagira, ne kizza omusango nga tekigenderedde," 
Leviticus4:14 ekibi olunaamanyikanga, ekibiina kinaawangayo ente ennume envubuka olw'ekibi, ne bagireeta mu maaso g'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakulu b'ekibiina banaateekanga ebibatu byabwe ku mutwe gwayo, nga bali mu maaso ga Mukama, n'ettirwa awo." 
Leviticus4:16 Ssaabakabona anaaleetanga ku musaayi gw'ente eyo mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama," 
Leviticus4:17 n'annyikamu engalo ye, n'agumansira emirundi musanvu awali Mukama mu maaso g'olutimbe." 
Leviticus4:18 Ogumu ku musaayi anaagusiiganga ku mayembe g'alutaari eri awali Mukama mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, omulala gwonna n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo, eri ku mulyango gw'Eweema eyo ye emu." 
Leviticus4:19 Ente anaagiggyangamu amasavu gonna, n'agookera ku alutaari." 
Leviticus4:20 Ku nte eyo, anaakolanga nga bw'akola ku nte eweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'addaabiriza olw'ekibi ky'abantu, abantu abo ne basonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Awo anaatwalanga ente eyo ebweru w'olusiisira, n'agyokya nga bw'ayokya eyo gy'aba awaddeyo olw'ekibi kye. Kino kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi ky'ekibiina." 
Leviticus4:22 Omufuzi bw'aba ye akoze ekibi, n'azza omusango olw'okumenya nga tagenderedde ekimu ku ebyo byonna Mukama Katonda we bye yalagira," 
Leviticus4:23 bw'anaategeezebwanga ekibi kye, anaaleetanga ekitone kye eky'embuzi ennume eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:24 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'alutaari, we battira ensolo ez'ebitambiro ebyokebwa mu maaso ga Mukama. Kino kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:25 Kabona anannyikanga engalo ye mu musaayi gw'ekiweereddwayo olw'ekibi, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo. Ogusigaddewo n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus4:26 Amasavu gaayo gonna anaagookeranga ku alutaari, ng'amasavu g'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekibi ky'omufuzi, omufuzi oyo n'asonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Omu ku bantu aba bulijjo bw'anaakolanga ekibi, n'azza omusango, olw'okumenya nga tagenderedde, ekimu ku ebyo Mukama bye yalagira," 
Leviticus4:28 bw'anaategeezebwanga ekibi kye, anaaleetanga ekitone eky'embuzi enkazi eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:29 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'alutaari, we battira ensolo ez'ebitambiro ebyokebwa." 
Leviticus4:30 Kabona anannyikanga engalo ye mu musaayi gwayo, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo, omusaayi gwayo gwonna n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari." 
Leviticus4:31 Amasavu gaayo gonna anaagaggyangamu ng'amasavu bwe gaggyibwa mu kitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, n'agookera ku alutaari, evvumbe lyago eddungi lisanyusa Mukama. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'omuntu oyo, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Omuntu bw'anaaleetanga endiga nga kye kitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, anaaleetanga nkazi eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:33 Anaateekanga ekibatu kye ku mutwe gwayo, n'agittira mu kifo we battira ebitambiro ebyokebwa." 
Leviticus4:34 Kabona anannyikanga engalo ye mu musaayi gwayo, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari eyokerwako ebiweebwayo, omusaayi gwayo gwonna n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari." 
Leviticus4:35 Amasavu gaayo gonna n'agaggyamu, nga bwe baggyamu amasavu g'endiga eweebwayo olw'okutabagana, n'agookera ku alutaari, awamu n'ebyokulya ebiweebwayo eri Mukama. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekibi ky'oyo ayonoonye, era oyo anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:1 Omuntu bw'alayizibwa okuwa obujulizi, n'atayogera kye yalaba oba kye yamanya, aba azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus5:2 Omuntu bwe yeekoona ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu, gamba ng'omulambo gw'ensolo ey'omu ttale oba enfuge eteri nnongoofu, oba ogw'ekyewalula, nga tategedde, aba n'omusango amangu ddala ng'ategedde ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:3 Omuntu bwe yeekoona ku kintu kyonna ekivudde ku muntu ekitali kirongoofu, nga tategedde aba n'omusango amangu ddala ng'ategedde ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:4 Omuntu bw'ayanguyiriza okweyama okukola ekirungi oba ekibi, nga tataddeeyo mwoyo, aba n'omusango amangu ddala ng'ategedde ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:5 Omuntu bw'anazzanga omusango mu kimu ku ebyo, anaayatulanga ekibi kye yakola." 
Leviticus5:6 Era omutango olw'omusango ogwo gw'azzizza, anaaleetanga eri Mukama endiga oba embuzi enkazi, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi. Kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'ekibi ky'omuntu oyo." 
Leviticus5:7 Omuntu bw'anaabanga tasobola kuwaayo ndiga oba mbuzi olw'enfuna ye entono, anaaleetanga eri Mukama omutango olw'ekibi kye, enjiibwa bbiri, oba amayiba amato abiri, enjiibwa emu ya kiweebwayo olw'ekibi, endala ya kiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus5:8 Anaazireetanga eri kabona, kabona n'asooka okuwaayo eyo eweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'anyoola obulago bwayo, naye n'atagikutulako mutwe." 
Leviticus5:9 N'amansira omusaayi gwayo ku mabbali g'alutaari, ogusigaddewo n'aguttulukusa ku ntobo y'alutaari. Ekyo kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus5:10 Olwo anaawangayo enjiibwa endala, ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ng'etteeka bwe liri. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabiririzanga omuntu oyo olw'ekibi ky'akoze, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Naye omuntu bw'anaabanga tasobola kuwaayo njiibwa bbiri, oba mayiba abiri, olw'enfuna ye entono, anaaleetanga kilo emu ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi. Taateekengako muzigo wadde obubaane, kubanga kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus5:12 Anaabuleetanga eri kabona, kabona oyo n'atoolako olubatu, nga ke kabonero akalaga nti bwonna buweereddwayo eri Mukama, n'abwokera ku alutaari ng'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus5:13 Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabiririzanga omuntu oyo olw'ekibi ky'akoze, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa. Obuwunga obusigaddewo bunaabanga bwa kabona, nga bwe kiba ku kiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus5:14 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus5:15 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi mu butali bugenderevu, olw'okulemwa okuwaayo ebitukuvu by'ateekwa okusasula eri Mukama, anaaleetanga eri Mukama omutango gwa ndiga ennume, oba gwa mbuzi ennume eteriiko kamogo. Omuwendo gw'ensimbi ogugigyamu, gunaabalirirwanga mu mbalirira entongole ey'omu Ssinzizo." 
Leviticus5:16 Era anaaleetanga n'ekyo kye yalemererwa okusasula, n'ayongeramu ekitundu kyakyo ekyokutaano. Anaakireetanga eri kabona, kabona n'amuddaabiririza ng'awaayo ekitambiro eky'endiga ennume ey'omutango, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi, wadde mu butanwa, ng'amenya ekimu ku biragiro bya Mukama, anaabeeranga n'omusango, era anaateekwanga okuwa omutango." 
Leviticus5:18 Anaaleetanga eri kabona omutango gwa ndiga ennume eteriiko kamogo, gy'aggye mu ndiga ze. Omuwendo gw'ensimbi ogugigyamu, gunaabalirirwanga mu mbalirira entongole ey'omu Ssinzizo. Kabona anaddaabiririzanga omuntu oyo olw'ekibi kye yakola mu butanwa, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Ekyo kye kiweebwayo olw'ekibi, omuntu kye yakola mu maaso ga Mukama.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus6:2 “Wanaabangawo ekiweebwayo, omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi mu maaso ga Mukama, ng'agaana okuzzaayo ekintu, Muyisirayeli munne kye yamulekera ng'omusingo, oba ng'amubbako ekintu, oba ng'amulyazaamaanya," 
Leviticus6:3 oba ng'azudde ekyabula n'akiryazaamanya, n'alayira nti takirabanga." 
Leviticus6:4 Omuntu bw'abangako ekibi ky'akoze mu kimu ku ebyo byonna, anazzangayo ekyo kye yanyaga oba kye yafuna mu bukumpanya." 
Leviticus6:5 Ku lunaku lw'alizuulibwa nti alina omusango, anaasasulanga mu bujjuvu nnannyini kintu ekyo, era anaakyongerangako ekitundu kyakyo kimu ekyokutaano." 
Leviticus6:6 Anaaleetanga eri kabona endiga ennume eteriiko kamogo, ey'omutango oguweebwayo eri Mukama. Omuwendo gw'ensimbi ogugigyamu, gunaabalirirwanga mu mbalirira entongole ey'omu Ssinzizo." 
Leviticus6:7 Kabona anaddaabiririzanga omuntu oyo mu maaso ga Mukama, omuntu oyo n'asonyiyibwa.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus6:9 awe Arooni ne batabani be amateeka aganaafuganga ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa. Ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, kinaasigalanga ku nku ku alutaari ekiro kyonna, era omuliro gunaakuumibwanga nga gwaka." 
Leviticus6:10 Awo kabona anaayambalanga ekyambalo kye ekyeru, n'empale ye enjeru, n'asitula evvu eriva ku kiweebwayo ekyokeddwa ku alutaari, n'aliteeka ku mabbali g'alutaari." 
Leviticus6:11 Awo anaayambulangamu ebyambalo ebyo n'ayambala ebirala, n'atwala evvu ebweru w'olusiisira, mu kifo ekibalibwa nga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus6:12 Omuliro oguli ku alutaari gunaakuumibwanga nga gwaka, awatali kuzikira n'akatono. Buli nkya kabona anaaguteekangako enku, n'atereezaako ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, era anaagwokerangako amasavu ag'ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus6:13 Omuliro gunaakuumibwanga nga gwaka bulijjo ku alutaari, awatali kuzikira n'akatono." 
Leviticus6:14 Gano ge mateeka aganaafuganga ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke: kabona ow'olulyo lwa Arooni anaabiwangayo eri Mukama mu maaso g'alutaari. 
Leviticus6:15 Anaatoolanga olubatu ku kiweebwayo eky'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, n'omuzigo, n'obubaane bwonna obukiriko, n'abyokera ku alutaari, nga ke kabonero akalaga nti biweereddwayo eri Mukama. Akaloosa kaabyo kasanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus6:16 Ekisigaddewo, Arooni ne batabani be banaakiryanga. Kinaafumbibwangamu emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, ne giriirwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, mu luggya lw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus6:17 Tekiifumbirwengamu kizimbulukusa. Nze Mukama nkiwadde bakabona, kibe omugabo gwabwe, ku byange ebiweebwayo okwokebwa. Kitukuvu nnyo, ng'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ekiweebwayo ng'omutango." 
Leviticus6:18 Mu mirembe gyonna egijja, buli musajja ku b'olulyo lwa Arooni, anaayinzanga okukiryako, ng'omugabo gwabwe ogw'olubeerera, ku byokulya ebiweebwayo eri Mukama. Buli anaakikoonangako, anaabanga mutukuvu." 
Leviticus6:19 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus6:20 “Kino kye kitone abooluganda lwa Arooni kye banaawangayo eri Mukama, ku lunaku lwe banaasiigirwangako omuzigo okwawulibwa. Banaawangayo kilo emu ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, ng'eyo eweebwayo buli lunaku, ekitundu kyabwo ekimu ku makya, n'ekitundu kyabwo ekirala olweggulo." 
Leviticus6:21 Bunaatabulwangamu omuzigo, ne bufumbirwa ku lusaniya olusiikirwako. Bwe bunaamalanga okusiikibwamu ebitole, ne buleetebwa okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky'emmere ey'empeke. Akaloosa kaakyo kasanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus6:22 Mu mirembe gyonna egijja, ekitone kino kinaaweebwangayo buli muzzukulu wa Arooni akola obwassaabakabona. Kinaayokebwanga kyonna ekiramba." 
Leviticus6:23 Ekitone eky'emmere ey'empeke ekiweebwayo kabona, tekiiriibwengako. Kinaayokebwanga kyonna.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus6:25 ategeeze Arooni ne batabani be nti: “Lino lye tteeka erinaafuganga ebiweebwayo olw'ekibi. Mu kifo mwe battira ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi mwe kinattirwanga mu maaso ga Mukama. Ekiweebwayo kino kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus6:26 Kabona akiwaayo, ye anaakiryanga. Kinaaliirwanga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, mu luggya lw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus6:27 Buli ekinaakoonanga ku nnyama yaakyo, kinaabanga kitukuvu. Era ekyambalo ekinaamansirwangako omusaayi gwakyo, banaakyolezanga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Leviticus6:28 Entamu ey'ebbumba efumbiddwamu ennyama yaakyo, eneeyasibwanga. Naye bw'eneefumbibwanga mu ntamu ey'ekikomo, entamu eyo eneekolokotebwanga n'eyozebwa n'amazzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Buli musajja ow'omu lulyo lwa Arooni, anaayinzanga okukiryako. Kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus6:30 Naye singa omusaayi gwakyo guleetebwa mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne gukozesebwa mu mukolo ogw'okuddaabiriza olw'ekibi, tekiiriibwengako; kinaayokebwanga bwokebwa." 
Leviticus7:1 “Era lino lye tteeka erifuga ekitone ekiweebwayo ng'omutango. Kiba kitukuvu nnyo. 
Leviticus7:2 Ensolo eweebwayo ng'omutango, enettirwanga ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'alutaari, awattirwa ensolo eziweebwayo okwokebwa, era omusaayi gwayo gunaamansirwanga ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus7:3 Amasavu gaayo gonna ganaaweerwangayo ku alutaari: omukira ogwassava, n'amasavu ag'oku byenda," 
Leviticus7:4 n'ensigo zombi n'amasavu agaziriko, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba." 
Leviticus7:5 Kabona anaabyokeranga ku alutaari, bibe ekitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama eky'ebyokulya. Ekyo kye kitone ekiweebwayo ng'omutango." 
Leviticus7:6 Buli musajja ow'omu lulyo lwa bakabona, anaayinzanga okukiryako, naye nga kiriirwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, kubanga kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus7:7 “Etteeka lye limu erifuga ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ekitone ekiweebwayo ng'omutango: ennyama yaabyo eneetwalibwanga kabona akoze ku kitambiro." 
Leviticus7:8 Kabona akoze ku kitambiro ekyokebwa, ekireeteddwa omuntu yenna, ye aneetwaliranga eddiba ly'ekitambiro ky'akozeeko." 
Leviticus7:9 Buli kitone ekiweebwayo eky'obuwunga, ekifumbibwa nga kivumbikiddwa mu kyoto, oba ekisiikibwa mu ntamu, oba ekikalirirwa ku lusaniya, kinaatwalibwanga kabona akikozeeko." 
Leviticus7:10 Naye ebitone ebiweebwayo byonna eby'emmere ey'empeke ebitali bifumbe, ebitabuddwamu omuzigo, oba ebikalu, binaabanga bya bakabona bonna ab'olulyo lwa Arooni, era banaabigabananga kyenkanyi." 
Leviticus7:11 “Lino lye tteeka erifuga ekitambiro ekiweebwayo eri Mukama olw'okutabagana. 
Leviticus7:12 Omuntu bw'anaawangayo ekitambiro kino nga kya kwebaza Katonda, anaaweerangako n'ekitone eky'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, egitabuddwamu omuzigo, oba egy'empewere, egisiigiddwako omuzigo, oba emigaati egikoleddwa mu buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ne bunnyikira." 
Leviticus7:13 Ku kitambiro kye eky'okutabagana ky'awaayo olw'okwebaza Katonda, anaaleeterangako emigaati egizimbulukusiddwa." 
Leviticus7:14 Anaawangayo eri Mukama omugaati gumu ku buli kika eky'emigaati egyo. Gunaabanga gwa kabona amansira omusaayi gw'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana. 
Leviticus7:15 Ennyama y'ekitambiro ekyo, eneeriibwanga ku olwo lwe kitambiddwa, tewaabenga esulawo." 
Leviticus7:16 “Naye ekitambiro omuntu ky'awaayo bwe kiba eky'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ky'awaayo nga yeeyagalidde, ennyama yaakyo eneeriibwanga ku olwo lwe kitambiddwa, era efikkawo eneeriibwanga enkeera." 
Leviticus7:17 Naye ennyama eyo efikkawo n'etuuka ku lunaku olwokusatu, eneeyokebwanga omuliro." 
Leviticus7:18 Ennyama eyo bw'eneeriibwangako ku lunaku olwokusatu, Mukama takkirizenga kitambiro, era taakibalirenga oyo akiwaddeyo. Eneebanga kyenyinyalwa, era buli anaagiryangako, anaafuukanga atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus7:19 Ennyama bw'eneekoonanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu, teeriibwengako, eneeyokebwanga bwokebwa. “Buli abalibwa okuba omulongoofu, ye anaalyanga ku nnyama ey'ekitambiro kino." 
Leviticus7:20 Naye omuntu anaagiryangako nga si mulongoofu, anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama." 
Leviticus7:21 Era omuntu bw'anaakoonanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu, ekiva ku muntu oba ku nsolo, oba ku kintu ekirala eky'omuzizo, n'alya ku nnyama y'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo eri Mukama olw'okutabagana, omuntu oyo anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Mukama n'alagira Musa," 
Leviticus7:23 agambe Abayisirayeli nti: “Temuulyenga masavu ga nte n'ag'endiga, wadde ag'embuzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Amasavu g'ensolo efudde yokka, n'amasavu g'eyo ettiddwa ensolo enkambwe, tegaaliibwenga n'akatono, naye ganaayinzanga okukozesebwa olw'emigaso emirala." 
Leviticus7:25 Buli alya amasavu g'ensolo abantu gye bawaayo eri Mukama ng'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama." 
Leviticus7:26 Yonna gye munaabeeranga, temuulyenga ku musaayi gwonna, ka gube gwa kinyonyi oba gwa nsolo." 
Leviticus7:27 Buli anaalyanga ku musaayi gwonna, anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus7:29 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Buli awaayo ekitambiro olw'okutabagana, anaaleetanga ekitundu kyakyo, kibe ekitone eri Mukama," 
Leviticus7:30 n'akireeta ye yennyini mu ngalo ze, kibe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Anaaleetanga amasavu n'ekifuba, bibe ekitone ekiwuubibwa eri Mukama." 
Leviticus7:31 Kabona anaayokeranga amasavu ku alutaari, naye ekifuba kinaabanga kya ba lulyo lwa Arooni." 
Leviticus7:32 Ekisambi ekya ddyo munaakiwanga kabona, kibe ekiweebwayo ekiggyibwa ku kitambiro eky'okutabagana." 
Leviticus7:33 Oyo ku b'olulyo lwa Arooni akoze ku musaayi ne ku masavu, ye anaakiweebwanga kibe omugabo gwe." 
Leviticus7:34 Ekifuba ekiwuubibwa, n'ekisambi ekya ddyo ekisitulibwa, bye nzigye ku Bayisirayeli, ku bitambiro bye bawaayo olw'okutabagana, ne mbiwa Arooni n'abaana be. Bino Abayisirayeli banaateekwanga okubiwa bakabona ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus7:35 Ogwo gwe mugabo oguggyibwa ku byokulya ebiweebwayo eri Mukama, ogwaweebwa Arooni ne batabani be ku lunaku lwe baafukibwako omuzigo, ne baawulibwa okuweereza Mukama mu bwakabona."
