Leviticus7:36 Ku lunaku olwo Mukama yalagira Abayisirayeli okubawanga omugabo ogwo. Ekyo Abayisirayeli banaateekwanga okukituukiriza ennaku zonna.” 
Leviticus7:37 Ago ge mateeka agafuga ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke, n'ebiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ebiweebwayo ng'omutango, n'ebiweebwayo olw'okwawulibwa, n'ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus7:38 Eyo ku lusozi Sinaayi mu ddungu, Mukama gye yaweera Musa ebiragiro ebyo, ku lunaku lwe yagambirako Abayisirayeli okuwangayo ebitone byabwe eri Mukama." 
Leviticus8:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus8:2 “Twala Arooni ne batabani be, otwale n'ebyambalo n'omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'ente ey'ekitone eky'okuwaayo olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume bbiri, n'ekibbo ekirimu emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa," 
Leviticus8:3 okuŋŋaanyize ekibiina kyonna ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu.” 
Leviticus8:4 Awo Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. Ekibiina ky'abantu ne kikuŋŋaanira ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. 
Leviticus8:5 Musa n'agamba ekibiina ky'abantu nti: “Ekigenda okukolebwa ky'ekyo Mukama ky'alagidde.” 
Leviticus8:6 Musa n'aleeta Arooni ne batabani be, n'akola omukolo ogw'okubanaaza n'amazzi." 
Leviticus8:7 N'ayambaza Arooni essaati n'ekkanzu, n'amusiba olukoba mu kiwato, n'amwambaza n'omunagiro, n'agusiba n'olukoba olwalukibwa obulungi, n'agunyweza mu kiwato kye." 
Leviticus8:8 N'amwambaza ekyambalo eky'oku kifuba, n'akiteekamu ebiyitibwa Wurimu ne Tummimu." 
Leviticus8:9 N'amusiba ekiremba ku mutwe, era awo mu maaso gaakyo n'akisibako akapande aka zaabu, ye ngule entukuvu, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Leviticus8:10 Awo Musa n'addira omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'agusiiga ku Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne ku bintu byonna ebigirimu, n'abitukuza okubyawulira Mukama." 
Leviticus8:11 N'atoola ku muzigo, n'agumansira emirundi musanvu ku alutaari ne ku bintu byayo byonna, ne ku bbenseni ne ku kikondo kyayo, okubitukuza okubyawulira Mukama." 
Leviticus8:12 N'ayawula Arooni ng'amufukako omuzigo ku mutwe. 
Leviticus8:13 Awo Musa n'aleeta batabani ba Arooni, n'abambaza amasaati, n'abasiba enkoba mu biwato, era n'ebiremba ku mitwe, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Leviticus8:14 N'aleeta ente ey'okuwaayo olw'ekibi, Arooni ne batabani be ne bateeka ebibatu byabwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus8:15 Musa n'agitta, n'atoola ku musaayi, n'agusiigisa engalo ye ku mayembe g'alutaari ku njuyi zaayo zonna okugyawulira Mukama. Omusaayi gwonna ogusigaddewo, n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari. Bw'atyo n'agyawulira Mukama era n'addaabiriza ku lwayo." 
Leviticus8:16 Musa n'addira amasavu gonna agali ku byenda, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba, n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaziriko, n'abyokera byonna ku alutaari." 
Leviticus8:17 Ente yonna esigaddewo: eddiba, n'ennyama, n'ebyenda, n'abyokya omuliro wabweru w'olusiisira, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Leviticus8:18 Awo Musa n'aleeta endiga ennume ey'ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Arooni ne batabani ne ne bateeka ebibatu byabwe ku mutwe gwayo. 
Leviticus8:19 Musa n'agitta, n'amansira omusaayi ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus8:20 N'asala mu ndiga ebitundu, n'ayoza n'amazzi ebyenda n'amagulu, n'ayokera omutwe n'amasavu n'ebitundu byonna eby'endiga ku alutaari, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. Kino kye kitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokebwa, ekiwunyira obulungi Mukama." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Awo Musa n'aleeta endiga ennume eyookubiri, olw'okwawulibwa kwa bakabona. Arooni ne batabani be ne bateeka ebibatu byabwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus8:23 Musa n'agitta, n'addira ku musaayi, n'agusiiga ku nsonda y'okutu kwa Arooni okwa ddyo, ne ku kinkumu ky'omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, ne ku kyalakisajja eky'ekigere kye ekya ddyo." 
Leviticus8:24 N'aleeta batabani ba Arooni, n'asiiga omusaayi ogumu ku nsonda z'amatu gaabwe aga ddyo, ku binkumu by'emikono gyabwe egya ddyo, ne ku byalabisajja eby'ebigere byabwe ebya ddyo. Omusaayi ogwasigalawo n'agumansira ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus8:25 N'addira amasavu, n'omukira ogwassava, n'amasavu gonna ag'oku byenda, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba, n'ensigo zombi, n'amasavu agaziriko, n'ekisambi ekya ddyo," 
Leviticus8:26 n'atoola n'omugaati gumu mu kibbo eky'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, egiweebwayo eri Mukama, n'omugaati gumu ogutabuddwamu omuzigo, n'ogw'oluwewere gumu, n'agiteeka ku masavu ne ku kisambi ekya ddyo." 
Leviticus8:27 Byonna n'abikwasa Arooni ne batabani be, ne babiwuuba, ne biba ekiweebwayo nga kiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus8:28 Musa n'abiggya mu ngalo zaabwe, n'abyokera ku alutaari, ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiweereddwayo olw'omukolo ogw'okwawula. Kino kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiwunyira obulungi Mukama." 
Leviticus8:29 Musa n'akwata ekifuba, n'akiwuuba, kibe ekiweebwayo nga kiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama. Ogwo gwe gwali omugabo gwa Musa ku ndiga ey'omukolo ogw'okwawula, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Leviticus8:30 Musa n'atoola ku muzigo ogusiigibwa, ne ku musaayi ogwali ku alutaari, n'abimansira ku Arooni ne ku byambalo bye, era ne ku batabani be ne ku byambalo byabwe. Bw'atyo n'ayawulira Mukama Arooni ne batabani be, era n'ebyambalo byabwe." 
Leviticus8:31 Musa n'agamba Arooni ne batabani be nti: “Mutwale ennyama ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, mugifumbe era mugiriire eyo, n'emigaati egiri mu kibbo eky'ebitone eby'omukolo ogw'okwawula, nga Mukama bwe yandagira nti Arooni ne batabani be bagiryanga." 
Leviticus8:32 Era ekisigalawo ku nnyama ne ku migaati, munaakyokya n'omuliro." 
Leviticus8:33 Temujja kuva ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, okumala ennaku musanvu, okutuusa emikolo egy'okwawulibwa kwammwe lwe girimalirizibwa." 
Leviticus8:34 Mukama yatulagira okukola ebyo bye tukoze olwaleero, olw'okuggyawo ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Muteekwa okusigala ekiro n'emisana ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, okumala ennaku musanvu, okutuukiriza ekiragiro kya Mukama, muleme kufa, kubanga bw'atyo Mukama bwe yandagira.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Awo Arooni ne batabani be ne bakola byonna Mukama bye yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Ku lunaku olwaddako ng'emikolo egy'okwawula giwedde, Musa n'ayita Arooni ne batabani be n'abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli," 
Leviticus9:2 n'agamba Arooni nti: “Twala ente ennume ento, n'endiga ennume, zombi ezitaliiko kamogo, oziweeyo eri Mukama, ente ennume ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus9:3 Awo ogambe Abayisirayeli, batwale embuzi ennume, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ennyana ey'omwaka ogumu, n'omwana gw'endiga ogw'omwaka ogumu, zombi ezitaliiko kamogo, zibe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa," 
Leviticus9:4 n'ente n'endiga ennume zibe ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, babitambire mu maaso ga Mukama, awamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, ekitabuddwamu omuzigo. Bakole bwe batyo, kubanga Mukama anaabalabikira olwaleero.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Ebyo byonna Musa by'alagidde, ne babireeta mu maaso g'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Ekibiina kyonna ne kisembera, ne kiyimirira mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus9:6 Musa n'agamba nti: “Mukama abalagidde okukola kino, era ekitiibwa kye kinaabalabikira.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Awo n'agamba Arooni nti: “Sembera kumpi n'alutaari, oweeyo ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, oddaabirize ku lulwo ne ku lw'abantu. Waayo ekitone eky'abantu, oddaabirize ku lwabwe, nga Mukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Awo Arooni n'asembera okumpi n'alutaari, n'atta ente ennume ento, nga kye kitone ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi ebibye." 
Leviticus9:9 Batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi, n'annyikamu engalo ye, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari, ogusigaddewo n'aguyiwa ku ntobo y'alutaari." 
Leviticus9:10 N'alyoka ayokera ku alutaari, amasavu, n'ensigo, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi eky'ekibumba, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Kyokka ennyama n'eddiba, n'abyokera wabweru w'olusiisira." 
Leviticus9:12 N'atta ensolo ey'ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi, n'agumansira ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus9:13 Ne bamuleetera omutwe n'ebitundu ebirala eby'ensolo eyo, n'abyokera ku alutaari." 
Leviticus9:14 N'ayoza ebyenda n'amagulu, n'abyokera ku alutaari, ku bitundu ebirala eby'ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus9:15 Bwe yamala ebyo, n'aleeta ebitone eby'abantu. N'addira embuzi ey'okuwaayo olw'ebibi by'abantu. N'agitta, n'agiwaayo, nga bwe yakola ng'awaayo olw'ebibi bye." 
Leviticus9:16 Era n'aleeta ensolo ey'ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'agiwaayo ng'ekiragiro bwe kyali." 
Leviticus9:17 N'aleeta ekitone ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'atoolako olubatu lw'obuwunga, n'abwokera ku alutaari, ng'abwongera ku kitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Leviticus9:18 N'atta ente n'endiga ennume, ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, kye yawaayo olw'abantu. Batabani be ne bamuleetera omusaayi, n'agumansira ku njuyi zonna ez'alutaari." 
Leviticus9:19 Amasavu n'ensigo n'ebitundu ebisinga obulungi eby'ekibumba eby'ente n'endiga ennume," 
Leviticus9:20 n'abiteeka ku bifuba eby'ensolo ezo, byonna n'abitwala ku alutaari. N'ayokera amasavu ku alutaari." 
Leviticus9:21 N'awaayo eri Mukama ebifuba n'amagulu aga ddyo, ng'abiwuuba, ne biba ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama, ebiba ebya bakabona, nga Musa bwe yalagira." 
Leviticus9:22 Arooni bwe yamala okuwaayo ebitambiro ebyo: ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, n'ayimusa emikono gye eri abantu, n'abasabira omukisa. N'akka wansi." 
Leviticus9:23 Musa ne Arooni ne bayingira mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Bwe baafuluma, ne basabira abantu omukisa, ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kirabikira abantu bonna." 
Leviticus9:24 Amangwago Mukama n'asindika omuliro, ne gwokera ku alutaari ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa era n'amasavu. Abantu bwe baagulaba, bonna ne baleekaana, ne bavuunama amaaso gaabwe ku ttaka." 
Leviticus10:1 Awo Nadabu ne Abihu, batabani ba Arooni, ne baddira ebyoterezo buli omu ekikye, ne babiteekamu omuliro, ne bateekako obubaane, ne baguleeta mu maaso ga Mukama. Naye omuliro ogwo tegwali mutukuvu, kubanga Mukama si ye yalagira okuguleeta." 
Leviticus10:2 Amangwago Mukama n'asindika omuliro, ne gubookya, ne bafiira mu maaso ge." 
Leviticus10:3 Awo Musa n'agamba Arooni nti: “Kino Mukama kye yayogerako, bwe yagamba nti: ‘Bonna abampeereza bateekwa okussaamu obutukuvu bwange ekitiibwa. Era nnaagulumizibwanga mu maaso g'abantu bonna.’ ” Arooni n'asirika." 
Leviticus10:4 Musa n'ayita Misayeli ne Elizafani, batabani ba Wuzziyeeli, kojja wa Arooni, n'abagamba nti: “Mujje musitule emirambo gya baganda bammwe, mugiggye mu Weema Entukuvu, mugitwale wabweru w'olusiisira.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Ne bajja, ne bagisitulira ku ngoye, ne bagitwala wabweru w'olusiisira, nga Musa bwe yalagira." 
Leviticus10:6 Musa n'agamba Arooni ne batabani be Eleyazaari ne Yitamaari nti: “Temutankuula enviiri zammwe, wadde okuyuza ebyambalo byammwe, okulaga nti munakuwadde. Bwe munaakola ekyo, mujja kufa, era Mukama ajja kusunguwalira ekibiina kyonna. Naye Bayisirayeli bannammwe bonna, bakkirizibwa okukungubagira okufiirwa okwo, okuleeteddwa omuliro Mukama gw'asindise." 
Leviticus10:7 Temuva ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, lwe mutaafe, kubanga muliko omuzigo ogwabasiigiddwa okwawulirwa Mukama.” Ne bakola nga Musa bwe yagamba." 
Leviticus10:8 Mukama n'agamba Arooni nti: 
Leviticus10:9 “Ggwe ne batabani bo, bwe munaabanga munywedde ku mwenge, oba ku kitamiiza kyonna, temuuyingirenga mu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu. Bwe mulikikola, mugenda kufa. Etteeka lino linaakuumibwanga ab'ezzadde lyammwe ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus10:10 Mwawulenga ebyo ebitukuvu, ku bikozesebwa ebya bulijjo, ebyo ebirongoofu, n'ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus10:11 Era muyigirizenga Abayisirayeli amateeka ge mbawadde nga mpita mu Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Arooni ne batabani be Eleyazaari ne Yitamaari abaasigalawo, Musa n'abagamba nti: “Mutwale ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekisigaddewo ku biweebwayo eri Mukama ebyokebwa, mukikolemu emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, mugiriire ku mabbali g'alutaari, kubanga ekiweebwayo ekyo kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus10:13 Mugiriire mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Gwe mugabo gwo ggwe Arooni, n'ogwa batabani bo, ku byokulya ebiweebwayo eri Mukama. Ekyo Mukama kye yandagira." 
Leviticus10:14 Naye ekifuba ekiweebwayo nga kiwuubibwa, n'ekisambi ekiweebwayo nga kisitulibwa, ggwe ne batabani bo ne bawala bo munaayinzanga okubiriira mu kifo kyonna ekirongoofu, kubanga ebyo bikuweebwa ggwe n'abaana bo, nga gwe mugabo gwammwe bakabona, ku bitambiro ebiweebwayo Abayisirayeli olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus10:15 Banaaleetanga ekisambi ekisitulibwa n'ekifuba ekiwuubibwa nga baleeta amasavu okuba ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokebwa. Ebitundu ebyo banaabiwuubanga, bibe ebiweebwayo ebiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama. Era binaabanga bibyo era bya baana bo ennaku zonna, nga Mukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa n'abuuza ebifa ku mbuzi ey'ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi. N'azuula nga yayokeddwa dda. N'asunguwalira Eleyazaari ne Yitamaari, batabani ba Arooni abaasigalawo. N'ababuuza nti:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, lwaki temukiriiridde mu Kifo Ekitukuvu? Ekitone ekyo kitukuvu nnyo, era Mukama yakibawa okuggyawo ebibi by'ekibiina, n'okuddaabiriza ku lw'ekibiina mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus10:18 Omusaayi gwakyo nga bwe gutaaleeteddwa mu Weema Entukuvu, mwandikiriiridde omwo, nga bwe nalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Awo Arooni n'addamu nti: “Olwaleero abantu baleese ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, era bawaddeyo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, naye era ne ntuukibwako ebizibu bino byonna. Kale era singa ndidde ekitone ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, Mukama yandisiimye?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Musa bwe yawulira ebyo, n'amatira." 
Leviticus11:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni 
Leviticus11:2 bategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Bino bye biramu bye munaalyanga ku nsolo zonna eziri ku nsi. 
Leviticus11:3 Buli nsolo erina ebinuulo ebyawulemu era ezza obwenkulumu, eyo gye munaalyanga." 
Leviticus11:4 Naye temuulyenga ŋŋamiya, n'omusu, n'akamyu. Munaabibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu, kubanga newaakubadde bizza obwenkulumu, naye tebirina binuulo byawulemu." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Era temuulyenga mbizzi. Munaagibaliranga mu bitali birongofu, kubanga newaakubadde erina ebinuulo ebyawulemu, naye tezza bwenkulumu." 
Leviticus11:8 Temuulyenga ku nsolo ezo, wadde okuzikoonangako nga zifudde. Si nnongoofu." 
Leviticus11:9 “Munaayinzanga okulya buli kyannyanja ekirina amaggwa n'amagalagamba. 
Leviticus11:10 Naye buli kiramu ekibeera mu mazzi ekitalina maggwa na magalagamba, kinaabanga kya muzizo gye muli." 
Leviticus11:11 Ebyo munaabizizanga. Temuubiryengako, wadde okubikoonangako nga bifudde." 
Leviticus11:12 Buli kibeera mu mazzi ekitalina maggwa na magalagamba, kinaabanga kya muzizo gye muli." 
Leviticus11:13 “Mu binyonyi bye munaazizanga era bye mutaalyenga, mwe muli ennunda, n'empungu, ne makwanzi," 
Leviticus11:14 ne kamunye, n'eddiirawamu n'ebirala ebiri mu bika byalyo;" 
Leviticus11:15 ne nnamuŋŋoona owa buli kika; 
Leviticus11:16 ne mmaaya, n'olubugabuga, n'olusove, n'enkambo n'ebirala ebiri mu kika kyayo," 
Leviticus11:17 n'ekiwuugulu, n'enkobyokkoobyo, n'ekkukufu," 
Leviticus11:18 n'ekiwuugulu eky'amatu, ne kimbala, n'ensega;" 
Leviticus11:19 ne kasida, ne mpaabaana n'ebirala ebiri mu kika kye, n'ekkookootezi, n'ekinyira." 
Leviticus11:20 “Munaazizanga ebiwuka byonna ebirina ebiwaawaatiro, ebitambuza amagulu ana," 
Leviticus11:21 okuggyako ebyo ebibuukabuuka ku magulu gaabyo ku ttaka. 
Leviticus11:22 Munaayinzanga okulya enzige n'enseenene, n'ejjanzi, n'ebirala eby'ebika ebyo." 
Leviticus11:23 Naye ebiwuka byonna ebirala ebirina ebiwaawaatiro, n'amagulu ana, munaabizizanga." 
Leviticus11:24 “Ebisolo bino bye binaabafuulanga abatali balongoofu. Buli anaakoonanga ku mulambo gwabyo, anaasigalanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi," 
Leviticus11:25 na buli anaasitulanga omulambo gwabyo, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, era anaasigalanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi:" 
Leviticus11:26 buli nsolo erina ebinuulo naye nga si byawulemu era nga tezza bwenkulumu, munaagibaliranga mu zitali nnongoofu. Buli anaagikoonangako ng'efudde, taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus11:27 Era buli nsolo ey'amagulu ana erina amaala, munaagibaliranga mu zitali nnongoofu. Buli anaagyekoonangako, anaasigalanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:28 Oyo anaasitulanga omulambo gw'ensolo eyo, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, era anaasigalanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Ensolo ezo munaazibaliranga mu zitali nnongoofu." 
Leviticus11:29 “Mu bitambulira ku ttaka nga byewalula, na bino munaabibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu: eggunju, n'emmese, n'ekkonkome eddene n'ebirala ebiri mu kika kyalyo," 
Leviticus11:30 n'ekinya, enswaswa, n'omunya, n'ekkonkome, ne nnawolovu." 
Leviticus11:31 Ebyo munaabibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu mu byonna ebyewalula. Buli anaabikoonangako nga bifudde, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:32 Era buli kintu ekinagwibwangako ebintu ebyo nga bifudde, ka kibe kya muti, oba ka kibe lugoye, oba ddiba, oba nsawo, oba ekirala kyonna ekikozesebwa, tekiibenga kirongoofu. Kinaateekwanga okunnyikibwa mu mazzi, naye ne kisigala nga si kirongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi, ne kiryoka kiba ekirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:33 Singa bigwa mu kintu eky'ebbumba, byonna ebirimu tebiibenga birongoofu, era eky'ebbumba ekyo kinaayasibwanga." 
Leviticus11:34 Buli kyakulya ekyandisobodde okuliika, naye ne kiyiibwako amazzi agavudde mu ky'ebbumba ekyo, tekiibenga kirongoofu, era buli kyakunywa mu ky'ebbumba ekyo, tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:35 Buli kintu ekinaagwibwangako ebintu ebyo nga bifudde, tekiibenga kirongoofu: oba kyoto, oba masiga ga ntamu, binaamenyebwanga. Si birongoofu, era munaabizizanga." 
Leviticus11:36 Naye oluzzi oba ttanka erimu amazzi, binaabanga birongoofu, newaakubadde ng'ekirala kyonna ekikoona ku bintu ebyo nga bifudde tekiba kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:37 Singa ekimu ku byo ekifudde kigwa ku nsigo egenda okusigibwa, ensigo esigala nnongoofu." 
Leviticus11:38 Naye singa ensigo eba ennyikiddwa mu mazzi, ekimu ku byo ekifudde ne kigwa ku yo, ensigo eyo temuugiyitenga nnongoofu." 
Leviticus11:39 “Singa ensolo eyinza okuliibwa efa, buli agikoonako taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:40 Ate oyo anaagiryangako, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye era taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. N'oyo anaagisitulanga ng'efudde, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, era anaasigalanga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus11:41 “Munaazizanga obusolo obutono obutambula ku nsi, temuubulyenga," 
Leviticus11:42 oba bwewalula, oba butambuza amagulu ana, oba bulina amagulu mangi." 
Leviticus11:43 Temweyonoonanga na byewalula ebyo, era temwefuulanga batali balongoofu olw'ebitonde ebyo." 
Leviticus11:44 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. Mubeerenga batuukirivu, kubanga nze ndi mutuukirivu. Temwejaajaamyanga olw'ekintu n'ekimu ekyekululira ku ttaka." 
Leviticus11:45 Nze Mukama eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ndyoke mbenga Katonda wammwe. Kale mubeerenga batuukirivu, kubanga nze ndi mutuukirivu." 
Leviticus11:46 “Lino lye tteeka erifa ku nsolo ne ku binyonyi, ne ku buli kiramu ekibeera mu mazzi, ne ku buli kiramu ekitambula ku ttaka," 
Leviticus11:47 ery'okwawula ebirongoofu ku bitali birongoofu, n'okwawula ebiramu ebikkirizibwa okuliibwa, ku bitakkirizibwa.”" 
Leviticus12:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus12:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti omukazi bw'anaabanga olubuto n'azaala omwana ow'obulenzi, ennaku omusanvu eziddirira, taabenga mulongoofu, nga bw'ataba mulongoofu mu biseera bye eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi." 
Leviticus12:3 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, omwana anaakomolebwanga." 
Leviticus12:4 Olwo omukazi oyo anaamalanga ennaku amakumi asatu mu ssatu ng'abalibwa nti tannatukuzibwa, olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu ng'azaala. Taakwatenga ku kintu kitukuvu, wadde okuyingira mu kifo ekitukuvu, okutuusa ennaku ez'okutukuzibwa kwe lwe zinaggwangako." 
Leviticus12:5 Naye bw'anaazaalanga omwana ow'obuwala, anaamalanga ennaku kkumi na nnya nga si mulongoofu, nga bw'aba mu biseera bye ebya buli mwezi. Olwo anaamalanga ennaku endala nkaaga mu mukaaga ng'abalibwa nti tannatukuzibwa olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu ng'azaala." 
Leviticus12:6 “Awo ennaku ze ez'okutukuzibwa bwe zinaggwangako, ez'omwana ow'obulenzi oba ow'obuwala, omukazi oyo anaaleetanga eri kabona ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, omwana gw'endiga ogw'omwaka ogumu, gube ekitone ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'enjiibwa, oba ejjiba etto, okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus12:7 Kabona anaawangayo ekitone ekyo eri Mukama n'addaabiririza omukazi oyo, omukazi oyo n'atukuzibwa olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu. Eryo lye tteeka erifuga omukazi azaala omwana, ow'obulenzi oba ow'obuwala." 
Leviticus12:8 “Omukazi bw'aba tasobola kuleeta mwana gwa ndiga olw'enfuna ye entono, anaaleetanga amayiba amato abiri, oba enjiibwa bbiri, emu ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'endala ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi. Kabona anaamuddaabiririzanga, n'aba mulongoofu.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus13:2 “Omuntu bw'anaabanga n'ekizimba, oba ejjute, oba embalabe erungudde, ku lususu lwe, nga kiyinza okufuuka endwadde y'ebigenge, anaaleetebwanga eri Arooni kabona, oba eri omu ku bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni." 
Leviticus13:3 Kabona anaakeberanga endwadde eri ku lususu. Obwoya obuli awalwadde bwe bunaabanga bufuuse obweru, n'endwadde ng'erabika eyingidde munda okuyisa olususu, eyo nga ye ndwadde y'ebigenge. Awo kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:4 Naye ekizimba ekirungudde bwe kiba ekyeru, nga kirabika tekiyingidde munda kuyisa lususu, n'obwoya nga tebufuuse bweru, kabona anaakuumiranga omuntu oyo mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:5 Awo kabona anaddangamu okumukebera ku lunaku olw'omusanvu. Bw'anaalabanga ng'endwadde esigadde nga bwe yali, teyeeyongedde kubuna walala ku lususu, anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku endala musanvu." 
Leviticus13:6 Kabona anaamukeberanga nate ku lunaku olw'omusanvu. Endwadde bw'eba ng'ekendedde, era nga teyeeyongedde kubuna walala ku lususu, kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu, alina kizimba buzimba. Awo omuntu oyo anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'aba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:7 Naye ekizimba bwe kineeyongeranga okubuna awalala ku lususu, nga kabona amaze okumukebera n'okumulangirira bw'ali omulongoofu, anaddangamu okweyanjula eri kabona." 
Leviticus13:8 Kabona anaddangamu okumukebera. Ekizimba bwe kiba nga kibunye awalala ku lususu, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu, nga by'alina bye bigenge." 
Leviticus13:9 “Omuntu ng'akwatiddwa endwadde y'ebigenge, anaaleetebwanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus13:10 n'amukebera. Bw'aba n'ekizimba ekyeru ku lususu lwe, ekyerusizza n'obwoya, era ng'omubiri gwesaliridde awazimbye," 
Leviticus13:11 ebyo nga bye bigenge ebitawona ku lususu lwe. Kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Tekyetaagisa kumukuumira mu kifo yekka, kubanga ddala oyo si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:12 Ebigenge bwe bisaasaana ne bibuna omulwadde, okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere," 
Leviticus13:13 kabona anaamukeberanga. Bw'anaalabanga ng'ebigenge bibunye omubiri gwe gwonna, anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu. Olususu lwonna bwe luba lufuuse lweru, oyo abalibwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:14 Naye bw'anaalabikangako ebbwa, taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:15 Kabona anaamukeberanga nate. Bw'anaalabanga ebbwa, anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Ebbwa bye bigenge. Olwo omuntu oyo si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:16 Naye ebbwa bwe liwona ne waddawo obupeeruufu, omuntu oyo anaagendanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus13:17 kabona n'addamu okumukebera. Awaali ebbwa bwe waba nga wapeeruuse, oyo nga mulongoofu, era kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:18 “Omuntu bw'anaabanga n'ejjute ne liwona," 
Leviticus13:19 naye oluvannyuma awaali ejjute ne waddawo ekizimba ekyeru, oba ebbala erimyukirivu, omuntu oyo anaagendanga eri kabona." 
Leviticus13:20 Kabona anaamukeberanga. Bwe kinaalabikanga ng'ebbala liyingidde munda okuyisa olususu, n'obwoya bwawo nga bweruse, kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Eyo ye ndwadde y'ebigenge efulumye mu jjute." 
Leviticus13:21 Naye kabona bw'anaakeberanga nga tewali bwoya bweru, era nga teweesimye kuyisa lususu, naye nga langi yaawo ntangaavu, olwo kabona anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:22 Ebbala bwe linaabunanga awalala ku lususu, olwo kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu, mulwadde." 
Leviticus13:23 Naye ebbala bwe linaakomanga awo, ne litabuna walala, eyo nga ye nkovu y'ejjute eriwonye. Awo kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:24 “Omuntu bw'anaayokebwanga omuliro, omubiri ogwokeddwa ne gweruka, oba ne wafuuka aweeruyeru era awamyukirivu," 
Leviticus13:25 kabona anaamukeberanga. Obwoya mu kifo ekyo bwe bunaafuukanga obweru, era ne kirabika nga weesimye okuyisa olususu, ebyo bye bigenge ebifulumye awaayokebwa. Kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:26 Naye kabona bw'anaakeberanga n'alaba nga tewali bwoya bweru, era nga teweesimye kuyisa lususu, naye nga langi yaawo ntangaavu, kabona anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:27 Kabona anaddangamu okumukebera ku lunaku olw'omusanvu. Awalungudde bwe wanaabunanga awalala ku lususu, eneebanga ndwadde ya bigenge. Kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:28 Naye awalungudde bwe wanaakomanga awo, ne wateeyongera kubuna walala, era nga langi yaawo ntangaavu, ebyo nga si bigenge. Era kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu, kubanga eyo nkovu ya muliro." 
Leviticus13:29 “Omusajja oba omukazi bw'abanga n'endwadde ku mutwe oba ku kalevu," 
Leviticus13:30 kabona anaagikeberanga. Bw'eneerabikanga ng'esimye okuyisa ku lususu, era ng'enviiri ezirimu za kyenvu, era nga za ntalaga, kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu. Ebyo bye bigenge eby'oku mutwe, oba eby'oku kalevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Era kabona bw'anaakeberanga endwadde, nga terabika nti esimye okuyisa ku lususu, naye nga tewali nviiri nzirugavu, kabona anaakuumiranga omulwadde oyo mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:32 Kabona anaddangamu okumukebera ku lunaku olw'omusanvu. Endwadde bw'eneebanga tebunye walala, era nga tewali nviiri za kyenvu, era nga terabika nti eyingidde okuyisa olususu," 
Leviticus13:33 omulwadde anaamwangako enviiri ze okuggyako awo awalwadde, kabona n'amukuumira mu kifo yekka, okumala ennaku endala musanvu." 
Leviticus13:34 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu kabona anaakeberanga awalwadde. Endwadde bw'eneebanga tebunye walala ku lususu, era nga tekirabika nti eyingidde okuyisa olususu, anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu. Omulwadde anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'aba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:35 Naye endwadde bw'eneebunanga awalala ku lususu ng'omulwadde amaze okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu," 
Leviticus13:36 awo kabona anaamukeberanga. Bw'eneebanga ebunye awalala ku lususu, tekyetaagisenga kunoonya nviiri za kyenvu. Ddala oyo si mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:37 Naye kabona bw'anaalabanga ng'endwadde ekomye awo, era ng'enviiri enzirugavu zimezeewo, endwadde ng'ewonye, era kabona anaamulangiriranga nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:38 “Omusajja oba omukazi bw'anaabanga n'amabala ameeru ku lususu," 
Leviticus13:39 kabona anaamukeberanga. Amabala bwe ganaabanga amapeeruufu, obwo nga butulututtu obufulumye mu lususu. Oyo mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:40 “Omusajja bw'anaakuunyuukanga enviiri ku mutwe mu kawompo oba enkoto, oyo aba wa kiwalaata, mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Naye ekibambya ekimyukirivu, oba ekyeruyeru, bwe kirabika awakuunyuuse enviiri, eyo nga ndwadde ya bigenge." 
Leviticus13:43 Kabona anaamukeberanga. Bw'anaabangako ekibambya ekimyukirivu era ekyeruyeru," 
Leviticus13:44 kabona anaamulangiriranga nti si mulongoofu, olw'ebigenge ku mutwe gwe." 
Leviticus13:45 “Omuntu alwadde ebigenge, anaayambalanga ngoye eziyulise, n'aleka enviiri ze nga si nsanirire, n'abikka ku mutwe gwe, n'alangiriranga nti: ‘Siri mulongoofu, siri mulongoofu!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Ebbanga lyonna ly'anaamalanga ng'akyali mulwadde, taabenga mulongoofu. Anaabeeranga yekka. Ennyumba ye, eneebeeranga bweru wa lusiisira." 
Leviticus13:47 “Endwadde y'ebigenge bw'eneebanga ku kyambalo, oba kya byoya bya ndiga, oba kya lugoye lwa bafuta," 
Leviticus13:48 oba ku kiwero eky'olugoye olwa bafuta, oba olw'ebyoya by'endiga, oba ku ddiba, oba ku kintu ekikoleddwa mu ddiba," 
Leviticus13:49 endwadde eyo bw'eba eya kiragalalagala, oba emmyukirivu ku kyambalo oba ku ddiba, oba ku kintu ekyakolebwa mu ddiba, eyo nga ndwadde ya bigenge, era eneeragibwanga kabona." 
Leviticus13:50 Kabona anaagikeberanga, n'abaako w'akuumira ekintu ekyo okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:51 Anaddangamu okukebera endwadde eyo ku lunaku olw'omusanvu. Bw'eneebanga ebunye awalala, nga bye bigenge ebirya. Ekintu ekyo kinaabanga ekitali kirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:52 Kabona anaakyokyanga mu muliro, kubanga ebyo bye bigenge ebirya. Biteekwa okuzikirizibwa." 
Leviticus13:53 “Naye kabona bw'anaakeberanga n'alaba ng'endwadde tebunye mu kintu," 
Leviticus13:54 anaalagiranga ne bakyoza, ne kiterekebwa okumala ennaku endala musanvu." 
Leviticus13:55 Awo anaakikeberanga. Endwadde bw'eneebanga tekyusizza bbala lyayo, ne bw'eneebanga tebunye, ekyo tekiibenga kirongoofu. Munaayokyanga ekintu ekyo, okukuubuuka oba kuli munda oba kungulu." 
Leviticus13:56 Naye kabona bw'anaddangamu okukikebera, endwadde n'eterabika nnyo, anaagiyuzanga mu kyambalo oba mu ddiba." 
Leviticus13:57 Endwadde bw'eneddangamu okulabika, nga ndwadde ya bigenge. Olwo nnannyini kintu ekyo anaakyokyanga." 
Leviticus13:58 Bw'anaakyozanga, ebbala ne liggwaamu, anaddangamu n'akyoza, ne kibalibwa nga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:59 “Eryo lye tteeka ly'ebigenge mu kyambalo oba kya bafuta, oba kya byoya bya ndiga, oba mu kintu kyonna ekyakolebwa mu ddiba, erinaagobererwanga okulangirira ekirongoofu n'ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Leviticus14:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus14:2 “Lino lye tteeka erinaagobererwanga mu kutukuza awonyezeddwa endwadde y'ebigenge. Ku lunaku lw'anaalangirirwangako nti mulongoofu, anaaleetebwanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus14:3 kabona n'amufulumya olusiisira,n'amukebera." 
Leviticus14:4 Endwadde y'ebigenge bw'eneebanga ewonye, kabona oyo anaalagiranga okuleeta ebinyonyi bibiri ebiramu era ebirongoofu, n'omuti omwerezi, n'ekiwuzi ky'olugoye olumyufu, n'akati akayitibwa yisopu." 
Leviticus14:5 Awo kabona anaalagiranga okuttira ekimu ku binyonyi ebyo mu kibya eky'ebbumba, omuli amazzi agavudde mu nsulo ezikulukuta." 
Leviticus14:6 Anaddiranga ekinyonyi ekiramu, awamu n'omuti omwerezi, n'olugoye olumyufu, n'akati akayitibwa yisopu, n'abinnyika mu musaayi gw'ekinyonyi ekittiddwa." 
Leviticus14:7 “Anaamansiranga omusaayi emirundi musanvu ku oyo agenda okutukuzibwako endwadde y'ebigenge, n'alyoka amulangirira nti mulongoofu. N'ata ekinyonyi ekiramu, ne kibuukira mu bbanga mu ttale." 
Leviticus14:8 Omuntu oyo agenda okutukuzibwa anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'amwako enviiri ze zonna, n'anaaba, olwo n'abalibwa nga mulongoofu, n'alyoka ayingira mu lusiisira. Kyokka anaamalanga ennaku musanvu ng'ali bweru w'eweema ye." 
Leviticus14:9 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu nate anaamwangako enviiri ze zonna, n'ekirevu n'ebisige, n'obwoya bwonna ku mubiri gwe. Era anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba omubiri, olwo n'abalibwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ku lunaku olw'omunaana anaaleetanga abaana b'endiga babiri aba sseddume, n'endiga enduusi emu ey'omwaka ogumu, zonna nga teziriiko kamogo, ne kilo ssatu ez'obuwunga bw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo gw'ebibala by'emizayiti, n'aleeta n'ekimu ekyokusatu ekya lita y'omuzigo gw'ebibala by'emizayiti." 
Leviticus14:11 Kabona anaateekanga omuntu oyo n'ebintu ebyo mu maaso ga Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. 
Leviticus14:12 Awo kabona anaddiranga emu ku ndiga ento eza sseddume, awamu n'ekimu ekyokusatu ekya lita y'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, n'abiwaayo ng'omutango, n'abiwuuba, ne biba ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus14:13 Awo anattiranga endiga eyo ento mu Kifo Ekitukuvu awattirwa ensolo ez'ebiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'ez'ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa. Anaakolanga bw'atyo kubanga ekiweebwayo olw'omutango, okufaanana ng'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, kiba kya kabona era kitukuvu nnyo." 
Leviticus14:14 “Kabona anaatoolanga ku musaayi gw'ekiweebwayo ng'omutango, n'aguteeka ku nsonda y'okutu okwa ddyo ne ku kinkumu eky'oku mukono ogwa ddyo, ne ku kigere ekisajja ekya ddyo, eby'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:15 Kabona anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogw'ebibala by'emizayiti, n'agufuka mu kibatu ekikye kyennyini ekya kkono," 
Leviticus14:16 n'annyika olunwe lwe olwa ddyo mu muzigo ogwo oguli mu kibatu kye ekya kkono, n'agumansira emirundi musanvu awo mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus14:17 Anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogusigaddewo mu kibatu kye, ne ku musaayi gw'ekiweebwayo ng'omutango, n'aguteeka ku nsonda y'okutu okwa ddyo, ne ku kinkumu eky'oku mukono ogwa ddyo, era ne ku kigere ekisajja eky'okugulu okwa ddyo, eby'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:18 Omuzigo ogusigadde mu kibatu kye, anaaguteekanga ku mutwe gw'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu. Mu ngeri eyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lw'omuntu oyo mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus14:19 “Kabona anaawangayo ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'addaabiriza olw'oyo agenda okuggyibwako obutali bulongoofu. Oluvannyuma anattanga ensolo ey'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa," 
Leviticus14:20 n'akiwaayo ku alutaari wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'omuntu oyo, omuntu oyo n'aba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:21 “Bw'anaabanga omwavu atasobola kufuna byenkana awo, anaaleetanga omwana gw'endiga ogwa sseddume gube ogw'omutango. Gunaabanga ekiweebwayo eri Mukama nga kiwuubibwa, ekitwalibwa kabona. Anaaleetanga kilo emu ey'obuwunga bw'eŋŋaano, obutabuddwamu omuzigo gw'ebibala by'emizayiti." 
Leviticus14:22 Era anaaleetanga enjiibwa bbiri, oba amayiba amato abiri. Ejjiba erimu linaabanga ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'eddala ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus14:23 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana olw'okutukuzibwa kwe, anaagaleetanga eri kabona, mu maaso ga Mukama, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus14:24 “Kabona anaddiranga omwana gw'endiga oguweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala by'emizayiti, n'abiwaayo eri Mukama ng'abiwuuba, ne biba ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa, ekitwalibwa kabona." 
Leviticus14:25 Anattanga omwana gw'endiga ogwo, n'atoola ku musaayi gwagwo n'aguteeka ku nsonda y'okutu okwa ddyo, ne ku kinkumu eky'omukono ogwa ddyo ne ku kigere ekisajja ekya ddyo eby'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:26 Awo kabona anaafukanga ku muzigo mu kibatu ekikye kyennyini ekya kkono," 
Leviticus14:27 n'agumansira n'olunwe lwe olwa ddyo emirundi musanvu awo mu maaso ga Mukama. 
Leviticus14:28 Anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogwo, n'aguteeka ku nsonda y'okutu okwa ddyo, ne ku kinkumu eky'oku mukono ogwa ddyo, ne ku kigere ekisajja eky'okugulu okwa ddyo eby'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:29 Omuzigo ogusigadde mu kibatu kye anaaguteekanga ku mutwe gw'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu, okuddaabiriza ku lulwe mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus14:30 Awo anaawangayo emu ku njiibwa, oba erimu ku mayiba amato, oli bw'aba nga g'asobodde okufuna, ne liba" 
Leviticus14:31 ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'eddala ne liba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga olw'oyo agenda okulangirirwa nti mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:32 Eryo lye tteeka ku oyo alina endwadde y'ebigenge, atasobola kufuna byetaagibwa ebya bulijjo mu kutukuzibwa kwe.”" 
Leviticus14:33 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Leviticus14:34 “Bwe muliba nga mutuuse mu nsi y'e Kanaani, gye mbawa mmwe okuba obutaka bwammwe, bwe nnaateekanga endwadde y'ebigenge mu nnyumba mu nsi eyo ebaweebwa," 
Leviticus14:35 nnannyini nnyumba eyo anajjanga n'abuulira kabona nti: ‘Ennyumba yange enfaananira okubaamu endwadde y'ebigenge.’ 
Leviticus14:36 Kabona nga tannayingira kukebera ndwadde ya bigenge, anaalagiranga okufulumya buli kintu mu nnyumba eyo, bireme kufuuka ebitali birongoofu. Olwo kabona anaayingiranga ennyumba," 
Leviticus14:37 okukebera endwadde y'ebigenge. Bwe wanaabangawo amabala aga kiragalalagala, oba amamyukirivu, agalabika nga galya ekisenge," 
Leviticus14:38 kabona anaavanga mu nnyumba, n'agiggala okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus14:39 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu anaakomangawo n'akebera. Endwadde bw'eneebanga ebunye," 
Leviticus14:40 anaalagiranga okuggyamu amayinja agaliko endwadde, n'okugasuula ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo awasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:41 Era anaalagiranga ne bakokota ennyumba munda enjuyi zonna, langi ekolokoteddwamu n'esuulibwa ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo awasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:42 Ne baddira amayinja amalala ne bagazimba mu kifo kya gali agaggyiddwamu, era ne baddira langi endala ne bagisiiga ku bisenge." 
Leviticus14:43 “Awo endwadde bw'eddangamu okufuutuuka mu nnyumba ng'amayinja gamaze okuggyibwamu, nga n'ebisenge bikolokoteddwa ne bisiigibwa langi," 
Leviticus14:44 kabona anaayingiranga n'akebera. Endwadde bw'eneebanga ebunye, ebyo nga bye bigenge ebirya ennyumba, era teebenga nnongoofu." 
Leviticus14:45 Eneeyabizibwanga, amayinja gaayo n'emiti ne langi yaayo yonna binaatwalibwanga ebweru w'ekibuga mu kifo awasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:46 Era buli anaayingiranga mu nnyumba eyo ng'ekyaggaliddwawo, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus14:47 Buli anaasulanga mu nnyumba eyo oba buli anaaliirangamu, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye." 
Leviticus14:48 “Kabona bw'anaayingiranga n'alaba ng'endwadde tezzeemu kulabika ng'ennyumba emaze okusiigibwako langi, anaalangiriranga nti ennyumba eyo nnongoofu, kubanga endwadde ewonye." 
Leviticus14:49 Okutukuza ennyumba, anaakozesanga ebinyonyi bibiri, n'omuti omwerezi, n'olugoye olumyufu, n'akati akayitibwa yisopu." 
Leviticus14:50 Anattiranga ekimu ku binyonyi ebyo mu kibya eky'ebbumba, omuli amazzi agavudde mu nsulo ezikulukuta." 
Leviticus14:51 Anaddiranga omuti omwerezi, n'akati akayitibwa yisopu, n'ekinyonyi ekiramu, n'abinnyika mu musaayi gw'ekinyonyi ekittiddwa, ne mu mazzi agavudde mu nsulo ezikulukuta. Anaamansiranga ennyumba emirundi musanvu." 
Leviticus14:52 Bw'atyo anaatukuzanga ennyumba ng'akozesa omusaayi gw'ekinyonyi, n'amazzi amalungi, n'omuti omwerezi, n'akati akayitibwa yisopu, era n'olugoye olumyufu." 
Leviticus14:53 Anaatanga ekinyonyi ekiramu ne kibuuka mu bbanga okuva mu kibuga, ne kigenda mu ttale. Bw'atyo bw'anaatukuzanga ennyumba n'eba nnongoofu." 
Leviticus14:54 “Ago ge mateeka ku ndwadde zonna ez'ebigenge," 
Leviticus14:55 era ge mateeka ku bizimba, n'amayute, n'embalabe ezirungudde, n'ebigenge mu ngoye ne mu mayumba." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Ge ganaagobererwanga okusalawo ku birongoofu, ne ku bitali birongoofu.”" 
Leviticus15:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Leviticus15:2 “Mwogere n'Abayisirayeli mubategeeze nti buli musajja alwadde enziku, taabenga mulongoofu olw'enziku ye gy'alwadde," 
Leviticus15:3 oba ng'emuleetera okutonnya, omusulo oba okuzibikira." 
Leviticus15:4 Alwadde enziku, buli kitanda ky'aneebakangako, na buli kintu ky'anaatuulangako, tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:5 Era buli anaakoonanga ku kitanda ky'ow'enziku, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:6 N'oyo anaatuulanga ku kintu ow'enziku ky'abadde atuddeko, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:7 Era n'oyo anaakoonanga ku w'enziku, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:8 Ow'enziku bw'anaawandanga amalusu ku mulongoofu, omulongoofu anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:9 Amatandiiko ow'enziku g'anaatuulangako okwebagala ensolo, tegaabenga malongoofu." 
Leviticus15:10 Buli akwata ku kintu ow'enziku ky'abadde atuddeko, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Era n'oyo anaakisitulanga, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:11 Ow'enziku bw'anaakwatanga ku muntu nga tamaze kunaaba mu ngalo, akwatiddwako anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:12 Ekintu eky'ebbumba ow'enziku ky'anaakwatangako, kinaayasibwanga. Na buli kintu kya muti ky'anaakwatangako, kinaayozebwanga mu mazzi." 
Leviticus15:13 “Ow'enziku bw'anaawonanga enziku ye, anaalindangako ennaku musanvu okwetukuza, n'alyoka ayoza ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi agakulukuta, n'aba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:14 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, anaatwalanga enjiibwa bbiri, oba amayiba amato abiri, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'agawa kabona." 
Leviticus15:15 Kabona anaagawangayo: erimu nga lya kiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'eddala nga lya kiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lw'omuntu oyo mu maaso ga Mukama, olw'enziku ye gy'alwadde." 
Leviticus15:16 “Omusajja bw'anaavangamu amazzi ag'obusajja, anaanaabanga omubiri gwonna, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:17 Buli kintu kya lugoye oba kya ddiba amazzi ag'obusajja kwe gatonnye, kinaayozebwanga, ne kisigala nga si kirongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:18 Era omusajja n'omukazi nga bamaze okwebaka bombi, banaanaabanga mu mazzi, ne basigala nga si balongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:19 “Omukazi bw'anaabeeranga mu biseera eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu. Era buli anaamukoonangako, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:20 Buli kintu ky'aneebakangako, oba ky'anaatuulangako mu nnaku z'ebiseera eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:21 Buli anaakoonanga ku kitanda ky'omukazi oyo, oba ku kintu kyonna ky'abadde atuddeko, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Omusajja aneebakanga naye mu biseera eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, taabenga mulongoofu okumala ennaku musanvu, era buli kitanda kye yeebakako, tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:25 “Omukazi bw'anaavangamu omusaayi ennaku ennyingi nga tali mu biseera bye eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, oba ng'ayisizza mu biseera bye ebya bulijjo, anaasigalanga si mulongoofu ennaku zonna z'anaaviirangamu omusaayi, nga bw'aba mu biseera eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi." 
Leviticus15:26 Buli kitanda kye yeebakako, ne buli kintu ky'atuulako mu kiseera ekyo, tekiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:27 Ne buli anaabikoonangako, taabenga mulongoofu, era anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus15:28 Omukazi oyo bw'anaakomanga okuvaamu omusaayi, anaalindanga ne wayitawo ennaku musanvu, n'alyoka aba omulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:29 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, anaatwalanga enjiibwa bbiri, oba amayiba amato abiri, eri kabona ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Leviticus15:30 Kabona anaagawangayo: erimu nga lya kiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'eddala nga lya kiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Bw'atyo kabona anaddaabirizanga ku lw'omuntu oyo mu maaso ga Mukama, olw'okuvaamu omusaayi ogwamufuula atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:31 “Bwe mutyo bwe munaalabulanga Abayisirayeli ku butali bulongoofu bwabwe, baleme okubufiiramu olw'okujaajaamya Eweema yange eri wakati mu bo." 
Leviticus15:32 “Ago ge mateeka ku musajja alwadde enziku, oba avaamu amazzi ag'obusajja," 
Leviticus15:33 ne ku mukazi mu biseera bye eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, ne ku musajja eyeebaka n'omukazi atali mulongoofu.”" 
Leviticus16:1 Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa, nga Arooni amaze okufiirwa batabani be bombi, bwe baasembera mu maaso ga Mukama ne bafa." 
Leviticus16:2 N'agamba nti: “Gamba Arooni muganda wo, obutamalanga gajja buli w'ayagalidde munda w'olutimbe mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, mu maaso g'entebe ey'obusaasizi eri ku ssanduuko, aleme kufa, kubanga nnaalabikiranga mu kire ku ntebe eyo ey'obusaasizi." 
Leviticus16:3 Arooni anaayingiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ng'alina ente ennume envubuka ey'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume ey'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus16:4 Anaamalanga kunaaba mu mazzi, n'ayambala ebyambalo ebitukuvu eby'engoye ennungi: ekkanzu n'empale, olukoba n'enkuufiira." 
Leviticus16:5 “Ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli kinaawanga Arooni embuzi ennume bbiri ez'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'endiga ennume emu ey'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus16:6 Anaawangayo ente ennume ey'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi eyiye ku bubwe, n'addaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'ab'ennyumba ye." 
Leviticus16:7 Awo anaatwalanga embuzi zombi ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. 
Leviticus16:8 Anaazikubiranga akalulu okulondako eneeba eya Mukama, n'eyo eneeba eya Azazeeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Arooni anaawangayo embuzi erondeddwawo akalulu okuba eya Mukama, n'agitta ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi." 
Leviticus16:10 Naye embuzi erondeddwawo akalulu okuba eya Azazeeli, eneeteebwanga mu maaso ga Mukama nga nnamu, olw'okuddaabiriza, olwo n'eryoka esindiikirizibwa eri Azazeeli mu ddungu." 
Leviticus16:11 “Arooni bw'anaawangayo ente ennume ey'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, eyiye ku bubwe, okuddaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'ab'ennyumba ye," 
Leviticus16:12 anaddiranga ekyoterezo ekijjudde amanda ag'omuliro, g'aggye ku alutaari mu maaso ga Mukama, n'obubaane obw'akaloosa obusekuddwa ennyo, bwa mbatu bbiri, n'abireeta munda w'olutimbe." 
Leviticus16:13 Awo anaateekanga obubaane ku muliro mu maaso ga Mukama, omukka ogw'obubaane ne gubikka entebe ey'obusaasizi n'atagiraba, aleme okufa." 
Leviticus16:14 Anaatoolanga ku musaayi gw'ente ennume, n'agumansira n'engalo ye ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba olw'entebe ey'obusaasizi, era n'agumansira mu maaso g'entebe eyo emirundi musanvu." 
Leviticus16:15 “Awo anattanga embuzi ey'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, ey'abantu, n'aleeta omusaayi gwayo munda w'olutimbe, n'agumansira ku ntebe ey'obusaasizi, ne mu maaso gaayo, nga bwe yakoze ku musaayi gw'ente ennume." 
Leviticus16:16 Bw'atyo anaddaabirizanga olw'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, okukiggyako obutali bulongoofu bw'Abayisirayeli, n'ensobi zaabwe, n'ebibi byabwe byonna. Era bw'atyo bw'anaakolanga ku Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ebeera nabo mu makkati gaabwe abatali balongoofu." 
Leviticus16:17 Temuubenga muntu mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, nga Arooni ayingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu okuddaabiriza, okutuusa lw'anaafulumanga ng'amaze okuddaabiriza ku lulwe, ne ku lw'ab'ennyumba ye, ne ku lw'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Olwo anaafulumanga n'agenda ku alutaari eri mu maaso ga Mukama, n'addaabiriza ku lwayo. N'atoola ku musaayi gw'ente ennume, ne ku gw'embuzi, n'agusiiga ku mayembe g'alutaari eyo, ku nsonda zaayo zonna." 
Leviticus16:19 N'agimansira omusaayi n'olunwe lwe emirundi musanvu, n'agirongoosa okugiggyako obutali bulongoofu bw'Abayisirayeli, n'agitukuza." 
Leviticus16:20 “Arooni bw'anaamalirizanga okuddaabiriza olw'Ekifo Ekitukuvu n'Eweema yonna ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne alutaari, anaayanjulangayo embuzi ennamu." 
Leviticus16:21 Anaateekanga emikono gye gyombi ku mutwe gw'embuzi eyo ennamu, n'agyatulirako ebyonoono n'ebibi by'Abayisirayeli, n'obujeemu bwabwe bwonna, n'abizza ku mutwe gwayo, n'agisindiikiriza mu ddungu ng'etwalibwa omuntu eyategekeddwa." 
Leviticus16:22 Embuzi eyo eneetwalanga ebibi byabwe byonna, n'egenda nabyo mu nsi eteriimu bantu. Oyo agitwala anaagiteeranga mu ddungu." 
Leviticus16:23 “Awo Arooni anaayingiranga mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'ayambulamu ebyambalo ebyeru bye yayambadde okuyingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'abireka omwo." 
Leviticus16:24 Anaanaabiranga omubiri mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'ayambala engoye ze, n'afuluma, n'awaayo ekitambiro ekyokebwa ekikye, n'ekitambiro ekyokebwa okuddaabiriza ku lulwe ne ku lw'abantu." 
Leviticus16:25 Amasavu g'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi anaagookeranga ku alutaari. 
Leviticus16:26 Oyo asindiikirizza embuzi mu ddungu eri Azazeeli, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba omubiri, olwo n'alyoka ayingira mu lusiisira." 
Leviticus16:27 Ente ennume n'embuzi ez'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, omusaayi gwazo oguyingiziddwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu okuddaabiriza, zinaafulumizibwanga ebweru w'olusiisira, ne zookebwa. Amaliba, n'ennyama n'ebyenda byazo, binaayokebwanga." 
Leviticus16:28 Oyo abyokya anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba omubiri mu mazzi, olwo n'alyoka adda mu lusiisira." 
Leviticus16:29 “Etteeka lino linaakuumibwanga ennaku zonna. Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, Abayisirayeli n'abagwira abali mu bo, baneebonerezanga, era tebaakolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Leviticus16:30 Ku lunaku olwo, wanaabangawo okuddaabiriza ku lwammwe olw'okubatukuza, muggyibweko ebibi byammwe byonna, mube balongoofu mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus16:31 Olwo lunaabanga Sabbaato yammwe ya kuwummulira ddala, era muneebonerezanga. Etteeka lino linaakuumibwanga ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus16:32 Kabona eyafukibwako omuzigo n'ayawulibwa okuba kabona mu kifo kya kitaawe, ye anaddaabirizanga ng'ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus16:33 Anaddaabirizanga olw'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, n'olw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'olw'alutaari, era anaddaabirizanga olwa bakabona, n'olw'abantu bonna ab'omu kibiina." 
Leviticus16:34 Etteeka lino munaalikuumanga ennaku zonna, wabeerengawo okuddaabiriza ku lw'Abayisirayeli omulundi gumu buli mwaka, olw'ebibi byabwe.” Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Leviticus17:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus17:2 “Yogera ne Arooni ne batabani be, n'Abayisirayeli bonna, obagambe nti: ‘Kino Mukama ky'alagidde:" 
Leviticus17:3 Omuyisirayeli anaatambiranga ente, oba endiga, oba embuzi mu lusiisira oba ebweru waalwo," 
Leviticus17:4 n'atagireeta ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, okugiwaayo ng'ekitone eri Mukama mu maaso g'ekifo Mukama w'abeera, anaavunaanibwanga omusango ogw'okuyiwa omusaayi, era anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama." 
Leviticus17:5 Ekigendererwa mu tteeka lino, be Bayisirayeli okuleetanga eri Mukama ebitambiro byabwe bye babadde battira mu ttale mu bbanga, babireetenga eri kabona ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, babitte, bibe ebitambiro ebiweebwayo eri Mukama olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus17:6 Awo kabona anaamansiranga omusaayi ku alutaari ya Mukama, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'ayokya amasavu, ne galeeta evvumbe erisanyusa Mukama," 
Leviticus17:7 Abayisirayeli balemenga kwongera kuba batali beesigwa eri Mukama, nga bawaayo ebitambiro byabwe eri balubaale ab'embuzi ennume. Abayisirayeli banaakuumanga etteeka lino ennaku zonna.’" 
Leviticus17:8 “Era obagambe nti: ‘Omuyisirayeli, oba omugwira yenna abeera mu Bayisirayeli, anaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa oba ekitambiro," 
Leviticus17:9 n'atakireeta eri Mukama ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu ba Mukama.’" 
Leviticus17:10 “Omuyisirayeli, oba omugwira yenna abeera mu Bayisirayeli bw'anaalyanga ku musaayi, nnaamutunuulizanga bukambwe, era nnaabanga sikyamubalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus17:11 Obulamu bwa buli kintu ekirina omubiri, buba mu musaayi. Kyennava ngubawa mmwe guddaabirizenga ku lw'obulamu ku alutaari, kubanga omusaayi gwe guddaabiriza ku lw'obulamu." 
Leviticus17:12 Kyenva ŋŋamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Tewaabenga n'omu ku mmwe alya omusaayi, era n'omugwira abeera mu mmwe, taalyenga musaayi.’" 
Leviticus17:13 “Omuyisirayeli, oba omugwira abeera mu Bayisirayeli, anaayigganga ensolo, oba ekinyonyi ekikkirizibwa okuliibwa, anaayiwanga omusaayi gwakyo, n'agubikkako ettaka," 
Leviticus17:14 kubanga obulamu bwa buli kintu ekirina omubiri, buba mu musaayi. Kyennava ŋŋamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Temuulyenga ku musaayi gwa kintu na kimu ekirina omubiri, kubanga obulamu bwakyo gwe musaayi gwakyo. Buli anaagulyangako, anaazikirizibwanga.’" 
Leviticus17:15 “Buli muntu, oba nzaalwa, oba mugwira, mu Bayisirayeli, anaalyanga ensolo efudde yokka, oba ettiddwa ensolo enkambwe, anaayozanga ebyambalo bye, n'anaaba omubiri mu mazzi, n'asigala nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Leviticus17:16 Naye bw'ataayozenga byambalo bye, era n'atanaaba mubiri, anaasigalanga si mulongoofu.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus18:2 “Yogera n'Abayisirayeli obagambe nti Nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus18:3 Temuugobererenga mpisa za bantu b'e Misiri gye mwabeeranga, wadde ez'abantu b'omu nsi y'e Kanaani, gye mbatwalamu. Temuutambulirenga ku mateeka gaabwe." 
Leviticus18:4 Muwulirenga amateeka gange, era mukolenga bye mbalagira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus18:5 Mugobererenga amateeka n'ebiragiro bye mbawa. Anaabituukirizanga, anaabanga mulamu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus18:6 “Tewaabenga ku mmwe asemberera wa buko yenna okwebaka naye. 
Leviticus18:7 Toswazanga kitaawo nga weebaka ne nnyoko. Nnyoko teweebakanga naye. 
Leviticus18:8 Toswazanga kitaawo ng'obaako n'omu ku bakazi be abalala gwe weebaka naye. 
Leviticus18:9 Teweebakanga na mwannyoko, omwana wa kitaawo, oba owa nnyoko, k'abe nga yakulira wamu naawe awaka, oba nga yakulira walala." 
Leviticus18:10 Teweebakanga na mwana wa mutabani wo, oba owa muwala wo, kubanga ekyo kikuswaza." 
Leviticus18:11 Teweebakanga na muwala wa kitaawo bwe mutagatta nnyammwe, kubanga naye mwannyoko." 
Leviticus18:12 Teweebakanga na ssenga wo, kubanga mwannyina kitaawo." 
Leviticus18:13 Teweebakanga na nnyoko omuto, kubanga muganda wa nnyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 Teweebakanga na muka kitaawo omuto. Oyo naye aba nnyoko. 
Leviticus18:15 Teweebakanga na muka mwana wo," 
Leviticus18:16 era teweebakanga na muka muganda wo. 
Leviticus18:17 Teweebakanga na mukazi, n'ogattako muwala we, oba muwala wa mutabani we, oba owa muwala we. Ekyo kivve, kubanga abo ba buko." 
Leviticus18:18 Totwalanga muganda wa mukazi wo kumufuula muggya we, ne weebaka naye, nga mukazi wo akyali mulamu." 
Leviticus18:19 “Teweebakanga na mukazi mu biseera bye eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, kubanga abalibwa obutaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus18:20 Teweebakanga na muka musajja. Ekyo kikufuula atali mulongoofu. 
Leviticus18:21 Towangayo n'omu ku baana bo kuwongerwa lubaale Moleki, n'ovumaganya erinnya lya Katonda wo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus18:22 Teweebakenga na musajja munno nga bwe beebaka n'abakazi. Ekyo kyenyinyalwa. 
Leviticus18:23 Omusajja oba omukazi teyeebakenga na nsolo. Obugwenyufu obwo bumufuula atali mulongoofu. 
Leviticus18:24 “Temweyonoonanga nga mubaako n'ekimu ku ebyo kye mukola. Ebyo byonna bye byayonoona ab'amawanga ge ngoba mu nsi eno okuleetamu mmwe. 
Leviticus18:25 Ebikolwa byabwe byayonoona ensi eno, kyenva ngibonereza n'eggweeramu ddala abantu abaagirimu." 
Leviticus18:26 Baakola ebyenyinyalwa ebyo byonna, ne boonoona ensi. Naye mmwe temuubikolenga. Mwenna Abayisirayeli n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe, mukuumenga amateeka n'ebiragiro byange," 
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 muleme kugobwa mu nsi eno, ng'abantu abaasooka mmwe okugibeeramu bwe baagyonoona ne bagobwamu." 
Leviticus18:29 Buli anaabangako ky'akola ku byenyinyalwa ebyo, anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus18:30 “Kale mukuumenga bye mbakuutira, mulemenga kugoberera mpisa ezo ezeenyinyalwa, ezaagobererwanga abo abaasooka mmwe okubeera mu nsi eno, era mulemenga kweyonoona nga mukola ebyo. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus19:2 ayogere n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, abagambe nti: “Mubenga batuukirivu, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe ndi mutuukirivu." 
Leviticus19:3 Buli omu mu mmwe assengamu kitaawe ne nnyina ekitiibwa, era akuumenga Sabbaato nga bwe nalagira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:4 “Temunvengako kusinza bintu bitaliimu, era temwekolerenga balubaale mu kyuma kisaanuuse kubasinza. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:5 “Era bwe munaawangayo gye ndi, Nze Mukama, ekitambiro eky'ebiweebwayo eby'okutabagana, munaakiwangayo mu ngeri esaanidde, kiryoke kikkirizibwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Kinaaliirwanga ku lunaku olwo lwe munaakiweerangayo, ne ku luddirira. Kyonna ekinaasigalangawo okutuusa ku lunaku olwokusatu, kinaayokebwanga omuliro," 
Leviticus19:7 kubanga olwo kinaabanga kifuuse ekitali kirongoofu, era bwe kinaaliibwanga ku lunaku olwo olwokusatu, sikkirizenga kitambiro ekyo." 
Leviticus19:8 Buli anaakiryangako taabenga mulongoofu, olw'okujaajaamya ekintu ekitukuvu ekya Mukama, era omuntu oyo anaabanga takyabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus19:9 “Bwe munaabanga mukungula ebirime byammwe, temuumalirengayo ddala ebisembayo ku nsalosalo z'ennimiro zammwe," 
Leviticus19:10 era temuddengayo mabega mu nnimiro zammwe kukuŋŋaanya birimba ebiba bisigalidde, wadde okulonderera ebiba bikunkumuse. Mubirekeranga abaavu n'abagwira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:11 “Temubbenga, temuulyazaamaanyenga, era temuulimbaganenga." 
Leviticus19:12 Temuulayirirenga bwereere linnya lyange kulivumaganya. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus19:13 “Temuuyiikirizenga bannammwe, wadde okunyaga ebyabwe. Empeera y'omukozi gw'okozesezza, toogiremerenga wadde ekiro ekimu kyokka." 
Leviticus19:14 Tookolimirenga kiggala, era ne muzibe toomuteekerengawo muziziko kwekoonako, naye onootyanga nze, Mukama Katonda wo." 
Leviticus19:15 “Musalenga emisango mu mazima ne mu bwenkanya. Temwekubiirenga ku ludda lwa mwavu, era temuutyenga mugagga. Naye musalenga ensonga mu bwesimbu." 
Leviticus19:16 Toosaasaanyenga ŋŋambo mu bantu bo, era tooteekenga mu kabi bulamu bwa muntu munno. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:17 “Tookyawenga munno mu mutima gwo, naye omunenyanga ne biggwa, oleme okumukolako ekibi." 
Leviticus19:18 Toowoolerenga ggwanga ku muntu n'omu, era toomusibirenga kiruyi. Naye oyagalanga muntu munno nga bwe weeyagala ggwe wennyini. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:19 “Mukwatenga ebiragiro byange. Toozaazisenga nsolo zo ezitafaanana mu kika kyazo. Toosigenga mu nnimiro yo nsigo za bika bibiri. Tooyambalenga kyambalo kya ngoye ez'engeri ebbiri ezigattiddwa awamu nga tezifaanana. 
Leviticus19:20 “Omusajja bw'aneebakanga n'omuzaana ayogerezebwa omusajja omulala, kyokka ono nga tannasasula bintu, era ng'omuzaana taweereddwa ddembe, omusajja oyo n'omuzaana banaabonerezebwanga, naye tebattibwenga, kubanga omuzaana taba wa ddembe." 
Leviticus19:21 Omusajja oyo anaaleetanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, embuzi ennume nga kye kiweebwayo eky'omutango." 
Leviticus19:22 Kabona anaakozesanga ekiweebwayo ekyo, okuddaabiriza ku lw'omusajja oyo mu maaso ga Mukama, olw'ekibi kye yakola, ne kimusonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus19:23 “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi y'e Kanaani ne musimba emiti egy'ebibala egya buli ngeri, ebibala byagyo mulibiyita ebitali birongoofu okumala emyaka esatu. Okumala emyaka egyo esatu, temuubiryengako." 
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka ogwokuna, ebibala byonna biriwongerwa nze Mukama okunneebaza." 
Leviticus19:25 Naye mu mwaka ogwokutaano, mulirya ku bibala by'ensi eyo. Ebyo bwe mulibituukiriza, mulifuna ekyengera. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:26 “Temuulyenga nnyama ng'ekyalimu omusaayi. Temuukolenga bya bulogo, wadde eby'okulagulwa." 
Leviticus19:27 Temuukomolenga ku nviiri zammwe, wadde okusala ku birevu byammwe." 
Leviticus19:28 Temuusalenga misale ku mibiri gyammwe okukungubagira abafu, wadde okweyolako enjola olw'okwewoomya. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:29 “Temuujaajaamyenga bawala bammwe nga mubawaayo mu bwenzi, ensi ereme kwonooneka na kujjula mpisa mbi." 
Leviticus19:30 Mukuumenga Sabbaato, era mussengamu ekitiibwa Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:31 “Temuugendenga kwebuuza ku basamize, wadde ku balogo. Temuunoonyenga gye bali, muleme kwonooneka. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:32 “Museguliranga abakaddiye, era mubassangamu ekitiibwa. Era muntyanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:33 “Abagwira ababeera nammwe mu nsi yammwe temuubayisenga bubi. 
Leviticus19:34 Mubayisenga nga Bayisirayeli bannammwe, era mubaagalenga nga bwe mweyagala mwennyini, kubanga nammwe mwali bagwira mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:35 “Temuukumpanyenga okukozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu mu kupima obuwanvu, n'obuzito, n'obungi bw'ebintu." 
Leviticus19:36 Mukozesenga minzaani entuufu n'ebipimo byonna ebituufu. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Mukwatenga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange, era mubituukirizenga. Nze Mukama.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus20:2 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Bwe wanaabangawo Omuyisirayeli oba omugwira abeera mu mmwe awaayo ku baana be eri lubaale Moleki, ekibiina kyonna kinaamukubanga amayinja n'afa." 
Leviticus20:3 Era nange ndyefuulira omuntu oyo ne mmuboola, ne ssongera kumubalira mu bantu bange, kubanga awaddeyo ku baana be eri Moleki, n'ayonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, n'avumisa erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Leviticus20:4 Naye ekibiina ky'abantu bwe kitaafengayo ku ky'akoze, ne kitamutta," 
Leviticus20:5 Nze nzennyini ndikyukira omuntu oyo n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna, n'abo bonna abamwegattako mu butaba beesigwa gye ndi, ne basinza Moleki. Siryongera kubabalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus20:6 “Era omuntu bw'anaagendanga okwebuuza ku basamize, nnaamwefuuliranga, ne ssongera kumubalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus20:7 Kale mwetukuze, mubenga batukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus20:8 Mukuumenga amateeka gange, kubanga nze Mukama abafuula abatukuvu." 
Leviticus20:9 “Buli akolimira kitaawe oba nnyina, anattibwanga. Ye anaabanga yeereetedde yekka okuttibwa." 
Leviticus20:10 “Omusajja bw'anaayendanga ku muk'omusajja, abenzi bombi, omusajja n'omukazi, banattibwanga." 
Leviticus20:11 N'omusajja eyeebaka n'omu ku baka kitaawe, aswaza kitaawe. Bombi, omusajja oyo n'omukazi banattibwanga. Be banaabanga beereetedde bokka okuttibwa." 
Leviticus20:12 Omusajja bw'aneebakanga ne muka mwana we, bombi banattibwanga. Banaabanga bakoze kya kivve, nga be beereetedde bokka okuttibwa." 
Leviticus20:13 Era omusajja bw'aneebakanga ne musajja munne, nga bwe yandyebase n'omukazi, baba bakoze eky'omuzizo. Bombi banattibwanga, nga be beereetedde bokka okuttibwa." 
Leviticus20:14 Omusajja bw'awasanga omukazi ne nnyina w'omukazi oyo, ekyo kya kivve. Abasatu abo banaayokebwanga omuliro ne bafa. Era temukkirizenga ekibi ng'ekyo okubeera mu mmwe." 
Leviticus20:15 Omusajja bw'aneebakanga n'ensolo, anattibwanga era ensolo eyo nayo enettibwanga." 
Leviticus20:16 Omukazi anaasembereranga ensolo ne yeebaka nayo anattibwanga, era ensolo eyo nayo enettibwanga, nga ye, nayo, be beereetedde bokka okuttibwa." 
Leviticus20:17 “Omusajja bw'anaawasanga mwannyina, muwala wa kitaawe oba owa nnyina, banaabanga bakoze kya buwemu. Banaagobwanga mu kibiina ky'abantu baabwe. Omusajja oyo anaabanga yeebase ne mwannyina, era anaavunaanibwanga olw'ekibi kye." 
Leviticus20:18 Omusajja bw'aneebakanga n'omukazi ali mu biseera bye eby'empisa y'abakazi eya buli mwezi, bombi banaagobwanga mu kibiina ky'abantu baabwe, kubanga bamenye amateeka agakwata ku bulongoofu." 
Leviticus20:19 “Teweebakenga na nnyoko omuto oba ne ssengaawo. Abakola ekyo baba bakoze kya kivve. Banaavunaanibwanga olw'ekibi kyabwe. 
Leviticus20:20 Omusajja bw'aneebakanga ne muka kitaawe omuto, oba ne muka kojjaawe, anaabanga aswazizza kitaawe omuto oba kojjaawe, era ye n'omukazi oyo banaavunaanibwanga olw'ekibi kyabwe. Balifa tebafunye baana." 
Leviticus20:21 Era omusajja bw'anaawasanga muka muganda we, anaabanga akoze kibi, ng'aswazizza muganda we. Tebaliba na baana." 
Leviticus20:22 “Mukuumenga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange byonna, ensi y'e Kanaani gye ŋŋenda okubayingizaamu okubeerangamu ereme kubagaana." 
Leviticus20:23 Temuugobererenga mpisa za bantu abo be ngobamu okuleetamu mmwe. Kubanga baakolanga ebyo byonna, kyennava mbakyawa." 
Leviticus20:24 Naye mmwe nabasuubiza okubawa ensi eno engagga era engimu, era ndigibawa n'eba yammwe. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaawula mu mawanga amalala." 
Leviticus20:25 Kale mwawulenga ensolo n'ebinyonyi ebirongoofu n'ebitali birongoofu. Temwejaajaamyenga nga mulya ensolo n'ebinyonyi, wadde ekintu ekirala kyonna ku nsi, ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus20:26 Munaabeeranga batukuvu, era nga muli bange nzekka, kubanga nabaawula mu mawanga amalala, mulyoke mubeerenga bange nzekka." 
Leviticus20:27 “Omusajja oba omukazi omusamize, oba omulogo, anattibwanga. Anaakubibwanga amayinja n'attibwa. Ye anaabanga yeereetedde yekka okuttibwa.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Yogera ne bakabona, batabani ba Arooni, obagambe nti tewaabengawo n'omu ku bo aneefuulanga atali mulongoofu nga yeetaba mu mikolo egibaawo mu kufiirwa ab'eŋŋanda ze," 
Leviticus21:2 okuggyako abo abamuli okumpi mu luganda: nnyina ne kitaawe, mutabani we ne muwala we, ne muganda we," 
Leviticus21:3 oba mwannyina atannafumbirwa, ali mu mikono gye." 
Leviticus21:4 Teyeefuulenga atali mulongoofu olw'abafudde ku buko. 
Leviticus21:5 “Bakabona tebaamwengako nviiri ku mitwe gyabwe, wadde okukomola ku birevu byabwe, era tebaasalenga misale ku mibiri gyabwe okulaga nti banakuwadde." 
Leviticus21:6 Banaabeeranga batukuvu eri Katonda waabwe, era tebaavumaganyenga linnya lya Katonda waabwe, kubanga bawaayo eri Mukama ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, by'ebyokulya ebya Katonda waabwe. Kyebanaavanga baba abatukuvu." 
Leviticus21:7 “Kabona taawasenga mukazi eyakolako obwamalaaya, oba omukazi atali mbeerera, wadde eyagobebwa bba, kubanga kabona yayawulirwa Katonda we." 
Leviticus21:8 Kale munaamwawuliranga Katonda, kubanga awaayo eri Katonda wammwe ekitone eky'ebyokulya. Munaamubalanga nga mutukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama abatukuza mmwe, ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus21:9 Era muwala wa kabona bwe yeeyonoona nga yeefuula malaaya, aswaza kitaawe. Anaayokebwanga omuliro n'afa." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ssaabakabona yafukibwako omuzigo ku mutwe gwe, n'atukuzibwa okwambalanga ebyambalo eby'obwakabona. N'olwekyo taalekenga nviiri ze nga si nsanirire, era taayuzenga byambalo bye, okulaga nti anakuwadde." 
Leviticus21:11 Teyeefuulenga atali mulongoofu, wadde okujaajaamya Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, ng'akivaamu n'ayingira ennyumba erimu omulambo, ne bwe guba ogwa kitaawe oba ogwa nnyina, kubanga yanjawulirwa nze Katonda we, ng'afukibwako omuzigo omutukuvu." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Anaawasanga omukazi akyali embeerera," 
Leviticus21:14 sso si nnamwandu, oba omukazi eyaliko malaaya, wadde eyagobwa bba. Omukazi embeerera ow'omu bantu be, gw'anaawasanga," 
Leviticus21:15 aleme kuvumaganya baana be mu bantu be, kubanga nze Mukama amutukuza.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus21:17 ategeeze Arooni nti: “Buli wa mu zzadde lyo mu mirembe gyonna anaabangako akamogo, taasemberenga okuwaayo ekitone eky'ebyokulya ekya Katonda we." 
Leviticus21:18 Buli aliko akamogo konna, taasemberenga kuweereza: muzibe, oba awenyera oba eyalemala, oba aliko awakyamu," 
Leviticus21:19 wadde eyamenyeka okugulu oba omukono; 
Leviticus21:20 ow'ebbango, nnakalanga, oba aliko akamogo ku liiso lye, oba alina endwadde ey'olususu, oba omulaawe." 
Leviticus21:21 Tewaabengawo n'omu mu zadde lya Arooni kabona, aliko kamogo anaasemberanga okuwaayo ebiweebwayo ebya Mukama ebyokebwa, n'ekitone eky'ebyokulya." 
Leviticus21:22 Ow'engeri eyo, anaalyanga ku kitone ekya Katonda we, ku mugaati omutukuvu ennyo, ne ku birala ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus21:23 Kyokka olw'okuba ng'aliko akamogo, taayingirenga awali olutimbe olutukuvu, era taasembererenga alutaari, alemenga kuvumaganya ebitukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama abitukuza.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Awo Musa n'ategeeza Arooni ne batabani be n'Abayisirayeli bonna bw'atyo. 
Leviticus22:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:2 “Tegeeza Arooni ne batabani be, bassengamu ekitiibwa ebintu ebitukuvu, Abayisirayeli bye bantonera, balemenga okuvumaganya erinnya lyange ettukuvu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:3 Bategeeze nti mu mirembe gyonna, buli wa mu zadde lyabwe atali mulongoofu anaasembereranga ebitukuvu Abayisirayeli bye bantonera, oyo taddengayo kujja mu maaso gange. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:4 “Tewaabengawo n'omu wa mu zadde lya Arooni alwadde ebigenge oba alina enziku, anaalyanga ku bintu ebitukuvu, okutuusa lw'anaabeeranga omulongoofu. Era kabona anaafuukanga atali mulongoofu, bw'anaakoonanga ku kintu ekifuuse ekitali kirongoofu olw'okukoona ku kifudde, oba ku musajja avuddemu amazzi ag'obusajja," 
Leviticus22:5 oba bw'anaakoonanga ku kyewalula ekimufuula atali mulongoofu, oba ku muntu amufuula atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus22:6 Buli kabona afuuka atali mulongoofu, asigala si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi, era taalyenga ku bitukuvu, wabula ng'amaze okunaaba omubiri." 
Leviticus22:7 Enjuba ng'egudde, anaabeeranga mulongoofu. Olwo anaayinzanga okulya ku bintu ebitukuvu, kubanga ebyo ye mmere ye." 
Leviticus22:8 Taalyenga nnyama ya nsolo efudde yokka, oba ettiddwa ensolo enkambwe, alemenga kwefuula atali mulongoofu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:9 “Bakabona bonna banaakuumanga bye mbalagira, balemenga kwonoona ne bafa olw'okubinyoomoola. Nze Mukama abafuula abatukuvu." 
Leviticus22:10 “Atali wa lulyo lwa bakabona taalyenga ku bitukuvu. Wadde omugenyi akyalidde kabona, oba omukozi we gw'asasula empeera, taabiryengako." 
Leviticus22:11 Naye omuddu, kabona gw'aguze n'ensimbi ze, n'abo abazaalirwa mu maka ge, abo banaalyanga ku mmere ya kabona." 
Leviticus22:12 Muwala wa kabona bw'anaafumbirwanga omusajja atali kabona, taalyenga ku bitone ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus22:13 Naye muwala wa kabona nga nnamwandu oba ng'agobeddwa bba, nga talina mwana, era ng'akomyewo mu nnyumba ya kitaawe nga bwe yali mu buto, anaalyanga ku mmere ya kitaawe. Naye atali wa mu lulyo lwa bakabona, taagiryengako." 
Leviticus22:14 “Omuntu atali wa lulyo lwa bakabona bw'anaalyanga ku kintu ekitukuvu nga tagenderedde, anaddizangawo kabona ekintu ekyo ekitukuvu, n'ayongeramu n'ekitundu kyakyo kimu ekyokutaano." 
Leviticus22:15 Kabona taajaajaamyenga bitukuvu, Abayisirayeli bye bawaayo eri Mukama," 
Leviticus22:16 ng'akkiriza atali kabona okubiryako, n'amuleetera omusango n'ekibonerezo. Nze Mukama abitukuza.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:18 “Tegeeza Arooni ne batabani be n'Abayisirayeli bonna nti Omuyisirayeli, oba omugwira ali mu Yisirayeli, bw'anaaleetanga eri Mukama ekitone kye ekyokebwa kye yeeyama, oba ky'awaayo nga yeeyagalidde," 
Leviticus22:19 okukkirizibwa, kinaabanga nnume ey'ente, oba ey'endiga, oba ey'embuzi, eteriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus22:20 Temuuwengayo kintu na kimu ekiriko akamogo, kubanga ekitone kyammwe ekyo tekikkirizibwenga." 
Leviticus22:21 Omuntu bw'anaawangayo eri Mukama ekitambiro eky'okutabagana okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ky'awaayo nga yeeyagalidde, ensolo eneebanga eyo eteriiko kamogo, n'eryoka ekkirizibwa." 
Leviticus22:22 Temuuwengayo eri Mukama, ensolo eyaziba amaaso, oba emmenyefu, oba ennema, oba eriko amabwa, oba endwadde y'olususu. Ensolo ez'engeri eyo temuuziwengayo ku alutaari okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus22:23 Ente oba endiga eriko ekitundu ekitali kitereevu, oba ekibulako ku bitundu byayo, eyo oyinza okugiwaayo ng'ekitone ky'owaayo nga weeyagalidde, naye tekkirizibwa mu kutuukiriza obweyamo." 
Leviticus22:24 Temuuwengayo eri Mukama, ensolo eyabetentebwa, oba eyanyigibwa, oba eyayatika, oba eyasalibwako ebibeere byayo. Ekyo temuukikolenga mu nsi yammwe." 
Leviticus22:25 “Ensolo ze muggye mu bagwira, temuuziwengayo eri Katonda wammwe ng'ekitone eky'ebyokulya. Ezo zibalibwa ng'eziriko akamogo, era tezikkirizibwenga.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus22:27 “Ente, oba endiga, oba embuzi, bw'eneezaalibwanga, eneerekebwanga n'eyonka nnyina waayo okumala ennaku musanvu. Okuva ku lunaku olw'omunaana n'okusingawo, enekkirizibwanga okuba ekitone ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus22:28 Temuttenga nte, oba ndiga n'omwana gwayo ku lunaku lumu." 
Leviticus22:29 Bwe muwangayo ekitambiro eri Mukama okumwebaza, munaakiwangayo nga mutuukiriza amateeka, mulyoke mukkirizibwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Mukiryenga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini. Temuukirekengawo okutuusa enkeera. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus22:31 “Mukuumenga ebiragiro byange, mubituukirizenga. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:32 Temuuvumaganyenga linnya lyange ettukuvu, naye njagala Abayisirayeli bonna baatulenga nga bwe ndi omutukuvu. Nze Mukama abafuula abatukuvu," 
Leviticus22:33 era eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, okuba Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus23:2 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Ennaku zino ze nnaku za Mukama enkulu, ze munaalangiriranga okukuŋŋaanirangako okusinza." 
Leviticus23:3 “Ennaku ziri mukaaga ezinaakolerwangako emirimu, naye olunaku olw'omusanvu, ye Sabbaato, lunaku lwa kuwummula. Ku olwo temuukolenga mirimu, naye munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza. Olwa Sabbaato, lunaku lwa Mukama yonna yonna gye mubeera." 
Leviticus23:4 “Zino ze nnaku enkulu eza Mukama ze munaalangiriranga mu biseera byazo ebituufu. 
Leviticus23:5 Olw'Okuyitako kwa Mukama, lutandika akawungeezi k'olunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya, olw'omwezi ogw'olubereberye." 
Leviticus23:6 “Embaga ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiddwa etandika ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwo. Okumala ennaku musanvu, munaalyanga migaati egitazimbulukusiddwa." 
Leviticus23:7 Ku lunaku olubereberye olw'ennaku ezo omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza. Temuukolenga mulimu na gumu ogw'emikono." 
Leviticus23:8 Ennaku ezo omusanvu munaawangayo eri Mukama ekitone ekyokebwa. Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza. Temuukolenga mirimu gya mikono.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus23:10 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli, abagambe nti: “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi Mukama gy'abawa, ne mukungula eŋŋaano, ekinywa ekisooka, mukitwalanga wa kabona." 
Leviticus23:11 Anaakiwangayo ng'akiwuuba mu maaso ga Mukama, ekitone kyammwe ekyo ne kikkirizibwa. Kabona anaakiwangayo ku lunaku oluddirira Sabbaato." 
Leviticus23:12 Era ku lunaku lwe munaaweerangayo ekinywa ky'eŋŋaano, munaawangayo eri Mukama ekitambiro ekyokebwa, eky'omwana gw'endiga omulume, ogutaliiko kamogo, ogw'omwaka ogumu." 
Leviticus23:13 Awamu n'ekitone ekyo, munaawangayo kilo bbiri ez'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ng'ekitone eky'ebyokulya. Akawoowo k'ekitone ekyo, kasanyusa Mukama. Era awamu nakyo, munaawangayo ekitone ekya lita emu ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Leviticus23:14 Temuulyenga ku ŋŋaano mpya, oba nga ya birimba bibisi, oba nga nsiike, oba ng'ekoleddwamu omugaati, okutuusa nga mumaze okuleeta ekitone kya Katonda wammwe. Etteeka lino linaakuumibwanga mu b'ezzadde lyammwe bonna, ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus23:15 “Munaabalanga wiiki musanvu enzijuvu okuva ku lunaku oluddirira Sabbaato gye muleeteddeko ekinywa kyammwe eky'eŋŋaano okukiwaayo eri Mukama. 
Leviticus23:16 Ku lunaku olwokutaano oluddirira Sabbaato ey'omusanvu, munaawangayo eri Mukama ekinywa ekirala eky'eŋŋaano." 
Leviticus23:17 Buli maka ganaaleetanga emigaati ebiri eri Mukama, ng'ekitone ekiwuubibwa. Buli mugaati gunaakolebwanga mu kilo bbiri ez'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi eziteekeddwamu ekizimbulukusa, emigaati egyo ne mugiwaayo eri Mukama ng'ekitone eky'eŋŋaano gye munaabanga musoose okukungula." 
Leviticus23:18 Awamu n'emigaati egyo, munaawangayo endiga musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, n'ente ennume ento emu, n'endiga ennume enkulu bbiri. Zonna teziibengako kamogo. Zinaaweebwangayo eri Mukama, ng'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, wamu n'ekitone eky'ebyokulya n'eky'ebyokunywa. Akawoowo ak'ekitone ekyo kasanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus23:19 Era munaawangayo embuzi ennume emu, ey'ekiweebwayo olw'ekibi, n'endiga ento bbiri, ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, ng'ekiweebwayo eky'okutabagana." 
Leviticus23:20 Kabona anaawangayo eri Mukama emigaati wamu n'endiga, ng'ekitone ekiwuubibwa, ekitwalibwa bakabona. Ebiweebwayo ebyo bitukuvu." 
Leviticus23:21 Ku lunaku olwo munaalangiriranga, ne mukuŋŋaana okusinza. Temuulukolerengako mirimu gya mikono. Etteeka lino munaalikuumanga ennaku zonna, yonna gye munaabeeranga." 
Leviticus23:22 “Bwe munaakungulanga bye mulimye mu nsi yammwe, temuukungulirenga ddala kumalayo na bya ku nsalosalo za nnimiro zammwe, era temuddenga mabega kulonderera ebyo ebisigalidde. Mubirekeranga abaavu n'abagwira. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:24 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, wanaabangawo okuwummulira ddala okw'ekijjukizo, okulangirirwa nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe, era munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza." 
Leviticus23:25 Munaawangayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu ogw'emikono.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:27 “Olunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, lwe lunaku olw'okuddaabiririzangako. Ku lunaku olwo, muneebonerezanga, era munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, ne muwaayo eri Mukama ekitone eky'ebyokulya." 
Leviticus23:28 Temuukolenga mirimu gya mikono ku olwo, kubanga lwe lunaku olw'okuddaabiririzaako ku lwammwe, mu maaso ga Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus23:29 Buli ateebonerezenga ku lunaku olwo, anaabanga abooleddwa mu bantu be," 
Leviticus23:30 era buli anaakolanga omulimu ku olwo, nnaamuboolanga n'aggyibwa mu bantu be." 
Leviticus23:31 Temuukolenga mulimu na gumu. Etteeka lino munaalikuumanga ennaku zonna, yonna gye munaabeeranga." 
Leviticus23:32 Okuva akawungeezi k'olunaku olw'omwenda olw'omwezi, okutuuka akawungeezi k'olunaku olw'ekkumi, munaakuumanga olunaku luno lube lwa Sabbaato ey'okuwummulira ddala, era muneebonerezanga.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus23:34 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwo ogw'omusanvu, wanaabangawo Embaga ekolerwa Mukama ey'Ensiisira, okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus23:35 Ku lunaku olw'olubereberye ku zo, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu ogw'emikono." 
Leviticus23:36 Buli lunaku, mu nnaku ezo omusanvu, munaawangayo ekitone ekyokebwa. Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, ne muwaayo ekitone ekyokebwa. Lunaabanga lunaku lukulu lwa kusinzizaako, era temuukolenga mirimu gya mikono." 
Leviticus23:37 “Ezo ze nnaku enkulu, Mukama z'abalagidde, ze munaalangiriranga okukuŋŋaana okusinza, n'okuwaayo eri Mukama ebitone eby'ebyokulya, n'ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebitone eby'emmere ey'empeke, n'ebitambiro, n'ebitone eby'ebyokunywa, buli bimu ku nnaku zaabyo." 
Leviticus23:38 Embaga ezo ze zeeyongedde ku Sabbaato za Mukama eza bulijjo. Era ebitone ebyo, bye byeyongedde ku bya bulijjo, bye muwaayo eri Mukama okutuukiriza obweyamo, n'ebitone bye muwaayo nga mweyagalidde." 
Leviticus23:39 “Bwe munaamalanga okukungula ebibala by'ennimiro zammwe, munaakuzanga embaga eno, okumala ennaku musanvu, nga mutandika n'olunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu. Ku lunaku olusooka, wanaabangawo okuwummulira ddala, okwenjawulo." 
Leviticus23:40 Ku lunaku olwo, munaatwalanga ku bibala by'emiti gyammwe ebisinga obulungi. Munaatwalanga amatabi g'enkindu, n'amatabi g'emiti egy'ebikoola ebingi, n'obuti obw'oku mbalama z'omugga, ne musanyukira ennaku musanvu, nga mutendereza mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus23:41 Munaakuzanga embaga eyo okumala ennaku musanvu buli mwaka. Etteeka lino munaalikuumanga ennaku zonna. 
Leviticus23:42 Abayisirayeli bonna banaabeeranga mu nsiisira okumala ennaku musanvu," 
Leviticus23:43 ab'ezzadde lyammwe balyoke bamanye nga nabeeza Abayisirayeli mu nsiisira, bwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Awo Musa n'ategeeza Abayisirayeli ennaku enkulu, Mukama z'abateereddewo okukuzanga." 
Leviticus24:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus24:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli bakuleetere omuzigo omulungi oguggyiddwa mu mizayiti emisekule, ogw'okuteeka mu ttaala y'omu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, eyakenga obutazikira." 
Leviticus24:3 Buli kawungeezi, Arooni anaagikoleezanga, n'agireka n'eyaka obutazikira, okutuusa enkeera ku makya, awo mu maaso ga Mukama, ebweru w'olutimbe oluli mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ennyo. Etteeka lino linaakuumibwanga ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus24:4 Arooni anaalabiriranga ettaala eyo ku kikondo kyayo ekya zaabu omulongoose, eyakenga mu maaso ga Mukama, obutazikira."
