Leviticus24:5 “Munaddiranga obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, kilo kkumi na bbiri, ne mufumbamu emigaati kkumi n'ebiri." 
Leviticus24:6 Munaagiteekanga mu mbu bbiri, ku buli lubu emigaati mukaaga, mu maaso ga Mukama, ku mmeeza ebikkiddwako zaabu omulongoose." 
Leviticus24:7 Era munaateekanga obubaane obulungi ku buli lubu, nga ke kabonero ak'ekitone eky'ebyokulya, ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokebwa, mu kifo ky'emigaati." 
Leviticus24:8 Buli Sabbaato obutayosa, Arooni anaateekanga emigaati egyo mu maaso ga Mukama ku lw'Abayisirayeli, nga ye ndagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Leviticus24:9 Emigaati egyo ginaabanga gya Arooni ne batabani be, era banaagiriiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, kubanga ekyo kye kitundu ekitukuvu ennyo eky'ebyokulya ebitonebwa eri Mukama.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Awo olwatuuka, ne wabaawo omusajja, nga kitaawe Mumisiri, kyokka nga nnyina Muyisirayeli, ayitibwa Selomiti, muwala wa Diburi, ow'omu kika kya Daani. Omusajja oyo, n'afuna enkaayana n'omusajja Omuyisirayeli nga bali mu lusiisira, n'avuma Erinnya lya Mukama, n'akolima. Ne bamuleeta eri Musa." 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 Ne bamukuuma nga balinda Mukama abategeeze eky'okumukolera. 
Leviticus24:13 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Leviticus24:14 “Oyo akolimye, mumutwale ebweru w'olusiisira. N'abo bonna abaamuwulidde, bateeke emikono gyabwe ku mutwe gwe, okukakasa nti yakolimye, ekibiina kyonna kimukube amayinja afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Era tegeeza Abayisirayeli nti buli anaakolimiranga Katonda we, anaavunaanibwanga olw'ekibi kye." 
Leviticus24:16 N'oyo anaavumanga erinnya lya Mukama, ekibiina kinaamukubanga amayinja n'afa." 
Leviticus24:17 “Oyo anattanga omuntu, naye anattibwanga." 
Leviticus24:18 N'oyo anattanga ensolo eteri yiye, anaagiriwangamu endala. Obulamu busasulwa bulamu." 
Leviticus24:19 “Omuntu bw'atuusangako muntu munne ebisago, naye bye binaamutuusibwangako." 
Leviticus24:20 Amenya munne eggumba, n'erirye linaamenyebwanga. Eriiso linaasasulwanga liiso, n'erinnyo linaasasulwanga linnyo. Ebisago omuntu by'anaatuusanga ku mulala, naye bye binaamutuusibwangako." 
Leviticus24:21 Anattanga ensolo, anaagiriwangamu endala. Oyo atta omuntu, naye anattibwanga." 
Leviticus24:22 Etteeka lino linaabatwalirangamu mwenna, Abayisirayeli n'abagwira abali mu mmwe, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Awo Abayisirayeli, Musa bwe yamala okubategeeza ebyo, oyo eyakolima ne bamutwala ebweru w'olusiisira, ne bamukuba amayinja n'afa. Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli ne bakola nga Mukama bwe yagamba Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Mukama n'agambira Musa ku Lusozi Sinaayi 
Leviticus25:2 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Bwe muliyingira mu nsi gye mbawa, mulissaamu Mukama ekitiibwa nga muleka okulima ensi eyo buli mwaka ogw'omusanvu." 
Leviticus25:3 Munaasiganga ennimiro zammwe, ne musaliranga ennimiro zammwe ez'emizabbibu, era ne mukungulanga ebibala byazo okumala emyaka mukaaga." 
Leviticus25:4 Naye omwaka ogw'omusanvu, gunaabanga mwaka gwa kuleka ettaka liwummulire ddala, omwaka oguweereddwayo eri Mukama. Temuusigenga nnimiro zammwe, era temuusalirenga nnimiro zammwe ez'emizabbibu." 
Leviticus25:5 Ebibala by'ebirime byammwe ebyemeza byokka temuubikungulenga, n'eby'emizabbibu egitali misalire temuubinogenga. Gunaabanga mwaka gwa kuleka ettaka liwummulire ddala." 
Leviticus25:6 Newaakubadde ettaka teriirimwenga omwaka ogwo gwonna, naye linaababalizanga emmere, mmwe n'abaddu n'abazaana bammwe, n'abakozi bammwe, n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe," 
Leviticus25:7 n'ensolo zammwe enfuge n'ez'omu ttale mu nsi yammwe. Byonna bye linaabazanga, binaabanga bya kulya." 
Leviticus25:8 “Munaabalanga emyaka musanvu emirundi musanvu, gye myaka gyonna awamu amakumi ana mu mwenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Awo ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, olunaku olw'okuddaabiririzaako, munaatumanga omuntu n'atalaaga ensi yammwe yonna, ng'agenda afuuwa eŋŋombe ey'omwanguka." 
Leviticus25:10 Bwe mutyo munaatukuzanga omwaka ogw'amakumi ataano, ne mulangirira eddembe eri abatuuze b'omu nsi yammwe. Mu mwaka ogwo, buli omu anaddizibwanga obutaka bwe, era buli omu eyatundibwa mu buddu, anaddangayo mu bantu be." 
Leviticus25:11 Omwaka ogwo munaagumalanga mujaguza. Temuusigenga, era temuukungulenga ebyo ebyemeza byokka. Era mu mwaka ogwo temuukuŋŋaanyenga bibala bya mizabbibu egitali misalire." 
Leviticus25:12 Omwaka ogwo gwonna gunaabanga gwa kujaguza era mutukuvu gye muli. Munaalyanga ebyo bye gubaza gwokka mu nnimiro. 
Leviticus25:13 Mu mwaka ogwo, buli ekyatundibwa kinaddiranga nnyinikyo eyasooka." 
Leviticus25:14 Kale bwe mubanga muguza Bayisirayeli bannammwe ettaka, oba nga mulibagulako, temuulyazaamaanyenga." 
Leviticus25:15 Omuwendo gunaagerekebwanga, nga mubalira ku myaka, ettaka gye likyayinza okubaza ebibala, ng'omwaka ogw'okuliddiza alitunda tegunnatuuka." 
Leviticus25:16 Emyaka egikyabulayo bwe ginaabanga emingi, omuwendo gunaabanga munene. Emyaka egikyabulayo bwe ginaabanga emitono, n'omuwendo gunaabanga mutono, kubanga omuwendo gw'ebikungulwa gwe gutundibwa." 
Leviticus25:17 Temuulyazaamaanyaganenga, naye mutyenga Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:18 “Mukuumenga amateeka gange, era mutuukirizenga ebiragiro byange, olwo munaabeeranga mirembe mu nsi." 
Leviticus25:19 Era ensi eneebazanga ebibala byayo, ne mufuna bye mulya, ne mukkuta, ne mugibeeramu mirembe." 
Leviticus25:20 “Naye muyinza okwebuuza nti munaalyanga ki mu mwaka ogw'omusanvu, nga temusize era nga temulina kye mukungula?" 
Leviticus25:21 Ndibawa omukisa mu mwaka ogw'omukaaga, ensi n'ebaza emmere eribamala mu myaka esatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Bwe munaasiganga mu mwaka ogw'omunaana, munaabanga mukyalya ku bye mwakungula edda, era munaabanga mukyalina emmere ebamala okutuusa amakungula ag'omwaka ogw'omwenda lwe gunaatuukanga." 
Leviticus25:23 “Ettaka teriitundibwenga okuliviiramu ddala olubeerera, kubanga lyange. Mwe muli bagwira era bayise, be nsenza." 
Leviticus25:24 Mu nsi yammwe yonna gye mulimu, ettaka bwe litundibwa, munakkirizanga nnyiniryo eyasooka okulinunula." 
Leviticus25:25 “Omuyisirayeli bw'anaayavuwalanga n'atunda ettaka lye, owooluganda lwe asinga okuba ow'okumpi, anaanunulanga ettaka eryo." 
Leviticus25:26 Atalina ayinza kulinunula, bw'agaggawala n'afuna ebimala okulinunula," 
Leviticus25:27 anaabalanga emyaka gy'amaze ng'alitunze, n'asasula eyaligula ekyo ekigya mu myaka egikyasigaddeyo okutuuka ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza, n'alyoka alyeddiza." 
Leviticus25:28 Bw'aba nga tasobola kulyeddiza, linaabeeranga mu mikono gy'oyo eyaligula, okutuuka ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza. Linaateebwanga mu kujaguza, n'addamu okuba nnyiniryo." 
Leviticus25:29 “Omuntu bw'anaatundanga ennyumba ye eri mu kibuga ekiriko ekigo, anaayinzanga okuginunula mu bbanga ery'omwaka omulamba okuva lwe yagitunda." 
Leviticus25:30 Kyokka bw'ataaginunulenga mu bbanga eryo ery'omwaka omulamba, eneefuukiranga ddala y'oyo eyagigula, n'eba yiye n'abasika be ennaku zonna. Tezzibwengayo mu mwaka ogw'okujaguza." 
Leviticus25:31 Naye amayumba ag'omu byalo ebitaliiko kigo, ganaabalirwanga bumu ng'ennimiro: ganaayinzanga okununulibwa, era ganazzibwangayo mu mwaka ogw'okujaguza." 
Leviticus25:32 Wabula Abaleevi, ennyumba zaabwe ezaazimbibwa mu bibuga byabwe ebyabaweebwa, banaayinzanga okuzinunula ebbanga lyonna." 
Leviticus25:33 Omuleevi bw'anaatundanga ennyumba ye eri mu bibuga ebyo, eneemuddizibwanga mu mwaka ogw'okujaguza, kubanga amayumba Abaleevi ge balina mu bibuga byabwe, gabeerera ddala gaabwe ennaku zonna mu Bayisirayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Naye ettaka erirundirwako ab'omu bibuga byabwe, teriitundibwenga kubanga liba lyabwe ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus25:35 “Muyisirayeli munno bw'anaayavuwalanga, nga tasobola kweyimirizaawo, omuyambanga n'abeera naawe ng'omunoonyi w'obubudamo era omutuuze ow'ekiseera." 
Leviticus25:36 Tomuggyangako magoba n'akatono, naye otyanga Katonda wo, n'oleka Muyisirayeli munno n'abeera naawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Toomusabenga magoba ku nsimbi z'omuwola, wadde okumusasuza emmere gy'omuwa okulya." 
Leviticus25:38 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, okubawa ensi y'e Kanaani, era okuba Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:39 “Era Muyisirayeli munno bw'anaayavuwalanga ne yeetunda gy'oli, toomukozesenga mirimu ng'omuddu." 
Leviticus25:40 Anaabeeranga naawe ng'omukozi asasulwa empeera, era omunoonyi w'obubudamo, n'akuweerezanga okutuusa ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza." 
Leviticus25:41 Olwo anaakuvangako ye n'abaana be, n'adda mu bantu be," 
Leviticus25:42 kubanga Abayisirayeli baddu bange, be naggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Tebaatundibwenga mu buddu." 
Leviticus25:43 Temuubafugenga lwa maanyi, naye mutyenga Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:44 Nga mwagala abaddu n'abazaana, munaabagulanga mu mawanga agabeetoolodde." 
Leviticus25:45 Era munaayinzanga okugula abaana b'abagwira n'ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe ababeera mu mmwe. Abaana be bazaalira mu nsi yammwe, banaabanga nvuma zammwe." 
Leviticus25:46 Era munaabalaamiranga abaana bammwe ng'obusika, ne bafuuka envuma zaabwe. Abo be munaafuganga obuddu. Naye Abayisirayeli bannammwe, temuubafugenga na kkaaze." 
Leviticus25:47 “Omugwira abeera mu mmwe bw'aba ng'agaggawadde, kyokka Muyisirayeli munnammwe n'ayavuwala, ne yeetunda eri omugwira oyo, oba n'atundayo omuntu ow'omu maka ge okuba omuddu," 
Leviticus25:48 bw'anaamalanga okutundibwa, anaayinzanga okununulibwa omu ku baganda be," 
Leviticus25:49 kitaawe omuto, oba mutabani wa kitaawe omuto, oba omulala ku booluganda lwe ow'okumpi, anaayinzanga okumununula. Oba naye yennyini bw'aba ng'agaggawadde, anaayinzanga okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:50 Anaateesanga n'oyo eyamugula, ne babalirira emyaka okuva mu kiseera kye yeetundiramu, okutuuka ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza, omuwendo gw'asasula okwenunula ne gugererwa ku mpeera y'omukozi, egwanira emyaka egyo." 
Leviticus25:51 Anazzangayo ekitundu ky'omuwendo gwe yamugula, nga bagerera ku myaka egikyasigaddeyo," 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 nga babala empeera eya buli mwaka. Eyamugula taamufugenga na kkaaze. 
Leviticus25:54 Bw'ataanunulibwenga bw'atyo, ye n'abaana be banaateebwanga mu mwaka ogw'okujaguza," 
Leviticus25:55 kubanga Abayisirayeli baddu bange, be naggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus26:1 “Temwekolerenga bifaananyi oba okwesimbirawo ekifaananyi ekyole, wadde empagi esinzibwa, oba ejjinja eryole okubisinzanga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus26:2 Mukuumenga Sabbaato zange, era mussengamu ekitiibwa Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus26:3 “Bwe munaakoleranga ku mateeka gange, ne mukuumanga ebiragiro byange," 
Leviticus26:4 nnaabawanga enkuba mu biseera byayo, ensi n'ebaza ebirime, n'emiti egy'omu nnimiro ne gibala ebibala." 
Leviticus26:5 Ebirime byammwe binaabalanga nnyo, ne muwuulanga eŋŋaano okutuuka ku kunoga emizabbibu, n'okunoga ne kutuuka mu kiseera eky'okusigiramu eŋŋaano. Munaalyanga emmere ne mukkuta, era munaabeeranga mirembe mu nsi yammwe." 
Leviticus26:6 “Nnaabawanga emirembe mu nsi yammwe, ne mwebakanga nga tewali abatiisa. Era ndimalawo ensolo ez'akabi mu nsi yammwe, era ensi yammwe teebeerengamu ntalo." 
Leviticus26:7 Munaawangulanga abalabe bammwe. 
Leviticus26:8 Abataano ku mmwe banaawangulanga ekikumi, n'ekikumi ku mmwe banaawangulanga omutwalo mulamba. Mu lutalo, abalabe bammwe banaagwanga ne bafa mu maaso gammwe." 
Leviticus26:9 Nnaabawanga mmwe omukisa, ne mbawa okuzaala abaana bangi, era nnaakuumanga endagaano gye nakola nammwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Munaalyanga ku bye mwakungula edda ne mutereka, era munaafulumyanga ebyo ebikadde okuyingiza ebiggya." 
Leviticus26:11 Nnaabeeranga mu mmwe, era siibakyawenga." 
Leviticus26:12 Nnaatambuliranga mu mmwe, ne mba Katonda wammwe, mmwe ne muba bantu bange." 
Leviticus26:13 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, mulyoke mulemenga kuba baddu baabwe. Namenyawo obuyinza obwali bubasibye ekikoligo, ne mbatambuza nga mwesimbye." 
Leviticus26:14 “Naye bwe mutampulirenga ne mutatuukiriza biragiro byange ebyo byonna," 
Leviticus26:15 era bwe munaagaananga okukwata amateeka gange ne mukyawa bye mbakuutira, era ne mutatuukiriza biragiro byange byonna, bwe mutyo ne mumenya endagaano gye nkoze nammwe," 
Leviticus26:16 ndibabonereza bwe nti: ndireeta entiisa mu mmwe. Omusujja n'endwadde ezitawonyezeka biribaziba amaaso, ne bikonzibya obulamu bwammwe. Mulisiga ensigo, naye teziibagasenga, kubanga abalabe bammwe banaabawangulanga ne balya bye musize." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndibeefuulira mmwe, ne muwangulwa abalabe bammwe, ne mufugibwanga ababakyawa. Munaagwibwangamu entiisa, ne mudduka nga tewali abagoba." 
Leviticus26:18 “Ebyo byonna bwe binaamalanga okubaawo, era ne mutampulira, ekibonerezo kyammwe nnaakyongerangako emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:19 Nnaamenyanga obukakanyavu bw'olwetumbu lwammwe. Tewaabenga nkuba. Kale ensi yammwe erikala, n'eba ng'ekyuma." 
Leviticus26:20 Bwe munaakolanga emirimu, amaanyi gammwe ganaabafanga bwereere, kubanga ettaka lyammwe teriibazenga bibala." 
Leviticus26:21 “Era bwe munaayongeranga okumpakanya n'obutampulira, ekibonerezo kyammwe era nnaakyongerangako emirundi musanvu, okusinziira ku bibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:22 Nnaasindikanga mu mmwe ensolo enkambwe, ne zitta abaana bammwe, era ne zizikiriza amagana gammwe. Zinaabakendeezanga obungi, n'amakubo gammwe ne gazika." 
Leviticus26:23 “N'ebyo bwe binaalemanga okubakomyawo gye ndi, ne mwongera okumpakanya," 
Leviticus26:24 kale nange ndibeefuulira ne mbabonereza okusingawo emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe. 
Leviticus26:25 Nnaabaleeteranga entalo okubonereza eggwanga lyammwe lye nakola nalyo endagaano. Era bwe muneekuŋŋaanyizanga awamu mu bibuga byammwe okwetaasa, nnaabasindikangamu kawumpuli, ne muwalirizibwa okwewaayo eri abalabe bammwe." 
Leviticus26:26 Bwe nnaakendeezanga emmere yammwe, abakazi ekkumi baneetaaganga ekyoto kimu kyokka okufumbiramu emigaati. Banaagipimanga, ne mugirya gyonna, naye ne mutakutta." 
Leviticus26:27 “Era ebyo bwe binaalemwanga okubagonza, naye ne mwongera obutampulira n'okumpakanya," 
Leviticus26:28 olwo nnaabakyukiranga nga nsunguwadde, ne nnyongera okubabonereza okusingawo emirundi musanvu olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:29 Munaalumwanga nnyo enjala, ne mutuuka n'okulyanga abaana bammwe." 
Leviticus26:30 Nnaazikirizanga ebifo eby'oku nsozi bye musinzizaamu balubaale, ne mmenyerawo ddala ebyoterezo byammwe eby'obubaane, n'emirambo gyammwe ne ngisuula ku mirambo gy'ebyo bye musinza." 
Leviticus26:31 Nnaabeetamwanga, ne nsaanyaawo ebibuga byammwe, n'ebifo mwe musinziza, era ne sikkiriza bitambiro byammwe." 
Leviticus26:32 Ensi yammwe ndigifuula eddungu, n'abalabe bammwe abalijja okugibeeramu ne beewuunya okulaba bw'ezikiridde." 
Leviticus26:33 Nnaabaleeteranga entalo, ne mbasaasaanyiza mu mawanga. Ensi yammwe eneebanga ddungu, n'ebibuga byammwe ne bisigala matongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Olwo ensi n'eryoka esanyukira emyaka gyayo egy'okuwummula, mmwe gye mutaagiwa nga mugirimu. Erirekebwa awo n'ewummula, mmwe nga muwaŋŋangukidde mu nsi y'abalabe bammwe." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 “Abo ku mmwe abanaabeeranga mu buwaŋŋanguse, nnaabaleetangamu okutya, n'ekikoola ekinyeenyezebwa embuyaga, banaakiwuliranga ne badduka. Munaddukanga nga be bawondera mu lutalo, ne mugwa, nga tewali abagoba." 
Leviticus26:37 Munaalinnyaganangako mwekka na mwekka, nga tewali abawondera, era temuubengako mulabe gwe muyinza kulwanyisa." 
Leviticus26:38 Munaafiiranga mu mawanga, ne mumiribwa ensi y'abalabe bammwe." 
Leviticus26:39 Abatono ku mmwe abanaawonangawo mu nsi y'abalabe bammwe, banaakenenanga olw'ebibi byabwe, n'olw'ebibi bya bajjajjaabwe." 
Leviticus26:40 “Naye bazzukulu bammwe bwe banaayatulanga ebibi byabwe n'ebibi bya bajjajjaabwe abampakanya ne banjeemera 
Leviticus26:41 ne bandeetera okubalwanyisa n'okubatwala mu nsi y'abalabe baabwe, bazzukulu bammwe abo bwe balimala okutoowazibwa, ne bakkiriza okubonerezebwa olw'ebibi byabwe," 
Leviticus26:42 olwo ndijjukira endagaano gye nakola ne Yakobo, ne Yisaaka era ne Aburahamu, era ndijjukira ensi gye nabasuubiza." 
Leviticus26:43 Naye ensi eneemalanga kulekebwa n'ezika, bo nga tebaliimu, n'ewummula, era banakkirizanga okubonerezebwa olw'okujeemera ebiragiro byange, n'obutakwata mateeka gange." 
Leviticus26:44 Naye ebyo byonna ne bwe binaabanga bwe bityo, nga bakyali mu nsi y'abalabe baabwe, siibeegobengako, wadde okubakyawa okutuuka okubasaanyizaawo ddala, n'okumenyawo endagaano gye nakola nabo, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
Leviticus26:45 Naddangamu buggya endagaano gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe, bwe nalaga amawanga gonna obuyinza bwange nga mbaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, nze Mukama ndyoke mbenga Katonda waabwe.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Ago ge mateeka n'ebiragiro bye yaweera Abayisirayeli ku Lusozi Sinaayi, ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Leviticus27:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Leviticus27:2 ategeeze Abayisirayeli nti: “Omuntu bw'aneeyamanga okuwonga abantu eri Mukama, anaasobolanga okutuukiriza obweyamo obwo, ng'awaayo omuwendo gw'ensimbi guno," 
Leviticus27:3 ogunaabalirirwanga ku mbala entongole ey'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Bw'anaabanga omusajja ow'emyaka okuva ku makumi abiri okutuuka ku nkaaga, zinaabanga sekeli amakumi ataano eza ffeeza." 
Leviticus27:4 Bw'anaabanga omukazi, zinaabanga sekeli amakumi asatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Bw'anaabanga omulenzi okuva ku myaka etaano okutuuka ku makumi abiri, zinaabanga sekeli amakumi abiri eza ffeeza, omuwala sekeli kkumi eza ffeeza." 
Leviticus27:6 Omwana ow'obulenzi ali wansi w'emyaka etaano, zinaabanga sekeli ttaano eza ffeeza." 
Leviticus27:7 Oyo asussizza emyaka enkaaga, nga musajja, zinaabanga sekeli kkumi na ttaano eza ffeeza; nga mukazi, sekeli kkumi eza ffeeza." 
Leviticus27:8 Kyokka oyo eyeeyama bw'anaabanga omwavu, nga tasobola kusasulira ku mbalirira eyo, omuntu gwe yeeyama okuwaayo anaamuleetanga mu maaso ga kabona, kabona n'amusalira omuwendo, ng'asinziira ku ekyo, oyo awaayo ky'asobola okusasula." 
Leviticus27:9 “Obweyamo, bwe bunaabanga obw'okuwaayo ensolo ekkirizibwa okuba ekitone eri Mukama, olwo ebitone byonna buli muntu by'anaawangayo eri Mukama, binaabanga bitukuvu." 
Leviticus27:10 Taakyusenga kuteekawo ndala, wadde okuwaanyisaamu ennungi mu kifo ky'embi, oba embi mu kifo ky'ennungi. Bw'anaawanyisangamu emu okuteekawo endala, olwo ensolo zombi zinaabanga za Mukama." 
Leviticus27:11 Naye obweyamo, bwe bunaabanga obw'okuwaayo ensolo eteri nnongoofu, etekkirizibwa okuba ekitone eri Mukama, omuntu anaagitwalanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus27:12 kabona n'alamula omuwendo ogugigyamu, ng'alabira ku bulungi oba ku bubi bwayo. Omuwendo gw'anaalamulanga, gwe gunaabanga ogw'enkomerero." 
Leviticus27:13 Agireese bw'anaayagalanga okuginunula, anaasasulanga omuwendo gwayo, n'agattako n'ekimu ekyokutaano eky'omuwendo ogwo." 
Leviticus27:14 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo ennyumba ye ebe ya Mukama, kabona anaalamulanga omuwendo ogugigyamu, ng'alabira ku birungi oba ku bitali birungi ebigiriko. Omuwendo gw'anaalamulanga, gwe gunaabanga ogw'enkomerero." 
Leviticus27:15 Oyo agiwaayo bw'anaayagalanga okuginunula, anaasasulanga omuwendo gwayo, n'agattako n'ekimu ekyokutaano eky'omuwendo ogwo." 
Leviticus27:16 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo ekitundu ky'ettaka lye, libe erya Mukama, omuwendo gwalyo gunaalamulwanga, okulabira ku bungi bw'ensigo ezimala okukisiga, nga buli kilo amakumi abiri eza bbaale, zigula sekeli ttaano eza ffeeza." 
Leviticus27:17 Bw'anaawangayo ennimiro ng'omwaka ogw'okujaguza gwakaggwaako, eneebanga ku muwendo gwonna ogugiramuddwa." 
Leviticus27:18 Bw'anaagiwangayo nga gumaze ebbanga nga guweddeko, kabona anaabaliriranga omuwendo gwayo, ng'alabira ku myaka egikyasigaddeyo okutuuka ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza, n'akendeeza ku muwendo gwayo." 
Leviticus27:19 Awaddeyo ennimiro bw'anaayagalanga okuginunula, anaasasulanga omuwendo gwayo, n'agattako n'ekimu ekyokutaano eky'omuwendo ogwo, n'esigala nga yiye." 
Leviticus27:20 Bw'ataayagalenga kuginunula, oba bw'anaagiguzanga omulala nga tannaginunula, eneebanga tekyayinza kununulibwa." 
Leviticus27:21 Ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza oguddirira, eneefuukiranga ddala ya Mukama ennaku zonna, n'eba ya bakabona." 
Leviticus27:22 “Omuntu bw'anaawangayo eri Mukama ennimiro gye yagula obuguzi nga teyagisikira," 
Leviticus27:23 kabona anaabaliriranga omuwendo gw'ensimbi ogugigyamu, ng'alabira ku myaka egikyasigaddeyo okutuuka ku mwaka ogw'okujaguza, agiwaddeyo n'asasula omuwendo ogwo ku lunaku olwo, ensimbi ne ziba za Mukama." 
Leviticus27:24 Mu mwaka ogw'okujaguza, ennimiro eneddiranga eyagitunda, oba abasika be." 
Leviticus27:25 “Emiwendo gyonna ginaabalirirwanga ku bipimo ebitongole eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. 
Leviticus27:26 “Ensolo eggula enda, eba ya Mukama. N'olwekyo tewaabengawo agimutonera. Nga nte, oba nga ndiga, oba nga mbuzi, eba ya Mukama." 
Leviticus27:27 Naye bw'eneebanga ey'ensolo eteri nnongoofu, eneenunulibwanga ku muwendo ogubaliriddwa, ne kugattibwako ekimu ekyokutaano kyagwo. Bw'eneebanga tenunuddwa, eneeguzibwanga omuntu omulala ku muwendo gw'ebaliriddwamu." 
Leviticus27:28 “Naye tewaabengawo kintu kiwongeddwa eri Mukama, omuntu ky'anaabanga awongedde Mukama ku byonna by'alina, k'abe muntu oba k'ebe ensolo oba ka kibe kibanja eky'obutaka, ekinaatundibwanga oba ekinaanunulibwanga. Buli kintu ekyawongerwa Mukama, kisigala nga kya Mukama ennaku zonna." 
Leviticus27:29 Ne bw'aba muntu tewaabenga anunulibwa, kasita aba nga yawongerwa Mukama, wabula anattibwanga." 
Leviticus27:30 “Ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'ebirime ebikungulwa mu nsi, oba eky'ensigo, oba eky'ebibala by'emiti, kya Mukama. Kinaaweebwangayo gy'ali." 
Leviticus27:31 Omuntu bw'anaayagalanga okununula ku bitundu ebyo eby'ekkumi eby'ebirime bye, anaasasulanga omuwendo ogubigyamu, n'agattako n'ekimu ekyokutaano eky'omuwendo ogwo." 
Leviticus27:32 Ku nsolo enfuge, buli nsolo kkumi ezibalibwa, emu eneeweebwangayo eri Mukama." 
Leviticus27:33 Nnannyini nsolo, taayawulengamu nnungi na mbi, era taaziwaanyisenga. Ensolo emu bw'anaagiwaanyisangamu endala, zombi zinaaweebwangayo eri Mukama, era teziinunulwenga.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Ebyo bye biragiro, Mukama bye yawa Musa ku lusozi Sinaayi ku lw'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers1:1 Mu ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwokubiri, mu mwaka ogwokubiri okuva Abayisirayeli lwe baava mu nsi y'e Misiri, Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. N'agamba nti:" 
Numbers1:2 “Mubale Abayisirayeli bonna, nga mugoberera ensibuko zaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Mubale abasajja bonna kinnoomu, era muwandiike amannya gaabwe gonna." 
Numbers1:3 Ggwe ne Arooni mujja kubala abasajja bonna mu Yisirayeli abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, abayinza okugenda okutabaala, nga mubabalira mu bibinja byabwe." 
Numbers1:4 Mu buli kika mujja kuvaamu omukulu w'ennyumba ya bajjajjaabe, akole nammwe." 
Numbers1:5 Era gano ge mannya g'abasajja abanaakola nammwe: mu Kika kya Rewubeeni, Elizuuri mutabani wa Sedewuri;" 
Numbers1:6 mu Kika kya Simyoni, Selumiyeeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi;" 
Numbers1:7 mu Kika kya Yuda, Nahusooni mutabani wa Amminadabu;" 
Numbers1:8 mu Kika kya Yissakaari, Netaneeli mutabani wa Zuwari;" 
Numbers1:9 mu Kika kya Zebbulooni, Eliyaabu mutabani wa Heloni;" 
Numbers1:10 mu baana ba Yosefu: mu Kika kya Efurayimu, Elisaama mutabani wa Ammihudi; mu Kika kya Manasse, Gamaliyeeli mutabani wa Pedazuuri;" 
Numbers1:11 mu Kika kya Benyamiini, Abidaani mutabani wa Gidiyoni;" 
Numbers1:12 mu Kika kya Daani, Ahiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi;" 
Numbers1:13 mu Kika kya Aseri, Pagiyeeli mutabani wa Okuraani;" 
Numbers1:14 mu Kika kya Gaadi, Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Deweli;" 
Numbers1:15 mu Kika kya Nafutaali, Ahira mutabani wa Enani.”" 
Numbers1:16 Abo be bakulu b'ebika era abakulembeze b'enkumi n'enkumi z'Abayisirayeli. 
Numbers1:17 Awo Musa ne Arooni ne batwala abantu abo abamenyeddwa amannya," 
Numbers1:18 ne bakuŋŋaanya abantu bonna ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwokubiri. Abantu ne boogera obuzaale bwabwe, nga balaga ensibuko zaabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, ne bawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu." 
Numbers1:19 Bw'atyo Musa n'abalira abantu mu ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Numbers1:20 Ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni, omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli, abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya, kinnoomu, okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:21 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Rewubeeni, baali emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu bitaano." 
Numbers1:22 Ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni, abasajja bonna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya, kinnoomu, okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:23 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Simyoni, baali emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu bisatu." 
Numbers1:24 Ab'omu Kika kya Gaadi, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:25 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Gaadi, baali emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu ataano." 
Numbers1:26 Ab'omu Kika kya Yuda, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:27 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Yuda, baali emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga." 
Numbers1:28 Ab'omu Kika kya Yissakaari, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:29 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Yissakaari, baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu bina." 
Numbers1:30 Ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:31 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Zebbulooni, baali emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu bina." 
Numbers1:32 Mu basibuka mu Yosefu: ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:33 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Efurayimu, baali emitwalo ena mu bitaano." 
Numbers1:34 Ab'omu Kika kya Manasse, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:35 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Manasse, baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri." 
Numbers1:36 Ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:37 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Benyamiini, baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu bina." 
Numbers1:38 Ab'omu Kika kya Daani, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:39 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Daani, baali emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu." 
Numbers1:40 Ab'omu Kika kya Aseri, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:41 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Aseri, baali emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu bitaano." 
Numbers1:42 Ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali, abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala, abaawandiikibwa amannya okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe, n'ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:43 abo abaabalibwa, mu Kika ekyo ekya Nafutaali, baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu bina." 
Numbers1:44 Abo be baabalibwa Musa ne Arooni, nga bayambibwako abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli, abasajja ekkumi n'ababiri, buli omu ng'akiikirira ennyumba ya bajjajjaabe." 
Numbers1:45 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli bonna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, bonna abayinza okugenda okutabaala mu ggye lya Yisirayeli, abaabalibwa okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers1:46 abo bonna abaabalibwa, baali emitwalo nkaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu bitaano mu ataano." 
Numbers1:47 Naye bo Abaleevi, tebaabalibwa wamu na ba bika birala," 
Numbers1:48 kubanga Mukama yagamba Musa nti: 
Numbers1:49 “Naye ab'omu Kika kya Leevi tobabala, era omuwendo gwabwe togugatta ku gwa Bayisirayeli bannaabwe." 
Numbers1:50 Wabula Abaleevi bawe omulimu ogw'okulabiriranga Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, era n'okulabiriranga ebintu byayo byonna, ne byonna ebigigenderako. Banaagisitulanga n'ebintu byayo byonna, era be banaabanga abaweereza baayo, era banaasiisiranga okugyetooloola." 
Numbers1:51 Buli lwe munaabanga musengula olusiisira, Abaleevi be banaasimbulanga Weema. Era bw'eneebanga esimbibwa, Abaleevi be banaagisimbanga. Atali Muleevi anaagisembereranga, anattibwanga." 
Numbers1:52 Abayisirayeli abalala, banaasimbanga eweema zaabwe, buli omu mu lusiisira lwe, ne mu kibinja kye, awali bbendera ye." 
Numbers1:53 Naye Abaleevi banaasiisiranga okwetooloola Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli kireme kusunguwalirwa. Era Abaleevi be banaabeeranga n'obuvunaanyizibwa ku Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu.”" 
Numbers1:54 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli ne bakola byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers2:2 “Abayisirayeli bwe banaabanga basiisira, buli muntu ajjanga kusiisira awali bbendera y'ekibinja kye, era awali obubonero bw'Ekika kye. Banaasiisiranga okwetooloola Eweema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, nga bagyesuddeko ebbanga." 
Numbers2:3 “Abanaasiisiranga ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba nga batunuulidde enjuba gy'eva, banaabanga ba bbendera ya lusiisira lwa Yuda mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Yuda ye Nahusooni mutabani wa Amminadabu." 
Numbers2:4 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. 
Numbers2:5 Ab'Ekika kya Yissakaari be banaasiisiranga okumuliraana. Omukulembeze waabwe ye Netaneeli mutabani wa Zuwari. 
Numbers2:6 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu bina. 
Numbers2:7 Ne kuddako ab'Ekika kya Zebbulooni, ng'omukulembeze waabwe ye Eliyaabu mutabani wa Heloni." 
Numbers2:8 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu bina. 
Numbers2:9 Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa mu lusiisira lwa Yuda, mu bibinja byabwe, baali emitwalo kkumi na munaana mu kakaaga mu bina. Abo be banaasookanga okutambula." 
Numbers2:10 “Ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, we wanaabanga bbendera y'olusiisira lwa Rewubeeni mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Rewubeeni ye Elizuuri mutabani wa Sedewuri." 
Numbers2:11 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:12 Ab'Ekika kya Simyoni be banaasiisiranga okumuliraana. Omukulembeze waabwe ye Selumiyeeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi. 
Numbers2:13 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu bisatu. 
Numbers2:14 Ne kuddako ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, ng'omukulembeze waabwe ye Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Reweli." 
Numbers2:15 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu ataano. 
Numbers2:16 Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa mu lusiisira lwa Rewubeeni, mu bibinja byabwe, baali emitwalo kkumi n'etaano mu lukumi mu bina mu ataano. Abo be banaabeeranga mu kifo ekyokubiri mu kutambula." 
Numbers2:17 “Awo Eweema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu n'eryoka eddako, wamu n'olusiisira lw'Abaleevi, wakati w'ensiisira ezikulembera n'eziddirira. Nga bwe baddiriŋŋana mu kusiisira, era bwe banaddiriŋŋananga mu kutambula, bagoberere bbendera zaabwe, nga buli omu atambulira mu kifo kye." 
Numbers2:18 “Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, we wanaabanga bbendera y'olusiisira lwa Efurayimu, mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Efurayimu, ye Elisaama mutabani wa Ammihudi." 
Numbers2:19 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo ena mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:20 Ab'Ekika kya Manasse be banaasiisiranga okumuliraana. Omukulembeze waabwe ye Gamaliyeeli mutabani wa Pedazuuri. 
Numbers2:21 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri. 
Numbers2:22 Ne kuddako ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini, ng'omukulembeze waabwe ye Abidaani mutabani wa Gidiyoni." 
Numbers2:23 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu bina. 
Numbers2:24 Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa mu lusiisira lwa Efurayimu, mu bibinja byabwe baali emitwalo kkumi mu kanaana mu kikumi. Abo be banaabeeranga mu kifo ekyokusatu mu kutambula." 
Numbers2:25 “Ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono, we wanaabanga bbendera ey'olusiisira lwa Daani mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Daani, ye Ahiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi." 
Numbers2:26 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu. 
Numbers2:27 Ab'Ekika kya Aseri be banaasiisiranga okumuliraana. Omukulembeze waabwe ye Pagiyeeli mutabani wa Okuraani. 
Numbers2:28 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu bitaano. 
Numbers2:29 Ne kuddako ab'Ekika kya Nafutaali, ng'omukulembeze waabwe ye Ahira mutabani wa Enani." 
Numbers2:30 Ekibinja kye kyabalibwamu abasajja emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu bina. 
Numbers2:31 Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa mu lusiisira lwa Daani, mu bibinja byabwe, baali emitwalo kkumi n'etaano mu kasanvu mu lukaaga. Abo be banaasembangayo emabega, nga bbendera bwe ziddiriŋŋana.”" 
Numbers2:32 Abo be Bayisirayeli abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Abasajja bonna abaabalibwa mu nsiisira zonna, mu bibinja byabwe, baali emitwalo nkaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu bitaano mu ataano." 
Numbers2:33 Naye nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa, bo Abaleevi tebaabalibwa wamu na Bayisirayeli bannaabwe." 
Numbers2:34 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli ne batuukiriza byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa: ne basiisiranga awali bbendera zaabwe, era ne batambulanga bwe batyo, okusinziira ku nsibuko ya buli omu, n'ennyumba ya bajjajjaabe." 
Numbers3:1 Bino bye bifa ku zzadde lya Arooni ne Musa, mu kiseera Mukama kye yayogereramu ne Musa ku Lusozi Sinaayi." 
Numbers3:2 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Arooni: Nadabu omuggulanda, ne Abihu, Eleyazaari, ne Yitamaari." 
Numbers3:3 Ago ge mannya ga batabani ba Arooni, bakabona abaafukibwako omuzigo, ne baawulibwa okuweerezanga mu bwakabona." 
Numbers3:4 Kyokka Nadabu ne Abihu ne bafiira mu maaso ga Mukama, bwe baaleeta mu maaso ge omuliro gw'atabalagidde, mu ddungu ly'e Sinaayi. Tebaalina baana. Olwo Eleyazaari ne Yitamaari ne baweerezanga mu bwakabona, nga balabirirwa Arooni kitaabwe." 
Numbers3:5 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:6 “Leeta ab'omu Kika kya Leevi, obakwase Arooni kabona bamuweerezenga." 
Numbers3:7 Banaayambanga bakabona n'abantu bonna okutuukiriza bye balagirwa okukola mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu. 
Numbers3:8 Banaalabiriranga ebintu byonna eby'omu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, era banaakoleranga Abayisirayeli abalala bonna bye balagirwa okukola mu Weema eyo." 
Numbers3:9 Onoggya Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli bannaabwe, obaweere ddala Arooni ne batabani be." 
Numbers3:10 Era onooteekawo Arooni ne batabani be, okukola omulimu gwabwe ogw'obwakabona. Omuntu omulala yenna anaagezangako okugukola, anattibwanga.”" 
Numbers3:11 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:12 “Nze nzennyini neerobozezza ne ntwala Abaleevi be nzigye mu Bayisirayeli, mu kifo ky'okutwala buli muggulanda mu baana ab'obulenzi ab'Abayisirayeli. Kaakano Abaleevi bafuuse bange," 
Numbers3:13 kubanga buli muggulanda, wange. Okuva ku lunaku lwe nattirako abaggulanda bonna mu nsi y'e Misiri, neeyawulira buli muggulanda mu Yisirayeli, ow'abantu n'ow'ensolo. Banaabeeranga bange, Nze Mukama.”" 
Numbers3:14 Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa mu ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, n'agamba nti:" 
Numbers3:15 “Bala Abaleevi ng'ogoberera ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, obale buli mulenzi awezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo.”" 
Numbers3:16 Awo Musa n'ababala nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. 
Numbers3:17 Bano be batabani ba Leevi: Gerusooni, ne Kohati, ne Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Gerusooni, era bajjajja b'abasibuka mu ye: Libuni ne Simeeyi." 
Numbers3:19 Batabani ba Kohati, era bajjajja b'abasibuka mu ye, be bano: Amuraamu ne Yizuhaari, Heburooni ne Wuzziyeeli." 
Numbers3:20 Batabani ba Merari, era bajjajja b'abasibuka mu ye, be bano: Mahuli ne Muusi. Abo be basibukamu Abaleevi, ng'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe bwe zaali." 
Numbers3:21 Mu Gerusooni mwe musibuka Abalibuni n'Abasimeeyi. Abo be Bagerusooni. 
Numbers3:22 Omuwendo gwabwe bonna, abasajja n'abaana ab'obulenzi abawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, abaabalibwa, gwali kasanvu mu bitaano." 
Numbers3:23 Abasibuka mu Gerusooni be baasiisiranga emabega w'Eweema, ebugwanjuba," 
Numbers3:24 nga bakulirwa Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Laweli. 
Numbers3:25 Omulimu gwa Bagerusooni mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, gwali gwa kugirabiriranga n'ebigibikkako munda ne kungulu, n'okulabirira olutimbe olw'omu mulyango gwayo," 
Numbers3:26 n'entimbe ez'oluggya olugyetooloola, yo ne alutaari, n'olutimbe lw'omulyango gw'oluggya olwo, n'emiguwa gyalwo egikozesebwa ku mulimu gwalwo gwonna." 
Numbers3:27 Ate mu Kohati mwe musibuka Abamuraamu, n'Abayizuhaari, n'Abaheburooni n'Abawuzziyeeli. Abo be Bakohati." 
Numbers3:28 Omuwendo gwabwe bonna, abasajja n'abaana ab'obulenzi abawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, gwali kanaana mu lukaaga. Abo be baalabiriranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers3:29 Abasibuka mu Kohati be baasiisiranga ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo bwa Weema," 
Numbers3:30 nga bakulirwa Elizafani, mutabani wa Wuzziyeeli." 
Numbers3:31 Omulimu gwabwe gwali gwa kulabirira Ssanduuko ey'Endagaano, n'emmeeza, n'ekikondo ky'ettaala, ne zaalutaari, n'ebintu eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu bakabona bye bakozesa mu kuweereza, n'olutimbe, n'ebikozesebwa ku lwo." 
Numbers3:32 Eleyazaari mutabani wa Arooni kabona, ye yali omukulu w'abakulembeze b'Abaleevi. Ye yalondebwa okukulira abalabirira Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers3:33 Mu Merari mwe musibuka Abamahuli, n'Abamuusi. Abo be Bamerari." 
Numbers3:34 Omuwendo gwabwe bonna abasajja n'abaana ab'obulenzi abawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, gwali kakaaga mu bibiri." 
Numbers3:35 Be baasiisiranga ku ludda lw'Eweema olw'ebukiikaddyo, abakulira nga ye Zuuriyeeli mutabani wa Abihayili." 
Numbers3:36 Omulimu ogwaweebwa Abamerari gwali gwa kulabiriranga mbaawo za Weema n'emikiikiro gyayo, n'empagi zaayo, n'ebinnya byayo, n'ebintu byayo byonna ebikozesebwa ku yo." 
Numbers3:37 Era baaweebwa ogw'okulabiriranga empagi, n'ebinnya, n'enninga, n'emiguwa, eby'oluggya olwetooloola Eweema." 
Numbers3:38 Musa ne Arooni ne batabani be, be baasiisiranga ebuvanjuba, mu maaso g'Eweema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, nga boolekedde enjuba gy'eva. Be baalabiriranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu okutuukiriza ebyalagirwa Abayisirayeli. Omuntu omulala yenna eyasembereranga ekifo ekyo, yabanga wa kuttibwa." 
Numbers3:39 Abaleevi bonna, abasajja n'abaana ab'obulenzi abawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, Musa ne Arooni be baabala nga bagoberera ensibuko zaabwe, nga Mukama bwe yalagira, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri." 
Numbers3:40 Awo Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Bala abaggulanda bonna, abasajja n'abaana ab'obulenzi abawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, ab'Abayisirayeli, owandiike amannya gaabwe." 
Numbers3:41 Naye mu kifo ky'abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi ab'Abayisirayeli, njawulira Abaleevi, babe bange, Nze Mukama. Era njawulira amagana g'Abaleevi gabe gange, mu kifo ky'ensolo zonna ezisooka okuzaalibwa mu magana g'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers3:42 Awo Musa n'abala abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi ab'Abayisirayeli, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Numbers3:43 Era abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi, okuva ku bawezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, abaawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe ne babalibwa, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri mu nsavu mu basatu." 
Numbers3:44 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers3:45 “Mu kifo ky'abaggulanda ab'obulenzi ab'Abayisirayeli, yawula Abaleevi babe bange, era yawula amagana gaabwe gabe gange, mu kifo ky'amagana g'Abayisirayeli. Nze Mukama." 
Numbers3:46 Olw'okununula abaggulanda ab'obulenzi ebikumi ebibiri mu ensanvu mu abasatu ab'Abayisirayeli, abaasukka ku muwendo gw'Abaleevi," 
Numbers3:47 onoosolooza sekeli ttaano olwa buli omu, ez'ekipimo ekitongole eky'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ze ggeera amakumi abiri buli sekeli." 
Numbers3:48 Ensimbi ezo onooziwa Arooni ne batabani be, olw'okununula abo abeeyongeramu.”" 
Numbers3:49 Bw'atyo Musa n'asolooza ensimbi ku abo abaafikkawo nga tebanunuliddwa Baleevi. 
Numbers3:50 Ensimbi ze yasolooza ku baggulanda ab'obulenzi ab'Abayisirayeli, zaawera sekeli lukumi mu bisatu mu nkaaga mu ttaano, ez'ekipimo ekitongole eky'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers3:51 Awo Musa n'awa Arooni ne batabani be ensimbi ezo ezaanunula, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Numbers4:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers4:2 “Mubale abasajja Abaleevi ab'olulyo lwa Kohati, nga mugoberera ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers4:3 Mubale okuva ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu n'okusingawo, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, buli asobola okukola omulimu ogw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers4:4 Omulimu Abakohati gwe banaakolanga mu Weema eyo, gwe gw'okulabiriranga ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo." 
Numbers4:5 “Ab'omu lusiisira bwe banaabanga banaatera okutandika olugendo, Arooni ne batabani be banaayingiranga mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, ne bawanulayo olutimbe olutimbibwa mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, ne balubikka ku yo." 
Numbers4:6 Ne bateekako ekibikka eky'amaliba amagonvu, ne baaliirira okwo olugoye olwa bbululu omwereere, ne bagiwangako emiti gyayo kw'esitulirwa." 
Numbers4:7 “Ne ku mmeeza ey'emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda, banaayaliirirangako olugoye olwa bbululu, ne bateekako essowaani n'ebijiiko, n'ebbakuli, n'ebikopo eby'ekiweebwayo ekinywebwa. Era olubeerera, ku mmeeza kunaabeerangako emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda." 
Numbers4:8 Ebyo banaabyaliirirangako olugoye olumyufu, ne bateekako ekibikka eky'amaliba amagonvu, olwo emmeeza ne bagiwangako emiti gyayo kw'esitulirwa." 
Numbers4:9 “Ne baddira olugoye olwa bbululu, ne basabika ekikondo ky'ettaala, n'ettaala zaakyo, ne makansi zaakyo, n'ensaniya zaakyo ez'evvu, ne byonna ebiteekebwamu amafuta agakozesebwa mu kyo." 
Numbers4:10 Ne bakisiba n'ebintu byakyo byonna mu kisabika eky'amaliba amagonvu, ne bakiteeka ku miti kwe kisitulirwa." 
Numbers4:11 “Ne ku alutaari eya zaabu, banaayaliirirangako olugoye olwa bbululu, ne bateekako ekibikka eky'amaliba amagonvu, ne bagiwangako emiti gyayo kw'esitulirwa." 
Numbers4:12 Ne baddira ebintu byonna ebikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ne babisiba mu lugoye olwa bbululu, ne babiteekako ekibikka eky'amaliba amagonvu, ne babiteeka ku lubaawo kwe bisitulirwa." 
Numbers4:13 Ne baggya evvu ku alutaari, ne bagyaliirirako olugoye olwa kakobe," 
Numbers4:14 ne bagiteekako ebintu byayo byonna ebikozesebwa ku yo: ensaniya ezinyookezebwako obubaane, ffooka ez'okukwasa ennyama, ebitiiyo eby'okuyooza evvu, n'ekkalaayi ezikozesebwa mu kumansira. Ebintu bya alutaari ebyo byonna ne babiteekako ekibikka eky'amaliba amagonvu, ne bagiwangako emiti gyayo kw'esitulirwa." 
Numbers4:15 Awo Arooni ne batabani be bwe banaamalirizanga okusabika buli kintu ekitukuvu ne byonna ebikigenderako, ab'omu lusiisira nga banaatera okutandika olugendo, Abakohati ne balyoka bajja okubisitula. Naye tebaakwatenga butereevu ku bitukuvu, sikulwa nga bafa. Ebyo bye bintu eby'omu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, Abakohati bye banaasitulanga." 
Numbers4:16 Eleyazaari mutabani wa Arooni kabona, ye anaabanga n'omulimu ogw'okulabirira amafuta ag'ettaala, n'obubaane obuwunya akaloosa, n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekitabulawo, n'omuzigo ogufukibwa ku bantu ne ku bintu. Era ye anaalabiriranga Eweema yonna, n'ebigirimu byonna, Ekifo Ekitukuvu n'ebintu byamu byonna.”" 
Numbers4:17 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers4:18 “Temuleetera lulyo lwa Bakohati kusaanawo mu Baleevi. 
Numbers4:19 Naye kino kye muba mubakolera balemenga kufa, bwe banaasembereranga ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo: Arooni ne batabani be, be banaayingiranga ne bawa buli muntu omulimu gw'anaakola, n'ekintu ky'anaasitula." 
Numbers4:20 Naye Abakohati tebagezanga ne bayingira okutunuulira obutereevu ku bitukuvu wadde akaseera akatono, baleme kufa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers4:22 “Bala abasajja ab'olulyo lwa Gerusooni, ng'ogoberera ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe n'ensibuko zaabwe." 
Numbers4:23 Abasajja abawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, b'oba obala, buli asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers4:24 “Guno gwe mulimu Abagerusooni gwe banaakolanga: 
Numbers4:25 banaasitulanga entimbe z'Eweema Entukuvu, n'Eweema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, era n'ekigibikkako ekyomunda, n'ekigibikkako ekyokungulu eky'amaliba amagonvu, n'olutimbe olw'omu mulyango oguyingira mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu," 
Numbers4:26 n'entimbe ez'oluggya, n'olutimbe olw'omu mulyango oguyingira mu luggya olwetooloola Eweema Entukuvu ne alutaari enjuyi zonna, n'emiguwa, ne byonna ebikozesebwa ku ntimbe ezo. Banaakolanga emirimu gyonna egyetaaga okukolebwa ku bintu ebyo." 
Numbers4:27 Arooni ne batabani be, be banaalaganga Abagerusooni emirimu gyonna gye bateekwa okukola, oba gya kusitula migugu, oba gya buweereza bulala. Byonna eby'okusitula mmwe munaabibakwasanga." 
Numbers4:28 Egyo gye mirimu ab'olulyo lwa Gerusooni gye banaakolanga mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu. Banaagikolanga nga balabirirwa Yitamaari mutabani wa Arooni kabona. 
Numbers4:29 “Ab'olulyo lwa Merari nabo onoobabala ng'ogoberera ensibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers4:30 Abawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, b'oba obala, buli asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers4:31 Omulimu gwabwe mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, gunaabanga gwa kusitula mbaawo z'Eweema Entukuvu, n'emikiikiro gyayo, n'empagi zaayo, n'ebinnya byayo," 
Numbers4:32 n'empagi z'oluggya olwetooloola Eweema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, n'ebinnya byazo, n'enninga zaazo, n'emiguwa gyazo, wamu ne byonna ebikozesebwa ku bintu ebyo. Munaawandiikanga amannya gaabwe okulaga buli omu ekintu ky'aweereddwa okusitula." 
Numbers4:33 Egyo gye mirimu ab'olulyo lwa Merari gye banaakolanga, nga baweereza mu Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu. Banaagikolanga nga balabirirwa Yitamaari, mutabani wa Arooni kabona.”" 
Numbers4:34 Awo Musa ne Arooni n'abakulembeze abalala ab'Abayisirayeli, ne babala abasajja ab'omu lulyo lwa Kohati, nga bagoberera ensibuko z'Abakohati abo, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:35 okuva ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, buli eyali asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers4:36 Abo abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaabwe, baali enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu mu ataano." 
Numbers4:37 Abo be b'omu lulyo lwa Kohati bonna, abaakolanga omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, Musa ne Arooni be baabala, nga Mukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers4:38 N'abasajja ab'omu lulyo lwa Gerusooni, abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:39 okuva ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, buli eyali asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama," 
Numbers4:40 abo abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, baali enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga mu asatu." 
Numbers4:41 Abo be b'omu lulyo lwa Gerusooni bonna, abaakolanga omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, Musa ne Arooni be baabala, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers4:42 N'abasajja ab'omu lulyo lwa Merari abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaabwe, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:43 okuva ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, buli eyali asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama," 
Numbers4:44 abo abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaaabwe, baali enkumi bbiri mu bibiri." 
Numbers4:45 Abo be b'omu lulyo lwa Merari, Musa ne Arooni be baabala, nga Mukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers4:46 Abo be Baleevi bonna, Musa ne Arooni n'abakulembeze abalala ab'Abayisirayeli be baabala, nga bagoberera ensibuko z'Abaleevi abo, n'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe," 
Numbers4:47 okuva ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi asatu, okutuusa ku bawezezza emyaka amakumi ataano, buli eyali asobola okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza, n'ogw'okusitula emigugu mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers4:48 Abo abaabalibwa baali kanaana mu bitaano mu kinaana. 
Numbers4:49 Nga Mukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa, buli musajja yabalibwa, n'aweebwa omulimu ogw'okukola, oba omugugu ogw'okusitula. Bwe batyo bwe baabalibwa nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers5:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli baggyenga mu lusiisira buli alina endwadde y'olususu etiisa, na buli alwadde ekikulukuto, na buli atali mulongoofu olw'okukoona ku kintu ekifudde." 
Numbers5:3 Abasajja n'abakazi abali bwe batyo, munaabaggyanga mu lusiisira ne mubafulumya ebweru, baleme kwonoona lusiisira lwe mbeeramu Nze wamu n'abantu bange.”" 
Numbers5:4 Ekyo Abayisirayeli ne bakikola. Ne bafulumya abaali bwe batyo ebweru w'olusiisira, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers5:6 “Gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omusajja oba omukazi bw'akola ekibi ku muntu munne, anyiiza Mukama era omusango guba gumusinze." 
Numbers5:7 Anakkirizanga ekibi kye ky'akoze, n'aliwa mu bujjuvu ekintu ky'ayonoonye, n'ayongerako n'ekitundu kyakyo ekimu ekyokutaano, n'abiwa oyo gw'azzizzaako omusango." 
Numbers5:8 Naye gwe bazzaako omusango bw'aba nga yafa ate nga talina waaluganda lwa kumpi ayinza kuliyirwa, ekiriyibwa olw'omusango kinaaliyirwanga Mukama, ne kiba kya kabona, ne kyongerwako n'endiga ennume okusonyiyisa ebibi by'oyo eyazza omusango." 
Numbers5:9 Buli kiweebwayo ekyenjawulo Abayisirayeli kye baleetera Mukama, kinaabanga kya kabona gwe bakikwasizza." 
Numbers5:10 Buli ekiwongeddwa, kinaabanga kya kabona gwe bakikwasizza.’ ”" 
Numbers5:11 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers5:12 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli abagambe nti: “Muk'omusajja bw'anaddanga ebbali n'ataba mwesigwa eri bba," 
Numbers5:13 omusajja omulala ne yeebaka naye mu kyama, bw'atyo omukazi oyo ne yeeyonoona nga bba tamanyi, era nga tewali mujulirwa amulumiriza, kubanga teyakwatirwa mu kikolwa ekyo," 
Numbers5:14 bba n'ajjirwa okuteerera nti mukazi we yeeyonoonye, oba n'amuteerera, kyokka nga teyeeyonoonye," 
Numbers5:15 omusajja oyo anaatwalanga mukazi we eri kabona. Era anaamuweerangayo ekitone kya kilo emu ey'obuwunga obwa bbaale. Taabufukengako muzigo gwa mizayiti, wadde okubuteekako obubaane, kubanga ekitone ekyo kye kiweebwayo omusajja ateerera mukazi we ne kiteekebwawo, amazima galyoke geeyoleke." 
Numbers5:16 “Kabona anaaleetanga omukazi oyo n'amuyimiriza mu maaso ga alutaari. 
Numbers5:17 Kabona anaddiranga amazzi agaweereddwa omukisa, n'agateeka mu kibya. N'atoola ku nfuufu eri wansi mu Weema Entukuvu, n'agiteeka mu mazzi ago, okugafuula agakaawa." 
Numbers5:18 N'ataggulula enviiri z'omukazi, n'amukwasa mu ngalo ekiweebwayo eky'obuwunga, ekiweereddwayo olw'okumalawo okuteerera. Ye kabona n'akwata mu mukono gwe amazzi agakaawa, agaleeta ekikolimo." 
Numbers5:19 Awo kabona anaalayizanga omukazi ng'amugamba nti: Oba nga tewabangawo musajja mulala yeebaka naawe, era oba nga toddangako bbali mu bya bwenzi sso ng'olina balo, amazzi gano agakaawa agaleeta ekikolimo tegaakukoleko kabi." 
Numbers5:20 Naye oba nga wadda ebbali sso ng'oli mukazi mufumbo, n'oyenda," 
Numbers5:21 olwo kabona anaalaamirizanga omukazi ebigambo eby'ekikolimo ng'agamba nti: Mukama akufuule anaajulirwanga mu bantu bo nga bakolima, bw'anaakonzibya ekisambi kyo, n'atumbiiza olubuto lwo." 
Numbers5:22 Amazzi gano agaleeta ekikolimo, gayingire mu byenda byo, gatumbiize olubuto lwo, era gakonzibye ekisambi kyo. “Omukazi anaddangamu nti: ‘Yee, nzikirizza kibe bwe kityo. Yee, nzikirizza kibe bwe kityo.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Awo kabona anaawandiikanga ebikolimo ebyo mu kitabo, n'abyozaako n'amazzi gali agakaawa." 
Numbers5:24 Kabona anaanywesanga omukazi amazzi agakaawa agaleeta ekikolimo, amazzi ago ne gayingira mu ye, ne gakaawa." 
Numbers5:25 Awo kabona anaggyanga mu ngalo z'omukazi ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke eky'okumalawo okuteerera, n'akitwala ku alutaari." 
Numbers5:26 N'atoola ku kyo olubatu, nga ke kabonero k'ekiweebwayo ekyo, n'alwokera ku alutaari. Olwo n'alyoka anywesa omukazi amazzi." 
Numbers5:27 Omukazi oyo bw'anaabanga yayonoona n'ataba mwesigwa eri bba, amazzi agaleeta ekikolimo ganaamuleeteranga obulumi, olubuto lwe ne lutumbiira, n'ekisambi kye ne kikonziba, n'afuuka ekikolimo mu bantu be." 
Numbers5:28 Kyokka bw'anaabanga talina musango, taabengako kabi kamutuukako, era anaasobolanga okuzaala abaana." 
Numbers5:29 “Eryo lye tteeka erinaakozesebwanga, ng'omukazi omufumbo azze ebbali ne yeeyonoona mu bwenzi," 
Numbers5:30 oba ng'omusajja ajjiddwa ebirowoozo, n'ateerera mukazi we obwenzi. Omusajja oyo anaaleetanga mu maaso ga Mukama, omukazi gw'ateerera, kabona n'alyoka akozesa etteeka eryo lyonna." 
Numbers5:31 Omusajja oyo taabengako kibi ky'avunaanibwa. Naye omukazi bw'anaabanga yayonoona, anaabonerezebwanga olw'ekibi kye.”" 
Numbers6:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers6:2 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli, abagambe nti: “Omusajja oba omukazi bw'aneeyamanga ku lulwe okwewongera Mukama, amweweere ddala okumala ekiseera," 
Numbers6:3 anaayawukananga n'okunywa omwenge n'ebyokunywa ebirala ebitamiiza. Taanywenga ku kyakunywa na kimu ekikoleddwa mu mizabbibu, era taalyenga mizabbibu mibisi wadde egikaziddwa." 
Numbers6:4 Ennaku zonna z'alimala nga yeewongedde Mukama, taalyenga kintu na kimu ekiva ku muzabbibu newaakubadde ensigo wadde ebikuta." 
Numbers6:5 “Ennaku zonna z'alibeera mu bweyamo bw'okwewongera Mukama, taasalenga ku nviiri ze era taazimwengako. Anaasibwanga obweyamo bwe ebbanga lyonna ly'alimala nga yeewongedde Mukama, era anaalekanga enviiri ze n'ebirevu bye ne bikula." 
Numbers6:6 Ennaku zonna ze yeewongeramu Mukama, taasembererenga mulambo" 
Numbers6:7 kwefuula atali mulongoofu, ne bwe guba gwa kitaawe, oba gwa nnyina, oba gwa muganda we, oba gwa mwannyina, kubanga aba muwonge eri Katonda." 
Numbers6:8 Ennaku zonna ez'okwewonga kwe, aba ayawuliddwa n'aba wa Mukama mu ngeri ey'enjawulo." 
Numbers6:9 “Singa omutwe gw'omuwonge gufuuka ogutali mulongoofu olw'omuntu afiiridde okumpi naye embagirawo, omuwonge oyo anaalindanga ne wayitawo ennaku musanvu, n'alyoka amwa omutwe gwe, n'addamu okuba omulongoofu." 
Numbers6:10 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, anaaleetanga eri kabona enjiibwa bbiri, oba amayiba amato abiri, ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers6:11 Awo kabona anaawangayo akamu ku bunyonyi obwo, kabe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, n'akookubiri kabe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'amusabira ekisonyiwo olw'ekisobyo kye yakola eky'okuliraana omufu. Omuntu oyo anaddangamu okuwonga omutwe gwe ku lunaku olwo lwennyini." 
Numbers6:12 Era anaawongeranga Mukama ebbanga eggere ly'alimala nga amwewongedde, n'aleeta endiga ento ennume ey'omwaka ogumu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'omusango. Naye ebbanga eryasooka linaabanga lifudde, kubanga okwewonga kwe kwayonooneka." 
Numbers6:13 “Lino lye tteeka erifuga omuwonge, ebbanga ery'okwewonga kwe bwe linaggwangako: ku lunaku lwe linaggwangako, anaaleetebwanga ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama," 
Numbers6:14 n'awaayo ekitone kye eri Mukama kya nsolo ssatu ezitaliiko kamogo: endiga ento ennume ey'omwaka ogumu, ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa; n'endiga ento enduusi ey'omwaka ogumu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; era n'endiga ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Numbers6:15 Era n'awaayo ekibbo eky'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, n'obugaati obukoleddwa mu buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, era n'emigaati egy'empewere egitazimbulukusiddwa, egifukiddwako omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, era n'ebiweebwayo ebigenderako: eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers6:16 “Kabona anaabyanjulanga eri Mukama, n'awaayo ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, n'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Numbers6:17 N'atambira endiga ennume, ebe ekiweebwayo eri Mukama olw'okutabagana, n'akiwaayo awamu n'ekibbo eky'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa. Kabona era anaawangayo ebiweebwayo ebigenderako: eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers6:18 Olwo omuwonge anaamweranga omutwe gwe ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'addira enviiri ze, akabonero akalaga okwewonga kwe, n'aziteeka mu muliro oguliko ekitambiro eky'ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Numbers6:19 “Kabona anaatwalanga omukono ogw'endiga ennume ogumaze okufumbibwa, era n'aggya mu kibbo akagaati kamu akatazimbulukusiddwa, n'omugaati ogw'empewere gumu ogutazimbulukusiddwa, byonna n'abiteeka mu ngalo z'omuwonge amaze okwemwako enviiri eziraga okwewonga kwe." 
Numbers6:20 Kabona anaabiwuubanga bibe ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama. Ebyo, awamu n'ekifuba ekiwuubibwa era n'ekisambi ekisitulibwa, byayawulirwa kabona. Ebyo bwe biggwa, omuwonge n'alyoka ayinza okunywa omwenge." 
Numbers6:21 Eryo lye tteeka erinaafuganga omuntu eyeeyama okwewongera Mukama amweweere ddala okumala ekiseera, era lye linaafuganga ekitone ky'anaawangayo eri Mukama. Naye omuwonge bw'aneeyamanga okuwaayo eri Mukama ebisingawo, anaabiwangayo nga bw'anaabanga yeeyamye.”" 
Numbers6:22 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers6:23 ategeeze Arooni ne batabani be nti bwe banaabanga basabira Abayisirayeli omukisa, banaagambanga bwe bati nti:" 
Numbers6:24 “Mukama akuwe omukisa akukuume," 
Numbers6:25 Mukama akusanyukire, akukwatirwe ekisa;" 
Numbers6:26 Mukama akutunuulize amaaso ag'ekisa, akuwe emirembe.”" 
Numbers6:27 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Bwe batyo bwe banaakoowooleranga erinnya lyange ku Bayisirayeli, ne mpa Abayisirayeli omukisa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Ku lunaku Musa lwe yamalirako okusimba Eweema Entukuvu, yagifukako omuzigo, n'agiwongera Mukama, awamu n'ebintu byonna ebikozesebwa mu yo. Era ne alutaari yagifukako omuzigo, n'agiwongera Mukama, awamu n'ebintu byonna ebikozesebwa ku yo." 
Numbers7:2 Awo abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ne batona. Be baali abakulu b'ebika, era be baakulira okubala abantu." 
Numbers7:3 Ne baleeta ekitone kyabwe mu maaso ga Mukama. Baaleeta amagaali mukaaga amabikkeko, nga buli bakulembeze babiri baleese eggaali limu ate nga buli mukulembeze aleese ente emu. Ne babyanjula mu maaso g'Eweema Entukuvu." 
Numbers7:4 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers7:5 “Baggyeeko bye batonye, bikozesebwenga emirimu egy'okuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu. Era onoobikwasa Abaleevi, okusinziira ku ebyo buli bamu bye beetaaga okukozesa.”" 
Numbers7:6 Musa n'addira amagaali n'ente, n'abikwasa Abaleevi." 
Numbers7:7 Amagaali abiri n'ente nnya, n'abikwasa Abagerusooni, ng'asinziira ku mulimu gwe baalina okukola." 
Numbers7:8 N'amagaali ana n'ente munaana n'abikwasa Abamerari, ng'asinziira ku mulimu gwe baalina okukola, nga bonna balabirirwa Yitamaari mutabani wa Arooni kabona." 
Numbers7:9 Naye bo Abakohati teyabawa, kubanga ebintu ebitukuvu bye baaweebwa okulabiriranga, baabisituliranga ku bibegabega byabwe." 
Numbers7:10 Abakulembeze era ne baleeta ebitone olw'okuwonga alutaari ku lunaku lwe yafukibwako omuzigo, ne babiwaayo mu maaso ga alutaari." 
Numbers7:11 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Olw'okuwonga alutaari, baleete ebitone byabwe buli mukulembeze ku lunaku lulwe.”" 
Numbers7:12 Eyaleeta ekitone kye ku lunaku olusooka yali Nahusooni mutabani wa Amminadabu ow'omu Kika kya Yuda. 
Numbers7:13 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:14 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:15 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa," 
Numbers7:16 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:17 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Nahusooni mutabani wa Amminadabu kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:18 Ku lunaku olwokubiri, Netaneeli mutabani wa Zuwari era omukulu w'Ekika kya Yissakaari, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:19 Bye yawaayo okuba ekitone kye byali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:20 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:21 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:22 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi," 
Numbers7:23 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Netaneeli mutabani wa Zuwari kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:24 Ku lunaku olwokusatu, Eliyaabu mutabani wa Heloni era omukulu w'Ekika kya Zebbulooni, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:25 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:26 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:27 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:28 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:29 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Eliyaabu mutabani wa Heloni kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:30 Ku lunaku olwokuna, Elizuuri mutabani wa Sedewuri era omukulu w'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:31 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:32 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:33 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:34 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:35 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Elizuuri mutabani wa Sedewuri kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:36 Ku lunaku olwokutaano, Selumiyeeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi era omukulu w'Ekika kya Simyoni, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:37 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:38 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:39 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:40 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:41 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Selumiyeeli mutabani wa Zurisaddayi kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:42 Ku lunaku olw'omukaaga, Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Deweli, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:43 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:44 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:45 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:46 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:47 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Deweli kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:48 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, Elisaama mutabani wa Ammihudi, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Efurayimu, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:49 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu, ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:50 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi ekijjudde obubaane; 
Numbers7:51 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:52 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:53 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Elisaama mutabani wa Ammihudi kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:54 Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, Gamaliyeeli mutabani wa Pedazuuri, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Manasse, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:55 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:56 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:57 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:58 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:59 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Gamaliyeeli mutabani wa Pedazuuri kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:60 Ku lunaku olw'omwenda, Abidaani mutabani wa Gidiyoni, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Benyamiini, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:61 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:62 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:63 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:64 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:65 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Abidaani mutabani wa Gidiyoni kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:66 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, Ahiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Daani, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:67 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:68 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:69 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:70 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:71 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Ahiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:72 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'olumu, Pagiyeeli mutabani wa Okuraani, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Aseri, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:73 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:74 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:75 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:76 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:77 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Pagiyeeli mutabani wa Okuraani kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:78 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ebbiri, Ahira mutabani wa Enani, era omukulu w'Ekika kya Nafutaali, n'awaayo." 
Numbers7:79 Ekitone kye kyali olusaniya lumu olwa ffeeza, oluzitowa kilo nga emu n'ekitundu; ebbakuli emu eya ffeeza ekozesebwa mu kumansira, ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana mu bipimo eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, byombi nga bijjudde obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke;" 
Numbers7:80 ekijiiko ekinene kimu ekya zaabu ekya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, ekijjudde obubaane;" 
Numbers7:81 ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga ennume emu, endiga ento ennume emu ey'omwaka ogumu, okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:82 embuzi ennume emu okuba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi; 
Numbers7:83 n'eby'ekitambiro ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n'endiga ento ennume ttaano ez'omwaka ogumu. Ekyo kye kitone Ahira mutabani wa Enani kye yawaayo." 
Numbers7:84 Bino bye bitone ebyaweebwayo abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli olw'okuwonga alutaari, ku lunaku lwe yafukibwako omuzigo: ensaniya kkumi na bbiri eza ffeeza; ebbakuli kkumi na bbiri eza ffeeza ezikozesebwa mu kumansira; n'ebijiiko ebinene kkumi na bibiri ebya zaabu." 
Numbers7:85 Buli lusaniya olwa ffeeza nga luzitowa kilo ng'emu n'ekitundu, na buli bbakuli ng'ezitowa gulaamu nga lunaana. Ebintu byonna ebya ffeeza byaweza obuzito bwa kilo amakumi abiri mu musanvu ne gulaamu nga lukaaga, mu kipimo eky'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers7:86 Ebijiiko ebinene byali kkumi na bibiri ebya zaabu ebijjudde obubaane, nga buli kimu kya gulaamu nga kikumi mu kkumi, mu kipimo eky'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ebijiiko byonna ebinene ebya zaabu, byaweza obuzito bwa kilo emu ne gulaamu nga bisatu mu abiri." 
Numbers7:87 Ensolo zonna ez'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, zaali ente ennume kkumi na bbiri, endiga ennume kkumi na bbiri, endiga ento ennume ez'omwaka ogumu kkumi na bbiri, awamu n'ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke ebigenderako; era n'embuzi ennume kkumi na bbiri ez'ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers7:88 Ate ensolo zonna ez'ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, zaali ente amakumi abiri mu nnya, endiga ennume nkaaga, embuzi ennume nkaaga, n'endiga ento ennume ez'omwaka ogumu, nkaaga. Ebyo bye bitone bye baawaayo okuwonga alutaari ng'emaze okufukibwako omuzigo." 
Numbers7:89 Musa bwe yayingira mu Weema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama okwogera ne Mukama, n'awulira eddoboozi ery'oyo ayogera naye ng'asinziira waggulu w'entebe ey'obusaasizi eyali ku Ssanduuko ey'Endagaano, wakati wa bakerubi bombi. N'ayogera naye." 
Numbers8:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers8:2 “Bw'onoobanga oteeka ettaala, ettaala omusanvu, ku kikondo kyazo, onoozitereezanga zimulise ebbanga eriri mu maaso g'ekikondo kyazo.”" 
Numbers8:3 Arooni n'akola bw'atyo, n'atereeza ettaala ne zimulisa ebbanga eriri mu maaso g'ekikondo kyazo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Ekikondo kyali kiweeseddwa, nga kyonna kya zaabu okuva ku kikolo kyakyo, okutuuka ku matabi gaakyo. Kyali kiweeseddwa okufaananira ddala ekyokulabirako Mukama kye yalaga Musa." 
Numbers8:5 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers8:6 “Yawula Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli abalala, obatukuze." 
Numbers8:7 Onoobatukuza bw'oti: onoobamansirako amazzi agaateekebwawo okunaazangako ebibi, beemwe omubiri gwonna, era booze engoye zaabwe, beetukuze." 
Numbers8:8 Ebyo nga biwedde, batwale ente emu ennume envubuka wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, bwe buwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, era obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti. Naawe otwale ente endala ennume envubuka, eneeba ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers8:9 Olwo onookuŋŋaanya ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli, n'oleeta Abaleevi mu maaso g'Eweema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers8:10 Ng'omaze okuleeta Abaleevi mu maaso gange, Abayisirayeli ne balyoka bateeka emikono ku Baleevi abo," 
Numbers8:11 Arooni n'abampongera babe bange mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, ekitone ekivudde mu Bayisirayeli, Abaleevi bafuuke abaweereza bange." 
Numbers8:12 Abaleevi banaateeka emikono gyabwe ku mitwe gy'ente, oziweeyo gyendi Nze Mukama: emu ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, n'eyookubiri, ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa okusonyiyisa Abaleevi ebibi." 
Numbers8:13 “Abaleevi onoobateekawo baweerezenga Arooni ne batabani be, era onoobampongera Nze Mukama, babe bange mu ngeri ey'enjawulo." 
Numbers8:14 Bw'otyo bw'onoyawula Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli abalala, Abaleevi babe bange." 
Numbers8:15 Ng'omaze okubatukuza n'okubampongera babe bange mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, Abaleevi banaasaanira okukolanga ogw'obuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu," 
Numbers8:16 kubanga bampeereddwa mu butongole okuva mu Bayisirayeli abalala. Mbeerobozezza babe bange mu kifo ky'abaggulanda ab'obulenzi b'Abayisirayeli abalala bonna. 
Numbers8:17 Abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi mu Bayisirayeli, bange, era na buli nsolo y'Abayisirayeli esooka okuzaalibwa, yange. Nabeeyawulira ku lunaku lwe nattirako abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Numbers8:18 Kaakano Abaleevi be ntutte mu kifo ky'abaggulanda bonna ab'obulenzi mu Bayisirayeli. 
Numbers8:19 Nzigye Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli abalala bonna, ne mbawaayo eri Arooni ne batabani be ng'ekirabo, bakolerenga Abayisirayeli omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, era bawonyenga Abayisirayeli akabi akandibatuusengako singa basemberera Ekifo Ekitukuvu.”" 
Numbers8:20 Musa ne Arooni n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli bwe batyo bwe baakola ku Baleevi. Baatuukiriza byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa okukola ku Baleevi. 
Numbers8:21 Abaleevi ne beetukuza, ne booza engoye zaabwe; Arooni n'abawonga eri Mukama, babeere babe mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, era n'akola omukolo ogw'okubasonyiyisa ebibi, n'abatukuza." 
Numbers8:22 Abayisirayeli ne bakola byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa okukola ku Baleevi. Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Abaleevi ne basaanira okukolanga omulimu gw'obuweereza mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, nga balabirirwa Arooni ne batabani be." 
Numbers8:23 Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa ng'agamba nti: 
Numbers8:24 “Lino lye tteeka ku Baleevi: Abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri mu etaano n'okusingawo, be banaakolanga omulimu ogw'obuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers8:25 Naye bwe banaawezanga emyaka amakumi ataano, banaalekeranga awo okukola omulimu gw'obuweereza, ne bawummula." 
Numbers8:26 Banaayinzanga okuyamba ku Baleevi bannaabwe, nga babalagirira okutuukiriza omulimu gwabwe ogw'obuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, naye bo tebaakolenga mulimu. Bw'otyo bw'onootegeka Abaleevi okutuukirizanga omulimu gwabwe.”" 
Numbers9:1 Mu mwezi ogusooka mu mwaka ogwokubiri ng'Abayisirayeli bavudde mu nsi y'e Misiri, Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa mu Ddungu ly'e Sinaayi ng'agamba nti:" 
Numbers9:2 “Abayisirayeli era bategeke Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, ebeerewo mu biseera byayo ebyalagirwa." 
Numbers9:3 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi guno, akawungeezi, mugitegeke ebeerewo mu biseera byayo ebyalagirwa, nga mugoberera amateeka gaayo gonna n'obulombolombo bwayo bwonna.”" 
Numbers9:4 Musa n'agamba Abayisirayeli okutegeka Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako. 
Numbers9:5 Ne bagitegeka n'ebaawo mu Ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, akawungeezi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi ogusooka, nga bagoberera byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa." 
Numbers9:6 Naye ne wabaawo abantu abataali balongoofu kubanga baali bakutte ku mufu, ne batayinza ku lunaku olwo kukola mikolo gya Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako. Ne bajja mu maaso ga Musa ne Arooni ku lunaku olwo," 
Numbers9:7 ne bagamba nti: “Tetuli balongoofu, kubanga twakutte ku mufu. Naye tuyinza okukkirizibwa okuweerayo awamu ne Bayisirayeli bannaffe ekitone eri Mukama, mu biseera byakyo ebyalagirwa?”" 
Numbers9:8 Musa n'abaddamu nti: “Musooke mulindeko mmale okuwulira Mukama ky'anaalagira ku mmwe.” 
Numbers9:9 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers9:10 agambe Abayisirayeli nti: “Abamu mu mmwe, oba mu bazzukulu bammwe, bwe bataabenga balongoofu olw'okukwata ku mufu, oba bwe banaabeeranga mu lugendo ewala, banaayinzanga okuwaayo eri Mukama ekitambiro eky'Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako." 
Numbers9:11 Banaakiwangayo mu mwezi ogwokubiri, akawungeezi, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya. Banaakiriirangako migaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, n'enva endiirwa ezikaawa." 
Numbers9:12 “Tebaabengako kye basigazaawo okutuuka enkeera, era ensolo gye basse okulya, tebaagimenyenga ggumba na limu. Banaakuumanga amateeka gonna ag'Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, ne bagatuukiriza." 
Numbers9:13 Naye omulongoofu era nga tali mu lugendo, anaalemwanga okuwaayo ekitambiro eky'Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako anaaboolebwanga mu bantu be, kubanga tawadde Mukama kitone mu kiseera kyakyo ekyalagirwa. Omuntu oyo anaavunaanibwanga olw'ebibi bye." 
Numbers9:14 “Era omugwira abeera mu mmwe anaayagalanga okuwaayo eri Mukama ekitambiro eky'Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, anaatuukirizanga etteeka ly'embaga eyo era n'obulombolombo bwayo. Etteeka eryo linaabanga lye limu ku mugwira ne ku muzaaliranwa.”" 
Numbers9:15 Ku lunaku Eweema Entukuvu, Eweema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, lwe yasimbibwa, ekire ne kigibikka. Okuva akawungeezi, ekire ne kiba ng'omuliro okutuusiza ddala ku makya." 
Numbers9:16 Bwe kityo bwe kyabanga bulijjo. Ekire kyagibikkanga emisana, ate ekiro ne kifaanana ng'omuliro." 
Numbers9:17 Ekire buli lwe kyaggyibwanga ku Weema, Abayisirayeli ne batandika okutambula. Mu kifo we kyayimiriranga, awo we baasiisiranga." 
Numbers9:18 Abayisirayeli baatambulanga nga Mukama amaze kubalagira, era baasiisiranga ng'amaze kubalagira. Ekiseera kyonna ekire kye kyabeeranga ku Weema Entukuvu, baasigalanga mu lusiisira." 
Numbers9:19 Era ekire bwe kyamalanga ennaku ennyingi nga kiri ku Weema Entukuvu, Abayisirayeli baagonderanga ekiragiro kya Mukama, ne batatambula."
