Numbers9:20 Oluusi ekire kyamalanga ennaku ntono ku Weema Entukuvu. Era nabo baagonderanga ekiragiro kya Mukama, ne basigala mu lusiisira. Bwe yabalagiranga okutambula, nga batambula." 
Numbers9:21 Era oluusi ekire kyabangawo okuva akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya. Bwe kyaggyibwangawo ku makya, ne batambula. Oba bwe kyabangawo emisana n'ekiro, era kyamalanga kuggyibwawo ne balyoka batambula." 
Numbers9:22 Ekire ne bwe kyamalanga ku Weema Entukuvu ennaku ebbiri, oba omwezi, oba okusingawo, Abayisirayeli nga basigala mu lusiisira, ne batatambula. Naye bwe kyaggyibwangawo, nga batambula." 
Numbers9:23 Baasiisiranga, era baatambulanga, nga bakolera ku kiragiro kya Mukama, kye yabawanga ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers10:2 “Kola amakondeere abiri aga ffeeza, ogaweese, ogakozesenga okuyita abantu okukuŋŋaana, n'okubalagira okuva mu lusiisira okutambula." 
Numbers10:3 Bwe banaagafuuwanga gombi, ekibiina kyonna kinaakunŋŋaaniranga w'oli, ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers10:4 Naye bwe banaafuuwangako erimu, olwo abakulembeze bokka, abakulu b'Ebika bya Yisirayeli, be banaakuŋŋaaniranga w'oli." 
Numbers10:5 Bwe munaagafuuwanga nga musirisaamu, ab'omu nsiisira eziri ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba banaatandikanga okutambula." 
Numbers10:6 Bwe munaagafuuwanga omulundi ogwokubiri nga musirisaamu, ab'omu nsiisira eziri ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo banaatandikanga okutambula. Kale banaafuuwanga nga basirisaamu, olw'okulagira abantu okutambula." 
Numbers10:7 Naye bwe kunaabanga okuyita abantu okukuŋŋaana, munaagafuuwanga naye nga temusirisaamu." 
Numbers10:8 Bakabona ab'olulyo lw'Arooni be banaafuuwanga amakondeere ago. Ekiragiro ekyo munaakikuumanga ennaku zonna. 
Numbers10:9 Era mu nsi yammwe bwe munaatabaalanga olutalo okwetaasaako abalabe ababali obubi, kale munaafuuwanga amakondeere ago nga musirisaamu, Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe ne ndyoka mbajjukira mmwe, ne mbawonya abalabe bammwe." 
Numbers10:10 Ne mu biseera byammwe eby'okusanyuka, ne ku mbaga zammwe ezaalagirwa, era ne ku ntandikwa ya buli mwezi, munaafuuwanga amakondeere ago nga muwaayo ebitone byammwe ebyokebwa, n'ebitambiro bye muwaayo olw'okutabagana. Olwo Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe nnaabajjukiranga mmwe, ne mbayamba.”" 
Numbers10:11 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri olw'omwezi ogwokubiri mu mwaka ogwokubiri, okuva Abayisirayeli lwe baava e Misiri, ekire ne kiggyibwa waggulu wa Weema Entukuvu." 
Numbers10:12 Abayisirayeli ne batandika olugendo lwabwe olwabaggya mu Ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, ne batambulira mu bibinja byabwe. Ekire ne kiyimirira mu Ddungu ly'e Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Ne batandika okutambula, nga Mukama bwe yabalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers10:14 Aba bbendera ey'olusiisira lw'ab'Ekika kya Yuda ne bakulemberamu, nga bali mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Yuda, yali Nahusooni mutabani wa Amminadabu." 
Numbers10:15 Ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Yissakaari, kyali kikulirwa Netaneeli, mutabani wa Zuwari." 
Numbers10:16 N'ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Zebbulooni, kyali kikulirwa Eliyaabu, mutabani wa Heloni." 
Numbers10:17 Olwo Eweema Entukuvu n'esimbulibwa. Ab'olulyo lwa Gerusooni n'ab'olulyo lwa Merari ne bagisitula, ne batandika okutambula." 
Numbers10:18 Ne kuddako aba bbendera ey'olusiisira lwa Rewubeeni, nga batambulira mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Rewubeeni, yali Elizuuri mutabani wa Sedewuri." 
Numbers10:19 Ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Simyoni, kyali kikulirwa Selumiyeeli, mutabani wa Zurisaddayi," 
Numbers10:20 n'ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, kyali kikulirwa Eliyasaafu, mutabani wa Deweli." 
Numbers10:21 Abakohati ne balyoka baddako, nga basitudde eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. We baatuukiranga awanaaba olusiisira, nga Eweema emaze okusimbibwa." 
Numbers10:22 Ku abo, ne kuddako aba bbendera ey'olusiisira lw'ab'Ekika kya Efurayimu, nga batambulira mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Efurayimu, yali Elisaama mutabani wa Ammihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Manasse, kyali kikulirwa Gamaliyeeli, mutabani wa Pedazuuri," 
Numbers10:24 n'ab'ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini nga bakulirwa Abidaani, mutabani wa Gidiyoni." 
Numbers10:25 Awo aba bbendera ey'olusiisira lw'ab'Ekika kya Daani, abaakooberanga ebibinja byonna, ne balyoka batandika okutambula nga bali mu bibinja byabwe. Omukulembeze w'ekibinja kya Daani, yali Ahiyezeri mutabani wa Ammisaddayi." 
Numbers10:26 Ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Aseri, kyali kikulirwa Pagiyeeli mutabani wa Okuraani," 
Numbers10:27 n'ekibinja ky'ab'Ekika kya Nafutaali nga kikulirwa Ahira mutabani, wa Enani." 
Numbers10:28 Eyo ye ngeri ebibinja Abayisirayeli bye baatambulirangamu gye byaddiriŋŋananga, bwe baabanga bava mu lusiisira olumu okudda mu lulala." 
Numbers10:29 Awo Musa n'agamba mukoddomi we Hobabu, mutabani wa Reweli Omumidiyaani nti: “Tutambula okugenda mu kifo, Mukama kye yagamba okutuwa. Mukama yasuubiza Yisirayeli ebirungi. Jjangu tugende ffenna, tuligabanira wamu naawe ebirungi ebyo.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabu n'addamu nti: “Nze sijja kugenda. Nja kuddayo mu nsi y'ewaffe ne mu b'eŋŋanda zange.” 
Numbers10:31 Musa n'amuddamu nti: “Totuleka, nkwegayiridde, kubanga ggwe omanyi we tunaayinzanga okusiisira mu ddungu, era ggwe onoogendanga otulagirira." 
Numbers10:32 Kale bw'onoogenda naffe, ebirungi byonna Mukama by'anaatukoleranga, tunaabigabaniranga wamu naawe.”" 
Numbers10:33 Ne bava ku lusozi lwa Katonda, ne batambula olugendo lwa nnaku ssatu. Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama n'ebakulemberamu okubanoonyeza ekifo eky'okusiisiramu." 
Numbers10:34 Bwe baatambulanga okuva mu lusiisira, ekire kya Mukama ne kibeera ku bo emisana." 
Numbers10:35 Essanduuko ey'Endagaano buli lwe yasitulwanga okutandika olugendo, Musa ng'agamba nti: “Situka, ayi Mukama, abalabe bo basaasaane, n'abakukyawa, badduke bave w'oli.”" 
Numbers10:36 Era Essanduuko bwe yayimiriranga, ng'agamba nti: “Komawo, ayi Mukama, mu mitwalo n'emitwalo gy'Abayisirayeli. ”" 
Numbers11:1 Awo abantu ne batandika okwemulugunyiza Mukama olw'ebizibu ebyabatuukako. Mukama bwe yawulira, n'asunguwala. Omuliro gwe ne gwaka mu bo, ne gwokya ekitundu ekikomererayo mu lusiisira." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu ne bakaabirira Musa abayambe. Musa ne yeegayirira Mukama, omuliro ne gukkakkana." 
Numbers11:3 Ekifo ekyo ne kituumibwa erinnya “Okwaka”, kubanga omuliro gwa Mukama gwayaka mu bo." 
Numbers11:4 Awo ab'omu kibinja ky'abagwira abaali batambula n'Abayisirayeli, ne booya nnyo okulya ennyama. Abayisirayeli nabo ne beemulugunya nga bagamba nti: “Ani anaatuwa ennyama tulye?" 
Numbers11:5 Kale mazima tujjukira ebyennyanja bye twalyanga eby'obwereere e Misiri, ssaako wujju n'ensujju, n'obutungulu, ne katunguluccumu." 
Numbers11:6 Naye kaakano amaanyi gonna gatuweddemu. Tetukyalina kyakulya kye tulabako, wabula mannu eno yokka!”" 
Numbers11:7 Mannu yali efaanana ng'obusigo bw'omuwemba, naye nga langi yaabwo njeru, ya mataatata." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu baagendanga ne bagikuŋŋaanya, ne bagiseera ku mmengo, oba ne bagisekulira mu binu, ne bagifumba mu ntamu, ne bagikolamu obugaati. Okuwooma kwayo kwali ng'okw'obugaati obusiikiddwa mu muzigo ogw'emizayiti." 
Numbers11:9 Ekiro omusulo bwe gwagwanga mu lusiisira, mannu n'egwa ku gwo." 
Numbers11:10 Musa n'awulira abantu nga beemulugunya, buli omu n'ab'omu maka ge, nga bali ku miryango gy'eweema zaabwe. Mukama n'asunguwala nnyo. Musa n'anakuwala." 
Numbers11:11 Musa n'agamba Mukama nti: “Onnanga ki nze omuweereza wo, okumpisa obubi bw'oti? Lwaki tonsaasira? Lwaki ontikka obuvunaanyizibwa ku bantu bano bonna?" 
Numbers11:12 Nze naba olubuto ne nzaala abantu bano bonna, olyoke oŋŋambe nti: ‘Basitule mu kifuba, ng'omulezi bw'asitula omwana ayonka’, okubatwala mu nsi gye walayirira bajjajjaabwe?" 
Numbers11:13 Ŋŋenda kuggya wa ennyama okuwa abantu bano bonna? Baabano bankaabirira nga bagamba nti: ‘Tuwe ennyama tulye.’ 
Numbers11:14 Sirina bwe nnyinza kwetikka buvunaanyizibwa bwa bantu bano bonna nzekka. Ekyo kinzitooweredde nnyo. 
Numbers11:15 Oba nga bw'oti bw'ogenda okumpisa, nkwegayiridde waakiri nzita mangu kaakano, nneme okubonaabona bwe nti.”" 
Numbers11:16 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Nkuŋŋaanyiza abasajja nsanvu, abassibwamu ekitiibwa mu Yisirayeli, b'omanyi nga bakungu, era nga bakulembeze ba bantu, obaleete ku Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, bayimirire eyo wamu naawe." 
Numbers11:17 Nze nja kukka njogerere eyo naawe. Era nja kutoolako ku Mwoyo ali ku ggwe, mmuteeke ku bo, balyoke bakuyambengako ku buvunaanyizibwa obw'okulabirira abantu, bulemenga kubeera ku ggwe wekka." 
Numbers11:18 Kaakano gamba abantu nti: ‘Mwetukuze okwetegekera olunaku olwenkya. Mujja kulya ennyama. Mukama awulidde bwe mukaaba nga mwebuuza anaabawa ennyama mulye, nga mugamba nti mwali bulungi mu Misiri. Kale Mukama anaabawa ennyama ne mulya." 
Numbers11:19 Temujja kugiriira lunaku lumu oba bbiri, nnaku ttaano oba kkumi, wadde amakumi abiri," 
Numbers11:20 naye mwezi mulamba, okutuusa lw'erifulumira mu nnyindo zammwe ne muginyiwa, kubanga mwesammudde Mukama ali mu mmwe, ne mwemulugunyiza mu maaso ge nga mugamba nti mwaviira ki mu Misiri!’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Musa n'agamba nti: “Abantu be ndi nabo bawera abasajja emitwalo nkaaga. Ggwe n'ogamba nti onoobawa ennyama bagiriire omwezi mulamba? 
Numbers11:22 Waliwo amagana g'endiga n'ente agayinza okubattirwa ne gabamala? Ne bwe babakuŋŋaanyiza ebyennyanja byonna mu nnyanja, biyinza okubamala?”" 
Numbers11:23 Mukama n'addamu Musa nti: “Obuyinza bwange buliko ekkomo? Kaakano ojja kulaba oba nga kye njogedde kinaatuukirira, oba nga tekiituukirire.”" 
Numbers11:24 Musa n'afuluma, n'ategeeza abantu Mukama by'ayogedde. N'akuŋŋaanya abasajja nsanvu ku bakulembeze b'abantu, n'abateekawo ne bayimirira okwetooloola Eweema." 
Numbers11:25 Mukama n'akkira mu kire, n'ayogera ne Musa. N'atoola ku Mwoyo eyali ku Musa, n'amuteeka ku bakulembeze ensanvu. Mwoyo olwakka ku bo, ne batandika okulanga, kyokka baakoma awo tebaddamu mulundi mulala." 
Numbers11:26 Naye ku bakulembeze ensanvu, babiri Elidaadi ne Meedaadi baali basigadde mu lusiisira, nga tebafulumye kujja ku Weema. Mwoyo n'akka ku bo, ne batandika okulanga nga bali mu lusiisira." 
Numbers11:27 Ne wabaawo omulenzi eyadduka n'agenda abuulira Musa nti: “Elidaadi ne Meedaadi bali eri mu lusiisira balanga.” 
Numbers11:28 Omuweereza wa Musa, era omu ku basajja be abalondemu, ayitibwa Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuuni, n'addamu ng'agamba nti: “Mukama wange Musa, bagaane!”" 
Numbers11:29 Musa n'amuddamu nti: “Olumirwa nnyo ekitiibwa kyange? Nze nandyagadde, Mukama abantu be bonna abawe Mwoyo we, babe balanzi.”" 
Numbers11:30 Awo Musa n'abakulembeze ensanvu ne baddayo mu lusiisira. 
Numbers11:31 Mukama n'asindika embuyaga, n'ereeta entiitiri okuva ku nnyanja, nga zibuukira mu bugulumivu nga bwa mita emu okuva ku ttaka, ne zigwa kumpi n'olusiisira okulwetooloola, ne zibuna mu kibangirizi ekya kilomita eziwerako ku buli ludda." 
Numbers11:32 Abantu ne basituka ne bagenda olunaku olwo lwonna n'ekiro kyonna, n'olunaku lwonna olwaddirira, ne bakuŋŋaanya entiitiri. Eyakuŋŋaanya entono yaweza kilo ng'enkumi bbiri. Ne bazaanika wonna wonna okwetooloola olusiisira." 
Numbers11:33 Bwe baali batandise okulya ennyama eyo kyokka nga tebannagimalawo, Mukama n'abasunguwalira nnyo, n'abasuulamu obulwadde obw'amaanyi." 
Numbers11:34 Ekifo ekyo ne kituumibwa erinnya “Entaana z'Okwoya”, kubanga mwe baaziika abantu abaayoya ennyama." 
Numbers11:35 Abayisirayeli bwe baava mu kifo ekyo, kye baatuuma “Entaana z'Okwoya”, ne bagenda e Hazerooti, ne basiisira eyo." 
Numbers12:1 Musa yawasa omukazi Mukuusi. Miriyamu ne Arooni ne boogera bubi ku Musa, nga bamulanga omukazi oyo." 
Numbers12:2 Ne bagamba nti: “Mukama ayogera ng'ayita mu Musa yekka? Teyayogera ng'ayita ne mu ffe?” Mukama n'awulira kye boogedde. 
Numbers12:3 Omusajja Musa yali mwetoowaze nnyo okusinga abantu abalala bonna ku nsi. 
Numbers12:4 Amangwago Mukama n'ayogera ne Musa ne Arooni ne Miriyamu nti: “Mwensatule mugende ku Weema ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu.” Bonsatule ne bagenda. 
Numbers12:5 Mukama n'akkira mu mpagi ey'ekire, n'ayimirira ku mulyango gw'Eweema, n'ayita Arooni ne Miriyamu. Bombi ne bagenda." 
Numbers12:6 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Muwulire kye ŋŋamba. Bwe wabaawo omulanzi mu mmwe, Nze Mukama mmweyolekera mu kulabikirwa, era njogera naye mu birooto." 
Numbers12:7 Naye ku muweereza wange Musa, si bwe kiri. Sirina kye mmukisa, kubanga mwesigwa." 
Numbers12:8 Ye njogera naye nga tutunuuliganye maaso na maaso, era butereevu sso si mu ngero. Era ye yali alabye ne bwe nfaanana. Kale muyinza mutya obutatya kwogera bubi ku muweereza wange oyo Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Awo Mukama n'abasunguwalira, era n'avaawo." 
Numbers12:10 Ekire ne kiva ku Weema. Okutemya n'okuzibula, Miriyamu n'alwalirawo endwadde y'olususu etiisa, n'ayeruka ng'omuzira. Arooni bwe yakyuka n'atunula ku Miriyamu, n'alaba nga Miriyamu akwatiddwa endwadde y'olususu etiisa." 
Numbers12:11 N'agamba Musa nti: “Ayi mukama wange, nkwegayiridde, ekibi ekyo kitusonyiwe. Bye tukoze bya busirusiru, era gutusinze." 
Numbers12:12 Nkwegayiridde, ono tomuleka kuba nga muntu azaalibwa ng'afudde, n'omubiri gwe nga guvunzeeko ekitundu.”" 
Numbers12:13 Musa n'akaabirira Mukama nti: “Ayi Katonda, nkwegayiridde, muwonye!”" 
Numbers12:14 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Singa kitaawe ye abadde amuwandidde amalusu mu maaso, teyandibadde n'obuswavu okumala ennaku musanvu? Kale aggalirwe ebweru w'olusiisira okumala ennaku musanvu, n'oluvannyuma balyoke bamukomyewo ayingire.”" 
Numbers12:15 Bw'atyo Miriyamu n'aggalirwa ebweru w'olusiisira okumala ennaku musanvu. Abantu ne batatambula okutuusa lwe baamukomyawo n'ayingira. 
Numbers12:16 Olwo ne bava e Hazerooti, ne batambula, ne basiisira mu Ddungu ly'e Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Awo Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers13:2 “Tuma abantu bagende bakette ensi y'e Kanaani gye mpa Abayisirayeli. Munaatuma omuntu omu okuva mu buli kika, era omuntu oyo nga mukulembeze mu kika kye.”" 
Numbers13:3 Nga bali mu ddungu ly'e Parani, Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yalagira. N'atuma abasajja nga bonna bakulembeze ba bika by'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers13:4 Amannya g'abaatumibwa ge gano: ow'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni, Sammuwa mutabani wa Zakkuri;" 
Numbers13:5 ow'omu Kika kya Simyoni, Safaati mutabani wa Hoori;" 
Numbers13:6 ow'omu Kika kya Yuda, Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne;" 
Numbers13:7 ow'omu Kika kya Yissakaari, Yigali mutabani wa Yosefu;" 
Numbers13:8 ow'omu Kika kya Efurayimu, Hoseya mutabani wa Nuuni;" 
Numbers13:9 ow'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, Paluti mutabani wa Raama;" 
Numbers13:10 ow'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni, Gadiyeeli mutabani wa Soodi;" 
Numbers13:11 ow'omu Kika kya Yosefu, kye Kika kya Manasse, Gaddi mutabani wa Suusi;" 
Numbers13:12 ow'omu Kika kya Daani, Ammiyeeli mutabani wa Gemalli;" 
Numbers13:13 ow'omu Kika kya Aseri, Seturi mutabani wa Mikayeli;" 
Numbers13:14 ow'omu Kika kya Nafutaali, Nahubi mutabani wa Vofusi;" 
Numbers13:15 ow'omu Kika kya Gaadi, Geweli mutabani wa Maaki." 
Numbers13:16 Ago ge mannya g'abantu Musa be yatuma okuketta ensi eyo. Musa n'atuuma Hoseya, mutabani wa Nuuni, erinnya Yoswa." 
Numbers13:17 Musa n'abatuma okuketta ensi ye Kanaani. N'abagamba nti: “Mwambuke, muyite mu nsi enkalu, mweyongereyo mu nsozi." 
Numbers13:18 Mulabe ensi eyo nga bw'eri, n'abantu abagirimu oba nga bangi, oba nga batono, oba nga ba maanyi, oba nga banafu." 
Numbers13:19 Mulabe oba ng'ensi eyo gye balimu nnungi oba nga mbi. Mwetegereze oba nga babeera mu nsiisira, oba mu bibuga ebiriko ebigo ebigumu." 
Numbers13:20 Mwekkaanye oba nga ensi eyo ngimu oba nkalu, oba nga mulimu emiti, oba nga temuli. Era mufube okuleeta ku bibala byamu.” Ekiseera ekyo kyali kya mizabbibu we gisookera okwengera." 
Numbers13:21 Ne bambuka ne baketta ensi eyo, okuva ku ddungu ly'e Ziini okutuuka e Rehobu awayingirirwa e Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Ne bambuka ne bayita mu nsi enkalu, ne batuuka mu Heburooni. Eyo nno Abahimani, n'Abasesayi, n'Abatalumayi, bazzukulu ba Anaki gye baali. (Heburooni kyali kimaze emyaka musanvu nga kizimbiddwa, ne Zowani eky'e Misiri nakyo ne kiryoka kizimbibwa)." 
Numbers13:23 Ne batuuka mu Kiwonvu ky'Ekirimba, ne batemayo ettabi eryaliko ekirimba kimu eky'emizabbibu, abantu babiri balamba ne bakireeta nga bakisitulidde ku muti. Ne baleeta ne ku makomamawanga ne ku bibala by'emitiini." 
Numbers13:24 Ekifo ekyo ne bakituuma erinnya “Ekiwonvu ky'Ekirimba,” olw'ekirimba Abayisirayeli kye baatemayo." 
Numbers13:25 Abakessi ne bakomawo nga wayiseewo ennaku amakumi ana, ze baamala nga baketta ensi eyo." 
Numbers13:26 Ne bajja eri Musa ne Arooni n'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli e Kadesi mu ddungu ly'e Parani, ne babategeeza bye baalaba, ne babalaga ebibala bye baaleta." 
Numbers13:27 Ne battottolera Musa nti: “Twatuuka mu nsi gye watutumamu. Mazima nsi ngimu era ngagga, era bino bye bibala byamu." 
Numbers13:28 Naye abantu ababeera mu nsi eyo ba maanyi, n'ebibuga byabwe binene nnyo era biriko ebigo ebigumu. N'ekirala, twalabayo bazzukulu ba Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abamaleki be bali mu kitundu ekikalu eky'ensi eyo, Abahiiti n'Abayebusi n'Abaamori, be bali ku nsozi, ate Abakanaani be bali okumpi n'ennyanja, ne ku lubalama lw'Omugga Yorudaani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kalebu n'asirisa abantu abaali bakuŋŋaanidde awali Musa, n'agamba nti: “Twambuke awatali kulwa tuwambe ensi eyo, kubanga tusobolera ddala okugiwangula.”" 
Numbers13:31 Kyokka abantu abaagendayo naye ne bagamba nti: “Tetuyinza kwaŋŋanga kulwanyisa bantu bali, kubanga batusinga nnyo amaanyi.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ne basaasaanya mu Bayisirayeli ebigambo ebibi eby'obulimba ebifa ku nsi gye baali bakesse, ne bagamba nti: “Ensi gye twayitamu nga tugiketta, nsi nkalu, etebaza mmere emala okusobola okubeezaawo abantu abagibeeramu, n'abantu bonna be twalabayo, bantu bawanvu nnyo." 
Numbers13:33 Era twalabayo abantu abawagguufu, Abaanaki abasibuka mu Banefiri. Tweraba nga tuli basirikitu nga nseenene, era nabo bwe batyo bwe baatulaba.”" 
Numbers14:1 Abakessi ekkumi n'ababiri abaaketta ensi y'e Kanaani bwe baamala okuwa obubaka bwabwe, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kireekaana, abantu ne bakaaba amaziga ekiro ekyo kyonna." 
Numbers14:2 Ne beemulugunyiza Musa ne Arooni, ekibiina kyonna ne kigamba nti: “Singa nno twafiira mu nsi y'e Misiri, oba waakiri mu ddungu muno!" 
Numbers14:3 Lwaki Mukama atuleeta mu nsi eno? Tujja kuttirwa mu lutalo, bakazi baffe n'abaana baffe abato banyagibwe. Tekyanditusingiddeko obulungi okuddayo e Misiri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Ne bagambagana nti: “Tulonde omukulembeze, tuddeyo e Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Awo Musa ne Arooni ne bavuunamira ddala ku ttaka, mu maaso g'ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers14:6 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, abaali mu abo abaaketta ensi eyo, ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe olw'okunakuwala, ne beecwacwana," 
Numbers14:7 ne bategeeza ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli nti: “Ensi gye twayitamu ne tugiketta, nsi mpitirivu obulungi." 
Numbers14:8 Oba nga Mukama atusiima, ajja kutuyingiza mu nsi eyo engimu era engagga, agituwe." 
Numbers14:9 Ekikulu, muleme kujeemera Mukama, wadde okutya abantu abali mu nsi eyo, kubanga kijja kutwanguyira okubawangula, nga bwe twanguyirwa okulya emmere. Bo ekibadde kibakuuma, kimaze okubaggyibwako, naye ffe Mukama ali wamu naffe. N'olwekyo temubatya.”" 
Numbers14:10 Ekibiina kyonna ne kigamba okubakuba amayinja. Naye mu kaseera ako, ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kirabikira Abayisirayeli bonna ku Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers14:11 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Abantu bano balituusa wa okunnyooma? Era balituusa wa obutanneesiga, wadde nga nkoze ebyewuunyo ebyo byonna mu bo?" 
Numbers14:12 Nja kubasindikamu kawumpuli mbazikirize, nsibuse mu ggwe eggwanga eddene era ery'amaanyi okusinga bo bwe bali.”" 
Numbers14:13 Naye Musa n'agamba Mukama nti: “Ggwe waggya abantu bano e Misiri, ng'okozesa obuyinza bwo. Abamisiri bwe baliwulira ky'okoze abantu bo," 
Numbers14:14 balikibuulira abantu ababeera mu nsi eno. Sso nga bano baamala dda okuwulira nga Ggwe, ayi Mukama, oli wamu n'abantu bano, era nti obalabikira mu lwatu, ekire kyo bwe kiyimirira waggulu ku bo, era ng'obakulembera mu mpagi ey'ekire emisana, ne mu mpagi ey'omuliro ekiro." 
Numbers14:15 Kale bw'onotta abantu bo bano bonna n'obamalawo, ab'amawanga amalala abaawulira ettutumu lyo, baligamba nti:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘Mukama yalemwa okutuusa abantu bano mu nsi gye yabalayirira okubawa, kyeyava abattira mu ddungu.’" 
Numbers14:17 Kale kaakano nkwegayiridde, ayi Mukama, laga obuyinza bwo obungi, okole kye wasuubiza bwe wagamba nti:" 
Numbers14:18 ‘Nze Mukama, ndwawo okusunguwala, nnina okwagala kungi, nsonyiwa ebibi n'obujeemu, naye sirema kubonereza muntu olw'omusango gw'azzizza. Era mbonereza abaana n'abazzukulu, okutuusa ku zzadde eryokusatu n'eryokuna olw'ebibi by'abazadde baabwe.’" 
Numbers14:19 Nkwegayiridde sonyiwa ebibi by'abantu bano olw'okusaasira kwo okungi, era nga bw'obadde obasonyiwa okuva lwe baava mu Misiri n'okutuusa kaakano.”" 
Numbers14:20 Mukama n'addamu nti: “Mbasonyiye, nga bw'onsabye." 
Numbers14:21 Naye mazima ddala, Nze Mukama ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, era ng'ensi yonna bw'ejjula ekitiibwa kyange," 
Numbers14:22 kale ku bantu abo abaalaba ekitiibwa kyange n'ebyewuunyo bye nakolera mu Misiri ne mu ddungu, naye ne bantawaanya emirundi n'emirundi, era ne banjeemera," 
Numbers14:23 mazima tewaliba n'omu ku bo, abo abannyooma, aliraba nsi gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers14:24 Kyokka omuweereza wange Kalebu, kubanga ye endowooza ye ya njawulo, era annywereddeko n'omutima gwe gwonna, ndimutuusa mu nsi gye yalambula, era ezzadde lye lirigiweebwa." 
Numbers14:25 Abamaleki n'Abakanaani nga bwe bali mu kiwonvu, enkya mukyuke mutambule mu ddungu, mu kkubo eridda ku Nnyanja Emmyufu.”" 
Numbers14:26 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers14:27 “Ekibiina kino eky'abantu ababi kirituusa wa okunneemulugunyiza? Nkooye okuwulira okwemulugunya kw'Abayisirayeli kwe banneemulugunyiza. 
Numbers14:28 Mubagambe nti: ‘Nze Mukama ndayira nti nga bwe Ndi omulamu, nja kubakolako nga bwe mpulidde ebyo mmwe mwennyini bye mwogedde." 
Numbers14:29 Mujja kufa, emirambo gyammwe gigwe mu ddungu muno. Abo bonna mu mmwe, abaabalibwa nga bawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, abanneemulugunyizza," 
Numbers14:30 mazima tebalituuka mu nsi gye nneerayirira okubawa okubeerangamu, wabula Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, be bokka abaligituukamu." 
Numbers14:31 Naye abaana bammwe abato be mugambye nti bajja kunyagibwa, be ndiyingiza mu nsi eyo mmwe gye munyoomye, era be baligyeyagaliramu." 
Numbers14:32 Naye mmwe, emirambo gyammwe gya kugwa mu ddungu lino." 
Numbers14:33 Abaana bammwe balibungeetera mu ddungu emyaka amakumi ana, nga babonaabona olw'obutali bwesigwa bwammwe, okutuusa lwe mulifiira mu ddungu ne muggwaawo." 
Numbers14:34 Mulibonaabona okumala emyaka amakumi ana olw'ebibi byammwe. Buli lunaku ku nnaku amakumi ana ze mwamala nga muketta ensi eyo, mulirusasulamu omwaka mulamba, mulyoke mutegeere nga nabaabulira." 
Numbers14:35 Nze Mukama njogedde. Mazima ekyo nja kukikola ku b'Eggwanga lino lyonna ebbi, abakuŋŋaanye okumpakanya. Mu ddungu lino tebalivaamu. Bonna mwe balifiira.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Abantu Musa be yatuma okuketta ensi eyo abaakomawo ne bagyogerako ebigambo ebibi eby'obulimba ebyaleetera ekibiina kyonna okwemulugunyiza Mukama," 
Numbers14:37 abantu abo abaayogera ebigambo ebibi eby'obulimba ku nsi eyo, ne bafa kawumpuli mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Numbers14:38 Naye Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, be baasigalawo nga balamu ku bantu abo abaagenda okuketta ensi eyo." 
Numbers14:39 Awo Musa n'abuulira Abayisirayeli bonna ebyo Mukama by'agambye. Abantu ne banyolwa nnyo. 
Numbers14:40 Enkeera, ne bazuukuka ku makya, ne bagenda okulumba ensi ey'ensozi, nga bagamba nti: “Laba tuutuno twetegese okwambuka okugenda mu kifo Mukama kye yasuubiza. Tutegedde nga twakoze kibi.”" 
Numbers14:41 Musa n'agamba nti: “Lwaki kaakano mujeemera ekiragiro kya Mukama? Temujja kuwangula. 
Numbers14:42 Temugenda, kubanga Mukama tali wamu nammwe. Abalabe bammwe bajja kubawangula mmwe." 
Numbers14:43 Bwe munaasisinkanirayo n'Abamaleki era n'Abakanaani, mujja kuttirwa mu lutalo. Mukama tajja kuba wamu nammwe, kubanga mwamweggyako, ne mugaana okumugoberera.”" 
Numbers14:44 Naye bo ne beerema, ne bambuka mu nsi ey'ensozi, newaakubadde ng'Essanduuko y'Endagaano ya Mukama, wadde Musa, teyava mu lusiisira." 
Numbers14:45 Awo Abamaleki n'Abakanaani abatuuze b'omu nsi eyo ey'ensozi, ne bakkirira, ne bakuba nnyo Abayisirayeli, ne babawondera okutuusa e Horuma." 
Numbers15:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers15:2 “Yogera n'Abayisirayeli, obagambe nti: ‘Bwe mulimala okutuuka mu nsi gye ŋŋenda okubawa okubeerangamu," 
Numbers15:3 ne mwagala okutoola ku nte, ne ku ndiga ne mbuzi zammwe, okuntonera Nze Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa oba ekitambiro, okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ekiweebwayo mu kweyagalira, oba ku nnaku zammwe enkulu ezaateekebwawo, akawoowo k'ebyokulya ebyo, kansanyusa Nze Mukama." 
Numbers15:4 Oyo antonera Nze Mukama ekitone kye eky'engeri eyo, anaakiwangayo wamu ne kilo emu ey'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu lita y'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, nga kye kiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke." 
Numbers15:5 Anaawangayo ne lita y'omwenge gw'emizabbibu, nga kye kiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa. Ebyo bye munaategekanga bigendere wamu na buli kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, oba ekitambiro eky'endiga ento." 
Numbers15:6 “Oba nga endiga ennume ye eweebwayo, munaategekanga kilo bbiri ez'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, nga butabuddwamu lita emu n'ekitundu ey'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ebyo ne biba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke." 
Numbers15:7 Era munaawangayo lita emu n'ekitundu ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, nga kye kiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa. Akawoowo kaakyo kansanyusa Nze Mukama." 
Numbers15:8 “Bwe munaategekanga okuntonera, Nze Mukama, ente ebe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa oba ekitambiro, okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ebe ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana," 
Numbers15:9 omuntu anaagiweerangayo wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, kya kilo ssatu ez'obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu lita bbiri ez'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti." 
Numbers15:10 Era munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa kya lita bbiri ez'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Akawoowo k'ekitambiro ekyo kansanyusa Nze Mukama. 
Numbers15:11 “Ebyo bye binaaweebwangayo nga muwaayo buli nte ennume, oba buli ndiga ennume, oba buli ndiga ento, oba embuzi." 
Numbers15:12 Obungi bw'ebintu ebyo ebigenderako buneeyongeranga okusinziira ku bungi bw'ensolo ze munaategekanga okuwaayo. 
Numbers15:13 Bannansi bonna banaakolanga ebyo bwe batyo, bwe banaabanga bawaayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky'akawoowo akansanyusa Nze Mukama." 
Numbers15:14 N'omugwira abeera mu mmwe okumala akabanga oba ebbanga lyonna, bw'anaabanga ayagadde okuwaayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky'akawoowo akansanyusa Nze Mukama, anaakoleranga ddala nga mmwe bwe mukola." 
Numbers15:15 Mu kibiina munaabangamu amateeka ge gamu agafuga mmwe, n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe, era amateeka ago tegaakyukenga ennaku zonna. Mmwe, n'abagwira abo, munaayisibwanga bumu mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Numbers15:16 Amateeka n'obulombolombo binaabanga bye bimu ebibafuga mmwe, n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe.”" 
Numbers15:17 Mukama era n'agamba Musa 
Numbers15:18 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli, abagambe nti: “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi gye mbatwalamu," 
Numbers15:19 ekiseera ne kituuka ne mulya ku mmere erimiddwa mu nsi eyo, mulyawuzaako ekitundu, kibe ekitone ekyenjawulo kye muntonera, Nze Mukama." 
Numbers15:20 Ku ŋŋaano gye musooka okukanda, munaggyangako omugaati ne muguwaayo, gube ekitone ekyenjawulo." 
Numbers15:21 Mu biseera byammwe byonna eby'omu maaso, ku ŋŋaano yammwe gye musooka okukanda, munaggyangako ekiweebwayo ekyenjawulo ne mukintonera, Nze Mukama." 
Numbers15:22 “Naye oboolyawo munaayinzanga okusobya mu butali bugenderevu, ne mutatuukiriza biragiro bino byonna, Nze Mukama bye ntegeezezza Musa." 
Numbers15:23 Era oboolyawo gye bujja, munaayinzanga okulemwa okukola byonna, Nze Mukama bye nalagira nga mpita mu Musa." 
Numbers15:24 Bwe munaabanga mukikoze nga temugenderedde, olw'okuba ng'ekibiina kibadde tekimanyi kiteekwa kukolebwa, ekibiina kyonna kinaawangayo ente ennume emu envubuka, n'eba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky'akawoowo akansanyusa Nze Mukama, wamu n'ekiweebwayo kyakwo eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako ng'etteeka bwe liragira, era n'embuzi emu ennume, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers15:25 Kabona anaasabiranga ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ekisonyiwo, era banaasonyiyibwanga, kubanga ekisobyo ekyo tekyali kigenderere, era banaabanga bandeetedde Nze Mukama ekitone kyabwe eky'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi olw'ekisobyo ekyo." 
Numbers15:26 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli n'abagwira ababeera mu bo, kinaasonyiyibwanga, kubanga bonna banaabanga bakoze ensobi eyo nga si ŋŋenderere." 
Numbers15:27 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi nga tagenderedde, anaawangayo embuzi enduusi ey'omwaka ogumu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers15:28 Omuntu oyo akoze ekibi nga tagenderedde, kabona anaamusabiranga ekisonyiwo gye ndi Nze Mukama, n'asonyiyibwa." 
Numbers15:29 Munaabeeranga n'amateeka ge gamu agafuga buli akola ekibi nga tagenderedde, k'abe omuzaaliranwa Omuyisirayeli, oba omugwira abeera mu Bayisirayeli." 
Numbers15:30 “Naye buli anaakolanga ekibi ng'agenderedde, k'abe omuzaaliranwa oba omugwira, oyo anaabanga anyoomodde Mukama, era anaaboolebwanga mu bantu be," 
Numbers15:31 kubanga anaabanga anyoomye ekigambo kyange Nze Mukama, era ng'amenye ekiragiro kyange, ne yeesingisa yekka omusango, n'aboolebwa.”" 
Numbers15:32 Lwali lumu Abayisirayeli nga bakyali mu ddungu, ne wabaawo omuntu eyasangibwa ng'alonderera obuku ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato." 
Numbers15:33 Abo abaamusanga ne bamuleeta eri Musa ne Arooni n'ekibiina kyonna," 
Numbers15:34 n'akuumibwa nga musibe, kubanga baali tebannamanya kya kumukolera." 
Numbers15:35 Awo Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Omuntu oyo ateekwa okuttibwa. Ekibiina kyonna kinaamukubira amayinja ebweru w'olusiisira.” 
Numbers15:36 Ekibiina kyonna ne kimufulumya ebweru w'olusiisira, ne kimukuba amayinja n'afa, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers15:38 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli, abalagire nti: “Mutungenga bulijjo ebijwenge ku mikugiro gy'ebyambalo byammwe, era ku bijwenge ebiri ku buli mukugiro, muteekengako akawuzi aka bbululu." 
Numbers15:39 Ebijwenge ebyo bibabeererenga akabonero akabajjukiza: buli lwe munaabirabanga, mujjukirenga ebiragiro byange byonna, mutuukirizenga kye biragira, mulemenga okunvaako okugoberera ebyo emitima gyammwe n'amaaso gammwe bye bibaleetera okwegomba." 
Numbers15:40 Olwo mujjukirenga ebiragiro byange byonna, era mutuukirizenga kye biragira, mulyoke mubeererenga ddala bange." 
Numbers15:41 Nze Mukama, Nze Katonda wammwe. Nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ndyoke mbe Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama, Nze Katonda wammwe.”" 
Numbers16:1 Awo Koora mutabani wa Yizuhaari, Yizuhaari mutabani wa Kohati asibuka mu Leevi, ng'ali wamu ne Datani ne Abiraamu batabani ba Eliyaabu, ne Oni mutabani wa Peleti, ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni," 
Numbers16:2 ne bawakanya obukulembeze bwa Musa. Ne beegattibwako Abayisirayeli abalala ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, abantu abatutumufu era abakulembeze abaalondebwa mu kibiina." 
Numbers16:3 Ne beekuŋŋaanyiza ku Musa ne Arooni, ne babagamba nti: “Muyitirizza okwekuza. Abantu b'Eggwanga lino bonna ba Mukama, era Mukama ali wamu nabo. Kale, lwaki mwegulumiza ku bantu b'Eggwanga lya Mukama?”" 
Numbers16:4 Awo Musa bwe yakiwulira, ne yeeyala ku ttaka nga yeevuunise." 
Numbers16:5 Awo n'agamba Koora ne banne bonna nti: “Enkya ku makya Mukama anaatulaga owuwe gw'alonze. Oyo owuwe gw'anaalonda, anaamuleka n'asembera gy'ali." 
Numbers16:6 Kino kye munaakola: ggwe Koora, ne banno bonna, munaakwata ebyoterezo" 
Numbers16:7 enkya, ne mubiteekamu omuliro, ne muteekako obubaane nga muli mu maaso ga Mukama. Olwo oyo Mukama gw'analonda, nga ye wuwe. Muyitirizza okwekuza mmwe Abaleevi.”" 
Numbers16:8 Musa n'agamba Koora nti: “Muwulire mmwe Abaleevi! 
Numbers16:9 Mukiyita kitono, Katonda wa Yisirayeli okubaawula mmwe mu kibiina ky'Abayisirayeli okubasembeza gy'ali, okukolanga omulimu ogw'obuweereza mu Weema ya Mukama, n'okuyimiriranga mu maaso g'ekibiina okukiweereza?" 
Numbers16:10 Mukama yakuwa ggwe ne Baleevi banno bonna ekitiibwa ekyo, era munoonya n'obwakabona?" 
Numbers16:11 Mu butuufu, ggwe ne banno bonna, Mukama gwe mujeemedde, kubanga Arooni ye ani, mmwe mulyoke mumwemulugunyize?”" 
Numbers16:12 Musa n'atumya Datani ne Abiraamu batabani ba Eliyaabu. Abo b'atumizza ne bagamba nti: “Tetujja kujja. 
Numbers16:13 Tekimala okuba nti watuggya mu nsi engimu era engagga, n'otuleeta okututtira mu ddungu? Era oyagala n'okwefuula atufuga?" 
Numbers16:14 N'ekirala, totutuusizza mu nsi engimu era engagga, wadde okutuwa ebibanja n'ennimiro ez'emizabbibu okuba ezaffe! Kati abantu bano oyagala okubaziba amaaso? Tetujja kujja!”" 
Numbers16:15 Awo Musa n'asunguwala nnyo, n'agamba Mukama nti: “Tokkiriza kitone kye bakuleetera. Sibaggyangako wadde endogoyi emu, era sirina n'omu ku bo gwe nali nkozeeko kabi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Musa n'agamba Koora nti: “Ggwe ne banno bonna, enkya mujje mu maaso ga Mukama. Ne Arooni ajja kubaayo." 
Numbers16:17 Buli omu ku mmwe akwate ekyoterezo kye, akiteekeko obubaane, era buli omu akireete mu maaso ga Mukama, ebyoterezo ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, era naawe ne Arooni, buli omu n'ekyoterezo kye.”" 
Numbers16:18 Awo buli omu n'akwata ekyoterezo kye, ne babiteekamu omuliro, ne bassaako obubaane, ne bayimirira wamu ne Musa ne Arooni ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers16:19 Koora n'akuŋŋaanya ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna, ne kiyimirira nga kitunuulidde Musa ne Arooni ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kirabikira ekibiina kyonna." 
Numbers16:20 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers16:21 “Muve awali abantu bano, bo ndyoke mbazikirize mbagirawo!”" 
Numbers16:22 Naye Musa ne Arooni ne bagamba nti: “Ayi Katonda, Ggwe osibukamu obulamu bwonna. Omuntu omu ng'akoze ekibi onoosunguwalira abantu bonna?”" 
Numbers16:23 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers16:24 agambe abantu nti: “Muve okumpi n'eweema eya Koora, n'eya Datani, n'eya Abiraamu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Musa n'asituka n'agenda ewa Datani ne Abiraamu. Abakulembeze b'Abayisirayeli ne bagenda naye. 
Numbers16:26 Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mbeegayiridde muve okumpi ne weema z'abantu abo ababi, sikulwa nga muzikirizibwa olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Numbers16:27 Awo abantu ne beesega, ne babeera wala n'eweema ya Koora, n'eya Datani, n'eya Abiraamu ku njuyi zonna. Datani ne Abiraamu ne bafuluma, ne bayimirira ku miryango gy'eweema zaabwe, nga bali wamu ne bakazi baabwe, n'abaana baabwe abakulu n'abato." 
Numbers16:28 Musa n'agamba nti: “Ku kino, kwe munaategeerera nga Mukama ye yantuma okukola emirimu gino gyonna, era nga sigikola nga nzigya mu kutetenkanya kwange." 
Numbers16:29 Abantu bano bwe balifa ng'abantu abalala bonna bwe bafa, oba bwe balituukibwako ekitalema kutuuka ku bantu bonna, kale nga Mukama si ye yantuma." 
Numbers16:30 Naye Mukama bw'anaakola ekitalabwangako, ettaka ne lyasama ne libamira wamu n'ebyabwe byonna, ne bakka mu bunnya nga balamu, olwo munaategeera ng'abantu bano banyoomye Mukama.”" 
Numbers16:31 Bwe yali amaliriza bw'ati okwogera ebigambo ebyo byonna, ettaka kwe baali ne lyegabanyaamu wabiri," 
Numbers16:32 ne libamira awamu n'eby'omu maka gaabwe, n'abagoberezi ba Koora bonna wamu n'ebyabwe byonna." 
Numbers16:33 Bwe batyo bo n'ebyabwe byonna ne beesolessa mu bunnya nga balamu, ettaka ne libasaanikira, ne basaanawo." 
Numbers16:34 Abayisirayeli bonna abaali beetoolodde abantu abo, bwe baawulira ebiwoobe byabwe, ne badduka nga baleekaana nti: “Lekooti, sikulwa nga naffe ettaka litumira!”" 
Numbers16:35 Mukama n'asindika omuliro, ne gwokya abantu ebikumi ebibiri mu ataano, abaali booteza obubaane." 
Numbers16:36 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers16:37 “Gamba Eleyazaari mutabani wa Arooni kabona, aggye ebyoterezo mu bintu ebyokeddwa, kubanga ebyoterezo ebyo bitukuvu, era asaasaanye amanda g'omuliro agabirimu." 
Numbers16:38 Ebyoterezo by'aboonoonyi abo abattiddwa olw'ebibi byabwe, bitukuvu, kubanga baabiwaddeyo eri Mukama. Ebyoterezo ebyo, biweesebwemu embaati, zibikkenga ku alutaari, zibeerenga akabonero akalabula Abayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Eleyazaari kabona n'atwala ebyoterezo eby'ekikomo ebyaweebwayo abo abookeddwa, ne biweesebwamu ekibikka ku alutaari," 
Numbers16:40 okujjukizanga Abayisirayeli nti buli muntu atali wa lulyo lwa Arooni, alemenga okusembera mu maaso ga Mukama okunyookeza obubaane, sikulwa ng'azikirizibwa nga Koora n'abagoberezi be. Ebyo byonna byakolebwa, nga Mukama bwe yagamba Eleyazaari, ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Ku lunaku olwaddako, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kyemulugunyiza Musa ne Arooni, nga kigamba nti: “Mwasse abantu ba Mukama.”" 
Numbers16:42 Awo bonna bwe baali nga bakuŋŋaanidde ku Musa ne Arooni, ne bakyuka ne batunula awali Weema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne balaba ng'ekire kigibisse. Ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kirabika." 
Numbers16:43 Musa ne Arooni ne bajja mu maaso ga Weema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. 
Numbers16:44 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers16:45 “Muve mu bantu bano, bo ndyoke mbazikirize mbagirawo!” Musa ne Arooni ne beeyala ku ttaka nga beevuunise." 
Numbers16:46 Awo Musa n'agamba Arooni nti: “Kwata ekyoterezo kyo, oggye amanda g'omuliro ku alutaari ogateeke mu kyo, oteekeko obubaane, okitwale mangu mu bantu, obasabire ekisonyiwo, kubanga Mukama asunguwadde, kawumpuli atandise.”" 
Numbers16:47 Arooni n'atwala ekyoterezo kye nga Musa bwe yamulagira, n'adduka n'agenda mu bantu, n'asanga nga kawumpuli atandise mu bantu. N'ateeka obubaane ku kyoterezo, n'asabira abantu ekisonyiwo," 
Numbers16:48 nga w'ayimiridde yeetooloddwa abakyali abalamu n'abafudde. Kawumpuli n'akoma. 
Numbers16:49 Abo abaafa kawumpuli baali omutwalo gumu mu enkumi nnya mu lusanvu, ng'abo abaafiira mu keediimo ka Koora tobabaliddeemu." 
Numbers16:50 Kawumpuli bwe yakomezebwa, Arooni n'addayo eri Musa ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers17:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers17:2 “Gamba Abayisirayeli bakuwe emiggo kkumi n'ebiri, gumu gumu okuva ku buli mukulu wa kika, owandiike erinnya lya buli mukulu wa kika ku muggo gwe." 
Numbers17:3 Era owandiike erinnya lya Arooni ku muggo gw'ab'Ekika kya Leevi, kubanga buli mukulu wa kika anaaba n'omuggo gumu." 
Numbers17:4 Onootwala emiggo egyo mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, n'ogiteeka mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, we nsisinkanira nammwe." 
Numbers17:5 Omuntu gwe nnaalonda, omuggo gwe gunaaloka, ndyoke mmalewo okwemulugunya kw'Abayisirayeli okujja gye ndi, nga babeemulugunyiza mmwe.”" 
Numbers17:6 Musa n'ayogera n'Abayisirayeli. Abakulu baabwe bonna ne bamuwa emiggo, gumu gumu buli kika, emiggo gyonna kkumi n'ebiri. Omuggo gwa Arooni nagwo ne gubeera mu gyo." 
Numbers17:7 Musa n'ateeka emiggo egyo mu Weema, mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano." 
Numbers17:8 Ku lunaku olwaddako, Musa bwe yayingira mu Weema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, n'alaba ng'omuggo gwa Arooni ogw'ab'omu Kika kya Leevi, gulose ne guleeta omutunsi, ne gusansula, ne gubala ebibala ebyengevu." 
Numbers17:9 Musa n'aggyayo emiggo gyonna, n'agifulumya n'agitwalira Abayisirayeli bonna, ne bagikebera, buli omu n'atwala ogugwe." 
Numbers17:10 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Zzaayo omuggo gwa Arooni mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, gukuumibwenga, gube akabonero akalabula abajeemu, nti bajja kufa, bwe batakomya kunneemulugunyiza.”" 
Numbers17:11 Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. 
Numbers17:12 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Musa nti: “Tuutuno, tufudde, tuzikiridde, ffenna tuweddewo." 
Numbers17:13 Oba nga buli asembera okumpi n'Eweema ya Mukama anaafa, olwo ffenna tetuggweewo?”" 
Numbers18:1 Mukama n'agamba Arooni nti: “Ggwe ne batabani bo, n'ab'omu kika kyo bonna, mmwe munaavunaanyizibwanga ebinaabanga bisobye mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Naye ebinaabanga bisobye mu bwakabona bwammwe, binaavunaanyizibwanga ggwe ne batabani bo mwekka." 
Numbers18:2 Onooleetanga baganda bo, ab'omu Kika kya Leevi, bakwegatteko, bakuyambenga ggwe ne batabani bo, nga muweereza mu Weema." 
Numbers18:3 Banaakolanga emirimu gy'obalagira, n'emirimu gyonna egy'omu Weema, naye tebakkirizibwa kusemberera bintu eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, wadde alutaari, sikulwa nga bo nammwe mufa." 
Numbers18:4 Banaakoleranga wamu naawe, ne balabiriranga Eweema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, nga bakola emirimu gyamu gyonna. Naye atali Muleevi, takkirizibwa kubasembereranga." 
Numbers18:5 Mmwe muba mulabiriranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu ne alutaari, nnemenga kuddamu kusunguwalira Bayisirayeli." 
Numbers18:6 Era Nze kennyini, nze neerobozezza baganda bammwe Abaleevi mu Bayisirayeli, ne baba ekirabo kye mpadde mmwe." 
Numbers18:7 Naye Ggwe ne batabani bo, munaakolanga omulimu gwammwe ogw'obwakabona ogukwatagana ne alutaari, era n'ebyo ebiri mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Okuweereza mu bwakabona, nkibawa mmwe ng'ekirabo. Atali Muleevi anaasembereranga ebintu ebitukuvu, anattibwanga.”" 
Numbers18:8 Mukama n'agamba Arooni nti: “Laba, ggwe nkuwadde ebisigalawo nga tebyokeddwa, ku ebyo Abayisirayeli bye bantonera. Mbikuwadde ggwe, ne batabani bo, bibenga omugabo gwe munaafunanga ennaku zonna." 
Numbers18:9 Ku bintu byonna ebitukuvu ennyo ebintonerwa ne bisigalawo nga si bya kwokebwa, bino bye binaabanga ebyammwe: buli ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, buli ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, na buli ekiweebwayo olw'okweggyako omusango. Byonna ebitukuvu ennyo ebintonerwa, binaabanga bibyo, ne batabani bo." 
Numbers18:10 Munaabiryanga mu ngeri egwanira okulya ebitukuvu ennyo. Buli musajja akkirizibwa okubiryangako. Mutegeerenga nga bitukuvu. 
Numbers18:11 “Ne byonna ebimpongerwa Abayisirayeli, ne biba byange mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, nabyo bibyo. Mbikuwadde ggwe, ne batabani bo, ne bawala bo, mubifunenga ennaku zonna. Buli mulongoofu ali mu maka go, akkirizibwa okubiryangako." 
Numbers18:12 “Byonna ebisinga obulungi, ebisooka okukungulwa, ku muzigo ogw'emizayiti, ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ne ku ŋŋaano, bye bantonera Nze Mukama, mbikuwadde." 
Numbers18:13 Ebibala byonna ebisooka okwengera mu nsi yaabwe, bye banandeeteranga Nze Mukama, binaabanga bibyo. Buli mulongoofu ali mu maka go, akkirizibwa okubiryako." 
Numbers18:14 Buli kintu ekinampongerwanga mu Yisirayeli, kinaabanga kikyo." 
Numbers18:15 “Buli ekiggulanda, k'abe muntu oba k'ebe nsolo, ekintonerwa Nze Mukama, kinaabanga kikyo. Naye omwana omuggulanda, onokkirizanga ensimbi ze bamununuza. Era n'ensolo eteri nnongoofu, onokkirizanga ensimbi ze baginunuza." 
Numbers18:16 Abaana banaanunulibwanga nga ba mwezi gumu, ku muwendo omugereke ogwa sekeli ttaano eza ffeeza, ez'ekipimo ekitongole eky'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ze ggeera amakumi abiri buli sekeli." 
Numbers18:17 Naye ente, n'endiga, n'embuzi, ezisooka okuzaalibwa, teziinunulwenga. Ezo zange. Zinattibwanga, omusaayi gwazo n'ogumansira ku alutaari, amasavu gaazo n'ogookya, ne gaba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky'akawoowo akansanyusa, Nze Mukama." 
Numbers18:18 Ennyama yaazo, eneebanga yiyo, ng'ekifuba ekimpongerwa ne kiba kyange mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, n'ekisambi ekya ddyo, bwe biri ebibyo." 
Numbers18:19 “Ebitone byonna eby'enjawulo Abayisirayeli bye bantonera, mbikuwadde ggwe, ne batabani bo, ne bawala bo, mubifunenga ennaku zonna. Eno ye ndagaano ey'olubeerera gye nkoze naawe era n'ezzadde lyo, eterimenyebwa.”" 
Numbers18:20 Mukama n'agamba Arooni nti: “Tolifuna ttaka lya nsikirano, wadde okuweebwa omugabo mu nsi y'Abayisirayeli. Ku byange kw'onoogabananga, era kw'onoofunanga ebikubeezaawo mu Bayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers18:21 Mukama era n'agamba nti: “Abaleevi mbawadde ebitundu byonna eby'ekkumi, Abayisirayeli bye bantonera, bibenga byabwe eby'ensikirano era ebibayimirizaawo. Eyo ye mpeera gye banaaweebwanga, olw'obuweereza bwabwe mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers18:22 N'okuva kati, Abayisirayeli abatali Baleevi, tebagezanga okusemberera Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, balemenga okwonoona ne battibwa." 
Numbers18:23 Naye Abaleevi, be banaakolanga omulimu ogw'obuweereza mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu, era be banaavunaanyizibwanga ebyayo ebinaabanga bisobye. Lino lye tteeka ery'olubeerera, erinaakolanga ne ku bazzukulu bammwe, nti Abaleevi tebaabenga na ttaka lya nsikirano," 
Numbers18:24 kubanga ebitundu eby'ekkumi Abayisirayeli bye bantonera Nze Mukama, nga bye biweebwayo ebyenjawulo, bye mpadde Abaleevi okuba ebyabwe, kyenvudde mbagamba bo nti tebaabenga na ttaka lya nsikirano mu Bayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers18:25 Mukama n'agamba Musa," 
Numbers18:26 ayogere n'Abaleevi, abagambe nti: “Bwe munaggyanga ku Bayisirayeli ebitundu eby'ekkumi Mukama by'abawadde mmwe okuba ebyammwe, munaatoolangako ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi ku byo, ne kiba ekiweebwayo ekyenjawulo, kye muwaayo eri Mukama." 
Numbers18:27 Era ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyenjawulo kye muwaayo, kinaababalirwanga ng'omulimi ky'awaayo, eky'emmere ey'empeke, gy'aggye mu gguuliro, n'eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, gw'aggye mu ssogolero, bwe kimubalirwa." 
Numbers18:28 Bwe mutyo nammwe munaggyanga ku bitundu byonna eby'ekkumi, Abayisirayeli bye babawa mmwe, ne muwaayo eri Mukama, ekiweebwayo ekyenjawulo. Ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyenjawulo kye muwaayo eri Mukama, munaakiwanga Arooni kabona." 
Numbers18:29 Ebirabo byonna bye mufuna, ebisinga obulungi ku byo, kwe munaatoolanga ekirabo ekyenjawulo kye mutonera Mukama, era munaakiwangayo nga kijjuvu." 
Numbers18:30 Kale bwe munaawangayo ku byo ekitundu ekisinga obulungi, ebirala munaabisigazanga, ng'omulimi bw'asigaza by'aggya mu gguuliro ne mu ssogolero, ng'amaze okuwaayo ekitone kye." 
Numbers18:31 Era bye musigazizza, mmwe n'ab'omu maka gammwe, munaabiriiranga wonna we mwagala, kubanga ebyo ye mpeera gye mufuna olw'obuweereza bwe mukola mu Weema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu." 
Numbers18:32 Temuubenga na musango okubirya, kasita munaamalanga okuwa Mukama ebisinga obulungi ku byo. Naye mwekuumenga obutavumaganyanga bitone Abayisirayeli bye bawaayo, nga mubaako bye mulya nga temunnawaayo eri Mukama ekitundu ekyo ekisinga obulungi. Bwe munaabiryangako nga temumaze kukiwaayo, temulirema kuttibwa.”" 
Numbers19:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: 
Numbers19:2 “Kino kye kiragiro ekiri mu tteeka, Nze Mukama lye nteekawo. Ŋŋamba bwe nti: Gamba Abayisirayeli bakuleetere ente eya lukunyu eteriiko kamogo, era eteteekebwangako kikoligo." 
Numbers19:3 Mugiwe Eleyazaari kabona, agitwale ebweru w'olusiisira, bagitte ng'alaba." 
Numbers19:4 Awo Eleyazaari kabona annyike olugalo lwe mu musaayi gwayo, agumansire emirundi musanvu okwolekera obwenyi bw'Eweema Ey'Okunsisinkanirangamu Nze Mukama." 
Numbers19:5 Ente eyo yonna, okutwaliramu eddiba, n'ennyama, n'omusaayi, n'ebyenda byayo, eyokebwe, nga Eleyazaari kabona, alaba." 
Numbers19:6 Kabona oyo akwate omuti omwerezi, n'akati aka yisopu, n'ekiwuzi ky'olugoye olumyufu, abisuule mu muliro, ente eyo mw'eyokerwa." 
Numbers19:7 Olwo Eleyazaari ayoze engoye ze, anaabe omubiri, alyoke ayingire mu lusiisira, wabula asigale nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:8 N'omuntu ayokezza ente eyo, ayoze engoye ze, anaabe omubiri, wabula naye asigale nga si mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:9 Omuntu omulongoofu ayoole evvu ly'ente eyo, alitereke ebweru w'olusiisira mu kifo ekirongoofu, gye liba likuumirwa. Evvu eryo linaakozesebwanga ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli, okutegeka amazzi agakozesebwa mu mukolo ogw'okwetukuza, ogukolebwa okuggyawo ebibi." 
Numbers19:10 Omuntu ayodde evvu ly'ente eyo, ayoze engoye ze, wabula abe atali mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Etteeka lino linaabanga lya lubeerera ku Bayisirayeli ne ku bagwira ababeera mu bo." 
Numbers19:11 “Buli anaakoonanga ku mulambo gw'omuntu, anaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga si mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:12 Ku lunaku olwokusatu ne ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, anaanaabanga amazzi ag'okwetukuza, n'alyoka aba omulongoofu. Kyokka ku lunaku olwo olwokusatu ne ku lunaku olw'omusanvu bw'ateetukuzenga, anaasigalanga nga si mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:13 Buli akoona ku mulambo gw'omuntu n'ateetukuza, avumaganya Eweema ya Mukama, era anaaboolebwanga mu Bayisirayeli. Anaasigalanga nga si mulongoofu, kubanga tamansiddwako mazzi ag'okwetukuza." 
Numbers19:14 “Omuntu bw'afiira mu weema, lino lye tteeka: buli ayingira mu weema eyo, na buli aba asangiddwamu, aba atali mulongoofu okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Numbers19:15 Buli kintu mu weema eyo ekyasaamiridde, ekitabikiddwako kisaanikira, tekiba kirongoofu." 
Numbers19:16 Era ebweru, buli akoona ku gwe basse obussi, oba ku afudde yekka, oba akoona ku ggumba ly'omufu, oba ku malaalo, taba mulongoofu okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Numbers19:17 “Olw'okuggyawo obutali bulongoofu, banaatoolanga ku vvu ery'ekitone ky'ente eya lukunyu ekyayokebwa olw'okutukuza, ne baliteeka mu kibya, ne baliyiwamu amazzi agaggyiddwa mu mugga ogukulukuta." 
Numbers19:18 Omuntu omulongoofu anaakwatanga akati aka yisopu, n'akannyika mu mazzi ago, n'agamansira ku weema, ne ku bintu byamu byonna, ne ku bantu abaagirimu, ne ku oyo eyakoona ku ggumba oba ku gwe basse obussi oba ku afudde yekka oba ku malaalo." 
Numbers19:19 Ku lunaku olwokusatu ne ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, omuntu omulongoofu anaamansiranga ku atali mulongoofu. Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, anaamutukuzanga. Olwo omuntu oyo atannaba mulongoofu, anaayozanga engoye ze, n'anaaba, n'aba omulongoofu akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:20 “Omuntu atali mulongoofu bw'ateetukuza, asigala nga si mulongoofu, kubanga amazzi ag'okwetukuza gaba tegamumansiddwako. Era olw'obutaba mulongoofu, avumaganya Weema ya Mukama, era anaaboolebwanga n'ava mu kibiina ky'abantu ba Katonda." 
Numbers19:21 Etteeka lino munaalikuumanga ennaku zonna. Omuntu amansira amazzi agakozesebwa okutukuza, naye anaayozanga engoye ze. N'oyo anaakoonanga ku mazzi agakozesebwa okutukuza, taabenga mulongoofu okutuuka akawungeezi." 
Numbers19:22 Buli kintu atali mulongoofu ky'anaakoonangako, kinaafuukanga ekitali kirongoofu, ne buli anaakikoonangako, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi.”" 
Numbers20:1 Mu mwezi ogusooka, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kituuka mu Ddungu ly'e Ziini, ne kisiisira e Kadesi. Miriyamu n'afiira eyo, era n'aziikibwa eyo." 
Numbers20:2 Ekibiina kyonna ne kitaba na mazzi, abantu ne bakuŋŋaanira ku Musa ne Arooni nga beemulugunya." 
Numbers20:3 Ne bayombesa Musa nga bagamba nti: “Singa twafa baganda baffe lwe baafiira mu maaso ga Mukama! 
Numbers20:4 Lwaki mwaleeta ekibiina kya Mukama mu ddungu lino? Mwagala tufiire muno, n'amagana gaffe?" 
Numbers20:5 Era lwaki mwatuggya e Misiri, ne mutuleeta mu kifo kino ekibi, omutali ŋŋaano, omutali mitiini, omutali mizabbibu, omutali makomamawanga, era omutali wadde amazzi ag'okunywa?”" 
Numbers20:6 Musa ne Arooni ne bava mu maaso g'ekibiina, ne bagenda ku mulyango gw'Eweema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne beeyala ku ttaka nga beevuunise, ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kibalabikira." 
Numbers20:7 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers20:8 “Kwata omuggo ogwo, okuŋŋaanye ekibiina, ng'oli wamu ne Arooni muganda wo, mulagire olwazi olwo, bonna nga balaba, luveemu amazzi. Obaggyire amazzi mu lwazi, bw'otyo onywese ekibiina ky'abantu n'amagana gaabwe.”" 
Numbers20:9 Musa n'aggya omuggo ku Ssanduuko ey'Endagaano, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Numbers20:10 Musa ne Arooni ne bakuŋŋaanyiza ekibiina mu maaso g'olwazi. Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Bajeemu mmwe, muwulirize! Tuyinza okubaggyira amazzi mu lwazi luno?”" 
Numbers20:11 Musa n'agalula omuggo n'agukubisa olwazi emirundi ebiri, amazzi mangi ne gawamatukamu. Abantu bonna ne banywa era n'amagana gaabwe." 
Numbers20:12 Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti: “Nga bwe mutanneesize, ne mutampeesa kitiibwa mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli, temuliyingiza kibiina ky'abantu bano mu nsi bo gye mbawa.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ago ge mazzi g'e Meriba, Abayisirayeli gye baawakanyiza Mukama n'abalaga bw'ali omutuukirivu." 
Numbers20:14 Awo Musa ng'ali e Kadesi, n'atuma ababaka eri kabaka wa Edomu okumutegeeza nti baganda be Abayisirayeli bagamba nti: “Omanyi bulungi ebizibu byonna ebyatutuukako." 
Numbers20:15 Bajjajjaffe baagenda e Misiri, ne tubeera mu Misiri okumala emyaka mingi. Abamisiri ne batubonyaabonya ffe ne bajjajjaffe." 
Numbers20:16 Twakaabirira Mukama atuyambe, n'awulira okukaaba kwaffe, n'atuma omubaka n'atuggya e Misiri. Kaakano tuutuno tuli Kadesi, ekibuga ekiri ku nsalo n'ensi yo." 
Numbers20:17 Tukwegayiridde, tukkirize tuyite mu nsi yo. Tetujja kulinnyako mu nnimiro n'emu, wadde ey'emizabbibu, era tetujja kunywa ku mazzi ag'omu nzizi zammwe. Tujja kutambulira mu luguudo mwokka, awatali kuwunjawunjako ku ddyo oba ku kkono, okutuusa lwe tulimala okuyita mu nsi yo.”" 
Numbers20:18 Naye Abeedomu ne bamuddamu nti: “Tojja kuyita mu nsi yaffe. Bw'onoogezaako okuyitamu, tujja kukwata ebyokulwanyisa tukulwanyise.”" 
Numbers20:19 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba nti: “Tujja kutambulira mu luguudo mwokka, era ffe n'amagana gaffe, buli lwe tunaanywa ku mazzi gammwe, tujja kugasasulira. Tusaba kimu kyokka: mutukkirize tuyitemu buyisi.”" 
Numbers20:20 Abeedomu ne bagamba nti: “Temujja kuyitamu.” Ne basindika eggye eddene n'ebyokulwanyisa eby'amaanyi okulumba Abayisirayeli. 
Numbers20:21 Bwe batyo Abeedomu ne bagaana Abayisirayeli okuyita mu nsi yaabwe. Abayisirayeli ne bakyuka ne bakwata ekkubo eddala. 
Numbers20:22 Ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli ne kiva e Kadesi, ne kitambula, ne kituuka ku Lusozi Hoori," 
Numbers20:23 ku nsalo ne Edomu. Nga bali eyo, Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Arooni nti:" 
Numbers20:24 “Arooni ajja kufa yeegatte ku bajjajjaabe. Tajja kuyingira mu nsi gye mpa Abayisirayeli, kubanga mmwe mwembi mwajeemera ekiragiro kyange ku mazzi ag'e Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Twala Arooni ne Eleyazaari mutabani we, oyambuke nabo ku Lusozi Hoori." 
Numbers20:26 Arooni omwambulemu ebyambalo bye eby'obwakabona, obyambaze Eleyazaari mutabani we. Arooni ajja kufiira eyo, yeegatte ku bajjajjaabe.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yalagira. Ne bambuka ku Lusozi Hoori, ng'ekibiina kyonna kiraba." 
Numbers20:28 Musa n'ayambulamu Arooni ebyambalo eby'obwakabona, n'abyambaza Eleyazaari mutabani wa Arooni. Arooni n'afiira eyo ku ntikko y'olusozi. Olwo Musa ne Eleyazaari ne baserengeta ne bava ku lusozi." 
Numbers20:29 Awo ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli bwe kyamanya nga Arooni afudde, ne kimukungubagira okumala ennaku amakumi asatu." 
Numbers21:1 Araadi, Kabaka Omukanaani, eyabeeranga mu kitundu kya Kanaani eky'ebukiikaddyo, bwe yawulira ng'Abayisirayeli bajja, nga bakutte ekkubo ly'e Atariimu, n'agenda okubalwanyisa, n'awamba abamu ku bo." 
Numbers21:2 Abayisirayeli ne beeyama obweyamo eri Mukama ne bagamba nti: “Bw'onooweerayo ddala abantu bano mu mikono gyaffe, tujja kuzikiririza ddala ebibuga byabwe.”" 
Numbers21:3 Mukama n'akkiriza Abayisirayeli kye baasaba, n'abawa okuwangula Abakanaani, ne babazikiririza ddala, bo n'ebibuga byabwe. Ekifo ne kituumibwa erinnya Horuma." 
Numbers21:4 Abayisirayeli ne bava ku Lusozi Hoori, ne batambula, nga bakutte ekkubo eridda ku Nnyanja Emmyufu, basobole okwetooloola ensi ya Edomu. Abantu ne beetamwa olw'olugendo," 
Numbers21:5 ne boogera bubi ku Katonda ne ku Musa nti: “Lwaki mwatuggya e Misiri? Mwatuleeta tufiire mu ddungu? Tewali mmere, tewali mazzi. N'okwetamwa twetamiddwa ekyokulya kino ekitalina bwe kiri.”" 
Numbers21:6 Awo Mukama n'asindika emisota egy'obusagwa, era bangi ku Bayisirayeli ne bafa." 
Numbers21:7 Abantu ne bajja eri Musa, ne bagamba nti: “Twakola kibi bwe twayogera obubi ku Katonda ne ku ggwe. Weegayirire Mukama atuggyeko emisota.” Musa n'asabira abantu." 
Numbers21:8 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Kola omusota ogufaanana egyo egy'obusagwa, oguwanike ku mulongooti. Buli anaaba alumiddwa omusota, bw'anaatunula ku ogwo, anaawona.”" 
Numbers21:9 Musa n'aweesa omusota ogw'ekikomo, n'aguwanika ku mulongooti. Awo buli eyabanga alumiddwa omusota, bwe yatunuuliranga omusota ogwo ogw'ekikomo, ng'awona." 
Numbers21:10 Abayisirayeli ne batambula, ne basiisira mu Obooti." 
Numbers21:11 Bwe baava mu Obooti, ne basiisira mu Yiye-Abariimu, mu ddungu eryolekera Mowaabu, ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Numbers21:12 Bwe baava eyo, ne batambula ne basiisira mu Kiwonvu ky'e Zeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Bwe baava eyo, ne batambula ne basiisira emitala w'Omugga Arunoni, oguli mu ddungu erituuka ne mu nsi y'Abaamori. Omugga Arunoni gwe gwawula ensi y'Abamowaabu ku y'Abaamori." 
Numbers21:14 Mu Kitabo ky'Entalo za Mukama kyebava bagamba nti: “Waaheebu mu Suufa n'ebiwonvu bya Arunoni," 
Numbers21:15 okukkirira mu biwonvu, okutuuka ku Kibuga Ari, okuliraana ensalo ne Mowaabu.”" 
Numbers21:16 Bwe baava eyo ne batambula, ne batuuka ku Beeri. Olwo lwe luzzi Mukama lwe yagamba Musa nti: “Kuŋŋaanya abantu, Ŋŋenda kubawa amazzi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Abayisirayeli ne bayimba oluyimba luno nti: “Muluyimbire! Ggwe oluzzi, sumulula ensulo zo." 
Numbers21:18 Oluzzi olwasimwa abakulu, abakungu b'abantu, nga balagirwa omufuzi. Baalusimisanga miti gye bakwata: gye miggo.” Ne bava mu ddungu, ne bagenda e Mataana." 
Numbers21:19 Bwe baava e Mataana, ne bagenda e Nahaliyeeli. Bwe baava e Nahaliyeeli ne batuuka e Bamooti." 
Numbers21:20 Bwe baava e Bamooti, ne batuuka mu kiwonvu ekiri mu nsi y'Abamowaabu, ku ntikko y'Olusozi Pisuga, okulengererwa eddungu." 
Numbers21:21 Abayisirayeli ne batuma ababaka eri Sihoni, Kabaka w'Abaamori, okumugamba nti:" 
Numbers21:22 “Tukwegayiridde, tukkirize tuyite mu nsi yo. Tetujja kuwunjawunjako mu nnimiro n'emu, wadde ey'emizabbibu. Tetujja na kunywa mazzi ga mu nzizi zammwe. Tujja kutambulira mu luguudo mwokka, okutuusa lwe tulimala okuyita mu nsi yo.”" 
Numbers21:23 Kyokka Sihoni n'atakkiriza Bayisirayeli kuyita mu nsi ye. N'akuŋŋaanya abantu be bonna, n'agenda e Yahazi mu ddungu, n'alwanyisa Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers21:24 Abayisirayeli ne battira abantu be mu lutalo, ne beefuga ensi ye, okuva ku Mugga Arunoni okutuuka ku Mugga Yabboki, kwe kugamba okutuuka ku Bammoni, kubanga ensalo y'Abammoni yali ekuumibwa na maanyi." 
Numbers21:25 Abayisirayeli ne bawamba ebibuga by'Abaamori byonna, omuli ne Hesubooni, n'obubuga bwonna obwali bukyetoolodde, ne babibeeramu." 
Numbers21:26 Hesubooni kye kyali ekibuga ekikulu ekya Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyali amaze okulwanyisa kabaka wa Mowaabu mu kusooka, n'amuwangula, n'awamba ensi ye yonna, okutuukira ddala ku Mugga Arunoni." 
Numbers21:27 Abayimbi kyebaava bayimba nti: “Mujje mu Hesubooni ekibuga kya Sihoni, mukizimbe buggya kinywezebwe." 
Numbers21:28 Omuliro gwava mu Hesubooni, ennimi zaagwo mu kibuga kya Sihoni, ne gwokya Ari, ekibuga kya Mowaabu, ne guzikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu ebya Arunoni." 
Numbers21:29 Nga zibasanze Abamowaabu! Muzikiridde mmwe abasinza lubaale Kemosi! Alese batabani bammwe bafuuke ababungeese, ne bawala bammwe bawambibwe Sihoni, Kabaka w'Abaamori." 
Numbers21:30 Naye ffe tubasaanyizzaawo okuva ku Hesubooni, okutuuka e Diboni. Tubazikirizza n'okutuuka e Noofa, ekituuka ku Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli ne bafuukira ddala batuuze mu nsi y'Abaamori. 
Numbers21:32 Musa n'atuma abantu okuketta Ekibuga Yazeri. Abayisirayeli ne bakiwamba, awamu n'obubuga obwali bukyetoolodde, ne bagobamu Abaamori abaalimu." 
Numbers21:33 Abayisirayeli ne bakyuka, ne bakwata ekkubo ly'e Basani. Ogi, Kabaka w'e Basani, n'abalumba n'abantu be bonna okubalwanyisiza mu Edereyi." 
Numbers21:34 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Tomutya, kubanga mmuwaddeyo mu mikono gyo, ye n'abantu be bonna, era n'ensi ye. Onoomukolako kye wakola ku Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyabeeranga mu Hesubooni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Awo Abayisirayeli ne batta Ogi ne batabani be, n'abantu be bonna, obutalekaawo n'omu, ne beefunira ensi ye." 
Numbers22:1 Abayisirayeli ne batambula, ne basiisira mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, emitala wa Yorudaani okwolekera Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Awo Balaki mutabani wa Zippori n'alaba byonna Abayisirayeli bye baakola ku Baamori. 
Numbers22:3 Abamowaabu ne batya nnyo ne batekemuka, kubanga Abayisirayeli baali bangi nnyo." 
Numbers22:4 Abamowaabu ne bagamba abakulembeze ba Midiyaani nti: “Kaakano ogubinja guno gujja kulya gusaanyeewo byonna ebitwetoolodde, ng'ente bw'erya n'esaanyaawo omuddo ogw'omu ttale.” Awo Balaki mutabani wa Zippori, era eyali kabaka wa Mowaabu mu kiseera ekyo," 
Numbers22:5 n'atuma ababaka eri Balamu mutabani wa Beyori ow'e Petori, ekiri okumpi n'Omugga Ewufuraate, mu nsi y'Abammoni, okumugamba nti: “Abantu b'eggwanga eddamba bavudde e Misiri, babuutikidde ensi, era bali wano okuliraana nange." 
Numbers22:6 Kale kaakano, nkwegayiridde, jjangu onkolimirire abantu bano, kubanga bansinga amaanyi. Olwo mpozzi tunaasobola okubawangula, ne mbagoba mu nsi eno, kubanga mmanyi nga ggwe, omuntu gw'osabira omukisa, agufuna, era nga buli gw'okolimira, akolimirwa.”" 
Numbers22:7 Awo abakulembeze ba Mowaabu n'aba Midiyaani ne bagenda eri Balamu, nga batutte kye banaamusasula olw'okukolima. Bwe baatuuka gy'ali, ne bamutegeeza ebyo Balaki bye yabatuma." 
Numbers22:8 Balamu n'abagamba nti: “Musule wano ekiro kino. Enkya nja kubaddiza obubaka, okusinziira ku ekyo Mukama ky'anaaba aŋŋambye.” Abakulembeze ba Mowaabu ne basula ewa Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Katonda n'ajja eri Balamu n'amubuuza nti: “Bantu ba ngeri ki bano abali naawe?” 
Numbers22:10 Balamu n'agamba Katonda nti: “Kabaka wa Mowaabu, Balaki mutabani wa Zippori, antumidde ng'agamba nti:" 
Numbers22:11 ‘Waliwo abantu abavudde e Misiri, ababuutikidde ensi. Nkwegayiridde, jjangu obankolimirire, mpozzi nnaasobola okubalwanyisa, ne mbagoba mu nsi eno.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Naye Katonda n'agamba Balamu nti: “Togenda nabo, era togeza n'okolimira abantu bali, kubanga baaweebwa omukisa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Enkeera, Balamu n'agamba ababaka ba Balaki nti: “Muddeeyo mu nsi yammwe. Mukama agaanye okunzikiriza okugenda nammwe.”" 
Numbers22:14 Awo abakulembeze ba Mowaabu ne basituka ne baddayo eri Balaki, ne bamugamba nti: “Balamu agaanye okujja naffe.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balaki n'ayongera okutuma abakulembeze abalala abasinga abo obungi, era n'okuba abeekitiibwa." 
Numbers22:16 Ne bagenda eri Balamu, ne bamugamba nti: “Balaki mutabani wa Zippori agamba nti: ‘Nkwegayiridde, waleme kubaawo kikuziyiza kujja gye ndi," 
Numbers22:17 kubanga nja kukukuza obeere waakitiibwa nnyo, era buli ky'onoŋŋamba, nja kukikola. Kale jjangu, nkwegayiridde, onkolimirire abantu bano.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Balamu n'addamu abaweereza ba Balaki nti: “Balaki ne bwe yandimpadde olubiri lwe nga lujjudde ebyobugagga ebingi, siyinza kuva ku ekyo Mukama Katonda wange ky'alagidde. Siyinza kukikendeezaako wadde okukyongerako." 
Numbers22:19 Kale nno mbeegayiridde, nammwe musule wano ekiro kino, mmale okumanya Mukama ky'anaayongera okuntegeeza.”" 
Numbers22:20 Ekiro ekyo Katonda n'ajja eri Balamu, n'amugamba nti: “Abantu abo oba nga bazze kukuyita, situka ogende nabo. Wabula ojja kukola ekyo kyokka kye nkulagira.”" 
Numbers22:21 Enkeera Balamu bwe yazuukuka, n'ateeka amatandiiko ku ndogoyi ye, n'agenda n'abakulembeze ba Mowaabu." 
Numbers22:22 Katonda n'asunguwala, kubanga Balamu yagenda. Awo Balamu bwe yali nga yeebagadde endogoyi ye, nga n'abaweereza be babiri bali naye, Malayika wa Mukama n'ayimirira mu kkubo okumuziyiza." 
Numbers22:23 Endogoyi bwe yalaba Malayika wa Mukama ng'ayimiridde mu kkubo, ng'akutte ekitala ekisowoddwa, n'eva mu kkubo, n'edda mu ttale. Balamu n'agikuba okugizza mu kkubo." 
Numbers22:24 Malayika wa Mukama n'alyoka ayimirira ekkubo we lifundira, nga liyita wakati w'ennimiro z'emizabbibu, ng'ebbali n'ebbali eriyo ekisenge." 
Numbers22:25 Endogoyi bwe yalaba Malayika wa Mukama, ne yeenyigiriza ku kisenge, n'enyigirizaako ekigere kya Balamu. Balamu n'addamu okugikuba." 
Numbers22:26 Malayika wa Mukama ne yeeyongerayo mu maaso, n'ayimirira mu kifo eky'akanyigo, awatali bwekyusizo ku ddyo wadde ku kkono." 
Numbers22:27 Endogoyi bwe yalaba Malayika wa Mukama, n'ebwama ku ttaka, nga Balamu agiri ku mugongo. Balamu n'asunguwala nnyo, n'agikuba n'omuggo gwe." 
Numbers22:28 Mukama n'asobozesa endogoyi okwogera, n'egamba Balamu nti: “Nkukoze ki, ggwe okunkuba emirundi gino gyonsatule?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu n'agiddamu nti: “Kubanga onnyoomye. Singa mbadde n'ekitala, n'andikusse.”" 
Numbers22:30 Endogoyi n'egamba Balamu nti: “Si nze ndogoyi yo gye weebagalako okuva ddi na ddi n'okutuusa kati? Nali nkuyisizzaako bwe ntyo?” Balamu n'addamu nti: “Nedda.” 
Numbers22:31 Mukama n'azibula amaaso ga Balamu, Balamu n'alaba Malayika wa Mukama ng'ayimiridde mu kkubo ng'agaludde ekitala ekisowoddwa. Balamu n'akutama, ne yeeyala ku ttaka nga yeevuunise." 
Numbers22:32 Malayika wa Mukama n'agamba Balamu nti: “Okubidde ki endogoyi yo emirundi egyo gyonsatule? Nzuuno nzize okukuziyiza, kubanga olugendo lwo sirusemba." 
Numbers22:33 Endogoyi yo bw'endabye, n'ekyuka okunneewala emirundi egyo gyonsatule. Singa tekyuse kunneewala, nandibadde nkusse ggwe, yo ne ngireka.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balamu n'agamba Malayika wa Mukama nti: “Nnyonoonye. Mbadde simanyi ng'oyimiridde mu kkubo okunziyiza. Kale, kaakano, oba nga olugendo lwange terukusanyusa, ka nzireyo eka.”" 
Numbers22:35 Malayika wa Mukama n'agamba Balamu nti: “Genda n'abantu abo, naye ekyo kyokka kye nnaakutegeeza, ky'onookola.” Awo Balamu n'agenda n'abakungu ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki bwe yawulira nga Balamu azze, n'agenda okumusisinkana mu kibuga kya Mowaabu, ekiri ku lubalama lw'Omugga Arunoni, awasemberayo ddala ku nsalo." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki n'agamba Balamu nti: “Lwaki tewajja bwe nakutumira abantu okukuyita ku mulundi ogwasooka? Walowooza nti siyinza kukukuza n'oba waakitiibwa?” 
Numbers22:38 Balamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Nzuuno kaakano nzize gy'oli. Naye olowooza nnina obuyinza okubaako kye njogera ekyange ku bwange? Ekyo kyokka Katonda ky'anandagira okwogera, kye nja okwogera.”" 
Numbers22:39 Awo Balamu n'agenda ne Balaki, ne batuuka mu Kibuga Huzooti." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki n'atambira ente n'endiga, n'aweerezaako Balamu n'abakungu abaali naye." 
Numbers22:41 Awo enkeera, Balaki n'atwala Balamu, n'ayambuka naye ku bifo ebigulumivu ebya Baali. Balamu n'asinziira eyo, okulengera ekitundu ku kibinja ky'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers23:1 Balamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Nzimbira wano alutaari musanvu, era ondeetere wano ente ennume musanvu, n'endiga ennume musanvu.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki n'akola nga Balamu bwe yamugamba. Balaki ne Balamu ne batambira ente ennume emu, n'endiga ennume emu ku buli alutaari." 
Numbers23:3 Balamu n'alyoka agamba Balaki nti: “Yimirira okumpi n'ekiweebwayo kyo ekyokebwa, nze ŋŋende ndabe oba nga Mukama anajja okunsisinkana. Era buli ky'anandaga, nnaakikutegeeza.” N'ayambuka yekka ku ntikko y'akasozi, awataali bimera." 
Numbers23:4 Katonda n'amusisinkana. Balamu n'agamba Katonda nti: “Ntegese alutaari musanvu, era ku buli emu, ne ntambirirako ente ennume emu n'endiga ennume emu.”" 
Numbers23:5 Mukama n'amanyisa Balamu by'anaayogera. N'amugamba nti: “Ddayo eri Balaki era oyogere bw'otyo.” 
Numbers23:6 Bw'atyo Balamu n'addayo, n'asanga Balaki ng'ayimiridde okumpi n'ekitambiro ky'awaddeyo ekyokebwa, ng'ali wamu n'abakungu ba Mowaabu bonna." 
Numbers23:7 Balamu n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Balaki Kabaka wa Mowaabu, yanzigya mu Aramu, mu nsozi z'ebuvanjuba, n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Jjangu onkolimirire aba Yakobo, jjangu ovumirire Abayisirayeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Nnaakolimira ntya oyo, Katonda gw'atakolimidde? Nnaavumirira ntya oyo, Katonda gw'atavumiridde?" 
Numbers23:9 Mbalabira we ndi ku ntikko z'enjazi, Mbalengerera ku lusozi. Abantu abo lye ggwanga eribeera lyokka, eriteebalira mu mawanga." 
Numbers23:10 “Abazzukulu ba Yakobo, bangi nnyo ng'enfuufu. Ayinza okubabala ye ani? Nga kizibu n'okubalako wadde ekyokuna ekimu eky'Abayisirayeli abo! Singa nnyini obulamu bwange buggwaako nga ndi muntu wa Ddunda! Singa n'enkomerero yange eba ng'ey'omutuukirivu!”" 
Numbers23:11 Balaki n'agamba Balamu nti: “Biki bino by'onkoledde? Nakuleese okolimire abalabe bange, naye ate ggwe ky'okoze, obasabidde mukisa?”" 
Numbers23:12 Ye n'addamu nti: “Nandiremye okwogera ekyo kyokka Mukama ky'ampadde okwogera?” 
Numbers23:13 Awo Balaki n'agamba Balamu nti: “Nkwegayiridde jjangu tugende ffembi mu kifo ekirala, w'onooyinza okubalengerera. Onoolabako bamu, sso si bonna, osinziire eyo okubankolimirira.”" 
Numbers23:14 N'amutwala mu ttale ly'e Zofiimu, ku ntikko y'Olusozi Pisuga. N'azimbayo alutaari musanvu, n'atambirira ku buli alutaari ente ennume emu, n'endiga ennume emu." 
Numbers23:15 Balamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Sigala wano okumpi n'ekiweebwayo kyo ekyokebwa, nze ŋŋende eri nsisinkane Mukama.”" 
Numbers23:16 Mukama n'amanyisa Balamu by'anaayogera. N'amugamba nti: “Ddayo eri Balaki era oyogere bw'otyo.” 
Numbers23:17 N'addayo, n'asanga Balaki ng'akyayimiridde okumpi n'ekiweebwayo kye ekyokebwa, nga n'abakungu ba Mowaabu bali wamu naye. Balaki n'abuuza Balamu nti: “Mukama agambye ki?”" 
Numbers23:18 Balamu n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Balaki, jjangu owulire, Ntegera okutu ggwe mutabani wa Zippori." 
Numbers23:19 “Katonda talimba, naye abantu balimba. Katonda takyuka, naye abantu bakyuka. Ye ky'asuubiza akikola, ky'ayogera akituukiriza." 
Numbers23:20 “Katonda andagidde okuwa omukisa. N'olwekyo Katonda bw'awa omukisa, siyinza kugujjulula." 
Numbers23:21 Talabye kibi ku ba Yakobo, wadde ekikyamu ku Bayisirayeli. Mukama Katonda waabwe ali nabo. Baatula bw'ali Kabaka waabwe." 
Numbers23:22 Ng'embogo bwe yeesiga amayembe gaayo, nabo bwe beesiga Katonda abaggye e Misiri." 
Numbers23:23 Tekisoboka okuloga aba Yakobo, wadde okulagula eby'okukola akabi ku Bayisirayeli. Banaayogerwangako nti: ‘Katonda ng'abakoledde!’" 
Numbers23:24 Yisirayeli lye ggwanga eritaamuuka ng'empologoma enkazi, oba ensajja etebwama kukkalira, okutuusa lw'etuga ky'eyigga, n'enywa omusaayi gw'ekyo ekittiddwa.”" 
Numbers23:25 Awo Balaki n'agamba Balamu nti: “Nga bw'ogaanye okubakolimira, era lema nno n'okubawa omukisa.”" 
Numbers23:26 Naye Balamu n'addamu Balaki nti: “Saakugambye nti nteekwa okukola byonna Mukama by'anaagamba?” 
Numbers23:27 Balaki n'agamba Balamu nti: “Kale jjangu nkwegayiridde, nkutwale mu kifo ekirala, oboolyawo Mukama anaasiima osinziire eyo okubankolimirira.”" 
Numbers23:28 Awo Balaki n'alinnyisa Balamu ku Lusozi Pewori, awalengererwa eddungu." 
Numbers23:29 Balamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Nzimbira wano alutaari musanvu, era ondeetere wano ente ennume musanvu, n'endiga ennume musanvu.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki n'akola nga Balamu bwe yagamba, n'atambira ku buli alutaari ente ennume emu, n'endiga ennume emu." 
Numbers24:1 Balamu bwe yamanya nga Mukama ayagala okuwa Abayisirayeli omukisa, n'atagenda kumala kwebuuza nga bwe yakola mu kusooka, wabula n'ayolekeza amaaso ge eri eddungu." 
Numbers24:2 Bwe yayimusa amaaso, n'alaba Abayisirayeli nga basiisidde ng'ebika byabwe bwe biddiriŋŋana. Mwoyo wa Mukama n'ajja ku ye." 
Numbers24:3 N'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Bino bye bigambo bya Balamu mutabani wa Beyori, era bye bigambo by'omusajja alaba obulungi." 
Numbers24:4 Bino bye bigambo by'oyo awulira Katonda by'agamba, eby'oyo eyeebaka, kyokka n'asigala ng'atunula, n'alaba ebimulagibwa Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Numbers24:5 Eweema zammwe aba Yakobo, n'ensiisira zammwe Abayisirayeli, nga nnungi!" 
Numbers24:6 Zeeyaliiridde ng'ebiwonvu, ng'ennimiro ku lubalama lw'omugga; ng'emiti gy'omugavu, Mukama gye yasimba. Ziri ng'emiti emyerezi, egiri okumpi n'amazzi." 
Numbers24:7 Banaafunanga enkuba nnyingi, ne basiga ensigo zaabwe mu nnimiro efukirirwa obulungi. Kabaka waabwe anaasinganga Kabaka Agagi ekitiibwa, n'obwakabaka bwe bunaatenderezebwanga." 
Numbers24:8 Ng'embogo bwe yeesiga amayembe gaayo, nabo bwe beesiga Katonda abaggye mu Misiri. Balisaanyaawo amawanga g'abalabe baabwe, bamenyeemenye amagumba gaabwe, babafumise obusaale bwabwe." 
Numbers24:9 Abayisirayeli babwama ne beebaka ng'empologoma ey'amaanyi. Ani aguma okubazuukusa? Buli abasabira omukisa, naye aguweebwenga. Buli abakolimira, naye akolimirwenga.”" 
Numbers24:10 Awo Balaki n'asunguwalira Balamu, ne yeecwacwana, n'agamba Balamu nti: “Nakuyita kukolimira balabe bange, ate ggwe kaakano obasabidde mukisa emirundi gino gyonsatule." 
Numbers24:11 Kale kaakano ddayo ewammwe. Nali nsuubizza okukukuza obe waakitiibwa nnyo, naye Mukama akuziyizizza okukuzibwa.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balamu n'agamba Balaki nti: “Ababaka be wantumira ssaabagamba nti: 
Numbers24:13 ‘Balaki ne bw'ampa olubiri lwe nga lujjudde ebyobugagga ebingi, siyinza kuva ku kigambo kya Mukama, ne nkola ekyange ku bwange, ka kibe kirungi oba ekibi,’ era nti ‘Nja kwogera ekyo kyokka Mukama ky'anaagamba?’" 
Numbers24:14 Kaakano nzirayo mu bantu bange, naye nga sinnagenda, jjangu nkutegeeze abantu bano bye balikola ku bantu bo mu biseera ebijja.”" 
Numbers24:15 Awo Balamu n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Bino bye bigambo bya Balamu mutabani wa Beyori, era bye bigambo by'omusajja alaba obulungi." 
Numbers24:16 Bino bye bigambo by'oyo awulira Katonda by'agamba, amanya amagezi g'Atenkanika, era eby'oyo eyeebaka, kyokka n'asigala ng'atunula, n'alaba ebimulagibwa Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Numbers24:17 “Bwe ntunula, mbalaba, naye si nga bwe bali kati. Mbatunuulira naye nga bandi wala. Kabaka ali ng'emmunyeenye alisibuka mu ba Yakobo bano Ye, ggwe muggo ogw'obwakabaka, ogulisibuka mu Bayisirayeli. Alikuba abakulembeze ba Mowaabu, alisaanyaawo aba Seeti bonna." 
Numbers24:18 “Aliwangula abalabe be mu Edomu, ne yeefuga ensi yaabwe Seyiri, nga yo Yisirayeli yeeyongera kuba ya maanyi." 
Numbers24:19 Oyo asibuka mu ba Yakobo alifuga, era alisaanyaawo abaliba basigaddewo mu kibuga.”" 
Numbers24:20 Awo Balamu bwe yatunuulira Abamaleki, n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Ery'Abamaleki lye lyali ebbereberye mu mawanga, naye ku nkomerero, lya kuzikirira.”" 
Numbers24:21 Bwe yatunuulira Abakeeni, n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Ekifo kye mubeeramu kigumu Kiri ng'ekisu ekyesiifu ekyawanikibwa eyo mu lwazi." 
Numbers24:22 “Naye Abakeeni mulizikirizibwa, Abassiriya bwe balibatwala nga muli basibe.”" 
Numbers24:23 Balamu era n'ayogera ebigambo bye eby'obulanzi nti: “Zitusanze! Katonda bw'alikola ekyo, ani alisigalawo nga mulamu?" 
Numbers24:24 Kale abalumbaganyi baliva e Kittimu mu mmeeri, ne bawangula Assiriya ne Eberi, naye nabo balizikirizibwa.”" 
Numbers24:25 Awo Balamu n'asitula n'addayo ewaabwe, ne Balaki n'akwata amakubo ge." 
Numbers25:1 Abayisirayeli bwe baali e Sittimu, ne batandika okukola obwamalaaya n'abakazi Abamowaabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abakazi abo bwe baakolanga embaga nga batambirira balubaale baabwe, baayitanga Abayisirayeli. Abayisirayeli ne beetaba mu kulya, era ne bavuunamira balubaale abo," 
Numbers25:3 ne batabagana ne lubaale Baali ow'e Pewori. Mukama n'abasunguwalira. 
Numbers25:4 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Twala abakulembeze bonna ab'Abayisirayeli obattire mu maaso gange emisana ttuku, ndyoke ndekere awo okusunguwalira abantu.”" 
Numbers25:5 Musa n'agamba abakungu b'Abayisirayeli nti: “Buli omu ku mmwe atte basajja be abaasinzizza Baali ow'e Pewori.” 
Numbers25:6 Mu kaseera ako, omu ku Bayisirayeli n'aleeta mu weema ye omukazi Omumidiyaani, nga Musa n'Abayisirayeli bonna balaba, bwe baali nga bakungubagira ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Numbers25:7 Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari, era muzzukulu wa Arooni kabona, bwe yalaba ekyo, n'asituka n'ava mu kibiina ky'abantu, n'akwata effumu," 
Numbers25:8 n'agoberera omusajja oyo Omuyisirayeli n'omukazi oyo, mu weema. N'abafumita effumu, ne libayitamu bombi. Olwo kawumpuli eyali azikiriza Abayisirayeli, n'akomezebwa," 
Numbers25:9 ng'amaze okutta abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya. 
Numbers25:10 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers25:11 “Olw'ekyo Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari, era muzzukulu wa Arooni kabona, ky'akoze, ndekedde awo okusunguwalira Abayisirayeli. Yagaanye okubaako b'agumiikiriza mu bo, okusinza omulala yenna atali Nze, kyenvudde sibazikiriza mu busungu bwange." 
Numbers25:12 Kale, mugambe nti nkola naye endagaano ey'emirembe, era nti mmusiima," 
Numbers25:13 ye n'ezzadde lye eririmuddirira, babenga bakabona olubeerera, kubanga teyagumiikirizza banvuganya Nze Katonda we, bw'atyo n'afunira Abayisirayeli ekisonyiwo.”" 
Numbers25:14 Omusajja Omuyisirayeli eyattirwa awamu n'omukazi Omumidiyaani yali Zimuri, mutabani wa Saalu, omukulu w'emu ku nnyumba ez'ab'Ekika kya Simyoni." 
Numbers25:15 Omukazi Omumidiyaani eyattibwa, yali Kozibi muwala wa Zuuri, eyali akulira abamu ku bakulu b'ennyumba mu Bamidiyaani." 
Numbers25:16 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers25:17 “Lumba Abamidiyaani, obatte," 
Numbers25:18 kubanga balabe bammwe. Baabasalira enkwe, ne babasenderasendera e Pewori. Era balabe bammwe, olwa Kozibi muwala w'omufuzi Omumidiyaani. Kozibi oyo, mwannyinaabwe, ye yattibwa mu kiseera kya kawumpuli, olw'ebyo ebyagwawo e Pewori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Awo kawumpuli bwe yaggwa, Mukama n'agamba Musa ne Eleyazaari, mutabani wa Arooni kabona, nti:" 
Numbers26:2 “Mubale Abayisirayeli bonna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, abayinza okugenda okutabaala. Mubabale nga mugoberera ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe.”" 
Numbers26:3 Awo Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, ne bategeeza abantu nga bali mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, ku Yorudaani okwolekera Yeriko, ne babagamba nti:" 
Numbers26:4 “Mubale abantu abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa.” Bano be Bayisirayeli abaava mu nsi y'e Misiri:" 
Numbers26:5 Ekika kya Rewubeeni omwana omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli, kyalimu Amasiga: erya Hanoki n'erya Pallu," 
Numbers26:6 n'erya Hezirooni n'erya Karumi. 
Numbers26:7 Ago ge Masiga g'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali emitwalo ena mu enkumi ssatu mu lusanvu mu asatu." 
Numbers26:8 Ab'olulyo lwa Pallu baali Eliyaabu 
Numbers26:9 ne batabani be, Semweli, ne Datani, ne Abiraamu. Datani ne Abiraamu abo be baalondebwa ekibiina ky'abantu, ne bawakanya Musa ne Arooni, era be beetaba ne Koora lwe baawakanya Mukama." 
Numbers26:10 Ettaka lyayasama ne libamira wamu ne Koora, bwe kityo ekibinja ekyo ne kifa, omuliro lwe gwazikiriza abasajja ebikumi ebibiri mu ataano, ne bafuuka akabonero akalabula abalala." 
Numbers26:11 Naye batabani ba Koora tebaafa. 
Numbers26:12 Ekika kya Simyoni kyalimu Amasiga: erya Nemweli, n'erya Yamini, n'erya Yakini;" 
Numbers26:13 erya Zera, n'erya Sawuuli." 
Numbers26:14 Ago ge Masiga g'Ab'Ekika kya Simyoni. Gaalimu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu bibiri. 
Numbers26:15 Ekika kya Gaadi kyalimu Amasiga: erya Zefoni, n'erya Haggi, n'erya Suni;" 
Numbers26:16 erya Ozini, n'erya Eri;" 
Numbers26:17 erya Aroodi, n'erya Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Ago ge Masiga g'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo ena mu bitaano." 
Numbers26:19 Batabani ba Yuda, Eri ne Onani, baafiira mu nsi ye Kanaani." 
Numbers26:20 Ekika kya Yuda kyalimu Amasiga: erya Seela, n'erya Pereezi, n'erya Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Essiga lya Pereezi lyalimu ennyiriri: olwa Hezirooni, n'olwa Hamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Ago ge Masiga g'ab'Ekika kya Yuda, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo musanvu mu kakaaga mu bitaano." 
Numbers26:23 Ekika kya Yissakaari kyalimu Amasiga: erya Toola, n'erya Puva;" 
Numbers26:24 erya Yasuubu, n'erya Simurooni." 
Numbers26:25 Ago ge Masiga g'ab'Ekika kya Yissakaari, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi nnya." 
Numbers26:26 Ekika kya Zebbulooni kyalimu Amasiga: erya Seredi, n'erya Eloni, n'erya Yaleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Ago ge Masiga g'ab'Ekika kya Zebbulooni, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo mukaaga mu bitaano." 
Numbers26:28 Yosefu yalina batabani be Manasse, ne Efurayimu." 
Numbers26:29 Mu Kika kya Manasse, Makiri mutabani wa Manasse oyo, ye kitaawe wa Gileyaadi, era gano ge Masiga g'abo abasibuka mu Gileyaadi:" 
Numbers26:30 erya Yezeri, n'erya Heleki;" 
Numbers26:31 erya Asiriyeeli n'erya Sekemu; 
Numbers26:32 erya Semida, n'erya Heferi." 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehaadi mutabani wa Heferi teyazaala baana ba bulenzi, wabula ab'obuwala era amannya gaabwe ge gano: Maala ne Noowa, Hogula, Milika ne Tiruza." 
Numbers26:34 Ago ge Masiga ag'ab'Ekika kya Manasse, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo etaano mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu." 
Numbers26:35 Ekika kya Efurayimu kyalimu Amasiga: erya Sutela, n'erya Bekeri, n'erya Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Ab'omu lulyo lwa Erani basibuka mu Sutela, ye jjajjaabwe."
