Numbers26:37 Ago ge Masiga ag'ab'Ekika kya Efurayimu, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu bitaano. Abo bonna basibuka mu Yosefu." 
Numbers26:38 Ekika kya Benyamiini kyalimu Amasiga: erya Bela, n'erya Asubeeli, n'erya Ahiraamu;" 
Numbers26:39 erya Sefufaamu, n'erya Hufaamu." 
Numbers26:40 Ab'ennyiriri: olwa Arudi n'olwa Naamani basibuka mu Bela, ye jjajjaabwe." 
Numbers26:41 Ago ge Masiga ag'ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga." 
Numbers26:42 Ekika kya Daani kyalimu abasibuka mu Suhaamu," 
Numbers26:43 era abaabalibwa ku Basuhamu abo baali abasajja emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bina. 
Numbers26:44 Ekika kya Aseri kyalimu Amasiga: erya Yimuna, n'erya Yisuvi, n'erya Beriya." 
Numbers26:45 Ab'olulyo olwa Heberi n'olwa Malukiyeeli basibuka mu Beriya, ye jjajjaabwe." 
Numbers26:46 Aseri yalina muwala we erinnya lye Seera. 
Numbers26:47 Ago ge Masiga ag'ab'Ekika kya Aseri, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina." 
Numbers26:48 Ekika kya Nafutaali kyalimu Amasiga: erya Yahuzeeli, n'erya Guuni;" 
Numbers26:49 erya Yezeri, n'erya Sillemu." 
Numbers26:50 Ago ge Masiga ag'ab'Ekika kya Nafutaali, era abaabalibwa ku bo, baali abasajja emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu ebikumi bina." 
Numbers26:51 Abasajja bonna Abayisirayeli abaabalibwa, baali emitwalo nkaaga mu lukumi mu lusanvu mu asatu." 
Numbers26:52 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers26:53 “Abo be baligabirwa ensi ebe obutaka bwabwe, okusinziira ku bungi bwabwe." 
Numbers26:54 Ekika ekirina abantu abangi, olikiwa ettaka ddene, n'ekika ekirina abantu abatono, olikiwa ettaka ttono. Buli kika kiriweebwa ettaka okuba obutaka bwakyo, okusinziira ku bungi bw'abantu baakyo abaabalibwa." 
Numbers26:55 Naye ettaka lirigabibwa nga likubirwa kalulu. Balirigabana nga bagoberera mannya ga bika bya bajjajjaabwe. 
Numbers26:56 Buli kika kiriweebwa ettaka lyakyo ery'ensikirano, nga likubirwa kalulu, era buli kika kirifuna ettaka, okusinziira ku bungi bw'abantu baakyo.”" 
Numbers26:57 Bano be Baleevi abaabalibwa okusinziira ku nsibuko zaabwe: abasibuka mu Gerusooni, n'abasibuka ku Kohati, era n'abasibuka mu Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Era mu Baleevi abo, mwe musibuka Abalibuni, Abaheburooni, Abamahuli, Abamuusi, n'Abakoora. Kohati ye kitaawe wa Amuraamu." 
Numbers26:59 Muka Amuraamu yali ayitibwa Yokebedi muwala wa Leevi. Yokebedi oyo baamuzaala bali Misiri. Yokebedi ye yazaalira Amuraamu abaana Arooni ne Musa, ne Miriyamu mwannyinaabwe." 
Numbers26:60 Arooni ye kitaawe wa Nadabu ne Abihu, ne Eleyazaari ne Yitamaari." 
Numbers26:61 Kyokka Nadabu ne Abihu baafa, bwe baawaayo eri Mukama omuliro Mukama gw'atabalagidde." 
Numbers26:62 Abasajja Abaleevi bonna abaabalibwa, okuva ku mwana ow'obulenzi awezezza omwezi ogumu n'okusingawo, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu. Bo tebaabalibwa wamu n'Abayisirayeli bannaabwe, kubanga Abaleevi tebaaweebwa ttaka lya nsikirano nga Bayisirayeli balala." 
Numbers26:63 Abo be basajja Abayisirayeli abaabalibwa Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, ku lubalama lw'Omugga Yorudaani, okwolekera Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Mu abo temwali n'omu ku bali abaabalibwa Musa ne Arooni kabona, lwe baabala Abayisirayeli mu Ddungu ly'e Sinaayi," 
Numbers26:65 kubanga Mukama yali agambye nti bonna baali ba kufiira mu ddungu. N'olwekyo, tewaali n'omu ku bo eyasigalawo, okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni." 
Numbers27:1 Ne weesowolayo abawala abayitibwa Maala, ne Noowa, Hogula, ne Milika, ne Tiruza, bawala ba Zelofehaadi mutabani wa Heferi, Heferi mutabani wa Gileyaadi, Gileyaadi mutabani wa Makiri, Makiri mutabani wa Manasse, Manasse mutabani wa Yosefu." 
Numbers27:2 Ne bajja mu maaso ga Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, n'abakulembeze, n'ekibiina kyonna, ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, ne bagamba nti:" 
Numbers27:3 “Kitaffe yafiira mu ddungu nga tazadde baana ba bulenzi. Teyali mu kibiina ky'abo abeekuŋŋaanya ne beetaba ne Koora okuwakanya Mukama, wabula ye yafa lwa kibi kye kirala." 
Numbers27:4 Kaakano erinnya lya kitaffe lisangulwe mu lulyo lw'asibukamu, olw'okuba nga teyazaala mwana wa bulenzi? Tusaba mutuwe obutaka mu baganda ba kitaffe.”" 
Numbers27:5 Musa n'ayanjula ensonga yaabwe eri Mukama. 
Numbers27:6 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers27:7 “Bawala ba Zelofehaadi kye bagamba kituufu. Bawe obutaka obw'ensikirano mu baganda ba kitaabwe, basikire omugabo gwa kitaabwe." 
Numbers27:8 Era gamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Omusajja bw'anaafanga nga tazadde mwana wa bulenzi, muwala we anaasikiranga ebintu bye." 
Numbers27:9 Bw'anaabanga talina mwana wa buwala, munaawanga baganda be ebintu bye ne babisikira." 
Numbers27:10 Bw'anaabanga talina baganda be, kale ebintu bye munaabiwanga baganda ba kitaawe ne babisikira." 
Numbers27:11 Era bw'anaabanga talina na baganda ba kitaawe, olwo ebintu bye munaabiwanga oyo amulinako oluganda olusinga okuba olw'okumpi mu lulyo lwe, ne biba bibye. Lino linaabanga etteeka Abayisirayeli lye banaakuumanga, nga Nze Mukama bwe nkulagidde ggwe Musa.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Awo Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Yambuka ku lusozi luno Abiriimu, olengere ensi gye mpadde Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers27:13 Bw'onoomala okugirengera, ojja kufa, weegatte ku bajjajjaabo nga muganda wo Arooni bwe yafa n'abeegattako," 
Numbers27:14 kubanga mmwe mwembi mwajeemera ekiragiro kyange mu Ddungu ly'e Ziini. Ekibiina kyonna bwe kyanjeemera e Meriba ku mazzi, mwagaana okumpeesa ekitiibwa mu maaso gaabwe.” Ago ge mazzi g'e Meriba, e Kadesi mu Ddungu ly'e Ziini." 
Numbers27:15 Musa n'asaba Mukama nti: 
Numbers27:16 “Mukama, Katonda, ensibuko y'obulamu, nkusaba olonde omuntu, akulire abantu bano," 
Numbers27:17 abakulemberenga, era abakumeekumenga, abantu bo bano baleme kuba nga ndiga ezitalina musumba.”" 
Numbers27:18 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Twala Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuuni, omusajja alimu Mwoyo, omusseeko emikono gyo." 
Numbers27:19 Omutwale ayimirire mu maaso ga Eleyazaari kabona, nga n'ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna weekiri, omukwase obukulu nga balaba." 
Numbers27:20 Omwawulize ku buyinza bwo, ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli kimuwulirenga." 
Numbers27:21 Anaagendanga eri Eleyazaari kabona, Eleyazaari n'akozesanga Wurimu n'amubuuliza kye njagala akole. Bw'atyo Eleyazaari ye anaawabulanga Yoswa, n'Abayisirayeli bonna mu byonna bye banaakolanga.”" 
Numbers27:22 Awo Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. N'atwala Yoswa, Yoswa n'ayimirira mu maaso ga Eleyazaari kabona, nga n'ekibiina ky'abantu kyonna weekiri." 
Numbers27:23 Musa n'assa emikono gye ku Yoswa, n'amukwasa obukulu, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Numbers28:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers28:2 alagire Abayisirayeli nti: “Ebiweebwayo eby'emmere eteekwa okutonerwa Mukama, nga bye biweebwayo ebyokebwa ebyakawoowo akamusanyusa, munassangayo omwoyo okubiwaayo gy'ali mu biseera byabyo ebyalagirwa.”" 
Numbers28:3 Era abagambe nti: “Kino kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa kye munaawangayo eri Mukama: endiga ento ennume bbiri ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu era ezitaliiko kamogo, zibenga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers28:4 Endiga ento emu, munaagitambiranga ku makya, endiga ento endala ne mugitambira akawungeezi," 
Numbers28:5 nga kugenderako ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekya kilo emu ey'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu lita emu ey'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, omulungi." 
Numbers28:6 Kino kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, ekyasooka okuweerwayo ku Lusozi Sinaayi, nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekiwunyira Mukama akawoowo." 
Numbers28:7 Ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigendera ku buli ndiga ento emu, kinaabanga kya lita emu. Ekiweebwayo ekyo eky'ebyokunywa ekika, kye mutonera Mukama, munaakiyiwanga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Numbers28:8 Akawungeezi munaatambiranga endiga ento eyookubiri, nga bwe munaabanga mutambidde ey'oku makya, nga kuliko ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako, ne kiba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekiwunyira Mukama akawoowo." 
Numbers28:9 “Ku lunaku olwa Sabbaato, munaawangayo endiga ento ennume bbiri, ezitannaweza myaka ebiri, era ezitaliiko kamogo. Era munaawangayo kilo bbiri ez'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, okuba ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, era ne mwongerako n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers28:10 Ekyo kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli Sabbaato, ekyongerwa ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers28:11 “Ekiweebwayo ku buli ntandikwa ya mwezi, munaawangayo eri Mukama ekitambiro ekyokebwa nga kiramba: ente envubuka bbiri, n'endiga enkulu ennume emu, endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, era ezitaliiko kamogo." 
Numbers28:12 Olw'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, munaawangayo obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti: kilo ssatu ez'obuwunga obwo olwa buli nte, kilo bbiri olwa buli ndiga enkulu ennume," 
Numbers28:13 ne kilo emu olwa buli ndiga ento ennume. Ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa nga kiramba, kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiwunyira Mukama akawoowo." 
Numbers28:14 N'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, binaabanga lita bbiri ez'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, olwa buli nte ennume, lita emu n'ekitundu, olwa buli ndiga nkulu ennume, ne lita emu, olwa buli ndiga ento. Ekyo kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli mwezi, okumalako omwaka." 
Numbers28:15 Okwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako, munaawangayo eri Mukama embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers28:16 “Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako eneekolerwanga Mukama, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi ogusooka mu mwaka." 
Numbers28:17 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogwo, embaga emala ennaku omusanvu, era eriirwako emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa eneetandikanga." 
Numbers28:18 Ku lunaku lw'embaga eyo olusooka, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Numbers28:19 Munaawangayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ne kyokebwa nga kiramba: ente envubuka bbiri, n'endiga enkulu ennume emu, n'endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, era ezitaliiko kamogo." 
Numbers28:20 Olw'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, munaawangayo olwa buli nte ennume, kilo ssatu ez'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ne kilo bbiri, olw'endiga enkulu ennume," 
Numbers28:21 ne kilo emu, olwa buli ndiga ento, ku ndiga ento omusanvu." 
Numbers28:22 Era munaawangayo embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, okubasabira ekisonyiwo." 
Numbers28:23 Munaawangayo ebyo, okwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba, ekya buli nkya." 
Numbers28:24 Bwe mutyo bwe munaawangayo buli lunaku okumala ennaku omusanvu, ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiwunyira Mukama akawoowo. Munaakiwangayo okwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers28:25 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Numbers28:26 “Ku lunaku olusooka olw'Embaga ey'Amakungula, era eyitibwa Embaga eya Wiiki Omusanvu, nga muwaayo eri Mukama eŋŋaano eyaakakungulwa, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Numbers28:27 Naye munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekiwunyira Mukama akawoowo: ente envubuka bbiri, endiga enkulu ennume emu, n'endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu." 
Numbers28:28 Era olw'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, munaawangayo olwa buli nte ennume kilo ssatu ez'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi era obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ne kilo bbiri olw'endiga enkulu ennume emu," 
Numbers28:29 ne kilo emu olwa buli ndiga ento ennume, ku ndiga ento ennume omusanvu." 
Numbers28:30 Era munaawangayo embuzi ennume emu olw'okubasonyiyisa ebibi. 
Numbers28:31 Munaawangayo ebyo wamu n'ebiweebwayo byabyo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, okwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako. Era mwekkaanyenga nti bye muwaayo, tebiriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:1 “Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogw'omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu. Ku lunaku olwo, munaafuuwanga amakondeere." 
Numbers29:2 Munaawangayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba, kiwunyire Mukama akawoowo: ente ennume envubuka emu, endiga enkulu ennume emu, n'endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:3 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, eky'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti: kilo ssatu olw'ente, kilo bbiri, olw'endiga enkulu ennume," 
Numbers29:4 ne kilo emu, olwa buli ndiga ento, ku ndiga ento ennume omusanvu." 
Numbers29:5 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, okubasabira ekisonyiwo." 
Numbers29:6 Ebyo munaabiwangayo, okwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba eky'olunaku olusooka mu mwezi, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, era n'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, okuli n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, nga bwe byalagirwa. Ebiweebwayo ebyo ebyokebwa biwunyira Mukama akawoowo." 
Numbers29:7 “Ne ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, olw'omwezi ogwo ogw'omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, ne mwebonereza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Numbers29:8 Munaawangayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba, ekiwunya akawoowo: ente envubuka emu, endiga enkulu ennume emu, endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, era nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:9 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, eky'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti: kilo ssatu olw'ente, kilo bbiri olw'endiga enkulu ennume," 
Numbers29:10 ne kilo emu olwa buli ndiga ento, ku ndiga ento ennume omusanvu." 
Numbers29:11 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi, okwongereza ku kiweebwayo olw'ebibi olw'okusaba ekisonyiwo, n'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako.”" 
Numbers29:12 “Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu. Munaakolanga embaga okumala ennaku musanvu, okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa." 
Numbers29:13 Munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ne mukyokya nga kiramba, kiwunyire Mukama akawoowo: ente envubuka kkumi na ssatu, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:14 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekigenderako, eky'obuwunga obw'eŋŋaano obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti: kilo ssatu, olwa buli nte, ku nte ekkumi n'essatu, ne kilo bbiri, olwa buli ndiga, ku ndiga zombi enkulu ennume," 
Numbers29:15 ne kilo emu, olwa buli ndiga, ku ndiga ento ekkumi n'ennya." 
Numbers29:16 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ekyo munaakiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako." 
Numbers29:17 “Ku lunaku olwokubiri, munaawangayo ente envubuka kkumi na bbiri, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:18 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:19 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako." 
Numbers29:20 “Ku lunaku olwokusatu, munaawangayo ente kkumi n'emu, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:21 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:22 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako." 
Numbers29:23 “Ku lunaku olwokuna, munaawangayo ente kkumi, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:24 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:25 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers29:26 “Ku lunaku olwokutaano, munaawangayo ente mwenda, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:27 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:28 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers29:29 “Ku lunaku olw'omukaaga, munaawangayo ente munaana, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:30 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:31 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers29:32 “Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, munaawangayo ente musanvu, endiga enkulu ennume bbiri, n'endiga ento ennume kkumi na nnya ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:33 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:34 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi ennume emu, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers29:35 “Ku lunaku olw'omunaana, munaakuŋŋaananga okusinza, era temuukolenga mulimu na gumu." 
Numbers29:36 Munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ne mukyokya nga kiramba, kiwunyire Mukama akawoowo: ente emu, endiga enkulu ennume emu, n'endiga ento ennume musanvu ez'omwaka ogumu ogumu, nga zonna teziriiko kamogo." 
Numbers29:37 Munaawangayo n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa ebigenderako, olw'ente, olw'endiga enkulu ennume, n'olw'endiga ento ennume, okusinziira ku muwendo gwazo nga bwe gunaabanga, era ne ku tteeka nga bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:38 Era munaawangayo n'embuzi emu ennume, ebe ekiweebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba ekya buli lunaku, wamu n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekyakwo, era n'ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa ekigenderako." 
Numbers29:39 “Ebyo bye munaawangayo eri Mukama ku mbaga zammwe ezaateekebwawo, bibe ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa nga biramba, n'ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke, n'ebiweebwayo eby'ebyokunywa, era ne bye muwaayo olw'okutabagana. Munaabiwangayo, nga mwongereza ku ebyo bye muwaayo okutuukiriza obweyamo bwammwe, ne ku ebyo bye muwaayo nga mweyagalidde.”" 
Numbers29:40 Musa n'ategeeza Abayisirayeli byonna Mukama bye yamulagira. 
Numbers30:1 Musa n'agamba abakulu b'Ebika by'Abayisirayeli nti: “Kino Mukama ky'alagidde. 
Numbers30:2 Omusajja bw'aneeyamanga okubaako ky'awa Mukama, oba bw'anaalayiranga nti amaliridde okubaako kye yeerumyamu, taavenga ku ky'alagaanyizza, wabula anaatuukirizanga ky'ayogedde." 
Numbers30:3 “Omuwala akyali mu maka ga kitaawe bw'aneeyamanga okubaako ky'awa Mukama, oba bw'anaalayiranga nti amaliridde okubaako kye yeerumyamu," 
Numbers30:4 kitaawe n'awulira obweyamo bwa muwala we, oba endagaano ye, n'atabiwakanya, olwo byonna omuwala bye yeeyamye ne by'alagaanyizza okwerumyamu, binaabanga bikakasiddwa." 
Numbers30:5 Naye kitaawe bw'anaamugaananga ku lunaku lw'abiwulirirako, tewaabengawo kikakasibwa ku bweyamo bwe, wadde ku ndagaano gy'akoze okubaako kye yeeyamyemu, era Mukama anaasonyiwanga omuwala oyo, kubanga kitaawe yamugaana." 
Numbers30:6 “Omuwala bw'anaafumbirwanga ng'alina kye yeeyama, nga ataddeyo omwoyo oba nga tataddeeyo mwoyo, oba kye yalagaanya okwerumyamu," 
Numbers30:7 bba bw'anaakiwuliranga n'atakiwakanya ku lunaku lw'akiwulirirako, omuwala oyo kye yeeyama oba kye yalagaanya okwerumyamu, kinaabanga kikakasiddwa." 
Numbers30:8 Naye bba bw'anaamugaananga ku lunaku lw'akiwulirirako, anaamenyangawo ebyo mukazi we bye yeeyama, oba bye yalagaanya nga ataddeyo oba nga tataddeeyo mwoyo. Era Mukama anaasonyiwanga omukazi oyo." 
Numbers30:9 Kyokka nnamwandu oba omukazi eyayawukana ne bba, anaatuukirizanga obweyamo bwe, oba buli kye yalagaanya okwerumyamu." 
Numbers30:10 “Era omukazi bw'anaabangako kye yeeyamira mu bufumbo, oba ky'alagaanya nga alayira," 
Numbers30:11 bba n'akiwulira, n'asirika busirisi n'atamugaana, byonna omukazi oyo bye yeeyama, na buli kye yalagaanya okwerumyamu, binaabanga bikakasiddwa." 
Numbers30:12 Naye bba bw'anaabigaananga ku lunaku lw'abiwulirirako, olwo byonna omukazi oyo bye yayogera eby'obweyamo bwe, oba eby'endagaano gye yakola, tebiikakasibwenga. Bba anaabanga abimenyeewo, era Mukama anaasonyiwanga omukazi oyo." 
Numbers30:13 Buli bweyamo, na buli ndagaano omukazi gy'akola ng'alayira, ey'okubaako kye yeerumyamu, bba ayinza okugikakasa oba okugimenyawo." 
Numbers30:14 Kyokka bwe wanaayitangawo ennaku nga bba talina ky'amugamba, bba oyo anaabanga akakasizza byonna mukazi we bye yeeyama, ne bye yalagaanya, kubanga okuva ku lunaku lwe yabiwulirirako, talina kye yamugamba." 
Numbers30:15 Wabula bw'anaabimenyangawo ng'amaze ennaku ng'abiwulidde, ye anaavunaanibwanga omusango gwa mukazi we ogw'obutabituukiriza.”" 
Numbers30:16 Ago ge mateeka Mukama ge yawa Musa ku bweyamo obw'omukazi alina bba, n'obw'omuwala akyali mu maka ga kitaawe, ng'omuwala oyo tannafumbirwa." 
Numbers31:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers31:2 “Woolera eggwanga ku Bamidiyaani olw'ebyo bye baakola Abayisirayeli. Ng'omaze okukola ekyo, olyoke ofe weegatte ku bajjajjaabo.”" 
Numbers31:3 Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mulonde abasajja mu mmwe, mubawe ebyokulwanyisa, bagende mu lutalo okulwanyisa Abamidiyaani, okubabonereza olw'ebyo bye baakola Mukama." 
Numbers31:4 Mulonde mu buli kika kya Yisirayeli abasajja lukumi, mubatume okutabaala.”" 
Numbers31:5 Awo ne balonda mu nkumi n'enkumi z'Abayisirayeli, abasajja lukumi okuva mu buli kika, ne baweza abasajja omutwalo gumu mu enkumi bbiri, abalina ebyokulwanyisa." 
Numbers31:6 Musa n'atuma abantu abo olukumi okuva mu buli kika, ne bagenda okutabaala, nga bakulemberwa Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari kabona, eyagenda n'ebintu eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'amakondeere ag'okufuuwa." 
Numbers31:7 Ne balumba Midiyaani, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa, ne batta abasajja bonna." 
Numbers31:8 Mu abo abattirwa mu lutalo olwo, mwe mwali ne bakabaka bataano aba Midiyaani: Evi, ne Rekemu, ne Zuuri, ne Huuri, ne Reba. Era mwe battira ne Balamu mutabani wa Beyori." 
Numbers31:9 Abayisirayeli ne banyaga abakazi Abamidiyaani n'abaana abato ab'Abamidiyaani, n'amagana gaabwe gonna ag'ente, n'ag'endiga n'embuzi, n'ebintu byabwe byonna, ne babitwala." 
Numbers31:10 Ne bookya ebibuga byonna Abamidiyaani bye baabeerangamu, era n'ensiisira zaabwe zonna." 
Numbers31:11 Ne batwala omunyago gwonna gwe baafuna, omwali abantu n'ensolo," 
Numbers31:12 ne baguleeta eri Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, n'eri ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli, ekyali mu lusiisira, mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, ku Yorudaani okumpi ne Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Awo Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, n'abakulembeze abalala ab'ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli, ne bagenda okusisinkana abaserikale, ebweru w'olusiisira." 
Numbers31:14 Musa n'asunguwalira abakulu mu ggye abaakulira olukumi lukumi, n'abaakulira ekikumi kikumi, abaali bavudde mu lutabaalo." 
Numbers31:15 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Abakazi bonna mubalese nga balamu? 
Numbers31:16 Mujjukire nga baali bakazi abo mu mitawaana gye Pewori, abaagoberera amagezi ga Balamu, ne basendasenda Abayisirayeli obutaba beesigwa eri Mukama, bw'atyo kawumpuli n'ajja mu bantu ba Mukama." 
Numbers31:17 Kale kaakano mutte buli mwana ow'obulenzi, era mutte buli mukazi eyali yeegasseeko n'omusajja." 
Numbers31:18 Naye abawala abato bonna abakyali embeerera, mubeesigalize." 
Numbers31:19 Era mmwe musigale ebweru w'olusiisira okumala ennaku musanvu. Buli eyatta omuntu, na buli eyakoona ku mulambo, mmwe mwenna n'abawambe bammwe, mwetukuze ku lunaku olwokusatu, ne ku lunaku olw'omusanvu." 
Numbers31:20 Era mutukuze buli kyambalo, na buli kintu eky'eddiba, n'ebintu byonna ebyakolebwa mu byoya by'embuzi, era n'ebintu byonna eby'emiti.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleyazaari kabona n'agamba abaserikale abaava mu lutalo nti: “Bino bye biragiro Mukama bye yawadde Musa: 
Numbers31:22 ‘Zaabu ne ffeeza, ekikomo, ekyuma, ebbaati, n'ekyuma ekizito," 
Numbers31:23 buli kintu ekiyinza okugumira omuliro, munaakiyisa mu muliro, ne kiryoka kiba ekirongoofu, naye era ne kitukuzibwa ne mu mazzi ag'okwetukuza. N'ebyo byonna ebitayinza kugumira muliro, munaabitukuza nga mubiyisa mu mazzi." 
Numbers31:24 Era munaayoza ebyambalo byammwe ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, ne muba balongoofu, olwo ne mulyoka muyingira mu lusiisira.’ ”" 
Numbers31:25 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers31:26 “Ggwe ne Eleyazaari kabona, n'abakulembeze b'ekibiina ky'abantu, mubale ebintu byonna ebyanyagiddwa, wamu n'abantu, era n'ensolo." 
Numbers31:27 Omunyago mugwawulemu ebitundu bibiri ebyenkanankana: ekitundu ekimu, mukiwe abaserikale abaalwana olutalo, ekitundu ekirala, mukiwe ekibiina ky'abantu abalala bonna abasigaddewo." 
Numbers31:28 Ku mugabo gw'abaserikale abaalwana olutalo, onoosoloolezaako Mukama omusolo: omuntu omu ku buli bawambe ebikumi bitaano. Era onookola bw'otyo ne ku nte, ne ku ndogoyi, ne ku mbuzi n'endiga." 
Numbers31:29 Omusolo ogwo, oguggye ku mugabo gwabwe, oguwe Eleyazaari kabona, gube ekiweebwayo ekiwongerwa Mukama, ne kiba kikye mu ngeri eyenjawulo." 
Numbers31:30 Ne ku mugabo ogw'Abayisirayeli abalala bonna, onoosoloozaako omuntu omu, ku buli bawambe makumi ataano, era onookola bw'otyo ne ku nte, ne ku ndogoyi, ne ku mbuzi n'endiga, ne ku nsolo endala zonna, obiwe Abaleevi abalabirira Eweema ya Mukama.”" 
Numbers31:31 Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, ne bakola nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers31:32 Ebintu ebyasigalawo ne biba omunyago abaserikale gwe baanyaga, byali endiga emitwalo nkaaga mu musanvu mu enkumi ttaano," 
Numbers31:33 n'ente emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi bbiri," 
Numbers31:34 n'endogoyi emitwalo mukaaga mu lukumi," 
Numbers31:35 n'abawala embeerera emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri. 
Numbers31:36 Ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri ekyagabanibwa abo abaatabaala, kyali bwe kiti: endiga zaali emitwalo amakumi asatu mu esatu, mu kasanvu mu bitaano." 
Numbers31:37 Okwo ne kuggyibwako omusolo gwa Mukama, endiga lukaaga mu nsanvu mu ttaano." 
Numbers31:38 Ente zaali emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga, okwaggyibwa omusolo gwa Mukama, ente nsanvu mu bbiri." 
Numbers31:39 Endogoyi zaali emitwalo esatu mu bitaano, ne kuggyibwako omusolo gwa Mukama, endogoyi nkaaga mu emu." 
Numbers31:40 N'abantu baali omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga, okwaggyibwa omusolo gwa Mukama abantu asatu mu babiri." 
Numbers31:41 Musa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira: n'awa Eleyazaari kabona omusolo ogwo gwonna, ne guba ekiweebwayo ekiwongerwa Mukama, ne kiba kikye mu ngeri eyenjawulo." 
Numbers31:42 Ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri Musa kye yayawula ku ky'abasajja abaatabaala ne kiba eky'Abayisirayeli abalala bonna," 
Numbers31:43 kyali bwe kiti: endiga zaali emitwalo asatu mu esatu mu kasanvu mu bitaano. 
Numbers31:44 Ente zaali emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga," 
Numbers31:45 endogoyi emitwalo esatu mu bitaano," 
Numbers31:46 n'abantu omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga. 
Numbers31:47 Ku kitundu ekyo ekyaweebwa Abayisirayeli, Musa n'aggyako omuntu omu omu ku buli bantu makumi ataano, n'ensolo emu emu ku buli nsolo amakumi ataano, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira, n'abiwa Abaleevi abaalabiriranga Eweema ya Mukama." 
Numbers31:48 Awo abakulembeze mu ggye, abaakulira olukumi lukumi, n'abaakulira ekikumi kikumi, ne bajja eri Musa," 
Numbers31:49 ne bamugamba nti: “Ffe abaweereza bo, tubaze abaserikale be twakulembera, ne kutabulako n'omu." 
Numbers31:50 Kale tuleese ku by'okwewoomya ebya zaabu buli omu by'afunye: emikuufu, obunyere, empeta ez'oku ngalo n'ez'oku matu, n'ebikomo. Tubitonera Mukama, nga twesabira ekisonyiwo gy'ali.”" 
Numbers31:51 Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, ne babaggyako zaabu oyo yenna, eyali akoleddwamu eby'okwewoomya." 
Numbers31:52 Zaabu yenna gwe baggya ku bakulembeze b'enkumi n'ab'ebikumi mu ggye, ow'ekiweebwayo ekitonerwa Mukama, ne kiba kikye mu ngeri eyenjawulo, zaabu oyo yaweza kilo nga ebikumi bibiri." 
Numbers31:53 Abaserikale baali beenyagidde ebintu, buli omu ebibye." 
Numbers31:54 Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, ne batwala zaabu gwe baggye ku bakulembeze b'enkumi n'ab'ebikumi mu ggye, ne bamuteeka mu Weema Ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, zaabu oyo abe ekijjukizo ky'Abayisirayeli mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Numbers32:1 Ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, baalina ensolo nnyingi nnyo nnyini. Kale ab'ebika ebyo byombi bwe baalaba ensi y'e Yazeri n'ey'e Gileyaadi, nga nnungi okulundiramu ensolo," 
Numbers32:2 ne bajja ne bagamba Musa ne Eleyazaari kabona, n'abakulembeze abalala ab'Abayisirayeli nti:" 
Numbers32:3 “Atarooti, ne Diboni, ne Yazeri, ne Nimira, ne Hesubooni, ne Eleyaale, ne Sebamu, ne Nebo, ne Bewoni," 
Numbers32:4 ensi Mukama gye yawangula ng'Abayisirayeli bonna balaba, nsi nnungi okulundiramu ensolo, ate naffe abaweereza bo tuli balunzi ba nsolo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Awo ne bagamba nti: “Tukusaba okkirize, ensi eno etuweebwe ffe abaweereza bo, ebe obutaka bwaffe. Totusomosa Mugga Yorudaani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Musa n'agamba ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni nti: “Baganda bammwe banaagenda okutabaala nga mmwe musigadde wano?" 
Numbers32:7 Lwaki mwagala okuterebula Abayisirayeli okusomoka okuyingira ensi Mukama gye yabawa? 
Numbers32:8 Ekyo bakitammwe nabo kye baakola, bwe nabatuma okuva e Kadesi - Baruneya okuketta ensi." 
Numbers32:9 Baagenda ne batuuka mu Kiwonvu eky'Ekirimba, ne balaba ensi, ne baterebula Abayisirayeli, baleme kuyingira nsi Mukama gye yabawa." 
Numbers32:10 Mukama n'asunguwala nnyo ku lunaku olwo, n'alayira ng'agamba nti:" 
Numbers32:11 ‘Mazima tewaliba n'omu ku basajja abaava e Misiri, awezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, aliyingira nsi gye nalayirira Aburahamu, ne Yisaaka, ne Yakobo, kubanga tebanneesiga," 
Numbers32:12 okuggyako Kalebu, mutabani wa Yefunne Omukenizi, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni. Abo be banneesize Nze Mukama.’" 
Numbers32:13 Mukama n'asunguwalira nnyo Abayisirayeli, n'ababungeeseza mu ddungu okumala emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa ab'ezzadde eryo lyonna abaakola ebibi, lwe baafa ne baggwaawo." 
Numbers32:14 Kale kaakano mmwe muzze mu kifo kya bakitammwe, olulyo lw'abakozi b'ebibi, okwongera okuleetera Mukama okusunguwalira Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers32:15 Mmwe bwe munaakyuka ne mumuvaako, ajja kuddamu okuleka abantu bano bonna mu ddungu, mubaleetere okuzikirizibwa.”" 
Numbers32:16 Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni ne basemberera Musa, ne bamugamba nti: “Ka tusooke tuzimbire ensolo zaffe ebisibo, n'abaana baffe abato ebibuga." 
Numbers32:17 Olwo tunaaba beetegefu okukwata ebyokulwanyisa tukulemberemu Bayisirayeli bannaffe, okutuusa lwe tulibatuusa mu kitundu ky'ensi ekyabwe, abaana baffe basigale mu bibuga ebiriko ebigo ebigumu, olw'okwerinda abantu ababeera mu nsi eno." 
Numbers32:18 Tetulikomawo mu maka gaffe, okutuusa nga buli Muyisirayeli munnaffe, amaze okufuna obutaka bwe." 
Numbers32:19 Tetuligabana wamu nabo ttaka, ku ludda luli olwa Yorudaani n'okweyongerayo, kubanga omugabo ogwaffe tugufunye ku ludda luno, olw'ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Singa ddala munaakola ekyo, ne mukwata ebyokulwanyisa, ne mugenda okutabaala nga mukulembeddemu Mukama," 
Numbers32:21 era mwenna abalina ebyokulwanyisa, bwe munaasomoka Omugga Yorudaani nga mukulembeddemu Mukama, okutuusa lw'alimala okuwangula abalabe be b'ayolekedde," 
Numbers32:22 ne yeefuga ensi eyo, olwo mulisobola okudda, ne mutabaako kye muvunaanibwa Mukama ne Bayisirayeli bannammwe. Era Mukama alikakasa ensi eno okuba obutaka bwammwe." 
Numbers32:23 Naye bwe mutaakole bwe mutyo, mbalabula nti munaaba mukoze ekibi ne munyiiza Mukama, era mumanye nga mulibonerezebwa olw'ebibi byammwe." 
Numbers32:24 Kale muzimbire abaana bammwe abato ebibuga, n'endiga zammwe ebisibo, era mutuukirize kye mwetemye okukola.”" 
Numbers32:25 Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, ne bagamba Musa nti: “Ssebo, tunaakola nga bw'olagidde." 
Numbers32:26 Abaana baffe abato ne bakazi baffe banaasigala eno mu bibuga by'e Gileyaadi, awamu n'amagana gaffe ag'endiga n'embuzi, n'ag'ente." 
Numbers32:27 Naye ffe abaweereza bo, tujja kusomoka Omugga Yorudaani, nga buli omu ku ffe alina ebyokulwanyisa, tulwane olutalo nga tuduumirwa Mukama, nga ggwe ssebo bw'oyogedde.”" 
Numbers32:28 Awo Musa ebikwata ku bo n'abiragira Eleyazaari kabona ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, n'abakulembeze abalala abakulu b'Ebika by'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers32:29 Musa n'abagamba nti: “Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, bwe balisomoka Omugga Yorudaani nga beetegese okugenda okutabaala nga baduumirwa Mukama, ne musobola okuwangula ensi eyo, kale mulibawa ensi y'e Gileyaadi okuba obutaka bwabwe." 
Numbers32:30 Naye bwe batalisomoka nga beetegese okugenda okutabaala, olwo obutaka bwabwe balibufuna wamu nammwe mu nsi y'e Kanaani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, ne baddamu nti: “Nga Mukama bw'atulagidde ffe abaweereza bo, bwe tutyo bwe tunaakola." 
Numbers32:32 Tunaasomoka Omugga Yorudaani nga tuduumirwa Mukama, ne tuyingira ensi y'e Kanaani, nga twetegese okutabaala, tulyoke tufune obutaka bwaffe ku ludda luno olwa Yorudaani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Awo Musa n'awa ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ab'Ekika kya Manasse mutabani wa Yosefu, ensi eyo yonna obwali obwakabaka bwa Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, n'obwali obwakabaka bwa Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, n'ebibuga byamu, n'ebitundu byonna ebibyetoolodde." 
Numbers32:34 Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi ne bazimba ebibuga Diboni, Atarooti, Aroweri," 
Numbers32:35 Atarooti-Soofaani, Yazeri, Yogubeha;" 
Numbers32:36 ne Beeti-Nimira, ne Beeti-Harani, ebibuga ebiriko ebigo ebigumu. Ne bazimba n'ebisibo by'endiga." 
Numbers32:37 Ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni ne bazimba ebibuga Hesubooni, ne Eleyaale, ne Kiriyatayiimu," 
Numbers32:38 ne Nebo, ne Baali-Miyoni nga bakyusizza amannya gaabyo. Ne bazimba ne Sibuma. Ebibuga ebyo bye baazimba, ne babituuma amannya amalala." 
Numbers32:39 Ab'olulyo lwa Makiri mutabani wa Manasse, ne bagenda ne balumba ensi y'e Gileyaadi, ne bagyefuga nga bagobyemu Abaamori abaagirimu." 
Numbers32:40 Bw'atyo Musa n'awa ab'olulyo lwa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, ensi y'e Gileyaadi, ne babeera omwo." 
Numbers32:41 Yayiri ow'omu Kika kya Manasse n'alumba era n'awamba ebimu ku byalo by'Abaamori n'abituuma “Ebyalo bya Yayiri.” 
Numbers32:42 Nooba n'alumba era n'awamba Kenaati n'ebyalo byakyo, n'akituuma Nooba, erinnya lye." 
Numbers33:1 Bino bye bifo Abayisirayeli bye baasiisiramu nga bali mu bibinja byabwe, bwe baava mu nsi y'e Misiri nga bakulemberwa Musa ne Arooni." 
Numbers33:2 Musa yawandiikanga, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira, ebifo bye baavangamu okweyongerayo mu lugendo lwabwe. Bino bye bifo nga bwe baavanga mu kimu okutuuka mu kirala." 
Numbers33:3 Abayisirayeli baasitula okuva e Rameseesi eky'e Misiri, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano olw'omwezi ogusooka, lwe lunaku olwaddirira Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, ne bagendera mu kitiibwa, nga Abamisiri bonna balaba." 
Numbers33:4 Abamisiri baali bakyaziika abaggulanda baabwe bonna, Mukama be yatta mu bo, n'alaga bw'ali ow'obuyinza okusinga balubaale baabwe." 
Numbers33:5 Abayisirayeli bwe baava e Rameseesi, baasiisira e Sukkoti." 
Numbers33:6 Bwe baava e Sukkoti, ne basiisira mu Etamu, ku mabbali g'eddungu." 
Numbers33:7 Bwe baava mu Etamu, ne baddayo emabega, ne bagenda e Pihahirooti, ebuvanjuba bwa Baali - Zefoni, ne basiisira okumpi ne Migidooli." 
Numbers33:8 Bwe baava e Pihahirooti, ne bayita mu Nnyanja Emmyufu wakati, ne bayingira eddungu. Ne batambula olugendo lwa nnaku ssatu mu Ddungu ery'e Etamu, ne basiisira e Maara." 
Numbers33:9 Ne basitula okuva e Maara, ne batuuka mu Elimu. Mu kifo ekyo, waaliwo enzizi z'amazzi kkumi na bbiri, n'enkindu nsanvu. Ne basiisira awo." 
Numbers33:10 Bwe baava mu Elimu, ne basiisira ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Emmyufu." 
Numbers33:11 Nga bavudde ku Nnyanja Emmyufu, ne basiisira mu Ddungu ly'e Siini." 
Numbers33:12 Bwe baava mu Ddungu ly'e Siini, ne basiisira e Dofuka." 
Numbers33:13 Ne basitula okuva e Dofuka, ne basiisira mu Aluusi." 
Numbers33:14 Bwe baava mu Aluusi, ne basiisira e Refidiimu, awataali mazzi bantu ge bayinza kunywa." 
Numbers33:15 Ne basitula okuva e Refidiimu, ne basiisira mu ddungu ly'e Sinaayi." 
Numbers33:16 Bwe baasitula okuva mu Ddungu ly'e Sinaayi, ne basiisira e Kiburooti-Hattaava." 
Numbers33:17 Ne bava e Kiburooti-Hattaava, ne basiisira e Hazerooti." 
Numbers33:18 Ne bava e Hazerooti, ne basiisira e Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Bwe baava e Ritima, ne basiisira e Rimmoni-Pereezi." 
Numbers33:20 Bwe baava e Rimmoni-Pereezi, ne basiisira e Libuna." 
Numbers33:21 Ne basitula okuva e Libuna, ne basiisira e Rissa." 
Numbers33:22 Bwe baava e Rissa, ne basiisira e Kehelaata." 
Numbers33:23 Ne bava e Kehelaata, ne basiisira ku Lusozi Saaferi." 
Numbers33:24 Bwe baava ku Lusozi Saaferi, ne basiisira e Haraada." 
Numbers33:25 Ne basitula okuva e Haraada, ne basiisira e Makelooti." 
Numbers33:26 Bwe baava e Makelooti, ne basiisira e Taahati." 
Numbers33:27 Ne bava e Taahati, ne basiisira e Taara." 
Numbers33:28 Ne bava e Taara, ne basiisira e Mituka." 
Numbers33:29 Ne bava e Mituka, ne basiisira e Hasimoona." 
Numbers33:30 Bwe baava e Hasimoona, ne basiisira e Moserooti." 
Numbers33:31 Bwe baava e Moserooti, ne basiisira e Bene-Yaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Ne bava e Bene-Yaakani, ne basiisira e Hoori-Hagidigaadi." 
Numbers33:33 Ne bava e Hoori-Hagidigaadi, ne basiisira e Yotubata." 
Numbers33:34 Bwe baava e Yotubata, ne basiisira mu Abiroona." 
Numbers33:35 Ne bava mu Abiroona, ne basiisira mu Eziyoni-Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Ne basitula okuva mu Eziyoni-Geberi, ne basiisira mu Ddungu ly'e Ziini, ye Kadesi." 
Numbers33:37 Bwe baasitula okuva e Kadesi, ne basiisira ku Lusozi Hoori, ku njegoyego z'ensi ya Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Awo Arooni kabona, n'ayambuka ku Lusozi Hoori, nga Mukama bwe yalagira, n'afiira eyo, ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwokutaano ogw'omwaka ogw'amakumi ana, okuva Abayisirayeli lwe baava mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Numbers33:39 Arooni we yafiira ku Lusozi Hoori, yali awangadde emyaka kikumi mu abiri mu esatu." 
Numbers33:40 Kabaka w'e Kanaani eyabeeranga mu Aradi mu bukiikaddyo bw'ensi eyo Kanaani, n'awulira nti Abayisirayeli bajja." 
Numbers33:41 Abayisirayeli bwe baasitula okuva ku Lusozi Hoori, ne basiisira e Zalumona." 
Numbers33:42 Bwe baava e Zalumona ne basiisira e Punooni. 
Numbers33:43 Bwe baava e Punooni ne basiisira mu Obooti. 
Numbers33:44 Ne bava mu Obooti ne basiisira mu Yiye-Abariimu, mu nsi ya Mowaabu." 
Numbers33:45 Bwe baava e Yiyiimu, ne basiisira e Diboni-Gaadi." 
Numbers33:46 Ne bava e Diboni-Gaadi, ne basiisira mu Alumooni-Dibulatayimu." 
Numbers33:47 Bwe baava mu Alumooni-Dibulatayimu, ne basiisira mu nsozi z'e Abariimu, okwolekera Olusozi Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Bwe baasitula ne bava mu nsozi z'e Abariimu, ne basiisira mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, ku Mugga Yorudaani, okwolekera Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Ne basiisira ku Mugga Yorudaani, okuva e Beti-Yesimooti okutuukira ddala mu Abeeli-Sittimu, mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu." 
Numbers33:50 Eyo mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, ku Mugga Yorudaani, okwolekera Yeriko, Mukama n'agamba Musa nti:" 
Numbers33:51 “Yogera n'Abayisirayeli obagambe nti: ‘Bwe mulisomoka Omugga Yorudaani ne muyingira ensi y'e Kanaani," 
Numbers33:52 muligobamu abatuuze baamu be mulisangamu, ne muzikiriza ebifaananyi byabwe byonna ebyole mu mayinja, n'ebiweeseddwa, era mulisaanyawo n'ebifo byabwe mwe basinziza balubaale baabwe." 
Numbers33:53 Mulyefuga ensi eyo, ne mugibeeramu, kubanga ngibawadde mmwe ebe yammwe." 
Numbers33:54 Muligigabana mu bika byammwe ne mu nnyumba za bajjajjammwe, nga mukuba kalulu, abangi nga mubawa ekitundu ky'ensi kinene, n'abatono ne mubawa kitono. Buli muntu akalulu we kalimuwa, we waliba awawe, ng'agabanira mu kika kye." 
Numbers33:55 Naye bwe mutaligobamu batuuze be mulisanga mu nsi eyo, abo be mulirekamu, balibafuukira ebisubi ebibagwa mu maaso, n'amaggwa agabafumita mu mbiriizi, era banaabatawanyanga mu nsi eyo gye mulibeeramu." 
Numbers33:56 Bwe mutalibagobamu, olwo nammwe ndibazikiriza nga bwe nalowooza okuzikiriza bo.’ ”" 
Numbers34:1 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers34:2 alagire Abayisirayeli abagambe nti: “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi y'e Kanaani, eyo y'ensi eriba obutaka bwammwe, ensalo zaayo zonna ziriba bwe ziti:" 
Numbers34:3 ensalo yammwe ey'omu bukiikaddyo eriva ku ddungu ly'e Ziini, n'eyita ku nsalo ya Edomu. Ebuvanjuba, ensalo yammwe eyo ey'ebukiikaddyo, eritandikira ku nkomerero y'Ennyanja ey'Omunnyo." 
Numbers34:4 Ensalo yammwe erikyukira ebukiikaddyo okwolekera ekkubo eryambuka ku Akirabbiimu, ne yeeyongerayo n'etuuka e Ziini, n'etuukira ddala e Kadesi-Baruneya, mu bukiikaddyo. Olwo erikyukira e Hazari-Addari, ne yeeyongerayo mu Azimooni." 
Numbers34:5 Ensalo erikyuka okuva mu Azimooni, n'eyolekera Akagga k'e Misiri, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati." 
Numbers34:6 “Ensalo yammwe ey'ebugwanjuba, eriba Ennyanja Eyaawakati." 
Numbers34:7 “Mulyerambira ensalo yammwe ey'ebukiikakkono, okuva ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati okutuuka ku Lusozi Hoori." 
Numbers34:8 Okuva ku Lusozi Hoori, muliramba okutuuka awayingirirwa e Hamati, okukoma ku Zedadi." 
Numbers34:9 Awo ensalo w'eriva n'etuuka e Zefirooni, n'ekoma e Hazari-Enaani. Eyo ye eriba ensalo yammwe ey'ebukiikakkono." 
Numbers34:10 “Era muliramba ensalo yammwe ey'ebuvanjuba, okuva ku Hazari-Enaani, okutuuka ku Sefamu." 
Numbers34:11 Ensalo eyo eriva ku Sefamu n'ekka e Ribula, ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba bwa Ayiini, n'ekkirira okutuuka ku lubalama olw'ebuvanjuba olw'ennyanja y'e Kinnereti." 
Numbers34:12 Ensalo eryeyongera okukka, n'etuuka ku Mugga Yorudaani, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Ey'Omunnyo. “Eyo ye eriba ensi yammwe n'ensalo zaayo ez'oku njuyi zonna.”" 
Numbers34:13 Musa n'alagira Abayisirayeli ng'agamba nti: “Eyo ye nsi gye muligabana nga mukuba akalulu, Mukama gy'alagidde okuwa ebika omwenda n'ekitundu," 
Numbers34:14 kubanga ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ab'Ekika kya Manasse, baamala dda okuweebwa obutaka obwabwe, nga bubaweebwa okusinziira ku nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers34:15 Ebika ebyo ebibiri n'ekitundu, byamala dda okuweebwa obutaka obwabyo emitala wa Yorudaani, ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, okwolekera Yeriko.”" 
Numbers34:16 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: 
Numbers34:17 “Gano ge mannya g'abantu abalibagabanyizaamu ensi eriba obutaka: Eleyazaari kabona, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni." 
Numbers34:18 Era mulitwala omukulembeze omu okuva mu buli kika, okugabanyaamu ensi." 
Numbers34:19 Gano ge mannya g'abantu abo: Mu Kika kya Yuda, Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne;" 
Numbers34:20 mu Kika kya Simyoni, Semweli mutabani wa Ammihudi;" 
Numbers34:21 mu Kika kya Benyamiini, Elidaadi mutabani wa Kisulooni;" 
Numbers34:22 mu Kika kya Daani, Bukki omufuzi, mutabani wa Yoguli;" 
Numbers34:23 mu b'olulyo lwa Yosefu, mu Kika kya Manasse, Hanniyeeli mutabani wa Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 mu Kika kya Efurayimu, Kamweli omufuzi, mutabani wa Sifutaani;" 
Numbers34:25 mu Kika kya Zebbulooni, Elizafani omufuzi, mutabani wa Parunaaki;" 
Numbers34:26 mu Kika kya Yissakaari, Pawulutiyeeli omufuzi, mutabani wa Azzaani;" 
Numbers34:27 mu Kika kya Aseri, Ahihudi omufuzi, mutabani wa Selomi." 
Numbers34:28 Mu Kika kya Nafutaali, Pedaheeli omufuzi, mutabani wa Ammihudi.”" 
Numbers34:29 Abo be bantu Mukama be yalagira okugabanyizaamu Abayisirayeli obutaka mu nsi y'e Kanaani. 
Numbers35:1 Mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu ku Yorudaani okwolekera Yeriko, Mukama gye yagambira Musa nti:" 
Numbers35:2 “Lagira Abayisirayeli, bawe Abaleevi ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu, nga batoola ku ebyo Abayisirayeli abo bye baagabana okuba obutaka bwabwe, era babawe n'ettaka eryetoolodde ebibuga ebyo." 
Numbers35:3 Ebibuga ebyo binaabanga bya Baleevi babibeerengamu. N'ettale lyakwo linaabanga lyabwe okulundirangamu amagana gaabwe ag'ente, n'ag'endiga n'embuzi, n'ensolo zaabwe endala zonna." 
Numbers35:4 “Ettale eryetoolodde ebibuga bye muliwa Abaleevi, liriba lya mita ebikumi bina mu ataano okuva ku kisenge ky'ekibuga, okwetooloola enjuyi zonna." 
Numbers35:5 Era muligera ebweru w'ekibuga mita lwenda ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, ne mita lwenda ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, mita lwenda ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, mita lwenda ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono ekibuga nga kye kiri wakati. Eryo lye liriba ettale ery'okulundiramu, eryetoolodde ebibuga byabwe." 
Numbers35:6 “Ebibuga mukaaga ku ebyo bye muliwa Abaleevi, biriba bibuga bya buddukiro ebiyinza okuddukirwangamu buli anaabanga asse omuntu nga tagenderedde. Ku ebyo, mulibongerako ebibuga ebirala amakumi ana mu bibiri." 
Numbers35:7 Ebibuga byonna bye muliwa Abaleevi, biriba amakumi ana mu munaana, nga biriko ettale lyakwo." 
Numbers35:8 Ebibuga bye muliggya ku butaka bw'Abayisirayeli okubigaba, abangi mulibaggyako bingi, n'abatono mulibaggyako bitono. Buli kika kiriwa Abaleevi ebibuga, okusinziira ku bungi bw'ebibuga bye kyagabana.”" 
Numbers35:9 Mukama n'agamba Musa 
Numbers35:10 ayogere n'Abayisirayeli abagambe nti: “Bwe mulisomoka Omugga Yorudaani ne muyingira ensi y'e Kanaani," 
Numbers35:11 mulyerondera ebibuga eby'obuddukiro ebiyinza okuddukirwangamu buli anaabanga asse omuntu nga tagenderedde. 
Numbers35:12 Ebibuga ebyo bye munaddukirangamu okuwona omuwoolezi w'eggwanga, buli anaabanga asse omuntu alemenga kuttibwa nga tannawozesebwa mu lujjudde lw'abantu." 
Numbers35:13 Ebibuga bye muliwaayo okuba eby'obuddukiro, biriba mukaaga." 
Numbers35:14 Muliwaayo ebibuga bisatu ku ludda luno olwa Yorudaani, n'ebirala bisatu mu nsi y'e Kanaani, bibenga bibuga bya buddukiro." 
Numbers35:15 Ebibuga ebyo omukaaga, binaabanga bya buddukiro bwa Bayisirayeli, n'omugwira azze obugenyi, n'oyo abeerera ddala mu bo. Buli anattanga omuntu nga tagenderedde, anaayinzanga okuddukira mu kimu ku byo." 
Numbers35:16 “Naye oyo anaakubisanga omuntu ekyuma n'amutta, oyo mutemu, era omutemu oyo, taalemenga kuttibwa." 
Numbers35:17 Era oyo anaakwatanga ekissi eky'ejjinja n'akikubisa omuntu, omuntu oyo n'afa, oyo akoze ekyo mutemu, era omutemu oyo, taalemenga kuttibwa." 
Numbers35:18 Era oyo anaakwatanga ekissi eky'omuti n'akikubisa omuntu, omuntu oyo n'afa, oyo akoze ekyo mutemu, era omutemu oyo, taalemenga kuttibwa." 
Numbers35:19 Owooluganda olw'okumpi olw'omuntu attiddwa, yennyini ye anattanga omutemu oyo. Bw'anaamusisinkananga, anaamuttanga." 
Numbers35:20 “Singa oli akyawa omuntu n'amusindika n'agwa, oba singa amwekwekerera n'amukasuukirira ekintu, omuntu oyo n'afa," 
Numbers35:21 oba singa amukuba oluyi, oba ekikonde, olw'obulabe, omuntu oyo n'afa, oyo amukubye, mutemu, era taalemenga kuttibwa. Owooluganda olw'okumpi olw'omuntu oyo attiddwa, anattanga omutemu oyo ng'amusisinkanye." 
Numbers35:22 “Naye bw'aba nga yamusindika mu butanwa, awatali bulabe, n'agwa, oba nga yabaako ky'amukasuukirira nga tamuteeze," 
Numbers35:23 era oba nga yaddira ejjinja eriyinza okutta omuntu, n'alimusuulako nga tamulabye, omuntu oyo n'afa, sso nga tabangako mulabe we, era nga teyagenderera kumukolako kabi," 
Numbers35:24 kale ekibiina ky'abantu kinaasalangawo mu lujjudde, wakati w'oyo eyakuba, n'owooluganda olw'okumpi olw'omufu, nga bagoberera amateeka gano." 
Numbers35:25 Ekibiina ky'abantu kinaawonyanga oyo eyatta nga tagenderedde, ne kimuggya mu mikono gy'owooluganda awoolera eggwanga olw'omufu, ne kimuzzaayo mu kibuga eky'obuddukiro kye yali addukiddemu, n'abeera omwo, okutuusa Ssaabakabona aliko lw'anaafanga." 
Numbers35:26 Naye eyatta omuntu bw'anaavanga mu kibuga eky'obuddukiro kye yaddukiramu," 
Numbers35:27 owooluganda omuwoolezi w'eggwanga n'amusanga ebweru waakyo, n'amutta, oyo amusse taabengako musango gwa butemu," 
Numbers35:28 kubanga oyo eyatta omuntu, yandibadde abeerera ddala mu kibuga ekyo eky'obuddukiro kye yaddukiramu, okutuusa nga Ssaabakabona amaze okufa. Ssaabakabona ng'amaze okufa, olwo eyatta omuntu anaddangayo ku butaka bwe." 
Numbers35:29 Ago ge ganaabanga amateeka ge munaakuumanga mmwe, n'abalibaddirira bonna, buli we munaabeeranga." 
Numbers35:30 “Anaabanga asse omuntu, anattibwanga nga waliwo abajulizi waakiri babiri abamulumiriza ogw'obutemu. Bwe wanaabangawo omujulizi omu yekka amulumiriza, omuntu oyo tattibwenga." 
Numbers35:31 Temukkirizenga kintu na kimu kusasulwa olw'okununula obulamu bw'omutemu asaliddwa ogw'okufa, wabula taalemenga kuttibwa." 
Numbers35:32 Era oyo eyaddukira mu kibuga eky'obuddukiro, temuumukkirizenga kubaako ky'asasula asobole okudda ewaabwe, nga Ssaabakabona tannafa." 
Numbers35:33 Bwe mulikola ekyo, muliba mwonoonye ensi gye mubeeramu, kubanga obutemu bwonoona ensi. Tewali kiyinza kufunira nsi kisonyiwo olw'obutemu obwakolebwa mu yo, okuggyako okutta oyo eyatemula." 
Numbers35:34 Kale temwonoonanga nsi gye mubeeramu, era nange gye mbeeramu, kubanga Nze Mukama, mbeera wamu n'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Awo abakulu b'ennyumba mu lulyo lw'abo abasibuka mu Gileyaadi, mutabani wa Makiri era muzzukulu wa Manasse, omu ku batabani ba Yosefu, ne bajja eri Musa n'abakulembeze abalala ab'Abayisirayeli." 
Numbers36:2 Ne bagamba nti: “Ssebo, Mukama yakulagira okugabira Abayisirayeli ensi okuba obutaka bwabwe obw'ensikirano ng'okuba kalulu. Mukama era yakulagira, obutaka obw'ensikirano obwa muganda waffe Zelofehaadi okubuwa bawala be." 
Numbers36:3 Bwe balifumbirwa abasajja ab'ebika ebirala eby'Abayisirayeli, obutaka bwabwe obw'ensikirano buliggyibwa ku butaka obw'ensikirano obwaweebwa bakitaffe, ne bugattibwa ku butaka obw'ensikirano obw'ebika ebirala bye balifumbirwamu, ekyo ne kikendeeza ku butaka bwaffe obw'ensikirano." 
Numbers36:4 Omwaka gw'okujaguza ogw'Abayisirayeli bwe gulituuka, kale obutaka obw'ensikirano obwa bawala ba Zelofehaadi buligattirwa ddala ku butaka obw'ensikirano obw'ekika mwe baliba bafumbiddwa, bwe butyo ne buggyibwa ku butaka obw'ensikirano obw'ekika kyaffe.”" 
Numbers36:5 Awo Musa n'alagira Abayisirayeli nga Mukama bwe yamugamba. N'agamba nti: “Ab'Ekika kya mutabani wa Yosefu kye bagamba kituufu. 
Numbers36:6 Kale kino Mukama ky'alagidde ku bawala ba Zelofehaadi. Agambye nti: ‘Ba ddembe okufumbirwa gwe basiimye, naye bafumbirwe ba mu kika kya kitaabwe.’" 
Numbers36:7 Tewaabenga butaka bwa nsikirano mu Bayisirayeli, obunaakyukanga okuggyibwa mu kika ekimu ne buzzibwa mu kirala. Buli Muyisirayeli anaakuumanga obutaka obw'ensikirano obw'ekika kya kitaawe." 
Numbers36:8 Buli muwala anaafunanga obutaka obw'ensikirano mu kika eky'Abayisirayeli, anaafumbirwanga musajja wa mu kika ekyo, buli Muyisirayeli alyoke asobolenga okufuna obusika obw'ensikirano obwa bajjajjaabe." 
Numbers36:9 Bwe kityo tewaabenga busika bwa nsikirano bukyuka kuggyibwa mu kika kimu, kuzzibwa mu kirala. Buli kika eky'Abayisirayeli kinaakuumanga obusika bwakyo obw'ensikirano.”" 
Numbers36:10 Nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa, era bwe batyo ne bawala ba Zelofehaadi bwe baakola." 
Numbers36:11 Mahula, Tiruza, ne Hogula, ne Milika, ne Noowa, bawala ba Zelofehaadi, ne bafumbirwa batabani ba baganda ba kitaabwe." 
Numbers36:12 Baafumbirwa ba mu Kika kya Manasse, mutabani wa Yosefu, obusika bwabwe obw'ensikirano ne busigala mu kika kya kitaabwe." 
Numbers36:13 Ago ge mateeka n'ebiragiro Mukama bye yawa Abayisirayeli ng'ayita mu Musa, mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu ku Yorudaani, okwolekera Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Bino bye bigambo Musa bye yagamba Abayisirayeli bonna, nga bali mu ddungu, ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba bw'omugga Yorudaani. Baali mu kiwonvu kyagwo okumpi ne Sufu, wakati w'akabuga Parani ku ludda olumu, n'obubuga Tofeli, Labani, Hazerooti ne Dizahabu ku ludda olulala." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Waliwo olugendo lwa nnaku kkumi na lumu okuva e Herobu, okuyita mu nsi ya Seyiri ey'ensozi, okutuuka e Kadesi Baruneya." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ana ng'Abayisirayeli bavudde mu Misiri, Musa n'agamba Abayisirayeli byonna Mukama bye yamulagira okubagamba." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Bino byabaawo ng'amaze okuwangula Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyabeeranga mu Hesubooni, ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, eyabeeranga mu Asitarooti ne mu Edereyi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Emitala w'Omugga Yorudaani, mu nsi ya Mowaabu, Musa gye yatandikira okunnyonnyola amateeka gano, n'agamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Nga tuli ku Lusozi Horebu, Mukama Katonda waffe yayogera naffe ng'agamba nti: ‘Ekiseera kye mubadde ku lusozi luno kimala." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Kaakano musituke, mwongere olugendo lwammwe. Mugende mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'Abaamori, ne mu bitundu byonna ebigiriraanye: mu kiwonvu kya Yorudaani, ne mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne mu lusenyi, ne mu kitundu eky'ebukiikaddyo, ne ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Eyaawakati. Mugende mu nsi y'Abakanaani, ne mu nsozi z'e Lebanooni, okutuukira ddala ku mugga omunene Ewufuraate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Eyo ye nsi Nze Mukama gye nneerayirira okuwa bajjajjammwe Aburahamu, ne Yisaaka, ne Yakobo, ne bazzukulu baabwe. Yiiyo ngibalaze, mugende mugyefuge.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Musa n'agamba abantu nti: “Nange mu kiseera ekyo nabagamba mmwe nti: ‘Sisobola kubakulembera nzekka. 
Deuteronomy1:10 Mukama Katonda wammwe abafudde bangi, era kaakano muli bangi ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe ayongere okubafuula abangi okusingawo emirundi lukumi, era abawe omukisa nga bwe yabasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Naye nze nzekka nsobola ntya okwetikka obuvunaanyizibwa obwenkanidde awo, obw'okubalabirira n'okubamalira ennyombo n'enkaayana zammwe?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mulonde abasajja abagezi, abategeevu era abamanyifu mu bika byammwe, abo mbafuule abakulembeze bammwe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ne munziramu nti: ‘Kirungi, tukole nga bw'ogambye.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Kale ne nzirira abakulembeze abagezi era abamanyifu be mwalonda mu bika byammwe, ne mbafuula abakulu bammwe, abakulira abantu olukumi lukumi, n'ebikumi bikumi, n'amakumi ataano ataano, n'ekkumi kkumi. Ne nteekawo n'abakulembeze abalala mu bika byammwe." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Era mu kiseera ekyo, ne nkuutira abalamuzi bammwe nti: ‘Muwulirizenga ensonga za baganda bammwe, musalenga mu bwenkanya emisango egy'abantu b'eggwanga lyammwe, era n'egyo egizingiramu abagwira ababeera mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Temubeeranga na kyekubiira mu nsala yammwe. Muwulirizenga kyenkanyi abato n'abakulu. Temubangako muntu n'omu gwe mutiisa maaso, kubanga emisango mugisala mu buyinza bwa Katonda. Era ensonga eneebanga ebalemye, mugireetanga gye ndi, ne ngiwulira.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Era mu kiseera ekyo, nabalagira byonna bye musaana okukola" 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Twakola nga Mukama Katonda waffe bwe yatulagira, ne tuva ku Horebu, ne tutambula okuyita mu ddungu eryo lyonna eddene era ery'entiisa lye mwalaba, nga tukutte ekkubo eriyita mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'Abaamori, ne tutuuka e Kadesi Baruneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ne mbagamba mmwe nti: ‘Mutuuse mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'Abaamori, Mukama Katonda waffe gy'atuwa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Eyo ye nsi Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abalaze. Mwambuke, mugyefuge, nga Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe bwe yabagamba. Temutya era temutekemuka’." 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Mwenna ne mujja gye ndi ne muŋŋamba nti: ‘Tusooke tutumeyo abantu batukettere ensi eyo, bakomewo batubuulire ekkubo lye tunaayitamu, era n'ebibuga bye tunaasangayo bwe biri.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Nalaba ng'ekyo kirungi. Ne nnonda mu mmwe abasajja kkumi na babiri, omu omu okuva mu buli kika." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ne basituka ne bambuka mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne batuuka mu Kiwonvu kya Esukooli, ne bakiketta." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ne banogayo ku bibala, ne babireeta gye tuli. Ne batubuulira nti: ‘Ensi Mukama Katonda waffe gy'atuwa, nnungi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Naye mmwe ne mujeemera ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda wammwe, ne mugaana okugiyingira." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ne mwemulugunyiza mu weema zammwe, nga mugamba nti: ‘Mukama yatukyawa, kyeyava atuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, okutuwaayo mu mikono gy'Abaamori batuzikirize." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tulaga wa eyo? Bannaffe batumazeemu amaanyi nga bagamba nti abantu abaliyo banene era bawanvu okutusinga. Ebibuga binene. Byazimbibwako ebigo ebigulumivu okutuuka ku ggulu, era nti baalabayo n'abaana ba Anaki! ’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Nze ne mbagamba mmwe nti: ‘Temutya era baleme kubatekemula. 
Deuteronomy1:30 Mukama Katonda wammwe abakulemberamu, ye anaabalwanirira mmwe, nga bwe mwalaba byonna bye yabakolera e Misiri" 
Deuteronomy1:31 ne mu ddungu. Mu lugendo lwonna lwe mwatambula nga muli eyo mu ddungu okutuusa lwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino, mwalaba Mukama Katonda wammwe bwe yabasitula, ng'omuntu bw'asitula omwana we.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Naye wadde ng'ebyo byali bwe bityo, temwakkiriza kwesiga Mukama Katonda wammwe," 
Deuteronomy1:33 eyabakulemberangamu okubanoonyeza ekifo eky'okusimbamu eweema zammwe. Yasinziiranga mu mpagi ey'omuliro ekiro, ne mu mpagi ey'ekire emisana, okubalaga ekkubo lye munaayitamu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Awo Mukama n'awulira bye mwayogera, n'asunguwala, n'alayira ng'agamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Tewali n'omu ku b'omulembe guno omubi, aliraba ensi ennungi gye nneerayirira okuwa bajjajjaabwe," 
Deuteronomy1:36 okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne. Oyo ye aligiraba. Era ye n'abaana be ndibawa ensi gye yalambula, kubanga yannywererako mu byonna.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Era olw'okubeera mmwe, nange Mukama yansunguwalira, n'agamba nti: ‘Naawe Musa, toliyingira mu nsi eyo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Omuweereza wo Yoswa, mutabani wa Nuuni, ye aligiyingiramu. Mugumye omwoyo, kubanga ye alituusa Abayisirayeli mu nsi eyo ne bagyefuga.’" 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Era abaana bammwe abo, be mwagamba nti: ‘Balinyagibwa, n'abaana bammwe abatannayawula kirungi na kibi, be baliyingira mu nsi eyo. Ndigibawa bo, ne bagyefuga." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Naye mmwe mukyuke mutambule nga mudda mu ddungu, nga mukutte ekkubo eriraga ku Nnyanja Emmyufu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Ne munziramu nti: ‘Twakola ekibi ne tunyiiza Mukama. Naye kaakano ka tugende, tulwane nga Mukama Katonda waffe bwe yatulagira.’ Buli omu ku mmwe n'ayambalira ebyokulwanyisa bye, nga mulowooza nti kyangu okulumba ensi ey'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Bagambe nti tebagenda, era tebalwana, kubanga nze siri wamu nabo. Abalabe baabwe bajja kubawangula.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ne mbabuulira, naye ne mutawuliriza, ne mujeemera ekiragiro kya Mukama, ne mwekuluntaza, ne mugenda mu nsi ey'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Awo Abaamori abaali mu nsi eyo ey'ensozi, ne bavaayo okubalumba nga bataamye ng'enjuki. Ne babawondera okutuukira ddala e Haruma, ne babawangulira eyo mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'e Seyiri." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ne mukomawo ne mukaabirira Mukama abayambe. Naye Mukama n'atabawuliriza era n'atabafaako. 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mwalwa nnyo e Kadesi, okusinziira ku nnaku ennyingi ze mwamalayo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Awo ne tukyusa obuwufu, ne tutambula nga tudda mu ddungu, nga tukutte ekkubo eriraga ku Nnyanja Emmyufu, nga Mukama bwe yaŋŋamba. Ne tumala ennaku nnyingi nga twetoloolera mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'e Seyiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Mumaze ekiseera ekimala nga mwetooloola ensi eno ey'ensozi. Kaakano mukyuse obuwufu, mugende mu bukiikakkono.’" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Era n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Lagira abantu obagambe nti: Mugenda kuyita mu nsi ya baganda bammwe, bazzukulu ba Esawu, ababeera mu Seyiri. Bajja kubatya. Naye mwegendereze nnyo." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Temulwana nabo, kubanga mmwe sijja kubawa kitundu na kimu eky'ensi yaabwe, wadde akatundu akatono akalinnyibwamu ekigere, kubanga olusozi Seyiri naluwa Esawu okuba obutaka bwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Munaawangayo nsimbi okubagulako emmere ne mulya, era munaawangayo nsimbi okubagulako amazzi, ne munywa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Mukama Katonda wammwe, abawadde mmwe omukisa mu byonna bye mukola. Abalabiridde nga mutambula mu ddungu lino eddene. Emyaka gino amakumi ana, Mukama Katonda wammwe abadde nammwe, ne mutabaako kye mujula." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Awo ne twebalama baganda baffe, bazzukulu ba Esawu, ababeera ku Seyiri. Ne tukwata ekkubo erigenda mu ddungu, okuva mu Elati ne Eziyoni Geberi. Ne tukyuka, ne tuyita mu kkubo ery'omu ddungu ly'e Mowaabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Temutawaanya bantu b'e Mowaabu, era temubaggulako lutalo, kubanga mmwe sijja kubawa kitundu na kimu ku nsi yaabwe okuba obutaka bwammwe, kubanga ekibuga Ari nakiwa dda bazzukulu ba Looti okuba obutaka bwabwe.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Mu biseera ebyo eby'edda, mu Ari mwabeerangamu Abeemi, abaali eggwanga ekkulu era eddene, era nga bawagguufu ng'Abaanaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Nabo baayitibwanga Bareefa ng'Abaanaki, naye nga Abamowaabu babayita Beemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Abahoori nabo baabeeranga ku Seyiri mu kusooka. Naye bazzukulu ba Esawu bwe bajja, ne babagobako, ne bazikiriza eggwanga lyabwe, ne basenga mu kifo kyabwe, okufaananira ddala ng'Abayisirayeli bwe baakola mu nsi Mukama gye yabawa okuba obutaka bwabwe)." 
Deuteronomy2:13 “ ‘Kale kaakano musituke, musomoke akagga Zeredi.’ Ne tusomoka akagga Zeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Okuva lwe twava e Kadesi Baruneya, okutuusa lwe twasomoka akagga Zeredi, gyali giweze emyaka amakumi asatu mu munaana. Abasajja abaserikale bonna ab'omulembe ogwo, baali bafudde nga baweddewo mu lusiisira, nga Mukama bwe yabalayirira." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Mukama yabalwanyisa okutuusa lwe yabazikiriza n'abamalirawo ddala mu lusiisira. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Awo abasajja abaserikale bonna bwe baamala okufa ne baggwaawo," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Olwaleero mujja kusala ensalo ya Mowaabu nga muyita mu Ari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Bwe munaasemberera ensi ey'Abammoni temubatawaanya era temubaggulako lutalo, kubanga mmwe sijja kubawa kitundu na kimu eky'ensi yaabwe. Ensi eyo nagiwa dda bazzukulu ba Looti okuba obutaka bwabwe.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Ensi eyo era eyitibwa ya Bareefa. Abareefa be baagibeerangamu edda. Naye Abammoni babayita Bazamuzuumu. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Baali ggwanga kkulu ery'abantu abangi era abawagguufu ng'Abaanaki. Naye Mukama n'abazikiriza, Abammoni ne balyoka basenga mu nsi eyo ne badda mu kifo kya bali." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Mukama era bw'atyo bwe yakolera bazzukulu ba Esawu, ababeera ku Seyiri. Yazikiriza Abahoori, olwo bazzukulu ba Esawu ne basenga mu nsi eyo, ne badda mu kifo kya bali, n'okutuusa kati." 
Deuteronomy2:23 N'Abavvi abaabeeranga mu byalo okutuukira ddala e Gaaza, Abakafutoori abaava e Kafutoori baabazikiriza, ne badda mu kifo kyabwe." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Bwe twamala okusala ensalo ya Mowaabu, Mukama n'agamba nti: ‘Musituke, mutambule, muyite mu Kiwonvu Arunoni. Sihoni Omwamori, kabaka w'e Hesubooni, mmuwaddeyo awamu n'ensi ye mu mikono gyammwe, mumugguleko olutalo, mutandike okwefuga ensi ye." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Okuva olwaleero, amawanga agali ku nsi yonna nja kugakuba entiisa, gabatye, buli abanaawulira ettutumu lyammwe, bakankane era beeraliikirire.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Nga tuli mu ddungu ly'e Kedemooti, ne ntumira Sihoni kabaka w'e Hesubooni obubaka obw'emirembe, nga ŋŋamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Tukkirize tuyite mu nsi yo. Tujja kukwata kkubo lyokka, awatali kuwunjawunja kudda ku ddyo wadde ku kkono." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Emmere gye tulya n'amazzi ge tunywa ojja kubituguza buguza, tukusasulemu ensimbi. Kye tusaba kwe kutukkiriza okutambula, tuyite mu nsi yo," 
Deuteronomy2:29 okutuuka lwe tunaasomoka Omugga Yorudaani ne tuyingira mu nsi Mukama Katonda waffe gy'atuwa. Tukkirize, nga bazzukulu ba Esawu ababeera ku Seyiri n'Abamowaabu ababeera mu Ari, bwe baatukkiriza okuyita mu nsi yaabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Kyokka Sihoni kabaka w'e Hesubooni n'atatuganya kuyita mu nsi ye, kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe yakalubya omwoyo gwe, n'amuwaganyaza omutima, tulyoke tumuwangule buwanguzi, twefuge ensi ye, mwe tuli kati." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Ntandise okubawa Sihoni n'ensi ye; kale mugiwangule, mugibeeremu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihoni ne yeesowolayo n'abantu be bonna okutwolekera mu lutalo e Yahazi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Mukama Katonda waffe n'amutuwa ne tumuwangula ne batabani be n'abantu be bonna. 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ne tunyaga ebyali ebibuga bye byonna mu budde obwo. Ne tuzikiriza abantu bonna abasajja n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, awatali kulekawo n'omu." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Ente zokka ze twatwala nga gwe munyago, awamu n'ebintu bye twanyaga mu bibuga." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Okuva ku Aroweri ku njegoyego z'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, n'ekibuga ekiri mu kiwonvu ekyo, okutuukira ddala e Gileyaadi, tewali kibuga kyatulema olw'obugulumivu bw'ebigo byakyo. Byonna Mukama Katonda waffe yabituwa ne tubiwamba." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Naye tetwasemberera nsi y'Abammoni, n'olubalama lw'Omugga Yabboki, n'ebibuga eby'omu nsi ey'ensozi, wadde ebifo ebirala byonna Mukama Katonda waffe gye yatugaana okugenda." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne tukyuka ne tukwata ekkubo erigenda e Basani. Ogi kabaka w'e Basani ne yeesowolayo n'abantu be bonna okutwolekera mu lutalo mu Edereyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Tomutya, kubanga nja kumuwaayo ye, n'abantu be bonna, n'ensi ye mu mikono gyo, omukoleko kye wakola ku Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, eyabeeranga mu Hesubooni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Awo Mukama Katonda waffe n'atuwa ne Ogi, kabaka w'e Basani n'abantu be, bonna ne tubatta obutalekaawo n'omu." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ne tuwamba ebyali ebibuga bye byonna mu kiseera ekyo. Tewali kibuga na kimu kye tutaabawambako. Byonna awamu byali ebibuga nkaaga eby'omu kitundu kyonna ekya Arugobu, ebyali obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ebibuga ebyo byonna byali bizimbiddwako ebigo ebigulumivu, n'emiryango egirimu enzigi ezirina ebisiba. Waaliwo n'ebyalo bingi nnyo ebitaaliko bigo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ne tusaanyaawo ebibuga byonna, ne tuzikiriza abantu bonna abasajja n'abakazi n'abaana abato, nga bwe twakola mu bibuga ebyali ebya Sihoni kabaka w'e Hesubooni." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Naye ente zonna n'ebintu bye twanyaga mu bibuga, ne tubyetwalira nga gwe munyago gwaffe." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Era mu kiseera ekyo, ne tuwamba ensi za bakabaka abo bombi ab'Abaamori abaabeeranga emitala wa Yorudaani, okuva ku Kiwonvu Arunoni okutuuka ku Lusozi Herumooni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Olusozi Herumooni, Abasidoni baluyita Siriyooni, ate Abaamori baluyita Seniri." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Twawamba ekitundu kyonna eky'obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani: ebibuga byonna eby'omu lusenyi, n'ebitundu byonna ebya Gileyaadi n'ebya Basani, okutuukira ddala e Saleka ne Edereyi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 “Ogi kabaka w'e Basani ye yekka eyali akyasigaddewo ku Bareefa. Ekitanda kye eky'ekyuma kyali kya mita nnya obuwanvu, ne mita kumpi bbiri obugazi, mu kipimo ekitongole abantu kye baapimisanga. Ekitanda ekyo kikyaliyo mu Rabba, ekibuga ky'Abammoni." 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Bwe twefuga ensi eyo mu biseera ebyo, ne mpa Abarewubeeni n'Abagaadi ekitundu ekitandikira ku Aroweri, ekiri ku mabbali g'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, n'ekitundu ky'ensi ey'ensozi ez'e Gileyaadi, n'ebibuga byamu." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ekitundu kya Gileyaadi ekyasigalawo, ne Basani yonna obwali obwakabaka bwa Ogi, kwe kugamba ekitundu kyonna ekya Arugobu, ne mbiwa ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse.” (Basani yonna yali eyitibwa nsi ya Bareefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yayiri ow'omu Kika kya Manasse n'agabana ekitundu kyonna eky'e Arugobu, kye ky'e Basani, okutuukira ddala ku nsalo n'Abagesuri n'Abamaaka. Ebyalo ebyo byonna n'abituuma erinnya lye, era bimanyiddwa ng'Ebyalo bya Yayiri n'okutuusa kati.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Makiri ne mmuwa Gileyaadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Abarewubeeni n'Abagaadi ne mbawa ekitundu okuva ku Gileyaadi okutuuka ku Kiwonvu Arunoni, ng'amakkati g'Ekiwonvu ye nsalo mu bukiikaddyo, ate Omugga Yabboki nga ye nsalo n'Abammoni mu bukiikakkono." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, ekitundu kyabwe ne kituuka ku Mugga Yorudaani, okuva ku Nnyanja y'e Galilaaya mu bukiikakkono, okukkira ddala ku Nnyanja y'Omunnyo mu bukiikaddyo, n'okutuuka ku bigere by'Olusozi Pisuga ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ne mbalagira mu kiseera ekyo nti: ‘Mukama Katonda wammwe abawadde ensi eno okugyefuga. Kale abaserikale bammwe bonna, basomoke Yorudaani nga babagalidde ebyokulwanyisa, bakulemberemu baganda baabwe ab'Ebika bya Yisirayeli ebirala." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Naye bakazi bammwe n'abaana bammwe abato, n'amagana gammwe (mmanyi nga mulina amagana mangi), bisigale mu bibuga byammwe, bye nabawa." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Muyambe baganda bammwe, okutuusa lwe balyefuga ensi, Mukama gy'abawa emitala wa Yorudaani, era okutuusa nabo Mukama lw'alibawa okutebenkera nga mmwe. Olwo mulikomawo, ne mudda, buli muntu ku butaka bwe, bwe nabawa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Ne ndagira Yoswa mu kiseera ekyo, nti: ‘Olabidde ddala n'amaaso go ebyo byonna Mukama Katonda wammwe by'akoze ku bakabaka abo ababiri. Bw'atyo Mukama bw'ajja okukola ku buli bwakabaka bwe mugenda okulumba." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Temubatyanga, kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe, ye ajja okubalwanirira mmwe.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ne neegayirira Mukama mu kiseera ekyo nga ŋŋamba nti: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Ayi Mukama Katonda nze omuweereza wo ondazeeko ntandikwa butandikwa ey'ebikulu era eby'amaanyi by'ogenda okukola. Teri Katonda mulala mu ggulu ne mu nsi ayinza okukola eby'amaanyi by'okoze. 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nkusaba onzikirize nsomoke, ndabe ensi ennungi eri emitala wa Yorudaani, ensi eyo ennungi ey'ensozi, ne Lebanooni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Naye Mukama n'ansunguwalira olw'okubeera mmwe, n'atampuliriza. N'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Ekyo kirekere awo. Toddayo kwogera nange ku kigambo ekyo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Yambuka ku ntikko y'Olusozi Pisuga, oyimuse amaaso go otunule ebugwanjuba ne mu bukiikakkono, ebuvanjuba, ne mu bukiikaddyo, ensi eyo ogirengere bulengezi, kubanga togenda kusomoka mugga guno Yorudaani." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Naye kuutira Yoswa era omugumye, abe mumalirivu, kubanga ye alisomoka ng'akulembera abantu bano okwefuga ensi eyo gy'ogenda okulengera.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Awo ne tusigala mu kiwonvu ekitunuulidde Beti Pewori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Kale kaakano mmwe Abayisirayeli muwulire amateeka n'ebiragiro bye mbayigiriza okutuukirizanga, mulyoke mube balamu, era muyingire mu nsi Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gy'abawa, mugyefuge." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Temuuyongerenga ku kye mbalagira era temuukikendeezengako. Mukwatenga ebiragiro bya Mukama Katonda wammwe bye mbawa. 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mmwe mwennyini mwalaba Mukama Katonda wammwe bye yakolera e Pewori, ebikwata ku Baali. Yazikiriza bonna mu mmwe abaasinzizaayo Baali." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Naye mmwe abaanywerera ku Mukama Katonda wammwe, mukyali balamu ne leero." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Nzuuno mbayigiriza amateeka n'ebiragiro nga Mukama Katonda wange bwe yandagira. Mubikwatenga nga muli mu nsi gye mugenda okuyingiramu okugyefuga. 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mubikuumenga era mubituukirizenga, kubanga ekyo kye kinaalaganga abantu ab'amawanga amalala, bwe mulina amagezi n'okutegeera. Bwe banaawuliranga amateeka ago gonna, banaagambanga nti: ‘Ddala eggwanga lino ekkulu, lya bantu abagezi era abategeevu.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Kale ggwanga ki eddala ekkulu, eririna Katonda aliri okumpi bw'atyo, nga Mukama Katonda waffe bw'ali okumpi bwe tumukoowoola?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Era ggwanga ki eddala ekkulu eririna amateeka n'ebiragiro eby'obwenkanya ng'amateeka gano gonna ge mbateerawo olwaleero? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Wabula mwegendereze era mwekuume, muleme kwerabira mu bulamu bwammwe bwonna ebyo mmwe mwennyini bye mwalaba. Mutegeeze abaana bammwe ne bazzukulu bammwe" 
Deuteronomy4:10 olunaku lwe mwayimirira mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wammwe ku lusozi Horebu, lwe yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Nkuŋŋaanyiza abantu. Njagala bawulire bye mbagamba, bayige okuntyanga ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwabwe ku nsi, era ekyo bakiyigirizenga n'abaana baabwe.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Mutegeezanga abaana bammwe nga bwe mwasembera ne muyimirira wansi w'olusozi olwali lubikkiddwa ebire ebikwafu, eby'omukka omuddugavu, ne lwaka omuliro, ne gutumbiira mu ggulu." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Mubategeezenga nga Mukama bwe yayogera nammwe ng'asinziira mu muliro, ne muwulira ddoboozi lyokka ng'ayogera, kyokka ne mutalaba nga bw'afaanana n'akatono." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yabategeeza endagaano ye, gye yabalagira okutuukiriza, bye biragiro ekkumi, n'abiwandiika ku bipande bibiri eby'amayinja." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Mukama n'andagira mu biseera ebyo okubayigiriza amateeka n'ebiragiro, mubituukirizenga mu nsi gye mugenda okuyingiramu okugyefuga." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Kale mwegendereze nnyo. Nga bwe mutaalaba Mukama bw'afaanana ku lunaku lwe yayogera nammwe ku Lusozi Horebu ng'asinziira mu muliro wakati," 
Deuteronomy4:16 mwekuume muleme kwonoona nga mwekolera ekifaananyi ekyole eky'engeri yonna ey'ekintu ekisajja oba ekikazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 eky'ensolo yonna ku nsi, eky'ekinyonyi eky'ebiwaawaatiro ekibuuka mu bbanga" 
Deuteronomy4:18 oba eky'ekintu kyonna ekyewalula ku ttaka, wadde eky'ekyennyanja ekibeera wansi mu mazzi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 “Era mulemenga kukemebwa ne musinza era ne muweereza bye mulaba ku ggulu: enjuba, n'omwezi n'emmunyeenye. Ebyo byonna eby'oku ggulu, Mukama Katonda wammwe yabiteerawo abantu bonna abali ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Naye mmwe Mukama yabakwatako, n'abaggya mu kabiga ak'ekyuma, ye Misiri, abafuulire ddala abantu be nga bwe muli kaakano." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Era Mukama yansunguwalira ku lwammwe, n'alayira nti nze sirisomoka Mugga Yorudaani era siriyingira mu nsi eyo ennungi, Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa mmwe okuba obutaka bwammwe." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Nze nja kufiira mu nsi eno. Siri wa kusomoka Mugga Yorudaani. Naye mmwe mujja kusomoka, mwefuge ensi eyo ennungi." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Mwekuume, mulemenga okwerabira endagaano Mukama Katonda wammwe gye yakola nammwe, ne mwekolera ekifaananyi eky'engeri yonna, Mukama Katonda wammwe kye yabagaana," 
Deuteronomy4:24 kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe ali ng'omuliro ogwaka, tavuganyizibwa." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ne bwe muliba nga mumaze ebbanga ggwanvu mu nsi eyo, nga muzadde abaana, era nga mulina n'abazzukulu, temugezanga ne mwonoona nga mwekolera ekifaananyi eky'engeri yonna. Ekyo kibi mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wammwe, era kirimusunguwaza." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Nkoowoola eggulu n'ensi okubalumiriza olwaleero nti mulizikirira mangu ne muggweerawo ddala mu nsi gye munaatera okuyingiramu okwefuga, nga musomose Omugga Yorudaani. Temuligibeeramu bbanga ggwanvu, naye mulizikirira ne muggweerawo ddala." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Mukama alibasaasaanya mu mawanga amalala, abatono ku mmwe gye balisigala nga balamu." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Eyo gye muliweerereza balubaale abakolebwa abantu mu miti ne mu mayinja, balubaale abatalaba wadde okuwulira, era abatalya wadde okuwunyiriza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Naye nga muli eyo, munaanoonyanga Mukama Katonda wammwe. Era bwe munaamunoonyanga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna, munaamuzuulanga." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Bwe munaabeeranga mu buyinike, era ng'ebyo byonna bibajjidde, ku nkomerero munaakomangawo eri Mukama Katonda wammwe, ne mugondera by'abagamba," 
Deuteronomy4:31 kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe wa kisa. Taabaabulirenga wadde okubazikiriza, era teyeerabirenga ndagaano gye yakola ne bajjajjammwe." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Kale mwetegereze ebyaliwo mu mirembe egy'edda, okuviira ddala emabega, Katonda bukya atonda bantu ku nsi. Mwetegereze ensi yonna. Ekintu ekikulu nga kino kyali kibaddewo, era waliwo eyali akiwuliddeko?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Waliwo abantu abaali bawulidde Katonda ng'ayogera, ng'asinziira mu muliro, nga mmwe bwe mwawulira, ne basigala nga balamu?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Oba waliwo lubaale eyali agezezzaako okugenda okwetwalira abantu b'eggwanga erimu ng'abaggya wakati mu ggwanga eddala, ng'akozesa ebigezo, n'ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero, n'olutalo, n'obuyinza obungi n'amaanyi, n'eby'entiisa ennene, nga Mukama Katonda wammwe bwe yakolera mmwe e Misiri nga mulaba?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ebyo Mukama yabibalaga mmwe, mulyoke mumanye nti Ye, ye Katonda yekka, tewali mulala." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Mmwe yabawuliza eddoboozi lye ng'asinziira mu ggulu, alyoke abayigirize. Ne ku nsi yabalaga omuliro gwe ogw'amaanyi, ne muwulira bye yayogerera wakati mu gwo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Olw'okwagala bajjajjammwe, yabalondamu mmwe bazzukulu baabwe, era mu buyinza bwe obungi, Ye yennyini n'abaggya mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Era bwe mwali nga munaatera okutuuka, ab'amawanga agasinga eryammwe obukulu n'amaanyi, yabagoba mu nsi yaabwe, ayingizeemu mmwe, era agibawe okuba obutaka bwammwe, nga bw'eri kaakano." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Kale mumanye olwaleero era mukikuume mu mitima gyammwe, nga Mukama ye Katonda mu ggulu ne mu nsi. Tewali mulala." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Mukuumenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye mbawa olwaleero, mulyoke mubeerenga bulungi, mmwe n'abaana bammwe abaliddawo, era muwangaalire mu nsi, Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa ebe yammwe ennaku zonna.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Awo Musa n'ayawula ebibuga bisatu ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 omuntu mw'ayinza okuddukira n'awona, bw'aba ng'asse munne mu butanwa, ng'abadde tamulinaako bulabe; nga bw'addukira mu kimu ku bibuga ebyo, awonya obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Waaliwo Bezeri eky'omu lusenyi mu ddungu, ku lw'ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni. Waaliwo Ramoti mu Gileyaadi ku lw'ab'omu Kika kya Gaadi. Waaliwo ne Golani mu Basani, ku lw'ab'omu Kika kya Manasse." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Gano ge mateeka, Musa ge yateerawo Abayisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy4:45 Bino bye bibuuliriro n'amateeka n'ebiragiro, Musa bye yategeeza Abayisirayeli bwe baava mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:46 Yabibaweera mu kiwonvu ekitunuulidde Beti Pewori, ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani, mu nsi eyali eya Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyabeeranga mu Hesubooni, Musa n'Abayisirayeli gwe baawangula nga bavudde mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Beefuga ensi ye, n'ensi ya Ogi kabaka w'e Basani kabaka omulala ow'Abaamori, era eyabeeranga ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Ekitundu kino, kiva ku Kibuga Aroweri, ekiri ku mabbali ku njegoyego z'Ekiwonvu Arunoni, okutuuka ku Lusozi Siyooni, olwo ye Herumooni." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Era kitwaliramu ekitundu kyonna eky'ebuvanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani, okutuuka ku Nnyanja y'Omunnyo, wansi w'obutunnumba bw'Olusozi Pisuga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Awo Musa n'ayita Abayisirayeli bonna, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, muwulire amateeka n'ebiragiro bye mbategeeza olwaleero. Mubiyige era mwegendereze okubituukirizanga."
