Deuteronomy24:14 “Omuntu akolera empeera nga mwavu era ng'ali mu bwetaavu, toomuyiikirizenga, k'abe Muyisirayeli munno, oba omugwira abeera mu kimu ku bibuga byammwe." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Buli lunaku lw'akoze, onoomuwanga empeera ye ng'enjuba tennagwa, kubanga empeera ye agyetaaga, era aba alindiridde okugifuna. Bw'otogimuwa, ajja kukaabirira Mukama ng'akuwawaabira, n'oba ng'okoze kibi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Abazadde tebattibwenga lwa misango gizziddwa baana baabwe, n'abaana tebattibwenga lwa misango gizziddwa bazadde baabwe. Omuntu anattibwanga lwa musango gw'aba azzizza yennyini." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Temuukyamyenga nsala ya musango gwa mugwira wadde ogwa mulekwa, era temuusingirwenga kyambalo kya nnamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Mujjukire nga mwali baddu mu Misiri, Mukama Katonda wammwe n'abanunulayo, kyenva mbawa ekiragiro ekyo." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Bw'okungulanga ebirime byo mu nnimiro yo ne weerabirayo ekinywa ky'eŋŋaano, toddengayo kukiggyayo. Ekyo okirekeranga bagwira, bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu, Mukama Katonda wo alyoke akuwenga omukisa mu byonna by'okola." 
Deuteronomy24:20 “Bw'onoganga ebibala by'omuzayiti, toddenga mu matabi okunoga ebisigaddemu. Obirekeranga bagwira, bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Bw'okungulanga emizabbibu mu nnimiro yo, toddengamu kulonderera gisigaddemu. Ogirekeranga bagwira, bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Mujjukire nga mwali baddu mu nsi y'e Misiri, kyenva mbawa ekiragiro ekyo." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Abantu bwe banaabanga n'enkaayana ne bajja okubasalirawo, banaasalirwanga, omutuufu n'asinga omusango, omusobya ne gumusinga." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Awo omusobya bw'anaabanga azzizza omusango ogunaamukubya, omulamuzi anaalagiranga ne bamugalamiza mu maaso ge, ne bamukuba emiggo egisaanira omusango gwe yazza." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ayinza okumusalira emiggo okutuuka ku makumi ana, kyokka taasussengawo. Okumukuba egisinga awo, kyandibadde kumuweebuula mu banne." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Toosibenga nte mumwa ng'ewuula. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Abasajja abooluganda bwe banaabanga babeera wamu, omu ku bo n'afa nga tazadde mwana wa bulenzi, nnamwandu we taafumbirwenga musajja mulala atali waaluganda lwa mufu. Muganda w'omufu anaatwalanga nnamwandu oyo amuwase, amukolere ekyo muganda w'omusajja ky'ateekwa okukolera mulamu we." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Omwana ow'obulenzi gw'anaasookanga okuzaala, ye anabbulanga erinnya lya muganda we eyafa, lireme kusaanawo mu Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Naye omusajja oyo bw'anaabanga tayagala kuwasa nnamwandu wa muganda we, nnamwandu oyo anaagendanga ku mulyango gw'ekibuga awatuula abakulembeze, n'abagamba nti: ‘Muganda wa baze agaana okubbula erinnya lya muganda we mu Yisirayeli. Tayagala kunkolera ekyo muganda w'omusajja ky'ateekwa okukolera mulamu we.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Abakulembeze b'ekibuga banaamuyitanga ne boogera naye. Bw'anaakakasanga n'agamba nti: ‘Ssaagala kumuwasa,’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 nnamwandu wa muganda we anajjanga w'ali mu maaso g'abakulembeze, n'amunaanulamu engatto mu kigere ekimu, n'amufujjira amalusu mu maaso, n'amugamba nti: ‘Omusajja agaana okuzaalira muganda we omusika, bw'atyo bw'ayisibwa!’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Amaka ge mu Yisirayeli ganaayitibwanga, ‘Amaka g'eyanaanulwa engatto.’" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Abasajja bwe banaabanga balwanagana bokka na bokka, mukazi w'omu ku bo n'ajja okutaasa bba, n'agolola omukono n'akwata ebitundu eby'ekyama eby'omusajja alwana ne bba," 
Deuteronomy25:12 atemwangako omukono awatali kumulaga kusaasira. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Temuukumpanyenga, ne mukozesa ebipimo ebikyamu okupima obuzito," 
Deuteronomy25:14 n'ebigero ebitali bituufu okugera obungi bw'ebintu. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Mukozesanga ebipimo ebituufu n'ebigero ebijjuvu, lwe muliwangaalira mu nsi Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa," 
Deuteronomy25:16 kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe akyawa buli akola ebibi ebiri ng'ebyo. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Mujjukire Abameleki kye baabakola mmwe, bwe mwali mu lugendo nga muva mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Baabalumba mmwe mu kkubo, bwe mwali mukooye era nga muweddemu amaanyi, ne batatya Katonda, ne batta bonna abaali basembyeyo emabega, abaali bajja basenvula." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Kale Mukama Katonda wammwe bw'alimala okubatebenkeza mmwe, n'abaggyirawo abalabe bammwe bonna ababeetoolodde mu nsi gy'abawa okuba obutaka bwammwe, mulisaanyizaawo ddala Abameleki abo, baleme kujjukirwanga ku nsi. Temukyerabiranga ekyo." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Bwe mulimala okuyingira mu nsi Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa okuba obutaka bwammwe, ne mugyefuga era ne mukkalira mu yo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 buli omu mu mmwe anaateekanga mu kibbo ekitundu ekisooka okukungulwa, eky'ebirime bye byonna by'anaabanga alimye mu nsi eyo Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa, n'akitwala mu kifo Mukama Katonda wammwe ky'aliba yeerobozezza okumusinzizangamu." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Anaagendanga eri kabona anaabanga ku mulimu mu kiseera ekyo, n'agamba nti: ‘Kaakano njatulira Mukama Katonda wo nti nnyingidde mu nsi, Mukama gye yalayirira bajjajjaffe okutuwa.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Kale kabona anaggyanga ekibbo mu mikono gyo, n'akissa wansi mu maaso ga alutaari ya Mukama Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Olwo ggwe onooyogereranga ebigambo bino mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wo nti: ‘Jjajjange yali Mwarameeya omubungeese. Yaserengeta e Misiri n'abeera eyo n'ab'omu maka ge, abataali bangi. Baayalira eyo, ne bafuuka eggwanga eddene ery'amaanyi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abamisiri ne batuyisa bubi, ne batubonyaabonya, ne bakalubya obulamu bwaffe." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ne tukoowoola Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, Mukama n'awulira eddoboozi lyaffe, n'alaba okubonaabona kwaffe n'okutegana kwaffe, n'okunyigirizibwa kwaffe." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Mukama n'atuggya mu Misiri ng'akozesa obuyinza obungi n'amaanyi n'obuyinza, era ng'akola ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero n'eby'entiisa ennyo." 
Deuteronomy26:9 N'atuleeta kuno, n'atuwa ensi eno, ensi engimu era engagga." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Era kaakano nzuuno ndeese bye nsoose okukungula mu ttaka lye wampa ayi Mukama.’ “Onoobiteekanga mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wo, n'omusinza." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Onoosanyukanga olw'ebirungi byonna Mukama Katonda wo by'akuwadde ggwe, n'ab'omu maka go, n'Abaleevi era n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Buli mwaka ogwokusatu, muneesoloozangamu ekitundu kimu eky'ekkumi ekya byonna bye mukungudde mu mwaka ogwo ogusoloolezebwamu ekitundu ekyo eky'ekkumi, ne mukiwa Abaleevi, n'abagwira, ne bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu, nabo baliirenga mu bibuga byammwe bakkute." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Olwo onooyogereranga mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wo nti: ‘Ebintu ebyatukuzibwa mbiggye mu maka gange, era mbiwadde Abaleevi, n'abagwira, ne bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu, nga bwe wandagira okukola. Tewali kiragiro kyo na kimu kye nsobezza, wadde kye neerabidde." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Tewali kimu kya kkumi kye ndidde nga ndi mu kukungubaga, oba okukiggya we kibadde nga siri mulongoofu, wadde okubaako kye mpaayo eri emizimu. Mpulidde by'ogamba, ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ntuukirizza byonna bye wandagira." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Tunula ng'osinziira mu ggulu mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu, owe omukisa abantu bo Abayisirayeli, n'ensi engimu era engagga gy'otuwadde, nga bwe walayirira bajjajjaffe.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Olwaleero Mukama Katonda wammwe abalagira okutuukirizanga amateeka gano n'ebiragiro. Kale mwegenderezenga okubituukiriza n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Mukakasizza olwaleero nga Mukama ye Katonda wammwe, era nga munaamuwuliranga ne mukuuma amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, ne by'abakuutira byonna." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Era Mukama akakasizza olwaleero nga muli babe abenjawulo nga bwe yabasuubiza, n'abalagira okukwatanga ebiragiro bye byonna," 
Deuteronomy26:19 alyoke abakuze okusinga amawanga amalala gonna ge yatonda, mugasinge ettendo n'ettutumu n'ekitiibwa, era mubeererenga ddala ggwanga lya Mukama nga bwe yagamba.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Awo Musa, ng'ali wamu n'abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli, n'agamba abantu nti: “Mukuumenga ebiragiro byonna bye mbawa olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ku lunaku lwe mulisomoka Omugga Yorudaani, ne muyingira mu nsi Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawa, mulisimba amayinja amanene, ne mugasiigako ennoni," 
Deuteronomy27:3 ne mugawandiikako ebigambo byonna eby'amateeka gano nga mumaze okusomoka, olwo ne mulyoka muyingira mu nsi engimu era engagga, Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gye yabasuubiza mmwe." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Kale nga mumaze okusomoka Omugga Yorudaani, mulisimba amayinja ago ku Lusozi Ebali, nga bwe mbalagira olwaleero, ne mugasiigako ennoni." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Eyo mulizimbirayo Mukama Katonda wammwe alutaari ey'amayinja ge mutayasizza na kyuma," 
Deuteronomy27:6 kubanga alutaari ya Mukama Katonda wammwe, munaagizimbisanga mayinja gatali maase, era okwo kwe munaaweerangayo eri Mukama Katonda wammwe ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Munaatambiranga ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, ne muliira eyo, ne musanyukira mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Era muliwandiikira ddala bulungi ku mayinja ago, ebigambo byonna eby'amateeka ago.”" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Awo Musa ng'ali wamu ne bakabona Abaleevi n'agamba Abayisirayeli bonna nti: “Musirike muwulire mmwe Abayisirayeli. Olwaleero mufuuse ggwanga lya Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Deuteronomy27:10 Kale mumuwulirenga era mutuukirizenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye mbawa olwaleero.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Awo Musa n'akuutira abantu ku lunaku olwo ng'agamba nti: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Bwe mulimala okusomoka Omugga Yorudaani, ab'Ebika bino: ekya Simyoni, n'ekya Leevi, n'ekya Yuda, n'ekya Yissakaari, n'ekya Yosefu, n'ekya Benyamiini, be baliyimirira ku Lusozi Gerizimu okusabira abantu omukisa." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ate ab'Ebika bino: ekya Rewubeeni, n'ekya Gaadi, n'ekya Aseri, n'ekya Zebbulooni, n'ekya Daani, n'ekya Nafutaali, be baliyimirira ku Lusozi Ebali okukolima." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Abaleevi baligamba Abayisirayeli bonna mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Omuntu akola ekifaananyi ekyole, oba ekibajje, oba ekikolebwa mu bintu ebisaanuuse Mukama ky'akyayira ddala, n'akiteekawo mu kyama, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Buli anyooma kitaawe oba nnyina, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Buli ajjulula ensalo z'ekibanja kya muliraanwa we, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Buli awabya muzibe okumuggya mu kkubo ettuufu, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Buli akyamya ensala y'omusango gw'omugwira ne mulekwa ne nnamwandu, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Buli musajja asobya ku muka kitaawe, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Buli asobya ku nsolo, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Buli asobya ku mwannyina, omwana wa kitaawe oba owa nnyina, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Buli eyeebaka ne nnyazaala we, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Buli atemulira omuntu mu nkukutu, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo,’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Buli agulirirwa okutemula omuntu, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Buli atakuuma era atatuukiriza mateeka gano, akolimirwe.’ Abantu bonna baliddamu nti: ‘Kibeere bwe kityo.’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Bwe munaanyiikiranga okuwulira Mukama Katonda wammwe, ne mukwatanga ebiragiro bye byonna bye mbawa olwaleero, era ne mubituukiriza, Mukama Katonda wammwe alibafuula ggwanga kkulu okusinga amawanga amalala gonna agali ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Bwe munaawuliranga Mukama Katonda wammwe, emikisa gino gyonna ginaabajjiranga ne mugifuna:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Munaabanga n'omukisa mu bibuga byammwe, era munaabanga n'omukisa mu nnimiro zammwe." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Munaabanga n'omukisa ne muzaala abaana bangi, era ne mwaza ebirime, n'ebiraalo by'ente, n'amagana g'endiga n'embuzi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Emmere gye munaalimanga ne gye munaafumbanga okulya, eneebanga n'omukisa." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Munaabanga n'omukisa nga muyingira, era munaabanga n'omukisa nga mufuluma." 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Abalabe bammwe ababalumba, Mukama anaabawangulanga nga mulaba. Banaakwatanga ekkubo limu nga bajja okubalumba mmwe, ne babadduka nga babunye emiwabo." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Mukama Katonda wammwe anaabawanga omukisa mu byonna bye mukola, n'ajjuza amawanika gammwe. Anaabaweeranga mmwe omukisa mu nsi gy'abawa." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Bwe munaawuliranga Mukama Katonda wammwe ne mukola by'abalagira, anaabakuumanga nga muli ggwanga lye nga bwe yabalayirira." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Olwo amawanga gonna ag'oku nsi ganaabatyanga mmwe, nga galaba Mukama abayita babe." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Era Mukama anaabawanga mmwe ebirungi bingi, ne muzaala abaana, ne muba n'ebisolo bingi, era ne mwaza ebibala mu ttaka lyammwe mu nsi Mukama gye yalayirira bajjajjammwe okubawa mmwe." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Mukama anaabaggulirangawo etterekero lye ery'ebirungi, eggulu ne litonnyesanga mu nsi yammwe enkuba mu biseera byayo. Era byonna bye mukola anaabiwanga omukisa, ne muwolanga amawanga mangi, naye mmwe nga temwewola." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Mukama mmwe anaabafuulanga bakulembeze, sso si bagoberezi. Munaabeeranga ku ntikko bulijjo, awatali kukka, kasita munaawuliranga ebiragiro bya Mukama Katonda wammwe bye mbawa olwaleero, ne mubikuumanga era ne mubituukirizanga." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Temugezanga ne muwaba wadde okuwunjawunja okuva ku ebyo bye mbalagira olwaleero, ne musinzanga balubaale era ne mubaweerezanga." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Naye bwe mutaliwulira Mukama Katonda wammwe, kukwata mateeka ge na biragiro bye, bye mbawa olwaleero, ebikolimo bino byonna biribajjira ne bibabeerako:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Mulikolimirwa mu bibuga, era mulikolimirwa mu nnimiro." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Emmere gye munaalimanga ne gye munaafumbanga okulya, eneebanga nkolimire." 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Ezzadde lyammwe ne bye munaalimanga mu ttaka lyammwe, n'ebiraalo by'ente zammwe era n'amagana g'endiga n'embuzi zammwe, binaabanga bikolimire." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Munaabanga bakolimire nga muyingira, era munaakolimirwanga nga mufuluma." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Bwe munaakolanga ebibi ne mweggya ku Mukama, Mukama anaabasindikiranga ekikolimo ne musoberwa era ne munenyezebwa mu byonna bye munaatuusangako engalo okukola, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa ne muggwaawo mangu." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Anaabasindikiranga kawumpuli n'abeesibako, okutuusa lwe watalisigalawo n'omu ku mmwe mu nsi gye mugenda okuyingiramu okugyefuga." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Mukama anaabalwazanga akafuba n'omusujja n'okuzimba, n'okubabuukirirwa okungi. Anaabasindikiranga entalo n'ekyeya n'okugengewala kw'ebirime. Ebyo byonna binaabeesibangako okutuusa lwe mulizikirira." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Eggulu linaabanga ng'ekikomo, ne litabatonnyeseza nkuba, ettaka lyammwe ne likala, ne liba ng'ekyuma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Mu kifo ky'enkuba, Mukama anaasindikanga mbuyaga ya nfuufu n'omusenyu mu nsi yammwe, okutuusa lwe mulizikirira." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Mukama anaabavangamu ne muwangulwa abalabe bammwe. Munaakwatanga ekkubo limu okugenda okubalumba, ne mubadduka nga mubunye emiwabo. Amawanga gonna ku nsi ganaalabanga ebibatuuseeko mmwe ne gatya." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Era nga mufudde, ebinyonyi n'ebisolo binaalyanga emirambo gyammwe, ne wataba abigobawo." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Mukama alibalwaza mmwe amayute nga ge yalwaza Abamisiri, n'amabwa, n'ebizimba, n'okwetakula ebitaliwonyezebwa." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Mukama anaabasuulanga eddalu, anaabafuulanga bamuzibe, era anaabeeraliikirizanga." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Munaawammantanga mu ttuntu, nga muzibe bw'awammanta mu kizikiza, era temuubenga na mukisa mu bye mukola. Munaanyigirizibwanga era munaanyagibwangako ebyammwe buli kiseera, nga tewali abayamba." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Munaayogerezanga abakazi, abasajja abalala ne basobya ku bakazi abo. Munaazimbanga ennyumba ne mutazibeeramu. Munaasimbanga ennimiro z'emizabbibu, ne mutalya ku bibala byazo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ente zammwe zinattibwanga nga mulaba, ne mutalya ku nnyama yaazo. Endogoyi zammwe zinaanyagibwanga nga mutunula, ne zitabaddizibwa. Endiga zammwe zinaagabirwanga abalabe bammwe, mmwe ne wataba abayamba." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe banaagabirwanga abagwira nga mulaba. Buli lunaku munaakandanga kutunula nga mwagala bakomewo, naye nga temulina kye muyinza kukola." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ab'eggwanga eddala balirya emmere gye mwalima ku ttaka lyammwe n'ebirala byonna bye mwateganira, nga munyigirizibwa bunyigirizibwa era nga mujoogebwa bulijjo," 
Deuteronomy28:34 ennaku gye mulaba eryoke ebasuule eddalu. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Mukama anaabalwazanga ku maviivi ne ku magulu amayute agatawonyezeka, ne gababuna okuva ku bigere okutuuka ku mutwe." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Mmwe ne kabaka gwe munaabanga mutaddewo okubafuga, Mukama anaabatwalanga mu nsi engwira, mmwe ne bajjajjammwe gye mutabeerangamu, ne muweereza balubaale ababajje mu miti ne mu mayinja." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Mu nsi Mukama mw'anaabanga abatutte, abantu baayo baneewuunyanga ekibatuuseeko mmwe, ne muwemuka era ne musekererwa." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Munaatwalanga ensigo nnyingi ne muzisiga mu nnimiro, naye ne mukungula kitono, kubanga enzige zinaabiryanga." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Munaasimbanga ennimiro ez'emizabbibu ne muzirabirira, naye temuukungulengamu mizabbibu wadde okunywa ku mwenge gwagyo, kubanga obuwuka buligirya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Munaabeeranga n'emizayiti mu nsi yammwe yonna, naye temwesiigenga ku muzigo gwagyo, kubanga ebibala byagyo binaakunkumukanga." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Mulizaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala, naye temulibeera nabo, kubanga balitwalibwanga mu busibe." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Emiti n'ebirime byammwe byonna, binaaliibwanga enzige." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Abagwira ababeera mu nsi yammwe baneeyongeranga okukulaakulana okusinga mmwe, nga mmwe mweyongera kufeeba." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Bo banaabawolanga mmwe, naye mmwe temuubenga na kye muyinza kubawola. Be banaafuganga mmwe." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Ebikolimo ebyo byonna binajjiranga mmwe, ne bibeesibako, ne bibeera nammwe, kubanga temwawulira Mukama Katonda wammwe, okukwatanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye yabawa mmwe." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Ebikemo ebyo binaabatuukangako mmwe n'ezzadde lyammwe, ne biba ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero ebibalumiriza omusango ennaku zonna." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Mukama Katonda wammwe yabawa ebirungi bingi, naye mmwe ne mugaana okumuweereza n'omutima ogujjudde essanyu n'okujaguza." 
Deuteronomy28:48 N'olwekyo abalabe bammwe Mukama b'anaasindikanga okubalumba mmwe, munaabaweerezanga nga mulumwa enjala n'ennyonta, nga muli bukunya, era munaabulwanga byonna bye mwetaaga. Mukama anaabateekanga mmwe ekikoligo eky'ekyuma mu nsingo, anaababonyaabonyanga mmwe n'obukambwe okutuusa lw'alibazikiriza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Mukama alibaleetera mmwe abantu ab'eggwanga eddala, aboogera olulimi lwe mutategeera, b'aliggya ewala ku nkomerero y'ensi, ne bafubutuka ne babalumba ng'empungu bw'ebuuka okulumba." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Abo baliba bakambwe, abatafa ku bakadde, wadde okusaasira abaana abato." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Banaalyanga ensolo zammwe, n'emmere yammwe gye mulimye, obutabalekerawo ŋŋaano, na mwenge gwa mizabbibu, na muzigo gwa mizayiti, wadde ente n'endiga n'embuzi, ne mufa enjala, ne muzikirira." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Banaabazingizanga mmwe mu bibuga byammwe byonna, mu nsi Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawadde, ebigo byammwe ebigulumivu era ebigumu bye mwesiga ne bigwa." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Mu kuzingizibwa ne mu kunyigirizibwa abalabe bammwe, munaalyanga abaana bammwe, ennyama ya batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe Mukama Katonda wammwe be yabawa." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Omusajja ow'empisa ennungi era omwegendereza ennyo, anaatunuuliranga bubi muganda we ne mukazi we gw'ayagala ennyo n'abaana be abalamu b'akyasigazizzaawo," 
Deuteronomy28:55 n'atabaako n'omu ku bo gw'awa ku nnyama ya baana be b'anaalyanga, nga talina kirala ky'alya mu kuzingizibwa, ne mu kunyigirizibwa abalabe bammwe kwe munaabangamu mu bibuga byammwe byonna." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Omukazi ow'empisa ennungi era omwegendereza ennyo, ataganya na kulinnya kigere kye mu ttaka olw'empisa ze n'olw'ekitiibwa kye, anaatunuuliranga bubi bba gw'ayagala ennyo, ne mutabani we ne muwala we," 
Deuteronomy28:57 n'abalyako mu bubba omwana gwe yaakazaala, era n'ekitanyi kye, olw'okubulwa ebyokulya mu kuzingizibwa n'okunyigirizibwa abalabe bammwe mu bibuga byammwe." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Bwe mutaakwatenga biri mu mateeka gano gonna agawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino ne mugatuukiriza, era bwe mutaatyenga linnya lya Mukama Katonda wammwe, ery'ekitiibwa era ery'entiisa," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Mukama anaabaleeteranga mmwe n'ezzadde lyammwe okubonaabona okutatendeka, okunene era okutasalako, n'endwadde embi era ezitawona." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Era alibalwaza endwadde zonna ez'e Misiri ze mwatyanga. Ziribeezingako mmwe. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Era anaabaleeteranga buli ndwadde n'okubonaabona ebitawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kya mateeka gano, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ne bwe mulyala ennyo ne muba ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu obungi, abaliwonawo muliba batono, kasita mutaliwulira Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nga Mukama bwe yasanyuka okubakolera ebirungi n'okubafuula abangi, bw'atyo bw'anaasanyukanga okubazikiriza n'okubasaanyaawo, abamalewo mu nsi gye muyingira okugyefuga," 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Mukama anaabasaasaanyanga mmwe mu mawanga gonna, okuva ensi w'etandikira okutuuka w'ekoma. Eyo gye munaasinzizanga balubaale ab'emiti n'amayinja, abaali batamanyiddwa mmwe wadde bajjajjammwe." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Era mu mawanga ago, temulyesiimirayo n'akatono. Temulibaako we muteredde, wabula Mukama alibawa emitima egitateredde, nga temulaba gye mulaga era nga temulina ssuubi." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Obulamu bwammwe temuubwekakasengamu. Emisana n'ekiro munaabeeranga mu mutya, nga temukakasa bulamu bwammwe bwe bunaabeera." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ku makya munaagambanga nti: ‘Singa nno bubadde kawungeezi!’ Akawungeezi ne mugamba nti: ‘Singa nno bubadde ku makya!’ Ebyo munaabyogeranga olw'emitima gyammwe okwekengera buli kye mulaba. 
Deuteronomy28:68 Mukama alibaddizaayo mu maato e Misiri, gye nabagamba nti temuliddayo. Nga muli eyo, muneewangayo eri abalabe bammwe babagule mube abaddu n'abazaana, naye tewaabenga abagula.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Eno ye ndagaano, Mukama gye yalagira Musa okukola n'Abayisirayeli mu nsi ya Mowaabu, ng'eyongerwa ku ndagaano, Mukama gye yakola nabo ku Lusozi Horebu," 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa n'ayita Abayisirayeli bonna, n'agamba nti: “Mwerabirako n'amaaso gammwe ebyo byonna Mukama bye yakola mu nsi y'e Misiri ku kabaka waayo ne ku baweereza be bonna, ne ku nsi ye yonna." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Mwalaba okugezebwa okw'amaanyi n'ebyewuunyo, n'ebyamagero ebikulu." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kyokka n'okutuusa kaakano, Mukama tabawadde mmwe mutima ogutegeera, wadde amaaso agalaba, n'amatu agawulira." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Emyaka amakumi ana bukya mbakulembera mu ddungu, ebyambalo byammwe tebibayulikidde ku migongo, n'engatto zammwe tezibakutuseeko mu bigere." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Temubadde na mmere gye mulya, oba omwenge ogw'emizabbibu wadde ekitamiiza kyonna kye munywa, naye Mukama yabawa bye mwetaaga mulyoke mumanye nga Mukama ye Katonda wammwe." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Era bwe twatuuka mu kifo kino, Sihoni Kabaka w'e Hesubooni, ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, baasituka ne batulumba okutulwanyisa. Naye ne tubawangula," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ne twefuga ensi yaabwe, ne tugigabanya mu Bika: ekya Rewubeeni, n'ekya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri ky'Ekika kya Manasse." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Kale mukuumenga ebigambo ebiri mu ndagaano eno, mubituukirizenga, mulyoke mubenga n'omukisa mu byonna bye mukola." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Olwaleero Abayisirayeli muyimiridde mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wammwe, mwenna abakulu b'ebika byammwe, abakulembeze bammwe, abafuzi bammwe, abasajja," 
Deuteronomy29:11 abakazi, abaana abato, n'abagwira ababeera mu mmwe ababatyabira enku era ababakimira amazzi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Muzze mubeere mu ndagaano ya Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'akola nammwe olwaleero, ng'erimu okweyama okugituukirizanga," 
Deuteronomy29:13 abanyweze, mube abantu be, Ye abe Katonda wammwe, nga bwe yabagamba mmwe, era nga bwe yalayirira bajjajjammwe Aburahamu, Yisaaka, ne Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Mukama takola nammwe mwekka endagaano eno erimu okweyama okugituukirizanga," 
Deuteronomy29:15 wabula agikola naffe ffenna abayimiridde wano mu maaso ge olwaleero, era n'abaana baffe ne bazzukulu baffe abatannazaalibwa." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Mumanyi bulungi embeera gye twalimu mu nsi y'e Misiri, era nga bwe twatambula okuyita mu nsi z'ab'amawanga amalala." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwalaba ebyenyinyalwa bye baalina: ebifaananyi, emiti, amayinja, ffeeza ne zaabu, ebyasinzibwanga mu bo." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Walemenga kubaawo musajja oba omukazi oba amaka, oba ekika, mu bali wano olwaleero, akyamya omutima gwe n'ava ku Mukama Katonda waffe, okusinza balubaale b'amawanga gali, n'aba ng'omulandira ogusibukako ekimera eky'obutwa era ekikaawa." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Bwe wabaawo awulira ebigambo by'ekikolimo kino ne yeekubagiza mu mutima gwe ng'agamba nti: ‘Nja kuba n'emirembe ne bwe nnaagugubira mu bukakanyavu bw'omutima gwange’, ekyo kiba kya kuzikiriza mwenna, abalungi n'ababi." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Mukama taamusonyiwenga. Era Mukama atayagala kuvuganyizibwa, anaasunguwaliranga nnyo omuntu oyo, ebikolimo byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino ne bimubaako, Mukama n'amusaanyizaawo ddala ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Era Mukama alimufuula ekyokulabirako mu bika bya Yisirayeli byonna, n'amutuusaako akabi, ng'ebikolimo byonna eby'endagaano ewandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino eky'Amateeka bwe biri." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Mu mirembe egijja, ezzadde lyammwe eriribaddirira, n'abagwira abanaavanga mu nsi ez'ewala, banaalabanga ebibonyoobonyo by'ensi yammwe, n'endwadde Mukama z'agireeseemu, ne balaba" 
Deuteronomy29:23 ng'ensi eyo yonna eyokeddwa, ng'efuuse buganga na munnyo. Eriba tekyasigibwamu kantu, nga terina ky'esobola kubaza, era nga tekyameramu muddo. Eriba ezikiriziddwa nga Sodoma ne Gomora, Abuda ne Zeboyiimu, Mukama bye yakwatirwa obusungu n'ekiruyi n'abizikiriza." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Ab'amawanga gonna balyebuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Mukama akoze ekyo ku nsi eno? Kiki ekyamusunguwaza ennyo bw'atyo?’ 
Deuteronomy29:25 Abantu banaabaddangamu nti: ‘Kubanga baamenya endagaano ya Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe, gye yakola nabo bwe yabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri," 
Deuteronomy29:26 ne bagenda ne baweereza era ne basinza balubaale be baali batasinzangako era Mukama be yabagaana okusinzanga," 
Deuteronomy29:27 Mukama kyeyava asunguwalira ensi eno, n'agireetako ebikolimo byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Mukama mu busungu n'ekiruyi ne mu kunyiiga okungi, abantu be n'abasimbulayo mu nsi yaabwe, n'abakasuka mu nsi endala n'okutuusa kati.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Ebyo Mukama Katonda waffe by'atatumanyisa, bisigala nga bibye. Kyokka yatumanyisa Amateeka ge, ffe n'ezzadde lyaffe, tulyoke tugakuumenga ennaku zonna." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ebyo byonna eby'omukisa n'ekikolimo bye ntadde mu maaso gammwe, bwe birimala okubatuukako, ne mubijjuukiriranga mu mawanga gonna, Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abasaasaanyizza," 
Deuteronomy30:2 mmwe n'abaana bammwe munaakyukanga ne mudda eri Mukama Katonda wammwe. Era ebiragiro bye, bye mbawa olwaleero, bwe munaabigonderanga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Mukama Katonda wammwe anaabakwatirwanga ekisa. Anaabakuŋŋaanyaangayo n'abaggya mu mawanga gonna gye yabasaasaanyiza, n'abakomyawo." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ne bwe muliba musaasaanyiziddwa mu nsonda z'ensi ez'ewala, Mukama Katonda wammwe alibakuŋŋaanyaayo n'abakomyawo," 
Deuteronomy30:5 n'abateeka mu nsi bajjajjammwe gye baafuna, ne mugyefuga, n'abawa mmwe ebirungi, n'abafuula bangi okusinga bajjajjammwe." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Mukama Katonda wammwe aligonza emitima gyammwe n'egy'abaana bammwe, ne muba babe, ne mumwagala n'omutima gwammwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna, ne muba balamu." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Aliteeka ebikolimo ebyo byonna ku balabe bammwe, ne ku abo ababakyawa mmwe era abaabayigganyanga." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Era muliddamu okugondera Mukama, n'okutuukiriza ebiragiro bye, bye mbawa olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy30:9 “Mukama Katonda wammwe anaabawanga omukisa mu byonna bye munaakolanga, ne muzaala abaana bangi, n'ensolo zammwe ne zeeyongera okwala, era ne mubaza ebirime. Mukama aliddamu okusanyukira okubawa mmwe omukisa, nga bwe yasanyukiranga okuguwa bajjajjammwe," 
Deuteronomy30:10 kasita munaamuwuliranga, ne mutuukiriza amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino eky'Amateeka." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ekiragiro kino kye mbawa olwaleero, si kizibu nnyo, era tekibasukkiridde." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tekiri mu ggulu, mulyoke mugambe nti: ‘Ani anaatulinnyirayo akituleetere, atusobozese okukiwulira, tulyoke tukituukirize?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Era tekiri mitala wa nnyanja, mutuuke n'okugamba nti: ‘Ani alituwungukira ennyanja akituleetere, atusobozese okukiwulira, tulyoke tukituukirize?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Naye kiri kumpi nnyo nammwe. Kiri mu kamwa kammwe, ne mu mitima gyammwe, musobole okukituukiriza." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Nzuuno olwaleero ntadde mu maaso gammwe ekirungi n'ekibi, era obulamu n'okufa," 
Deuteronomy30:16 kubanga mbalagira olwaleero okwagalanga Mukama Katonda wammwe, okukoleranga ku by'abakuutira, n'okukuumanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye byonna, mulyoke mubenga balamu, muzaalenga mwale, Mukama Katonda wammwe abawenga omukisa mu nsi gye mugenda okuyingiramu mugyefuge." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Naye emitima gyammwe bwe ginaawabanga ne mutawulira, era ne musendebwasendebwa, ne musinza balubaale, ne muba baweereza baabwe," 
Deuteronomy30:18 mbategeereza ddala olwaleero nga temulirema kuzikirira. Temuliwangaalira mu nsi gye mugenda okwefuga nga musomose Omugga Yorudaani. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Nkoowoola olwaleero eggulu n'ensi okuba abajulizi ababalumiriza mmwe, nga ntadde mu maaso gammwe obulamu n'okufa, omukisa n'ekikolimo. Kale mulondeko obulamu, mulyoke mubenga balamu mmwe n'ezzadde lyammwe." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mwagalenga Mukama Katonda wammwe, mumuwulirenga, mumunywererengako, kubanga ye bwe bulamu bwammwe, bwe buwangaazi bwammwe. Olwo nno munaabeeranga mu nsi, Mukama Katonda wammwe gye yalayirira okuwa bajjajjammwe Aburahamu, Yisaaka, ne Yakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa n'ayongera okutegeeza Abayisirayeli bonna ebigambo ebyo. 
Deuteronomy31:2 N'abagamba nti: “Olwaleero mpezezza emyaka kikumi mu abiri. Sikyayinza kuba mukulembeze wammwe, era Mukama yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Tojja kusomoka Mugga guno Yorudaani.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Mukama Katonda wammwe ye alibakulemberamu okusomoka, n'azikiriza, nga mulaba, ab'amawanga agaliyo, ne mwefuga ensi yaabwe. Era Yoswa ye alibakulembera okusomoka, nga Mukama bwe yagamba." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Mukama aliwangula abantu abo nga bwe yawangula Sihoni ne Ogi, bakabaka b'Abaamori, be yazikiriza n'ensi yaabwe." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Mukama aliwaayo abantu abo mu mikono gyammwe, ne mubakolako nga bwe mbalagidde." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mube bagumu era bamalirivu. Temubatya, era tebabatekemula. Mukama Katonda wammwe yennyini ye aligenda nammwe. Talibalekerera, era talibaabulira mmwe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Awo Musa n'ayita Yoswa, n'amugambira mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli bonna nti: “Beera mugumu era mumalirivu. Ggwe ojja okukulembera abantu bano okugenda okwefuga ensi Mukama gye yalayira okuwa bajjajjaabwe." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Era Mukama yennyini, omukulembeze wammwe, anaabeeranga naawe. Taakulekererenga, era taakwabulirenga. Totya era totekemuka.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Awo Musa n'awandiika Amateeka ago, n'agakwasa bakabona Abaleevi, abaasitulanga Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama, era n'abakulembeze bonna aba Yisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Musa n'abalagira nti: “Buli myaka musanvu bwe ginaggwangako, mu kiseera ekyateekebwawo okusonyiyirangamu amabanja, ku Mbaga ey'Ensiisira," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ng'Abayisirayeli bonna bazze okusinza Mukama Katonda wammwe, mu kifo ky'aliba yeerobozezza okumusinzizangamu, munaasomeranga Amateeka gano mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli bonna bawulire." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Munaakuŋŋaanyanga abantu bonna, abasajja n'abakazi n'abaana abato, n'abagwira ababeera mu bibuga byammwe, bawulire era bayige okussangamu Mukama Katonda wammwe ekitiibwa, n'okukwatanga Amateeka gano gonna, bagatuukirizenga," 
Deuteronomy31:13 era abaana baabwe abatannagayiga bawulire, bayige okussangamu Mukama Katonda wammwe ekitiibwa ennaku zonna ze mulibeera mu nsi gye mugenda okwefuga nga musomose Omugga Yorudaani.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Kaakano osigazzaayo ennaku ntono ofe. Yita Yoswa, mweyanjule mu Weema ey'okunsisinkanirangamu, ndyoke mmulagire.” Awo Musa ne Yoswa ne bagenda ne beeyanjula mu Weema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Nga bali eyo, Mukama n'abalabikira mu mpagi ey'ekire. Empagi eyo n'eyimirira waggulu w'oluggi lw'Eweema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Onootera okufa weegatte ku bajjajjaabo. Abantu bano tebaliba beesigwa gye ndi era balimenya endagaano gye nakola nabo. Balindekawo ne basinza balubaale b'omu nsi gye bagenda okubeerangamu. 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ndibasunguwalira mu kiseera ekyo. Ndibaabulira ne mbeekweka, ne bazikirizibwa. Balituukibwako ebizibu n'okubonaabona okungi. Olwo balitegeera ng'ebizibu ebyo bibatuuseeko kubanga Nze Katonda waabwe sikyali wamu nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Era sirirema kubeekwekera ddala olw'ebibi byonna bye baliba bakoze, kubanga baliba bakyuse ne basinza balubaale." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Kale kaakano, ggwe wennyini wandiika oluyimba luno, era oluyigirize Abayisirayeli, olubayimbise. Oluyimba luno lwe lunaabanga omujulizi wange alumiriza Abayisirayeli abo," 
Deuteronomy31:20 kubanga kaakano ŋŋenda okubayingiza mu nsi engimu era engagga, gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe. Naye bwe balimala okulya ne bakkuta, ne bagejja, balikyukira balubaale ne babaweereza, ne banyooma nze, ne bamenya endagaano yange." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ekiseera bwe kirituuka ne batuukibwako akabi n'okubonaabona okungi, oluyimba luno lunaayimbibwanga, ne luba omujulizi abalumiriza, kubanga ne bazzukulu baabwe tebaalwerabirenga. Ne kaakano, nga sinnabatwala mu nsi gye nneerayirira okubawa, mmanyi kye balowooza okukola.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Awo Musa n'awandiika oluyimba luno ku lunaku olwo, n'aluyigiriza Abayisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Awo Mukama n'ayogera ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, n'amugamba nti: “Beera mugumu, era mumalirivu, kubanga ggwe olituusa Abayisirayeli mu nsi gye nabalayirira, era nze nnaabeeranga wamu naawe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Awo Musa bwe yamala okuwandiika mu kitabo ebigambo by'Amateeka gano n'okubimalirayo ddala obutalekaayo na kimu," 
Deuteronomy31:25 n'alagira Abaleevi abaasitulanga Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama, n'agamba nti:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Mutwale ekitabo kino eky'Amateeka, mukiteeke ku mabbali g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama Katonda wammwe, kibeerenga eyo, nga bwe bujulizi obulumiriza abantu be." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Mmanyi nga bwe bali abajeemu era abakakanyavu, kubanga ne leero nga nkyali mulamu, nga ndi wamu nabo, babadde bajeemera Mukama. Kale tebalyeyongera nnyo okumujeemera nga mmaze okufa?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Mumpitire abakulu bonna ab'ebika byammwe, n'abakulembeze bammwe, bakuŋŋaane, ndyoke njogere ebigambo bino nga bawulira, nkoowoole eggulu n'ensi, bibe abajulizi ababalumiriza," 
Deuteronomy31:29 kubanga mmanyi nga bwe ndimala okufa, balyefuulira ddala babi, ne bagaana okukola bye mbalagidde. Era gye bujja, balituukibwako ebizibu, kubanga baliba basunguwazizza Mukama nga bakola by'alaba nga bibi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Musa n'ayogera ebigambo by'oluyimba luno byonna, ng'ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli kyonna kiwulira." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Ggwe ggulu, ntegera amatu njogere, naawe ensi, wuliriza bye ŋŋamba." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Bye njigiriza bibe ng'enkuba etonnya, bye njogera bigwe ng'omusulo, ng'olukubakuba ku bimera ebigonvu, ng'oluwandaggirize ku muddo omuto." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Nja kutenda erinnya lya Mukama, njatule nga Katonda waffe bw'ali Omukulu." 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Ye w'amaanyi atutaasa, era akola ebituukiridde, asalawo obulungi ensonga. Katonda mwesigwa, wa mazima, akola ebituufu eby'obwenkanya." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Naye abantu be boonoonyi, era tebasaanidde kuba babe. Bafuuse ggwanga kkakanyavu, eryakyama." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Bwe mutyo bwe muyisa Mukama, mmwe abantu abatalina magezi? Si ye kitammwe eyabateekawo? Si ye yabafuula eggwanga?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Mujjukire ebiseera eby'edda, mulowooze emyaka gy'emirembe emingi. Mubuuze bakitammwe babalage, bajjajjammwe bababuulire ebyabaawo." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Atenkanika bwe yagabira amawanga ebyago, bwe yayawulamu abantu. Yabateerawo ensalo zaabwe ng'agoberera omuwendo gw'abaana ba Katonda." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Aba Yakobo yabafuula babe, gwe mugabo ogugwe ku bubwe." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Yabasanga babungeetera mu ddungu ekkalu kibuyaga mw'akuntira, n'abakuuma n'abalabirira, ng'omuntu bw'alabirira emmunye y'eriiso lye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ng'empungu bw'eyaliirira ekisu kyayo, n'epapalira awali abaana baayo, n'ebatwalira ku biwaawaatiro byayo, ne Mukama bwe yabawanirira obutagwa." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Mukama yekka ye yabakulembera. Tewali lubaale yamukwatirako. 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Yabawa okubeera mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne balya emmere erimiddwa mu nnimiro. Baasanga omubisi gw'enjuki mu njazi, ettaka ery'oluyinjayinja ne libaza emizayiti gyabwe." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ente zaabawa omuzigo, era baakama amata mu mbuzi zaabwe. Ne bazaaza endiga engevvu, ne bafuna eŋŋaano ennungi. Ne beesogoleranga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omuwoomu omuka." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Abayisirayeli ne bagaggawala, naye ne bajeema. Baagejjuka, emmere n'ebazimbulula. Ne bava ku Mutonzi waabwe, ne banyooma ow'amaanyi, omulokozi waabwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Baasenga balubaale, ne bamukwasa obuggya. Baakola ebyenyinyalwa, ne bamusunguwaza." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baatambirira balubaale, sso si Katonda; balubaale abatamanyiddwa, balubaale abaggya, abataasinzibwanga bajjajjaabwe." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Beerabira Omuyinza eyabatonda, tebajjukira Katonda eyabawa obulamu." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Mukama bwe yakiraba n'asunguwala. N'atamwa batabani be ne bawala be. 
Deuteronomy32:20 N'agamba nti: ‘Nja kubeekweka, ndabe enkomerero yaabwe. Bafuuse zzadde bbi, baana abatalina kukkiriza." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bankwasizza obuggya nga beewa ebitali Nze Katonda. Bansunguwazizza, nga beesiga ebitaliimu. Nange ndibakwasa obuggya, nga nnumirwa abatali bantu bange. Ndibasunguwaza nga ŋŋanza eggwanga ly'abatalina magezi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Obusungu bwange bukoledde ng'omuliro okwokya buli ekiri ku nsi. Bunaayaka okutuuka emagombe wansi eyo, bwokye emisingi gy'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “ ‘Ndibatuusaako akabi aka buli ngeri. Ndimalira obusaale bwange ku bo. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Banaafanga enjala n'omusujja, bazikirizibwe endwadde ez'akabi. Ndisindika ensolo enkambwe zibalye, N'emisota egy'obusagwa gibabojje." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Entalo ebweru n'ekikangabwa mu nnyumba, binattanga abalenzi n'abawala, omukadde ow'envi n'omuto ayonka." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nagamba nti: Ka mbasaasaanye ewala, wabulirewo ddala abajjukira." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Naye ne neekengera okwewaana kw'abalabe: ababakyawa baleme kwerimba nga bagamba nti: Olw'amaanyi gaffe ffe tubawangudde, sso Mukama si ye akoze bino byonna.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Yisirayeli lye ggwanga ly'abatayagala kubuulirirwa. Temuli bategeera mu bo. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Singa balina amagezi banditegedde ekibaleetedde okuwangulwa abalabe. 
Deuteronomy32:30 Omu yandigobye atya olukumi, n'ababiri ne baddusa omutwalo, singa ow'amaanyi abakuuma teyabawaayo, singa Mukama teyabaabulira?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Balubaale b'abalabe banafu, naye Katonda waffe wa maanyi, n'abalabe baffe bennyini ekyo bakimanyi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Boonoonyi ng'ab'e Sodoma ne Gomora. Bali ng'ennimiro z'emizabbibu egibala emizabbibu egy'obutwa, nga n'ebirimba byagyo bikaawa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Omwenge gwagyo guli nga busagwa bwa misota, bukambwe nga bwa mbalasaasa." 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Mukama ajjukira abalabe baabwe kye bakoze. Alinda ekiseera ky'ategese, alyoke abonereze abalabe abo." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Mukama ye awoolera eggwanga, era ye asasula. Obudde bujja kutuuka bagwe, kubanga ekiseera kyabwe eky'okubonaabona kiri kumpi, n'eby'okubajjira byanguwako." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Mukama alisalawo nti abantu be, be basinze omusango. Abaweereza be alibakwatirwa ekisa, bw'aliraba nga bonna baweddemu amaanyi, ng'omusibe n'ow'eddembe tewakyali agalina." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Olwo abantu be alibabuuza nti: ‘Balubaale bali ludda wa, ab'amaanyi be mwesiganga?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Baalyanga amasavu ag'ebitambiro byammwe, ne banywa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu gwe mwabatoneranga banywe. Bajje kaakano babayambe, babe obuwonero bwammwe." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Kaakano mumanye nga Nze era nzekka Nze wuuyo. Tewali Katonda mulala wabula Nze. Nze nzita, era Nze mpa obulamu. Nfumita era ne mponya. Tewali ayinza kunzigyako kiri mu buyinza bwange." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngolola omukono gwange eri eggulu ne ŋŋamba nti: Nga bwe ndi omulamu emirembe gyonna," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ndiwagala ekitala kyange ekimasamasa, nze Omuyinza ne nkozesa obwenkanya. Ndiwoolera eggwanga ku balabe bange, ne mbonereza abankyawa." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Obusaale bwange bulijjula omusaayi, n'ekitala kyange kirirya ennyama awamu n'omusaayi ogw'abattiddwa n'abawambiddwa, n'emitwe gy'abakulembeze b'abalabe.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Mmwe amawanga mutendereze abantu ba Mukama, kubanga aliwoolera eggwanga ku abo abatta abaweereza be, n'akwatirwa ekisa ensi ye n'abantu be.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Bw'atyo Musa bwe yajja ne Hoseya mutabani wa Nuuni, ne boogera ebigambo by'oluyimba olwo byonna, ng'abantu bawulira." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Musa bwe yamala okwogera n'Abayisirayeli ebigambo ebyo byonna," 
Deuteronomy32:46 n'agamba nti: “Musseeyo omwoyo ku bigambo byonna bye mbategeezezza olwaleero. Mubiyigirize abaana bammwe, bafengayo okutuukiriza byonna ebiragirwa mu mateeka gano," 
Deuteronomy32:47 kubanga bino si bigambo bya kusaaga, naye bya bulamu bwammwe bwennyini, era bye biribawangaaliza mu nsi gye mugenda okwefuga nga musomose Omugga Yorudaani.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Awo Mukama n'agamba Musa ku lunaku olwo nti: 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Yambuka mu nsozi z'e Abariimu mu nsi y'e Mowaabu, eyolekedde ekibuga Yeriko, oyambuke ku Lusozi Nebo, olengere ensi y'e Kanaani, gye mpa Abayisirayeli ebe obutaka bwabwe," 
Deuteronomy32:50 ofiire ku lusozi olwo, weegatte ku bajjajjaabo, nga muganda wo Arooni bwe yafiira ku Lusozi Hori, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe," 
Deuteronomy32:51 kubanga mmwe mwembi mwasobya ne munnyiiriza mu Bayisirayeli. Bwe mwali ku mazzi g'e Meriba ku Kadesi, mu ddungu ly'e Ziini, temwanzisaamu kitiibwa." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ojja kulengera bulengezi ensi gye mpa Abayisirayeli, naye tojja kugiyingiramu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Guno gwe mukisa, Musa omusajja wa Katonda, gwe yasabira Abayisirayeli nga tannaba kufa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Yagamba nti: “Mukama yava ku Lusozi Sinaayi, n'avaayo ng'enjuba ku Seyiri, n'ayaka ng'asinziira ku Lusozi Parani, ng'ali wamu n'obukumi bw'abatuukirivu, n'omuliro ogwaka nga gumuli ku ludda lwe olwa ddyo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Weewaawo ayagala abantu be. Abaamwawulirwa bali mu mikono gye. Batuula kumpi n'ebigere bye okuwulira ebigambo bye. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa yatuwa Amateeka kye ky'omuwendo ennyo eky'eggwanga lya Yakobo. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Mukama yafuuka Kabaka w'Abayisirayeli, ebika byabwe n'abakulembeze baabwe bwe baakuŋŋaana.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Musa n'ayogera ku ba Rewubeeni nti: “Aba Rewubeeni babe balamu baleme kufa kuggwaawo, era beeyongere obungi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 N'ayogera ku ba Yuda nti: “Wulira ayi Mukama omulanga gwa Yuda, omukomyewo mu baganda be. Omulwanirire, omuyambe okumuwonya abalabe be.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ku Baleevi n'agamba nti: “Turimu wo ne Wurimu wo biwe basajja bo abakussaamu ekitiibwa, be wagereza e Massa. Wawakana nabo ku mazzi g'e Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Abaleevi baanywerera ku ggwe okusinga ku bazadde baabwe, ne ku baganda baabwe, ne ku baana baabwe. Baawulira ebiragiro byo, ne bakuuma endagaano yo." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Banaayigirizanga aba Yakobo ebiragiro byo n'amateeka go. Banaayoterezanga obubaane w'oli. Banaawangayo ebitambiro ebyokebwa nga biramba ku alutaari yo. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ebyabwe, ayi Mukama, obiwenga omukisa. Osanyukirenga bye bakola. Betenteranga ddala abalabe baabwe, abo ababakyawa balemenga kuddamu kusituka.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ku Babenyamiini n'agamba nti: “Bano mikwano gya Mukama. Banaabeeranga mirembe w'ali. Anaabakuumanga ekiseera kyonna, era anaabeeranga mu bo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ku ba Yosefu n'agamba nti: “Ensi yaabwe, Mukama agiwe omukisa, ogw'ebirungi ebiva waggulu mu bire, n'ogw'ebiva mu ttaka wansi." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ensi yaabwe ebeemu ebibala ebyengezebwa enjuba, era ebirungi mu buli makungula." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ebe n'eby'omuwendo ennyo ebiva mu nsozi ez'edda, n'ebirungi ebiva mu busozi obutaggwaawo." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ensi yaabwe ejjule ebirungi byonna ebiweereddwa omukisa gwa Mukama, eyayogera ng'asinziira mu kisaka ekyaka omuliro. Emikisa gino gijje ku ba Yosefu, kubanga Yosefu ye yali omukulembeze mu baganda be." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yosefu alina amaanyi ng'ag'ente ennume, n'amayembe ng'ag'embogo. Amayembe ago, gye mitwalo gya Bamanasse, gye mitwalo n'emitwalo gy'Abeefurayimu. Aligatomeza amawanga agasindiikirize, agatuuse ensi gy'ekoma.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ku Zebbulooni ne ku Yissakaari n'agamba nti: “Mmwe Abazebbulooni, musanyuke nga muli mu ŋŋendo zammwe, nammwe Abayissakaari, nga muli awaka." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baliyita ab'amawanga amalala ku lusozi lwabwe, ne baweerangayo eyo ebitambiro ebituufu. Banaafunanga ebyobugagga mu nnyanja, ne mu musenyu ku lubalama.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ku Kika kya Gaadi n'agamba nti: “Aweebwe omukisa agaziya ensi ya Gaadi. Gaadi abwama ng'empologoma, okutaagula omukono n'akawompo k'omu mutwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yatwala ekitundu ekirungi okusinga ebirala, kubanga eyo ye waateekebwa omugabo gw'omukulembeze. Yajja n'abakulembeze b'abantu, n'atuukiriza ebiragiro bya Mukama, n'amateeka ge yawa Yisirayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ne ku Kika kya Daani n'agamba nti: “Daani mwana gwa mpologoma, ogukyayonka. Abuuka okuva mu Basani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ku Kika kya Nafutaali n'agamba nti: “Ggwe Nafutaali, Mukama ow'ekisa akuwadde nnyo omukisa. Funa ensi ey'ebugwanjuba n'ey'omu bukiikaddyo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ku Kika kya Aseri n'agamba nti: “Aseri afune omukisa ogusinga ku gwa banne. Ayagalibwenga baganda be. Ensi ye eyazenga omuzigo ogw'emizayiti. 
Deuteronomy33:25 Ebibuga bye biggalwenga enzigi ez'ekyuma n'ez'ekikomo. Abenga wa maanyi obulamu bwe bwonna.” 
Deuteronomy33:26 Mmwe Abayisirayeli, teri n'omu ali nga Katonda eyeebagala ku ggulu n'ayita mu bbanga. Ng'ali mu kitiibwa ekingi, n'ajja okubayamba." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Katonda ataggwaawo ye abataasa mmwe. Emikono gye egy'olubeerera gye gibawanirira. Anaagobanga abalabe bammwe mu nsi nga mutuuka, mmwe n'abagamba nti: “Mubazikirize.”" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Kale Abayisirayeli banaabeeranga mirembe, bazzukulu ba Yakobo banaabeeranga bokka mu nsi omuli eŋŋaano n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, era efukirirwa omusulo oguva mu ggulu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Oli wa mukisa ggwe Yisirayeli! Ani ali nga ggwe, eggwanga erirokolebwa Mukama? Mukama ye ngabo yo n'ekitala kyo, ebikutaasa, era ebikuwa obuwanguzi. Abalabe bo balijja ne bakwemenyera, ggwe n'obalinnyako." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Awo Musa n'ava mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, n'ayambuka ku Lusozi Nebo, entikko ya Pisuga, olwolekera Yeriko. Mukama n'amulaga ensi eyo yonna ey'e Gileyaadi, okutuuka e Daani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 n'ekitundu kyonna ekya Nafutaali, n'ensi ya Efurayimu ne Manasse, n'ensi yonna eya Yuda, okutuuka ebugwanjuba ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati," 
Deuteronomy34:3 n'ebukiikaddyo, n'olusenyi olw'ekiwonvu eky'e Yeriko ekibuga ky'ensansa, okutuuka e Zowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Mukama n'agamba Musa nti: “Eyo ye nsi gye nalayirira Aburahamu, Yisaaka, ne Yakobo nga ŋŋamba nti ndigiwa ezadde lyabwe. Ngikulengezezza bulengeza, naye tojja kusomoka kugendayo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Awo Musa omuweereza wa Mukama n'afiira eyo mu nsi y'e Mowaabu, nga Mukama bwe yagamba." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Mukama n'amuziika mu kiwonvu mu nsi y'e Mowaabu, okwolekera ekibuga Beti Pewori. Naye ne leero tewali amanyi kifo kyennyini we yaziikibwa." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa we yafiira, yali awezezza emyaka kikumi mu abiri. Kyokka yali akyalaba bulungi era ng'akyali wa maanyi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abayisirayeli ne bakaaba amaziga olwa Musa, okumala ennaku amakumi asatu nga bali mu nsenyi z'e Mowaabu, olwo ekiseera eky'okukungubagiramu nga bakungubagira Musa, ne kiryoka kiggwaako." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni yali ajjudde amagezi, kubanga Musa yali amukakasizza okumusikira. Abayisirayeli ne bawuliranga Yoswa, ne bakolanga nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Okuva olwo tewasibukangawo mulanzi mu Yisirayeli ali nga Musa, Mukama gwe yamanya, n'ayogeranga naye nga balabagana maaso na maaso." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Tewali mulanzi mulala yakola byewuunyo na byamagero ng'ebyo Mukama bye yatuma Musa okukola ku kabaka w'e Misiri, ku bakungu be, ne ku nsi ye yonna." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Era tewali mulanzi mulala yakola bya maanyi ebyo byonna era eby'entiisa eyo yonna nga Musa bye yakola ng'Abayisirayeli bonna balaba. 
Joshua1:1 Awo olwatuuka, Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bwe yamala okufa, Mukama n'ayogera ne Yoswa, omuyambi wa Musa, era mutabani wa Nuuni," 
Joshua1:2 n'agamba nti: “Musa omuweereza wange afudde. Kale kaakano weetegeke, ggwe n'Abayisirayeli bonna, musomoke Omugga Yorudaani, muyingire mu nsi gye mbawa bo." 
Joshua1:3 Nga bwe nagamba Musa, mbawadde mmwe buli kifo kye mulirinnyamu ekigere kyammwe." 
Joshua1:4 Ensalo yammwe eriva ku ddungu mu bukiikaddyo, okutuuka ku Lusozi Lebanooni mu bukiikakkono, era eriva ku mugga omunene Ewufuraate mu buvanjuba, okuyita mu nsi y'Abahiiti, okutuuka ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati mu bugwanjuba." 
Joshua1:5 Yoswa, tewaliba muntu n'omu aliyinza kukuwangula ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo. Nnaabeeranga naawe, nga bwe nabeeranga ne Musa. Siikwabulirenga era siikulekenga." 
Joshua1:6 Ddamu amaanyi, ogume omwoyo, kubanga ggwe olikulembera abantu bano nga bagenda okufuna ensi eno gye nasuubiza bajjajjaabwe okugibawa." 
Joshua1:7 Kale ddamu amaanyi, ogume omwoyo, era wekkaanye otuukirizenga amateeka gonna Musa omuweereza wange ge yakuwa. Togavangako n'akatono, lw'onooweebwanga omukisa buli gy'onoogendanga." 
Joshua1:8 Ekitabo kino eky'Amateeka okisomanga bulijjo, n'okyebuulirirangako emisana n'ekiro, olyoke weegenderezenga okutuukiriza byonna ebikiwandiikiddwamu. Lw'onooweebwanga omukisa n'owangula mu byonna." 
Joshua1:9 Manya nga nze nkulagidde okuddamu amaanyi n'okuguma omwoyo. Totya, era toterebukanga, kubanga nze, Mukama Katonda wo, ndi wamu naawe buli gy'onoogendanga yonna.”" 
Joshua1:10 Awo Yoswa n'alagira abakulembeze 
Joshua1:11 okuyita mu lusiisira, bagambe abantu nti: “Mutegeke emmere yammwe, kubanga mu nnaku ssatu, mujja kusomoka Omugga Yorudaani, okuyingira mufune ensi Mukama, Katonda wamwe gy'abawa ebe eyammwe.”" 
Joshua1:12 Yoswa n'agamba Ebika ekya Rewubeeni, n'ekya Gaadi, n'ekitundu eky'Ekika kya Manasse nti:" 
Joshua1:13 “Mujjukire Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bwe yabagamba nti Mukama, Katonda wammwe alibawa ensi eno ey'ebugwanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani, gye muba mutebenkeramu." 
Joshua1:14 Bakazi bammwe n'abaana bammwe abato balisigala wano wamu n'amagana gammwe, naye mu mmwe, abazira bonna ab'amaanyi, balisomoka nga balina ebyokulwanyisa, ne bakulemberamu baganda bammwe," 
Joshua1:15 okutuusa nabo lwe balimala okutebenkera mu nsi ey'ebugwanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani, Mukama, Katonda wammwe gy'aliwa bo. Olwo muliddayo ne mukkalira mu nsi gye mwafuna mu buvanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani, Musa omuweereza wa Mukama, gye yabawa.”" 
Joshua1:16 Yoswa ne bamuddamu nti: “Byonna by'otulagidde tunaabikola, era tunaagendanga buli gy'onootutumanga." 
Joshua1:17 Tunaakuwuliranga mu byonna nga bwe twawuliranga Musa, era Mukama, Katonda wo abeere naawe nga bwe yali ne Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Buli anaajeemeranga ekiragiro kyo, n'atawulira bigambo byo, mu byonna by'onoomulagiranga, anattibwanga. Ggwe ddamu amaanyi, era guma omwoyo.”" 
Joshua2:1 Awo Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni n'atuma abakessi babiri okuva mu Sittimu, n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mwetegereze ensi y'e Kanaani, naddala Ekibuga Yeriko.” Ne bagenda. Bwe baatuuka mu kibuga, ne bayingira mu nnyumba ya malaaya, erinnya lye Rahabu, ne basulayo." 
Joshua2:2 Kabaka wa Yeriko n'awulira ng'abamu ku Bayisirayeli bazze ekiro okuketta ensi. 
Joshua2:3 N'atumira Rahabu nti: “Abantu abazze ne bayingira mu nnyumba yo, bazze kuketta nsi yaffe yonna. Baggyeeyo.”" 
Joshua2:4 Kyokka omukazi n'abatwala bombi n'abakweka, n'agamba nti: “Weewaawo abantu bazze ewange. Naye nabadde simanyi gye bavudde." 
Joshua2:5 Awo obudde bwe bwabadde bukutte nga tebannaggalawo wankaaki wa kibuga, ne bagenda. Ssaategedde gye balaze. Naye singa mubawondera mangu, mujja kubakwata.”" 
Joshua2:6 Naye yali abalinnyisizza mu kasolya n'abakweka mu miti gy'obugoogwa gye yali atereezezzaayo obulungi. 
Joshua2:7 Abaabawondera bwe baamala okuva mu kibuga, wankaaki waakyo n'aggalwawo. Ne bagenda nga banoonya Abayisirayeli abakessi, okutuuka awasomokerwa Yorudaani." 
Joshua2:8 Abakessi nga tebanneebaka, Rahabu n'alinnya gye bali mu kasolya." 
Joshua2:9 N'abagamba nti: “Mmanyi nga Mukama, ensi eno agibawadde. Abagirimu bonna bakwatiddwa entiisa ku lwammwe," 
Joshua2:10 kubanga twawulira Mukama nga bwe yakaliza mu maaso gammwe Ennyanja Emmyufu bwe mwava mu Misiri. Era twawulira kye mwakola bakabaka ababiri ab'Abaamori, Sihoni ne Ogi, abaali emitala wa Yorudaani, be mwazikiririza ddala." 
Joshua2:11 Bwe twakiwulira, ne tutya, era ffenna mwatumalamu dda amaanyi, kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe, ye Katonda ali waggulu mu ggulu, ne wansi ku nsi." 
Joshua2:12 Kale kaakano mundayirire Mukama oyo, ng'amaka ga kitange munaagakwatirwa ekisa nga nange bwe nkibakwatiddwa mmwe, era mumpe akabonero akanankakasa obwesigwa bwammwe." 
Joshua2:13 Munkakase nga munaawonya kitange ne mmange ne bannyinaze ne baganda bange n'ebyabwe byonna, ne mutatuleka kuttibwa.”" 
Joshua2:14 Abasajja ne bagamba nti: “Tulikuuma obulamu bwammwe nammwe bwe munaakuuma obwaffe. Bwe mutaayogere bino bye tubadde tukola, Mukama bw'alituwa ensi eno, naffe tulikulaga ekisa n'amazima.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rahabu yasulanga ku bbugwe wa kibuga, kubanga ennyumba ye kwe yazimbirwa. N'akozesa omuguwa n'abayamba okukka ng'abayisa mu ddirisa." 
Joshua2:16 N'abagamba nti: “Mulage mu nsozi, ababawondera baleme kubasanga. Mwekwekereyo ennaku ssatu, okutuusa lwe banaakomawo. Oluvannyuma muliyinza okugenda.”" 
Joshua2:17 Abasajja ne bamugamba nti: “Tetulimenya kirayiro kino ky'otulayizza. 
Joshua2:18 Olikola bw'oti: bwe tulirumba ensi yammwe eno, olisiba akaguwa kano akamyufu ku ddirisa ly'otuyisizzaamu. Era olikuŋŋaanyiza mu nnyumba yo, kitaawo, ne nnyoko ne baganda bo, n'ab'omu nnyumba ya kitaawo bonna." 
Joshua2:19 Bwe walibaawo afuluma ennyumba yo n'adda mu luguudo, ye aliba yeereetedde yekka okuttibwa, si ffe tulivunaanibwa. Naye buli alibeera naawe mu nnyumba, n'atuukibwako akabi, oyo gwe tulivunaanibwa." 
Joshua2:20 Wabula bw'olibuulirako omuntu yenna ku bino bye tukola, tuliba tetukyasibibwa kirayiro kyo kino ky'otulayizza.”" 
Joshua2:21 Rahabu n'akkiriza, n'abasiibula ne bagenda, n'asiba akaguwa akamyufu ku ddirisa." 
Joshua2:22 Abakessi ne bagenda ne beekweka mu nsozi, ne babeera eyo ennaku ssatu, okutuusa abaabawondera lwe baakomawo mu Yeriko nga bamaze okubanoonya wonna ne batabalaba." 
Joshua2:23 Awo abakessi bombi ne bavaayo mu nsozi ne basomoka Yorudaani, ne baddayo eri Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, ne bamubuulira byonna ebyabatuukako." 
Joshua2:24 Awo ne bamugamba nti: “Ddala Mukama ensi eno yonna agituwadde. Abantu bonna abagirimu batutidde.” 
Joshua3:1 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli baakeera mu makya, ne bava mu Sittimu, ne batuuka ku Yorudaani, ne basiisira awo nga tebannasomoka." 
Joshua3:2 Bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu, abakulembeze ne bayitaayita mu lusiisira," 
Joshua3:3 ne bagamba abantu nti: “Bwe munaalaba Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama, Katonda wammwe, nga bakabona Abaleevi bagyetisse, ne mulyoka muva mu bifo byammwe, ne mugigoberera," 
Joshua3:4 mulyoke mumanye ekkubo lye mugwanidde okukwata, kubanga ekkubo lino mubadde temuliyitangamu. Naye Essanduuko ey'Endagaano temugisemberera. Munaalekawo ebbanga lya kilomita ng'emu wakati wammwe nayo.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Mwetukuze, kubanga enkya, Mukama ajja kukola ebyamagero mu mmwe.”" 
Joshua3:6 Awo n'agamba bakabona nti: “Musitule Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, mukulemberemu abantu.” Ne bagisitula, ne bakulemberamu." 
Joshua3:7 Awo Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Kye nnaakola olwaleero, kinaaleetera Abayisirayeli bonna okutandika okukussaamu ekitiibwa, n'okukumanya nga ndi naawe, nga bwe nali ne Musa." 
Joshua3:8 Lagira bakabona abasitudde Essanduuko ey'Endagaano nti bwe batuuka mu mazzi g'Omugga Yorudaani, basigale nga bagayimiriddemu.”" 
Joshua3:9 Yoswa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Mujje wano muwulire Mukama, Katonda wammwe by'agamba." 
Joshua3:10 Ku kino kwe munaategeerera nga Katonda Nnnannyinibulamu ali mu mmwe, era nga talirema kugoba Bakanaani na Bahiiti na Bahiivi na Baperezi, na Bagirugaasi, na Baamori, na Bayebusi mmwe nga mulaba." 
Joshua3:11 Mulabe, Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama w'ensi zonna ebakulembeddemu okusomoka Yorudaani." 
Joshua3:12 Kale kaakano mulonde abasajja kkumi na babiri, omu omu okuva mu buli kika kya Yisirayeli." 
Joshua3:13 Bakabona abasitudde Essanduuko ya Mukama bwe banaalinnya mu mazzi, Omugga Yorudaani gujja kulekera awo okukulukuta, amazzi agava engulu, geetuume wamu entuumu.”" 
Joshua3:14 Abantu bwe baava mu weema zaabwe okusomoka Yorudaani, bakabona ne babakulemberamu nga basitudde Essanduuko ey'Endagaano." 
Joshua3:15 Bakabona abo abasitudde Essanduuko bwe baatuuka ku Yorudaani, ne balinnya mu mazzi gaagwo agaali gaaladde ku mbalama zaagwo zonna mu biseera byonna ebyo eby'amakungula," 
Joshua3:16 amazzi agava engulu ne galekera awo okukulukuta, ne geetuuma wamu entuumu, ebbanga ddene, okuviira ddala ku Adamu ekibuga ekiriraanye Zaretaani. Ago agakkirira ku Nnyanja ey'e Araba, ye Nnyanja ey'Omunnyo, ne gaggweerawo ddala, abantu ne basomokera okumpi ne Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Abayisirayeli bonna ne bayita awakalu, nga bakabona abasitudde Essanduuko ey'Endagaano bayimiridde awakalu wakati mu Mugga Yorudaani, okutuusa eggwanga lyonna lwe lyamala okusomoka." 
Joshua4:1 Eggwanga lyonna bwe lyamala okusomoka Yorudaani, Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti:" 
Joshua4:2 “Mulonde mu bantu abasajja kkumi na babiri, omu omu okuva mu buli kika," 
Joshua4:3 era mu balagire balonde amayinja kkumi n'abiri mu makkati ga Yorudaani, mu kifo wennyini bakabona mwe baayimiridde, bagatwale bagateeke mu kifo kye munaasulamu ekiro kino.”" 
Joshua4:4 Awo Yoswa n'ayita abasajja ekkumi n'ababiri be yalonda mu Bayisirayeli, omu omu okuva mu buli kika," 
Joshua4:5 n'abagamba nti: “Mutambule mutuuke wakati mu Yorudaani awali Essanduuko ya Mukama, Katonda wammwe. Buli omu ku mmwe asitule ejjinja, alisse ku kibegabega kye, buli kika kya Yisirayeli ejjinja limu." 
Joshua4:6 Amayinja ago ganajjukizanga abantu, ekyo Mukama ky'akoze. Mu biseera ebigenda okujja, abaana bammwe bwe banaababuuzanga amayinja ago kye gategeeza," 
Joshua4:7 munaabagambanga nti amazzi ga Yorudaani gavaawo ne gaviira Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama bwe yali ng'eyita mu Yorudaani. Amayinja gano ganajjukizanga bulijjo Abayisirayeli ebyo ebibaddewo.” 
Joshua4:8 Abayisirayeli ne bakola nga Yoswa bwe yabalagira. Ne balonda amayinja kkumi n'abiri mu makkati ga Yorudaani, limu limu erya buli kika kya Yisirayeli, nga Mukama bwe yagamba Yoswa, ne bagatwala mu kifo mwe baasula, ne bagateeka eyo." 
Joshua4:9 Ne Yoswa n'asimba amayinja kkumi n'abiri mu Yorudaani wakati, mu kifo bakabona abaasitula Essanduuko ey'Endagaano mwe baayimirira. Amayinja ago gakyaliwo ne kaakano." 
Joshua4:10 Bakabona abaasitula Essanduuko baayimirira mu Yorudaani wakati, okutuusa byonna Mukama bye yalagira Yoswa okubuulira abantu lwe byatuukirira, nga Musa bwe yali alagidde Yoswa. Abantu ne banguwako okusomoka." 
Joshua4:11 Awo abantu bonna bwe baamala okusomoka, bakabona abaali n'Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano ne bakulemberamu abantu." 
Joshua4:12 Ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'omu kya Gaadi, n'ab'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ab'omu Kika kya Manasse ne bakulemberamu Abayisirayeli abalala, nga balina ebyokulwanyisa, nga Musa bwe yali abagambye." 
Joshua4:13 Abantu ng'emitwalo ena abeeteeseteese okulwana olutalo ne bayita mu maaso ga Mukama mu lusenyi olw'e Yeriko. 
Joshua4:14 Mukama bye yakola ku lunaku olwo ne bireetera Abayisirayeli okumanya nga Yoswa muntu mukulu. Ne bamussangamu ekitiibwa ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe, nga bwe baakissangamu Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Awo Mukama n'agamba Yoswa 
Joshua4:16 alagire bakabona abasitudde Essanduuko, bambuke bave mu Yorudaani." 
Joshua4:17 Awo Yoswa n'abalagira nti: “Mwambuke, muve mu Yorudaani.”" 
Joshua4:18 Awo bakabona abaasitula Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano bwe baayambuka ne bava mu Yorudaani, ne balinnya ku lukalu, amazzi gaagwo ne gaddamu okukulukuta n'okwanjaala ku mbalama zaagwo, ng'edda." 
Joshua4:19 Abantu baasomoka Yorudaani ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, mu mwezi ogw'olubereberye, ne basula e Gilugaali mu buvanjuba bwa Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Eyo Yoswa gye yasimba amayinja ekkumi n'abiri ge baggya mu Yorudaani. 
Joshua4:21 N'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Mu biseera ebijja abaana bammwe bwe banaababuuzanga amayinja gano kye gategeeza," 
Joshua4:22 munaabagambanga nti: ‘Abayisirayeli baasomoka Omugga Yorudaani guno nga mukalu.’ 
Joshua4:23 Munaabategeezanga nga Mukama Katonda wammwe bwe yakaliza amazzi ga Yorudaani, okutuusa lwe mwamala okusomoka, nga bwe yakaliza Ennyanja Emmyufu nga mugisomoka." 
Joshua4:24 Olwa kino, ab'amawanga gonna ku nsi balimanya obuyinza bwa Mukama nga bwe buli obw'amaanyi, era mulissaamu Mukama Katonda wammwe ekitiibwa ennaku zonna.”" 
Joshua5:1 Awo bakabaka bonna ab'Abaamori abaali ku ludda lwa Yorudaani olw'ebugwanjuba ne bakabaka ab'Abakanaani abaali ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Eyaawakati, bwe baawulira nga Mukama yakaliza amazzi ga Yorudaani okutuusa Abayisirayeli lwe baamala okusomoka, ne batya nnyo, ne baggwaamu amaanyi olw'Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua5:2 Awo Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Kola obwambe obw'amayinja, okomole Abayisirayeli abo abatakomolebwanga.”" 
Joshua5:3 Yoswa n'akola nga Mukama bwe yamulagira, n'akomola Abayisirayeli ku lusozi oluyitibwa olw'Okukomola." 
Joshua5:4 Yoswa yabakomola lwa nsonga. Weewaawo Abayisirayeli okuva e Misiri abasajja bonna baali bakomole. Naye mu bbanga ery'emyaka amakumi ana, Abayisirayeli gye baatambula mu ddungu, abaana ab'obulenzi tebaakomolebwanga. N'ekirala, ebbanga eryo we lyaggweerako, abasajja bonna abaali basobola okulwana olutalo we baaviira mu Misiri, baali bafudde baweddewo, kubanga baali bajeemedde Mukama. Abo Mukama yalayira obutabaganya kulaba ku nsi ngimu era ngagga gye yasuubiza bajjajjaabwe." 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Batabani ba bano tebaali bakomole. Abo Yoswa be yakomola. 
Joshua5:8 Okukomolebwa bwe kwaggwa, eggwanga lyonna ne lisigala mu lusiisira, abakomole ne bamala okuwona." 
Joshua5:9 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Olwaleero mbaggyeeko okuswala kwe mwalimu e Misiri.” Ekifo ekyo kyekyava kiyitibwa Gilugaali ne kaakano. 
Joshua5:10 Abayisirayeli bwe baali bakyasiisidde e Gilugaali mu lusenyi olw'e Yeriko, ne balya Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, mu kawungeezi k'olunaku lw'omwezi olw'ekkumi n'ennya." 
Joshua5:11 Olunaku olwaddirira, lwe baasookerako okulya emmere gye baalima mu nsi y'e Kanaani: emmere ey'empeke ensiike n'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa." 
Joshua5:12 Olwo ne mannu n'erekera awo okugwa, Abayisirayeli ne bataddayo kugifuna. Okuva olwo ne balyanga emmere erimwa mu nsi y'e Kanaani." 
Joshua5:13 Yoswa bwe yali okumpi ne Yeriko, n'alaba omusajja ayimiridde mu maaso ge, ng'akutte ekitala ekisowole. Yoswa n'amusemberera, n'amubuuza nti: “Oli omu ku ffe oba oli omu ku balabe baffe?”" 
Joshua5:14 Oli n'addamu nti: “Nedda; naye nze mukulu w'eggye lya Mukama. Kaakano ntuuse.” Yoswa n'avuunama mu maaso ge n'asinza. N'agamba nti: “Mukama wange, ndi muweereza wo, kiki ky'oyagala nkole?”" 
Joshua5:15 Omukulu w'eggye lya Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Yambulamu engatto mu bigere byo, kubanga ekifo ky'oyimiriddemu kitukuvu.” Yoswa n'akola bw'atyo." 
Joshua6:1 Enzigi za Yeriko zaali ziggaliddwawo ddala, olw'okwerinda Abayisirayeli, nga tewali n'omu ayingira, wadde afuluma." 
Joshua6:2 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Ntadde mu mikono gyo ekibuga Yeriko ne kabaka waamu, n'abalwanyi ab'amaanyi." 
Joshua6:3 Ggwe n'abalwanyi bo, mujja kutambula mukyetooloole omulundi gumu buli lunaku, okumala ennaku mukaaga." 
Joshua6:4 Bakabona musanvu, nga buli omu akutte eŋŋombe ey'ejjembe ly'endiga ennume, bajja kukulemberamu Essanduuko ey'Endagaano. Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu mulitambula okwetooloola ekibuga emirundi musanvu, nga bakabona bafuuwa eŋŋombe." 
Joshua6:5 Awo balifuuwa nnyo eŋŋombe. Bwe muliwulira eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, abantu bonna ne baleekaana mu maloboozi ag'omwanguka, ekisenge ky'ekibuga ne kiryoka kigwa. Olwo eggye lyonna ne liyingira butereevu mu kibuga.”" 
Joshua6:6 Awo Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni n'ayita bakabona n'abagamba nti: “Musitule Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, era musanvu ku mmwe bagikulemberemu nga bakutte eŋŋombe ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume.”" 
Joshua6:7 Awo n'agamba basajja be nti: “Mutambule, mwetooloole ekibuga. Abalina ebyokulwanyisa bakulemberemu Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano.”" 
Joshua6:8 Awo Yoswa bwe yamala okulagira bw'atyo abantu, bakabona omusanvu abakutte eŋŋombe omusanvu ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume nga bali mu maaso ga Mukama, ne bagenda nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe, nga bakabona abasitudde Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama bavaako emabega." 
Joshua6:9 Abaalina ebyokulwanyisa ne bakulemberamu bakabona abafuuwa eŋŋombe. Olwo abaali bakoobera emabega ne bagoberera Essanduuko, ne bafuuwa eŋŋombe nga batambula." 
Joshua6:10 Kyokka Yoswa yali alagidde basajja be nti: “Temuleekaana era temubaako kye mwogera, wadde okuwuliza eddoboozi lyammwe, okutuusa ku lunaku lwe ndibalagira, olwo ne mulyoka muleekaana.”" 
Joshua6:11 Awo n'abalagira okutwala Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano bagyetoolooze ekibuga omulundi gumu. Olwo ne badda mu lusiisira ne basula omwo. 
Joshua6:12 Yoswa n'azuukuka ku makya ku lunaku olwaddirira. 
Joshua6:13 Ne bakabona omusanvu abakutte eŋŋombe omusanvu ez'amayembe g'endiga ennume, ne bakulemberamu Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano, ne bagenda nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe obutasalako. Abalwanyi abalina ebyokulwanyisa ne bakulemberamu. Abavaako emabega ne batambulira emabega w'Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano. Ebbanga lyonna ng'eŋŋombe zivuga." 
Joshua6:14 Ne ku lunaku olwokubiri, ne beetooloola ekibuga omulundi gumu, ne baddayo mu lusiisira. Baakola bwe batyo okumala ennaku mukaaga." 
Joshua6:15 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu ne bakeera nkya mu matulutulu, ne beetooloola ekibuga mu ngeri ye emu. Naye ku lunaku olwo ne bakyetooloola emirundi musanvu." 
Joshua6:16 Ku mulundi ogw'omusanvu bakabona bwe baafuuwa eŋŋombe, Yoswa n'agamba basajja be nti: “Muleekaane, kubanga ekibuga Mukama akibawadde!" 
Joshua6:17 Ekibuga n'ebikirimu byonna bya kuweebwayo eri Mukama bizikirizibwe. Rahabu malaaya n'ab'omu nnyumba ye be bokka ab'okutalizibwawo, kubanga yakweka abakessi be twatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Naye mwewalire ddala okubaako kye mutwala ku by'okuzikiriza. Bwe munaatwalako, mujja kuleetera olusiisira lw'Abayisirayeli emitawaana n'okuzikirizibwa." 
Joshua6:19 Naye ebintu byonna ebya ffeeza, n'ebya zaabu, n'eby'ekikomo, n'eby'ekyuma, byawuliddwa Mukama, bya kutwalibwa mu ggwanika lya Mukama.”" 
Joshua6:20 Awo bakabona ne bafuuwa eŋŋombe. Abasajja bwe baawulira eddoboozi ly'eŋŋombe, ne baleekaana n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ekisenge ekyetoolodde ekibuga ne kigwa wansi. Awo eggye lyonna ne lyambuka mu kibuga, buli omu ng'agenda butereevu mu maaso ge, ekibuga ne bakiwamba." 
Joshua6:21 Ne batta bonna abaali mu kibuga, abasajja n'abakazi, abato era n'abakulu, awamu n'ente, n'endiga n'endogoyi." 
Joshua6:22 Abasajja ababiri abaakola ogw'obukessi, Yoswa n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu nnyumba y'omukazi malaaya mumufulumye, ye n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna nga bwe mwamulayirira.”" 
Joshua6:23 Abavubuka abakessi ne bayingira ne bafulumya Rahabu, wamu ne kitaawe ne nnyina ne baganda be, era n'abantu be abalala bonna, n'ebibye byonna, ne babaleeta, ne babateeka kumpi n'olusiisira lw'Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua6:24 Awo ekibuga ne bakyokya omuliro, n'ebyalimu byonna. Naye ffeeza ne zaabu n'ebintu eby'ekikomo n'eby'ekyuma ne babitwala mu ggwanika lya Mukama." 
Joshua6:25 Kyokka Yoswa n'awonya obulamu bwa Rahabu malaaya, n'obw'ab'omu nnyumba ya kitaawe wa Rahabu oyo, n'obwa bonna be yalina, kubanga Rahabu oyo yakweka abakessi, Yoswa be yatuma okuketta Yeriko. Bazzukulu ba Rahabu bakyali mu Yisirayeli ne kaakano." 
Joshua6:26 Mu biro ebyo, Yoswa n'ayisa ekirangiriro eky'amaanyi ekigamba nti: “Buli agezaako okuzimba obuggya ekibuga kino Yeriko, akolimirwe mu maaso ga Mukama. Buli alissaawo omusingi gwakyo, alifiirwa omwana we omuggulanda. Buli aliwangamu enzigi zaakyo, alifiirwa omwana we omuggalanda.”" 
Joshua6:27 Bw'atyo Mukama n'abeera ne Yoswa, ettutumu lye ne libuna mu nsi eyo yonna." 
Joshua7:1 Naye Abayisirayeli ne batakuuma kiragiro kya Mukama eky'obutatwala ku bintu ebyali eby'okuzikiriza. Akani mutabani wa Karumi era muzzukulu wa Zabudi era owa Zeera ow'omu Kika kya Yuda, yatwala ku bintu ebyo, Mukama n'asunguwalira Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua7:2 Yoswa n'atuma abantu okuva e Yeriko okugenda e Ayi, ekibuga ekiri ebuvanjuba bwa Beteli, okumpi ne Betaveni, n'abagamba bagende bakette ekitundu ekyo. Ne bagenda ne baketta Ayi." 
Joshua7:3 Ne bakomawo eri Yoswa ne bamugamba nti: “Tekyetaagisa bantu bonna kugenda, naye abantu ng'enkumi bbiri oba ssatu bambukeyo balumbe Ayi. Tosindikayo ggye lyonna kulwana, kubanga abaayo batono.”" 
Joshua7:4 Awo Abayisirayeli ng'enkumi ssatu ne bambukayo, naye ab'e Ayi ne babazzaayo emabega," 
Joshua7:5 ne babagoba okubaggya ku mulyango gw'ekibuga okubatuusa ku birombe by'amayinja, ne babattamu abantu ng'amakumi asatu mu mukaaga ku kaserengeto. Abayisirayeli ne baggwaamu amaanyi, ne batya." 
Joshua7:6 Yoswa n'abakulembeze mu Bayisirayeli ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe olw'okunakuwala. Ne beevuunika ku ttaka mu maaso g'Essanduuko ya Mukama ey'Endagaano, okutuusa akawungeezi, nga beesiize enfuufu ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Joshua7:7 Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Kino nga kitalo, ayi Mukama Katonda! Lwaki wasomosa abantu bano Omugga Yorudaani? Wayagala kutuwaayo eri Abaamori batuzingize? Kale nno singa twamatira ne tusigala ku ludda luli olwa Yorudaani!" 
Joshua7:8 Ayi Mukama, nnaayogera ki ng'Abayisirayeli bamaze okudduka abalabe baabwe?" 
Joshua7:9 Kubanga Abakanaani n'abalala bonna abali mu nsi eno, bajja kuwulira kino batuzingize batusaanyeewo. Kale olwo olikola otya okukuuma ekitiibwa kyo?”" 
Joshua7:10 Awo Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Situka! Lwaki ogudde ku ttaka okwevuunika bw'otyo? 
Joshua7:11 Abayisirayeli boonoonye. Bamenye endagaano yange gye nabalagira okukuuma. Batutte ku bintu ebiteekwa okuzikirizibwa. Babibbye ne babikukusa, ne babiteeka mu bintu byabwe." 
Joshua7:12 Ekyo kye kiremesezza Abayisirayeli okwaŋŋanga abalabe baabwe. Badduse abalabe baabwe, kubanga bo bennyini Abayisirayeli bafuuse ba kuzikirizibwa. Sijja kwongera kubeera nammwe, wabula nga muzikirizza ebintu ebyo bye mwagaanibwa okutwala." 
Joshua7:13 Situka, otukuze abantu. Bagambe beetukuze, okwetegekera olunaku lw'enkya, kubanga nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ggwe Yisirayeli, mu bibyo otereseemu ebintu bye nakulagira okuzikiriza. Tojja kusobola kwaŋŋanga balabe bo nga tonnabyeggyako.’" 
Joshua7:14 Kale bategeeze nti enkya banaaleetebwa nga bali mu bika byabwe. Ekika kye nnaalondamu, kinaavaayo, ab'ennyumba emu nga baddirirwa ab'ennyumba endala. N'ennyumba gye nnaalondamu, buli muntu anaavaayo ng'addirirwa munne." 
Joshua7:15 Oyo anaalondebwamu ng'alina ekiteekwa okuzikirizibwa, ajja kwokebwa omuliro, ye n'ebibye byonna by'alina, kubanga amenye endagaano yange, era akoze eky'obuswavu mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Joshua7:16 Enkeera, Yoswa yazuukuka mu makya, n'aleeta Abayisirayeli nga bali mu bika byabwe. Ekika kya Yuda ne kirondebwamu." 
Joshua7:17 N'aleeta ab'Ekika kya Yuda, n'alondamu ab'ennyumba ya Zeera, ne bavaayo buli muntu kinnoomu, Zabudi n'alondebwamu." 
Joshua7:18 Oyo n'aleeta ab'omu nnyumba ye kinnoomu. Akani mutabani wa Karumi era muzzukulu wa Zabudi, era muzzukulu wa Zeera ow'omu Kika kya Yuda, n'alondebwamu." 
Joshua7:19 Yoswa n'agamba Akani nti: “Mwana wange, yogera amazima wano mu maaso ga Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, oyatule. Kaakano mbuulira ky'okoze, tokinkisa.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani n'addamu nti: “Mazima nayonoonye ne nnyiiza Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, era kino kye nakoze:" 
Joshua7:21 bwe nalabye mu munyago ekyambalo ekirungi ekyava e Sinaari, ne kilo nga bbiri eza ffeeza, n'ekitole kya zaabu ekiweza obuzito nga bwa kimu kyakubiri ekya kilo, ne mbiyaayaanira ne mbitwala. Biziikiddwa mu weema yange, nga ffeeza ye ali wansi.”" 
Joshua7:22 Awo Yoswa n'atuma ababaka, ne bagenda bunnambiro mu weema ya Akani, ne basanga nga ddala ebintu gyebiri, nga ffeeza ye ali wansi." 
Joshua7:23 Ne babiggyayo mu weema, ne babireetera Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli bonna, ne babissa wansi mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Joshua7:24 Yoswa wamu n'Abayisirayeli bonna, ne bakwata Akani, mutabani wa Zeera, ne ffeeza n'ebyambalo, n'ekitole kya zaabu, ne batabani be ne bawala be, n'endogoyi ze n'endiga ze, ne weema ye, n'ebibye ebirala byonna, ne babatwala mu Kiwonvu Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Lwaki otuleetedde emitawaana? Kaakano Mukama emitawaana agituuse ku ggwe!” Abantu bonna ne bakuba Akani amayinja, n'afa. Era ne bakuba ab'omu nnyumba ye amayinja, ne bamwokera wamu nabo omuliro era n'ebintu bye byonna." 
Joshua7:26 Ne bamutuumako entuumu ennene ey'amayinja, ekyaliwo ne kaakano. Ekiwonvu ekyo kyekyava kiyitibwa Ekiwonvu Akori. Awo Mukama n'aggweebwako obusungu bwe obukambwe." 
Joshua8:1 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Totya era toterebuka. Twala abalwanyi bo bonna oyambuke e Ayi. Nja kukuwa okuwangula kabaka w'e Ayi n'abantu be n'ekibuga kye n'ensi ye. 
Joshua8:2 Ojja kukola ku Ayi ne kabaka waakyo kye wakola ku Yeriko ne kabaka waakyo. Naye ku mulundi guno ebintu n'amagana muyinza okubyesigaliza ng'omunyago gwammwe. Muteegere ekibuga emabega waakyo.” 
Joshua8:3 Awo Yoswa n'asituka n'abalwanyi bonna, n'ayambuka e Ayi. N'alondamu abazira ab'amaanyi emitwalo esatu, n'abasindika ekiro." 
Joshua8:4 N'abalagira nti: “Muteegere ekibuga emabega waakyo, naye nga temuli wala nakyo, mwetegeke mwenna okulumba." 
Joshua8:5 Nze n'abantu bonna abanaaba nange, tunaasemberera ekibuga. Ab'omu kibuga bwe banajja okutulumba, tujja kukyuka tubadduke, nga bwe twakola olwasooka." 
Joshua8:6 Bajja kutuwondera, okutuusa nga tumaze okubasendasenda beesuule nnyo ekibuga. Bajja kulowooza nti tubadduse nga bwe twakola olwasooka." 
Joshua8:7 Awo mmwe mujja kuva we muteegedde, muwambe ekibuga. Mukama Katonda wammwe anaakiwaayo mu mikono gyammwe." 
Joshua8:8 Bwe munaamala okukiwamba, mukyokye omuliro, nga Mukama bwe yatugamba okukola. Ebyo bye mbalagidde.”" 
Joshua8:9 Awo Yoswa n'abasindika, ne bagenda we banaateegera, ne babeera eyo ebugwanjuba bwa Ayi, wakati wa Ayi ne Beteli. Naye Yoswa ekiro ekyo n'asula mu bantu mu lusiisira." 
Joshua8:10 Enkeera Yoswa n'agolokoka mu makya, n'ayita abalwanyi, ne bakuŋŋaana. Awo ye ng'ali n'abakulembeze mu Yisirayeli, n'abakulembera ne bagenda e Ayi." 
Joshua8:11 Abalwanyi bonna abaali naye ne bambuka, ne batuuka mu maaso g'ekibuga, ne bakuba olusiisira ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono, nga waliwo ekiwonvu wakati waabwe ne Ayi." 
Joshua8:12 N'atwala abantu ng'enkumi ttaano, n'abategeka ne beekweka ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba bw'ekibuga, wakati wa Beteli ne Ayi." 
Joshua8:13 Abalwanyi ne bategekebwa, ng'eggye eddene liri mu bukiikakkono obw'ekibuga, ate ng'abalwanyi abalala bali mu bugwanjuba bwakyo. Yoswa n'amala ekiro ekyo mu kiwonvu." 
Joshua8:14 Awo kabaka w'e Ayi bwe yalaba abasajja ba Yoswa, ye n'abantu be bonna ab'omu kibuga ne banguwa mangu, ne bagenda ku makya mu Kiwonvu kya Yorudaani okulwanyisa Abayisirayeli abo, nga kabaka tamanyi nti waliwo abamuteeze emabega w'ekibuga." 
Joshua8:15 Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli bonna ne beefuula abakyuse okubadduka, ne badduka nga boolekedde eddungu." 
Joshua8:16 Abasajja bonna ab'omu kibuga ne bayitibwa okubawondera. Gye baakoma okuwondera Yoswa, gye baakoma n'okwesuula ekibuga." 
Joshua8:17 Abasajja bonna ne baggwaayo mu Ayi ne mu Beteli okuwondera Abayisirayeli, ne baleka ekibuga nga kiggule, awatali akikuuma." 
Joshua8:18 Awo Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Effumu ly'okutte ligalulire ku Ayi, kubanga nnaakiwaayo mu mikono gyo.” Yoswa n'agalulira ku kibuga ekyo effumu ly'akutte." 
Joshua8:19 Yoswa olwagolola omukono gwe, abateezi ne basituka mangu gye baali beekwese, ne badduka mbiro ne bayingira mu kibuga, ne bakiwamba, amangwago ne bakyokya omuliro." 
Joshua8:20 Ab'e Ayi bwe baatunulako emabega ne balaba omukka oguva mu kibuga nga gunyooka okutuuka mu bire, ne babulwa gye banaddukira, kubanga Abayisirayeli abaali baddukidde mu ddungu, baabakyukira okubalumba." 
Joshua8:21 Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli bonna bwe baalaba ng'abateezi baabwe bawambye ekibuga era nga kinyooka omukka, awo ne bakyuka ne batandika okutta ab'e Ayi." 
Joshua8:22 N'Abayisirayeli abaali mu kibuga, nabo ne bajja okulumba abalabe. Olwo ab'e Ayi ne babeera wakati, nga beetooloddwa Abayisirayeli, ne battibwa bonna, ne wataba n'omu asigalawo, wadde adduka," 
Joshua8:23 okuggyako kabaka w'e Ayi gwe baawamba nga mulamu, ne bamutwalira Yoswa." 
Joshua8:24 Awo Abayisirayeli bwe baamala okuttira ddala abatuuze b'omu Ayi bonna abaali babawondedde mu ddungu, ne bakomawo mu Ayi, ne batta buli muntu eyalimu." 
Joshua8:25 Effumu Yoswa lye yali akutte ng'aligalulidde ku Ayi, n'atalissa wansi okutuusa nga buli eyakirimu amaze okuttibwa. Abantu bonna ab'omu Ayi abasajja n'abakazi emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri, ne battibwa ku lunaku olwo." 
Joshua8:26  
Joshua8:27 Wabula amagana n'ebintu, Abayisirayeli bye baanyaga mu kibuga, ne babyetwalira, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Yoswa." 
Joshua8:28 Awo Yoswa n'ayokya Ayi omuliro, n'akireka nga matongo, era ne leero bwe kikyali." 
Joshua8:29 N'awanika kabaka w'e Ayi ku muti okutuusa olweggulo. Enjuba bwe yagwa, n'alagira bawanuleyo omulambo, ne bagusuula ku mulyango ogwa wankaaki w'ekibuga, ne bagutuumako entuumu ennene ey'amayinja ekyaliwo ne kaakano." 
Joshua8:30 Awo Yoswa n'azimbira Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, alutaari ku Lusozi Ebali." 
Joshua8:31 Yagizimba ng'agoberera ebiragiro bya Musa, omuweereza wa Katonda, bye yawa Abayisirayeli, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa nti: “Alutaari ekolebwenga na mayinja amalamba agatayasiddwa na kyuma kyonna.” Ne baweerako eri Mukama ebitambiro ebyokebwa, era ne bawaayo ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Joshua8:32 Amateeka Musa ge yawandiika, Yoswa n'agawandiika awo ku mayinja ng'Abayisirayeli balaba." 
Joshua8:33 Abayisirayeli bonna enzaalwa era n'ab'amawanga amalala ababeera mu bo, n'abakulembeze baabwe n'abaami era n'abalamuzi baabwe ne bayimirira erudda n'erudda lw'Essanduuko, nga batunuulidde bakabona Abaleevi, abasitudde Essanduuko eyo ey'Endagaano ya Mukama. Ekitundu kyabwe ekimu ekyokubiri, baayimirira nga batunuulidde Olusozi Gerizimu, n'ekitundu ekirala nga batunuulidde Olusozi Ebali. Bw'atyo Musa omuweereza wa Katonda bwe yabalagira okusooka okukola, nga bagenda okuweebwa omukisa." 
Joshua8:34 Awo Yoswa n'asoma mu lwatu Amateeka gonna, omuli ebigambo eby'okusabira omukisa n'okukolima, nga bwe byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Amateeka." 
Joshua8:35 Tewali teeka lya Musa na limu Yoswa ly'ataasomera lukuŋŋaana lwonna olw'Abayisirayeli, omuli abakazi n'abaana abato, n'ab'amawanga amalala ababeera mu bo." 
Joshua9:1 Awo obuwanguzi bwa Yoswa ne buwulirwa mu bakabaka bonna ab'omu bugwanjuba bwa Yorudaani, mu nsozi ne mu nsenyi, ne ku lubalama lwonna olw'Ennyanja Eyaawakati, okutuukira ddala ku Lusozi Lebanooni.
