Abo be bakabaka b'Abahiiti, n'Abaamori, n'Abakanaani, n'Abaperizi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua9:2 Bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira wamu okulwanyisa Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli. 
Joshua9:3 Naye abatuuze b'e Gibiyoni bwe baawulira Yoswa bye yakola ku Yeriko ne ku Ayi," 
Joshua9:4 ne basala amagezi. Ne bagenda ne basiba ebyokulya. Ne bateeka ensawo enkadde ku ndogoyi zaabwe, n'ensawo z'omwenge ez'amaliba enkadde ezikubiddwamu ebiraka." 
Joshua9:5 Ne bambala engoye ezikaddiye, n'engatto ezikaddiye era ezikubiddwamu ebiraka. N'emmere yaabwe yonna ey'entanda yali ekaliridde, ng'ekutte n'obukuku." 
Joshua9:6 Ne bajja mu lusiisira e Gilugaali, ne bagamba Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli nti: “Tuvudde mu nsi ya wala. Twagala mukole naffe endagaano ey'okutabagana.”" 
Joshua9:7 Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Abahiivi abo nti: “Bwe muba nga muli ba kumpi naffe, kale tunaakola tutya nammwe endagaano ey'okutabagana?”" 
Joshua9:8 Ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Tuli baddu bo.” Yoswa n'ababuuza nti: “Mmwe baani? Era muva wa?” 
Joshua9:9 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Ffe abaddu bo tuvudde mu nsi ya wala nnyo okujja wano, kubanga twawulira ku Mukama, Katonda wo. Twawulira ettutumu lye ne byonna bye yakola mu Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 ne byonna bye yakola bakabaka ababiri ab'Abaamori, abaali mu buvanjuba bwa Yorudaani: Sihoni, kabaka w'e Hesubooni, ne Ogi, kabaka w'e Basani, eyali mu Asitarooti." 
Joshua9:11 Abakulembeze baffe n'abantu bonna abali mu nsi yaffe, baatugamba okusibira olugendo luno entanda n'okujja okubasisinkana mmwe, tubategeeze nga tuli baddu bammwe, n'okubasaba mukole naffe endagaano ey'okutabagana." 
Joshua9:12 Emmere yaffe yiino. Twagisiba entanda nga tukyali ka, ng'ekyabuguma ku lunaku lwe twavaayo okujja gye muli. Naye kaakano, yiino ekaliridde, era ekutte obukuku." 
Joshua9:13 N'ensawo ez'omwenge zino ez'amaliba, twazijjuza nga mpya. Naye mulabe! Ziizino ziyuliseyulise! N'ebyambalo byaffe bino n'engatto zaffe, bikaddiye olw'olugendo olunene ennyo.”" 
Joshua9:14 Abayisirayeli ne balya ku ntanda yaabwe, naye ne bateebuuza ku Mukama." 
Joshua9:15 Yoswa n'akola n'abantu b'e Gibiyoni endagaano ey'okutabagana, n'abalagaanya obutabatta. Abakulembeze b'ekibiina ky'Abayisirayeli ne babalayirira okukuuma endagaano eyo." 
Joshua9:16 Bwe waayitawo ennaku ssatu nga bamaze okukola endagaano eyo, Abayisirayeli ne bawulira ng'abantu abo baliraanwa baabwe ab'okumpi ddala." 
Joshua9:17 Abayisirayeli ne batambula, era mu nnaku ssatu ne batuuka mu bibuga byabwe Gibiyoni ne Kefira, ne Beetoti ne Kiriyati Yeyariimu." 
Joshua9:18 Naye Abayisirayeli ne batabatta, kubanga abakulembeze baabwe baali babalayiridde Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Ekibiina kyonna ne kyemulugunyiza abakulembeze." 
Joshua9:19 Naye abakulembeze bonna ne babaddamu nti: “Abantu bano twabalayirira Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Kale kaakano tetuyinza kubakolako kabi. 
Joshua9:20 Kye tunaabakolera kwe kubaleka nga balamu, Mukama aleme kutusunguwalira olw'ekirayiro kye twabalayirira.”" 
Joshua9:21 Abakulembeze era ne bagamba nti: “Mubaleke nga balamu, basennyerenga enku era basenerenga amazzi ekibiina kyonna eky'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Joshua9:22 Yoswa n'atumya abantu b'e Gibiyoni, n'ababuuza nti: “Lwaki mwatulimba nga mugamba nti muli ba wala nnyo, sso ate nga muli ba wano kumpi?" 
Joshua9:23 Kale kaakano mukolimiddwa. Abantu bammwe banaabanga baddu bulijjo, abanaasennyeranga enku era abanaaseneranga amazzi Ennyumba ya Katonda wange.”" 
Joshua9:24 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Ssebo, ekyo twakikola, kubanga ffe abaddu bo, twawulira nti ddala kituufu nga Mukama, Katonda yalagira omuweereza we Musa okubawa mmwe ensi eno yonna, n'okutta abantu bonna abagirimu nga mujja. Bwe mwajja, ne tutya nnyo nti mujja kututta, kyetwava tukola ekyo." 
Joshua9:25 Kaakano tuli mu mikono gyo. Tukole kyonna ky'olaba nga kirungi era nga kye kituufu.” 
Joshua9:26 Era Yoswa kye yakola kwe kubakuuma, n'ataganya Bayisirayeli kubatta." 
Joshua9:27 Wabula okuva olwo n'abalagira okusennyeranga enku n'okukimiranga amazzi Abayisirayeli ne alutaari ya Mukama, mu kifo Mukama ky'anaasiimanga. Ogwo gwe mulimu gwe bakyakola ne kaakano." 
Joshua10:1 Awo Adonizedeki kabaka w'e Yerusaalemu, n'awulira nga Yoswa awambye era ng'asaanyirizzaawo ddala Ayi, n'atta ne kabaka waakyo, nga bwe yakola Yeriko ne kabaka waakyo. Era n'awulira ng'ab'e Gibiyoni bakoze endagaano ey'okutabagana n'Abayisirayeli, era nga babeera mu bo." 
Joshua10:2 Abantu b'e Yerusaalemu ne batya nnyo, kubanga Gibiyoni kyali kibuga kinene, ng'ekibuga ekirala kyonna ekyalimu kabaka. Kyali kinene okusinga Ayi, n'abantu baayo nga balwanyi ba maanyi." 
Joshua10:3 Awo Adonizedeki n'atumira Kabaka Hohamu ow'e Heburooni ne Kabaka Piramu ow'e Yarumuti, ne Kabaka Yafiya ow'e Lakisi, ne Kabaka Debiri ow'e Egulooni nti:" 
Joshua10:4 “Mujje munnyambe okulumba Gibiyoni, kubanga abantu baakyo bakoze endagaano ey'okutabagana ne Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Bakabaka bano abataano ab'Abaamori: ow'e Yerusaalemu n'ow'e Heburooni, n'ow'e Yerumuti, n'ow'e Lakisi, n'ow'e Egulooni, ne beegatta wamu ne batwala amagye gaabwe gonna, ne basiisira okwebungulula Gibiyoni, ne bakirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:6 Awo ab'e Gibiyoni ne batumira Yoswa mu lusiisira e Gilugaali nti: “Toyabulira baddu bo. Jjangu mangu gye tuli, otudduukirire, otuwonye! Bakabaka bonna ab'Abaamori ababeera mu nsi ey'ensozi beetabye wamu ne batulumba.”" 
Joshua10:7 Awo Yoswa n'ava e Gilugaali n'eggye lye lyonna, omuli n'abalwanyi bonna ab'amaanyi." 
Joshua10:8 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Tobatya, kubanga mmaze okubateeka mu mikono gyo. Tewaabe n'omu mu bo anaasobola kukwesimbako.”" 
Joshua10:9 Ekiro kyonna Yoswa n'atambula n'eggye lye, okuva e Gilugaali, n'azinduukiriza Abaamori nga tebamanyi." 
Joshua10:10 Mukama n'akuba Abaamori entiisa, nga balabye Abayisirayeli. Abayisirayeli ne babattamu bangi nnyo e Gibiyoni, ne babawondera mu kkubo eryambuka e Betooroni, ne babakuba okutuusiza ddala e Azeka ne Makkeda." 
Joshua10:11 Awo Abaamori bwe baali nga badduka Abayisirayeli, Mukama n'atonnyesa amayinja amanene ag'omuzira, ne gabakuba. Abattibwa amayinja ago ag'omuzira, ne basinga obungi abo abattibwa Abayisirayeli." 
Joshua10:12 Ku lunaku Mukama lwe yaweerako Abayisirayeli okuwangula Abaamori, Yoswa n'ayogera ne Mukama mu maaso g'Abayisirayeli, n'agamba nti: “Ggwe enjuba, yimirira waggulu wa Gibiyoni. Naawe omwezi, yimirira waggulu w'Ekiwonvu Ayalooni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Enjuba n'eyimirira, omwezi ne gulinda, okutuusa eggwanga lwe lyamala okuwangula abalabe baalyo. Kino kyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Yasari. Enjuba yalindira ku ggulu wakati, n'etayanguyiriza kugwa, okumala ng'olunaku lulamba." 
Joshua10:14 Tebangawo lunaku, era tewaliba lulala olwenkana ng'olwo, Mukama okuwulira omuntu: kubanga Mukama yalwanirira Yisirayeli!" 
Joshua10:15 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yoswa n'akomawo n'Abayisirayeli bonna mu lusiisira e Gilugaali." 
Joshua10:16 Awo bakabaka abo abataano ab'Abaamori ne badduka, ne beekweka mu mpuku e Makkeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ne wabaawo abaabuulira Yoswa nti: “Bakabaka tubalabye nga beekwese mu mpuku e Makkeda.” 
Joshua10:18 Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Muyiringise amayinja amanene mugateeke mu mulyango gw'empuku, muteekewo n'abakuumi." 
Joshua10:19 Naye mmwe temusigala awo. Muwondere abalabe bammwe, mubakube nga mubava emabega. Temubaganya kuyingira mu bibuga byabwe. Mukama abawadde mmwe okubawangula.”" 
Joshua10:20 Awo Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli ne bamaliriza okutta abantu abangi ennyo kumpi okubamalirawo ddala, mu bibuga ebiriko ebigo." 
Joshua10:21 Olwo Abayisirayeli bonna ne bakomawo mirembe mu lusiisira eri Yoswa mu Makkeda. Tewali muntu n'omu mu nsi eyo eyaguma wadde okwogera obubi ku Bayisirayeli. 
Joshua10:22 Awo Yoswa n'agamba nti: “Mugguleewo omulyango gw'empuku, muggyemu bakabaka bali abataano, mubandeetere.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ne baggulawo empuku, ne baggyamu bakabaka abataano: ow'e Yerusaalemu, n'ow'e Heburooni, n'ow'e Yarumuti, n'ow'e Lakisi, n'ow'e Egulooni." 
Joshua10:24 Ne babaleeta eri Yoswa. Yoswa n'ayita abasajja Abayisirayeli bonna, n'agamba abakulembeze b'abalwanyi abaagenda naye nti: “Mujje mulinnye ebigere byammwe mu bulago bwa bakabaka bano.” Ne bajja, ne balinnya ebigere byabwe mu bulago bwa bakabaka abo." 
Joshua10:25 Awo Yoswa n'agamba abakulembeze nti: “Temutya, era temuggwaamu maanyi, era mugume omwoyo, kubanga kino Mukama ky'agenda okukola ku balabe bammwe bonna be munaalwanyisa.”" 
Joshua10:26 Awo Yoswa n'atta bakabaka abo, emirambo gyabwe n'agiwanika ku miti etaano, ne gibeerayo okutuusa olweggulo." 
Joshua10:27 Enjuba bwe yali egwa, Yoswa n'alagira, ne baggyayo emirambo gyabwe, ne gisuulibwa mu mpuku mwe baali beekwese okusooka, ne bateeka amayinja amanene mu mulyango gw'empuku, agakyaliwo n'okutuusa kati." 
Joshua10:28 Ku lunaku olwo, Yoswa n'alumba era n'awamba Makkeda ne kabaka waamu. N'atta buli muntu eyakirimu, obutalekaawo n'omu. N'akola ku kabaka w'e Makkeda nga bwe yakola ku kabaka w'e Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Awo Yoswa n'ava mu Makkeda ng'ali n'eggye lye lyonna, n'agenda e Labuna n'akirumba." 
Joshua10:30 Mukama n'awa Abayisirayeli nakyo okukiwangula ne kabaka waamu. Ne batta abaakirimu bonna, obutataliza n'omu. Ne bakola ku kabaka waamu nga bwe baakola ku kabaka w'e Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Yoswa n'ava mu Libuna ng'ali n'eggye lye lyonna, n'agenda e Lakisi, n'akyebungulula." 
Joshua10:32 Mukama n'awa Abayisirayeli okuwangula Lakisi ku lunaku olwokubiri. Nga bwe baakola e Libuna, ne batta abantu bonna abaakirimu, nga tebataliza n'omu." 
Joshua10:33 Kabaka Horamu ow'e Gezeri n'ajja okuyamba Lakisi. Kyokka Yoswa n'amuwangula ye n'abantu be, n'atalekaawo n'omu nga mulamu." 
Joshua10:34 Awo Yoswa n'ava mu Lakisi ng'ali n'eggye lye lyonna, n'agenda e Egulooni, n'asiisira okukyebungulula, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:35 Ne bakiwamba ku lunaku olwo lwe lumu, ne batta abantu bonna abaakirimu, nga tebataliza n'omu, mu ngeri ye emu nga bwe baakola e Lakisi." 
Joshua10:36 Awo Yoswa n'ava mu Egulooni ng'ali n'eggye lye lyonna, n'agenda e Heburooni, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:37 Ne bakiwamba, ne batta kabaka waamu n'abantu bonna abaakirimu, n'abaali mu bubuga bwakyo bwonna, nga tebataliza muntu n'omu, mu ngeri ye emu nga bwe baakola mu Egulooni. Yoswa n'akizikiririza ddala, n'atalekaamu muntu n'omu nga mulamu." 
Joshua10:38 Yoswa n'akomawo n'eggye lye lyonna e Debiri, n'akirwanyisa." 
Joshua10:39 N'akiwamba ne kabaka waamu, n'obubuga bwakyo bwonna. Ne batta abaayo bonna, obutalekaawo n'omu. Yoswa n'akola ku Debiri ne kabaka wamu nga bwe yakola ku Heburooni ne Libuna ne bakabaka baamu." 
Joshua10:40 Yoswa n'awangula ensi eyo yonna, ekitundu eky'ensozi, n'ekitundu eky'omu bukiikaddyo, n'eky'ensenyi, n'eky'ebiwonvu, ne bakabaka baamu bonna. N'atta abaayo bonna, nga Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli bwe yalagira, n'atatalizaawo n'omu." 
Joshua10:41 Yoswa n'abawangula okuva e Kadesibaruneya, okutuuka e Gaaza, n'ensi yonna ey'e Goseni, okutuukira ddala e Gibiyoni." 
Joshua10:42 Ne bakabaka abo bonna n'ensi yaabwe Yoswa n'abawangula omulundi gumu, kubanga Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli yalwanirira Yisirayeli" 
Joshua10:43 Awo Yoswa n'akomawo n'eggye lyonna mu lusiisira e Gilugaali. 
Joshua11:1 Awo Yabini kabaka wa Hazori bwe yawulira ebyo, n'atumira Yobabu kabaka wa Madoni, kabaka wa Simurooni n'owa Akusafu," 
Joshua11:2 ne bakabaka abaali mu nsi ey'ensozi mu bukiikaddyo obw'Ennyanja y'e Galilaaya, ne mu nsenyi ne mu nsozi, ne ku lubalama okuliraana Doori." 
Joshua11:3 Era n'atumira n'Abakanaani abaali ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba bwa Yorudaani, n'Abaamori, n'Abahiiti, n'Abaperizi, n'Abayebusi mu nsi ey'ensozi, n'Abahiivi mu nsi y'e Mizupa, Olusozi Herumooni gye lusimba." 
Joshua11:4 Ne bajja n'amagye gaabwe gonna, ng'obungi bali ng'omusenyu oguli ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. Era baalina embalaasi nnyingi nnyo n'amagaali." 
Joshua11:5 Bakabaka abo bonna ne bakuŋŋaana, ne bajja basiisira ku mazzi g'e Meromu okulwanyisa Yisirayeli." 
Joshua11:6 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Tobatya abo, kubanga enkya mu kiseera nga kino, nja kuba nga mmaze okubagabula eri Yisirayeli, nga bafu. Embalaasi zaabwe ojja kuzitema enteega, amagaali gaabwe ogookye omuliro.”" 
Joshua11:7 Awo Yoswa n'ajja ng'ali n'abalwanyi be bonna, n'abazinduukiriza ku mazzi g'e Meromu nga tebamanyi." 
Joshua11:8 Mukama n'awa Abayisirayeli okubawangula, Abayisirayeli ne babakuba, ne babawondera okutuuka ku Sidoni ekinene, ne ku Misurefooti-Mayiimu, ne ku Kiwonvu ky'e Mizupa mu buvanjuba. Ne babatta obutalekaawo n'omu nga mulamu." 
Joshua11:9 Yoswa n'abakolako Mukama kye yamulagira: embalaasi zaabwe n'azitema enteega, amagaali gaabwe n'agookya omuliro." 
Joshua11:10 Awo Yoswa n'adda emabega mu kiseera ekyo, n'awamba Azoni n'atta kabaka waamu. Mu biseera ebyo Hazori kye kyali ekibuga ekikulu eky'obwakabaka obwo bwonna." 
Joshua11:11 Ne batta abantu bonna abaakirimu, ne batalekaawo n'omu nga mulamu, n'ekibuga ne bakyokya omuliro." 
Joshua11:12 Yoswa n'awamba ebibuga ebyo byonna ne bakabaka baamu, n'atta buli muntu nga Musa, omuweereza wa Mukama bwe yalagira." 
Joshua11:13 Naye ebibuga ebyazimbibwa ku bifunvu, oba ku busozi, tebaayokyako na kimu, okuggyako Hazori kyokka. Ekyo Yoswa kye yayokya." 
Joshua11:14 Abayisirayeli ne beetwalira omunyago gw'ebyobugagga byonna n'amagana, bye baggya mu bibuga ebyo. Naye ne batta buli muntu obutalekerawo ddala n'omu nga mulamu." 
Joshua11:15 Mukama ye yawa bw'atyo omuweereza we Musa ebiragiro, Musa n'abiwa Yoswa, ne Yoswa n'abituukiriza. Teyalekayo kintu na kimu Mukama kye yalagira Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'awamba ensi eyo yonna ey'ensozi n'ey'ensenyi mu bukiikakkono ne mu bukiikaddyo, n'ekitundu kyonna eky'e Goseni, n'ensi enkalu ey'ebugwanjuba bwakyo, era n'Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani," 
Joshua11:17 n'okuva ku Lusozi Halaki okwambuka e Seyiri, okutuuka e Baalugaadi mu Kiwonvu kya Lebanooni, wansi w'Olusozi Herumooni. Bakabaka baayo bonna n'abawamba n'abatta." 
Joshua11:18 Yoswa n'alwawo ng'alwanyisa bakabaka b'ebitundu ebyo byonna. 
Joshua11:19 Tewali kibuga kyakola ndagaano ya kutabagana na Bayisirayeli okuggyako Gibiyoni, ekyalimu abamu ku Bahiivi. Ebirala byonna byawambibwa mu lutalo." 
Joshua11:20 Mukama ye yakakanyaza emitima gy'abantu baamu okujja okulwanyisa Abayisirayeli, balyoke battibwe awatali kisa, era bazikiririzibwe ddala, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Mu biseera ebyo, Yoswa n'agenda n'azikiriza Abaanaki mu nsi ey'ensozi, mu Heburooni, mu Debiri, mu Anabu, ne mu nsi yonna ey'ensozi eya Buyudaaya ne Yisirayeli. Yoswa n'abazikiririza ddala n'ebibuga byabwe." 
Joshua11:22 Tewali Baanaki baasigalawo mu nsi y'Abayisirayeli, okuggyako mu Gaaza ne mu Gaati ne mu Asudoodi." 
Joshua11:23 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'awamba ensi eyo yonna, nga Mukama bwe yagamba Musa. Yoswa n'awa Abayisirayeli ensi eyo ebe yaabwe, nga buli kika akiwa ekitundu ekyakyo. Awo ensi n'ewummula entalo, n'eba mirembe." 
Joshua12:1 Bano be bakabaka b'ensi, Abayisirayeli be baawangula ne beefuga ensi yaabwe emitala wa Yorudaani ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba ne beefuga ensi yaabwe okuva ku Kiwonvu ekya Arunoni okwambuka n'Ekiwonvu ekya Yorudaani, okutuuka ku Lusozi Herumooni mu bukiikakkono: baawangula" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyafugiranga mu Hesubooni. Obwakabaka bwe bwazingirangamu ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri ekya Gileyaadi, okuva ku Aroweri, ekiri ku mabbali g'ekiwonvu ekya Arunoni, n'ekibuga ekiri mu kiwonvu wakati, okutuuka ku Mugga Yabboki, ensalo y'Abammoni." 
Joshua12:3 Era bwatwalirangamu Ekiwonvu ekya Yorudaani, okuva ku Nnyanja y'e Galilaaya, mu bukiikaddyo, okutuuka e Betiyesimooti ebuvanjuba bw'Ennyanja y'Omunnyo n'okweyongerayo, okutuuka wansi w'Olusozi Pisuga." 
Joshua12:4 Era baawangula ne Ogi, kabaka w'e Basani, eyali omu ku Bareefa abaasembayo, eyafugiranga mu Asitarooti ne mu Edureyi." 
Joshua12:5 Obwakabaka bwe bwazingirangamu Olusozi Herumooni, ne Saleka, ne Basani yonna, okutuuka ku nsalo ya Gesuri ne Maaka, awamu n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri ekya Gileyaadi, okutuuka ku nsalo y'obwakabaka bwa Sihoni ow'e Hesubooni." 
Joshua12:6 Musa n'Abayisirayeli baawangula bakabaka abo, ensi yaabwe Musa omuweereza wa Mukama n'agiwa Abarewubeeni, n'Abagaadi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse, ebe yaabwe." 
Joshua12:7 Yoswa n'Abayisirayeli baawangula bakabaka bonna mu kitundu eky'ebugwanjuba bwa Yorudaani, okuva e Baalugaadi mu Kiwonvu kya Lebanooni, okutuuka ku Lusozi Halaki, okwambuka e Seyiri. Yoswa n'awa Abayisirayeli ensi eno, ebe yaabwe, buli kika ng'akiwa ekitundu ekyakyo." 
Joshua12:8 Ekitundu ekyo kyazingirangamu ensi ey'ensozi n'ensi ey'ensenyi, n'Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani, n'obusozi obw'ebuvanjuba, n'eddungu, n'ensi ey'omu bukiikaddyo. Ekitundu ekyo mwe mwabeeranga Abahiiti, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Abayisirayeli baawangula bakabaka b'ebibuga bino: Yeriko, Ayi ekiriraanye Beteli," 
Joshua12:10 Yerusaalemu, Heburooni," 
Joshua12:11 Yalamuti, Lakisi," 
Joshua12:12 Egulooni, Gezeri," 
Joshua12:13 Debiri, Gederi," 
Joshua12:14 Horuma, Aradi," 
Joshua12:15 Libuna, Adullamu," 
Joshua12:16 Makkeda, Beteli," 
Joshua12:17 Tappuwa, Eferi," 
Joshua12:18 Afeki, Lasarooni," 
Joshua12:19 Madoni, Hazori," 
Joshua12:20 Simurooni, Merooni, Akusafu," 
Joshua12:21 Taanaki, Megiddo," 
Joshua12:22 Kedesi, Yokuneyaamu ku Karumeeli," 
Joshua12:23 Doori ku lubalama, Goyiimu mu Gilugaali, ne" 
Joshua12:24 Tiruza, bonna wamu bakabaka amakumi asatu mu omu." 
Joshua13:1 Yoswa yali akaddiye nnyo. Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Okaddiye nnyo, naye wakyaliwo ebitundu by'ensi bingi ebitannawangulwa," 
Joshua13:2 bye bino: ekitundu kyonna eky'Abafilistiya n'eky'Abagesuri: 
Joshua13:3 okuva ku Mugga Sihori, ku nsalo ne Misiri, okutuuka ku nsalo ne Sihori mu bukiikakkono, ekibalibwa okuba eky'Abakanaani era ekifugibwa abakungu abataano Abafilistiya, ababeera e Gaaza, ne Asudoodi ne Asukelooni, ne Gaati ne Ekurooni, n'ekitundu kyonna eky'Abavvimu," 
Joshua13:4 mu bukiikaddyo. Wakyaliwo n'ensi yonna ey'Abakanaani, ne Meyara eky'Abasidoni, okutuuka ku Afeki ku nsalo n'Abaamori;" 
Joshua13:5 n'ensi y'Abagebali, ne Lebanooni yonna ebuvanjuba, okuva e Baalugaadi, wansi w'Olusozi Herumooni, okutuuka ku Muwaatwa gw'e Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 Abantu bonna ab'omu nsi ey'ensozi, okuva ku Lebanooni okutuuka ku Misurefaati Mayimu, n'Abasidoni bonna, nja kubagoba mu nsi eyo ng'Abayisirayeli balaba, naye ggwe ogiwe Abayisirayeli ebe yaabwe, nga bwe nakulagira." 
Joshua13:7 Kale kaakano ensi eno gigabanyizeemu ebika omwenda, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ekika kya Manasse, ebe yaabyo.”" 
Joshua13:8 Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ekya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse, byali bimaze okufuna ebitundu ebyabyo, Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bye yabawa ebuvanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani." 
Joshua13:9 Ekitundu kyabwe kyali kiva ku Aroweri ekiri ku mabbali g'Ekiwonvu ekya Arunoni, n'ekibuga ekiri mu makkati g'ekiwonvu ekyo, ne kizingiramu n'omuseetwe ogw'e Medeba, okutuuka ku nsalo ne Ammoni," 
Joshua13:10 ne kitwaliramu n'ebibuga byonna ebyali ebya Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyafugiranga mu Hesubooni." 
Joshua13:11 Era kyazingirangamu ne Gileyaadi, n'ebitundu by'e Gesuri ne Maaka, n'olusozi lwonna Herumooni, ne Basani yonna, okutuuka ku Saleka." 
Joshua13:12 Kyalimu obwakabaka bwonna obwa Ogi eyasembayo mu Bareefa, eyafugiranga mu Asitarooti, ne mu Edereyi eby'omu Besani. Abo Musa yabawangula n'abasaanyaawo." 
Joshua13:13 Naye Abayisirayeli tebaagobamu Bagesuri, wadde Abamaakiti. Bakyabeera mu Yisirayeli n'okutuusa kati." 
Joshua13:14 Ekika kya Leevi kye kyokka Musa ky'ataawa ttaka libe eryakyo. Omugabo ogwabwe baali ba kugufunanga ku bitambiro ebyokebwa ku alutaari ya Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nga Mukama bwe yagamba Musa." 
Joshua13:15 Lino lye ttaka Musa lye yawa ab'ennyumba ez'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni libe eryabwe. 
Joshua13:16 Ekitundu kyabwe kyava ku Aroweri ekiri ku mabbali g'Ekiwonvu ekya Arunoni, n'ekibuga ekiri mu makkati g'ekiwonvu ekyo, ne kizingiramu n'omuseetwe ogw'e Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Era kyatwaliramu Hesubooni, n'ebibuga byonna eby'omu museetwe: Diboni, Bamooti Baali, Beti Baalimooni," 
Joshua13:18 Yakazi, Kedemooti, Mefaati," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriyatayiimu, Sibuma, Zeretisakari, ku lusozi olw'omu kiwonvu," 
Joshua13:20 Betipeyori, obuserengeto bw'Olusozi Pisuga, era ne Beti Yesimooti." 
Joshua13:21 Kyalimu n'ebibuga byonna eby'omu museetwe, n'obwakabaka bwonna obwa Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori, eyafugiranga mu Hesubooni. Musa yamuwangula awamu n'abafuzi ba Midiyaani: Evi, ne Rekemu, ne Zuuri, ne Huuri, ne Reba, abaali abakungu ba Kabaka Sihoni mu nsi eyo." 
Joshua13:22 Mu abo Abayisirayeli be batta, mwe mwali n'omulaguzi Balamu, mutabani wa Bewori." 
Joshua13:23 Omugga Yorudaani ye yali ensalo y'Ekika kya Rewubeeni ebugwanjuba. Ebyo bye bibuga n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde, ebyaweebwa ab'ennyumba z'Ekika kya Rewubeeni okuba ebyabwe." 
Joshua13:24 Lino lye ttaka Musa lye yawa ab'ennyumba ez'omu Kika kya Gaadi libe eryabwe. 
Joshua13:25 Ekitundu kyabwe kyatwaliramu Yazeri n'ebibuga byonna ebya Gileyaadi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ensi y'Abammoni, okutuuka ku Aroweri, ebugwanjuba bwa Rabba." 
Joshua13:26 Ekitundu kyabwe ne kiva ku Hesubooni okutuuka ku Lamati Mizupa ne Betonimu, n'okuva ku Mahanayimu okutuuka ku nsalo ne Lodebari." 
Joshua13:27 Mu Kiwonvu kya Yorudaani, Abagaadi baatwala Beti Aramu, ne Betunimura, ne Sukkoti ne Safoni, n'ekitundu ekisigaddewo eky'obwakabaka bwa Sihoni ow'e Hesubooni. Ensalo yaabwe mu bugwanjuba gwe Mugga Yorudaani, okwambukira ddala okutuuka ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja y'e Galilaaya." 
Joshua13:28 Ebyo bye bibuga n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde, ebyaweebwa ab'ennyumba z'omu Kika kya Gaadi okuba ebyabwe." 
Joshua13:29 Lino lye ttaka Musa lye yawa ab'ennyumba ez'omu kimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse. 
Joshua13:30 Ekitundu kyabwe kyali kiva ku Mahanayimu ne kitwaliramu Basani yonna, eyali obwakabaka bwa Ogi kabaka wa Basani, n'ebyalo byonna enkaaga ebya Yayiri ebiri mu Basani." 
Joshua13:31 Kyazingiramu ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri ekya Gileyaadi awamu ne Asitarooti ne Edereyi, ebibuga ebikulu eby'obwakabaka bwa Ogi mu Basani. Ebyo byonna byaweebwa ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ab'ennyumba z'abasibuka mu Makiri, omwana wa Manasse." 
Joshua13:32 Bw'atyo Musa bwe yagabanyaamu ekitundu ekiri ebuvanjuba bwa Yeriko ne Yorudaani, mu nsenyi za Mowaabu." 
Joshua13:33 Naye ab'Ekika kya Leevi, Musa teyabawa ttaka libe lyabwe. Yabagamba nti omugabo ogwabwe banaagufunanga ku biweebwayo eri Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Joshua14:1 Bino bye bitundu Abayisirayeli bye baagabana mu nsi y'e Kanaani, Eleyazaari kabona, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni n'abakulu b'Ebika by'Abayisirayeli bye baabagabira." 
Joshua14:2 Ebitundu ebyaweebwa ebika omwenda n'ekitundu, byagabibwa nga bakuba kalulu, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Joshua14:3 Ekitundu eky'ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani, Musa yali amaze okukiwa ebika ebibiri n'ekitundu. Naye Abaleevi tebaaweebwa ttaka libe lyabwe." 
Joshua14:4 Bazzukulu ba Yosefu baavaamu ebika bibiri: Manasse ne Efurayimu. Bo Abaleevi tebaaweebwa mugabo gwa ttaka, wabula ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu. Baaweebwa n'ebyalo ebyetoolodde ebibuga ebyo, bakuumirengamu amagana gaabwe n'ebintu byabwe ebirala." 
Joshua14:5 Abayisirayeli baagabana ensi eyo nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Joshua14:6 Awo abamu ku b'omu Kika kya Yuda ne bajja eri Yoswa mu Gilugaali. Kalebu, mutabani wa Yefunne, Omukenizi n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Omanyi Mukama kye yagamba Musa omuntu wa Katonda mu Kadesibaruneya, ekikwata ku nze naawe." 
Joshua14:7 Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bwe yantuma okuva e Kadesibaruneya okuketta ensi eno, nali mpeza emyaka amakumi ana egy'obukulu. Namuleetera amawulire ag'ebintu nga bwe nabiraba." 
Joshua14:8 Naye bannange be nagenda nabo, ne baleetera abantu baffe okutya. Naye nze nakolera ddala ekyo Mukama Katonda wange ky'ayagala." 
Joshua14:9 Musa n'andayirira ku lunaku olwo nti: ‘Nga bw'okoledde ddala ekyo Mukama Katonda wange ky'ayagala, ekitundu ky'ensi ky'olinnyeemu ekigere kyo, kiriba kikyo ggwe n'abaana bo ennaku zonna.’" 
Joshua14:10 Era kaakano, laba emyaka giweze amakumi ana mu etaano, Mukama bukya agamba Musa ebigambo ebyo. Olwo Yisirayeli yali ekyatambula mu ddungu. Era Mukama ankuumye nga ndi mulamu nga bwe yasuubiza. Laba, ndi wa myaka kinaana mu etaano," 
Joshua14:11 era kaakano nkyali wa maanyi nga ku lunaku luli Musa lwe yantumirako. Nkyalina amaanyi okulwana mu lutalo oba okukola ekirala kyonna. 
Joshua14:12 Kale kaakano mpa ekitundu kino eky'ensozi, Mukama kye yayogerako ku lunaku luli, kubanga ku lunaku olwo wawulira nga Abaanaki be baaliyo mu bibuga ebinene ebyaliko ebigo. Osanga Mukama anaabeera nange ne mbagobamu, nga Mukama bwe yagamba.”" 
Joshua14:13 Yoswa n'asabira omukisa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne, n'amuwa ekibuga Heburooni okuba ekikye." 
Joshua14:14 Okuva olwo Heburooni ne kibeera ekya Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne Omukenizi n'okutuusa kati, kubanga Kalebu yakolera ddala, Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli ky'ayagala." 
Joshua14:15 Edda Heburooni kyayitibwanga Kibuga kya Aruba. Aruba oyo ye yali asinga obukulu mu Baanaki. Awo ensi n'ewummula entalo. 
Joshua15:1 Ekitundu akalulu kye kaawa ab'ennyumba ez'omu Kika kya Yuda, kyatuuka ku nkomerero y'eddungu ly'e Ziini mu bukiikaddyo, ku nsalo ne Edomu." 
Joshua15:2 Ensalo ey'obukiika obwo yaviira ddala bukiikaddyo obw'Ennyanja ey'Omunnyo," 
Joshua15:3 ne yeeyongerayo mu bukiikaddyo, okuva ku Muwaatwa gw'e Akurabbimu, okutuuka ku Ziini, n'eyita mu bukiikaddyo obwa Kadesibaruneya, n'eyita kumpi ne Hezirooni n'etuuka ku Addari, n'ekyamira ku Karuka;" 
Joshua15:4 n'egenda ku Azumooni, n'egoberera omugga ogw'oku nsalo ne Misiri, okutuukira ddala ku nkomerero yaayo ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati. Eyo ye nsalo ya Yuda ey'omu bukiikaddyo." 
Joshua15:5 Ensalo ey'ebuvanjuba yali Nnyanja ya Munnyo, okutuuka Omugga Yorudaani we guyiira mu nnyanja eyo. N'ensalo ey'oludda olw'ebukiikakkono," 
Joshua15:6 yatandikira awo, n'eyambuka okutuuka ku Betoogula, n'eyita ku bukiikakkono obw'Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani, n'eyambuka okutuuka ku Jjinja lya Bokani, mutabani wa Rewubeeni." 
Joshua15:7 N'eva ku Kiwonvu Akori okwambuka e Debiri, n'eraga e Gilugaali mu bukiikakkono, ekitunuulidde ekkubo eryambuka ku Lusozi Adummimu, oluli emitala w'omugga ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo. Ne yeeyongerayo okutuuka ku mazzi ag'e Ensemesi, n'ekoma ku Enerogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Awo ensalo n'eyita mu Kiwonvu kya mutabani wa Hinnomu, ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo obw'olusozi, okwali Yerusaalemu, ekibuga ky'Abayebusi. Ensalo n'eyambuka ku ntikko y'olusozi olutunuulidde ekiwonvu kya Hinnomu, ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, ku nkomerero y'Ekiwonvu kya Refayiimu ey'omu bukiikakkono." 
Joshua15:9 Okuva awo, ensalo n'eraga ku nsulo z'amazzi ga Nefutowa, n'etuuka ku bibuga eby'oku Lusozi Efurooni. Awo ensalo n'ewetamu n'eyolekera Baala oba Kiriyati Yeyariimu." 
Joshua15:10 Ku Baala w'ekyamira ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba n'edda ku Lusozi Seyiri, n'egenda okutuuka ku Lusozi Yeyariimu oba Kyesalooni ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono, n'ekka ku Betisemesi, n'eyita ku mabbali ga Timuna." 
Joshua15:11 Ensalo n'eyita ku mabbali g'ebukiikakkono obw'Olusozi Ekurooni, n'ewetamu n'eyolekera Sikkerooni, n'eyita ku Lusozi Baala, n'etuuka ku Yabineeli, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati," 
Joshua15:12 ennyanja eyo n'eba ensalo ey'ebugwanjuba. Ezo ze nsalo ezeetooloodde enjuyi zonna ez'ekitundu ekyaweebwa ab'ennyumba za Yuda. 
Joshua15:13 Yoswa n'awa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne omugabo mu b'Ekika kya Yuda, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. N'amuwa Heburooni, ekibuga kya Aruba kitaawe wa Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu n'akigobamu bazzukulu ba Anaki abasibuka mu baana be abasatu: Sesayi ne Ahimaani ne Talumayi. 
Joshua15:15 N'ava eyo, n'alumba ab'omu kibuga Debiri, edda ekyayitibwanga Kiriyati Seferi," 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu n'agamba nti: “Omusajja anaalumba Kiriyati Seferi n'akiwamba, nja kumuwa muwala wange Akusa amuwase.”" 
Joshua15:17 Ofiniyeeli, mutabani wa Kenazi, muganda wa Kalebu n'akiwamba, Kalebu n'amuwa muwala we Akusa okumuwasa." 
Joshua15:18 Akusa bwe yajja eri Ofiniyeeli, n'amukuutira asabe kitaawe amuwe ekibanja. Akusa n'ava ku ndogoyi ye. Kalebu n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala ki?”" 
Joshua15:19 Akusa n'addamu nti: “Njagala ompe ekirabo. Nga bw'ompadde ensi enkalu, era mpa n'enzizi z'amazzi.” Kalebu n'amuwa enzizi ez'engulu n'ez'emmanga." 
Joshua15:20 Bino bye bitundu ab'ennyumba ez'ab'omu Kika kya Yuda bye baafuna bibe byabwe. 
Joshua15:21 Ebibuga ebisemberayo ddala ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo ku nsalo ne Edomu, byali Kabuzeeli, ne Ederi, ne Yaguri," 
Joshua15:22 ne Kina, ne Dimona, ne Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 ne Kedesi, ne Hazori, ne Yitunani," 
Joshua15:24 ne Zifu, ne Telemu, ne Beyalooti," 
Joshua15:25 ne Hazori Hadatta, ne Keriyooti Hezirooni oba Hazori," 
Joshua15:26 ne Amamu, ne Sema, ne Molada," 
Joshua15:27 ne Hazari Gadda, ne Hesumooni, ne Betupeleti," 
Joshua15:28 ne Hazari, ne Suwali, ne Beruseba, ne Biziyotiya," 
Joshua15:29 ne Baala, ne Yimu, ne Ezemu," 
Joshua15:30 ne Elutoladi, ne Kyesili, ne Horuma," 
Joshua15:31 ne Zikulagi, ne Madimenna, ne Sansanna," 
Joshua15:32 ne Lebawooti, ne Siluhiimu, ne Ayini, ne Rimmoni: ebibuga amakumi abiri mu mwenda n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:33 Ebibuga eby'omu nsi ey'ensozi byali Esutawoli ne Zora ne Asuma," 
Joshua15:34 ne Zanowa, ne Engannimu, ne Tappuwa, ne Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 ne Yarumuti, ne Adullamu, ne Soko, ne Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 ne Sarayiimu, ne Aditayiimu, ne Gedera, ne Gederotayimu: ebibuga kkumi na bina n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:37 Waaliwo ne Zenani, ne Hadasa, ne Midugudalugaadi," 
Joshua15:38 ne Dileyaani ne Mizupa, ne Yokuteeli," 
Joshua15:39 ne Lakisi, ne Bozukati, ne Egulooni," 
Joshua15:40 ne Kabboni, ne Kitulisi," 
Joshua15:41 ne Gederoti, ne Betidagooni, ne Naama, ne Makkeda, ebibuga kkumi na mukaaga n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:42 Era waaliwo ne Libuna, ne Eteri, ne Asani;" 
Joshua15:43 ne Yifuta, ne Asuna, ne Neziibu," 
Joshua15:44 ne Keyila, ne Akuzibu, ne Maresa: ebibuga mwenda n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:45 Waaliwo Ekurooni n'ebibuga n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde," 
Joshua15:46 n'ebibuga byonna n'ebyalo okumpi ne Hasudoodi, okuva ku Ekurooni okutuuka ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati." 
Joshua15:47 Waaliwo Asudoodi, ne Gaaza n'obubuga bwabyo n'ebyalo byabyo, okutuuka ku mugga gw'oku nsalo ne Misiri, ne ku lubalama lw'Ennyanja Eyaawakati." 
Joshua15:48 Mu nsi ey'ensozi mwalimu Samiri, ne Yattira, ne Soko," 
Joshua15:49 ne Danna, ne Kiriyati Sanna oba Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 ne Anabu, ne Esutemo, ne Animu," 
Joshua15:51 ne Goseni, ne Holoni, ne Gilo: ebibuga kkumi na kimu n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:52 Waaliwo Arabu, ne Duma, ne Esani," 
Joshua15:53 ne Yaniimu, ne Beti Tappuwa, ne Afeki," 
Joshua15:54 ne Hutama, ne Kiriyati Aruba oba Heburooni, ne Ziyori: ebibuga mwenda n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:55 Waaliwo Mawoni, ne Karumeeli, ne Zifu, ne Yutta" 
Joshua15:56 ne Yezireeli, ne Yokudeyaamu, ne Zanowa," 
Joshua15:57 ne Kayini, ne Gibeya, ne Timuna; ebibuga kkumi n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:58 Waaliwo Haluhuli, ne Betizuuri, ne Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 ne Maarati, ne Betanooti, ne Elutekoni: ebibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:60 Waaliwo Kiriyati Baali oba Kiriyati Yeyariimu, ne Rabba, ebibuga bibiri n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:61 Mu ddungu, waaliyo Beti Araba, ne Middini, ne Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 ne Nibusaani, n'ekibuga eky'Omunnyo, ne Engedi: ebibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua15:63 Naye bazzukulu ba Yuda ne batasobola kugoba Bayebusi mu Yerusaalemu n'okutuusa kati. 
Joshua16:1 Ensalo ey'omu bukiikaddyo ey'ekitundu ekyaweebwa bazzukulu ba Yosefu mu kalulu, yatandikira ku Mugga Yorudaani okumpi ne Yeriko ebuvanjuba w'ensulo z'amazzi ez'e Yeriko, n'eraga mu ddungu. N'egenda okuva e Yeriko okwambuka mu nsi ey'ensozi, okutuuka e Beteli." 
Joshua16:2 Okuva e Beteli n'eraga e Luuzi, ng'eyitira ku Atarooti Addari, ensi y'Abaruki." 
Joshua16:3 Awo ensalo n'ekka ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, okutuuka ku nsalo n'Abayafuleeti, okutuukira ddala ku kitundu ky'e Betooroni ekya wansi. Okuva awo ne yeeyongerayo okutuuka e Gezeri, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati." 
Joshua16:4 Bazzukulu ba Yosefu, abasibuka mu Efurayimu ne Manasse, ne bafuna ekitundu ekyo kibeerenga kyabwe." 
Joshua16:5 Kino kye kitundu ab'ennyumba z'abazzukulu ba Efurayimu kye baafuna: ensalo yaabwe yava ku Atarooti Addari ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, okutuuka ku Betooroni eky'engulu." 
Joshua16:6 Okuva awo n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati. Mikumetati kyabali mu bukiikakkono. Ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, ensalo n'ekyuka okwolekera Taanati Siilo, n'ekiyitako ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, n'eraga e Yanowa." 
Joshua16:7 N'eva ku Yanowa, n'ekiika ku Atarooti ne Naara, n'etuuka ku Yeriko, n'ekoma ku Yorudaani." 
Joshua16:8 Ensalo n'egenda ebugwanjuba okuva ku Tappuwa, okutuuka ku Mugga Kaana, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati. Ekyo kye kitundu ekyaweebwa ab'ennyumba ez'ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu ebeerenga eyaabwe," 
Joshua16:9 wamu n'ebibuga n'ebyalo ebimu, ebyali mu kitundu kya bazzukulu ba Manasse, naye ekyaweebwa Abeefurayimu." 
Joshua16:10 Kyokka tebaagobamu Bakanaani abaali mu Gezeri. Awo Abakanaani ne babeera wamu n'Abeefurayimu n'okutuusa kati, era ne bafuuka abaddu okukolanga emirimu egibalagirwa." 
Joshua17:1 Mu kalulu, ab'Ekika kya Manasse omwana wa Yosefu omuggulanda, ne baweebwa ekitundu kibe ekyabwe. Makiri, kitaawe wa Gileyaadi, era omwana wa Manasse omuggulanda, yali muzira mu ntalo kyeyava aweebwa Gileyaadi ne Basani." 
Joshua17:2 Era mu kalulu, ekitundu eky'ebugwanjuba bwa Yorudaani ne kiweebwa ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Manasse abalala: Abiyezeeri, ne Heleki, ne Asuriyeeli, ne Sekemu, ne Heferi, ne Semida. Abo be bazzukulu ab'obulenzi aba Manasse mutabani wa Yosefu, abakulu b'ennyumba." 
Joshua17:3 Zelofehaadi mutabani wa Heferi, azaalibwa Gileyaadi, omwana wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manasse, teyazaala baana ba bulenzi, wabula ab'obuwala bokka. Amannya gaabwe ge gano: Maala, ne Noowa, ne Hogula, ne Milika, ne Tiruza." 
Joshua17:4 Abo ne bagenda eri Eliyazaari kabona n'eri Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni n'eri abakulembeze, ne bagamba nti: “Mukama yalagira Musa okutuwa mu bannyinaffe ettaka okuba eryaffe.” Kyebaava baweebwa ettaka mu bannyinaabwe nga Mukama bwe yalagira." 
Joshua17:5 Bw'atyo Manasse n'afuna ebitundu kkumi ebyeyongera ku Gileyaadi ne Basani ebiri ku ludda lwa Yorudaani olw'ebuvanjuba. Yafuna ebyo byonna 
Joshua17:6 kubanga ne bazzukulu be abawala nabo baaweebwa ettaka. Ensi ey'e Gileyaadi yali yaweebwa dda bazzukulu ba Manasse abalala. 
Joshua17:7 Ekitundu kya Manasse kyava ku Aseri okutuuka ku Mikumetati ebuvanjuba bwa Sekemu. Ensalo n'egenda mu bukiikaddyo, okuzingiramu abantu b'e Entappuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Ekitundu ekyetoolodde Tappuwa kyaba kya Manasse, naye ekibuga Tappuwa ku nsalo, ne kiba kya Efurayimu." 
Joshua17:9 Kale ensalo n'ekka okutuuka ku Mugga Kaana. Ebibuga eby'omu bukiikakkono obw'omugga, byali bya Efurayimu, newaakubadde nga byali mu kitundu kya Manasse. Ensalo ya Manasse yayita ku ludda olwa kkono olw'omugga, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati." 
Joshua17:10 Efurayimu yali ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, Manasse n'aba ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono, ng'Ennyanja Eyaawakati ye nsalo yaabwe mu bugwanjuba. Ne batuuka ku Aseri ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Joshua17:11 Mu kitundu kya Yissakaari n'ekya Aseri, Manasse n'afunayo Beti Saani ne Yibuleyaamu, n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde, ne Doori, ne Endori, ne Taanaki, ne Megiddo n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua17:12 Naye bazzukulu ba Manasse ne batasobola kugobamu bantu abaali mu bibuga ebyo. Kale Abakanaani ne bongera okubeera mu nsi eyo. 
Joshua17:13 Abayisirayeli ne bwe beeyongera amaanyi, ne batagobaamu Bakanaani bonna, wabula ne babawalirizanga okubakolera emirimu." 
Joshua17:14 Bazzukulu ba Yosefu ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Lwaki otuwadde omugabo gumu gwokka ogw'ettaka okuba ogwaffe, ate nga Mukama yatuwa omukisa ne tuba bangi nnyo?”" 
Joshua17:15 Yoswa n'addamu nti: “Oba nga muli bangi nnyo, ng'ensi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi tebamala, mugende mu bibira mwesaayire omwo, mu nsi y'Abaperezi n'Abareefa.”" 
Joshua17:16 Bazzukulu ba Yosefu ne baddamu nti: “Ne bwe tunaakola bwe tutyo, era ensi ey'ensozi tetumala. Ate tetusobola kusenga mu nsenyi kubanga Abakanaani abali mu Beti Saani n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde, n'abo abali mu Kiwonvu ky'e Yezireeli, balina amagaali ag'ebyuma.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yoswa n'agamba ab'ennyumba ya Yosefu, bye bika ekya Efurayimu n'ekya Manasse nti: “Nga bwe muli abangi ennyo era ab'amaanyi, temujja kufuna mugabo gumu." 
Joshua17:18 Ensi yonna ey'ensozi eneeba yammwe. Newaakubadde nga ya kibira, mujja kukisaawa, kibe kyammwe okuva ku nsonda emu okutuuka ku ndala, era Abakanaani mulisobola okugibagobamu newaakubadde nga balina amagaali ag'ebyuma era nga ba maanyi.”" 
Joshua18:1 Abayisirayeli bwe baamala okuwangula ensi ye Kanaani, ekibiina kyabwe kyonna ne kikuŋŋaanira e Siilo, ne basimba Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama." 
Joshua18:2 Mu Bayisirayeli waali wakyasigaddewo ebika musanvu ebitannafuna mugabo gwabyo ogw'ettaka. 
Joshua18:3 Yoswa n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Muligayaala kutuusa ddi, ne mutagenda kwefunira nsi Mukama Katonda wa bajjajjammwe gye yabawa mmwe?" 
Joshua18:4 Mwerondemu abasajja basatu mu buli kika, mbatume bagende balambule ensi eyo yonna, bapime nga bw'eyinza okugabanyizibwamu, balyoke bakomewo gye ndi." 
Joshua18:5 Ensi eyo ejja kugabanyizibwamu ebitundu musanvu. Yuda ajja kusigala mu kitundu kye, ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, n'ab'ennyumba ya Yosefu mu kitundu kyabwe, ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono." 
Joshua18:6 Muwandiike ebinnyonnyola ku bitundu ebyo omusanvu, mundeetere bye muwandiise, ndyoke mbakubire obululu wano mu maaso ga Mukama, Katonda waffe." 
Joshua18:7 Naye Abaleevi tebajja kufuna mugabo gwa ttaka mu mmwe, kubanga omugabo ogwabwe, kwe kuweereza Mukama mu bwakabona. Ate Gaadi ne Rewubeeni n'ekitundu eky'Ekika kya Manasse baamala dda okuweebwa ebitundu ebyabwe ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani, Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bye yabawa.”" 
Joshua18:8 Awo abasajja ne basituka ne bagenda, okupima ensi eyo, nga Yoswa amaze okubalagira nti: “Mugende mulambule ensi eyo yonna, muwandiike ebinnyonnyola nga bw'efaanana, mukomewo gye ndi, ndyoke mbakubire obululu wano mu maaso ga Mukama e Siilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Abasajja ne bagenda ne bayitaayita mu nsi eyo, ne bawandiika mu kitabo nga bwe bagigabanyizzaamu ebitundu omusanvu, nga balaga n'ebibuga byabyo. Awo ne baddayo eri Yoswa mu lusiisira e Siilo." 
Joshua18:10 Yoswa n'abakubira obululu mu maaso ga Mukama e Siilo. Buli kika kya Yisirayeli ekyali kitannagabana, n'akiwa omugabo ogwakyo ogw'ettaka." 
Joshua18:11 Ekitundu ekyaweebwa ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, kye kyasooka okulondebwa mu kalulu. Ekitundu kyabwe ne kiba wakati w'Ekika kya Yuda n'Ekika kya Yosefu." 
Joshua18:12 Mu bukiikakkono, ensalo yaabwe yatandikira ku Yorudaani, n'eyambuka ku njegoyego za Yeriko mu bukiikakkono, n'eyambuka mu nsi ey'ensozi ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, n'etuuka ku ddungu ly'e Betaaveni." 
Joshua18:13 Okuva awo ensalo n'egenda mu bukiikaddyo, n'eyita kumpi ne Luuzi, era ekiyitibwa Beteli, n'ekka okutuuka ku Atarooti Addari, kumpi n'olusozi oluli mu bukiikaddyo obwa Betooroni, ekiri emmanga." 
Joshua18:14 Ensalo n'ekyukira ku ludda olulala, n'eva mu bukiikaddyo, n'edda ebugwanjuba bw'olusozi Betooroni, n'eraga ku Kiriyati Baali oba Kiriyati Yeyariimu, ekibuga eky'ab'Ekika kya Yuda. Eyo ye yali ensalo y'Ababenyamiini mu bugwanjuba." 
Joshua18:15 Ensalo mu bukiikaddyo, yatandikira ku njegoyego za Kiriyati Yeyariimu, n'eraga ebugwanjuba ku nzizi z'e Nafutowa." 
Joshua18:16 Awo n'ekka mu Kiwonvu kya Hinnomu mu bukiikaddyo obw'ensozi z'Abayebusi, n'ekka ku Enurogeli." 
Joshua18:17 N'ewetamu n'eyolekera mu bukiikakkono ku Ensemesi, n'etuuka e Gelilooti, ekitunuulidde ekkubo eryambuka e Adummimu, n'eryoka etuuka ku jjinja lya Bokani, mutabani wa Rewubeeni," 
Joshua18:18 n'eyita ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono ku nsozi ezitunuulidde Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani, n'ekka mu kiwonvu ekyo," 
Joshua18:19 n'eyita ku nsozi z'e Beti Hogula ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo. 
Joshua18:20 Omugga Yorudaani gwe gwali ensalo ey'ebuvanjuba ey'ekitundu ekyagabanibwa ab'ennyumba ez'ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini, okuba ekyabwe." 
Joshua18:21 Ebibuga by'ab'ennyumba z'ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini byali Yeriko, ne Beti Hogula, ne Emeki Kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 ne Beti Araba, ne Zemarayimu, ne Beteli," 
Joshua18:23 ne Avvimu, ne Para, ne Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 ne Kefarammoni, ne Ofuni, ne Geeba: ebibuga kkumi na bibiri wamu n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua18:25 Era waaliwo Gibiyoni, ne Raama, ne Beeroti," 
Joshua18:26 ne Mizupa, ne Kefira, ne Moza," 
Joshua18:27 ne Rekemu, ne Yirupeeli, ne Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 ne Zela, ne Elefu, ne Yebusi oba Yerusaalemu, ne Gibeya, ne Kiriyati Yeyariimu, ebibuga kkumi na bina, wamu n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde. Ekyo kye kitundu ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe." 
Joshua19:1 Akalulu akookubiri kaagabira ba nnyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni ekitundu ekyabwe. Ekitundu kye baafuna kyali wakati w'ekyo ab'Ekika kya Yuda kye baafuna. 
Joshua19:2 Kyalimu Beruseba, ne Seba, ne Molada," 
Joshua19:3 ne Azari Suwali, ne Bala, ne Ezemu," 
Joshua19:4 ne Elutoladi, ne Betuli, ne Oruma," 
Joshua19:5 ne Zikulagi, ne Beti Marikabooti, ne Azari Susa," 
Joshua19:6 ne Beti Lebawooti ne Sarukeni: ebibuga kkumi na bisatu n'ebyalo. 
Joshua19:7 Waaliwo Ayini ne Rimmoni, ne Eteri ne Asani: ebibuga bina n'ebyalo byabyo," 
Joshua19:8 wamu n'ebyalo byonna ebibyetoolodde okutuuka ku Baalati Beera oba Raama, mu bukiikaddyo. Kino kye kitundu ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe." 
Joshua19:9 Ekitundu ekyaweebwa ab'omu Kika kya Yuda nga bwe kyali kibayitiriddeko obunene, n'ab'omu kika kya Simyoni kwe baafuna omugabo ogwabwe." 
Joshua19:10 Akalulu akookusatu ne kagabira ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni ekitundu ekyabwe. Ekitundu kye baafuna kyatuuka ku Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Okuva awo ensalo yaabwe yalaga bugwanjuba e Mareyali, n'ekoma ku Dabbeseti, ne ku mugga oguli ebuvanjuba bwa Yokuneyaamu." 
Joshua19:12 Ku ludda olulala olwa Saridi, ensalo yalaga mu buvanjuba okutuuka ku nsalo y'e Kisulooti Tabori, ne ku Daberaati, n'eyambuka e Yafiya," 
Joshua19:13 ne yeeyongerayo mu buvanjuba, n'etuuka ku Gaati Heferi, ne ku Etukazini, n'ekoma ku Rimmoni okutuuka ku Neya." 
Joshua19:14 Ne yeetooloola ku luuyi olw'ebukiikakkono n'ekyuka okwolekera Hamatoni, n'ekoma ku Kiwonvu Yifutaheli." 
Joshua19:15 N'ezingiramu Kattati, ne Nakalali, ne Simurooni, ne Yidala, ne Betilehemu: ebibuga kkumi na bibiri n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua19:16 Ebibuga bino n'ebyalo byabyo byali mu kitundu ab'ennyumba ez'ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:17 Akalulu akookuna ne kagabira ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Yissakaari ekitundu ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:18 Ekitundu kye baafuna kyalimu Yezireeli, ne Kesulooti, ne Sunemu," 
Joshua19:19 ne Hafarayimu ne Siyooni, ne Anakarati," 
Joshua19:20 ne Rabbiti, ne Kisiyooni ne Ebezi," 
Joshua19:21 ne Remeti ne Engannimu, ne Enuhadda, ne Betupazzezi." 
Joshua19:22 Ensalo era n'ekoona ku Tabori ne Sahazuma, ne Betisemesi, n'ekoma ku Yorudaani, bye bibuga kkumi na mukaaga n'ebyalo byabyo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua19:23 Ebibuga bino n'ebyalo byabyo, byali mu kitundu ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Yissakaari kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe." 
Joshua19:24 Akalulu akookutaano ne kagabira ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Aseri ekitundu ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:25 Ekitundu kye baafuna kyalimu Helukati ne Ali, ne Beteni, ne Akusafu," 
Joshua19:26 ne Alamu Meleki, ne Amadi, ne Misali, n'ekituuka ku Karumeeli ne Sihori Libunati, ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba." 
Joshua19:27 Ensalo yaabwe n'ewetera ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba, n'etuuka ku Betudagoni, n'ekoona ku Zebbulooni, ne ku Kiwonvu Yifutaheli, n'eyolekera Betemeki ne Neyeli mu bukiikakkono. Ne yeeyongerayo e Kabuli mu bukiikakkono," 
Joshua19:28 ne Heburooni, ne Rehobu, ne Ammoni, ne Kaana, okutuukira ddala e Sidoni." 
Joshua19:29 Ensalo n'eweta okwolekera Raama, n'etuuka ku kibuga Tiiro ekiriko ekigo, n'eweta okwolekera Osa, n'ekoma ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati. Yazingiramu Makalabu ne Akuzibu" 
Joshua19:30 ne Wumma ne Afeki ne Rehobu: bye bibuga amakumi abiri mu bibiri n'ebyalo byabyo. 
Joshua19:31 Ebibuga bino n'ebyalo byabyo byali mu kitundu ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Aseri kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:32 Akalulu ak'omukaaga ne kagabira ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali ekitundu ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:33 Ensalo yaabwe yava ku Helefu, n'etuuka ku muvule ogw'e Zaanannimu, ne yeeyongerayo mu Adaminekebu ne Yabuneeli, okutuuka ku Lakkumu, n'ekoma ku Yorudaani." 
Joshua19:34 Awo ensalo n'eweta okwolekera oludda olw'ebugwanjuba, n'etuuka ku Azunooti Tabori, n'eva eyo n'etuuka e Hukoki, n'ekoona ku Zebbulooni ku ludda olw'ebukiikaddyo, ne ku Aseri ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba, ne ku Yorudaani ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Joshua19:35 Ebibuga ebiriko ebigo byali Ziddiimu ne Zeri, ne Hammati, ne Rakkati, ne Kinnereti," 
Joshua19:36 ne Adaama, ne Raama, ne Hazori," 
Joshua19:37 ne Kedesi, ne Edereyi, ne Enuhaazori," 
Joshua19:38 ne Yirooni, ne Migudaleli, ne Horemu, ne Betanaati, ne Betisemesi: bye bibuga kkumi na mwenda n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Joshua19:39 Ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byabyo byali mu kitundu, ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali kye baafuna okuba ekyabwe." 
Joshua19:40 Akalulu ak'omusanvu ne kagabira ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Daani ekitundu ekyabwe. 
Joshua19:41 Ekitundu kye baafuna kyalimu Zora, ne Esutawoli, ne Yirusemesi," 
Joshua19:42 ne Saalabbini, ne Ayalooni, ne Yetula," 
Joshua19:43 ne Eloni, ne Timuna, ne Ekurooni," 
Joshua19:44 ne Eluteke, ne Gibbetooni, ne Baalati," 
Joshua19:45 ne Yekudi, ne Beneberaki, ne Gaturimmoni," 
Joshua19:46 ne Meyarukooni ne Rakkooni, wamu n'ekitundu ekyetoolodde Yaafo." 
Joshua19:47 Awo ab'omu Kika kya Daani bwe baafiirwa ekitundu kyabwe, ne bagenda e Layisi, ne bakirumba ne bakirwanyisa, ne bakiwamba, ne batta abantu baamu bonna, ne bakituuma erinnya Daani, erya jjajjaabwe." 
Joshua19:48 Ebibuga bino n'ebyalo byabyo byali mu kitundu ab'ennyumba z'ab'omu Kika kya Daani kye baafuna. 
Joshua19:49 Abayisirayeli bwe baamala okugabanyaamu ensi ebitundu, buli bamu ne bafuna ebyabwe, awo ne balyoka bawa Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni ekitundu okuba ekikye." 
Joshua19:50 Nga Mukama bwe yalagira, ne bamuwa ekibuga kye yasaba, eky'e Timunati Seera, mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi. N'akizimba buggya, n'abeera omwo." 
Joshua19:51 Eleyazaari kabona, ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, n'abakulu b'ennyumba z'ab'omu bika bya Yisirayeli, baagabanya ebitundu bino eby'ensi, nga bakuba obululu mu maaso ga Mukama e Siilo, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. Bwe batyo bwe baamaliriza okugabanyaamu ensi." 
Joshua20:1 Mukama n'agamba Yoswa 
Joshua20:2 okutegeeza Abayisirayeli nti: “Mulonde ebibuga eby'okuddukirangamu bye nalagira Musa okubategeezaako. 
Joshua20:3 Oyo anaabanga asse omuntu nga tagenderedde, anaddukiranga eyo okuwona oyo amunoonya okuwoolera eggwanga." 
Joshua20:4 Anaayinzanga okuddukira mu kimu ku bibuga ebyo, n'agenda mu kifo awasalirwa emisango, ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, n'annyonnyola abakulembeze ebibaddewo. Awo banaamukkirizanga okuyingira mu kibuga, ne bamuwa ekifo aw'okubeera, n'abeera omwo." 
Joshua20:5 Oyo anoonya okuwoolera eggwanga bw'anaamugobererangayo, ab'omu kibuga ekyo, tebaamuwengayo mu mikono gye. Banaakuumanga eyatta, kubanga omuntu yamutta nga tagenderedde, naye nga si lwa kumukyawa." 
Joshua20:6 Eyatta omuntu anaasigalanga mu kibuga omwo okutuusa ng'amaze okuwozesebwa mu maaso g'ekibiina ky'abantu, era okutuusa nga Ssaabakabona abeerawo mu nnaku ezo amaze okufa. Olwo omuntu oyo n'addayo eka mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe gye yadduka.”" 
Joshua20:7 Ku ludda olw'ebugwanjuba olw'Omugga Yorudaani, ne balonda Kedesi eky'omu Galilaaya mu nsi ey'ensozi eya Nafutaali, ne Sekemu mu nsi ey'ensozi eya Efurayimu, ne Heburooni mu nsi ey'ensozi eya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba olw'Omugga Yorudaani, ne balonda Bezeri eky'ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, ekiri mu lusenyi olw'eddungu mu buvanjuba bwa Yeriko, ne Ramoti eky'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi mu Gileyaadi, ne Golani eky'ab'Ekika kya Manasse mu Basani." 
Joshua20:9 Bino bye byali ebibuga eby'okuddukirangamu, ebyalondebwa Abayisirayeli bonna na buli mugwira abeera mu bo, buli attanga omuntu nga tagenderedde, addukirenga omwo, aleme okuttibwa oyo amunoonya okuwoolera eggwanga, okutuusa ng'amaze okuwoleza mu maaso g'ekibiina ky'abantu." 
Joshua21:1 Awo abakulu b'ennyumba ez'ab'omu Kika kya Leevi, ne bagenda eri Eleyazaari kabona, n'eri Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, n'eri abakulu b'ennyumba z'ab'omu bika byonna ebya Yisirayeli." 
Joshua21:2 Ne babagambira mu Siilo mu nsi y'e Kanaani nti: “Mukama yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa okutuwa ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu, n'ettale lyakwo ery'okulundirangamu ensolo zaffe.”" 
Joshua21:3 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bawa Abaleevi ebibuga ebimu n'ettale lyakwo, mu bitundu byabwe, nga Mukama bwe yalagira." 
Joshua21:4 Abaleevi ab'ennyumba ya Kohati be baasooka okuweebwa ebibuga mu kalulu. Abasibuka mu Arooni kabona, baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bisatu okuva mu bitundu eby'ab'Ebika: ekya Yuda n'ekya Simyoni n'ekya Benyamiini." 
Joshua21:5 Abakohati abalala ne baweebwa ebibuga kkumi okuva mu bitundu eby'ab'Ebika: ekya Efurayimu n'ekya Daani n'ekya Manasse. 
Joshua21:6 Ab'ennyumba ya Gerusooni ne baweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bisatu okuva mu bitundu eby'ab'Ebika: ekya Yissakaari n'ekya Aseri n'ekya Nafutaali n'ekya Manasse mu Basani. 
Joshua21:7 Ab'ennyumba ya Merari ne baweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bibiri okuva mu bitundu eby'Ebika: ekya Rewubeeni n'ekya Gaadi n'ekya Zebbulooni. 
Joshua21:8 Abayisirayeli baakuba bululu okuwa Abaleevi ebibuga ebyo n'ettale lyakwo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Gano ge mannya g'ebibuga ebyaggyibwa mu bitundu bya Yuda ne Simyoni ne biweebwa 
Joshua21:10 bazzukulu ba Arooni, ab'ennyumba ya Kohati ow'omu Kika kya Leevi. Be baasooka okukubirwa akalulu." 
Joshua21:11 Ne babawa Kiriyati Aruba (Aruba ye yali kitaawe wa Anaki), kati ekiyitibwa Heburooni, mu nsi ey'ensozi eya Yuda, awamu n'ettale lyakwo." 
Joshua21:12 Naye ennimiro z'ekibuga ekyo n'ebyalo byakyo byali byaweebwa dda Kalebu, mutabani wa Yefunne okuba ebibye." 
Joshua21:13 Okwongereza ku Heburooni, ekimu ku bibuga eby'okuddukirangamu, bino bye bibuga ebyaweebwa bazzukulu ba Arooni kabona: Libuna," 
Joshua21:14 ne Yattiri, ne Esutemowa," 
Joshua21:15 ne Holoni, ne Debiri," 
Joshua21:16 ne Ayini, ne Yutta, ne Beti Semesi, wamu n'ettale lyabyo. Ebyo bye bibuga omwenda, ebyaggyibwa ku Bika, ekya Yuda n'ekya Simyoni." 
Joshua21:17 Okuva mu kitundu kya Benyamiini, baaweebwa ebibuga bina: Gibiyoni ne Geeba" 
Joshua21:18 ne Anatooti ne Alumoni n'ettale lyakwo. 
Joshua21:19 Ebibuga kkumi na bisatu byonna awamu bye byaweebwa bakabona, bazzukulu ba Arooni." 
Joshua21:20 Abaleevi abalala ab'ennyumba ya Kohati ne baweebwa mu kalulu ebibuga, mu kitundu kya Efurayimu." 
Joshua21:21 Baaweebwa ebibuga bina: Sekemu n'ettale lyakwo, ekimu ku bibuga eby'okuddukiramu mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, ne Gezeri" 
Joshua21:22 ne Kibuzayimu, ne Betooroni n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:23 Ne baweebwa ebibuga bina mu kitundu kya Daani: Eluteke, ne Gibbetooni" 
Joshua21:24 ne Ayalooni, ne Gaturimmoni n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:25 Ne baweebwa ebibuga bibiri mu kitundu kya Manasse: Taanaki ne Gaturimmoni n'ettale lyabyo. 
Joshua21:26 Ebibuga byonna ab'ennyumba ya Kohati abalala bye baafuna byali kkumi, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:27 Abaleevi abalala ab'ennyumba ya Gerusooni ne baweebwa mu kitundu kya Manasse ebibuga bibiri: Goloni ekimu ku bibuga eby'okuddukirangamu eky'omu Basani, ne Beesutera, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:28 Ne baweebwa mu kitundu kya Yissakaari ebibuga bina: Kisiyooni ne Daberaati 
Joshua21:29 ne Yarumuti ne Engannimu, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:30 Ne baweebwa ebibuga bina mu kitundu kya Aseri: Misali ne Abudooni," 
Joshua21:31 ne Elukati ne Rehobu, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:32 Ne baweebwa ebibuga bisatu mu kitundu kya Nafutaali: Kedesi, ekimu ku bibuga eby'okuddukirangamu eky'omu Galilaaya, ne Hammoti Doori, ne Karutaani, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:33 Ab'ennyumba ya Gerusooni bonna awamu, baafuna ebibuga kkumi na bisatu wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:34 Abaleevi abalala ab'ennyumba ya Merari, ne baweebwa mu kitundu kya Zebbulooni ebibuga bina: Yokuneyaamu ne Karuta," 
Joshua21:35 ne Dimuna, ne Nahalali, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:36 Ne baweebwa mu kitundu kya Rewubeeni ebibuga bina: Bezeri ne Yahazi," 
Joshua21:37 ne Kedemooti ne Mefaati, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:38 Ne baweebwa ebibuga bina mu kitundu kya Gaadi: Ramoti, ekimu ku bibuga eby'okuddukirangamu eky'omu Gileyaadi, ne Mahanayimu," 
Joshua21:39 ne Hesubooni, ne Yazeri, wamu n'ettale lyabyo." 
Joshua21:40 Bwe batyo ab'ennyumba ya Merari bonna awamu, baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bibiri." 
Joshua21:41 Mu bitundu byonna Abayisirayeli bye baafuna okuba ebyabwe, Abaleevi baaweebwamu ebibuga amakumi ana mu munaana, wamu n'ettale lyabyo eribyetoolodde." 
Joshua21:42 Ebibuga ebyo byonna bwe byali bwe bityo nga birina ettale eribyetoolodde. 
Joshua21:43 Bw'atyo Mukama bwe yawa Abayisirayeli ensi yonna, gye yalayirira okuwa bajjajjaabwe. Ne bagyefuga, ne bagibeeramu." 
Joshua21:44 Mukama n'abawa emirembe ku nsalo zaabwe zonna, nga bwe yasuubiza bajjajjaabwe. Tewali n'omu ku balabe baabwe bonna eyasobola okuyimirira mu maaso gaabwe, kubanga Mukama yawa Abayisirayeli okuwangula abalabe baabwe bonna." 
Joshua21:45 Tewali kirungi na kimu Mukama kye yasuubiza Yisirayeli ekyabulako: byonna byatuukirira. 
Joshua22:1 Awo Yoswa n'ayita ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse," 
Joshua22:2 n'abagamba nti: “Mukoze byonna Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bye yabalagira okukola, era muwulidde ebiragiro byange byonna." 
Joshua22:3 Ebbanga lino lyonna temulekererangako Bayisirayeli bannammwe, naye mutuukirizza bulungi ebiragiro bya Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Joshua22:4 Kaakano Mukama Katonda wammwe awadde Bayisirayeli bannammwe emirembe nga bwe yabasuubiza. N'olwekyo muddeeyo ewammwe mu kitundu Musa omuweereza wa Mukama kye yabawa okuba ekyammwe mu buvanjuba bwa Yorudaani. 
Joshua22:5 Mutuukirizenga bulungi amateeka n'ebiragiro, Musa omuweereza wa Mukama bye yabalagira: okwagalanga Mukama Katonda wammwe, n'okukolanga byonna by'ayagala, n'okukwatanga amateeka ge, n'okubeeranga abeesigwa gy'ali, n'okumuweerezanga n'omutima gwammwe gwonna.”" 
Joshua22:6 Awo Yoswa n'abasabira omukisa, n'abasiibula ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Joshua22:7 Ekitundu ekimu eky'Ekika kya Manasse, Musa yali akiwadde ettaka mu Basani ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba bwa Yorudaani, ate ekitundu ekirala Yoswa ng'akiwadde ku ludda Olw'ebugwanjuba bwa Yorudaani, wamu n'ebika ebirala." 
Joshua22:8 Yoswa n'asiibula ebika ebyo ng'abagamba nti: “Muddayo ewammwe nga muli bagagga nnyo: nga mulina amagana g'ente ne ffeeza, ne zaabu, n'ebikomo n'ebyuma n'engoye nnyingi. Mugabane ne baganda bammwe, ebyo bye mwanyaga ku balabe bammwe.” Awo ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Joshua22:9 Awo ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse ne baddayo ewaabwe, ne baleka Abayisirayeli abalala mu Siilo, mu nsi y'e Kanaani, ne bagenda mu nsi yaabwe, ey'e Gileyaadi, gye baaweebwa okuba eyaabwe, nga Mukama bwe yalagira ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Awo ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse, bwe baatuuka e Gelilooti, ekiriraanye Omugga Yorudaani mu nsi y'e Kanaani, ne bazimba awo alutaari ennene, esikiriza okulaba." 
Joshua22:11 Awo Abayisirayeli abalala ne bawulira abantu nga bagamba nti: “Laba, ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni, n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse bazimbye alutaari e Gelilooti, ku ludda lwaffe olwa Yorudaani.”" 
Joshua22:12 Abayisirayeli bwe baakiwulira, bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira e Siilo, bagende babalwanyise." 
Joshua22:13 Awo Abayisirayeli ne batuma Finehaasi, mutabani wa Eleyazaari kabona, eri ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi." 
Joshua22:14 N'agenda n'abakulembeze kkumi, abaava mu buli kika kya Yisirayeli, era nga be bakulu b'ennyumba zaabwe." 
Joshua22:15 Ne bajja eri ab'Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi," 
Joshua22:16 ne boogerera ekibiina kya Mukama kyonna, ne babagamba nti: “Lwaki mukoze ekintu kino ekibi mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli? Mujeemedde Mukama nga mwezimbira alutaari eno! Mumuvuddeko, temukyamugoberera!" 
Joshua22:17 Era twongere ku kibi kye twakolera e Peyori, kye tutannaba na kwenaazaako n'okutuusa kaakano, newaakubadde nga Mukama yasindika kawumpuli mu bantu be?" 
Joshua22:18 Mwagala kumuvaako leero? Singa mumujeemera olwa leero, enkya ajja kusunguwalira ekibiina kya Yisirayeli kyonna." 
Joshua22:19 Naye kaakano oba ng'ensi yammwe tegwanira kusinzizaamu, mujje mu nsi ya Mukama omuli eweema ye, mwefunire ettaka mu ffe. Naye temujeemera Mukama, oba okutufuula abajeemu nga muzimba alutaari endala, ng'ate alutaari ya Mukama Katonda waffe weeri." 
Joshua22:20 Akani mutabani wa Zeera, bwe yagaana okuwulira ekiragiro ekifa ku bintu ebyali eby'okuzikiriza, ekibiina kyonna ekya Yisirayeli tekyabonerezebwa? Akani si ye yekka eyafa olw'ekibi kye.”" 
Joshua22:21 Ab'Ekika ekya Rewubeeni n'ekya Gaadi n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse ne baddamu abakulu b'ennyumba z'Abayisirayeli abalala nti: 
Joshua22:22 “Mukama, ye Katonda Nnannyinibuyinza! Mukama, ye Katonda Nnannyinibuyinza! Ye amanyi, era nammwe twagala mumanye kye twakola. Ddala oba nga twakikola lwa bujeemu, na lwa kweggya ku Mukama, ku luno temutusaasira." 
Joshua22:23 Oba nga twazimba alutaari lwa kujeemera Mukama, tuleme kumugoberera, oba tulyoke tuweereko gy'ali ebitambiro ebyokebwa oba ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke, oba ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, Mukama yennyini atubonereze." 
Joshua22:24 Nedda! Twakikola kubanga twatya nti gye bujja, bazzukulu bammwe bandigamba abaffe nti: ‘Mulina nkolagana ki ne Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli?" 
Joshua22:25 Mukama yafuula Yorudaani ensalo wakati waffe nammwe Abarewubeeni n'Abagaadi. Temulina kye mugabana wa Mukama.’ Bwe batyo bazzukulu bammwe bandiresezzaayo bazzukulu baffe okusinza Mukama. 
Joshua22:26 Kale kyetwava tuzimba alutaari, si lwa kwokerako bitambiro, oba okuweerako ebiweebwayo," 
Joshua22:27 naye twagizimba, ebe obujulizi obulaga abantu baffe n'abammwe, era n'ab'omu mirembe egirituddirira nti ddala tusinza Mukama, era tuwaayo mu maaso ge ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, bazzukulu bammwe baleme kugamba bazzukulu baffe gye bujja nti: ‘Temulina kye mugabana wa Mukama.’" 
Joshua22:28 Twalowooza nti bwe balitugamba bwe batyo, oba bwe baligamba bwe batyo bazzukulu baffe gye bujja, tuligamba nti: ‘Mulabe alutaari bajjajjaffe gye baakola ng'efaananira ddala alutaari ya Mukama. Baagikola, si lwa biweebwayo ebyokebwa, oba lwa bitambiro, naye ebe obujulizi wakati waffe nammwe.’" 
Joshua22:29 Kikafuuwe ffe okujeemera Mukama, oba okulekera awo okumugoberera, ne tuzimba alutaari okuweerako ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, oba ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke, oba ebitambiro. Ekyo tetuyinza kukikola nga waliwo alutaari ya Mukama Katonda waffe mu maaso g'Eweema ye.”" 
Joshua22:30 Awo Finehaasi kabona, n'abakulembeze b'ekibiina, abakulu b'ennyumba za Yisirayeli abaali naye, bwe baawulira ebigambo ab'omu Bika ekya Rewubeeni n'ekya Gaadi n'ekitundu ky'Ekika kya Manasse bye bagambye, ne basanyuka nnyo." 
Joshua22:31 Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari kabona n'abagamba nti: “Kaakano tutegedde nga Mukama ali wakati mu ffe, kubanga temwamujeemera. Muwonyezza Abayisirayeli okubonerezebwa Mukama.”" 
Joshua22:32 Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari kabona n'abakulembeze, ne bava mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi gye baasisinkanira Abarewubeeni n'Abagaadi, ne baddayo mu nsi y'e Kanaani eri Abayisirayeli, ne babategeeza ebibaddewo." 
Joshua22:33 Abayisirayeli ne basanyuka, ne batendereza Katonda, ne bataddayo kwogera ku bya kugenda kulwanyisa Barewubeeni na Bagaadi, n'okuzikiriza ensi mwe babeera." 
Joshua22:34 Abarewubeeni n'Abagaadi ne batuuma alutaari eyo erinnya “Obujulizi”, nga bagamba nti: “Eno bwe bujulizi obutulaga nti Mukama ye Katonda.”" 
Joshua23:1 Bwe waayitawo ekiseera kiwanvu, Mukama n'awonya Abayisirayeli abalabe baabwe bonna ababeetoolodde. Mu kiseera ekyo, Yoswa yali akaddiye nnyo." 
Joshua23:2 Kyeyava ayita Abayisirayeli bonna, abakulu n'abakulembeze, n'abalamuzi, n'abakungu baabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Nze nkaddiye. Mpise mu myaka mingi." 
Joshua23:3 Mulabye byonna Mukama Katonda wammwe by'akoze ku mawanga gonna gonna ku lwammwe. Mukama Katonda wammwe abadde abalwanirira mmwe. 
Joshua23:4 Ensi y'amawanga agakyasigaddewo, n'ey'amawanga gonna ge namala edda okuwangula, okuva ku Mugga Yorudaani mu buvanjuba, okutuuka ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati mu bugwanjuba, ngiwadde ebika byammwe okuba eyaabyo." 
Joshua23:5 Mukama Katonda wammwe alisindiikiriza ab'amawanga ago, n'abazza emabega ku lwammwe, era alibagoba nga mmwe mulaba. Mulyefuga ensi yaabwe, nga Mukama Katonda wammwe bwe yabasuubiza mmwe." 
Joshua23:6 Kale munyiikire nnyo okukwatanga n'okukolanga byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Amateeka ga Musa, mulemenga kubivaako n'akatono," 
Joshua23:7 era mulemenga kwetaba na ba mawanga gano abasigadde mu mmwe, oba okukoowoolanga amannya ga balubaale baabwe, oba okugakozesanga nga mulayira, oba okusinza balubaale abo, wadde okubafukaamirira." 
Joshua23:8 Naye munywerere ku Mukama nga bwe mubadde mukola okutuusa kaakano. 
Joshua23:9 Mukama yagoba amawanga amanene era ag'amaanyi nga mulaba, era tewali muntu yayimirira mu maaso gammwe okutuusa kati." 
Joshua23:10 Omu mu mmwe anaagobanga lukumi, kubanga Mukama Katonda wammwe ye abalwanirira, nga bwe yabasuubiza." 
Joshua23:11 Kale, musseeyo nnyo omwoyo okwagalanga Mukama Katonda wammwe," 
Joshua23:12 kubanga bwe mulidda emabega, ne mwegatta n'ab'amawanga ago abaasigala mu mmwe, ne mufumbiriganwa nabo," 
Joshua23:13 mutegeerere ddala nga Mukama Katonda wammwe taagobenga ba mawanga ago nga mulaba, naye banaabanga mutego n'ekyambika gye muli, n'obuswanyu mu mbiriizi zammwe, oba amaggwa mu maaso gammwe, okutuusa lwe muliggweerawo ddala mu nsi eno ennungi, Mukama Katonda wammwe gy'abawadde." 
Joshua23:14 “Mulabe, nze nnaatera okufa. Mwenna mumanyi bulungi mu mitima gyammwe ne mu myoyo gyammwe, nga Mukama abawadde ebirungi byonna bye yasuubiza. Buli kirungi kye yasuubiza akituukirizza. Tewali na kimu kibuzeeko." 
Joshua23:15 Naye nga bw'atuukirizza buli kirungi kye yabasuubiza, bw'atyo Mukama bw'alibatuusaako buli kabi konna, okutuusa lw'alibamalirawo ddala mu nsi eno ennungi gye yabawa." 
Joshua23:16 Bwe mutalikuuma ndagaano Mukama Katonda wammwe gye yabalagira okukuuma, ne mugenda ne muweereza balubaale, era ne mubafukaamirira, alibabonereza mu busungu bwe, ne muggwaawo mangu mu nsi eno ennungi gy'abawadde.”" 
Joshua24:1 Awo Yoswa n'akuŋŋaanya ebika ebya Yisirayeli mu Sekemu. N'ayita abantu abakulu, n'abakulembeze, n'abalanzi, era n'abakungu ba Yisirayeli. Ne bajja mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Joshua24:2 Yoswa n'agamba abantu bonna nti: “Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Edda bajjajjammwe baabeeranga emitala w'Omugga Ewufuraate, ne basinzanga balubaale. Omu ku bajjajjammwe abo, ye Teera, kitaawe wa Aburahamu ne Nahori." 
Joshua24:3 Aburahamu jjajjammwe ne mmuggya emitala w'Omugga ogwo Ewufuraate, ne mmuyisa mu nsi yonna ey'e Kanaani, ne njaza ezzadde lye, ne mmuwa Yisaaka." 
Joshua24:4 Yisaaka ne mmuwa Yakobo ne Esawu. Ne mpa Esawu ensi Seyiri ey'ensozi okuba eyiye. Naye Yakobo n'abaana be, ne baserengeta e Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Oluvannyuma ne ntuma Musa, ne mbonyaabonya Misiri mu ebyo bye nakolerayo, ne ndyoka mbaggyayo mmwe." 
Joshua24:6 Naggya bajjajjammwe e Misiri, Abamisiri ne babawondera n'amagaali n'abeebagadde embalaasi. Naye bajjajjammwe bwe baatuuka ku Nnyanja Emmyufu," 
Joshua24:7 ne bankoowoola, Nze Mukama, mbayambe. Ne nteekawo ekizikiza wakati waabwe n'Abamisiri. Abamisiri ne mbayiwako ennyanja ne mbasaanyaawo. Mumanyi bye nakola ku Misiri. “ ‘Mwamala ekiseera kiwanvu mu ddungu." 
Joshua24:8 Awo ne mbaleeta mu nsi y'Abaamori, abaali ku ludda olw'ebuvanjuba olw'Omugga Yorudaani. Ne babalwanyisa mmwe. Naye mmwe ne mbawa okubawangula, ne mwefuga ensi yaabwe, bo ne mbazikiriza nga mmwe mulaba." 
Joshua24:9 Awo kabaka w'e Mowaabu, Balaki mutabani wa Zippori, n'abalwanyisa mmwe Abayisirayeli. N'atumya Balamu mutabani wa Bewori, n'amusaba okubakolimira." 
Joshua24:10 Naye ne ŋŋaana okuwuliriza ebya Balamu, kyeyava abasabira omukisa. Bwe ntyo ne mbawonya Balaki." 
Joshua24:11 Ne musomoka Omugga Yorudaani, ne mutuuka e Yeriko. Abantu b'e Yeriko ne babalwanyisa, ng'Abaamori, n'Abaperizi, n'Abakanaani, n'Abahiiti, n'Abagirugaasi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi bwe baakola. Naye ne mbawa mmwe okubawangula abo bonna." 
Joshua24:12 Bwe mwali nga mutuuka, ne ndeeta mu bantu abo entiisa n'egoba bakabaka bombi ab'Abaamori. Tebyali bitala byammwe, wadde emitego gyammwe." 
Joshua24:13 Nabawa ensi gye mwali mutalimanga, n'ebibuga bye mwali mutazimbanga, ne mubibeeramu. Ne mulya ku mizabbibu ne ku mizayiti gye mutasimbanga.’ ”" 
Joshua24:14 “Kale kaakano musseemu Mukama ekitiibwa, mumuweerezenga mu mazima awatali bukuusa. Era muggyeewo balubaale, bajjajjammwe be baasinzanga mu Mesopotaamiya ne mu Misiri, muweerezenga Mukama yekka." 
Joshua24:15 Era oba nga temwagala kumuweerezanga, mulondeewo olwaleero gwe munaaweerezanga: oba balubaale, bajjajjammwe be baaweerezanga mu Mesopotaamiya, oba balubaale b'Abaamori, ab'omu nsi gye mulimu kaakati. Naye nze n'ab'omu nnyumba yange, ffe tunaaweerezanga Mukama.”" 
Joshua24:16 Abantu ne baddamu nti: “Kikafuuwe ffe okuva ku Mukama ne tuweereza balubaale! 
Joshua24:17 Mukama Katonda waffe ye yatuggya ffe ne bajjajjaffe mu buddu mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne tulaba ebyewuunyo bye yakola. Yatukuuma wonna gye twagendanga mu mawanga gonna ge twayitangamu." 
Joshua24:18 Bwe twali nga tujja mu nsi eno, Mukama n'agobamu Abaamori bonna abaagirimu. N'olwekyo tunaaweerezanga Mukama, kubanga ye Katonda waffe.”" 
Joshua24:19 Yoswa n'agamba abantu nti: “Naye muyinza okulemwa okuweereza Mukama. Ye ye Katonda, era mutuukirivu. Kale taasonyiwenga bibi byammwe. Tagenda kukkiriza kuvuganyizibwa." 
Joshua24:20 Bwe munaamuvangako ne muweereza balubaale, anaabakyukiranga mmwe, n'ababonereza. Alibazikiriza, newaakubadde nga yasooka kubakolera birungi.”" 
Joshua24:21 Abantu ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Nedda, tunaaweerezanga Mukama.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yoswa n'abagamba nti: “Muli bajulirwa bammwe mwennyini nga mulonzeewo kuweerezanga Mukama.” Ne bagamba nti: “Tuli bajulirwa.” 
Joshua24:23 N'agamba nti: “Kale kaakano muggyeewo balubaale abagwira be mulina. Mukyusize ddala emitima gyammwe eri Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Abantu ne bagamba Yoswa nti: “Mukama Katonda waffe tunaamuweerezanga. Ne by'alagira, tunaabituukirizanga.”" 
Joshua24:25 Bw'atyo Yoswa n'akola endagaano n'abantu ku lunaku olwo, n'abateekera amateeka n'ebiragiro e Sekemu." 
Joshua24:26 Yoswa n'awandiika ebigambo ebyo mu Kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Katonda. N'atwala ejjinja eddene, n'alisimba awo wansi w'omuvule mu kifo ekitukuvu ekya Mukama." 
Joshua24:27 N'agamba abantu bonna nti: “Ejjinja lino linaabanga mujulirwa waffe, kubanga liwulidde ebigambo byonna Mukama by'atugambye; kyerinaavanga liba omujulirwa abalumiriza mmwe, mulemenga okwegaana Katonda wammwe.”" 
Joshua24:28 Awo Yoswa n'asiibula abantu, buli omu n'adda mu kitundu kye yagabana okuba ekikye." 
Joshua24:29 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, omuweereza wa Mukama, Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, n'afa ng'awangadde emyaka kikumi mu kkumi." 
Joshua24:30 Ne bamuziika mu ttaka lye, lye yagabana e Timunati Seera, mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'Olusozi Gaasi." 
Joshua24:31 Ebbanga lyonna Yoswa lye yamala nga mulamu, Abayisirayeli baaweereza Mukama. Era ne bongera okumuweereza ebbanga lyonna, ery'obulamu bw'abakulembeze abeerabirako n'agaabwe byonna Mukama bye yakolera Yisirayeli, era abaasigalawo nga Yoswa amaze okufa." 
Joshua24:32 Amagumba ga Yosefu, Abayisirayeli ge baaleeta nga bava e Misiri, ne bagaziika e Sekemu, mu ttaka Yakobo lye yagula ebitundu bya ffeeza ekikumi ku batabani ba Hamori, kitaawe wa Sekemu. Ettaka eryo ne liba obusika bwa bazzukulu ba Yosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Eleyazaari mutabani wa Arooni n'afa, ne bamuziika e Gibeya, ekibuga kya mutabani we Finehaasi, ekyamuweebwa mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi." 
Judges1:1 Awo Yoswa ng'amaze okufa, Abayisirayeli ne babuuza Mukama nti: “Baani ababa basooka okugenda okulumba Abakanaani okubalwanyisa?”" 
Judges1:2 Mukama n'addamu nti “Ab'Ekika kya Yuda be baba basooka okugenda. Bo be mpadde okufuga ensi eyo.” 
Judges1:3 Ab'Ekika kya Yuda ne bagamba ab'Ekika kya Simyoni nti: “Mujje tugende ffenna mu kitundu ekiweereddwa ffe tulwanyise Abakanaani nga tuli wamu. Era naffe bwe tutyo tuligenda nammwe mu kitundu ekiweereddwa mmwe.” Awo ab'Ekika kya Simyoni 
Judges1:4 n'ab'ekya Yuda ne bagendera wamu mu lutalo. Mukama n'abawa okuwangula Abakanaani n'Abaperizi, ne babattamu abasajja omutwalo gumu e Bezeki." 
Judges1:5 Ne basanga Adonibezeki mu Bezeki, ne bamulwanyisa." 
Judges1:6 N'adduka, kyokka ne bamuwondera ne bamukwata, ne bamutemako engalo ze ensajja n'ebigere bye ebisajja." 
Judges1:7 Adonibezeki n'agamba nti: “Bakabaka ensanvu be natemako engalo zaabwe ensajja n'ebigere byabwe ebisajja baakuŋŋaanyanga obukunkumuka bw'emmere wansi w'emmeeza yange. Kaakano Katonda ansasudde ekyo kye nabakola.” Ne bamutwala e Yerusaalemu, era eyo gye yafiira." 
Judges1:8 Awo ab'Ekika kya Yuda ne balumba Yerusaalemu, ne bakiwamba, ne batta abantu baamu, ekibuga ne bakyokya omuliro." 
Judges1:9 Bwe baava awo ne bagenda okulwanyisa Abakanaani ab'omu nsi ey'ensozi, ne mu bisenyi ne mu nsi enkalu ey'omu bukiikaddyo." 
Judges1:10 Ne balumba Abakanaani abaali mu kibuga Heburooni, ekyayitibwanga Kiriyati Aruba, ne bawangula Abasesayi n'Abayimani n'Abatalumayi." 
Judges1:11 Ab'ekika kya Yuda bwe baava eyo, ne balumba ekibuga ky'e Debiri, ekyayitibwanga Kiriyati Seferi." 
Judges1:12 Omu ku bo ayitibwa Kalebu n'agamba nti: “Anaalumba n'awamba ekibuga Kiriyati Seferi nja kumuwa muwala wange Akasa amuwase.” 
Judges1:13 Otiniyeeli mutabani wa Kenazi, muto wa Kalebu n'akiwamba. Kalebu n'amuwa muwala we Akasa amuwase." 
Judges1:14 Ku lunaku olw'embaga ey'obugole bwabwe, Otiniyeeli n'akuutira Akasa okusaba kitaawe amuwe ennimiro. Awo Akasa n'ava ku ndogoyi ye, n'akka wansi. Kalebu n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala ki?”" 
Judges1:15 Akasa n'agamba nti: “Nnyamba ompe n'enzizi z'amazzi, kubanga ensi gy'ompadde nkalu.” Kalebu n'amuwa enzizi ez'engulu n'ez'emmanga." 
Judges1:16 Bazzukulu b'Omukeeni, kitaawe wa muka Musa, ne bagenda wamu n'ab'Ekika kya Yuda okuva e Yeriko, ekibuga ky'enkindu, ne balaga mu nsi enkalu, eri mu bukiikaddyo obwa Aradi mu Buyudaaya. Ne basenga mu Bamaleki." 
Judges1:17 Ab'omu Kika kya Yuda ne bagenda wamu n'ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni, ne bawangula Abakanaani abaali mu kibuga Zefati, ne bakizikiririza ddala, ne bakituuma erinnya Horuma." 
Judges1:18 Ab'Ekika kya Yuda ne bawangula Gaaza ne Asikelooni ne Ekurooni, n'ebitundu ebibyetoolodde." 
Judges1:19 Era Mukama n'abayamba ne bawamba ensi ey'ensozi. Naye ne batasobola kugobamu batuuze ab'omu bisenyi, kubanga abatuuze abo baalina amagaali ag'ebyuma." 
Judges1:20 Ekibuga Heburooni ne kiweebwa Kalebu, nga Musa bwe yalagira, Kalebu n'agobamu ab'ebika ebisatu eby'abazzukulu ba Anaki." 
Judges1:21 Naye ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini ne batagoba Bayebusi mu Yerusaalemu. Okuva olwo Abayebusi ne bongera okukibeeramu awamu nabo n'okutuusa kati. 
Judges1:22 Ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu n'ab'omu Kika kya Manasse nabo ne balumba Beteli ekyali kiyitibwa Luuzi, Mukama n'abayamba." 
Judges1:23 Ne batuma abakessi mu kibuga. 
Judges1:24 Abakessi abo ne balaba omusajja akivaamu, ne bamugamba nti “Tulagirire mangu we tuyinza okuyita okuyingira mu kibuga, olwo naffe tetuukukoleko kabi”." 
Judges1:25 N'abalagirira. Ne batta ab'omu kibuga bonna, okuggyako omusajja oyo n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Judges1:26 Omusajja oyo n'agenda mu nsi y'Abahiiti n'azimbayo ekibuga, n'akituuma erinnya Luuzi. Era kikyayitibwa erinnya eryo n'okutuusa kati." 
Judges1:27 Ab'omu Kika kya Manasse tebaagobamu batuuze ba mu bibuga Beti Seyani ne Taanaki, ne Doori, ne Yibuleyani, ne Megiddo, n'ab'omu byalo ebibiriraanye, Abakanaani ne bongera okubeera mu nsi eyo." 
Judges1:28 Awo Abayisirayeli bwe beeyongera okuba ab'amaanyi, ne bawaliriza Abakanaani okubakoleranga emirimu, naye ne batabagoberamu ddala." 
Judges1:29 Ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu tebaagobamu Bakanaani abaali mu kibuga Gezeri, Abakanaani ne bongera okubeeramu wamu nabo." 
Judges1:30 Ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni tebaagobamu batuuze ba mu bibuga Kituroni ne Nakalali, Abakanaani ne bongera okubibeeramu awamu nabo, ne bawalirizibwa okukoleranga Abayisirayeli emirimu." 
Judges1:31 Ab'omu Kika kya Aseri tebaagobamu batuuze ba mu bibuga Akko ne Sidoni, ne Alabu ne Akuzibu, wadde ab'omu Eluba ne Afeki ne Rehobu." 
Judges1:32 Ab'omu Kika kya Aseri ne babeera wamu n'abatuuze Abakanaani, kubanga tebaabagobaamu." 
Judges1:33 Ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali ne batagobaamu batuuze ba mu bibuga Beti-Semani ne Beti-Anati. Ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali ne bongera okubeera awamu n'abatuuze Abakanaani naye ne babawaliriza okubakoleranga emirimu. 
Judges1:34 Abaamori baasindiikiriza ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne babazzaayo mu nsi ey'ensozi, ne batabakkiriza kukka mu lusenyi." 
Judges1:35 Abaamori ne bongera okubeera mu Ayiyalooni, ne mu Saalubini, ne ku lusozi Eresi. Naye ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu n'ab'omu Kika kya Manasse ne babakinako, ne babawaliriza okubakoleranga emirimu." 
Judges1:36 Okuva mu bukiikaddyo obwa Seela, ensalo y'Abaamori yayitiranga mu ntikko ya Akurabbimu." 
Judges2:1 Awo Malayika wa Mukama n'ava e Gilugaali n'agenda e Bokimu, n'agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri ne mbaleeta mu nsi gye nasuubiza bajjajjammwe. Nagamba nti sirimenya ndagaano yange gye nakola nammwe." 
Judges2:2 Temuukolenga ndagaano na bantu abali mu nsi eno. Mumenyewo alutaari zaabwe. Naye mmwe temukoze nga bwe nabalagira. Lwaki mujeemye? 
Judges2:3 Kale kaakano mbagamba nti sirigobayo bantu abo nga mugendayo. Banaabanga balabe bammwe, era munaakemebwanga okusinza balubaale baabwe.”" 
Judges2:4 Malayika wa Mukama bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, Abayisirayeli bonna ne batema emiranga, ne bakaaba amaziga." 
Judges2:5 Ekifo ekyo kyebaava bakituuma erinnya Bokimu, ne baweera eyo ebitambiro eri Mukama." 
Judges2:6 Awo Yoswa n'asiibula Abayisirayeli ne bagenda, buli omu okufuna ekitundu ky'ensi kye yagabana." 
Judges2:7 Abayisirayeli baaweerezanga Mukama ebbanga lyonna Yoswa lye yamala nga mulamu, era n'ebbanga lyonna, nga wakyaliwo abakulembeze, abaamusinga okuwangaala, abaalaba ku bikuuno byonna, Mukama bye yakolera Yisirayeli." 
Judges2:8 Omuweereza wa Mukama, mutabani wa Nuuni, yafa ng'awangadde emyaka kikumi mu kkumi." 
Judges2:9 Ne bamuziika mu kitundu kye, kye yagabana mu Timunati Sera, mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, mu bukiikakkono obw'olusozi Gaasi." 
Judges2:10 Era n'ab'omulembe ogwo bonna ne bafa. Ne waddawo ab'omulembe ogwaddirira, abataamanya Mukama, wadde ebyo bye yakolera Yisirayeli." 
Judges2:11 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bakola ekyanyiiza Mukama, ne basinza Babbaali." 
Judges2:12 Ne bava ku Mukama, Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne basinza balubaale, ab'abantu ababeetoolodde, ne babavuunamira, ne basunguwaza Mukama." 
Judges2:13 Mukama baamuvaako, ne baweereza Baali ne Asitarooti." 
Judges2:14 Mukama n'asunguwalira nnyo Abayisirayeli, n'abawaayo eri abanyazi ne babanyagako ebyabwe. N'aleka abalabe baabwe bonna abaali babeetoolodde, ne babawangula, Abayisirayeli nga tebakyasobola kwetaasa." 
Judges2:15 Buli lwe baagendanga mu lutalo, nga Mukama abaleetera akabi, nga bwe yali agambye okukola. Ne beeraliikirira nnyo!" 
Judges2:16 Mukama n'abawa abakulembeze okubawonya abanyazi. 
Judges2:17 Naye Abayisirayeli ne batawuliriza bakulembeze baabwe. Ne bataba beesigwa eri Mukama, wabula ne basinza balubaale. Bajjajjaabwe baawuliranga ebiragiro bya Mukama, naye bano tebaakola bwe batyo." 
Judges2:18 Mukama bwe yawanga Abayisirayeli omukulembeze, Mukama yayambanga omukulembeze oyo, era yabawonyanga abalabe baabwe, ebbanga lyonna omukulembeze lye yamalanga nga mulamu. Mukama yabakwatirwanga ekisa, kubanga baasindanga olw'okubonyaabonyezebwa n'okunyigirizibwa." 
Judges2:19 Naye omukulembeze bwe yafanga, abantu baddanga mu mize gyabwe egy'edda, ne baba babi n'okusinga bajjajjaabwe. Baaweerezanga era baasinzanga balubaale, ne bagaana okulekayo empisa zaabwe embi." 
Judges2:20 Awo Mukama n'asunguwalira nnyo Yisirayeli, n'agamba nti: “Ab'eggwanga lino bamenye endagaano gye nalagira bajjajjaabwe okukuumanga, era tebakyampulira." 
Judges2:21 Kale nange okuva leero sikyagobyemu ba mawanga agaali gakyali mu nsi eno, Yoswa we yafiira." 
Judges2:22 Nja kuyita mu bo okugeza Abayisirayeli, ndabe oba nga banaakwatanga, oba tebaakwatenga makubo gange, nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baagakwatanga.”" 
Judges2:23 N'olwekyo Mukama n'aleka ab'amawanga ago mu nsi eyo, n'atabagobaamu mangu era n'ataganya Yoswa kubawangula." 
Judges3:1 Kale Mukama n'aleka ab'amawanga agamu okusigala mu nsi eyo okugeza Abayisirayeli abataalaba ku ntalo z'e Kanaani. 
Judges3:2 Ekyo yakikola, nga ky'ayagala, kwe kuyigiriza eby'entalo Abayisirayeli aba buli mulembe, naddala abo abaali tebabeerangako mu lutalo." 
Judges3:3 Abo abaalekebwa mu nsi eyo, be b'omu bibuga by'Abafilistiya ebitaano, n'Abakanaani bonna, n'Abasidoni n'Abahiivi, abatuuze b'omu nsozi z'omu Lebanooni okuva ku Lusozi Baali Herumooni, okutuuka awayingirirwa mu Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Baali ba kugeza Bayisirayeli okulaba oba nga banaawuliranga ebiragiro bya Mukama, bye yalagira bajjajjaabwe, ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Judges3:5 Abayisirayeli ne babeera mu Bakanaani n'Abahiiti, n'Abayebusi." 
Judges3:6 Ne bawasa abakazi mu bantu abo, era ne bafumbizaamu bawala baabwe era ne basinzanga balubaale baabwe." 
Judges3:7 Abayisirayeli ne beerabira Mukama, Katonda waabwe, ne bakola ebibi ne bamunyiiza, ne basinza balubaale Baali ne Asera." 
Judges3:8 Mukama kyeyava asunguwalira ennyo Abayisirayeli, n'aleka Kusani Risatayimu, kabaka wa Mesopotaamiya okubawangula, n'abafugira emyaka munaana." 
Judges3:9 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bakaabirira Mukama, n'abatumira omuntu eyabanunula, ye Otiniyeeli, mutabani wa Kalebu, muto wa Kenazi." 
Judges3:10 Omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gujja ku ye, n'akulembera Yisirayeli. N'agenda mu lutalo, Mukama n'amuwa okuwangula Kusani Risatayimu, kabaka wa Mesopotaamiya." 
Judges3:11 Ensi n'ebaamu emirembe okumala emyaka amakumi ana. Otiniyeeli n'afa. 
Judges3:12 Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okukola ebibi ne banyiiza Mukama. N'olwekyo Mukama n'awa Egulooni kabaka wa Mowaabu amaanyi okulwanyisa Yisirayeli. 
Judges3:13 Egulooni ne yeegatta n'Abammoni n'Abamaleki, ne bawangula Yisirayeli, ne bawamba Yeriko, ekibuga eky'enkindu." 
Judges3:14 Abayisirayeli ne bafugibwa Egulooni okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana. 
Judges3:15 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bakaabirira Mukama, n'abatumira omuntu okubanunula, ye Ehudi mutabani wa Gera, Omubenyamiini. Ehudi oyo yali wankonokono. Abayisirayeli ne bakwasa Ehudi ebirabo abitwalire Egulooni kabaka wa Mowaabu." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi yali yeeweeserezza ekitala eky'obwogi ku njuyi zombi, nga kiweza sentimita ng'amakumi ataano obuwanvu. N'akyesiba ku kisambi kye ekya ddyo, munda mu ngoye ze." 
Judges3:17 N'atwalira Egulooni Kabaka wa Mowaabu ebirabo. Egulooni yali musajja munene nnyo. 
Judges3:18 Ehudi bwe yamala okuwaayo ebirabo, n'alagira abantu abaabyetikka baddeyo ewaabwe." 
Judges3:19 Naye Ehudi kennyini n'akoma ku mayinja amoole agaali okumpi ne Gilugaali, n'addayo eri Egulooni, n'agamba nti: “Ayi Ssaabasajja, nnina obubaka obw'okukuwa mu kyama.” Awo Kabaka n'alagira abaweereza be nti: “Mutuleke ffekka!” Bonna ne bava w'ali ne bafuluma." 
Judges3:20 Kabaka bwe yali ng'atudde yekka mu kisenge kye ekiweweevu eky'okuwummuliramu ekya waggulu, Ehudi n'ajja gy'ali, n'agamba nti: “Nnina obubaka bwo obuvudde eri Katonda.” Kabaka n'asituka ku ntebe ye." 
Judges3:21 Ehudi n'akozesa omukono gwe ogwa kkono, n'aggyayo ekitala ku kisambi kye ekya ddyo, n'akifumita kabaka mu lubuto."
