Judges3:22 Ekitala kyonna ne kimubuliramu n'ekiti kyakyo, amasavu ne gazibikira we kiyingiridde. Ehudi teyakisikaamu mu lubuto lwa kabaka, ne kiggukira emabega." 
Judges3:23 Awo Ehudi n'afuluma n'amuggaliramu, enzigi n'azisiba," 
Judges3:24 n'agenda. Abaweereza bwe bajja ne balaba ng'enzigi z'ekisenge ekyawaggulu nsibe, ne balowooza nti kabaka mw'ali yeeteewuluzaako mu kasenge akoomunda." 
Judges3:25 Ne balindako ebbanga lye baalowooza nti limala. Bwe baalaba nga taggulawo, ne bakwata ekisumuluzo, ne baggulawo. Ne basanga mukama waabwe ng'agudde wansi afudde." 
Judges3:26 Ehudi n'atoloka nga bakyalindirira. N'ayita mu mayinja amoole, n'atuuka gy'anaawonera e Seyira." 
Judges3:27 Bwe yatuuka eyo mu nsi ya Efurayimu, n'afuuwa eŋŋombe okuyita Abayisirayeli. N'abakulembera, ne baserengeta wamu naye okuva mu nsi ey'ensozi." 
Judges3:28 N'agamba nti: “Mungoberere, Mukama abawadde okuwangula abalabe bammwe Abamowaabu.” Ne bagoberera Ehudi, ne baserengeta, ne beekwata ekifo Abamowaabu we baali ab'okusomokera Omugga Yorudaani, ne bataganya muntu n'omu kusomoka." 
Judges3:29 Ku mulundi ogwo ne batta mu Bamowaabu abasajja nga omutwalo gumu ab'amaanyi era abazira, ne watabaawo awonawo." 
Judges3:30 Ku lunaku olwo Abayisirayeli ne bawangula Mowaabu. Ensi n'ebaamu emirembe okumala emyaka kinaana. 
Judges3:31 Omukulembeze eyaddirira, yali Samugaari, mutabani wa Anati. Naye yanunula Yisirayeli bwe yatta Abafilistiya lukaaga n'omuwunda." 
Judges4:1 Ehudi bwe yamala okufa, Abayisirayeli ne baddamu okukola ebibi ne banyiiza Mukama." 
Judges4:2 Mukama n'abaleka okuwangulwa Yabini, Kabaka wa Kanaani, eyafugiranga mu kibuga Azori. Omuduumizi w'eggye lye yali Sisera, ng'abeera mu Haroseti-Hagoyiimu." 
Judges4:3 Yabini yalina amagaali lwenda ag'ebyuma, n'afuga Yisirayeli n'obukambwe okumala emyaka amakumi abiri. Abayisirayeli ne bakaabirira Mukama abayambe." 
Judges4:4 Mu biro ebyo, Debora muka Lappidoti, yali mulanzi, era nga mulamuzi wa Bayisirayeli." 
Judges4:5 Yatuulanga wansi w'Olukindu lwa Debora, wakati wa Raama ne Beteli, mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi. Eyo Abayisirayeli gye baagendanga gy'ali okubasalira emisango." 
Judges4:6 Awo n'atumya Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu mu Kibuga Kedesi eky'omu Nafutaali, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli akulagidde nti: ‘Twala abasajja omutwalo gumu ku b'omu Kika kya Nafutaali n'ekya Zebbulooni, bakuŋŋaanire ku Lusozi Tabori." 
Judges4:7 Sisera omuduumizi w'eggye lya Yabini nja kumuleeta okukulwanyisa ku Mugga Kisoni. Ajja n'amagaali ge n'abaserikale be, kyokka nja kukusobozesa okumuwangula.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Baraki n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe bw'onoogenda nange, kale nnaagenda. Naye bw'otoogende nange, sijja kugenda.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora n'addamu nti: “Mazima nja kugenda naawe. Naye ekitiibwa eky'obuwanguzi tekijja kuba kikyo, kubanga Mukama ajja kuwaayo Sisera awangulwe omukazi.” Awo Debora n'asituka, n'agenda ne Baraki e Kadesi." 
Judges4:10 Baraki n'ayita ab'Ekika kya Nafutaali n'ekya Zebbulooni e Kadesi, abasajja omutwalo gumu, ne bamugoberera. Debora n'agenda wamu naye." 
Judges4:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, Heberi Omukeeni yali yeeyawudde ku Bakeeni banne, bazzukulu ba Hobabu, kitaawe wa muka Musa, n'asimba eweema ye awali omuvule mu Zenannimu, okumpi n'e Kadesi." 
Judges4:12 Sisera bwe baamubuulira nti Baraki, mutabani wa Abinowamu ayambuse ku Lusozi Tabori," 
Judges4:13 Sisera n'akuŋŋaanya amagaali ge gonna olwenda ag'ebyuma, ne basajja be bonna abaali naye, ne bava e Haroseti-Hagoyiimu, ne balaga ku Mugga Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Debora n'agamba Baraki nti: “Genda! Mukama akukulembedde. Olwaleero akuwadde okuwangula Sisera.” Awo Baraki n'akkirira olusozi Tabori wamu ne basajja be omutwalo gumu. 
Judges4:15 Mukama n'afufuggaza Sisera n'amagaali ge gonna, n'eggye lye lyonna n'ebyokulwanyisa, mu maaso ga Baraki. Sisera n'ava mu ggaali ye, n'addusa bigere." 
Judges4:16 Baraki n'awondera amagaali era n'eggye okutuuka mu Aroseti ekya Bannamawanga. Eggye lya Sisera lyonna ne littibwa. Ne watasigalawo muntu n'omu. 
Judges4:17 Sisera n'addusa bigere n'atuuka ku weema ya Yayeli muka Heberi Omukeeni, kubanga Yabini Kabaka wa Azori yali mirembe n'ab'ennyumba ya Heberi." 
Judges4:18 Yayeli n'afuluma okusisinkana Sisera, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, yingira omwange totya.” Sisera n'ayingira mu weema. Yayeli n'amukweka mu lutimbe." 
Judges4:19 Sisera n'amugamba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, mpa ku mazzi nnyweko, kubanga ennyonta ennuma.” Yayeli n'asumulula ensawo ey'eddiba omubeera amata, n'amuwa n'anywa, n'amukweka nate." 
Judges4:20 Sisera n'agamba Yayeli nti: “Yimirira mu mulyango gwa weema. Bwe wabaawo ajja n'akubuuza nti waliwo omusajja ali muno ogamba nti: ‘Nedda.’ ” 
Judges4:21 Sisera yali akooye nnyo, ne yeebaka otulo tungi. Awo Yayeli n'akwata enkondo ya weema n'ennyondo, n'amusemberera ng'asooba, n'amukomerera enkondo mu kyenyi n'eyitamu n'ekwata n'ettaka. Bw'atyo Sisera n'afa." 
Judges4:22 Baraki bwe yajja ng'awondera Sisera, Yayeli n'afuluma okumusisinkana, n'amugamba nti: “Jjangu nkulage omusajja gw'onoonya.” Awo Baraki n'ayingira ne Yayeli, n'asanga Sisera ng'agaŋŋalamye afudde, nga n'enkondo ekomereddwa mu kyenyi kye." 
Judges4:23 Bw'atyo ku lunaku olwo, Katonda n'awa Abayisirayeli okuwangula Yabini Kabaka wa Kanaani." 
Judges4:24 Abayisirayeli ne beeyongera okumunyigiriza okutuusa lwe baamala okumuzikiriza. 
Judges5:1 Ku lunaku olwo, Debora ne Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu, ne bayimba oluyimba luno nti:" 
Judges5:2 Mutendereze Mukama, kubanga abakulembeze mu Yisirayeli baamalirira okulwana, era n'abantu ne beewaayo nga beeyagalidde." 
Judges5:3 Muwulire mmwe bakabaka, mutege amatu mmwe abafuzi: nze nnyimbira Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:4 Mukama, bwe wafuluma mu Seyiri n'ova mu Edomu okutabaala, ensi yakankana n'eggulu ne litonnyesa enkuba ng'efukumuka okuva mu bire!" 
Judges5:5 Ensozi zaakulukutira mu maaso ga Mukama w'e Sinaayi, Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:6 Mu mirembe gya Samugari mutabani wa Anati, mu mirembe gya Yayeli enguudo zeewalibwanga, ng'abatambuze bayita mu mpenda." 
Judges5:7 Ebyalo byakala, byaggwaamu abantu, okutuusa ggweDebora lwe wajja nga nnyina wa Yisirayeli." 
Judges5:8 Abayisirayeli bwe baasenga balubaale abaggya, olwo ne wabaawo olutalo mu Yisirayeli. Mu basajja emitwalo ena mu Yisirayeli, waliwo eyatabaala n'engabo oba n'effumu?" 
Judges5:9 Nsanyukira abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli, era n'abantu abeewaayo nga beeyagalidde. Mwebaze Mukama." 
Judges5:10 Mukyogereko mmwe abeebagala endogoyi enjeru, mmwe abatuula ku biwempe ebidalize, nammwe abatambula mu nguudo." 
Judges5:11 Muwulirize eddoboozi ly'abali ku nzizi z'amazzi! Boogera ku buwanguzi Mukama bwe yawa Abayisirayeli. Awo abantu ba Mukama ne bakumba nga balaga ku miryango. 
Judges5:12 Situka, situka Debora, situka okoleeze oluyimba! Weesowoleyo Baraki mutabani wa Abinowamu, kulemberamu abasibe b'owambye!" 
Judges5:13 Awo abakungu abeesigwa ne baserengeta nga bali wamu ne Mukama okulwanyisa ab'amaanyi. 
Judges5:14 Mu Efurayimu n'evaayo abasibuka mu Ameleki ne bagoberera ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini. Abaduumizi ne baserengeta nga bava mu Makiri. Ate n'e Zebbulooni n'evaayo abakungu abasimbisa ennyiriri. 
Judges5:15 N'abakulembeze ba Yissakaari ne bajja ne Debora nga bali bumu ne Baraki, ne bamugoberera mu kiwonvu. Naye ab'omu Kika kya Rewubeeni beesalamu ne badda mu kwebuuzaganya, ne batasalawo oba nga banaagenda." 
Judges5:16 Baasigalira ki mu bisibo by'endiga okuwuliriza emirere gye bafuuyira amagana? Aba Rewubeeni beesalamu ne badda mu kwebuuzaganya, ne batasalawo oba nga banaagenda." 
Judges5:17 Ab'omu Kika kya Gaadi baasigala mitala wa Yorudaani. Ab'omu Kika kya Daani baasigalira ki mu maato? Ab'omu Kika kya Aseri baasirikira eri ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, beesigalira ku mwalo." 
Judges5:18 Ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni n'ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali be baaguma ne beewaayo okufiira mu lutalo. 
Judges5:19 Bakabaka baalwanira e Taanaki ku mazzi g'e Megiddo. Bakabaka b'e Kanaani baalwana, ne batafuna munyago gwa nsimbi." 
Judges5:20 Emmunyeenye mu bbanga zaalwana mu lugendo lwazo, zaalwanyisa Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Engezi ya Kisoni omugga ogwo ogw'edda, yabakuluggusa. Nze nkumba nga ntambuza maanyi!" 
Judges5:22 Olwo embalaasi ne ziduma, ng'ebinuulo byazo bisambirira ettaka!" 
Judges5:23 Malayika wa Mukama agamba nti: “Mukolimire Merozi mukolimire n'abatuuze baamu, kubanga tebadduukirira Mukama mu kulwanyisa ab'amaanyi.”" 
Judges5:24 Abakazi abasula mu weema Yayeli muka Heberi Omukeeni bonna ye abasinga omukisa. 
Judges5:25 Sisera yasaba mazzi, Yayeli n'amuwa mata. Yamuweera amata amasunde mu kibya eky'ekikungu." 
Judges5:26 Yakwata mu mukono gwe ogumu enkondo, n'akwata ennyondo mu mukono gwe omulala, n'akomerera Sisera, enkondo n'eyita mu kiwanga kya Sisera." 
Judges5:27 N'akka ku maviivi ge n'awanattuka n'agwa! Awo wansi w'agudde we yasigala ng'afudde. 
Judges5:28 Nnyina Sisera yalingiriza ng'atunuulira mu ddirisa, n'asitula eddoboozi n'abuuza nti: “Embalaasi ze ekizikeereyezza kiki? Lwaki amagaali ge galuddewo okudda?”" 
Judges5:29 Abakyala be ab'amagezi nabo ne bamwanukula kennyini kye yeddiramu nti: 
Judges5:30 “Baluddeyo lwa munyago gwe bakuŋŋaanya bagabane: buli musajja omuwala omu oba babiri. Engoye ennungi za Sisera, nfuneyo ez'emidalizo nange.”" 
Judges5:31 Bwe batyo abalabe bo ayi Mukama bazikirirenga bonna. Naye abakwagala bonna baakaayakane ng'enjuba evayo. Ensi n'ebaamu emirembe okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
Judges6:1 Abayisirayeli era ne bakola ebibi, ne banyiiza Mukama, Mukama n'abaleka okufugibwa Abamidiyaani okumala emyaka musanvu." 
Judges6:2 Midiyaani n'esinga nnyo Yisirayeli amaanyi, Abayisirayeli ne beekweka mu mpuku ne mu bifo ebirala ebyekusifu mu nsozi." 
Judges6:3 Kubanga Abayisirayeli buli lwe baamalanga okusiga, Abamidiyaani n'Abamaleki n'abatuuze b'omu Buvanjuba baasitukiranga wamu ne babalumba." 
Judges6:4 Baabazindanga ne bazikiriza ebirime byabwe, okutuukira ddala okumpi n'e Gaaza, ne batalekangawo kyakulya mu Yisirayeli, wadde endiga oba ente oba endogoyi." 
Judges6:5 Bajjanga n'ente zaabwe n'eweema zaabwe, nga bali ng'enzige ezitabalika obungi, bo bennyini n'eŋŋamiya zaabwe, ne bayingira mu nsi, ne bagizikiriza." 
Judges6:6 Yisirayeli n'ejeezebwa nnyo Midiyaani. 
Judges6:7 Awo Abayisirayeli bwe baalaajanira Mukama olw'Abamidiyaani," 
Judges6:8 Mukama n'atuma omulanzi eri Abayisirayeli, n'abagamba nti: “Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Nabaggya mu Misiri gye mwali mufugibwa obuddu." 
Judges6:9 Era nabawonya obuyinza bw'Abamisiri n'obuyinza bw'abo bonna abaabajoogeranga mu nsi eno mwe muli. Abo ne mbagobamu nga mmwe mujja, ensi yaabwe ne ngigabira mmwe." 
Judges6:10 Ne mbagamba mmwe nti nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. Temuusinzenga balubaale b'Abaamori bannannyini nsi gye mulimu. Naye temwawulira kye mbagamba.’ ” 
Judges6:11 Awo Malayika wa Mukama n'ajja n'atuula wansi w'omuvule gw'e Ofura ogwa Yowaasi Omwabiyezeeri. Gidiyoni mutabani wa Yowaasi oyo, yali ng'awuula eŋŋaano mu ssogolero ly'emizabbibu, okugikisa Abamidiyaani." 
Judges6:12 Malayika wa Mukama n'amulabikira n'amugamba nti: “Mukama ali wamu naawe, ggwe omusajja ow'amaanyi, omuzira.”" 
Judges6:13 Gidiyoni n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, oba Mukama ali wamu naffe, kale lwaki tutuukibwako ebyo byonna? Era ebyamagero bye yakolanga biri ludda wa, bajjajjaffe bye baatunyumizanga nti Mukama yabaggya mu Misiri? Naye kaakano Mukama atusudde era atuwaddeyo mu buyinza bwa Midiyaani.”" 
Judges6:14 Mukama n'akyukira Gidiyoni n'agamba nti: “Genda n'amaanyi go ago gonna, oggye Yisirayeli mu buyinza bwa Midiyaani, nze nkutumye.”" 
Judges6:15 Gidiyoni n'amugamba nti: “Mukama wange, Yisirayeli ndimununuza ki? Baganda bange be basinga obutaba na maanyi mu Manasse, ate nze muto mu nnyumba ya kitange.”" 
Judges6:16 Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Mazima nja kubeera wamu naawe, era ojja kwanguyirwa okuwangula Abamidiyaani ng'awangula omuntu omu.”" 
Judges6:17 Gidiyoni n'addamu nti: “Oba nga onsiimye, mpa akabonero akalaga nga ggwe ayogera nange, ggwe Mukama." 
Judges6:18 Nkwegayiridde tova wano, mmale okukuleetera ekirabo.” N'agamba nti: “Nja kubeera wano okutuusa lw'onookomawo.”" 
Judges6:19 Awo Gidiyoni n'ayingira mu nnyumba, n'afumba embuzi ento, era n'agoya kilo kkumi ez'obuwunga n'akolamu emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa. Ennyama n'agiteeka mu kibbo, n'omukyuzi n'agufuka mu kibya, n'abireeta eri malayika wa Mukama, n'abimuweera wansi w'omuvule." 
Judges6:20 Malayika wa Mukama n'amulagira nti: “Ddira ennyama n'emigaati egitazimbulukusiddwa obiteeke ku jjinja lino, obifukeko omukyuzi.” Gidiyoni n'akola bw'atyo." 
Judges6:21 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'asitula ekikolo ky'omuggo gwe yali akutte, n'akoona ku nnyama ne ku migaati egitazimbulukusiddwa, omuliro ne guva mu jjinja, ne gwokya ennyama n'emigaati. Malayika wa Mukama n'abula." 
Judges6:22 Gidiyoni n'amanya nga gw'alabye abadde malayika wa Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Zinsanze, ayi Mukama, Katonda, kubanga ndabye malayika wo maaso na maaso!”" 
Judges6:23 Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Emirembe gibe naawe, leka kutya. Togenda kufa.”" 
Judges6:24 Gidiyoni n'azimbira Mukama alutaari mu kifo ekyo, n'agiyita “Mukama gye mirembe”. N'okutuusa kati gyeri mu Ofura eky'Ababiyezeeri." 
Judges6:25 Mu kiro ekyo, malayika wa Mukama n'agamba Gidiyoni nti: “Kwata ente ya kitaawo ennume, n'ente endala ennume ey'emyaka omusanvu, omenyewo alutaari, kitaawo gye yazimbira Baali, otemeeteme n'empagi ya Asera eri okumpi nayo." 
Judges6:26 Ozimbire Mukama Katonda wo alutaari waggulu ku kigo kino, ng'okozesa amayinja agatereezeddwa obulungi. Oddire ente eyo eyookubiri ogyokye, ng'okozesa enku ez'empagi ya Asera gy'otemye, ebe ekitambiro ekiweebwayo.”" 
Judges6:27 Awo Gidiyoni n'atwala abasajja kkumi ku baweereza be, n'akola nga Mukama bw'amulagidde. Olw'okutya ab'ennyumba ya kitaawe n'ab'omu kibuga, n'atayinza kukikola misana, wabula n'akikola ekiro." 
Judges6:28 Abantu ab'omu kibuga bwe baagolokoka enkeera ku makya, ne balaba ng'alutaari ya Baali emenyeddwawo, n'empagi ya Asera egibadde okumpi ng'etemeddwawo, nga n'ente ennume eyookubiri eyokeddwa ku alutaari ezimbiddwawo." 
Judges6:29 Ne beebuuzaganya nti: “Ani akoze kino?” Awo bwe baabuuliriza, ne bazuula nga Gidiyoni, mutabani wa Yowaasi ye akikoze." 
Judges6:30 Awo ne bagamba Yowaasi nti: “Fulumya mutabani wo tumutte, kubanga amenyeemenye alutaari ya Baali era atemyewo empagi ya Asera egibadde okumpi.”" 
Judges6:31 Kyokka Yowaasi bonna abaamulumba n'abagamba nti: “Mwagala okuworereza Baali? Oba mwagala kumulwanirira? Buli ayagala okumuwolereza wa kuttibwa nga tebunnakya nkya. Oba nga Baali lubaale, yeewolereze, kubanga alutaari emenyeddwa yiye.”" 
Judges6:32 Okuva olwo Gidiyoni n'ayitibwa Yerubbaali, kubanga Yowaasi yagamba nti: “Baali yeewolereze, kubanga alutaari ye gye bamenye.”" 
Judges6:33 Awo Abamidiyaani bonna n'Abamaleki n'abatuuze b'Ebuvanjuba ne bakuŋŋaana, ne basomoka Omugga Yorudaani, ne basiisira mu kiwonvu eky'e Yezireeli." 
Judges6:34 Omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gujja ku Gidiyoni, n'afuuwa eŋŋombe okuyita Ababiyezeri okujja gy'ali." 
Judges6:35 N'atuma ababaka mu bitundu bya Manasse byombi okuyita abaayo bamwegatteko. N'atuma n'ababaka eri ab'Ekika kya Aseri n'ekya Zebbulooni, n'ekya Nafutaali, Ne bajja ne bamwegattako." 
Judges6:36 Awo Gidiyoni n'agamba Katonda nti: “Oba ng'onoolokola Yisirayeli ng'okozesa nze nga bwe wagamba," 
Judges6:37 kale nja kuteeka ebyoya by'endiga mu gguuliro ly'eŋŋaano. Ku makya omusulo bwe gunaaba ku byoya kwokka, ettaka nga kkalu, nja kumanya ng'onoonunula Yisirayeli ng'okozesa nze.”" 
Judges6:38 Bwe kityo bwe kyaba. Gidiyoni bwe yazuukuka enkeera ku makya, n'akamula ebyoya by'endiga okubimalamu omusulo, ne bivaamu amazzi, ne gajjuza ekibya." 
Judges6:39 Gidiyoni n'agamba Katonda nti: “Tonsunguwalira, leka njogereyo omulundi gumu gwokka. Nzikiriza ngezese ebyoya by'endiga omulundi gumu gwokka. Ku mulundi guno, ebyoya by'endiga bibe bikalu, ettaka lye liba litoba omusulo.”" 
Judges6:40 Ekiro ekyo, Katonda n'akola bw'atyo. Enkeera ku makya ebyoya by'endiga byokka bye byali ebikalu, ettaka lyonna nga lye litobye omusulo." 
Judges7:1 Awo Yerubbaali, ye Gidiyoni, n'abantu bonna abaali naye, ne bazuukuka mu makya, ne basiisira ku lusozi Harodi. Olusiisira lw'Abamidiyaani lwali mu kiwonvu, ku ludda lwabwe olw'ebukiikakkono ku mabbali g'Olusozi More." 
Judges7:2 Mukama n'agamba Gidiyoni nti: “Abantu abali naawe bayitiridde obungi nze okubawa okuwangula Abamidiyaani. Abayisirayeli bayinza okunneewaanirako nga bagamba nti bawangudde lwa maanyi gaabwe. 
Judges7:3 Kale nno kaakano langirira mu bantu nti: ‘Buli atya era akankana, addeyo ewaabwe, ave ku Lusozi Gileyaadi.’ ” Awo abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri ne baddayo ewaabwe, abantu omutwalo gumu ne basigala." 
Judges7:4 Awo Mukama n'agamba Gidiyoni nti: “Abantu bakyayinze obungi. Baserengese ku mazzi, mbakulonderemu eyo. Oyo gwe nnaakugamba nti anaagenda naawe, oyo ye anaagenda naawe. Era buli gwe nnaakugamba nti ono tagenda naawe, ye ataagende naawe.”" 
Judges7:5 Gidiyoni n'aserengesa abantu ku mazzi. Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Buli anaakomba amazzi n'olulimi lwe ng'embwa bw'ekomba, mwawule ku buli anaafukamira ku maviivi ge okunywa amazzi.”" 
Judges7:6 Abaasena amazzi mu bibatu byabwe ne bagakomba n'olulimi, baali ebikumi bisatu. Abalala bonna ne bafukamira ku maviivi gaabwe okunywa amazzi." 
Judges7:7 Mukama n'agamba Gidiyoni nti: “Nja kubanunula mmwe nga nkozesa abasajja abo ebikumi bisatu abakombye amazzi, nkuwe okuwangula Abamidiyaani. Abalala bonna baddeyo ewaabwe.”" 
Judges7:8 Gidiyoni n'asindika Abayisirayeli bonna baddeyo ewaabwe, okuggyako ebikumi ebisatu, be yasigala nabo, ne basigaza ebyokulya byonna n'eŋŋombe." 
Judges7:9 Ekiro ekyo, Mukama n'agamba Gidiyoni nti: “Situka, olumbe olusiisira; ndukuwadde oluwangule." 
Judges7:10 Naye oba ng'otya okulumba, serengetayo ne Pura omuweereza wo." 
Judges7:11 Ojja kuwulira bye boogera, olyoke ofune amaanyi okulumba olusiisira.” Awo Gidiyoni n'aserengeta n'omuweereza we Pura ku njegoyego y'olusiisira lw'omulabe." 
Judges7:12 Abamidiyaani n'Abamaleki n'abatuuze b'omu Buvanjuba, baali babisse ekiwonvu, nga bali ng'enzige obungi, era n'eŋŋamiya ze balina butabalika, ng'omusenyu ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Judges7:13 Gidiyoni bwe yatuukayo, n'awulira omusajja ng'abuulira munne ekirooto, ng'agamba nti: “Naloose omugaati gwa bbaale, nga gugwa mu lusiisira lw'Abamidiyaani, ne gutuuka ku weema, ne gugikuba n'egwa, ne yeevuunika, n'ebutamira ddala ku ttaka.”" 
Judges7:14 Munne n'addamu nti: “Ekyo kitala kya Gidiyoni, mutabani wa Yowaasi, Omuyisirayeli! Tekitegeeza kirala! Katonda amuwadde okuwangula Midiyaani n'eggye lyaffe lyonna.”" 
Judges7:15 Gidiyoni bwe yawulira ekirooto ky'omusajja n'amakulu gaakyo, n'asinza Katonda, n'addayo mu lusiisira lw'Abayisirayeli, n'agamba nti “Musituke! Mukama abawadde mmwe okuwangula eggye ly'Abamidiyaani.”" 
Judges7:16 Basajja be ebikumi ebisatu n'abagabanyaamu ebibinja bisatu. Buli musajja n'amukwasa eŋŋombe n'ensuwa enkalu, ng'erimu omumuli." 
Judges7:17 N'abagamba nti: “Bwe nnaatuuka ku njegoyego y'olusiisira, muntunuulire! Kye nnaakola, nammwe kye muba mukola." 
Judges7:18 Nze ne bonna abali nange bwe tunaafuuwa eŋŋombe zaffe, olwo nammwe ne mufuuwa ezammwe wonna okwetooloola olusiisira, ne muleekaana nti: ‘Ku lwa Mukama ne ku lwa Gidiyoni!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Awo Gidiyoni n'abasajja kikumi abaali naye, ne batuuka ku njegoyego y'olusiisira, ng'obudde bubulako katono okutuuka ettumbi, nga kye bajje bakyuse abakuumi. Ne bafuuwa eŋŋombe zaabwe, ne baasa ensuwa ze baali bakutte." 
Judges7:20 N'ab'ebibinja ebirala ebibiri ne bakola kye kimu. Bonna ne bakwata emimuli mu mikono gyabwe egya kkono, n'eŋŋombe mu gya ddyo, ne baleekaana nti: “Ekitala kya Mukama era kya Gidiyoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Buli omu n'ayimirira mu kifo kye okwetooloola olusiisira. Ab'eggye lyonna ery'omulabe ne badduka nga baleekaana. 
Judges7:22 Abasajja ba Gidiyoni bwe bafuuwa eŋŋombe zaabwe, Mukama n'aleetera ab'eggye ly'omulabe okulumbagana bokka na bokka, buli omu ng'alwanyisa munne n'ekitala. Ne badduka okutuuka e Betusitta, okwolekera Zerera, okutuuka ku nsalo ne Abeli Mewola, okumpi ne Tabbati." 
Judges7:23 Abasajja Abayisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaanyizibwa okuva mu Bika ekya Nafutaali n'ekya Aseri n'ekya Manasse kyonna, ne bawondera Abamidiyaani." 
Judges7:24 Gidiyoni n'atuma ababaka mu nsi yonna eya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, nga bagamba nti: “Muserengete okulwanyisa Abamidiyaani. Mwekwate Omugga Yorudaani n'ebitundu ebirala eby'amazzi okutuuka e Betubara.”" 
Judges7:25 Ne bakwata abalangira ba Midiyaani ababiri Orebu ne Zeebu, ne battira Orebu ku Lwazi lwa Orebu, ne Zeebu ne bamuttira mu Ssogolero lya Zeebu. Ne bongera okuwondera Abamidiyaani. Emitwe gya Orebu ne Zeebu ne bagireetera Gidiyoni emitala wa Yorudaani." 
Judges8:1 Awo abasajja b'Efurayimu ne bagamba Gidiyoni nti: “Lwaki watuyisa bw'otyo obutatuyita ng'ogenda okulwanyisa Abamidiyaani?” Ne bamunenya nnyo. 
Judges8:2 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Kye nakola tekiriiko bwe kiri bw'okigeraageranya n'ekyo mmwe kye mukoze. Mmwe aba Efurayimu kye mukoze kisingira ddala ekyo ffe ab'ennyumba ya Abiyezeeri kye tukoze. 
Judges8:3 Katonda abawadde mmwe okutta abalangira ba Midiyaani ababiri Orebu ne Zeebu. Kale nze nkoze ki ekyenkanankana n'ekyo?” Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, obusungu bwabwe ne bukkakkana." 
Judges8:4 Olwo Gidiyoni ne basajja be ebikumi ebisatu ne batuuka ku Mugga Yorudaani, ne bagusomoka nga bakooye, naye nga bakyawondera omulabe." 
Judges8:5 Bwe yatuuka e Sukkoti, n'agamba abaayo nti: “Mbeegayiridde, basajja bange mubawe ku mmere, kubanga bakooye, ate nga mpondera Zeba ne Zalumunna bakabaka Abamidiyaani.”" 
Judges8:6 Abakulembeze mu Sukkoti ne bagamba nti: “Eggye lyo limaze okuwamba Zeba ne Zalumunna tulyoke tuliwe emmere?” 
Judges8:7 Gidiyoni n'agamba nti: “Kale, Mukama bw'alimala okuwaayo Zeba ne Zalumunna mu mikono gyange, ndibakubisa amaggwa n'emyeramannyo eby'omu ttale.”" 
Judges8:8 Gidiyoni n'avaayo, n'ayambuka e Penweli, n'abantu baayo n'abasaba ekintu kye kimu. Naye ab'omu Penweli ne bamuddamu mu ngeri ye emu ng'ab'e Sukkoti." 
Judges8:9 Ab'eyo bo n'abagamba nti: “Bwe ndikomawo emirembe, ndimenyaamenya omunaala gwammwe guno.”" 
Judges8:10 Zeba ne Zalumunna baali mu Karukori n'eggye lyabwe. Ku ggye lyonna ery'abasajja b'ebuvanjuba, omutwalo gumu mu enkumi ttaano be baali basigaddewo. Abalwanyi emitwalo kkumi n'ebiri baali battiddwa." 
Judges8:11 Gidiyoni n'ayambukira mu kkubo ery'ebuvanjuba bwa Noba ne Yogubeha, n'alumba, eggye nga terimulindiridde." 
Judges8:12 Bakabaka bombi Abamidiyaani Zeba ne Zalumunna ne badduka, kyokka Gidiyoni n'abawondera n'abakwata, n'atiisa eggye lyabwe lyonna." 
Judges8:13 Gidiyoni bwe yali ng'akomawo okuva mu lutalo, ng'ayambuka mu Aresi," 
Judges8:14 n'awamba omuvubuka w'e Sukkoti, n'abaako by'amubuuza. Omuvubuka n'awandiikira Gidiyoni amannya nsanvu mu musanvu ag'abakungu n'abakulembeze mu Sukkoti." 
Judges8:15 Awo Gidiyoni n'agenda eri ab'e Sukkoti n'agamba nti: “Mujjukira nga bwe mwagaana okunnyamba? Mwagamba nti temuyinza kuwa mmere basajja bange abakooye, kubanga nali sinnawamba Zeba ne Zalumunna. Kati baabano, mubalabe!”" 
Judges8:16 N'addira amaggwa n'emyeramannyo eby'omu ttale, n'abonereza abakulembeze b'e Sukkoti." 
Judges8:17 Era n'amenyaamenya omunaala gw'e Penweli, n'atta abasajja ab'omu kibuga ekyo." 
Judges8:18 Awo Gidiyoni n'abuuza Zeba ne Zalumunna nti: “Abasajja be mwattira e Tabori baali bafaanana batya?” Ne baddamu nti: “Baali bakufaanana, buli omu ku bo ng'afaanana omwana wa kabaka.”" 
Judges8:19 Gidiyoni n'agamba nti: “Baali baganda bange, abaana ba mmange bennyini. Ndayira Mukama omulamu nti singa temwabatta, sandibasse mmwe.”" 
Judges8:20 N'agamba Yeteri, mutabani we omukulu nti: “Situka, obatte!” Kyokka omubuvuka oyo n'atasowola kitala kye. Yatya, kubanga yali akyali mulenzi muto." 
Judges8:21 Zeba ne Zalumunna ne bagamba Gidiyoni nti: “Ggwe oba otutta! Ekikolwa ng'ekyo kisobolwa musajja!” Gidiyoni n'asituka n'abatta. N'atwala eby'okwewoomya ebyali bitimbiddwa mu bulago bw'eŋŋamiya zaabwe, ebikoleddwa mu kifaananyi ky'omwezi." 
Judges8:22 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Gidiyoni nti: “Tufuge ggwe era n'abasika bo, kubanga otuwonyezza Abamidiyaani.”" 
Judges8:23 Gidiyoni n'abagamba nti: “Nze sigenda kubafuga, wadde mutabani wange. Mukama ye anaabafuganga.”" 
Judges8:24 Kyokka n'abagamba nti: “Ka mbasabe kino: buli omu ampe empeta ez'omu matu ze yanyaga.” (Abamidiyaani baalina empeta z'omu matu eza zaabu ng'Abayisimayeli abalala). 
Judges8:25 Ne baddamu nti: “Tunaazikuwa na ssanyu.” Ne baaliirawo olugoye, buli omu n'ateekawo empeta z'omu matu ze yanyaga." 
Judges8:26 Empeta ze yafuna ne zizitowa kilo kumpi makumi abiri, nga tobaliddeeko byakwewoomya ebikoleddwa mu kifaananyi ky'omwezi, era n'emikuufu egy'omu bulago, n'engoye eza kakobe bakabaka ba Midiyaani ze bambala, n'enjegere ezaali mu nsingo z'eŋŋamiya zaabwe." 
Judges8:27 Mu zaabu oyo, Gidiyoni n'akolamu ekifaananyi, n'akiteeka mu kibuga ky'e Ofura. Abayisirayeli bonna ne bava ku Katonda, ne bagendangayo okukisinza, ne kifuuka kyambika eri Gidiyoni n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Judges8:28 Awo Midiyaani n'ewangulwa Yisirayeli, n'eteddamu kubeeraliikiriza. Ensi n'ebaamu emirembe okumala emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa Gidiyoni lwe yafa." 
Judges8:29 Yerubbaali, ye Gidiyoni, mutabani wa Yowaasi n'addayo mu maka ge, n'abeera eyo." 
Judges8:30 Yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi nsanvu, kubanga yawasa abakazi bangi." 
Judges8:31 Era yalina omukazi muganzi we, eyali e Sekemu, naye n'amuzaalira omwana ow'obulenzi, n'amutuuma erinnya Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gidiyoni mutabani wa Yowaasi n'afa ng'amaze okukaddiwa obulungi, ne bamuziika mu ntaana ya Yowaasi kitaawe mu Ofura, ekibuga ky'Ababiyezeeri." 
Judges8:33 Gidiyoni nga yaakafa, Abayisirayeli ne baddamu obutaba beesigwa eri Katonda, ne basinza Babbaali, ne bafuula Baali-Beriti lubaale waabwe," 
Judges8:34 ne beerabira Mukama, Katonda waabwe eyabawonya abalabe baabwe bonna ababeetoolodde." 
Judges8:35 Tebaalaga kusiima ba nnyumba ya Gidiyoni olw'ebirungi byonna bye yakolera Yisirayeli. 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mutabani wa Yerubbaali, n'agenda e Sekemu ku bukojjaabwe, n'agamba abooluganda lwa nnyina bonna" 
Judges9:2 okubuuza abantu b'e Sekemu nti: “Kiruwa kye musinga okusiima? Okufugibwanga batabani ba Yerubbaali ensanvu, oba omu okubafuganga? Mujjukire nga nze ndi wa musaayi gwammwe.”" 
Judges9:3 Abooluganda lwa nnyina ne bamutuusiza ebigambo ebyo byonna eri abantu b'e Sekemu. Abantu b'e Sekemu ne basalawo okugoberera Abimeleki, kubanga gwe baalinako oluganda." 
Judges9:4 Ne bamuwa ebitundu bya ffeeza nsanvu, bye baggya mu ssabo lya Baali-Beriti. Ensimbi ezo Abimeleki ze yakozesa okupangisa abasajja abataliiko kye bagasa era abatabufutabufu, ne bamugoberera," 
Judges9:5 n'agenda mu nnyumba ya kitaawe mu Ofura, n'attirayo ku jjinja limu, baganda be ensanvu, batabani ba Yerubbaali. Naye Yotamu mutabani wa Yerubbaali asembayo obuto, ne yeekweka, n'atattibwa." 
Judges9:6 Abatuuze bonna ab'omu Sekemu n'ab'e Betimillo bonna, ne bakuŋŋaana, ne bafuula Abimeleki kabaka, wansi w'omuvule gw'e Sekemu." 
Judges9:7 Awo Yotamu bwe yakimanya, n'agenda n'ayimirira ku ntikko y'olusozi Gerizimu, n'akangula eddoboozi, n'abalagiriza nti: “Mumpulire, mmwe abatuuze b'e Sekemu, Katonda alyoke abawulire mmwe." 
Judges9:8 Olwatuuka, emiti ne gigenda okulonda kabaka anaagifuganga. Ne gigamba omuti omuzayiti nti: ‘Ba kabaka waffe.’" 
Judges9:9 Omuzayiti ne guddamu nti: ‘Ndekeyo okuvaamu omuzigo ogukozesebwa okussaamu ekitiibwa Katonda n'abantu, nzire mu kufuga emiti?’" 
Judges9:10 Emiti ne gigamba omuti omutiini nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe, obe kabaka waffe.’" 
Judges9:11 Naye omutiini ne gugamba nti: ‘Ndekerere okubala ebibala byange ebirungi era ebiwoomu, nzire mu kufuga emiti?’" 
Judges9:12 Emiti ne gigamba omuzabbibu nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe, obe kabaka waffe.’" 
Judges9:13 Naye omuzabbibu ne guddamu nti: ‘Ndekeyo okuvaamu omwenge gwange ogusanyusa Katonda n'abantu, nzire mu kufuga emiti?’" 
Judges9:14 Awo emiti gyonna ne gigamba omweramannyo nti: ‘Jjangu ggwe, obe kabaka waffe.’" 
Judges9:15 Omweramannyo ne gugamba emiti nti: ‘Oba nga ddala mwagala okunfuula kabaka wammwe, kale mujje mwewogome mu kisiikirize kyange. Naye oba nga si ekyo, omuliro gunaava mu matabi gange ag'amaggwa, ne gumalawo emivule egy'oku Lebanooni.’" 
Judges9:16 “Kale kaakano mwakola kituufu era kya bwenkanya okufuula Abimeleki kabaka? Mwajjukira ebirungi Gidiyoni bye yabakolera? Era ab'ennyumba ye mwabayisa bulungi nga bwe kisaanira? 
Judges9:17 Mujjukire nga kitange yabalwanirira, n'awaayo obulamu bwe, n'abawonya Abamidiyaani." 
Judges9:18 Naye mmwe olwaleero mwefuukidde ab'ennyumba ya kitange. Era batabani be, abantu ensanvu, mubattidde ku jjinja limu, Abimeleki mutabani w'omuzaana ne mumufuula kabaka wa Sekemu, kubanga ye wooluganda lwammwe." 
Judges9:19 Kale oba nga kye mukoze Yerubbaali n'ab'ennyumba ye kye kituufu era eky'obwenkanya, musanyukire Abimeleki era naye abasanyukire mmwe." 
Judges9:20 Naye oba nga si bwe kiri, omuliro guve mu Abimeleki gwokye ab'omu Sekemu n'ab'e Betimillo, era omuliro guve mu bantu b'omu Sekemu n'ab'e Betimillo, gwokye Abimeleki.”" 
Judges9:21 Yotamu, olw'okutya muganda we Abimeleki, n'ayanguwa n'addukira e Beeri, n'abeera eyo." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki n'afugira Yisirayeli emyaka esatu. 
Judges9:23 Awo Katonda n'akyawaganya Abimeleki n'abantu b'omu Sekemu. Ab'omu Sekemu ne basalira Abimeleki enkwe. 
Judges9:24 Ekyo kyabaawo, Abimeleki n'abantu b'e Sekemu, abaamuwagira okutta batabani ba Yerubbaali ensanvu, basasule omusango gwabwe." 
Judges9:25 Ab'omu Sekemu ne bassaawo abasajja okuteegeranga Abimeleki ku ntikko z'ensozi, ne banyaga bonna ababayitako mu kkubo eryo. Kino Abimeleki ne bakimubuulira." 
Judges9:26 Awo Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi, n'ajja ne baganda be e Sekemu, abantu b'e Sekemu ne bamwesiga." 
Judges9:27 Bonna ne bagenda mu nnimiro zaabwe ez'emizabbibu ne bagisogola, ne bafumba embaga, ne bayingira mu ssabo lya lubaale waabwe, ne balya era ne banywa, ne boogera ebinyooma Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi n'agamba nti: “Tuli bantu ba ngeri ki mu Sekemu? Lwaki tuweereza Abimeleki? Ye ye ani? Si mutabani wa Yerubbaali? Ye ne Zebuli omumyuka we, si baweereza ba basajja ba Hamori, kitaawe wa Sekemu? Kale lwaki tumuweereza?" 
Judges9:29 Era singa nze mukulembeze w'abantu bano, nandiggyeewo Abimeleki! Nandigambye Abimeleki nti: ‘Nyweza eggye lyo, weesowoleyo olwane.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Zebuli omukulu w'ekibuga bwe yawulira ebigambo bya Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi, n'asunguwala." 
Judges9:31 N'atuma ababaka eri Abimeleki mu Aruma okumutegeeza nti: “Gaali mutabani wa Ebedi ne baganda be bazze e Sekemu, era basekeeterera ekibuga okukulwanyisa." 
Judges9:32 Kale kaakano, ggwe n'abantu bo, mwandizinduse kiro ne muteega mu nnimiro." 
Judges9:33 Situka ku makya, enjuba nga ky'ejje eveeyo, olumbe ekibuga. Gaali n'abantu be bwe banaavaayo okukulumba, obakubire ddala nga bw'osobola.”" 
Judges9:34 Awo Abimeleki ne bonna abaali naye ne bazinduka kiro, ne bateega ebweru wa Sekemu mu bibinja bina." 
Judges9:35 Abimeleki n'abaali naye bwe baalaba Gaali ng'afuluma n'ayimirira ku mulyango ogwa wankaaki w'ekibuga, ne basituka we baali bateegedde." 
Judges9:36 Gaali bwe yabalaba n'agamba Zebuli nti: “Laba abantu baserengeta nga bava ku ntikko z'ensozi.” Zebuli n'addamu nti: “Olaba bisiikirize bya nsozi nga bifaanana ng'abantu.” 
Judges9:37 Gaali n'agamba nate nti: “Laba abantu bakkirira nga bayitira mu muwaatwa gw'olusozi, n'ekibinja ekimu kifuluma mu kkubo ery'oku muvule gw'abalaguzi.”" 
Judges9:38 Awo Zebuli n'alyoka amugamba nti: “Okwewaana kwo kuli ludda wa? Kubanga wagamba nti Abimeleki ye ani ffe okumuweereza? Bano be bantu be wanyooma. Kaakano weesowoleyo obalwanyise!” 
Judges9:39 Gaali n'akulembera abasajja ab'e Sekemu, n'afuluma n'alwanyisa Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Gaali n'adduka. Abimeleki n'amuwondera okutuuka ku mulyango gwa wankaaki. Bangi ne bagwa nga bafumitiddwa. 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki n'abeera mu Aruma. Zebuli n'agoba Gaali ne baganda be mu Sekemu, baleme kubeerangamu." 
Judges9:42 Ku lunaku olwaddirira ne babuulira Abimeleki nti abantu bategeka okugenda mu nnimiro. 
Judges9:43 Awo n'atwala basajja be n'abagabanyaamu ebibinja bisatu, n'ateegera mu nnimiro, n'alinda. Bwe yalaba abantu nga bafuluma mu kibuga, n'avaayo gye yali yeekwese, n'abalumba." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki n'ab'ekibinja ekyali naye, ne bafubutuka, ne bakuuma omulyango gwa wankaaki w'ekibuga. Ab'ebibinja ebibiri ne balumba abantu abaali mu nnimiro, ne babatta bonna." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki n'azibya olunaku olwo ng'alwanyisa ekibuga, n'akiwamba, n'atta abantu baamu, n'akimenyaamenya, n'akiyiwamu omunnyo." 
Judges9:46 Abantu bonna ab'omu kigo eky'e Sekemu bwe baawulira ekyo, ne bayingira mu kinnya eky'omu ssabo lya Eluberiti." 
Judges9:47 Ne babuulira Abimeleki nti bonna bakuŋŋaanidde omwo. 
Judges9:48 Awo n'ayambuka ku Lusozi Zalumoni ne basajja be. N'akwata embazzi n'atema ettabi ku muti, n'alikwata, n'aliteeka ku kibegabega kye. N'alagira basajja be banguwe, nabo bakole nga bw'akoze." 
Judges9:49 Awo buli omu n'atema ettabi ku muti, n'agoberera Abimeleki. Ne batuuma amatabi ku kinnya kiri. Ne bakikumako omuliro. Abantu bonna ab'omu kigo ky'e Sekemu ne bafiiramu, abasajja n'abakazi nga lukumi." 
Judges9:50 Awo Abimeleki n'agenda e Tebezi, n'asiisira okwetooloola ekibuga ekyo, n'akiwamba." 
Judges9:51 Kyalimu ekigo eky'amaanyi. Abantu bonna ab'omu kibuga, abasajja n'abakazi, ne baddukira omwo, ne beggaliramu, ne balinnya mu kasolya." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki bwe yajja okulumba ekigo, n'agenda ku mulyango, okwokya ekigo omuliro." 
Judges9:53 Naye omukazi omu n'asuula olubengo ku mutwe gwa Abimeleki, n'amwasa ekiwanga." 
Judges9:54 Abimeleki n'ayanguwa okuyita omulenzi eyakwatanga ebyokulwanyisa bye, n'amulagira nti: “Sowola ekitala kyo, onzite, abantu balemenga okunjogerako nti omukazi ye yanzita.” Omulenzi we n'amufumita, n'afa." 
Judges9:55 Abayisirayeli bwe baalaba nga Abimeleki afudde, bonna ne baddayo ewaabwe." 
Judges9:56 Katonda bw'atyo bwe yasasula Abimeleki olw'omusango gwe yazza ku kitaawe ng'atta baganda be ensanvu. 
Judges9:57 Katonda era n'abonereza abantu b'omu Sekemu olw'ekibi kyabwe, ne Yotamu kye yabakolimira ne kituukirira." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleki bwe yamala okufa, Tola mutabani wa Puwa era muzzukulu wa Dodo, n'ajja okununula Yisirayeli. Yali wa mu Kika kya Yissakaari, ng'abeera mu Samiri mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi." 
Judges10:2 N'aba omukulembeze wa Yisirayeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri mu esatu, n'afa ne bamuziika mu Samari." 
Judges10:3 Tola bwe yavaawo, ne waddawo Yayiri, eyava e Gileyaadi. N'akulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri mu ebiri." 
Judges10:4 Yalina batabani be amakumi asatu, abeebagalanga endogoyi amakumi asatu. Baalina ebibuga amakumi asatu, mu nsi ya Gileyaadi, ebikyayitibwa Ebyalo bya Yayiri." 
Judges10:5 Yayiri yafa ne bamuziika mu Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Abayisirayeli ne beeyongera nate okukola ebibi ne banyiiza Mukama, nga basinza Babbaali ne Asitarooti, ne balubaale b'e Siriya n'ab'e Sidoni, n'ab'e Mowaabu, ne balubaale b'Abammoni n'ab'e Filistiya. ne bava ku Mukama, ne batamuweereza." 
Judges10:7 Mukama n'asunguwalira Abayisirayeli, n'aleka Abafilistiya n'Abammoni okubawangula." 
Judges10:8 Okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana, ne banyigiriza era ne bayigganya Abayisirayeli bonna abaali emitala w'omugga Yorudaani, mu nsi y'Abaamori, eri mu Gileyaadi." 
Judges10:9 Abammoni ne basomoka Omugga Yorudaani nabo okulwanyisa ekika kya Yuda n'ekya Benyamiini, n'ekya Efurayimu. Yisirayeli ne yeeraliikirira nnyo." 
Judges10:10 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bakaabirira Mukama nga bagamba nti: “Twayonoona mu maaso go, kubanga twakuvaako, ggwe Katonda waffe, ne tuweereza Babbaali.”" 
Judges10:11 Mukama n'abaddamu nti: “Saabawonya Abamisiri, n'Abaamori, n'Abammoni n'Abafilistiya?" 
Judges10:12 Era n'Abasidoni, n'Abamaleki n'Abamawoni baababonyaabonya mmwe, ne munkaabirira, ne mbabawonya." 
Judges10:13 Naye mwanvaako ne muweereza balubaale, kyenva ŋŋaana okuddamu okubanunula." 
Judges10:14 Mugende mukaabirire balubaale mu bizibu.” 
Judges10:15 Naye Abayisirayeli ne bagamba Mukama nti: “Twayonoona. Tukoleko kyonna ky'onoolaba nga kisaana, naye tukwegayiridde tununule.”" 
Judges10:16 Ne beggyako balubaale abagwira, ne baweereza Mukama. N'alumwa omwoyo olw'okubonaabona kwa Yisirayeli." 
Judges10:17 Awo Abammoni ne bakuŋŋaana ne basiisira e Mizupa mu Gileyaadi. 
Judges10:18 Abantu abakulu ab'e Gileyaadi ne beebuuzaganya nti: “Ani anaakulembera olutalo lw'okulwanyisa Abammoni? Oyo ye aliba omukulembeze wa bonna mu Gileyaadi.” 
Judges11:1 Yefuta omutabaazi ow'amaanyi omuzira ow'e Gileyaadi, yali mutabani wa mukazi malaaya. Gileyaadi kitaawe," 
Judges11:2 yalina batabani be abalala, aba mukazi we. Bwe baakula, ne bagoba Yefuta awaka, ne bamugamba nti: “Tolibaako ky'osikira mu nnyumba ya kitaffe, kubanga oli mwana wa mukazi mulala.”" 
Judges11:3 Awo Yefuta n'adduka baganda be, n'abeera mu nsi y'e Tobu. Abasajja abataliiko kye bagasa ne bamukuŋŋaanirako, ne batabaalanga wamu naye." 
Judges11:4 Awo ekiseera bwe kyayitawo, Abammoni ne balwanyisa Yisirayeli." 
Judges11:5 Abakulembeze mu Gileyaadi ne bagenda okuggyayo Yefuta mu nsi y'e Tobu. 
Judges11:6 Ne bamugamba nti: “Jjangu otukulembere, tulwanyise Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Yefuta n'abagamba nti: “Mwankyawa ne mungoba mu nnyumba ya kitange. Kale lwaki mujja gye ndi kaakano nga muli mu buzibu?” 
Judges11:8 Abakulembeze mu Gileyaadi ne bagamba Yefuta nti: “Tukyukira gy'oli kaakano, kubanga twagala ogende naffe olwanyise Abammoni, era obe mukulembeze wa bantu bonna mu Gileyaadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Yefuta n'abagamba nti: “Bwe munanzizaayo ewaffe okulwanyisa Abammoni, Mukama n'ampa obuwanguzi, ndiba mufuzi wammwe.”" 
Judges11:10 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Tukkirizza. Mukama ye mujulirwa waffe.” 
Judges11:11 Awo Yefuta n'agenda n'abakulembeze b'e Gileyaadi, abantu ne bamufuula omukulu waabwe abafuga. Yefuta n'ayogera ebigambo bye byonna mu maaso ga Mukama e Mizupa." 
Judges11:12 Awo Yefuta n'atuma ababaka eri kabaka w'Abammoni okumugamba nti: “Otuvunaana ki? Lwaki olumba ensi yaffe?” 
Judges11:13 Kabaka w'Abammoni n'addamu ababaka ba Yefuta nti: “Abayisirayeli bwe baava mu Misiri, baatwala ekitundu ky'ensi yange, okuva ku Mugga Arunoni, okutuuka ku Mugga Yabboki, ne ku Mugga Yorudaani. Kale kaakano ekitundu ekyo mukituddize lwa mirembe.”" 
Judges11:14 Yefuta n'atuma nate ababaka eri kabaka w'Abammoni 
Judges11:15 ng'amuddamu nti: “Yisirayeli tanyaganga nsi ya Mowaabu, wadde ensi ya Ammoni." 
Judges11:16 Naye Abayisirayeli bwe baava e Misiri, baayita mu ddungu okutuuka ku Nnyanja Emmyufu, ne bagguka e Kadesi." 
Judges11:17 Awo ne batuma ababaka eri kabaka wa Edomu okumusaba abakkirize okuyita mu nsi ye. Kyokka kabaka wa Edomu n'atabakkiriza. Abayisirayeli ne basigala e Kadesi. 
Judges11:18 Awo ne balyoka bayita mu ddungu, ne beetooloola ensi ya Edomu n'ensi ya Mowaabu, ne batuuka ku luuyi lw'ensi ya Mowaabu olw'ebuvanjuba, ne basiisira emitala w'Omugga Arunoni. Naye tebaatuuka mu ttaka lya Mowaabu, kubanga Arunoni ye nsalo ya Mowaabu." 
Judges11:19 Awo Abayisirayeli ne batuma ababaka eri Sihoni, kabaka w'Abaamori ow'e Hesubooni, ne bamusaba abakkirize okuyita mu nsi ye bagende mu yaabwe." 
Judges11:20 Kyokka Sihoni n'ateesiga Yisirayeli kuyita mu nsi ye. N'akuŋŋaanya eggye lyonna n'asiisira mu Yahazi n'alwanyisa Yisirayeli. 
Judges11:21 Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'awa Abayisirayeli okuwangula Sihoni n'eggye lye. Abayisirayeli ne balyoka batwala ekitundu kyonna eky'Abaamori abaabeeranga mu nsi eyo." 
Judges11:22 Ne batwala ekitundu kyonna eky'Abaamori, okuva ku Arunoni okutuuka ku Yabboki, mu bukiikakkono, n'okuva ku Yorudaani mu bukiikaddyo." 
Judges11:23 Kale Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ye yagobamu Abaamori olw'abantu be Abayisirayeli. Ggwe onookyeddiza? 
Judges11:24 Kuuma ensi, lubaale wo Kemosi gy'akuwa. Naye naffe tujja kukuuma buli kimu Mukama Katonda waffe ky'atuwa." 
Judges11:25 Olowooza nga ggwe osinga Balaki, mutabani wa Zippori, kabaka wa Mowaabu? Yawakanyaako Abayisirayeli, wadde okubalwanyisa?" 
Judges11:26 Yisirayeli amaze emyaka ebikumi bisatu mu Hesubooni ne Aroweri, n'ebyalo ebibyetoolodde, ne mu bibuga byonna, ebiri ku mbalama z'Omugga Arunoni. Kiki ekyabalobera okubyeddiza mu kiseera ekyo?" 
Judges11:27 Si nze nsobezza, naye ggwe osobezza okunnwanyisa. Mukama ye mulamuzi. Alamule leero wakati w'Abayisirayeli n'Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Naye kabaka w'Abammoni n'atafa ku bubaka, Yefuta bwe yamutumira." 
Judges11:29 Awo omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gujja ku Yefuta, n'ayita mu Gileyaadi ne mu Manasse, n'adda mu Mizupa eky'omu Gileyaadi, n'agenda eri Abammoni." 
Judges11:30 Yefuta ne yeeyama obweyamo eri Mukama nti: “Bw'olimpa okuwangula Abammoni," 
Judges11:31 omuntu alisooka okufuluma mu miryango gy'ennyumba yange okunnyaniriza nga nkomyewo n'obuwanguzi, aliba wa Mukama. Ndimuwaayo okuba ekitambiro ekyokebwa.”" 
Judges11:32 Awo Yefuta n'asomoka omugga okulwanyisa Abammoni, Mukama n'amuwa obuwanguzi." 
Judges11:33 N'abakuba okuva ku Aroweri okutuuka mu miriraano gya Minniti, bye bibuga amakumi abiri, n'okutuuka ku Abelu Keramimu. N'abattamu bangi nnyo. Bwe batyo Abammoni ne bawangulwa Abayisirayeli." 
Judges11:34 Yefuta bwe yaddayo eka mu Mizupa, muwala we n'ajja okumusisinkana ng'azina era ng'akuba ensaasi. Ye yali omwana we yekka. Teyalina mwana mulala ow'obulenzi oba ow'obuwala okuggyako oyo yekka." 
Judges11:35 Yefuta bwe yamulaba, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye olw'okunakuwala, n'agamba nti: “Zinsanze, muwala wange! Onnakuwazizza nnyo! Era ondeetedde okweraliikirira, kubanga neeyama obweyamo eri Mukama, siyinza kubumenyawo!”" 
Judges11:36 Omuwala n'amugamba nti: “Kitange, oba nga weeyama obweyamo eri Mukama, tuukiriza kye wagamba okunkolako, kubanga Mukama yawoolera eggwanga ku balabe bo Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Kyokka n'agamba kitaawe nti: “Nkolera ekintu kino kimu: ndeka okumala emyezi ebiri, ŋŋende ne mikwano gyange ntambuletambule mu nsozi, nkungubage olw'okufa nga simanyi musajja.”" 
Judges11:38 Yefuta n'amugamba nti: “Genda.” N'amusiibula amale emyezi ebiri. N'agenda ne mikwano gye mu nsozi n'akungubagira eyo olw'okufa nga tamanyi musajja. 
Judges11:39 Emyezi ebiri bwe gyaggwaako, omuwala n'adda eri kitaawe. Kitaawe n'akola nga bwe yeeyama eri Mukama, omuwala n'afa nga tamanyi musajja. Eno ye yali entandikwa y'empisa mu Yisirayeli," 
Judges11:40 abawala okugendanga buli mwaka, ne bamala ennaku nnya nga bakungubagira muwala wa Yefuta ow'e Gileyaadi." 
Judges12:1 Abeefurayimu ne bategeka olutalo, ne basomoka Omugga Yorudaani, ne bajja e Zafoni, ne bagamba Yefuta nti: “Lwaki wasala ensalo n'ogenda okulwanyisa Abammoni, n'ototuyita kugenda naawe? Tujja kukwokera mu nnyumba yo!”" 
Judges12:2 Yefuta n'abagamba nti: “Nze n'abantu bange twalina enkaayana ey'amaanyi n'Abammoni. Nabayita mmwe, naye ne mutajja kubamponya." 
Judges12:3 Bwe nalaba nga temunziruukiridde, ne mpaayo obulamu bwange, ne nsala ensalo okulwanyisa Abammoni, Mukama n'ampa okubawangula. Kale lwaki mujja gye ndi okunnwanyisa?”" 
Judges12:4 Awo Yefuta n'akuŋŋaanya abasajja bonna ab'e Gileyaadi, n'alwanyisa Abefurayimu n'abagoba. Abeefurayimu baali bagamba nti: “Mmwe Abagileyaadi mu Efurayimu ne mu Manasse, mwadduka ku Efurayimu.”" 
Judges12:5 Abagileyaadi okuziyiza Abeefurayimu okutoloka, beekwata ebifo byonna, Omugga Yorudaani we guyinza okusomokerwa. Buli Mwefurayimu eyajjanga n'asaba bamukkirize okusomoka, nga bamubuuza nti: “Oli Mwefurayimu?” Bwe yaddangamu nti: “Nedda”," 
Judges12:6 ne bamugamba ayogere nti: “Shibboleti,” n'ayogera nti: “Sibboleti,” kubanga teyayinzanga kukyatula bulungi, nga bamukwata, nga bamuttira ku emu ku nsomoko za Yorudaani. Mu biro ebyo, Abeefurayimu emitwalo ena mu enkumi bbiri ne battibwa." 
Judges12:7 Yefuta n'akulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka mukaaga, n'afa, ne bamuziika mu kimu ku bibuga by'omu Gileyaadi." 
Judges12:8 Yefuta bwe yavaawo, Yibuzaani ow'e Betilehemu n'akulembera Yisirayeli." 
Judges12:9 Yalina batabani be amakumi asatu, ne bawala be amakumi asatu. N'afumbiza bawala be abo mu bika ebirala. N'aggya abawala amakumi asatu mu bika ebirala, n'abawasiza batabani be. N'akulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka musanvu," 
Judges12:10 n'afa, ne bamuziika mu Betilehemu." 
Judges12:11 Yibuzaani bwe yavaawo, Eloni Omuzebbulooni n'akulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka kkumi," 
Judges12:12 n'afa, ne bamuziika mu Ayalooni mu nsi ya Zebbulooni." 
Judges12:13 Eloni bwe yavaawo, Abudooni mutabani wa Hilleli Omupiratoni n'akulembera Yisirayeli." 
Judges12:14 Yalina batabani be amakumi ana, ne bazzukulu be amakumi asatu, abeebagalanga ku ndogoyi nsanvu. Abudooni yakulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka munaana," 
Judges12:15 n'afa, ne bamuziika mu Piratoni, mu nsi ya Efurayimu, mu kitundu ky'Abamaleki eky'ensozi." 
Judges13:1 Awo Abayisirayeli ne beeyongera nate okukola ebibi ne banyiiza Mukama. Mukama n'abaleka okufugibwa Abafilistiya okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
Judges13:2 Waaliwo omusajja, erinnya lye Manowa, ow'e Zora, ow'omu kika kya Daani. Mukazi we yali mugumba." 
Judges13:3 Malayika wa Mukama n'alabikira omukazi oyo n'amugamba nti: “Oli mugumba, tozaalanga ku mwana. Naye ojja kuba olubuto, ozaale omwana wa bulenzi." 
Judges13:4 Weekuume oleme kunywa ku mwenge, oba ku kitamiiza kyonna, wadde okulya ku kintu kyonna eky'omuzizo." 
Judges13:5 Era omwana ow'obulenzi gw'olizaala, taamwebwengako nviiri, kubanga omwana oyo aliba Muwonge eri Katonda okuva mu lubuto. Ye alitandika omulimu ogw'okununula Yisirayeli mu Bafilistiya.”" 
Judges13:6 Awo omukazi n'agenda n'abuulira bba nti: “Omuntu wa Katonda azze gye ndi, ng'amaaso ge gatiisa ng'aga malayika wa Katonda. Simubuuzizza gy'avudde, era tambuulidde linnya lye." 
Judges13:7 Wabula aŋŋambye nti nja kuba olubuto, nzaale omwana wa bulenzi. Aŋŋambye obutanywa mwenge, wadde ekitamiiza ekirala kyonna, n'obutalya kintu na kimu eky'omuzizo, kubanga omwana aliba Muwonge eri Katonda obulamu bwe bwonna.”" 
Judges13:8 Awo Manowa ne yeegayirira Mukama ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, nkwegayiridde, omuntu wa Katonda oyo gwe watumye, muleke adde gye tuli, atutegeeze kye tulikolera omwana, agenda okuzaalibwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Katonda n'akola ekyo Manowa kye yasaba, malayika we n'adda eri omukazi bwe yali ng'atudde mu nnimiro, kyokka Manowa bba teyali naye." 
Judges13:10 Omukazi n'adduka mangu n'abuulira bba nti: “Laba, omusajja oli eyajja gye ndi olulala, era andabikidde!”" 
Judges13:11 Monowa n'asituka n'agoberera mukazi we. N'agenda eri omusajja, n'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe musajja eyayogera ne mukazi wange?” N'addamu nti: “Ye nze.”" 
Judges13:12 Manowa n'amubuuza nti: “Ebigambo byo bwe birituukirira, omwana alikola mulimu ki? Era obulamu bwe buliba bwa ngeri ki?”" 
Judges13:13 Malayika wa Mukama n'addamu nti: “Mukazi wo yeegendereze okukola byonna bye namugamba. 
Judges13:14 Talyanga ku kintu kyonna ekiva ku mizabbibu. Tanywanga mwenge, wadde ekirala kyonna ekitamiiza. Era talyanga kya muzigo na kimu. Akwatanga byonna bye namulagira.”" 
Judges13:15 Manowa teyamanya ng'oyo malayika wa Mukama, kyeyava amugamba nti: “Nkwegayiridde, sooka oleke okugenda, tukufumbireyo embuzi ento.” Kyokka malayika wa Mukama n'agamba nti: “Ne bwe siigende mangu, era sijja kulya ku mmere yo. Naye bw'oyagala okuteekateeka ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, osaanidde okukiwa Mukama.”" 
Judges13:16  
Judges13:17 Manowa n'agamba malayika wa Mukama nti: “Tubuulire erinnya lyo, ebigambo byo bwe birituukirira tulyoke tukusseemu ekitiibwa.”" 
Judges13:18 Malayika wa Mukama n'amuddamu nti: “Obuuliza ki erinnya lyange? Linnya lya magero.” 
Judges13:19 Awo Manowa n'akwata embuzi ento n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'abiweerayo ku lwazi eri Mukama akola ebyamagero." 
Judges13:20 Ennimi z'omuliro bwe zaava ku alutaari, ne zitumbuka waggulu, Manowa ne mukazi we ne balaba malayika wa Mukama ng'ayambuka mu ggulu, ng'ayambukira mu nnimi ezo ez'omuliro. Awo Manowa n'amanya ng'oyo malayika wa Mukama. Ye ne mukazi we ne bavuunama ng'obwenyi butuukira ddala ku ttaka. Malayika wa Mukama teyaddamu kubalabikira." 
Judges13:21  
Judges13:22 Manowa n'agamba mukazi we nti: “Tetuuleme kufa, kubanga tulabye Katonda!”" 
Judges13:23 Kyokka mukazi we n'addamu nti: “Singa Mukama abadde ayagala kututta, teyandikirizza ekiweebwayo kyaffe ekyokebwa, n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke. Era teyanditulaze bino byonna, wadde okutubuulira kaakano ebiri nga bino.”" 
Judges13:24 Omukazi n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi n'amutuuma erinnya Samusooni. Omwana n'akula, Mukama n'amuwa omukisa." 
Judges13:25 Omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gutandika okumuwa amaanyi ng'ali wakati wa Zora ne Estawoli mu Mahanedani. 
Judges14:1 Olumu Samusooni n'aserengeta e Timuna, n'alaba omuwala Omufilistiya," 
Judges14:2 n'addayo eka, n'agamba kitaawe ne nnyina nti: “Ndabye omuwala Omufilistiya e Timuna. Kale mumpasize oyo.”" 
Judges14:3 Naye kitaawe ne nnyina ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki ogenda okuwasa omukazi mu Bafilistiya abatali bakomole? Tewali muwala mu ba kika kyaffe, wadde mu bantu baffe bonna?” Naye Samusooni n'agamba kitaawe nti: “Mpasiza oyo, kubanga gwe nsiimye.”" 
Judges14:4 Naye kitaawe ne nnyina baali tebamanyi nga Mukama ye yasindika Samusooni okukola ekyo, kubanga yali anoonya ensonga okulwanyisa Abafilistiya. Mu biro ebyo, Abafilistiya nga be bafuga Yisirayeli." 
Judges14:5 Awo Samusooni n'aserengeta ne kitaawe ne nnyina e Timuna. Bwe baali bayita mu nnimiro z'emizabbibu, n'awulira empologoma envubuka ng'ewuluguma." 
Judges14:6 Amangwago omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gumuwa amaanyi, n'agitaagulataagula, ng'ataagulataagula embuzi ento, nga talina kintu mu ngalo ze. Kyokka n'atabuulira bazadde be ky'akoze." 
Judges14:7 N'agenda n'anyumya n'omuwala, n'amusiima." 
Judges14:8 Ebbanga bwe lyayitawo, n'addayo okumuleeta. N'akyama okulaba empologoma gye yatta. Mu mulambo gwayo n'asangamu enjuki n'omubisi gwazo." 
Judges14:9 N'agutoolako n'engalo ze, n'agulya ng'atambula. N'agenda eri kitaawe ne nnyina, n'abawaako ne balya. Kyokka n'atababuulira ng'omubisi aguggye mu mulambo gw'empologoma." 
Judges14:10 Kitaawe n'agenda mu maka g'omuwala, Samusooni n'akolerayo embaga, kubanga abawasa bwe batyo bwe baakolanga." 
Judges14:11 Abafilistiya bwe baamulaba, ne baweereza abavubuka amakumi asatu okubeera naye." 
Judges14:12 Samusooni n'abagamba nti: “Kaakano ka mbakokkolere ekikokko. Bwe muliyinza okukitegeera ne mukinzivuunula, ennaku omusanvu ez'embaga nga tezinnaggwaako, ndibawa engoye ennungi amakumi asatu, n'ebyambalo amakumi asatu eby'oku mbaga." 
Judges14:13 Naye bwe muliremwa okukimbuulira, mmwe mulimpa engoye ennungi amakumi asatu, n'ebyambalo amakumi asatu eby'oku mbaga.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Kokkola ekikokko kyo tukiwulire.”" 
Judges14:14 N'agamba nti: “Mu mulyi mwavaamu ekyokulya. Mu w'amaanyi mwavaamu ekiwoomerevu!” Ennaku ssatu ne ziyitawo nga bakyalemeddwa okuvuunula ekikokko. 
Judges14:15 Ku lunaku olwokuna, ne bagamba muka Samusooni nti: “Sendasenda balo atuvvuunule ekikokko. Bw'otookikole, tujja kukwokya ggwe, n'ennyumba ya kitaawo. Mwatuyita kutwavuwaza?”" 
Judges14:16 Muka Samusooni n'agenda gy'ali ng'akaaba amaziga, n'agamba nti: “Tonjagala, onkyawa bukyayi! Wakokkera ab'eggwanga lyange ekikokko, n'otombuulira kye kitegeeza!” N'amugamba nti: “Saabuulira kitange wadde mmange, ggwe nnaabuulira?”" 
Judges14:17 Omukazi n'akaabanga olw'ekyo buli lunaku, okumalako ennaku omusanvu ez'embaga. Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu n'amubuulira, kubanga yamwetayirira nnyo. Omukazi n'abuulira ab'eggwanga lye." 
Judges14:18 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu, abasajja ab'omu kibuga ne bagamba Samusooni enjuba nga tennagwa nti: “Ekisinga omubisi gw'enjuki obuwoomerevu kiki? N'empologoma kiki ekigisinga amaanyi?” Samusooni n'addamu nti: “Singa temwalimya nte yange n'ekikokko kyange temwandikivumbudde!”" 
Judges14:19 Awo omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gumujjako n'amaanyi, n'aserengeta e Asukelooni, n'attayo abasajja amakumi asatu, n'abambula, engoye zaabwe n'aziwa abasajja abavvuunula ekikokko kye. Obusungu ne bumutikka, n'addayo mu maka ga kitaawe." 
Judges14:20 Mukazi we ne bamuwa munne, eyali mukwano gwe ennyo." 
Judges15:1 Awo ebbanga bwe lyayitawo, Samusooni n'agenda okukyalira mukazi we mu makungula g'eŋŋaano, ng'amutwalidde embuzi ento. N'agamba kitaawe w'omukazi nti: “Njagala kuyingira mu kisenge kya mukazi wange.” Kyokka kitaawe w'omukazi n'atamuganya kuyingira." 
Judges15:2 N'agamba Samusooni nti: “Nze nalowooza nga wamukyayira ddala, ne mmuwa munno. Naye muganda we omuto ye asinga obulungi. Gw'oba otwala mu kifo ky'oli.”" 
Judges15:3 Samusooni n'abagamba nti: “Ku mulundi guno sigenda kuvunaanibwa olw'akabi ke nnaakola Abafilistiya!” 
Judges15:4 Awo n'agenda n'akwata ebibe ebikumi bisatu, n'asiba bibiri bibiri emikira, n'ateeka ebitawuliro mu bifundikwa." 
Judges15:5 Bwe yamala okukoleeza omuliro ku bitawuliro, n'abita okugenda mu nnimiro z'eŋŋaano ez'Abafilistiya. Bw'atyo n'ayokya ebinywa by'eŋŋaano ekunguddwa, era n'eyo ekyali mu nnimiro, wamu n'ennimiro z'emiti emizayiti." 
Judges15:6 Awo Abafilistiya ne beebuuza nti: “Akoze kino ye ani?” Ne babagamba nti: “Samusooni mukoddomi w'Omutimuna. Kubanga Omutimuna oyo yaddira muka Samusooni, n'amuwa munne wa Samusooni.” Awo Abafilistiya ne bagenda ne bookya omuliro omukazi n'ab'omu maka ga kitaawe." 
Judges15:7 Samusooni n'abagamba nti: “Bwe mukoze bwe mutyo? Kale, sijja kuweera nga sinnabawoolerako ggwanga.”" 
Judges15:8 N'abalumba n'amaanyi mangi, n'abattamu bangi nnyo. N'agenda n'abeera mu mpuku ku kagulungujjo k'olwazi lw'e Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Awo Abafilistiya ne bajja ne basiisira mu Buyudaaya, ne bazinda ekibuga Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ne bababuuza nti: “Lwaki mutulumbye?” Ne baddamu nti: “Tuzze okukwata Samusooni tumusibe, twesasuze bye yatukola.”" 
Judges15:11 Awo abasajja enkumi ssatu aba Buyudaaya ne bagenda ku mpuku, ku kagulungujjo k'e Etamu ne bagamba Samusooni nti: “Tomanyi ng'Abafilistiya be batufuga? Kale kiki ky'otukoze?” N'abaddamu nti: “Nneesasuza kye bankola.”" 
Judges15:12 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tuzze okukusiba tukuweeyo gye bali.” Samusooni n'agamba nti: “Mundayirire nga temunzite mmwe mwennyini.” 
Judges15:13 Ne bagamba nti: “Tetujja kukutta, wabula tujja kukusiba busibi, tukuweeyo gye bali.” Ne bamusiba emiguwa ebiri emiggya, ne bamuggyayo mu mpuku." 
Judges15:14 Bwe yatuuka e Lehi, Abafilistiya ne badduka okujja gy'ali nga baleekaana. Amangwago omwoyo gwa Mukama ne gumuwa amaanyi, n'akutula emiguwa egyali gimusibye emikono, ne giba ng'obugoogwa obwokeddwa omuliro." 
Judges15:15 N'agwikiriza oluba lw'endogoyi olubisi, n'alulonda, n'alussa abasajja lukumi." 
Judges15:16 Samusooni n'agamba nti: “Oluba lw'endogoyi ndussizza abasajja lukumi. Mbatuumye entuumu n'oluba lw'endogoyi.” 
Judges15:17 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'asuula wansi oluba lw'endogoyi. Ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Lamati Lehi." 
Judges15:18 Awo Samusooni n'alumwa nnyo ennyonta, n'akoowoola Mukama nti: “Ompadde obuwanguzi buno obw'amaanyi. Kaakano nfe ennyonta, nkwatibwe abatali bakomole?”" 
Judges15:19 Awo Mukama n'aggula ekinnya ekiri eyo e Lehi, ne muvaamu amazzi. Samusooni bwe yamala okunywa, n'awulira ng'ali bulungi, n'addamu obulamu. Oluzzi olwo ne lutuumibwa erinnya Enihakkore, oluli e Lehi n'okutuusa kati." 
Judges15:20 Awo Samusooni n'akulembera Yisirayeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri mu biseera by'Abafilistiya. 
Judges16:1 Samusooni n'agenda e Gaaza n'alabayo omukazi malaaya, ne yeebaka naye." 
Judges16:2 Ab'e Gaaza ne bamanya ng'ali eyo, ne bazinda ekifo ekyo, ne bamuteega ekiro kyonna ku mulyango gw'ekibuga nga bagamba nti: “Obudde ka bukye, tulyoke tumutte.”" 
Judges16:3 Kyokka Samusooni ne yeebaka okutuuka mu ttumbi. N'agolokoka n'akwata oluggi lw'emiryango gy'ekibuga, n'alusimbulamu n'emyango gyalwo gyombi n'ebisiba, n'abiteeka ku kibegabega kye, n'abitwala ku ntikko y'olusozi oluli mu maaso ga Heburooni." 
Judges16:4 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Samusooni n'aganza omukazi mu kiwonvu ky'e Soreki, erinnya lye Delila." 
Judges16:5 Abakungu b'Abafilistiya ne bagenda eri omukazi oyo, ne bamugamba nti: “Mukemereze omanye amaanyi amangi mwe gasibuka, oba nga tuyinza okumusobola, tumusibe abe nga takyeyinza. Buli omu ku ffe ajja kukuwa ebitundu bya ffeeza kikumi.”" 
Judges16:6 Awo Delila n'agamba Samusooni nti: “Nkwegayiridde, mbuulira amaanyi go amangi mwe gasibuka, n'ekiyinza okukusiba n'oba nga tokyeyinza.”" 
Judges16:7 Samusooni n'agamba nti: “Bwe bansibya enkolokolo empya omusanvu ezitakaze, nfuuka munafu, ne mba ng'omusajja omulala yenna.”" 
Judges16:8 Awo abakungu b'Abafilistiya ne baleetera Delila enkolokolo empya musanvu ezitakaze, n'azimusibya." 
Judges16:9 Omukazi era yalinawo abasajja abateeze mu kisenge ekirala. N'aleekaana n'amugamba nti: “Samusooni, Abafilistiya bakuguddeko!” Samusooni n'akutula enkolokolo ng'omuguwa gw'obugoogwa bwe gukutuka nga gukutte omuliro. Awo amaanyi ge ne gatategeerekeka." 
Judges16:10 Delila n'agamba Samusooni nti: “Ndaba ng'ombuzaabuza era onnimba! Kaakano nkwegayiridde, mbuulira ekiyinza okukusiba.”" 
Judges16:11 N'amugamba nti: “Bwe bansibya emiguwa emiggya egitakozesebwangako, nfuuka munafu, ne mba ng'omusajja omulala yenna.”" 
Judges16:12 Awo Delila n'addira emiguwa emiggya n'amusiba. N'aleekaana n'amugamba nti: “Samusooni, Abafilistiya bakuguddeko!” Abasajja era baali bateeze mu kisenge ekirala. Kyokka n'akutula emiguwa mu mikono gye ng'ewuzi." 
Judges16:13 Delila n'agamba Samusooni nti: “Okutuusa kati ombuzaabuza era onnimba bulimbi. Mbuulira ekiyinza okukusiba.” N'amugamba nti: “Emivumbo omusanvu egy'enviiri zange bw'ogiruka n'engoye ku muti okulukirwa, n'oginyweza n'olubambo, nja kuba munafu, mbe ng'omusajja omulala yenna.”" 
Judges16:14 Delila n'amwebasa, n'addira emivumbo omusanvu egy'enviiri ze n'agiruka n'engoye, n'azisibira ddala n'olubambo, n'alyoka aleekaana n'amugamba nti: “Samusooni, Abafilistiya bakuliko!” Samusooni n'azuukuka mu tulo, ne yeetakkuluza ku lubambo lw'omuti ogulukirwako n'engoye ezirukiddwa." 
Judges16:15 Awo omukazi n'agamba nti: “Oyinza otya okugamba nti onjagala ate nga tonneesiga? Waakambuzaabuza emirundi gino esatu n'otombuulira amaanyi go amangi mwe gasibuka.” 
Judges16:16 Bw'atyo omukazi n'amutawaanyanga buli lunaku ng'amubuuza, okutuusa lwe yeetamirwa ddala." 
Judges16:17 N'amubuulira byonna, n'amugamba nti: “Simwebwangako nviiri, kubanga ndi Muwonge eri Katonda okuviira ddala mu lubuto lwa mmange. Bwe mmwebwako enviiri, amaanyi gange ganvaako, ne nfuuka munafu, ne mba ng'omusajja omulala yenna.”" 
Judges16:18 Delila bwe yamanya ng'amubuulidde byonna, n'atumira abakungu b'Abafilistiya nti: “Mukomewo omulundi guno gumu gwokka kubanga ambuulidde byonna.” Awo ne bajja gy'ali, nga n'ensimbi bazze nazo." 
Judges16:19 Delila ne yeebasa Samusooni ng'amuleze, n'ayita omusajja n'amwa emivumba omusanvu egy'enviiri za Samusooni. N'atandika okumusiba nga takyeyinza, amaanyi ge ne gamuvaako." 
Judges16:20 Awo omukazi n'aleekaana n'amugamba nti: “Samusooni, Abafilistiya bakuliko!” N'azuukuka mu tulo, n'alowooza nti: “Nja kwetakkuluza ŋŋende nga bulijjo.” Yali tamanyi nga Mukama amulese!" 
Judges16:21 Abafilistiya ne bamukwata ne bamuggyamu amaaso. Ne bamutwala e Gaaza, ne bamusibya enjegere z'ekikomo, ne bamuteeka ku gw'okuseeranga ku lubengo mu kkomera." 
Judges16:22 Kyokka enviiri ze ne zitandika okuddako okumera. 
Judges16:23 Awo abakungu b'Abafilistiya ne bakuŋŋaana okusanyuka n'okuwaayo ekitambiro ekinene eri lubaale waabwe Dagoni, nga bagamba nti: “Lubaale waffe atuwadde okuwangula Samusooni omulabe waffe.”" 
Judges16:24 Awo bwe baali basanyuka, ne bagamba nti: “Muyite Samusooni atusanyuseemu!” Bwe baleeta Samusooni, nga bamuggya mu kkomera, n'abasanyusaamu, ne bamuyimiriza wakati w'empagi. Abantu bwe baamulaba ne batendereza lubaale waabwe nti: “Lubaale waffe atuwadde okuwangula eyazikiriza ensi yaffe, era eyatuttako abangi!”" 
Judges16:25  
Judges16:26 Samusooni n'agamba omulenzi eyali amukutte ku mukono nti: “Leka nkwate ku mpagi eziwanirira ennyumba, nzeesigameko.”" 
Judges16:27 Ennyumba yali ejjudde abasajja n'abakazi. Era abakungu b'Abafilistiya baali bali awo bonna. Ne waggulu ku kasolya kwaliko abasajja n'abakazi ng'enkumi ssatu, abaali batunuulira Samusooni ng'abasanyusaamu." 
Judges16:28 Awo Samusooni ne yeegayirira Mukama ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, Katonda, njijukira! Nkwegayirira ompe amaanyi gange omulundi guno gumu gwokka ayi Katonda, mu kikolwa kino ekimu mpoolere eggwanga ku Bafilistiya olw'okunzigyamu amaaso gange gombi!”" 
Judges16:29 Samusooni n'akwata empagi zombi eza wakati, eziwaniridde ekizimbe, n'azimalirako amaanyi gonna, omukono gwe ogwa ddyo ku emu, n'ogwa kkono ku ndala." 
Judges16:30 N'aleekaana, n'agamba nti: “Ka nfiire wamu n'Abafilistiya!” N'asindika n'amaanyi ge gonna, ennyumba n'egwa ku bakungu, ne ku bantu bonna abaali omwo. Samusooni bw'atyo n'atta bangi mu kufa kwe, okusinga be yatta nga mulamu." 
Judges16:31 Awo baganda be n'ab'ennyumba ya kitaawe bonna ne bajja okutwala omulambo gwe. Ne bamutwala ne bamuziika wakati w'e Zora ne Esutawoli, ku biggya bya kitaawe Manowa. Yali akulembedde Yisirayeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri." 
Judges17:1 Waliwo omusajja erinnya lye Mikka, eyali ow'omu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi." 
Judges17:2 N'agamba nnyina nti: “Ebitundu bya ffeeza olukumi mu ekikumi bye baakutwalako n'okolima nga mpulira, nze nabitwala era mbirina.” Nnyina n'agamba nti: “Mukama akuwe omukisa, mwana wange.”" 
Judges17:3 Omusajja n'azza ebitundu bya ffeeza olukumi mu ekikumi eri nnyina. Nnyina n'agamba nti: “Okuggya ekikolimo ku mwana wange, mponga eri Mukama ffeeza ono, akolebwemu ekifaananyi ekyole ekibikkiddwako ffeeza omusaanuuse. Kale kaakano ffeeza mmukuddiza.”" 
Judges17:4 Awo Mikka bwe yazza ebitundu bya ffeeza eri nnyina, nnyina n'atoolako ebitundu ebikumi bibiri, n'abiwa omukozi asaanuusa, oyo n'akola ekifaananyi ekyole, n'akibikkako ffeeza, ekifaananyi ekyo ne kiteekebwa mu nnyumba ya Mikka." 
Judges17:5 Omusajja oyo Mikka, yalina essinzizo lye. N'akola ebifaananyi eby'okusinza. N'ayawula omu ku batabani be, n'afuuka kabona we." 
Judges17:6 Mu kiseera ekyo, tewaali kabaka mu Yisirayeli. Buli muntu yakolanga nga bw'alaba." 
Judges17:7 Kale waaliwo omuvubuka Omuleevi, eyali abeera mu Betilehemu mu Buyudaaya." 
Judges17:8 N'avaayo n'anoonya awalala gy'anaabeera. Bwe yali ng'atambula, n'atuuka ku nnyumba ya Mikka mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi." 
Judges17:9 Mikka n'amubuuza nti: “Ova wa?” N'addamu nti: “Ndi Muleevi w'e Betilehemu. Nnoonya walala gye nnyinza okubeera.” 
Judges17:10 Mikka n'amugamba nti: “Beera nange, obeere omubuulirizi era kabona wange. Nnaakuwanga ebitundu kkumi ebya ffeeza omwaka, n'ebyokwambala n'ebyokulya.”" 
Judges17:11 Awo omulenzi Omuleevi n'akkiriza okubeera mu nnyumba y'omusajja oyo; era n'abeerera ddala ng'omu ku batabani be. 
Judges17:12 Mikka n'amuteekawo abeere kabona we, omulenzi oyo Omuleevi, n'abeera mu nnyumba ya Mikka." 
Judges17:13 Mikka n'agamba nti: “Kaakano nga bwe nnina Omuleevi nga ye kabona wange, mmanyi nga Mukama ajja kunkolera ebirungi.”" 
Judges18:1 Mu biseera ebyo, tewaali kabaka mu Yisirayeli. Mu nnaku ezo ab'Ekika kya Daani baali bakyanoonya ekitundu eky'okubeeramu, baali tebannafuna kitundu kyabwe mu Bika bya Yisirayeli." 
Judges18:2 Awo ab'omu Kika kya Daani bonna ne beerondamu abasajja abazira bataano, ne babatuma okuva mu Zora ne mu Esutawoli okuketta ensi n'okugyetegereza. Bwe baatuuka mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, ne babeera mu nnyumba ya Mikka." 
Judges18:3 Bwe baali bali eyo, ne beetegereza enjogera y'omuvubuka Omuleevi, ne bamutuukirira, ne bamubuuza nti: “Okola ki wano? Era ani yakuleeta wano?”" 
Judges18:4 N'addamu nti: “Twategeeragana ne Mikka: ampa empeera, ne mba kabona we.”" 
Judges18:5 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tukwegayiridde, buuza Katonda atumanyise oba ng'olugendo lwaffe lunaaba n'omukisa.”" 
Judges18:6 Kabona n'abagamba nti: “Temweraliikirira, Mukama abalabirira mu lugendo lwammwe.”" 
Judges18:7 Awo abasajja abo abataano ne bagenda, ne batuuka e Layisi, ne balaba ng'abantu baayo bali mirembe ng'ab'e Sidoni bwe bali. Baali bakkakkamu, nga ba mirembe, nga balina byonna bye beetaaga. Baali beesudde nnyo Abasidoni, era nga tewali bantu balala be bakolagana nabo." 
Judges18:8 Abasajja abataano bwe baddayo e Zora, ne Esutawoli, baganda baabwe ne bababuuza bye bazudde." 
Judges18:9 Ne baddamu nti: “Musituke, tugende tulumbe Layisi. Ensi tumaze okugiraba, nnungi nnyo. Temugayaalira wano. Mwanguwe! Mugende mugiwambe." 
Judges18:10 Bwe munaatuukayo, mujja kusanga abantu nga tebalina ke beekengera. Ensi ngazi. Erimu buli kintu, omuntu ky'ayinza okwetaaga. Katonda amaze okugigabula mu mikono gyammwe.”" 
Judges18:11 Awo abasajja lukaaga ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne basitula okuva e Zora ne Esutawoli, nga balina ebyokulwanyisa." 
Judges18:12 Ne bambuka, ne basiisira mu bukiikaddyo obwa Kiriyati Yaarimu mu Buyudaaya. Kyebava bayita ekifo ekyo Enkambi ya Daani n'okutuusa kati." 
Judges18:13 Ne bavaayo, ne batuuka ku nnyumba ya Mikka mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi." 
Judges18:14 Abasajja abataano abaali bagenze okuketta ensi y'e Layisi, ne bagamba bannaabwe nti: “Mubadde mumanyi nga mu emu ku nnyumba zino mulimu ekifaananyi ekyole, ekibikkiddwako ffeeza? Mulimu n'ebifaananyi ebirala ebya balubaale, era n'ekkanzu. Kale nno mulowooze kye mugwanira okukola.”" 
Judges18:15 Awo ne bayingira mu nnyumba ya Mikka, omuvubuka Omuleevi mwe yabeeranga, ne bamubuuza nga bw'ali." 
Judges18:16 Olwo abasajja bali olukaaga ab'omu Kika kya Daani abalina ebyokulwanyisa, baali bayimiridde ku mulyango gwa wankaaki" 
Judges18:17 Abasajja abataano abakessi ne bambuka, ne bayingira mu nnyumba, ne batwala ekifaananyi ekyole, ekibikkiddwako ffeeza, n'ebifaananyi ebirala ebya balubaale, n'ekkanzu, nga kabona ayimiridde ku mulyango gwa wankaaki, wamu n'abasajja olukaaga, abalina ebyokulwanyisa." 
Judges18:18 Abasajja bali bwe baayingira mu nnyumba ya Mikka, ne baggyamu ekifaananyi ekyole, n'ebifaananyi ebirala ebya balubaale, era n'ekkanzu, kabona n'ababuuza nti: “Mukola ki?”" 
Judges18:19 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Sirika, tonyega! Jjangu naffe, obeere kabona waffe. Tekisinga okuba kabona w'Ekika ky'Abayisirayeli ekiramba, mu kifo ky'okuba kabona w'ennyumba y'omuntu omu?”" 
Judges18:20 Kabona n'asanyuka, n'atwala ekkanzu n'ekifaananyi ekyole, n'ebifaananyi ebirala ebya balubaale, n'agenda wamu nabo." 
Judges18:21 Awo ne bakyusa, ne bagenda nga bakulembezzaamu abaana abato n'ensolo n'ebintu." 
Judges18:22 Bwe baali batambudde olugendo oluwerako okuva ku nnyumba ya Mikka, Mikka n'ayita baliraanwa be, ne bawondera era ne batuuka ab'omu Kika kya Daani," 
Judges18:23 ne babakoowoola. Ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne bakyuka ne batunula emabega, ne bagamba Mikka nti: “Obadde otya okujja n'ekibiina ekinene bwe kityo?”" 
Judges18:24 Mikka n'addamu nti: “Munzigyeeko kabona ne balubaale bange be nakola ne mubatwala, ne sisigaza kantu! Kale ate mumbuuza mutya nti: Obadde otya?”" 
Judges18:25 Ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne bagamba nti: “Ekisinga, toyongera kwogera, sikulwa ng'abasajja bano abakambwe bakulumba ne bakutta ggwe n'ab'omu nnyumba yo.”" 
Judges18:26 Ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne beetambulira. Awo Mikka bwe yalaba nga bamusinze nnyo amaanyi, n'akyuka n'addayo ewuwe." 
Judges18:27 Ab'omu Kika kya Daani bwe baamala okutwala ebintu bya Mikka bye yali akoze, ne kabona gwe yalina, ne balumba Layisi, ekibuga eky'abantu abakkakkamu ab'emirembe, ne babatta, ekibuga ne bakyokya omuliro." 
Judges18:28 Tewaaliwo bajja kubataasa, kubanga Layisi kyali mu kiwonvu ekiriraanye Beturihobu, nga kyesudde nnyo Sidoni, ate ng'abaayo tewali bantu balala be bakolagana nabo. Ab'omu Kika kya Daani ne bazimba buggya ekibuga, ne babeera omwo." 
Judges18:29 Erinnya ly'ekibuga eryali Layisi ne balikyusa, ne bakituuma Daani mutabani wa Yakobo." 
Judges18:30 Abadaani ne basimba ekifaananyi kiri ekyole okukisinzanga. Yonataani mutabani wa Gerusoomu, era muzzukulu wa Musa n'aba kabona waabwe. Ye n'abasika be, ne baba bakabona mu b'Ekika kya Daani, okutuusa abantu lwe baatwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Judges18:31 Ekifaananyi, Mikka kye yalina, ne kisigalawo ebbanga lyonna, Weema ya Katonda lye yabeerawo mu Siilo." 
Judges19:1 Awo mu nnaku ezo nga tewannaba kabaka mu Yisirayeli, ne wabaawo Omuleevi, eyabeeranga ewala mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi. N'aggya omuwala mu Betilehemu mu Buyudaaya n'amuwasa." 
Judges19:2 Omuwala n'ayenda, n'anyiiza bba, n'amunobako n'addayo mu nnyumba ya kitaawe mu Betilehemu mu Buyudaaya n'amalayo emyaka ena." 
Judges19:3 Bba n'asituka n'agenda okumuwooyawooya amukomyewo. N'atwala omuddu we n'endogoyi bbiri. Omuwala n'amuyingiza mu nnyumba ya kitaawe. Kitaawe w'omuwala bwe yamulaba, n'amwaniriza." 
Judges19:4 Kitaawe w'omuwala n'alwisa mukoddomi we, n'amukkirizisa okumalayo ennaku ssatu. Bwe batyo ne balya ne banywa, ne basulayo." 
Judges19:5 Mu makya g'olunaku olwokuna, ne bagolokoka nga bukyali, ne beetegeka okugenda. Kyokka kitaawe w'omuwala n'agamba mukoddomi we nti: “Mumale okulya ku kamere mulyoke mugende.”" 
Judges19:6 Awo ne batuula, ne balya ne banywa bombi wamu. Kitaawe w'omuwala n'agamba mukoddomi we nti: “Nkwegayiridde kkiriza osule, osanyukeko.”" 
Judges19:7 Omusajja n'agolokoka okugenda, kyokka kitaawe w'omuwala n'amwegayirira n'asulayo nate." 
Judges19:8 Ku lunaku olwokutaano n'agolokoka nkya mu makya okugenda. Kitaawe w'omuwala n'amugamba nti: “Sanyukako, nkwegayiridde. Mubeere wano okutuusa obudde lwe bunaawungeera.” Bwe batyo ne balya bombi." 
Judges19:9 Omusajja ne mukazi we n'omuddu bwe baasituka okugenda, kitaawe w'omuwala n'agamba nti: “Laba, kaakano obudde buubuno buwungedde. Mbeegayiridde musule. Obudde bunaatera okuziba. Beera wano osanyuke. Enkya mukeere okutambula, oddeyo eka.”" 
Judges19:10 Naye omusajja n'atakkiriza kusula kiro kirala. Awo n'asituka n'atambula ng'ali ne mukazi we n'omuddu we n'endogoyi zaabwe ebbiri, eziriko amatandiiko, ne boolekera Yebusi, ye Yerusaalemu." 
Judges19:11 Bwe baatuuka e Yebusi ng'obudde bugenze nnyo, omuddu n'agamba mukama we nti: “Lwaki tetukyama ne tusula mu kibuga kino eky'Abayebusi?”" 
Judges19:12 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: “Tetuukyame kusula mu kibuga ky'abatali Bayisirayeli. Tuyitewo tweyongereyo katono, tusule mu Gibeya oba mu Raama.”" 
Judges19:13  
Judges19:14 Awo ne batambula ne bayisa Yebusi ne beeyongerayo. Obudde ne bubazibirira nga bali kumpi ne Gibeya mu kitundu ky'ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini. 
Judges19:15 Ne bakyama eyo gye baba basula. Ne bayingira mu kibuga, ne batuula mu kibangirizi, ne wataba abayingiza mu nnyumba ye okubasuza." 
Judges19:16 Bwe baali bakyali awo, omusajja omukadde n'ajja ng'ava mu mirimu gye mu nnimiro akawungeezi. Omusajja oyo okusooka, yali wa mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi, naye olwo yali abeera mu Gibeya. Abantu baayo abalala baali ba mu Kika kya Benyamiini." 
Judges19:17 Omusajja omukadde bwe yayimusa amaaso ge, n'alaba omuyise oli, mu kibangirizi ky'ekibuga, n'amubuuza nti: “Ova wa? Era ogenda wa?”" 
Judges19:18 Omuleevi n'addamu nti: “Tuva Betilehemu mu Buyudaaya, nga tuddayo eka ewala mu nsi ya Efurayimu ey'ensozi. Naye tewali atuyingizza wuwe kutusuza," 
Judges19:19 wadde nga tulina omuddo n'emmere y'endogoyi zaffe. Era nnina emmere n'omwenge ebyange ne mukazi wange, n'omuddu wange. Tulina byonna bye twetaaga.”" 
Judges19:20 Omusajja omukadde n'agamba nti: “Mujje ewange, nze nja kubalabirira. Temujja kusula mu kibangirizi.”" 
Judges19:21 Awo n'abayingiza mu nnyumba ye, endogoyi zaabwe n'aziwa ebyokulya. Bo ne banaaba ebigere, ne balya, ne banywa." 
Judges19:22 Awo bwe baali nga basanyuka, abasajja ab'omu kibuga abagwenyufu ne bazingiza ennyumba enjuyi zonna, ne bakonkona ku luggi. Ne boogera ne nnannyini nnyumba, omukadde oli, nga bamugamba nti: “Fulumya omusajja oyo ayingidde mu nnyumba yo, twebake naye.”" 
Judges19:23 Omusajja nnannyini nnyumba n'afuluma n'abagamba nti: “Nedda, bannange! Mbeegayiridde, temukola kibi kyenkanidde awo! Omusajja ono mugenyi wange. Temukola kya bugwenyufu kino." 
Judges19:24 Mulabe, waliwo mukazi we, ne muwala wange akyali embeerera. Abo be nnaafulumya kaakano, ne mubakolako kye mwagala. Naye omusajja ono temumukolako kya bugwenyufu ekyenkana awo!”" 
Judges19:25 Naye abasajja ne batamuwuliriza. Awo Omuleevi n'akwata mukazi we, n'amufulumya gye bali. Ne bamwebakako, ne bamukolako eby'effujjo ekiro kyonna. Obudde bwe bwali bukya ne bamuta." 
Judges19:26 Awo obudde nga bukya, omukazi n'ajja n'agwa awo ku luggi lw'ennyumba y'omusajja omukadde, omwali bba, n'abeera awo okutuusa lwe bwakya." 
Judges19:27 Awo bba bwe yagolokoka ku makya n'aggulawo oluggi, n'afuluma okugenda, n'asanga mukazi we, ng'agudde mu maaso g'ennyumba, emikono gye nga gikunukkiriza omulyango." 
Judges19:28 N'amugamba nti: “Golokoka tugende.” Kyokka nga taddamu. N'amuteeka ku ndogoyi ye, n'agenda ewuwe." 
Judges19:29 Awo bwe yatuuka eka, n'ayingira mu nnyumba ye, n'aggyayo akambe, n'akwata omulambo gwa mukazi we n'agusalamu ebitundu kkumi na bibiri, buli kika kya Yisirayeli n'akiweerezaako ekitundu." 
Judges19:30 Awo bonna abaalaba ekyo ne bagamba nti: “Ekiri nga kino tekibangawo era tekirabibwangako bukya Bayisirayeli bava mu Misiri. Mukirowooze, muteese, tulabe eky'okukola!”" 
Judges20:1 Awo Abayisirayeli bonna, okuva ku Daani mu bukiika obwa kkono okutuuka ku Beruseba mu bukiikaddyo, n'okuva mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi mu buvanjuba, ekibiina kyonna ne kikuŋŋaana ng'omuntu omu, mu maaso ga Mukama e Mizupa." 
Judges20:2 Abakulembeze b'Ebika bya Yisirayeli byonna baaliwo mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu ba Katonda, abaserikale emitwalo ena abatambuza ebigere." 
Judges20:3 Mu kiseera ekyo ab'Ekika kya Benyamiini ne bawulira ng'Abayisirayeli abalala bakuŋŋaanidde e Mizupa. Abayisirayeli ne babuuza nti: “Tubuulire, omusango guno gwazzibwa gutya?”" 
Judges20:4 Omuleevi bba w'omukazi eyattibwa, n'addamu nti: “Natuuka e Gibeya mu kitundu kya Benyamiini okusulayo, nga ndi wamu ne mukazi wange." 
Judges20:5 Abasajja b'e Gibeya ne bannumba ne bazingiza ennyumba mwe nali ekiro, okugyetooloola. Baali baagala okunzita, ne bakola eby'effujjo ku mukazi wange, n'afa." 
Judges20:6 Ne ntwala omulambo gwe, ne ngusalaasalamu ebitundu, ne mbiweereza ensi yonna eyagabanibwa Yisirayeli, kubanga baakola eky'ekivve era eky'obusirusiru mu Yisirayeli." 
Judges20:7 Kale Abayisirayeli mwenna, muteese mulabe eky'okukola.”" 
Judges20:8 Abantu bonna ne basituka ng'omuntu omu, ne bagamba nti: “Tewali n'omu mu ffe anaddayo mu weema ye oba mu nnyumba ye." 
Judges20:9 Naye kye tunaakola Gibeya kye kino: tujja kugenda tukirwanyise nga tukubye akalulu. 
Judges20:10 Ekimu eky'ekkumi ku basajja mu Yisirayeli kijja kusakira eggye emmere, abalala bonna bagende babonereze Gibeya ekya Benyamiini, olw'ekikolwa kino eky'obugwenyufu, kye baakola mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Awo abasajja bonna ab'omu Yisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaana ng'omuntu omu okulumba ekibuga. 
Judges20:12 Awo Ebika bya Yisirayeli ne bituma ababaka mu kitundu kya Benyamiini kyonna okubagamba nti: “Kibi ki kino kye mwakola? 
Judges20:13 Kale kaakano muweeyo abasajja abagwenyufu abaali mu Gibeya tubatte okuggyawo ekibi kino mu Yisirayeli.” Naye aba Benyamiini ne bagaana okuwuliriza Abayisirayeli bannaabwe abalala. 
Judges20:14 Ne bava mu bibuga bya Benyamiini byonna, ne bakuŋŋaanira mu Gibeya okulwanyisa Abayisirayeli abalala." 
Judges20:15 Mu bibuga byabwe ne bayitayo abaserikale emitwalo ebiri mu kakaaga ku lunaku olwo. Okwongereza ku abo, ab'e Gibeya ne bakuŋŋaanya abasajja lusanvu abalondemu." 
Judges20:16 Mu bantu abo bonna mwalimu abasajja abalondemu lusanvu abakozesa kkono. Buli omu ku bo yayinzanga okuteeka ejjinja mu nvuumuulo akube oluviiri, n'atasubwa." 
Judges20:17 Ebika bya Yisirayeli ebirala ne bikuŋŋaanya abalwanyi abazira emitwalo amakumi ana. 
Judges20:18 Abayisirayeli ne beesitula ne bambuka e Beteli okusinza, ne babuuza Katonda nti: “Kika ki ekiba kisooka okulumba Ababenyamiini?” Ne Mukama n'addamu nti: “Ekika kya Yuda kye kiba kisooka.”" 
Judges20:19 Ku lunaku olwaddako, Abayisirayeli ne bakeera mu makya, ne basiisira okumpi ne Gibeya." 
Judges20:20 Ne beesowolayo okulwanyisa Ababenyamiini. Ne basimba ennyiriri okulwanyisa ekibuga Gibeya. 
Judges20:21 Ababenyamiini ne bava Gibeya okulwana, ne batta abaserikale emitwalo ebiri ab'Abayisirayeli olunaku olwo." 
Judges20:22 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bataterebuka, ne basimba ennyiriri nate mu kifo mwe baazisimbye ku lunaku olwasooka." 
Judges20:23 Basooka kwambuka gye basinziza, ne bakungubagira mu maaso ga Mukama okutuusa akawungeezi. Ne babuuza Mukama nti: “Tuddemu okulwanyisa baganda baffe Ababenyamiini?” Mukama n'addamu nti: “Mugende mubalwanyise.”" 
Judges20:24 Ne boolekera Ababenyamiini olunaku olwokubiri. 
Judges20:25 N'Ababenyamiini ne bava mu Gibeya okubalwanyisa omulundi ogwokubiri. Ku mulundi guno, ne batta abaserikale ba Yisirayeli omutwalo gumu mu kakaaga." 
Judges20:26 Awo ab'eggye lyonna ery'Abayisirayeli ne bambuka e Beteli, ne bakungubaga. Ne babeera eyo mu maaso ga Mukama, ne batalya okutuusa akawungeezi. Ne bawaayo mu maaso ga Mukama ebitambiro ebyokebwa, n'ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Judges20:27 Mu biro ebyo, Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Katonda yabeeranga eyo e Beteli, era nga Finehaasi, mutabani wa Eleyazaari era muzzukulu wa Arooni ye agirabirira. Abayisirayeli ne babuuza Mukama nti: “Tuddemu nate okulwanyisa baganda baffe Ababenyamiini, nandiki tulekere awo?” Mukama n'addamu nti: “Mugende mulwane, kubanga enkya nja kuwaayo Ababenyamiini mu mikono gyammwe.”" 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bateekawo abaserikale okuteega Gibeya ku njuyi zonna. 
Judges20:30 Awo ne bambuka okulwanyisa Ababenyamiini olunaku olwokusatu. Ne basimba ennyiriri zaabwe nga boolekedde Gibeya ng'olulala. 
Judges20:31 Ababenyamiini ne bavaayo okulwana, ne basikirizibwa okwesuula ekibuga. Ng'olulala, ne batandika okukubira n'okuttira abamu ku Bayisirayeli awatangaavu, ku luguudo olumu olwambuka e Beteli, ne ku lulala olugenda e Gibeya. Ne battayo Abayisirayeli ng'amakumi asatu." 
Judges20:32 Ababenyamiini ne bagamba nti: “Tubawangudde nga bwe twakola ku mirundi egyasooka.” Naye Abayisirayeli ne bagamba nti: “Tudduke, tubasikirize okwesuula ekibuga, badde mu nguudo.”" 
Judges20:33 Abayisirayeli bonna ne baseguka mu kifo kyabwe, ne basimba ennyiriri zaabwe e Baalitamari. Olwo Abayisirayeli abaateeze ne bafubutuka mu bifo byabwe ebugwanjuba wa Gibeya." 
Judges20:34 Abasajja lukumi abaalondebwa mu Yisirayeli yonna, ne balumba Gibeya. Ne balwana nnyo. Naye Ababenyamiini baali tebamanyi ng'akabi kabali kumpi." 
Judges20:35 Mukama n'awa Yisirayeli okuwangula Ababenyamiini ku lunaku olwo, Abayisirayeli ne batta abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano mu kikumi ku balwanyi Ababenyamiini." 
Judges20:36 Awo Ababenyamiini ne bamanya nga bawanguddwa. Abayisirayeli baasegulira Ababenyamiini, kubanga baali beesiga abateezi, be baateegesa ku Gibeya." 
Judges20:37 Abateezi bano badduka mangu, ne bazinda Gibeya, ne batta abaakirimu bonna." 
Judges20:38 Eggye ly'Abayisirayeli n'abateezi, baali balagaanye akabonero, nti abateezi bwe banaanyoosa omukka omungi mu kibuga," 
Judges20:39 Abayisirayeli abali mu ddwaniro nga bakyusa. Olwo Ababenyamiini baali bamaze okutta Abayisirayeli ng'amakumi asatu. ne bagambagana nti: “Tubawangudde, nga bwe twakola mu kulwanagana okwasooka.”" 
Judges20:40 Naye olwo akabonero ne kalabika. Ekire ky'omukka ekiri ng'empagi ne kinyooka okuva mu kibuga okutuuka ku ggulu. Ababenyamiini bwe baakyuka okutunula emabega, ne balaba ekibuga kyonna nga kiggya." 
Judges20:41 Awo Abayisirayeli ne bakyuka. Ababenyamiini ne bawuniikirira nga balaba akabi kabatuuseeko! 
Judges20:42 Awo ne bakuba Abayisirayeli amabega, baddukire mu kkubo eriraga mu ddungu, naye nga tebalina gye badda! Ne bakwatibwa wakati w'eggye ly'Abayisirayeli n'abateezi abaali bava mu kibuga, ne bazikirizibwa." 
Judges20:43 Abayisirayeli ne bazingiza Ababenyamiini enjuyi zonna, ne babawondera awatali kuweera, okutuusa mu kitundu eky'ebuvanjuba wa Gibeya, nga bagenda babatta." 
Judges20:44 Mu Babenyamiini ne mufaamu abalwanyi abazira omutwalo gumu mu kanaana. 
Judges20:45 Abalala ne bakyuka ne badduka nga badda awatangaavu, nga boolekedde Olwazi lwa Rimmoni. Enkumi ttaano ne battibwa ku luguudo. Abayisirayeli ne bongera okuwondera abaasigaddewo, okutuuka e Gidoma, ne babattamu enkumi bbiri." 
Judges20:46 Bwe batyo Ababenyamiini bonna abaafa ku lunaku olwo, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ttaano, bonna abo nga basajja bazira."
