2Kings15:22 Menahemu n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, mutabani we Pekahiya n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ataano nga Azariya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Pekahiya mutabani wa Menahemu n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli, n'afugira mu Samariya emyaka ebiri." 
2Kings15:24 N'akola ebibi n'anyiiza Mukama. N'atalekaayo kukola bibi ng'ebya Yerobowaamu mutabani wa Nebaati, ebyaleetera Yisirayeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:25 Awo omuduumizi w'eggye lye ayitibwa Peka, mutabani wa Remaaliya, n'akola olukwe n'abasajja amakumi ataano abaava e Gileyaadi, n'amufumitira e Samariya mu kigo ekigumu eky'okwerindiramu ekyomunda mu lubiri, n'amutta, wamu ne Arugobu, ne Ariye. N'afuuka kabaka mu kifo kye." 
2Kings15:26 N'ebirala byonna Pekahiya bye yakola, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi ataano mu ebiri nga Azariya, ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli, n'afugira mu Samariya emyaka amakumi abiri." 
2Kings15:28 N'akola ebibi n'anyiiza Mukama. N'atalekaayo kukola bibi ng'ebya Yerobowaamu mutabani wa Nebaati, ebyaleetera Yisirayeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:29 Mu mulembe gwa Peka, kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Tigulati Pileseri kabaka wa Assiriya, n'ajja n'awamba ebibuga Yijoni ne Abeli Beeti Maaka, ne Yanowa, ne Kedesi, ne Hazori, n'ebitundu by'e Gileyaadi, n'eby'e Galilaaya n'eby'e Nafutaali, abantu n'abatwala mu Assiriya nga basibe." 
2Kings15:30 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri nga Yotamu mutabani wa Azariya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Hoseya mutabani wa Ela, n'akola olukwe, n'afumita Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya, n'amutta, n'afuuka kabaka mu kifo kye." 
2Kings15:31 N'ebirala byonna Peka bye yakola, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli." 
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Peka mutabani Remaaliya ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Yotamu mutabani wa Azariya n'afuuka kabaka wa Buyudaaya," 
2Kings15:33 nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu ettaano, n'afugira emyaka kkumi na mukaaga mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina yali Yerusa, muwala wa Zaddooki." 
2Kings15:34 Yotamu n'akolanga ebirungi n'asanyusa Mukama nga Azariya kitaawe bye yakolanga. 
2Kings15:35 Kyokka ebifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu tebyaggyibwawo. Abantu ne bongera okuweerangayo ebitambiro n'okwoterezanga obubaane mu bifo ebyo. Yotamu n'azimba omulyango ogw'ekyengulu ogw'Essinzizo. 
2Kings15:36 N'ebirala byonna Yotamu bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya. 
2Kings15:37 Mu mulembe gwa Yotamu, Mukama mwe yatandikira okusindika Rezini kabaka wa Siriya ne Peka kabaka wa Yisirayeli era mutabani wa Remaaliya, ne balumba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:38 Awo Yotamu n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa mu masiro gaabwe mu Kibuga kya Dawudi jjajjaawe. Mutabani we Ahazi n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omusanvu nga Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Ahazi mutabani wa Yotamu, n'afuuka kabaka wa Buyudaaya" 
2Kings16:2 nga wa myaka amakumi abiri, n'afugira emyaka kkumi na mukaaga mu Yerusaalemu. N'atakola birungi ebisanyusa Mukama, Katonda we, nga jjajjaawe Dawudi bwe yakolanga." 
2Kings16:3 Kyokka n'agoberera empisa embi eza bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli, era n'ayokya ne mutabani we mu muliro ng'ekitambiro, nga bwe yali empisa eyenyinyalwa ab'amawanga amalala, Mukama be yagoba mu nsi eyo ng'Abayisirayeli banaatera okutuuka." 
2Kings16:4 N'awangayo ebitambiro, era n'anyookerezanga obubaane mu bifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, ne ku nsozi, ne wansi wa buli muti ogw'amakoola." 
2Kings16:5 Awo Rezini kabaka wa Siriya, ne Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya era kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ne bajja okulumba Yerusaalemu. Ne bazingiza Ahazi, kyokka ne batayinza kuwangula." 
2Kings16:6 Mu kiseera ekyo Rezini kabaka wa Siriya mwe yawangulira Elati, ne kiba kya Siriya, n'akigobamu Abayudaaya abaakirimu, Abassiriya ne babeera mu Elati n'okutuusa kati." 
2Kings16:7 Awo Ahazi n'atumira Tigulati Pileseri kabaka wa Assiriya ababaka ng'agamba nti: “Nze ndi muweereza wo era mwana wo. Jjangu omponye kabaka wa Siriya ne kabaka wa Yisirayeli abannumbye.” 
2Kings16:8 Awo Ahazi n'aggyayo ffeeza ne zaabu eyasangibwawo mu Ssinzizo ne mu ggwanika ly'olubiri lwa kabaka, n'amuweereza kabaka wa Assiriya, nga kye kirabo ky'amuwadde." 
2Kings16:9 Kabaka wa Assiriya n'akkiriza, n'alumba Ekibuga Damasiko, n'akiwamba, n'atta Kabaka Rezini, n'atwala abaayo e Kiri nga basibe." 
2Kings16:10 Awo kabaka Ahazi n'agenda e Damasiko okusisinkana Tigulati Peleseri kabaka wa Assiriya. Ahazi n'alaba alutaari eyali e Damasiko, n'aweereza Wuriya kabona ekifaananyi ky'alutaari eyo, ekiraga engeri yonna gye yakolebwamu." 
2Kings16:11 Wuriya kabona n'azimba alutaari ng'agoberera ebyo byonna Kabaka Ahazi bye yamuweereza ng'asinziira e Damasiko. Bw'atyo bwe yagikola, n'agimaliriza nga Kabaka Ahazi tannakomawo okuva e Damasiko." 
2Kings16:12 Kabaka bwe yakomawo ng'ava e Damasiko, n'alaba alutaari eyo, n'agisemberera, n'aweerayo ku yo ekitambiro." 
2Kings16:13 N'ayokerako ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiramba, n'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, n'ayiwako ekiweebwayo eky'ebyokunywa, n'amansirako omusaayi gw'ekiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
2Kings16:14 Alutaari ey'ekikomo eyali ewongeddwa Mukama yali wakati w'alutaari empya n'ennyumba eyoomunda mu Ssinzizo. Ahazi n'agiggyawo, n'agiteeka ku ludda olw'ebukiikakkono obw'alutaari empya." 
2Kings16:15 Awo Kabaka Ahazi n'alagira Wuriya Kabona nti: “Ku alutaari eno ennene kw'obanga oyokera ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke ekya buli kawungeezi, n'ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa nga kiramba, n'ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke ebya kabaka n'eby'abantu bonna mu ggwanga, n'ebiweebwayo byabwe eby'ebyokunywa. Era kw'onoomansiranga omusaayi gw'ensolo zonna ezitambiddwa. Naye alutaari ey'ekikomo eneebanga yange ya kwebuulizaako eri Mukama.”" 
2Kings16:16 Wuriya kabona n'akola byonna nga Kabaka Ahazi bwe yamulagira. 
2Kings16:17 Kabaka Ahazi n'asalako emigo ku bikondo ebyali bikozesebwa mu Ssinzizo, n'aggyamu ebbenseni ezaali ku byo. Era n'aggya ogutanka ogw'ekikomo ku bifaananyi by'ente ekkumi n'ebbiri eby'ekikomo n'aguteeka ku musingi ogw'amayinja amaaliire." 
2Kings16:18 Olukuubo olusereke olw'okuyitamu ku Sabbaato olwali luzimbiddwa munda w'olubiri, n'omulyango Kabaka gwe yayingirirangamu mu Ssinzizo, n'abiziba okusanyusa kabaka wa Assiriya." 
2Kings16:19 N'ebirala byonna Ahazi bye yakola, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa mu masiro gaabwe mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, mutabani we Heezeekiya n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri nga Ahazi ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Hoseya mutabani wa Ela n'afuuka kabaka wa Yisirayeli, n'afugira mu Samariya emyaka mwenda." 
2Kings17:2 N'akola ebibi n'anyiiza Mukama, kyokka n'atenkana bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli abaamusooka." 
2Kings17:3 Kabaka Salumaneseri owa Assiriya n'alumba Hoseya n'amulwanyisa mu lutalo, n'amuwangula, Hoseya n'awanga Salumaneseri omusolo." 
2Kings17:4 Naye kabaka oyo owa Assiriya, n'amanya olukwe lwa Hoseya olw'okujeema, nga Hoseya atumidde So, kabaka wa Misiri ababaka amuyambe, bw'atyo Hoseya n'atawa kabaka wa Assiriya musolo nga bwe yakolanga buli mwaka. Awo kabaka wa Assiriya n'akwata Hoseya n'amusiba mu kkomera." 
2Kings17:5 Awo kabaka wa Assiriya n'alumba ensi ya Yisirayeli, n'azingiza Ekibuga Samariya okumala emyaka esatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka ogw'omwenda nga Hoseya ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, kabaka wa Assiriya n'awamba Ekibuga Samariya, n'atwala ab'omu Yisirayeli mu Assiriya nga basibe, abamu n'abateeka mu Kibuga Hala, abalala mu Kitundu ky'e Gozani okumpi n'Omugga Habori, ne mu bibuga by'Abameedi." 
2Kings17:7 Ekyo kyabaawo, kubanga Abayisirayeli baakola ebibi ne banyiiza Mukama, Katonda waabwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri mu mikono gya kabaka waayo, ne basinzanga balubaale," 
2Kings17:8 ne bagoberera empisa z'ab'amawanga amalala, Mukama be yagoba mu nsi eyo nga bo Abayisirayeli banaatera okutuuka, era ne bakolera ku bulombolombo bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli bwe baateekawo." 
2Kings17:9 Abayisirayeli ne bakoleranga mu kyama ebintu ebitali birungi era ebitasanyusa Mukama, Katonda waabwe. Ne beezimbira ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizangamu mu bibuga byabwe byonna ebinene n'ebitono." 
2Kings17:10 Ne basimba ku buli lusozi oluwanvu, na buli wansi wa muti ogw'amakoola empagi z'amayinja n'ebifaananyi bya Asera, lubaale omukazi." 
2Kings17:11 Ne banyookerezanga obubaane mu bifo byonna ebigulumivu, ng'ab'amawanga amalala abo bwe baakolanga, Mukama be yaggyawo nga bo Abayisirayeli banaatera okutuuka. Ne bakolanga ebibi, ne basunguwaza Mukama," 
2Kings17:12 ne basinza ebyo ebitali Katonda, Mukama bye yabagamba nti: “Temuubisinzenga!”" 
2Kings17:13 Mukama n'alabulanga Yisirayeli ne Buyudaaya ng'ayita mu buli mulanzi ne mu buli mulabi, ng'agamba nti: “Mukyuke, mulekeeyo empisa zammwe embi, mukwate ebiragiro byange bye nabateerawo mu mateeka gange ge nawa bajjajjammwe nga mpita mu baweereza bange abalanzi.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kyokka ne batawulira, wabula ne bakakanyaza emitima gyabwe nga bajjajjaabwe abaagaana okwesiga Mukama, Katonda waabwe, bwe baakola." 
2Kings17:15 Ne bagaana okukwata amateeka ge, n'okukuuma endagaano gye yakola ne bajjajjaabwe, ne batafa ku kulabula kwe yabalabulamu. Ne basinza ebitagasa, nabo ne bafuuka ebitagasa, ne bagoberera empisa z'ab'amawanga agabeetoolodde, nga sso Mukama yabagaana okuyisa ng'ab'amawanga ago." 
2Kings17:16 Ne bava ku biragiro byonna ebya Mukama, Katonda waabwe, ne beekolera mu kyuma ekisaanuuse ebifaananyi bye banaasinzanga: ennyana bbiri, n'ekifaananyi kya lubaale omukazi, Asera. Ne basinzanga emmunyeenye zonna ez'oku ggulu, era ne baba baweereza ba Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Ne bawangayo abaana baabwe ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala ne baba ebitambiro ebyokebwa. Ne balagulwanga era ne bakolanga eby'obulogo, ne beeweerangayo ddala okukola ebibi, ne banyiiza Mukama." 
2Kings17:18 Mukama bw'atyo n'asunguwalira nnyo Abayisirayeli, n'abagoba mu maaso ge ne watasigalawo n'omu, okuggyako ab'omu Buyudaaya bokka." 
2Kings17:19 Naye n'ab'omu Buyudaaya ne batakwatanga biragiro bya Mukama, Katonda waabwe, wabula ne bagobereranga obulombolombo ab'omu Yisirayeli bwe beeteerawo." 
2Kings17:20 Mukama n'aboola Abayisirayeli bonna, n'ababonereza ng'abawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe, okutuusa lwe yabagoba mu maaso ge." 
2Kings17:21 Mukama bwe yayawula Yisirayeli ku b'ennyumba ya Dawudi, ab'omu Yisirayeli, Yerobowaamu mutabani wa Nebaati gwe baafuula kabaka waabwe. Yerobowaamu oyo, n'asigula ab'omu Yisirayeli okuva ku Mukama, bw'atyo n'abaleetera okukola ekibi ekinene." 
2Kings17:22 Ab'omu Yisirayeli ne bagoberera Yerobowaamu, ne bongera okukolanga ebibi byonna Yerobowaamu bye yakola," 
2Kings17:23 okutuusa Mukama lwe yabaggya mu maaso ge nga bwe yabalabula ng'ayita mu baweereza be bonna abalanzi. Awo ab'omu Yisirayeli ne baggyibwa mu nsi yaabwe, ne batwalibwa mu Assiriya gye bakyali ne leero." 
2Kings17:24 Awo kabaka wa Assiriya n'asengula abantu okubaggya mu bibuga Babilooni, ne Kuuti, ne Avva, ne Hamati, ne Sefarivayimu, n'abasenza mu bibuga bya Samariya, mu kifo ky'Abayisirayeli. Abantu abo ne beefuga ensi y'e Samariya, ne babeera mu bibuga byayo." 
2Kings17:25 Bwe baali baakatandika okubeeramu, tebassaamu Mukama kitiibwa, Mukama kyeyava abasindikira empologoma ne zibattamu abamu." 
2Kings17:26 Ne wabaawo abaabuulira kabaka wa Assiriya nti: “Abantu be watwala n'obasenza mu bibuga by'e Samariya, tebamanyi mateeka ga lubaale wa mu nsi eyo, lubaale oya kyeyava asindika empologoma, era ziri eri zibatta.”" 
2Kings17:27 Awo kabaka wa Assiriya n'alagira nti: “Mutwaleeyo omu ku bakabona be mwaggyayo agende abeere eyo, abayigirize amateeka ga lubaale w'omu nsi eyo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Awo omu ku bakabona be baggya mu Samariya, n'agenda n'abeera e Beteli, n'abayigirizanga bwe basaanye okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa." 
2Kings17:29 Naye abantu aba buli ggwanga, mu bibuga byabwe mwe baabeeranga, ne bongera okwekoleranga ebifaananyi bya balubaale baabwe, ne babiteeka mu nfo ez'okusinzizangamu, Abayisirayeli ze baaleka bakoze." 
2Kings17:30 Abantu abaava e Babilooni ne bakola ebifaananyi bya lubaale Sukkoti Benooti, abaava e Kuusi ne bakola ebya lubaale Nerugali, abaava e Hamati ne bakola ebya lubaale Asima;" 
2Kings17:31 abaava mu Avva ne bakola ebya balubaale Nibuhazi ne Tarutaaki. Abantu abaava e Sefarivayimu ne batambiriranga balubaale baabwe, Adurammeleki ne Anammeleki, abaana baabwe nga babookya mu muliro." 
2Kings17:32 Abantu bano, ne Mukama baamusinzanga, era ne beerondangamu mu bo bennyini bakabona abaabaweerangayo ebitambiro mu nfo zaabwe ez'okusinzizangamu, mu bifo ebigulumivu." 
2Kings17:33 Bwe batyo ne bassangamu Mukama ekitiibwa, naye era ne babanga baweereza ba balubaale baabwe, nga bagoberera obulombolombo bw'ensi mwe baava." 
2Kings17:34 Ne leero bakyakola nga bwe baakolanga edda. Tebassaamu Mukama kitiibwa era tebakwata byabalagirwa n'ebyabakuutirwa, wadde okugondera amateeka n'ebiragiro Mukama bye yawa ab'ezzadde lya Yakobo gwe yatuuma Yisirayeli." 
2Kings17:35 Mukama yakola nabo endagaano, n'abakuutira ng'agamba nti: “Temuusinzenga balubaale, temuubavuunamirenga, era temuubenga baweereza baabwe, wadde okuwangayo ekitambiro eri balubaale abo." 
2Kings17:36 Naye munaasinzanga Nze Mukama, eyabaggya mu nsi ye Misiri, nga nkozesa amaanyi amangi n'obuyinza obungi. Nze gwe munaavuunamiranga, era Nze gwe munaawanga ebitambiro." 
2Kings17:37 Amateeka gonna n'ebiragiro bye nabawandiikira, munassangayo omwoyo okubikwatanga ennaku zonna. Temuusinzenga balubaale." 
2Kings17:38 Endagaano gye nkoze nammwe, temugyerabiranga, era temuusinzenga balubaale." 
2Kings17:39 Naye Nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, Nze mubanga musinza, era Nze nnaabawonyanga abalabe bammwe bonna.”" 
2Kings17:40 Naye abantu abo ne batawulira, wabula ne basigala nga bakyagoberera empisa zaabwe ez'edda." 
2Kings17:41 Kale abantu ab'amawanga ago ne basinzanga Mukama, kyokka era ne basinzanga n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale baabwe ebyole. N'abaana baabwe nabo bwe batyo bwe baakolanga, era ne bazzukulu baabwe bwe bakyakola n'okutuusa kati." 
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka ogwokusatu nga Hoseya mutabani wa Ela ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Heezeekiya mutabani wa Ahazi n'afuuka kabaka wa Buyudaaya," 
2Kings18:2 nga wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano, n'afugira emyaka amakumi abiri mu mwenda mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Abiya, muwala wa Zekariya." 
2Kings18:3 N'akolanga ebirungi ebisanyusa Mukama, ng'ebyo byonna Dawudi jjajjaawe bye yakolanga." 
2Kings18:4 N'aggyawo ebifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, n'ayasaayasa empagi ez'amayinja, n'amenyaamenya ebifaananyi bya lubaale omukazi Asera. N'amenyaamenya omusota ogw'ekikomo Musa gwe yakola, kubanga n'okutuusa mu biro ebyo, Abayisirayeli baali bagunyookeza obubaane. N'aguyita kikomo bukomo." 
2Kings18:5 Heezeekiya yeesiga Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ne wataba n'omu amwenkana mu bakabaka bonna aba Buyudaaya abaamusooka n'abaamuddirira." 
2Kings18:6 Yanywerera ku Mukama, n'atamuvaako n'akatono, era n'akwata ebiragiro Mukama bye yalagira Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Mukama n'abeeranga naye, n'abanga wa mukisa mu byonna bye yakolanga. N'ajeemera kabaka wa Assiriya, n'agaana okumugonderanga." 
2Kings18:8 N'awangula Abafilistiya okubatuusa e Gaaza n'ebitundu ebikyetoolodde nga mw'otwalidde ebibuga ebinene n'ebitono. 
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ogw'obufuzi bwa Heezeekiya, gwe mwaka ogw'omusanvu nga Hoseya mutabani wa Ela ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, Salumaneseri kabaka wa Assiriya n'alumba Ekibuga Samariya, n'akizingiza." 
2Kings18:10 Emyaka esatu bwe gyayitawo nga kizingiziddwa, ne kiwangulwa, gwe gwali omwaka ogw'omukaaga ogw'obufuzi bwa Heezeekiya, ate nga gwe gw'omwenda ogw'obufuzi bwa Hoseya, kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
2Kings18:11 Kabaka wa Assiriya n'atwala ab'omu Yisirayeli mu Assiriya, abamu n'abatwala mu Kibuga Hala, abalala mu kitundu ky'e Gozani okumpi n'Omugga Habori, n'abalala mu bibuga by'Abameedi." 
2Kings18:12 Samariya kyawangulwa kubanga ab'omu Yisirayeli tebaagondera Mukama, Katonda waabwe, wabula baamenya endagaano gye yakola nabo, ne bajeemera byonna Musa omuweereza we bye yalagira, ne batakkiriza kubiwuliriza, wadde okubituukiriza." 
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ena ogw'obufuzi bwa kabaka Heezeekiya, Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assiriya n'alumba ebibuga byonna ebya Buyudaaya ebiriko ebigo ebigumu, n'abiwangula." 
2Kings18:14 Awo Heezeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya n'atumira kabaka wa Assiriya eyali e Lakisi mu kiseera ekyo. Mu bubaka bwe, n'agamba nti: “Nnyonoonye. Ddayo oleme kunnumba. By'ononsalira, nnaabiwa.” Kabaka wa Assiriya n'asalira Heezeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya ffeeza talanta ebikumi bisatu, ne zaabu talanta amakumi asatu." 
2Kings18:15 Heezeekiya n'amuwa ffeeza yenna eyali mu Ssinzizo, ne mu ggwanika ly'olubiri lwa kabaka." 
2Kings18:16 Mu kiseera ekyo, Heezeekiya n'abembula ne zaabu ku nzigi z'Essinzizo, ne ku mpagi zaamu, ye yennyini kabaka Heezeekiya gwe yali abisseeko, n'amuwa kabaka wa Assiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Awo kabaka wa Assiriya ng'ali e Lakisi, n'asindika eggye ddene okulumba Heezeekiya e Yerusaalemu. Lyali likulirwa abakungu be basatu ab'oku ntikko. Bwe baatuuka e Yerusaalemu, ne bayimirira ku mukutu oguleeta amazzi okuva mu kidiba eky'ekyengulu, ekiri ku luguudo olugenda ku ggyolezo ly'engoye." 
2Kings18:18 Awo ne batumya kabaka. Abakungu ne bagenda okubasisinkana: Eliyakimu, mutabani wa Hilukiya, eyali alabirira olubiri; Sebuna, omuwandiisi mu lubiri; ne Yoowa, mutabani wa Asafu, eyali omukuumi w'ebiwandiiko." 
2Kings18:19 Omu ku bakungu Abassiriya n'abagamba nti: “Mugambe Heezeekiya nti: ‘Kabaka omukulu, kabaka wa Assiriya, akubuuza nti, kiki kye weesiga?" 
2Kings18:20 Okwogera obwogezi kwe kunadda mu kifo ky'amagezi n'amaanyi ag'okulwana olutalo? Ani kale gwe weesiga n'okutuuka n'okunjeemera? 
2Kings18:21 Laba Misiri gwe weesiga, lwe lumuli olwatifu, olufumita ekibatu ky'oyo alwesimbaggirizaako ng'omuggo. Bw'atyo Kabaka w'e Misiri bw'ali ku bonna abamwesiga.’" 
2Kings18:22 “Naye bwe muŋŋamba nti: ‘Twesiga Mukama, Katonda waffe.’ Mukama si ye wuuyo Heezeekiya gw'aggyiddewo ebifo bye ebigulumivu bye bamusinzizaamu, era ne zaalutaari ze, Heezeekiya oyo n'agamba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ne mu Yerusaalemu nti: ‘Munaasinzizanga mu maaso ga alutaari y'omu Yerusaalemu yokka?’" 
2Kings18:23 Kale kaakano ka mbasoomoze ku lwa mukama wange kabaka wa Assiriya: nja kukuwa embalaasi enkumi bbiri, ggwe bw'onooyinza okuzuulayo abazeebagala." 
2Kings18:24 Ggwe atasobola kwaŋŋanga wadde omu ku bakungu asembayo obuto mu ggye lya mukama wange, ne weesiga Misiri olw'amagaali n'abeebagala embalaasi!" 
2Kings18:25 Olowooza nga nalumba ekifo kino okukizikiriza nga Mukama si ye annyamba? Mukama yennyini ye yaŋŋamba nti: ‘Lumba ensi eyo ogizikirize.’ ” 
2Kings18:26 Awo Eliyakimu mutabani wa Hilukiya, ne Sebuna, ne Yoowa, ne bagamba omukungu Omussiriya nti: “Tukwegayiridde, yogera naffe mu lulimi Olwaramayika, kubanga tulutegeera, naye toyogera naffe mu Lwebureeyi ng'abantu abali ku kisenge bawulira.”" 
2Kings18:27 Omukungu Omussiriya n'addamu nti: “Mulowooza nga mukama wange yantuma kubuulira mukama wammwe nammwe mwekka ebigambo bino? Yantuma kubuulira n'abasajja abatuula ku ntikko y'ekigo, abanaatuuka n'okulya empitambi yaabwe n'okunywa omusulo gwabwe nga mmwe.”" 
2Kings18:28 Awo omukungu oyo n'ayimirira, n'alangirira mu lulimi lw'Abayudaaya n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Muwulire kabaka omukulu kabaka wa Assiriya ky'abagamba." 
2Kings18:29 Abalabula nti Heezeekiya aleme kubalimbalimba, kubanga tayinza kubawonya mmwe kubaggya mu mikono gyange." 
2Kings18:30 Era aleme kubasendasenda kwesiga Mukama, ng'agamba nti: ‘Mukama ajja kutuwonya, n'ekibuga kino tekiiweebweyo mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assiriya.’" 
2Kings18:31 Temuwuliriza Heezeekiya, kubanga kabaka wa Assiriya agamba nti: ‘Mutabagane nange, mufulume mweweeyo gye ndi.’ Olwo buli omu anaalya ku bibala by'emizabbibu gye, n'eby'emitiini gye, era munaanywa amazzi ag'omu nzizi zammwe," 
2Kings18:32 okutuusa lwe ndijja ne mbatwala mu nsi efaanana ensi yammwe, ensi erimu eŋŋaano n'omwenge, ensi erimu emigaati n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu, ensi erimu omuzigo gw'emizayiti n'omubisi gw'enjuki, mube balamu muleme kufa. Naye temuwuliriza Heezeekiya abaguyaaguya ng'agamba nti: ‘Mukama ajja kutuwonya!’" 
2Kings18:33 Waliwo lubaale n'omu mu balubaale b'amawanga eyali asobodde okuwonya ensi ye n'agiggya mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assiriya? 
2Kings18:34 Bali ludda wa balubaale b'e Hamati ne Arupaadi? Bali ludda wa balubaale b'e Sefarivayimu, wadde ab'e Hena, n'ab'e Yivva? Baawonya Samariya ne bakiggya mu mikono gyange?" 
2Kings18:35 Baani ku balubaale bonna ab'ensi abaali bawonyezza ensi yaabwe okugiggya mu mikono gyange, Mukama alyoke asobole okuwonya Yerusaalemu akiggye mu mikono gyange?”" 
2Kings18:36 Naye abantu ne basirika ne batamuddamu kigambo kubanga kabaka yali abalagidde nti: “Temubaako kye mumuddamu.” 
2Kings18:37 Awo Eliyakimu mutabani wa Hilukiya era eyali alabirira olubiri, ne Sebuna omuwandiisi, ne Yoowa mutabani wa Asafu era eyali omukuumi w'ebiwandiiko ebitongole, ne bajja eri Heezeekiya nga bayuzizza ebyambalo byabwe olw'okunakuwala, ne bamubuulira ebigambo omukungu wa Assiriya by'ayogedde." 
2Kings19:1 Awo Kabaka Heezeekiya bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye olw'okunakuwala, n'ayambala ebikutiya, n'ayingira mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings19:2 N'atuma Eliyakimu eyali alabirira olubiri lwa kabaka, ne Sebuna omuwandiisi, n'abamu ku bakabona abakulu, eri Yisaaya omulanzi, mutabani wa Amozi." 
2Kings19:3 Ne bamugamba nti: “Heezeekiya agamba nti: ‘Olunaku luno, lunaku lwa kubonaabona. Tubonerezeddwa era tuswaziddwa. Tuli ng'omukazi atuusizza okuzaala, sso nga talina maanyi ga kuzaala." 
2Kings19:4 Kabaka wa Assiriya atumye omukungu we omukulu okujerega Katonda Nnannyinibulamu. Oboolyawo Mukama, Katonda wo, anassaayo omwoyo ku bigambo byonna omukungu oyo by'ayogedde, n'amukangavvula olw'ebigambo ebyo, Ye Mukama Katonda by'awulidde.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Abakungu ba Kabaka Heezeekiya bwe baatuusa obubaka bwe eri Yisaaya," 
2Kings19:6 Yisaaya n'abagamba bagende bagambe mukama waabwe nti: Mugende mugambe mukama wammwe nti: “Mukama agamba nti: ‘Totya bigambo by'owulidde, abakungu ba kabaka w'e Assiriya bye boogedde nga banzivoola." 
2Kings19:7 Laba, nja kumukyusa omutima. Ajja kuwulira olugambo, addeyo mu nsi ye, era Nze nja kumuleetera okuttirwayo.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Awo omukungu oyo Omussiriya n'awulira nga kabaka w'ewaabwe avudde e Lakisi, era ng'alwanyisa ab'omu Kibuga Libuna, n'agenda gy'ali." 
2Kings19:9 Kabaka wa Assiriya bwe baamubuulira nti: “Tiraka kabaka w'e Etiyopiya wuuli asitudde eggye okukulwanyisa,” n'addamu okutumira Heezeekiya ng'agamba nti:" 
2Kings19:10 “Mugende mugambe Heezeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya nti: ‘Katonda wo gwe weesiga takulimbanga ng'agamba nti Yerusaalemu tekirigabulwa mu mikono gya kabaka w'e Assiriya. 
2Kings19:11 Ndowooza wawulira bakabaka b'e Assiriya kye baakola ensi zonna, ze baasalawo okuzikiririza ddala. Ggwe onoowona?" 
2Kings19:12 Bajjajjange baazikiriza ebibuga Gozani, ne Harani, ne Rezefu, ne batta Abeedeni abaali mu Telassaari. Waliwo ku balubaale baabwe eyasobola okubawonya?" 
2Kings19:13 Bakabaka bali ludda wa ab'omu bibuga Hamati ne Arupaadi, ne Sefarivayimu, wadde ow'e Hera n'ow'e Yivva?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Awo Heezeekiya n'aggya ebbaluwa ku babaka, n'agisoma. N'ayambuka mu Ssinzizo, n'agyanjuluza mu maaso ga Mukama," 
2Kings19:15 n'asaba Mukama ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, atuula ku bakerubi, Ggwe Katonda wekka. Ggwe wekka Ggwe ofuga obwakabaka bwonna ku nsi. Ggwe watonda eggulu n'ensi." 
2Kings19:16 Kaakano ayi Mukama, laba ebitutuuseeko. Wulira ebigambo ebyo, Sennakeribu by'aweerezza okukuvuma Ggwe Katonda Nnannyinibulamu." 
2Kings19:17 Kyo kituufu, ayi Mukama, bakabaka ba Assiriya baazikiriza amawanga mangi, ensi zaago ne bazifuula matongo." 
2Kings19:18 Baayokya balubaale baago, ddala abatali Katonda, wabula ebifaananyi eby'emiti n'eby'amayinja, abantu bye baakola n'emikono gyabwe, kyebaava babazikiriza." 
2Kings19:19 Kale nno, ayi Mukama, Katonda waffe, ggwe tuwonye otuggye mu mikono gy'Abassiriya, ab'amawanga gonna ku nsi balyoke bamanye nga Ggwe, ayi Mukama, Ggwe Katonda wekka.”" 
2Kings19:20 Awo Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi n'atumira Heezeekiya ng'agamba nti: “Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Mpulidde by'onsabye ebikwata ku Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assiriya." 
2Kings19:21 Kino nze Mukama kye ŋŋamba ku ye nti: Ekibuga Siyooni kikunyoomye ggwe, Sennakeribu, era kikusekeredde! Ekibuga Yerusaalemu kikukongodde!" 
2Kings19:22 Olowooza ani gw'ojereze, gw'ovvodde? Ani gw'oboggoledde era gw'oziimudde? Ye nze, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
2Kings19:23 Otumye ababaka bo okunneewaanirako nga bwe wakozesa amagaali go, n'owangula entikko z'ensozi z'e Lebanooni. Weewaanye nti eyo watemayo emivule egisinga obuwanvu, n'emiberosi egisinga obulungi, era nti wasenserera ddala mu bitundu by'ebibira ebisingayo okuba ebikwafu." 
2Kings19:24 Weetenze bwe wasima enzizi, n'onywa amazzi mu nsi ez'ebunaayira, era nti ebigere by'abaserikale bo byakaza emigga gyonna egy'e Misiri." 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Tewakiwulirako nti nze nategeka ebyo byonna edda? Era kaakano mbituukirizza. Nakuwa obuyinza, ebibuga ebiriko ebigo ebigumu okubifuula entuumu z'ebisasiro." 
2Kings19:26 Abaabirimu kyebaava baggwaamu amaanyi, ne batekemuka, ne bakeŋŋentererwa, ne baba ng'essubi ery'omu ttale, era ng'omuddo ogumeze waggulu ku nnyumba, era ng'eŋŋaano ekaze nga tennakula." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Naye mmanyi byonna ebikufaako, ne by'okola, era ne gy'ogenda. Era mmanyi ne bw'ondalukirako." 
2Kings19:28 Mmaze okuwulira eddalu lyo, n'okwekulumbaza kwo. Kaakano nja kuteeka eddobo lyange mu nnyindo zo, n'olukoba lwange mu kamwa ko, nkuddizeeyo mu kkubo lye wayitamu ng'ojja.’ ”" 
2Kings19:29 Awo Yisaaya n'agamba Kabaka Heezeekiya nti: “Kano ke kanaaba akabonero akakulaga ebinaabaawo: mu mwaka guno, ne mu mwaka ogujja, mujja kulya mmere ya kyemeza. Naye mu mwaka oguddako, mulisiga emmere yammwe ne mugikungula. Mulisimba ennimiro z'emizabbibu, ne mulya ebibala byamu." 
2Kings19:30 Abo abaliwonawo mu Buyudaaya, balyanya ng'ebimera ebisimba emirandira gyabyo wansi mu ttaka, ne bibala ebibala waggulu." 
2Kings19:31 Wajja kubaawo abamu abawonawo mu Yerusaalemu ne ku Lusozi Siyooni. Mukama Nnannyinimagye amaliridde ekyo okukituukiriza. 
2Kings19:32 “Bino Mukama by'agamba ku kabaka wa Assiriya: ‘Tajja kuyingira mu kibuga kino, wadde okulasaayo akasaale. Tajja kukirumba na ngabo, wadde okutuuma entuumu z'ettaka okukyetooloola." 
2Kings19:33 Mu kkubo mwe yayita ng'ajja, era mw'aliddirayo, nga tayingidde mu kibuga kino. Nze Mukama, njogedde." 
2Kings19:34 Nja kutaasa ekibuga kino, nkikuume, olw'ekitiibwa kyange, n'olw'ebyo bye nasuubiza omuweereza wange Dawudi.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Awo olwatuuka, mu kiro ekyo, malayika wa Mukama n'agenda n'atta mu lusiisira lw'Abassiriya abaserikale emitwalo kkumi na munaana mu enkumi ttaano. Enkeera ku makya, abo bonna nga bafu ba jjo!" 
2Kings19:36 Awo Sennakeribu kabaka wa Assiriya ne yeemulula n'agenda, n'addayo mu Kibuga Nineeve, n'abeera eyo." 
2Kings19:37 Lumu bwe yali mu ssabo ng'asinza lubaale we Nisirooki, batabani be Adurammeleki ne Sarezeeri ne bamutta n'ebitala, ne baddukira mu nsi y'e Ararati, mutabani we Esaraddoni n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings20:1 Awo mu biseera ebyo, Heezeekiya n'alwala nnyo kumpi kufa. Omulanzi Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi n'agendayo okumulaba, n'amugamba nti: “Teekateeka eby'omu maka go, kubanga ogenda kufa, tojja kuwona.”" 
2Kings20:2 Awo Heezeekiya n'akyuka n'atunula ku kisenge, ne yeegayirira Mukama ng'agamba nti:" 
2Kings20:3 “Ayi Mukama, nkwegayiridde, jjukira bwe mbadde omwesigwa mu maaso go, nga nkugondera n'omutima gwange gwonna, era nga mbadde nfuba bulijjo okutuukiriza by'osiima!” Heezeekiya n'akaaba nnyo amaziga." 
2Kings20:4 Awo Yisaaya bwe yali tannayita na mu luggya olwawakati, Mukama n'amugamba nti:" 
2Kings20:5 “Ddayo ogambe Heezeekiya omukulembeze w'abantu bange nti: ‘Mukama, Katonda wa Dawudi jjajjaawo agamba nti: Mpulidde ky'osabye, era ndabye amaziga go. Kale nja kukuwonya. Ku lunaku olwokusatu ojja kuyingira mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings20:6 Ndyongera emyaka kkumi n'etaano ku bulamu bwo era ndikuwonya, ne nkuggya ggwe n'ekibuga kino Yerusaalemu mu mikono gya kabaka wa Assiriya. Ndirwanirira ekibuga kino olw'ekitiibwa kyange n'olw'ebyo bye nasuubiza omuweereza wange Dawudi.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Awo Yisaaya n'agamba nti: “Muleete ebibala by'omutiini ebisekule.” Ne babireeta, ne babiteeka ku jjute lya Heezeekiya, Heezeekiya n'assuuka." 
2Kings20:8 Awo Heezeekiya n'abuuza Yisaaya nti: “Kabonero ki akakakasa nga Mukama anamponya, era nga ku lunaku olwokusatu, nja kusobola okugenda nnyingire mu Ssinzizo?”" 
2Kings20:9 Yisaaya n'addamu nti: “Mukama ajja kukuwa akabonero akakakasa ng'ajja kutuukiriza ekyo ky'agambye. Kale oyagala ekisiikirize kigende mu maaso, oba kidde emabega amadaala kkumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Heezeekiya n'addamu nti: “Kiba kyangu ekisiikirize okukka amadaala ekkumi mu maaso gye kibadde kigenda. Ekyo nedda, naye ekisiikirize leka kidde emabega amadaala kkumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Yisaaya omulanzi ne yeegayirira Mukama, Mukama n'azzaayo ekisiikirize emabega ebbanga ery'amadaala ekkumi ge kyali kigenze mu maaso ku madaala Kabaka Ahazi ge yakola." 
2Kings20:12 Mu nnaku ezo, kabaka wa Babilooniya Merodaki Baladani, mutabani wa Baladani, n'awulira nga Heezeekiya bwe yali alwadde. N'amuwandiikirayo ebbaluwa n'agimuweereza wamu n'ekirabo." 
2Kings20:13 Heezeekiya n'ayaniriza abaabireeta, n'abalaga ebyobugagga bwe byonna mu nnyumba ye ey'eggwanika: ffeeza ne zaabu, n'ebyakaloosa, n'omuzigo ogw'omuwendo ennyo, n'ennyumba mw'atereka ebyokulwanyisa bye, na byonna ebyali mu mawanika ge. Tewali kintu na kimu mu lubiri lwe, wadde mu bwakabaka bwe bwonna ky'ataabalaga." 
2Kings20:14 Awo Yisaaya omulanzi n'ajja eri Kabaka Heezeekiya, n'amubuuza nti: “Abasajja bano bagambye ki, era bavudde wa okujja gy'oli?” Heezeekiya n'addamu nti: “Bava mu nsi ey'ewala, ey'e Babilooniya.”" 
2Kings20:15 Era n'abuuza nti: “Balabye ki mu lubiri lwo?” Heezeekiya n'addamu nti: “Byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwange babirabye. Tewali kintu na kimu ku byobugagga bwange kye sibalaze.” 
2Kings20:16 Yisaaya n'agamba Heezeekiya nti: “Wulira Mukama ky'agamba: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Manya ng'ekiseera kijja kutuuka, byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwo, n'ebyo bajjajjaabo bye baatereka okutuusa kati, bitwalibwe e Babilooniya. Tewaliba na kimu kirisigala." 
2Kings20:18 N'abamu ku b'ezzadde lyo abasibukira ddala mu ggwe, balitwalibwa ne balaayibwa okuweereza mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Babilooniya.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Awo Heezeekiya n'agamba Yisaaya nti: “Ekigambo kya Mukama ky'oyogedde, kirungi.” Kubanga yagamba nti: “Ate si kirungi, oba nga walibaawo emirembe n'obutebenkevu mu kiseera kyange?”" 
2Kings20:20 N'ebirala byonna Heezeekiya bye yakola, omuli n'ebikolwa bye eby'obuzira, wamu n'ebyo ebinyumya nga bwe yasima ekidiba era n'omukutu, n'aleeta amazzi mu kibuga, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings20:21 Awo Heezeekiya n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, mutabani we Manasse n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings21:1 Manasse yali wa myaka kkumi n'ebiri we yafuukira kabaka, n'afugira emyaka amakumi ataano mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Hefuziba." 
2Kings21:2 N'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama, ng'agoberera empisa embi ddala ez'ab'amawanga amalala Mukama be yagoba mu nsi eyo ng'Abayisirayeli banaatera okutuuka." 
2Kings21:3 Kubanga Manasse yazimba buggya ebifo ebigulumivu bye basinzizaamu, Heezeekiya kitaawe bye yali azikirizza. N'ateerawo Baali zaalutaari, n'akola ekifaananyi kya lubaale omukazi Asera, nga Ahabu kabaka wa Yisirayeli bwe yakola. N'asinza byonna ebyakira ku ggulu, n'aba muweereza waabyo." 
2Kings21:4 N'azimba zaalutaari mu Ssinzizo, Mukama lye yayogerako nti: “Mu Yerusaalemu mwe banansinzizanga.”" 
2Kings21:5 Era n'azimbira ebyakira ku ggulu byonna zaalutaari mu mpya ebbiri ez'Essinzizo. 
2Kings21:6 Era n'ayokya mutabani we ng'ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Ne yeebuuzanga ku mmandwa ne ku basamize, n'akola eby'obulogo. N'akolagana n'abo abayita emizimu era n'abalogo." 
2Kings21:7 Ekifaananyi kya lubaale omukazi Asera kye yakola, n'akiteeka mu Ssinzizo, Essinzizo Mukama lye yagamba Dawudi ne Solomooni mutabani we nti: “Mu Ssinzizo lino ne mu Yerusaalemu, ekibuga kye nneeroboza mu bibuga by'Ebika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, mwe baba bansinzizanga ennaku zonna." 
2Kings21:8 Era siriddamu kuggya Bayisirayeli mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjaabwe, bwe banassangayo omwoyo okukola byonna bye mbalagidde, n'okukuuma amateeka gonna n'ebiragiro n'obulombolombo bye nabawa nga mbiyisa mu Musa omuweereza wange.”" 
2Kings21:9 Manasse n'awabya ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, ne bakola ebibi okusinga n'ab'amawanga Mukama ge yazikiriza ng'Abayisirayeli banaatera okutuuka mu nsi eyo." 
2Kings21:10 Awo Mukama ng'ayita mu baweereza be abalanzi, n'agamba nti:" 
2Kings21:11 “Manasse kabaka wa Buyudaaya akoze ebyenyinyalwa ebyo, era akoze ebibi ebisinga byonna Abaamori abaamusooka bye baakola, n'aleetera n'ab'omu Buyudaaya okwonoona nga basinza ebifaananyi bye yateekawo." 
2Kings21:12 N'olwekyo nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ŋŋamba nti: ‘Kale nja kuleeta akabi ku Yerusaalemu ne ku Buyudaaya, buli anaakawulirangako, amatu ge gawaawaalenga." 
2Kings21:13 Ndibonereza Yerusaalemu nga bwe nabonereza Samariya, era nga bwe nabonereza Ahabu kabaka wa Yisirayeli n'ab'ezzadde lye. Ndisaanyaawo abantu mu Yerusaalemu, ng'omuntu bw'asiimuula essowaani: bw'amala okugisiimuula, n'agivuunika." 
2Kings21:14 Ndyabulira abantu bange abaliwonawo, ne mbawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe babayigge ng'ensolo, babakwate era babafuule omunyago gwabwe." 
2Kings21:15 Ndikola ekyo, kubanga abantu bange bakoze bye sisiima, ne bansunguwaza okuviira ddala ku lunaku bajjajjaabwe lwe baaviirako mu Misiri n'okutuusa kati.’" 
2Kings21:16 “N'ekirala, Manasse yatta abantu bangi nnyo, n'ajjuza Yerusaalemu omusaayi gw'abatalina musango. Okwo n'ayongerako ekibi kye eky'okuleetera ab'omu Buyudaaya okukola ebitasiimibwa Mukama.”" 
2Kings21:17 N'ebirala byonna Manasse bye yakola omuli n'okwonoona kwe, kwe yayonoonamu, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings21:18 Manasse n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, n'aziikibwa mu nnimiro y'omu lubiri, ennimiro ya Wuzza, mutabani we Amoni n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu ebiri we yafuukira kabaka wa Buyudaaya, n'afugira emyaka ebiri mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Mesullemeti, muwala wa Haruuzi, ow'e Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 N'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama, nga Manasse kitaawe bye yakola." 
2Kings21:21 N'agoberera empisa za kitaawe: n'asinzanga ebifaananyi kitaawe bye yasinzanga, n'abivuunamiranga." 
2Kings21:22 Ne yeggya ku Mukama, Katonda wa bajjajjaabe, n'atakwata biragiro bya Mukama." 
2Kings21:23 Abakungu be ne bamukolera olukwe, ne bamutemulira mu lubiri lwe." 
2Kings21:24 Kyokka abantu ab'omu nsi eyo ne batta bonna abaakolera Kabaka Amoni olukwe, ne bateekako mutabani we Yosiya okumusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings21:25 N'ebirala byonna Amoni bye yakola, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings21:26 Amoni n'aziikibwa mu ntaana ye mu nnimiro ya Wuzza, mutabani we Yosiya n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yali wa myaka munaana we yafuukira kabaka wa Buyudaaya, n'afugira emyaka amakumi asatu mu gumu mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Yedida, muwala wa Adaya ow'e Bozukati." 
2Kings22:2 Yosiya n'akolanga ebyo Mukama by'asiima n'aba n'empisa ng'eza Dawudi jjajjaawe, n'atakyukakyuka kudda eno n'eri." 
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana ogw'obufuzi bwa Yosiya, kabaka oyo Yosiya n'atuma omuwandiisi we Saafani, mutabani wa Azaliya era muzzukulu wa Mesullamu, agende mu Ssinzizo, ng'amulagidde nti:" 
2Kings22:4 “Genda eri Ssaabakabona Hilukiya, omugambe abale ensimbi ezireeteddwa mu Ssinzizo, abagguzi ze baakasolooza ku bantu." 
2Kings22:5 Baziwe abasajja abalabirira omulimu gw'okuddaabiriza Essinzizo," 
2Kings22:6 basasule ababazzi n'abazimbi, n'abakomozi b'amayinja, era bagule embaawo n'amayinja amakomole okuddaabiriza Essinzizo." 
2Kings22:7 Naye ensimbi ezibakwasiddwa, tekyetaagisa kuzibalirira muwendo, kubanga bakola na bwesigwa.”" 
2Kings22:8 Awo Hilukiya Ssaabakabona n'agamba Saafani omuwandiisi nti: “Nzudde Ekitabo ky'Amateeka mu Ssinzizo.” Awo n'akiwa Saafani n'akisoma. 
2Kings22:9 Saafani omuwandiisi n'addayo eri kabaka, n'amutegeeza nti: “Abaweereza bo baggyeeyo ensimbi zonna ezisangiddwa mu Ssinzizo ne bazikwasa abasajja abakola omulimu ogw'okuddaabiriza.”" 
2Kings22:10 Awo Saafani omuwandiisi n'agamba kabaka nti: “Hilukiya kabona ampadde ekitabo.” N'akisomeramu kabaka. 
2Kings22:11 Awo kabaka bwe yawulira ebigambo eby'omu Kitabo ky'Amateeka, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye olw'okunakuwala." 
2Kings22:12 N'alagira Hilukiya kabona, ne Ahikaamu mutabani wa Saafani, ne Akuboori mutabani wa Mikaaya, ne Saafani omuwandiisi, ne Asaya omuweereza wa kabaka ow'oku lusegere, ng'abagamba nti:" 
2Kings22:13 “Mugende mubuuze Mukama ku lwange ne ku lw'abantu bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya, ebifa ku bigambo eby'omu kitabo kino ekizuuliddwa. Mukama atusunguwalidde nnyo, kubanga bajjajjaffe tebaagondera bigambo biri mu kitabo kino, byonna ebyatuwandiikirwa tubikole.”" 
2Kings22:14 Awo Hilukiya kabona ne Ahikaamu ne Akuboori ne Saafani ne Asaya ne bagenda eri Huluda omulanzi omukazi, muka Sallumu mutabani wa Tikuva, era muzzukulu wa Harukasi, omukuumi w'etterekero ly'ebyambalo. Omukazi oyo yabeeranga mu kitundu ekipya ekya Yerusaalemu. Ne boogera naye ku nsonga eyo." 
2Kings22:15 N'abagamba nti: “Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: ‘Omuntu abatumye gye ndi mumugambe nti:" 
2Kings22:16 Mukama agamba nti: Akabi konna akoogerwako mu kitabo kino kabaka wa Buyudaaya ky'asomye, nja kukatuusa ku kifo kino, ne ku bakibeeramu." 
2Kings22:17 Nga bwe banvuddeko, ne bootereza balubaale obubaane, ne bansunguwaza n'ebyo byonna bye bakoze, obusungu bwange kyebuliva bukoleera ku kifo kino, era tebulizikira." 
2Kings22:18 Era kabaka wa Buyudaaya, abatumye okubuuza Mukama, mumugambe nti: Nze Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli ŋŋamba nti: ku bigambo by'owulidde," 
2Kings22:19 omutima gwo nga bwe gubadde omugonvu, ne weetoowaza mu maaso gange, n'oyuza ebyambalo byo olw'okunakuwala, era n'okaaba amaziga bw'owulidde ebigambo bye nayogera ku kifo kino ne ku abo abalikibeeramu, nga balizikirira ne bajulirwa mu kukolima, kale nkuwulidde." 
2Kings22:20 Ndikutwala eri bajjajjaabo n'oziikibwa mirembe, era toliraba ku kabi ke ndituusa ku kifo kino.’ ” Ne baddayo, ne babuulira kabaka ebigambo ebyo." 
2Kings23:1 Awo Kabaka Yosiya n'atumya abakulembeze bonna aba Buyudaaya n'aba Yerusaalemu, ne bakuŋŋaanira w'ali." 
2Kings23:2 N'agenda nabo mu Ssinzizo, awamu n'abasajja bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya, ne bonna ababeera mu Yerusaalemu, ne bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abantu abalala bonna abakulu n'abato. N'asoma nga bawulira ebigambo by'omu Kitabo eky'Endagaano ekyazuulibwa mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings23:3 Kabaka n'ayimirira kumpi n'empagi, n'akola endagaano mu maaso ga Mukama, okumuwuliranga n'okukwatanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, ne bye yakuutira, n'alagaanya nti anaabikwatanga n'omutima gwe gwonna, n'emmeeme ye yonna, era anaatuukirizanga ebigambo by'endagaano eyo, nga bwe byawandiikibwa mu kitabo ekyo. Abantu bonna ne bayimirira okukakasa nga banaakuumanga endagaano eyo." 
2Kings23:4 Awo Kabaka Yosiya n'alagira Hilukiya Ssaabakabona, ne bakabona abamuddirira, n'abaggazi b'e Ssinzizo, okufulumya mu Ssinzizo ebintu byonna ebyakozesebwanga mu kusinza Baali ne lubaale omukazi Asera, ne mu kusinza ebyakira ku ggulu byonna. Kabaka n'abyokera ebweru wa Yerusaalemu, mu ttale ly'omu Kiwonvu Kidurooni, evvu lyabyo ne litwalibwa e Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 N'aggyawo bakabona abasinza ebitali Katonda, bakabaka ba Buyudaaya abaamusooka be baateekawo okunyookezanga obubaane ku bifo ebigulumivu bye basinzizaamu, ebyali mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne mu bifo ebyetoolodde Yerusaalemu, era n'abo abaanyookezanga obubaane eri Baali, n'enjuba, n'omwezi, n'emmunyeenye, n'ebirala byonna ebiri ku ggulu." 
2Kings23:6 N'aggya ekifaananyi kya lubaale omukazi Asera mu Ssinzizo, n'akitwala ebweru wa Yerusaalemu, ku Kagga Kidurooni, n'akyokerayo, n'akisekulasekula, n'akifuula olusennyente, n'amansa olusennyente olwo mu kifo ekiziikibwamu abafu ekyalukale." 
2Kings23:7 N'amenyerawo ddala ebisulo by'abasajja abaakolanga eby'obukaba ku basajja bannaabwe. Ebisulo ebyo byali mu Ssinzizo, era mu byo abakazi mwe baalukiranga ebitimbirwa lubaale omukazi Asera." 
2Kings23:8 N'aleeta mu Yerusaalemu bakabona bonna abaali mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, n'ayonoona mu ggwanga lyonna ebifo byonna ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, era bakabona mwe baanyookerezanga obubaane mu ggwanga lyonna, okuva e Geba okutuuka e Beruseba. Era n'azikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu ebyali okumpi n'awayingirirwa mu Mulyango gwa Yoswa, omukulu w'ekibuga ekyali ku mukono ogwa kkono omuntu ng'ayingira mu Wankaaki w'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings23:9 Kyokka bakabona abo abaakoleranga mu bifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, ne batakkirizibwa kuweereza mu Ssinzizo mu Yerusaalemu, naye baayinzanga okulya ku migaati egitazimbulukusiddwa egiweereddwa bakabona bannaabwe." 
2Kings23:10 Kabaka Yosiya era n'ayonoona Tofeti, ekifo mu Kiwonvu ky'Abahinnomu, walemenga kubaawo n'omu ayokerayo mutabani we oba muwala we okuba ekiweebwayo eri Lubaale Moleki, ekyokebwa nga kiramba." 
2Kings23:11 N'aggyawo embalaasi, bakabaka ba Buyudaaya abaamusooka ze baali bawongedde enjuba, n'ayokya amagaali gaayo agaali mu luggya okumpi n'awayingirirwa mu Ssinzizo okuliraana n'ekisenge kya Natani-Meleki omulaawe." 
2Kings23:12 Zaalutaari bakabaka ba Buyudaaya ze baali bakoze waggulu wa kalinaabiri ya Ahazi, Kabaka Yosiya n'azimenyawo awamu ne zaalutaari ezaazimbibwa Kabaka Manasse mu mpya zombi ez'Essinzizo. N'azikoonakoona, n'azimenyaamenya, ebitundutundu byazo n'abisuula mu Kagga Kidurooni." 
2Kings23:13 Kabaka Yosiya n'ajaajaamya n'ebifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu ebyolekera Yerusaalemu ebyali obukiikaddyo obw'olusozi olw'Obwonoonefu, Solomooni kabaka wa Yisirayeli bye yazimbira ebifaananyi ebyenyinyalwa: ekya Asera, lubaale omukazi ow'Abasidoni, ekya Kemosi, lubaale wa Mowaabu, n'ekya Milukomu, lubaale owa Ammoni eyeenyinyalwa." 
2Kings23:14 N'ayasaayasa empagi ez'amayinja, n'atemaatema n'ebifaananyi bya Asera, ebifo byabyo n'abijjuzaamu amagumba g'abafu." 
2Kings23:15 Kabaka Yosiya n'amenyawo ne alutaari eyali e Beteli era n'ekifo ekigulumivu kye baasinzizangamu ekyazimbibwa Yerobowaamu mutabani wa Nebaati, eyaleetera Yisirayeli okwonoona. Yosiya n'amenyawo alutaari eyo era n'ekifo ekyo ekigulumivu kye baasinzizangamu, n'abyokya, n'abisambirira, n'abifuula olusennyente, n'ayokya n'ekifaananyi kya lubaale omukazi Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Awo Yosiya bwe yatunulatunula, n'alaba amalaalo agaali awo ku lusozi, n'alagira ne baggyamu amagumba n'agookera ku alutaari n'agyonoona nga Mukama bwe yagamba ng'ayita mu mulanzi we, eyalanga ebiribaawo mu kifo ekyo." 
2Kings23:17 Awo kabaka n'abuuza nti: “Kijjukizo ki ekyo kye ndaba?” Abantu ab'omu kibuga ekyo ne bamubuulira nti: “Ago ge malaalo g'omusajja wa Katonda eyava mu Buyudaaya, n'alanga ebintu ebyo by'okoze ku alutaari eno ey'e Beteli.”" 
2Kings23:18 Kabaka Yosiya n'alagira nti “Oyo mumuleke, amagumba ge waleme kubaawo agasimulayo.” Ne baleka amagumba ge, era n'amagumba g'omulanzi eyava e Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Amasabo gonna ag'omu bifo ebigulumivu agaali mu bibuga eby'e Samariya, bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli ge baali bazimbye ne basunguwaza Mukama, Yosiya n'agaggyawo, n'agakolako byonna nga bye yakola e Beteli." 
2Kings23:20 Bakabona bonna abaakoleranga mu bifo ebigulumivu abantu bye baasinzizangamu, n'abattira ku zaalutaari, era zaalutaari ezo n'azookerako amagumba g'abafu, n'alyoka addayo e Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Awo Kabaka Yosiya n'alagira abantu nti: “Mukolere Mukama, Katonda wammwe, Embaga Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Endagaano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Okuviira ddala ku mirembe gy'Abalamuzi abaafuga Yisirayeli, waali tewabangawo Mbaga Ejjuukirirwako Kuyitako yenkana awo, newaakubadde mu mirembe gya bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli, wadde mu gya bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings23:23 Naye mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana nga Yosiya ye Kabaka, Embaga eno Ejjuukirirwako Okuyitako n'ekolerwa Mukama mu Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Yosiya era n'aggyawo mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna, abasamize, n'abalogo, ne balubaale ab'omu maka, n'ebifaananyi abantu bye basinza, n'ebintu ebirala byonna ebyenyinyalwa, alyoke anyweze eby'amateeka ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo, Hilukiya kabona kye yazuula mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings23:25 Yosiya oyo, mu bakabaka bonna abaamukulembera, tewali n'omu eyamwenkana mu kukyukira Mukama n'omutima gwe gwonna, n'omwoyo gwe gwonna, n'amaanyi ge gonna, ng'atuukiriza ebiri mu Mateeka ga Musa gonna, era ne mu baamuddirira tewali yasinga ye." 
2Kings23:26 Kyokka era Mukama n'atalekaayo kusunguwalira nnyo Buyudaaya olw'ebyo Manasse bye yakola okumusunguwaza. 
2Kings23:27 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Ndiggyawo Buyudaaya mu maaso gange, nga bwe naggyawo Yisirayeli. Ndiboola ekibuga kino Yerusaalemu kye neeroboza, era n'Essinzizo lye nayogerako nti mwe banansinzizanga.”" 
2Kings23:28 N'ebirala byonna Kabaka Yosiya bye yakola byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya. 
2Kings23:29 Mu mirembe gye, Faraawo Neeko Kabaka w'e Misiri n'ajja n'eggye okuyamba kabaka wa Assiriya ku Mugga Ewufuraate. Kabaka Yosiya n'agenda okumulwanyisa. Neeko bwe yalaba Yosiya, n'amuttira e Megiddo." 
2Kings23:30 Abaweereza be ne bamuteeka mu ggaali ng'afudde, ne bamuggya e Megiddo, ne bamutwala e Yerusaalemu, ne bamuziika mu ntaana ye. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ne balonda Yehoyahaazi mutabani we, ne bamufukako omuzigo, ne bamufuula kabaka mu kifo kya kitaawe." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoyahaazi yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu esatu we yafuukira kabaka, n'afugira emyezi esatu mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Hamutali, muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 N'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama nga bajjajjaabe bye baakola. 
2Kings23:33 Neeko kabaka w'e Misiri n'amusibira e Ribula mu nsi ya Hamati, aleme okufuga mu Yerusaalemu. N'asalira Buyudaaya omusolo gwa talanta kikumi eza ffeeza ne talanta emu eya zaabu." 
2Kings23:34 Kabaka Neeko oyo n'alonda Eliyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya n'amufuula kabaka mu kifo kya Yosiya kitaawe, n'akyusa erinnya lya Eliyakimu, n'amutuuma Yehoyakiimu. Neeko n'atwala Yehoyahaazi e Misiri, Yehoyahaazi n'afiira eyo." 
2Kings23:35 Kabaka Yehoyakiimu n'asolooza ffeeza ne zaabu ku bantu b'omu nsi ye okusinziira ku nfuna yaabwe, alyoke aweze omuwendo gw'ensimbi ez'omusolo kabaka w'e Misiri gwe yamulagira okusasula." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakiimu yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu etaano we yafuukira kabaka, n'afugira mu Yerusaalemu emyaka kkumi na gumu. Nnyina yali Zebida, muwala wa Pedaaya ow'e Ruuma." 
2Kings23:37 Yehoyakiimu n'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama, ng'ebyo byonna bajjajjaabe bye baakola." 
2Kings24:1 Yehoyakiimu bwe yali nga ye kabaka, Nebukadunezzari Kabaka wa Babilooniya n'alumba Buyudaaya, Yehoyakiimu n'afuuka omuweereza we okumala emyaka esatu, oluvannyuma n'amwefuulira, n'amujeemera." 
2Kings24:2 Awo Mukama n'asindika ebibinja by'Abakaludaaya, n'eby'Abassiriya, n'eby'Abammoni okulumba Yehoyakiimu, bizikirize Buyudaaya, nga Mukama bwe yagamba ng'ayita mu baweereza be abalanzi." 
2Kings24:3 Ddala Mukama ye yalagira kibe bwe kityo, okuggyawo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya mu maaso ge, olw'ebibi byonna Kabaka Manasse bye yakola," 
2Kings24:4 naddala olw'abantu abataliiko musango Manasse oyo be yatta, kubanga yajjuza Yerusaalemu omusaayi gw'abantu be yattira obwereere. Mukama n'asalawo obutasonyiwa Manasse olw'ekyo." 
2Kings24:5 N'ebirala byonna Yehoyakiimu bye yakola, byawandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings24:6 Awo Yehoyakiimu n'akisa omukono, ne yeegatta ku bajjajjaabe, Yehoyakiini mutabani we n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
2Kings24:7 Kabaka wa Misiri teyaddamu kuva mu nsi ye kujja kulumba, kubanga Kabaka w'e Babilooniya yali yeefuze ekitundu kyonna ekyabanga ekya kabaka w'e Misiri, okuva ku Kagga k'e Misiri, okutuuka ku Mugga Ewufuraate." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakiini yali wa myaka kkumi na munaana we yafuukira kabaka, n'afugira mu Yerusaalemu emyezi esatu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Nehusita, muwala wa Elunatani ow'e Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings24:9 N'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama ng'ebya bajjajjaabe byonna bye baakolanga. 
2Kings24:10 Mu biseera ebyo, eggye lya Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babilooniya ne lijja e Yerusaalemu, ne likizingiza." 
2Kings24:11 Ne Nebukadunezzari kennyini n'ajja e Yerusaalemu, eggye lye nga likizingizizza." 
2Kings24:12 Yehoyakiini kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ng'ali wamu ne nnyina, n'abaweereza be, n'abakungu be, n'abaami be, n'avaayo, ne yeewaayo mu mikono gya Kabaka w'e Babilooniya. Nebukadunezzari mu mwaka ogw'omunaana nga ye kabaka, n'akwata Yehoyakiini n'amusiba." 
2Kings24:13 Ebyobugagga byonna eby'omu Ssinzizo, n'eby'omu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'abiggyamu, n'abitwala. Era nga Mukama bwe yagamba, Nebukadunezzari n'amenyaamenya ebintu byonna ebya zaabu, Solomooni kabaka wa Yisirayeli bye yali atadde mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings24:14 Nebukadunezzari n'atwala abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu nga basibe: abakungu bonna, n'abasajja bonna ab'amaanyi abazira, abasibe omutwalo gumu bonna awamu, omwali abaweesi, n'abakugu bonna mu mirimu egitali gimu. Tewali baasigalayo mu Buyudaaya, okuggyako abo abaali abaavu lunkupe." 
2Kings24:15 Kabaka w'e Babilooniya n'atwala Yehoyakiini e Babilooni wamu ne nnyina, ne bakazi be, n'abakungu be, n'abantu abatutumufu mu Buyudaaya. N'abaggya e Yerusaalemu, n'abatwala e Babilooni nga basibe." 
2Kings24:16 Abasajja bonna ab'amaanyi abazira baali kasanvu. Abakugu mu kukola emirimu, omwali n'abaweesi, baali lukumi. Bonna abo baali bazira abasobola okulwana mu lutalo, n'abatwala e Babilooniya nga basibe." 
2Kings24:17 Awo kabaka w'e Babilooniya n'alonda Mattaniya, kitaawe omuto owa Yehoyakiini, n'amufuula kabaka mu kifo kya Yehoyakiini, n'akyusa erinnya lye, n'amutuuma Zeddeekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zeddeekiya yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu gumu we yafuukira kabaka, n'afugira emyaka kkumi na gumu mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Hamutali, muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'akola ebitasiimibwa Mukama, ng'ebyo byonna Yehoyakiimu bye yakola." 
2Kings24:20 Mukama n'asunguwalira nnyo ab'omu Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'abagoba mu maaso ge. Zeddeekiya n'ajeemera kabaka w'e Babilooniya." 
2Kings25:1 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi mu mwaka ogw'omwenda bukya Zeddeekiya afuuka kabaka, Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya n'ajja n'eggye lye lyonna okulumba Yerusaalemu, n'asiisira okukyetooloola, ne bakizimbako ekigo enjuyi zonna," 
2Kings25:2 ne kizingizibwa okutuusa mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu bukya Zeddeekiya afuuka kabaka. 
2Kings25:3 Ku lunaku olw'omwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna, enjala n'enyiikira mu kibuga, abantu nga tebakyalina kye balya." 
2Kings25:4 Ne bakuba ekituli mu kigo ky'ekibuga. Abasajja bonna abaserikale ne babomba ekiro, newaakubadde ng'Abakaludaaya baali bazingizizza ekibuga enjuyi zonna. Ne bakwata ekkubo eriyita ku nnimiro ya kabaka, ne bayita mu mulyango ogugatta ebisenge ebibiri, Kabaka n'agenda nabo ng'ayolekedde Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani." 
2Kings25:5 Naye ab'eggye ly'Abakaludaaya ne bawondera Kabaka Zeddeekiya, ne bamutuukako mu nsenyi z'e Yeriko, eggye lye lyonna ne lisaasaana, ne limwabulira." 
2Kings25:6 Ne bamuwamba ne bamutwala eri kabaka wa Babilooniya e Ribula, ne bamusalira omusango okumusinga." 
2Kings25:7 Ne batta batabani ba Zeddeekiya mu maaso ge ng'alaba. Ne bamuggyamu amaaso, ne bamusiba mu njegere, ne bamutwala e Babilooni." 
2Kings25:8 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu olw'omwezi ogw'omwenda mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omwenda bukya Nebukadunezzari afuuka kabaka wa Babilooniya, Nebuzaradaani, omukungu omukulu w'abakuumi ba Kabaka wa Babilooniya, n'ajja e Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings25:9 N'ayokya Essinzizo, n'olubiri lwa Kabaka, n'ebizimbe byonna ebinene eby'omu Yerusaalemu." 
2Kings25:10 N'eggye lye ery'Abakaludaaya ne limenyaamenya ekigo kya Yerusaalemu enjuyi zonna. 
2Kings25:11 Abantu abaali basigaddewo mu kibuga, n'abo abaali beewaddeyo ne badda ku ludda lwa kabaka wa Babilooniya awamu n'abalala bonna, Nebuzaradaani omukulu w'abakuumi ba kabaka n'abatwala e Babilooni nga basibe." 
2Kings25:12 Kyokka n'aleka mu Buyudaaya abaavu lunkupe, okulimanga n'okulabiriranga ennimiro z'emizabbibu." 
2Kings25:13 Abakaludaaya ne bamenyaamenya n'empagi ez'ebikomo ezaali mu Ssinzizo, n'ebikondo ebiriko nnamuziga, n'ogutanka ogunene, eby'ekikomo, ne balyoka batwala ekikomo kyabyo e Babilooni." 
2Kings25:14 Ne batwala n'ekitamu, n'ebiyoola evvu, ne makansi ezisalako ebisiriiza ku ttaala, n'ebijiiko n'ebintu ebirala byonna eby'ekikomo ebyakozesebwanga mu kuweereza mu Ssinzizo." 
2Kings25:15 Na buli kintu ekyakolebwa mu zaabu oba mu ffeeza, omuli n'ebyoterezo n'ebbakuli, Nebuzaradaani n'akitwala." 
2Kings25:16 Empagi zombi, ogutanka ogunene, n'ebikondo ebiriko nnamuziga, Solomooni bye yakolera Essinzizo lya Mukama, obuzito bw'ekikomo kyabyo tebwapimibwa." 
2Kings25:17 Empagi emu yali ya mita munaana obugulumivu, ng'eriko omutwe ogw'ekikomo, obugulumivu bwagwo, mita emu n'obutundu busatu. Era yaliko ebifaananyi by'emikuufu n'eby'amakomamawanga, nga biri ku mutwe okwetooloola, nga byonna byakikomo. N'empagi eyookubiri nayo yali ekoleddwa mu ngeri ye emu." 
2Kings25:18 Nebuzaradaani era n'akwata Seraya Ssaabakabona, ne Zefaniya kabona amuddirira, n'abaggazi b'Essinzizo abasatu." 
2Kings25:19 Ne mu kibuga, n'aggyamu omukungu eyali akulira ab'amagye, n'abasajja bataano ku abo abaatuukiriranga kabaka okumuwa amagezi abaali bakyali mu kibuga, n'omuwandiisi omukulu, eyawandiikanga abaserikale mu ggye mu ggwanga, n'abasajja nkaaga ku bantu abatutumufu mu ggwanga, abaali bakyali mu kibuga." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradaani n'abatwala eri kabaka wa Babilooniya, e Ribula," 
2Kings25:21 mu nsi y'e Hamati. Kabaka oyo n'abakuba n'abattira eyo. Bwe batyo Abayudaaya bwe baggyibwa mu nsi yaabwe nga basibe, ne bawaŋŋangusibwa." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya n'ateekawo Gedaliya, mutabani wa Ahikaamu, era muzzukulu wa Safani, okuba omufuzi w'abantu abaasigala mu Buyudaaya, kabaka oyo be yalekamu." 
2Kings25:23 Abakulu bonna mu magye ga Buyudaaya ne basajja baabwe abaali bateewaddeeyo, bwe baawulira nga kabaka wa Babilooniya awadde Gedaliya obufuzi, ne bajja eri Gedaliya oyo e Mizupa. Abajja be bano: Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, ne Yohanaani, mutabani wa Kareya, ne Seraya, mutabani wa Tanuhumeti, ow'e Netofa, ne Yaazaniya mutabani w'omusajja ow'e Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya n'abalayirira, bo ne basajja baabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Temutya bakungu Abakaludaaya. Musigale mu nsi eno, muweereze kabaka wa Babilooniya, mujja kuba bulungi.”" 
2Kings25:25 Kyokka mu mwezi ogw'omusanvu Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya era muzzukulu wa Elisaama ow'olulyo olulangira n'ajja wamu n'abasajja kkumi e Mizupa, ne batta Gedaliya. Ne batta n'Abayudaaya n'Abakaludaaya abaali naye eyo." 
2Kings25:26 Awo abantu bonna, abato n'abakulu, n'abakulu mu magye ne beesitula ne baddukira e Misiri, nga batidde Abakaludaaya." 
2Kings25:27 Evilumerodaaki mu mwaka mwe yafuukira kabaka wa Babilooniya, n'akwatirwa Kabaka Yehoyakiini owa Buyudaaya ekisa, n'amuggya mu kkomera, ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu omusanvu, olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu omusanvu, okuva Yehoyakiini kabaka wa Buyudaaya lwe yasibibwa." 
2Kings25:28 Evilumerodaaki n'amuyisa bulungi, n'amusukkulumya ku bakabaka abalala abaali naye mu buwaŋŋanguse mu Babilooni." 
2Kings25:29 Yehoyakiini n'aggyibwa mu byambalo by'ekkomera, era okuva olwo n'aliiranga ku lujjuliro lwa Kabaka obulamu bwe bwonna." 
2Kings25:30 Kabaka n'alagira bamuwenga omugabo ogwa buli lunaku, ebbanga lyonna lye yamala nga mulamu." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu yazaala Seeti, Seeti n'azaala Enosi, Enosi n'azaala," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Kenani n'azaala Mahalaleeli, Mahalaleeli n'azaala Yaredi, Yaredi n'azaala" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Enoka n'azaala Metuseela, Metuseela n'azaala Lameka, Lameka" 
1Chronicles1:4 n'azaala Noowa, Noowa n'azaala Seemu, Haamu, ne Yafeeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Batabani ba Yafeeti: Gomeri, ne Magogi, ne Madayi, ne Yavani, ne Tubali, ne Meseki, ne Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Batabani ba Gomeri: Asukenaazi, ne Difati, ne Togaruma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Batabani ba Yavani: Elisa, ne Tarusiisi, Kittimu, ne Rodaniimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Batabani ba Haamu: Kuusi ne Mizurayimu, Puuti ne Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Batabani ba Kuusi: Seba, ne Havila, ne Sabuta, ne Raama, ne Sabuteka. Batabani ba Raama: Seeba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuusi yazaala Nimuroodi, eyasooka okuba omuntu omulwanyi ow'amaanyi ku nsi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizurayimu yazaala Ludiimu, ne Anamiimu, ne Lehabiimu, Nafutuhiimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 ne Paturusiimu, ne Kasuluhiimu eyasibukamu Abafilistiya, ne Kafutorimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani yazaala Sidoni, omuggulanda we, ne Heeti," 
1Chronicles1:14 n'Abayebusi, n'Abaamori, n'Abagirugaasi," 
1Chronicles1:15 n'Abahiivi, n'Abaruki, n'Abasiini," 
1Chronicles1:16 n'Abaruvaadi, n'Abazemari, n'Abahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Batabani ba Seemu: Elamu, ne Assuri, ne Arupakusaadi, ne Luudi, ne Aramu, ne Wuuzi, ne Huuli, ne Geteri, ne Meseki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arupakusaadi yazaala Seela, Seela n'azaala Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yazaala abatabani babiri: erinnya ly'omu Pelegi, kubanga mu kiseera kye, ensi we yagabanyizibwamu, n'erinnya lya muganda we Yokutaani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokutaani yazaala Alumodaadi, ne Selefu, ne Hazurumaveti, ne Yeera," 
1Chronicles1:21 ne Hadoraamu, ne Wuuzali, ne Dikula," 
1Chronicles1:22 ne Ebali, ne Abimayeli, ne Seeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 ne Ofiri, ne Havila ne Yobabu. Abo bonna baali batabani ba Yokutaani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Obuzaale bwa Aburahamu okuva ku Seemu: Seemu yazaala Arupakusaadi, Arupakusaadi n'azaala Seera, Seera n'azaala" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Eberi n'azaala Pelegi, Pelegi n'azaala Rewu, Rewu n'azaala" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Serugi n'azaala Nahori, Nahori n'azaala Teera, Teera n'azaala" 
1Chronicles1:27 Aburaamu, ye Aburahamu." 
1Chronicles1:28 Batabani ba Aburahamu: Yisaaka ne Yisimayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Bano be batabani ba Yisimayeli: Nebayooti omuggulanda we, addibwako Kedari, ne Adubeeli, ne Mibusaamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misuma, ne Duma, Massa, Hadadi, ne Teema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafisi, ne Kedema. Abo be baana ba Yisimayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Batabani ba Aburahamu be yazaala mu Ketura, mukazi we omulala: Ketura yazaala Zimurani, ne Yokusaani, ne Medaani, ne Midiyaani, ne Yisubaaki, ne Suuwa. Batabani ba Yakusaani: Seeba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Batabani ba Midiyaani: Efa, ne Eferi, ne Hanoki, ne Abiida, ne Eluda. Abo bonna baali ba zzadde lya Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu yazaala Yisaaka. Batabani ba Yisaaka: Esawu ne Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Batabani ba Esawu: Elifaazi, Reweli, Yewusi, Yalaamu, ne Koora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Batabani ba Elifaazi: Temani, ne Omari, Zefi, ne Gatamu, Kenazi, ne Timuna, ne Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Batabani ba Reweli: Nahati, Zera, Samma ne Mizza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Batabani ba Seyiri: Lotani, ne Sobali, ne Zibiyoni, ne Ana, ne Disoni, ne Ezeri, ne Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Batabani ba Lotani: Hoori ne Homaamu. Timuna yali mwannyina Lotani. 
1Chronicles1:40 Batabani ba Sobali: Aluyaani ne Manahati, ne Ebali, Sefi, ne Onamu. Batabani ba Zibiyoni, Aya ne Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mutabani wa Ana: Disoni. Batabani ba Disoni: Hamuraani, ne Esubaani, ne Yituraani, ne Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Batabani ba Ezeri: Bilihaani ne Zaavani ne Yaakani. Batabani ba Disani: Wuuzi ne Araani. 
1Chronicles1:43 Bano be bakabaka abaagenda baddiriŋŋana okufuga mu nsi ya Edomu, nga tewannaba kabaka n'omu afuga Bayisirayeli: Bela mutabani wa Bewori, erinnya ly'ekibuga kye lyali Dinuhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela bwe yafa, Yobabu mutabani wa Zera ow'e Bozira n'afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu bwe yafa, Husamu eyava mu nsi y'Abatemani n'afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:46 Husamu bwe yafa, Hadadi mutabani wa Bedadi, eyawangula Abamidiyaani mu lutalo olwali mu nsi y'e Mowaabu, n'afuga mu kifo kye. Erinnya ly'ekibuga kye lyali Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi bwe yafa, Samula ow'e Masireeka n'afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula bwe yafa, Sawuuli ow'e Rehoboti eky'oku Mugga, n'afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:49 Sawuuli bwe yafa, Baalihanani mutabani wa Akuboori n'afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baalihanani bwe yafa, Hadadi ow'e Paayi, n'afuga mu kifo kye. Muka Hadadi yali Mehetabeli, muwala wa Makireedi era muzzukulu wa Mezahaabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi bwe yafa, ensi y'e Edomu n'efugibwa abakungu bano: Timuna, Aliya, Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibuzaari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magudiyeeli, Yiramu. Abo be bakungu ba Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Bano be batabani ba Yisirayeli: Rewubeeni, Simyoni, Leevi ne Yuda, Yissakaari ne Zebbulooni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daani, Yosefu ne Benyamiini. Nafutaali, Gaadi, ne Aseri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Batabani ba Yuda: Eri, ne Onani ne Seela. Abasatu abo nnyaabwe yali Suuwa Omukanaani. Omuggulanda we Eri, yali muntu mubi. Mukama n'amutta." 
1Chronicles2:4 Batabani ba Yuda abalala be bano: Pereezi ne Zera. Abo yabazaala mu Tamari, mukaamwana we. Batabani ba Yuda bonna awamu baali bataano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Batabani ba Pereezi: Hezirooni ne Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Batabani ba Zera be bano: Zimuri ne Etani, ne Heemaani, ne Kalukoli, ne Daara, bonna bataano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mutabani wa Karumi yali Akaari, eyaleetera Abayisirayeli omutawaana bwe yasobya ebintu ebyali biwongeddwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mutabani wa Etani: Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Batabani ba Hezirooni be bano: Yerameeli, Raamu, ne Kelubaayi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Raamu yazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu n'azaala Nahusooni, omukulembeze w'ab'Ekika kya Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahusooni yazaala Saluma; Saluma n'azaala Bowaazi; 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowaazi n'azaala Obedi; Obedi n'azaala Yesse. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yesse yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi musanvu: Eliyaabu ye muggulanda, Abinadabu ye wookubiri, Simeeya ye wookusatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netaneeli ye wookuna, Raddayi ye wookutaano," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu ye w'omukaaga, Dawudi ye w'omusanvu," 
1Chronicles2:16 ne bannyinaabwe: Zeruyiya ne Abigayili. Zeruyiya yazaala abalenzi basatu: Abisaayi, Yowaabu, ne Asaheeli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili yazaala Amasa. Kitaawe wa Amasa yali Yeteri Omuyisimayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mutabani wa Hezirooni yazaala omuwala Yeriyooti, mu mukazi we Azuba. Era bano be balenzi Azuba be yazaala: Yeeseri, Sobabu, ne Arudooni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba bwe yafa, Kalebu n'awasa Efuraati eyamuzaalira Huuri," 
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri n'azaala Wuuri, ate Wuuri n'azaala Bezaleeli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hezirooni bwe yaweza emyaka nkaaga, n'awasa muwala wa Makiri kitaawe wa Gileyaadi. Ne bazaala Segubu," 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu n'azaala Yayiiri eyali nnannyini bibuga amakumi abiri mu bisatu mu kitundu ky'e Gileyaadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Obwakabaka bw'e Gesuri ne Araamu ne bubanyagako Ebibuga bya Yayiiri, ne Kenaati, n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde, byonna awamu ebibuga nkaaga. Abo bonna abaali eyo be basibuka mu Makiri, kitaawe wa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Awo Hezirooni ng'amaze okufiira mu Kalebu-Efuraati, nnamwandu we Abiya n'amuzaalira Asuhuuri kitaawe wa Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Batabani ba Yerameeli omuggulanda wa Hezirooni be bano: Raamu omuggulanda, ne Buuna, ne Oreri, ne Ozemu, ne Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerameeli yalina omukazi omulala, erinnya lye Ataara. Oyo ye yali nnyina Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Batabani ba Raamu, omuggulanda wa Yerameeli: Maagi, ne Yamuni, ne Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Batabani ba Onamu baali Sammayi ne Yaada. Batabani ba Sammayi: Nadaaba ne Abisuuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abisuuri erinnya lye Abihayili, yamuzaalira Abani ne Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ne batabani ba Nadabu: Seledi ne Appayiimu. Kyokka Seledi yafa tazadde baana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mutabani wa Appayiimu yali Yiisi, ate mutabani wa Yiisi yali Sesani, ne mutabani wa Sesani yali Alayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Batabani ba Yaada muganda wa Sammayi: Yeteri, ne Yonataani. Yeteri yafa tazadde baana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Batabani ba Yonataani: Peleti ne Zaaza. Abo be basibuka mu Yerameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesani teyazaala baana ba bulenzi wabula ba buwala bokka. Sesani oyo yalina omuddu Omumisiri erinnya lye Yara. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani n'addira muwala we n'amuwa Yara omuddu we amuwase, omuwala oyo n'amuzaalira Attayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attayi n'azaala Natani, Natani n'azaala Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi n'azaala Efulaali, Efulaali n'azaala Obedi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi n'azaala Yeehu, Yeehu n'azaala Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya n'azaala Helezi, Helezi n'azaala Eleyaasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyaasa n'azaala Sisumaayi, Sisumaayi n'azaala Sallumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 Sallumu n'azaala Yekamiya, Yekamiya n'azaala Elisaama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Batabani ba Kalebu muganda wa Yerameeli be bano: Meesa omuggulanda we, eyazaala Ziifu, Ziifu n'azaala Maresa, Maresa n'azaala Heburooni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Batabani ba Heburooni: Koora, ne Tappuwa, ne Rekemu, ne Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema yazaala Rehamu kitaawe wa Yorukeyamu, ate Rekemu n'azaala Sammayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mutabani wa Sammayi yali Mawoni. Mawoni oyo ye kitaawe wa Betizuuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebu yalina omukazi omulala, erinnya lye Efa, eyazaala Harani ne Moza ne Gazeezi, Harani n'azaala Gazeezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Batabani ba Yahudaayi baali Regemu ne Yotamu, ne Gesani, ne Peleti, ne Efa, ne Saafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka omukazi omulala owa Kalebu, n'azaala Seberi ne Tiruhaana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Era yazaala ne Saafu kitaawe wa Madimenna, n'azaala ne Seva kitaawe wa Makubeena era kitaawe wa Gibeya. Muwala wa Kalebu yali Akusa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Bano era be batabani ba Kalebu: Huuri ye muggulanda we mu mukazi we Efuraati. Huuri yazaala Sobali kitaawe wa Kiriyati Yeyariimu. 
1Chronicles2:51 Saluma mutabani we owookubiri ye kitaawe wa Betilehemu. Hareefu mutabani we owookusatu ye kitaawe wa Betigadeeri. 
1Chronicles2:52 Sobali kitaawe wa Kiriyati Yeyariimu ye jjajja wa Harowe, asibukamu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Abamenuhoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ebika by'Abakiriyaatiyeyariimu byali: Abayituri, n'Abapuuti, n'Abasumati, n'Abamisuraayi. Mu abo mwe mwava Abazorati, n'Abesutawooli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Batabani ba Saluma: Betilehemu n'Abanetafa, Atarooti-Beeti-Yowaabu, n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Abamanahuti, be Bazaruti." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ebika by'abawandiisi abaabeeranga e Yabezi: Abatiruwaati, Abasimeyaati, n'Abasukati. Abo be Bakenimu abaava e Hemati era be bavaamu ab'oluggya lwa Rehabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bano be baana ba Dawudi be yazaala ng'ali e Heburooni: Amunooni omuggulanda, nnyina ye Ahinowamu Omuyezireeli; owookubiri Daniyeli, nnyina ye Abigayili Omukarumeeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 owookusatu Abusaalomu, nnyina ye Maaka muwala wa Kabaka Talumayi ow'e Gesuri; owookuna Adoniya, nnyina ye Haggiiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 owookutaano Sefatiya, nnyina ye Abitaali; ow'omukaaga Yitireyaamu, nnyina ye Egula." 
1Chronicles3:4 Abo omukaaga yabazaala ali Heburooni. N'afugira eyo emyaka musanvu n'emyezi mukaaga. Yafugira mu Yerusaalemu emyaka amakumi asatu mu esatu. 
1Chronicles3:5 Bano be yazaalira e Yerusaalemu: Simeeya, Sobabu, Natani, ne Solomooni. Abana abo nnyaabwe yali Batisuwa muwala wa Ammiyeeli." 
1Chronicles3:6 N'abalala mwenda: Yibuha, Elisaama, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nooga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisaama, Eliyaada, ne Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles3:9 Dawudi era yalina abaana ab'obulenzi mu bakazi abalala, era n'omwana ow'obuwala Tamari." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomooni yazaala Rehobowaamu, Rehobowaamu n'azaala Abiya, Abiya n'azaala Asa, Asa n'azaala Yehosafaati," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehosafaati n'azaala Yoraamu, Yoraamu n'azaala Ahaaziya, Ahaaziya n'azaala Yowaasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 Yowaasi n'azaala Amaziya, Amaziya n'azaala Azariya, Azariya n'azaala Yotamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 Yotamu n'azaala Ahazi, Ahazi n'azaala Heezeekiya, Heezeekiya n'azaala Manasse," 
1Chronicles3:14 Manasse n'azaala Amoni, Amoni n'azaala Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Batabani ba Yosiya: omuggulanda ye Yohanaani, owookubiri Yehoyakiimu, owookusatu Zeddeekiya, owookuna Sallumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Batabani ba Yehoyakiimu: Yekoniya ne Zeddeekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bano be batabani ba Yekoniya eyatwalibwa e Babilooni nga musibe: Seyalutiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malukiraamu, Pedaaya, Senazzari, Yekamiya, Hosaama ne Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Batabani ba Pedaaya: Zerubabbeeli ne Simeeyi. Batabani ba Zerubabbeeli: Mesullamu, Hananiya, ne Selomiti mwannyinaabwe," 
1Chronicles3:20 n'abalala bataano: Hasuba, ne Oheli, ne Berekiya, ne Hasadiya, ne Yusabu Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Batabani ba Hananiya: Pelatiya ne Yesaaya. Yesaaya yazaala Refaaya, Refaaya n'azaala Arunaani, Arunaani n'azaala Obadiya, Obadiya n'azaala Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sekaniya yasibukamu abaana ab'obulenzi mukaaga: mutabani we Semaaya, ne batabani ba Semaaya oyo: Hattusi ne Yiguyaali, ne Baariya, ne Neyariya, ne Saafati." 
1Chronicles3:23 Batabani ba Neyariya baali basatu: Eliyowenayi, ne Heezeekiya, ne Azirikaamu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Batabani ba Eliyowenayi baali musanvu: Hoodaviya, ne Eliyasibu, ne Pelaaya, ne Akkubu, ne Yohanaani, ne Delaaya, ne Anaani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bano be bamu ku basibuka mu Yuda: Hezirooni, ne Karumi, ne Huuri, ne Sobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Sobali yazaala Reyaaya eyazaala Yahati, Yahati n'azaala Ahumaayi ne Lahadi abaasibukamu abatuuze b'e Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Etamu yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi basatu. Yezireeli, Yisima ne Yidibbaasi. Abo baalina mwannyinaabwe erinnya lye Hazzelelipooni." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penweli kitaawe wa Gedori ne Ezeri kitaawe wa Huusa baali batabani ba Huuri omuggulanda wa Efuraati, muka Kalebu. Huuri oyo ye yasibukamu Betilehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Asuuri kitaawe wa Tekowa yalina abakazi babiri: Hela ne Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara n'amuzaalira Ahuzaamu, ne Heferi, ne Temeni, ne Haahasutaari. Abo be batabani ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Batabani ba Hela: Zereti, ne Yizuhaari, ne Etinaani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koozi yazaala Anuubu ne Zobeba, ne jjajja w'ab'ennyumba ezisibuka mu Aharuheeli mutabani wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Waaliwo omusajja erinnya lye Yabezi eyali oweekitiibwa okusinga baganda be. Nnyina yamutuuma erya Yabezi, kubanga yamuluma nnyo ng'amuzaala." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi ne yeegayirira Katonda wa Yisirayeli nti: “Singa nno ompa omukisa ayi Katonda, n'ogaziya amatwale gange, n'obeeranga nange, n'omponya buli kabi, kalemenga kuntuukako.” Awo Katonda n'amuwa kye yasaba." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu muganda wa Suuwa yazaala Mehiiri, Mehiiri n'azaala Esitooni, Esitooni" 
1Chronicles4:12 n'azaala Betiraafa ne Pesewa, ne Tehinna eyazaala Yirinahaasi. Abasibuka mu abo be batuuze b'e Reeka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Batabani ba Kenazi: Otiniyeeli ne Seraya. Batabani ba Otiniyeeli: Hatati 
1Chronicles4:14 ne Mewonotaayi eyazaala Ofura. Seraya yazaala Yowaabu eyasibukamu ab'omu Kiwonvu ekiyitibwa eky'Abafundi, kubanga abatuuze baamu baali bafundi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Bano be batabani ba Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne: Yiru, Ela, ne Naamu. Ela yazaala Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Batabani ba Yehalleleli: Ziifu, ne Ziifa, Tiriya, ne Asareeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Batabani ba Ezera: Yeteri, ne Meredi, ne Eferi, ne Yalooni. Meredi yawasa Bitiya muwala wa kabaka w'e Misiri, ne bazaala omuwala Miriyamu n'abalenzi babiri: Sammayi ne Yisiba. Yisiba oyo ye kitaawe wa Esitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Meredi yawasa n'omukazi Omuyudaaya, ne bazaala abalenzi basatu: Yeredi kitaawe wa Gedori, Heberi kitaawe wa Soko, ne Yekutiyeeli kitaawe wa Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Hodiya yawasa mwannyina Nahamu. Batabani ba muka Hodiya oyo be basibukamu Keyila Omugarumi ne Esitemowa ow'e Maakati. 
1Chronicles4:20 Batabani ba Simooni: Amunooni, ne Rinna, ne Benihanani, ne Tilooni. Batabani ba Yisi: Zoheti, ne Benizoheti" 
1Chronicles4:21 Batabani ba Seela mutabani wa Yuda: Eri kitaawe wa Leeka, ne Laada kitaawe wa Maresa, n'ab'olulyo lw'abo abaalukanga engoye, ab'ennyumba ya Asibeeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 ne Yokimu n'abatuuze b'e Kozeba, ne Yowaasi, ne Saraafu abaafuganga mu Mowaabu ne Yasubilehemu. Ebyo byabaawo dda nnyo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Abantu abo baali babumbi abakolera kabaka era nga babeera mu Netayiimu ne mu Gedera. 
1Chronicles4:24 Batabani ba Simyoni: Nemweli, ne Yamini, Yaribu, Zera, ne Sawuuli. Sawuuli" 
1Chronicles4:25 yazaala Sallumu, Sallumu n'azaala Mibusaamu, Mibusaamu n'azaala Misuma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mutabani wa Misuma: Hamweli eyazaala Zakkuri, Zakkuri n'azaala Simeeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simeeyi yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi kkumi na mukaaga, n'ab'obuwala mukaaga. Kyokka baganda be tebaazaala baana bangi era Ekika kyabwe tekyayala ng'ekya Yuda bwe kyayala." 
1Chronicles4:28 Abasibuka mu Simyoni baasenga mu bibuga Beruseba, ne Molada, ne Hazarusuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 ne Biliha, ne Ezemu, ne Tolaadi," 
1Chronicles4:30 ne Betuweeli, ne Horuma, ne Zikulagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 ne Betimarukabooti, ne Hazarisusiimu, ne Betibiri, ne Saarayiimu. Ebyo bye byali ebibuga byabwe okutuusa Dawudi lwe yafuuka kabaka." 
1Chronicles4:32 Era ebyalo byabwe byali Etamu, ne Ayiini, Rimmoni, ne Tokeni, ne Asani, byonna wamu bitaano," 
1Chronicles4:33 era n'ebitundu ebyetoolodde ebyalo ebyo okutuuka e Bbaali. Mu ebyo mwe baabeeranga. Bajjajjaabwe be bano: 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobaabu, ne Yamuleeki, ne Yoosa mutabani wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 ne Yoweeli, ne Yeehu mutabani wa Yosibiya, Yosibiya mutabani wa Seraya, Seraya mutabani wa Asiyeeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 ne Eliyowenayi, ne Yaakoba, ne Yesohaaya, ne Asaya, ne Adiyeeli, ne Yesimiyeeli, ne Benaaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 ne Ziiza mutabani wa Sifi era muzzukulu wa Alloni. Alloni yali mutabani wa Yedaaya era muzzukulu wa Simuri, Simuri mutabani wa Semaaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Abo abamenyeddwa amannya, baali bakulu ba nnyiriri zaabwe era olulyo lwabwe lweyongera okwala," 
1Chronicles4:39 ne basengukira awayingirirwa e Gedori ku luuyi lw'ebuvanjuba bw'ekiwonvu okunoonyeza amagana gaabwe omuddo. 
1Chronicles4:40 Ne balaba awali omuddo omugimu omulungi mu nsi engazi entebenkevu era ey'emirembe. Abatuuze baamu abaasooka baali basibuka mu Haamu. 
1Chronicles4:41 Mu mulembe gwa Kabaka Heezeekiya owa Buyudaaya, abo abamenyeddwa amannya baalumba eweema n'ensiisira z'abatuuze baayo n'ez'Abamewuni be baasangayo ne babasaanyizaawo ddala, ne basengayo mu kifo kyabwe, kubanga waaliyo omuddo ogw'okuliisa amagana gaabwe." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ebikumi bitaano ku bo ne bagenda ku Lusozi Seyiri, nga bakulemberwa Pelatiya, ne Neyariya, ne Refaaya, ne Wuzziyeeli mutabani wa Yiisi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Eyo ne battirayo Abamaleki abaali basigaddewo, ne basenga eyo n'okutuusa kati." 
1Chronicles5:1 Bano be batabani ba Rewubeeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli. Newaakubadde Rewubeeni ono ye yali omuggulanda, kyokka olw'okwebaka ne muka kitaawe, omugabo gwe ogw'obuggulanda gwamuggyibwako, ne guweebwa batabani ba Yosefu era mutabani wa Yisirayeli. N'olwekyo enkalala z'obuzaale zaawandiikibwa nga tezigoberera buggulanda." 
1Chronicles5:2 Newaakubadde eky'okuba omuggulanda kyali kya Yosefu, kyokka Yuda ye yafuuka ow'amaanyi okusinga baganda be, era mu ye mwe mwava omukulembeze." 
1Chronicles5:3 Batabani ba Rewubeeni omuggulanda wa Yisirayeli be bano: Hanoki, ne Pallu, Hezirooni, ne Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Batabani ba Yoweeli: Semaaya eyazaala Googi, Googi n'azaala Simeeyi, Simeeyi" 
1Chronicles5:5 n'azaala Mikka. Mikka ye azaala Reyaaya, Reyaaya n'azaala Baali, Baali" 
1Chronicles5:6 n'azaala Beera, Kabaka Tigulati Piluneseri owa Assiriya gwe yatwala mu buwaŋŋanguse. Beera oyo ye yali omukulembeze w'abasibuka mu Rewubeeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Enkalala z'Abarewubeeni ziraga abakulembeze baabwe bano: Yeyeli, Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ne Bela mutabani wa Azazi, Azazi mutabani wa Sema, Sema mutabani wa Yoweeli. Abasibuka mu Yoweeli oyo, baabeeranga mu Aroweri okutuuka e Nebo n'e Baali Mewooni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ebuvanjuba baali mu kitundu awatandikira eddungu, okutuukira ddala ku Mugga Ewufuraate, kubanga amagana gaabwe gaali mangi mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu mulembe gwa Kabaka Sawulo, Abarewubeeni ne balwanyisa Abahagari mu lutalo, ne babatta, ne babeeranga mu weema zaabwe mu kitundu kyonna ekiri ku ludda lw'ebuvanjuba bwa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, baasenga ebukiikakkono bw'Abarewubeeni mu Basani, okutuukira ddala e Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoweeli ye yali omukulembeze waabwe, amuddirira nga ye Safamu, ne kuddako Yaani ne Safati mu Basani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Baganda baabwe bwe bagatta bajjajjaabwe be bano: Mikayeli, ne Mesullamu, ne Seba, ne Yorayi, ne Yakani, ne Ziiya, ne Eberi, abantu musanvu." 
1Chronicles5:14 Abo be baali batabani ba Abihayili mutabani wa Huuri, Huuri mutabani wa Yarowa, Yarowa mutabani wa Gileyaadi, Gileyaadi mutabani wa Mikayeli, Mikayeli mutabani wa Yesisaayi, Yesisaayi mutabani wa Yahudo, Yahudo mutabani wa Bbuuzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mutabani wa Abudiyeeli era muzzukulu wa Guuni, ye yali omukulu w'ennyumba za bajjajjaabe." 
1Chronicles5:16 Abagaadi ne babeeranga mu Gileyaadi ne Basani, ne mu bibuga byayo byonna, ne mu bitundu eby'amalundiro eby'e Saroni okutuukira ddala gye bikoma." 
1Chronicles5:17 Abo bonna baawandiikibwa mu nkalala z'obuzaale mu mulembe gwa Yotamu kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ne mu mulembe gwa Yerobowaamu Owookubiri kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ekika kya Rewubeeni n'ekya Gaadi, n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse, byonna awamu byalina abaserikale emitwalo ena mu enkumi nnya mu lusanvu mu nkaaga, abasajja abazira era abamanyirivu mu kukozesa engabo, n'ebitala n'obusaale, era abatendeke obulungi mu kulwana entalo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ne balwanyisa Abahagari, n'Abayeturi, n'Abanefisi, n'Abanodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Beesiga Mukama ne bamusaba abayambe era n'abayamba, Abahagari ne bawangulwa wamu ne bonna be baali nabo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ne banyaga ku balabe eŋŋamiya emitwalo etaano, endiga emitwalo amakumi abiri mu etaano, n'ennyumbu enkumi bbiri, n'abantu emitwalo kkumi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Era batta bangi, kubanga Katonda ye yalwana olutalo olwo. Ne beefuga ebitundu ebyo okutuusa lwe baawaŋŋangusibwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ab'Ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Abamanasse ne beeyongera obungi, ne babeeranga mu kitundu ky'ensi eyo okuva e Basani okutuuka e Baali Herumooni ne Seniri ne ku Lusozi Herumooni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Bano be baali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe: Eferi, ne Yiisi, ne Eliyeeli, ne Azuriyeeli, ne Yeremiya, ne Hoodaviya, ne Yahudiyeeli. Abo bonna baali basajja bazira era abamanyifu ennyo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Awo abantu ne bataba beesigwa eri Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe, ne bamuvaako ne basinzanga balubaale b'abannansi Katonda be yagoba mu nsi omwo nga bo Abayisirayeli batuuka." 
1Chronicles5:26 Awo Katonda w'Abayisirayeli n'akubiriza Puuli kabaka wa Assiriya erinnya lye eddala ye Tilugati Piluneseri, okutwala mu buwaŋŋanguse Abarewubeeni, n'Abagaadi, n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Abamanasse. Kabaka oyo n'abatwala e Hala, n'e Habori, n'e Haara, ne ku Mugga Gozani, ne babeerera ddala eyo n'okutuusa kati." 
1Chronicles6:1 Batabani ba Leevi: Gerusoomu, Kohati, ne Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Batabani ba Kohati: Amuraamu, ne Yizuhaari, ne Heburooni, ne Wuzziyeeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abaana ba Amuraamu: Arooni, ne Musa, ne Miriyamu. Batabani ba Arooni: Nadabu, ne Abihu, Eliyazaari ne Yitamaari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eliyazaari yazaala Finehaasi, Finehaasi n'azaala Abisuuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisuuwa n'azaala Bukki, Bukki n'azaala Wuzzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Wuzzi n'azaala Zerahiya, Zerahiya n'azaala Merayooti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayooti n'azaala Amariya, Amariya n'azaala Ahituubu." 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahituubu yazaala Zaddooki, Zaddooki n'azaala Ahimaazi,"
