1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi n'azaala Azariya, Azariya n'azaala Yohanaani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaani n'azaala Azariya eyaweereza mu bwakabona mu Ssinzizo, Solomooni lye yazimba mu Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azariya oyo yazaala Amariya, Amariya n'azaala Ahituubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahituubu n'azaala Zaddooki, Zaddooki n'azaala Sallumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Sallumu n'azaala Hilukiya, Hilukiya n'azaala Azariya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Azariya yazaala Seraya, Seraya n'azaala Yehozadaaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehozadaaki oyo yawaŋŋangusibwa, Mukama bwe yatwala ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu mu busibe ng'akozesa Nebukadunezzari." 
1Chronicles6:16 Batabani ba Leevi: Gerusoomu, Kohati, ne Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Amannya g'abatabani ba Gerusoomu ge gano: Libuni ne Simeeyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Batabani ba Kohati: Amuraamu, ne Yizihaari, ne Heburooni, ne Wuzziyeeli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Batabani ba Merari: Mahuli ne Musi. Olwo lwe lulyo lw'Abaleevi, nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baddiriŋŋana." 
1Chronicles6:20 Bano be basibuka mu Gerusoomu: Gerusoomu yazaala Libuni, Libuni n'azaala Yahati, Yahati n'azaala Zimma." 
1Chronicles6:21 Zimma yazaala Yoowa, Yoowa n'azaala Yiddo, Yiddo n'azaala Zeta, Zeta n'azaala Yeyaterayi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bano be basibuka mu Kohati: Kohati yazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu n'azaala Koora, Koora n'azaala Asiiri." 
1Chronicles6:23 Asiiri yazaala Elukaana, Elukaana n'azaala Ebiyasaafu, Ebiyasaafu n'azaala Asiiri, Asiiri" 
1Chronicles6:24 n'azaala Tahati, Tahati n'azaala Wuriyeeli, Wuriyeeli n'azaala Wuzziya, Wuzziya n'azaala Sawuuli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Abasibuka mu Elukaana be bano: Elukaana yazaala Amasaayi ne Ahimooti, Ahimooti" 
1Chronicles6:26 n'azaala Elukaana, Elukaana n'azaala Zoofayi, Zoofayi n'azaala Nahati, Nahati" 
1Chronicles6:27 n'azaala Eliyaabu, Eliyaabu n'azaala Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu n'azaala Elukaana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samweli yazaala abaana babiri: Yoweeli ye muggulanda we, owookubiri ye Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Bano basibuka mu Merari: Merari yazaala Mahuli, Mahuli n'azaala Libuni, Libuni n'azaala Simeeyi, Simeeyi n'azaala Wuzza. Wuzza" 
1Chronicles6:30 yazaala Simeeya, Simeeya n'azaala Haggiya, Haggiya n'azaala Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Waliwo abantu Kabaka Dawudi be yalonda okukulira eby'okuyimba mu Ssinzizo ly'e Yerusaalemu, Essanduuko y'Endagaano ya Mukama bwe yamala okuyingizibwa mu Ssinzizo eryo." 
1Chronicles6:32 Baaweerezanga mu mpalo mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama, nga bayimba, okutuusa Kabaka Solomooni bwe yamala okuzimba Essinzizo lya Mukama mu Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles6:33 Abantu abo abaateekebwawo, be bano: Okuva mu basibuka mu Kohati, waaliwo Hemani omukulu w'abayimbi, mutabani wa Yoweeli, Yoweeli mutabani wa Samweli, Samweli" 
1Chronicles6:34 mutabani wa Elukaana, Elukaana mutabani wa Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu mutabani wa Eliyeeli, Eliyeeli mutabani wa Toowa, Toowa" 
1Chronicles6:35 mutabani wa Zufu, Zufu mutabani wa Elukaana, Elukaana mutabani wa Mahati, Mahati mutabani wa Amasaayi, Amasaayi" 
1Chronicles6:36 mutabani wa Elukaana, Elukaana mutabani wa Yoweeli, Yoweeli mutabani wa Azariya, Azariya mutabani wa Zefaniya, Zefaniya" 
1Chronicles6:37 mutabani wa Tahati, Tahati mutabani wa Asiiri, Asiiri mutabani wa Ebiyasaafu, Ebiyasaafu mutabani wa Koora, Koora" 
1Chronicles6:38 mutabani wa Yizuhaari, Yizuhaari mutabani wa Kohati, Kohati mutabani wa Leevi, Leevi mutabani wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Munne wa Hemani era eyamuyimiriranga ku mukono ogwa ddyo, yali Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya, Berekiya mutabani wa Simeeya, Simeeya" 
1Chronicles6:40 mutabani wa Mikayeli, Mikayeli mutabani wa Baaseya, Baaseya mutabani wa Malukiya, Malukiya" 
1Chronicles6:41 mutabani wa Etuni, Etuni mutabani wa Zera, Zera mutabani wa Adaaya, Adaaya" 
1Chronicles6:42 mutabani wa Etani, Etani mutabani wa Zimma, Zimma mutabani wa Simeeyi, Simeeyi" 
1Chronicles6:43 mutabani wa Yahati, Yahati mutabani wa Gerusoomu, Gerusoomu mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 N'oyo eyayimiriranga ku gwa kkono gwa Hemani ne Asafu, yali ava mu basibuka mu Merari, nga ye Etani mutabani wa Kiisi, Kiisi mutabani wa Abudi, Abudi mutabani wa Malluki, Malluki" 
1Chronicles6:45 mutabani wa Hasabiya, Hasabiya mutabani wa Amaziya, Amaziya mutabani wa Hilukiya, Hilukiya" 
1Chronicles6:46 mutabani wa Amuzi, Amuzi mutabani wa Baani, Baani mutabani wa Semeri, Semeri" 
1Chronicles6:47 mutabani wa Mahuli, Mahuli mutabani wa Muusi, Muusi mutabani wa Merari, Merari mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Baleevi bannaabwe abalala bonna ne baweebwa emirimu emirala gyonna, egy'omu Ssinzizo." 
1Chronicles6:49 Arooni n'abasibuka mu ye ne baweerangayo ku alutaari ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, era ne booterezanga obubaane ku alutaari yaabwo. Ne bakolanga emirimu gyonna egy'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu, era ne basabiranga Abayisirayeli okusonyiyibwa ebibi byabwe, nga Musa omuweereza wa Katonda, bwe yalagira." 
1Chronicles6:50 Era bano be basibuka mu Arooni: Arooni yazaala Eleyazaari, Eleyazaari n'azaala Finehaasi, Finehaasi n'azaala Abisuuwa, Abisuuwa" 
1Chronicles6:51 n'azaala Bukki, Bukki n'azaala Wuzzi, Wuzzi n'azaala Zerahiya, Zerahiya" 
1Chronicles6:52 n'azaala Merayooti, Merayooti n'azaala Amariya, Amariya n'azaala Ahituubu, Ahituubu" 
1Chronicles6:53 n'azaala Zaddooki, Zaddooki n'azaala Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Bino bye bifo ab'olulyo lwa Arooni mwe baasenga. Abakohati akalulu be kaasooka okulonda ne baweebwa aw'okusenga mu kitundu ekyaweebwa Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles6:55 Baaweebwa Heburooni eky'omu Buyudaaya, n'amalundiro agakyetoolodde." 
1Chronicles6:56 Kyokka ennimiro zaakyo, wamu n'ebyalo byakyo byaweebwa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefunne." 
1Chronicles6:57 Era baawa abasibuka mu Arooni ebibuga eby'obuddukiro: Heburooni, ne Libuna, n'amalundiro gaabyo, ne Yattiri, ne Esitemowa n'amalundiro gaabyo," 
1Chronicles6:58 ne Hileeni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Debiri n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:59 ne Asani n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Betusemesi n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Mu kitundu ekyagabanibwa Ekika kya Benyamiini, Abaleevi ne baweebwa ebibuga bino: Geba n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Alemeti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Anatooti n'amalundiro gaakyo. Ebibuga byabwe byonna ebyaweebwa ab'ennyumba zaabwe zonna, byali kkumi na bisatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Era akalulu bwe kaakubwa, Abahokati abalala ne baweebwa ebibuga kkumi, ebyali mu kitundu ky'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse." 
1Chronicles6:62 Aba buli nnyumba ez'abasibuka mu Gerusoomu, nabo ne baweebwa ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu. Bonna awamu baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bisatu ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Yissakaari, ne ku kya Aseri, ne ku kya Nafutaali, ne ku kya Manasse eky'omu Basani." 
1Chronicles6:63 N'aba buli nnyumba ez'abasibuka mu Merari, ne baweebwa ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu. Bonna awamu baakubirwa akalulu ne baweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bibiri ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Rewubeeni, ne ku kya Gaadi, ne ku kya Zebbulooni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli ne bawa Abaleevi ebibuga eby'okubeerangamu, nga babaweerako n'amalundiro ageetoolodde ebibuga ebyo." 
1Chronicles6:65 Ebibuga ebimenyeddwa amannya ebyaggyibwa ku b'Ekika kya Yuda ne ku b'Ekika kya Simyoni, ne ku b'Ekika kya Benyamiini byagabirwa Abaleevi nga bikubirwa kalulu." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ab'ennyumba ezimu ku ezo ezisibuka mu Kohati baalina ebibuga ebyabwe, ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Efurayimu." 
1Chronicles6:67 Ne baaweebwa ebibuga: Sekemu eky'obuddukiro, n'amalundiro gaakyo ku lusozi Efurayimu, ne Gezeri n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:68 ne Yokumeyaamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Beti Horoni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:69 ne Ayiyalooni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Gatirimooni n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:70 Ate ebyaggyibwa ku kimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse: Aneri n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Bileyaamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne biweebwa abasibuka mu Kohati abaali batannafuna." 
1Chronicles6:71 Abasibuka mu Gerusoomu ne baweebwa ebibuga bino: ebyaggyibwa ku kimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse: Golani eky'omu Basani, wamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Asitarooti n'amalundiro gaakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:72 n'ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Yissakaari: Kedesi n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Daberaati n'amalundiro gaakyo" 
1Chronicles6:73 ne Ramoti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Aneemu n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Era ne baweebwa ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Aseri: Masali n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Abudooni n'amalundiro gaakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:75 ne Hukoki n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Rehobu n'amalundiro gaakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Nafutaali: Kedesi, eky'omu Galilaaya, wamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Hammoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Kiriyatayiimu n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Abasibuka mu Merari abaali batannafuna bibuga, ne baweebwa bino ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Zebbulooni, Rimmoni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Tabori n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:78 Ebuvanjuba bw'Omugga Yorudaani, okumpi n'Ekibuga Yeriko, ne baweebwa ebibuga ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Rewubeeni: Bezeri eky'omu ddungu, wamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Yahuza n'amalundiro gaakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:79 ne Kedemooti n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Mefaati n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:80 n'ebyaggyibwa ku Kika kya Gaadi: ne baweebwa Ramoti eky'omu Gileyaadi, wamu n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Mahanayimu n'amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:81 ne Hesubooni n'amalundiro gaakyo, ne Yazeri n'amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Yissakaari yalina abaana ab'obulenzi bana: Tola, ne Puwa, Yasubu, ne Simurooni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Batabani ba Tola: Wuzzi, ne Refaaya, ne Yeriyeeli, ne Yahumayi, ne Yibusaamu, ne Semweli, be bakulu b'ennyumba z'abasibuka mu Tola, era abasajja ab'amaanyi abazira mu mirembe gyabwe. Mu mulembe gwa Dawudi, ababasibukamu baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mutabani wa Wuzzi yali Yizirahiya. Yizirahiya oyo yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi bana: Miikaneeli, ne Obadiya, ne Yoweeli, ne Yissiya. Bonna abo abasibuka mu Wuzzi baali bantu bakulu mu Kika kyabwe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Baawasa abakazi bangi era baazaala abaana bangi, abasibuka mu bo ne basobola okuvaamu eggye ly'abaserikale emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga." 
1Chronicles7:5 Enkalala entongole ez'amannya g'ab'Ekika kya Yissakaari ziraga abasajja emitwalo munaana mu kasanvu, bonna abaserikale abazira." 
1Chronicles7:6 Batabani ba Benyamiini basatu: Bela, ne Bekeri, ne Yediyayeeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Batabani ba Bela baali bataano: Ezibooni, ne Wuzzi, ne Wuzziyeeli, ne Yerimooti, ne Yiri. Bonna baali bakulu ba nnyumba mu Kika kyabwe, nga batabaazi bazira. Ababasibukamu baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu asatu mu bana, abasobola okulwana mu lutalo." 
1Chronicles7:8 Batabani ba Bekeri: Zemira, ne Yowaasi, ne Eliyezeeri, ne Eleyowenari, ne Omuri, ne Yerimooti, ne Abiya, ne Anatooti, ne Alameti. Abo bonna be batabani ba Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Enkalala entongole ez'amannya gaabwe, ziraga nga baalimu abaserikale abazira emitwalo ebiri mu ebikumi bibiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mutabani wa Yediyayeeli: Bilihaani. Bilihaani oyo yazaala Yewusi ne Benyamiini, ne Ehudi, Kenaana, Zetani, ne Tarusiisi, ne Ahisaahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo bonna baana ba Yediyayeeli. Baali bakulu ba nnyumba mu Kika kyabwe, abaserikale abazira. Abasibuka mu bo, baali omutwalo gumu mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bibiri, abasobola okulwana mu lutalo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Suppimu ne Huppimu be baali batabani ba Yiri, Husimu nga wa Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Batabani ba Nafutaali: Yahaziyeeli, ne Guni, ne Yezeri, ne Sallumu, bazzukulu ba Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasse yalina omukazi Omussiriya, eyamuzaalira Asiriyeeli, ne Makiri kitaawe wa Gileyaadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri n'awasa omukazi mwannyina Huppimu ne Suppimu, erinnya lye Maaka. Omwana ow'obulenzi owookubiri owa Makiri yali Zelofehaadi. Zelofehaadi oyo, yazaala abaana ba buwala bokka." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka muka Makiri, n'azaala omwana ow'obulenzi, n'amutuuma erinnya Peresi. Ne muganda w'oyo yali Seresi. Batabani ba Peresi: Wulamu ne Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Wulamu yazaala Bedani. Abo be basibuka mu Gileyaadi mutabani wa Makiri, Makiri mutabani wa Manasse." 
1Chronicles7:18 Gileyaadi yalina mwannyina nga ye Hammoleketi, eyazaala Yisihoodi, ne Abiyezeeri, ne Mahula." 
1Chronicles7:19 Batabani ba Semida: Ahiyaani, ne Sekemu, ne Liki; ne Aniyaamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efurayimu yazaala Sutela, Sutela n'azaala Beredi, Beredi n'azaala Tahati, Tahati n'azaala Elaada, Elaada n'azaala Tahati, Tahati" 
1Chronicles7:21 n'azaala Zabadi, Zabadi n'azaala Sutela. Efurayimu era yalina ne batabani be abalala babiri: Ezeri ne Eleyaadi, abattibwa Abagaati abazaaliranwa b'omu nsi eyo, abajja okubanyagako ente zaabwe." 
1Chronicles7:22 Kitaabwe Efurayimu n'abakungubagira okumala ennaku nnyingi, baganda be ne bajja okumukubagiza." 
1Chronicles7:23 Efurayimu ne yeegatta ne mukazi we, mukazi we n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi, Efurayimu n'amutuuma erinnya Beriya, kubanga akabi kaagwira amaka ge." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efurayimu yalina omwana ow'obuwala erinnya lye Seera, eyazimba ebibuga Beti Horoni byombi, ekyawansi n'eky'engulu, ne Wuzzenuseera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efurayimu era yalina mutabani we omulala, erinnya lye Reefa. Reefa oyo yazaala Resefu, Resefu n'azaala Tela, Tela n'azaala Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahani n'azaala Laadani, Laadani n'azaala Ammihudi, Ammihudi n'azaala Elisaama, Elisaama" 
1Chronicles7:27 n'azaala Nooni, Nooni n'azaala Yehosuwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Obutaka bwabwe bwali Beteli n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde, n'okutuuka e Gaaza n'ebyalo ebikyetoolodde." 
1Chronicles7:29 Abasibuka mu Manasse, baalina Betisaani n'obubuga bwakyo, Taanaki n'obubuga bwakyo, Megiddo n'obubuga bwakyo, ne Doori n'obubuga bwakyo. Ebifo ebyo byonna bye byasengamu abasibuka mu Yosefu, mutabani wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Batabani ba Aseri: Yimuna, ne Yisuwa, ne Yisuwaayi, ne Beriya. Mwannyinaabwe yali Seera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Batabani ba Beriya: Heberi, ne Malukiyeeli kitaawe wa Biruzayiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi yazaala Yafuleeti, ne Someeri, ne Hotamu, ne mwannyinaabwe Suuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Batabani ba Yafuleeti: Pasaki, ne Bimuhaali, ne Asuvaati." 
1Chronicles7:34 Batabani ba Someeri: Ahi, ne Rooga, ne Yehubba, ne Araamu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Batabani ba muganda we Hotamu: Zoofa, ne Yimuna, ne Selesi ne Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Batabani ba Zoofa: Suuwa, ne Haruneferi, ne Suwali, ne Beri, ne Yimura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, ne Hoodi, ne Samma, Silusa, ne Yituraani, ne Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Batabani ba Yeteri: Yefunne, ne Pisupa, ne Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Batabani ba Wulla: Ara, ne Hanniyeeli, ne Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo bonna baali basibuka mu Aseri, era nga bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, nga basajja balwanyi bazira abeesigika, era nga bakulembeze batutumufu. Baalimu abasajja abasobola okulwana mu lutalo emitwalo ebiri mu kakaaga." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamiini yazaala Bela, ye muggulanda we, owookubiri Asubeeli, owookusatu Ahura," 
1Chronicles8:2 owookuna Nooha, owookutaano Raama." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela yazaala Addari, ne Geera, ne Abihuudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 ne Abisuuwa, ne Naamani, ne Ahoowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 ne Gera, ne Sefufaani, ne Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bano be basibuka mu Ehudi, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajja b'abantu b'e Geba era abawaŋŋangusirizibwa e Manohati:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, ne Ahiya ne Gera eyabawaŋŋangusa era oyo ye kitaawe wa Wuzza ne Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharayiimu yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi bwe yamala okugoba abakazi be Husimu ne Baara. 
1Chronicles8:9 N'awasa Hodesi ne bazaala Yobabu, ne Zibiya ne Meesa, ne Malukaamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 ne Yewuzi, ne Saakiya, ne Miruma. Bonna abo be baali batabani be, abaafuuka abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ne mukazi we Husimu yali azaddemu Abituubu ne Elupaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Batabani ba Elupaali: Eberi, ne Misaamu, ne Samedi. Samedi oyo ye yazimba ebibuga Ono ne Loodi n'obubuga obubyetoolodde," 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya ne Sema be baali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajja b'abantu b'e Ayiyalooni. Abo baagenda e Gaati ne bagobayo abatuuze baayo. 
1Chronicles8:14 Mu basibuka mu Beriya, mwe mwali Ahiyo, Sasaki, ne Yeremooti," 
1Chronicles8:15 ne Zebadiya, ne Araadi, ne Aderi," 
1Chronicles8:16 ne Mikayeli, ne Yisupa, ne Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Batabani ba Elupaali: Zebadiya, ne Mesullamu, ne Heziki, ne Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 ne Yisumeraaya, ne Yizuliya, ne Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu, ne Zikuri, ne Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 ne Eliyenayi, ne Zilutaayi, ne Eliyeeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 ne Adaaya, ne Beraaya, ne Simuraati, baali batabani ba Simeeyi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Yisupa, ne Heberi, ne Eliyeeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 ne Abudooni, ne Zikuri, ne Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 ne Hananiya, ne Elamu, ne Anutotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 ne Yifudeya, ne Penweli, batabani ba Sasaki." 
1Chronicles8:26 Samuserayi, ne Sehariya, ne Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 ne Yaaresiya, ne Eliya, ne Zikuri, bonna basibuka mu Yerohaamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo be baali abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ng'emirembe bwe gyagenda giddiriŋŋana, era baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Kitaawe wa Gibiyoni yabeeranga Gibiyoni, era mukazi we yali ayitibwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Batabani be baali Abudooni omuggulanda, ne Zuuri, ne Kiisi, ne Baali, ne Naadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 ne Gedori, ne Ahiyo, ne Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 ne Mikilooti kitaawe wa Simeeya. Abo nabo baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu wamu ne baganda baabwe, okumpi n'ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe abalala." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri yazaala Kiisi, Kiisi n'azaala Sawulo, Sawulo n'azaala Yonataani, ne Malukisuwa, ne Abinadabu, ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mutabani wa Yonataani yali Meribbaali, Meribbaali yazaala Mikka." 
1Chronicles8:35 Batabani ba Mikka: Pitoni, ne Meleki, ne Tareya, ne Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi yazaala Yehoyaada, Yehoyaada n'azaala Alemeti, ne Azumaveti, ne Zimuri, Zimuri n'azaala Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza n'azaala Bineya, Bineya n'azaala Raafa, Raafa n'azaala Eleyaasa, Eleyaasa n'azaala Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeeli yazaala abaana ab'obulenzi mukaaga, era amannya gaabwe ge gano: Azurikaamu, ne Bokeru, ne Yisimayeli, ne Seyariya, ne Obadiya, ne Hanani. Abo bonna baali batabani ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Batabani ba Eseki muganda wa Azeli be bano: omuggulanda yali Wulamu, owookubiri Yewusi, owookusatu Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Batabani ba Wulamu baali basajja ba maanyi abazira, abakugu mu kulasa obusaale. Baalina abaana n'abazzukulu bangi, bonna awamu kikumi mu ataano. Abo bonna baali ba mu Kika kya Benyamiini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Awo Abayisirayeli bonna ne bawandiikibwa amannya mu nkalala eziraga obuzaale bwabwe. Enkalala ezo ne ziwandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Bassekabaka ba Yisirayeli. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baali baatwalibwa e Babilooni nga basibe, okubabonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
1Chronicles9:2 Abantu abaasooka okudda mu bibanja byabwe ne mu bibuga byabwe, baali abamu ku Bayisirayeli abaabulijjo, ne bakabona, n'Abaleevi, n'abakozi ab'omu Ssinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abamu ku b'omu Bika ekya Yuda, n'ekya Benyamiini, n'ekya Efurayimu n'ekya Manasse, ne babeera mu Yerusaalemu, era be bano:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Wutayi mutabani wa Ammihudi, era muzzukulu wa bano nga bwe baddiriŋŋana: Owuri, ne Yimuri, ne Baani, ne Pereezi mutabani wa Yuda;" 
1Chronicles9:5 mu basibuka mu Seela mutabani wa Yuda: Asaya omuggulanda ne batabani be. 
1Chronicles9:6 Ku batabani ba Zera era mutabani wa Yuda: Yeweli ne baganda be, bonna awamu abantu lukaaga mu kyenda." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ku basibuka mu Benyamiini: Sallu mutabani wa Mesullamu, era muzzukulu wa Hoodaviya mutabani wa Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Yibuniya mutabani wa Yerohaamu, ne Ela mutabani wa Wuzzi era muzzukulu wa Mikuri; ne Mesullamu mutabani wa Sefatiya era muzzukulu wa Reweli mutabani wa Yibuniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Abasajja Ababenyamiini bonna awamu, baali lwenda mu ataano mu mukaaga. Abo bonna baali bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles9:10 Bano be bakabona abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu: Yedaaya, ne Yehoyaribu, ne Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 ne Azariya mutabani wa Hilukiya era muzzukulu wa bano nga bwe baddiriŋŋana: Mesullamu, Zaddooki, Merayooti, ne Ahituubu eyalabiriranga Essinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:12 Bakabona abalala baali: Adaaya mutabani wa Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu mutabani wa Pasuhuuri, Pasuhuuri mutabani wa Malukiya; ne Maasayi mutabani wa Adiyeeli, era muzzukulu wa bano nga bwe baddiriŋŋana: Yazera, Mesullamu, Mesillemiti, ne Yimmeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Bakabona abo baali bakulu mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe, era wamu ne baganda baabwe, baali lukumi mu lusanvu mu nkaaga. Baali basobolera ddala okukola obulungi emirimu gyonna egy'omu Ssinzizo," 
1Chronicles9:14 Bano be Baleevi, abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu: Semaaya mutabani wa Hassubu, Hassubu mutabani wa Azurikaamu, Azurikaamu mutabani wa Hasibiya asibuka mu Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ne Bakubakkari, Heresi, ne Galali, ne Mattaniya mutabani wa Mikka, Mikka mutabani wa Zikuri, Zikuri mutabani wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 ne Obadiya mutabani wa Semaaya era muzzukulu wa Galali, Galali mutabani wa Yedutuuni, ne Berekiya mutabani wa Asa era muzzukulu wa Elukaana eyabeeranga mu byalo by'Abametofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abaggazi: Sallumu, ne Akkubu, ne Talumooni, ne Ahimaani, ne baganda baabwe. Sallumu ye yali abakulira." 
1Chronicles9:18 Abo be baggazi abaakuumanga omulyango ogw'ebuvanjuba ogwayitibwanga Omulyango gwa Kabaka. Era be baali abaggazi ku miryango egyayingiranga mu buli lusiisira lw'Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Sallumu mutabani wa Koore era muzzukulu wa Ebiyasaafu mutabani wa Koora, wamu n'ab'olulyo lwe abasibuka mu jjajjaabwe Koora, be baalabiriranga omulimu gw'obuweereza, nga be baggazi b'emiryango gy'Eweema, nga bajjajjaabe bwe baalabiriranga olusiisira lwa Mukama, nga be bakuumi b'omulyango." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleyazaari ye yakuliranga abaggazi abo mu biseera eby'edda, Mukama ng'ali naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mutabani wa Meselemiya ye yali omuggazi w'omulyango oguyingira mu Weema ey'Okusisinkanirangamu Mukama. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abo bonna abaalondebwa okuba abaggazi b'emiryango, baali ebikumi bibiri mu kkumi na babiri. Bawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe okusinziira ku buzaale bwabwe mu byalo byabwe gye baabeeranga. Abo be bantu Kabaka Dawudi n'omulanzi Samweli be baalonda okukolanga omulimu ogwo ogwateekebwawo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Abantu abo wamu ne bazzukulu baabwe ne babeeranga abaggazi b'emiryango gy'Essinzizo mu mpalo. 
1Chronicles9:24 Abaggazi abo baabeeranga ku njuyi zonna ez'Essinzizo: ebuvanjuba, n'ebugwanjuba, n'ebukiikakkono, n'ebukiikaddyo." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe abaabeeranga mu byalo, bajjanga ne babayamba mu mpalo ku mulimu ogw'obuggazi, okumala ennaku musanvu musanvu." 
1Chronicles9:26 Omulimu guno ogwateekebwawo gwaliko abaggazi abakulu bana Abaleevi, era be baalabiriranga ebisenge n'amawanika eby'oku Ssinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Baasulanga awo nga beetoolodde Essinzizo, kubanga be baakwasibwa omulimu ogw'okulikuuma n'ogw'okuliggulangawo buli nkya." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abamu ku Baleevi baakwasibwa ogw'okulabiriranga ebintu ebikozesebwa mu kusinza, kubanga byabalibwanga nga bitwalibwa okukozesebwa, era ne bibalibwanga nga babikomezzaawo okubitereka." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abalala ne bakwasibwa ogw'okulabiriranga ebintu ebirala byonna ebikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'okulabiriranga obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo, n'obubaane, n'ebyakaloosa." 
1Chronicles9:30 Era abamu ku bakabona be baalongoosanga ebyakaloosa. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mattitiya Omuleevi, omuggulanda wa Sallumu asibuka mu Koora, ye yakolanga omulimu ogwateekebwawo ogw'okufumba obugaati obw'empewere." 
1Chronicles9:32 Abamu ku baganda baabwe ab'olulyo lwa Kohati, be baateekateekanga emigaati egiweebwayo eri Katonda egyateekebwanga ku mmeeza buli Sabbaato." 
1Chronicles9:33 N'abamu ku Baleevi baali bayimbi era nga bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Baasulanga mu bisenge by'oku Ssinzizo, era tebaaweebwa mulimu mulala gwonna, kubanga omulimu ogwabwe baagukolanga emisana n'ekiro." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo baali bakulu ba nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe mu lulyo lw'Abaleevi, mu nnyiriri z'obuzaale bwabwe. Baali bakulembeze, era baabeeranga Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeli kitaawe wa Gibiyoni yabeeranga mu Gibiyoni. Erinnya lya mukazi we, nga ye Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Mutabani we omuggulanda yali Abudooni. Batabani be abalala be bano: Zuuri, ne Kiisi, ne Baali, ne Neeri, ne Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 ne Gedori, ne Ahiyo, ne Zekariya, ne Mikilooti," 
1Chronicles9:38 kitaawe wa Simeyaamu. Abo nabo baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu wamu ne baganda baabwe, okumpi n'ab'eŋŋanda zaabwe abalala." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri yazaala Kiisi, Kiisi n'azaala Sawulo, Sawulo n'azaala Yonataani, ne Malukisuwa, ne Abinadabu, ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mutabani wa Yonataani yali Meribbaali kitaawe wa Mikka. 
1Chronicles9:41 Batabani ba Mikka baali Pitoni, ne Meleki, ne Tareya," 
1Chronicles9:42 ne Ahazi, kitaawe wa Yara. Yara yazaala Alemeti, ne Azumaveti, ne Zimuri kitaawe wa Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza n'azaala Bineya, Bineya n'azaala Refaaya, Refaaya n'azaala Eleyaasa, Eleyaasa n'azaala Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli oyo yazaala abalenzi mukaaga, era gano ge mannya gaabwe: Azurikaamu, Bokeru, ne Yisimayeli, ne Seyariya, ne Obadiya, ne Hanani. Abo be baali batabani ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Awo Abafilistiya ne balwanyisa Abayisirayeli, Abayisirayeli ne badduka Abafilistiya, era Abayisirayeli bangi ne battirwa ku Lusozi Gilubowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilistiya ne bawondera Sawulo ne batabani be, ne batta Yonataani, ne Abinadabu, ne Malukisuwa, batabani ba Sawulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olutalo ne lunyigiriza nnyo Sawulo, abalasi b'obusaale ne bamulaba, ne bamulasa obusaale, n'afuna ebisago eby'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles10:4 Sawulo n'agamba oyo eyakwatanga ebyokulwanyisa bye nti: Ggyayo ekitala kyo, onzite, abo abatali bakomole baleme okujja ne banswaza. Kyokka eyakwatanga ebyokulwanyisa bye, n'agaana, kubanga yatya nnyo. Sawulo kyeyava aggyayo ekitala kye, n'akyetungako." 
1Chronicles10:5 Awo eyakwatanga ebyokulwanyisa bya Sawulo bwe yalaba nga Sawulo afudde, naye ne yeetunga ku kitala ekikye, n'afa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Bw'atyo Sawulo n'akisa omukono, ne batabani be abasatu, n'ab'omu nnyumba ye bonna ne bafiira wamu." 
1Chronicles10:7 Abayisirayeli abaali mu kiwonvu bwe baalaba ng'eggye lya Yisirayeli lidduse era nga Sawulo ne batabani be bafudde, ne baabulira ebibuga byabwe, ne badduka. Abafilistiya ne bajja ne babibeeramu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Awo ku lunaku olwaddako, Abafilistiya bwe bajja okwambula abattiddwa, ne basanga enjole ya Sawulo n'emirambo gya batabani be, nga gigudde ku Lusozi Gilubowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Sawulo ne bamwambula ne bamutemako omutwe, ne bagutwala awamu n'ebyokulwanyisa bye. Ne batuma ababaka wonna mu nsi y'Abafilistiya, okutuusaayo amawulire ago, eri ebifaananyi bye basinza, ne mu bantu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ne bateeka ebyokulwanyisa bye mu ssabo lya balubaale baabwe, ne bawanika omutwe gwe mu ssabo lya Lubaale Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Abatuuze b'e Yabesi Gileyaadi bonna bwe baawulira ekyo Abafilistiya kye baakola Sawulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abazira bonna ne bagenda ne baggyayo enjole ya Sawulo, n'emirambo gya batabani be, ne bagireeta e Yabesi, ne babaziika eyo, wansi w'omuvule, ne basiibira ennaku musanvu." 
1Chronicles10:13 Bw'atyo Sawulo n'akisa omukono, olw'obutaba mwesigwa eri Mukama. Yagaana okukola ekyo Mukama kye yamulagira, era yeebuuza ku musamize amulagule," 
1Chronicles10:14 n'ateebuuza ku Mukama, Mukama kyeyava amutta, obwakabaka n'abuwa Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse." 
1Chronicles11:1 Awo Abayisirayeli bonna ne bakuŋŋaana, ne bajja eri Dawudi mu Heburooni ne bamugamba nti: “Tuli baganda bo ddala." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mu biro eby'edda, Sawulo bwe yali nga ye kabaka, ggwe wakulemberanga Abayisirayeli mu ntabaalo. Mukama Katonda wo n'akugamba nti: ‘Ggwe olikulembera abantu bange Abayisirayeli, era ggwe oliba omufuzi waabwe.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Awo abakulembeze bonna aba Yisirayeli ne bajja eri Kabaka Dawudi mu Heburooni. N'akolerayo nabo endagaano mu maaso ga Mukama, ne bamufukako omuzigo okuba kabaka wa Yisirayeli, nga Mukama bwe yagamba ng'ayita mu Samweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Awo Dawudi n'Abayisirayeli bonna ne bagenda ne balumba Yerusaalemu. Olwo kyali kiyitibwa Yebusi, ng'Abayebusi, abatuuze b'omu nsi eyo be bakibeeramu." 
1Chronicles11:5 Awo Abayebusi ne bagamba Dawudi nti: “Tojja kuyingira muno.” Naye Dawudi n'awamba ekigo ky'e Siyooni, ne kifuuka Ekibuga kya Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Anasooka okuttayo Abayebusi ye anaafuuka omukulu era omuduumizi w'eggye.” Awo Yowaabu nga nnyina ye Zeruyiya, n'aba nga ye asoose okulumba, n'afuuka omukulu w'eggye." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dawudi n'agenda n'abeera mu kigo ekyo, kyebaava bakiyita Ekibuga kya Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 N'akizimba buggya enjuyi zonna okutandikira mu kifo ekyajjuzibwamu ettaka olw'okwerinda, ekiyitibwa Millo. Yowaabu n'azimba buggya ebitundu ebirala eby'ekibuga ekyo." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dawudi n'agenda nga yeeyongera okuba ow'amaanyi, kubanga Mukama Nnannyinimagye yali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bano be baali abakulu, abasajja ab'amaanyi, abazira Dawudi be yalina. Nga bali wamu n'Abayisirayeli bonna, baamuyamba okufuuka kabaka, nga Mukama bwe yagamba ku Ggwanga lya Yisirayeli, era be baakuuma obwakabaka bwe nga bwa maanyi." 
1Chronicles11:11 Abasajja abo ab'amaanyi Dawudi be yalina, be bano: Yasobeyaamu Omuhakimooni omukulu w'abo Amakumi Asatu. Olumu yakwata effumu lye n'alwanyisa abasajja ebikumi bisatu, n'abatta." 
1Chronicles11:12 Owookubiri ku basatu ab'amaanyi, ye Eleyazaari mutabani wa Dodo Omwahohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yali wamu ne Dawudi e Pasidammimu, Abafilistiya bwe baakuŋŋaanira eyo okubalwanyisa mu lutalo awaali omusiri ogujjuddemu bbaale, Abayisirayeli abalala ne badduka." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ye ne basajja be ne bayimirira wakati mu nnimiro ne bagirwanirira, ne batta Abafilistiya. Mukama n'abawa obuwanguzi obw'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles11:15 Awo abasatu ku bakulu amakumi asatu ne baserengeta, ne bajja eri Dawudi mu mpuku y'e Adullamu, eggye ly'Abafilistiya nga lisiisidde mu Kiwonvu Refayiimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Mu kiseera ekyo Dawudi yali mu kigo ekigumu, ate Abafilistiya ng'enkambi yaabwe bagikubye Betilehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawudi ne yeegomba, n'agamba nti: “Kale singa wabaddewo anandeetera amazzi ag'okunywa agava ku luzzi olw'e Betilehemu, oluli okumpi ne wankaaki.”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Awo abo abasatu ne bawaguza mu lusiisira olw'Abafilistiya, ne basena amazzi mu luzzi olw'e Betilehemu, olwali okumpi ne wankaaki, ne bagaleetera Dawudi. Kyokka Dawudi n'atakkiriza kuganywako, wabula n'agayiwa ku ttaka ng'ekiweebwayo eri Mukama," 
1Chronicles11:19 n'agamba nti: “Katonda wange aleme kunzikiriza kunywa mazzi gano, kubanga kiri ng'okunywa omusaayi gw'abasajja bano abawaddeyo obulamu bwabwe okugakima.” Kyeyava agaana okuganywako. Ebyo bye byobuzira abasajja abasatu abo ab'amaanyi bye baakola." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ne Abisaayi muganda wa Yowaabu ye yali omukulu w'abasatu. Yakwata effumu lye n'alwanyisa abasajja ebikumi bisatu, n'abatta, n'ayatiikirira mu basatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ku basatu abo, yali waakitiibwa, ababiri baamussangamu ekitiibwa n'afuuka omukulembeze waabwe, wabula n'ataba mututumufu nga bali abasatu ab'olubereberye." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaaya mutabani wa Yehoyaada ow'e Kabuzeeli naye yali musajja muzira, yakola ebikolwa eby'amaanyi. Yatta Abamowaabu babiri ab'amaanyi ng'empologoma. Era olumu mu biseera eby'obutiti, yakka mu bunnya n'atta empologoma." 
1Chronicles11:23 Era yatta Omumisiri, omusajja omuwanvu ennyo, eyali asobya mu mita ebbiri obuwanvu. Omumisiri oyo yali akutte effumu ng'olunyago lwalyo lwenkana empagi erukirwako engoye. Benaaya n'agenda gy'ali ng'alina muggo, n'amusikako effumu lye, n'alimufumisa, n'amutta." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ebyo Benaaya mutabani wa Yehoyaada bye yakola, n'ayatiikirira ku basajja abo ab'amaanyi abasatu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Kale yalina ekitiibwa okusinga abo amakumi asatu, kyokka teyali mututumufu nga bali abasatu ab'olubereberye. Dawudi n'amufuula omukulu w'abakuumi be." 
1Chronicles11:26 Abasajja abalala ab'amaanyi mu ab'omu ggye be bano: Asaheeli muganda wa Yowaabu, Eluhanani mutabani wa Dodo ow'e Betilehemu." 
1Chronicles11:27 Sammoti Omuharori, Helezi Omupelooni;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Yira mutabani wa Yikkesi Omutekowa; Abiyezeeri Omwanatooti; 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibbekaayi Omuhusati, Yilayi Omwahohi;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharaayi Omunetofa, Heledi mutabani wa Baana Omunetofa;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Yitayi mutabani wa Ribayi ow'e Gibeya eky'Ababenyamiini. Benaaya Omupiratoni. 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurayi ow'oku bugga bw'e Gaasi. Abiyeeli Omwaruuba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azumaveti Omubaharuumu. Eliyaaba Omusaalubooni. 
1Chronicles11:34 Batabani ba Hasemu Omugizoni, Yonataani mutabani wa Sage Omuharari." 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiyaamu mutabani wa Sakari Omuharari, Elifaali mutabani wa Wuuri." 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi ow'e Mekera, Ahiya Omupelooni." 
1Chronicles11:37 Heziro Omukarumeeli, Naarayi mutabani wa Ezubaayi." 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoweeli muganda wa Natani, Mibuhaari mutabani wa Haguri." 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki Omwammoni, Naharayi Omubeeroti, eyakwatanga ebyokulwanyisa bya Yowaabu mutabani wa Zeruyiya." 
1Chronicles11:40 Yira Omuyituri, Garebu Omuyituri;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Wuriya Omuhiiti, Zabadi mutabani wa Ahulaayi." 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mutabani wa Siza Omurewubeeni era omukulembeze w'Abarewubeeni wamu n'ekibinja kye eky'amakumi asatu. 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mutabani wa Maaka, ne Yosafaati Omumituni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Wuzziya Omwasuteraati, Saama ne Yeyeli batabani ba Hotamu Omwaroweri;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyayeeli, ne Yoha, batabani ba Simuri ow'e Tiizi;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyeeli Omumahavi, ne Yeribayi, ne Yosaviya, batabani ba Elunaamu, ne Yitima Omumowaabu;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliyeeli, ne Obedi, ne Yaasiyeeli Omumezooba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Dawudi bwe yali e Zikulagi ng'akyekwese Kabaka Sawulo mutabani wa Kiisi, bano be bajja gy'ali ne bamwegattako, era be bamu ku batabaazi abaamuyambanga mu ntalo ze yalwananga." 
1Chronicles12:2 Baali ba mu Kika kya Benyamiini nga Sawulo bwe yali. Baakwatanga emitego gy'obusaale n'envuumuulo, nga basobola bulungi okulasa obusaale n'okuvuumuula amayinja nga bakozesa omukono ogwa ddyo era n'ogwa kkono." 
1Chronicles12:3 Baali bakulirwa Ahiyezeri, ng'addirirwa Yowaasi, bombi abo nga batabani ba Semaaya ow'e Gibeya. Abaserikale abo be bano: Yeziyeeli ne Peleti batabani ba Azumaveti, Beraka ne Yeehu ow'e Anatooti." 
1Chronicles12:4 Yisumaaya Omugibiyoni, omusajja ow'amaanyi mu abo amakumi asatu era omukulembeze waabwe. Yeremiya ne Yahaziyeeli, ne Yohanaani, ne Yozabadi ow'e Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzaayi ne Yerimooti, ne Beyaliya, ne Semariya, ne Sefatiya ow'e Haruufu." 
1Chronicles12:6 Elukaana ne Yissiya, ne Azareeli, ne Yowezeri, ne Yasobeyaamu, abasibuka mu Koora." 
1Chronicles12:7 Yoweela ne Zebadiya, batabani ba Yerohaamu ow'e Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ne mu Kika kya Gaadi ne muvaamu abasajja ab'amaanyi abazira, abaagoberera Dawudi mu ddungu gye yali akoze ekigo ekigumu. Baali bannamagye abamanyirivu mu kulwana entalo, abamanyi okulwanyisa engabo n'amafumu, abatunuza obukambwe ng'empologoma era abasobola okudduka embiro ng'empeewo ez'oku nsozi. Be bano nga bwe baali baddiriŋŋana:" 
1Chronicles12:9 abakulira yali Ezeri, amuddirira Obadiya, owookusatu Eliyaabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 owookuna Misumanno, owookutaano Yeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 ow'omukaaga Attayi, ow'omusanvu Eliyeeli," 
1Chronicles12:12 ow'omunaana Yohanaani, ow'omwenda Eluzabadi;" 
1Chronicles12:13 ow'ekkumi Yeremiya, n'ow'ekkumi n'omu, Makubannayi." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ab'omu Kika kya Gaadi abo, be baali abakulu mu ggye, nga mu bo ow'amaanyi amatono asobola okulwanyisa abantu kikumi, ate asinga okuba ow'amaanyi, ng'asobola okulwanyisa abantu lukumi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Abo be baasomoka Omugga Yorudaani, mu mwezi ogusooka mu mwaka, mu kiseera omugga ogwo mwe gwanjaalira ku mbalama zaagwo zonna, ne bagoba abatuuze bonna ab'omu biwonvu ne babasaasaanyiza ebuvanjuba era n'ebugwanjuba w'omugga." 
1Chronicles12:16 Awo abamu ku b'omu Kika kya Benyamiini n'ekya Yuda ne bajja eri Dawudi mu kigo kye ekigumu. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dawudi n'avaayo okubasisinkana, n'abagamba nti: “Oba nga muzze lwa bulungi gye ndi okunnyamba, mbaanirizza. Naye oba nga muzze kundyamu lukwe mumpeeyo eri abalabe bange nga tewali kabi ke nkoze, Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, akirabe ababonereze.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Mwoyo wa Mukama n'ajja ku Amasaayi, omukulu wa bali amakumi asatu, n'agamba nti: “Tuli babo, Dawudi. Tuli ku ludda lwo, mutabani wa Yesse! Mirembe, emirembe gibe naawe. Era gibe n'abo abakuyamba. Kubanga Katonda wo ye muyambi wo.” Awo Dawudi n'abaaniriza, n'abafuula bakulu mu ggye lye." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abamu ku batabaazi ab'omu Kika kya Manasse ne beegatta ku Dawudi, bwe yali ng'agenda awamu n'Abafilistiya mu lutalo okulwanyisa Sawulo. Kyokka Dawudi ne basajja be tebaasobola kuyamba Bafilistiya kubanga abakungu b'Abafilistiya bwe baamala okuteesa, ne bagoba Dawudi nga bagamba nti: “Yandituwaayo eri mukama we Sawulo, ne tutemwako emitwe.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Dawudi bwe yali ng'addayo e Zikulagi, ab'omu Kika kya Manasse bano ne bamwegattako: Aduna ne Yozabadi, ne Yediyayeeli, ne Mikayeli, ne Yozabadi ne Elihu, ne Zilletaayi abaaduumiranga abaserikale olukumi lukumi mu ggye ly'Abamanasse." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ne bayamba Dawudi okulwanyisa ebibinja ebyakolanga ebikwekweto, kubanga bonna bali basajja ba maanyi, abazira, era nga bakulu mu ggye." 
1Chronicles12:22 Kumpi buli lunaku abalala bajjanga eri Dawudi okumwegattako, eggye lye ne lifuuka ddene nnyo eritagambika." 
1Chronicles12:23 Gino gye miwendo gy'abo abajja eri Dawudi mu Heburooni nga bakutte ebyokulwanyisa mu ntalo, okumuyamba okufuuka Kabaka mu kifo kya Sawulo, nga Mukama bwe yagamba." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ab'omu Kika kya Yuda kaakaga mu lunaana, abaakwata engabo n'amafumu, nga beetegese okulwana olutalo." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ab'omu Kika kya Simyoni, abasajja ab'amaanyi abazira mu kulwana entalo, baali kasanvu mu kikumi." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ab'omu Kika kya Leevi baali enkumi nnya mu lukaaga. 
1Chronicles12:27 Yehoyaada eyakulembera abasibuka mu Arooni, yajja na nkumi ssatu mu lusanvu." 
1Chronicles12:28 Zaddooki omuvubuka ow'amaanyi omuzira n'ab'omu nnyumba ya kitaawe, baali abakungu amakumi abiri mu babiri." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini abooluganda ne Sawulo, baali enkumi ssatu, kubanga mu kiseera ekyo abasinga obungi ku b'omu Kika ekyo baali bakyanyweredde ku b'ennyumba ya Sawulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ab'omu Kika kya Efurayimu baali emitwalo ebiri mu lunaana, abasajja ab'amaanyi abazira era ab'amannya mu nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ab'omu kitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse baali omutwalo gumu mu kanaana, abaalondebwa okujja okufuula Dawudi Kabaka." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ab'omu Kika kya Yissakaari, abaategeera ekiseera bwe kyali ne bamanya Yisirayeli ky'egwanidde okukola, baali abakulembeze ebikumi bibiri, ne baganda baabwe bonna abagondera ebiragiro byabwe." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ab'omu Kika kya Zebbulooni baali emitwalo etaano abeesigwa era abamalirivu, abaatendekebwa okukozesa buli kyakulwanyisa kyonna." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ab'omu Kika kya Nafutaali baali abakulembeze lukumi, wamu n'abantu baabwe emitwalo esatu mu kasanvu, ababagalidde engabo n'amafumu." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ab'omu Kika kya Daani baali emitwalo ebiri mu kanaana mu lukaaga abaserikale abatendekeddwa okulwana olutalo. 
1Chronicles12:36 N'ab'omu Kika kya Aseri baali emitwalo ena, abeeteeseteese okulwana olutalo." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ab'omu Bika eby'ebuvanjuba wa Yorudaani, ekya Rewubeeni, ekya Gaadi, n'ekitundu ekimu ekyokubiri eky'Ekika kya Manasse, baali emitwalo kkumi n'ebiri, nga balina ebyokulwanyisa ebya buli ngeri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abaserikale abo bonna abaali batendekeddwa okulwana, ne bajja e Heburooni nga balina omutima omumalirivu okufuula Dawudi Kabaka wa Yisirayeli yonna. Era n'Abayisirayeli abalala bonna baali bamaliridde mu ngeri ye emu okufuula Dawudi Kabaka." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ne bamalayo ennaku ssatu nga bali ne Dawudi, nga balya era nga banywa ebyo ab'eggwanga lyabwe bye baali babategekedde." 
1Chronicles12:40 Abantu abaali ab'okumpi, n'abaali ab'ewala ng'ab'Ebika ekya Yissakaari, n'ekya Zebbulooni, n'ekya Nafutaali, ne baleeta endogoyi, eŋŋamiya, ennyumbu, n'ente nga zeetisse ebyokulya: obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, ebitole by'ettiini, n'ebirimba by'emizabbibu ebikaziddwa, n'omwenge, era n'omuzigo gw'emizayiti. Ne baleeta n'ente n'endiga nnyingi ez'okutta okulya, kubanga mu Yisirayeli yonna mwalimu essanyu." 
1Chronicles13:1 Awo Kabaka Dawudi n'ateesa n'abakulu bonna mu ggye abakulira olukumi lukumi, n'abakulira ekikumi kikumi." 
1Chronicles13:2 Awo n'agamba Abayisirayeli bonna abaali mu lukuŋŋaana olwo nti: “Bwe muba ng'ekyo kye musiima, era nga ne Mukama Katonda waffe ky'ayagadde, ka tutumire baganda baffe abalala mu bitundu bya Yisirayeli byonna, ne bakabona n'Abaleevi be bali nabo mu bibuga byabwe, ne mu byalo byabwe, bajje batwegatteko," 
1Chronicles13:3 tukomyewo Essanduuko y'Endagaano eya Katonda waffe, gye twali tutakyafaako mu mirembe gya Sawulo.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Bonna abaali bakuŋŋaanye ne bakisiima, kubanga baalaba nga kituufu." 
1Chronicles13:5 Awo Dawudi n'akuŋŋaanya Abayisirayeli bonna, okuva ku Sihori akagga ak'oku nsalo ne Misiri, okutuuka awayingirirwa e Hamati, okuleeta Essanduuko y'Endagaano eya Katonda okugiggya e Kiriyati Yeyariimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Awo Dawudi n'agenda n'Abayisirayeli bonna e Baala, ye Kiriyati Yeyariimu, eky'omu Buyudaaya, okukimayo Essanduuko ey'Endagaano eya Katonda, eyitibwa Erinnya lya Mukama atuula ku bakerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Essanduuko ya Katonda ne bagitwalira ku kigaali ekiggya nga bagiggya mu nnyumba ya Abinadabu. Wuzza ne Ahiyo ne bavuga ekigaali ekyo. 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawudi n'Abayisirayeli bonna ne bazina n'amaanyi gaabwe gonna mu maaso ga Katonda, nga bayimba era nga batakiza ennanga n'entongooli, n'ebitaasa n'ensaasi, n'amakondeere." 
1Chronicles13:9 Awo bwe batuuka mu gguuliro lya Kidoni, ente ne zeesittala, Wuzza n'agolola omukono gwe n'akwata Essanduuko okugiziyiza okugwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Mukama n'asunguwalira Wuzza oyo, n'amutta, kubanga yakwata ku Ssanduuko. Wuzza n'afiira awo mu maaso ga Katonda." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dawudi n'anyiiga, kubanga Mukama yabonereza Wuzza mu busungu n'obukambwe. Okuva olwo ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Perezuzza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ku lunaku olwo Dawudi n'atya Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Nnyinza ntya okutwala Essanduuko ya Katonda eka ewange?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Dawudi n'atagitwala wuwe mu kibuga kye, wabula n'agikyamya n'agiteeka mu nnyumba ya Obededomu Omugitti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Essanduuko ya Katonda n'emala emyezi esatu mu nnyumba ya Obededomu ng'eri n'ab'omu maka ge. Mukama n'awa omukisa amaka ga Obededomu ne byonna bye yalina. 
1Chronicles14:1 Awo Hiraamu Kabaka w'e Tiiro n'atumira Dawudi ababaka, n'amuweereza emiti egy'emivule, n'ababazzi, n'abazimbi b'amayinja, bazimbire Dawudi olubiri." 
1Chronicles14:2 Awo Dawudi n'ategeera nga Mukama amunywezezza okuba kabaka wa Yisirayeli, kubanga obwakabaka bwe yabugulumiza ku lw'abantu be Abayisirayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dawudi ng'ali eyo mu Yerusaalemu, n'awasaayo abakazi abalala, ne yeeyongera okuzaala abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala." 
1Chronicles14:4 Era gano ge mannya g'abaana, be yazaalira e Yerusaalemu: Sammuwa ne Sobabu, Natani ne Solomooni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Yibuhaari ne Elisuuwa ne Elupeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 ne Nooga, ne Nefegi, ne Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 ne Elisaama, ne Beeliyaada ne Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Abafilistiya bwe baawulira nga Dawudi asiigiddwako omuzigo okuba kabaka wa Yisirayeli yonna, ne bakuŋŋaana bonna ne bagenda bamunoonye. Dawudi bwe yakiwulira, n'agenda okubalwanyisa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Mu kiseera ekyo Abafilistiya baali bazze ne bazinda Ekiwonvu Refayiimu. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dawudi n'abuuza Katonda nti: “ŊŊende nnumbe Abafilistiya? Ononsobozesa okubawangula?” Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Genda, nja kukusobozesa okubawangula.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Awo Abafilistiya ne bagenda e Baali-Peraziimu, Dawudi n'abawangulira eyo. N'agamba nti: “Katonda ankozesezza, n'amenya abalabe bange, ng'omujjuzo gw'amazzi bwe gumenya embibiro.” Ekifo ekyo kyebaava bakituuma Baali-Peraziimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilistiya ne baleka awo ttayo ebifaananyi byabwe bye basinza, Dawudi n'alagira basajja be bakyokye." 
1Chronicles14:13 Abafilistiya ne bakomawo nate, ne bazinda ekiwonvu." 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawudi n'addamu okubuuza Katonda. Katonda n'amugamba nti: “Tobawondera. Kyuka obaveeko, obatuukeko ng'obafuluma mu maaso g'emitugunda." 
1Chronicles14:15 Awo bw'onoowulira enswagiro ku masanso g'emitugunda, n'olyoka olumba, kubanga nze Katonda nkukulembeddemu okuwangula eggye ly'Abafilistiya.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dawudi n'akola nga Katonda bwe yamulagira, ne bagenda nga batta ab'omu ggye ly'Abafilistiya okuva e Gibiyoni okutuuka e Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Ettutumu lya Dawudi ne libuna ensi zonna, era Mukama n'aleetera amawanga gonna okutya Dawudi." 
1Chronicles15:1 Awo Dawudi ne yeezimbira amayumba mu kibuga ekiyitibwa ekya Dawudi. N'ategekera Essanduuko ya Katonda ekifo, n'agisimbira eweema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Awo Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Tewali balala banaasitula Ssanduuko ya Katonda, wabula Abaleevi, kubanga abo Mukama be yalonda okugisitulanga n'okugirabiriranga ennaku zonna.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Awo Dawudi n'ayita Abayisirayeli bonna, ne bajja e Yerusaalemu okutwala Essanduuko ya Mukama mu kifo kye yali agitegekedde." 
1Chronicles15:4 N'ayita abasajja ab'olulyo lwa Arooni, n'Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Kohati, ne wajja Wuriyeeli, ne baganda be kikumi mu abiri b'akulembera." 
1Chronicles15:6 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Merari ne wajja Asaya ne baganda be ebikumi bibiri mu abiri b'akulembera. 
1Chronicles15:7 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Gerusoomu, ne wajja Yoweeli ne baganda be, kikumi mu asatu b'akulembera." 
1Chronicles15:8 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Elizafani, ne wajja Semaaya ne baganda be ebikumi bibiri b'akulembera." 
1Chronicles15:9 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Heburooni, ne wajja Eliyeeli ne baganda be kinaana b'akulembera." 
1Chronicles15:10 Ku b'omu nnyumba ya Wuzziyeeli, ne wajja Amminadabu ne baganda be kikumi mu kkumi na babiri b'akulembera." 
1Chronicles15:11 Awo Dawudi n'ayita bakabona Zaddooki ne Abiyataari, n'Abaleevi bali omukaaga: Wuriyeeli ne Asaya, ne Yoweeli, ne Semaaya, ne Eliyeeli, ne Amminadabu." 
1Chronicles15:12 N'abagamba nti: “Mmwe bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjammwe mu Kika kya Leevi. Mwetukuze, mmwe ne baganda bammwe, mulyoke muleete Essanduuko ya Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, mu kifo kye ngitegekedde." 
1Chronicles15:13 Kubanga si mmwe mwagisitula ku mulundi ogwasooka, Mukama Katonda waffe kyeyava atubonereza mu busungu n'obukambwe, olw'obutakola nga bwe yalagira.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Awo bakabona n'Abaleevi ne beetukuza balyoke baleete Essanduuko ya Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 Ne bagisitulira ku bibegabega byabwe, ku miti kw'esitulirwa, nga Musa bwe yabalagira ng'atuukiriza ekyo Mukama kye yagamba." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dawudi n'alagira abakulu b'Abaleevi okuteekawo baganda baabwe abayimbi, bayimbe era bakube ebivuga eby'entongooli n'ennanga n'ebitaasa mu ddoboozi ery'essanyu." 
1Chronicles15:17 Awo Abaleevi ne balonda Hemani mutabani wa Yoweeli, n'omu ku baganda be: Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya, ne Etani mutabani wa Husaayi omu ku baganda baabwe ab'omu lulyo lwa Merari." 
1Chronicles15:18 Ne bateekawo ne baganda baabwe ab'okubayambako: Zekariya, Beeni ne Yaaziyeeli, ne Semiramoti, ne Yehiyeeli, ne Wunni, Eliyaabu, ne Benaaya, ne Maaseya, ne Mattitiya, ne Elifelehu, ne Mikuneya ne Obededomu, ne Yeyeli, abaggazi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abayimbi Hemani, Asafu, ne Etani, ne bateekebwawo okukuba ebitaasa eby'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekariya, ne Aziyeeli ne Semiramoti, ne Yehiyeeli, ne Wunni, ne Eliyaabu, ne Maaseya, ne Benaaya, ne bateekebwawo, okukuba entongooli ez'eddoboozi eryawaggulu." 
1Chronicles15:21 Mattitiya, ne Elifelehu ne Mikuneya, ne Obededomu, ne Yeyeli ne Azaziya, be baateekebwawo okukulemberanga ennyimba ku nnanga ez'eddoboozi eryeggunda." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya omukulu w'Abaleevi, nga bwe yali omukugu mu by'ennyimba, ye yakuliranga era ye yayigirizanga eby'ennyimba." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya ne Elukaana be baali abaggazi abakuuma Essanduuko ey'Endagaano. 
1Chronicles15:24 Sebaniya ne Yosafaati ne Netaneeli, ne Amasaayi, ne Zekariya ne Benaaya ne Eliyezeeri bakabona, be baafuuwanga amakondeere mu maaso g'Essanduuko ya Katonda. Obededomu ne Yehiya nabo baali baggazi abaakuumanga Essanduuko eyo." 
1Chronicles15:25 Awo Kabaka Dawudi, n'abakulembeze mu Yisirayeli, n'abakulira olukumi lukumi, ne bagenda n'essanyu okukima Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama, nga bagiggya mu nnyumba ya Obededomu." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ne bawaayo ekitambiro ky'ente ennume musanvu ne sseddume z'endiga musanvu, nga Katonda asobozesezza Abaleevi okusitula Essanduuko ye ey'Endagaano." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawudi n'ayambala omunagiro ogw'olugoye olweru olulungi ennyo, era n'abayimbi ne Kenaniya omukulembeze waabwe, n'Abaleevi bonna abaasitula Essanduuko ey'Endagaano, ne bambala bwe batyo. Era Dawudi yali ayambadde n'ekkanzu ey'olugoye olweru." 
1Chronicles15:28 Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli bonna ne baleeta Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama nga baleekaana n'amaloboozi ag'essanyu, nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe n'amakondeere, era nga bakuba nnyo ebitaasa ebisaala, n'entongooli n'ennanga." 
1Chronicles15:29 Awo Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama bwe yali ng'etuuka mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, Mikali muwala wa Sawulo n'alingiza mu ddirisa, n'alaba Kabaka Dawudi ng'azina era nga abuuka olw'essanyu, n'amunyooma mu mutima gwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ne bayingiza Essanduuko ya Katonda, ne bagiteeka wakati mu Weema Dawudi gye yagitegekera. Ne bawaayo eri Katonda ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
1Chronicles16:2 Dawudi bwe yamala okuwaayo ebiweebwayo ebyo, n'awa abantu omukisa mu linnya lya Mukama," 
1Chronicles16:3 n'agabula abantu bonna ebyokulya. N'awa buli musajja na buli mukazi mu Yisirayeli, omugaati n'ekifi ky'ennyama, n'ekitole ky'emizabbibu egikaziddwa ne gisekulibwa." 
1Chronicles16:4 Awo Dawudi n'ateekawo abamu ku Baleevi okuweerezanga mu maaso g'Essanduuko ya Mukama, okujjukiranga okwebazanga, n'okutenderezanga Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ye yalondebwa okuba omukulu, ng'addirirwa Zekariya. Yeyeli ne Semiramoti ne Yehiyeeli, ne Mattitiya, ne Eliyaabu, ne Benaaya, ne Obededomu ne Yeyeli, be baali abakubi b'entongooli n'ennanga. Asafu ye yakubanga ebitaasa ebivuga ennyo." 
1Chronicles16:6 Bakabona babiri Benaaya ne Yahaziyeeli be baafuuwanga bulijjo amakondeere mu maaso g'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Katonda. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ku lunaku olwo Dawudi kwe yateerawo Asafu ne baganda be, n'abalagira okuyimbiranga Mukama okumwebaza." 
1Chronicles16:8 Mwebaze Mukama, mumukoowoole mumanyise amawanga bye yakola." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumuyimbire, muyimbe mumutendereze, mwogere ku byamagero byonna bye yakola." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwenyumiririze mu Ye Omutuukirivu abeesiga Mukama basanyuke. 
1Chronicles16:11 Mwesige Mukama n'amaanyi ge, mumwesigenga bulijjo." 
1Chronicles16:12 Mujjukire ebyamagero n'ebyewuunyo bye yakola era n'emisango gye yasala," 
1Chronicles16:13 mmwe ezzadde lya Yisirayeli omuweereza we, mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo abalondemu be." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ye Mukama Katonda waffe, ye asalawo ensonga z'ensi zonna." 
1Chronicles16:15 Mujjukire endagaano ye bulijjo, ne bye yasuubiza emirembe olukumi." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ye ndagaano gye yakola ne Aburahamu, ne bye yasuubiza Yisaaka ng'alayira n'okulayira." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ye ndagaano gye yanyweza ne Yakobo, n'eba ya lubeerera ne Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:18 Yagamba nti: “Ndibawa ensi ya Kanaani. Eribeerera ddala yammwe ku bwammwe.” 
1Chronicles16:19 Mwali mukyali batono nga temunnayala era mwali batambuze mu nsi eyo," 
1Chronicles16:20 nga mutambula okuva mu nsi emu okudda mu ndala, okuva mu bwakabaka obumu okudda mu bulala." 
1Chronicles16:21 Kyokka teyabaako gw'akkiriza kubabonyaabonya. Okubataasa, yalabula bakabaka nti:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Temukwatanga ku basiige bange, n'abalanzi bange temubakolangako kabi.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Muyimbire Mukama, mmwe ensi zonna Mwatule buli lunaku bwe yatulokola." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mumanyise ekitiibwa kye mu mawanga, abantu bonna bamanye ebyamagero by'akola." 
1Chronicles16:25 Kubanga Mukama mukulu, era agwanira okutenderezebwa ennyo, n'okussibwamu ekitiibwa okusinga balubaale bonna." 
1Chronicles16:26 Kubanga balubaale bonna ab'amawanga amalala, bifaananyi. Naye Mukama ye yakola eggulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Yeetooloddwa ekitiibwa n'obukulu, obuyinza n'essanyu biri awo w'ali." 
1Chronicles16:28 Mutendereze Mukama abantu mwenna abali ku nsi. Mutendereze ekitiibwa kye era n'amaanyi ge. 
1Chronicles16:29 Musseemu Mukama ekitiibwa ekimugwanidde muleete ebiweebwayo, mujje mu maaso ge. Musinze Mukama ng'alabise." 
1Chronicles16:30 Mukankane mu maaso ge mmwe ab'omu nsi zonna. Ensi enywera n'eteyinza kusagaasagana. 
1Chronicles16:31 Eggulu ka lisanyuke era n'ensi k'ejaganye. Boogere mu mawanga nti Mukama ye Kabaka. 
1Chronicles16:32 Ennyanja n'ebigirimu, ewuume. Ennimiro ejaguze n'ebigirimu byonna." 
1Chronicles16:33 Emiti era n'ebibira olw'essanyu bireekaane mu maaso ga Mukama, kubanga ajja okusalira ensi emisango." 
1Chronicles16:34 Kale mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna. 118:1; 136:1; Yer 33:11" 
1Chronicles16:35 Mumugambe nti: “Otulokole, ayi Katonda Omulokozi waffe, Otukuŋŋaanye, otuggye mu mawanga, tulyoke tukwebazenga Ggwe Omutuukirivu, era twenyumiririzenga mu kukutendereza.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwe kaakano n'emirembe gyonna. Awo abantu bonna ne bagamba nti: “Kibe bwe kityo!” Ne batendereza Mukama. 
1Chronicles16:37 Kabaka Dawudi n'alekawo Asafu ne baganda be, bakolenga omulimu gw'obuweereza mu maaso g'Essanduuko y'Endagaano ya Mukama, nga bwe kyabanga kyetaagisa buli lunaku." 
1Chronicles16:38 N'alekawo ne Obededomu mutabani wa Yedutuuni, ne Hosa ne Baleevi bannaabwe nkaaga mu munaana, okuba abaggazi." 
1Chronicles16:39 N'ateekawo Zaddooki kabona ne bakabona banne mu Weema ya Mukama eyali e Gibiyoni mu kifo ekigulumivu kye baasinzizangamu," 
1Chronicles16:40 ku makya n'akawungeezi obutasalako, baweerengayo eri Mukama ku alutaari ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa nga biramba, nga bagoberera byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Mukama, ge yawa Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Awamu nabo, n'ateekawo ne Hemani ne Yedutuuni n'abalala abaalondebwa, abayatuddwa amannya gaabwe, okwebazanga Mukama olw'ekisa kye, kubanga kibeerawo emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani ne Yedutuuni era be baakuumanga amakondeere n'ebitaasa n'ebivuga ebirala, n'abalala bonna bye baakubanga okuyimbira Katonda. Ab'ennyumba ya Yedutuuni be baateekebwawo okuba abaggazi." 
1Chronicles16:43 Awo buli muntu n'addayo ewuwe. Dawudi naye n'addayo ewuwe okubeera n'ab'omu maka ge. 
1Chronicles17:1 Awo olwatuuka, Kabaka Dawudi bwe yamala okukkalira mu lubiri lwe, n'agamba Natani omulanzi nti: “Laba nze nsula mu nnyumba eŋŋumu era eyeekitiibwa, naye Essanduuko ya Mukama ebeera mu weema buweema.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani n'agamba Dawudi nti: “Kola ekikuli ku mutima, kubanga Mukama ali wamu naawe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Naye ekiro ekyo, Katonda n'agamba Natani nti:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Genda ogambe omuweereza wange Dawudi nti Nze Mukama mmugamba nti: ‘Si ggwe ojja okunzimbira ennyumba mwe nnaabeeranga 
1Chronicles17:5 kubanga sibeerangako mu nnyumba okuviira ddala ku lunaku lwe naggya Abayisirayeli mu Misiri n'okutuusa leero, wabula nabeeranga mu weema, era navanga mu kifo ekimu, ne nzira mu kifo ekirala." 
1Chronicles17:6 Mu bifo byonna gye natambulira n'Abayisirayeli bonna, ku bakulembeze be nateekawo okulabirira abantu bange, saabuuzaako n'omu nti lwaki temunzimbira nnyumba eŋŋumu era eyeekitiibwa?’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:7 Mukama era n'agamba Natani nti: “Kale nno gamba omuweereza wange Dawudi nti Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye mmugamba nti: ‘Nakuggya ku gw'okulundanga endiga mu ttale, ne nkufuula omukulembeze w'abantu bange Abayisirayeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Era nabeeranga naawe buli gye wagendanga yonna, ne mmalawo abalabe bo ng'olaba. Era ndikufuula wa ttutumu ng'abafuzi abatutumufu ennyo mu nsi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Nditegekera abantu bange Abayisirayeli ekifo, ne mbateekamu, babeerenga omwo nga kyabwe, balemenga kuddamu kutawaanyizibwa, era abantu ababi nga tebakyababonyaabonya, nga bwe gwali" 
1Chronicles17:10 we nateekerawo abalamuzi okufuganga abantu bange Abayisirayeli. Era ndiwangula abalabe bo bonna. N'ekirala nze Mukama nkugamba nti ndikwaliza ezzadde. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ennaku zo bwe ziriggwaako n'ogenda eri bajjajjaabo, omu ku batabani bo, ndimussaawo okuba kabaka, era ndinyweza obwakabaka bwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Oyo ye alinzimbira ennyumba, era ndinyweza entebe ye ey'obwakabaka emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndiba kitaawe, ye n'aba mwana wange. Siirekengayo kumukwatirwa kisa, nga bwe nalekayo okukikwatirwa oyo eyakusooka okuba kabaka." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ndimuteekawo okulabirira abantu bange n'obwakabaka bwange emirembe gyonna, n'entebe ye ndiginyweza ennaku zonna.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Awo Natani n'abuulira Dawudi byonna nga Mukama bwe yabimugamba, era nga bwe yabimulaga." 
1Chronicles17:16 Awo Kabaka Dawudi n'ayingira mu Weema, n'atuula mu maaso ga Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda, nze n'ab'ennyumba yange, tetusaanidde bino byonna bye wankolera." 
1Chronicles17:17 Era n'ekyo kyali kitono mu maaso go, ayi Katonda. Oyogedde ne ku b'ezzadde lyange nze omuweereza wo, nga bwe baliba mu bbanga eggwanvu erigenda okujja, era onkuzizza, ayi Mukama Katonda, n'onfuula omuntu oweekitiibwa ennyo." 
1Chronicles17:18 Kiki ate ekirala nze Dawudi omuweereza wo, kye nnyinza okukugamba olw'ekitiibwa ky'onzisizzaamu? Kubanga ommanyi nze omuweereza wo." 
1Chronicles17:19 Ayi Mukama, onkoledde ebintu bino byonna ebikulu nga Ggwe weeyagalidde, n'ommanyisa ebintu ebyo byonna ebikulu." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ayi Mukama, tewali akwenkana, era tetuwulirangako nga waliwo Katonda omulala okuggyako Ggwe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Era ggwanga ki eddala eriri ku nsi, eriri ng'ery'abantu bo Abayisirayeli, Ggwe Katonda be wagenda okwenunulira okuba eggwanga eriryo ku bubwo! Ebintu ebikulu era eby'entiisa bye wabakolera, byayatiikiriza erinnya lyo mu nsi yonna. Wagoba ab'amawanga amalala, ne basegulira abantu bo, be wanunula n'obaggya mu Misiri." 
1Chronicles17:22 Abayisirayeli wabafuula abantu bo emirembe gyonna, era naawe Mukama, n'ofuuka Katonda waabwe." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Kale nno, ayi Mukama, nywezanga ennaku zonna ky'osuubizza nze omuweereza wo n'ab'ennyumba yange, era okole nga bw'ogambye." 
1Chronicles17:24 Kale kinywezebwe, olyoke ogulumizibwenga emirembe gyonna, nga bagamba nti: ‘Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ye Katonda wa Yisirayeli era ye alabirira Yisirayeli!’ Era onyweze mu maaso go ab'ennyumba yange, nze Dawudi omuweereza wo." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ayi Katonda wange, nze omuwereza wo ŋŋumye okwegayirira bwe ntyo mu maaso go, kubanga ombikkulidde nze omuweereza wo, ng'ab'ennyumba yange olibafuula bakabaka." 
1Chronicles17:26 Era ggwe, ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda, era osuubizza nze omuweereza wo ebintu ebyo ebirungi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Era kaakano osiimye okuwa omukisa ab'ennyumba yange nze omuweereza wo, beeyongere okuganja mu maaso go ennaku zonna, kubanga Ggwe, ayi Mukama, obawadde omukisa, era gubaweereddwa emirembe gyonna.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Kabaka Dawudi n'alwanyisa Abafilistiya n'abawangula, n'aggya mu mikono gyabwe Ekibuga Gaati n'obubuga obukyetoolodde." 
1Chronicles18:2 N'awangula n'ensi Mowaabu, Abamowaabu ne bafuuka abaddu be ne bamuwanga omusolo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dawudi n'awangula ne Hadadezeri Kabaka w'e Zoba, ekiri okumpi ne Hamati, Hadadezeri oyo bwe yali ng'agenda okunyweza obufuzi bwe mu kitundu ekiriraanye Omugga Ewufuraate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dawudi n'amuwambako amagaali lukumi, n'abaserikale kasanvu abeebagala embalaasi, n'abalala emitwalo ebiri ab'ebigere. Embalaasi zonna ezisika amagaali, Dawudi n'azitema enteega okuggyako ezo zokka ezimala okusika amagaali ekikumi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Abasiriya ab'e Damasiko bwe bajja okuddukkirira Hadadezeri Kabaka w'e Zoba, Dawudi n'abattamu abasajja emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri," 
1Chronicles18:6 ensi yaabwe n'agiteekamu enkambi z'abaserikale, Abasiriya ne bafuuka abaddu be, ne bamuwanga omusolo. Mukama n'awa Dawudi obuwanguzi buli gye yagendanga." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dawudi n'anyaga engabo za zaabu abaweereza ba Hadadezeri ze baalina, n'azitwala e Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ne mu bibuga Tibuhati ne Kuuni ebyafugibwanga Hadadezeri, Dawudi n'aggyamu ekikomo kingi nnyo. Ekikomo ekyo, Solomooni kye yakozesa ogutanka, n'empagi, n'ebintu ebirala eby'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:9 Toowu kabaka w'e Hamati bwe yawulira nga Dawudi awangudde eggye lyonna erya Hadadezeri Kabaka w'e Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 n'atuma mutabani we Hadoraamu eri Kabaka Dawudi okumulamusa n'okumukulisa okulwanyisa Hadadezeri n'amuwangula. Hadadezeri oyo yali mulabe wa Toowu. Hadoraamu n'aleetera Dawudi ebirabo ebya buli ngeri, omwali ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza n'eby'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:11 N'ebyo Kabaka Dawudi n'abiwongera Mukama, wamu ne ffeeza ne zaabu gwe yanyaga mu mawanga gonna: Edomu ne Mowaabu, mu Baamori n'Abafilistiya, ne mu Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Awo Abisaayi mutabani w'omukazi ayitibwa Zeruyiya, n'attira mu Kiwonvu ky'Omunnyo Abeedomu lukumi mu lunaana." 
1Chronicles18:13 N'ateeka enkambi z'abaserikale mu Edomu. Abeedomu bonna ne bafuuka baddu ba Dawudi. Mukama n'awa Dawudi obuwanguzi buli gye yagendanga yonna. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dawudi n'afuga Yisirayeli yonna, era n'akulemberanga abantu be mu mazima n'obwenkanya." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowaabu mutabani wa Zeruyiya ye yali omuduumizi w'eggye ow'oku ntikko. Yehosafaati mutabani wa Ahiluudi ye yawandiikanga ebyagwangawo. 
1Chronicles18:16 Zaddooki mutabani wa Ahituubu, ne Abimeleki mutabani wa Abiyataari, be baali bakabona, Savusa ye yali omuwandiisi." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaaya mutabani wa Yehoyaada ye yali akulira abakuumi ba Dawudi Abakereti n'Abapeleti. Bo batabani ba Dawudi, be baali abakungu ababeera kabaka ku lusegere." 
1Chronicles19:1 Awo ebyo bwe byaggwa, Kabaka Nahasi ow'Abammoni n'afa, mutabani we Hanuni n'amusikira ku bwakabaka." 
1Chronicles19:2 Dawudi n'agamba nti: “Ŋŋenda okulaga Hanuni mutabani wa Nahasi ekisa, nga kitaawe bwe yandaga ekisa.” Dawudi n'atuma ababaka okumukubagiza olw'okufiirwa kitaawe. Abaweereza ba Dawudi ne batuuka ewa Hanuni mu nsi y'Abammoni okumukubagiza." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kyokka abakulembeze b'Abammoni ne bagamba Hanuni nti: “Olowooza Dawudi okukutumira ab'okukukubagiza, ddala aba assaamu kitaawo kitiibwa? Abaweereza be bazze kwetegereza n'okuketta ensi, asobole okugiwamba.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Awo Hanuni n'akwata abaweereza ba Dawudi, n'abamwako ebirevu, n'asalira ebyambalo byabwe wakati okukoma mu butuuriro bwabwe, n'abasiibula." 
1Chronicles19:5 Abantu abamu ne babuulira Dawudi ebikoleddwa ku basajja abo. N'atuma abantu okubasisinkana, kubanga abasajja abo baali bakwatiddwa nnyo ensonyi okudda ewaabwe. Kabaka n'agamba nti: “Mugira musigala e Yeriko okutuusa ebirevu byammwe nga bimaze okukula, mulyoke mukomewo.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Kabaka Hanuni n'Abammoni bwe baalaba nga beekyayisizza Dawudi, ne basasula talanta lukumi eza ffeeza, okupangisa amagaali n'abeebagala embalaasi mu Mesopotaamiya ne mu Maaka ekya Siriya, ne mu Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ne bapangisa amagaali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri, ne kabaka w'e Maaka n'abantu be. Abo ne bajja ne basiisira okwolekera Medeba. Abammoni ne bakuŋŋaana okuva mu bibuga byabwe, ne beetegeka okulwana." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dawudi bwe yakiwulira, n'aweereza Yowaabu n'eggye lyonna ery'abasajja ab'amaanyi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Abammoni ne bafuluma, ne beeteekerateekera olutalo ku mulyango gw'ekibuga kyabwe ekikulu, ate bakabaka abajja, ne baba bokka mu kitundu eky'ettale." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yowaabu bwe yalaba ng'abalabe bajja kumulumba nga bafuluma mu maaso n'emabega we, n'alonda mu basajja ba Yisirayeli abasinga obuzira, n'abategeka okwolekera Abasiriya." 
1Chronicles19:11 Abalala bonna abaasigalawo n'abakwasa Abisaayi muganda we, ne beetegeka okwolekera Abammoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 N'agamba Abisaayi nti: “Abasiriya bwe banansinza amaanyi, onojja n'onnyamba. Naye Abammoni bwe banaakusinza amaanyi, najja ne nkuyamba." 
1Chronicles19:13 Ddamu amaanyi, tulwane masajja ku lw'abantu baffe ne ku lw'ebibuga bya Katonda waffe. Mukama akole nga bw'asiima.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Yowaabu ne basajja be ne basembera okulwanyisa Abasiriya, Abasiriya ne badduka." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abammoni bwe baalaba ng'Abasiriya badduse, nabo ne badduka Abisaayi muganda wa Yowaabu, ne baddayo mu kibuga. Awo Yowaabu n'addayo e Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Abasiriya bwe baalaba nga bawanguddwa Abayisirayeli, ne batuma ababaka, ne baggyayo Abasiriya abaali emitala w'Omugga Ewufuraate, ne Sofaki Omuduumizi w'eggye lya Hadadezeri nga ye mugabe." 
1Chronicles19:17 Dawudi bwe baamubuulira n'akuŋŋaanya eggye lya Yisirayeli lyonna, n'asomoka Omugga Yorudaani, n'abatuukako, ne yeetegeka okubalwanyisa. Awo Dawudi bwe yamala okwetegeka okulwanyisa Abasiriya, Abasiriya abo ne bamulwanyisa." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abasiriya, ne badduka Abayisirayeli. Dawudi n'atta mu Basiriya abasajja kasanvu abavuzi b'amagaali, n'abasajja emitwalo ena ab'ebigere n'atta ne Sofaki omuduumizi w'eggye." 
1Chronicles19:19 Abaweereza ba Hadadezeri bwe baalaba nga bawanguddwa Abayisirayeli, ne bakola endagaano ey'emirembe ne Dawudi, ne bafuuka baddu be. Awo Abasiriya ne batakkiriza kuyamba Bammoni mulundi mulala." 
1Chronicles20:1 Awo olwatuuka, mu kiseera ky'omwaka bakabaka mwe bagendera okulwana entalo, Yowaabu n'akulembera eggye ery'amaanyi, n'azinda ensi y'Abammoni. Kyokka kabaka Dawudi n'asigala e Yerusaalemu. Yowaabu n'azingiza Ekibuga Rabba, n'akirumba n'akizikiriza." 
1Chronicles20:2 Dawudi n'aggya engule ku mutwe gw'ekifaananyi kya Lubaale Moleki ow'Abammoni. Engule eyo yali ya zaabu, ng'ezitowa kilo ng'amakumi asatu mu nnya era ng'erimu amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo. Dawudi n'agaggyamu n'agateeka mu ngule eyiye. Dawudi n'anyaga n'ebintu ebirala bingi mu kibuga ekyo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Abantu baamu n'abaggyamu, n'abakozesa emirimu nga bakozesa emisumeeno, n'ensuuluulu, n'embazzi. Era bw'atyo bwe yakola abantu bonna mu bibuga by'Abammoni. Awo Dawudi n'abantu be bonna ne baddayo e Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, ne wabaawo olutalo e Gezeri wakati w'Abayisirayeli n'Abafilistiya. Sibbekaayi ow'e Huusa n'atta Sippayi, omu ku bazzukulu b'omusajja omuwagguufu. Abafilistiya ne bawangulwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ne wabaawo olutalo olulala n'Abafilistiya. Eluhanani mutabani wa Yayiri n'atta Lahumi muganda wa Goliyaati Omugitti, ng'olunyago lw'effumu lye lunene okwenkana omuti ogulukirwako engoye." 
1Chronicles20:6 Era ne wabaawo olutalo olulala e Gaati, nga lulimu omusajja omuwagguufu eyalina engalo mukaaga ku buli kibatu, n'obugere mukaaga ku buli kigere, byonna awamu amakumi abiri mu bina, engalo n'obugere. Omusajja oyo naye yali muzzukulu wa musajja oli omuwagguufu." 
1Chronicles20:7 Awo bwe yasoomoza Abayisirayeli, Yonataani mutabani wa Simeeya muganda wa Dawudi, n'amutta." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo baali bazzukulu ba musajja omuwagguufu ow'e Gaati, era battibwa Dawudi ne basajja be." 
1Chronicles21:1 Awo Sitaani n'asituka okuleetera Abayisirayeli emitawaana, n'asendasenda Dawudi okubabala." 
1Chronicles21:2 Dawudi n'agamba Yowaabu n'abakulembeze b'abantu nti: “Mugende mu Yisirayeli, okuva e Beruseba okutuuka e Daani, mubale abantu, mukomewo muntegeeze we benkana obungi.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yowaabu n'agamba nti: “Mukama ayaze abantu be, beeyongere obungi emirundi kikumi. Mukama wange Kabaka, bonna bantu bo, ayi Ssaabasajja. Naye lwaki oyagala okukola ekyo, ekinaaleetera Yisirayeli yonna omusango?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Naye Yowaabu n'awalirizibwa okukola ekyo kabaka kye yalagira. N'agenda n'atalaaga Yisirayeli yonna, n'alyoka akomawo e Yerusaalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yowaabu n'aleetera Kabaka Dawudi omuwendo gw'abantu ogwabalibwa. Abasajja bonna mu Yisirayeli abasobola okulwana mu lutalo, baali akakadde kamu mu emitwalo kkumi, ne mu Buyudaaya baali emitwalo amakumi ana mu musanvu." 
1Chronicles21:6 Naye olw'okuba nga Yowaabu ekiragiro kya Kabaka teyakisiima, ab'omu Bika ekya Leevi n'ekya Benyamiini teyababaliramu." 
1Chronicles21:7 Katonda n'anyiiga olw'ekyo ekyakolebwa, kyeyava abonereza Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Dawudi n'agamba Katonda nti: “Nnyonoonye nnyo olw'ekyo kye nkoze. Naye kaakano nkwegayiridde, sonyiwa ekibi kyange nze omuweereza wo, kubanga nkoze kya busirusiru nnyo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Awo Mukama n'agamba Gaadi omulanzi wa Dawudi nti: 
1Chronicles21:10 “Genda ogambe Dawudi nti: ‘Mukama agamba nti akuteereddewo ebintu bisatu, olondeko kimu ky'aba akukolako.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Awo Gaadi n'agenda eri Dawudi, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama agamba nti: ‘Werobozeeko ky'oyagala:" 
1Chronicles21:12 oba emyaka esatu egy'enjala, oba emyezi esatu ng'oyigganyizibwa abalabe bo mu ntalo, oba ennaku ssatu nga Mukama akulumba n'ekitala kye, asindike kawumpuli mu nsi yo, malayika wa Mukama agende ng'atta abantu mu Yisirayeli yonna. Lowooza olabe kye nnaddiza oyo antumye.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dawudi n'agamba Gaadi nti: “Nsobeddwa nnyo. Wabula ka mbonerezebwe Mukama, kubanga ye alina okusaasira kungi, naye nneme kubonerezebwa bantu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Awo Mukama n'asindika kawumpuli mu Yisirayeli, ne mufaamu abantu emitwalo musanvu." 
1Chronicles21:15 Awo Katonda n'atuma malayika e Yerusaalemu okukizikiriza. Bwe yali ng'anateera okukizikiriza, Mukama n'akitunuulira, ne yeddamu olw'akabi ako, n'agamba malayika azikiriza nti: “Kinaamala, kaakano lekera awo okubonereza.” Malayika yali ayimiridde awali egguuliro lya Orunaani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dawudi bwe yayimusa amaaso n'alaba malayika wa Mukama, ng'ayimiridde mu bbanga, wakati w'ensi n'eggulu, ng'akutte mu ngalo ze ekitala ekisowoddwa, ng'akigolodde ku Yerusaalemu. Dawudi n'abakulembeze b'abantu, ne bavuunama amaaso gaabwe okutuuka ku ttaka nga bambadde ebikutiya." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dawudi n'agamba Katonda nti: “Nze nalagira okubala abantu. Nze nnyonoonye ne nkola ekibi ekinene ennyo, naye abantu bano bakoze ki? Nkwegayiridde ayi Mukama Katonda wange, bonereza nze, n'ab'ennyumba ya kitange, owonye abantu bo kawumpuli!”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Malayika wa Mukama n'alagira Gaadi okugamba Dawudi, agende azimbire Mukama alutaari, mu gguuliro lya Orunaani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Dawudi n'agenda, nga Gaadi bwe yamugamba mu linnya lya Mukama." 
1Chronicles21:20 Orunaani yali mu gguuliro ne batabani be abana ng'awuula eŋŋaano. Bwe yakyuka n'alaba malayika, abatabani ne beekweka." 
1Chronicles21:21 Orunaani bwe yalengera Kabaka Dawudi ng'ajja gy'ali, n'ava mu gguuliro, n'amuvuunamira." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dawudi n'amugamba nti: “Nguza ekibanja ky'egguuliro lino, nkisasule omuwendo gwennyini ogukigyamu, nzimbirewo Mukama alutaari, kawumpuli aziyizibwe mu bantu.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunaani n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama wange Kabaka, ekibanja kitwale okole nga bw'onoosiima. N'ente ziizo, nzikuwadde zibe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa n'ebiwuula bibe enku, n'eŋŋaano ebe ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke. Byonna mbikuwa buwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Kabaka Dawudi n'agamba Orunaani nti “Nedda, nja kubigula omuwendo gwennyini ogubigyamu, kubanga siitoole bibyo okuwa Mukama, wadde okuwaayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa kye sitooledde kantu na kamu”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Awo Dawudi n'asasula Orunaani Sekeli lukaaga eza zaabu okugula ekibanja ekyo. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dawudi n'azimbirayo Mukama alutaari, n'awaayo ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa nga biramba, n'ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana. Ne yeegayirira Mukama, Mukama n'amuddamu ng'asindika omuliro ku alutaari nga guva mu ggulu." 
1Chronicles21:27 Mukama n'alagira malayika, malayika n'azza ekitala kye mu kiraato kyakyo." 
1Chronicles21:28 Awo Dawudi bwe yalaba nga Mukama amuzzeemu ky'amusabye ng'ali mu gguuliro lya Orunaani, n'aweerangayo ebitambiro mu kifo ekyo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Eweema ya Mukama, Musa gye yakolera mu ddungu, ne alutaari okwayokerwanga ebitambiro, mu kiseera ekyo byali bikyali mu kifo ekigulumivu kye baasinzizangamu e Gibiyoni," 
1Chronicles21:30 kyokka Dawudi nga tayinza kugendayo okusinza Katonda, kubanga yali atidde ekitala kya malayika wa Mukama." 
1Chronicles22:1 Awo Dawudi n'agamba nti: Eno kye Kisulo Kya Mukama Katonda, era eno ye alutaari Abayisirayeli kwe banaayokeranga ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa nga biramba." 
1Chronicles22:2 Awo Dawudi n'alagira okukuŋŋaanya abagwira bonna abaali mu nsi ya Yisirayeli. N'alondamu, ab'okwasa amayinja n'okugakomola okuzimba Essinzizo." 
1Chronicles22:3 N'ategeka ebyuma bingi eby'okuweesaamu emisumaali n'embaati eby'okugatta enzigi ez'emiryango eminene, n'eby'okuyunga ebintu eby'okukozesa mu kuzimba. N'ategeka n'ekikomo kingi, ekitaasobola na kupimibwa," 
1Chronicles22:4 era n'emiti mingi nnyo egy'emivule egitaasobola kubalibwa, abantu b'e Sidoni n'e Tiiro gye baamuleetera." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dawudi yagamba nti: “Essinzizo erigenda okuzimbirwa Mukama ligwana okuba eryekitiibwa ennyo, okwatiikirira n'okutenderezebwa mu nsi zonna. Naye mutabani wange Solomooni agenda okulizimba, akyali mwana muto, kyenva nditegekera eby'okulizimbisa.” Bw'atyo Dawudi n'ategeka bingi nnyo nga tannafa." 
1Chronicles22:6 N'ayita Solomooni mutabani we, n'amukuutira okuzimbira Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli Essinzizo." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dawudi n'amugamba nti: “Mwana wange, nayagala okuzimbira Mukama Katonda wange Essinzizo okumussaamu ekitiibwa." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kyokka Mukama n'aŋŋaana ng'agamba nti: ‘Walwana entalo nnyingi, n'otta abantu bangi. Kale olw'omusaayi omungi gwe wayiwa nga ndaba, tojja kunzimbira Ssinzizo." 
1Chronicles22:9 Wabula olizaala omwana ow'obulenzi, aliba omuntu ow'emirembe, kubanga ndimuwa emirembe, n'ataba na balabe ku njuyi zonna. Erinnya lye aliba Solomooni, kubanga mu bufuzi bwe ndiwa Yisirayeli emirembe n'obutebenkevu." 
1Chronicles22:10 Oyo ye alinzimbira Essinzizo. Aliba mwana wange, nze ne mba kitaawe. Era ndinyweza entebe y'obwakabaka bwe mu Yisirayeli emirembe gyonna.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Kale mwana wange, Mukama, Katonda wo abeere naawe, akuwe omukisa osobole okumuzimbira Essinzizo nga bwe yayogera ebifa ku ggwe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Ekikulu, Mukama Katonda wo akuwe amagezi n'okutegeera, osobole okufuganga Yisirayeli ng'ogoberera Amateeka ge." 
1Chronicles22:13 Bw'onoogonderanga Amateeka n'ebiragiro Mukama bye yawa Yisirayeli ng'ayita mu Musa, ebintu byonna binaakugenderanga bulungi. Beera muvumu, ogume omwoyo, totya, era teweeraliikirira." 
1Chronicles22:14 Laba nze nfubye nga bwe nsobola ne ntegekera Essinzizo talanta emitwalo kkumi eza zaabu, ne talanta akakadde kamu eza ffeeza, n'ekikomo n'ekyuma, ebitapimika olw'obungi bwayo. Era ntegese n'emiti n'amayinja. Naawe ku ebyo kw'olyongereza ebirala." 
1Chronicles22:15 Era olinawo abakozi bangi nnyo: abayasa amayinja n'abo abagazimbisa, n'ababazzi, n'abalala abalina amagezi n'obumanyirivu okukola emirimu egya buli ngeri," 
1Chronicles22:16 abatabalika bungi, nga bakozesa zaabu ne ffeeza n'ekikomo n'ekyuma. Situka otandike omulimu, era Mukama abeere naawe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Dawudi n'alagira abakulembeze bonna aba Yisirayeli okuyamba Solomooni mutabani we. N'agamba nti: 
1Chronicles22:18 “Mukama Katonda wammwe ali wamu nammwe, era abawadde emirembe ku njuyi zonna. Yansobozesa okuwangula abantu ababeera mu nsi eno, ne bagondera Mukama era nammwe abantu be." 
1Chronicles22:19 Kale kaakano Mukama Katonda wammwe mumuweereze n'omutima gwammwe gwonna n'omwoyo gwammwe gwonna. Musituke mutandike okuzimba Essinzizo, musobole okuteekamu Essanduuko ey'Endagaano ya Mukama, n'ebintu ebirala byonna ebitukuvu ebikozesebwa mu kumusinza, bibeerenga mu Ssinzizo erigenda okumuzimbirwa.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Dawudi bwe yawangaala ennyo n'akaddiwa, n'afuula mutabani we Solomooni kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Kabaka Dawudi n'akuŋŋaanya abakulembeze bonna aba Yisirayeli, ne bakabona, n'Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Abasajja Abaleevi bonna ab'emyaka amakumi asatu n'okusingawo, ne babalibwa kinnoomu, ne bawera emitwalo esatu mu kanaana." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ku abo, emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi nnya, kabaka n'abawa gwa mu Ssinzizo kya Mukama, akakaaga n'abawa gwa bwami n'obulamuzi," 
1Chronicles23:5 enkumi nnya gwa buggazi. N'abalala enkumi nnya n'abawa gwa kutenderezanga Mukama nga bakozesa ebivuga kabaka bye yateekawo olw'omulimu ogwo. 
1Chronicles23:6 Dawudi n'agabanya mu Baleevi ebibinja bisatu, nga batabani ba Leevi bwe baali Gerusooni, Kohati ne Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Ab'omu lulyo lwa Gerusooni: Laadani ne Simeeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadani yalina abatabani basatu: Yehiyeeli nga ye mukulu, ne Zetamu, ne Yoweeli." 
1Chronicles23:9 Batabani ba Simeeyi baali basatu: Selomoti, ne Haziyeeli, ne Harani. Abo be baali abakulu b'ennyumba ez'abasibuka mu Laadani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Batabani ba Simeeyi baali: Yahati, Ziina, ne Yewusi, ne Beriya. Abo abana be baali batabani ba Simeeyi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati ye yali omukulu, Ziiza ye yali owookubiri. Kyokka Yewusi ne Beriya tebaalina baana bangi, kyebaava babalibwa ng'ennyumba emu eyoobujjajja." 
1Chronicles23:12 Batabani ba Kohati baali bana: Amuraamu, Yizuhaari, Heburooni ne Wuzziyeeli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Batabani ba Amuraamu: Arooni ne Musa. Arooni n'ayawulibwa n'abaana ab'obulenzi ab'ezzadde lye, okulabiriranga emirembe gyonna ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo, okwoterezanga Mukama obubaane, okumuweerezanga, n'okuwanga abantu omukisa mu linnya lye." 
1Chronicles23:14 Naye batabani ba Musa omusajja wa Katonda, baabalirwa mu Baleevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Batabani ba Musa: Gerusoomu ne Eliyezeeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Omukulu mu batabani ba Gerusoomu yali Sebweli. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliyezeeri yalina mutabani we omu yekka Rehabiya, kyokka batabani ba Rehabiya ne baba bangi nnyo." 
1Chronicles23:18 Mu batabani ba Yizuhaari, Selomiti ye yali omukulu." 
1Chronicles23:19 Mu batabani ba Heburooni, Yeriya ye yali omukulu, Amariya ye yali owookubiri, Yahaziyeeli ye yali owookusatu, ne Yekameyamu nga ye wookuna." 
1Chronicles23:20 Mu batabani ba Wuzziyeeli Mikka ye mukulu, ate Yissiya ye wookubiri." 
1Chronicles23:21 Batabani ba Merari baali Mahuli ne Muusi. Batabani ba Mahuli baali Eleyazaari ne Kiisi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazaari n'afa nga talina baana ba bulenzi wabula ab'obuwala bokka, ne bafumbirwa bannyinaabwe batabani ba Kiisi, kitaabwe omuto." 
1Chronicles23:23 Batabani ba Muusi baali basatu: Mahuli, ne Ederi ne Yeremooti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo be b'omu Kika kya Leevi, ng'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe bwe zaali, era nga be bakulira ab'ennyumba ezo, omwali abasajja abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingawo, abaabalibwa kinnoomu, ne bawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe, nga be b'okukola omulimu ogw'okuweereza mu Ssinzizo kya Mukama." 
1Chronicles23:25 Kubanga Dawudi yagamba nti: “Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli awadde abantu be emirembe, era naye yennyini anaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu emirembe gyonna." 
1Chronicles23:26 N'olwekyo Abaleevi tekikyabeetaagisanga kusitula Eweema ya Mukama n'ebintu ebikozesebwa mu yo.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Olw'ebyo Dawudi bye yasembyayo okulagira, Abaleevi abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri oba okusingawo, be baawandiikibwanga ku nkalala z'abanaakolanga" 
1Chronicles23:28 omulimu ogw'okuyamba bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Arooni mu byonna ebikwata ku buweereza mu Ssinzizo kya Mukama Katonda: okulabirira empya zaalyo era n'ebisenge; okukuuma buli kintu ekitukuvu, kireme kujaajaamizibwa;" 
1Chronicles23:29 okulabirira ebikwata ku migaati egiweebwayo eri Mukama, obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi olw'ekiweebwayo eky'emmere ey'empeke, ebiweebwayo ebisiikibwa, n'obuwunga obutabuddwamu omuzigo ogw'emizayiti; n'okupima obuzito n'obunene bw'ebiweebwayo mu Ssinzizo." 
1Chronicles23:30 Baalina okuberangawo okwebaza Mukama n'okumutendereza buli nkya n'akawungeezi,"
