Nehemiah5:3 Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Olw'enjala, tusingayo ebibanja byaffe n'ennimiro zaffe ez'emizabbibu n'ennyumba zaffe okufuna eŋŋaano.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 N'abalala ne bagamba nti: “Twewola ensimbi okusasula omusolo gwa kabaka ku bibanja byaffe ne ku nnimiro zaffe ez'emizabbibu. 
Nehemiah5:5 Tuli ba musaayi gumu ne Bayudaaya bannaffe abo, abaana baffe bali ng'abaana baabwe. Kyokka batabani baffe ne bawala baffe tubawaayo okuba abaddu n'abazaana. Era abamu ku bawala baffe bamaze okuweebwayo mu buddu. Tetukyesobola, kubanga ebibanja byaffe n'ennimiro zaffe ez'emizabbibu birina balala.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Bwe nawulira ebyo bye bagamba nga beemulugunya, ne nsunguwala nnyo." 
Nehemiah5:7 Awo ne nneebuuza mu mutima gwange eky'okukola. Ne nnyombesa abakulembeze n'abakungu b'abantu, ne mbagamba nti: “Muliika baganda bammwe amagoba!” Awo ne nkuba olukuŋŋaana lunene okubavunaana." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ne mbagamba nti: “Tukoze kye tusobola okununula Bayudaaya bannaffe abaatundibwa mu b'amawanga amalala. Kaakano nammwe mwagala n'okutunda baganda bammwe, ffe tulyoke tubagule?” Abakulembeze ne basirika busirisi, ne batabaako kye boogera." 
Nehemiah5:9 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Kye mukola si kirungi. Musaanidde okutya Katonda waffe, ne mutatuvumisa balabe baffe ab'amawanga amalala." 
Nehemiah5:10 Nange mbadde mpola abantu ssente n'eŋŋaano, era nga ne baganda bange n'abaweereza bange nabo bakikola. Kati mbeegayiridde, tubasonyiwe amagoba ago." 
Nehemiah5:11 Mbeegayiridde mubaddize olwaleero ebibanja byabwe n'ennimiro zaabwe ez'emizabbibu, n'ez'emizayiti era n'amayumba gaabwe. Mubasonyiwe amabanja gonna ge mubabanja: aga ssente, n'ag'eŋŋaano, ag'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'ag'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Awo abakulembeze ne baddamu nti: “Tujja kukola nga bw'otugambye. Tujja kubaddiza ebintu byabwe byonna, era tubasonyiwe n'amabanja gonna ge tubabanja.” Ne mpita bakabona, ne ndayiza abakulembeze n'abakungu okukola nga bwe basuubizza." 
Nehemiah5:13 Awo ne nkunkumula ekiwuzi kye nneesiba mu kiwato, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Bw'ati Katonda bw'alikunkumula omuntu atakuuma ky'asuubizza, n'amuggya mu nnyumba ye, ne ku mulimu gwe. Omuntu oyo bw'atyo bw'aba akunkumulwa mu ebyo, aggyirwemu ddala.” Ekibiina kyonna ne kigamba nti: “Kibe bwe kityo!” Ne batendereza Mukama. Abantu ne batuukiriza kye baasuubiza." 
Nehemiah5:14 Mu myaka gyonna ekkumi n'ebiri gye namala nga nfuga Buyudaaya, okuva mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri nga Arutazeruzeesi ye kabaka, okutuuka mu mwaka gwe ogw'amakumi asatu mu ebiri, nze wadde baganda bange, tewali yalya ku mmere eyaalibadde eweebwa omufuzi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Abafuzi abansooka, baatulugunyanga abantu nga babaggyako emmere n'omwenge gw'emizabbibu n'ensimbi amakumi ana eza ffeeza. Era n'abaweereza baabwe, nabo baatulugunyanga abantu. Naye nze si bwe nakolanga, kubanga nali nzisaamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
Nehemiah5:16 Nze nanyiikiriranga kukola mulimu gwa kuzimba kisenge kino, ne tuteegulira ttaka. N'abaweereza bange bonna ne beemalira mu kukola mulimu." 
Nehemiah5:17 Ku mmeeza yange naliisanga abantu kikumi mu ataano, Abayudaaya, n'abakulembeze, wamu n'abantu abalala abajja gye tuli nga bava mu mawanga agatwetoolodde." 
Nehemiah5:18 Buli lunaku banteekerateekeranga ente emu, n'endiga mukaaga ensava, n'enkoko era buli nnaku kkumi, omwenge mungi ogwa buli ngeri. Wadde ng'ebyo byali bwe bityo, kyokka namanya ebizibu ebinene abantu bye baalina, ne sibasaliranga mmere gye banditeekeddwa okuwa omufuzi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ayi Katonda wange, jjukira byonna bye nkoledde abantu bano, onsasulemu ebirungi." 
Nehemiah6:1 Awo Sanuballati ne Tobiya ne Gesemu Omuwarabu n'abalabe baffe abalala bonna, ne bamanya nga mmalirizza okuzimba ekisenge, era nga temuli bituli bisigaddemu, newaakubadde nga nali sinnassa nzigi mu miryango." 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanuballati ne Gesemu ne bantumira nga bagamba nti: “Jjangu tusisinkane mu kimu ku byalo by'omu lusenyi lwa Ono.” Naye nga kye bagenderera kwe kunkolako akabi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Ne mbatumira ababaka nga ŋŋamba nti: “Sisobola kujja, kubanga omulimu gwe ndiko munene. Kaakano ndekewo omulimu, guyimirire, ndyoke nzije eyo gye muli?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ne bantumira bwe batyo emirundi ena, nange nga mbaddamu bwe ntyo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Awo Sanuballati n'antumira omuweereza we mu ngeri ye emu omulundi ogwokutaano ng'aleetedde mu mukono gwe ebbaluwa eteri nsibe. 
Nehemiah6:6 Mu bbaluwa eyo yawandiika nti: “Gesemu ambuulidde nti waliwo oluvuuvuumo mu bantu abatwetoolodde nti ggwe n'Abayudaaya muteekateeka okujeema, kye kikuzimbisa ekisenge. Era agambye nti oyagala okuba kabaka waabwe," 
Nehemiah6:7 era otaddewo n'abalanzi abanaabuulira abantu ebigambo byo mu Yerusaalemu nti: ‘Mu Buyudaaya mulimu kabaka.’ Kale kabaka taaleme kubuulirwa bigambo ebyo. N'olwekyo jjangu, tubyogereko.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ne mmutumira nti: “Byonna by'ogamba tebibeerangawo, ggwe obyeyiiyirizza ku bubwo.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Kubanga bonna baali baagala kututiisa nga balowooza nti tujja kuva ku mulimu guleme kukolebwa. Kyokka kaakano, ayi Katonda onnyongere amaanyi." 
Nehemiah6:10 Awo ne ŋŋenda ewa Semaaya mutabani wa Delaaya era muzzukulu wa Meketabeli eyali tasobola kuva mu nnyumba ye. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Tugende twekweke mu kifo Ekitukuvu eky'omu Ssinzizo, twesibiremu kubanga bagenda kujja kukutta. Ddala ekiro banajja okukutta.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ne mmuddamu nti: “Omusajja nga nze nnyinza ntya okudduka ne nneekweka? Era nnyinza ntya okuyingira mu Ssinzizo okuwonyezaamu obulamu bwange? Sijja kukikola.” 
Nehemiah6:12 Ne mmanya era ne ntegeera nga Katonda si ye yatuma Semaaya okwogera ebyo, wabula nga yeeyogeza eby'obulanzi ebyo, kubanga Tobiya ne Sanuballati be baali bamuguliridde." 
Nehemiah6:13 Baamugulirira antiisetiise nkole bwe ntyo ngwe mu kibi, balyoke banjogereko obubi, banswazeswaze." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ayi Katonda wange, jjukira Tobiya ne Sanuballati kye bakoze. Era jjukira n'omulanzi omukazi Nowadiya n'abalanzi abalala abagezezzaako okuntiisa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Awo ne tumaliriza okuzimba ekisenge ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mw'ettaano mu mwezi ogwa Eluuli. Omulimu ogwo gwakolebwa mu nnaku amakumi ataano mu bbiri. 
Nehemiah6:16 Abalabe baffe bonna bwe baawulira, n'ab'amawanga gonna agatwetoolodde bwe baalaba ebyo, ne baggweeramu ddala amaanyi, kubanga baamanya ng'omulimu ogwo gwakolebwa, nga Katonda waffe ye atubedde." 
Nehemiah6:17 Mu biseera ebyo abakungu b'omu Buyudaaya baaweerezanga Tobiya ebbaluwa nnyingi era ne Tobiya ng'abaddamu. 
Nehemiah6:18 Mu Buyudaaya mwalimu abantu bangi abaali ku ludda lwe, kubanga Sekaniya mutabani wa Ara ye yali kitaawe wa mukazi we. Ate ne mutabani we Yehohanani yali awasizza muwala wa Mesullamu, mutabani wa Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Abantu baayogereranga we ndi ebirungi Tobiya by'akola, ate ne bamubuuliranga bye njogedde. Tobiya n'ampandiikiranga ebbaluwa ezintiisatiisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Awo olwatuuka ekisenge bwe kyaggwa okuzimba, era nga mmaze okuteekamu enzigi, era ng'abaggazi, n'abayimbi, era n'Abaleevi balondeddwa," 
Nehemiah7:2 ne nteekawo muganda wange Hanani, ne Hananiya omufuzi w'ekigo eky'okwerinda okulabiriranga Yerusaalemu. Hananiya oyo yali mwesigwa, era nga mu kutya Katonda tewali amwenkana." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ne mbagamba nti: “Emiryango gya Yerusaalemu tegiggulwangawo ng'akasana tekannabaaluuka, era bagiggalenga, gisibwe ng'abakuumi bakyakuuma. Era muteekeewo abakuumi okuva mu batuuze b'omu Yerusaalemu, bakuume mu mpalo zaabwe, era buli mukuumi akuume ekitundu ennyumba ye mw'etunudde.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Yerusaalemu kyali kibuga kinene, naye mwalimu abantu batono era nga n'ennyumba ezizimbiddwa si nnyingi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Katonda n'anteekamu ekirowoozo eky'okukuŋŋaanya abakungu, n'abakulembeze b'abantu, n'abantu abalala babalibwe mu maka mwe bazaalibwa. Ne nzuula ekitabo eky'obuzaale bw'abo abaasooka okuva mu buwaŋŋanguse nga bawandiikiddwamu bwe bati:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Bano be bantu abaava mu kitundu ky'e Babilooni abaakomawo e Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya buli muntu ng'adda mu kibuga ky'ewaabwe. Abantu bano Kabaka Nebukadunezzari yali abatutte e Babilooni nga basibe. 
Nehemiah7:7 Abakulu baabwe baali Zerubabbeeli, Yeswa, Nehemiya, Azariya, Raamiya, Nahamani, Moruddekaayi, Bilisani, Misupereti, Biguvaayi, Nehumu ne Baana. Guno gwe muwendo gw'abasajja Abayisirayeli:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Ab'ezzadde lya Parosi, enkumi bbiri mu kikumi mu nsanvu mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:9 Ab'ezzadde lya Sefatiya, ebikumi bisatu mu nsanvu mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:10 Ab'ezzadde lya Ara, lukaaga mu ataano mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:11 Ab'ezzadde lya Pahati Mowaabu, bazzukulu ba Yeswa ne Yowaabu, enkumi bbiri, mu lunaana mu kkumi na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:12 Ab'ezzadde lya Elamu, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana." 
Nehemiah7:13 Ab'ezzadde lya Zattu, lunaana mu ana mu bataano." 
Nehemiah7:14 Ab'ezzadde lya Zakkayi, lusanvu mu nkaaga." 
Nehemiah7:15 Ab'ezzadde lya Binnuyi, lukaaga mu ana mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:16 Ab'ezzadde lya Bebayi, lukaaga mu abiri mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:17 Ab'ezzadde lya Azugaadi, enkumi bbiri mu bisatu mu abiri mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:18 Ab'ezzadde lya Adonikamu, lukaaga mu nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Nehemiah7:19 Ab'ezzadde lya Biguvaayi, enkumi bbiri mu nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Nehemiah7:20 Ab'ezzadde lya Adini, lukaaga mu ataano mu bataano." 
Nehemiah7:21 Ab'ezzadde lya Ateri era gwe bayita Heezeekiya, kyenda mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:22 Ab'ezzadde lya Hasumu, bisatu mu abiri mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:23 Ab'ezzadde lya Bezayi, bisatu mu abiri mu bana." 
Nehemiah7:24 Ab'ezzadde lya Halifu, kikumi mu kkumi na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:25 Ab'ezzadde lya Gibiyoni, kyenda mu bataano." 
Nehemiah7:26 Abasajja abasibuka mu Betilehemu ne Netofa, kikumi mu kinaana mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:27 Abasajja abasibuka mu Anatooti, kikumi mu abiri mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:28 Abasajja abasibuka mu Beti-Azumaveti, amakumi ana mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:29 Abasajja abasibuka mu Kiriyati-Yeyariimu, Kefira ne Beroti, lusanvu mu ana mu basatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Abasajja abasibuka mu Raama ne Geba, lukaaga mu abiri mu omu." 
Nehemiah7:31 Abasajja abasibuka mu Mikumasi, kikumi mu abiri mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:32 Abasajja abasibuka mu Beteli ne Ayi, kikumi mu abiri mu basatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Abasajja abasibuka mu Nebo ekirala, amakumi ataano mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:34 Ab'ezzadde lya Elamu omulala, lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano mu bana." 
Nehemiah7:35 Ab'ezzadde lya Arimu, ebikumi bisatu mu amakumi abiri." 
Nehemiah7:36 Ab'ezzadde lya Yeriko, ebikumi bisatu mu ana mu bataano." 
Nehemiah7:37 Ab'ezzadde lya Loodi, ne Hadidi ne Ono, lusanvu mu abiri mu omu." 
Nehemiah7:38 Ab'ezzadde lya Ssena, enkumi ssatu mu lwenda mu asatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Bakabona: ab'ezzadde lya Yedaaya, bazzukulu ba Yeswa, lwenda mu nsanvu mu basatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Ab'ezzadde lya Yimmeri, lukumi mu ataano mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:41 Ab'ezzadde lya Pasuhuuri, lukumi mu bibiri mu ana mu musanvu." 
Nehemiah7:42 Ab'ezzadde lya Harimu, lukumi mu kkumi na musanvu." 
Nehemiah7:43 Ab'ennyumba z'Abaleevi abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse be bano: Ab'ezzadde lya Yeswa ne Kadumyeli abasibuka mu Hodeva, nsanvu mu bana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abayimbi ab'ezzadde lya Asafu, kikumi mu ana mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abaggazi ab'ezzadde lya Sallumu, n'erya Ateri, n'erya Talumooni, n'erya Akkubu, n'erya Atita, n'erya Sobayi, kikumi mu asatu mu munaana." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abaweereza b'omu Ssinzizo ab'ezzadde lya Ziha, n'erya Asufa, n'erya Tabbawooti;" 
Nehemiah7:47 ab'ezzadde lya Kerosi, n'erya Siya, n'erya Padoni;" 
Nehemiah7:48 ab'ezzadde lya Lebana n'erya Hagaba, n'erya Salumayi;" 
Nehemiah7:49 ab'ezzadde lya Hanani, n'erya Giddeli, n'erya Gahari;" 
Nehemiah7:50 ab'ezzadde lya Reyaaya, n'erya Rezini, n'erya Nekoda" 
Nehemiah7:51 ab'ezzadde lya Gazzamu, n'erya Wuzza, n'erya Paseya;" 
Nehemiah7:52 ab'ezzadde lya Besayi, n'erya Mewuniimu, n'erya Nefusesimu;" 
Nehemiah7:53 ab'ezzadde lya Bakubuki, n'erya Akufa, n'erya Arukuri;" 
Nehemiah7:54 ab'ezzadde lya Bazuliti, n'erya Mekida, n'erya Arusa;" 
Nehemiah7:55 ab'ezzadde lya Barukosi, n'erya Sisera, n'erya Tema;" 
Nehemiah7:56 ab'ezzadde lya Neziya n'erya Atiifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Ab'ezzadde ly'abaweereza ba Solomooni: ab'ezzadde lya Sotayi, n'erya Sofereti, n'erya Perida;" 
Nehemiah7:58 ab'ezzadde lya Yaala, n'erya Darukoni, n'erya Giddeli;" 
Nehemiah7:59 ab'ezzadde lya Sefatiya, n'erya Attili, n'erya Pokereti Azebayimu, n'erya Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Ab'ezzadde ly'abaweereza b'omu Ssinzizo, n'ery'abaweereza ba Solomooni bonna awamu, baali ebikumi bisatu mu kyenda mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:61 Bano be baava mu bibuga Telumela, Teluharusa, Kerubu, Addoni ne Yimmeri, kyokka nga tebayinza kulaga nnyumba za bajjajjaabwe mwe basibuka, wadde obuzaale bwabwe nti Bayisirayeli:" 
Nehemiah7:62 ab'ezzadde lya Delaaya, n'erya Tobiya, n'erya Nekoda, bonna awamu lukaaga mu ana mu babiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ne mu bakabona, waaliwo ab'ezzadde lya Hobaya, n'erya Hakkozi, n'erya Baruzillayi, eyawasa omu ku bawala ba Baluzillayi Omugileyaadi, n'atuumibwa erinnya lyabwe." 
Nehemiah7:64 Abo ne banoonya we baawandiikibwa mu nkalala z'obuzaale naye ne watalabika, kye baava baboolebwa mu bwakabona nti si balongoofu." 
Nehemiah7:65 Omufuzi n'abagaana okulya ku mmere entukuvu ennyo, okutuusa nga bafunye kabona asobola okukozesa Wurimu ne Tummimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Bonna awamu abaakomawo okuva mu buwaŋŋanguse baali emitwalo ena mu enkumi bbiri mu bisatu mu nkaaga," 
Nehemiah7:67 nga tobaliddeeko baddu baabwe na bazaana baabwe abaali akasanvu mu ebisatu mu asatu mu musanvu. Era baalina abayimbi ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu bataano abasajja n'abakazi. 
Nehemiah7:68 Embalaasi zaabwe zaali lusanvu mu asatu mu mukaaga, ennyumbu zaabwe zaali ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu ttaano." 
Nehemiah7:69 Eŋŋamiya zaabwe zaali ebikumi bina mu asatu mu ttaano, endogoyi zaabwe kakaaga mu lusanvu mu abiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Awo abamu ku bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ne bawaayo eby'okukola omulimu. Omufuzi n'awaayo mu ggwanika ensimbi kilo munaana eza zaabu, n'ebbenseni amakumi ataano, n'ebyambalo ebikumi bitaano mu asatu, ebya bakabona." 
Nehemiah7:71 Era abamu ku bakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe, ne bawaayo mu ggwanika ensimbi kilo kikumi mu nkaaga mu munaana eza zaabu, ne kilo lukumi mu bibiri mu ataano eza ffeeza." 
Nehemiah7:72 Abantu abalala ne bawaayo ensimbi, kilo kikumi mu nkaaga mu munaana eza zaabu, ne kilo kikumi mu ana ffeeza, n'ebyambalo nkaaga mu musanvu ebya bakabona." 
Nehemiah7:73 Bwe batyo bakabona n'Abaleevi, n'abaggazi, n'abayimbi, n'abamu ku bantu abaabulijjo, n'abaweereza b'omu Ssinzizo, n'Abayisirayeli bonna, ne babeeranga mu bibuga byabwe. Omwezi ogw'omusanvu okutuuka, Abayisirayeli nga bali mu bibuga byabwe." 
Nehemiah8:1 Awo Abayisirayeli bonna ng'omuntu omu, ne bakuŋŋaanira mu Yerusaalemu, mu kibangirizi ekiri mu maaso g'Omulyango gw'Amazzi. Ezera omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka ne bamugamba aleete Ekitabo ky'Amateeka, Mukama ge yawa Yisirayeli ng'ayita mu Musa." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ku lunaku olubereberye olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, Ezera kabona n'aleeta ekitabo ekyo, mu kifo Abayisirayeli bonna we bakuŋŋaanidde, abasajja n'abakazi n'abaana bonna abasobola okutegeera." 
Nehemiah8:3 N'asoma ebikirimu, ng'atunudde mu kibangirizi ekiri mu maaso g'Omulyango ogw'Amazzi. Yakibasomera okuva ku makya okutuusa mu ttuntu, nga bonna bateze amatu okuwulira eby'omu kitabo ekyo eky'Amateeka." 
Nehemiah8:4 Awo Ezera omunnyonnyozi w'amateeka n'ayimirira ku kituuti eky'embaawo, ekyakolebwa olw'omulimu ogwo. Era okumpi naye ne wayimirirawo Mattitiya, ne Sema, ne Anaya, ne Wuriya, ne Hilukiya, ne Maaseya ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, ne Pedaaya, ne Misayeli, ne Malukiya, ne Hasumu, ne Hasubaddana, ne Zekariya, ne Mesullamu, ku mukono gwe ogwa kkono." 
Nehemiah8:5 Awo Ezera n'ayanjuluza ekitabo ng'abantu bonna bamulaba bulungi, kubanga yali ayimiridde ku kituuti. Bwe yayanjuluza ekitabo, bonna ne bayimirira." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezera n'agamba nti: “Mukama Katonda atenderezebwe, kubanga mukulu!” Awo abantu bonna ne baddamu nti: “Weewaawo, weewaawo,” nga bawanika emikono gyabwe. Ne bavuunama ne basinza Mukama, ng'emitwe gyabwe gikoona ku ttaka." 
Nehemiah8:7 Awo abantu ne bayimirira mu bifo byabwe, Yeswa, ne Baani, ne Serebiya, ne Yamini, ne Akubu, ne Sabbetaayi, ne Hodiya, ne Maaseya, ne Kelita, ne Azariya, ne Yozabadi, ne Hanani, ne Pelaya, n'Abaleevi ne bannyonnyola abantu Amateeka." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ne basoma mu ddoboozi eriwulikika, ebiri mu kitabo ky'Amateeka ga Katonda, nga bannyonnyola amakulu, abantu basobole okutegeera ebisomeddwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Awo abantu bwe baawulira Amateeka bye galagira okukola, ne bakaaba amaziga. Awo Nehemiya Omufuzi, ne Ezera kabona, era omunnyonnyozi w'Amateeka, n'Abaleevi abaayigirizanga abantu Amateeka, ne bagamba abantu bonna nti: “Olunaku luno lutukuvu eri Mukama Katonda wammwe. N'olwekyo muleme kunakuwala, wadde okukaaba amaziga." 
Nehemiah8:10 Kaakano muddeyo ewammwe, mulye ebyassava, munywe omwenge oguwooma, mugabanyizeeko n'abo abatabirina, kubanga olunaku luno lutukuvu eri Mukama waffe. Kale temunakuwala, kubanga essanyu Mukama ly'abawa, ge maanyi gammwe.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Abaleevi ne bagenda nga bawooyawooya abantu, nga bagamba nti: “Mukkakkane, kubanga olunaku luno lutukuvu, temunakuwala.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Awo abantu ne baddayo ewaabwe, ne balya ne banywa nga basanyuka, era ne bagabira ne ku bannaabwe, kubanga baali bategedde ebyali bibasomeddwa." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ku lunaku olwaddirira, abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajja b'abantu bonna ne bajja, wamu ne bakabona n'Abaleevi, ne bakuŋŋaanira ewa Ezera omunnyonnyozi w'Amateeka okuyiga eby'omu Mateeka." 
Nehemiah8:14 Mu Mateeka, Mukama ge yawa ng'ayita mu Musa, ne basanga nti Abayisirayeli banaasulanga mu nsiisira mu biseera eby'embaga ey'omu mwezi ogw'omusanvu." 
Nehemiah8:15 Banaamanyisanga era banaalangiriranga mu bibuga byabwe byonna ne mu Yerusaalemu nti: “Mwambuke ku busozi, muleete amatabi g'emizayiti emisimbe n'ag'egy'omu nsiko, n'ag'emiti egy'ebisaka, n'ag'enkindu, n'ag'emiti emiziyivu, muzimbe ensiisira nga bwe kyawandiikibwa.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Bwe batyo abantu ne bagenda, ne baleeta amatabi ago, ne beezimbira ensiisira, buli omu ku kasolya k'ennyumba ye akabeebeetevu, ne mu luggya lwe, ne mu luggya lw'Essinzizo, ne mu kibangirizi eky'oku Mulyango ogw'Amazzi, n'eky'oku Mulyango gwa Efurayimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Abantu bonna abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse ne bazimba ensiisira ne bazisulamu. Abayisirayeli ne basanyuka nnyo, kubanga okuva mu biseera bya Yeswa mutabani wa Nuuni, okutuuka ku lunaku olwo, baali tebakirabangako." 
Nehemiah8:18 Buli lunaku, okuva ku lunaku olusooka olw'embaga, okutuuka ku lusembayo, Ezera n'abasomeranga eby'omu kitabo ky'Amateeka ga Katonda. Embaga n'emala ennaku musanvu, ku lunaku olw'omunaana ne wabaawo olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, ng'ekiragiro bwe kigamba." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi ogwo, Abayisirayeli ne bakuŋŋaana, ne basiiba era ne bambala ebikutiya, nga basaabye n'ettaka ku mitwe gyabwe, okulaga nga bwe banyoleddwa olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Nehemiah9:2 Baali beeyawudde ku b'amawanga amalala, ne bayimirira okwatula ebibi byabwe n'ebya bajjajjaabwe." 
Nehemiah9:3 Nga bayimiridde mu bifo byabwe ne basoma mu kitabo ky'Amateeka ga Mukama Katonda waabwe, okumala essaawa ssatu. Ate essaawa essatu ezaddirira, ne bazimala nga baatula ebibi byabwe, era nga basinza Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
Nehemiah9:4 Awo Yeswa, ne Baani, ne Kadumyeli, ne Sebamiya, ne Bunni, ne Serebiya, ne Baani, ne Kenani ne bayimirira ku madaala g'Abaleevi, ne bawanjagira Mukama Katonda waabwe mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka." 
Nehemiah9:5 Awo Abaleevi: Yeswa, ne Kadumyeli, ne Baani, ne Asabuneya, ne Serebiya, ne Hodiya, ne Sebaniya, ne Petahiya ne bagamba abantu nti: “Musituke mutendereze Mukama Katonda wammwe, nga mugamba nti: Okuva ddi na ddi erinnya lyo eryekitiibwa erisukkulumye amatendo gonna, ligulumizibwe emirembe gyonna." 
Nehemiah9:6 Ayi Mukama, ggwe Mukama wekka. Ggwe watonda eggulu n'ebiri wa ggulu mu bbanga. Ggwe watonda olukalu n'ennyanja n'ebibirimu byonna, era ggwe obikuuma byonna. Eby'omu ggulu ggwe bisinza." 
Nehemiah9:7 Ggwe Mukama Katonda eyalonda Aburaamu, mu Wuuri eky'Abakaludaaya, n'omutuuma Aburahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Walaba omutima gwe, nga mwesigwa gy'oli n'okola naye endagaano. N'omusuubiza okumuwa ensi y'Abakanaani ey'Abahiiti n'Abaamori, ensi y'Abaperezi ey'Abayebusi n'Abagirugaasi ebe ya bazzukulu be. Era n'okituukiriza, kuba oli mutuukirivu." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Walaba okubonaabona kwa bajjajjaffe mu Misiri, n'owulira okukaaba kwabwe ku nnyanja emmyufu." 
Nehemiah9:10 Wakola ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero ku kabaka w'e Misiri, ku bakungu be bonna ne ku bantu b'omu nsi ye, kubanga wamanya bwe baabonyaabonya bajjajjaffe. Ne weefunira ettutumu erikutenza ne leero." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ennyanja wagitemamu wabiri nga balaba n'agaabwe, ne batambulira awakalu okugiyitamu wakati. Abo abaabawondera n'obakasuka ebuziba, ng'ejjinja erikasukibwa mu mazzi ag'amaanyi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Wabakulembezanga empagi ey'ekire emisana, ekiro n'obakulembezanga empagi ey'omuliro obamulisize ekkubo lye baba bayitamu." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wava mu ggulu n'okka ku lusozi Sinaayi n'oyogera nabo, n'obawa ensala entuufu, Amateeka ag'amazima, ebibuuliriro ebirungi era n'ebiragiro." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabamanyisa olunaku lwo olwa Sabbaato olutukuvu, n'obawa ebiragiro byo era n'Amateeka go ng'oyita mu Musa omuweereza wo." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Bwe baalumwa enjala, wabawa emmere eyava mu ggulu. Bwe baalumwa ennyonta, n'obawa amazzi agaava mu lwazi. N'obalagira bagende beefuge ensi, gye wabasuubiza okubawa." 
Nehemiah9:16 Wabula bo, bajjajjaffe, beekulumbaza ne bawaganyala, ne bagaana okuwulira ebiragiro byo." 
Nehemiah9:17 Baagaana okukuwulira, era beerabira ebyamagero bye wakola mu bo. Olw'okwekulumbaza kwabwe, bajeema, ne beerondera omukulembeze okubazzaayo mu buddu bwabwe. Naye ggwe oli Katonda eyeeteeseteese okusonyiwa. Oli wa kisa, era ojjudde okusaasira. Olwawo okusunguwala, era okwatirwa nnyo ekisa, era tewabalekulira." 
Nehemiah9:18 Wadde beekolera ekifaananyi eky'ennyana ekisaanuuse, ne bagamba nti ye Katonda waabwe, eyabaggya e Misiri, nga bakoze ebivvoola ennyo," 
Nehemiah9:19 naye olw'okusaasira kwo okungi, tewabalekulira nga bali mu ddungu. Tewabaggyaako mpagi ya kire, ebaluŋŋamya emisana, wadde empagi ey'omuliro ebamulisiza ekkubo ekiro, ekkubo lye baba bayitamu." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wabawa omwoyo gwo omulungi okubaluŋŋamya. Tewabaggyaako mannu yo gye baalya, wabawa n'amazzi banywe." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wabalabirira mu ddungu okumala emyaka amakumi ana, nga tebaliiko kye bajula. Tebaayambala ngoye njulifu, wadde okuzimba ebigere." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Wabawa ensi za bakabaka n'amawanga okuba omugabo gwabwe, ne beefuga ensi ya Sihoni, kabaka we Hesubooni, n'ensi ya Ogi kabaka w'e Basani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wayaza abaana baabwe ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu, n'obatuusa mu nsi gye wagamba bajjajjaabwe okuyingira bagyefuge." 
Nehemiah9:24 Bazzukulu baabwe ne bayingira ne beefuga ensi eyo. Wabawangulira abatuuze baamu Abakanaani. Bo ne bakabaka baabwe n'obassa mu mikono gy'abantu bo babakole nga bwe baagala. 
Nehemiah9:25 Abantu bo baawamba ebibuga ebiriko ebigo, n'ensi engimu, n'ennyumba ezijjudde ebyobugagga, n'enzizi ezisimiddwa, n'ennimiro ez'emizabbibu n'ez'emiti emizayiti, n'ez'emiti mingi nnyo egy'ebibala. Ne balya ne bakkuta, ne basanyukira ebirungi ebingi bye wabawa." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Kyokka ne bagaana okukuwulira ne bakujeemera, ne bava ku Mateeka go. Ne batta abalanzi abaabawabulanga okubakyusa badde gy'oli. Baakolanga ebivvoola ennyo," 
Nehemiah9:27 kyewava obawaayo mu balabe baabwe ne bababonyaabonya. Mu kubonaabona kwabwe baakukaabirira, n'obawulira ng'osinziira mu ggulu. Olw'okusaasira kwo okungi n'obaweereza abanunuzi abaabawonya abalabe baabwe." 
Nehemiah9:28 Naye bwe baafuna emirembe, ne baddamu okwonoona. Era n'obawaayo mu balabe baabwe ne babafuga. Bwe beenenyanga ne bakukaabirira obawonye, n'obawulira ng'osinziira mu ggulu, n'obanunula emirundi mingi olw'ekisa kyo." 
Nehemiah9:29 Wabalabula obakomyewo ku Mateeka go. Naye olw'okwekulumbaza kwabwe, ne batawulira biragiro byo, wabula ne babimenya bumenyi, sso nga mu kubituukiriza, omuntu mw'afunira obulamu. Ne bakubayo amabega, ne bakakanyalira ddala, ne bagaana okuwulira." 
Nehemiah9:30 Wamala emyaka mingi ng'obagumiikiriza, n'obalabulanga ne Mwoyo wo, ayogerera mu balanzi; kyokka ne baziba amatu, kyewava obawaayo mu b'amawanga amalala." 
Nehemiah9:31 Naye olw'ekisa kyo ekingi, tewabazikiriza wadde okubaabulira, kubanga oli Katonda ow'ekisa era omusaasizi." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Kale nno ayi Katonda waffe ggwe omukulu, ow'amaanyi era ow'entiisa, okuuma endagaano, era olina okwagala okutakoma. Okubonaabona kwonna okwatujjira ffe ne bakabaka baffe, n'abakungu baffe, ne bakabona baffe, n'abalanzi baffe, ne bajjajjaffe, n'abantu bo bonna okuviira ddala ku mirembe gya bakabaka ba Assiriya n'okutuusa kati, kuleme kukulabikira ng'akantu akatono." 
Nehemiah9:33 Mu byonna ebyatutuukako, wabeeranga mwenkanya, kubanga wakolanga eby'amazima. Naye ffe twali boonoonyi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Bakabaka baffe n'abakungu baffe ne bakabona baffe ne bajjajjaffe tebaakwatanga Mateeka go era tebaawuliranga biragiro byo, wadde okuwabula kwo kwe wabawabulangamu." 
Nehemiah9:35 Baagaana okukyuka, okuva mu bibi byabwe bakuweereze newaakubadde wabawa omukisa, mu bwakabaka bwabwe, ne babeera mu nsi engazi era engimu, ne mu birungi byonna bye wabawa." 
Nehemiah9:36 Kaakano tuli baddu, baddu mu nsi gye wawa bajjajjaffe okubeeramu, n'okulyanga ebibala byamu, n'ebirungi ebirala ebirimu." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ensi eyo ewa amagoba mangi bakabaka be wateekawo okutufuga kubanga twayonoona. Balina obuyinza okukola buli kye baagala ku ffe ne ku magana gaffe. Tulina obuyinike bungi!” 
Nehemiah9:38 “Olw'ebyo byonna, kyetuva tukola endagaano mu buwandiike, abakungu baffe, n'Abaleevi baffe, ne bakabona baffe, ne bagissaako emikono.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Bano be bantu abaateekako emikono: Nehemiya omufuzi, mutabani wa Hakaliya, ne Zeddeekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 ne Seraya, ne Azariya, ne Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 ne Pasuhuuri, ne Amariya, ne Malukiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 ne Attusi, ne Sebaniya, ne Malluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 ne Harimu, ne Meremooti, ne Obadiya" 
Nehemiah10:6 ne Daniyeli, ne Ginnetoni, ne Baruku" 
Nehemiah10:7 ne Mesullamu, ne Abiya, ne Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 ne Maaziya, ne Bilugayi ne Semaaya. Abo be bakabona." 
Nehemiah10:9 Abaleevi abaateekako emikono be bano: Yeswa mutabani wa Azaniya, ne Binnuyi, omu ku baana ba Henadaadi, ne Kadumyeli," 
Nehemiah10:10 ne baganda baabwe: Sebaniya, ne Hodiya ne Kelita, ne Pelaya, ne Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 ne Mikka, ne Rehobu, ne Hasabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 ne Zakkuri, ne Serebiya, ne Sebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:13 ne Hodiya, ne Baani, ne Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Abakulembeze b'abantu era abaateekako emikono be bano: Parosi, ne Pahati Mowaabu ne Elamu, ne Zattu, ne Baani," 
Nehemiah10:15 ne Bunni, ne Azugaadi, ne Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:16 ne Adoniya, ne Biguvaayi, ne Adini" 
Nehemiah10:17 ne Ateri, ne Heezeekiya, ne Azzuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 ne Hodiya, ne Hasumu, ne Bezayi," 
Nehemiah10:19 ne Harifu, ne Anatooti, ne Nebayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 ne Magupiyasi, ne Mesullamu, ne Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 ne Mesezabeli, ne Zaddooki, ne Yadduwa," 
Nehemiah10:22 ne Pelatiya, ne Hanani, ne Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 ne Hoseya, ne Hananiya, ne Hassubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 ne Hallohesi, ne Piluha, ne Sobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 ne Rehumu, ne Hasabuna, ne Maaseya" 
Nehemiah10:26 ne Ahiya, ne Hanani, ne Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 ne Malluki, ne Harimu, ne Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Abayisirayeli abalala bonna, bakabona, n'Abaleevi, n'abaggazi, n'abayimbi, n'abaweereza b'omu Ssinzizo, n'abo bonna abeeyawula ku bantu b'omu nsi eyo ne bagoberera Amateeka ga Katonda, nga bali wamu ne bakazi baabwe, ne batabani baabwe, ne bawala baabwe, na buli muntu eyalina amagezi ag'okumanya n'okutegeera," 
Nehemiah10:29 ne beegatta ku baganda baabwe ne ku bakungu baabwe, ne balayira nti: “Tukolimirwe singa tuligaana okugobereranga Amateeka, Katonda ge yawa ng'agayisa mu muweereza we Musa, era bwe tuligaana okukwatanga, n'okukolanga byonna ebiri mu Mateeka n'ebiragiro, Mukama Katonda waffe bye yateekawo." 
Nehemiah10:30 Tetuufumbizenga bawala baffe mu ba mawanga malala, wadde okuwasiza batabani baffe bawala baabwe." 
Nehemiah10:31 Ab'amawanga amalala bwe banaaleetanga ebyokulya oba ebintu ebirala byonna okubitunda ku Sabbaato, tetuubibagulengako ku Sabbaato, oba ku lunaku olulala lwonna olutukuvu. Era mu buli mwaka ogw'omusanvu, tetuulimenga misiri gyaffe, era tetuubanjenga bbanja na limu." 
Nehemiah10:32 Twetemye okuwangayo buli mwaka ekitundu kimu ekyokusatu ekya sekeli olw'emirimu gy'Essinzizo. 
Nehemiah10:33 “Era tunaawangayo ebintu bino: emigaati emitukuvu n'ebiweebwayo buli lunaku eby'empeke, n'ensolo ezookebwa mu bitambiro buli lunaku, n'ebiweebwayo ebya buli Sabbaato, n'ebiweebwayo ng'omwezi gubonese, ne ku mbaga endala, n'ebintu ebirala ebitukuvu, n'ebiweebwayo okutambira olw'ebibi bya Yisirayeli. Tunaawangayo n'ebintu ebirala byonna ebyetaagibwa mu Ssinzizo." 
Nehemiah10:34 “Era bakabona, n'Abaleevi, naffe abalala, tunaakubanga obululu buli mwaka, okulonda ebika ebinaaleetanga mu mpalo ekiweebwayo eky'enku mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda waffe, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Mateeka." 
Nehemiah10:35 “Twetemye okuleetanga mu Ssinzizo buli mwaka, ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa mu nnimiro zaffe, n'ebibala ebisooka okunogebwa ku miti gyonna egy'ebibala." 
Nehemiah10:36 “Batabani baffe abaggulanda tunaabatwaliranga bakabona abaweereza mu Ssinzizo, ne tubawaayo eri Mukama, nga bwe kyalagirwa mu Mateeka. Era tunaawangayo eri Mukama ensolo zaffe ezisooka okuzaalibwa: ente n'embuzi n'endiga." 
Nehemiah10:37 “Buli mwaka, tunaaleetanga eri bakabona abali mu Ssinzizo, omutemwa gw'emmere yaffe ey'empeke esooka okukungulwa, era n'omwenge, n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, n'ebibala eby'oku miti egya buli ngeri. N'Abaleevi tunaabatwaliranga ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'amakungula gaffe, kubanga Abaleevi abo, be baweebwa ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi, mu byalo byaffe byonna gye tulimira." 
Nehemiah10:38 Kabona, muzzukulu wa Arooni, anaabeerangawo ng'Abaleevi baweebwa ebitundu eby'ekkumi. Era Abaleevi banaaleetanga mu tterekero ly'omu Ssinzizo lya Katonda waffe ekitundu kimu eky'ekkumi eky'ebitundu eby'ekkumi bye bafunye." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ddala Abayisirayeli n'Abaleevi banaaleetanga omutemwa gw'emmere ey'empeke, n'omwenge, n'omuzigo gw'emizayiti, mu tterekero, omukuumirwa ebintu ebikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, okumpi n'ekifo bakabona abali ku mulimu, n'abakuumi, n'abayimbi, gye basula. “Tetujjanga kulagajjalira Ssinzizo lya Katonda waffe.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Mu biseera ebyo, abakulembeze b'abantu mu ggwanga, ne babeeranga mu Yerusaalemu. Abantu abalala ne bakuba obululu okulonda omuntu omu ku buli bantu kkumi, okubeeranga mu Yerusaalemu, ekibuga ekitukuvu, n'abalala omwenda ku buli kkumi, okubeeranga mu bibuga ebirala." 
Nehemiah11:2 Era abantu ne basiima nnyo abasajja abeeronda ku bwabwe okubeera mu Yerusaalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Kyokka Abayisirayeli abalala ne bakabona, n'Abaleevi, n'abakozi b'omu Ssinzizo, n'abazzukulu b'abaddu ba Solomooni, babeeranga mu bibanja byabwe mu bibuga ebirala ebya Buyudaaya. Bano be batuuze abakulu mu kitundu kya Buyudaaya abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu:" 
Nehemiah11:4 mwalimu abamu ku bazzukulu ba Yuda, n'abamu ku bazzukulu ba Benyamiini. Mu bazzukulu ba Yuda, mwalimu Ataya mutabani wa Wuzziya era muzzukulu wa Zekariya, Zekariya mutabani wa Amariya, Amariya mutabani wa Sefatiya, Sefatiya mutabani wa Mahalaleeli, asibuka mu Pereezi, mutabani wa Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:5 Era mwalimu Maaseya mutabani wa Baruku, Baruku mutabani wa Koluhoze, Koluhoze mutabani wa Hazaaya, Hazaaya mutabani wa Adaaya, Adaaya mutabani wa Yoyaribu, Yoyaribu mutabani wa Zekariya asibuka mu Seela, mutabani wa Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bazzukulu ba Pereezi bonna abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu, baali ebikumi bina mu nkaaga mu munaana, abasajja abazira." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ate bazzukulu ba Benyamiini: Sallu mutabani wa Mesullamu, Mesullamu mutabani wa Yowedi, Yowedi mutabani wa Pedaaya, Pedaaya mutabani wa Kolaya, Kolaya mutabani wa Maaseya, Maaseya mutabani wa Yitiyeeli, Yitiyeeli mutabani wa Yesaaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Baganda ba Sallu be bano: Gabbayi ne Sallayi. Ababenyamiini bonna awamu baali lwenda mu abiri mu munaana mu Yerusaalemu. 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweeli mutabani wa Zikuri ye yali omukulembeze waabwe, ne Yuda mutabani wa Hassenuwa, ye yali omumyuka w'omukulu w'ekibuga." 
Nehemiah11:10 Ku bakabona, kwaliko Yedaaya mutabani wa Yoyaribu, ne Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 ne Seraya mutabani wa Hilukiya, Hilukiya mutabani wa Mesullamu, Mesullamu mutabani wa Zaddooki, Zaddooki mutabani wa Merayooti, Merayooti mutabani wa Ahituubu Ssaabakabona omukulu w'Essinzizo." 
Nehemiah11:12 Abo ne baganda baabwe bonna awamu abaaweerezanga mu Ssinzizo, baali lunaana mu abiri mu babiri. Okwo kw'ossa ne Adaaya mutabani wa Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu mutabani wa Pelaliya, Pelaliya mutabani wa Amuzi, Amuzi mutabani wa Zekariya, Zekariya mutabani wa Pasuhuuri, Pasuhuuri mutabani wa Malukiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 Bonna awamu, Adaaya ne baganda be baali ebikumi bibiri mu ana mu babiri, abaakuliranga ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe. N'omulala ye Amasusayi mutabani wa Azareeli, Azareeli mutabani wa Ahuzayi, Ahuzayi mutabani wa Mesillemoti, Mesillemoti mutabani wa Yimmeri." 
Nehemiah11:14 Bano awamu ne baganda baabwe, baali kikumi mu abiri mu munaana, abasajja ab'amaanyi era abazira. Omukulembeze waabwe yali Zabudiyeeli, mutabani wa Haggedoliimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Mu Baleevi, mwalimu Semaaya mutabani wa Hassubu, Hassubu mutabani wa Azurikaamu, Azurikaamu mutabani wa Hasabiya, Hasabiya mutabani wa Bunni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Okwo kw'ogatta Sabbetaayi ne Yozabadi abamu ku Baleevi abakulu abaalabiriranga emirimu gy'ebweru egy'Essinzizo. 
Nehemiah11:17 Ne Mattaniya mutabani wa Mikka, Mikka mutabani wa Zabudi, Zabudi mutabani wa Asafu eyakulemberanga mu kusinza okw'okwebaza, ne Bakubukiya eyamyukanga Mattaniya, ne Abuda mutabani wa Sammuwa, Sammuwa mutabani wa Gaalaali, Gaalaali mutabani wa Yedutuuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abaleevi bonna mu kibuga ekitukuvu, baali ebikumi bibiri mu kinaana mu bana." 
Nehemiah11:19 Abaggazi be bano: Akkubu ne Talumooni ne baganda baabwe abaakuumanga emiryango, baali kikumi mu nsanvu mu babiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abayisirayeli abalala ne bakabona n'Abaleevi, baabeeranga mu bibuga ebirala byonna ebya Buyudaaya, buli omu mu kibanja kye." 
Nehemiah11:21 Naye abaweereza b'omu Ssinzizo baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu, mu kitundu kye bayita Ofeli, era baalabirirwanga Ziha ne Gisupa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Eyalabiriranga Abaleevi mu Yerusaalemu yali Wuzzi, mutabani wa Baani, Baani mutabani wa Hasabiya, Hasabiya mutabani wa Mattaniya, Mattaniya mutabani wa Mikka, Mikka asibuka mu nnyumba ya Asafu. Ab'ennyumba ya Asafu be baali abayimbi mu Ssinzizo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Era kabaka yali ataddewo ekiragiro era n'enkola abayimbi abo bye banaagobereranga buli lunaku. 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya mutabani wa Mesezabeli ow'omu nnyumba ya Zeera mu kika kya Yuda, ye yakiikiriranga Abayisirayeli ewa kabaka w'e Perusiya." 
Nehemiah11:25 Abantu abamu baabeeranga mu bibuga ne mu byalo ebiri okumpi n'ennimiro zaabwe. Ab'omu kika kya Yuda baabeeranga mu bibuga: Kiriyati-Aruba, ne Diboni, ne Yekabuzeeli, ne mu byalo ebibyetoolodde." 
Nehemiah11:26 Era baabeeranga mu bibuga Yeswa, ne Molada, ne Betipeleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 ne mu Hazarusuwali, ne Beruseba, ne mu byalo ebikyetoolodde." 
Nehemiah11:28 Baabeeranga mu bibuga Zikulagi ne mu Mekona, ne mu byalo byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:29 ne mu Enurimmoni, ne mu Zora, ne mu Yarumuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 ne mu Zanowa, ne mu Adullamu, ne mu byalo ebibiriraanye. Baabeeranga mu Lakisi n'ennimiro zaakyo, ne mu Azeka n'ebyalo byakyo. Bwe batyo baabeeranga mu kitundu okuva e Beruseba okutuuka mu kiwonvu ky'e Hinnomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ab'omu Kika kya Benyamiini baabeeranga okuva e Geba n'okweyongerayo okutuuka e Mikumasi ne Ayiya, ne Beteli n'ebyalo byakyo," 
Nehemiah11:32 ne mu Anatooti ne Nobu, ne Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 ne Hazori, ne Raama, ne Gittayiimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 ne Hadidi, ne Zeboyiimu, ne Neballati," 
Nehemiah11:35 ne Loodi, ne Ono, ne mu kiwonvu ky'abakola emirimu egy'emikono." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ebibinja by'Abaleevi ebimu byabeeranga mu kitundu kya Yuda, n'ebirala mu kitundu kya Benyamiini." 
Nehemiah12:1 Luno lwe lukalala lwa bakabona n'Abaleevi abaava mu buwaŋŋanguse, nga bali ne Zerubabbeeli mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, ne Yeswa, ne Seraya, ne Yeremiya, ne Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 ne Amariya, ne Malluki, ne Hattusi," 
Nehemiah12:3 ne Sekaniya, ne Rehumu, ne Meremooti," 
Nehemiah12:4 ne Yiddo, ne Ginnetoyi, ne Abiya" 
Nehemiah12:5 ne Miyamini, ne Maadiya, ne Biluga," 
Nehemiah12:6 ne Semaaya, ne Yoyaribu, ne Yedaaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 ne Sallu, ne Amoki, ne Hilukiya ne Yedaaya. Bano be baali bakabona abakulu abaakulemberanga bannaabwe mu biseera bya Yeswa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Ate Abaleevi ye Yeswa, ne Binnuyi, ne Kadumyeli, ne Serebiya, ne Yuda, ne Mattaniya eyali awamu ne baganda be, nga ye akulembera ennyimba ez'okwebaza." 
Nehemiah12:9 Ate Bakubukiya, ne Wunno, baganda baabwe, be baayimiriranga mu maaso okuyimba ebiddibwamu." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yoswa yazaala Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu n'azaala Eliyasibu, Eliyasibu n'azaala Yoyaada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyaada n'azaala Yonataani, Yonataani n'azaala Yadduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Bano be baali abakulu b'ennyumba za bakabona mu kiseera Yoyakimu we yabeerera Ssaabakabona: eyali akulira ennyumba eya Seraya, Meraya; eya Yeremiya, Hananiya;" 
Nehemiah12:13 eya Ezera, Mesullamu; eya Amariya, Yehohanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 eya Malluki, Yonataani; eya Sebaniya, Yosefu;" 
Nehemiah12:15 eya Harimu, Aduna; eya Merayooti, Helukayi;" 
Nehemiah12:16 eya Yiddo, Zekariya; eya Ginnetoni, Mesullamu;" 
Nehemiah12:17 eya Abiya, Zikuri; eya Miniyamini, eya Mowadiya, Pilutaayi;" 
Nehemiah12:18 eya Biluga, Sammuwa; eya Semaaya, Yehonataani;" 
Nehemiah12:19 eya Yoyaribu, Mattenayi; eya Yedaaya, Wuzzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 eya Sallayi, Kallayi; eya Amoki, Eberi;" 
Nehemiah12:21 eya Hilukiya, Hasabiya; eya Yedaaya, Netaneeli." 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu mirembe gya bassaabakabona Eliyasibu ne Yoyaada, ne Yohanaani, ne Yadduwa, Abaleevi ne bawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'abakulu b'ennyumba za bajjajjaabwe. Ne bakabona nabo ne bawandiikibwa, okutuusa ku mulembe gwa Dariyo nga ye kabaka w'e Perusiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Abakulu b'ennyumba z'Abaleevi, baawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka, okutuuka mu biseera bya Yohanaani, mutabani wa Eliyasibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Hasabiya ne Serebiya, ne Yeswa mutabani wa Kadumyeli be baali abakulu b'Abaleevi. Baatunuuliragananga ne baganda baabwe okuyimba ennyimba ez'okutendereza n'okwebaza Katonda, ng'oludda olumu luyimba ebiddibwamu, nga Dawudi, omuntu wa Katonda, bwe yalagira." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniya, ne Bakubukiya, ne Obadiya, ne Mesullamu, ne Talumooni, ne Akkubu, be baali abaggazi abaakuumanga amawanika ag'oku miryango gy'Essinzizo." 
Nehemiah12:26 Abo baaliwo mu kiseera kya Yoyakimu, mutabani wa Yeswa era muzzukulu wa Yehozadaaki, ne mu kiseera kya Nehemiya omufuzi, ne mu kya Ezera kabona era omunnyonnyozi w'Amateeka." 
Nehemiah12:27 Awo ekiseera bwe kyatuuka okutukuza ekisenge kya Yerusaalemu, ne bakuŋŋaanya Abaleevi yonna gye baali, bajje e Yerusaalemu, beetabe mu kijaguzo eky'okutukuza ekisenge, bayimbe ennyimba ez'okwebaza, nga bakuba ebitaasa n'ennanga, n'okufuuwa endere." 
Nehemiah12:28 Abaleevi abayimbi ne bakuŋŋaana, nga bava mu bitundu ebyetoolodde Yerusaalemu, ne mu byalo by'e Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 ne Betigilugaali ne mu kitundu ky'e Geba, ne Azumaveti, kubanga abayimbi abo baali beezimbidde mu byalo ebyetoolodde Yerusaalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Awo bakabona n'Abaleevi ne beetukuza, ne batukuza abantu, n'emiryango, n'ekisenge kya Yerusaalemu." 
Nehemiah12:31 Awo ne mpita abakulu b'omu Buyudaaya ne balinnya ku ntikko y'ekisenge. Ne mbaawulamu ebibinja bibiri ebyagendanga bikumba okwetooloola ekibuga, nga byebaza Katonda. Ekibinja ekimu ne kitambula nga kidda ku mukono ogwa ddyo okwolekera Omulyango gw'Ebisasiro." 
Nehemiah12:32 Hosaaya n'ava emabega w'abayimbi ng'agobererwa ekimu ekyokubiri eky'abakulembeze ba Buyudaaya," 
Nehemiah12:33 ne Azariya, ne Ezera, ne Mesullamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 ne Yuda, ne Benyamiini, ne Semaaya, ne Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah12:35 n'abamu ku batabani ba bakabona, abaagendanga bafuuwa amakondeere, era be bano: Zekariya mutabani wa Yonataani era muzzukulu wa Semaaya, Semaaya mutabani wa Mattaniya, Mattaniya mutabani wa Miikaaya, Mikaaya mutabani wa Zakkuri, Zakkuri mutabani wa Asafu," 
Nehemiah12:36 ne baganda be; Semaaya, ne Azareeli, ne Milalayi, ne Gilalayi, ne Maayi, ne Netaneeli, ne Yuda, ne Hanani, abaagendanga bakuba ebivuga bya Dawudi, omuntu wa Katonda, era Ezera omunnyonnyozi w'Amateeka ng'akulembeddemu." 
Nehemiah12:37 Awo ne bayita mu Mulyango gw'Oluzzi, ne bagenda butereevu mu maaso gaabwe, ne balinnya ku lutindo olulaga mu kibuga kya Dawudi, ekisenge we kyambukira waggulu w'olubiri lwa Dawudi, ne batuuka ku kisenge ekiri ku Mulyango gw'Amazzi, mu buvanjuba bw'ekibuga." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ekibinja ekirala eky'abo abajja okwebaza, ne kigenda ku kkono. Nze n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'abakulembeze b'abantu, ne tubagoberera, ne tutambulira ku kisenge waggulu, ne tuyita ku Munaala gw'Ettanuulu okutuukira ddala ku Kisenge Ekigazi." 
Nehemiah12:39 Ne tuyita engulu w'Omulyango gwa Efurayimu, ne ku Mulyango Omukadde, tuutwo ku Mulyango gw'Ebyennyanja, ne ku Munaala gwa Hananeeli, ne ku Munaala ogw'Ekikumi. Ne tuyita ku Mulyango gw'Endiga, ne tutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Abakuumi, awo we twakoma." 
Nehemiah12:40 Awo ebibinja byombi ebyebaza ne biyimirira mu Ssinzizo, era nange bwe ntyo wamu n'ekimu ekyokubiri eky'abakulembeze be nali nabo," 
Nehemiah12:41 omwali ne bakabona: Eliyakimu, ne Maaseya, ne Miniyamini, ne Mikaaya, ne Eliyowenayi, ne Zekariya, ne Hananiya, abo nga balina amakondeere," 
Nehemiah12:42 ne Maaseya, ne Semaaya, ne Eleyazaari, ne Wuzzi, ne Yehohanani, ne Malukiya, ne Elamu, ne Ezeri. Abayimbi ne bayimba mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka nga bakulemberwa Yezirakiya." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ku lunaku olwo ne bawaayo ebitambiro bingi nga bayimba mu maloboozi ag'omwanguka, kubanga Katonda yali abawadde essanyu. Abakazi n'abaana nabo ne beetaba mu kujaguza, era okusanyuka okwo okwali mu Yerusaalemu ne kuwulirwa n'ewala." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ku lunaku olwo ne balonda abantu ab'okulabiriranga amaterekero agakuumirwamu ebiweebwayo eby'Essinzizo omuli ekimu eky'ekkumi, emmere ey'empeke n'ebibala bye baasookanga okukungula. Era baalina okukuŋŋaanyizaamu emigabo egiragirwa mu Mateeka okuweebwa bakabona n'Abaleevi, okuva mu nnimiro eziriraanye ebibuga. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baasanyuka olwa bakabona Abaleevi abaaweereza," 
Nehemiah12:45 kubanga baakola emikolo egy'okwetukuza, n'emikolo emirala, Katonda waabwe gye yabalagira. Era abayimbi n'abaggazi, nabo baakola omulimu gwabwe, nga bagoberera ebiragiro bya Dawudi ne mutabani we Solomooni, bye baateekawo." 
Nehemiah12:46 Era okuva edda mu biro bya Dawudi ne Asafu, waaliwo akulira abayimbi, era nga waliwo n'ennyimba ez'okutendereza n'okwebaza Katonda." 
Nehemiah12:47 Mu biro bya Zerubabbeeli ne mu biro bya Nehemiya, Abayisirayeli bonna baawangayo ebirabo buli lunaku okuyimirizaawo abayimbi n'abaggazi. Era baawangayo n'emigabo gy'Abaleevi, ate Abaleevi ne baawulako emigabo gy'abaana ba Arooni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ku lunaku olwo, ne basomera abantu mu kitabo kya Musa. Ne basanga nga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Tewali Mwammoni wadde Omumowaabu akkirizibwa kwetaba mu lukuŋŋaana lwa bantu ba Katonda," 
Nehemiah13:2 kubanga Abayisirayeli bwe baali bava e Misiri, Abammoni n'Abamowaabu, tebaabawa mmere, wadde amazzi. Kye baakola kwe kugulirira Balamu abakolimire. Naye Katonda waffe, ekikolimo n'akifuula omukisa.”" 
Nehemiah13:3 Abantu bwe baawulira Etteeka eryo, ne baggya mu Bayisirayeli abo bonna ab'amawanga amalala." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ebyo nga tebinnabaawo, kabona Eliyasibu, eyalondebwa okuba omukulu w'ebisenge by'omu Ssinzizo lya Katonda waffe, yalina enkolagana emugatta ne Tobiya." 
Nehemiah13:5 N'ategekera Tobiya oyo ekisenge ekinene ekyakuumirwangamu ebiweebwayo eby'emmere ey'empeke, n'obubaane, n'ebintu ebyakozesebwanga mu Ssinzizo, n'ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'emmere ey'eŋŋaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ebyali biteekwa okuweebwa Abaleevi, n'abayimbi, n'abaggazi era n'ebyo ebyakuŋŋaanyizibwanga nga bya bakabona." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ekyo okubaawo, nali siri mu Yerusaalemu, kubanga mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu mu ebiri ogw'obufuzi bwa kabaka Arutazeruzeesi ow'e Babilooni, nali nzizeeyo gy'ali okweyanjula. Bwe waayitawo ekiseera, ne mmusaba n'anzikiriza, ne nzirayo e Yerusaalemu." 
Nehemiah13:7 Bwe natuuka mu Yerusaalemu, ne ntegeera ekibi Eliyasibu kye yakola, bwe yategekera Tobiya ekisenge mu Ssinzizo." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ekyo kyannakuwaza nnyo, kyennava nzigya ebintu bya Tobiya byonna mu kisenge, ne mbikasuka ebweru." 
Nehemiah13:9 Awo ne ndagira, ne balongoosa ebisenge, ne ndyoka nzizaayo ebintu ebikozesebwa mu Ssinzizo, eby'emmere ey'empeke era n'obubaane." 
Nehemiah13:10 Era ne ntegeera ng'Abaleevi, n'abayimbi baali tebaweereddwa migabo gyabwe, era nga bonna bazzeeyo mu maka gaabwe mu byalo." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ne nvunaana abakulu olw'obutafaayo ku Ssinzizo. Bwe ntyo ne nkomyawo Abaleevi, n'abayimbi, ne mbazza mu bifo byabwe." 
Nehemiah13:12 Olwo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ne baddamu okuleeta ekitundu ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'eŋŋaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti mu mawanika." 
Nehemiah13:13 Era ne nnonda Selemiya kabona, ne Zaddooki omunnyonnyozi w'Amateeka, ne Pedaaya Omuleevi, okuba abawanika, nga bayambibwako Hanani mutabani wa Zakkuri era muzzukulu wa Mattaniya. Bano baalowoozebwa okuba abeesigwa, era omulimu gwabwe gwali gwa kuwanga bakozi bannaabwe omugabo gwabwe." 
Nehemiah13:14 Onzijukiranga olwa kino, ayi Katonda wange, era teweerabiranga bikolwa byange ebirungi, bye nakolera Essinzizo lyo, n'olw'emirimu egikolerwamu okukuweereza." 
Nehemiah13:15 Awo mu biseera ebyo, ne ndaba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya nga basogola omubisi gw'emizabbibu ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato. Abalala baali batikka ku ndogoyi zaabwe ebinywa by'eŋŋaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'emizabbibu, n'emizayiti, n'emigugu egya buli ngeri, nga babireeta mu Yerusaalemu. Nabalabula obutatunda kintu na kimu ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:16 Abasajja b'omu Tiiro, abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemu, baaleetanga ebyennyanja n'ebintu ebirala, ne babiguza ab'omu Buyudaaya ne mu Yerusaalemu, ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:17 Awo ne nvunaana abakulembeze mu Buyudaaya, ne mbagamba nti: “Kiki ekibakozesa ekibi kino okwonoona olunaku lwa Sabbaato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Bajjajjammwe si bwe baakola bwe batyo? Era Katonda si kwe yava okutubonereza, era n'azikiriza ekibuga kino? Kaakati laba mwongera okuleetera Katonda okusunguwalira Yisirayeli, nga mwonoona olunaku lwa Sabbaato.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Awo ne ndagira emiryango gyonna egya Yerusaalemu giggalwengawo obudde oluwungeera, enkeera nga ye Sabbaato. Ne mbalagira obutagiggula okutuusa nga Sabbaato eweddeko. Era ne nteeka abamu ku baweereza bange ku miryango egyo bagikuume, obutakkiriza kuyingiza kintu na kimu mu kibuga ku Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Olwo abasuubuzi n'abatunda ebintu ebya buli kika ne basula ebweru wa Yerusaalemu omulundi gumu oba ebiri. 
Nehemiah13:21 Naye ne mbalabula, ne mbagamba nti: “Lwaki musula ebweru w'ekibuga? Bwe munaddamu okusulayo omulundi omulala, nja kubakwata.” Okuva ku olwo tebaakomawo ku lwa Sabbaato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Awo ne ndagira Abaleevi beetukuze, era bajje bakuume emiryango, okukakasa nti Sabbaato ekuumibwa nga ntukuvu. Ayi Katonda wange onzijukiranga n'olwa kino, era onsaasire olw'ekisa kyo ekingi." 
Nehemiah13:23 Awo mu biseera ebyo, era ne ndaba abasajja Abayudaaya bangi, abaali bawasizza abakazi Abasudoodi n'Abammoni, n'Abamowaabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Kimu kyakubiri eky'abaana baabwe baali boogera lulimi Olusudoodi oba olulimi olw'abantu ab'eggwanga eddala, kyokka nga tebayinza kwogera lulimi Luyudaaya." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ne mbavunaana era ne mbakolimira. Abamu ne mbakuba era ne mbakuunyuula enviiri. Awo ne mbalayiza Katonda nti: “Temukkirizenga bawala bammwe kufumbirwa batabani ba bagwira wadde batabani bammwe okuwasa bawala baabwe, era nammwe temuubawasenga.”" 
Nehemiah13:26 Ne mbagamba nti: “Temumanyi nga Solomooni kabaka wa Yisirayeli abakazi ng'abo be baamuleetera okwonoona? Solomooni yali mututumufu okusinga bakabaka bonna ab'amawanga amalala, era nga yayagalwa nnyo Katonda we, era Katonda yamufuula Kabaka wa Yisirayeli yonna. Kyokka abakazi ab'amawanga amalala baamukozesa ekibi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Kale tunaawuliriza mmwe, ne tukola ekibi ekyenkana awo, ne tulyamu Katonda waffe olukwe, nga tuwasa abakazi ab'amawanga amalala?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Omu ku batabani ba Yoyaada mutabani wa Eliyasibu Ssaabakabona, yali awasizza muwala wa Sanuballati Omuhoroni, kyennava mmugoba we ndi." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ayi Katonda wange, abo bajjukire, kubanga boonoonye obwakabona, n'endagaano ey'obwakabona n'ey'Abaleevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Awo ne ntukuza abantu okubaggyako byonna eby'ab'amawanga amalala. Bakabona n'Abaleevi ne mbateekerawo ebiragiro eby'okugoberera, nga biraga emirimu gyabwe buli omu;" 
Nehemiah13:31 era ne nkola entegeka ey'enku ezeeyambisibwa okwokya ebiweebwayo, n'okuzireetanga mu budde obutuufu, era n'abantu okuleeta ebiweebwayo byabwe, eby'ebibala ebisooka okukungulwa. Ayi Katonda wange onzijukiranga n'ompa ebirungi." 
Esther1:1 Mu mirembe gya Ahaswero, obwakabaka bwa Ahaswero oyo bwali buva e Buyindi okutuuka e Kuusi, nga bulimu ebitundu by'amatwale kikumi mu abiri mu musanvu." 
Esther1:2 Mu kiseera ekyo, entebe ye ey'obwakabaka yabeeranga mu kibuga ekikulu Susa ekya Perusiya." 
Esther1:3 Awo Kabaka Ahaswero, mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogw'obufuzi bwe, n'agabula abafuzi n'abaami be bonna ekijjulo. Ab'amagye ga Perusiya ne Mediya, awamu n'abakungu n'abaami b'amasaza, nabo baaliwo." 
Esther1:4 Kabaka n'ayolesa obugagga n'ekitiibwa eby'obwakabaka bwe, okumala ennaku nnyingi, ezaawerera ddala ekikumi mu ekinaana." 
Esther1:5 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kyaggwaako, kabaka n'agabula abantu be bonna, abagagga n'abaavu, abaali mu kibuga ekikulu Susa, ekijjulo ekyamala ennaku omusanvu, nga kigabulirwa mu kidaala ekyakolebwa mu lubiri lwe." 
Esther1:6 Ekidaala ekyo kyali kitimbiddwa entimbe ez'olugoye olweru n'olwa bbululu, nga zisibiddwa n'empeta eza ffeeza, n'emiguwa egya kakobe, ku mpagi ez'amayinja aganyirira. Ebitanda ebya zaabu ne ffeeza byali biteekeddwa ku mayinja amaaliire agenjawulo, aganyirira." 
Esther1:7 Omwenge gwagabulirwa mu bikopo bya zaabu ebyenjawulo, nga tewali wadde ebibiri ebifaanagana, era kabaka yagabula omwenge mungi ddala." 
Esther1:8 Tewaali tteeka liwaliriza muntu kunywa, kubanga kabaka yalagira abaweereza bonna ab'omu lubiri, buli omu okumuwa nga bw'ayagala." 
Esther1:9 Mu kiseera kye kimu, Nnaabagereka Vasuti naye yali agabula abakazi mu lubiri lwa Kabaka Ahaswero." 
Esther1:10 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu olw'ekijjulo, kabaka bwe yanywa omwenge n'acamuka, n'ayita abalaawe be omusanvu: Mehumaani, Bizuta, Haruboona, Biguta, Abaguta, Zetari, ne Karukasi, abaamuweerezanga." 
Esther1:11 N'abalagira okugenda okuleeta Nnaabagereka Vasuti, ajje ng'atikkidde engule ku mutwe. Nnaabagereka ono yali mukazi mulungi mubalagavu. Kabaka n'ayagala amulage abakungu be n'abagenyi be bonna, bamulabe nga bw'ali omulungi." 
Esther1:12 Naye abalaawe bwe baategeeza Nnaabagereka Vasuti ekyo kabaka ky'alagidde, ye n'agaana okujja. Kino ne kisunguwaza nnyo kabaka, n'asuukiira olw'obusungu." 
Esther1:13 Yali mpisa ya kabaka okwebuuza ku bakugu mu by'amateeka n'ebiragiro. Awo n'ayita abawi b'amagezi, kubanga be bamanyi ekisaana okukolebwa." 
Esther1:14 Be yasinganga okwebuuzaako baali Karisena, Setari, Adimata, Tarusiisi, Meresi, Marisena, ne Memukani, abaami omusanvu aba Perusiya ne Mediya, abaali basinga okuba n'ebifo ebyawaggulu mu bwakabaka." 
Esther1:15 N'abagamba nti: “Nze, Kabaka Ahaswero, nasindise abalaawe eri Nnaabagereka Vasuti, nga nnina kye mmulagira, naye yagaanye okukigondera! Kale amateeka gagamba gatya? Era kiki ekiteekwa okukolebwa ku Nnaabagereka ono?”" 
Esther1:16 Awo Memukani n'ategeeza kabaka n'abaami be nti: “Nnaabagereka Vasuti tanyoomye kabaka yekka, naye n'abaami ba kabaka bonna. Mu mazima, anyoomye buli musajja mu matwale gonna aga Kabaka Ahaswero." 
Esther1:17 Buli mukazi mu bwakabaka, ajja kutandika okunyooma bba, amangu ddala ng'awulidde Nnaabagereka ky'akoze. Bajja kugamba nti: ‘Kabaka Ahaswero yalagira Nnaabagereka Vasuti okujja gy'ali, Vasuti n'agaana.’" 
Esther1:18 Abakyala b'abaami bo mu Perusiya ne Mediya, bwe banaawulira nga Nnaabagereka bwe yeeyisizza, bajja kukitegeeza babbaabwe nga n'olunaku terunnaziba. Abakyala buli wantu banaaba tebakyassaamu babbaabwe kitiibwa, era abasajja bajja kusunguwalira bakazi baabwe." 
Esther1:19 Bw'oba ng'osiimye, ayi Ssaabasajja, fulumya ekirangiriro ekigamba nti: ‘Vasuti taliddayo kulabika mu maaso ga Kabaka Ahaswero.’ Lagira kiwandiikibwe mu mateeka ga Perusiya ne Mediya, kireme kukyusibwa ennaku zonna. Ate ekifo kye eky'Obwannaabagereka, kiweebwe omukazi omulala amusinga." 
Esther1:20 Ekiwandiiko kyo bwe kinaabunyisibwa wonna mu bwakabaka bwo buno obunene bwe butyo, buli mukazi ajja kussangamu bba ekitiibwa, bba k'abe mugagga oba mwavu.”" 
Esther1:21 Kabaka n'abaami be ne basiima ekirowoozo ekyo, era kabaka n'akola nga Memukani bwe yateesa." 
Esther1:22 Ekiwandiiko ne kiweerezebwa mu buli kitundu ekiri mu matwale ga kabaka, mu lulimi ne mu mpandiika eya buli kitundu, kisobozese buli musajja okubeera n'obuyinza, era n'okukozesa olulimi lw'eggwanga lye mu maka ge." 
Esther2:1 Kabaka Ahaswero bwe yamala okukkakkana obusungu, n'asigala ng'alowooza ku kikolwa kya Vasuti, ne ku kirangiriro kye yali amufulumizzaako." 
Esther2:2 Awo abaweereza ba kabaka, abaali okumpi naye, ne bagamba nti: “Ayi Ssaabasajja, bakunoonyeze abawala abato abalungi era embeerera." 
Esther2:3 Tuma abaami bo mu bitundu byonna eby'omu bwakabaka bwo, bakuŋŋaanyize abawala bonna abato abalungi era embeerera, mu nnyumba yo ey'abakazi mu kibuga ekikulu Susa, bakwasibwe omulaawe wo Hegayi, alabirira abazaana, era bafumbirirwe bulungi." 
Esther2:4 Olwo nno onoosobola okulondamu omuwala abasinga bonna, omufuule Nnaabagereka mu kifo kya Vasuti.” Kabaka n'asiima amagezi ago era n'agakolerako." 
Esther2:5 Mu kibuga ekikulu Susa, mwalimu Omuyudaaya ng'ayitibwa Moruddekaayi mutabani wa Yayiri, Yayiri mutabani wa Simeeyi, Simeeyi mutabani wa Kiisi ow'omu Kika kya Benyamiini." 
Esther2:6 Moruddekaayi yali omu ku abo abaanyagibwa okuva mu Yerusaalemu, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni bwe yawangula era n'awaŋŋangusa Yekoniya, kabaka wa Buyudaaya." 
Esther2:7 Yalina omuwala Esiteeri, muganda we gw'azaala, omuwala oyo ng'ayitibwa Hadasa mu Lwebureeyi. Yali alabika bulungi, nga mubalagavu. Bazadde be bwe baafa, Moruddekaayi n'amutwala n'amwola nga muwala we yennyini." 
Esther2:8 Ekiragiro kya kabaka bwe kyalangirirwa, abawala bangi ne baleetebwa mu kibuga ekikulu Susa. Mu abo ne Esiteeri mwe yajjira. Era naye n'ateekebwa mu lubiri, mu mikono gya Hegayi eyali alabirira abakazi." 
Esther2:9 Omuwala oyo n'asanyusa nnyo Hegayi, Hegayi n'amuyisa bulungi n'ekisa. Teyalwa, n'atandika okumufumbirira, ng'asiimuulwa n'omuzigo, n'okuweebwa emmere ey'enjawulo. N'ateekebwa mu kifo ekisinga obulungi mu kisulo ky'abazaana, ng'alina n'abawala musanvu abaalondebwa mu b'omu lubiri okumuweerezanga." 
Esther2:10 Esiteeri yali tayogedde ggwanga lye, wadde amaka mw'asibuka, kubanga Moruddekaayi yali amukuutidde okubisirikira." 
Esther2:11 Buli lunaku, Moruddekaayi yeeyisaayisanga mu maaso g'oluggya lw'ekisulo ky'abazaana, asobole okumanya ebifa ku muwala we." 
Esther2:12 Oluwalo olwa buli muwala okutwalibwa eri Kabaka Ahaswero nga terunnatuuka, omuwala yamalanga kufumbirirwa okumala omwaka mulamba, ng'etteeka ku bakazi bwe lyali: emyezi mukaaga ng'asiimuulwa n'omuzigo ogwa mmira, ate emyezi emirala omukaaga ng'asiimuulwa n'ebyobuwoowo, era n'ebirala ebikola ku bakazi." 
Esther2:13 Omuwala bwe yabanga agenda eri kabaka mu ngeri eyo, buli ky'asaba ave nakyo mu nnyumba y'abazaana, okugenda mu lubiri lwa kabaka, kyamuweebwanga." 
Esther2:14 Yatwalibwanga ewa kabaka akawungeezi, ate enkeera n'aggyibwayo, n'atwalibwa mu nnyumba y'abazaana endala, erabirirwa Saasugazi omulaawe. Omuwala teyaddangayo ewa kabaka, okuggyako nga kabaka amutumizza ng'amuyita n'erinnya." 
Esther2:15 Esiteeri, muwala wa Abihayili, kitaawe omuto owa Moruddekaayi, era Moruddekaayi gwe yayola ng'omwana we ddala, bwe yatuusa ekiseera kye eky'okugenda eri kabaka, talina bye yasaba, okuggyako ebyo Hegayi omulaawe wa kabaka, era eyali alabirira abakazi, bye yamugamba, era ne yeewuunyisa buli eyamulabako." 
Esther2:16 Mu mwaka ogw'omusanvu ogw'obufuzi bwa Kabaka Ahaswero mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi, gwe mwezi ogwa Tebeti, Esiteeri n'atwalibwa mu lubiri eri Kabaka Ahaswero." 
Esther2:17 Awo kabaka n'ayagala Esiteeri okusinga abakazi bonna. N'amusiima era n'amuganza okukira abawala abalala. Bw'atyo n'amutikkira engule ey'obwakabaka, era n'amufuula Nnaabagereka mu kifo kya Vasuti." 
Esther2:18 Awo kabaka n'akola embaga nnene eyaliko abaami be bonna, n'abaweereza be ng'awasizza Esiteeri. Kabaka n'alangirira olunaku olw'okuwummula mu matwale ge, era n'agaba n'ebirabo bingi ebyatuukana n'ekitiibwa kye nga kabaka." 
Esther2:19 Awo abawala bwe baali bakuŋŋaanye omulundi ogwokubiri, Moruddekaayi yali atudde ku mulyango gwa kabaka." 
Esther2:20 Esiteeri yali tayogeranga maka mw'asibuka, wadde eggwanga lye, kubanga Moruddekaayi yali amukuutidde obutabuulirako muntu n'omu. Esiteeri n'amugondera ne mu kino, nga bwe yamugonderanga mu byonna mu buto, ng'akyali mu maka ge." 
Esther2:21 Mu kiseera ekyo, Moruddekaayi ng'atudde ku mulyango gwa kabaka, babiri ku balaawe ba kabaka, Bigitaana ne Teresi abaggazi, ne basunguwala, ne bakola n'olukwe okutemula Kabaka Ahaswero." 
Esther2:22 Moruddekaayi n'agwa mu lukwe olwo, n'alutegeezaako Nnaabagereka Esiteeri, Esiteeri n'abuulira kabaka mu linnya lya Moruddekaayi." 
Esther2:23 Bwe baabuuliriza, ne basanga nga bwe kityo bwe kiri. Abasajja abo bombi ne bawanikibwa ku kalabba. Ne kiwandiikibwa, nga kabaka alaba, mu kitabo ky'ebibaawo buli lunaku." 
Esther3:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Kabaka Ahaswero n'awa Hamani obwakatikkiro. Hamani yali mutabani wa Hammedata, asibuka mu Agagi." 
Esther3:2 Abaweereza ba kabaka bonna abaali ku mulyango gwa kabaka, ne bavuunamiranga Hamani okumuwa ekitiibwa, nga kabaka bwe yali alagidde. Kyokka Moruddekaayi n'atamuvuunamira, era n'atamuwa kitiibwa." 
Esther3:3 Awo abaweereza ba kabaka ne babuuza Moruddekaayi nti: “Lwaki ojeemera ekiragiro kya kabaka?” 
Esther3:4 Awo olwatuuka, bwe baamala okumugambanga buli lunaku, n'agaana okubawulira, ne babuulira Hamani, okulaba oba nga anaagumiikiriza empisa za Moruddekaayi, kubanga Moruddekaayi yali ababuulidde nti Muyudaaya." 
Esther3:5 Hamani bwe yalaba nga Moruddekaayi teyamuvuunamira wadde okumuwa ekitiibwa, n'ajjula obusungu." 
Esther3:6 Era bwe yakitegeera nti Moruddekaayi Muyudaaya, n'amalirira obutabonereza Moruddekaayi yekka, wabula n'okuzikiriza abantu ba Moruddekaayi, Abayudaaya bonna, mu bwakabaka bwa Ahaswero bwonna." 
Esther3:7 Mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri ogw'obufuzi bwa Kabaka Ahaswero, mu mwezi ogusooka, gwe mwezi ogwa Nisani, Hamani n'alagira okukubisa akalulu, ako ke kayitibwa Puri, okulaba olunaku n'omwezi, okuzikiririzaako Abayudaaya bonna mu lunaku lumu. Olunaku olwasalibwawo lwali olw'ekkumi n'essatu, olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri ogwa Adaari." 
Esther3:8 Awo Hamani n'agamba Kabaka Ahaswero nti: “Waliwo eggwanga ly'abantu erimu erisaasaanye ne libuna mu bantu, mu bitundu byonna eby'obwakabaka bwo. Amateeka gaabwe, maawufu ku g'abantu abalala bonna, era tebakwata mateeka go, ayi Ssaabasajja. N'olwekyo tekiyamba kabaka okubagumiikiriza." 
Esther3:9 Oba ng'osiima, ayi Ssaabasajja, yisa etteeka eriragira bazikirizibwe. Kino bw'onookikola, nja kuleeta mu ggwanika ly'obwakabaka talanta omutwalo gumu eza ffeeza, nzikwase abo abalabirira emirimu gy'obwakabaka.”" 
Esther3:10 Awo kabaka n'anaanula ku ngalo ye, empeta eyakozesebwanga okussa akabonero ku birangiriro ebitongole, n'agiwa Hamani, omulabe w'Abayudaaya, mutabani wa Hammedata, asibuka mu Agagi." 
Esther3:11 Kabaka n'amugamba nti: “Ensimbi zisigaze, n'abantu nkukkirizza obakoleko ky'oyagala.”" 
Esther3:12 Awo ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'essatu olw'omwezi ogusooka, abawandiisi ba kabaka ne bayitibwa. Ne bawandiika ekirangiriro, omuli byonna Hamani bye yalagira abakungu ba kabaka, n'abaami abafuga buli kitundu, n'abakulu ba buli ggwanga. Buli kitundu ne kiwandiikirwa mu mpandiika yaakyo, na buli ggwanga mu lulimi lwalyo. Ekirangiriro kyawandiikibwa mu linnya lya Kabaka Ahaswero, era ne kiteekebwako akabonero k'empeta ye." 
Esther3:13 Ababaka ne batwala ekirangiriro mu buli kitundu ky'obwakabaka. Ekirangiriro kyalimu okulagira okutta, okuzikiriza, n'okumalirawo ddala Abayudaaya bonna, abato n'abakulu, abakazi n'abaana, mu lunaku lumu olw'ekkumi n'essatu, olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, gwe mwezi ogwa Adaari, n'okunyaga ebintu byabwe." 
Esther3:14 Ebyakirimu byali bya kuba tteeka mu buli kitundu, birangirirwe eri abantu bonna beeteekereteekere olunaku olwo." 
Esther3:15 Kabaka n'alagira ababaka ne bagenda, ne babunyisa mangu etteeka mu kibuga ekikulu Susa. Awo kabaka ne Hamani ne batuula okunywa, kyokka ng'ekibuga kyonna ekikulu Susa, kiguddemu akasattiro." 
Esther4:1 Moruddekaayi bwe yamanya byonna ebyali bikoleddwa, n'ayuza ebyambalo bye olw'okunakuwala, ne yeesiba ebikutiya, ne yesiiga omutwe gwe gwonna evvu, n'ayita mu kibuga ng'akuba ebiwoobe eby'amaanyi," 
Esther4:2 okutuuka lwe yatuuka ku mulyango gw'olubiri, naye n'atayingira, kubanga omuntu ayambadde ebikutiya teyakkirizibwanga kuyingira mu lubiri." 
Esther4:3 Mu bitundu by'amatwale byonna, etteeka lya kabaka n'ekiragiro kye gye byatuuka, Abayudaaya ne beesaasaabaga nnyo, ne basiiba, ne bakaaba amaziga, ne bakuba ebiwoobe, era bangi ne bagalamira mu vvu nga bambadde ebikutiya." 
Esther4:4 Esiteeri ne yennyamira nnyo, abaweereza be abakazi n'abalaawe bwe baamubuulira Moruddekaayi bye yali akola. N'amuweereza engoye ez'okwambala mu kifo eky'ebikutiya, naye Moruddekaayi n'atazikkiriza." 
Esther4:5 Awo Esiteeri n'ayita omu ku balaawe ba kabaka eyali ateekeddwawo okumuweereza, eyayitibwanga Hataki, n'amutuma agende amanye byonna ebiriwo." 
Esther4:6 Hataki n'agenda eri Moruddekaayi mu makkati g'ekibuga ku mulyango gw'olubiri. 
Esther4:7 Moruddekaayi n'amutegeeza byonna ebyali bimutuuseeko, n'omuwendo gw'ensimbi Hamani gwe yali asuubizza okuleeta mu ggwanika ly'obwakabaka, singa Abayudaaya bonna bazikirizibwa." 
Esther4:8 Moruddekaayi n'awa Hataki ebyali mu kirangiriro ekyali kifulumiziddwa mu Susa, ekiragira okusaanyaawo Abayudaaya. N'amugamba abitwalire Esiteeri era abimunnyonnyole, era amukuutire okugenda eri kabaka amwegayirire, era amusabe okukwatirwa abantu be Abayudaaya ekisa." 
Esther4:9 Awo Hataki n'agenda n'abuulira Esiteeri, Moruddekaayi by'agambye." 
Esther4:10 Ne Esiteeri n'awa Hataki obubaka obw'okuddiza Moruddekaayi nti: 
Esther4:11 “Singa wabaawo omuntu, k'abe musajja oba mukazi, ayingira munda mu luggya, n'alaba kabaka nga tayitiddwa, omuntu oyo ateekwa kuttibwa. Etteeka lino buli omu alimanyi, okuva ku baweereza ba kabaka, okutuukira ddala ku bantu bonna ab'omu bitundu kabaka by'afuga. Wabula singa kabaka agololera omuntu omuggo gwe ogwa zaabu, olwo omuntu oyo tattibwa. Naye mmaze ennaku amakumi asatu nga siyitibwanga kugenda eri kabaka.”" 
Esther4:12 Awo ne babuulira Moruddekaayi Esiteeri by'agambye. 
Esther4:13 Moruddekaayi n'abagamba okuddamu Esiteeri nti: “Tolowooza nti mu Bayudaaya bonna, ggwe onoowonawo kubanga oli mu lubiri lwa kabaka." 
Esther4:14 Kubanga bw'onoosirika mu kiseera nga kino, Abayudaaya bajja kufuna obuyambi obw'okubawonya nga buva awalala, naye ggwe n'ab'ennyumba ya kitaawo, muzikirire. Ye ani amanyi oba nga wafuulibwa Nnaabagereka lwa biseera ebiri nga bino?”" 
Esther4:15 Esiteeri n'addamu Moruddekaayi nti: 
Esther4:16 “Genda okuŋŋaanye Abayudaaya bonna abali mu Susa, musiibe ku lwange. Temulya wadde okubaako kye munywa, okumala ennaku ssatu. Nze n'abaweereza bange abakazi, tujja kukola ekintu kye kimu. Oluvannyuma nja kugenda eri kabaka newaakubadde nga tekikkirizibwa. Oba kufa, kale nnaafa!”" 
Esther4:17 Moruddekaayi n'agenda n'akola nga Esiteeri bwe yamulagira. 
Esther5:1 Ku lunaku olwokusatu, Esiteeri n'ayambala ebyambalo bye eby'Obwannaabagereka, n'agenda n'ayimirira mu luggya olwomunda olw'olubiri lwa kabaka, ng'atunuulidde ennyumba ya kabaka. Kabaka yali atudde ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka mu lubiri, ng'atunudde eri omulyango gw'olubiri." 
Esther5:2 Kabaka bwe yalaba Nnaabagereka Esiteeri ng'ayimiridde wabweru, n'amusanyukira, n'amugololera omuggo gwe ogwa zaabu gwe yali akutte. Esiteeri n'asembera awali kabaka n'akwata ku musa gw'omuggo gwa kabaka." 
Esther5:3 Awo kabaka n'amugamba nti: “Nnaabagereka Esiteeri, kiki ky'oyagala? Era kiki ky'osaba? Kijja kukuweebwa, ne bwe kinaaba ekimu ekyokubiri eky'obwakabaka.”" 
Esther5:4 Esiteeri n'amuddamu nti: “Singa osiima, ayi Ssaabasajja, kkiriza okujja ne Hamani olwaleero ku kijjulo kye nkufumbidde.”" 
Esther5:5 Kabaka n'agamba nti: “Mwanguye Hamani, tukole nga Esiteeri bw'agambye.” Awo kabaka ne Hamani ne bagenda ku kijjulo Esiteeri kye yali afumbye." 
Esther5:6 Bwe baali banywa omwenge, kabaka n'agamba Esiteeri nti: “Kiki ky'osaba? Kijja kukuweebwa. Era kiki ky'oyagala? Kijja kutuukirizibwa, ne bwe kinaaba ekimu ekyokubiri eky'obwakabaka.”" 
Esther5:7 Esiteeri n'addamu nti: “Kye njagala era kye nsaba kye kino: 
Esther5:8 bw'oba ng'onkwatiddwa ekisa, ayi Ssaabasajja, era oba ng'osiima okumpa kye njagala, n'okutuukiriza kye nsaba, ayi Ssaabasajja, kale kkiriza ggwe ne Hamani okujja enkya ku kijjulo kye nnaabafumbira. Olwo enkya lwe nnaakola nga bw'ogambye, ayi Ssaabasajja.”" 
Esther5:9 Hamani n'ava ku kijjulo nga musanyufu era ng'ajaguza mu mutima gwe. Naye bwe yasanga Moruddekaayi ng'ali ku mulyango gw'olubiri, n'atayimuka wadde okulaga akabonero konna akamussaamu ekitiibwa ng'ayitawo, Hamani n'amusunguwalira nnyo." 
Esther5:10 Kyokka n'afuga obusungu bwe, n'addayo eka. Awo n'ayita mikwano gye ne bajja mu nnyumba ye, n'agamba ne mukyala we Zeresi okubeegattako." 
Esther5:11 Hamani n'abeenyumiririzaako olw'obugagga bwe, n'abaana ab'obulenzi b'alina, n'engeri kabaka gye yali amukuzizzaamu, okumuwa ekifo ekikulu, ekimufudde omuntu omukulu okusinga abakungu abalala bonna." 
Esther5:12 Ne yeeyongera okubagamba nti: “N'ekisinga byonna, kwe kulaba nga Nnaabagereka Esiteeri, yayise nze nzekka okugenda ne kabaka ku kijjulo kye yafumbye. Era n'enkya ampise wamu ne kabaka." 
Esther5:13 Kyokka bino byonna tebingasa nga nkyalaba Omuyudaaya oyo Moruddekaayi ng'atudde ku mulyango gw'olubiri.” 
Esther5:14 Mukyala we Zeresi ne mikwano gye bonna ne bamuwa amagezi nga bagamba nti: “Zimbisa akalabba ka mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri n'ekitundu obugulumivu, enkya ku makya osabe kabaka, Moruddekaayi awanikibweko afe, olwo osobole okugenda ku kijjulo ne kabaka ng'oli musanyufu.” Hamani n'alowooza nti ago gaali magezi malungi. Bw'atyo n'azimbisa akalabba." 
Esther6:1 Ekiro ekyo, kabaka n'abulwa otulo, n'alagira okumuleetera ekitabo eky'ebigwawo buli lunaku, ebigwana okujjukirwa, ne babimusomera." 
Esther6:2 Ne basanga nga kiwandiikiddwa, nga Moruddekaayi bwe yaloopa olukwe, olwakolebwa Bigitaana ne Teresi, ababiri ku balaawe ba kabaka abaggazi, abaagezaako okutemula Kabaka Ahaswero." 
Esther6:3 Kabaka n'abuuza nti: “Kitiibwa ki na bukulu ki Moruddekaayi bye yaweebwa olw'ekyo?” Awo abaweereza ba kabaka ne bamugamba nti: “Tewali kyali kimuweereddwa.” 
Esther6:4 Kabaka n'abuuza nti: “Ani ali mu luggya?” Mu kiseera ekyo Hamani yali yaakayingira mu luggya olw'ebweru olw'omu lubiri, ng'azze okusaba kabaka amuwe Moruddekaayi awanikibwe ku kalabba, ke yali amaze okukola." 
Esther6:5 Abaweereza ba kabaka ne bamugamba nti: “Hamani ye ali mu luggya.” Kabaka n'agamba nti: “Ayingire.” 
Esther6:6 Awo Hamani n'ayingira era kabaka n'amugamba nti: “Kiki ekigwanidde okukolerwa omuntu, kabaka gw'ayagala okuwa ekitiibwa?” Hamani n'alowooza mu mutima gwe nti: “Ani kabaka gwe yandyagadde okuwa ekitiibwa okusinga nze.”" 
Esther6:7 Awo Hamani n'agamba kabaka nti: “Omuntu kabaka gw'ayagala okuwa ekitiibwa," 
Esther6:8 baleete ebyambalo bya kabaka bye yali ayambaddemu, n'embalaasi kabaka gye yali yeebagaddeko, era etikkiddwa ku mutwe engule ey'obwakabaka." 
Esther6:9 Ebyambalo ebyo n'embalaasi, bikwasibwe omu ku bakungu ba kabaka abasingira ddala ekitiibwa, amwambaze ebyambalo ebyo, era amukulembere ng'amwebagazza embalaasi, amuyise mu kibuga wakati, agende ng'alangirira nti: ‘Bw'atyo omuntu, kabaka gw'ayagala okuwa ekitiibwa, bw'agwanidde okuyisibwa!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Awo kabaka n'agamba Hamani nti: “Yanguwa oleete ebyambalo n'embalaasi, Moruddekaayi Omuyudaaya omuwe ekitiibwa ekyo. Buli kyonna ky'oyogedde, ky'oba omukolera ddala obutalekaayo n'ekimu. Ojja kumusanga ng'atudde ku mulyango gw'olubiri.”" 
Esther6:11 Awo Hamani n'aleeta ebyambalo n'embalaasi n'ayambaza Moruddekaayi, n'amwebagaza embalaasi, n'amukulembera okumuyisa mu kibuga wakati, ng'agenda alangirira nti: “Bw'atyo omuntu, kabaka gw'ayagala okuwa ekitiibwa, bw'agwanidde okuyisibwa!”" 
Esther6:12 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Moruddekaayi n'akomawo ku mulyango gwa kabaka. Naye Hamani n'ayanguwa okuddayo ewuwe ng'anakuwadde, era nga yeebisse omutwe gwe." 
Esther6:13 Hamani n'abuulira mukyala we Zeresi ne mikwano gye bonna, buli kintu ekyali kimutuuseeko. Awo abasajja abagezi, ne Zeresi mukyala we, ne bamugamba nti: “Moruddekaayi oyo, nga bw'otandise okutoowazibwa mu maaso ge, bw'aba nga wa mu lulyo lwa Bayudaaya, tojja kumusobola, wabula ojja kweyongera bweyongezi okutoowazibwa.”" 
Esther6:14 Awo bwe baali nga bakyayogera, abalaawe b'omu lubiri ne bajja mu bwangu okutwala Hamani ku kijjulo, Esiteeri kye yali afumbye." 
Esther7:1 Awo kabaka ne Hamani ne bagenda okulya ekijjulo ewa Nnaabagereka Esiteeri," 
Esther7:2 omulundi ogwokubiri. Bwe baali banywa omwenge, kabaka n'agamba Esiteeri nate nti: “Nnaabagereka Esiteeri, kiki ky'osaba? Kijja kukuweebwa. Era kiki ky'oyagala? Kijja kutuukirizibwa, ne bwe kinaaba ekimu ekyokubiri eky'obwakabaka.”" 
Esther7:3 Awo Nnaabagereka Esiteeri n'agamba nti: “Bw'oba ng'onkwatiddwa ekisa, era bw'oba ng'osiimye, ayi Ssaabasajja, okumpa kye nsaba, nkusaba n'obuwombeefu mpeebwe obulamu bwange, era nkwegayirira, abantu bange baleme okuttibwa." 
Esther7:4 Nze n'abantu bange tutundiddwa okuttibwa, okuzikirizibwa, n'okumalibwawo ddala. Singa kibadde kikoma ku kya kutundibwa okuba abaddu n'abazaana, nandisirise ne sikuteganya, newaakubadde ng'omulabe teyandiyinzizza kuliwa, kabaka bye yandifiiriddwa.”" 
Esther7:5 Awo Kabaka Ahaswero n'abuuza Nnaabagereka Esiteeri nti: “Ani ayinza okwaŋŋanga okukola ekintu ng'ekyo? Era omuntu oyo ali ludda wa?” 
Esther7:6 Awo Esiteeri n'agamba nti: “Omulabe waffe, atuyigganya, ye musajja ono Hamani omubi.” Hamani n'atya nnyo mu maaso ga kabaka ne Nnaabagereka." 
Esther7:7 Kabaka n'asituka ng'ajjudde obusungu, n'ava we yali anywera omwenge, n'afuluma ebweru, n'agenda mu bulimiro bw'omu lubiri. Hamani bwe yalaba nga kabaka amaliridde okumubonereza, n'asigalawo okwegayirira Nnaabagereka Esiteeri okuwonya obulamu bwe." 
Esther7:8 Awo kabaka n'akomawo ng'ava mu bulimiro bw'omu lubiri, n'ayingira mu kifo mwe yali anywera omwenge, n'asanga Hamani ng'agudde ku kitanda, Esiteeri kwe yali. Awo kabaka n'agamba nti: “Omusajja ono ayagala na kukwata Nnaabagereka wano mu maaso gange, mu lubiri lwange?” Olwayogera ekyo, ne babikka ku maaso ga Hamani." 
Esther7:9 Awo Haruboona omu ku balaawe abaweereza kabaka n'agamba nti: “Era Hamani yabadde akoze n'akalabba mu maka ge ak'okuwanikako Moruddekaayi, eyawonya obulamu bwa Ssaabasajja. Obugulumivu bw'akalabba ako, bwa mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri n'ekitundu.” Kabaka n'alagira nti: “Mumuwanike okwo.”" 
Esther7:10 Awo Hamani n'awanikibwa ku kalabba, ke yali akoledde Moruddekaayi. Awo obusungu bwa kabaka ne bukkakkana." 
Esther8:1 Ku lunaku olwo, Kabaka Ahaswero n'awa Nnaabagereka Esiteeri ebintu byonna ebyali ebya Hamani, omulabe w'Abayudaaya. Esiteeri n'abuulira kabaka nga Moruddekaayi bwe yali amulinako oluganda, era okuva olwo, Moruddekaayi n'akkirizibwa okujjanga mu maaso ga kabaka." 
Esther8:2 Kabaka n'anaanula empeta ye eriko akabonero, gye yaggya ku Hamani, n'agiwa Moruddekaayi. Esiteeri n'akwasa Moruddekaayi obuvunaanyizibwa obw'okulabirira ebintu byonna ebyali ebya Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Awo Esiteeri n'addamu okwogera ne kabaka. N'avuunama wansi w'ebigere bya kabaka nga bw'akaaba amaziga, n'amwegayirira okuziyiza entegeka ey'akabi era n'olukwe, Hamani asibuka mu Agagi, bye yali akoledde Abayudaaya." 
Esther8:4 Awo kabaka n'agololera Esiteeri omuggo gwe ogwa zaabu. Esiteeri n'asituka, n'ayimirira mu maaso ga kabaka," 
Esther8:5 n'agamba nti: “Bw'oba ng'osiima, ayi Ssaabasajja, era bw'oba ng'onkwatiddwa ekisa, era bw'olaba nga kituufu, era nga nsiimibwa mu maaso go, bawandiike ekirangiriro ekiziyiza ebbaluwa za Hamani mutabani wa Hammedata, asibuka mu Agagi, ze yawandiika okumalirawo ddala Abayudaaya bonna, abali mu bitundu byonna eby'obwakabaka." 
Esther8:6 Kubanga nnyinza ntya okugumiikiriza okulaba akabi nga kajjira abantu bange? Oba nnyinza ntya okugumiikiriza okulaba baganda bange nga bazikirizibwa?” 
Esther8:7 Kabaka Ahaswero n'agamba Nnaabagereka Esiteeri ne Moruddekaayi Omuyudaaya nti: “Kaakano mmaze okuwanika Hamani ku kalabba olw'okuyigganya Abayudaaya, era mpadde Esiteeri ebintu byonna ebibadde ebya Hamani." 
Esther8:8 Naye ekirangiriro ekimaze okuweebwa mu linnya lya kabaka, ne kissibwako n'akabonero k'empeta ya kabaka, tekiyinza kujjululwa. Wabula muyinza okuwandiikira Abayudaaya buli kye musiima, mu linnya lyange, musseeko n'akabonero k'empeta ya kabaka.”" 
Esther8:9 Kino kyaliwo ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu essatu olw'omwezi ogwokusatu, gwe mwezi gwa Sivaani. Moruddekaayi n'ayita abawandiisi ba kabaka, n'abawa ebigambo eby'okuwandiika mu bbaluwa ezaawandiikirwa Abayudaaya n'abaami bonna, abaali bafuga ebitundu ekikumi mu abiri mu omusanvu, okuva e Buyindi okutuuka e Kuusi. Ebbaluwa ne ziwandiikirwa buli kitundu mu lulimi lwakyo n'empandiika yaakyo, n'Abayudaaya ne bawandiikirwa mu lulimi lwabwe mu mpandiika yaabwe." 
Esther8:10 Moruddekaayi n'awandiika ebbaluwa zino mu linnya lya kabaka, n'assaako akabonero k'empeta ya kabaka. Ne zitwalibwa mangu ababaka abeebagadde embalaasi ezidduka ennyo, ezakozesebwanga emirimu gya kabaka, era ezaggyibwa mu bisibo bye." 
Esther8:11 Mu bbaluwa ezo, kabaka n'akkiriza Abayudaaya abali mu buli kibuga okukuŋŋaana, basobole okutaasa obulamu bwabwe, era basobole okutta, okuzikiriza, n'okumalirawo ddala amagye gonna aga buli ggwanga oba ekitundu, agaba gabalumbye bo, ne bakazi baabwe, era n'abaana baabwe abato. Bayinza n'okwetwalira ebibadde ebintu eby'abalabe baabwe." 
Esther8:12 Ekiragiro ekyo kyali kya kukola mu matwale gonna aga Kabaka Ahaswero, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'essatu olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, gwe mwezi ogwa Adaari." 
Esther8:13 Ebyali mu kirangiriro, byali bya kulangirirwa ng'etteeka mu buli kitundu, n'okumanyisibwa eri buli muntu, okusobozesa Abayudaaya okweteekateeka okuwoolera eggwanga ku balabe baabwe, ng'olunaku olwo lutuuse." 
Esther8:14 Kabaka n'alagira ababaka, ne beebagala embalaasi ze ezidduka ennyo, ne bagenda. Etteeka ne lirangirirwa ne mu kibuga ekikulu Susa." 
Esther8:15 Awo Moruddekaayi n'ava ewa kabaka ng'ayambadde ebyambalo bya kabaka ebya bbululu n'ebyeru, ng'asuulidde omunagiro ogw'olugoye olwa kakobe, era ng'ayambadde n'engule eyeekitiibwa eya zaabu. Awo abantu mu nguudo z'ekibuga Susa ne bakuba emizira, ne baleekaana olw'essanyu." 
Esther8:16 Awo Abayudaaya ne baba bulungi, ne basanyuka, ne bajaguza, era ne baba n'ekitiibwa." 
Esther8:17 Mu buli kibuga ne mu buli kitundu ekirangiriro kya kabaka gye kyasomebwanga, ng'Abayudaaya baba n'olunaku olw'okuwummula, nga basanyuka era nga bajaguza. Abantu b'amawanga amalala bangi ne batuuka n'okufuuka Abayudaaya, kubanga olwo Abayudaaya baali bafuuse abantu abatiisa." 
Esther9:1 Awo olunaku olw'ekkumi n'essatu olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, gwe mwezi ogwa Adaari, olwali olw'okutuukiririzaako ekiragiro n'etteeka kabaka bye yawa, era abalabe b'Abayudaaya lwe baali basuubira okubawangulirako bwe lwatuuka, ebintu ne bikyuka okubeevuunulira, Abayudaaya ne bawangula abalabe baabwe." 
Esther9:2 Mu bifo ebibeeramu Abayudaaya, mu bibuga eby'omu matwale ga Kabaka Ahaswero, Abayudaaya ne bakuŋŋaana okulwanyisa buli muntu eyagezaako okubakolako akabi. Wonna wonna abantu ne batya Abayudaaya, era ne wataba ayinza kubalwanyisa." 
Esther9:3 Abaali mu bifo ebitongole: abafuzi n'abaami b'ebitundu, awamu n'abakungu ba kabaka, bonna abo ne batuuka n'okuyamba Abayudaaya, olw'okutya Moruddekaayi." 
Esther9:4 Kubanga Moruddekaayi yali muntu mukulu mu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'ettutumu lye nga libunye mu bitundu byonna eby'obwakabaka. Kubanga omusajja oyo Moruddekaayi, yeeyongeranga bweyongezi okuba n'obuyinza." 
Esther9:5 Abayudaaya ne batta abalabe baabwe bonna nga babatema n'ebitala, ne babazikiriza okubamalawo. Ne bakola kye baagala ku abo abaabakyawa." 
Esther9:6 Ne mu Susa, ekibuga ekikulu kyennyini, Abayudaaya ne batta ne bazikiriza abantu ebikumi bitaano." 
Esther9:7 Ne batta Parisanidaata, ne Dalifoni, ne Asipata," 
Esther9:8 ne Porata, ne Adaliya, ne Aridaata," 
Esther9:9 ne Paramasita, ne Arisaayi, ne Aridaayi, ne Vayizaata," 
Esther9:10 abatabani ekkumi aba Hamani, mutabani wa Hammedata era omulabe w'Abayudaaya. Naye ne batanyaga kintu na kimu." 
Esther9:11 Awo ne bategeeza kabaka omuwendo gw'abantu abattibwa mu kibuga ekikulu Susa ku lunaku olwo lwennyini. 
Esther9:12 Kabaka n'agamba Nnaabagereka Esiteeri nti: “Mu kibuga ekikulu Susa, Abayudaaya basse ne bazikiriza abantu ebikumi bitaano, ne batabani ba Hamani ekkumi. Kale abantu bameka be basse mu matwale ga kabaka gonna! Kati kiki ky'osaba? Kijja kukuweebwa. Oba, kiki era ky'oyagala? Kijja kutuukirizibwa.”" 
Esther9:13 Esiteeri n'addamu nti: “Bw'osiima, ayi Ssaabasajja, kkiriza Abayudaaya abali mu Susa, enkya baddemu okukola ekyo, kye bakkiriziddwa okukola olwaleero, n'emirambo gya batabani ba Hamani ekkumi, giwanikibwe ku kalabba.”" 
Esther9:14 Kabaka n'alagira bakole bwe batyo, era ekirangiriro ne kiweebwa mu Susa, emirambo egya batabani ba Hamani ekkumi, ne bagiwanika." 
Esther9:15 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olwa Adaari, Abayudaaya abaali mu Susa ne baddamu okukuŋŋaana, ne batta abantu ebikumi bisatu mu Susa. Naye ne batanyaga kintu na kimu." 
Esther9:16 Awo Abayudaaya abalala abaali mu bitundu by'obwakabaka ne bakuŋŋaana, ne bataasa obulamu bwabwe ne beewonya abalabe baabwe. Mu abo abaabakyawa, ne battamu emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi ttaano. Naye ne batanyaga kintu na kimu." 
Esther9:17 Kino kyabaawo ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'essatu olw'omwezi ogwa Adaari. Enkeera, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya, ne bawummula ne balufuula olunaku olw'okuliirako embaga n'okusanyuka." 
Esther9:18 Naye Abayudaaya abaali mu Susa, ne bakuŋŋaana ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'essatu, ne ku lw'ekkumi n'ennya. Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ettaano ne bawummula, ne balufuula olunaku olw'okuliirako embaga n'okusanyuka." 
Esther9:19 Abayudaaya ab'omu byalo, abaabeeranga mu bibuga ebitaliiko bigo, kyebaava bafuula olunaku olw'ekkumi n'ennya olw'omwezi gwa Adaari olunaku olw'okusanyukirako n'okuliirako embaga, era olw'okuwummula n'okuweerezaganirako ebirabo." 
Esther9:20 Awo Moruddekaayi n'awandiika ebyo byonna ebyabaawo. Era Abayudaaya bonna abaali okumpi n'ewala mu matwale gonna aga Kabaka Ahaswero, n'abawandiikira ebbaluwa," 
Esther9:21 ng'abalagira okukuzanga ennaku: olw'ekkumi n'ennya n'olw'ekkumi n'ettaano eza Adaari, buli mwaka." 
Esther9:22 Ezo ze nnaku, Abayudaaya kwe beewonyeza abalabe baabwe. Ogwo gwe mwezi ogwafuuka ogw'essanyu mu kifo ky'obuyinike, era ogw'okuwummula mu kifo ky'okukungubaga. Baalagirwa okufuula ennaku ezo ez'okuliirako embaga, n'ez'okusanyukirako, n'ez'okuweerezaganirangako ebirungi, n'okugabirangako abaavu ebirabo." 
Esther9:23 Abayudaaya ne bakkiriza okukolanga ekyo kye baali batandise, era nga Moruddekaayi bwe yabawandiikira." 
Esther9:24 Kubanga Hamani mutabani wa Hammedata, asibuka mu Agagi era omulabe w'Abayudaaya bonna, yali abakoledde olukwe okubazikiriza, era yali akubisizza akalulu, ako ke kayitibwa Puri, okubamalawo n'okubazikiriza."
