Esther9:25 Naye Esiteeri bwe yagenda eri kabaka, kabaka n'awandiika ebbaluwa ng'alagira nti olukwe olwo nnamuzisa, Hamani lwe yali akoledde Abayudaaya, lumwekyusize, era ye ne batabani be bawanikibwe ku kalabba." 
Esther9:26 Ennaku ezo kyebaava baziyita Purimu olw'erinnya Puri, akalulu. Kale olw'ebigambo ebyali mu bbaluwa eyo, n'olw'ebyo bye baalaba ebifa ku nsonga eno, n'olw'ebyo ebyabatuukako," 
Esther9:27 Abayudaaya kyebaava balifuula etteeka ku bo bennyini, ne ku zzadde lyabwe, ne ku buli alifuuka Omuyudaaya, nti ennaku ezo zombi zikuzibwenga buli mwaka awatali kwosa nga bwe kyawandiikibwa, era ng'ebiseera byazo bwe byategekebwa." 
Esther9:28 Era baasalawo nti ennaku ezo zijjukirwenga era zikuzibwenga mu buli mulembe, ne mu buli maka ne mu buli kitundu ne mu buli kibuga, era ennaku ezo eza Purimu ziremenga kugyibwawo mu Buyudaaya, wadde okwerabirwa bazzukulu baabwe." 
Esther9:29 Awo Nnaabagereka Esiteeri muwala wa Abihayili, ng'ali wamu ne Moruddekaayi Omuyudaaya, n'awandiika ebbaluwa ng'akozesa obuyinza bwe bwonna, okunyweza ebbaluwa eyo eyookubiri eyogera ku Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Ebbaluwa n'agiweereza Abayudaaya bonna mu bitundu ekikumi mu abiri mu omusanvu eby'obwakabaka bwa Ahaswero, ng'ebaagaliza emirembe, era ng'ebakubiriza okuba abaamazima." 
Esther9:31 Yabawandiikirwa okukakasa ennaku ezo eza Purimu, mu biseera byazo ebyateekebwawo, nga Moruddekaayi Omuyudaaya ne Nnaabagereka Esiteeri bwe baabalagira, era nga bo be nnyini Abayudaaya bwe baali beeteereddewo ebiragiro eby'okusiiba, n'ebiseera eby'okukungubaga." 
Esther9:32 Awo ekiragiro kya Esiteeri ne kikakasa amateeka ga Purimu, era ne kiwandiikibwa mu kitabo." 
Esther10:1 Awo Kabaka Ahaswero n'asalira abantu ab'oku lukalu n'ab'omu bizinga eby'omu nnyanja omusolo. 
Esther10:2 Ebyo byonna bye yakola ebiraga obuyinza bwe n'amaanyi ge, era n'ebyo ebiraga nga bwe yatuusa Moruddekaayi ku bukulu, biwandiikiddwa mu Kitabo eky'Ebyomumirembe gya Bassekabaka b'e Perusiya n'e Mediya." 
Esther10:3 Moruddekaayi Omuyudaaya, ye yaddiriranga Kabaka Ahaswero mu kitiibwa, era yali mukulu mu Bayudaaya. Bayudaaya banne baamwagalanga, kubanga yakoleranga abantu be ebirungi, era ng'ayagaliza ab'eggwanga lye emirembe." 
Job1:1 Waaliwo omusajja mu nsi ya Wuzzi, erinnya lye Yobu. Omusajja oyo yali muntu ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa, era omwesimbu, assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era nga yeewala okukola ebibi." 
Job1:2 Yalina abaana ab'obulenzi musanvu, n'ab'obuwala basatu." 
Job1:3 Yalina endiga kasanvu, eŋŋamiya enkumi ssatu, n'emigogo gy'ente ezirima ebikumi bitaano, n'endogoyi enkazi ebikumi bitaano, n'abaweereza bangi nnyo ddala. Omusajja oyo ye yali asinga obugagga mu bantu b'ebuvanjuba bonna." 
Job1:4 Batabani be baagendanga ne bafumba embaga mu nnyumba ya buli omu ku bo mu mpalo, ne batumya bannyinaabwe abasatu, ne babayita okulya n'okunywa nabo." 
Job1:5 Ennaku ez'embaga zaabwe bwe zaggwangako, Yobu yabatumyanga n'abatukuza. Yagolokokanga mu makya, n'aweerayo buli omu ku bo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, kubanga yagambanga nti: “Oboolyawo abaana bange baliko ebibi bye baakoze, ne beegaana Katonda mu mitima gyabwe.” Bw'atyo Yobu bwe yakolanga bulijjo." 
Job1:6 Awo olunaku lwali lumu, bannaggulu ne bajja okweyanjula mu maaso ga Mukama. Ne Sitaani naye n'ajjira mu bo." 
Job1:7 Mukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Ova wa?” Sitaani n'addamu Mukama nti: “Nva kuyitaayita mu nsi n'okugitambulatambulamu.” 
Job1:8 Mukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Olabye omuweereza wange Yobu? Tewali amwenkana ku nsi. Omusajja oyo ye muntu ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa, era omwesimbu, anzisaamu ekitiibwa, ne yeewala okukola ebibi.”" 
Job1:9 Awo Sitaani n'addamu Mukama nti: “Yobu akussizaamu bwereere ekitiibwa? 
Job1:10 Omukoledde olukomera okumwetooloola, ye n'amaka ge, n'ebibye byonna by'alina. By'akola obiwadde omukisa, n'obugagga bwe bweyongedde obungi mu nsi." 
Job1:11 Naye kaakano golola omukono gwo omuggyeko byonna by'alina, ajja kukwegaana ng'olaba.”" 
Job1:12 Mukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Kale byonna by'alina, biri mu buyinza bwo. Kyokka ye tomukolako kabi.” Awo Sitaani n'ava mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Job1:13 Awo olunaku lwali lumu, batabani ba Yobu ne bawala be, bwe baali nga baliira emmere era nga banywera omwenge mu nnyumba ya muganda waabwe omukulu," 
Job1:14 omubaka n'ajja eri Yobu n'agamba nti: “Ente bwe zibadde nga zirima, nga n'endogoyi ziziriraanye, zirya," 
Job1:15 Abasabeya ne bazizinda, ne bazinyaga. Ne bakozesa ebitala, ne batta abaweereza bo. Era nze nzekka, nze mponyeewo, ne nzija okukubuulira.”" 
Job1:16 Yali ng'akyayogera, omulala n'ajja, n'agamba nti: “Omuliro gwa Katonda gugudde nga guva mu ggulu, ne gwokya endiga n'ababadde bazirunda, ne gubazikiriza. Era nze nzekka nze mponyeewo, ne nzija okukubuulira.”" 
Job1:17 Yali ng'akyayogera, omulala n'agamba nti: “Abakaludaaya, nga beegabanyizzaamu ebibinja bisatu, bazinze eŋŋamiya, ne bazinyaga. Ne bakozesa ebitala, ne batta abaweereza bo. Era nze nzekka nze mponyeewo, ne nzija okukubuulira.”" 
Job1:18 Yali ng'akyayogera, omulala n'ajja n'agamba nti: “Batabani bo ne bawala bo babadde baliira emmere era nga banywera omwenge mu nnyumba ya muganda waabwe omukulu," 
Job1:19 omuyaga ogw'amaanyi ne guva mu ddungu, ne gukuba ensonda ennya ez'ennyumba, n'ebagwako, era bafudde. Era nze nzekka nze mponyeewo, ne nzija okukubuulira.”" 
Job1:20 Awo Yobu n'asituka, n'ayuza ekyambalo kye olw'okunakuwala, n'amwa omutwe gwe, n'avuunama ku ttaka, n'asinza Katonda." 
Job1:21 N'agamba nti: “Mu lubuto lwa mmange navaamu ndi mwereere, era ndifa ndi mwereere. Mukama ye yampa ebyo, era Mukama ye aggyeewo. Kale Mukama yeebazibwe.”" 
Job1:22 Mu ebyo byonna ebyagwawo, Yobu teyayonoona, wadde okunenya Katonda." 
Job2:1 Awo olunaku lwali lumu nate, bannaggulu ne bajja okweyanjula mu maaso ga Mukama. Ne Sitaani n'ajjira mu bo okweyanjula mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Job2:2 Mukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Ova wa?” Sitaani n'addamu Mukama nti: “Nva kuyitaayita mu nsi n'okugitambulatambulamu.” 
Job2:3 Mukama n'abuuza Sitaani nti: “Olabye omuweereza wange Yobu? Tewali amwenkana ku nsi. Omusajja oyo ye muntu ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa, era omwesimbu, anzisaamu ekitiibwa, era nga yeewala okukola ebibi. Era akyanywezezza obwesigwa bwe, newaakubadde nga wanzikirizisa okumuzikiririza obwereere.”" 
Job2:4 Sitaani n'addamu Mukama nti: “Ekikwata ku lususu kye kikosa omuntu. Byonna omuntu by'alina alibiwaayo olw'obulamu bwe. 
Job2:5 Naye kaakano golola omukono gwo, okwate ku magumba ge ne ku mubiri gwe, ajja kukuvuma ng'olaba.”" 
Job2:6 Mukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Kale, ali mu buyinza bwo. Kyokka mulekere obulamu.”" 
Job2:7 Awo Sitaani n'ava awali Mukama n'agenda, n'alwaza Yobu amayute amabi ennyo omubiri gwonna, okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere." 
Job2:8 Yobu n'akwatanga oluggyo okweyaguza. N'atuulanga mu vvu. 
Job2:9 Awo mukazi we n'amugamba nti: “Era okyakuuma obwesigwa bwo? Wegaane Katonda, ofe.”" 
Job2:10 Kyokka Yobu n'amugamba nti: “Oyogera ng'abakazi abasirusiru bwe boogera. Katonda by'atuwa, tunaayanirizanga bisanyusa byokka, ne tutayaniriza binyiga?” Mu ebyo byonna ebyagwawo Yobu teyayogera bubi ku Katonda." 
Job2:11 Awo mikwano gya Yobu basatu: Elifaazi Omutemani, Biludaadi Omusuuhi, ne Zafari Omunaamati, bwe baawulira emitawaana gyonna egimujjidde, bonsatule ne basalawo buli omu okuva ewuwe, ne bajja okumukaabirako n'okumukubagiza." 
Job2:12 Bwe baamulengera, ne balaba nga takyafaananika. Ne batema emiranga, ne bakaaba amaziga. Ne bayuza ebyambalo byabwe olw'okunakuwala. Ne beeyiira enfuufu mu mitwe, era nga bwe bagimansa waggulu." 
Job2:13 Ne batuula wamu naye ku ttaka emisana n'ekiro, okumala ennaku musanvu, nga tewali ayogera naye kigambo, kubanga baalaba okubonaabona okungi kwe yalimu." 
Job3:1 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yobu n'atandika okwogera, n'akolimira olunaku lwe yazaalirwako." 
Job3:2 Yobu n'agamba nti: 
Job3:3 “Olunaku kwe nazaalirwako luzikirire, n'ekiro ekyagamba nti omwana ow'obulenzi ali mu lubuto." 
Job3:4 Lube lwa kizikiza olunaku olwo; Katonda mu ggulu alwerabire, n'enjuba ereme okwakirako." 
Job3:5 Ekisiikirize n'ekizikiza ekikutte biruyite olwabyo. Ekire kirubikke. Lutiisibwe ebyo byonna ebiddugaza obudde. 
Job3:6 Ekiro ekyo kivumbagirwe ekizikiza ekikutte. Kiggyibwe mu nnaku z'omwaka; kireme na kubalirwa mu mwezi. 
Job3:7 Ddala ekiro ekyo kibe kya bugumba; kireme kuwulirwamu basanyuka. 
Job3:8 Kikolimirwe abo, abakolimira obudde; era abasobola okusaggula goonya." 
Job3:9 Emmunyeenye z'amakya gaakyo zireme okulabikako. Ekitangaala kye kisuubira, kibule, kireme kulaba ku mmambya." 
Job3:10 Kubanga mmange tekyamufuula mugumba, ne kireka ndabe ennaku eno endaaza!" 
Job3:11 Lwaki saafiirawo nga nzaalwa, olwava mu nda ya mmange ne nzisa ogusembayo?" 
Job3:12 Lwaki nalererwa ku maviivi? N'amabeere lwaki gannyonsa? 
Job3:13 Kubanga bwe nandifudde nandisirise; nandyebase, nandiwummudde" 
Job3:14 wamu ne bassekabaka n'abafuzi b'ensi, abeezimbira obuggya embiri mu matongo." 
Job3:15 Nandyebase wamu n'abalangira abajjuza ennyumba zaabwe zaabu ne ffeeza. 
Job3:16 Singa naggyibwawo ng'omusowole, oba okuziikibwa ng'omwana azaalibwa ng'afudde, atalaba ku kitangaala." 
Job3:17 Eyo mu ntaana ababi, bakoma okuteganya abantu, era eyo, abalungi gye bawummulira." 
Job3:18 Eyo n'abasibe bassa ku mukka; ne batawulira abatulugunya. 
Job3:19 Omuto n'omukulu bali eyo; n'omuddu tafugibwa mukama we. 
Job3:20 “Abantu abali mu nnaku balabira ki ekitangaala? N'abo ababonaabona babeerera ki abalamu? 
Job3:21 Beegomba okufa, ne kubeesamba; ne bakunoonya okukira abawuukuula obugagga obukwekeddwa." 
Job3:22 Basanyuka nnyo nnyini ne bajaguza bwe bafa, ne bateekebwa mu ntaana." 
Job3:23 Omuntu akwekeddwa ekkubo lye Katonda gw'akolako olukomera? 
Job3:24 Kubanga okusinda ye mmere yange; okusindogoma okwange tekukoma. 
Job3:25 Kye ntya kye kinzijira, n'ekinkanga kye kingwira." 
Job3:26 Siweerako, sirina mirembe, siwummula, Mitawaana gye gijja!”" 
Job4:1 Awo Elifaazi Omutemani n'ayanukula Yobu nti: 
Job4:2 “Omuntu bw'anaayogerako naawe kinaakukola bubi? Naye ani ayinza okwefuga n'atabaako ky'ayogera? 
Job4:3 Wayigirizanga bangi, era wagumyanga abanafu." 
Job4:4 Eyeesittala wamubuuliriranga, n'aguma alemenga kugwa." 
Job4:5 Kati kituuse ku ggwe, n'ozirika; okwatiddwako, ne weeraliikirira." 
Job4:6 Katonda wamusinzanga n'oba mwesigwa gy'ali. Wali muntu mwesimbu. Ekyo tekikuwa ssuubi? 
Job4:7 “Naawe sooka wejjukanye: ani yali asaanyeewo nga tazzizza musango? Era walaba wa omwenkanya azikirizibwa? 
Job4:8 Nze ndabye abafaabiina ng'omulimi bw'akabala. Ne bategeka ennimiro, ne bagisigamu ebyonoono awamu n'emitawaana. Era ebyo bye bakungulamu." 
Job4:9 Katonda abassiza omukka ogw'obusungu bwe, Obuli nga kibuyaga, n'abazikiriza." 
Job4:10 Abantu ababi bawuluguma ng'empologoma enkambwe. Naye amannyo gaazo gamenyebwa. 
Job4:11 Bafa ng'empologoma ezitalina kye zitta kulya, Abaana baabwe ne basaasaana." 
Job4:12 “Olumu nafuna obubaka, nga buli nga kaama ka mu kutu." 
Job4:13 Nali mu birowoozo eby'ekirooto ky'omu kiro; mu tulo otungi otukwata abantu. 
Job4:14 Entiisa n'okukankana ne binkwata. Amagumba gange ne ganyeenyezebwa. 
Job4:15 Omuzimu gwampita awo mu maaso. Enviiri zanva ne ku mutwe! 
Job4:16 Gwayimirira buyimirizi, naye ne sigwekkaanya. Ekifaananyi kyandi mu maaso, nga wonna kasiriikiriro. Ne mpulira eddoboozi nti:" 
Job4:17 ‘Omuntu alifa, asinga Katonda obutuukirivu? Era aliba omulongoofu okukira eyamussaawo?" 
Job4:18 Wadde abo abamuweereza mu ggulu tabeesiga n'akatono. Bamalayika be abanenya olw'ensobi zaabwe. 
Job4:19 Alabisa kale abantu abaakolebwa mu nfuufu? Ababetenteka amangu okusinga n'ekiwuka! 
Job4:20 Okuzikirira kwabwe tekutwala na bbanga: Okuva ku makya okutuusa akawungeezi, baggwaawo ne batajjukirwa." 
Job4:21 Balifa tebannaba bagezi. Byonna bye babadde nabyo ne bitwalibwa abalala.’ 
Job5:1 “Kaakano koowoola, anaakuyitaba ye ani? Onookyukira malayika ki nti: ‘Nnyamba?’" 
Job5:2 Kubanga okweraliikirira kutta omusirusiru; N'okukwatibwa obuggya, kutta abatalina magezi." 
Job5:3 Nalaba omusirusiru nga munywevu. Naye amangwago ne nkolimira ekifo mw'abeera. 
Job5:4 Abaana be baba mu kabi, babetenterwa mu mulyango. Era tewaba abawonya." 
Job5:5 By'akungula biriibwa abayala, ne baggyayo n'ebiri eyo mu maggwa. Obugagga bwe bwegombwa ababululunkanira." 
Job5:6 Kubanga Obuyinike tebusibuka mu nfuufu. Ne mu ttaka, si mwe muva obunaku." 
Job5:7 Naye abantu bazaalirwa kubonaabona, ng'ensasi z'omuliro bwe zimansukira mu bbanga." 
Job5:8 “Naye nze ku bwange, nandyebuuzizza ku Katonda, Oyo gwe nandyanjulidde ensonga." 
Job5:9 Ye akola ebikulu ebitategeerekeka, N'ebyamagero ebitabalika." 
Job5:10 Atonnyesa enkuba ku nsi, N'afukirira ennimiro." 
Job5:11 Abeetoowaza abagulumiza. Akubagiza abanaku, n'abatuusa ku ddembe." 
Job5:12 Afumya enkwe z'abakalabakalaba; zikoma ne zigwa butaka. 
Job5:13 Akwasa abagezi mu bugezigezi bwabwe. Era akomya mangu okuteesa kw'abalina enkwe. 
Job5:14 Baba mu kizikiza emisana, ne bawammanta mu ttuntu ng'ekiro." 
Job5:15 Naye Katonda awonya abanaku ekitala ky'akamwa k'abakambwe. Abali mu bwetaavu abawonya okunyigirizibwa ab'amaanyi. 
Job5:16 Olwo abaavu ne baba n'essuubi, ababi ne bataddayo kunyega." 
Job5:17 “Omuntu Katonda gw'agolola mazima aba wa mukisa. Kale tonyooma kukangavvulwa Muyinzawaabyonna. 
Job5:18 Ye anyiga ebiwundu by'afumise. Engalo ze ezikuba, ze ziwonya." 
Job5:19 Mu buli buyinike akuwonya, Bulijjo n'otobaako kabi." 
Job5:20 Anaakuwonyanga okufa ng'enjala egudde. Mu lutalo n'akuwonya okuttibwa ekitala. 
Job5:21 Anaakuwonyanga abakuwaayiriza. Tootyenga kuzikirira bwe kunajjanga. 
Job5:22 Onoosekereranga enjala era n'okuzikirira, n'ensolo z'omu ttale n'otozitya." 
Job5:23 Kubanga mu nnimiro yo temuubenga mayinja; n'ensolo z'omu ttale teziikulumbenga. 
Job5:24 Oneekakasanga nti mu nnyumba yo oli mirembe; era ne wekkaanya nti ensolo z'omu ggana lyo tekuliiko ekubuze. 
Job5:25 Era oneekakasanga nti bazzukulu bo ba kwala, n'ezzadde lyo liryeyongera obungi ng'omuddo ogw'oku ttale." 
Job5:26 Olifa n'oteekebwa mu ntaana ng'omaze okuwangaala, ng'eŋŋaano gye bakungudde n'ereetebwa ewuulwe." 
Job5:27 Ebyo twabinoonyereza, ne tulaba nga bya mazima. Biwulire obimanye, obiggyemu omugaso.”" 
Job6:1 Yobu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: 
Job6:2 “Singa bapima okweraliikirira kwange, n'ennaku yange n'essibwa ku minzaani," 
Job6:3 Omusenyu gw'ennyanja byandigukize obuzito. Bye njogedde n'olwekyo namaze gabyanguyira. 
Job6:4 Kubanga obusaale bw'Omuyinzawaabyonna bunnyingidde mu mubiri. Obusagwa bwabwo bumbunye. Katonda by'alina eby'entiisa yabiggyayo bisimbe ennyiriri okunzigulako olutalo. 
Job6:5 “Entulege ekaaba bw'eba n'omuddo? Oba ente ye eŋooŋa awali emmere yaayo? 
Job6:6 Ekitaliimu nsa kiriika nga tokirunzeemu munnyo? Omuntu afuna ssanyu ki mu kulya ekitawooma? 
Job6:7 Saagala mbiryeko ebyo, ku nze kumpi gwe muziro." 
Job6:8 “Singa nfuna kye nsaba, Katonda n'ampa kye neegomba:" 
Job6:9 Katonda asiime ambetente nze. Ankube anzite nveewo! 
Job6:10 Ekyo kyandinkubagizza, olwo nandibadde njaganya, Nga sisaasirwa olw'okulumwa. Kubanga sigaananga Omutukuvu by'alagira." 
Job6:11 Amaanyi ge nnina galuwa nnyongere okuba omulamu? Ye obulamu bungasa ki obutalina ssuubi? 
Job6:12 Ndi mugumu nga mayinja? N'omubiri gwange gwa kikomo? 
Job6:13 Nkyalina ageeyamba, Nze atakyalina kye nsobola?" 
Job6:14 “Aterebuse agwana okuyambibwa banne, Ne bw'aba yeegaanye Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Job6:15 Baganda bange balimba ng'akagga akateesigwa. Bali ng'obugga obulabibwamu amazzi, ate oluvannyuma ne bukalira;" 
Job6:16 Obuddugazibwa amazzi agakutte, era obwekwekebwamu omuzira." 
Job6:17 Olubuguma ne bukalira. Omusana olwakako, tobulabako." 
Job6:18 Abatambuze bakyama nga babunoonya. Batambulatambula mu ddungu ne bazikirira. 
Job6:19 Abatambuze b'e Tema baabutunuulira. N'abatambuze b'e Seeba baabulinamu essuubi. 
Job6:20 Baaswala, kubanga baabwesigira bwereere. Bwe baabutuukako ne basoberwa." 
Job6:21 Nammwe bwe mutyo bwe munfuukidde: Kubanga mulaba ndi mu kabi ne mutya. 
Job6:22 Mbagambye nti: ‘Mumpe ekirabo?’ Oba nti ‘Mutoole ku byammwe muweeyo enguzi ku lwange?’ 
Job6:23 Oba nti: ‘Mumponye omulabe?’ Oba nti: ‘Munzigye mu mikono gy'abannyigiriza?’ 
Job6:24 “Ka nsirike mumpabule; Muntegeeze kye nasobya. 
Job6:25 Ebigambo ebituufu bimatiza. Naye empaka zammwe zingasa ki? 
Job6:26 Mwagala okunnenya olw'ebigambo ebiri ng'empewo bye njogedde nga sirina ssuubi? 
Job6:27 Mwandikubidde ne mulekwa akalulu okumufuula omuddu? Mwandiramuzizza ne munnammwe mumufunemu amagoba? 
Job6:28 Kale kaakano muntunuulire, kubanga siibalimbe nga mulaba." 
Job6:29 Mbasaba muddemu mwerowooze muleme kunsibako kibi. Muddemu mwerowooze, ensonga zange ntuufu." 
Job6:30 Nnina ekikyamu kye njogedde? Siyinza kwawula kirungi na kibi? 
Job7:1 “Obulamu bw'omuntu buba bwa kukuluusana ku nsi. Buba ng'obw'abakolera empeera. 
Job7:2 Ng'omuddu bwe yeegomba okuwummula mu kisiikirize, era ng'omupakasi bw'asuubira empeera ye," 
Job7:3 nange bwe ntyo bwe nagabana emyezi gye sifunamu mugaso, n'obudde bw'ekiro bwanteerwawo, bumbuzeeko obuwummuliro." 
Job7:4 Bwe ngalamira ne nneebuuza nti: ‘Okugolokoka kwa ddi?’ Naye ekiro tekiggwaako! Nsula nkulungutana okukeesa obudde. 
Job7:5 Omubiri gwange gujjudde envunyu n'obujama. Olususu lwange luyulika ne lufulumya amasira. 
Job7:6 Ennaku zange ziri ku misinde okusinga n'ewuzi ey'oyo atungisa ekyalaani. Ziggwaako nga tewali ssuubi. 
Job7:7 Jjukira nti obulamu bwange mukka. Amaaso gange tegaliddayo kulaba birungi 
Job7:8 Eriiso erintunulako teririddayo kundabako. Amaaso bwe galinnoonya ndiba nabuzeewo dda. 
Job7:9 “Ng'ekire bwe kiggwaawo ne kibula, bw'atyo n'akka emagombe eyo tagenda kwambuka aveeyo." 
Job7:10 Takomawo nate mu maka ge. N'abo be yabeeranga nabo bamwerabira. 
Job7:11 Kale kaakano siisirike, ka nsinde obuyinike bwange, njogere ennaku endi ku mwoyo." 
Job7:12 Ndi nnyanja, oba kikulejje ky'omu nnyanja, olyoke onteekeko abankuuma?" 
Job7:13 Bwe njagala ekitanda kimpeezeeko, n'obuliri bwerabize ku kwemulugunya kwange," 
Job7:14 n'ontiisiza mu birooto ng'ondagiramu ebinkanga! 
Job7:15 Ne nsiima okutugibwa nveewo okusinga lwe mba amagumba gano. 
Job7:16 Neetamiddwa obulamu siribeerawo nnaku zonna. Ndeka, kubanga obulamu bwange bwa kaseera buseera." 
Job7:17 Omuntu ataliiko bw'ali lwaki omussaako omwoyo," 
Job7:18 n'omwekebejja buli nkya, n'omugeza buli kaseera?" 
Job7:19 Olituusa wa obutanzigyako maaso, n'obutandeka kumala kumira ku ddusu lyange?" 
Job7:20 Bwe mba nkoze ekibi nkukolako kabi ki ggwe alabirira abantu? Onnondoolera ki ne ntuuka n'okwezitoowerera? 
Job7:21 Kale lwaki tonsonyiwa buli kye nsobya kyonna, n'oggyawo ekibi kyange? Kubanga kaakano nja kufa ngalamire mu nfuufu. Era bw'ononnoonya nja kuba sikyaliwo.”" 
Job8:1 Awo Biludaadi Omusuuhi n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job8:2 “Onootuusa wa okwogera ebigambo ebyo ebiri ng'empewo ey'amaanyi? 
Job8:3 Katonda asaliriza ensonga? Omuyinzawaabyonna awa ensala eteri ntuufu? 
Job8:4 Abaana bo baakola ekibi ne bamunyiiza, kyeyava ababonereza olw'ekibi kyabwe." 
Job8:5 Bw'okkiriza okugondera Katonda, ne weegayirira Omuyinzawaabyonna," 
Job8:6 era bw'onooba omulongoofu era omwesimbu, taaleme kusituka n'akuyamba, n'akuddizaawo amaka go agakusaanidde." 
Job8:7 Wadde byali bitono bye walina mu kusooka, naye eby'oluvannyuma biryeyongera nnyo obungi." 
Job8:8 “Nkusaba weebuuze ku b'emirembe egy'edda; weetegereze n'ebyo bajjajjaabwe bye baazuula. 
Job8:9 Kubanga ffe tuli ba jjo tetuliiko kye tumanyi. N'ennaku ze tumala ku nsi, ziyita nga kisiikirize." 
Job8:10 Kale ab'edda abo tebakuyigiriza ne bakutegeeza, ne bakuggyirayo bye bamanyi?" 
Job8:11 Ekitoogo kiyinza okukula awatali lutobazzi? N'olumuli luyinza okumera awatali mazzi? 
Job8:12 Amazzi bwe gakalira ne bwe biba tebitemeddwa, bye bisooka ebimera ebirala byonna okuwotoka." 
Job8:13 N'abeerabira Katonda bwe batyo bwe baba. N'oyo atatya Katonda taba na ssuubi. 
Job8:14 Kye yeesiga kikutuka nga wuzi; n'ekimuyinula kiba nga ntimbe za nnabbubi. 
Job8:15 Yeesigama ku nnyumba ye n'etemuwanirira. Aginywererako kyokka n'eteguma. 
Job8:16 Ali ng'ekimera ekifukirirwa ku makya ng'omusana tegunnayaka. Amatabi ge ne galanda okubuna mu nnimiro. 
Job8:17 Emirandira gye gisensera mu ntuumu z'amayinja, ne gyekwata ku buli jjinja." 
Job8:18 Bw'akuulibwa mu kifo ekyo kimwegaana nti: ‘Sikulabangako.’ 
Job8:19 N'essanyu ly'omubi bwe liba. Kubanga wajjawo abalala ne badda mu kifo mw'abadde. 
Job8:20 “Kale nno Katonda talyabulira muntu ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa, era taliyamba bakola bibi." 
Job8:21 “Ddaaki alikujjuza obuseko, era okube obukule." 
Job8:22 Abakukyawa baliswala, n'ennyumba z'ababi zirisaanyizibwawo.”" 
Job9:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job9:2 “Mazima mmanyi nga bwe kityo bwe kiri. Naye omuntu ayinza atya okuwoza ne Katonda n'asinga? 
Job9:3 Bw'ayagala okuwoza naye, Katonda ayinza okubuuza ebibuuzo olukumi, omuntu n'atayinza kumuddamu na kimu." 
Job9:4 Katonda mugezi era wa maanyi. Ani amuwakanya n'asinga? 
Job9:5 “Asiguukulula ensozi nga talina gw'abuulidde, mu busungu bwe n'azisaanyaawo." 
Job9:6 Aleeta okukankana kw'ensi wansi ne wayuuguuma, n'akankanya empagi z'ensi." 
Job9:7 Alagira enjuba nti: ‘Tovaayo!’ Emmunyeenye azibikkako ne zitayaka. 
Job9:8 Ye abamba eggulu obw'omu, ye akkakkanya amayengo g'ennyanja." 
Job9:9 Yawanga emmunyeenye ku ggulu eziyitibwa Eddubu, Omuyizzi ne Kakaaga, n'ez'omu bukiikaddyo." 
Job9:10 Akola ebikulu ebitategeerekeka n'ebyamagero ebitabalika. 
Job9:11 Kale ampitako ne simulaba. Yeeyongerayo, kyokka ne simwetegereza." 
Job9:12 Bw'atwala ekintu olw'amaanyi ani ayinza okumuziyiza? Ani anaamubuuza nti: ‘Okola ki?’ 
Job9:13 Obusungu bwa Katonda tebukoma. Awangula abalabe be, abayambi ba Rahabu." 
Job9:14 “Kale nnyinza ntya okuzuula ebigambo eby'okuwoza naye nga neetaasa? 
Job9:15 Wadde siriiko kye nvunaanibwa, siyinza kwewolereza. Wabula omulamuzi wange gwe neegayirira ansaasire." 
Job9:16 Ne bwe nandimuyise okujja okuwoza n'akkiriza, sandikkirizza nti awulidde kye ŋŋamba." 
Job9:17 Ankubisa kibuyaga, n'annyongera ebiwundu awatali nsonga." 
Job9:18 Taŋŋanya kussa ku mukka, wabula ambonyaabonya." 
Job9:19 Bwe kuba kwegera maanyi, ye ye agansinza. Bwe kuba kuwoza musango, ani ananteerawo obudde obw'okuguwulira?" 
Job9:20 Wadde siriiko kye nvunaanibwa, bye njogera bigunsalira okunsinga. Wadde nga sirina musango, ajja kulaga bwe ndi omukyamu." 
Job9:21 Siriiko kye nvunaanibwa naye neetamiddwa obulamu. 
Job9:22 Byonna kye kimu. Kyenva ŋŋamba nti azikiriza abataliiko kye bavunaanibwa n'abakola ebibi. 
Job9:23 Akabi bwe kagwa ne kattirawo abantu, akudaalira abataliiko kye bavunaanibwa, ababonaabona." 
Job9:24 Katonda yawaayo ensi mu mikono gy'ababi. Abikka ku maaso g'abalamuzi baayo. Oba si Katonda, kale ani?" 
Job9:25 “Ennaku zange ziri ku misinde okusinga n'omuddusi. Ziggwaako nga sizifunyeemu kalungi 
Job9:26 Ziyise ng'amaato ag'embiro ng'empungu ekka ku muyiggo gwayo. 
Job9:27 Bwe ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ayi Katonda, ka neerabire okwemulugunya kwange, mmweenyeeko nsanyuke,’" 
Job9:28 ne nzijirwa okutya obuyinike bwange, kubanga mmanyi taligamba nti siriiko kye nvunaanibwa." 
Job9:29 Omusango nga bwe gunansinga, kale nteganira ki obwereere?" 
Job9:30 Ne bwe nnaanaaba amazzi ag'omuzira ne ntukuza engalo zange ne sabbuuni," 
Job9:31 era ononsuula mu kinnya ekijama n'engoye zange ne zintamwa. 
Job9:32 Kubanga singa Katonda abadde muntu buntu nga nze, nandimwanukudde, ne mpoza naye." 
Job9:33 Naye tewali mulamuzi wakati waffe, anaatuwozesa n'atusalirawo." 
Job9:34 Katonda alekere awo okunkubya omuggo gwe; aleme okunkanga n'okuntiisa. 
Job9:35 Katonda nga bw'antiisizza, siyinza kwennyonnyolako nga bwe nandyagadde." 
Job10:1 “Neetamiddwa obulamu! Nja kwemulugunya lwatu, njatule ennaku endi ku mwoyo." 
Job10:2 Nja kugamba Katonda nti: ‘Tonsalira musango kunsinga. Naye mmanyisa ky'onvunaana. 
Job10:3 Olaba nga kirungi okukambuwala n'okunyooma ggwe wennyini bye watonda, n'osanyukira amagezi g'ababi?" 
Job10:4 Ggwe ebintu obiraba ng'omuntu bw'abiraba? Oba obitegeera ng'abantu bwe babitegeera? 
Job10:5 Ennaku z'owangaala ziri ng'ez'abantu abafa? Oba emyaka gy'obulamu bwo giri ng'egy'omuntu? 
Job10:6 Lwaki oyagala okubuuliriza ku bibi byange, n'okunoonyereza ku kwonoona kwange?" 
Job10:7 Newaakubadde omanyi nga siriiko kye nvunaanibwa, tewali ayinza kumponya ng'anzigya mu mikono gyo." 
Job10:8 “ ‘Ggwe wennyini ggwe wammumba n'emikono gyo n'onteekawo. Ate kaakano onkyukidde okunsaanyaawo. 
Job10:9 Jjukira nga wammumba mu bbumba. Ononsekula onzizeeyo mu nfuufu? 
Job10:10 Tewanjiwa ng'amata mu lubuto lwa mmange, n'ommumba ng'ekitole ky'omuzigo?" 
Job10:11 Wataba amagumba gange n'ebinywa n'ogabikkako ennyama n'olususu. 
Job10:12 Wampa obulamu era n'onjagala. Olabiridde bulungi obulamu bwange. 
Job10:13 “ ‘Naye waliwo bino bye wakweka nga bya kyama. Mmanyi nga wali obitegeka okuntuukako. 
Job10:14 Bwe nkola ekibi, onneetegereza, Era tolikinsonyiwa." 
Job10:15 Bwe mba omubi nga zinsanze! Bwe nkola ekituufu nkoteka omutwe gwange ne nzijula okuswala, ne nnyenjebuka olw'okubonaabona." 
Job10:16 Bwe nkola eky'okwenyumiririzaamu obeera ng'empologoma n'onjigga. Okola n'ekyamagero okunnumya. 
Job10:17 Onnumba buggya okumbonyaabonya. Weeyongera okunsunguwalira. Onsindikira amagye mu bibinja n'ebibinja. 
Job10:18 “ ‘Kale lwaki waleka ne nzaalibwa? Nandifudde nga tewannaabawo n'omu andabako. 
Job10:19 Olwandivudde mu lubuto ne banziikirawo, ne mba ng'atabangawo." 
Job10:20 Obulamu bwange tebusigazizzaayo ennaku ntono? Ndeka nsanyukemu akatono," 
Job10:21 nga sinnagenda mu nsi eyo ey'ekisiikirize n'ekizikiza ekikutte gye sigenda kuva. 
Job10:22 Ensi ey'ekisiikirize n'obutabangufu ekitangaala gye kiri ng'ekizikiza.’ ” 
Job11:1 Awo Zofari Omunaamati n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job11:2 “Ebigambo ebingi bwe bityo tebisaanye kuddibwamu? Okwogera ebingi kye kyejjeereza omuntu? 
Job11:3 Okwenyumiriza kwo kunaasirisa abalala? Bw'okudaala bw'otyo tewaabe n'omu akuwemuukiriza? 
Job11:4 Kubanga ogamba nti: ‘By'okkiriza bye bituufu, era nti Katonda alaba nti toliiko ky'ovunaanibwa.’" 
Job11:5 Naye nandyagadde Katonda ayogere naawe butereevu. 
Job11:6 Akubuulire eby'amagezi ebikisiddwa, ebitamanyika kuggwaayo. Kale manya nti Katonda akubonereza kitono okusinga bw'osaanira." 
Job11:7 “Oyinza okunoonyereza ebifa ku Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, n'obizuula n'obimalayo?" 
Job11:8 Bigulumivu okusinga eggulu. Oyinza kukola ki? Bikka wansi okusinga emagombe, oyinza otya okubimanya?" 
Job11:9 Bw'obipima bisinga ensi obunene, n'ennyanja bigisinga obugazi." 
Job11:10 Katonda bw'ajja n'asiba abantu mu kkomera, n'abayita okusalirwa omusango, ani ayinza okumuziyiza?" 
Job11:11 Katonda amanyi abantu abataliiko kye bagasa. Bw'alaba ebibi bye bakola tabifaako? 
Job11:12 Bw'erizaalibwayo entulege enteefu n'abasiru balitandika okutegeera. 
Job11:13 “Bw'oneenenya mu mutima gwo, onoogololera emikono gyo eri Katonda." 
Job11:14 Bw'oba n'ebikyamu by'okola obyewale. Oleme kukkiriza bibi kubeeranga mu maka go. 
Job11:15 Onootunulanga nga teweebwalabwala. Onoobanga n'emirembe nga tolina ky'otya. 
Job11:16 Kubanga olyerabira ennaku yo, nga bwe weerabira amazzi agakulukuse ne gagenda." 
Job11:17 Obulamu bwo bulyakaayakana okusinga omusana ogw'ettuntu. Ekiseera kyabwo eky'ekizikiza kirifuuka ekitangaala eky'oku makya. 
Job11:18 “Onoobanga n'emirembe olw'okuba n'essuubi. Katonda anaakukuumanga n'owummula nga tolina ky'otya. 
Job11:19 Oneebakanga nga tewali akutiisa. Bangi banaakusabanga obuyambi. 
Job11:20 Naye ababi banaamagamaganga, ne babulwa obuddukiro. Essuubi lyabwe liri mu: Kufa.”" 
Job12:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job12:2 “Kya mazima mmwe ddoboozi ly'abantu. Bwe mulifa, abagezi baliggwaawo." 
Job12:3 Naye nange ntegeera nga mmwe temunsinganga n'akatono. Era ani atamanyi ebyo bye mubadde mwogerako. 
Job12:4 Nsekererwa mikwano gyange, nze eyasabanga Katonda n'anziramu. Nze omuntu akola ekituufu, ataliiko kye nvunaanibwa, kaakano nsekererwa abantu." 
Job12:5 Atannalaba nnaku, asekerera ajeera. Abonaabona era ye ajjirwa ebizibu." 
Job12:6 Amaka g'abanyazi gaba bulungi, n'abo abanyiiza Katonda tebalina babatiisa. Amaanyi gaabwe ge beesiga nga Katonda." 
Job12:7 “Naye nno buuza ebisolo binaakuyigiriza, n'ebinyonyi binaakubuulira." 
Job12:8 Oba yogera n'ensi, eneekuyigiriza n'ebyennyanja binaakunnyonnyola." 
Job12:9 Mu bitonde byonna ebyo, ekitamanyi kiruwa nti ebibeerawo byonna bikolebwa Mukama?" 
Job12:10 Buli kintu ekiramu kiri mu mikono gye. Obulamu bw'abantu nabwo ye abufuga. 
Job12:11 Omuntu by'awulira tayawulamu bituufu na bitali bya mazima, nga bw'alya ku mmere n'ayawula ewooma n'etewooma?" 
Job12:12 Amagezi gaba na bakadde, n'okutegeera kuba mu bawangadde." 
Job12:13 “Katonda ye alina amagezi n'obuyinza, ye alina entegeka n'okutegeera." 
Job12:14 Katonda ky'amenya, tewali akizimba buggya. Katonda gw'aggalira, tewali amuggulira." 
Job12:15 Bw'aziyiza enkuba okutonnya, wabaawo ekyeya. Bw'agireka n'etonnya, omujjuzi gw'amazzi ne gubikka ensi." 
Job12:16 Ye w'amaanyi era omuwanguzi. Alimbibwa n'oyo alimba bali mu buyinza bwe. 
Job12:17 Abafuzi b'ensi abamalamu amagezi. Abalamuzi abafuula abasirusiru. 
Job12:18 Ayambula bakabaka ebyambalo ebyekitiibwa, n'abasiba enkoba ezisibibwa abaddu." 
Job12:19 Bakabona abamalamu amagezi, abafuzi abaggya mu buyinza." 
Job12:20 Asirisa abo abantu be beesiga, n'abakadde abaggyako okutegeera." 
Job12:21 “Aleka abakungu okunyoomebwa, ab'obuyinza abamala amaanyi." 
Job12:22 Ayolesa ebikusike eby'ebuziba, amulisa ebikweke mu nzikiza." 
Job12:23 Akulaakulanya amawanga ate n'agazikiriza. Agafuula ag'amaanyi, ate n'agasaanyaawo." 
Job12:24 Abafuzi b'abantu abafuula abasiru, n'ababungeeseza eyo awatali kkubo mu ddungu." 
Job12:25 Bawammantira mu kizikiza ekikutte ennyo, n'abaleetera okutagatta ng'abatamiivu." 
Job13:1 “Kale ebyo byonna nabiraba, era nabiwulira dda ne mbitegeera." 
Job13:2 Bye mumanyi mmwe, era nange mbimanyi temunsinga." 
Job13:3 Naye njagala njogere na Muyinzawaabyonna. Katonda gwe njagala okulaga nti siriko kye nvunaanibwa. 
Job13:4 Kyokka mmwe mwogera bya bulimba okukweka amazima. Muli basawo abatasobola kuwonya. 
Job13:5 Singa musirikidde ddala lwe mwandiraze bwe muli abagezi. 
Job13:6 “Muwulirize kye ŋŋamba. Mutege amatu muwulire empoza yange. 
Job13:7 Munaawolereza Katonda nga mwogera ebitali bituufu, era nga muleeta eby'obulimba?" 
Job13:8 Munaasaliriza ku lulwe, muwoze omusango gwe asinge?" 
Job13:9 Binaabagendera bulungi bw'anaabakebera okubekkaanya? Munaamulimbalimba ng'abantu bwe balimbalimba bannaabwe? 
Job13:10 Taaleme kubavunaana ne bwe munaakweka okusaliriza kwammwe. 
Job13:11 Ekitiibwa kye tekiibatiise, ne kibakwasa ensisi?" 
Job13:12 Engero zammwe tezigasa: ziri nga vvu. N'empoza yammwe temuli: emulungulwa nga bbumba. 
Job13:13 “Musirike, muleke nze njogere. Ebinanzijira, binzijire." 
Job13:14 Ka nneeveemu mpeeyo n'obulamu! 
Job13:15 Oba anzita anzite, kiki kye nkyasuubirayo? Kyokka nja kuwoleza mu maaso ge." 
Job13:16 Era ekyo kye kinandokola. Kubanga atassaamu Katonda kitiibwa tayimirira mu maaso ge. 
Job13:17 “Muwulirize ebigambo byange, mutegereze bye ŋŋamba." 
Job13:18 Kale nsengese empoza yange, mmanyi nja kwejjeerera." 
Job13:19 Ani anannumiriza omusango? Neetegese bwe guba gunsinze, okusirika era nfe." 
Job13:20 Ompeeyo ebintu bibiri byokka olwo nneme kukwekweka. 
Job13:21 Okumbonereza lekera awo era oleme okunkanga n'okuntiisa. 
Job13:22 Kale ggwe sooka ompite, nze mpitabe. Oba oleke nze njogere, ggwe onziremu." 
Job13:23 Ensobi zange n'okuwaba kwange bye biruwa? Ntegeeza obujeemu bwange n'ekibi kyange. 
Job13:24 “Lwaki onneekweka n'ompita omulabe wo? 
Job13:25 Onootiisa nze akakoola akatwalibwa embuyaga? Oyigganye nze akasasiro akakaze? 
Job13:26 Onnumiriza emisango eminene n'ogiwandiika. Onvunaana ensobi ez'omu buvubuka bwange. 
Job13:27 Osiba ebigere byange mu nvuba. Olondoola buli kigere kye nsitula, olamba buli we nninnya." 
Job13:28 Naye nseebengerera ng'ekintu ekivunda ne kiggwaawo, oba ng'ekyambalo ekiriibwa ennyenje." 
Job14:1 “Buli muntu azaalibwa mukazi. Obulamu bwe buba bumpi, Era buba bwa bugubi." 
Job14:2 Akula n'awotoka ng'ekimuli. Abulawo nga kisiikirize, tasigalawo n'akatono." 
Job14:3 Kale ggwe otunuulira omuntu ali bw'atyo? N'oleeta nga nze mu maaso go onsalire omusango? 
Job14:4 Ani ayinza okuggya ekirongoofu mu kitali kirongoofu? Tewali n'omu. 
Job14:5 Wasalirawo dda omuntu ennaku z'aliwangaala. Wamugerekera n'emyezi, n'opimira ddala ebbanga ly'atayinza kusussaawo." 
Job14:6 Kale muggyeeko amaaso omuleke awummuleko, alyoke amaleko olunaku lwe ng'omupakasi akolera empeera." 
Job14:7 “Bwe batema omuti, wabaawo essuubi nti ku kikonge kyagwo kunaaloka ettabi, era teriife." 
Job14:8 Wadde emirandira gyagwo gikaddiyira mu ttaka ekikonge kyagwo ne kivunda," 
Job14:9 bwe gutuukibwako amazzi, gulisibuka ne guleeta amatabi ng'ekisimbe ekiggya." 
Job14:10 Naye omuntu afa, n'aggweeramu ddala obulamu. Bw'assa ogw'enkomerero, aba akyali ludda wa?" 
Job14:11 Ng'ennyanja bw'eggwaamu amazzi era ng'omugga bwe gukalira," 
Job14:12 bw'atyo n'omuntu afa, n'agalamira obutayimuka. Ng'eggulu likyali mu bbanga talizuukuka n'akatono. Talizuukusibwa mu tulo twe." 
Job14:13 “Singa onkwese emagombe n'onkuumira eyo, okutuusa obusungu bwo lwe buliggwaawo. Era n'ongerera ekiseera n'onzijukira." 
Job14:14 Omuntu bw'afa, addamu obulamu? Naye nze ekiseera kyonna nandirinze okutuusa lwe nanditeereddwa." 
Job14:15 Olwo wandimpise nze ne mpitaba. N'osanyukira nze ekitonde kyo. 
Job14:16 N'olabirira buli kigere kye nsitula. Naye n'oteekaliriza bibi byange. 
Job14:17 Olibinsonyiwa n'obisibira mu nsawo. Olibikkako ebisobyo byange. 
Job14:18 Naye era n'ensozi zigwa ne ziseebengerera, n'olwazi luggyibwa mu kifo kyalwo." 
Job14:19 Amazzi gaggweereza amayinja, ne mukoka akuluggusa ettaka. Naawe bw'otyo bw'ozikiriza essuubi omuntu ly'aba nalyo." 
Job14:20 Ojja n'omusinza amaanyi n'omuggyirawo ddala. N'ofaafaaganya entunula ye mu kufa. 
Job14:21 Batabani be batuuka ku kitiibwa ye nga takimanyi. Era bwe batoowazibwa ye tategeera bwe bali. 
Job14:22 Awulira bulumi buli mu ye, era yeekungubagira yekka.”" 
Job15:1 Awo Elifaazi Omutamani n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job15:2 “Ow'amagezi taddamu na bigambo bitalina makulu. Tayogera bigambo biri nga mpewo buwewo. 
Job15:3 Tawalaaza mpaka zitalina mugaso. Tayogera bigambo bitavaamu kalungi. 
Job15:4 Ojja kuziyiza abantu okussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, n'okugenda mu maaso ge okumusinza." 
Job15:5 Ebibi byo ye nsibuko y'ebyo by'oyogera. Era okozesa lulimi lwa bukumpanya. 
Job15:6 Akamwa ko ke kakusalira omusango okukusinga, sso si nze. Emimwa gyo gyennyini gye gikulumiriza." 
Job15:7 “Abantu bonna ogamba ggwe wabasooka okuzaalibwa? Oba ggwe wazaalibwa ng'ensozi tezinnabaawo? 
Job15:8 Wawulirizaako ggwe Katonda bye yateesa mu kyama? Ggwe wageziwala wekka omu? 
Job15:9 Kiki ky'omanyi kye tutamanyi? Otegeera biki ebyatulema? 
Job15:10 Ffe tuli wamu n'ab'envi n'abakadde ennyo, abakulu n'okusinga kitaawo." 
Job15:11 Katonda by'anaakukolera okukugumya by'ogaya nti tebimala? N'ebigambo ebikkakkamu bye tukubuulira ku lulwe by'onyooma? 
Job15:12 Lwaki ocamuukiridde? Lwaki otunuza bukambwe," 
Job15:13 n'osunguwalira Katonda n'oyogera ebiri ng'ebyo? 
Job15:14 Omuntu ayinza okuba omulongoofu? Ani eyazaalibwa omukazi Katonda gw'abala nti mutuufu? 
Job15:15 Olaba Katonda teyeesiga wadde bamalayika be! N'eggulu si ddongoofu mu maaso ge. 
Job15:16 Alabisa kale omuntu omwonoonefu era entagasa, eyeekatankira ebyonoono nga bw'anywa amazzi!" 
Job15:17 “Ntegera amatu njogere, nze nkubuulire bye ndabye;" 
Job15:18 n'abagezi bye boogedde nga babiggya ku bajjajjaabwe," 
Job15:19 abaaweebwa ensi eno bokka nga tebali wamu na bagwira. 
Job15:20 Omubi ateganyizibwa ennaku zonna. Oyo anyigiriza abalala, abonaabona obulamu bwe bwonna." 
Job15:21 Awulira mu matu ge amaloboozi ag'entiisa. Lw'afunyeeko akalembereza lw'alirumbibwa abanyazi. 
Job15:22 Tasuubira kuva mu kizikiza. Era okuttibwa kw'alindirira. 
Job15:23 Abungeeta anoonye k'anaalya nga yeebuuza gy'anaakaggya. Amanyi nti olwa kazigizigi kati lumukeeredde. 
Job15:24 Ennaku n'obuyinike bimutiisa nga kabaka ow'amaanyi bw'atiisa be yeeteeseteese okulumba. 
Job15:25 Kubanga agalulidde Katonda ekikonde ky'amufunyidde, n'asoomoza Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Job15:26 Abulira mu ngabo ye ennene, agende amulumbagane." 
Job15:27 Kubanga mugevvu mu maaso n'emabega agezze akabina. 
Job15:28 Era abeera mu bibuga ebisengukiddwamu. Ennyumba asula mu bifulukwa ebisuliridde okugwa. 
Job15:29 Obugagga bwe buliyita buyisi, talimala nabwo kiseera kiwanvu. Naye yennyini taliwangaala." 
Job15:30 Walumbe alimwefuga mu kizikiza. Aliba ng'amatabi g'omuti agababuddwa omuliro, n'ebimuli byagwo ebitwalibwa embuyaga." 
Job15:31 Bwe yeesiga ebitalina mugaso aba yeerimba, kubanga alisasulwamu ebyo." 
Job15:32 Alikala mangu ng'ettabi, n'ataddamu kuggumiza." 
Job15:33 Aliba ng'omuzabbibu ogukunkumula ebibala byagwo ebitannaba kwengera; era ng'omuzayiti ogukunkumula ekimuli. 
Job15:34 Kubanga abatassaamu Katonda kitiibwa banaabeeranga bagumba. Era omuliro gunaayokyanga amayumba ge baggya mu kulya enguzi. 
Job15:35 Bakola bya kabi ebiva mu ttima lyabwe. Bajjudde bukuusa.” 
Job16:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job16:2 “Mpulidde bingi ebiri ng'ebyo. Kale olwo munkubagizizzaamu ki? 
Job16:3 Emboozi eyo etegasa munaagikomya wa? Ye kiki ekikusosonkereza okunnyanukula bw'otyo? 
Job16:4 Nange nandisobodde okwogera nga mmwe bwe mwogedde, singa mmwe muli mu mbeera eyange gye ndimu bwe nti. Nandiboogeredde amafuukuule nga bwe nnyeenya n'omutwe mu bunyoomi." 
Job16:5 Nandyogedde ebinaabagumya nzikakkanye ku buyinike bwammwe. 
Job16:6 “Naye okwogera ne bwe njogera obulumi bwange tebukendeera. Era ne bwe nsiriikirira mpeeraweerako kenkana wa? 
Job16:7 Ddala, ayi Katonda, ommaze amaanyi, N'abange bonna obasaanyizzaawo!" 
Job16:8 Ggwe okunvumbagira kye kinnumiriza. N'obukovvu bwange, abantu kwe basinziira okukakasa nti gunsinze." 
Job16:9 Katonda, mu busungu bwe, antaagudde era ankyaye. Annumidde obujiji. Yeefudde omulabe wange, n'ankanulira amaaso!" 
Job16:10 Abantu bantunuulidde nga basamaaliridde. Bankuŋŋaanirako ne bankuba empi ku matama. 
Job16:11 Katonda ampaddeyo eri ababi. Ansudde mu mikono gy'aboonoonyi. 
Job16:12 Nali nteredde wamu, n'ajja n'angabanyaamu. Yankwata ku nsingo, n'ankuba ekigwo wansi. Antaddewo ng'ekintu ky'akubirako sabbaawa." 
Job16:13 Abalasa obusaale bwe, banneetoolodde. Ayasaamu ensigo zange nga tasaasira n'akatono, n'ayiwa endulwe yange ku ttaka." 
Job16:14 Anfubutukira ng'omulwanyi mu lutalo n'ammenyaamenya buli nnyingo. 
Job16:15 Neetungidde ekikutiya ky'abakungubazi ne nkyeteeka ku mubiri. Nzigweddemu amaanyi ne ngalamira mu nfuufu. 
Job16:16 Okukaaba ennyo amaziga kunfumizza entunula. Amaaso gazimbye ebisige ne gajjako ekifu. 
Job16:17 Sso nga sikolanga bukambwe, era nsinza bulungi Katonda." 
Job16:18 “Ayi ggwe ensi togaana musaayi gwange kululuma; n'omulanga gwange guleme kusirisibwa. 
Job16:19 Ne mu kaseera kano mu ggulu eriyo anjulira, waggulu ampolereza tabuzeeyo." 
Job16:20 Mikwano gyange bannyooma. Naye eri Katonda gye nzirukira nga njiwa amaziga. 
Job16:21 Wabeewo ali wakati wa Katonda nange omuntu, okufaanana ng'oyo abeera wakati w'omuntu ne munne." 
Job16:22 Kubanga emyaka mitono gye nsigazizza giggweeko, ntambule okugenda eyo gye siriva kukomawo." 
Job17:1 “Obulamu bwange bugenze, ennaku zange ziwedde. Entaana kati y'enninze," 
Job17:2 Mazima neetooloddwa abakudaazi, ndaba bwe bansosonkereza." 
Job17:3 Ayi Katonda, ggwe oba onteerawo akakalu. Omulala ananneeyimirira ye ani?" 
Job17:4 Nga bw'obazibye emitima ne batasobola kutegeera, tobaleka kuwangula." 
Job17:5 Alyamu banne olukwe afune ebyabwe, abaana be zibasanze." 
Job17:6 “Nfuuliddwa ekisekererwa abantu, era gwe bawandira amalusu." 
Job17:7 Ennaku enzibye amaaso. Nzenna nkozze, nsigadde magumba." 
Job17:8 Abeeyita abalungi balaba kino ne beekanga. Ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa asituka, n'ambala nti sissaamu Katonda kitiibwa." 
Job17:9 Eyeeyita omutuufu yeeyongere okuguma. N'atazzanga musango yeeyongere okwenyweza. 
Job17:10 Kale mwenna mukomewo muddemu bye mubadde mugamba. Sijja kulaba mu mmwe wa magezi. 
Job17:11 “Ennaku zange zigenze! Bye nteekateeka bifudde, era ne bye mbadde neegomba." 
Job17:12 Bannange ekiro bakiyita misana. Ekizikiza bwe kikwata, nti bunaatera okutangaala." 
Job17:13 Magombe yokka gye nsuubira okuba amaka gange. Nneeyalire neebake mu kizikiza. 
Job17:14 Mpite entaana kitange n'envunyu mmange, era mwannyinaze." 
Job17:15 Olwo essuubi lyange lye liruwa? Kye nsuubira ani akiraba? 
Job17:16 Ndikkirira nakyo olwo magombe, ngalamire nakyo mu nfuufu?”" 
Job18:1 Awo Biludaadi Omusuuhi n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job18:2 “Munaatuusa wa okunoonya eby'okwogera? Musooke mwerowooze tulyoke twogere. 
Job18:3 Otubalira ki mu bisolo? Lwaki otufuula abasiru? 
Job18:4 Ggwe eyeetaagula mu busungu, ensi eneeyabulirwa ku lulwo?" 
Job18:5 “Obulamu bw'omubi kya mazima buzikira ng'ettaala, oba ng'omumuli ogutaddayo kwaka." 
Job18:6 Aliba ng'ennyumba erimu ekizikiza, ettaala emulisaamu bw'ezikira." 
Job18:7 Eyali atambula nga yeekakasa kati yeekengera w'alinnya. Amagezi g'awa abalala yennyini gamusudde. 
Job18:8 Ebigere bye bimutunze: yeesudde yekka mu mutego. 
Job18:9 Omutego gumukutte ekisinziiro, akakunizo kamunywezezza." 
Job18:10 Bamuteze omuguwa mu ttaka, bamukwese ekigu mu kkubo lye." 
Job18:11 Entiisa emufuluma buli ludda, emugoba buggereggere okumukwata." 
Job18:12 Alumwa enjala emumalamu amaanyi n'akabi kamuli ku lusegere. 
Job18:13 Ekirwadde kimulidde omubiri, ekimbe kimuwemmense." 
Job18:14 Asikambulwa mu nnyumba ye mw'abadde ateredde entende, ne bamutambuza okumutwala eri Kabaka w'entiisa." 
Job18:15 Beesulira mu nnyumba kaakano etekyali yiye, nga bamaze okumansa obuganga mw'abadde." 
Job18:16 Aliba ng'omuti ogukala okuviira ddala ku mirandira wansi okutuuka waggulu ku busanso. 
Job18:17 Alyerabirirwa ddala ku nsi ne wabulawo amujjukira. 
Job18:18 Aliggyibwa mu kitangaala n'agoberwa mu kizikiza, ave mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Job18:19 Ku babe tewalisigalawo mwana wadde omuzzukulu. Era gye yabeeranga teriwonawo muntu. 
Job18:20 Ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba abaliwulira ebimutuuseeko balyesisiwala ne batya. 
Job18:21 Enkomerero y'ababi ye eyo, awatali kuwannaanya. Ekyo kye kirituukirira ku bateefiirayo ku Katonda.”" 
Job19:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job19:2 “Mulituusa wa okunneeraliikiriza, n'okumbetentera mu bigambo?" 
Job19:3 Emirundi kkumi ddamba muli ku nze mwevumira. Okumpisa mutyo temuswala? 
Job19:4 Ne bwe nandibadde omusobya, mazima ensobi yange, era yandikosezza nze." 
Job19:5 Ne bwe munanneekulumbalizaako, ne musinziira ku buyinike bwange mukakase nti ndi mwonoonyi," 
Job19:6 musaanye mumanye nti Katonda kino ye akintuusizzaako, n'anzingiza n'ekitimba ankwase." 
Job19:7 “Laba, bwe ndeekaana nti: ‘Banzita!’ tewaba ampulira. Bwe nkuba enduulu bannyambe, tewali antaasa." 
Job19:8 Katonda azibye ekkubo lyange, sirina nze bwe mpitamu. Amakubo agafudde ga nzikiza." 
Job19:9 Ekitiibwa akinnyambudde, aggye engule ku mutwe gwange." 
Job19:10 Ammenyeemenye enjuyi zonna, sikyaliko bwe ndi! Essuubi lyange alikudde nga muti." 
Job19:11 Ansibidde obusungu obwaka ng'omuliro. Ampisa nga mulabe we. 
Job19:12 Amagye ge gajjira wamu ne gategeka okunnumba. Ne gasiisira okuzingiza eweema yange. 
Job19:13 “Baganda bange Katonda anjawukanyizza nabo. N'abamanyi banfuukidde nga be simanyi. 
Job19:14 Abooluganda banneggyeeko. Mikwano gyange ennyo nabo banjabulidde. 
Job19:15 Nneerabiddwa be nakyazanga omwange. Abawala abaakolanga ewange bampisa nga mugwira. Bandaba nga munnaggwanga. 
Job19:16 Omuddu gwe mpita tampitaba, ne bwe mmwegayirira tanfaako." 
Job19:17 Mukyala wange anneesamba. Abaana ba mmange tebansemberera. 
Job19:18 N'abaana abato bannyooma. Bwe nsitukawo ne beesekera. 
Job19:19 Bonna mikwano gyange ennyo bankyaye. Be nayagalanga banneegaanye. 
Job19:20 Nsigaddeko lususu na magumba. Mponedde watono obutafa. 
Job19:21 Munsaasire, munsaasire mikwano gyange mmwe! Kubanga Katonda ankubye omuggo!" 
Job19:22 Munjigganyiza ki nga Katonda bw'anjigganyizza? Kye mbonyeebonye tekibamala? 
Job19:23 “Singa okwemulugunya kwange kuwandiikiddwa! Singa kukubiddwa mu kitabo. 
Job19:24 Singa kwoleddwa mu lwazi n'ekkalaamu ey'ekyuma, ne bajjuza mu nnukuta essasi essaanuuse, kusomebwenga ennaku zonna." 
Job19:25 Naye mmanyi ng'Omununuzi wange mulamu: ye alisalawo eky'enkomerero ku nsi. 
Job19:26 Ndiraba Katonda nga nnina omubiri; wadde ng'endwadde eridde olususu lwange. 
Job19:27 Ndimulaba nze nzennyini n'amaaso gange nga ye oyo, sso si mulala. Omutima gwange gweraliikirira." 
Job19:28 Bwe mugamba nti: ‘Ka tumuyigganye nno ensonga kwe tusinziira eri mu ye’," 
Job19:29 mutye ekitala: kubanga obusungu bwegwanyiza okubonerezebwa n'ekitala, mulyoke mumanye nti eriyo okusala omusango.”" 
Job20:1 Awo Zafari Omunaamati n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job20:2 “Olw'ebigambo by'oyogedde ebirowoozo byange bimpalirizza okwanguwa okubaako kye ŋŋamba. 
Job20:3 Mpulidde ebinnenya ebivuma, omutima ne gumpabula kye nnina okukwanukula." 
Job20:4 “Ggwe tokimanyi nti okuva ddi bukya muntu ateekebwa ku nsi 
Job20:5 Essanyu ly'omubi liba limpi? N'atassaamu Katonda kitiibwa asanyukako kaseera buseera? 
Job20:6 Ne bw'akula okuwagguuka okutuuka eyo ku ggulu ng'omutwe gwe gutuuka ne ku bire," 
Job20:7 alifuuyibwa embuyaga n'emumalawo ng'enfuufu. Abo ababadde bamulaba balyebuuza gye yalaga. 
Job20:8 Alibulawo nga kirooto nga kulabikirwa kwa mu kiro, n'ataddayo kulabikako." 
Job20:9 Taliddayo kukubikako kimunye; Alibulawo mu kifo we yabeeranga. 
Job20:10 “Abaana be baliddiza abaavu obugagga bwe yali ababbyeko. 
Job20:11 Eryanyi ly'abadde alina mu buvubuka, aligalamira nalyo mu nfuufu." 
Job20:12 Wadde ng'ekibi kimuwoomera nga sukaali mu kamwa ke, n'akikwekako ne wansi w'olulimi lwe," 
Job20:13 n'akisigaza mu kamwa agire ng'akyanuuna," 
Job20:14 naye emmere ye emukaayirira mu lubuto lwe, n'efuuka obusagwa bw'omusota mu ye." 
Job20:15 Asesema obugagga bwe yamira, Katonda n'abumuggya mu lubuto." 
Job20:16 Ky'anuuna kiri nga butwa: kimutta nga bwe yandittiddwa essota ery'obusagwa. 
Job20:17 Taliwangaala kulaba ku birungi Katonda by'agaba, ebiri ng'emigga egikulukuta omubisi gw'enjuki n'amata." 
Job20:18 Aliwaayo bye yateganira byonna, talibirya kumukka mu lubuto. N'amagoba g'afunye taligeesiimiramu." 
Job20:19 Kubanga yayisa bubi abaavu, n'abalekerera. Yanyaga amayumba g'ataazimba." 
Job20:20 Olw'omululu gwe ogutamatira, taasigazengawo na kimu ku ebyo by'ayagala." 
Job20:21 Tewali ky'alya n'alekawo. N'okubeera obulungi kyekuliva kumuggwaako. 
Job20:22 W'alibeerera n'ebingi ebivuluuja w'alirabira ennaku n'adooba, atuukibweko buli kizibu." 
Job20:23 Ng'anaatera okulya okwekkutira Katonda anaamuyiwangako ekiruyi kye ekingi, ne kimufuukira emmere ye." 
Job20:24 Alidduka ekyokulwanyisa eky'ekyuma, n'afumitibwa akasaale ak'ekikomo." 
Job20:25 Kamuyitamu ne kafuluma: omumwa gwako ogumasamasa, ne guyita mu kalulwe ke. Alikwatibwa entiisa." 
Job20:26 “Ebyobugagga bye bitokomoka. Omuliro ogutakumwa bantu gulimwokya, ne gusaanyaawo ne by'asigazzaawo mu nnyumba." 
Job20:27 Eggulu liryerula ebibi bye, n'ensi n'emulumiriza." 
Job20:28 Eby'omu nnyumba ye birinyagibwa, ne bitwalibwa ku olwo Katonda lw'alisunguwala." 
Job20:29 Ogwo gwe mugabo Katonda gwe yawa omwonoonyi. Bwe busika bwe yamuteerawo.” 
Job21:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job21:2 “Muwulirize bulungi bye ŋŋamba kye kikubagizo kyokka kye mbasaba. 
Job21:3 Munzikirize njogere, bwe nnaamala, munaayongera ne muduula." 
Job21:4 Nze ku bwange seemulugunyiza bantu. Kale lwaki siba atali mugumiikiriza? 
Job21:5 Muntunuulire, mwewuunye era mukwate ne ku mumwa!" 
Job21:6 Bwe ndowooza ku kyantuukako, neekanga, ne neesisiwala nzenna!" 
Job21:7 Lwaki bo abakola ebibi bawangaala ne bakaddiwa, nga ba buyinza, ba maanyi?" 
Job21:8 Bafuna abaana n'abazzukulu ne babeerawo okulaba bwe bakula. 
Job21:9 Amaka gaabwe tewaba bigatiisa ne Katonda tagabonereza n'akatono. 
Job21:10 Ebisolo byabwe biwaka ne bizaala bulungi. 
Job21:11 Bazaala omuyeeye gw'abaana, ne baligita ng'obuliga." 
Job21:12 Bayimbira ku bitaasa n'ennanga, ne banyumirwa eddoboozi ly'omulere." 
Job21:13 Bafuna ebirungi mu bulamu era ne bafiira mu ddembe. 
Job21:14 Bagamba Katonda nti: ‘Tuveeko! Tetwetaaga kumanya by'otwagaza kukola.’ 
Job21:15 ‘Ye ani Omuyinzawaabyonna tulyoke tumuweerezenga? Kitugasa ki okubaako kye tumusaba?’ 
Job21:16 “Bo bagamba nti bawangaala lwa maanyi gaabwe. Amagezi g'ababi sigakkiriza. 
Job21:17 Ettaala y'ababi ddi lwe yali ezikiziddwa? Akabi ddi lwe kaali kabatuuseeko? Era ddi Katonda lwe yali ababonerezza mu busungu," 
Job21:18 ne baba ng'ebisasiro ebifuuyibwa embuyaga, oba ng'ebisusunku ebitwalibwa kikuŋŋunta?" 
Job21:19 Mugamba nti: ‘Katonda abonereza abaana olw'ebibi bya kitaabwe.’ Katonda abonereze oyo ye yennyini akimanye nti abonerezeddwa lwa bibi bye ebyo. 
Job21:20 Ye yennyini ye aba alaba bw'azikirizibwa, alege ku busungu bw'Omuyinzawaabyonna." 
Job21:21 Kubanga bw'amala okufa afaayo ki ku bituuka ku b'omu maka ge? 
Job21:22 Omuntu ayinza okuyigiriza Katonda asalira omusango n'abo abali mu bifo ebya waggulu? 
Job21:23 Waliwo afiira mu maanyi ng'atereeredde ddala ali bulungi: 
Job21:24 ng'omubiri gwe mugevvu, munyirivu, ng'alabikira ddala nga muvubuka." 
Job21:25 Omulala afa nga mwennyamivu nga tabangako na musanyufu. 
Job21:26 Bombi bagalamira bumu mu nfuufu ne babikkibwako envunyu. 
Job21:27 “Ddala ebirowoozo byammwe mbimanyi n'akabi ke muteesa okunkolako. 
Job21:28 Kubanga mubuuza nti: ‘Ennyumba y'omukungu eri ludda wa? Amaka g'abaakolanga ebibi gali ludda wa?’ 
Job21:29 Temwogeranga na batambula ŋŋendo? Temuwuliranga mawulire ge badda nago," 
Job21:30 nti akabi lwe kagwawo akola ebibi ye awonawo? Ne Katonda lw'asunguwala, era akola ebibi gw'ataliza?" 
Job21:31 Ani yeesimbawo mu maaso ge amulumirize omusango gw'azzizza? Ky'akoze ani akimusasula? 
Job21:32 Bw'atwalibwa mu ntaana amalaalo ge bagakuuma. 
Job21:33 Abantu nkumu abawerekera nga bagenda okumuziika. Abamu bakulemberamu, abalala ne bavaako emabega, ne bamuyiwako bulungi akataka." 
Job21:34 Kale mmwe munankubagiza mutya n'ebigambo ebitalina makulu? Nga ne bye munziramu birimu bulimba busa?” 
Job22:1 Awo Elifaazi Omutemani n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job22:2 “Omuntu alina ky'ayinza okugasa Katonda? Ddala bw'abeera omugezi ayinza okwegasa. 
Job22:3 Ggwe okuba omwenkanya kirina kye kiganyulamu Katonda? Wadde okubaako kye kimuyamba ggwe obutabaako ky'ovunaanibwa? 
Job22:4 Akuvunaana lwa kumussaamu kitiibwa? Era kyava akuwozesa? 
Job22:5 Nedda, akulanga bibi byo ebingi n'ebyonoono byo ebitaliiko kkomo." 
Job22:6 Waggya ku baganda bo emisingo egy'obwereere, n'obambulamu n'engoye zaabwe n'obaleka bwereere." 
Job22:7 Abakooye tewabawanga mazzi kunywa. Era wammanga emmere abayala. 
Job22:8 Olw'okuba oli wa maanyi, ettaka lyonna walyefunza, ng'olirekako abo bokka b'oyagala." 
Job22:9 Bannamwandu wabeegobako n'otobayamba. Walumyanga ne bamulekwa, ng'obanyagako ebyabwe." 
Job22:10 Kyova weetooloozebwa emitego, n'ojjirwa n'eby'entiisa, ne bikweraliikiriza." 
Job22:11 Ekizikiza kikubuutikira n'otosobola kulaba, n'obikkibwa engezi y'amazzi." 
Job22:12 “Katonda ali waggulu mu ggulu. Alaba n'emmunyeenye gye zeewanise. 
Job22:13 Oyinza okwebuuza nti: ‘Katonda amanya ki? Ayinza okusala omusango ng'abikkiddwa ebire ebikutte ekizikiza?’ 
Job22:14 Olowooza nti ebire ebikwafu bimuziyiza okulaba ng'atambulira ku nkulungo y'eggulu? 
Job22:15 “Oyagala kukuuma mpisa ez'edda ababi mwe batambulira? 
Job22:16 Ng'ekizimbe ekitwalibwa mukoka, baafa ekiseera kyabwe eky'okufa tekinnatuuka." 
Job22:17 Bano be bantu abaagamba Katonda nti: ‘Tuveeko.’ Era nti: ‘Omuyinzawaabyonna ayinza kutukolako ki?’ 
Job22:18 Sso ng'ennyumba zaabwe yazijjuza ebirungi. Naye amagezi g'ababi sigakkiriza. 
Job22:19 Abatuukirivu basanyuka n'abataliiko kye bavunaanibwa basekereza nnyini, bwe balaba ababi nga babonerezebwa." 
Job22:20 Ne bagamba nti: ‘Mazima abalabe baffe bazikiriziddwa. Ne bye baleseewo, omuliro gubisaanyizzaawo.’" 
Job22:21 “Tabagana ne Katonda obe n'emirembe, olwo onoofuna ebirungi." 
Job22:22 Kkiriza by'ayigiriza, okuume ebigambo bye mu mutima gwo." 
Job22:23 Kyuka nga weetoowaza, odde eri Omuyinzawaabyonna, okomye ebibi byonna ebikolebwa mu nnyumba yo." 
Job22:24 Suula ebyobugagga bwo mu nfuufu, ne zaabu omulungi ow'e Ofiri mu mayinja ag'omu kagga," 
Job22:25 Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna ye aba abeera zaabu wo. Era ye aba abeera ffeeza wo gwe watuuma entuumu. 
Job22:26 Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna lw'alikuwa essanyu eringi n'omutunuulira nga tolina ky'otya. 
Job22:27 Anaakuwuliranga ng'oliko ky'omusaba n'otuukiriza kye weeyamye okukola. 
Job22:28 Onoosalangawo eky'okukola n'okituukiriza. N'ekkubo ly'oyitamu linaabeerangamu ekitangaala. 
Job22:29 Bwe waba abatoowazibwa, onoogambanga nti: ‘Eriyo okukuzibwa.’ Era Katonda alokola omwetoowaze." 
Job22:30 Awonya omuntu ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa. Kale anaakuwonyanga nga tozzizza musango.” 
Job23:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job23:2 “Ne leero neemulugunya era mpakanya, Wadde ngezaako obutasinda, naye siyinza kweziyiza." 
Job23:3 Kale singa mmanya gye nnyinza okusanga Katonda, ne ntuuka n'awali entebe ye!" 
Job23:4 Nandisengese ensonga zange mu maaso ge, sandimulekeddeyo n'emu." 
Job23:5 Nandimanye by'anziramu, ne ntegeera by'aŋŋamba." 
Job23:6 Yandinnyombesezza mu bukulu bwe n'obuyinza bwe? Nedda, yandiwulirizza bye ŋŋamba." 
Job23:7 Eyo omwesimbu ayinza okuwoza naye. Omulamuzi wange yandinnejjerezza ne biggwa. 
Job23:8 “Kale nnoonya ebuvanjuba, naye nga Katonda taliiyo, n'ebugwanjuba ne simulabayo." 
Job23:9 Katonda akolera mu bukiikakkono ne mu bukiikaddyo, wabula siyinza kumulaba." 
Job23:10 Kyokka ye amanyi ekkubo lye nkwata. Bw'alimala okungeza, ndivaamu ntukudde nga zaabu." 
Job23:11 Ntambulira mu kkubo ly'ayitamu. Siriviiramu ddala n'akatono. 
Job23:12 Sivanga ku by'andagira. Ngoberera by'ayagala, sso si ebyo nze bye neegomba." 
Job23:13 “Naye ye y'omu bulijjo tewali ayinza kumukyusa Era akola ekyo ky'ayagala. 
Job23:14 Ajja kutuukiriza ekyo, kye yanteekerateekera. Era alina bingi ebiri ng'ekyo." 
Job23:15 Kyenva nfuna entiisa w'ali Sirema kutya bwe mmulowooza. 
Job23:16 Kubanga Katonda anzirisizza, Omuyinzawaabyonna antekemudde." 
Job23:17 Katonda ye antiisa sso si nzikiza, wadde ye enzibye amaaso." 
Job24:1 “Lwaki Omuyinzawaabyonna tateekawo biseera bya kusaliramu musango? Lwaki abaweereza be tebalaba bw'asala musango mu bwenkanya? 
Job24:2 Waliwo abajjulula empaanyi z'ebituuti, okugaziya ettaka lyabwe. Banyaga ebisolo, ne babyerundira ng'ebyabwe." 
Job24:3 Batwala endogoyi ya mulekwa. Ente ya nnamwandu gwe bawola bagisigaza nga musingo. 
Job24:4 Bagoba abaavu bave mu luguudo. Abanaku abali mu ggwanga, bonna balina kwekweka." 
Job24:5 Olwo abaavu ne baba ng'entulege: babeera eyo mu ttale nga bakola okunoonya akamere, ak'okuwa ku baana baabwe balye." 
Job24:6 Mu nnimiro ezitali zaabwe mwe banoonya kye bawa ensolo zaabwe. Banoga ku mizabbibu egirekeddwa mu nnimiro z'aboonoonyi. 
Job24:7 Basula bali bwereere, awatali na kye beebisse okuwona empewo efuuwa." 
Job24:8 Enkuba ebatobeza mu nsozi. Ne beekwata ku lwazi, nga we beggama tewali." 
Job24:9 Waliwo abakwakula abaana abatalina bakitaabwe ne babaggya ku bannyaabwe Ne batwala omwana w'omwavu, ng'omusingo gw'ebbanja." 
Job24:10 Abaavu bayita bwereere, nga tebalina kye bambadde. Enjala n'ebaluma nga beetisse emmere y'empeke gye bakungudde." 
Job24:11 Bakamulira omuzigo gw'emizayiti mu bisenge by'abo. Basogola emizabbibu mu masogolero gaabwe, bo ne balumwa ennyonta." 
Job24:12 Abafa basinda mu kibuga n'abafumitiddwa badaaga. Naye Katonda tafaayo ku bisobyo bibakolebwa. 
Job24:13 “Waliwo abajeemera ekitangaala. Beewala era tebatambulira mu kkubo omuli ekitangaala. 
Job24:14 Omutemu agolokokera wamu n'emmambya n'atta omwavu n'omunaku. Era ekiro n'aba omubbi. 
Job24:15 Omusajja omwenzi alinda budde kukwata, n'agamba nti: ‘Tewali anandaba.’ Amaaso ge n'agakweka." 
Job24:16 Mu kiro ababbi mwe bakubira ekituli mu nnyumba, emisana ne beggalira, ne beewala ekitangaala." 
Job24:17 Eky'obudde okukya bakitya, bamanyidde bikangabwa bya nzikiza." 
Job24:18 “Omubi akuluggusibwa ng'amazzi. N'ekibanja kye kikolimiddwa, tewakyali akola mu mizabbibu gye." 
Job24:19 Ng'ebbugumu ly'ekyeya bwe limalawo amazzi g'omuzira ogusaanuuse, n'amagombe bwe gamalawo omwonoonyi." 
Job24:20 Ne nnyina yennyini amwerabira. Envunyu zimweriira; Azikirira ng'omuti ogutemeddwa. 
Job24:21 Ayisa bubi omugumba, atazaalanga ku mwana. Ne nnamwandu n'atamukolera kalungi." 
Job24:22 Naye Katonda alina amaanyi okuggyawo bannakyemalira. Asituka n'abamalako essuubi ery'okuba abalamu. 
Job24:23 Yandibawa emirembe ne beeyinula. Kyokka abasimbye amaaso. 
Job24:24 “Bagulumizibwa okumala ebbanga, oluvannyuma ne babulawo. Batoowazibwa ne baggyibwawo ng'abalala bonna. Baba ng'ebirimba by'eŋŋaano ebisaliddwa ku kikolo." 
Job24:25 Oba si bwe kiri, ani anannumiriza nti nnimba, ne bye njogera temuli nsa?”" 
Job25:1 Awo Biludaadi Omusuuhi, n'addamu ng'agamba nti:" 
Job25:2 “Katonda ye alina obuyinza obufuga, wa ntiisa. Aleeta emirembe mu bwakabaka bwe obw'omu ggulu." 
Job25:3 Amagye g'alina tegabalika. Ekitangaala kye kyakira buli wantu. 
Job25:4 Kale mu maaso ga Katonda omuntu ayinza atya okuba omutuukirivu? Era azaalibwa omukazi ayinza atya okuba omulongoofu? 
Job25:5 Mu maaso ge, oba n'omwezi tegwakaayakana; N'emmunyeenye ziba ng'ezitalina kitangaala." 
Job25:6 Kale alabisa omuntu envunyu obuvunyu; Omwana w'omuntu, olusiriŋŋanyi!”" 
Job26:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu ng'agamba nti: 
Job26:2 “Kale ng'oyambye omunafu ali nga nze! Ng'odduukiridde ataliimu maanyi! 
Job26:3 Kale laba bw'owadde amagezi atalina ky'amanyi! Olaze ebingi by'otegeera obulungi! 
Job26:4 Ani akuyambyeko okwogera obulungi bw'otyo? Ani akuweeredde by'oyogedde? 
Job26:5 “Emagombe mu mazzi, agali eyo wansi, abafu bakankana nga batidde." 
Job26:6 Emagombe teri kikwekeddwa Katonda. Era alaba byonna ebiri mu kifo eky'okuzikirira. 
Job26:7 Abamba eggulu ery'omu bukiikakkono mu bbanga ejjereere. Era awanika ensi awatali kigiwanirira. 
Job26:8 Asiba amazzi mu bire bye ebiziyivu, ne bitayulika olw'obuzito." 
Job26:9 Akweka entebe ye ng'agibikkako ebire bye. 
Job26:10 Yassaawo enkulungo ku nnyanja, okwawula ekitangaala ku kizikiza." 
Job26:11 Empagi z'eggulu zikankana ne zijugumira bw'akangamu okuzisaanyaawo. 
Job26:12 Obuyinza bwe bukkakkanya ennyanja. Olw'amagezi ge azikiriza ekikulejje kyamu Rahabu. 
Job26:13 Yafuuwa ebire n'abyera ku ggulu. Yakwata ekissi n'afumita ekikulejje ky'omu nnyanja ekiwulukuka. 
Job26:14 Naye ebyo katundu butundu ak'ebintu by'akola. Era bye tumuwulirako bye bitono ddala. Naye obuyinza bwe obw'amaanyi ani ayinza okubutegeera?” 
Job27:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu okwogera emboozi ye, n'agamba nti:" 
Job27:2 “Katonda atampisizza bulungi, era Omuyinzawaabyonna andeetedde okunyolwa mu mwoyo, gwe ndayira nti:" 
Job27:3 Nga nkyali mulamu, era nga nkyassa omukka Katonda gwe yampa," 
Job27:4 siriyisa bya bulimba mu kamwa kange; wadde okwogeza eby'obukuusa olulimi lwange. 
Job27:5 Kye sisobola kukola, kwe kubagamba nti: muli batuufu mmwe. Tewali lwe ndigamba nti: ndiko kye nvunaanibwa." 
Job27:6 Nnywezezza obwesigwa bwange, siribuleka kunvaako. Omutima gwange teguliiko kye gunvunaana obulamu bwange bwonna." 
Job27:7 “Omulabe wange abonerezebwe ng'omubi. N'oyo ansitukiramu, akolweko ng'omwonoonyi." 
Job27:8 Atassaamu Katonda kitiibwa kiki ky'asuubirayo nga Katonda amukomezza n'amuggyako obulamu? 
Job27:9 Bw'alibeera mu buyinike, Katonda aliwuliriza okukaaba kwe?" 
Job27:10 Ye muntu asanyukira okusinza Omuyinzawaabyonna, era amwegayirira ennaku zonna?" 
Job27:11 “Ka mbayigirize mmwe nti Katonda wa buyinza. Ka nneme okubakweka ebifa ku Muyinzawaabyonna. 
Job27:12 Naye nammwe mwenna mubyerabiddeko n'agammwe. Kale lwaki mweyogeza ebitalina makulu? 
Job27:13 “Guno gwe mugabo Katonda gw'awa ababi. Bwe busika Omuyinzawaabyonna bw'awa abanyigiriza abalala: 
Job27:14 abaana be bazaala ne baala, baba ba kufa kitala. Ezzadde lyabwe terifuna mmere ya kulya erimala." 
Job27:15 Be baleka bakyali abalamu banattibwanga olumbe, bannamwandu baabwe, ne batakungubaga." 
Job27:16 Omubi ne bw'alikuŋŋaanya ensimbi ezitabalika, n'ategeka ebyambalo ebisinga ku bye yeetaaga," 
Job27:17 ebyo by'aba ategese omulungi ye alibyambala. Era ataliiko ky'avunaanibwa, ye aligabana ensimbi." 
Job27:18 Ennyumba omubi gy'azimba eba nga ya kiwojjolo, teguma. Oba era eba ng'ensiisira ey'omukuumi w'ennimiro." 
Job27:19 Agenda okwebaka nga mugagga, Kyokka taliddayo kuba bw'atyo. W'azibulira ati amaaso ng'obugagga bwe bubuzeewo." 
Job27:20 Ebitiisa bimutuukako ng'engezi y'amazzi; Ekiro kibuyaga n'amukuŋŋunsa. 
Job27:21 Embuyaga y'ebuvanjuba emusitula n'agenda, n'emukunguzza okumuggya w'abeera." 
Job27:22 Emufuumuula awatali kusaasira ng'afuba okugyetakkuluzaako. 
Job27:23 Emukubaganyiza ebintu, n'emuleekaanyiza amaloboozi." 
Job28:1 “Kituufu ebaayo ekirombe omusimibwa ffeeza. N'ebaayo n'ekifo gye balongooseza zaabu. 
Job28:2 Mu ttaka mwe basima ekyuma. Basaanuusa biyinja, okufunamu ekikomo." 
Job28:3 Abantu bagoba enzikiza nga bakoleeza emimuli, ne banoonya eyo mu ttaka wansi ebiyinja bye banaasimayo mu bunyomero eyo ekuzimu." 
Job28:4 Bayiikuula eyo ewala eteba bantu, n'abatambuze gye batayita, ne bawanirirwa emiguwa kwe beewuubira okukka, nga bali eyo bokka ku bwabwe." 
Job28:5 Emmere erimwa ku nsi. Naye wansi w'ensi eyo, wali ng'awali omuliro." 
Job28:6 Enjazi zaayo mwe baggya amayinja ga bbululu agayitibwa Safiro. Ne mu nfuufu yaayo mulimu zaabu. 
Job28:7 Ekkubo ery'omu birombe tewali nnyonyi eyigga erimanyi. Terirabwanga na kamunye. 
Job28:8 Teriyitibwangamu nsolo nkambwe. Era empologoma terikwatanga. 
Job28:9 “Abantu baasa enjazi enkalubo. Basima ensozi, okutuuka ku ntobo zaazo." 
Job28:10 Batema emikutu mu njazi ne bakuba eriiso ku buli kintu eky'omuwendo ennyo. 
Job28:11 Batangira emigga okukulukuta, ebikise ne babiteeka awalaba." 
Job28:12 “Naye amagezi gasangwa wa? Ludda wa awaba okutegeera? 
Job28:13 Tegasangibwa mu nsi y'abalamu. N'omuntu tamanyi muwendo gugalimu. 
Job28:14 Obuziba bugamba nti: ‘Tegali mu nze.’ N'ennyanja egamba nti: ‘Tegali we ndi.’ 
Job28:15 Towaayo zaabu n'ogafuna. Topima ffeeza n'ogagula. 
Job28:16 Zaabu omulungi ow'e Ofiri tagenkana muwendo. Wadde amayinja ag'omuwendo Onika oba Safiro. 
Job28:17 Zaabu n'endabirwamu tebiyinza kugenkana. Tegayinza kuwaanyisibwa na kibya kyakolebwa mu zaabu. 
Job28:18 Mu kuba ag'omuwendo, amagezi gasingira wala amayinja agayitibwa korali, ne kristaalo, ne luulu." 
Job28:19 Topaazi eriva mu Kuusi, ne zaabu akira obulungi, nabyo tebyenkana magezi." 
Job28:20 “Kale amagezi gava wa? Ludda wa awaba okutegeera? 
Job28:21 Ebiramu byonna gabyekwese, n'ennyonyi ezibuuka mu bbanga." 
Job28:22 Amagombe n'Okuzikirira bigamba nti: ‘Twewulirirako n'agaffe Bye bagoogerako mu ŋŋambo.’ 
Job28:23 “Katonda yekka ye amanyi awabeera amagezi, ye ategeera ekkubo erituusaayo." 
Job28:24 Kubanga ye atuusa amaaso mu buli kanyomero ka nsi. Ye alaba buli kantu akali wansi w'eggulu. 
Job28:25 Bwe yawa empewo obuzito, n'apima amazzi n'ekigero;" 
Job28:26 Bwe yateekera enkuba etteeka, n'enjota ekkubo ly'ekwata," 
Job28:27 olwo n'alaba amagezi, n'agalangirira. N'agakebera n'ageekenneenya." 
Job28:28 N'agamba abantu nti: ‘Okutya Mukama ge magezi; Okwewala okukola ekibi, kwe kutegeera.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Awo Yobu n'ayongera okwogera, n'agamba nti:" 
Job29:2 “Singa mbadde nga bwe nabanga edda! Ne mba nga mu biseera biri, mwe nalabirirwanga Katonda!" 
Job29:3 Ettaala ye bwe yayakiranga awo ku mutwe gwange, okummulisiza mpite mu kizikiza!" 
Job29:4 Mu biseera ebyo nabanga bulungi, nga Katonda ye munnange, ataasa n'amaka gange." 
Job29:5 Olwo Omuyinzawaabyonna yabeeranga wamu nange; n'abaana bange nga banneetoolodde. 
Job29:6 Ng'amata nganaabya n'ebigere; nga n'olwazi lukulukuta omuzigo gwe bakamulirako, mu mizayiti gyange." 
Job29:7 Bwe navangayo okujja mu kifo awakuŋŋaanirwa ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, ntereeze entebe yange mu luggya," 
Job29:8 abavubuka bandabanga ne banviira. Abakadde ne basituka ne bayimirira; 
Job29:9 Abakulembeze ne basirika, ne bakwata ne ku mumwa." 
Job29:10 N'abakungu ne batanyega, wadde okubaayo awuuna!" 
Job29:11 “Abaawuliranga bye njogera n'abandabanga, nga bankulisa. Nga banjogerako birungi byereere." 
Job29:12 Kubanga nawonyanga omwavu ansaba obuyambi ng'akaaba, n'eyafiirwako kitaawe, atalina amukwata ku mukono." 
Job29:13 Be nawonya okufa bansabiranga. Bannamwandu bye nabakolera byabasanyusa ne bayimba. 
Job29:14 Bulijjo nakolanga bituufu, nga bye binneetooloola. Obwenkanya bwange ne buba ng'ekyambalo kyange, n'ekitambaala ky'oku mutwe." 
Job29:15 Nakulemberanga bamuzibe, ne mpaniriranga abalema." 
Job29:16 Nafuuka kitaawe w'abaavu. Nekkaanyanga ensonga z'abo be simanyi. 
Job29:17 Namenyanga emba z'aboonoonyi Ne mbaggya omuyiggo mu mannyo 
Job29:18 “Nalowooza nti ndifiira mu kisu kyange, nga mpezezza ennaku ze mpangadde." 
Job29:19 Nali ng'omuti ogulandizza emirandira awali amazzi; ng'omusulo gugwa ku matabi okumala ekiro kyonna. 
Job29:20 Naweebwanga ekitiibwa bulijjo n'amaanyi gange gaddanga buto. 
Job29:21 Abantu baalindanga kasirise ne bawuliriza mbabuulirire. 
Job29:22 Bye njogedde bwe byaggwanga, nga tewali kye bongerako. Ebigambo byange ne bibannyikira." 
Job29:23 Bannindiriranga ng'abalindirira enkuba. Ne kiba ng'abalimi bwe baaniriza ekire ky'enkuba ya ttoggo. 
Job29:24 Be nasekerangako nga tebayinza na kukkiriza! Akaseko kange ku maaso, kaabazzangamu amaanyi." 
Job29:25 Nabeeranga mukulu mu bo ne mbasalirangawo eky'okukola. Nababeerangamu nga kabaka mu ggye lye; era ng'omuntu akubagiza abakungubaga. 
Job30:1 “Naye kaakano be nsinga obukulu be bansekerera. Bakitaabwe nabanyoomanga ne sibakkiriza kubeera wamu na mbwa zikuuma ggana lyange. 
Job30:2 Nandibafunyeemu mugaso ki abantu abatakyalimu maanyi? 
Job30:3 Olw'obwavu n'enjala ebaluma balumaaluma ebikalu ekiro mu kizikiza mu ddungu. 
Job30:4 Banoga ku bisaka ebikoola by'ebimera. N'emirandira gy'akeeyeeyo ye mmere yaabwe. 
Job30:5 Bagobebwa mu bantu, ne bakubirwa enduulu ng'ababbi." 
Job30:6 Bagwanira kubeeranga mu mifulejje ne mu miwaatwa; mu binnya ne mu mpuku ez'omu njazi. 
Job30:7 Bakaabira mu bisaka ng'ebisolo, Wansi w'emyennyango we bakuŋŋaanira." 
Job30:8 Batabani ba basirusiru, baana ba batamanyiddwa. Baakubibwa emiggo ne bagobebwa mu ggwanga." 
Job30:9 Kaakano mbafuukidde luyimba, ndi ŋŋombo yaabwe ya kugereesa." 
Job30:10 Banneetamiddwa, banneesamba. Amaaso gange tebagataliza kugawandira malusu." 
Job30:11 Kubanga Katonda andese ngalo nsa n'ammala amaanyi, Nze we mbeera kye baagala kye beekolera." 
Job30:12 Ku ludda lwange olwaddyo esituseeyo abalalulalu: batega emitego we nninnya. Bategeka kulumba bantemule. 
Job30:13 Baziba ekkubo lyange basobole okummalawo, nga tebeetaaze muyambi." 
Job30:14 Bajja nga bayita mu kituli ekigazi; mu matongo wakati, ne bakulukuta ng'engezi." 
Job30:15 Nzijirwa ebintiisa. Ekitiibwa kyange kigenze, ng'ekitwaliddwa embuyaga. Obuwonero bwange buyise nga kire." 
Job30:16 “Kaakano mpweddemu obulamu Ekiseera ky'obuyinike kintuuse. 
Job30:17 Ekiro amagumba gammeketa Obulumi bwe nnina tebusalako. 
Job30:18 Bunkwata n'amaanyi ne bunfunyaafunya olususu. Ne bummiima ng'obulago bw'ekyambalo kyange. 
Job30:19 Katonda ankubye mu bitosi; Nfuuse nga nfuufu na vvu. 
Job30:20 Nkukaabirira ayi Katonda, n'otonziramu. Nnyimirira, n'ontunuulira butunuulizi." 
Job30:21 Onfuukidde omukambwe, n'onjigganya n'amaanyi go gonna." 
Job30:22 Onsitula n'onneebagajjira ku mbuyaga. Onjuuyayuuyiza eno n'eri mu kibuyaga akunta. 
Job30:23 Ddala mmanyi ontwala magombe mu kifo erigenda bonna abalamu. 
Job30:24 Lwaki olumba omuntu azikirira atakyalina ky'ayinza kukola, wabula okusaba obuyambi?" 
Job30:25 Ssaakaabira wamu amaziga n'abali mu nnaku yaabwe? Ssaalumirwa abo abali mu bwetaavu? 
Job30:26 Naye bwe nasuubira ebirungi ebibi ate bye byajja. Bwe nalindirira ekitangaala, ekizikiza kye kyajja." 
Job30:27 Omutima guncankalanye, tegulina bwe guweera. Ekiseera ky'okubonaabona kintuuseeko." 
Job30:28 Ntambula nnakuwadde, ne sifunayo kikubagizo. Nneesimba we bakuŋŋaanidde, ne nsaba nti bannyambe." 
Job30:29 Ndi muganda wa bibe era mukwano gwa bimmaaya. 
Job30:30 Olususu lunzirugadde, n'omubiri gumbunye ebbugumu." 
Job30:31 Ennyimba ze nkuba ku nnanga, kati za bakungubazi. Eddoboozi ly'endere yange ndifuuyira bakaaba maziga." 
Job31:1 “Nalagaanya amaaso gange okugeekuumanga. Kale ate nandiyinzizza ntya okugeekaliriza omuwala? 
Job31:2 Katonda yampa mugabo ki ogwa waggulu gy'ali? Nafuna basika ki okuva mu ggulu ew'Omuyinzawaabyonna? 
Job31:3 Akabi tekajjira boonoonyi? N'ennaku tegwira babi? 
Job31:4 Katonda talaba kkubo lye nkutte? Talaba buli kigere kye nsitula? 
Job31:5 Oba natambulira mu bulimba, ebigere ne bintwala mu bukuusa," 
Job31:6 mpimibwe mu minzaani epima ekituufu, Katonda amanye bwe ndi ataliiko kye nvunaanibwa." 
Job31:7 “Oba nava mu kkubo ettuufu, ne mpugulwa bye ndaba, ebinteekako ebbala," 
Job31:8 kale bye nsiga biriibwe omulala. Emmere gye mbaza ekuulibwe esuulwe. 
Job31:9 Oba neegomba muk'omusajja omulala, ne nteegera ku mulyango gwa muliraanwa," 
Job31:10 kale mukazi wange afumbire omusajja omulala, era abalala basule naye;" 
Job31:11 kubanga ekyo kyandibadde kya kivve. Ddala kyandibadde kibi ekireetebwa mu balamuzi. 
Job31:12 Kyandibadde muliro ogwokya, oguzikiriza. Gwandiwemmense buli kye nnina kyonna." 
Job31:13 “Oba nagaana okuwulira omuddu wange oba omuzaana wange nga banneemulugunyiza," 
Job31:14 kale ndikola ntya Katonda bw'alisituka? Ndimuddamu ki bw'alijja okumbuuza? 
Job31:15 Eyantonda mu lubuto, era naye si ye yamutonda? Si ye omu eyatubumba mu lubuto ffembi?" 
Job31:16 Nali nnyimye abaavu bye beetaaga? Nali mmazeeko nnamwandu essuubi? 
Job31:17 Nali ndidde emmere yange nzekka nga mulekwa taliddeeko? 
Job31:18 Okuva obuto bwange, nalabiriranga mulekwa nga kitaawe." 
Job31:19 Bwe nalabanga omuntu afa olw'okubulwa ekyokwambala, oba omwavu atalina kye yeebikka," 
Job31:20 nga mmubugumya n'ekyambalo ekikoleddwa mu byoya by'endiga zange. 
Job31:21 Oba nali ndyazaamaanyizza mulekwa nga ndabye nti abalamuzi banannyamba," 
Job31:22 kale ekibegabega kyange kiweekukeko. N'omukono gwange gumenyeke eggumba. 
Job31:23 Nali siyinza kukola bintu biri ng'ebyo, kubanga ntya Katonda." 
Job31:24 “Nali ntadde essuubi lyange mu zaabu? Nali ŋŋambye zaabu omulungi nti: ‘Ggwe bwesige bwange?’ 
Job31:25 Nali ntadde essanyu lyange mu byobugagga bwange obungi? Wadde okwesiima olw'endulundu y'ebintu? 
Job31:26 Nali ntunuulidde enjuba mu kwaka kwayo, oba obulungi bw'omwezi ogumasamasa," 
Job31:27 omutima gwange ne gusikirizibwa mu nkukutu; ne nnywegera ekibatu kyange okulaga bwe mbigulumiza? 
Job31:28 Na kino kyandibadde kibi ekireetebwa mu balamuzi, kubanga nandibadde neegaanye Katonda ali waggulu." 
Job31:29 Nali nsanyukidde okuzikirira kw'oyo ankyaye; oba okujaganya ng'akabi kamujjidde? 
Job31:30 Saaganya kamwa kange kwonoona, nsabe nga nkolima, nti afe." 
Job31:31 Ddi ababeera mu maka gange lwe bataabuuza nti: ‘Ani atakkuse nnyama Yobu gy'agabula?’ 
Job31:32 Abatambuze mbaaniriza, sireka basule ku kkubo." 
Job31:33 Sikwekanga nsobi zange ng'abantu abakisa ebibi byabwe," 
Job31:34 olw'okutya ekibiina ky'abantu, n'okunyoomebwa ab'eŋŋanda. Ne nzira awo ne nsirika, ne nnema n'okuva mu nnyumba." 
Job31:35 “Kale singa waliwo awuliriza bye ŋŋamba! Bye byange ebyo bye nkakasa. Omuyinzawaabyonna anziremu. Nandyagadde oyo ampawaabidde ampe omusango mu buwandiike. 
Job31:36 Mazima nandigusitulidde ku kibegabega kyange gulabibwe. Nandigutikkidde ng'engule ku mutwe gwange. 
Job31:37 Nandimuttottoledde buli kigere kye nsitula. Nandimusemberedde nga sirina kye ntyamu. 
Job31:38 Singa nabba bubbi ekibanja kye nnimamu, nga kireekaana okukiddiza nnyinikyo," 
Job31:39 ne ndya ebibala byamu nga sisasudde, ne ndeka enjala ette bannyinikyo," 
Job31:40 kale omwennyango gukulemu mu kifo ky'eŋŋaano; ne ssere mu kifo kya bbaale.” Ebigambo bya Yobu bikomye awo. 
Job32:1 Awo abasajja abasatu ne balekera awo okuddamu Yobu, kubanga yalaga nti yeemanyi nga taliiko ky'avunaanibwa." 
Job32:2 Awo Elihu, mutabani wa Barakeeli Omubuuzi, ow'omu lulyo lwa Raamu, n'abuubuuka obusungu, kubanga Yobu yeeyita atalina musango, n'anenya Katonda." 
Job32:3 Era Elihu n'asunguwalira ne mikwano gya Yobu abasatu, kubanga baabulwa kye baanukula Yobu, newaakubadde baali bamaze okusalira Yobu omusango okumusinga." 
Job32:4 Elihu yali akyalinze okubaako ky'agamba Yobu, kubanga waaliwo abaali basinga Elihu obukulu." 
Job32:5 Bwe yalaba ng'abasajja abo abasatu babuliddwa eky'okuddamu Yobu, obusungu bwe ne bubuubuuka." 
Job32:6 Awo Elihu ono, mutabani wa Barakeeli Omubuuzi, n'addamu ng'agamba nti: “Nze ndi muto mu myaka, mmwe muli bakadde. Kyenvudde ntya ne saŋŋanga kubalaga kye mmanyi." 
Job32:7 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ab'emyaka ka boogere, Abakadde balage amagezi.’" 
Job32:8 Naye Mwoyo wa Katonda mu bantu, omukka ogubateekebwamu Omuyinzawaabyonna, gwe gubawa okutegeera." 
Job32:9 Okukula si kwe kugeziwala, N'okukaddiwa si kwe kutegeera ekituufu." 
Job32:10 Kyenva ŋŋamba nti: Muntegere amatu, nange ndage kye mmanyi." 
Job32:11 Kale mubadde mukyanoonya bye munaayogera, ne nnindirira ebigambo byammwe mpulirize eby'amagezi ebibavaamu." 
Job32:12 Mbateereddeyo omwoyo okuwuliriza, ku mmwe ne wataba n'omu avuganya Yobu mu bigambo, wadde ayanukula by'aleese." 
Job32:13 Mwekkaanye muleme kwewaana nti amagezi mugazudde. Katonda ye ayinza okumuwangula, sso si bantu." 
Job32:14 Ebigambo bye tabyolekezza nze. Naye nze sandimuzzeemu na bigambo ng'ebyo ebyammwe. 
Job32:15 “Basobeddwa, babuliddwa eby'okuddamu. Tebakyalina kye bagamba." 
Job32:16 Era nga bwe basirise nninde? Bayimiridde awo, tebakyalina kye baanukula?" 
Job32:17 Nze nja kubaako kye nziramu. Nange kye mmanyi nja kukiraga. 
Job32:18 Eby'okwogera nnina bingi. Mpulira muli ekimpika njogere. 
Job32:19 Nziyidde siriiko we nzisiza. Ndi ng'omwenge omusu omusaanikire, Ogwagala okwabya mwe guteekeddwa." 
Job32:20 Nnina kwogera ndyoke mpeere. Nteekwa okubaako kye ŋŋamba. 
Job32:21 Sijja kwekubiira ku ludda lw'ono oba olw'oli. Sijja era kubaako gwe mpaana. 
Job32:22 Kubanga simanyi kuwaana. Era sikulwa ng'Omutonzi wange anzigyawo amangu. 
Job33:1 “Kati nno Yobu, wulira bye ŋŋenda okwogera. Wuliriza ebigambo byange byonna." 
Job33:2 Kale ka ntandike okwogera, nfulumye muli ekimpujja." 
Job33:3 Ebigambo byange bye biraga nti ddala ndi mwesimbu. 
Job33:4 Mwoyo wa Katonda yantonda. Omukka gw'Omuyinzawaabyonna gwampa obulamu. 
Job33:5 Oba oyinza, nziraamu. Tereeza bulungi ensonga, oyimirire mu maaso gange." 
Job33:6 Nze naawe mu maaso ga Katonda tuli kimu: Ffembi twabumbibwa mu ttaka. 
Job33:7 N'olwekyo tobaako ky'ontyamu. Sijja kukuzitoowerera. 
Job33:8 Mazima oyogedde mpulira. Eddoboozi lyo livuze mu gano amatu gange nti: 
Job33:9 ‘Sirina musango, tewali kikyamu kye nakola. Siriiko kye nvunaanibwa, era sirina kibi." 
Job33:10 Naye Katonda afuna ebyekwaso, n'anteeka mu ssa ly'omulabe." 
Job33:11 Asiba ebigere byange mu nvuba, alingiriza bye nkola byonna.’" 
Job33:12 Naye ka nkubuulire ggwe Yobu, nti mu kino oli mukyamu. Katonda asukkulumye nnyo ku bantu." 
Job33:13 Lwaki omwemulugunyiza ng'ogamba nti: ‘Bye mmugamba nga tanziramu?’ 
Job33:14 Kubanga Katonda ayogera mu ngeri eno oba eri, wadde ng'abantu tebeeteerayo mwoyo." 
Job33:15 Abantu ekiro mu tulo otungi balina bye balabira mu birooto nga babongootera ku bitanda. 
Job33:16 Awo Katonda w'aggulira amatu g'abantu. N'abakakasa by'abayigiriza," 
Job33:17 alyoke abaggye ku bikolwa ebibi, era abaziyize okuba abeepansi." 
Job33:18 Abawonya okukka emagombe, n'okuzikirizibwa olumbe." 
Job33:19 Era okulwalira ku kitanda, n'okulumwa mu magumba, bikangavvula omuntu." 
Job33:20 Obulamu bwe butamwa by'alya. N'ebyamuwoomeranga, n'atabyegomba." 
Job33:21 Aggweebwako omubiri n'akogga. Amagumba ge agataalabikanga ne gakukunala. 
Job33:22 Ddala asemberera omugo gw'entaana, n'abula kata okuzikirira." 
Job33:23 “Naye bw'afuna omu ku bamalayika ba Katonda enkumi n'enkumi abayamba abantu okubalaga ekituufu," 
Job33:24 n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'agamba Katonda nti: ‘Muwonye aleme kukka magombe. Mmulabiddeyo omutango." 
Job33:25 Omubiri gwe gube kawerette ng'ogw'omwana omuto. Era yennyini adde buvubuka,’" 
Job33:26 olwo omuntu oyo asinza Katonda, Katonda n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'ajja mu maaso ge nga musanyufu, kubanga amuwonyezza okufa." 
Job33:27 Ayimbira mu maaso g'abantu ng'agamba nti: ‘Nayonoona, ne nkola ebitatuuse. Naye ne sibonerezebwa nga bwe nsaanidde." 
Job33:28 Annunudde ne sikka magombe nja kwongera okuba omulamu.’ 
Job33:29 Mazima ebyo byonna Katonda abikolera abantu bulijjo 
Job33:30 okubawonya amagombe, n'abawa essanyu olw'okuba abalamu." 
Job33:31 “Kaakano nno Yobu, wuliriza bye ŋŋamba. Sirika ondeke njogere." 
Job33:32 Naye oba olinayo ky'ogamba, kyogere mpulire. Yogera, kubanga njagala okukakasa nti tolina musango." 
Job33:33 Naye oba tokirina, sirika owulire bye ŋŋamba. Nkuyigirize eby'amagezi.”" 
Job34:1 Awo Elihu n'agamba nti: 
Job34:2 “Muwulirize bye ŋŋamba mmwe abantu abagezi. Muntegere amatu mmwe abamanyi ebintu. 
Job34:3 Kubanga omuntu mu by'awulira ayawulamu ebituufu n'ebitali bya mazima, nga bw'alya ku mmere n'ayawula ewooma n'etewooma." 
Job34:4 Twawulemu ekituufu. Twesalirewo ffekka kye tulaba nti kirungi. 
Job34:5 Kubanga Yobu agambye nti: ‘Siriiko kye nvunaanibwa. Kyokka Katonda tampisizza bulungi. 
Job34:6 Newaakubadde ndi mutuufu, mpitibwa mulimba. Wadde sizzanga musango, nfumitibwa nfe bufi.’" 
Job34:7 Yobu muntu wa ngeri ki? Obunyoomi abwekatankira nga bw'anywa amazzi. 
Job34:8 Ayita wamu n'abakozi b'ebyambyone. Atambulira wamu n'aboonoonyi. 
Job34:9 Kubanga agambye nti: ‘Okuba mukwano gwa Katonda omuntu talina ky'afunamu.’ 
Job34:10 Kale muntegere amatu mmwe abantu abategeevu. Tekiyinzika n'akatono Katonda kukola bitasaana. Era Omuyinzawaabyonna okukola ate ebisobyo. 
Job34:11 Kubanga aliwa buli muntu empeera, ng'asinziira ku ebyo buli omu bye yakola. Omuntu n'alaba nti ky'afunayo kye kiikyo ekigwanira empisa ze." 
Job34:12 Kituufu ddala nti Katonda wamma taakolenga kibi, era Omuyinzawaabyonna taasalirizenga nsonga." 
Job34:13 Ani yamuwa omulimu gw'okulabiriranga ensi? Oba ani yateekateeka buli kintu? 
Job34:14 Katonda singa asalawo okweddiza omwoyo gwe, n'omukka gwe, ebiwa obulamu," 
Job34:15 buli kiramu kyandizikiridde, abantu ne badda mu nfuufu." 
Job34:16 “Kale oba ggwe otegeera ebintu wuliriza kye ŋŋamba. 
Job34:17 Akyawa obwenkanya ayinza okufuga? Oyo omutuufu ow'amaanyi gw'osalira omusango okumusinga? 
Job34:18 Si ye oyo agamba kabaka nti: ‘Oli ntagasa’, N'abakungu nti: ‘Muli babi?’" 
Job34:19 Ye oyo ateekubiira ku ludda lw'abafuzi, ayisa obumu abagagga n'abaavu. Kubanga batonde be bonna." 
Job34:20 Bafa mu kaseera buseera, mu matumbi g'obudde. Abantu banyeenyezebwa ne babulawo. Ab'amaanyi baggyibwawo nga tewali abakuttenako." 
Job34:21 Atunuulira engeri omuntu gye yeeyisaamu, era alaba buli gy'alaga yonna." 
Job34:22 Tewali kisiikirize wadde kizikiza ekikutte, abakola ebibi mwe bayinza okwekweka Katonda." 
Job34:23 Katonda teyeetaaga kumala kulaalika muntu atuuke mu maaso ge okumusalira omusango. 
Job34:24 Teyeetaaga kubuuliriza okumenyawo ab'amaanyi, n'okussaawo abalala mu kifo kyabwe." 
Job34:25 Nga bye bakola bw'abimanyi, abavuunika kiro n'abazikiriza." 
Job34:26 Abakubira mu maaso g'abantu, ng'abalanga ebibi byabwe." 
Job34:27 Kubanga balekayo okumugoberera, ne batafaayo ku biragiro bye." 
Job34:28 Ne baleka abaavu okumukaabirira. N'awulira okukaaba kwabwe, nga bababonyaabonya." 
Job34:29 Bw'asalawo obutabaako ky'asalawo, ani ayinza okumusalira omusango okumusinga? Bw'akweka amaaso ge, ani ayinza okumulaba, ne bwe liba ggwanga oba omuntu?" 
Job34:30 Omuntu atatya Katonda amuziyiza okufuga, waleme kubaawo asuula bantu mu katego." 
Job34:31 “Kirungi omuntu agambe Katonda nti: ‘Mbonerezeddwa, sikyaddamu kusobya." 
Job34:32 Njigiriza kye siraba. Oba nga nakola ekibi sikyaddamu kukikola.’ 
Job34:33 Oba owakana, olowooza nti Katonda yandibonerezza omuntu ng'oyo? Awo ggwe olina okusalawo, sso si nze. Kale yogera ky'omanyi." 
Job34:34 Abantu abategeevu bajja kuŋŋamba, ne buli muntu ow'amagezi anaawuliriza bye njogera ajja kuŋŋamba nti:" 
Job34:35 ‘Yobu ayogeza butamanya, ne by'ayogera temuli magezi.’" 
Job34:36 Yobu awozesebwe mu bujjuvu, kubanga addamu ng'abantu ababi;"
