Job34:37 kubanga ku bibi bye, ayongerako obujeemu. Anyooma Katonda ng'asinziira wakati mu ffe, n'ayogera olutakutuka.”" 
Job35:1 Awo Elihu era n'agamba nti: 
Job35:2 “Olowooza nti kituufu okugamba nti: ‘Siriiko kye nvunaanibwa mu maaso ga Katonda?’ 
Job35:3 N'okubuuza Katonda nti: ‘Ekibi kyange kikukolako ki? N'obutakola kibi bungasizza ki?’ 
Job35:4 Nja kukuddamu ggwe, wamu ne mikwano gyo." 
Job35:5 Tunuulira eggulu, olabe. Weetegereze ebire ebyewanise okusinga w'otuuka." 
Job35:6 Bw'oyonoona, omukolako kabi ki? Ebibi byo bwe byeyongera obungi, bimukolako ki?" 
Job35:7 Bw'obeera omwenkanya omuganyula ki? Oba ky'akufunako kye kiruwa? 
Job35:8 Obubi bwo buyinza kulumya muntu buntu nga ggwe. N'ebirungi by'okola gwe biyamba. 
Job35:9 Olw'okunyigirizibwa okungi abantu baleekaana. Bakaaba bafune ayamba okubawonya ab'amaanyi. 
Job35:10 Naye tewali agamba nti: ‘Katonda ali ludda wa eyantonda, asobozesa abantu okuyimba nga bali mu kaseera akazibu;" 
Job35:11 akozesa ebisolo atuyigirize, akozesa n'ebinyonyi, atufuule abagezi.’" 
Job35:12 Kale bakaaba, naye Katonda taddamu, kubanga beekuza era babi." 
Job35:13 Bakaabira bwereere, Katonda tawuliriza byabwe. Era Omuyinzawaabyonna tatunulako gye bali." 
Job35:14 Kale olwo anaakuwulira atya bw'ogamba nti tomulaba? Era bw'ogamba nti omusango gwo guli mu maaso ge, era nti omulindirira?" 
Job35:15 Era kaakano oba obusungu bwe tebuliiko gwe bubonereza, era tewali ky'afaayo ku bibi," 
Job35:16 Yobu ayogera bitaliimu nsa, ayongera kwogera by'atamanyi.”" 
Job36:1 Awo Elihu n'ayongera n'agamba nti: 
Job36:2 “Ogira oŋŋumiikiriza mmale okukunnyonnyola, kubanga nkyalinayo kye njagala okwogera ku lwa Katonda." 
Job36:3 Nja kuleeta bye mmanyi okuva wano ne wali, okukakasa nti Omutonzi wange mwenkanya." 
Job36:4 Mazima sirimba mu bye njogera. Alina okumanya okujjuvu ye ali naawe. 
Job36:5 Katonda wa maanyi, era si munyoomi. Tewali ky'atategeera." 
Job36:6 Taleka babi kuyinaayina, naye abanyigirizibwa abawa ebibagwanidde." 
Job36:7 Abataliiko kye bavunaanibwa tabaggyaako liiso; naye ku ntebe awali bakabaka kw'abateeka ne bagulumizibwa ennaku zonna. 
Job36:8 Era bwe basibwa mu masamba Ne babonyaabonyezebwa," 
Job36:9 Katonda abalaga kye baakola, era nga bwe baasobya nga beekulumbaza." 
Job36:10 Azibula amatu gaabwe, bawulire by'abalabulamu, n'abalagira okuva mu bibi byabwe." 
Job36:11 Bwe bawulira ne bamuweereza, Banaamalangako obulamu bwabwe nga balina emikisa, era nga basanyuka." 
Job36:12 Naye bwe batawulira, balizikirizibwa olumbe. Balifa olw'obutamanya bwabwe." 
Job36:13 Abo abatassaamu Katonda kitiibwa basiba obusungu ku mutima. Ne bw'ababonereza tebamusaba kubayamba. 
Job36:14 Bafa bakyali bavubuka. N'enkomerero y'obulamu ebasanga bali mu buswavu. 
Job36:15 Naye Katonda ayigiriza abantu ng'ayita mu kubonaabona kwabwe. Mu buyinike bwabwe mw'aggulira amatu gaabwe. 
Job36:16 “Katonda yakuggya mu buzibu n'akuwonya okutawaanyizibwa. Olujjuliro lwo ne lujjula ebyokulya ebiwoomu. 
Job36:17 Naye kaakano osaliddwa omusango mu bujjuvu, nga babi banno abalala. Omusango gusaliddwa, tokyalina gy'ojulira." 
Job36:18 Weegendereze oleme okulimbibwa obugagga. Era enguzi ereme kukwonoona. 
Job36:19 Obugagga bwo tebuuyambe, wadde n'amaanyi go gonna, okukuwonya okubonaabona." 
Job36:20 Teweegomba kiro kujja amawanga mwe gazikirizibwa amangwago. 
Job36:21 Weegendereze oleme kukola bibi. Okubonaabona kwo kwajja kukutangira mu ekyo. 
Job36:22 “Laba Katonda bw'alina obuyinza obungi! Ani amwenkana mu kuba omuyigiriza? 
Job36:23 Ani amubuulira eky'okukola? Oba ani ayinza okumugamba nti: ‘Ky'okoze si kituufu?’ 
Job36:24 Jjukira okumutenderezanga olw'ebyo bye yakola. Abantu bye batenda mu nnyimba. 
Job36:25 Abantu bonna babiraba. Naye nga babirengerera wala. 
Job36:26 Laba Katonda bw'ali omukulu, era tetumumanya kimala! Emyaka gye tegibalika." 
Job36:27 Atwala waggulu amatondo g'amazzi ne gakenenukamu enkuba okuva mu lufu lwe," 
Job36:28 ebire gye biyiwa n'etonnyera abantu mu bungi. 
Job36:29 Era waliwo ategeera ebire bwe bibikkibwa ku ggulu, wadde ategeera okubwatuka kw'eggulu lye?" 
Job36:30 Asaasaanya okumyansa kw'eggulu okumwetooloola. Naye obuziba bw'ennyanja n'abubikkako enzikiza. 
Job36:31 Atonnyesa enkuba n'aliisa abantu, n'abawa emmere nnyingi." 
Job36:32 Akwata okumyansa kw'eggulu mu kibatu kye N'alagira kukube gy'akwolekeza. 
Job36:33 Okubwatuka kw'eggulu kulaga nti kibuyaga asembedde. N'ente zimanya nti ajja. 
Job37:1 Kibuyaga ankankanya omutima, ne guntundugga." 
Job37:2 Muwulire okubwatuka kw'eddoboozi lya Ddunda! N'okududuma okuva mu kamwa ke! 
Job37:3 Akusindika wansi w'eggulu lyonna. N'okumyansa kwe kubuna enkomerero y'ensi. 
Job37:4 Olwo eddoboozi lye liwuluguma, ne libwatuka n'entiisa. Liwulirwa, nga n'okumyansa bwe kugenda mu maaso." 
Job37:5 Okubwatuka kw'eddoboozi lya Katonda kwa kitalo! Akola ebikulu, ebitulema okutegeera!" 
Job37:6 Kubanga alagira omuzira nti: ‘Gwa ku nsi’; n'ekire ky'enkuba nti: ‘Tonnya n'amaanyi.’ 
Job37:7 Ayimiriza emirimu gya buli muntu, abantu bonna be yatonda, bamanye by'akola." 
Job37:8 Ebisolo bigenda gye byekweka, ne bibeera mu mpuku zaabyo." 
Job37:9 Embuyaga n'eva mu bukiikaddyo, n'empewo n'eva mu bukiikakkono." 
Job37:10 Katonda assa omukka ne guleeta omuzira. Amazzi ne gakwata ng'ejjinja. 
Job37:11 Ekire ekikutte akijjuza amazzi. Ebire bibunya wonna okumyansa kwe. 
Job37:12 Ebire byetooloola eno n'eri nga bw'aba abiragidde. Bikolera ku biragiro bye buli wantu gye biraga. 
Job37:13 Atonnyesa enkuba okufukirira ensi. Olumu agitonnyesa lwa kubonereza bantu. Olumu kaba kabonero akalaga ekisa kye. 
Job37:14 Yobu, wulira kino: siriikirira olowooze ku by'ekitalo, Katonda bye yakola." 
Job37:15 Omanyi Katonda bw'alagira ebire, okumyansa ne kuvaayo mu byo?" 
Job37:16 Omanyi ebire bwe biseeyeeyera mu bbanga, ekiraga obukugu bwa Katonda obwekitalo?" 
Job37:17 Otuuyanira mu byambalo byo ng'obudde bulimu ebbugumu, olw'embuyaga eva mu bukiikaddyo." 
Job37:18 Oyinza okukwatirako Katonda okubamba eggulu, ne limasamasa ng'endabirwamu?" 
Job37:19 Tuyigirize bye tuba tumugamba, tetuliiko kye tumanyi. Tuli ng'abali mu kizikiza." 
Job37:20 Bakimugambe nti njagala okwogerako naye? Mba nneenoonyeza kusaanyizibwawo? 
Job37:21 Embuyaga bw'emala okwerawo ebire, kizibu okutunula mu kitangaala ekitangalijjira ku ggulu." 
Job37:22 Mu bukiikakkono ye eva okwakaayakana okuli nga zaabu. Ekitiibwa kya Katonda kitukuba entiisa! 
Job37:23 Omuyinzawaabyonna okumanya wa buyinza nnyo, tetuyinza kumusemberera. Asala mu bwenkanya era mwesimbu. Tatulugunya bantu." 
Job37:24 Abantu kyebava bamutya. Tassa mwoyo ku abo abeerowooza okuba abagezi.” 
Job38:1 Awo Mukama n'addamu Yobu ng'asinziira mu mbuyaga ey'amaanyi, n'agamba nti:" 
Job38:2 “Ani oyo aziyiza entegeka yange okutegeerekeka, ng'ayogera ebiraga obutamanya?" 
Job38:3 Kale weesibe ekimyu ng'omusajja, onziremu bye nkubuuza." 
Job38:4 “Wali oli ludda wa bwe nassaawo emisingi gy'ensi? Mbuulira, oba okitegeera." 
Job38:5 Ani yasalawo bw'enenkana obunene? Oba ani yagipimisa omuguwa? Tolema ggwe kumanya. 
Job38:6 Emisingi gyayo giri ku ki? Oba ani yasimba ejjinja lyayo ery'omu nsonda," 
Job38:7 emmunyeenye z'oku makya bwe zaayimbira awamu ne bannaggulu, ne baleekaana olw'essanyu?" 
Job38:8 Oba ani yaggalira ennyanja enzigi, bwe yawaguza ng'ekiva mu nda ya nnyina waakyo?" 
Job38:9 Nze nafuula ebire ekyambalo kyayo, n'ekizikiza ekikutte ne nkifuula obugoye obugibikka." 
Job38:10 Nagiteerawo ekkomo lyayo, Ne nteekawo enzigi n'ebisiba." 
Job38:11 Ne ngigamba nti: ‘Okomanga wano, era tosukkangawo. N'amayengo go agasuukiira we ganaaziyirizibwanga.’" 
Job38:12 “Bukya obaawo, wali olagidde emmambya ejje era olunaku lukye," 
Job38:13 ekitangaala kibune buli kanyomero ka nsi, kigobewo ababi beekweke?" 
Job38:14 Olwo ensi evaayo n'erabika ng'eri ng'ekyambalo, ekya langi ennyingi." 
Job38:15 Ababi ekitangaala kibamalako eddembe, ne baziyizibwa okukola eby'obukambwe." 
Job38:16 Wali otuuse ebuziba, awali ensulo z'ennyanja? Wali otambulidde wansi eyo ku ntobo y'ennyanja?" 
Job38:17 Waliwo eyali akulaze enzigi z'emagombe, eziyingira mu kizikiza awakuumirwa abaafa?" 
Job38:18 Wali otegedde ensi bw'eri obugazi? Nziramu oba byonna obimanyi. 
Job38:19 Omanyi ekkubo erituusa awasula ekitangaala? Ekizikiza bwe kivaawo kiraga wa? 
Job38:20 Oyinza okubiggyayo mu kifo kyabyo? Era otegeera amakubo agatuusa gye bisula? 
Job38:21 Omanyi, kubanga wali muzaale mu bbanga eryo! Nga mingi emyaka gy'owangadde!" 
Job38:22 Wali oyimiridde mu mawanika ng'omuzira? Wali olabye awaterekebwa amayinja ag'omuzira," 
Job38:23 ge nterekera ekiseera ekizibu, olunaku lw'obulwa n'otulo?" 
Job38:24 Kkubo ki erituusa mu kifo omwawukanira ekitangaala? Oba embuyaga z'ebuvanjuba mwe zisaasaanira ku nsi? 
Job38:25 Ani yatema ku ggulu emikutu enkuba mw'eyita eyiike? Oba ekkubo ly'okubwatuka kw'eraddu? 
Job38:26 Ani atonnyesa enkuba mu bitundu ebitabeeramu bantu? N'etonnya mu ddungu omutaba muntu n'omu," 
Job38:27 okufukirira ensi eyazika enkalu erekeddwa awo, emeremu omuddo omuto?" 
Job38:28 Enkuba erina kitaawe waayo? Oba ani azaala amatondo g'omusulo? 
Job38:29 Omuzira guva mu nda ye ani? N'omusulo ogutonnyerera ng'olukubakuba ne gukwata, ani aguzaala?" 
Job38:30 Amazzi gafuuka amakalubo ng'ejjinja, ne kungulu w'ennyanja ne wakwata." 
Job38:31 Oyinza okusiba ekikuukuulu ky'emmunyeenye ekiyitibwa Kakaaga? Oba okusumulula emiguwa egigatta ezo eziyitibwa Omuyizzi? 
Job38:32 Oyinza okufulumya emmunyeenye zirabikire mu budde bwazo? Oba oyinza okuluŋŋamya Ddubu ennene n'abaana baayo? 
Job38:33 Omanyi ebiragiro ebifuga mu ggulu? Oyinza okubikozesa okufuga ne mu nsi? 
Job38:34 Oyinza okuboggolera ebire okubiragira bikubunduggulireko amazzi? 
Job38:35 Oyinza okuweereza ebimyanso by'eggulu bigende, ne bikugamba nti: ‘Tuutuno?’" 
Job38:36 Ani yateeka mu bire amagezi, ag'okutonnyesa enkuba? N'eyawa olufu okutegeera engeri gye lunaagwangamu?" 
Job38:37 Ani ayinza okukozesa amagezi n'abala ebire? Oba ani ayinza okuttulula amaliba g'omu ggulu ago," 
Job38:38 enfuufu n'efuuka ettosi, ebitoomi ne byekwata?" 
Job38:39 “Onooyiggira empologoma enkazi by'erya? Oba onoogabirira empologoma ento ozikkuse," 
Job38:40 bwe zeebaka mu mpuku zaayo, oba bwe zibwama mu bisaka okuteega?" 
Job38:41 Ani aliisa binnamuŋŋoona bwe bitambulatambula okunoonya emmere, ng'abaana baabyo bankaabirira?" 
Job39:1 “Omanyi ebiseera engabi ez'omu nsozi mwe zizaalira? Oba wali weetegerezza empeewo bw'ezaala? 
Job39:2 Oyinza okubala emyezi gye zimala n'amawako? Oba omanyi ebbanga lye zizaalirako," 
Job39:3 lwe zifukamira ne zizaala abaana baazo, ne ziryoka ziwona obulumi?" 
Job39:4 Abaana baazo bafuna amaanyi, ne bakulira mu ttale ebweru. Bagenda ne batakomawo we ziri." 
Job39:5 Ani yata entulege n'aleka ebe ya ddembe? Eyagiyimbula ye ani, edduke nga bw'eyagala?" 
Job39:6 Nze nagiwa eddungu okuba amaka gaayo, n'ensi y'omunnyo okuba ekifo kyayo." 
Job39:7 Oluyoogaano lw'ekibuga terwetaaga. Tewuliriza mugobi alagira na bboggo. 
Job39:8 Etaayaaya mu nsozi, lye ddundiro lyayo, era mwe yeenoonyeza buli kibisi ky'erya." 
Job39:9 Embogo enekkiriza okukuweerezanga ggwe? Erisulako awali emmanvu ebisolo mwe biriira? 
Job39:10 Oyinza okugisiba olukoba ekutemere ebikata? Oba ekusikire enkumbi ekulimire ebisenyi? 
Job39:11 Onoogyesiga olw'amaanyi gaayo g'erina amangi? N'ogirekera omulimu gw'eneekukolera? 
Job39:12 Ogyesiga nti ekomawo ekuleetere ensigo zo mu gguuliro lyo? 
Job39:13 “Ebiwaawaatiro bya maaya ebizinyisa ng'esanyuka. Naye ebiwaawaatiro byayo ebyo n'ebyoya byayo, biba n'ekisa?" 
Job39:14 Kubanga ereka amagi gaayo ku ttaka gabugumizibwe musenyu. 
Job39:15 Ne yeerabira nti ekigere kiyinza okugabetenta, oba ekisolo okugalinnyirira." 
Job39:16 Eyisa bubi abaana baayo, ng'abatali b'ezaala. N'eraga nti tefaayo kuteganira bwereere." 
Job39:17 Kubanga saagikkiriza kubeera na magezi. Era saagiwa kutegeera. 
Job39:18 Naye bw'etandika okudduka temanya mbalaasi na mwebagazi! 
Job39:19 Embalaasi ggwe ogiwa amaanyi, n'obulago obukankanya olugiŋŋirima?" 
Job39:20 Ggwe ogibuusa ng'enzige n'eba n'okufugula okw'entiisa? 
Job39:21 Esamba n'obukambwe mu kiwonvu, Efubutuka okulumba ebyokulwanyisa by'omulabe." 
Job39:22 Temanyi kiyitibwa kutya. Tedda mabega olw'ekitala. 
Job39:23 Ensawo y'obusaale, n'effumu erimyamyansa, n'omuwunda, bikubaganira ku yo." 
Job39:24 Efuumuuka emisinde mu busungu obungi, tetereera ng'ewulidde eŋŋombe." 
Job39:25 Buli lwe bafuuwa eŋŋombe, n'efugula nti: ‘Otyo!’ Olutalo n'okuleekaana kw'abaduumizi ebikonga ng'ekyali wala." 
Job39:26 Ggwe oyigiriza magga okutumbiira, n'abamba ebiwaawaatiro bye, ayolekere obukiikaddyo?" 
Job39:27 Ggwe olagira empungu okulinnya n'ekola ekisu kyayo waggulu mu nsozi entumbiivu? 
Job39:28 Ezimba mu mpompogoma z'enjazi engulumivu, n'ebeera eyo." 
Job39:29 Eyo gy'esinziira okuketta ky'enetta erye, Amaaso gaayo ne gakirengerera wala." 
Job39:30 Abaana baayo banywa omusaayi. Awali ekifudde, yo w'ebeera.”" 
Job40:1 Mukama era n'agamba Yobu nti: 
Job40:2 “Anoonya ensobi, anaavunaana Omuyinzawaabyonna? Oyo awakana nange kale anziremu.”" 
Job40:3 Awo Yobu n'alyoka addamu Mukama nti: 
Job40:4 “Siriimu kaabuntu; Nnaakuddamu ntya? Ka nkwate ku mumwa nsirike busirisi. 
Job40:5 Nayogedde omulundi gumu, sijja kuddamu. Oba ebiri, naye sikyayongedde.”" 
Job40:6 Awo Mukama n'addamu Yobu, ng'asinziira mu mbuyaga ey'amaanyi, n'agamba nti:" 
Job40:7 “Kale weesibe ekimyu ng'omusajja, nkubuuze ebibuuzo, onziremu." 
Job40:8 Onootuuka n'okukyusa ensala yange? Onoosalira nze omusango okunsinga, ggwe oba obeera omutuufu?" 
Job40:9 Wenkana nange amaanyi? Era oyinza okubwatuka n'eddoboozi eriri ng'eryange? 
Job40:10 Kale weetimbe obukungu n'olwetumbu. Yambala ekitiibwa n'obukulu. 
Job40:11 Laga obusungu bwo obuyitirivu, otunuulire buli mwepansi omubonereze." 
Job40:12 Ddala tunuulira buli mwepansi omukkakkanye Olinnyirire ababi awo wennyini we bali. 
Job40:13 Bavumbike bonna wamu mu nfuufu. Basibire mu kifo ekikwekeddwa. 
Job40:14 Olwo nange nnaakutendereza nti obuyinza bwo buwangudde. 
Job40:15 “Kale laba envubu gye natonda nga bwe natonda ggwe. Erya muddo ng'ente. 
Job40:16 Amaanyi gaayo gagiri mu kiwato, Ne mu nnyama y'oku lubuto lwayo." 
Job40:17 Ekakanyaza omukira ne gwesimba ng'omuvule. Ebinywa by'amagulu gaayo byasibagana. 
Job40:18 Amagumba gaayo gali ng'enseke ez'ekikomo, Amagulu gaayo gali ng'emitayimbwa." 
Job40:19 Y'esooka mu nsolo zonna ze natonda. Omutonzi waayo ye yekka ayinza okugisemberera n'ekitala. 
Job40:20 Naye ensozi okuzannyira ebisolo byonna, ze zigyaliza by'erya." 
Job40:21 Egalamira wansi w'obuti obw'amaggwa; yeekweka mu bitoogo, mu lutobazzi." 
Job40:22 Yeggama mu bisiikirize by'obuti obw'amaggwa; Ne mu myerebu egy'oku myala gy'amazzi. 
Job40:23 Omugga bwe gwanjaala, tetya. Eguma omwoyo, Yorudaani ne bwe gujjula okutuuka ku kamwa kaayo." 
Job40:24 Waliwo ayinza okugikwata ng'etunula? Oba ayinza okugikwasa ku mutego n'ogifumita ennyindo? 
Job41:1 “Goonya oyinza okugivubisa eddobo, oba okusiba olulimi lwayo n'omuguwa?" 
Job41:2 Oyinza okuyingiza omuguwa mu nnyindo zaayo, Oba okuwummula oluba lwayo n'eddobo?" 
Job41:3 Eneekwegayirira ogikwatirwe ekisa, n'eyogera naawe bulungi ogireke?" 
Job41:4 Eneekola naawe endagaano ebeerenga muweereza wo ennaku zonna? 
Job41:5 Onoozannyanga nayo nga bw'ozannya n'ekinyonyi? Oba onoogisibiranga abaweereza bo abawala ebasanyuse? 
Job41:6 Abavubi banaagiramuzanga? Abasuubuzi banaagitemaatemanga okugitunda? 
Job41:7 Oyinza okugifumita effumu ne liyita mu ddiba lyayo? Oba omutwe gwayo n'ogufumita emiwunda egiswaga ebyennyanja? 
Job41:8 Geza ogikooneko, tolikiddira lulala! Era olutalo tolirwerabira!" 
Job41:9 N'okugiraba obulabi omuntu taba na ssuubi. n'agwa ku ttaka wansi. 
Job41:10 Tewali aba na buvumu bwa kusaggula goonya. Olwo kale aguma ye ani okuyimirira we ndi? 
Job41:11 Ani yasooka okumpa gwe nnina okuddiza? Buli ekiri wansi w'eggulu kyange. 
Job41:12 “Siireme kwogera ku magulu gaayo, ne ku maanyi gaayo, ne ku nkula yaayo ennungi." 
Job41:13 Ani ayinza okugyambulamu ekyambalo kyayo ekyokungulu? Ani afumita n'ayita mu ddiba lyayo ery'embu ebbiri? 
Job41:14 Ani ayinza okwasamya akamwa kaayo? Amannyo gaayo nga ga ntiisa! 
Job41:15 Amagalagamba gaayo ag'amaanyi ge gagyewuliza. Gasibaganye ganywezeddwa akabonero ng'ak'envumbo. 
Job41:16 Erimu liriraana linnaalyo, ne watasigala kaagaanya wadde n'empewo eyitemu." 
Job41:17 Geegasse ne gakwatagana, tegayinza kwawulibwa." 
Job41:18 Bw'ekuba emyasi, givaamu ekitangaala. Amaaso gaayo gamyuka nga njuba evaayo." 
Job41:19 Akamwa kaayo kavaamu mimuli egyaka. Kabuukamu nsasi ez'omuliro. 
Job41:20 Ennyindo yaayo evaamu omukka ng'oguva mu ntamu etokota, ne mu kisaalu ekyaka." 
Job41:21 Omukka gw'essa gukuma amanda, ennimi ez'omuliro ne ziva mu kamwa kaayo." 
Job41:22 Erimu amaanyi mu nsingo. Etiisa n'ekankanya buli agyaŋŋanga. 
Job41:23 Enfunyiro z'ennyama yaayo zeekutte zigyerippyeko awatali kusagaasagana. 
Job41:24 Omutima gwayo gwakula nga jjinja; ddala mugumu nga lubengo. 
Job41:25 Bw'egira eti n'esituka, wadde balubaale batya! Beekanga ne babulwa eky'okukola." 
Job41:26 Agisimbako ekitala, tagireetako kamogo. Effumu n'omuwunda wadde akasaale, bya bwereere!" 
Job41:27 Eby'ekyuma ebibala nga bisasiro; eby'ekikomo, miti gya mpumbu." 
Job41:28 Toyinza kugigobesaawo kasaale. Amayinja g'envuumuulo gaba nga bisusunku ku yo. 
Job41:29 Embuukuuli z'emiggo nazo ku yo bisusunku. Esekerera amafumu ge bakasuka okugifumita. 
Job41:30 Amagalagamba g'oku lubuto lwayo gali ng'enzigyo ez'obwogi. Bwe yeekulula mu bitosi eba ng'ebiwuula eŋŋaano eby'ekyuma. 
Job41:31 Bw'eyingira amazzi, esiikuula ennyanja n'eba ng'entamu etokota, era ng'akasaka omweserera omuzigo." 
Job41:32 Amazzi mw'eyise, erekamu ekkubo ly'amayengo ameeru. N'erowoozesa n'oli, obuziba okuba n'envi." 
Job41:33 Tewali kigyenkana ku nsi. Yatondebwa teriimu kutya. 
Job41:34 Eziimuula buli kisolo ekyepansi; Ye kabaka w'ensolo zonna.” 
Job42:1 Awo Yobu n'addamu Mukama ng'agamba nti: 
Job42:2 “Mmanyi ng'oyinza byonna. Era ky'oba osazeewo okukola, tewali kikiziyiza." 
Job42:3 Obuuzizza nti: ‘Ono ani aziyiza entegeka zo okutegeerekeka, ng'ayogeza obutamanya?’ Ddala nayogedde ku bintu bye sitegeera, ebimpitiriddeko, ebyannemye okumanya." 
Job42:4 Oŋŋambye nti: ‘Wuliriza njogere Nkubuuze ebibuuzo onziremu.’ 
Job42:5 Nawuliranga buwulizi bye bakwogerako, Naye kaakano nkwerabiddeko n'agange." 
Job42:6 N'olwekyo nneemenye ne nneenenya mu nfuufu n'evvu.” 
Job42:7 Awo Mukama bwe yamala okwogera ne Yobu ebigambo ebyo, n'agamba Elifaazi Omutemani nti: “Nkusunguwalidde nnyo ggwe ne banno bombi, kubanga temunjogeddeeko bituufu ng'omuweereza wange Yobu bw'ayogedde." 
Job42:8 Kale kaakano mutwale ente ennume musanvu, n'endiga ennume musanvu eri omuweereza wange Yobu, muweeyo ku lwammwe ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa. Omuweereza wange Yobu abasabire. Oyo gwe nnakkiriza, nneme kubakolako mmwe, ng'obusirusiru bwammwe bwe busaanira, kubanga temunjogeddeeko bituufu ng'omuweereza wange Yobu by'ayogedde.”" 
Job42:9 Awo Elifaazi Omutemani, ne Biludaadi Omusuuhi, ne Zefari Omunaamati ne bagenda, ne bakola nga Mukama bw'alagidde. Mukama n'akkiriza Yobu bye yabasabira." 
Job42:10 Awo Yobu bwe yamala okusabira mikwano gye, Mukama n'amuddizaawo obugagga bwe, era n'amuwa bungi emirundi ebiri okusinga bwe yalina olubereberye." 
Job42:11 Awo baganda ba Yobu bonna ne bannyina, ne bajja, ne baliira wamu naye ekijjulo mu nnyumba ye. Ne bamukubagiza olw'ebizibu byonna, Mukama bye yamutuusaako. Buli omu ku bo n'amuleetera ekitundu kya ffeeza n'empeta eya zaabu." 
Job42:12 Mukama n'awa Yobu omukisa mu kiseera ky'obulamu bwe ekyasembayo, okusinga ne mu kyasooka. Yobu n'aba n'endiga omutwalo gumu mu enkumi nnya, n'eŋŋamiya kakaaga, n'emigongo gy'ente lukumi egikola emirimu, n'endogoyi enkazi lukumi." 
Job42:13 Era yalina abaana ab'obulenzi musanvu n'ab'obuwala basatu. 
Job42:14 Omuwala asooka n'amutuuma Yemima, owookubiri erinnya lye Keziya, n'owookusatu erinnya lye Kereni Happuki." 
Job42:15 Mu nsi yonna tewaali bakazi balungi babalagavu nga bawala ba Yobu. Kitaabwe n'abawa omugabo gw'obusika, awamu ne bannyinaabwe." 
Job42:16 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yobu n'awangaala emyaka kikumi mu ana, n'alaba abaana be n'abazzukulu, okutuuka ku bannakasatwe." 
Job42:17 N'oluvannyuma Yobu n'afa nga musajja mukadde, ow'emyaka emingi ddala." 
Psalms1:1 Wa mukisa oyo atakolera ku magezi ga babi oba okukwata ekkubo ly'aboonoonyi, wadde okutuula awamu n'abanyoomi." 
Psalms1:2 Wabula amateeka ga Katonda ge gamusanyusa, era g'alowoozaako emisana n'ekiro." 
Psalms1:3 Afaanaanyirizibwa n'omuti ogwasimbibwa okumpi n'ensulo z'amazzi, ogubala ebibala mu kiseera kyabyo, era ogutawotoka makoola. Mu buli ky'akola aba wa mukisa." 
Psalms1:4 Naye ababi si bwe bali. Bafaanaanyirizibwa n'ebisusunku ebifuumuulibwa embuyaga. 
Psalms1:5 Ababi abo kyebaliva balemwa okugumira olunaku olw'okusalirwako omusango, wadde okwetaba awamu n'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms1:6 Kubanga Mukama aluŋŋamya abatuukirivu. Naye ababi balizikirira. 
Psalms2:1 Lwaki amawanga geegugunga, n'abantu ne balowooza ebitaliimu?" 
Psalms2:2 Bakabaka b'ensi baateekateeka, n'abafuzi bateeseza wamu okulwanyisa Mukama n'omusiige we" 
Psalms2:3 nga bagamba nti: “Ka tukutule enjegere zaabwe, tweggyeko ekikoligo kyabwe.”" 
Psalms2:4 Mukama ng'ali waggulu abasunga era abasekerera. 
Psalms2:5 Olwo n'abagamba ng'asunguwadde, n'abatiisa ng'aswakidde nti:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu Siyooni, nateekako kabaka.”" 
Psalms2:7 “Nja kulangirira ekiragiro kya Mukama. Mukama yagamba nti: ‘Oli mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzadde." 
Psalms2:8 Nsaba, nze ndikuwa amawanga gonna n'ensi yonna, bibe bibyo." 
Psalms2:9 Olibimenya n'omuggo ogw'ekikomo, olibyasaayasa ng'entamu y'omubumbi.’ ”" 
Psalms2:10 Kale kaakano bakabaka mugeziwale, abafuzi b'ensi muyige." 
Psalms2:11 Muweereze Mukama nga mutya. Mumusseemu ekitiibwa nga mukankana," 
Psalms2:12 sikulwa ng'asunguwala ne muzikirira. Obusungu bwe tebulwa kusituka. Ba mukisa abo bonna abamweyuna. 
Psalms3:1 Ayi Mukama, abalabe bange nga beeyongedde obungi! Bangi abasituka okunnumba." 
Psalms3:2 Bangi abanjogerako nti: “Katonda taamuyambe.” 
Psalms3:3 Naye ayi Mukama, ggwe ngabo enkuuma. Ggwe nneenyumiririzaamu, ggwe ompanirira." 
Psalms3:4 Nkoowoola Mukama, n'anziramu ng'asinziira ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms3:5 Ngalamira ne neebaka, ne nzuukuka, kubanga Mukama ankuuma." 
Psalms3:6 Sitya nkumi na nkumi z'abalabe abanneetooloola okunnumba. 
Psalms3:7 Ayi Mukama, jjangu ondokole, ayi Katonda wange! Ggwe okuba abalabe bange empi ku ttama, n'omenya amannyo g'aboonoonyi." 
Psalms3:8 Mukama, era ggwe olokola, n'owa abantu bo omukisa." 
Psalms4:1 Ayi Katonda, ggwe onnyamba, bwe nkukoowoola onziramu. Kati nkwatirwa ekisa, owulire kye nsaba." 
Psalms4:2 Mmwe abantu mulituusa wa okumpeebuula? Mulituusa wa okwagala ebitaliimu, n'okukolera ku by'obulimba?" 
Psalms4:3 Mumanye nti Mukama abamwagala abalonze okuba ababe. Mukama bwe mmukoowoola, ampulira." 
Psalms4:4 Mmwe mutye, mulekere awo okwonoona. Musiriikirire mulowooze nga mwebase mu bitanda byammwe." 
Psalms4:5 Muweeyo ebitambiro ebisaanira, era mwesige Mukama." 
Psalms4:6 Bangi abagamba nti: “Ani alitulaga ebirungi? Tutunuulize ekisa, ayi Mukama.”" 
Psalms4:7 Ompadde essanyu eritafunibwa balala mu kyengera ky'emmere n'omwenge. 
Psalms4:8 Ngalamira ne neebaka mirembe, kubanga, ayi Mukama, ggwe onkuuma ne sitya." 
Psalms5:1 Wulira bye ŋŋamba, ayi Mukama, tegereza omulanga gwange." 
Psalms5:2 Wulira okwegayirira kwange, ggwe Kabaka wange era Katonda wange." 
Psalms5:3 Ku makya owulira eddoboozi lyange. Enjuba ng'evaayo nkusaba, ne nnindirira ky'ononziramu." 
Psalms5:4 Ggwe Katonda atasanyukira bikolwa bibi, akola ekibi tabeera naawe." 
Psalms5:5 Abeenyumiriza tobakkiriza mu maaso go, okyawa bonna abakola ebibi." 
Psalms5:6 Ozikiriza aboogera eby'obulimba; abatta abantu era n'ab'enkwe, Mukama obakyayira ddala." 
Psalms5:7 Naye nze, olw'ekisa kyo ekingi, nnaayingiranga mu nnyumba yo. Nnaasinzizanga mu Ssinzizo lyo ettukuvu, ne nkussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms5:8 Ayi Mukama, nnuŋŋamya nkolenga ky'oyagala, kubanga nnina abampalana bangi. Ndaga bulungi ekkubo lyo lye mba nkwata." 
Psalms5:9 Abalabe bange bye boogera tebyesigibwa, ekibali ku mutima kwe kukola ebibi. Emimiro gyabwe ye ntaana eyasaamiridde, boogera bya kuwaanawaana." 
Psalms5:10 Ayi Katonda, basalire omusango okubasinga. Bo bennyini be baba bagwa mu mitego gyabwe. Bagobe mu maaso go olw'ebibi byabwe ebingi, kubanga bakujeemedde ggwe." 
Psalms5:11 Naye bonna abakwesiga basanyuke, bayimbenga n'essanyu bulijjo, kubanga ggwe obakuuma. N'abakwagala basanyukirenga mu ggwe," 
Psalms5:12 kubanga, ayi Mukama, owa omukisa abakola by'oyagala. Ekisa kyo kibakuuma ng'engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Ayi Mukama, tonnenya ng'osunguwadde, era tombonereza ng'okambuwadde." 
Psalms6:2 Nsaasira ayi Mukama, kubanga amaanyi gampweddemu. Ayi Mukama, mponya, kubanga amagumba gankubagana." 
Psalms6:3 Omwoyo gwange gweraliikiridde nnyo. Naye ayi Mukama, olimala bbanga ki nga tonnannyamba?" 
Psalms6:4 Komawo ayi Mukama, ondokole, omponye olw'ekisa kyo," 
Psalms6:5 kubanga abafu tebakujjukira. Ani alikutenderereza emagombe? 
Psalms6:6 Okusinda kunkooyezza. Buli kiro nkaaba amaziga nga ndi ku kitanda kyange, obuliri bwange ne mbutobya n'amaziga." 
Psalms6:7 Amaaso gange gakutteko ekifu olw'obuyinike. Gankambagga olw'abalabe bange bonna bankaabya. 
Psalms6:8 Muve we ndi mwenna abakola ebibi, kubanga Mukama awulidde okukaaba kwange." 
Psalms6:9 Mukama awulidde okwegayirira kwange, akkirizza okumpa kye mmusaba." 
Psalms6:10 Abalabe bange bonna baliswala era balisoberwa, balivaawo mangu nga baswadde!" 
Psalms7:1 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nzirukira gy'oli. Ndokola era mponya bonna abanjigganya," 
Psalms7:2 baleme kuntaagula ng'empologoma, ne nkavvulwa nga tewali anamponya." 
Psalms7:3 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, oba nga nakola ekintu nga kino: nga nayonoona," 
Psalms7:4 oba nga nakola mukwano gwange ekintu ekibi, wadde okulumya omulabe wange awatali nsonga," 
Psalms7:5 kale omulabe anjigganye era ankwate, ansambajjire wansi ku ttaka era anzite, andeke nga ngalamidde mu nfuufu." 
Psalms7:6 Ayi Mukama, situka n'obusungu weesimbewo, olwanyise abalabe bange abakambwe. Golokoka ayi Mukama, ggwe eyalagira wabeewo obwenkanya." 
Psalms7:7 Abantu bonna bakuŋŋaane era bakwetooloole, obafuge ng'oli waggulu." 
Psalms7:8 Ayi Mukama, asalira abantu bonna omusango, sala omusango gwange nsinge, kubanga omanyi bwe siriiko musango." 
Psalms7:9 Ggwe Katonda omutuukirivu akebera emitima n'ebirowoozo, malawo ettima ly'ababi, onyweze abatuukirivu." 
Psalms7:10 Katonda ye ngabo mwe nneewogoma, alokola ab'omutima omulongoofu." 
Psalms7:11 Katonda asala emisango mu bwenkanya, bulijjo asunguwalira ababi." 
Psalms7:12 Bwe batakyuka ne beenenya, ajja kuwagala ekiso kye. Aleeze omutego gwe ogw'obusaale okulasa." 
Psalms7:13 Ategese ebissi ebiribatta, ayengerezza obusaale bwe." 
Psalms7:14 Laba omubi bw'alowooza okukola ekibi! Ajjudde ettima, era ayogera eby'obulimba." 
Psalms7:15 Obunnya bw'asima n'awuukuula, ye abugwamu yennyini." 
Psalms7:16 Ettima lye limuddira, n'obukambwe bwe bulumya ye yennyini." 
Psalms7:17 Nneebazanga Mukama kubanga mwenkanya, nnaayimbanga okutendereza Mukama Atenkanika." 
Psalms8:1 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga kkulu nnyo mu nsi yonna! Ettendo lyo lituuka ne ku ggulu." 
Psalms8:2 Liyimbibwa abaana abato n'abayonka. Wazimba ekigo okwetaasa abalabe bo n'okwegobako buli akulwanyisa. 
Psalms8:3 Bwe ntunuulira eggulu lye wakola, n'omwezi n'emmunyeenye bye wateekawo," 
Psalms8:4 ne nneebuuza nti, omuntu ataliiko bw'ali, lwaki omulowoozaako? Era omuntu obuntu, lwaki omulumirwa?" 
Psalms8:5 Wamukola, n'abulako katono okwenkana ggwe Katonda. Wamutikkira engule eyeekitiibwa n'ettendo." 
Psalms8:6 Wamuwa okufuga ebintu byonna bye wakola. Ebintu byonna wabiteeka mu buyinza bwe: 
Psalms8:7 endiga zonna n'ente, era n'ebisolo eby'omu ttale," 
Psalms8:8 ebinyonyi n'ebyennyanja, n'ebitonde ebirala ebiri mu nnyanja." 
Psalms8:9 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga kkulu nnyo mu nsi zonna!" 
Psalms9:1 Ayi Mukama, nnaakwebazanga n'omutima gwange gwonna, nnaatendanga byonna by'okola ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms9:2 Nnaasanyukanga ne njaguliza mu ggwe, nnaayimbanga okukutendereza ggwe Atenkanika." 
Psalms9:3 Bw'olabika, abalabe bange badda emabega, ne bagwa ne bazirika," 
Psalms9:4 kubanga wayingira mu nsonga zange, n'osala omusango mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms9:5 Waboggolera abantu ab'ensi, n'ozikiriza ababi: tebakyaddayo kujjukirwa." 
Psalms9:6 Abalabe baffe baggweerawo ddala. Ebibuga byabwe wabizikiriza, ne beerabirirwa ddala." 
Psalms9:7 Naye Mukama ye Kabaka emirembe gyonna, yateekawo entebe ye kw'asalira emisango." 
Psalms9:8 Alamula ensi zonna mu bwenkanya, asalira amawanga gonna omusango mu mazima." 
Psalms9:9 Mukama kye kiddukiro ky'abanyigirizibwa, ekiddukiro mu biseera eby'obuyinike." 
Psalms9:10 Abakumanyi banaakwesiganga, ayi Mukama, kubanga abajja gy'oli tobaabulira." 
Psalms9:11 Muyimbe okutendereza Mukama abeera mu Siyooni, mubuulire abantu bonna by'akola," 
Psalms9:12 kubanga Katonda ajjukira ababonaabona, teyeerabira kukaaba kwabwe, era abonereza abababonyaabonya." 
Psalms9:13 Nkwatirwa ekisa, ayi Mukama! Laba abankyaye bwe bambonyaabonya. Mponya okugenda e Magombe" 
Psalms9:14 ndyoke nnangirire ettendo lyo eri abantu ab'omu Siyooni, nsanyuke kubanga ondokodde." 
Psalms9:15 Abantu ab'ensi bagudde mu bunnya bwe baasima, bakwatiddwa mu mutego gwe baatega." 
Psalms9:16 Mukama yeeragidde mu ngeri gy'asalamu emisango, ababi bakwatiddwa mu ebyo, bo bennyini bye baakola." 
Psalms9:17 Ababi n'abo bonna abeerabira Katonda, ba kugenda emagombe." 
Psalms9:18 Abaavu tebeerabirwenga mirembe gyonna, abanaku tebasuubirira bwereere ennaku zonna." 
Psalms9:19 Jjangu ayi Mukama, tokkiriza bantu kukunyooma. Abantu ab'ensi baleetebwe mu maaso go basalirwe omusango." 
Psalms9:20 Ggwe batiise ayi Mukama, bamanye nti bantu buntu." 
Psalms10:1 Lwaki ayi Mukama, oyimirira ewala? Lwaki weekwese mu biseera eby'obuyinike?" 
Psalms10:2 Ababi beekulumbaza ne bayigganya abaavu, ne babakwasa mu mitego gye bateze." 
Psalms10:3 Omubi yeewaana olw'okwegomba kwe okubi, ow'omululu yeegaana Mukama era amunyooma." 
Psalms10:4 Omubi yeekulumbaza n'agamba nti: “Mukama talinvunaana.” Alowooza nti Katonda taliiwo. 
Psalms10:5 Buli ky'akola kimugendera bulungi. Ennamula yo emusukkiridde, tagitegeera. Abalabe be abanyooma." 
Psalms10:6 Agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Sirisagaasagana. Siribonaabona emirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms10:7 By'ayogera bijjudde okukolima, n'obulimba era n'obukambwe. Ayanguyira okwogera eby'ettima n'eby'enkwe." 
Psalms10:8 Yeekweka n'atuula ng'ateeze ku byalo, n'attira mu bunyomero abantu abatalina musango. Aliimisa alabe abateeyinza." 
Psalms10:9 Yeekweka n'ateega ng'empologoma mu mpuku yaayo. Akwata omwavu n'amutwala ng'amuwalulira mu kitimba kye. 
Psalms10:10 Akutama n'akootakoota ku ttaka, n'avumbagira abanafu n'amaanyi ge gonna," 
Psalms10:11 n'agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Katonda yeerabidde, yeebisse ku maaso, tagenda kukiraba.”" 
Psalms10:12 Ayi Mukama Katonda, jjukira abanaku, obayambe." 
Psalms10:13 Lwaki omubi anyooma Katonda, n'agamba mu mutima gwe nti: “Tajja kunvunaana”?" 
Psalms10:14 Naye ggwe olaba; otunuulira ettima n'obukyayi, nga weetegese okuyamba. Ateesobola yeeteeka mu mikono gyo, bulijjo bamulekwa ggwe obayamba." 
Psalms10:15 Omubi era omwonoonyi mumale amaanyi, omalirewo ddala ebibi bye." 
Psalms10:16 Mukama ye Kabaka emirembe gyonna. Ab'amawanga agatamusinza ba kuzikirira mu nsi ye. 
Psalms10:17 Ayi Mukama, owulira abanaku bye bakusaba, ogumya emitima gyabwe." 
Psalms10:18 Onoowulirizanga bamulekwa n'abajoonyesebwa, olyoke obasalire omusango basinge, abantu obuntu balemenga kubatiisatiisa." 
Psalms11:1 Mukama gwe neesiga, ye ankuuma, muyinza mutya okuŋŋamba nti: “Buuka ng'akanyonyi olage mu nsozi?”" 
Psalms11:2 Kubanga ababi baabano baleeze emitego, obusaale babutadde ku buguwa, balasize mu nzikiza abalina omutima omulongoofu." 
Psalms11:3 Oba nga buli kintu kizikirizibwa, kiki omuntu omulungi ky'ayinza okukola?" 
Psalms11:4 Mukama ali mu Ssinzizo lye ettukuvu, entebe ye eri mu ggulu. Atunuulidde abantu bonna, era yeetegereza bye bakola." 
Psalms11:5 Mukama yekkaanya abalungi n'ababi. Akyayira ddala abaagala eby'obunyazi. 
Psalms11:6 Ababi abayiwako amanda g'omuliro n'obuganga, ababonereza n'empewo eyokya ennyo," 
Psalms11:7 kubanga Mukama mutuukirivu, ayagala ebikolwa ebirungi. Ababikola balibeera mu maaso ge." 
Psalms12:1 Ayi Mukama tuyambe, kubanga abalungi baweddewo, amazima gawedde mu bantu." 
Psalms12:2 Balimbagana ne bawaanagana, boogera kino nga bategeeza kirala." 
Psalms12:3 Ayi Mukama, sirisa aboogera ebiwaanawaana, ggala akamwa k'abo abeetenda, abagamba nti:" 
Psalms12:4 “Olulimi lwaffe ge maanyi gaffe, tujja kwogera buli kye twagala. Ani ayinza okutuziyiza?”" 
Psalms12:5 Mukama agamba nti: “Kubanga abaavu banyagibwako ebyabwe, n'abayigganyizibwa basinda, nja kusituka mbakuume nga bwe beegomba.”" 
Psalms12:6 Mukama by'asuubiza bya mazima, biri nga ffeeza ayooyooteddwa mu kyoto ky'omuliro, n'atukuzibwa emirundi musanvu." 
Psalms12:7 Ayi Mukama, tukuumenga bulijjo, otuwonye ababi ab'omulembe guno." 
Psalms12:8 Ababi babunye buli wantu, ekibi kye kitendebwa mu bantu!" 
Psalms13:1 Olinneerabira kutuusa ddi, ayi Mukama? Olinneekweka emirembe gyonna?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndituusa wa okweraliikiriranga, n'okuwulira mu mutima obuyinike olunaku lwonna? Omulabe wange alituusa wa okunninnyako?" 
Psalms13:3 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ntunuulira onziremu. Nzizaamu amaanyi, nneme kufa." 
Psalms13:4 Omulabe wange aleme okugamba nti: “Mmuwangudde.” Abankyawa baleme kujaganya nga nterebuse. 
Psalms13:5 Naye nze neesiga ekisa kyo, nnaasanyukanga kubanga olindokola." 
Psalms13:6 Nnaayimbiranga Mukama, kubanga ankoledde ebirungi bingi." 
Psalms14:1 Abasirusiru bagamba mu mitima gyabwe nti: “Tewali Katonda.” Boonoonese, bakoze ebibi ebyenyinyalwa, tewali n'omu akola kirungi." 
Psalms14:2 Mukama asinziira mu ggulu, n'atunuulira abantu, alabe oba nga waliwo abategeera, oba nga waliwo abanoonya Katonda." 
Psalms14:3 Naye bonna bawabye, bonna be bamu: boonoonyi. Tewali n'omu akola kirungi, wadde omu bw'ati." 
Psalms14:4 Bonna abakola ebibi, tebalina magezi? Bakavvula abantu bange ng'abalya emmere, era tebasinza Mukama." 
Psalms14:5 Naye balitya nnyo, kubanga Katonda ali wamu n'abatuukirivu." 
Psalms14:6 Ababi balemesa omwavu okutuukiriza by'ateesa, naye Katonda kye kiddukiro kye." 
Psalms14:7 Singa nno oyo aliwonya Yisirayeli alisibuka mu Siyooni! Mukama bw'alizzaawo embeera ennungi mu bantu be, aba Yakobo balisanyuka, Abayisirayeli balijaguza." 
Psalms15:1 Ayi Mukama, ani anaabeeranga mu weema yo? Ani anaabeeranga ku lusozi lwo olutukuvu?" 
Psalms15:2 Ye oyo awulira Katonda mu byonna, era akola ebituufu bulijjo. Ye oyo ayogera eby'amazima omutali bukuusa," 
Psalms15:3 era atawaayiriza. Ye oyo atakolako banne kabi, era atasaasaanya ŋŋambo ku baliraanwa be." 
Psalms15:4 Ye oyo anyooma abo abatasiimibwa Katonda, naye assaamu ekitiibwa abo abawulira Mukama. Ye oyo atuukiriza ky'asuubizza ne bwe kimufiiriza." 
Psalms15:5 Ye oyo awola nga tagenderera kufuna magoba, era atagulirirwa kusaliriza atalina musango. Akola ebyo, anaabeeranga munywevu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms16:1 Ayi Katonda, nkuuma, kubanga neesiga ggwe." 
Psalms16:2 Ŋŋamba Mukama nti: “Ggwe Mukama wange, sirina kirungi na kimu ggwe w'otoli.”" 
Psalms16:3 Nsanyukira nnyo abatukuvu, era be njagala okubeeranga nabo mu nsi." 
Psalms16:4 Abanoonyaayo Katonda omulala be beeyongerako bennyini okunakuwala. Sijja kwetaba nabo mu kutambira kwabwe, sijja kusinza balubaale baabwe." 
Psalms16:5 Ayi Mukama, ggwe nnonze, ggwe wange. Ebyange byonna biri mu ggwe." 
Psalms16:6 Ebintu byonna biŋŋendedde bulungi, omugabo gwange mulungi ddala." 
Psalms16:7 Neebaza Mukama ambuulirira, ate ekiro omutima gwange gundabula." 
Psalms16:8 Mmanyi nti Mukama ali nange bulijjo, andi kumpi, sijja kusagaasagana." 
Psalms16:9 Kyenva nsanyuka ne njaguza, nzenna ne mbeera mirembe," 
Psalms16:10 kubanga tolindeka magombe, era toliganya mutukuvu wo kuvunda." 
Psalms16:11 Olindaga ekkubo erituusa mu bulamu. Njijula essanyu okubeera w'oli. Mu mukono gwo ogwa ddyo mwe muli ebisanyusa emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms17:1 Ayi Mukama, wulira okuwoza kwange okw'amazima, tega okutu owulirize bye nkusaba, nga sirina bukuusa." 
Psalms17:2 Ggwe oba osala omusango ngusinge, kubanga ggwe olaba ekituufu." 
Psalms17:3 Omanyi ekiri mu mutima gwange, ne bw'ojja gye ndi ekiro n'ongeza, tojja kunsangamu kabi. Sirina kibi kye njogera," 
Psalms17:4 ng'abangi bwe bakola. Mpulira ebiragiro byo, ne neewala amakubo g'abanyazi." 
Psalms17:5 Bulijjo ntambulira mu kkubo lye wandaga, sirivaamu n'akatono." 
Psalms17:6 Nkoowoola ggwe ayi Katonda, kubanga ggwe ononziramu. Tega okutu kwo, owulire bye ŋŋamba." 
Psalms17:7 Laga ekisa kyo ekyewuunyisa, ggwe alokola abaddukira gy'oli okuwona abalabe baabwe." 
Psalms17:8 Nkuuma nga bw'okuuma emmunye y'eriiso lyo, nkweka mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo," 
Psalms17:9 omponye ababi abannyaga, abalabe bange abanzingiza okunzita." 
Psalms17:10 Tebalina kisa era beewaanawaana. 
Psalms17:11 Kaakano banzingizizza buli gye nzira, bandabiriza amaaso, balyoke bankube wansi." 
Psalms17:12 Bali ng'empologoma eyaayaanira omuyiggo gwayo bali ng'empologoma ento eyeekweka n'eteega. 
Psalms17:13 Jjangu, ayi Mukama, olwanyise abalabe bange, obawangule. Mponya omubi ng'okozesa ekitala kyo." 
Psalms17:14 Ayi Mukama, mponya abantu abalowooleza mu kufuna ebintu eby'ensi. Embuto zaabwe ozijjuze bye wabateekerateekera, abaana baabwe bafune ebibamala, wafikkewo n'ebirimala abazzukulu." 
Psalms17:15 Naye nze ndikutunulako kubanga sazza musango. Era ndimatira bwe ndizuukuka ne nkulaba. 
Psalms18:1 Nkwagala ayi Mukama, ggwe maanyi gange." 
Psalms18:2 Mukama ye ankuuma, ye antaasa era ye andokola. Katonda wange kye kiddukiro kyange, ye antaasa ng'engabo, ye wa maanyi andokola n'ankuuma." 
Psalms18:3 Mukama asaanira okutenderezebwa: mmukoowoola n'amponya abalabe bange. 
Psalms18:4 Nali neetooloddwa akabi ak'okufa, amayengo ag'okunzikiriza ne ganjiikako." 
Psalms18:5 Emiguwa egy'emagombe gyanneetooloola, emitego gy'olumbe ne gintaayiza." 
Psalms18:6 Mu buyinike bwange nakoowoola Mukama, ne mpita Katonda wange okunnyamba. Yawulira eddoboozi lyange mu Ssinzizo lye, n'awuliriza bwe namusaba annyambe." 
Psalms18:7 Ensi yayuuguuma, n'ekankana. Emisingi gy'ensozi gyajugumira, ne ginyeenyezebwa, nga Katonda asunguwadde." 
Psalms18:8 Omukka gwanyooka mu nnyindo ze, omuliro ogusenkenya era n'amanda agaaka ne biva mu kamwa ke." 
Psalms18:9 Yakutamya eggulu n'akka, ekizikiza ekikutte ennyo nga kiri wansi w'ebigere bye." 
Psalms18:10 Yeebagala kerubi n'abuuka, n'agendera mangu ku biwaawaatiro by'embuyaga." 
Psalms18:11 Yeebikka ekizikiza, ne kimukweka. Ebire ebikutte, ebijjudde amazzi, ne bimwetooloola." 
Psalms18:12 Amayinja ag'omuzira n'amanda ag'omuliro byava ku kumyansa okuli mu maaso ge, ne biyita mu bire ebikutte." 
Psalms18:13 Mukama era yabwatuka mu ggulu, eddoboozi ly'Atenkanika ne liwulirwa. Ne wabaawo amayinja ag'omuzira, n'amanda ag'omuliro." 
Psalms18:14 Yalasa obusaale bwe, abalabe be n'abasaasaanya, n'abagoba n'okumyansa okungi." 
Psalms18:15 Bwe wakayukira abalabe bo, ayi Mukama, era bwe wababoggolera mu busungu bwo, entobo y'ennyanja n'erabika, n'emisingi ensi kw'enyweredde ne gyeyerula." 
Psalms18:16 Mukama yasinziira mu ggulu n'agolola omukono gwe n'ankwata, n'anzigya mu mazzi amangi." 
Psalms18:17 Yamponya abalabe bange ab'amaanyi, n'abo abankyawa, abansinza amaanyi." 
Psalms18:18 Bannumba nga ndi mu buzibu, naye Mukama ye yankuuma." 
Psalms18:19 Yantuusa mu kifo ekigazi, n'amponya kubanga yanjagala." 
Psalms18:20 Mukama yampa empeera, kubanga nakola ebirungi. Yampa omukisa, kubanga saalina musango," 
Psalms18:21 kubanga nawulira amateeka ga Mukama, ne siva ku Katonda wange nga nkola ekibi." 
Psalms18:22 Nakwata ebiragiro bye byonna, saajeemera mateeka ge." 
Psalms18:23 Era saalina musango mu maaso ge, nneekuuma ne sikola kibi." 
Psalms18:24 Mukama kyavudde ampa empeera, kubanga nkola ebirungi. Ampadde emikisa, kubanga sirina musango mu maaso ge." 
Psalms18:25 Oli mwesigwa eri abo abeesigwa, oli mutuukirivu eri abatuukirivu." 
Psalms18:26 Oli mulongoofu eri abalongoofu, naye oli mulabe eri ababi." 
Psalms18:27 Olokola abo abanyoomebwa, naye otoowaza abeekulumbaza." 
Psalms18:28 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, ompa ekitangaala, n'ongobako ekizikiza." 
Psalms18:29 Ggwe onnyamba okulumba eggye ly'abalabe bange. Ggwe ompa amaanyi okuwangula ekigo kyabwe. 
Psalms18:30 Katonda ono, ebikolwa bye byatuukirira, ebyo by'asuubiza byesigibwa. Ye ataasa bonna abamwesiga." 
Psalms18:31 Mukama ye Katonda yekka, era Katonda waffe, ye yekka atutaasa." 
Psalms18:32 Katonda ampa amaanyi, ye andagirira ekkubo eritaliimu kabi." 
Psalms18:33 Ebigere byange abinyweza okutambula ng'eby'empeewo. Ankuumira waggulu ku nsozi. 
Psalms18:34 Anjigiriza okulwana, ne nsobola okuleega omutego ogw'ekikomo." 
Psalms18:35 Ayi Mukama, onkuuma era ondokola. Ompaniridde. Era obukkakkamu bwo bungulumizizza." 
Psalms18:36 Ogaziyirizza ebigere byange ekkubo, siiseererenga kugwa." 
Psalms18:37 Ngoba abalabe bange ne mbakwata, sikomawo nga sinnabazikiriza." 
Psalms18:38 Mbakuba wansi ne batayinza kuyimukawo, bagwa wansi ne mbalinnyako." 
Psalms18:39 Ompa amaanyi okulwana, ne mpangula abannumba." 
Psalms18:40 Waleetera abalabe bange okunziruka, abo abankyawa nabazikiriza." 
Psalms18:41 Baakoowoola ow'okubayamba ne wataba abawonya. Baakoowoola Mukama, naye n'atabaddamu." 
Psalms18:42 Mbasekulasekula ne bafuuka ng'enfuufu etwalibwa empewo, ne mbalinnyirira ng'ebitosi eby'omu nguudo." 
Psalms18:43 Omponyezza okwegugunga kw'abantu, n'onfuula omufuzi w'amawanga. Abantu be saamanyanga balimpeereza." 
Psalms18:44 Ab'amawanga amalala balinfukaamirira, oluliwulira ebigambo byange baliŋŋondera." 
Psalms18:45 Baliggwaamu amaanyi, baliva mu bifo byabwe bye beekwekamu, ne bajja nga bakankana." 
Psalms18:46 Mukama mulamu! Ye antaasa, atenderezebwe! Era Katonda andokola agulumizibwe!" 
Psalms18:47 Ye Katonda ansobozesa okuwangula abalabe bange, n'awangula amawanga ngafuge," 
Psalms18:48 n'amponya abampalana. Ayi Mukama, onsobozesa okufufuggaza abalabe bange, omponya abantu abajjudde obukambwe." 
Psalms18:49 Kyennaavanga nkutenda mu mawanga, nnaayimbanga okukutendereza." 
Psalms18:50 Katonda gw'awadde obwakabaka amuwa obuwanguzi obw'amaanyi. Akwatirwa ekisa omusiige we Dawudi n'ezzadde lye emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms19:1 Eggulu liraga ekitiibwa kya Katonda, n'ebiri mu bbanga byoleka omulimu gwe." 
Psalms19:2 Buli lunaku oluggwaako lukibuulira oluddirira. N'ekiro ekiba kiggwaako kikimanyisa kinnaakyo. 
Psalms19:3 Tebirina bigambo wadde emboozi, eddoboozi lyabyo teriwulirwa." 
Psalms19:4 Naye obubaka bwabyo bubunye mu nsi yonna, n'amakulu gaabyo gatuuka gy'ekoma. Ku ggulu Katonda kwe yateeka ekisulo ky'enjuba," 
Psalms19:5 eri ng'awasa omugole, bw'ava mu nnyumba ye ng'asanyuka, era ng'eri ng'omusajja ow'amaanyi, n'etandika olugendo lwayo." 
Psalms19:6 Evaayo ku ludda olumu olw'eggulu, n'eryetooloola okutuuka ku ludda olulala. Tewali kyekweka bbugumu lyayo." 
Psalms19:7 Etteeka lya Mukama lyatuukirira, lizzaamu amaanyi. Mukama by'alagira byesigika, biwa abatamanyi amagezi." 
Psalms19:8 Okuyigiriza kwa Mukama kutuufu, kusanyusa omutima. Ekiragiro kya Mukama kitukuvu, kitangaaza amaaso." 
Psalms19:9 Okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa kulungi, kusigalawo emirembe n'emirembe. Ensala Mukama gy'asalamu emisango, ya mazima era ntuufu ddala." 
Psalms19:10 Ebyo bisaanye okuyaayanirwa okusinga zaabu akira obulungi. Biwoomerevu okusinga omubisi gw'enjuki n'ebisenge byagwo. 
Psalms19:11 Era ebyo bye birabula omuweereza wo. Okubikuuma kulimu empeera nnene. 
Psalms19:12 Naye ani ayinza okumanya ensobi ze? Nnaazaako ebibi ebikisiddwa. 
Psalms19:13 Nze omuweereza wo mponya okwekulumbaza kulemenga okunfuga. Bwe ntyo mbe nga siriiko kye nvunaanibwa, nga sirina musango munene." 
Psalms19:14 Siima ebigambo byange n'ebirowoozo byange ayi Mukama ekiddukiro kyange, era omununuzi wange." 
Psalms20:1 Mukama akuwe by'omusaba ng'oli mu buzibu. Katonda wa Yakobo akutaase. 
Psalms20:2 Akuyambe ng'asinziira mu kifo ekitukuvu, akubeere ng'asinziira mu Siyooni." 
Psalms20:3 Ajjukire bye wawaayo byonna, akkirize ebitambiro byo ebyokye." 
Psalms20:4 Akuwe bye weegomba, atuukirize byonna by'oteesa." 
Psalms20:5 Tuleekane olw'essanyu ng'owangudde, tuwanike ebbendera zaffe nga tutendereza Mukama. Mukama akuwe byonna by'osaba." 
Psalms20:6 Kaakano mmanyi nga Mukama ayamba omusiige we. Amuddamu ng'asinziira mu ggulu lye ettukuvu. Olw'obuyinza bwe, amusobozesa okuwangula." 
Psalms20:7 Abamu beesiga magaali, abalala beesiga mbalaasi. Naye ffe twesiga maanyi ga Mukama Katonda waffe." 
Psalms20:8 Abo balineguka ne bagwa, naye ffe tuligolokoka ne tuyimirira." 
Psalms20:9 Ayi Mukama, wa kabaka okuwangula. Otwanukule bwe tukoowoola." 
Psalms21:1 Kabaka asanyuka, ayi Mukama, kubanga omuwadde amaanyi. Asanyuka nnyo, kubanga omuyambye." 
Psalms21:2 Omuwadde bye yeegomba, tomummye ye yennyini ky'akusabye." 
Psalms21:3 Weewaawo ozze gy'ali n'emikisa emingi ddala, n'omutikkira ku mutwe engule ya zaabu amatendo." 
Psalms21:4 Yakusaba obulamu, n'omuwa okuwangaala emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms21:5 Ekitiibwa kye kinene olw'obuyinza bwo, wamuwa obukulu n'ettendo." 
Psalms21:6 Emikisa gyo giri naye emirembe gyonna, asanyuka kubanga ggwe wooli." 
Psalms21:7 Kabaka yeesiga Mukama, era olw'ekisa ky'oyo Atenkanika, ye taasagaasaganenga." 
Psalms21:8 Aliwamba abalabe be bonna, alikwata abamukyawa." 
Psalms21:9 Bw'alirabika, balikoleera ne baaka ng'omuliro gw'ekikoomi. Mukama alibasaanyaawo, n'omuliro gulibasenkenya." 
Psalms21:10 Abaana n'abazzukulu baabwe kabaka alibatta, n'abamalirawo ddala ku nsi." 
Psalms21:11 Ne bwe baliteesa okumukolako akabi, ne bwe balisala enkwe, tebalisobola," 
Psalms21:12 kubanga alibaleegamu obusaale mu maaso, ne bakyuka ne badduka." 
Psalms21:13 Ayi Mukama, ogulumizibwenga olw'amaanyi go, tunaayimbanga ne tutendereza obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms22:1 Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde? Lwaki onneesuula n'otonnyamba, era n'otowulira kukaaba kwange?" 
Psalms22:2 Ayi Katonda wange, nkoowoola emisana, n'otoddamu! N'ekiro nkoowoola, ne siwummula!" 
Psalms22:3 Naye ggwe mutuukirivu atuula ku ntebe yo, abantu ba Yisirayeli ne bakutendereza." 
Psalms22:4 Ye ggwe bajjajjaffe gwe beesiganga, baakwesiganga n'obawonya." 
Psalms22:5 Baakukoowoolanga ne bawona akabi, tebaakwesigiranga bwereere." 
Psalms22:6 Naye nze ndi lusiriŋŋanyi, siri muntu. Abantu bonna banvuma era bannyooma." 
Psalms22:7 Bonna abandaba bansekerera ne banduulira. Bandagamu emimwa, ne banyeenya n'emitwe nga bagamba nti:" 
Psalms22:8 “Yeesiga Mukama, kale Mukama amuwonye. Oba nga Mukama amwagala, kale amuyambe.”" 
Psalms22:9 Naye ggwe wanzigya mu nda ya mmange, ggwe wankuuma nga nkyayonka." 
Psalms22:10 Neesiga ggwe okuviira ddala lwe nazaalibwa, era okuva olwo ggwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms22:11 Tombeera wala, kubanga akabi kali kumpi, era tewali annyamba." 
Psalms22:12 Abalabe bangi banneetoolodde, bantaayizizza nga bali ng'ente endalu eza sseddume ez'omu nsi Basani." 
Psalms22:13 Banjasamiza akamwa kaabwe ng'empologoma etaamye, ewuluguma." 
Psalms22:14 Njiiseyiise ng'amazzi, n'amagumba gange gonna gasowose. Omutima gwange guli ng'envumbo: gusaanuukidde mu kifuba kyange." 
Psalms22:15 Amaanyi gange gakalidde ng'oluggyo, n'olulimi lwange lukwatidde ku kibuno kyange. Ondese nfiire mu nfuufu." 
Psalms22:16 Ekibinja ky'abakola ebibi kinneetoolodde, bali ng'embwa ezintaayizizza. Ebibatu n'ebigere byange babiwummudde." 
Psalms22:17 Amagumba gange gonna galabika, bantunuulira ne banvulumulira amaaso." 
Psalms22:18 Baagabana ebyambalo byange, olugoye lwange ne balukubira akalulu." 
Psalms22:19 Naye ggwe ayi Mukama, leka kumbeera wala. Ayi ggwe annyamba, yanguwa okunziruukirira." 
Psalms22:20 Mponya ekitala, obulamu bwange buwonye embwa." 
Psalms22:21 Mponya empologoma, nze ateeyamba mponya embogo." 
Psalms22:22 Ndikumanyisa mu baganda bange, ndikutenderereza mu kkuŋŋaaniro wakati." 
Psalms22:23 Mmwe abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa mumutendereze, bazzukulu ba Yakobo mwenna, mugulumize Mukama, abantu ba Yisirayeli mwenna, mumusseemu ekitiibwa;" 
Psalms22:24 kubanga teyanyooma munaku, oba obutamufaako mu buyinike bwe, wadde okumukuba amabega." 
Psalms22:25 Ggwe ompeesa ettendo nga ndi mu kibiina ekinene. Bye neeyama nja kubituukiriza mu maaso g'abakussaamu ekitiibwa. 
Psalms22:26 Abaavu balirya ne bakkuta, abanoonya Mukama balimutendereza, babeerenga balamu bulijjo." 
Psalms22:27 Amawanga gonna galijjukira Mukama, abantu ab'omu nsi zonna balimusinza," 
Psalms22:28 kubanga Mukama ye kabaka, ye afuga amawanga." 
Psalms22:29 Bonna abeekulumbaza balimuvuunamira, n'abo bonna ab'okudda mu nfuufu balimufukaamirira." 
Psalms22:30 Abaana abalizaalibwa balimuweereza, abantu balitegeeza ab'omulembe ogujja ebifa ku Mukama." 
Psalms22:31 Abantu abatannazaalibwa balibuulirwa nti: “Mukama yalokola abantu be.” 
Psalms23:1 Mukama ye annunda, siriiko kye njula." 
Psalms23:2 Andeka ne ngalamira mu malundiro ag'omuddo omuto. Antwala awali amazzi amateefu. 
Psalms23:3 Anzizaamu amaanyi, annuŋŋamya mu makubo amatuufu nga bwe yasuubiza." 
Psalms23:4 Ne bwe ntambulira mu kiwonvu ekikutte ekizikiza, sirina kabi ke ntya, kubanga ggwe oli nange. Oluga lwo n'omuggo gwo bye binkuuma." 
Psalms23:5 Onteekerateekera olujjuliro ng'abalabe bange batunula. Onsiize omuzigo ku mutwe, ekikopo kyange kibooze." 
Psalms23:6 Ddala obulungi bwo n'ekisa kyo biriba nange obulamu bwange bwonna. Nnaabeeranga mu Nnyumba ya Mukama bulijjo. 
Psalms24:1 Ensi n'ebigirimu byonna bya Mukama, ensi yonna yiye era ne bonna abagiriko." 
Psalms24:2 Ye yagiteeka ku nnyanja, ye yaginyweza ku mazzi amangi." 
Psalms24:3 Ani alyambuka ku lusozi lwa Mukama? Era ani aliyimirira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu? 
Psalms24:4 Oyo akola ebirungi, era ow'omutima omulongoofu, ateemalira ku bitaliimu nsa, era atalayira bya bulimba." 
Psalms24:5 Mukama alimuwa omukisa, Katonda alimufuula mutuukirivu n'amulokola." 
Psalms24:6 Abali ng'oyo be bakunoonya, be baagala okukulaba, ayi Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Mugguleewo emiryango n'enzigi ez'edda, ziggulirwewo ddala, Kabaka oweekitiibwa ayingire." 
Psalms24:8 Kabaka oweekitiibwa ye ani? Ye Mukama ow'amaanyi n'obuyinza, Mukama omuzira mu lutalo." 
Psalms24:9 Mugguleewo emiryango, n'enzigi ez'edda ziggulirwewo ddala, Kabaka oweekitiibwa ayingire." 
Psalms24:10 Kabaka oweekitiibwa ye ani? Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye Kabaka oweekitiibwa. 
Psalms25:1 Ayi Mukama, nnyimusiza gy'oli omwoyo gwange." 
Psalms25:2 Ayi Katonda wange, ggwe neesiga, tondeka kuswala. Toleka balabe bange kunneewaanirako," 
Psalms25:3 kubanga abakwesiga tobaleka kuswala, wabula oleka abo abeetawaanyiza obwereere nga basala enkwe." 
Psalms25:4 Ndaga amakubo go, ayi Mukama, ndagirira empenda zo." 
Psalms25:5 Njigiriza, onnuŋŋamye mu mazima go, kubanga ggwe Katonda wange andokola, ggwe neesiga bulijjo." 
Psalms25:6 Ayi Mukama, jjukira ekisa kyo n'okwagala kwo, bye walaga okuva edda n'edda lyonna." 
Psalms25:7 Tojjukira bibi wadde ensobi, bye nakola mu buvubuka bwange. Naye mu kisa kyo jjukira nze, ayi ggwe Mukama omulungi." 
Psalms25:8 Mukama mulungi era wa mazima, aboonoonyi kyava abalaga ekkubo." 
Psalms25:9 Abeetoowaze abaluŋŋamya mu kusala emisango, era abayigiriza ky'ayagala bakole." 
Psalms25:10 Engeri Mukama gy'akwatamu abo abatuukiriza endagaano ye ne bye yalagira, ya kisa era ya bwesigwa." 
Psalms25:11 Kuuma kye wasuubiza, ayi Mukama, onsonyiwe ebibi byange kubanga binene." 
Psalms25:12 Omuntu assaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, Mukama gw'anaalaganga ekkubo ly'agwanira okukwata." 
Psalms25:13 Ye yennyini n'ab'ezzadde lye, balifuna ebirungi. Ensi eriba yaabwe." 
Psalms25:14 Mukama aba mukwano gw'abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa, era anaakakasanga endagaano gye yakola nabo." 
Psalms25:15 Amaaso gange gasimbye ku Mukama ennaku zonna, kubanga ye aggya ebigere byange mu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Ayi Mukama, kyukira gye ndi, onsaasire, kubanga nsigadde bwomu era mbonaabona." 
Psalms25:17 Obuyinike bweyongedde mu mutima gwange, nzigya mu bibonoobono byange." 
Psalms25:18 Lowooza ku bunaku bwange, ne ku kutegana kwange onsonyiwe ebibi byange byonna." 
Psalms25:19 Laba abalabe bange bwe benkana obungi, laba nga bwe bankyawa ennyo." 
Psalms25:20 Kuuma obulamu bwange era omponye, toŋŋanya kuswala, kubanga ggwe nneesiga." 
Psalms25:21 Obutuukirivu n'amazima binkuumenga, kubanga nneesiga ggwe." 
Psalms25:22 Ayi Katonda, nunula Yisirayeli mu bibonoobono bye byonna." 
Psalms26:1 Ayi Mukama, nsalira omusango nsinge, kubanga sirina kibi kye nakola, era nkwesiga awatali kubuusabuusa." 
Psalms26:2 Nkebera, ayi Mukama, ongeze, olabe omutima gwange n'amagezi gange," 
Psalms26:3 kubanga ekisa kyo kye kinnuŋŋamya, era obwesigwa bwo kwe ntambulira." 
Psalms26:4 Situula na bantu balimba, era seetaba na bakuusa." 
Psalms26:5 Nkyawa ekibiina ky'abakola ebibi, era sikkiriza kutuula na babi." 
Psalms26:6 Ayi Mukama, nnaaba mu ngalo okulaga bwe sirina musango, ne neetooloola alutaari yo," 
Psalms26:7 nga nnyimba oluyimba olw'okwebaza era nga njogera ku byamagero by'okola. 
Psalms26:8 Ayi Mukama, njagala ennyumba yo, n'ekifo omubeera ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms26:9 Tonsaanyaawo na boonoonyi, obulamu bwange tobuzikiririza wamu na batemu." 
Psalms26:10 Bo bakozi ba bibi era bulijjo balya enguzi. 
Psalms26:11 Naye nze nkola kye mmanyi nti kituufu. Nkwatirwa ekisa onnunule. 
Psalms26:12 Nnyimiridde watereevu, neebazanga Mukama mu kibiina ky'abantu." 
Psalms27:1 Mukama kye kitangaala kyange era ye Mulokozi wange, ani gwe nnaatya? Mukama ye akuuma obulamu bwange, ani anankankanya?" 
Psalms27:2 Abantu ababi bwe bannumba nga baagala okunzita, beesittala ne bagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Eggye eddamba ne bwe lisiisira okunnwanyisa, omutima gwange tegugenda kutya. Ne bwe nnumbibwa mu lutalo, nsigala ndi mugumu." 
Psalms27:4 Kye nsabye Mukama, era kye nnoonya, kiri kimu kyokka: obulamu bwange bwonna, ntunuulirenga obulungi bwe, era mmwebuuzengako mu Ssinzizo lye;" 
Psalms27:5 kubanga mu biseera eby'obuyinike alinkweka omumwe, alinteeka waggulu ku lwazi olwekusifu." 
Psalms27:6 Olwo ndiwangula abalabe bange abanneetoolodde. Ndiwaayo ebitambiro mu Ssinzizo lye, nga njaguza. Ndiyimba ne ntendereza Mukama." 
Psalms27:7 Ayi Mukama, wulira okukaaba kwange, nkwatirwa ekisa, onziremu." 
Psalms27:8 Bwe wagamba nti: “Munnoonye”, naddamu nti: “Ayi Mukama, Gwe gwe nnoonya!”" 
Psalms27:9 Tonneekweka. Nze omuweereza wo tongoba ng'osunguwadde. Ggwe muyambi wange, tonsuula, era tonjabulira, ayi Katonda Omulokozi wange!" 
Psalms27:10 Kitange ne mmange ne bwe banjabulira, Mukama anandabiriranga." 
Psalms27:11 Ayi Mukama, njigiriza ekkubo ly'oyagala nkwate, nkulembera mu kakubo akatereevu, kubanga nnina abalabe bangi." 
Psalms27:12 Tompaayo mu balabe bange, abannumba nga bampaayiriza, era nga bajjudde obukambwe." 
Psalms27:13 Mmanyi nti nja kulama, ndabe obulungi bwa Mukama mu bulamu buno." 
Psalms27:14 Weesige Mukama, ddamu amaanyi, ogume omwoyo. Ddala weesige Mukama." 
Psalms28:1 Ayi Mukama, Ggwe ontaasa, nkukoowoola, mpulira! Bw'ononsiriikirira, nja kuba ng'abo abakka emagombe!" 
Psalms28:2 Ayi Mukama wange, wulira okukaaba kwange nga nkusaba onnyambe, nga nnyimusa emikono gyange eri ekifo kyo ekitukuvu ennyo." 
Psalms28:3 Tontwalira mu boonoonyi, mu abo abakola ebibi, aboogera ne bannaabwe eby'emirembe, sso ng'obukyayi bwe buli mu mitima gyabwe." 
Psalms28:4 Ggwe babonereze olw'ebikolwa byabwe, ng'ogerera ku bibi bye bakola. Bawe empeera esaanira emirimu gyabwe." 
Psalms28:5 Mukama by'akola tebabifaako, alibamenyerawo ddala n'atabazzaawo." 
Psalms28:6 Mukama atenderezebwe kubanga awulidde bye mmusaba. 
Psalms28:7 Mukama ye ampa amaanyi, era ye antaasa, mmwesiga. Annyamba ne nsanyuka, nnyimba okumutendereza." 
Psalms28:8 Mukama ye awa abantu be amaanyi, ye ataasa n'awonya omusiige we." 
Psalms28:9 Lokola abantu bo be weefunira, era obawe omukisa. Ggwe oba obalabirira, obawanirirenga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms29:1 Mmwe ab'omu ggulu, mutendereze Mukama, waakitiibwa era muzira, mumutendereze." 
Psalms29:2 Mutendereze erinnya lye eryekitiibwa, mumusinze nga musaanidde mu kifo kye ekitukuvu." 
Psalms29:3 Eddoboozi lya Mukama liwulirwa ku mazzi, Katonda oweekitiibwa abwatuka, eddoboozi lye ne liwulirwa ku mazzi amangi." 
Psalms29:4 Eddoboozi lya Mukama lya maanyi, eddoboozi lya Mukama lyakitiibwa nnyo!" 
Psalms29:5 Eddoboozi lya Mukama limenya emivule, Mukama amenya emivule gy'omu Lebanooni." 
Psalms29:6 Ensozi z'omu Lebanooni azizinyisa ng'ennyana, n'Olusozi Siriyooni ne luzina ng'embogo ento." 
Psalms29:7 Eddoboozi lya Mukama livaamu ennimi ez'omuliro. 
Psalms29:8 Eddoboozi lya Mukama likankanya eddungu, Mukama akankanya eddungu ly'e Kadesi." 
Psalms29:9 Eddoboozi lya Mukama liyuuguumya emivule, likunkumulira ddala amakoola g'amabira." 
Psalms29:10 Mukama ye afuga omujjuzo gw'amazzi, afuga nga Kabaka emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms29:11 Mukama awa abantu be amaanyi, abawa omukisa n'emirembe." 
Psalms30:1 Nkugulumiza ayi Mukama, kubanga omponyezza, n'otoleka balabe bange kunneeyagalirako." 
Psalms30:2 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, nakukoowoola onnyambe, n'omponya." 
Psalms30:3 Ayi Mukama, wanzigya mu ntaana, wamponya okukka emagombe, n'onzizaamu obulamu." 
Psalms30:4 Mmwe abantu ba Katonda abeesigwa muyimbe nga mumutendereza, mumwebaze Omutuukirivu." 
Psalms30:5 Obusungu bwe buba bwa kaseera buseera, ekisa kye kya bulamu bwaffe bwonna. Amaziga agayiika mu kiro, gaddirirwa ssanyu mu makya." 
Psalms30:6 Bwe nali obulungi ne ŋŋamba nti: “Sirinyeenyezebwa n'akatono.” 
Psalms30:7 Mu kisa kyo, ayi Mukama, wali onnywezezza ng'olusozi. Naye bwe wanneekisa, ne neeraliikirira." 
Psalms30:8 Ayi Mukama, nkukoowoola, nkwegayirira onnyambe." 
Psalms30:9 Kale bwe nnaafa, onoogasibwa ki nga nzikiridde emagombe? Enfuufu eneekutenderezanga? Era eneekulangiriranga nga bw'oli omwesigwa?" 
Psalms30:10 Wulira, ayi Mukama onkwatirwe ekisa, ayi Mukama, onnyambe." 
Psalms30:11 Okunakuwala kwange okufudde kubiibya. Onzigyeko obuyinike n'onzijuza essanyu. 
Psalms30:12 N'olwekyo siisirikenga, nnaayimbanga okukutendereza. Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nnaakwebazanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms31:1 Ayi Mukama, nzirukira gy'oli, tondeka kuswala n'akatono. Ggwe omutuukirivu, ndokola." 
Psalms31:2 Ntegera okutu, yanguwa okumponya. Beera ekiddukiro kyange, onkuume. Nzibira, ondokole." 
Psalms31:3 Ddala ggwe kiddukiro kyange, ggwe onzibira. Nkuuma onkulembere, nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms31:4 Nzigya mu kitimba kye banteze, kubanga nzirukira gy'oli." 
Psalms31:5 Nkukwasizza omwoyo gwange, kubanga ondokodde, ayi Mukama. Ggwe Katonda omwesigwa." 
Psalms31:6 Okyawa abasinza ebitaliimu, naye nze nneesiga Mukama." 
Psalms31:7 Nnaasanyukanga ne njaguza olw'ekisa kyo, kubanga walaba okubonaabona kwange, n'omanya obuyinike bwange." 
Psalms31:8 Tewandeka kuwambibwa mulabe, wampa eddembe okutambula yonna gye njagala." 
Psalms31:9 Ayi Mukama, nkwatirwa ekisa, kubanga zinsanze! Amaaso gange gakooye olw'amaziga, nzigwereddemu ddala amaanyi," 
Psalms31:10 kubanga obulamu bwange mbumaze mu buyinike. Emyaka gyange ngiyiseemu mu kusinda. Amaanyi gampweddemu olw'obuyinike bwange, n'amagumba gange gennyini gakozze!" 
Psalms31:11 Abalabe bange bonna bangaya, baliraanwa bange banneenyinyala. Mikwano gyange bantya, bwe bandaba mu kkubo, banziruka." 
Psalms31:12 Nneerabiddwa ng'omufu, nfuuse ng'ekibya ekyatise." 
Psalms31:13 Mpulira bangi nga beegeya, entiisa enneetoolodde wonna. Bateeseza wamu ku nze, nga basala amagezi okunzita." 
Psalms31:14 Naye nze neesiga ggwe, ayi Mukama, ŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe Katonda wange.”" 
Psalms31:15 Obulamu bwange buli mu mikono gyo, ggwe nzigya mu mikono gy'abalabe bange, n'egy'abo abanjigganya." 
Psalms31:16 Ntunuuliza busaasizi nze omuweereza wo, ondokole olw'ekisa kyo." 
Psalms31:17 Ayi Mukama, tondeka kuswala, kubanga nkoowoola ggwe. Ababi be baba baswala, bawereekerezebwe mu kasirise emagombe." 
Psalms31:18 Buniza emimwa gy'abalimba abo, aboogera obubi ku batuukirivu bo." 
Psalms31:19 Ebirungi byo nga bingi bye waterekera abakussaamu ekitiibwa! Abantu bonna balaba by'okolera abakwesiga. 
Psalms31:20 Obakweka gy'oli, n'obawonya enkwe z'abantu. Obakuumira aweesiifu, ne bawona okuvumibwa." 
Psalms31:21 Mukama atenderezebwe, kubanga andaze ekisa kye ekingi, mu kibuga ekiriko ekigo." 
Psalms31:22 Mu kutya okungi nagamba nti: “Ngobeddwa mu maaso go!” Naye wawulira okwegayirira kwange, nga nkusaba onnyambe." 
Psalms31:23 Mwagale Mukama mmwe mwenna abantu be abeesigwa. Mukama akuuma abamwesiga, naye abeekulumbaza ababonereza nga bwe basaanidde." 
Psalms31:24 Mwenna abalina essuubi mu Mukama, mube ba maanyi, mugume omwoyo." 
Psalms32:1 Wa mukisa oyo asonyiyibwa ekyonoono kye, n'aggyibwako ekibi kye." 
Psalms32:2 Omuntu oyo wa mukisa, Mukama gw'abala nti talina kibi, era ataliimu bukuusa." 
Psalms32:3 Bwe nali nga nkyasirikidde ekibi kyange, naggweeramu ddala amaanyi olw'okukaaba olunaku lwonna," 
Psalms32:4 kubanga wambonerezanga emisana n'ekiro, amaanyi ne ganzigweramu ddala ng'amazzi bwe gakala mu kyeya." 
Psalms32:5 Olwo ne nkwatulira ekibi kyange, ne sikisa byonoono byange. Nagamba nti: “Ka njatulire Mukama ebyonoono byange.” Naawe n'onsonyiwa omusango gw'ekibi kyange." 
Psalms32:6 Buli muweereza wo kyanaavanga akwegayirira ng'ali mu biseera ebizibu. Ennaku ne bw'eryalaala ng'amazzi, terimutuukako." 
Psalms32:7 Ggwe kiddukiro kyange, olimponya obuyinike n'onzijuza essanyu olw'okulokolebwa." 
Psalms32:8 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndikuyigiriza ne nkulaga ekkubo ly'onookwatanga. Nnaakubuuliriranga, ne nkulabirira." 
Psalms32:9 Temuba ng'embalaasi wadde ennyumbu ezitalina magezi, z'oteekwa okufuga nga zisibiddwa ekyuma mu kamwa n'enkoba mu kifuba, ziryoke zisembere w'oli.”" 
Psalms32:10 Ababi ba kubonaabona nnyo; naye abeesiga Mukama, abakuuma n'ekisa kye." 
Psalms32:11 Mmwe abantu ba Katonda abeesigwa, musanyuke mujaguze olw'ebyo Mukama by'akola. Nammwe mwenna ab'omutima omulongoofu muleekaane olw'essanyu." 
Psalms33:1 Abatuukirivu mwenna musanyuke olw'ebyo Mukama by'akola, musanyuke mumutendereze mmwe ab'omutima omulongoofu." 
Psalms33:2 Mwebaze Mukama nga mumuyimbira ku nnanga, mumukubire entongooli ey'enkoba ekkumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mugikubise magezi n'obukugu, mumuyimbire oluyimba oluggya, nga muleekaana olw'essanyu." 
Psalms33:4 Mukama by'ayogera bya mazima, era by'akola byesigika." 
Psalms33:5 Ayagala obutuufu n'amazima, ensi yajjula okwagala kwe." 
Psalms33:6 Katonda yalagira, eggulu ne litondebwa, ebiririmu byonna byakolebwa na kigambo kye." 
Psalms33:7 Akuŋŋaanyiza amazzi mu nnyanja, ne gaba ng'agali mu nsuwa. Amazzi ag'ebuziba agateeka mu materekero." 
Psalms33:8 Ensi yonna etye Mukama, ab'oku nsi bonna bamusseemu ekitiibwa," 
Psalms33:9 kubanga yayogera ensi n'ebaawo, yalagira n'enywera." 
Psalms33:10 Mukama aggyawo ebyo amawanga bye gateesa, abantu abalemesa bye bamaliridde okukola." 
Psalms33:11 Ye by'ateesa bisigalawo ennaku zonna, ebirowoozo bye bibeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms33:12 Eggwanga eririna Mukama Katonda nga gwe lisinza lya mukisa; abantu be yalonda okuba ababe, ba mukisa." 
Psalms33:13 Mukama asinziira mu ggulu n'alengera, n'alaba abantu bonna," 
Psalms33:14 asinziira ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka n'alaba abali ku nsi bonna. 
Psalms33:15 Ye yakola emitima gya bonna, era yekkaanya byonna bye bakola." 
Psalms33:16 Kabaka tawangula lwa ggye ddene, omutabaazi tawona lwa maanyi ge mangi." 
Psalms33:17 Embalaasi tegasa okuwangula. Ne bw'eba ey'amaanyi ennyo, si ye ewonya omuntu." 
Psalms33:18 Mukama atunuulira abamussaamu ekitiibwa. Atunuulira abeesiga ekisa kye," 
Psalms33:19 okubawonya okufa n'okubakuuma nga balamu mu biseera eby'enjala. 
Psalms33:20 Tulindirira Mukama, ye atubeera era ye atutaasa." 
Psalms33:21 Tusanyukira mu ye, kubanga twesiga erinnya lye ettukuvu." 
Psalms33:22 Ayi Mukama nga bwe tukwesiga, tukwatirwe ekisa." 
Psalms34:1 Mukama nnaamwebazanga bulijjo, nnaamutenderezanga obutamala." 
Psalms34:2 Nneenyumirizanga mu Mukama, ababonaabona bawulire basanyuke." 
Psalms34:3 Mujje tugulumize Mukama, ffenna tumutendereze." 
Psalms34:4 Neegayirira Mukama, n'anziriramu, n'amponya byonna ebyali bintiisa." 
Psalms34:5 Bonna abatunuulira gy'ali basanyuka, era tebaliswala n'akatono." 
Psalms34:6 Omunaku amuwulira, n'amuggya mu buzibu bwe bwonna." 
Psalms34:7 Malayika wa Mukama yeebungulula abawulira Mukama, n'abataasa." 
Psalms34:8 Mulegeeko mulabe nga Mukama bw'ali omulungi! Wa mukisa oyo amwesiga. 
Psalms34:9 Musseemu Mukama ekitiibwa mmwe abaweereza be, kubanga abamussaamu ekitiibwa tebajula kantu." 
Psalms34:10 Obwana bw'empologoma oluusi bubulwa emmere ne bulumwa enjala. Naye abanoonya Mukama, tebajula kirungi na kimu." 
Psalms34:11 Mujje baana bange, muntegere amatu, mbayigirize okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa." 
Psalms34:12 Oyagala okunyumirwa obulamu, okuwangaala n'okufuna ebirungi?" 
Psalms34:13 Ziyiza olulimi lwo okwogera ekibi, n'emimwa gyo okwogera eby'obulimba." 
Psalms34:14 Va mu bibi, okolenga ebirungi, noonya emirembe, gy'oba ogobereranga." 
Psalms34:15 Mukama alabirira abatuukirivu, era awulira okukaaba kwabwe." 
Psalms34:16 Kyokka aboonoonyi, abatunuuliza bukambwe; alaba nti tebajjukirwenga mu nsi." 
Psalms34:17 Abantu ba Mukama abeesigwa bamukoowoola n'abawulira, n'abaggya mu bizibu byabwe byonna." 
Psalms34:18 Mukama abeera kumpi n'abeenenyezza mu mutima, alokola ababoneredde mu mwoyo." 
Psalms34:19 Omuntu omulungi abonaabona mu bingi, naye Mukama abimuwonya byonna." 
Psalms34:20 Akuuma amagumba ge gonna, tekulimenyekako na limu." 
Psalms34:21 Ekibi kiritta omubi, abakyawa obutuukirivu balibonerezebwa." 
Psalms34:22 Mukama anunula abaweereza be. Tewali n'omu ku bamwesiga alisingibwa musango. 
Psalms35:1 Ayi Mukama, wakanya abampakanya, olwane n'abannwanyisa." 
Psalms35:2 Kwata engabo ennene n'entono, ositukiremu onnyambe." 
Psalms35:3 Abanjigganya bagalulire effumu lyo, oŋŋambe nti: “Ndi Mulokozi wo.”" 
Psalms35:4 Abaagala okunzita bakwatibwe ensonyi baswale, abateesa okunkolako akabi bazzibweyo emabega nga basobeddwa." 
Psalms35:5 Malayika wa Mukama abagobe, babe ng'ebisusunku ebitwalibwa embuyaga." 
Psalms35:6 Ekkubo lyabwe Malayika wa Mukama mw'abagobera, libeemu ekizikiza n'obuseerezi," 
Psalms35:7 kubanga bantega ekitimba kyabwe awatali nsonga, baasima obunnya mbugwemu." 
Psalms35:8 Naye okuzikirira kubatuukeko nga tebamanyi, n'ekitimba kye bantega kikwase bo bennyini bazikirire." 
Psalms35:9 Olwo ndisanyukira ebyo Mukama by'akola, ndijaguza kubanga andokola." 
Psalms35:10 N'amaanyi gange gonna ndigamba Mukama nti: “Ayi Mukama, teri akwenkana ggwe! Omunafu omuwonya abamusinza ennyo amaanyi, omwavu omuwonya abamunyagako ebibye.”" 
Psalms35:11 Abantu ababi basituka ne bannumiriza ebigambo bye simanyinako. 
Psalms35:12 Mu birungi bansasulamu bibi, ne bammalamu amaanyi." 
Psalms35:13 Kale bo bwe baalwala, nayambala ekikutiya, ne nneebonereza nga nsiiba, ne nsaba Katonda nga nkutamizza omutwe," 
Psalms35:14 nga bwe nandisabidde mukwano gwange, oba muganda wange. Nagendanga nneewese olw'ennaku, ng'alirira nnyina." 
Psalms35:15 Naye nze bwe nagwa ku kizibu ne basanyuka, ne bakuŋŋaana okunsekerera. Ne be simanyi ne bankuba awatali kuweera." 
Psalms35:16 Ne banduulira ng'abatatya Katonda, ne baluma n'obugigi nga bansunguwalidde." 
Psalms35:17 Ayi Mukama, olituusa wa okutunuulira obutunuulizi? Mponya abaagala okunzita. Obulamu bwange buwonye empologoma zino." 
Psalms35:18 Olwo ndikwebaliza mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu bo, ndikutendereza mu maaso ga bonna." 
Psalms35:19 Abalabe bange abampaayiriza, tobakkiriza kunneewanikako. Era abankyawa awatali nsonga, tobaganya kunyigiragana ku liiso ku lwange, nga basanyuka." 
Psalms35:20 Teboogera bya mirembe, naye bateesa bya bulimba ku bateredde emirembe mu nsi." 
Psalms35:21 Bannumirizza nga baleekaana nti: “Twalaba kye wakola!” 
Psalms35:22 Bino obirabye, ayi Mukama, tosirika busirisi. Ayi Mukama, tombeera wala." 
Psalms35:23 Situka, ayi Mukama ontaase. Golokoka, ayi Katonda wange, osale omusango gwange!" 
Psalms35:24 Ayi Mukama, sala omusango gwange, nga bw'oli omwenkanya, era toleka balabe bange kunneewaanirako." 
Psalms35:25 Baleme kugamba mu mitima gyabwe nti: “Otyo, tufunye kye twagala: oyo tumumazeewo!”" 
Psalms35:26 Bonna abasanyukira obuyinike bwange bakwatibwe ensonyi baswale. Abanneekulumbalizaako, bajjule ensonyi n'okunyoomebwa." 
Psalms35:27 Abo abaagala nsinge omusango baleekaane olw'essanyu, bajaguze, era bagambe bulijjo nti: “Mukama agulumizibwe, asanyuka okulaba omuweereza we ng'awangudde.”" 
Psalms35:28 Olwo ndirangirira obutuukirivu bwo, ne nkutendereza olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms36:1 Ekibi kyogerera mu mutima gw'omwonoonyi. Tassaamu Katonda kitiibwa n'akatono," 
Psalms36:2 kubanga yeegulumiza, n'alowooza nti ekibi kye tekirirabibwa ne kikyayibwa." 
Psalms36:3 Byonna by'ayogera bibi era bya bulimba, aleseeyo okukola eby'amagezi era ebirungi." 
Psalms36:4 Ne bw'aba mu kitanda kye, ateesa kukola bibi; anywerera mu mpisa ze embi, n'atabaako kibi ky'akyawa." 
Psalms36:5 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kituuka ne ku ggulu, obwesigwa bwo butuuka ne mu bire." 
Psalms36:6 Obutuufu bwo buli ng'ensozi engulumivu, ennamula yo ekka ng'ennyanja ey'eddubi. Ayi Mukama, ggwe owonya abantu n'ebisolo." 
Psalms36:7 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kya muwendo nnyo, era abantu baddukira gy'oli." 
Psalms36:8 Bakkusibwa emmere ennyingi gy'obawa mu nnyumba yo. Obaleka ne banywa amazzi ku mugga gwo ogwesiimisa," 
Psalms36:9 kubanga mu ggwe mwe muli ensibuko y'obulamu. Mu kitangaala kyo mwe tulabira ekitangaala. 
Psalms36:10 Kale yongera okulaga ekisa kyo eri abakumanyi, n'obulungi bwo, eri abalina emitima emirongoofu." 
Psalms36:11 Toganya beekulumbaza kunnumba, wadde ababi okungoba we ndi." 
Psalms36:12 Laba aboonoonyi bwe bagudde eri, bameggeddwa ne batasobola kuyimuka." 
Psalms37:1 Toggweebwangako mirembe olw'ababi, wadde okukwatibwa ensaalwa olw'abo abakola ebibi," 
Psalms37:2 kubanga balifa mangu ng'omuddo ogukala, balibulawo ng'ebimera ebiwotoka ne bifa." 
Psalms37:3 Weesigenga Mukama, okolenga ebirungi, lw'olibeera emirembe ku nsi." 
Psalms37:4 Essanyu linoonyenga mu Mukama, alikuwa ebyo omutima gwo bye gwegomba." 
Psalms37:5 Weeteekenga mu mikono gya Mukama; mwesigenga, anaakuyambanga." 
Psalms37:6 Anaalaganga bw'oli omutuufu, n'oyaka ng'omusana ogw'ettuntu." 
Psalms37:7 Sirika ogumiikirizenga mu maaso ga Mukama, olindirirenga ye ky'anaakola. Teweeraliikiriranga abo abatuukiriza ebibi bye bateesa okukola, buli kye bakola ne kibagendera bulungi." 
Psalms37:8 Lekanga obusungu n'ekiruyi, era teweeraliikiriranga. Ebyo tebivaamu kalungi." 
Psalms37:9 Ababi balizikirizibwa. Naye abeesiga Mukama, ensi eriba yaabwe." 
Psalms37:10 Mu kaseera katono, ababi baliba tebakyaliwo. Ne bw'olibanoonya we babadde, tolibalaba." 
Psalms37:11 Ensi eriba ya beetoowaze, ne basanyuka awatali kibatawaanya." 
Psalms37:12 Omubi yeewerera omulungi, era amutunuuliza bukambwe." 
Psalms37:13 Naye Mukama asekerera ababi, kubanga amanyi nti banaatera okuzikirizibwa." 
Psalms37:14 Ababi basowola ebitala, ne baleega n'emitego gy'obusaale bwabwe, okutta abaavu n'abateeyamba, n'okumalawo ab'empisa ennungi." 
Psalms37:15 Naye ebitala byabwe ebyo biritta bo bennyini. N'emitego gyabwe girimenyeka. 
Psalms37:16 Ebitono eby'omulungi, bikira obugagga bw'ababi abangi," 
Psalms37:17 kubanga ababi, Mukama alibamala amaanyi, n'akuuma abalungi." 
Psalms37:18 Mukama alabirira abatalina musango, era ensi eriba yaabwe ennaku zonna." 
Psalms37:19 Mu biseera eby'akabi tebalirumwa. Ne mu biseera eby'enjala, banaalyanga ne bakkuta." 
Psalms37:20 Naye ababi balifa, abalabe ba Mukama baliggwaawo ng'ebimuli eby'omu ttale. Baliggwaawo ng'omukka." 
Psalms37:21 Omubi yeewola n'atasasula. Naye omulungi akola eby'ekisa, agaba ebirabo." 
Psalms37:22 Abo Mukama b'awa omukisa ensi eriba yaabwe. Kyokka abo b'akolimira balizikirira. 
Psalms37:23 Mukama aluŋŋamya omuntu mu kkubo ettuufu, era akuuma abo abamusanyusa." 
Psalms37:24 Ne bwe bagwa tebalemera wansi, kubanga Mukama abayamba okuyimuka." 
Psalms37:25 Kaakano nkuze era nkaddiye, naye sirabanga muntu mulungi Mukama gw'ayabulira, wadde abaana be nga basabiriza ebyokulya." 
Psalms37:26 Bulijjo omulungi akola eby'ekisa, awola abalala, n'abaana be bamwesiimisa." 
Psalms37:27 Va mu bibi okolenga ebirungi, lw'olibeera n'obutaka obw'olubeerera." 
Psalms37:28 Mukama ayagala ebituufu, era tayabulira bamwesiga. Abakuuma emirembe gyonna. Naye ezzadde ly'omubi, lirizikirizibwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abakola Katonda by'ayagala, ensi eriba yaabwe. Banaagibeerangamu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms37:30 Omuntu omulungi ayogera eby'amagezi, era bibaamu ensonga." 
Psalms37:31 Akuuma amateeka ga Katonda we mu mutima gwe, era tagaviirako ddala." 
Psalms37:32 Omubi atunuulira omulungi, ng'ayagala okumutta;" 
Psalms37:33 naye Mukama talireka mulungi mu buyinza bwa mubi, wadde okumuleka okusalirwa omusango okumusinga." 
Psalms37:34 Weesigenga Mukama, okwatenga ebiragiro bye, alikugulumiza, ensi ebe yiyo. Era oliraba ababi bwe bazikirizibwa." 
Psalms37:35 Nalaba omubi eyeekulumbaza era anyooma buli omu, ng'agulumidde ng'omuti omuwanvu ogumeze mu ttaka eggimu." 
Psalms37:36 Naye bwe nakomawo, yali takyaliwo. Namunoonya, naye saamulaba." 
Psalms37:37 Wekkaanye omuntu atalina musango, omanye ow'omutima omulongoofu. Omuntu ow'emirembe afuna abazzukulu," 
Psalms37:38 naye aboonoonyi bazikirizibwa bonna, ezzadde lyabwe ne liggweerawo ddala." 
Psalms37:39 Mukama alokola abantu abalungi, era abakuuma mu biseera eby'okubonaabona." 
Psalms37:40 Abayamba n'abataasa, n'abawonya ababi, kubanga beeyuna gy'ali." 
Psalms38:1 Ayi Mukama, tonnenya mu busungu bwo, tombonereza ng'okambuwadde." 
Psalms38:2 Onfumise n'obusaale bwo, onkubye ne ngwa wansi." 
Psalms38:3 Mpulira obulumi olw'obusungu bwo, omubiri gwange gwonna gulwadde olw'ebibi byange." 
Psalms38:4 Nzitoowereddwa ebibi byange, biri ng'omugugu ogutasitulikika." 
Psalms38:5 Olw'obusirusiru bwange, ebiwundu byange bivunze ne biwunya." 
Psalms38:6 Mpeteddwa ne ngalamizibwa wansi, nkaaba olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms38:7 Nzijudde ebbugumu ery'omusujja, sikyawulira bulamu mu mubiri gwange" 
Psalms38:8 Nnyongobedde, mmenyesemenyese, nsinda olw'obuyinike mu mutima." 
Psalms38:9 Ayi Mukama, bye neetaaga byonna obimanyi, n'okusinda kwange okuwulira." 
Psalms38:10 Omutima gwange gumpakuka nnyo, amaanyi gampweddemu. Amaaso gange tegakyalaba." 
Psalms38:11 Olw'ebiwundu byange, mikwano gyange ne baliraanwa bange tebakyansemberera, ne baganda bange banneesuula." 
Psalms38:12 Abaagala okunzita bantega emitego, abanjagaliza obubi banjogerera eby'obukambwe. Buli kiseera bansalira enkwe." 
Psalms38:13 Naye nze ndi nga kiggala, sikyawulira; era ndi nga kasiru, sikyayogera." 
Psalms38:14 Ddala ndi ng'atawulira, era atasobola kwanukula." 
Psalms38:15 Ayi Mukama, neesiga ggwe Mukama Katonda wange, ggwe ononnyanukula." 
Psalms38:16 Nkusaba nti toleka balabe bange kusanyuka olw'obuyinike bwange. Tobakkiriza kunneewaanirako nga ngudde. 
Psalms38:17 Ndi kumpi okugwa, ndi mu bulumi obutasalako." 
Psalms38:18 Njatula ebibi byange, nneenenya olw'okwonoona." 
Psalms38:19 Abalabe bange balamu, ba maanyi. N'abankyayira obwemage bangi." 
Psalms38:20 Mbakolera ebirungi, naye bo bankolera bibi. Bampalana kubanga nfuba okukola ebirungi." 
Psalms38:21 Ayi Mukama, tonjabulira. Katonda wange, tombeera wala." 
Psalms38:22 Yanguwa okunnyamba, ayi Mukama, omulokozi wange." 
Psalms39:1 Nagamba nti: “Nneekuumanga mu mpisa zange, nnemenga okusobya mu bye njogera. Awali ababi nnaasirikanga.”" 
Psalms39:2 Nasiruwala ne nsirika n'ebirungi saabyogera; naye neeyongera kunakuwala," 
Psalms39:3 ne neeraliikirira. Bwe nalowoozanga, nga nnyongera kweraliikirira. Kyennava ŋŋamba nti:" 
Psalms39:4 “Mukama, ntegeeza lwe ndifa, n'ebbanga lye ndiwangaala. Mmanyisa ng'obulamu bwange bwe buyita amangu.”" 
Psalms39:5 Obulamu bwange wabugerera ku luta. Akaseera ke ndiwangaala, tekalina bwe kenkana mu maaso go. Ddala buli muntu mukka bukka," 
Psalms39:6 ayita buyisi ng'ekisiikirize! Byonna by'akola bimufa bwereere. Obugagga bw'akuŋŋaanya, tamanya aliba nnyinibwo." 
Psalms39:7 Mukama, era kaakano nsuubire ki? Essuubi lye nnina liri mu ggwe." 
Psalms39:8 Nzigyaako ebibi byange byonna, tondeka kusekererwa basirusiru." 
Psalms39:9 Siiyogere, ka mbunire nsirike, kubanga ggwe wayagala mboneebone bwe nti." 
Psalms39:10 Toyongera kumbonereza, n'empi z'onkubye zimala." 
Psalms39:11 Bw'obonereza omuntu ng'omunenya olw'ebibi bye, ozikiriza by'ayagala, ne biba ng'ebiriiriddwa ennyenje. Ddala buli muntu mukka bukka." 
Psalms39:12 Wulira kye nsaba, ayi Mukama, owulirize bwe nkaaba. Olw'amaziga ge njiwa, nnyamba! Ndi mugenyi wo, omuyise era omutambuze, ŋŋenda nga bajjajjange bonna." 
Psalms39:13 Ndeka nsanyukemu akatono, nga sinnagenda butadda ku nsi kuno." 
Psalms40:1 Nagumiikiriza ne nninda Mukama okunnyamba, yategereza n'awulira bwe nkaaba." 
Psalms40:2 Yanzigya mu bunnya obuntiisa, ne mu bitosi mwe ntubira, n'anteeka ku lwazi kwe mponera, n'annyweza ebigere we nninnye." 
Psalms40:3 Yanjigiriza oluyimba oluggya, olutendereza Katonda waffe. Bangi baliraba kino ne batya, baliyiga ne beesiga Mukama." 
Psalms40:4 Wa mukisa eyeesiga Mukama, era ateesigula bakola bya malala, wadde abasinza ebitajja nsa." 
Psalms40:5 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, ebyewuunyisa by'otukolera bingi, tewali alikwenkana. Ne by'otutegekera bingi. Bwe ngezaako okubimenya wadde okubyogerako, tebibalika obungi!" 
Psalms40:6 Ebitambiro n'ebiweebwayo si by'oyagala. Ebyokebwa n'ebiweebwayo olw'ebibi, tobyetaaga. Wabula wampa amatu mpulire." 
Psalms40:7 Kyennava ŋŋamba nti: “Nzuuno, nzize. Ebinjogerako biwandiikiddwa mu muzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Psalms40:8 Ayi Katonda wange, nsanyuka okukola by'oyagala, era nkuuma amateeka go mu mutima gwange.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ng'abantu bo bakuŋŋaanye nayatula nga bw'otulokodde. Ayi Mukama, omanyi nga siirekengayo kukyogera ekyo." 
Psalms40:10 Kye namanya nti otulokodde nakyogera, saasirika abantu bo we bakuŋŋaanidde. Obwesigwa bwo n'obuyambi bwo, ekisa kyo n'amazima go, ssaabikisa." 
Psalms40:11 Tolekaayo kunsaasira, ayi Mukama. Ekisa kyo n'amazima go binkuumenga bulijjo," 
Psalms40:12 kubanga neetooloddwa ebizibu nkumu ebitabalika. Mbikkiddwa ebibi byange, tebikyaŋŋanya kulaba. Okubibala obungi, bikira enviiri ez'oku mutwe gwange. Era mpweddemu amaanyi." 
Psalms40:13 Ayi Mukama, kkiriza okumponya. Ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms40:14 Bonna abaagala okunzita, bakwatibwe ensonyi baswale. Abasanyukira ennaku yange, bazzibwe emabega nga baswadde." 
Psalms40:15 Abansekerera, batye era baswale." 
Psalms40:16 Bonna abeeyuna gy'oli basanyuke bajaguze. Abakwebaza olw'okubalokola, bagambenga bulijjo nti: “Mukama agulumizibwe.”" 
Psalms40:17 Nze ndi mwavu, ndi mu bwetaavu, naye Mukama andowoozaako. Ggwe onnyamba era ggwe omponya. Ayi Katonda wange, tolwa!" 
Psalms41:1 Wa mukisa alumirwa abaavu; olutuukibwako ebizibu, Mukama amuyamba." 
Psalms41:2 Mukama amukuuma n'amuwa obulamu, amuwa omukisa mu nsi, tamuwaayo kufugibwa balabe be." 
Psalms41:3 Ng'ali ku ndiri alwadde, Mukama amuyamba, n'amuwonya obulumi bwe bwonna." 
Psalms41:4 Nze nagamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, nnyonoonye, nkunyiizizza, mponya lwa kisa.”" 
Psalms41:5 Abalabe bange basaakiriza nti: “Alifa ddi ne yeerabirwa?” 
Psalms41:6 Abajja okundaba boogera bitajja nsa. Banoonya bya ŋŋambo. Bwe bagenda, ze balaalaasa." 
Psalms41:7 Bonna abankyawa banjogerako obwama. Ebisinga obubi bye bandowoozaako. 
Psalms41:8 Bagamba nti: “Obulwadde bw'alwadde, si bwa kuwona, taliyimuka wansi.”" 
Psalms41:9 Ne mukwano gwange, oyo gwe neesiganga ennyo, bwe tulya ku lujjuliro, afuuse mulabe ampaayo." 
Psalms41:10 Ayi Mukama, ba wa kisa, nnyimusa, ndyoke mbawoolere eggwanga." 
Psalms41:11 Omulabe wange tampangudde. Kino kindaze nti onjagala. 
Psalms41:12 Ompaniridde kubanga nkola ekituufu. Ontadde mu maaso go ennaku zonna. 
Psalms41:13 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, otenderezebwe emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina era amiina." 
Psalms42:1 Ng'empeewo bw'ewejjawejja olw'amazzi, nange bwe nkwettanira, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms42:2 Omwoyo gunnumira Katonda Nnannyinibulamu: ndijja ddi ne ndabika mu maaso ge? 
Psalms42:3 Emisana n'ekiro amaziga ye mmere yange. Buli budde nga bwe baŋŋamba nti: “Katonda wo ali ludda wa?”
