Psalms42:4 Bwe njijukira eby'edda, nennyamira! Nagendanga n'ekibiina ky'abantu, ne nkulemberamu nga tutambula okulaga mu nnyumba ya Katonda ng'essanyu litujjudde, tuyimba tusaakaanya ennyimba ezimutendereza." 
Psalms42:5 Kale kaakano, lwaki ennaku ennuma omwoyo, era lwaki neeraliikirira? Ka neesige Katonda, kubanga ndiddamu ne mmutendereza, Katonda Omulokozi wange." 
Psalms42:6 Ayi Katonda wange, ennaku ennuma omwoyo! Kyenva nkulowoozaako nga ndi mu nsi ya Yorudaani ne ku nsozi z'e Herumooni ne ku kasozi Mizari." 
Psalms42:7 Ebiyiriro by'amazzi biyita binnaabyo, amazzi go ageefuukuula bwe gayira. Engezi yo yonna n'amayengo biyise ku nze!" 
Psalms42:8 Mukama alaga ekisa kye emisana, ekiro ndyoke mbe n'oluyimba lwe nnyimba, nga nsaba Katonda akuuma obulamu bwange." 
Psalms42:9 Ŋŋamba Katonda antaasa nti: “Lwaki ggwe onneerabidde? Lwaki mbonyaabonyezebwa abalabe bange?” 
Psalms42:10 Njigganyizibwa ebivumo byabwe, nga bambuuza obutayosa nti: “Katonda wo ali ludda wa?”" 
Psalms42:11 Kale lwaki ennaku ennuma omwoyo, era lwaki neeraliikirira? Ka neesige Katonda, kubanga ndiddamu okumutendereza, Katonda Omulokozi wange." 
Psalms43:1 Ayi Katonda, sala omusango nsinge abalabe bange aboonoonyi. Mponya abalimba era ababi." 
Psalms43:2 Ggwe onkuuma. Lwaki onjabulidde? Lwaki abalabe bange bambonyaabonya? 
Psalms43:3 Mpa ekitangaala kyo n'amazima go binkulembere, bintuuse ku lusozi lwo olutukuvu, ne ku weema yo entukuvu," 
Psalms43:4 olwo ndyoke ntuuke ku alutaari yo, ggwe Katonda wange ansanyusa ennyo, nnyimbire ku nnanga nkutende ggwe ayi Katonda wange." 
Psalms43:5 Kale lwaki ennaku ennuma omwoyo, era lwaki neeraliikirira? Ka nneesige Katonda kubanga ndiddamu ne mmutendereza, Katonda Omulokozi wange." 
Psalms44:1 Ayi Mukama, bajjajjaffe baatunyumiza ne twewulirira n'agaffe ebyewuunyo bye wakola edda mu biro byabwe." 
Psalms44:2 Wagoba mu nsi ab'amawanga amalala, owe bano we banaabeeranga. Wabonyaabonya abantu bali, bano n'obawa nnyo eddembe." 
Psalms44:3 Bajjajjaffe baawangula ensi eyo nga tebalwanyisa bitala. Baawangula olutalo newaakubadde nga tebaali ba maanyi. Gaali maanyi go na buyinza bwo n'okukakasa nti oli nabo, ebyabalaga okwagala kwo." 
Psalms44:4 Ggwe Kabaka wange era Katonda wange, ayamba abantu ba Yakobo ne bawangula." 
Psalms44:5 Olw'obuyinza bwo tuwangula abalabe baffe, ne tulinnyirira abatulumbagana." 
Psalms44:6 Seesiga mutego gwa kasaale kange, wadde ekitala kyange okumponya." 
Psalms44:7 Naye ggwe watuwonya abalabe baffe, n'owangula abatukyawa." 
Psalms44:8 Tuneenyumiririzanga mu ggwe Katonda, era tunaakwebazanga bulijjo." 
Psalms44:9 Naye kaakano otusudde muguluka, otulese ne tuwangulwa. Tokyatabaalira wamu na ggye lyaffe." 
Psalms44:10 Watuleka tudduke abalabe baffe, ne banyaga n'ebyaffe." 
Psalms44:11 Watuwaayo tuttibwe ng'endiga, n'otusaasaanya mu mawanga." 
Psalms44:12 Watunda abantu bo omuwendo omutono ogutaleese na magoba. 
Psalms44:13 Okkirizza baliraanwa baffe batuvume, abatwetoolodde batunyoome baseke." 
Psalms44:14 Otulese okugayibwa ab'amawanga amalala; batunyeenyeza emitwe mu bunyoomi. 
Psalms44:15 Obudde buziba nga nnyoomebwa, nzenna nzijudde kuswala" 
Psalms44:16 nga mpulira ababoggola era abavuma, n'abalabe abawoolera eggwanga." 
Psalms44:17 Ebyo byonna bitutuuseeko newaakubadde tetukwerabidde, wadde okumenya endagaano gye wakola naffe." 
Psalms44:18 Tetukuvangako ffe, tetujeemeranga biragiro byo." 
Psalms44:19 Naye ggwe watusuula awali emisege, n'otuleka mu kizikiza ekizibu." 
Psalms44:20 Singa twerabidde Katonda waffe, ne tugezaako okusinza omulala," 
Psalms44:21 tewandikirabye ekyo Katonda amanya ebikisiddwa mu mutima? 
Psalms44:22 Olunaku lwonna tuli mu kabi ka kuttibwa ku lulwo. Tubalibwa ng'endiga ez'okuttibwa. 
Psalms44:23 Zuukuka, lwaki weebaka, ayi Mukama? Golokoka, totusuula nnaku zonna!" 
Psalms44:24 Lwaki otwekweka n'otolabika? Lwaki ffe abalumwa era ababonaabona otwerabira? 
Psalms44:25 Twekubye mu nfuufu, tugudde ku ttaka wansi." 
Psalms44:26 Jjangu otuyambe. Otuwonye olw'ekisa kyo. 
Psalms45:1 Nzijudde ebirungi eby'okunyumya nga njiiya oluyimba lwa kabaka. Bye njogera byesomba ng'ebigambo by'omuwandiisi omwangu mu kuwandiika. 
Psalms45:2 Walungiwa okukira abalala, oyogeza kisa. Katonda yakuwa omukisa, era gwa nnaku zonna." 
Psalms45:3 Weesibe mu kiwato kyo olukoba okuli ekitala, ggwe ow'amaanyi: kye kitiibwa kyo n'obukulu bwo." 
Psalms45:4 Ayi Kabaka weebagale okulwanirira obwenkanya era n'amazima. Oli wa maanyi, wangula otiibwe." 
Psalms45:5 Obusaale bwo bwa bwogi, bufumita emitima gy'abalabe bo. Amawanga gakuvuunamira." 
Psalms45:6 Entebe yo ey'obwakabaka, ayi Katonda, ebeerawo emirembe n'emirembe. N'obwakabaka bwo obufugisa bwenkanya." 
Psalms45:7 Wayagala obutuukirivu, n'okyawa ekibi. Katonda, Katonda wo, kyeyava akufukako omuzigo okukuwa ekitiibwa, n'osanyuka okusinga banno." 
Psalms45:8 Ebyambalo byo biwunya kawoowo ka mirra, n'aka alowe, n'aka kasiya. Mu mbiri ezitimbiddwa amasanga osanyusibwa ennanga." 
Psalms45:9 Mu bakyala abakuwembejja temubuzeemu bambejja. Nnamasole ayambadde ebya zaabu ebiteŋŋeenya. Akuyimiridde awo ku ludda lwo olwa ddyo. 
Psalms45:10 Muwala, wulira olowooze bye ŋŋamba, ababo n'ab'ekika kyo beerabire." 
Psalms45:11 Obulungi bwo kabaka alibwagala. Ye mukama wo, mufukaamirirenga." 
Psalms45:12 Ab'e Tiiro balikuleetera ebirabo, n'abagagga balyettanira okusiimibwa gy'oli." 
Psalms45:13 Mu lubiri omumbejja ekitiibwa kye kinene. Ekyambalo kye kya zaabu. 
Psalms45:14 Bamutwalayo ewa kabaka mu byambalo ebiteŋŋeenya. Emperekeze ezigoberera nazo zigenda wa kabaka. 
Psalms45:15 Bajjira mu ssanyu na kujaganya bayingire olubiri lwa kabaka. 
Psalms45:16 Abaana bo balisikira bajjajjaabo n'obafuula bakabaka, bafugenga ensi zonna." 
Psalms45:17 Onojjukirwanga bulijjo olw'oluyimba lwange luno. Bonna banaakutenderezanga ebiseera byonna ebijja. 
Psalms46:1 Katonda kye kiddukiro kyaffe, ge maanyi gaffe. Bulijjo yeeteeseteese okutuyamba mu buzibu." 
Psalms46:2 N'olwekyo tetuutyenga ensi ne bw'eneetabangukanga, ensozi ne bwe zinaasigukanga ne zeesuula mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
Psalms46:3 Amazzi g'ennyanja ne bwe gayira ne geevulungujja, ensozi ne zinyeenyezebwa olw'okwetabula kw'amazzi ago." 
Psalms46:4 Waliwo omugga oguleeta essanyu mu kibuga kya Katonda, mu nnyumba ye, Atenkanika." 
Psalms46:5 Katonda ali mu kibuga ekyo, tekirinyeenyezebwa. Anaakiyambanga ng'obudde tebunnalaba." 
Psalms46:6 Katonda olwogeza amaanyi, amawanga gatiitiira, obwakabaka buyuuguuma, ensi n'esaanuuka." 
Psalms46:7 Mukama Nnannyinimagye ali naffe, Katonda wa Yakobo kye kiddukiro kyaffe." 
Psalms46:8 Mujje mulabe Mukama by'akoze, mulabe ebyewuunyisa by'akoze ku nsi." 
Psalms46:9 Amalawo entalo mu nsi zonna, emitego gy'obusaale n'agimenya. N'azikiriza amafumu, amagaali n'agakumako omuliro." 
Psalms46:10 N'alagira nti: “Mukkakkane! Mumanye nti nze Katonda agulumizibwa mu mawanga gonna ne mu nsi zonna.” 
Psalms46:11 Mukama Nnannyinimagye ali naffe, Katonda wa Yakobo kye kiddukiro kyaffe." 
Psalms47:1 Abantu mwenna mukube mu ngalo, mutendereze Katonda mumuyimbire n'essanyu," 
Psalms47:2 kubanga Mukama Atenkanika wa ntiisa. Ye Kabaka akira obukulu, ensi zonna ye azifuga." 
Psalms47:3 Atuwa okuwangula abantu, amawanga gaabwe ne tugeefugira." 
Psalms47:4 Yatulondera ensi mwe tubeera, etweyagaza ffe aba Yakobo gw'ayagala." 
Psalms47:5 Katonda alinnye waggulu ng'abamutenda basaakaanya. Mukama atumbidde waggulu nga bamufuuyira eŋŋombe. 
Psalms47:6 Muyimbire Katonda, mumutendereze. Kabaka waffe, muyimbe mumutendereze." 
Psalms47:7 Katonda ye Kabaka mu nsi zonna, muyimbe nnyo mumutendereze." 
Psalms47:8 Katonda afuga amawanga gonna, atudde ku ntebe ye entukuvu." 
Psalms47:9 Abafuzi b'amawanga bakuŋŋaanye n'abantu ba Katonda wa Aburahamu. Ab'obuyinza mu nsi Katonda ye abafuga, bonna ye abasukkulumye." 
Psalms48:1 Mukama mukulu agwanira okutenderezebwa ennyo mu kibuga kya Katonda waffe, ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms48:2 Siyooni lusozi lulungi mu kugulumira kwalwo. Ekibuga kya kabaka omukulu, kisanyusa ensi yonna." 
Psalms48:3 Mu mayumba gaakyo Katonda yeeraze nga ye kye kiddukiro," 
Psalms48:4 kubanga bakabaka baakuŋŋaana ne bajjira wamu okukirumba. 
Psalms48:5 Bwe baakiraba ne beewuunya, ne batya ne babuna emiwabo." 
Psalms48:6 Ensisi n'ebakwatirayo, ne balumwa ng'omukazi bw'alumwa ng'azaala." 
Psalms48:7 Ne baba ng'amaato g'e Tarusiisi, agamenyebwa omuyaga gw'ebuvanjuba." 
Psalms48:8 Bye twawuliranga, era bye byo bye tulabye, mu kibuga kya Katonda waffe, Mukama Nnannyinimagye ky'akuuma emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms48:9 Twalowooza ku kisa kyo nga tuli wakati mu Ssinzizo lyo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms48:10 Omanyiddwa mu nsi yonna, ayi Katonda, otenderezebwa buli wantu, ofugisa bwenkanya." 
Psalms48:11 Ab'oku Lusozi Siyooni basanyuke abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bajaganye, kubanga osala bulungi ensonga." 
Psalms48:12 Mutambule Siyooni mukyetooloole, mubale eminaala egirimu." 
Psalms48:13 Mwekalirize ebigo byakyo, mwetegereze amayu gaakyo, musobole okunyumiza ab'omulembe ogujja" 
Psalms48:14 nti Katonda oyo ye Katonda waffe, ye anaatukulemberanga bulijjo." 
Psalms49:1 Muwulire kino ab'amawanga gonna, muwulirize mwenna abatuuze b'oku nsi:" 
Psalms49:2 abeekitiibwa n'abakopi, abagagga wamu n'abaavu." 
Psalms49:3 Ebigambo bye njogera bya magezi, bye ndowooza bitegeerekeka." 
Psalms49:4 Nja kwetegereza olugero, ndunnyonnyolere ku nnanga." 
Psalms49:5 Siityenga mu biseera ebizibu, ng'abalabe bange banneetoolodde." 
Psalms49:6 Ababi abeesiga obugagga bwe balina, abeewaana olw'endulundu y'ebintu," 
Psalms49:7 mu bo teri ayinza kwenunula, n'awa Katonda ensimbi zigule obulamu." 
Psalms49:8 Obulamu bwe bwa muwendo nnyo, buli ky'alina okuwaayo tekimala," 
Psalms49:9 okumukuuma kimuwangaaze, aleme kuyingira magombe." 
Psalms49:10 Buli muntu akiraba nti n'abagezi bafa, abatamanyi wamu n'abasiru nabo bazikirira, n'obugagga bwabwe ne babulekera abalala." 
Psalms49:11 Entaana zaabwe ge maka gaabwe bulijjo mwe balisigala ennaku zonna, wadde baalina ettaka lye baayitanga eryabwe." 
Psalms49:12 Omuntu tabeerera mu kitiibwa, ali ng'ensolo ezizikirira." 
Psalms49:13 Laba ebituuka ku beesiga eby'obusiru, ne ku abo abasanyukira mu bugagga." 
Psalms49:14 Bali ng'endiga ezirundirwa emagombe. Walumbe ye musumba waabwe. Entaana zaabwe balizeesogga, era tebalirwawo kuvunda. Emagombe ye eriba amaka gaabwe." 
Psalms49:15 Naye Katonda alimponya emagombe, kubanga alinzikiriza mbe wuwe." 
Psalms49:16 Omuntu bw'agaggawala ekitiibwa kye ne kyeyongera, tomutyanga." 
Psalms49:17 Bw'alifa talibaako ky'atwala. Ekitiibwa kye tekirikka mu ntaana. 
Psalms49:18 Omuntu ne bwe yeewaana nti mu bulamu wa mukisa, ne bwe bamutendereza nga ne by'akola biramye," 
Psalms49:19 alikkayo emagombe naye, eri bajjajjaabe, enzikiza gy'ekutte." 
Psalms49:20 Omuntu alina ekitiibwa n'atakitegeera, ali ng'ensolo ezizikirira." 
Psalms50:1 Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, Mukama ayogera, ensi yonna n'agiyita okuva enjuba gy'eva okutuusiza ddala gy'egwa." 
Psalms50:2 Katonda ayakira mu Siyooni obulungi mwe bujjudde. 
Psalms50:3 Katonda waffe ajja, era tajja kusirika omuliro gwe gwaka, yetooloddwa kibuyaga omungi." 
Psalms50:4 Ayita eggulu n'ensi ng'asalira abantu be omusango: 
Psalms50:5 “Mukuŋŋaanyize wendi abeesigwa bange bwe twakola endagaano nga bampa ebitambiro.” 
Psalms50:6 Eggulu lirangirira nti Katonda mutuukirivu, yennyini ye mulamuzi." 
Psalms50:7 “Abantu bange muwulire, ka njogere, ka nkulumirize ggwe Yisirayeli, nze Katonda, Katonda wo." 
Psalms50:8 Sikunenya lwa bitambiro byo. Ebyokebwa tebibulawo by'ompa. 
Psalms50:9 Naye ente ennume ez'omu biraalo byo n'embuzi ennume ez'omu malundiro go sizeetaaga," 
Psalms50:10 kubanga ensolo zonna mu bibira zange, wamu n'amagana agali ku nkumi n'enkumi z'obusozi." 
Psalms50:11 Ebinyonyi we bifa byenkana byange na buli kiramu mu ttale kyange. 
Psalms50:12 “Singa enjala ennuma sigamba ggwe, kubanga ensi yonna n'ebigirimu byange." 
Psalms50:13 Ennyama y'ente ennume gye ndya? Wadde omusaayi gw'embuzi ennume gwe nnywa? 
Psalms50:14 Weerezanga Katonda ekitambiro eky'okumwebaza okolenga nga bw'osuubizza Atenkanika. 
Psalms50:15 Onkoowoolenga ng'oli mu buzibu, nnaakuyambanga, ggwe n'ontendereza.”" 
Psalms50:16 Naye Katonda agamba omubi nti: “Lwaki ojeeja ebiragiro byange, n'oyogera ku ndagaano yange?" 
Psalms50:17 Toyagala kugololebwa, ne bye nkugamba obisuula muguluka." 
Psalms50:18 Omubbi gw'olaba gw'okwana, oli wa kinywi n'abenzi." 
Psalms50:19 “Okwogera obubi lye ssanyu lyo, era tolonzalonza kulimba." 
Psalms50:20 W'obeera baganda bo obavuma, era n'obawaayiriza." 
Psalms50:21 Byonna ebyo wabikola ne nsirika, n'olowooza nti ndi nga ggwe. Naye kaakano nkunenya, ne nkulaga bw'okyamye." 
Psalms50:22 “Mmwe abanneerabira mwerinde nneme kubasaanyaawo, ng'ow'okubawonya tewali." 
Psalms50:23 Aleeta ekitambiro eky'okwebaza anzisaamu ekitiibwa, n'omulungi mu mpisa ze sirirema kumulokola.”" 
Psalms51:1 Nkwatirwa ekisa, ayi Mukama omusaasizi. Olw'okusaasira kwo okungi nzigyaako emisango gyange gyonna." 
Psalms51:2 Nnaazaako ebisobyo byange, ekibi kinviireko ddala ntukule." 
Psalms51:3 Mmanyi nga bwe nayonoona, ndowooza ku kibi kyange bulijjo." 
Psalms51:4 Ggwe wennyini, ggwe nanyiiza, ne nkola ebitakusanyusa. Kyova obeera omutuufu mu by'oyogera, n'osala omusango ne gunsinga." 
Psalms51:5 Nali mu bibi okuva lwe nazaalibwa, nazaalibwa ndi mwonoonyi." 
Psalms51:6 Ggwe oyagala mazima mu mutima gw'omuntu. Njigiriza amagezi mu mwoyo gwange. 
Psalms51:7 Nzigyaako ekibi kyange mbe mulongoofu, onnaaze ntukule okusinga omuzira." 
Psalms51:8 Mpa okuwulira essanyu n'okwesiima. Newaakubadde wankuba n'ombonereza, nja kuddamu nsanyuke." 
Psalms51:9 Totunuulira bibi byange, nnaazaako ebyonoono byange byonna." 
Psalms51:10 Ntondaamu omutima omulongoofu, ayi Katonda, onteekemu omwoyo omuggya era omulungi." 
Psalms51:11 Tongoba mu maaso go, omwoyo gwo omutukuvu togunzigyako." 
Psalms51:12 Nziriza essanyu ly'owa buli gw'oba olokodde, ompe omwoyo ogusanyukira okukugondera" 
Psalms51:13 ndyoke njigirize aboonoonyi ebiragiro byo, abakola ebibi bakyuke badde gy'oli." 
Psalms51:14 Omponye okuttibwa ayi Katonda Omulokozi wange, ndyoke nnyimbenga nnyo nga bw'oli omulungi." 
Psalms51:15 Ayi Mukama, onnyambe okwogera, ndyoke nsobole okukutendereza." 
Psalms51:16 Ggwe toyagala bitambiro ne bwe nandibikuwadde, wadde ebiweebwayo ne byokebwa tebikusanyusa." 
Psalms51:17 Ekitambiro kyange, gwe mutima ogwenenyezza, ayi Katonda. Omutima ogwenenyezza era oguboneredde togugaya." 
Psalms51:18 Ayi Katonda, beera wa kisa ku Siyooni, ozimbe buggya ebisenge bya Yerusaalemu," 
Psalms51:19 olyoke osanyukire ebitambiro ebitukuvu, n'ebiweebwayo ne byokebwa, n'ente ennume ziweebweyo ku alutaari yo." 
Psalms52:1 Ggwe ow'amaanyi, lwaki weenyumiriza olw'ettima lyo? Ekisa kya Katonda kya lubeerera." 
Psalms52:2 Oteekateeka okuzikiriza abalala, ebigambo byo biri ng'ekiso ekyogi, bulijjo oyiiya eby'obulimba." 
Psalms52:3 Oyagala ebibi okusinga ebirungi, oyagala obulimba okusinga amazima." 
Psalms52:4 Oyagala ebigambo ebirumya abalala, mulimba ggwe!" 
Psalms52:5 Katonda kyaliva akuzikiriza emirembe gyonna. Alikukwata n'akusika mu nnyumba yo n'akuggya mu nsi y'abalamu. 
Psalms52:6 Abantu abalungi baliraba kino ne batya. Balikusekerera ne bagamba nti: 
Psalms52:7 “Laba, ono ye ateesiganga Katonda kumukuuma, wabula eyeesiganga obugagga bwe obungi, n'asuubira nti okukola ebibi kulimukuuma.”" 
Psalms52:8 Naye nze ndi ng'omuti omuzayiti ogukulira mu nnyumba ya Katonda: neesiga kisa kya Katonda emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms52:9 Nnaakwebazanga bulijjo ayi Katonda, olw'ebyo by'okoze mu maaso g'abatukuvu bo. Nnaayatulanga bulijjo bw'oli omulungi." 
Psalms53:1 Abasirusiru bagamba mu mitima gyabwe nti: “Tewali Katonda.” Boonoonese, bakoze ebibi ebyenyinyalwa, tewali n'omu akola kirungi." 
Psalms53:2 Katonda asinziira mu ggulu n'atunuulira abantu, alabe oba nga waliwo abategeera, oba nga waliwo abamunoonya." 
Psalms53:3 Naye bonna bamuvuddeko. Bonna be bamu: boonoonyi. Tewali n'omu akola kirungi, wadde omu bw'ati." 
Psalms53:4 Abakola ebibi tebalina magezi? Bakavvula abantu bange ng'abalya emmere, era tebasinza Katonda." 
Psalms53:5 Naye balitya nnyo, mu ngeri gye baali tebatyangamu, kubanga Katonda alisaasaanya amagumba g'abo abazingiza abantu be. Olibawangula ne baswala, kubanga Katonda yababoola." 
Psalms53:6 Singa nno oyo aliwonya Yisirayeli alisinziira mu Siyooni! Katonda bw'alizzaawo embeera ennungi mu bantu be, aba Yakobo balisanyuka, Abayisirayeli balijaguza." 
Psalms54:1 Ayi Katonda, ndokola n'obuyinza bwo, mponya n'amaanyi go." 
Psalms54:2 Wulira kye nsaba, ayi Katonda, wuliriza bye njogera." 
Psalms54:3 Abeekulumbaza bazze okunnumba, abakambwe baagala okunzita. Tebafa ku Katonda." 
Psalms54:4 Naye Katonda ye annyamba Mukama ye awanirira obulamu bwange. 
Psalms54:5 Alibonereza abalabe bange, ebibi byabwe bibaddire." 
Psalms54:6 Ayi Mukama, ndikuwa ekitambiro nga nsanyuka, ndikwebaza kubanga oli mulungi." 
Psalms54:7 Onzigye mu bizibu byange byonna, era ndabye abalabe bange nga bawanguddwa." 
Psalms55:1 Ayi Katonda, wulira okusaba kwange, togoba kwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms55:2 Ompulirize onziremu, ebizibu byange binkooyezza." 
Psalms55:3 Okuleekaana kw'abalabe n'okuyigganyizibwa ababi bintiisizza, kubanga bankolako obulabe, bansunguwalidde era bankyaye." 
Psalms55:4 Nzijudde obuyinike, ekikangabwa ky'okufa kintiisizza." 
Psalms55:5 Okutya n'okukankana binkutte, ekyekango kintekemudde." 
Psalms55:6 Era ŋŋamba nti: “Singa mbadde n'ebiwaawaatiro ng'ejjiba, nandibuuse ne nnoonya gye mpummulira." 
Psalms55:7 Nandibuuse ne ŋŋenda wala, ne mbeera eyo mu ddungu." 
Psalms55:8 Nandizudde mangu we nneewogoma, ne mpona empewo ennyingi n'omuyaga.”" 
Psalms55:9 Ayi Mukama, zikiriza olulimi lwabwe, otabuletabule bye boogera, kubanga ndaba eby'obukambwe n'okuyombagana mu kibuga." 
Psalms55:10 Emisana n'ekiro beetooloola ebisenge byakyo, ne bakijjuza ebikolwa ebibi n'emitawaana." 
Psalms55:11 Boonoona ebintu mu kibuga, enguudo zaakyo tezibulamu bya kulumya bantu na bya bukuusa." 
Psalms55:12 Singa omulabe ye anvuma, nandiyinzizza okugumiikiriza. Singa oyo ankyaye ye anneewulirirako, nandimwekwese." 
Psalms55:13 Naye akola ekyo ye ggwe munnange, mukwano gwange bwe tuyita." 
Psalms55:14 Twanyumyanga ffembi emboozi ey'akafubo twasinzizanga wamu mu nnyumba ya Katonda. 
Psalms55:15 Okufa kutuuke ku balabe bange nga tebakulindiridde. Bakke emagombe nga bakyali balamu, kubanga ekibi kiri mu maka gaabwe ne mu mitima gyabwe." 
Psalms55:16 Naye nze mpita Katonda annyambe, Mukama ajja kundokola." 
Psalms55:17 Ku makya, mu ttuntu n'akawungeezi neemulugunya nga nsinda. Ajja kuwulira eddoboozi lyange." 
Psalms55:18 Alinkomyawo mirembe mu lutalo, lwe nnwana n'abalabe abangi." 
Psalms55:19 Katonda eyafuga okuva emirembe gyonna aliwulira n'abawangula, kubanga tebakyukako, era tebatya Katonda." 
Psalms55:20 Eyali munnange yalumbagana mikwano gye, n'amenya endagaano gye yakola." 
Psalms55:21 Ebigambo bye byali bigonvu okusinga omuzigo, naye byali bitala ebyogi, nga ky'alina mu mutima gwe, lwe lutalo." 
Psalms55:22 Ebizibu byo bikwasenga Mukama, anaakuyambanga. Taalekenga bantu beesigwa kuwangulwa." 
Psalms55:23 Naye ggwe ayi Mukama, abantu abatemu n'abalimba olibasuula mu ntaana ng'emyaka gye bandiwangadde tebannagituusa na wakati. Naye nze nnaakwesiganga." 
Psalms56:1 Nkwatirwa ekisa ayi Katonda, kubanga abantu bannumba. Abalabe banjigganya olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms56:2 Abalabe bange bannumba okuva enkya okuzibya obudde. Abeekulumbaza bangi abannwanyisa. 
Psalms56:3 Buli lwe ntya, neesiga ggwe." 
Psalms56:4 Katonda gwe neesiga, siritya. Mmutendereza olw'ebyo by'asuubiza. Abantu obuntu bayinza kunkola ki?" 
Psalms56:5 Olunaku lwonna abalabe bange bateesa bya kunnumya. Kye balowooza bulijjo kwe kunkolako obulabe. 
Psalms56:6 Beekuŋŋaanya ne beekweka, ne baketta buli kye nkola nga bateega okunzita." 
Psalms56:7 Ayi Katonda, babonereze olw'ebibi byabwe. Mu busungu bwo, wangula abantu abo." 
Psalms56:8 Ggwe omanyi nga bwe ntawaanyizibwa. Teeka amaziga gange mu ccupa yo. Tegawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kyo? 
Psalms56:9 Ku lunaku lwe ndikukoowoola, abalabe bange balizzibwayo emabega. Kino nkimanyi kubanga Katonda ali ku ludda lwange." 
Psalms56:10 Katonda mmutendereza olw'ebyo by'asuubiza. 
Psalms56:11 Katonda gwe neesiga, siritya. Abantu obuntu bayinza kunkola ki?" 
Psalms56:12 Ayi Katonda, ndituukiriza byonna bye nkusuubizza. Ndikuwa ebirabo olw'okukwebaza," 
Psalms56:13 kubanga omponyezza okufa, n'ompanirira obutagwa, ntambulire mu maaso ga Katonda, mu kitangaala ekyakira abalamu." 
Psalms57:1 Nkwatirwa ekisa, ayi Katonda, nkwatirwa ekisa, kubanga nzirukira gy'oli. Nzirukira mu kisiikirize eky'ebiwaawaatiro byo, okutuusa obucwano lwe buliggwaawo." 
Psalms57:2 Nkoowoola Katonda Atenkanika, Katonda atuukiriza bye yantegekera." 
Psalms57:3 Alisinziira mu ggulu eyo n'andokola, aliwangula abandoobya. Katonda alindaga ekisa kye, alindaga bwe yeesigibwa." 
Psalms57:4 Ndi mu mpologoma wakati ez'amaddu ezikavvula abantu. Amannyo gazisongodde ng'obusaale n'amafumu. Ennimi zaazo kye kitala ekyogi. 
Psalms57:5 Gulumizibwa okusinga eggulu, ayi Katonda, ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi zonna." 
Psalms57:6 Abalabe bange bateze ekitimba bankwase, obuyinike bumpese! Basimye obunnya mu kkubo lyange, naye bo bennyini be babuguddemu." 
Psalms57:7 Omutima gwange mugumu, ayi Katonda, omutima gwange mugumu, nnaayimba ne nkutendereza." 
Psalms57:8 Zuukuka ggwe mwoyo gwange, zuukuka ggwe entongooli! Oli ludda wa ggwe ennanga? Ŋŋenda okuzuukusa emmambya!" 
Psalms57:9 Nnaakwebaza, ayi Mukama nga ndi mu bantu. Nnaayimba ne nkutenderereza mu mawanga." 
Psalms57:10 Ekisa kyo kigulumivu okutuuka ku ggulu. Obwesigwa bwo butuuka ne ku bire. 
Psalms57:11 Gulumizibwa okusinga eggulu, ayi Katonda, ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi zonna." 
Psalms58:1 Mmwe abafuzi, musala bulungi emisango? Abantu mubalamula mu bwenkanya?" 
Psalms58:2 Nedda! Mulowooza ku kukola bibi. Mukola bya bukambwe mu nsi. 
Psalms58:3 Ababi bazaalibwa nga babi, obulimba babutandika nga bato." 
Psalms58:4 Bajjudde obusagwa ng'obw'omusota, bali nga ssalambwa eritawulira, erizibikira amatu gaalyo," 
Psalms58:5 ne litawulira ddoboozi lya mukwasi wa misota, oba ery'omulozi omukugu." 
Psalms58:6 Ayi Katonda, bakuulemu amannyo, menya amannyo, ayi Mukama, ag'empologoma ezo enkambwe." 
Psalms58:7 Baggweewo ng'amazzi agakulukuta, bawotoke ng'omuddo ogulinnyirirwa." 
Psalms58:8 Babe ng'ekkovu erisaanuuka, babe ng'omwana omusowole atalaba ku kitangaala." 
Psalms58:9 Balimibwewo ng'omuddo, nga tebannamanya. Katonda abasunguwalire nnyo, abasaanyeewo nga balaba." 
Psalms58:10 Abatuukirivu balyesiima bwe baliraba aboonoonyi bwe babonerezebwa. Balirinnya mu musaayi gw'ababi. 
Psalms58:11 Abantu baligamba nti: “Ddala abatuukirivu bafuna empeera. Ddala Katonda waali, asala omusango mu nsi!”" 
Psalms59:1 Ayi Katonda wange, mponya abalabe bange, ntaasa abannumba." 
Psalms59:2 Mponya abakola ebibi, ntaasa abatemu," 
Psalms59:3 kubanga laba, banteeze banzite. Ab'amaanyi beekobye okunnumba nga sirina kibi na musango, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms59:4 Beetegeka bannumbe, nze atalina musango. Jjangu olabe, yanguwa onnyambe." 
Psalms59:5 Ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, ggwe Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Jjangu obonereze amawanga gonna tosaasira n'omu ow'enkwe ateesa okukola ebibi." 
Psalms59:6 Bakomawo buli kawungeezi nga bakaaba ng'embwa, ne beetooloola ekibuga." 
Psalms59:7 Baabo bavuma era batiisatiisa, olulimi lubali ng'ekitala mu kamwa kaabwe. Balowooza nti tewali abawulira." 
Psalms59:8 Naye ggwe ayi Mukama, obasekerera, osunga abantu bonna ab'ensi." 
Psalms59:9 Amaanyi go ge neesiga, gy'oli gye nzirukira, ayi Katonda." 
Psalms59:10 Katonda wange anjagala, era alinsisinkana, n'andabisa abalabe bange nga bawanguddwa." 
Psalms59:11 Tobatta, ayi Katonda, sikulwa ng'abantu bange beerabira. Basaasaanye n'amaanyi go, obawangule, ayi ggwe Katonda atutaasa ng'engabo." 
Psalms59:12 Okwogera ebibi tekubava ku mimwa. Bakwatibwe mu kwekulumbaza kwabwe olw'okukolima n'olw'okulimba kwabwe. 
Psalms59:13 Ggwe bazikirize mu busungu bwo, bazikirize baggweerewo ddala, abantu bonna balyoke bamanye nti Katonda ye afuga mu Yisirayeli, ne mu mawanga gonna ku nsi." 
Psalms59:14 Bakomawo buli kawungeezi nga bakaaba ng'embwa ne beetooloola ekibuga. 
Psalms59:15 Babungeeta nga banoonya ebyokulya, ne bawoggana nga tebafunye bimala." 
Psalms59:16 Naye nze nnaayimbanga okutenda amaanyi go. Buli nkya nnaayimbanga okutenda ekisa kyo, kubanga obadde kiddukiro kyange, mwe nneekweka nga ndi mu buzibu." 
Psalms59:17 Nnaayimbanga okukutendereza ggwe antaasa, kubanga ggwe ayi Katonda, onjagala, era ggwe kiddukiro kyange." 
Psalms60:1 Ayi Katonda otusudde, otumenyeemenye. Otusunguwalidde. Naye tukwegayiridde otukomyewo." 
Psalms60:2 Okankanyizza ensi n'ogyasaayasa. Kaakati ziba enjatika zaayo, kubanga yeeyabyamu." 
Psalms60:3 Abantu bo otulese ne tubonaabona nnyo, tutalantuka ng'abatamiivu." 
Psalms60:4 Olabudde abakussaamu ekitiibwa basobole okuwona akabi. 
Psalms60:5 Nziraamu kye nkusaba, otuwonye n'obuyinza bwo, baganzi bo tununulibwe." 
Psalms60:6 Katonda yayogerera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu n'agamba nti: “Ndijaguza nga ngabanya mu Sekemu, ne ngaba ebitundu by'ekiwonvu Sukkoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileyaadi nsi yange, ne Manasse yange. Efurayimu ye nkuufiira yange, Buyudaaya gwe muggo gwange ogw'obwakabaka." 
Psalms60:8 Mowaabu ye bbenseni mwe nnaabira. Edomu gye nkasukako engatto zange okulaga nti nsi yange. Mu Filistiya njogeza maanyi olw'obuwanguzi.” 
Psalms60:9 Ani alinnyingiza mu kibuga eky'amaanyi? Ani alintuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Otuvuddemu ayi Katonda? Tokyatambulira wamu na magye gaffe ayi Katonda. 
Psalms60:11 Tuyambe okulwanyisa omulabe, kubanga obuyambi bw'abantu tebugasa." 
Psalms60:12 Nga Katonda ali ku ludda lwaffe tuliba ba maanyi. Ye alirinnyirira abalabe baffe. 
Psalms61:1 Ayi Mukama, wulira okukaaba kwange, wuliriza okwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms61:2 Nkuyita nga ndi wala n'ewaffe, era nga nterebuse. Ntwala mu kifo ekyesiifu," 
Psalms61:3 kubanga ggwe kiddukiro kyange, ggwe w'amaanyi antaasa abalabe." 
Psalms61:4 Ka mbeerenga mu weema yo ennaku zonna, nneekwekenga mu biwaawaatiro byo." 
Psalms61:5 Owulidde bye nsuubizza, ayi Katonda, ompadde by'ogabira abakussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms61:6 Wanvuya obulamu bwa kabaka, awangaale emyaka n'emyaka," 
Psalms61:7 afuge ng'ali mu maaso go ennaku zonna. Ayi Katonda, ggwe ow'ekisa era omwesigwa, mukuumenga," 
Psalms61:8 ndyoke nnyimbenga okukutendereza ennaku zonna, nga ntuukiriza buli lunaku bye nsuubizza." 
Psalms62:1 Ngumiikiriza ne nnindirira Katonda okundokola, yekka ye Mulokozi wange." 
Psalms62:2 Ye yekka ankuuma era andokola, ye antaasa, siriwangulwa n'akatono." 
Psalms62:3 Mmwe mwenna mulituusa wa okulumba omuntu okumutta ng'ali ng'ekisenge ekyewunzise n'olukomera olugwa? 
Psalms62:4 Kiri kimu kye muteesa: kumuwanula ku bukulu bwe. Musanyukira eby'obulimba, mwogera ebimusabira omukisa, naye mu mutima mumukolimira." 
Psalms62:5 Neesiga Katonda yekka, essuubi lyange liri mu ye." 
Psalms62:6 Ye yekka ankuuma era andokola, ye antaasa, siriwangulwa." 
Psalms62:7 Katonda ye annunula ne mba waakitiibwa, Katonda kye kiddukiro ekigumu mwe nneekukuma." 
Psalms62:8 Mmwe abantu mumwesigenga bulijjo, mumwanjulirenga ebibeeraliikiriza, kubanga gy'ali gye muddukira." 
Psalms62:9 Ddala abantu mukka bukka. Ne bwe baba baakitiibwa, bawewuka mu minzaani, omukka gubasinga obuzito." 
Psalms62:10 Temwesiganga bunyazi, n'okubba temukweyinulanga. Obugagga ne bwe bweyongera obungi, temubwesigulanga." 
Psalms62:11 Katonda ayogedde ne mmuwulira, emirundi egisoba mu gumu nti: “Obuyinza Katonda ye nnyinibwo.”" 
Psalms62:12 Era nti: “Ekisa kye kya lubeerera,” kubanga ayi Mukama, buli muntu omusasula ng'omulimu gwe bwe guli." 
Psalms63:1 Ayi Katonda, ggwe Katonda wange, nkulumirwa omwoyo. Obulamu bwange bukwetaaga ng'ensi enkalu erakasidde, bwe yeetaaga amazzi." 
Psalms63:2 Bwe ntyo neegomba okukulaba mu kifo ekitukuvu, ndabe nga bw'oli ow'obuyinza era oweekitiibwa." 
Psalms63:3 Ekisa kyo kinkirira obulamu bwennyini. Nnaakutenderezanga. 
Psalms63:4 Nnaakwebazanga obulamu bwange bwonna, nnaayimusanga emikono gyange nga nkusinza." 
Psalms63:5 Nnaamatiranga ng'alidde obusomyo n'amasavu, ne nkutenderereza mu nnyimba ez'essanyu." 
Psalms63:6 Nkulowoozaako ekiro nga ndi ku kitanda kyange. Nsisimuka ne nkujjukira," 
Psalms63:7 kubanga onnyamba bulijjo. Nsanyukira mu kisiikirize ky'ebiwaawaatiro byo. 
Psalms63:8 Nkwekwatako n'ompanirira n'amaanyi go. 
Psalms63:9 Abagezaako okunzita baligenda emagombe. 
Psalms63:10 Balittibwa n'ekitala, ebibe ne bibeeriira." 
Psalms63:11 Naye kabaka alisanyuka, olw'ebyo Katonda by'akola. Buli alayira Katonda alyenyumiriza. Aboogera eby'obulimba baliggalwa akamwa." 
Psalms64:1 Wulira ayi Katonda wulira bwe nkaaba. Kuuma obulamu bwange, nnemenga okutya abalabe." 
Psalms64:2 Ggwe mponya entegeka ze bateeseza mu kyama, era mponya oluyoogaano lw'ababi," 
Psalms64:3 abawagala ennimi zaabwe ng'ebitala. Ebigambo eby'obukambwe babireega ng'obusaale," 
Psalms64:4 atalina musango bamulasize we beekwese. Bamugwako nga talaba, tebatya." 
Psalms64:5 Mu kuteesa ekibi bagumyagana: bateesa we banaateeka emitego gyabwe mu kyama, ne bagamba nti: “Ani anaagiraba?”" 
Psalms64:6 Bateesa ekibi ne bagamba nti: “Entegeka eno gye tukoze, tewali kinaagirema.” Ebirowoozo by'omuntu mu mutima gwe munda, nga ddala bituuka wala!" 
Psalms64:7 Naye Katonda alibalasa n'obusaale ne bafumitibwa mbagirawo. 
Psalms64:8 Alibazikiriza olw'ebigambo bye boogera. Bonna ababalaba balinyeenya emitwe. 
Psalms64:9 Abantu bonna balitya ne balowooza ku ebyo Katonda by'akoze, ne boogera ku bikolwa bye." 
Psalms64:10 Abakola ebituufu balisanyuka olw'ebyo Mukama by'akoze, bonna ab'omutima omulongoofu balimutendereza." 
Psalms65:1 Ayi Katonda, ogwanira ettendo mu Siyooni n'okuweebwa ebyakusuubizibwa." 
Psalms65:2 Ayi ggwe awulira okusaba, abantu bonna balijja gy'oli" 
Psalms65:3 olw'ebibi byabwe. Ebibi byaffe ne bwe bituyitirirako, ggwe obitusonyiwa." 
Psalms65:4 Wa mukisa oyo gw'olonda n'omusembeza kumpi abeerenga mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu. Tunakkusibwanga ebirungi eby'omu nnyumba yo, eby'omu Ssinzizo lyo ettukuvu." 
Psalms65:5 Ayi Katonda Omulokozi waffe, otwanukula ng'otununula n'ebikolwa eby'entiisa. Abantu bonna ku nsi n'abali emitala w'amayanja beesiga ggwe." 
Psalms65:6 Oli wa maanyi, era obuyinza bwo bwe bunyweza ensozi mu bifo byazo." 
Psalms65:7 Osirisa okuwuuma kw'ennyanja, n'okw'amayengo gaayo. Osirisa okwegugunga kw'amawanga." 
Psalms65:8 Abantu mu nsi zonna batya ebyamagero by'okola. Obajjuza essanyu okuva ku makya okutuusa olweggulo. 
Psalms65:9 Ayi Katonda, olambula ensi n'ogifukirira, era n'ogigaggawaza nnyo. Emigga ogijjuza amazzi. Oteekateeka ensi bw'otyo, n'olabirira ebirime byayo." 
Psalms65:10 Obulime bwayo obufukirira amazzi mangi ne bugonda. Ettaka olinnyikiza enkuba n'okuza ebirime byalyo. 
Psalms65:11 Omwaka ogujjuza ebirungi byo, buli w'oyita olekawo ekyengera." 
Psalms65:12 Amalundiro g'omu ddungu gakubyeko ebisolo obusozi bujjudde essanyu. 
Psalms65:13 Amalundiro gajjudde amagana, n'ebiwonvu bibikkiddwa eŋŋaano. Buli kintu kisaakaanya nga kiyimba olw'essanyu." 
Psalms66:1 Ggwe ensi sanyuka otendereze Katonda. 
Psalms66:2 Yimba okutenda ekitiibwa kye, omugulumize ng'omutendereza." 
Psalms66:3 Gamba Katonda nti: “By'okola nga byewuunyisa! Olw'obuyinza bwo obungi abalabe bo balikujeemulukukira. 
Psalms66:4 Bonna ku nsi balikusinza, bakuyimbire nga bakutendereza.”" 
Psalms66:5 Mujje mulabe Katonda by'akola, atiisa mu by'akolera abantu." 
Psalms66:6 Ennyanja yagifuula olukalu, ne bagisomosa bigere. Tusanyukirenga by'akola." 
Psalms66:7 Afuga n'amaanyi ge emirembe gyonna, ne yeekaliriza amawanga, abajeemu balemenga okwegulumiza." 
Psalms66:8 Mmwe amawanga gonna mutendereze Katonda waffe, eddoboozi erimutendereza liwulirwe." 
Psalms66:9 Atukuuma nga tuli balamu, era tatuleka kugwa." 
Psalms66:10 Ayi Katonda, watugeza, watugeza nga ffeeza bw'agezebwa mu muliro." 
Psalms66:11 Watuleka okuyingira mu kitimba, watutikka emigugu emizito." 
Psalms66:12 Waleka abalabe baffe okutulinnya ku mitwe. Twayita mu muliro ne mu mazzi, naye wabituggyamu n'otutuusa mu kifo eky'emirembe." 
Psalms66:13 Nnaaleeta mu nnyumba yo ebiweebwayo ne byokebwa. Nnaakuwa bye nakusuubiza. 
Psalms66:14 Nnaakuwa bye neetema bwe nali mu buzibu. 
Psalms66:15 Nnaakuwa ebyassava ebyokebwa. Nnaawaayo endiga eza sseddume n'ente n'embuzi byokebwe binyooke omukka. 
Psalms66:16 Mwenna abassaamu Katonda ekitiibwa mujje muwulire, mbabuulire bye yankolera." 
Psalms66:17 Namukoowoola annyambe, era nayimba okumutendereza." 
Psalms66:18 Singa nalina ebirowoozo ebibi mu mutima, Mukama teyandimpulidde." 
Psalms66:19 Naye ddala Katonda ampulidde, alowoozezza ku bye mmusaba." 
Psalms66:20 Katonda yeebazibwe kubanga tagaanye kye mmusaba era akkirizza okunkwatirwa ekisa. 
Psalms67:1 Ayi Katonda, tukwatirwe ekisa, otuwenga omukisa, otutunuulize amaaso ag'ekisa," 
Psalms67:2 ensi yonna eryoke emanye by'oyagala, amawanga gonna gamanye bw'olokola." 
Psalms67:3 Abantu bakutenderezenga, ayi Katonda, abantu bonna bakutenderezenga." 
Psalms67:4 Amawanga gasanyukenga, gayimbenga olw'essanyu kubanga osalira abantu emisango mu bwenkanya, era ofuga amawanga gonna mu nsi." 
Psalms67:5 Abantu bakutenderezenga, ayi Katonda, abantu bonna bakutenderezenga." 
Psalms67:6 Ensi ebazizza ebibala bingi, Katonda, Katonda waffe atuwadde omukisa." 
Psalms67:7 Katonda atuwadde omukisa, abantu mu nsi zonna bamussengamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms68:1 Katonda k'asituke, abalabe be basaasaane." 
Psalms68:2 Abafuumuule ng'omukka bwe gufuumuuka. Ng'envumbo bw'esaanuuka awali omuliro, n'ababi bwe baba bazikirira awali Katonda." 
Psalms68:3 Naye abo abakola Katonda by'ayagala, basanyuke bajaganye mu maaso ge, bajaguze olw'essanyu." 
Psalms68:4 Muyimbire Katonda mumutendereze. Mumulongooseze ekkubo, atambulira mu bire. Mukama lye linnya lye, mujagulize mu maaso ge." 
Psalms68:5 Katonda abeera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, ye alabirira abatalina kitaabwe, era ye akuuma bannamwandu." 
Psalms68:6 Abatalina abayamba Katonda abawa ennyumba mwe basula. Aggya abasibe mu kkomera, n'abatuusa ku ddembe. Naye abajeemu babeera mu nsi enkalu." 
Psalms68:7 Ayi Katonda, bwe wakulembera abantu bo, bwe watambula mu ddungu," 
Psalms68:8 ensi yakankana, enkuba yafukumuka, Olusozi Sinaayi lwakankana olw'okujja kwa Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Watonnyesa enkuba nnyingi, ayi Katonda, n'onnyikiza ensi yo eyali erakasidde," 
Psalms68:10 abantu bo ne basenga omwo. Olw'ekisa kyo, abaavu wabawa bye beetaaga." 
Psalms68:11 Mukama yawa ekiragiro, bangi ne batwala amawulire nti:" 
Psalms68:12 “Bakabaka b'amagye badduka.” Abakazi abasigala awaka be bagabana omunyago. 
Psalms68:13 Mmwe musigala mugalamidde mu bisibo by'endiga, ng'ejjiba ery'ebiwaawaatiro ebibikkiddwako ffeeza, n'ebyoya ebiriko zaabu atemagana." 
Psalms68:14 Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna bwe yasaasaanya bakabaka ku Lusozi Salumooni, omuzira gwagwako." 
Psalms68:15 Basani nga lusozi lunene: Basani lulina emitwe emigulumivu! 
Psalms68:16 Ggwe olusozi olw'emitwe emigulumivu, lwaki oziimuula olusozi Katonda lwe yayagala okubeerako? Ddala alirubeerako ennaku zonna." 
Psalms68:17 Mukama ava ku Sinaayi n'amagaali ge obukumi n'obukumi, n'ayingira mu kifo ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:18 Alinnya ku lusozi oluwanvu ng'atwala abasibe bangi. Afunye ebirabo bingi mu bantu, ne mu abo abajeemu. Mukama anaabeeranga eyo." 
Psalms68:19 Mukama atuwanirira buli lunaku, atenderezebwe. Ye Katonda atulokola." 
Psalms68:20 Katonda waffe ye Katonda alokola, era Katonda ye Mukama atuwonya okufa." 
Psalms68:21 Ddala Katonda alyasa emitwe gy'abalabe be, egy'abanyiikira okuzza emisango." 
Psalms68:22 Mukama yagamba nti: “Ndikomyawo abalabe bo okuva e Basani, ndibakomyawo okuva mu buziba bw'ennyanja," 
Psalms68:23 olyoke olinnye mu musaayi gwabwe, n'embwa zo zigukombenga nga bwe zaagala.”" 
Psalms68:24 Ayi Katonda, bonna balabye bw'otambula, bw'otambula ggwe Katonda wange, Kabaka wange, ng'oyingira mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:25 Abayimbi be bakulembedde, ab'ebivuga ne baddirira. Wakati we wali abawala abagenda bakuba ensaasi." 
Psalms68:26 Mwebalize Katonda mu lukuŋŋaana olunene, mutendereze Mukama mmwe abasibuka mu Yisirayeli." 
Psalms68:27 Benyamiini asembayo obuto abakulembere, kuddeko abalangira ba Yuda. Bagobererwe abakungu ba Zebbulooni n'aba Nafutaali." 
Psalms68:28 Laga obuyinza bwo, ayi Katonda, n'amaanyi ge wakozesa okugasa ffe." 
Psalms68:29 Olw'Essinzizo lyo eriri mu Yerusaalemu, bakabona banaakuleeteranga ebirabo." 
Psalms68:30 Boggolera ensolo ezo ez'omu kisaalu, boggolera amawanga, ente ezo ennume, n'ennyana zaakwo, okutuusa zonna lwe zirivuunama ne zikutonera ffeeza. Saasaanya abantu abaagala entalo." 
Psalms68:31 Ababaka baliva e Misiri, n'ab'e Etiyopiya baligolola emikono eri Katonda nga bamusinza." 
Psalms68:32 Muyimbire Katonda mmwe obwakabaka bw'ensi. 
Psalms68:33 Muyimbire eyeebagala ku ggulu eryabaawo edda n'edda lyonna. Muwulire bw'ayogera n'eddoboozi lye ery'amaanyi. 
Psalms68:34 Mumukkirize nti wa buyinza, ekitiibwa kye kifuga Yisirayeli n'obuyinza bwe buli mu ggulu." 
Psalms68:35 Katonda nga wa ntiisa mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, Katonda oyo owa Yisirayeli! Awa abantu be obuyinza n'amaanyi. Katonda atenderezebwe" 
Psalms69:1 Mponya ayi Mukama: amazzi gankoma mu bulago! 
Psalms69:2 Ntubira mu ttosi eggwanvu, tewali wagumu we nninnya. Ntuuse mu buziba wakati, amayengo gammira gammalawo!" 
Psalms69:3 Okukaaba kunkooyezza, obulago bunkaze. Amaaso gakutte ekifu, nga nnindirira ggwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms69:4 Abankyayira obwemage bangi, okusinga enviiri ez'oku mutwe gwange. Abalabe bange bampaayiriza. Ba maanyi, baagala okunzita, bampaliriza nzizeeyo bye sabba." 
Psalms69:5 Ayi Katonda, omanyi obusirusiru bwange, n'ebibi byange tebikukisiddwa." 
Psalms69:6 Abakwesiga tobaleka kuswala ku lwange, ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye! Abakunoonya tondeka kubaswaza, ayi Katonda wa Yisirayeli!" 
Psalms69:7 Banvuma lwa kubeera ggwe, ne nswala." 
Psalms69:8 Nfuuse munnaggwanga eri baganda bange, mugwira eri abaana ba mmange," 
Psalms69:9 kubanga okwagala ennyumba yo kundidde, ne bye bavuma ggwe bizze ku nze." 
Psalms69:10 Nkaaba amaziga ne nsiiba enjala, ekyo ne kinvumya." 
Psalms69:11 Bwe nayambala ekikutiya, ne mbafuukira eŋŋombo." 
Psalms69:12 Njogerwako abatuula ku mulyango n'abatamiivu bajeeja nze. 
Psalms69:13 Naye nze neegayirira ggwe, ayi Mukama, onziremu mu kiseera ky'osiima, ayi Katonda. Onziremu kubanga olina ekisa kingi, era oli mwesigwa mu kuyamba." 
Psalms69:14 Mponya okutubira mu ttosi, ontaase abalabe bange, onzigye mu mazzi ag'eddubi." 
Psalms69:15 Toleka mayengo kunsaanyaawo, ne nzikirira ebuziba, wadde okumiribwa obunnya." 
Psalms69:16 Nziraamu ayi Mukama ow'ekisa, omulungi! Ggwe ajjudde okusaasira, kyuka otunuleko gye ndi!" 
Psalms69:17 Tonneekweka nze omuddu wo. Ndi mu buyinike, yanguwa okunziramu." 
Psalms69:18 Sembera we ndi ondokole, omponye abalabe bange." 
Psalms69:19 Okimanyi bwe nvumibwa, bwe nswazibwa, ne nnyoomebwa. Abalabe bange bonna obalaba." 
Psalms69:20 Okuvumibwa kummenye omutima, era kunterebudde. Nnoonyezza anansaasira n'ambula, era siraba banansanyusa." 
Psalms69:21 Mu kifo ky'emmere bampa mususa. Ennyonta bwe yannuma bannywesa nkaatu. 
Psalms69:22 Kale ekijjulo kyabwe kibafuukire omutego. Emirembe gye balimu gibafuukire ekigu. 
Psalms69:23 Amaaso gaabwe gasiikirizibwe baleme okulaba, okankanyenga emigongo gyabwe ennaku zonna." 
Psalms69:24 Obayiwengako ekiruyi kyo, obasunguwalirenga n'obukambwe." 
Psalms69:25 We basiisira wasigalenga matongo, walemenga kubaawo n'omu abeera mu weema zaabwe," 
Psalms69:26 kubanga bayigganya b'obonereza, era boogera ku b'ofumise." 
Psalms69:27 Yongeranga okubabonereza olemenga kubasonyiwa. 
Psalms69:28 Amannya gaabwe gasangulwe mu kitabo ky'abalamu, baggyibwe ku lukalala lw'abantu bo abeesigwa." 
Psalms69:29 Naye nze ndi munaku era ndi mu bulumi. Nsitula, ayi Mukama, ondokole." 
Psalms69:30 Nnaatenderezanga Katonda nga nnyimba, nnaamugulumizanga nga mmwebaza." 
Psalms69:31 Era ebyo binaasanyusanga Mukama okusinga okumuwa ente ennume erina amayembe n'ebinuulo. 
Psalms69:32 Abanyigirizibwa bwe baliraba kino, balisanyuka. Abasinza Katonda baliddamu amaanyi." 
Psalms69:33 Mukama awulira abali mu bwetaavu, era teyeerabira bantu be abasibe." 
Psalms69:34 Eggulu n'ensi bimutenderezenga, ennyanja n'ebiramu byonna ebirimu," 
Psalms69:35 kubanga Katonda alirokola Siyooni, n'azimba buggya ebibuga bya Yuda. Abantu be balibeera omwo, ensi n'ebeera yaabwe." 
Psalms69:36 Eriba ya bazzukulu b'abaweereza be, n'abo abamwagala, be baligibeeramu." 
Psalms70:1 Ayi Katonda, kkiriza okumponya, ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms70:2 Abaagala okunzita bakwatibwe ensonyi baswale. Abasanyukira ennaku yange, bazzibwe emabega nga baswadde." 
Psalms70:3 Abansekerera, batye era baswale." 
Psalms70:4 Bonna abeeyuna gy'oli, basanyuke bajaguze. Abakwebaza olw'okubalokola bagambenga bulijjo nti: “Katonda agulumizibwe”." 
Psalms70:5 Nze ndi mwavu, ndi mu bwetaavu, yanguwa okujja gye ndi, ayi Katonda. Ggwe onnyamba era ggwe omponya, ayi Mukama, tolwa!" 
Psalms71:1 Ayi Mukama, nzirukira gy'oli, tondeka kuswala." 
Psalms71:2 Nnyamba ontaase, kubanga oli mulungi, mpulira ondokole." 
Psalms71:3 Obe ekiddukiro kyange ekinkuuma, ekigo kyange ekigumu mwe mponera, kubanga ggwe kiddukiro kyange era ekigo kyange." 
Psalms71:4 Ayi Katonda wange, mponya omwonoonyi, nzigya mu mikono gy'omubi era omukambwe." 
Psalms71:5 Ayi Mukama Katonda, essuubi lyange liri mu ggwe, nneesiga ggwe okuviira ddala mu buto bwange." 
Psalms71:6 Ggwe wampanirira okuviira ddala lwe nazaalibwa, ggwe wanzigya mu nda ya mmange. Nnaakutenderezanga bulijjo." 
Psalms71:7 Obulamu bwange bwewuunyisa bangi, naye ggwe w'amaanyi, ggwe ontaasa." 
Psalms71:8 Nkutendereza olunaku lwonna, ne nkugulumiza." 
Psalms71:9 Kaakano tonsuula nga nkaddiye, tonjabulira nga sikyalina maanyi." 
Psalms71:10 Abalabe bange banjogerako, ne bateesa nga baagala okunzita." 
Psalms71:11 Bagamba nti: “Katonda amwabulidde. Mumugoberere mumukwate, tewali anaamuyamba.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ayi Katonda, tombeera wala. Ayi Katonda wange, yanguwa okunnyamba." 
Psalms71:13 Abannumba bawangulwe bazikirizibwe, abaagala okunnumya baswazibwe banyoomebwe." 
Psalms71:14 Naye nze nnaasuubiranga bulijjo nnaayongeranga okukutendereza. 
Psalms71:15 Nnaatendanga ebirungi by'okola, olunaku lwonna nnaayogeranga ku by'okola okulokola, newaakubadde nga sisobola kubitegeera." 
Psalms71:16 Nnaatenderezanga obuyinza bwo, ayi Mukama Katonda. Nnaatenderezanga obutuukirivu bwo, obubwo bwokka." 
Psalms71:17 Ayi Katonda, wanjigiriza okuva mu buto bwange era ne kati nkyayogera ku bikolwa byo ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms71:18 Kaakati nga nkaddiye, nga mmeze n'envi, tonjabulira, ayi Katonda. Beera nange, mmanyisenga amaanyi go, n'obuyinza bwo emirembe egijja." 
Psalms71:19 Obutuukirivu bwo, ayi Katonda bugulumivu okutuuka ku ggulu. Ggwe eyakola ebikulu, ayi Katonda, tewali ali nga ggwe." 
Psalms71:20 Ggwe eyandeka ne mbonaabona nnyo era ggwe olinzizaamu amaanyi, onzigye emagombe." 
Psalms71:21 Olinnyongera ekitiibwa, n'oddamu okunsanyusa." 
Psalms71:22 Nnaakutenderezanga nga nkuba endongo, kubanga oli mwesigwa, ayi Katonda wange. Nnaakutenderezanga nga nnyimba ku nnanga, ayi ggwe Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms71:23 Nnaasanyukanga n'omutima gwange gwonna nga nnyimba okukutendereza, kubanga wandokola." 
Psalms71:24 Olunaku lwonna nnaayogeranga ku bulungi bwo, kubanga abaagala okunkolako akabi bakwatiddwa ensonyi, baswaziddwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ayi Katonda, kabaka muwe alamulenga nga ggwe, muwe ku mazima go" 
Psalms72:2 alyoke afugenga abantu bo mu mazima, n'abanyigirizibwa abafugenga bulungi." 
Psalms72:3 Ensi ebeeremu emirembe, ebeere bulungi." 
Psalms72:4 Kabaka alabirire abaavu, ayambe abali mu bwetaavu, amenye ababanyigiriza." 
Psalms72:5 Abantu bakusinzenga emirembe gyonna, enjuba n'omwezi gye birimala nga bikyayaka." 
Psalms72:6 Kabaka abe ng'enkuba etonnya mu nnimiro, abe ng'oluwandaggirize olufukirira ettaka." 
Psalms72:7 Mu mulembe gwe abalungi balifuna omukisa, walibaawo emirembe mingi, okutuusa omwezi lwe gulikoma okwaka." 
Psalms72:8 Alifuga okuva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja; okuva ku Mugga Ewufuraate okutuuka ensi gy'ekoma. 
Psalms72:9 Ababeera mu ddungu balimufukaamirira, n'abalabe be balikomba enfuufu." 
Psalms72:10 Bakabaka b'e Tarusiisi n'ab'oku bizinga balimuleetera ebirabo. Bakabaka b'e Buwarabu n'ab'Etiyopiya nabo balimuwa ebirabo. 
Psalms72:11 Bakabaka bonna balimuvuunamira, amawanga gonna ganaamuweerezanga," 
Psalms72:12 kubanga adduukirira omunaku amukaabirira, n'omwavu atalina buyambi." 
Psalms72:13 Asaasira abaavu n'abanaku, awonya obulamu bw'abateeyamba." 
Psalms72:14 Abawonya okujoogebwa n'okuyisibwa obubi, obulamu bwabwe abuyita bwa muwendo." 
Psalms72:15 Awangaale! Aweebwe ku zaabu ow'e Buwarabu. Abantu bamusabirenga bulijjo, basiibenga nga bamusabira omukisa gwa Katonda." 
Psalms72:16 Ensi ebeere mu kyengera, obusozi bujjule ebibala, bibeere bingi ng'eby'omu Lebanooni. Ebibuga bijjule abantu, ng'ettale bwe lijjula omuddo." 
Psalms72:17 Erinnya lye lijjukirwenga bulijjo, libe lya lubeerera, ng'enjuba. Abantu bonna beeyagalizenga omukisa ng'ogugwe. Amawanga gonna gamuyitenga wa mukisa." 
Psalms72:18 Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwe yekka akola ebyamagero. 
Psalms72:19 Erinnya lye eryekitiibwa litenderezebwenga emirembe gyonna. Ensi zonna zijjule ekitiibwa kye. Amiina era Amiina. 
Psalms72:20 Okusaba kwa Dawudi mutabani wa Yesse kukomye awo. 
Psalms73:1 Ddala Mukama akolera Yisirayeli ebirungi, n'ab'emitima emirongoofu." 
Psalms73:2 Naye nze nali nnaatera okuterebuka, okukkiriza kwange nga kuseebengerera." 
Psalms73:3 Abeekulumbaza nabakwatirwa obuggya, nga ndaba ababi bwe bali obulungi." 
Psalms73:4 Bo tebalina kibaluma, balamu era ba maanyi." 
Psalms73:5 Tebabonaabona ng'abalala, tebalumwa ng'abalala." 
Psalms73:6 Kyebava beeyambika amalala ng'omukuufu, ne beebunya obukambwe ng'ekyambalo." 
Psalms73:7 Bagezze ne bakanuka amaaso, emitima gibajjudde obugwenyufu." 
Psalms73:8 Baduula, era boogera bakudaala, beewaana ne batiisatiisa abalala." 
Psalms73:9 Boogera ebinyooma Katonda ali mu ggulu, banyooma n'abantu be ku nsi." 
Psalms73:10 Abantu kyebava bakyukira gye bali, bye boogera ne babikkiriza." 
Psalms73:11 Ne bagamba nti: “Katonda alimanya atya? Ddala Atenkanika amanya?” 
Psalms73:12 Ababi bwe batyo bwe baba. Bali bulungi bulijjo, bongera kugaggawala." 
Psalms73:13 Mazima nteganidde bwereere okwekuuma obutayonoonanga? 
Psalms73:14 Mbonaabona okuzibya obudde ne mbonerezebwa buli nkya. 
Psalms73:15 Singa nayogera bwe ntyo, sandikoze ng'omu ku babo." 
Psalms73:16 Nagezaako ndowooze ntegeere ekyo, ne nnemererwa ne nsirika." 
Psalms73:17 Okutuusa lwe nayingirako mu kifo kya Katonda ekitukuvu, ne ntegeera enkomerero yaabwe." 
Psalms73:18 Ddala obateeka awali obuseerezi, bagwe bazikirire." 
Psalms73:19 Tebalwa kuggwaawo, ne bazikirizibwa entiisa." 
Psalms73:20 Bayita ng'ekirooto ky'oku makya: ggwe Mukama w'oligolokokera, nga tewakyali gw'olabako." 
Psalms73:21 Bwe nali ndowoolereza, ne nnumwa ne nennyamira." 
Psalms73:22 Nali musiru ng'ensolo, nga sikutegeera ggwe." 
Psalms73:23 Naye ndi wamu naawe bulijjo, era ggwe onkutte ku mukono." 
Psalms73:24 Kaakano nnuŋŋamya ompabule, onnyingize mu kitiibwa oluvannyuma." 
Psalms73:25 Ani gwe nnina mu ggulu wabula ggwe? Kiki ku nsi kye njagala okuggyako ggwe? 
Psalms73:26 Nzenna ne bwe mba n'obunafu, mu nze Katonda ge maanyi. Ye ye wange emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms73:27 Abakwewala balitokomoka, olizikiriza abatali beesigwa abakulekawo." 
Psalms73:28 Naye nze kirungi nsemberere Katonda, ye gwe mba nfuula ekiddukiro kyange ndyoke mmanyisenga byonna by'akola." 
Psalms74:1 Ayi Katonda, lwaki watusuula ennaku zonna? Endiga ez'omu ddundiro lyo olizisunguwalira butamala?" 
Psalms74:2 Jjukira abantu be weefunira okuva edda, be wanunula babe eggwanga eriryo ddala. Jjukira Olusozi Siyooni kwe wabeeranga." 
Psalms74:3 Lambula ebifo ebisigadde nga matongo. Mu kifo ekitukuvu, omulabe yazikiriza byonna." 
Psalms74:4 Abalabe bo baawogganira mu kifo mw'otukuŋŋaanyiza, ne basimbamu bbendera zaabwe, okulaga bwe bawangudde." 
Psalms74:5 Baafaanana ng'abakutte embazzi okutema emiti mu kibira. 
Psalms74:6 Baamenya ebibajje byonna ne babyasisa embazzi n'ennyondo. 
Psalms74:7 Ekifo kyo ekitukuvu baakikumako omuliro, Essinzizo lyo baalinyooma ne balizikiriza." 
Psalms74:8 Baateesa okutuzikiririza ddala, ne bookya ebifo ebitukuvu byonna ebiri mu ggwanga." 
Psalms74:9 Obubonero bwaffe obutukuvu tebukyaliwo tetukyalina na mulanzi. Era mu ffe tewali amanyi embeera eriwo lw'erikoma. 
Psalms74:10 Ayi Mukama, abalabe balituusa wa okukuvuma? Erinnya lyo balirivvoola ennaku zonna?" 
Psalms74:11 Lwaki ogaana okuba ne ky'okolawo? Lwaki emikono gyo ogizingira ku kifuba kyo? 
Psalms74:12 Naye obadde Kabaka waffe okuva edda, ayi Katonda. Ggwe Mulokozi waffe bulijjo." 
Psalms74:13 Ennyanja wagigabanyaamu wabiri n'amaanyi go, wamulungula emitwe gy'agasolo mu mazzi." 
Psalms74:14 Wabetenta emitwe gya Lukwata, ekikulejje ky'omu nnyanja, n'okigabula ab'omu ddungu." 
Psalms74:15 Waggulira ensulo n'obugga, ate n'okaza emigga eminene." 
Psalms74:16 Emisana n'ekiro bibyo, wateeka enjuba n'omwezi mu bifo byabyo." 
Psalms74:17 Wateekawo ensalo zonna ez'ensi, n'oteekawo ebiseera eby'ekyeya n'eby'obutiti." 
Psalms74:18 Naye jjukira ayi Mukama, abalabe bwe bakuvuma, n'ababi bwe bakunyooma." 
Psalms74:19 Abantu bo abateeyinza, tobalekera balabe baabwe bakambwe. Obulamu bw'abanaku bo tobwerabira ennaku zonna." 
Psalms74:20 Jjukira endagaano gye wakola naffe, kubanga eby'obukambwe bikolebwa buli awakutte ekizikiza mu nsi eno." 
Psalms74:21 Abayigganyizibwa tobaleka kuswazibwa, abaavu n'abanaku bakutenderezenga." 
Psalms74:22 Ayi Katonda yanguwa olwanirire ekitiibwa kyo, jjukira ng'ababi bwe bakuvuma olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms74:23 Teweerabira okuboggola kw'abalabe bo, n'okuleekaana kw'abakuwalanya obutasalako." 
Psalms75:1 Tukwebaza ayi Katonda, tukwebaza kubanga oli kumpi nga twogera ku by'okola ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms75:2 Waŋŋamba nti: “Mu kiseera kye ndigera, ndisala omusango mu mazima." 
Psalms75:3 Ensi bw'eyuuguuma n'ebigirimu byonna, nze ŋŋumya empagi zaayo." 
Psalms75:4 Ŋŋamba abeewaana nti: ‘Mulekenga okwewaana.’ N'ababi nti: ‘Mulemenga okwekulumbaza. 
Psalms75:5 Mulekere awo okwewanika, n'okwogera nga muduuluka.’ ”" 
Psalms75:6 Okugulumizibwa tekuva buvanjuba, wadde ebugwanjuba oba wadde mu ddungu." 
Psalms75:7 Naye Katonda ye mulamuzi atoowaza omu, n'agulumiza omulala." 
Psalms75:8 Mukama akutte mu ngalo ze ekikopo ky'omwenge omuka ogw'obusungu bwe. Alikifuka, ababi bonna ne bakinywa, ne bakimalamu." 
Psalms75:9 Naye nze siirekengayo kwogera ku Katonda wa Yakobo, siirekengayo kuyimba okumutendereza." 
Psalms75:10 Alizikiriza obuyinza bw'ababi bwonna, naye obw'abalungi bulyeyongera obungi." 
Psalms76:1 Katonda amanyiddwa mu nsi ya Yuda erinnya lye kkulu mu Yisirayeli. 
Psalms76:2 Ekisulo kye kiri mu Yerusaalemu, abeera ku Lusozi Siyooni." 
Psalms76:3 Eyo gye yamenyera obusaale bw'omulabe, n'engabo wamu n'ebitala, n'ebyokulwanyisa ebirala." 
Psalms76:4 Oli waakitiibwa, ayi Katonda, ng'ova mu nsozi gye wawangulira abalabe bo." 
Psalms76:5 Abalwanyi baabwe abazira, byonna bye baalina binyagiddwa, kati beebase obutakyassa. Amaanyi gaabwe n'obuzira tebyabagasa." 
Psalms76:6 Bwe wakangisaamu oti, ayi Katonda wa Yakobo, embalaasi n'abazeebagala baagwa eri ne balambaala!" 
Psalms76:7 Naye ggwe oli wa ntiisa! Aluwa akutambaala ng'omaze okusunguwala? 
Psalms76:8 Wamanyisa ensala y'omusango evudde mu ggulu. Ensi n'etya n'esirika," 
Psalms76:9 ng'osituse okulaga bw'ogusaze okulokola abanyigirizibwa ku nsi. 
Psalms76:10 Ddala obusungu bw'abantu bwongera kukuweesa kitiibwa. Abaliwona entalo balikutendereza nga bajaguza. 
Psalms76:11 Mukama Katonda wammwe mumuwe bye mumusuubizza. Bonna abamwetoolodde bamuleetere ebirabo, oyo agwanira okutiibwa." 
Psalms76:12 Atoowaza abalangira abakulu, n'atiisa bakabaka mu buli ggwanga." 
Psalms77:1 Nkaaba ne ntemera Katonda omulanga, nkaaba, naye n'ampulira." 
Psalms77:2 Nga ndi mu kabi nsaba Mukama, nsitula emikono gyange ekiro kyonna ne gitaddirira, naye ne mbulwa ekikubagizo." 
Psalms77:3 Bwe ndowooza ku Katonda ne neeraliikirira. Bwe ndoowolereza, amaanyi ne gakendeera." 
Psalms77:4 Taŋŋanya kusumagirako ekiro kyonna, nkoowa nnyo, n'okwogera kulema." 
Psalms77:5 Ndowooza ku nnaku eziyise, ku myaka egy'ebiseera eby'edda." 
Psalms77:6 Ndowooza mu kiro kyonna, mu mutima ne nneebuuza nti:" 
Psalms77:7 “Mukama aboolera ddala ennaku zonna? Era taliddayo kutusanyukira? 
Psalms77:8 Takyasaasira n'akatono? Ne bye yasuubiza bikomye awo? 
Psalms77:9 Katonda eby'okusaasira abyerabidde? Obusungu bumumazeeko ekisa?” 
Psalms77:10 Era ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nga zinsanze? Katonda amaanyi ge gakyuseeko!” 
Psalms77:11 Nzijukira ebikolwa bya Mukama ebyamagero bye yakolanga edda," 
Psalms77:12 ndowoolereza bye yakola byonna, ne mmanya bwe biri ebikulu." 
Psalms77:13 Ayi Katonda, by'okola bitukuvu, oli mukulu, ani alikwenkana?" 
Psalms77:14 Ggwe Katonda akola ebyamagero, walaga amaanyi go mu mawanga." 
Psalms77:15 Wanunula abantu bo n'amaanyi, bazzukulu ba Yakobo ne Yosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Ayi Katonda, amazzi gaakutya bwe gaakulaba, wakankanya obuziba bw'ennyanja." 
Psalms77:17 Ebire byayiwa amazzi, eggulu lyabwatuka, ebimyanso ne bibuna wonna!" 
Psalms77:18 Eddoboozi ly'okubwatuka kwo, ne liba mu kikuŋŋunta, okumyansa ne kumulisa byonna. Ensi yakankana, yayuuguuma!" 
Psalms77:19 Watema ekkubo mu nnyanja, n'empenda zo mu mazzi amangi. Naye mw'oyise temwalabika." 
Psalms77:20 Wakulembera ababo ng'endiga zo, nga balabirirwa Musa ne Arooni." 
Psalms78:1 Mmwe bantu bange muwulire bye njigiriza. Mutege amatu njogere. 
Psalms78:2 Nja kwogera mu lugero nja kwatula ebikusike eby'edda," 
Psalms78:3 bye twamanya, bye twawulira, ebyatubuulirwa bajjajjaffe." 
Psalms78:4 Tetulibikisa baana ab'omulembe oguliddirira. Tulibabuulira obuyinza bwa Mukama ne bye yakola ebikulu, awamu n'ebyamagero." 
Psalms78:5 Yawa ebiragiro bazzukulu ba Yakobo, mu Yisirayeli amateeka yagassaamu. Kwe kukuutira bajjajjaffe bagayigirize abazzukulu." 
Psalms78:6 Gamanyibwe ab'emirembe egiriddirira, nabo bagamanyise be bazaala." 
Psalms78:7 Era bwe batyo na bano balyoke beesigenga Katonda, baleme kwerabira bikolwa bya Mukama, naye bakwatenga amateeka ge." 
Psalms78:8 Baleme kuba nga bajjajjaabwe abaakakanyala ne bajeema. Abataanywera mu kwesiganga Katonda, era nga si beesigwa gy'ali." 
Psalms78:9 Aba Efurayimu nga balina obusaale n'emitego badda emabega ku lunaku lw'olutalo. 
Psalms78:10 Endagaano ya Katonda baagimenya, ne bajeemera amateeka ge." 
Psalms78:11 Bye yali akoze tebaabijjukira, ne bye yabalaga ebyamagero." 
Psalms78:12 Mu maaso ga bajjajjaabwe we yakolera ebyewuunyo, mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu kisenyi ky'e Zowani." 
Psalms78:13 Yayawuza mu nnyanja, ne bagiyitamu wakati. Yayimiriza amazzi, ne gafaanana entuumu." 
Psalms78:14 Yabakulembera na kire emisana, ate ekiro kyonna na mumuli gwa muliro." 
Psalms78:15 Yayasa amayinja mu ddungu, n'abanywesa amazzi agava ebuziba." 
Psalms78:16 Olwazi yaluggyamu ensulo z'amazzi, amazzi ne gakulukuta ng'emigga." 
Psalms78:17 Naye ne bongera okwonoona, mu ddungu ne bajeemera Atenkanika." 
Psalms78:18 Ne bakema Mukama mu bugenderevu, nga bamusaba ebyokulya bye baayagala." 
Psalms78:19 Ne boogera obubi ku Katonda: baagamba nti: “Katonda ayinza okuteekateeka emmere mu ddungu? 
Psalms78:20 Weewaawo yakuba olwazi ne luvaamu amazzi. Gaayiika ne gafuuka emigga egy'amaanyi. Era ayinza abantu be okubawa ennyama n'emmere kaakati?” 
Psalms78:21 Mukama bwe yawulira ebyo, yasunguwala, n'akuma ku ba Yakobo omuliro, ku Bayisirayeli, obusungu bwe ne bunyooka," 
Psalms78:22 kubanga Katonda tebaamukkiriza, era tebeesiga nti ye abalokola!" 
Psalms78:23 Kyokka yagamba ebire mu bbanga, yalagira eggulu lyeggulewo," 
Psalms78:24 n'abawa emmere eyalivaamu: n'atonnyesa mannu gye banaalya. 
Psalms78:25 Awo abantu ne balya ku mmere ey'abamalayika, gye yabawa ne bakkuta." 
Psalms78:26 Embuyaga eva ebuvanjuba yagikunsa, era amaanyi ge ne galeeta eyo eva mu bukiikaddyo." 
Psalms78:27 N'abaweereza ennyama eyaze ng'enfuufu: ze nnyonyi ennyingi ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja. 
Psalms78:28 Ne zigwa we basiisidde, okwetooloola ensiisira zaabwe." 
Psalms78:29 Awo abantu ne balya ne bakkuta, yabawa kye baali beegomba." 
Psalms78:30 Naye baali bakyalya, ng'era bakyalina amaddu," 
Psalms78:31 Katonda n'abasunguwalira: n'abattamu abo abasinga okuba ab'amaanyi. Yisirayeli n'afiirwa abavubuka embulakalevu. 
Psalms78:32 Newaakubadde ebyo baabiraba, era tebaalekayo kwonoona. Wadde yabalaga ebyamagero, beerema, tebaamukkiriza." 
Psalms78:33 Naye kwe kubeerawo ng'enfuufu, era obulamu bwabwe ne babumala mu kutya." 
Psalms78:34 Buli lwe yabattangamu abantu, abalamu ne beenenya, ne bamusemberera." 
Psalms78:35 Ne bajjukira nti Katonda ye abakuuma, era nti Katonda Atenkanika Ye Mulokozi waabwe." 
Psalms78:36 Mu bigambo baamutendanga naye nga bulimba bwereere. 
Psalms78:37 Tebaabanga beesigwa gy'ali: endagaano ye tebaagikuumanga. 
Psalms78:38 Wabula Katonda ye, yabakwatirwanga kisa, n'abasonyiwa ebisobyo. Era teyabasaanyaawo. Emirundi mingi era ng'obusungu bwe abufuga, ne butabaggweerako bwonna." 
Psalms78:39 Yajjukira nti bantu abalifa, era mbuyaga ekunta n'etedda." 
Psalms78:40 Emirundi mingi gye baamujeemera mu ddungu, ne bamunyiiriza mu lukoola." 
Psalms78:41 Nga bamugeza lutata, ne banyiiza Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Beerabira obuyinza bwe, n'olunaku lwe yabawonya omulabe," 
Psalms78:43 bwe yakola ebyewuunyo bye e Misiri n'ebyamagero mu kisenyi ky'e Zowani. 
Psalms78:44 Emigga yagifuula omusaayi, Abamisiri ne babulwa amazzi ge banywa." 
Psalms78:45 Yabasindikira ebibinja by'ensowera ezaabaluma, n'ebikere ebyabazikiriza." 
Psalms78:46 Bye balimye yabigabira obuwuka, era n'enzige ne zibyeriira." 
Psalms78:47 Omuzira gwakuba emizabbibu gyabwe, n'emiti emitiini tegwagitaliza." 
Psalms78:48 Ente zaabwe yazitta n'omuzira, endiga ne zikubwa laddu." 
Psalms78:49 Yabaleetera okunakuwala, ng'abayiwako obusungu bwe n'ekiruyi, bye yabatumira abazikirize." 
Psalms78:50 Teyaziyiza busungu bwe, wadde okusaasira obulamu bwabwe, wabula yabassa kawumpuli." 
Psalms78:51 Yatta abaggulanda bonna mu Misiri, abasinga amaanyi mu maka ga Haamu." 
Psalms78:52 Olwo n'akulembera abantu be ng'endiga ze, n'abaluŋŋamya ng'eggana lye abayise mu ddungu." 
Psalms78:53 N'abakulembera mirembe ne batatya. Naye abalabe baabwe ne bamiribwa ennyanja. 
Psalms78:54 N'atuusa abantu be mu nsi ye entukuvu, ku lusozi yennyini lwe yawangula." 
Psalms78:55 Abantu be olwajja, ensi n'agigobamu abalimu, n'agiwa ebika bya Yisirayeli, n'ennyumba za bali, n'azigabira abazze." 
Psalms78:56 Naye ne bageza Katonda Atenkanika, ne batawulira biragiro bye." 
Psalms78:57 Wabula ne badda emabega, ne bakuusakuusa nga bajjajjaabwe, ne beekyusiza mu kiti ng'embazzi." 
Psalms78:58 Baamusunguwaza olw'amasabo gaabwe ag'oku nsozi, ne bamunyiiza nnyo olw'ebifaananyi ebyole." 
Psalms78:59 Katonda bwe yalaba ebyo n'asunguwala, n'atamwa nnyo abantu ba Yisirayeli." 
Psalms78:60 N'ava mu weema ye mu Siilo gye yabeerangamu ng'ali mu bo. 
Psalms78:61 Akabonero akategeeza obuyinza bwe, n'akaleka okunyagibwa abalabe." 
Psalms78:62 Yasunguwalira abantu be, n'abaleka battibwe n'ekitala." 
Psalms78:63 Omuliro ne gutta abavubuka baabwe, bawala baabwe ne babulwa abawasa." 
Psalms78:64 Bakabona baabwe battibwa n'ebitala, bannamwandu baabwe tebaakaaba." 
Psalms78:65 Olwo nno Mukama n'aba ng'azuukuka mu tulo, era ng'omuzira akyamuddwa omwenge." 
Psalms78:66 N'agoba abalabe be ne badda amabega, ne bakwatibwa ensonyi ezitalikoma" 
Psalms78:67 Kyokka n'aboola bazzukulu ba Yosefu, n'atalonda kika kya Efurayimu." 
Psalms78:68 Wabula ekika kya Yuda kye yalonda, n'Olusozi Siyooni lw'ayagala." 
Psalms78:69 N'azimbako ekifo kye ekitukuvu, ekiri ng'ensozi obugulumivu. Ne kinywera ggulugulu ng'ensi, gye yanywereza ddala ennaku zonna." 
Psalms78:70 N'alonda omuweereza we Dawudi, gwe yaggya mu malundiro gye yali" 
Psalms78:71 ng'alabirira endiga eziyonsa kati alabirire aba Yakobo, Abayisirayeli abantu ba Mukama." 
Psalms78:72 Yabalabirira mu mwoyo omulungi, ng'abafuga n'amagezi." 
Psalms79:1 Ayi Katonda, ab'amawanga amalala balumbye ensi yo, ne boonoona Essinzizo lyo ettukuvu, Yerusaalemu bakirese matongo." 
Psalms79:2 Emirambo gy'abaweereza bo bagigabulidde ensega zigirye. Egy'abeesigwa bo, bagiwadde nsolo okugirya." 
Psalms79:3 Baayiwa omusaayi gw'abantu bo, ng'abayiwa amazzi, ne wataba wa kubaziika!" 
Psalms79:4 Tuvumibwa abatwetoolodde, batujerega nga beesekera." 
Psalms79:5 Ayi Mukama, olituusa wa? Olisunguwalira ennaku zonna? Obusungu bwo bulibuubuuka ng'omuliro?" 
Psalms79:6 Sunguwalira abo ab'amawanga agatakumanyi, n'ab'omu bwakabaka obutakusinza." 
Psalms79:7 Batta abantu ba Yakobo, ne bazikiriza ekifo kyabwe." 
Psalms79:8 Totubonereza lwa bibi bya bajjajjaffe. Yanguwa okutukwatirwa ekisa, kubanga tufeebezebwa nnyo." 
Psalms79:9 Tuyambe ayi Katonda, tulokole, olw'ekitiibwa kyo tuwonye, era tusonyiwe ebibi byaffe." 
Psalms79:10 Lwaki ab'amawanga amalala banditubuuzizza nti: “Katonda wammwe ali ludda wa?” Tulage bw'obonereza amawanga olw'omusaayi gw'abaweereza bo ogwayiibwa. 
Psalms79:11 Wuliriza okusinda kw'abasibe. Mu buyinza bwo obungi owonye ababadde ab'okutta. 
Psalms79:12 Ayi Mukama, baliraanwa baffe baddize emirundi musanvu ebivumo bye baatuvuma." 
Psalms79:13 Olwo ffe ababo, endiga z'omu kisibo kyo, tunaakwebazanga bulijjo, tukutenderezenga ennaku zonna." 
Psalms80:1 Ayi Omusumba alunda Yisirayeli, wulira, ggwe akulembera Yosefu ng'eggana ly'endiga, ggwe atuula wakati wa bakerubi." 
Psalms80:2 Weeyoleke Efurayimu ne Benyamiini ne Manasse. Situka n'amaanyi go ojje otulokole. 
Psalms80:3 Ggwe tuzze mu nteeko, ayi Katonda, tulage ekisa kyo, otulokole." 
Psalms80:4 Ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, olituusa wa okusunguwalira okwegayirira kw'abantu bo?" 
Psalms80:5 Otugabula maziga ng'emmere yaffe, era g'otuwa mu bungi tunywe." 
Psalms80:6 Otuleka ne tuyombagana ne baliraanwa baffe, abalabe baffe ne beesekera." 
Psalms80:7 Ggwe tuzze mu nteeko, ayi Katonda Nnannyinimagye, tulage ekisa tulokoke." 
Psalms80:8 Ggwe waggya omuzabbibu e Misiri, ab'amawanga amalala n'obagoba mu nsi yaabwe, n'ogusimbamu, ne gubuna ensi eyo." 
Psalms80:9 Wagulimirira, ne gusimba nnyo emirandira." 
Psalms80:10 Ekisiikirize kyagwo ne kibikka ensozi, amatabi gaagwo ne gabikka emivule emiwanvu." 
Psalms80:11 Gaalanda okutuuka ku nnyanja, n'okutuuka ku Mugga Ewufuraate." 
Psalms80:12 Wamenyera ki enkomera ezigwetoolodde? Kaakati bonna abayitawo beenogera ebibala byagwo! 
Psalms80:13 Embizzi ez'omu ttale zigulinnyirira, n'ebisolo byonna eby'omu nsiko bigwonoona." 
Psalms80:14 Ayi Katonda Nnannyinimagye, kyuka otunuleko wansi ng'osinziira mu ggulu, olabe era oggyire omuzabbibu gwo ogwo," 
Psalms80:15 ggwe wennyini gwe wasimba, n'ogukuza nga gwa maanyi." 
Psalms80:16 Abalabe bagwokezza omuliro ne bagutemawo. Batunuulize bukambwe, obazikirize." 
Psalms80:17 Kuuma otaase abantu be walonda babe babo, eggwanga lye wafuula ery'amaanyi." 
Psalms80:18 Tetukyaddamu kukuvaako, tukuume nga tuli balamu, olwo tunaakutenderezanga." 
Psalms80:19 Ggwe tuzze mu nteeko, ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, tulage ekisa kyo tulokoke." 
Psalms81:1 Katonda atuwa amaanyi mumuyimbire nnyo, muyimbire Katonda wa Yakobo nga musanyuka." 
Psalms81:2 Mukoleeze oluyimba, mukube ensaasi, mukube ennanga ennungi n'amadinda." 
Psalms81:3 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe ng'omwezi kye gujje guboneke. Mufuuwe nga gwa ggabogabo, ku lunaku olw'embaga yaffe." 
Psalms81:4 Eryo lye tteeka mu Yisirayeli, kiragiro kya Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Yakiragira Yosefu, bwe yalumba ensi y'e Misiri. Nawulira eddoboozi lye simanyi nti:" 
Psalms81:6 “Nabatikkula omugugu, ne mbawonya okusitula obusero." 
Psalms81:7 Bwe mwali mu buyinike obungi, mwankoowoola ne mbawonya. Nabaddamu nga nneekwese mu kubwatuka kw'eggulu. Nabagereza ku mazzi g'e Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 “Abantu bange, muwulire mbabuulirira. Yisirayeli, singa okkiriza n'ompulira!" 
Psalms81:9 Mu mmwe temuubenga na mulala gwe musinza wabula nze Katonda. 
Psalms81:10 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Mwasamye akamwa kammwe, nja kukajjuza." 
Psalms81:11 “Naye abantu bange tebampulira, Yisirayeli teyanneewa." 
Psalms81:12 Nange nabaleka gye baalemera, bagoberere bye baayagala." 
Psalms81:13 Singa nno abantu bange kale baawuliriza kye ŋŋamba! Singa Yisirayeli akola bye ndagira! 
Psalms81:14 Nandyanguye okubawonya abalabe, n'okuwangula ababawalanya." 
Psalms81:15 “Nandijeemuludde abankyawa, ne batabonerezebwa ennaku zonna." 
Psalms81:16 Nandibagabudde mmwe eŋŋaano ennungi n'omubisi gw'enjuki ogw'omu ttale.” 
Psalms82:1 Katonda ye akulira olukiiko olw'omu ggulu, n'asala emisango mu balubaale nti:" 
Psalms82:2 “Mulituusa wa okusala emisango awatali mazima, n'okwekubiira ku ludda lw'ababi?" 
Psalms82:3 Musalirenga abaavu ne bamulekwa baweebwenga ebyabwe ebibasaanidde. 
Psalms82:4 Mubeerenga ba mazima eri abeetaaga n'abateeyamba. Mubawonyenga obuyinza bw'ababi. 
Psalms82:5 “Temuliiko kye mumanyi, temutegeera mmwe. Mu nzikiza mwe mutambulira, mumazeewo obwenkanya mu nsi." 
Psalms82:6 Nagamba nti: ‘Muli balubaale mmwe, mwenna muli baana ba Atenkanika.’" 
Psalms82:7 Naye mulifa ng'abantu, muggweewo ng'abantu, muggweewo ng'abalangira abalala.”" 
Psalms82:8 Jjangu ayi Katonda, osalire ensi omusango, kubanga amawanga gonna gago." 
Psalms83:1 Ayi Katonda tosirika busirisi, wadde okubeera awo, ayi Katonda, nga toliiko ky'ofaayo." 
Psalms83:2 Kubanga abalabe bo baabano beediimye, n'abakukyawa bajagaladde." 
Psalms83:3 Basalira abantu bo enkwe. Bateesa okukola akabi ku bantu bo b'okuuma. 
Psalms83:4 Bagamba nti: “Mujje, tubazikirize, balemenga okuba eggwanga, erinnya Yisirayeli lyerabirwe!”" 
Psalms83:5 Bateesa ne bakkaanya ne balagaana okukukolako akabi: 
Psalms83:6 Aba Edomu n'aba Yisimayeli, ab'e Mowaabu n'Abakaguri," 
Psalms83:7 ab'e Gabali ne Ammoni, ab'e Amaleki, Filistiya ne Tiiro." 
Psalms83:8 Era ne Assiriya yeegasse nabo, bayambe abazzukulu ba Looti." 
Psalms83:9 Ggwe bakole kye wakola Abamidiyaani ne Sisera ne Yabini ku Mugga Kisoni," 
Psalms83:10 abaazikirizibwa mu Endori ne bafuuka ng'obusa ku ttaka. 
Psalms83:11 Abakungu baabwe obafuule nga Horebu ne Zeebu. Abalangira baabwe babe nga Zeba ne Zalumunna," 
Psalms83:12 abaagamba nti: “Twetwalire ensi ya Katonda ebeere yaffe.” 
Psalms83:13 Ayi Katonda wange, bafuule ng'enfuufu ey'akazimu, ng'ebisasiro embuyaga by'etwala." 
Psalms83:14 Ng'omuliro bwe gwokya ekibira, n'ennimi zaagwo nga bwe zookya ensozi," 
Psalms83:15 bagobaganye bw'otyo ne kibuyaga wo, obatiise n'embuyaga zo ez'amaanyi." 
Psalms83:16 Ayi Mukama, ggwe bajjuze okwebwalabwala, obakkirizise obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms83:17 Bakwatibwenga ensonyi, era batyenga bulijjo, bazikirire nga baswadde." 
Psalms83:18 Balyoke bamanye nti ggwe Mukama wekka, Omufuzi w'ensi zonna Atenkanika." 
Psalms84:1 W'obeera nga walungi, ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye!" 
Psalms84:2 Neegomba nnyo okulaba empya za Mukama. Nzenna olw'essanyu, nnyimbira Katonda Nnannyinibulamu." 
Psalms84:3 Weewaawo enkazaluggya zeezimbira ebisu, obutaayi nabwo bwekolera we bubiikira amagi gaabwo, okumpi n'alutaari zo, ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Kabaka wange era Katonda wange." 
Psalms84:4 Ba mukisa abo ababeera mu nnyumba yo, nga bayimba okukutendereza." 
Psalms84:5 Ba mukisa abo abeesiga ggwe, amaanyi be gaba mu ggwe, abalumirwa okulamaga e Siyooni." 
Psalms84:6 Nga bayita mu Kiwonvu Baka ekikalu, bakifuula ekivulula amazzi. Enkuba esooka ekijjuza ebidiba." 
Psalms84:7 Bagenda nga beeyongera amaanyi, okutuusa lwe balirabika mu maaso ga Katonda mu Siyooni." 
Psalms84:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, wulira okwegayirira kwange. Tega okutu ayi Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Ayi Mukama, atutaasa, tunuulira omusiige wo." 
Psalms84:10 Olunaku olumu mu mpya zo, lusinga olukumi ze mmala awalala. Nandisiimye okuyimirira ku mulyango ogw'ennyumba ya Katonda, okusinga okubeeranga mu mayumba g'aboonoonyi," 
Psalms84:11 kubanga Mukama Katonda ye Kabaka oweekitiibwa atutaasa. Abeegendereza taliiko kirungi ky'abamma. 
Psalms84:12 Ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye, omuntu akwesiga, nga wa mukisa!" 
Psalms85:1 Ayi Mukama, wayagala ensi yo, n'ozzaawo emikisa gya Yakobo." 
Psalms85:2 Waggyawo ebibi by'abantu bo, ensobi zaabwe n'ozisonyiwa zonna." 
Psalms85:3 Wakomya okubasunguwalira, n'okubakwatirwa ekiruyi." 
Psalms85:4 Ayi Katonda Omulokozi waffe, ggwe otuzze mu nteeko, okomye okutunyiigira." 
Psalms85:5 Onootusunguwaliranga ennaku zonna? Obusungu bwo tebulikoma? 
Psalms85:6 Ddamu okutwongera amaanyi, ffe ababo tukusanyukirenga ggwe." 
Psalms85:7 Tulage ekisa kyo ayi Mukama, otulokole." 
Psalms85:8 Ka mpulire Katonda Mukama ky'agamba, kubanga asuubiza mirembe ababe b'ayagala, bwe bataddayo mu busirusiru bwabwe." 
Psalms85:9 Ddala yeeteeseteese okulokola abo abamutya, ekitiibwa kiryoke kibeerenga mu nsi yaffe." 
Psalms85:10 Ekisa n'obwesigwa binaasisinkana, obutuukirivu n'emirembe binaanywegeragana." 
Psalms85:11 Obwesigwa bunaameruka mu nsi, obutuukirivu bunaasinziira mu ggulu ne butunula ku nsi." 
Psalms85:12 Ddala Mukama anaatuwa ebirungi, era ensi yaffe eneeba mu kyengera kingi." 
Psalms85:13 Obutuukirivu bunaakulembera Mukama, ne bumwerulira ekkubo." 
Psalms86:1 Ayi Mukama, tega okutu kwo onziremu, kubanga ndi mwavu ateeyamba." 
Psalms86:2 Kuuma obulamu bwange, ku ggwe kwe nnyweredde. Ayi ggwe Katonda wange, nze omuweereza wo akwesiga, ndokola!" 
Psalms86:3 Nkwatirwa ekisa, ayi Mukama, nkukoowoola olunaku lwonna." 
Psalms86:4 Nze omuweereza wo nsanyusa, ayi Mukama, omwoyo gwange nguyimusa gy'oli." 
Psalms86:5 Ayi Mukama, oli mulungi, osonyiwa, oli wa kisa kingi eri buli akukoowoola." 
Psalms86:6 Ayi Mukama, wulira kye nsaba, wuliriza okwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms86:7 Mu kiseera eky'obuyinike nkukoowoola, kubanga onziramu." 
Psalms86:8 Ggwe Katonda wekka, teri mulala yenkana nga ggwe, ayi Mukama, ggwe bye wakola teri mulala yali abikoze." 
Psalms86:9 Amawanga gonna ge wakola galijja ne gakuvuunamira, era galikugulumiza." 
Psalms86:10 Oli mukulu, okola ebyamagero, ggwe wekka ggwe Katonda." 
Psalms86:11 Njigiriza ekkubo ly'oyagala nkwate, ayi Mukama, nkuwulirenga. Luŋŋamya omutima gwange nkussengamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms86:12 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nnaakutenderezanga n'omutima gwange gwonna, nnaakugulumizanga emirembe gyonna," 
Psalms86:13 kubanga onkwatirwa ekisa kingi, wamponya obunnya bw'emagombe." 
Psalms86:14 Abeekulumbaza bansitukiddemu, ayi Mukama, ekibiina ky'abantu abatakuliiko kyagala kunzita." 
Psalms86:15 Naye ggwe ayi Mukama oli Katonda ow'ekisa era omusaasizi, alwawo okusunguwala, ajjudde ekisa n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms86:16 Kyukira gye ndi onkwatirwe ekisa, nze omuweereza wo ompe amaanyi, lokola omwana w'omuzaana wo." 
Psalms86:17 Mpa akabonero akalaga bw'oli omulungi, abankyawa baswale nga balaba bw'onnyambye era bw'onsanyusizza." 
Psalms87:1 Mukama yazimba ekibuga kye ku lusozi olutukuvu. 
Psalms87:2 Ayagala ekibuga kye Siyooni okusinga ebifo byonna ebya Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Ggwe ekibuga kya Katonda, oyogerwako ebyekitiibwa bino:" 
Psalms87:4 “Mu mawanga agammanyi, ndibaliramu Misiri ne Babilooniya. Ab'e Filistiya, Tiiro ne Etiyopiya ndibabalira mu bazaaliranwa b'e Siyooni.”" 
Psalms87:5 Siyooni kiryogerwako nti ab'eggwanga gundi ne gundi mu kyo bazaaliranwa. Era yennyini Atenkanika alikinyweza. 
Psalms87:6 Mukama aliwandiika abantu mu mawanga, n'ababala okuba abazaaliranwa b'e Siyooni." 
Psalms87:7 Abayimbi n'abazinyi bagamba nti: “Emikisa gyaffe gisibuka mu ggwe.” 
Psalms88:1 Ayi Mukama Katonda Omulokozi wange, nkaaba olunaku lwonna, n'ekiro nzija gy'oli." 
Psalms88:2 Wulira kye nsaba, wulira bwe nkaaba!" 
Psalms88:3 Obuyinike nnina bungi, era nsemberedde emagombe." 
Psalms88:4 Mbalirwa mu bakka mu bunnya, ndi awo sirina buyambi." 
Psalms88:5 Ndekeddwa nzekka mu bafu, ndi ng'abattibwa, abagalamira mu ntaana, b'otokyajjukira era b'otokyayamba." 
Psalms88:6 Ontadde mu bunnya obusse ennyo, mu bifo eby'ekizikiza, eby'ebuziba." 
Psalms88:7 Obusungu bwo bunnyigiriza nnyo, amayengo gaabwo gambonyaabonya." 
Psalms88:8 Onjawukanyizza n'ab'emikwano, onfudde kyenyinyalwa gye bali. Nsibiddwa mwe siyinza kuva." 
Psalms88:9 Amaaso gankambira olw'okunakuwala. Buli lunaku nkowoola ggwe, ayi Mukama, ne nkugololera emikono." 
Psalms88:10 Abafu b'olikolera ebyamagero? Be balivaayo ne bakutendereza? 
Psalms88:11 Ekisa kyo kiritenderwa mu ntaana, n'obwesigwa bwo mu kifo eky'okuzikirira?" 
Psalms88:12 Ebyamagero byo birimanyirwa mu kizikiza, n'obulungi bwo mu nsi y'abeerabirwa?" 
Psalms88:13 Ayi Mukama, nkukoowoola, era buli olukya nkusaba." 
Psalms88:14 Lwaki Mukama onsuulirira? Lwaki kaakano onneekweka? 
Psalms88:15 Mbonaabona ne nkaaba, okuviira ddala mu buto, ontiisa ne neeraliikirira." 
Psalms88:16 Obusungu bwo bummalawo, onzikiriza n'ebintiisa." 
Psalms88:17 Olunaku lwonna binneetooloola ng'engezi ezikulukuta, bintaayiza enjuyi zonna." 
Psalms88:18 Abammanyi n'abanjagala onjawukanyizza nabo. Gye ndi nayo yokka ye nzikiza. 
Psalms89:1 Nnaayimbanga ku kisa kyo, ayi Mukama ennaku zonna. Obwesigwa bwo nnaabutenderezanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms89:2 Ekisa kyo kya mirembe gyonna, obwesigwa bwo tebuggwaawo, buli ng'eggulu obugumu." 
Psalms89:3 Wagamba nti: “Nkoze endagaano ne gwe nnonze. Omuweereza wange Dawudi mmusuubizza nti: 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ezzadde lyo ndirikuuma ennaku zonna, n'entebe yo ey'obwakabaka ndiginyweza emirembe gyonna.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Mu ggulu abatukuvu gye bakuŋŋaanidde banaatenderezanga ebyamagero byo, n'obwesigwa bwo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms89:6 Mu ggulu teri n'omu akwenkana ggwe, ayi Mukama. Ani mu b'omu ggulu ali nga ggwe?" 
Psalms89:7 Otiibwa mu lukiiko lw'abatukuvu, otiibwa nnyo mu bakwetoolodde." 
Psalms89:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, teri alina buyinza nga ggwe, ayi Mukama. Oli mwesigwa mu byonna." 
Psalms89:9 Ggwe ofuga obusungu bw'ennyanja, okkakkanya amayengo agatumbiira." 
Psalms89:10 Ekikulejje Rahabu wakibetenta n'okitta. Abalabe bo wabasaasaanya n'obuyinza bwo obw'amaanyi. 
Psalms89:11 Eggulu liryo, n'ensi yiyo, n'ebibirimu ggwe wabikola." 
Psalms89:12 Watonda obukiikakkono n'obukiikaddyo. Ensozi Tabori ne Herumooni zikuyimbira nga zisanyuka. 
Psalms89:13 Oli wa buyinza nnyo ggwe, oli nnantawangulwa ow'amaanyi." 
Psalms89:14 Entebe y'obwakabaka bwo eteekeddwa mu butuukirivu ne mu mazima. Okolera ku kisa na ku bwesigwa. 
Psalms89:15 Ba mukisa abakuyimbira nga basanyuka, ne bagabana ku ssanyu lyo, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms89:16 Olunaku lwonna ne basanyuka ku lulwo, ne batendereza obulungi bwo," 
Psalms89:17 kubanga obawa ekitiibwa era n'amaanyi. Olw'ekisa kyo otuwa ffe obuwanguzi. 
Psalms89:18 Ayi Mukama, ggwe walonda atutaasa, ggwe Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, ggwe watuwa kabaka waffe." 
Psalms89:19 Mu biro biri eby'edda abaweereza bo abeesigwa wabalabikira n'ogamba nti: “Ow'amaanyi gwe nnyambye. Ngulumizza oyo eyalondebwa mu bantu. 
Psalms89:20 Omuweereza wange Dawudi mmuwadde obwakabaka, nga mmufukako omuzigo omutukuvu." 
Psalms89:21 Amaanyi gange ganaabanga naye, obuyinza bwange bunaamuwanga amaanyi." 
Psalms89:22 Abalabe be tebaamujoogenga, talitoowazibwa babi." 
Psalms89:23 Ndibetenta ng'alaba abalwanagana naye, nditta abamukyawa." 
Psalms89:24 Obwesigwa bwange n'ekisa kyange binaabeeranga naye. Ndimuwa okuwangula. 
Psalms89:25 Obwakabaka bwe ndibugaziya okuva ku nnyanja Eyaawakati, okutuuka ku Mugga Ewufuraate." 
Psalms89:26 Anaŋŋambanga nti: ‘Ggwe kitange era Katonda wange, ggwe ontaasa era ggwe ondokola.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndimufuula asooka mu bonna, asinga bakabaka bonna ku nsi." 
Psalms89:28 Nnaabeeranga wa kisa gy'ali bulijjo, ndinyweza endagaano yange naye." 
Psalms89:29 Ezzadde lye ndiriwangaaza ennaku zonna, mu bazzukulu be temulibula kabaka." 
Psalms89:30 “Bazzukulu be bwe balijeemera amateeka gange, ne bava ku bye mbalagira okukola," 
Psalms89:31 bwe balinyooma bye nateekawo, ne bamenya ebiragiro byange," 
Psalms89:32 ndibakuba olw'ensobi zaabwe, ndibabonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Psalms89:33 Wabula ndisigala nkyamukwatirwa ekisa, ndisigala ndi mwesigwa gy'ali." 
Psalms89:34 Sirimenya ndagaano yange naye, sirijjulula ku bye mmusuubizza." 
Psalms89:35 “Nneerayirira namala: Dawudi sirimulimba. 
Psalms89:36 Ezzadde lye liribeerera ennaku zonna, obwakabaka bwe mbukuumenga ng'enjuba bwe ngibeesaawo." 
Psalms89:37 Buliba ng'omwezi ku ggulu bwe guli: kalabaalaba atakoowa kuboneka.” 
Psalms89:38 Naye ogobye era osudde omusiige wo, kaakano omusunguwalidde." 
Psalms89:39 Endagaano yo n'omuweereza wo ogimenyeewo, engule ye ogisudde mu nfuufu." 
Psalms89:40 Enkomera z'ekibuga kye ozimenye, ebigo bye obifudde matongo." 
Psalms89:41 Abayitawo bonna beenyagira ebibye, baliraanwa be bamusekerera." 
Psalms89:42 Abalabe be obawadde okuwangula, abatamwagala ne basanyuka." 
Psalms89:43 Ebyokulwanyisa bye obifudde bitagasa, mu lutalo omulese teyeeyinza." 
Psalms89:44 Ddamula ogumuggyeeko, osudde wansi entebe ye kw'afugira." 
Psalms89:45 Omukaddiyizza nga muto, era n'omuswazaswaza." 
Psalms89:46 Ayi Mukama, olituusa wa? Olyekwekera ennaku zonna? N'obusungu bwo bulikoma ddi okubuubuuka ng'omuliro?" 
Psalms89:47 Ayi Mukama, jjukira obulamu bwange bwe buli obumpi. Jjukira ng'abatonde bonna enkomerero yaabwe kufa." 
Psalms89:48 Ani omulamu atalifa? Ani alyewonya amagombe? 
Psalms89:49 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kiri ludda wa eky'edda, ggwe omwesigwa kye wasuubiza Dawudi?" 
Psalms89:50 Ayi Mukama, jjukira omuddu wo nga bwe nvumibwa. Ngumiikiriza ebivumo by'abantu." 
Psalms89:51 Ayi Mukama, abalabe bo bavuma omusiige wo, buli w'alaga bamuvuma." 
Psalms89:52 Mukama atenderezebwenga bulijjo! Amiina era Amiina. 
Psalms90:1 Ayi Mukama, okuva edda n'edda ggwe maka gaffe." 
Psalms90:2 Ng'ensozi tonnazitonda, era nga tonnabumba nsi n'ebyamu, ggwe Katonda emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms90:3 Abantu obazzaayo mu nfuufu, n'obagamba nti: “Muddeeyo gye mwasibuka.”" 
Psalms90:4 Emyaka olukumi ku ggwe giri ng'olunaku olwa jjo oluyise, oba ng'ekisisimuka ekimu mu kiro." 
Psalms90:5 Otukuluggusa nga mukoka, tuyita buyisi nga kirooto. Tuli ng'omuddo ogumeruka ku makya," 
Psalms90:6 ne gukula ne gumulisa ebimuli, we buzibira nga guwotose gukaze." 
Psalms90:7 Ddala obusungu bwo butumalawo, bw'onyiiga ne tweraliikirira!" 
Psalms90:8 Ebyonoono byaffe obitadde mu maaso go, n'ebibi byaffe eby'ekyama obitadde w'obirabira." 
Psalms90:9 Ennaku zaffe zisalwako obusungu bwo, obulamu bwaffe buggwaawo nga kikkowe." 
Psalms90:10 Emyaka tukoma ku nsanvu, oba kinaana bwe tuba abagumu, ng'ate gijjudde okutegana era n'ebizibu. Giyita mangu, ne tubulawo." 
Psalms90:11 Ani amanyi amaanyi g'obusungu bwo, era n'okunyiiga kwo bwe kutiibwa?" 
Psalms90:12 Tuyigirize obulamu bwe buli obumpi, tulyoke tufuuke ba magezi." 
Psalms90:13 Obusungu bwo bulikoma wa? Abaweereza bo, ayi Mukama, tusaasire," 
Psalms90:14 otujjuzenga ekisa ku makya, tusanyuke tuyimbenga mu bulamu bwaffe bwonna." 
Psalms90:15 Otuwe essanyu lingi lisasule ebiseera biri mwe watubonyaabonyeza, n'emyaka emingi, mwe twalabira ennaku." 
Psalms90:16 Olage abaweereza bo bw'okola ebyamagero. Bazzukulu baabwe nabo obalage ekitiibwa kyo. 
Psalms90:17 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, emikisa gyo gibe ku ffe, emirimu gyaffe gyonna ogiwenga omukisa." 
Psalms91:1 Buli addukira eri oyo Atenkanika n'akuumwa Omuyinzawaabyonna," 
Psalms91:2 anaagambanga Mukama nti: “Ggwe Mukama wange ow'amaanyi, ggwe Katonda wange gwe neesiga,”" 
Psalms91:3 kubanga ye anaakuwonyanga emitego gy'abakuyigga, era ne kawumpuli akutta." 
Psalms91:4 Ye anaakulabiriranga, akubikke mu biwaawaatiro bye. Ye mwesigwa anaakutaasanga, era anaakukuumanga." 
Psalms91:5 Tootyenga ebitiisa mu budde obw'ekiro, wadde ebikulumba emisana," 
Psalms91:6 oba olumbe oluttira mu nzikiza, wadde nnamuzisa akutugira mu ttuntu." 
Psalms91:7 Awo ku lusegere w'oli bandigwa ne battibwa lukumi, n'omutwalo ne bagwa ne bafa ku ludda lwo olwa ddyo, naye ggwe n'otobaako kabi." 
Psalms91:8 Olitunula ne weerolera omubi bw'afuna empeera ye. 
Psalms91:9 Mukama gw'ofudde ekiddukiro kyo, Atenkanika ye mukuumi wo ataasa." 
Psalms91:10 Kale tolituukibwako kabi, teri kibonoobono na kimu ekirituuka w'obeera." 
Psalms91:11 Bamalayika be alibalagira bakukuume buli w'oliraga. 
Psalms91:12 Balikuwanirira mu mikono gyabwe, oleme okwekoona ekigere ku jjinja."
