Psalms91:13 Olirinnya ku mpologoma enkambwe, osambe emisota gikalibusagwa." 
Psalms91:14 Katonda agamba nti: “Ndimuwonya kubanga anjagala. Era oyo ammanyi ndimukuuma. 
Psalms91:15 Anampitanga ne mpitaba, mu buyinike ndibeera naye. Ndimuwonya ne mmugulumiza." 
Psalms91:16 Ndimuwangaaza nnyo era ndimulokola.” 
Psalms92:1 Ayi Mukama, kirungi okukwebazanga, n'okuyimba okukutenderezanga ggwe Atenkanika." 
Psalms92:2 Kirungi okwatula ekisa kyo buli nkya n'obwesigwa bwo buli kiro 
Psalms92:3 nga bwe tusuna enkoba z'endongo nga tukubirako n'ennanga. 
Psalms92:4 Ayi Mukama, bye wakola binsanyusa, nnyimba n'essanyu olw'ebyo bye watuukiriza." 
Psalms92:5 Ayi Mukama, by'okola bikulu, ne by'olowooza byekusifu." 
Psalms92:6 Omuntu eyasiruwala tamanya n'omusirusiru tategeera 
Psalms92:7 nti ababi ne bwe bameruka ng'omuddo, nga ne bye bakola bibagendera bulungi, naye ku nkomerero bazikirira." 
Psalms92:8 Kyokka ggwe ayi Mukama, ogulumizibwa ennaku zonna." 
Psalms92:9 Ayi Mukama, kya mazima nti abalabe bo balifa. Abakozi b'ebibi bonna nabo balisaasaanyizibwa." 
Psalms92:10 Naye nze ompadde amaanyi ng'ag'embogo, era onsiize omuzigo ne nnyirira." 
Psalms92:11 Abalabe bange ndabye bwe bawanguddwa, abannumbagana bakaabye ne mpulira." 
Psalms92:12 Abeesimbu mu mpisa zaabwe balyegolola ng'olukindu, balikula ng'emivule gy'omu Lebanooni." 
Psalms92:13 Bali ng'emiti egisimbibwa mu nnyumba ya Mukama, balikulira mu mpya za Katonda waffe." 
Psalms92:14 Balikaddiwa ne basigala nga bakyabala ebibala, ng'era bagimu, ba mazzi. Balisigala nga bannyikivu" 
Psalms92:15 okulaga nti Mukama mutuukirivu, ye ankuuma, era taliimu bukuusa." 
Psalms93:1 Mukama ye Kabaka alina ekitiibwa n'amaanyi. Ddala yanyweza ensi, teyinza kusagaasagana." 
Psalms93:2 Ayi Mukama, entebe yo ey'obwakabaka yanywererawo okuva edda n'edda lyonna. Oli wa lubeerera ennaku zonna." 
Psalms93:3 Ennyanja esiikuuse, ayi Mukama, eyimusizza amayengo n'eyira." 
Psalms93:4 Mukama ali mu ggulu wa maanyi okusinga okuwuuma kw'ennyanja, n'okukira amayengo gaayo ago agawuluguma ennyo lw'eba etaamye." 
Psalms93:5 Ayi Mukama, bye walagira tebikyuka. Obutukuvu busaanira ennyumba yo ennaku zonna." 
Psalms94:1 Ayi Mukama, Katonda omuwoolezi w'eggwanga, labika owoolere eggwanga." 
Psalms94:2 Ggwe asala emisango gya bonna, jjangu owe abeekulumbaza ekibasaanira." 
Psalms94:3 Ayi Mukama, ababi balituusa wa, balituusa wa okwewaana?" 
Psalms94:4 Bonna abakozi b'ebibi beewanika, beetenda, boogera nga beewaana." 
Psalms94:5 Balinnyirira abantu bo, ayi Mukama, babonyaabonya abo be weefunira." 
Psalms94:6 Batta bannamwandu n'enfuuzi, era batemula abagenyi." 
Psalms94:7 Bagamba nti: “Mukama taabirabe. Katonda wa Yakobo abifaako ki?” 
Psalms94:8 Bantu mmwe, mwasiruwala ngeri ki? Muliba ddi n'amagezi?" 
Psalms94:9 Eyateekawo amatu ye atawulira? Eyakola amaaso ye atalaba? 
Psalms94:10 Akangavvula amawanga ye atabonereza, ng'ate ye ayigiriza abantu amagezi?" 
Psalms94:11 Mukama akimanyi nti bye balowooza mukka bukka. 
Psalms94:12 Ayi Mukama, wa mukisa oyo gw'okangavvulako ne gw'oyigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms94:13 Omuwummuza mu biseera ebizibu okutuusa ababi lwe basimirwa obunnya," 
Psalms94:14 kubanga Mukama tasuula babe, abantu be tabaabulira." 
Psalms94:15 Obwenkanya mu misango buliddawo, ne bugobererwa bonna ab'emitima emirongoofu." 
Psalms94:16 Ani asituka antaase ababi? Ani ayimirira amponye abakozi b'ebyambyone? 
Psalms94:17 Singa Mukama teyannyamba, nandibadde nagenda dda e Butanyega." 
Psalms94:18 Olwayogerako nti: “Nseeredde”, ggwe ayi Mukama omuzirakisa, n'ompanirira amangwago." 
Psalms94:19 Bwe mbeera mu buyinike obungi onkubagiza ne nsanyuka. 
Psalms94:20 Abafuzi ababi tokkaanya nabo, abeesigamya obutali bwenkanya ku mateeka," 
Psalms94:21 abeekobaana okutta omulungi, ne basalira ogw'okufa atalina musango." 
Psalms94:22 Naye Nze Mukama ye ankuuma, era Katonda wange ye antaasa." 
Psalms94:23 Alibabonereza olw'ebibi byabwe, abazikirize olw'obubi bwabwe. Mukama Katonda waffe alibazikiriza." 
Psalms95:1 Mujje tutendereze Mukama, tumuyimbire n'essanyu oyo atukuuma n'atuwonya." 
Psalms95:2 Mujje gy'ali tumwebaze, tumuyimbire n'essanyu ennyimba tumutendereze." 
Psalms95:3 Mukama ye Katonda, mukulu, ye Mufuzi wa balubaale bonna." 
Psalms95:4 Ye afuga enkonko z'ensi eno, n'entikko z'ensozi, zize." 
Psalms95:5 Ennyanja yiye kubanga ye yagikola, n'olukalu ye yalwekolera." 
Psalms95:6 Mujje tusinze, tumuvuunamire, tufukamire mu maaso ga Mukama, Omutonzi waffe," 
Psalms95:7 kubanga ye Katonda waffe, era ffe bantu b'afaako, ffe ndiga ze z'aliisa. Olwaleero bwe muwulira eddoboozi lye," 
Psalms95:8 “Temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe nga bajjajjammwe bwe baakola e Meriba, ku lunaku lwe baali e Massa mu ddungu:" 
Psalms95:9 bwe bankema ne bangeza, newaakubadde nga bye nkola baali babirabye." 
Psalms95:10 Emyaka amakumi ana neetamwa abantu abo, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Babambaavu mu mitima, tebagondera biragiro byange.’" 
Psalms95:11 Kyennava nsunguwala ne ndayira nti: ‘Siribawa kuwummula n'akatono.’ ” 
Psalms96:1 Muyimbire Mukama oluyimba oluggya, ab'oku nsi mwenna muyimbire Mukama." 
Psalms96:2 Muyimbire Mukama mumutendereze, mwatule buli lunaku bwe yatulokola." 
Psalms96:3 Mumanyise ekitiibwa kye mu mawanga, abantu bamanye by'akola ebyamagero." 
Psalms96:4 Mukama mukulu era agwanira okutenderezebwa ennyo, ekitiibwa kye kisinga ekya balubaale bonna." 
Psalms96:5 Balubaale bonna ab'amawanga amalala, bifaananyi, naye Mukama ye yakola eggulu." 
Psalms96:6 Yeetooloddwa ekitiibwa n'obukulu, obuyinza n'obulungi bijjudde mu kifo kye ekitukuvu." 
Psalms96:7 Mukama oweekitiibwa n'amaanyi mumutendereze mwenna abali ku nsi. 
Psalms96:8 Mumuwe ekitiibwa kye ekimugwanidde, mujje mu mpya ze, muleete ebitambiro." 
Psalms96:9 Musinze Mukama, nga musaanidde, mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, ab'oku nsi mukankane mu maaso ge." 
Psalms96:10 Mutegeeze amawanga gonna nti Mukama ye Kabaka. Ensi yaginyweza nnyo, teyinza kusagaasagana. Abantu alibalamuza bwenkanya." 
Psalms96:11 Eggulu ka lyesiime era n'ensi k'ejaganye, ennyanja ewuume n'ebigirimu byonna." 
Psalms96:12 Ennimiro k'ejaguze n'ebigirimu byonna. Emiti era n'ebibira olw'essanyu bireekaane 
Psalms96:13 mu maaso ga Mukama, kubanga ajja. Ajja okusalira ensi emisango Aligisala mu bwesimbu abantu abalamuze mazima." 
Psalms97:1 Ensi esanyuke kubanga Katonda ye Kabaka, n'ebizinga byonna bijaguze." 
Psalms97:2 Ebire n'ekizikiza bimwetoolodde, afugira ku bwesimbu na bwenkanya." 
Psalms97:3 Omuliro gumukulemberamu, ne gwokya abalabe be ku njuyi zonna." 
Psalms97:4 Ebimyanso bye byamulisa ensi, ensi n'ebiraba n'ekankana." 
Psalms97:5 Ensozi zisaanuuka ng'envumbo awali Mukama, awali Mukama w'ensi zonna." 
Psalms97:6 Eggulu liraga nti mutuukirivu, abantu bonna balaba ekitiibwa kye." 
Psalms97:7 Bonna abasinza ebifaananyi ebyole n'abenyumiriza olw'ebyo ebitali Katonda, baswale. Balubaale bonna bavuunamira Mukama." 
Psalms97:8 Ayi Katonda, ab'omu Siyooni basanyuka, n'ab'omu bibuga bya Yuda bajaguza olw'okuwulira emisango gy'osala." 
Psalms97:9 Ayi Mukama, ggwe Atenkanika mu nsi zonna, ogulumizibwa okusinga balubaale bonna." 
Psalms97:10 Mmwe abagala Mukama, mukyawe ebibi, Mukama akuuma obulamu bw'abantu be abalungi, abawonya obuyinza bw'ababi." 
Psalms97:11 Ekitangaala kyakira abakola ebituufu n'essanyu liba n'ab'omutima omulongoofu. 
Psalms97:12 Mwenna abeesimbu musanyuke olw'ebyo Mukama by'akola. Mwebaze erinnya lye ettukuvu. 
Psalms98:1 Muyimbire Mukama oluyimba oluggya, kubanga akoze ebyamagero. Obuyinza bwe obutukuvu n'amaanyi ge, biwangudde." 
Psalms98:2 Mukama alaze nga ye muwanguzi, amawanga agalaze bw'alokola. Ajjukidde okulaga abantu ba Yisirayeli ekisa kye n'okwesigibwa." 
Psalms98:3 Abantu mu nsi zonna balabye nga Katonda waffe bw'awangudde. 
Psalms98:4 Mwe ab'oku nsi mwenna, Katonda mumuyimbire n'essanyu, muyimbe musaakaanye, mumutendereze." 
Psalms98:5 Muyimbe okutendereza Mukama, mumutendere ku ddoboozi ery'ennanga." 
Psalms98:6 Mufuuwe amakondeere n'eŋŋombe, musaakaanyize Mukama Kabaka waffe." 
Psalms98:7 Ennyanja ewuume n'ebigirimu byonna, ensi eyimbe n'abagiriko bonna." 
Psalms98:8 Emigga gikube mu ngalo, ensozi ziyimbire wamu n'essanyu," 
Psalms98:9 mu maaso ga Mukama, kubanga ajja okusalira ensi omusango. Aligugisalira mu bwesimbu aliramula abantu mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms99:1 Mukama ye Kabaka, amawanga gakankane. Atuula ku ntebe ye eri ku bakerubi, ensi esagaasagane." 
Psalms99:2 Mukama mukulu mu Siyooni, ab'amawanga gonna abasukkulumye." 
Psalms99:3 Batendereze erinnya lye ekkulu ery'entiisa, ye ye Mutuukirivu." 
Psalms99:4 Kabaka ow'obuyinza, amazima g'oyagala. Wassaawo okugobanga ensonga, n'obwesimbu mu bantu ba Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Mugulumizenga Mukama Katonda waffe, muvuuname w'ateeka ebigere bye, mumusinze ye ye Mutuukirivu." 
Psalms99:6 Musa ne Arooni baali bakabona be, ne Samweli ye omu ku baamukoowoolanga. Baayita Mukama n'abaanukula." 
Psalms99:7 Yayogera nabo ng'asinziira mu mpagi ey'ekire; baakwata amateeka n'ebiragiro bye yabawa. 
Psalms99:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, wabaanukula. Walaga nti ggwe Katonda asonyiwa, wadde wababonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Psalms99:9 Mugulumize Mukama Katonda waffe, mumusinze ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu, kubanga Mukama Katonda waffe Mutuukirivu." 
Psalms100:1 Mmwe ab'omu nsi zonna muyimbire Mukama. 
Psalms100:2 Muweereze Mukama n'essanyu, mujje mu maaso ge nga muyimba." 
Psalms100:3 Mumanye nga Mukama ye Katonda, ye yatutonda, era tuli babe. Tuli bantu be era ndiga ez'omu ddundiro lye." 
Psalms100:4 Muyingire mu miryango gy'ennyumba ye nga mumwebaza, ne mu mpya ze nga mumutendereza. Mumwebaze era mumutendereze," 
Psalms100:5 kubanga Mukama mulungi, ekisa kye kya lubeerera, obwesigwa bwe bwa mirembe gyonna. 107:1; 118:1; 136:1; Yer 33:11" 
Psalms101:1 Ka nnyimbe ku bwesigwa n'amazima, nnyimbire ggwe, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms101:2 Nnaagobereranga empisa ennungi. Kale olijja ddi gye ndi! Nnaabeeranga wa mutima mulongoofu mu nnyumba yange. 
Psalms101:3 Seesemberezenga kintu na kimu ekitasaana, nkyawa ebikolwa by'abeggya ku Katonda, siibyetabengamu." 
Psalms101:4 Abakumpanya nnaabeewalanga, siikolaganenga na babi." 
Psalms101:5 Nja kweggyangako awaayiriza munne mu kyama, eyeepanka era eyeekulumbaza siimugumiikirizenga." 
Psalms101:6 Abeesigwa mu nsi be nnaasiimanga okubeera nange, abagoberera empisa ennungi be banampeerezanga." 
Psalms101:7 Ow'enkwe taabeerenga mu nnyumba yange, n'omulimba taabeerenga nange." 
Psalms101:8 Buli olukya nnaazikirizanga ababi mu nsi, mmalirewo ddala abakola ebyambyone mu kibuga kya Mukama." 
Psalms102:1 Ayi Mukama, wulira okusaba kwange, n'okukaaba kwange kutuuke gy'oli." 
Psalms102:2 Totunula bbali nga ndi mu buzibu. Wulira kye ŋŋamba, bwe nkowoola onziremu mangu," 
Psalms102:3 Obulamu bwange buggwaawo ng'omukka, n'omubiri gwange gwokebwa ng'omumuli." 
Psalms102:4 Nkubiddwa ne mpotoka ng'omuddo, n'agalya emmere sirina." 
Psalms102:5 Nsigaddeko magumba na lususu, nga kiva ku kusinda nnyo." 
Psalms102:6 Ndi ng'ekinyonyi eky'omu ddungu, nfuuse ng'ekiwuugulu mu matongo." 
Psalms102:7 Sikyebaka ku tulo, ndi ng'ennyonyi eri yokka, ku kitikkiro ky'ennyumba." 
Psalms102:8 Abalabe bange banvuma olunaku lwonna, abanjerega, bakozesa erinnya lyange nga bakolima." 
Psalms102:9 Kati evvu lye ndya ng'emmere, bye nnywa ntabulamu amaziga," 
Psalms102:10 kubanga wansunguwalira n'onyiiga, wanneggyako n'onsuula." 
Psalms102:11 Obulamu bwange kye kisiikirize eky'olweggulo ekiggwaawo, era mpotose ng'omuddo." 
Psalms102:12 Naye ggwe ayi Mukama, obeerawo emirembe gyonna, era omanyibwa aba buli mulembe." 
Psalms102:13 Olijja n'okwatirwa Siyooni ekisa, ekiseera kituuse okumusaasira, ddala buno bwe budde." 
Psalms102:14 Abaweereza bo baagala nnyo Siyooni, basaalirwa okulaba bwe kizikiridde!" 
Psalms102:15 Amawanga gonna galitya Mukama, bakabaka bonna ab'ensi balitya ekitiibwa kye." 
Psalms102:16 Mukama bw'alizimba Siyooni obuggya, alimanyisa ekitiibwa kye." 
Psalms102:17 Aliwulira okusaba kw'abanaku, talinyooma kwegayirira kwabwe." 
Psalms102:18 Kino kiwandiikirwe ab'omulembe ogujja, abalizaalibwa batendereze Mukama," 
Psalms102:19 nti yatunula wansi ng'asinziira awatukuvu awagulumivu, yatunula wansi ng'asinziira mu ggulu." 
Psalms102:20 N'awulira okusinda kw'abasibe, n'asumulula ababadde ab'okutta," 
Psalms102:21 abantu balyoke bamumanyise mu Siyooni, era bamutenderereze mu Yerusaalemu," 
Psalms102:22 amawanga n'amatwale nga gakuŋŋaanye okusinza Mukama. 
Psalms102:23 Mukama ammazeemu amaanyi nga nkyali muvubuka, obulamu bwange abusazeeko." 
Psalms102:24 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Katonda wange, tonzigyawo nga sinnakaddiwa, ggwe abeerawo emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms102:25 Edda n'edda ennyo watonda ensi, n'eggulu ggwe walikola wennyini." 
Psalms102:26 Byo biriggwaawo, naye ggwe oli wa lubeerera. Byonna birikaddiwa ng'ekyambalo. Olibikyusa ng'ekyambalo, ne biggwaawo." 
Psalms102:27 Naye ggwe tokyukako, n'obulamu bwo tebulikoma." 
Psalms102:28 Abaana b'abaweereza bo balibeerawo ng'obakuuma. N'ezzadde lyabwe linaabeerangawo mu maaso go. 
Psalms103:1 Ggwe omwoyo gwange, tendereza Mukama, buli ekiri mu nze kimutendereze." 
Psalms103:2 Ggwe omwoyo gwange, tendereza Mukama, era teweerabira ebirungi byonna by'akola." 
Psalms103:3 Yakusonyiwa ebibi byo byonna, n'akuwonya obulwadde bwo bwonna." 
Psalms103:4 Obulamu bwo yabuwonya okuzikirira, era n'akuwa omukisa olw'ekisa kye n'okusaasira kwe." 
Psalms103:5 Obulamu bwo abujjuza ebirungi, obuvubuka bwo ne budda buggya ng'obw'empungu." 
Psalms103:6 Mukama wa mazima, asala emisango, abanyigirizibwa ne basinga." 
Psalms103:7 Yamanyisa Musa entegeka ze, n'alaga Abayisirayeli ebikolwa bye." 
Psalms103:8 Mukama musaasizi, asonyiwa, alwawo okusunguwala, era wa kisa nnyo." 
Psalms103:9 Taanenyenga lugenderezo, taasibenga busungu bulijjo." 
Psalms103:10 Tatubonereza nga bwe tusaanira, era tatusasula kisaanira bikolwa byaffe ebibi." 
Psalms103:11 Ng'eggulu bwe lyesudde ennyo ensi, n'ekisa kye gye kikomya okuba ekingi ku abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms103:12 Ng'ebuvanjuba bwe weesudde ebugwanjuba, bw'atyo bw'atuggyako ebibi byaffe, ne bitubeera wala." 
Psalms103:13 Nga kitaawe w'abaana bw'asaasira abaana be, bw'atyo ne Mukama bw'asaasira abamussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms103:14 Amanyi bwe twakolebwa, ajjukira nga tuli nfuufu." 
Psalms103:15 Ekiseera ky'obulamu bw'omuntu, kiba kitono ng'eky'omuddo. Akula n'ayanya ng'ekimuli ky'omu ttale." 
Psalms103:16 Embuyaga zikiyitako nga zikunta, ne kigenda ne kitaddawo we kibadde." 
Psalms103:17 Naye okuva edda n'edda Mukama akwatirwa ekisa abamussaamu ekitiibwa, era obulungi bwe abulaga abaana b'abaana baabwe." 
Psalms103:18 Abulaga abatuukiriza endagaano ye, ne banyiikira okukola by'ayagala." 
Psalms103:19 Mu ggulu Mukama mwe yanyweza entebe ye, era ye Kabaka afuga byonna." 
Psalms103:20 Mutendereze Mukama mmwe bamalayika be, ab'amaanyi abakola by'alagira, era abawulira by'agamba." 
Psalms103:21 Mutendereze Mukama mmwe ab'omu ggye lye, mmwe abaweereza be abakola by'ayagala." 
Psalms103:22 Mutendereze Mukama mmwe ebitonde bye mwenna mu bifo by'afuga byonna. Ggwe omwoyo gwange, tendereza Mukama." 
Psalms104:1 Ggwe omwoyo gwange tendereza Mukama. Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, oli mukulu nnyo. Oyambadde ekitiibwa n'obukulu." 
Psalms104:2 Weebikka ekitangaala ng'ekyambalo, otimba eggulu ng'eweema." 
Psalms104:3 Ozimba ennyumba yo ku mazzi aga waggulu, ofuula ebire ekigaali kyo, ne weebagala ku biwaawaatiro by'embuyaga." 
Psalms104:4 Embuyaga ogifuula ababaka bo, omuliro n'ennimi zaagwo obifuula abaweereza bo." 
Psalms104:5 Wateeka ensi ku misingi gyayo, eremenga kunyeenyezebwa ennaku zonna." 
Psalms104:6 Wagibikkako ennyanja ng'ekyambalo, amazzi ne gabikka ensozi." 
Psalms104:7 Bwe wagakayukira, ne gadduka; gaakulugguka bwe gaawulira eddoboozi lyo bwe libwatuka." 
Psalms104:8 Gaakulukutira ku nsozi, ne gaserengetera mu biwonvu, ne gatuuka mu kifo kye wagateerawo." 
Psalms104:9 Wagateerawo ensalo gye gatayinza kusukka, galeme kuddamu okubikka ensi." 
Psalms104:10 Okulukusa ensulo z'amazzi mu biwonvu, emigga ne gikulukutira wakati w'ensozi." 
Psalms104:11 Ebisolo binywa amazzi, entulege ne ziwona ennyonta." 
Psalms104:12 Ebinyonyi bizimba ebisu byabyo era biyimbira mu miti egiriraanyeewo. 
Psalms104:13 Enkuba eva mu bire ogitonnyesa ku nsozi, ensi n'ejjula ebibala by'ogibazisa." 
Psalms104:14 Omeza omuddo gw'ensolo, n'ebimera ebigasa abantu. Abantu ne bakuza ebirime byabwe," 
Psalms104:15 mwe baggya omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogubasanyusa, n'omuzigo ogubanyiriza, era n'emmere ebawa amaanyi." 
Psalms104:16 Enkuba ennyingi y'efukirira emivule, Mukama gye yameza mu Lebanooni." 
Psalms104:17 Mu gyo ebinyonyi byezimbira ebisu, ne ssekanyolya mw'azuula w'asula." 
Psalms104:18 Ennangaazi zisula ku nsozi empanvu, obumyu bwekweka mu njazi." 
Psalms104:19 Wateekawo omwezi okubala ebiro. Enjuba, essaawa y'okugwa egimanya." 
Psalms104:20 Bw'ossaawo ekizikiza, ne buba kiro, ebisolo byonna eby'omu ttale ne bivaayo." 
Psalms104:21 Empologoma ento ziwuluguma, nga ziyigga kye zinaalya, ne zinoonya ekyokulya Katonda ky'anaaziwa." 
Psalms104:22 Enjuba bw'evaayo, ne ziddayo, ne zeebaka mu mpuku zaazo." 
Psalms104:23 Olwo abantu ne bagenda ku mirimu gyabwe, ne bakola okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Psalms104:24 Ayi Mukama, nga bye wakola bingi nnyo! Byonna wabikozesa magezi. Ensi ejjuddemu ebitonde byo." 
Psalms104:25 Waliwo ennyanja ennene engazi, omuli ebiramu ebitabalika. Mulimu ebitono n'ebinene." 
Psalms104:26 Amaato gaseeyeeyerako. Ne Lukwata, ekikulejje kye watonda, kizannyira omwo." 
Psalms104:27 Byonna ggwe bitunuulira, obiwe emmere buli lwe bigyetaaga." 
Psalms104:28 Ggwe obigabula ne birya, obigabira ne bikkuta." 
Psalms104:29 Bw'otunula ebbali, ne byeraliikirira, bw'obiggyamu omukka, ne bifa, ne bidda mu nfuufu mwe byava." 
Psalms104:30 Bw'obiteekamu omukka ne biba biramu, ensi n'ogizza buggya." 
Psalms104:31 Ekitiibwa kya Mukama kibe kya lubeerera, Mukama asanyukire bye yakola." 
Psalms104:32 Atunuulira ensi, n'ekankana; akwata ku nsozi ne zinyooka omukka." 
Psalms104:33 Obulamu bwange bwonna nnaayimbiranga Mukama, nnaayimbanga okumutendereza okutuusa lwe ndifa." 
Psalms104:34 Okwebuulirira kwange kumusanyusenga, kubanga nsanyukira by'akola." 
Psalms104:35 Aboonoonyi bazikirire baggweewo mu nsi, ababi baleme kusigalawo. Ggwe omwoyo gwange, tendereza Mukama. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms105:1 Mwebaze Mukama, mumukoowoole, mumanyise amawanga bye yakola." 
Psalms105:2 Mumuyimbire, muyimbe mumutendereze, mwogere ku byamagero byonna bye yakola." 
Psalms105:3 Mwenyumiririze mu ye Omutuukirivu, abeeyuna Mukama basanyuke." 
Psalms105:4 Mweyune Mukama era n'amaanyi ge, mumweyunenga bulijjo." 
Psalms105:5 Mujjukire ebyamagero n'ebyewuunyo bye yakola, era n'emisango gye yasala," 
Psalms105:6 mmwe ezzadde lya Aburahamu omuweereza we, mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo abalondemu be." 
Psalms105:7 Ye Mukama Katonda waffe, ye asalawo ensonga z'ensi zonna." 
Psalms105:8 Ajjukira endagaano ye bulijjo, ne bye yasuubiza emirembe olukumi." 
Psalms105:9 Ye ndagaano gye yakola ne Aburahamu ne bye yasuubiza Yisaaka ng'alayira n'okulayira. 
Psalms105:10 Ye ndagaano gye yanyweza ne Yakobo, n'eba ya lubeerera ne Yisirayeli." 
Psalms105:11 Yagamba nti: “Ndibawa ensi ya Kanaani, eribeerera ddala yammwe ku bwammwe.”" 
Psalms105:12 Baali bakyali batono nga tebannawera, era nga batambuze mu nsi eyo," 
Psalms105:13 nga batambula okuva mu nsi emu okudda mu ndala, okuva mu bwakabaka obumu okudda mu bulala." 
Psalms105:14 Kyokka teyabaako gw'akkiriza kubabonyaabonya. Okubataasa, yalabula bakabaka nti:" 
Psalms105:15 “Temuukwatenga ku basiige bange, n'abalanzi bange temuubakolengako kabi.”" 
Psalms105:16 Awo n'aleeta enjala mu nsi eyo, n'abaggyako emmere yaabwe yonna." 
Psalms105:17 Yatuma omuntu okubakulemberamu, ye Yosefu eyatundibwa okuba omuddu." 
Psalms105:18 Ebigere bye baabirumya, nga babisiba n'enjegere, ne bamusiba ekyuma mu bulago," 
Psalms105:19 okutuusa nga kye yali ayogedde kimaze okutuukirira. Ekigambo kya Mukama kyakakasa nti yali mutuufu. 
Psalms105:20 Kabaka w'e Misiri yatuma ne bamusumulula, omufuzi w'amawanga n'amuta." 
Psalms105:21 N'amuwa obukulu mu nnyumba ye, n'amukwasa okulabirira ebibye byonna," 
Psalms105:22 aluŋŋamyenga abalangira nga bw'ayagala, era awenga abakungu be amagezi." 
Psalms105:23 Olwo Yisirayeli n'ajja e Misiri, Yakobo n'asenga mu nsi ya Haamu." 
Psalms105:24 Mukama n'awa abantu be okuzaala ennyo, n'abawa n'amaanyi okusinga abalabe baabwe." 
Psalms105:25 N'awa Abamisiri okukyawa abantu be, n'okusalira abaweereza be enkwe." 
Psalms105:26 N'atuma Musa omuweereza we, ne Arooni gwe yalonda." 
Psalms105:27 Ne bakola ebyewuunyo bye mu Bamisiri, n'ebyamagero mu nsi ya Haamu." 
Psalms105:28 Mukama n'aleeta ekizikiza ne kikwata ku nsi, Abamisiri ne bajeemera ebigambo bye." 
Psalms105:29 Emigga gyabwe n'agifuula omusaayi, ebyennyanja byabwe ne bifa." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaabwe n'ejjula ebikere, ne biyingira ne mu bisenge bya kabaka waabwe." 
Psalms105:31 Mukama n'awa ekiragiro ebibinja by'ensowera n'obutugu ne bijja mu nsi yaabwe yonna. 
Psalms105:32 N'abawa omuzira mu kifo ky'enkuba, n'okumyansa ne kubuna mu nsi yaabwe." 
Psalms105:33 N'azikiriza emizabbibu n'emitiini gyabwe, n'amenya n'emiti gyonna mu nsi yaabwe." 
Psalms105:34 N'alagira enzige ne zijja, ne bulusejjera ne buba bungi obutabalika." 
Psalms105:35 Ne zirya ebimera byonna mu nsi yaabwe, ne zirya n'ebibala byabwe byonna." 
Psalms105:36 N'atta batabani baabwe abaggulanda bonna mu nsi yaabwe. 
Psalms105:37 N'alyoka aggyayo Abayisirayeli nga balina ffeeza ne zaabu, nga bonna balamu era ba maanyi." 
Psalms105:38 Abamisiri ne basanyuka bwe baagenda, kubanga baali babakubye entiisa." 
Psalms105:39 Mukama n'ayanjuluza ekire okubabikka, n'assaawo n'omuliro okubawa ekitangaala ekiro." 
Psalms105:40 Ne basaba, n'abawa entiitiri, era n'abakkusa n'omugaati oguva mu ggulu." 
Psalms105:41 Yayasa olwazi, amazzi ne gafumbukuka, ne gakulukuta mu ddungu ng'omugga," 
Psalms105:42 kubanga yajjukira ekigambo kye ekitukuvu kye yasuubiza Aburahamu omuweereza we. 
Psalms105:43 Kyeyava aggyayo abantu be, be yalonda, ne bavaayo nga basanyuka era nga bayimba." 
Psalms105:44 N'abawa ensi z'ab'amawanga amalala, ne bafuna ebyo abalala bye baateganira okulima," 
Psalms105:45 balyoke bakwatenga ebiragiro bye, era bakuumenga amateeka ge. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms106:1 Mutendereze Mukama, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna. 107:1; 118:1; 136:1; Yer 33:11" 
Psalms106:2 Ani ayinza okubala eby'amaanyi by'akola, oba okumutenda n'amalayo?" 
Psalms106:3 Ba mukisa abakwata by'alagira, abakola ebituufu bulijjo." 
Psalms106:4 Nzijukira, ayi Mukama, ng'olaga abantu bo ekisa. Nnyamba ng'obanunula." 
Psalms106:5 Be walonda ndabe bwe bafuna omukisa, ngabane ku ssanyu ly'eggwanga lyo, nsanyuke olw'okubalirwa mu babo." 
Psalms106:6 Twayonoona nga bajjajjaffe, twakola ebibi ebitasaana." 
Psalms106:7 Bajjajjaffe baalemwa okutegeera ebyamagero Mukama bye yakola e Misiri. Tebajjukira kisa kye ekingi, naye baajeemera ku nnyanja ku Nnyanja Emmyufu." 
Psalms106:8 Kyokka ye n'abawonya nga bwe yali asuubizza, alyoke alage obuyinza bwe obungi." 
Psalms106:9 Yalagira Ennyanja Emmyufu n'ekalira, ne bayita awakalu, nga bali ng'abayita mu ddungu." 
Psalms106:10 Yabawonya ababakyawa n'abaggya mu buyinza bw'abalabe. 
Psalms106:11 Abalabe baabwe battibwa amazzi ne watasigalawo n'omu. 
Psalms106:12 Olwo abantu be ne bakkiriza bye yali abasuubizza, ne bayimba nga bamutendereza." 
Psalms106:13 Beerabira mangu bye yakola, tebaalinda kumala kumwebuuzaako," 
Psalms106:14 ne bajjula okwoya ennyo mu ddungu, olwo ne bagerezaayo Katonda." 
Psalms106:15 N'abawa bye baamusaba, kyokka n'abaleetera okwennyamira." 
Psalms106:16 Nga bali mu lusiisira baakwatirwa Musa obuggya, ne Arooni omutukuvu wa Mukama." 
Psalms106:17 Ensi yayasama n'emira Datani, n'eziika Abiraamu n'ekibiina kye." 
Psalms106:18 N'omuliro gwakoleera ku kibiina ekyo, ne gwokya abantu abo ababi." 
Psalms106:19 Baasaanuusiza zaabu e Horebu, ne bakolamu ekifaananyi ky'ennyana, ne bakisinza." 
Psalms106:20 Ekitiibwa kye bandiwadde Katonda, ne bakiwa ekifaananyi ky'ente erya omuddo." 
Psalms106:21 Beerabira Katonda eyabalokola, n'ebikulu bye yakolera e Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 ebyamagero mu nsi ya Haamu, eby'entiisa ku Nnyanja Emmyufu!" 
Psalms106:23 Yali agambye nti abasaanyeewo, singa Musa omulondemu we teyeesimbawo w'ali, okuziyiza obusungu bw'aleese okubazikiriza bonna." 
Psalms106:24 Olwo ne banyooma ensi ennungi ennyo, kubanga kye yasuubiza tebaakikkiriza." 
Psalms106:25 Beemulugunyiza mu nsiisira zaabwe, ne batawulira Mukama ky'agamba." 
Psalms106:26 Kyeyava abalabula ng'alayira nti alibattira mu ddungu," 
Psalms106:27 ezzadde lyabwe lisaasaanire mu mawanga, libulire gye liwaŋŋangukira." 
Psalms106:28 Ate bwe baatuuka e Peyori ne beetaba mu kusinza Baali. Ne baguma okulyanga ebyo abafu bye batambirirwa. 
Psalms106:29 Baasunguwaza Mukama olw'ebikolwa byabwe, kawumpuli n'ajja mu bo." 
Psalms106:30 Finehaasi kyeyava asituka n'abonereza abasobya, olwo kawumpuli n'akka." 
Psalms106:31 Ekyo ne kimuyisa omutuukirivu anajjukirwanga emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms106:32 Era baanyiiriza Mukama ku mazzi g'e Meriba, ne baleetera Musa emitawaana:" 
Psalms106:33 kubanga baamunakuwaza nnyo, n'ayogera nga talowoozezza." 
Psalms106:34 Tebaasaanyaawo bantu b'amawanga amalala, nga Mukama bwe yabalagira okukola." 
Psalms106:35 Naye ne babeetabamu, ne bayiga empisa zaabwe." 
Psalms106:36 Ne baweereza balubaale baabwe, ekyabaleetera okugwa mu kabi." 
Psalms106:37 Emizimu emibi ne bagitambiriranga abaana baabwe abalenzi n'abawala. 
Psalms106:38 Battanga abaana baabwe abataliiko musango, ne babatambirira balubaale b'e Kanaani. Ensi n'eyonoonebwa obutemu." 
Psalms106:39 Bwe batyo ne beejaajaamya n'ebikolwa byabwe ebyo, era ne bava ku Katonda." 
Psalms106:40 Mukama kyeyava asunguwalira abantu be, n'abatamirwa ddala." 
Psalms106:41 N'abawaayo mu buyinza bw'amawanga amalala, abaabakyawa ne babafuga." 
Psalms106:42 Omulabe waabwe n'ajooga, n'afuga abo n'akamala!" 
Psalms106:43 Emirundi mingi Mukama n'abawonya, kyokka ne balondawo okumujeemera. Ne bongera okwessa mu bibi byabwe." 
Psalms106:44 Kyokka ye bwe yawuliranga nga bakaaba, ng'abalumirwa olw'obuyinike bwabwe." 
Psalms106:45 Olw'obulungi bwe ng'ajjukira endagaano ye, n'olw'ekisa kye ekingi, obusungu bwe nga bukkakkana." 
Psalms106:46 N'abaleetera okusaasirwanga bonna abaabanyaganga. 
Psalms106:47 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, tuwonye, otukuŋŋaanye otuggye mu mawanga tulyoke tukwebazenga, era tukutenderezenga ggwe Omutuukirivu." 
Psalms106:48 Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwenga emirembe n'emirembe. Era abantu bonna bagambenga nti: “Amiina.” Mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms107:1 “Mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna”. 106:1; 118:1; 136:1; Yer 33:11 
Psalms107:2 Bonna boogere bwe batyo Mukama be yanunula, n'abawonya obuyinza bw'omulabe," 
Psalms107:3 n'abakuŋŋaanya ng'abaggya mu nsi ennyingi, mu buvanjuba ne mu bugwanjuba, mu bukiikakkono ne mu bukiikaddyo." 
Psalms107:4 Baawabira awatali kkubo mu ddungu, nga tebamanyi bwe balituuka mu kibuga kya kubeeramu." 
Psalms107:5 Baalumwa enjala n'ennyonta, ne baggwaamu n'essuubi." 
Psalms107:6 Ne bakaabirira Mukama mu buzibu bwabwe, n'abawonya obuyinike bwabwe." 
Psalms107:7 N'abaluŋŋamya mu kkubo eggolokofu, n'abatuusa mu kibuga eky'okubeeramu." 
Psalms107:8 Kale beebaze Mukama olw'ekisa kye n'olw'ebyamagero by'akolera abantu. 
Psalms107:9 Abalumwa ennyonta agibamalako, n'abayala n'abakkusa ebirungi." 
Psalms107:10 Abalala baali mu kizikiza ne mu kwennyamira, nga bali mu nnaku, basibiddwa mu njegere," 
Psalms107:11 olw'okujeemera ebiragiro bya Katonda n'okunyooma ebyo ebyabakuutirwa Atenkanika. 
Psalms107:12 Baakoowa olw'emirimu emikakali, ne bagwa wansi ne babulwa abayamba." 
Psalms107:13 Ne bakaabirira Mukama mu buzibu bwabwe, n'abawonya obuyinike bwabwe." 
Psalms107:14 N'abaggya mu kizikiza ne mu kwennyamira, n'akutulakutula enjegere zaabwe." 
Psalms107:15 Kale beebaze Mukama olw'ekisa kye, n'olw'ebyamagero by'akolera abantu." 
Psalms107:16 Amenya enzigi ez'ekikomo, n'akutulamu ebisiba eby'ekyuma." 
Psalms107:17 N'abalala baali basirusiru ne babonaabona olw'ebibi byabwe, okwonoona kwabwe ne kubabuza emirembe." 
Psalms107:18 Ne batamwa ebyokulya byonna, ne babulako katono okufa." 
Psalms107:19 Ne bakaabirira Mukama mu buzibu bwabwe, n'abawonya obuyinike bwabwe." 
Psalms107:20 Yalagira bulagizi n'abawonya, n'abaggya mu kizikiza." 
Psalms107:21 Kale beebaze Mukama olw'ekisa kye, n'olw'ebyamagero by'akolera abantu." 
Psalms107:22 Baweeyo ebitambiro okumwebaza, era bayimbe okutendereza by'akola." 
Psalms107:23 Abamu baaseeyeeyera mu maato ku nnyanja, ne bakolera emirimu gyabwe ku mazzi." 
Psalms107:24 Ne balaba ebyamagero, Mukama by'akolera mu buziba." 
Psalms107:25 Yalagira omuyaga ne gukunta, ne guyimusa amayengo g'ennyanja." 
Psalms107:26 Amaato ne gatumbiira waggulu, ate ne gakka wansi mu ddubi, ne baterebuka olw'okuba mu kabi." 
Psalms107:27 Ne beesunda eruuyi n'eruuyi, ne batagatta ng'abatamiivu, amagezi ne gabaggwaamu." 
Psalms107:28 Ne bakaabirira Mukama mu buzibu bwabwe, n'abawonya obuyinike bwabwe." 
Psalms107:29 N'akkakkanya omuyaga, amayengo g'ennyanja ne gateeka." 
Psalms107:30 Ne basanyuka olw'okutebenkera, n'abagobya ku mwalo we baagala okugoba." 
Psalms107:31 Kale beebaze Mukama olw'ekisa kye, n'olw'ebyamagero by'akolera abantu." 
Psalms107:32 Bamugulumize mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu, bamutenderereze mu lukiiko lw'abantu abakulu." 
Psalms107:33 Akaliza ddala emigga, n'azibikira ensulo z'amazzi." 
Psalms107:34 Ensi ebala agifuula enkalu ey'olunnyo, olw'ebibi by'abo abagibeeramu." 
Psalms107:35 Eddungu alifuula ebidiba by'amazzi, n'ensi enkalu agifuula ensulo ezikulukuta." 
Psalms107:36 Omwo mw'ateeka abalina enjala bazimbemu ekibuga mwe banaabeera. 
Psalms107:37 Ne basiga ensigo mu nnimiro, ne basimba emizabbibu, beeyalize ebibala mu makungula." 
Psalms107:38 Era n'abawa emikisa ne beeyongera nnyo obungi, era n'ataganya na nte zaabwe kukendeera." 
Psalms107:39 Bwe baawangulwa ne batoowazibwa olw'okunyigirizibwa, n'obuyinike era n'obuzibu," 
Psalms107:40 n'anyoomesa ababanyigiriza, n'abaleetera okuwabira awatali kkubo mu ddungu." 
Psalms107:41 Kyokka abanaku n'abawonya obuyinike, amaka gaabwe n'agajjuza abantu, nga bw'ayaza amagana." 
Psalms107:42 Abatuukirivu balaba bino ne basanyuka, ababi bonna ne basirisibwa." 
Psalms107:43 Buli alina amagezi, bino abiteekeko omwoyo. Abantu balowoozenga ku kisa kya Mukama." 
Psalms108:1 Omutima gwange mugumu, ayi Katonda, omutima gwange mugumu, nnaayimba ne nkutendereza." 
Psalms108:2 Zuukuka ggwe mwoyo gwange, zuukuka ggwe entongooli!" 
Psalms108:3 Oli ludda wa ggwe ennanga? Ŋŋenda okuzuukusa emmambya. Nnaakwebazanga, ayi Mukama, nga ndi mu bantu, nnaayimbanga ne nkutenderereza mu mawanga." 
Psalms108:4 Ekisa kyo kigulumivu okutuuka ku ggulu, ku ggulu gye kyekoona. Obwesigwa bwo butuuka ne ku bire." 
Psalms108:5 Gulumizibwa okusinga eggulu, ayi Katonda, ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi yonna." 
Psalms108:6 Nziraamu kye nkusaba otuwonye n'obuyinza bwo, abaagalwa bo banunulibwe." 
Psalms108:7 Katonda yayogerera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, n'agamba nti: “Ndijaguza nga ngabanya mu Sikemu, ne ngaba ebitundu by'Ekiwonvu Sukkoti." 
Psalms108:8 Gileyaadi nsi yange, ne Manasse yange. Efurayimu ye nkuufiira yange, Buyudaaya gwe muggo gwange ogw'obwakabaka." 
Psalms108:9 Mowaabu ye bbenseni mwe nnaabira, Edomu gwe nkasukako engatto zange, okulaga nti nsi yange. Mu Filistiya njogeza maanyi olw'obuwanguzi.”" 
Psalms108:10 Ani alinnyingiza mu kibuga eky'amaanyi? Ani alintuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Otuvuddemu, ayi Katonda? Tokyatambulira wamu na magye gaffe, ayi Katonda!" 
Psalms108:12 Tuyambe okulwanyisa omulabe, kubanga obuyambi bw'abantu tebugasa." 
Psalms108:13 Nga Katonda ali ku ludda lwaffe, tuliba ba maanyi. Ye alirinnyirira abalabe baffe." 
Psalms109:1 Ayi Katonda gwe ntendereza, tosirika busirisi." 
Psalms109:2 Ababi n'abalimba boogera nga bampaayiriza. 
Psalms109:3 Banjogerera eby'obukyayi bannumbaganira bwereere. 
Psalms109:4 Wadde mbaagala, bo bampalana. Nze kye nkola, kubasabira." 
Psalms109:5 Mu kirungi bampaamu kibi. Nze mbaagala, bo bankyawa." 
Psalms109:6 Omulabe wange omusseeko omuntu omubi, n'omu ku balabe be ye aba amulumiriza." 
Psalms109:7 Bw'awozesebwa, bagusale gumusinge, n'okwewolereza kwe kubalibwe ng'ekibi." 
Psalms109:8 Ekiseera ky'obulamu bwe kikendeere, omulimu gwe gutwalibwe omulala." 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be babe bamulekwa, mukazi we abe nnamwandu." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be babe bakireereese, basabirizenga. Bagobwenga mu bifulukwa bye basulamu." 
Psalms109:11 Amubanja anyage by'alina, abagwira baaye byonna bye yakolerera." 
Psalms109:12 Abulwe amukwatirwa ekisa, wadde alabirira abaana be b'alese nga bamulekwa." 
Psalms109:13 Ezzadde lye life liggweewo, aleme kujjukirwa mu mirembe egiriddirira." 
Psalms109:14 Mukama ajjukire ebibi bya bajjajjaabe, n'ekibi kya nnyina kireme kusonyiyibwa." 
Psalms109:15 Bijjukirwenga Mukama ennaku zonna, naye bo beerabirirwe ddala ku nsi," 
Psalms109:16 kubanga teyalina kisa. Yayigganya abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, era n'abaterebuse, okubatta." 
Psalms109:17 Ye ayagala okukolima, k'akolimirwe. Teyayagaliza balala mikisa, naye ka gimwesambe." 
Psalms109:18 Okukolima yakufuula ng'ekyambalo kye, ka kumuyingire mu mubiri ng'amazzi, ne mu magumba ng'omuzigo." 
Psalms109:19 Ebikolimo bimubikke ng'ekyambalo, era abyesibe bulijjo ng'olukoba." 
Psalms109:20 Ebyo Mukama by'aba aweera abalabe bange, aboogera obubi ku bulamu bwange." 
Psalms109:21 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nnyamba nga bwe wasuubiza. Mponya olw'ekisa kyo ekirungi," 
Psalms109:22 kubanga ndi mwavu, ndi mu bwetaavu, nkoseddwa mu mutima." 
Psalms109:23 Nnaatera okuggwaawo ng'ekisiikirize, nsammulwa eri ng'enzige." 
Psalms109:24 Amaviivi gange ganafuye olw'obutalya, nkozze nsigadde magumba." 
Psalms109:25 Abandaba banvuma, banyeenya n'emitwe olw'okungaya." 
Psalms109:26 Nnyamba, ayi Mukama Katonda wange, mponya olw'ekisa kyo," 
Psalms109:27 balyoke bamanye nti Mukama ggwe omponyezza. 
Psalms109:28 Kale bo bakolime, naye ggwe ompe omukisa. Oswaze abanjigganya, naye nze omuweereza wo nsanyuke." 
Psalms109:29 Abalabe bange bambale okuswala, babikkibwe ensonyi ng'ekyambalo." 
Psalms109:30 Ndyebaza Mukama mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ndimutenderereza mu lukuŋŋaana lw'abantu," 
Psalms109:31 kubanga ataasa omwavu, n'amuwonya amusalira ogw'okufa." 
Psalms110:1 Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti: “Tuula ng'onninaanye, ku ludda lwange olwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo ekirinnyibwako ebigere byo.” 15:25; Beef 1:20-22; Bak 3:1; Beb 1:13; 8:1; 10:12-13" 
Psalms110:2 Ng'oli mu Siyooni, Mukama aligaziya obuyinza bwo, n'agamba nti: “Fuga abalabe bo.”" 
Psalms110:3 Ku lunaku lw'olwanyisa abalabe bo abantu bo balyewaayo okulwana nga beeyagalidde. Abavubuka bo balijja gy'oli, ku nsozi entukuvu, ng'omusulo ogw'oku makya." 
Psalms110:4 Mukama talikyusa kye yasuubiza ng'alayira: “Oli Kabona emirembe gyonna, mu lubu lwa Melikizeddeki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Mukama ali ku ludda lwo olwa ddyo, bw'alisunguwala, aliwangula bakabaka." 
Psalms110:6 Alisala omusango mu mawanga, alijjuza eddwaniro emirambo, aliwangula bakabaka mu nsi zonna." 
Psalms110:7 Kabaka alinywa ku nsulo eri ku kkubo, aliddamu amaanyi n'awangula." 
Psalms111:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Neebaza Mukama n'omutima gwange gwonna abatuukirivu we bakuŋŋaanidde. 
Psalms111:2 Mukama by'akola bikulu, ababisanyukira be babyetegereza." 
Psalms111:3 Buli kimu ky'akola kijjudde ekitiibwa n'obukulu, obwesigwa bwe bwa mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms111:4 Mukama wa kisa era musaasizi, atujjukiza ebikolwa bye ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms111:5 Abamussaamu ekitiibwa abawa ebyokulya, teyeerabira ndaagaano ye n'akatono." 
Psalms111:6 Abantu be abalaze obuyinza bwe, ng'abawa ensi y'ab'amawanga amalala." 
Psalms111:7 Mu byonna by'akola mwesigwa era mwenkanya, ebiragiro bye tebikyukakyuka." 
Psalms111:8 Bibeerawo ennaku zonna, byateekebwawo mu mazima na mu butuukirivu." 
Psalms111:9 Yanunula abantu be, n'akola nabo endagaano ey'olubeerera. Mutuukirivu era waakitiibwa" 
Psalms111:10 Okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa ye ntandikwa y'amagezi. Bonna abakola bwe batyo, be bategeevu. Mukama wa kutendebwanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms112:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Wa mukisa oyo assaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, asanyukira ennyo okukwata ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms112:2 Abaana be, banaabeeranga ba maanyi ku nsi. Ezzadde ly'omutuukirivu linaabeeranga lya mukisa." 
Psalms112:3 Amaka ge galifuna ebintu ne gagaggawala, anaabeeranga mwesimbu bulijjo." 
Psalms112:4 Omutuukirivu ekitangaala kimwakira mu kizikiza. Oyo wa kisa, musaasizi, era mwenkanya." 
Psalms112:5 Wa mukisa akola eby'ekisa era awola, omwesigwa mu by'akola." 
Psalms112:6 Anaabeeranga munywevu bulijjo, anajjukirwanga ennaku zonna." 
Psalms112:7 Amawulire amabi tagatya, aguma nga yeesiga Mukama." 
Psalms112:8 Tatya, omutima gwe mugumu, okutuusa lw'aliraba ng'abalabe be bawanguddwa." 
Psalms112:9 Wa kisa mu kugabira abaavu, ekisa kye tekimuggwaako. Alisiimibwa n'aweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Psalms112:10 Ekyo omubi akiraba ne kimusunguwaza, aluma amannyo ng'anyolwa. Omubi by'ayagala birimufa." 
Psalms113:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Mmwe abaweereza ba Mukama, mumutendereze." 
Psalms113:2 Erinnya lye litenderezebwe okuva kaakano n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms113:3 Okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba mutendereze erinnya lya Mukama. 
Psalms113:4 Mukama ye afuga amawanga gonna, ekitiibwa kye kisinga n'eggulu." 
Psalms113:5 Tewali ali nga Mukama Katonda waffe abeera waggulu," 
Psalms113:6 n'akutama okutunuulira ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri ku nsi. 
Psalms113:7 Ayimusa abaavu okubaggya mu nfuufu, abankuseere abayimusa okubaggya ku ntuumu y'ebisasiro," 
Psalms113:8 n'abatuuza wamu n'abalangira, abalangira b'abantu be." 
Psalms113:9 Aweesa omukazi omugumba ekitiibwa mu maka, n'amusanyusa ng'amuwa okuzaala abaana. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms114:1 Abayisirayeli bwe baava e Misiri, ab'ennyumba ya Yakobo nga bazaawuka okuva mu ggwanga eryo," 
Psalms114:2 Buyudaaya n'eba ekifo kya Mukama ekitukuvu Yisirayeli n'eba ensi eyiye ku bubwe. 
Psalms114:3 Ennyanja Emmyufu yalaba n'eddukawo, Omugga Yorudaani gwaddayo emabega." 
Psalms114:4 Ensozi zaabuukabuuka ng'endiga eza sseddume, era n'obusozi ne buligita ng'obuliga." 
Psalms114:5 Waba otya okudduka ggwe ennyanja? Yorudaani lwaki ggwe waddayo emabega? 
Psalms114:6 Kale mmwe ensozi kiki ekyababuusabuusa ng'endiga eza sseddume? Nammwe obusozi mwaligitira ki ng'obuliga? 
Psalms114:7 Kankana ggwe ensi, kubanga Mukama atuuse, atuuse Katonda wa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 eyafuula olwazi ekidiba ky'amazzi, n'amayinja n'agafuula oluzzi." 
Psalms115:1 Ayi Mukama, ekitiibwa tekigwana ffe, si ffe, wabula kigwana ggwe, olw'ekisa kyo n'obwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms115:2 Ab'amawanga amalala lwaki batubuuliriza nti: “Katonda wammwe ali ludda wa?” 
Psalms115:3 Katonda waffe mu ggulu gy'abeera, akola byonna by'ayagala." 
Psalms115:4 Balubaale baabwe bifaananyi bya ffeeza na zaabu ebyakolebwa abantu. 
Psalms115:5 Birina emimwa, naye tebyogera, birina amaaso, naye tebiraba." 
Psalms115:6 Birina amatu, naye tebiwulira, birina ennyindo, naye tebiwunyiriza." 
Psalms115:7 Birina engalo, naye tebikwata, birina ebigere, naye tebitambula." 
Psalms115:8 Ababikola bafaanana nga byo, buli abyesiga bw'atyo bw'ali." 
Psalms115:9 Mmwe abantu ba Yisirayeli, mwesige Mukama, ye abayamba era ye abakuuma." 
Psalms115:10 Mmwe ab'ennyumba ya Arooni, mwesige Mukama, ye abayamba era ye abakuuma." 
Psalms115:11 Mwesige Mukama mwenna abamussaamu ekitiibwa, ye abayamba era ye abakuuma." 
Psalms115:12 Mukama atujjukira. Alituwa omukisa. Aliguwa abantu ba Yisirayeli, aliguwa ab'ennyumba ya Arooni." 
Psalms115:13 Aliguwa abamussaamu ekitiibwa, abato era n'abakulu." 
Psalms115:14 Mukama abawe mmwe okwala, mmwe n'abaana bammwe." 
Psalms115:15 Mukama abawenga omukisa, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms115:16 Eggulu eryo lya Mukama, ensi gye yawa abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafu si be batendereza Mukama, wadde abakkirira emagombe eteri kanyego." 
Psalms115:18 Naye ffe abalamu tuneebazanga Mukama, okuva kaakano n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms116:1 Njagala Mukama, kubanga awulira okwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms116:2 Ampuliriza, kyennaavanga mmukoowoola mu bulamu bwange bwonna." 
Psalms116:3 Akabi ak'okufa kantaayiza, obulumi obw'emagombe ne bunkwata, ne nzijula obuyinike, ne nkaluubirirwa." 
Psalms116:4 Kyennava nkoowoola Mukama, nti: “Nkwegayiridde, Mukama, mponya!”" 
Psalms116:5 Mukama wa kisa era mulungi, Katonda waffe musaasizi." 
Psalms116:6 Mukama akuuma abatalina nkwe: bwe natoowazibwa, n'andokola." 
Psalms116:7 Omutima ka gunzire mu nteeko, Mukama ankwatiddwa ekisa kingi." 
Psalms116:8 Mukama amponyezza okufa, n'ansangula amaziga. Era amponyezza okusirittuka ne ngwa." 
Psalms116:9 Kyenva ntambulira mu maaso ga Mukama, nga ndi mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Psalms116:10 Nasigaza okukkiriza ne bwe nagamba nti: “Mbonyeebonye nnyo!” 
Psalms116:11 Era ne bwe nagamba nti: “Teri muntu yeesigibwa!” 
Psalms116:12 Kiki kye ndiwa Mukama, olw'ebirungi by'ankoledde nze?" 
Psalms116:13 Ndisitula ekikopo okwebaza Mukama olw'okundokola. 
Psalms116:14 Mu maaso g'abantu be bonna, ndimuwa kye mmusuubizza." 
Psalms116:15 Mu maaso ga Mukama okufa kw'abatuukirivu be kuba kwa muwendo nnyo. 
Psalms116:16 Ndi muweereza wo, ayi Mukama, nga mmange bwe yali. Omponyezza okufa." 
Psalms116:17 Ndikuwa ekitambiro okukwebaza, ne nkukoowoola, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms116:18 Ndiwa Mukama kye namusuubiza, ndikimuweera mu maaso g'abantu be bonna," 
Psalms116:19 mu mpya z'ennyumba ye, wakati mu ggwe Yerusaalemu. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms117:1 Mutendereze Mukama mmwe amawanga gonna, mumutendereze mmwe abantu mwenna," 
Psalms117:2 kubanga atukwatirwa ekisa kingi, n'obwesigwa bwe bwa mirembe gyonna. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms118:1 Mwebaze Mukama, kubanga mulungi, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna. 106:1; 107:1; 136:1; Yer 33:11" 
Psalms118:2 Abantu ba Yisirayeli bagambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:3 Ab'ennyumba ya Arooni bagambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:4 Abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa bagambe nti: “Ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.” 
Psalms118:5 Bwe nali mu buyinike nakoowoola Mukama, n'anziramu n'amponya." 
Psalms118:6 Mukama ali nange, siityenga. Omuntu ayinza kunkola ki?" 
Psalms118:7 Mukama ali nange okunnyamba, kyendiva mpangula abankyawa." 
Psalms118:8 Okwesiga Mukama kusinga okwesiga abantu. 
Psalms118:9 Okwesiga Mukama, kusinga okwesiga abafuzi." 
Psalms118:10 Abalabe bangi bannneetooloola. Naye olw'obuyinza bwa Mukama, bonna ne mbasaanyaawo." 
Psalms118:11 Banzingiza ku buli ludda, naye olw'obuyinza bwa Mukama, ne mbasaanyaawo." 
Psalms118:12 Banneetooloola ng'enjuki, era ne babuubuuka ng'omuliro ogw'omu maggwa. Olw'obuyinza bwa Mukama ne mbasaanyaawo." 
Psalms118:13 Bannumba n'amaanyi okumpangula, naye Mukama n'annyamba." 
Psalms118:14 Mukama ye ampa amaanyi, ye ansobozesa okuyimba, era ye andokola." 
Psalms118:15 Wulira amaloboozi ag'essanyu era ag'obuwanguzi mu lusiisira lw'abeesimbu. Amaanyi ga Mukama gakoze eby'obuzira. 
Psalms118:16 Amaanyi ga Mukama gawangudde, ddala gakoze eby'obuzira." 
Psalms118:17 Nze sijja kufa wabula okuba omulamu, mmanyise wonna Mukama by'akoze." 
Psalms118:18 Mukama ambonerezza nnyo, naye tampaddeeyo nfe." 
Psalms118:19 Munzigulirewo emiryango egy'ekifo ekitukuvu, nnyingire neebaze Mukama." 
Psalms118:20 Guno gwe mulyango gwa Mukama, abatuukirivu bokka be bayingiramu." 
Psalms118:21 Nnaakwebazanga, ayi Mukama, kubanga wanziramu n'ondokola." 
Psalms118:22 Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka ekkulu ery'entabiro." 
Psalms118:23 Ekyo Mukama ye yakikola, ne tukiraba, ne tukyewuunya." 
Psalms118:24 Luno lwe lunaku Mukama lwe yassaawo, kale tusanyuke, tujaguze ku lwaleero." 
Psalms118:25 Ayi Mukama tukwegayiridde, tulokole. Ayi Mukama, bye tukola biwe omukisa." 
Psalms118:26 Wa mukisa oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama. Tubasabira omukisa nga tuli mu nnyumba ya Mukama. 
Psalms118:27 Mukama ye Katonda atuwa ekitangaala. Mukwate amatabi mu ngalo mukumbe, mwetooloole alutaari." 
Psalms118:28 Ggwe Katonda wange, era nkwebaza. Ggwe Katonda wange, nkutendereza." 
Psalms118:29 Kale mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, n'ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:1 Ba mukisa abataliiko kamogo, abakolera ku mateeka ga Mukama." 
Psalms119:2 Ba mukisa abakuuma bye yalagira, abajja gy'ali n'omutima gwabwe gwonna," 
Psalms119:3 era abatakola bibi wabula abatambulira mu makubo g'abalaga. 
Psalms119:4 Ayi Mukama, watukuutira ebiragiro byo, tubituusenga n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms119:5 Singa nno nnyweredde mu kukwata ebiragiro byo! 
Psalms119:6 Singa nzisa omwoyo ku byonna bye walagira, sandikwatiddwanga nsonyi." 
Psalms119:7 Nnaakutenderezanga n'omutima omulongoofu, nga njize ennamula yo ey'obwenkanya." 
Psalms119:8 Nnaakwatanga amateeka go, nkwegayiridde tonjabuliranga." 
Psalms119:9 Kale omuvubuka anaakuumanga atya empisa ze? Nga yeegendereza, n'akolera ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:10 Nfuba okukuweereza n'omutima gwange gwonna, mponya okujeemera bye walagira." 
Psalms119:11 Ebigambo byo mbikuuma mu mutima gwange, nneme okwonoona mu maaso go." 
Psalms119:12 Otenderezebwe, ayi Mukama, onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:13 Njogera ne mmanyisa bye watukuutira byonna. 
Psalms119:14 Nsanyukira okugoberera amateeka go, okusinga okufuna ebyobugagga byonna." 
Psalms119:15 Njagala okwekkaanya ebiragiro byo, n'okulowoolereza ku by'okuutira." 
Psalms119:16 Nsanyukira amateeka go, sseerabirenga bigambo byo." 
Psalms119:17 Onkwatirwe ekisa nze omuweereza wo, mbeere mulamu, ŋŋonderenga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:18 Zibula amaaso gange ndabe ebyewuunyisa ebiri mu mateeka go. 
Psalms119:19 Ku nsi ndi muyise buyise, tonkisa bye walagira." 
Psalms119:20 Omwoyo gwange gwegomba nnyo okumanya ennamula yo ennaku zonna. 
Psalms119:21 Onenya abeekulumbaza, abajeemera bye walagira bakolimiddwa." 
Psalms119:22 Omponye okuvumibwa n'okunyoomebwa kubanga nkuumye bye wakuutira. 
Psalms119:23 Abafuzi batuula ne banjogerako obubi, naye nze omuweereza wo, ndowoolereza ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:24 Era bye wakuutira bye nsanyukira, era bye nneebuuzaako." 
Psalms119:25 Nze agalamidde mu nfuufu, onzizeemu obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:26 Nayatula byonna bye nakola, n'onziramu. Onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:27 Ggwe nnyamba okutegeera amateeka go, ndyoke ndowoolerezenga ku by'okola ebyamagero." 
Psalms119:28 Nfa obuyinike, ggwe nzizaamu endasi nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:29 Mponya okugoberera ekikyamu, naye olw'ekisa kyo, onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:30 Nnonzeewo okubeera omuwulize, ntadde omwoyo ku by'okuutira." 
Psalms119:31 Nkolera ku bye walagira, ayi Mukama, tondeka kuswala." 
Psalms119:32 Nnaatuukirizanga by'olagira, ng'onnyambye okubitegeera." 
Psalms119:33 Ayi Mukama onjigirize amateeka go nga bwe gagenda, nnaagakwatanga bulijjo." 
Psalms119:34 Mpa amagezi nkuumenga amateeka go, ngakwatenga n'omutima gwange gwonna." 
Psalms119:35 Nnyamba okukwatanga bye walagira, kubanga mu byo mwe nsanyukira." 
Psalms119:36 Mpa okwegomba okukwatanga ebiragiro byo, sso si kwettanira bya bugagga." 
Psalms119:37 Mponya okumalira omwoyo ku bitalina mugaso, naye ebigambo byo bimpe obulamu." 
Psalms119:38 Nyweza kye wasuubiza omuweereza wo, kye wasuubiza abakussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms119:39 Mponya okuvumibwa kwe ntya, kubanga ennamula yo nnungi." 
Psalms119:40 Laba, njagala nnyo ebiragiro byo, ggwe omwenkanya, mpa obulamu." 
Psalms119:41 Ayi Mukama, ndaga ekisa kyo, era ondokole nga bwe wasuubiza," 
Psalms119:42 ndyoke mbeeko ne kye nziramu abanvuma, kubanga neesiga ebigambo byo." 
Psalms119:43 Nsobozesa okwogeranga amazima bulijjo, kubanga nnina essuubi mu nnamula yo." 
Psalms119:44 Nnaakwatanga amateeka go ennaku zonna, emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms119:45 Era nnaabeeranga mu ddembe, kubanga nfuba okukwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:46 Nnaategeezanga bakabaka amateeka go, nga sikwatibwa nsonyi." 
Psalms119:47 Nsanyuka okutuukiriza bye walagira, era mbyagala nnyo." 
Psalms119:48 Ebiragiro byo mbissaamu ekitiibwa era mbyagala. Nnaalowoolerezanga ku mateeka go. 
Psalms119:49 Jjukira kye wasuubiza nze omuweereza wo, ekyandeetera essuubi." 
Psalms119:50 Ne bwe nabonaabona nasanyuka, kubanga kye wasuubiza kyanzizaamu amaanyi." 
Psalms119:51 Abeekulumbaza bansekerera nnyo, naye ssaava ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:52 Bwe nzijukira bye wakuutira edda, nsanyuka, ayi Mukama," 
Psalms119:53 Bwe ndaba ababi nga bava ku mateeka go, nkwatibwa nnyo obusungu." 
Psalms119:54 Mu bulamu bwange obuyita obuyisi, bye walagira bye nnyimbako ennyimba." 
Psalms119:55 Nkujjukira ekiro ayi Mukama, ne ŋŋondera amateeka go." 
Psalms119:56 Okukwata ebiragiro byo kwe nfudde essanyu lyange. 
Psalms119:57 Ayi Mukama, ggwe wange, nsuubiza okukwatanga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:58 Nkwegayirira n'omutima gwange gwonna, onkwatirwe ekisa nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:59 Bwe ntunuulira amayisa gange, nkyuka ne ngoberera bye wakuutira." 
Psalms119:60 Sseekunya, nnyanguwa okukwata bye walagira." 
Psalms119:61 Ababi ne bwe bantega emiguwa, sseerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:62 Nzuukuka mu ttumbi okukwebaza olw'amateeka go amatuufu. 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mukwano gw'abo bonna abakussaamu ekitiibwa era ow'abo abakwata ebiragiro byo. 
Psalms119:64 Ayi Mukama, ekisa kyo kijjudde ensi, onjigirize bye walagira." 
Psalms119:65 Otuukiriza kye wasuubiza, ayi Mukama, ng'onkolera ebirungi nze omuweereza wo." 
Psalms119:66 Ompe amagezi n'okutegeera, kubanga neesiga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:67 Nga sinnabonaabona nakuvangako, naye kaakano mpulira by'olagira." 
Psalms119:68 Oli mulungi, okola ebirungi, onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:69 Abeekulumbaza banjogerako eby'obulimba, naye nze nnywerera ku by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:70 Emitima gyabwe gyonoonese, naye nze nsanyukira amateeka go." 
Psalms119:71 Okubonaabona kwangasa, ne nsobola okwetegereza ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:72 Amateeka go gansingira zaabu ne ffeeza enkumi n'enkumi. 
Psalms119:73 Ggwe wantonda era ggwe onkuuma, mpa amagezi njige ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:74 Abakussaamu ekitiibwa bwe banandabanga, banaasanyukanga, kubanga neesiga kye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:75 Mmanyi ayi Mukama, nti olamula mu mazima, era nga wambonereza kubanga oli mwesigwa." 
Psalms119:76 Nkwegayiridde, ggwe ow'ekisa onsanyuse, nze omuweereza wo, nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:77 Nkwatirwa ekisa, ompe obulamu, kubanga nsanyukira amateeka go." 
Psalms119:78 Abeekulumbaza abampaayiriza baswale, naye nze nnaalowoolerezanga ku amateeka go." 
Psalms119:79 Abakussaamu ekitiibwa bajje gye ndi, bamanye bye walagira." 
Psalms119:80 Ntuukirize bulungi bye walagira, nnemenga okuswala." 
Psalms119:81 Ayi Mukama, nkooye nga nkulindirira okundokola, naye neesiga kye wayogera." 
Psalms119:82 Nkooye okutega amaaso nga nnindirira okulaba kye wasuubiza, nga bwe nneebuuza nti: “Olinsanyusa ddi?”" 
Psalms119:83 Newaakubadde nfuuse ng'eddiba eritakyagasa, naye seerabira bye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:84 Nze omuweereza wo ndigumiikiriza kutuusa ddi? Abanjigganya olibasalira ddi omusango? 
Psalms119:85 Abeekulumbaza abatagoberera mateeka go bansimidde obunnya mbugwemu. 
Psalms119:86 Byonna bye walagira byesigibwa. Banjigganya awatali nsonga, ggwe onnyamba." 
Psalms119:87 Kaabula kata bansaanyeewo ku nsi, naye saava ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:88 Olw'ekisa kyo, wonya obulamu bwange, ndyoke nkwatenga bye walagira." 
Psalms119:89 Ayi Mukama, ky'oyogera kibeerera, ne mu ggulu kiba kinywevu." 
Psalms119:90 Obwesigwa bwo bwa mirembe gyonna, wanyweza ensi obutasagaasagana." 
Psalms119:91 Ebintu byonna bikyaliwo nga bwe walagira, kubanga byonna ggwe biweereza." 
Psalms119:92 Singa amateeka go si ge gansanyusa, nandibadde nfudde bwe nabonaabona." 
Psalms119:93 Seerabirenga biragiro byo ennaku zonna, kubanga by'ompeereddemu obulamu." 
Psalms119:94 Nze ndi wuwo, kale ggwe ndokola, kubanga nfuba okutuukiriza by'olagira." 
Psalms119:95 Ababi bannindiridde okunsaanyaawo, naye nze nnaalowoolerezanga ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:96 Ndabye ng'ebintu byonna birina we bikoma, naye ebiragiro byo tebirina kkomo." 
Psalms119:97 Amateeka go ngaagala nnyo, ngeebuulirirako okuzibya obudde." 
Psalms119:98 Ekiragiro kyo kiba nange bulijjo, ne kinfuula mugezi okusinga abalabe bange." 
Psalms119:99 Ntegeera okusinga abayigiriza bange bonna, kubanga ndowoolereza ku bye walagira." 
Psalms119:100 Ndi mugezi okusinga abakadde, kubanga nkwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:101 Neewala empisa embi zonna, ndyoke nkwatenga ky'ogamba." 
Psalms119:102 Siva ku biragiro byo, kubanga ggwe obinjigiriza." 
Psalms119:103 Ebigambo byo bimpoomera okusinga omubisi gw'enjuki. 
Psalms119:104 By'oyigiriza binfuula mugezi ne nkyawa empisa zonna ez'obulimba. 
Psalms119:105 Ekigambo kyo ye ttaala emmulisiza ekkubo nga ntambula. 
Psalms119:106 Nkakasizza nga ndayira okukwatanga amateeka go, agajjudde obwenkanya." 
Psalms119:107 Mbonaabona nnyo, ayi Mukama, onkuume nga ndi mulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:108 Ayi Mukama, siima bye nkuwa okukwebaza, era onjigirize by'olagira." 
Psalms119:109 Obulamu bwange buli mu kabi buli kaseera, naye seerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:110 Ababi banteze omutego, naye siva ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:111 Ebyo bye walagira gwe mugabo gwange ogw'olubeerera, era bye bisanyusa omutima gwange." 
Psalms119:112 Mmaliridde okutuukirizanga ebiragiro byo. Okutuusa lwe ndifa. 
Psalms119:113 Nkyawa abateesigwa, naye njagala amateeka go." 
Psalms119:114 Ggwe onkuuma era ggwe ontaasa, neesiga bye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:115 Muve we ndi mmwe aboonoonyi, nze nkwata ebyo Katonda bye yalagira." 
Psalms119:116 Ompanirire nga bwe wasuubiza, mbe mulamu, tondeka kuswala nga nkwesize." 
Psalms119:117 Ompanirire mbe mirembe, nkwatenga amateeka go ennaku zonna." 
Psalms119:118 Onyooma bonna abava ku biragiro byo, ddala entegeka zaabwe ez'obulimba ziba za bwereere." 
Psalms119:119 Ababi bonna obayisa ng'ebisasiro, kyenva njagala ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:120 Nzenna nkankana olw'okukutya, era ntya okulamula kwo." 
Psalms119:121 Nkoze ebituufu era ebirungi, tondeka mu balabe bange." 
Psalms119:122 Suubiza okuyamba omuweereza wo, abeekulumbaza tobaleka kunnyigiriza." 
Psalms119:123 Nkooye okukanula amaaso nga nnindirira ondokole nga bwe wasuubiza, ggwe omwenkanya." 
Psalms119:124 Ondage ekisa kyo, era onjigirize by'olagira." 
Psalms119:125 Ndi muweereza wo, ompe okutegeera, ndyoke mmanye by'oyigiriza." 
Psalms119:126 Ayi Mukama, kye kiseera obeeko ky'okola, kubanga bamenya amateeka go." 
Psalms119:127 Njagala ebiragiro byo okusinga zaabu, wadde zaabu omulungi ennyo." 
Psalms119:128 Kyennaavanga ngoberera byonna by'olagira, era ne nkyawa eby'obulimba byonna." 
Psalms119:129 Bye walagira byewuunyisa, kyenva mbikuuma mu mutima gwange." 
Psalms119:130 Ebigambo byo bwe binnyonnyolwa, biwa ekitangaala, bigeziwaza abatalina magezi." 
Psalms119:131 Njasamya akamwa kange ne mpeevuuma, olw'okuyaayaanira bye walagira." 
Psalms119:132 Kyukira gye ndi onkwatirwe ekisa, nga bw'okikwatirwa abakwagala." 
Psalms119:133 Onnuŋŋamyenga nga bwe wasuubiza, waleme kubaawo kibi kinfuga." 
Psalms119:134 Omponye abambonyaabonya, nsobole okukwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:135 Ontunuulize ekisa nze omuddu wo, era onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:136 Amaziga gange gakulukuta ng'omugga, kubanga abantu tebakwata mateeka go." 
Psalms119:137 Ayi Mukama, oli mutuukirivu, era amateeka go ga bwenkanya." 
Psalms119:138 Ebiragiro bye wawa bituufu, era byesigirwa ddala." 
Psalms119:139 Obusungu bumbugujja kubanga abalabe bange beerabidde ebigambo byo. 
Psalms119:140 Kye wasuubiza kikakafu, nze omuweereza wo kyenva nkyagala." 
Psalms119:141 Nze siriiko bwe ndi era nnyoomebwa, naye seerabira biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:142 Obutuukirivu bwo bwa mirembe gyonna, era amateeka go matuufu bulijjo." 
Psalms119:143 Nzijiddwa emitawaana n'obuyinike, naye bye walagira binsanyusa." 
Psalms119:144 Bye walagira bituufu emirembe gyonna, ompe okutegeera mbe mulamu." 
Psalms119:145 Ayi Mukama, nkoowoola n'omutima gwange gwonna, onziremu, nnaakwatanga amateeka go." 
Psalms119:146 Nkukoowoola ondokole, ndyoke ntuukirizenga bye walagira." 
Psalms119:147 Nkeera nnyo ng'emmambya tennasala, ne nkusaba onnyambe. Neesiga kye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:148 Ekiro kyonna nsula ntunula, nga ndowoolereza ku bye walagira." 
Psalms119:149 Olw'ekisa kyo ayi Mukama, owulire kye ŋŋamba nti kuuma obulamu bwange ggwe omwenkanya." 
Psalms119:150 Ababi abangigganya banfumbiikirizza, be bantu abatakwata mateeka go." 
Psalms119:151 Naye ggwe ondi kumpi, ayi Mukama, ebiragiro byo byonna bituufu." 
Psalms119:152 Okuva edda n'edda nayiga bye walagira, ne mmanya nti wabiteekawo nga bya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:153 Laba obuyinike bwange, omponye, kubanga seerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:154 Ompolereze, onnunule, ompe obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:155 Ababi tebalokolebwa, kubanga tebafa ku bye walagira." 
Psalms119:156 Ekisa kyo kingi, ayi Mukama, ompe obulamu ggwe omwenkanya." 
Psalms119:157 Abanjigganya n'abankyawa bangi, naye nze siva ku bye walagira." 
Psalms119:158 Ndaba ab'enkwe ne neetamwa, kubanga tebakwata biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:159 Ayi Mukama, laba bwe njagala bye walagira. Olw'ekisa kyo, kuuma obulamu bwange." 
Psalms119:160 Omulamwa gw'amateeka go ge mazima, byonna by'olagira bituufu era bya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:161 Ab'obuyinza banjigganya awatali nsonga, naye nze nzisaamu ebiragiro byo ekitiibwa." 
Psalms119:162 Nsanyukira bye wasuubiza, ng'asanyukira eby'omunyago ebingi." 
Psalms119:163 Nkyawa era ntamwa obulimba, naye njagala amateeka go." 
Psalms119:164 Buli lunaku nkutendereza emirundi musanvu, olw'ennamula yo ey'obwenkanya." 
Psalms119:165 Abaagala amateeka go balina emirembe mingi, tebalina kye beesittalako." 
Psalms119:166 Ayi Mukama, nkulindirira ondokole, era ntuukiriza bye walagira." 
Psalms119:167 Nkwata ebiragiro byo era mbyagala nnyo. 
Psalms119:168 Ntuukiriza bye walagira ne bye wakuutira, era olaba byonna bye nkola." 
Psalms119:169 Okukaaba kwange kutuuse gy'oli, ayi Mukama, ompe okutegeera nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:170 Wulira okwegayirira kwange, omponye nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:171 Nnaakutenderezanga bulijjo, kubanga onjigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:172 Nnaayimbanga bye walagira, kubanga ebiragiro byo bya bwenkanya." 
Psalms119:173 Bulijjo ba nga weetegese okunnyamba, kubanga nalondawo okukwatanga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:174 Ayi Mukama, neegomba ondokole, era amateeka go ge gansanyusa." 
Psalms119:175 Ompe obulamu, nnaakutenderezanga, era ennamula yo ennyambenga." 
Psalms119:176 Mbutaabutana ng'endiga eyabula, onnoonye nze omuweereza wo, kubanga seerabira biragiro byo." 
Psalms120:1 Mu kunakuwala kwange, nkoowoola Mukama n'anziramu." 
Psalms120:2 Ayi Mukama, omponye aboogera eby'obulimba n'eby'obukuusa." 
Psalms120:3 Oliweebwa ki, era olibonerezebwa na ki ggwe ayogera eby'obukuusa?" 
Psalms120:4 Olibonerezebwa n'obusaale obwogi obw'abazira, era n'amanda agengereredde." 
Psalms120:5 Nga zinsanze okubeera mu Bameseki ne mu Bakedari! 
Psalms120:6 Nga mbadde ekiseera kiwanvu mu bantu abakyawa emirembe! 
Psalms120:7 Nze njagala mirembe. Naye bwe njogera, bo baagala kulwana." 
Psalms121:1 Nnyimusa amaaso gange ne ntunuulira ensozi. Obuyambi bwange buliva wa? 
Psalms121:2 Mukama ye annyamba, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Talikuleka kugwa, akukuuma talisumagira." 
Psalms121:4 Ddala oyo akuuma Yisirayeli teyeebaka, wadde okusumagira." 
Psalms121:5 Mukama ye akukuuma, Mukama akuli ku lusegere okukutaasa." 
Psalms121:6 Enjuba terikwokya emisana, wadde omwezi ekiro." 
Psalms121:7 Mukama anaakuwonyanga buli kabi, n'akuuma obulamu bwo," 
Psalms121:8 n'akukuuma amagenda n'amadda, okuva kaakano n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms122:1 Nasanyuka bwe baŋŋamba nti: “Tugende mu nnyumba ya Mukama.” 
Psalms122:2 Kaakano tuli wano, tuyimiridde mu miryango gya Yerusaalemu." 
Psalms122:3 Yerusaalemu kye kibuga ekyazimbibwa nga kigattiddwa awamu. 
Psalms122:4 Mu kyo ebika mwe bijja, ebika bya Mukama, okwebaza Mukama, nga Yisirayeli bwe yalagirwa." 
Psalms122:5 Mu kyo mwe mwateekebwa entebe ez'obulamuzi entebe ez'ab'ennyumba ya Dawudi. 
Psalms122:6 Musabire Yerusaalemu emirembe nti: “Babe ba mukisa abakwagala. 
Psalms122:7 Emirembe gibe mu bisenge byo ebikwetoolodde, n'omukisa gube mu mayumba agali mu ggwe.”" 
Psalms122:8 Olwa baganda bange ne bannange, ŋŋamba Yerusaalemu nti: “Emirembe gibe mu ggwe!”" 
Psalms122:9 Olw'ennyumba ya Mukama Katonda wange, nkusabira omukisa." 
Psalms123:1 Nnyimusiza amaaso gange gy'oli, ayi Mukama abeera mu ggulu." 
Psalms123:2 Ng'abaddu bwe batunuulira mukama waabwe, era ng'abazaana bwe batunuulira mugole waabwe naffe bwe tutunuulira ggwe, Mukama Katonda waffe, okutuusa lw'otukwatirwa ekisa." 
Psalms123:3 Tukwatirwe ekisa, ayi Mukama, tukwatirwe ekisa kubanga tunyoomebwa nnyo." 
Psalms123:4 Abali obulungi batuduulidde nnyo, era tunyoomebwa abeekulumbaza." 
Psalms124:1 Singa Mukama teyali ku ludda lwaffe, Yisirayeli eyogere kaakano," 
Psalms124:2 singa Mukama teyali ku ludda lwaffe, abantu bwe baatusitukiramu," 
Psalms124:3 banditumize tuli balamu, ng'obusungu bwe baatulinako bubuubuuka!" 
Psalms124:4 Mukoka yanditwezeewo, amazzi ganditubisse." 
Psalms124:5 Amazzi agayira ganditusaanyizzaawo. 
Psalms124:6 Mukama yeebazibwe atatugabudde mu balabe baffe. 
Psalms124:7 Tuwonye omutego gw'omutezi. Omutego gukutuse ffe ne tuwona. 
Psalms124:8 Mukama ye atuyamba, eyakola eggulu n'ensi." 
Psalms125:1 Abeesiga Mukama bali ng'olusozi Siyooni, olutanyeenyezebwa, olubeerera ennaku zonna." 
Psalms125:2 Ng'ensozi bwe zeetoolodde Yerusaalemu, Mukama naye bw'atyo bwe yeetoolodde abantu be, okuva kaakano n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms125:3 Ababi tebalifuga nsi ya balungi, sikulwa nga n'abalungi nabo bakola ebitasaana." 
Psalms125:4 Abalungi n'ab'emitima emirongoofu bakolerenga ebirungi, ayi Mukama." 
Psalms125:5 Naye abakwata ekkubo eryabwe, eritali ttuufu babonerereze wamu n'ababi Emirembe gibeere ku Yisirayeli." 
Psalms126:1 Mukama bwe yatuggya mu busibe n'atuzza mu Siyooni, twali ng'abaloota." 
Psalms126:2 Twasekereza ne tuyimba olw'essanyu, ab'amawanga amalala ne bagamba nti: “Mukama abakoledde ebikulu!”" 
Psalms126:3 Ddala Mukama atukoledde ebikulu, kyetuvudde tusanyuka." 
Psalms126:4 Otuzzeeyo ayi Mukama, mu nsi yaffe, ng'enkuba bw'ezza amazzi mu migga egikaze." 
Psalms126:5 Abasiga nga bakaaba amaziga, bakungule nga basanyuka." 
Psalms126:6 Agenda akaaba ng'atwala ensigo, alikomawo ng'ayimba olw'essanyu, ng'aleeta ebinywa by'akungudde." 
Psalms127:1 Mukama bw'aba nga si ye azimba ennyumba, abagizimba bateganira bwereere. Mukama bw'aba nga si ye akuuma ekibuga, abakuumi okutunula batawaanira bwereere." 
Psalms127:2 Tekirina mugaso okuteganira kye munaalya, ne muzuukuka nga tebunnalaba, era ne mwebaka mu matumbi. Mukama b'ayagala abawa nga bali mu tulo." 
Psalms127:3 Okuzaala abaana kirabo kya Mukama, ddala kirabo kyennyini." 
Psalms127:4 Abaana omuntu b'azaala mu buvubuka, baba ng'obusaale mu mikono gy'omuzira." 
Psalms127:5 Wa mukisa alina obusaale ng'obwo obungi, bw'aliyomba n'abalabe be ku mulyango taliwangulwa." 
Psalms128:1 Bonna abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa ne bakolera ku by'alagira, ba mukisa." 
Psalms128:2 Olirya ku bibala by'entuuyo zo, oliraba ebirungi, oliba wa mukisa." 
Psalms128:3 Mukazi wo aliba ng'omuzabbibu ogubala mu nnyumba yo. Abaana bo baliba ng'amatabi ag'omuti omuzayiti nga beetoolodde olujjuliro lwo. 
Psalms128:4 Ddala omuntu assaamu Mukama ekitiibwa bw'atyo bw'aliweebwa omukisa. 
Psalms128:5 Mukama akuwe omukisa ng'asinziira mu Siyooni, olabe Yerusaalemu bwe kikulaakulana, ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo." 
Psalms128:6 Owangaale olabe ku bazzukulu bo. Emirembe gibeere ku Yisirayeli. 
Psalms129:1 Yisirayeli agambe nti: “Okuva mu buto bwange, bambonyaabonyezza emirundi mingi." 
Psalms129:2 Okuva mu buto bwange bambonyaabonyezza emirundi mingi, naye ne batampangula." 
Psalms129:3 Banfumita ebiwundu mu mugongo, ne bagufuula ng'ennimiro ekabaliddwa." 
Psalms129:4 Naye Mukama mwenkanya; yakutula emiguwa gy'ababi.” 
Psalms129:5 Bonna abakyawa Siyooni bawangulwe bazzibwe emabega. 
Psalms129:6 Babe ng'omuddo ogumera waggulu ku nnyumba, ogukala nga tegunnakula." 
Psalms129:7 Oyo agukungula teguwezaamu lubatu, n'oyo agukuŋŋaanya taguwezaamu kiganda." 
Psalms129:8 Era abayitawo tebaligamba nti: “Mukama abawe omukisa. Tubawa omukisa mu linnya lya Mukama.” 
Psalms130:1 Ayi Mukama, nkuwanjagira nga nsinziira ebuziba." 
Psalms130:2 Ayi Mukama, wulira okukaaba kwange. Wuliriza bwe nsaba obuyambi." 
Psalms130:3 Ayi Mukama, singa otunuulira ebibi byaffe, ani atandisingiddwa musango?" 
Psalms130:4 Naye ggwe otusonyiwa, tulyoke tukussengamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms130:5 Nnindirira n'omutima gwange gwonna Mukama okunnyamba, era nneesiga ekigambo kye." 
Psalms130:6 Nnindirira Mukama okusinga abakuumi bwe balindirira obudde okukya, ddala okusinga abakuumi bwe balindirira obudde okukya." 
Psalms130:7 Yisirayeli weesigenga Mukama kubanga wa kisa, buli kiseera yeetegese okununula." 
Psalms130:8 Alinunula abantu ba Yisirayeli mu bibi byabwe byonna. 
Psalms131:1 Ayi Mukama, seekulumbaza, situnuza lwetumbu, siruubirira bikulu, wadde ebinsukkiridde." 
Psalms131:2 Wabula nteredde, nsirise ng'omwana bw'asirika, ng'ali ku kifuba kya nnyina. Ddala bwe ntyo nange bwe nteredde." 
Psalms131:3 Ggwe Yisirayeli, weesige Mukama okuva kaakano n'okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms132:1 Ayi Mukama, jjukira Dawudi n'ebizibu bye yagumira byonna." 
Psalms132:2 Jjukira bwe yakulayirira, ayi Mukama, n'obweyamo bwe yakola gy'oli, Ggwe Ow'obuyinza, Katonda wa Yakobo:" 
Psalms132:3 “Siriyingira mu nnyumba yange, wadde okulinnya ekitanda kyange," 
Psalms132:4 siryebaka wadde okusumagirako," 
Psalms132:5 okutuusa nga mmaze okuzuulira Mukama ekifo, ekifo kye Owoobuyinza Katonda wa Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Essanduuko ey'Endagaano twagiwulirako mu Efurata, twagiraba mu nnimiro z'e Yaari." 
Psalms132:7 Tuyingire mu kisulo kya Mukama, tusinzize w'ateeka ebigere bye." 
Psalms132:8 Ayi Mukama, jjangu mu kifo mw'owummulira, obeeremu n'Essanduuko ey'Endagaano etegeeza obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms132:9 Bakabona bo bakolenga bulijjo ebyo ebituufu, n'abatukuvu bo bajaganye olw'essanyu." 
Psalms132:10 Olw'omuweereza wo Dawudi, togoba musiige wo." 
Psalms132:11 Mukama yalayirira Dawudi n'anyweza kye yasuubiza ky'atagenda kukyusaako: “Ndituuza omu ku batabani bo ku ntebe yo ey'obwakabaka. 
Psalms132:12 Abaana bo bwe banaakuumanga endagaano yange n'ebiragiro byange bye nnaabayigirizanga, n'abaana baabwe banaasikiranga obwakabaka bwo emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms132:13 Mukama yeeroboza Siyooni n'asiima okukibeerangamu: 
Psalms132:14 “Kino kye kifo mwe nnaawummuliranga, wano we nsiimye okubeeranga bulijjo." 
Psalms132:15 Nnaawanga Siyooni byonna bye kyetaaga, abaavu baakyo nnaabakkusanga emmere." 
Psalms132:16 Bakabona baakyo ndibawa omukisa mu bye bakola byonna n'abatukuvu abakirimu banaajaganyanga olw'essanyu. 
Psalms132:17 Wano omu ku basika ba Dawudi we ndimufuulira kabaka omukulu. Wano we ndikuumira omumuli ogw'omusiige wange. 
Psalms132:18 Abalabe be ndibakwasa ensonyi. Kyokka ye engule ye eritemagana.” 
Psalms133:1 Ddala nga kirungi era kisanyusa abooluganda okuba awamu nga bakkaanya! 
Psalms133:2 Kiri ng'omuzigo ogw'omuwendo ogukulukutira ku mutwe ne ku kirevu kya Arooni, ne guserengetera ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye." 
Psalms133:3 Kiri ng'omusulo gw'oku Herumooni ogugwa ku busozi bwa Siyoon, Mukama gye yasinziira okulagira wabeewo omukisa: ogwo bwe bulamu obw'emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms134:1 Mujje mutendereze Mukama mmwe mwenna abaweereza be abaweereza mu nnyumba ye ekiro. 
Psalms134:2 Muyimuse emikono gyammwe nga mugyolekeza ekifo ekitukuvu mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms134:3 Mukama eyakola eggulu n'ensi abawe omukisa ng'asinziira mu Siyooni. 
Psalms135:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Mwe abaweereza ba Mukama, mutendereze erinnya lye." 
Psalms135:2 Mmwe abayimirira mu nnyumba ya Mukama, mu mpya z'ennyumba ya Katonda waffe," 
Psalms135:3 mutendereze Mukama kubanga mulungi. Muyimbe erinnya lye kubanga wa kisa. 
Psalms135:4 Mukama yeeroboza aba Yakobo, abantu ba Yisirayeli okuba ababe." 
Psalms135:5 Mmanyi nga Mukama mukulu, mukulu okusinga balubaale bonna." 
Psalms135:6 Buli ky'ayagala akikola mu ggulu era ne mu nsi, n'ebuziba mu nnyanja." 
Psalms135:7 Ayimusa ebire ku njuyi zonna ez'ensi, aleeta okumyansa mu nkuba, n'afulumya embuyaga mu mawanika ge." 
Psalms135:8 Mu Misiri yatta abaggulanda, ab'abantu n'ebisolo." 
Psalms135:9 Eyo e Misiri yakolerayo ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero okubonereza kabaka waayo n'abakungu be bonna. 
Psalms135:10 Yazikiriza amawanga mangi, n'atta bakabaka ab'amaanyi:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, ne Ogi kabaka w'e Basani, ne bakabaka bonna ab'e Kanaani." 
Psalms135:12 Ensi yaabwe n'agiwa abantu be. Yagiwa Abayisirayeli bagyefuge. 
Psalms135:13 Erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama, lisigalawo ennaku zonna. onojjukirwanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms135:14 Mukama anaataasanga abantu be, anaasaasiranga abaweereza be." 
Psalms135:15 Balubaale b'amawanga, bifaananyi bya ffeeza ne zaabu, ebyakolebwa abantu." 
Psalms135:16 Birina emimwa, naye tebyogera; birina amaaso, naye tebiraba." 
Psalms135:17 Birina amatu, naye tebiwulira, era tebissa mukka." 
Psalms135:18 Ababikola n'ababyesiga bafaanana nga byo. 
Psalms135:19 Mmwe abantu ba Yisirayeli, mutendereze Mukama. Mmwe ab'ennyumba ya Arooni, mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms135:20 Mmwe ab'ennyumba ya Leevi, mutendereze Mukama. Mmwe abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, mumutendereze." 
Psalms135:21 Mukama abeera mu Yerusaalemu, atenderezebwe mu Siyooni. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms136:1 Mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna. 100:5; 106:1; 107:1; 118:1; Yer 33:11" 
Psalms136:2 Mwebaze Katonda afuga balubaale, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:3 Mwebaze Mukama w'abakama, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:4 Ye yekka akola ebyamagero ebikulu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:5 Eggulu yalikoza magezi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:6 Yayaliira ensi ku mazzi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:7 Yakola ebyaka ebikulu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna," 
Psalms136:8 enjuba efugenga emisana, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna;" 
Psalms136:9 omwezi n'emmunyeenye bifugenga ekiro, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:10 Yatta abaggulanda b'Abamisiri, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna;" 
Psalms136:11 n'aggya Abayisirayeli mu Misiri, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna," 
Psalms136:12 n'omukono gwe omugolole ogw'amaanyi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:13 Yayawula mu Nnyanja Emmyufu wakati, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna," 
Psalms136:14 n'ayisa Abayisirayeli wakati waayo, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna," 
Psalms136:15 naye n'asaanyizaamu kabaka w'e Misiri n'eggye lye, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:16 Yakulembera abantu mu ddungu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:17 Yatta bakabaka ab'amaanyi, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:18 Yatta bakabaka abamanyifu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna:" 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni kabaka w'Abaamori, kubanga ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna," 
Psalms136:20 ne Ogi kabaka wa Basani, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:21 Ensi yaabwe n'agiwa abantu be, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:22 Yagiwa Abayisirayeli bagyefuge, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:23 Yatujjukira bwe twawangulwa, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:24 N'atuwonya abalabe baffe, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:25 Awa emmere ebitonde byonna ebiramu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:26 Mwebaze Mukama ow'omu ggulu, ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms137:1 Kumpi n'emigga gy'e Babilooni gye twatuula ne tukaaba amaziga, bwe twajjukira Siyooni." 
Psalms137:2 Ne tuwanika ennanga zaffe, ku miti egiriraanyeewo," 
Psalms137:3 kubanga eyo abaatutwala mu busibe baatugamba okuyimba. Abatubonyaabonya baatulagira okusanyuka nti: “Mutuyimbire mu nnyimba za Siyooni.” 
Psalms137:4 Tuyinza tutya okuyimba oluyimba lwa Mukama mu nsi eteri yaffe? 
Psalms137:5 Bwe nkwerabira ggwe Yerusaalemu, omukono gwange ogwa ddyo gukalambale." 
Psalms137:6 Olulimi lwange lukwatire ku kibuno kyange, bwe siikujjukirenga era bwe siikwagalenga okusinga byonna ebinsanyusa." 
Psalms137:7 Ayi Mukama, jjukira aba Edomu kye baakola ku lunaku Yerusaalemu lwe kyawambibwa, bwe baagamba nti: “Mukisaanyeewo, mukisaanyeewo n'emisingi gyakyo!”" 
Psalms137:8 Ggwe Babilooni oli wa kuzikirizibwa. Wa mukisa akusasula bye watukola. 
Psalms137:9 Wa mukisa alikwata abaana bo abato n'abafuntula ku lwazi! 
Psalms138:1 Ayi Mukama, nkwebaza n'omutima gwange gwonna, nnyimba ne nkutendereza mu maaso ga balubaale." 
Psalms138:2 Nnaasinzanga nga ntunuulidde Essinzizo lyo ettukuvu, ne nkwebaza olw'ekisa kyo n'olw'obwesigwa bwo, kubanga wagulumiza erinnya lyo n'ekigambo kyo okusinga ebirala byonna." 
Psalms138:3 Ku lunaku lwe nakukoowoolerako wannyanukula, wannyongeramu amaanyi n'oŋŋumya." 
Psalms138:4 Bakabaka bonna ab'ensi balikutendereza, ayi Mukama, kubanga bawulidde bye wayogera." 
Psalms138:5 Baliyimba ku by'okola, ne bagamba nti: “Ekitiibwa kya Mukama nga kinene!”" 
Psalms138:6 Wadde Mukama asukkulumye, kyokka alowooza ku beetoowaze; Wabula abeekulumbaza, abeesamba." 
Psalms138:7 Ne bwe mbeera mu buyinike, onkuuma nga ndi mulamu. Olwanyisa abalabe bange abasunguwadde, n'omponya n'amaanyi go." 
Psalms138:8 Ayi Mukama olituukiriza bye wasuubiza kubanga ekisa kyo kya mirembe gyonna. Tosuulirira mulimu gwe watandika. 
Psalms139:1 Ayi Mukama, wannekkaanya n'ommanya." 
Psalms139:2 Bwe ntuula oba bwe nsituka omanya, ne bye ndowooza obimanyira wala." 
Psalms139:3 Bwe ntambula oba bwe neebaka, ontunuulira, buli kye nkola okimanya." 
Psalms139:4 Ne bwe mba nga sinnayogera, kye nnaayogera oba wakitegedde dda." 
Psalms139:5 Onneetoolodde ku njuyi zonna, onkuuma n'amaanyi go." 
Psalms139:6 Okumanya kw'ommanyiimu kwewuunyisa, kunsukkiridde, siyinza kukutegeera." 
Psalms139:7 Nnaalaga wa okukwekweka Ggwe? Naddukira wa gy'otoli? 
Psalms139:8 Singa nninnya mu ggulu, gyoli. Singa nneeyalira emagombe, gyoli." 
Psalms139:9 Ne bwe mbuuka ne ntuuka ebuvanjuba, ne bwe nsomoka amayanja ne mpisa ebugwanjuba," 
Psalms139:10 n'eyo obeerayo okunkulembera, obeerayo okunnyamba." 
Psalms139:11 Ne bwe nsaba enzikiza okunkweka, oba ekitangaala ekinneetoolodde kifuuke ekiro," 
Psalms139:12 n'enzikiza yennyini ggwe w'oli teba nkwafu, n'ekiro kitangaala ng'emisana. Ku ggwe enzikiza n'ekitangaala biba kye kimu." 
Psalms139:13 Ggwe watonda ebitundu byange byonna, ggwe wammumba mu nda ya mmange." 
Psalms139:14 Nkutendereza kubanga nakolebwa mu ngeri etiisa era eyeewuunyisa. Ekyo nkimanyidde ddala. 
Psalms139:15 Amagumba gange ogamanyi bulungi, n'engeri gye nabumbirwa mu kyama nga ntonderwa wansi mu ttaka." 
Psalms139:16 Wandaba nga sinnazaalibwa. Ennaku ezampeebwa, zonna waziwandiika mu kitabo nga tezinnaba na kutandika." 
Psalms139:17 Ayi Katonda, nga nkaluubirirwa okumanya ebirowoozo byo, era nga bingi nnyo!" 
Psalms139:18 Singa mbibala, bisinga omusenyu obungi. Bwe nzuukuka mba nkyali wamu naawe." 
Psalms139:19 Ayi Katonda, njagala otte ababi, n'abaagala okuyiwa omusaayi banveeko." 
Psalms139:20 Bakwogerako bubi, abalabe bavuma erinnya lyo." 
Psalms139:21 Ayi Mukama, nkyawa abakukyawa, ntamwa abakulwanyisa." 
Psalms139:22 Mbakyayira ddala, mbayita balabe bange." 
Psalms139:23 Nkebera ayi Katonda, omanye omutima gwange. Ongeze, omanye ebirowoozo byange." 
Psalms139:24 Laba oba nga ndimu ebibi, onkulembere mu kkubo ery'olubeerera." 
Psalms140:1 Ayi Mukama, mponya abantu ababi, ontaase abatemu." 
Psalms140:2 Bayiiya eby'ettima mu mitima gyabwe, teboosa kusiikuula ntalo." 
Psalms140:3 Ennimi zaabwe bazisongoza ng'ez'emisota, akamwa kaabwe kalimu obusagwa ng'obw'essalambwa." 
Psalms140:4 Ayi Mukama, mponya abantu ababi, ontaase abatemu." 
Psalms140:5 Abeekulumbaza banteze omutego, baaliiridde ekitimba, ne bakitega mu kkubo." 
Psalms140:6 Ŋŋamba Mukama nti: “Ggwe Katonda wange.” Wulira okukaaba kwange, ayi Mukama, onnyambe." 
Psalms140:7 Ayi Mukama, Mukama wange, omuyambi wange ow'amaanyi, ggwe onkuumye mu lutalo." 
Psalms140:8 Ayi Mukama, ababi tobawa bye baagala, tobakkiriza kutuukiriza bye bategeka." 
Psalms140:9 Abalabe bange baleme kuwangula, eby'okutiisatiisa bye boogera bibaddire." 
Psalms140:10 Amanda agengeredde gagwe ku bo, bagwe mu bunnya obuwanvu, baleme kubuvaamu." 
Psalms140:11 Awaayiriza abalala abulweko w'abeera mu nsi; omutemu, ebibi bye bimuyiggenga okumuzikiriza." 
Psalms140:12 Mmanyi nga Mukama ataasa ababonyaabonyezebwa, era alwanirira abanaku." 
Psalms140:13 Ddala abenkanya balikutendereza, abatuukirivu balibeera mu maaso go." 
Psalms141:1 Ayi Mukama, nkukoowoola, yanguwa okujja gye ndi, ompulire nga nkukoowoola." 
Psalms141:2 Okwegayirira kwange, kunyooke okutuuka gy'oli ng'obubaani, n'okugolola emikono gyange kube ng'ekitambiro eky'akawungeezi." 
Psalms141:3 Ayi Mukama, kuuma akamwa kange, owumbe emimwa gyange." 
Psalms141:4 Tondeka kwagala kukola kibi wadde okwetaba n'abakola ebibi, era nnemenga kwegatta nabo mu kulya embaga zaabwe." 
Psalms141:5 Omuntu omulungi ambonereze oba annenye n'ekisa. Naye sikkiriza kitiibwa ekimpeebwa abantu ababi, kubanga bulijjo nnwanyisa ebikolwa byabwe ebibi, nga nsaba Katonda." 
Psalms141:6 Abafuzi baabwe bwe balisuulibwa wansi nga bawanulwa ku njazi empanvu, abantu lwe balimanya ebigambo byange bwe biri eby'amazima." 
Psalms141:7 Amagumba gaabwe galisaasaanyizibwa ku mulyango gw'emagombe ng'ettaka eritemeddwa amavuunike ne gakubibwa. 
Psalms141:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda, nze ntunuulira ggwe, era neesiga ggwe. Tondeka nga siriiko anannyamba." 
Psalms141:9 Ontaase emitego gye banteze, n'ebitimba by'ababi." 
Psalms141:10 Ababi bagwe mu bitimba byabwe, naye nze mpone." 
Psalms142:1 Nkoowoola Mukama, mmwegayirira annyambe." 
Psalms142:2 Mmwanjulira ebinnuma byonna, mmulaga obuyinike bwange." 
Psalms142:3 Bwe mba nnaatera okuterebuka, ye amanya kye nteekwa okukola. Mu kkubo mwe mpita, bantezeemu omutego." 
Psalms142:4 Bwe ntunula ku mabbali ndaba nga tewali anfaako. Tewali gye nzirukira, tewali n'omu annumirwa." 
Psalms142:5 Ayi Mukama, nkoowoola ggwe, ne ŋŋamba nti ggwe kiddukiro kyange, ggwe mugabo gwange mu bulamu buno." 
Psalms142:6 Wulira okukaaba kwange, kubanga njeezebwa nnyo. Omponye abanjigganya, kubanga bansinga amaanyi." 
Psalms142:7 Onzigye mu kkomera ndyoke nkwebaze ng'abantu bo banneetoolodde, olw'ebirungi by'onkoledde." 
Psalms143:1 Ayi Mukama, wuliriza okusaba kwange, wuliriza okwegayirira kwange, onziremu, kubanga oli mwesigwa era mwenkanya." 
Psalms143:2 Leka kuwozesa muweereza wo, kubanga teri mulamu aba mutuufu mu maaso go." 
Psalms143:3 Omulabe anjigganyizza, ampangulidde ddala, n'anteeka mu kizikiza, ne mba ng'abaafa edda." 
Psalms143:4 Kyenvudde nterebuka, ne nzigweramu ddala amaanyi." 
Psalms143:5 Nzijukira ennaku ez'edda, ndowoolereza byonna bye wakola, nfumiitiriza ebikolwa byo," 
Psalms143:6 ne nsitulira gy'oli emikono gyange. Omwoyo gwange gukulumirwa ennyonta, ng'ensi erakasidde." 
Psalms143:7 Ayi Mukama, yanguwa okunziramu, nzigwamu amaanyi. Tonneekweka, nneme kuba ng'abo abakkirira emagombe." 
Psalms143:8 Ombuulire eby'ekisa kyo buli nkya, kubanga neesiga ggwe. Ondagirire ekkubo lye mba nkwata, kubanga nnyimusiza omwoyo gwange gy'oli." 
Psalms143:9 Nzirukira gy'oli, ayi Mukama, omponye abalabe bange." 
Psalms143:10 Onjigirize okukola by'oyagala, kubanga ggwe Katonda wange. Ggwe ow'omwoyo omulungi, onnuŋŋamye mu kkubo eggolokofu." 
Psalms143:11 Ayi Mukama, kuuma obulamu bwange nga bwe wasuubiza. Nga bw'oli omulungi, onzigye mu buyinike." 
Psalms143:12 Nga bw'onkwatirwa ekisa, zikiriza abalabe bange, omalewo bonna abambonyaabonya, kubanga ndi muweereza wo." 
Psalms144:1 Mukama ankuuma era anjigiriza eby'entalo n'anteekateeka okulwana, atenderezebwe." 
Psalms144:2 Ye ankuuma, ye w'amaanyi antaasa. Ye Mulokozi wange, Ye antaasa ng'engabo, era kye kiddukiro kyange, Ye awangula amawanga ngafuge." 
Psalms144:3 Ayi Mukama, omuntu ataliiko bw'ali, lwaki omufaako? Era omuntu obuntu, lwaki omulowoozaako?" 
Psalms144:4 Ali ng'omukka obukka ennaku ze kisiikirize ekiyita obuyisi. 
Psalms144:5 Ayi Mukama, kutamya eggulu lyo okke, kwata ku nsozi, zinyooke omukka." 
Psalms144:6 Leeta okumyansa, abalabe bo obasaasaanye. Lasa obusaale bwo obalinnimule."
