Psalms144:7 Golola omukono gwo ng'osinziira mu ggulu, omponye, onzigye mu mazzi amangi. Onzigye mu buyinza bwa bannamawanga" 
Psalms144:8 abatayogera mazima era abalayira eby'obulimba. 
Psalms144:9 Nnaakuyimbira oluyimba oluggya, ayi Katonda, ku nnanga ey'enkoba ekkumi." 
Psalms144:10 Ggwe awa bakabaka obuwanguzi, ggwe awonya Dawudi omuweereza wo," 
Psalms144:11 omponye okuttibwa abalabe abakambwe. Onzigye mu buyinza bwa bannamawanga, abatayogera mazima era abalayira eby'obulimba." 
Psalms144:12 Batabani baffe bakule bulungi ng'ebimera, mu buvubuka bwabwe. Bawala baffe babe ng'empagi engolokofu okuzimbirwa olubiri." 
Psalms144:13 Amawanika gaffe gajjule ebikungulwa ebya buli ngeri. Endiga mu malundiro gaffe zizaale nkumi na nkumi. 
Psalms144:14 Ente zaffe zizaale bulungi, zireme kuvaamu mawako wadde okufiisa. Waleme kubaawo kutema miranga mu nguudo zaffe." 
Psalms144:15 Eggwanga lya mukisa eririna ebiri ng'ebyo. Ba mukisa abasinza Mukama nga ye Katonda waabwe. 
Psalms145:1 Nnaakugulumizanga, ayi Katonda wange era Kabaka wange, nnaakutenderezanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms145:2 Nnaakwebazanga buli lunaku, nnaakutenderezanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms145:3 Mukama mukulu, era agwana okutenderezebwa ennyo, obukulu bwe tebumalikayo." 
Psalms145:4 Ab'omulembe ogumu banaatenderanga ab'omulembe oguddirira bye wakola, banaatenderezanga ebikolwa byo eby'amaanyi." 
Psalms145:5 Nnaalowoolerezanga ku kitiibwa ekinene eky'obukulu bwo, ne ku bye wakola ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu banaayogeranga ku by'entiisa by'okola, nange nnaamanyisanga obukulu bwo." 
Psalms145:7 Banaanyumyanga ku bulungi bwo obungi obumanyiddwa, ne bayimba ku butuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms145:8 Mukama wa kisa era musaasizi, alwawo okusunguwala, era asonyiwa nnyo." 
Psalms145:9 Mukama akolera bulungi bonna, era akwatirwa ekisa byonna bye yakola." 
Psalms145:10 Ebitonde byo byonna binaakutenderezanga, ayi Mukama, n'abantu bo bonna banaakwebazanga." 
Psalms145:11 Banaayogeranga ku kitiibwa ky'obwakabaka bwo, banaanyumyanga ku buyinza bwo," 
Psalms145:12 abantu bonna bamanye eby'amaanyi by'okola, n'ekitiibwa ky'obukulu bw'obwakabaka bwo." 
Psalms145:13 Obwakabaka bwo si bwa kuggwaawo, oli mufuzi emirembe gyonna. Mukama mwesigwa mu by'asuubiza, era wa kisa mu byonna by'akola." 
Psalms145:14 Mukama awanirira bonna abagwa, n'ayimusa abagudde." 
Psalms145:15 Ebiramu byonna bitunuulira ggwe n'obiwa emmere buli lwe bigyetaaga. 
Psalms145:16 Obigabira nga bwe byetaaga, byonna n'obikkusa." 
Psalms145:17 Mukama mutuufu mu byonna by'akola, era wa kisa mu bikolwa bye byonna." 
Psalms145:18 Aba kumpi n'abo bonna abamukoowoola, abamukoowoola mu mazima." 
Psalms145:19 Abamussaamu ekitiibwa abakolera kye baagala, era awulira okukaaba kwabwe n'abalokola." 
Psalms145:20 Akuuma bonna abamwagala, naye asaanyaawo ababi bonna." 
Psalms145:21 Nnaatenderezanga Mukama, era emirembe gyonna ebitonde bye byonna bitenderezenga erinnya lye ettukuvu." 
Psalms146:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Ggwe mwoyo gwange, tendereza Mukama." 
Psalms146:2 Nnaatenderezanga Mukama obulamu bwange bwonna, nnaayimbanga okumutendereza nga nkyali mulamu." 
Psalms146:3 Temwesiganga bafuzi, temwesiganga muntu n'omu, kubanga talina ky'ayinza kuyamba." 
Psalms146:4 Omukka bwe gumuggwaamu, ng'adda mu ttaka mwe yava. Olwo bye yategekanga nga bizikirira." 
Psalms146:5 Wa mukisa ayambibwa Katonda wa Yakobo, era asuubira mu Mukama Katonda we," 
Psalms146:6 eyatonda eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja n'ebibirimu byonna, kubanga Mukama akuuma obwesigwa ennaku zonna." 
Psalms146:7 Abo abanyigirizibwa abasalira omusango mu bwenkanya, abayala n'abawa emmere. Mukama asumulula abasibe," 
Psalms146:8 azibula amaaso ga bamuzibe. Ayimusa abagudde, ayagala abalungi." 
Psalms146:9 Mukama akuuma bannaggwanga, ayamba bannamwandu ne bamulekwa, naye azikiriza ebikolwa by'ababi." 
Psalms146:10 Mukama anaafuganga ennaku zonna. Ggwe Siyooni, Katonda wo anaafuganga emirembe n'emirembe." 
Psalms147:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Kirungi okuyimba nga tutendereza Katonda waffe, kubanga wa kisa era agwana okutenderezebwa." 
Psalms147:2 Mukama addamu okuzimba Yerusaalemu, akuŋŋaanya Abayisirayeli abaasaasaana." 
Psalms147:3 Awonya ab'emitima egimenyese, era asiba ebiwundu byabwe." 
Psalms147:4 Ye amanyi obungi bw'emmunyeenye, zonna n'aziwa amannya gaazo." 
Psalms147:5 Mukama waffe mukulu era wa buyinza, n'amagezi ge tegaliiko kkomo." 
Psalms147:6 Mukama ayimusa abeetoowaze, n'anyigiriza wansi ababi." 
Psalms147:7 Muyimbire Mukama nga mumwebaza, muyimbire ku nnanga nga mumutendereza." 
Psalms147:8 Abikka ebire ku ggulu, ateekerateekera ensi enkuba, ameza omuddo ku nsozi." 
Psalms147:9 Awa ebisolo emmere yaabyo, ne binnamuŋŋoona ebito ebikaaba." 
Psalms147:10 Essanyu lye teriri mu maanyi ga mbalaasi, wadde mu ggye eritambuza ebigere." 
Psalms147:11 Wabula yeesiimira mu abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa, ne mu beesiga ekisa kye." 
Psalms147:12 Yerusaalemu tendereza Mukama, Siyooni tendereza Katonda wo," 
Psalms147:13 kubanga anyweza ebisiba enzigi zo, abakulimu abawa omukisa." 
Psalms147:14 Aleeta emirembe ku nsalo zo, akukkusa eŋŋaano ekira obulungi." 
Psalms147:15 Aweereza ekiragiro kye ku nsi, ky'alagira ne kikolebwa mangu." 
Psalms147:16 Atonnyesa omuzira ogutukula obulala, asansa omusulo ng'evvu." 
Psalms147:17 Aweereza amayinja g'omuzira ng'obukunkumuka. Ani ayinza okugumira obutiti bwe? 
Psalms147:18 Ate bw'alagira n'abisaanuusa. Akunsa embuyaga, amazzi ne gakulukuta." 
Psalms147:19 Ekigambo kye akibuulira aba Yakobo, amateeka n'ebiragiro bye abimanyisa Abayisirayeli." 
Psalms147:20 Ekyo takikoleranga mawanga malala, tagamanyisanga biragiro bye. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms148:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Mutendereze Mukama nga musinziira mu ggulu. Mumutendereze mmwe abali eyo waggulu. 
Psalms148:2 Mmwe bamalayika be mwenna mumutendereze, mmwe eggye lye mwenna mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:3 Mmwe enjuba n'omwezi mumutendereze; mmwe emmunyeenye zonna ezaaka, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:4 Ggwe eggulu erisinga okutumbiira, mutendereze. Amazzi agali waggulu w'eggulu, gamutendereze." 
Psalms148:5 Byonna bitendereze erinnya lya Mukama, kubanga yalagira ne bikolebwa." 
Psalms148:6 Yabiteekako etteeka eritakyuka, n'abinyweza emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms148:7 Mmwe abali ku nsi mutendereze Mukama. Mmwe ebikulejje eby'omu nnyanja, nammwe ebifo eby'eddubi mu gayanja," 
Psalms148:8 omuliro n'omuzira, ggwe kalenge n'omusulo, omuyaga ogutuukiriza ekiragiro kye, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:9 Mmwe ensozi n'obusozi bwonna, emiti egy'ebibala n'emivule gyonna," 
Psalms148:10 ensolo zonna, enfuge n'ez'omu ttale, ebyewalula n'ennyonyi ezibuuka, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:11 Mmwe bakabaka b'ensi nammwe amawanga gonna, abakungu n'abafuzi mwenna ab'ensi," 
Psalms148:12 mmwe abavubuka abalenzi n'abawala, abakadde n'abaana abato, mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:13 Bonna batendereze erinnya lya Mukama, kubanga lye lyokka erigulumizibwa. Ekitiibwa kye kisukkiridde ensi n'eggulu." 
Psalms148:14 Eggwanga lye yalifuula lya maanyi abantu be bonna kyebava bamutendereza, be Bayisirayeli, abamuli okumpi. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms149:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Mumuyimbire oluyimba oluggya, mumutenderereze abeesigwa be we bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Psalms149:2 Yisirayeli sanyuka olw'ebyo Omutonzi wo by'akola. Abantu b'e Siyooni musanyukire Kabaka wammwe. 
Psalms149:3 Mutendereze erinnya lye nga muzina, nga muyimbira ku ŋŋoma ne ku nnanga," 
Psalms149:4 kubanga Mukama asanyukira abantu be, agulumiza abeetoowaze ng'abawa obuwanguzi." 
Psalms149:5 Abamwesiga bajaguze kubanga bawangudde; bayimbe olw'essanyu, ku buliri bwabwe." 
Psalms149:6 Bayimbe nnyo nga batendereza Katonda, nga bakutte ebitala ebyogi mu ngalo," 
Psalms149:7 okuwoolera eggwanga ku mawanga, n'okubonereza abantu;" 
Psalms149:8 okusiba bakabaka n'enjegere, abakungu baabwe n'empingu," 
Psalms149:9 balyoke batuukirize ensala y'omusango eyabateekerwawo. Ekyo kye kitiibwa ky'abeesigwa be. Mutendereze Mukama! 
Psalms150:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Mutendereze Katonda mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, mutendereze amaanyi ge mu ggulu." 
Psalms150:2 Mumutendereze olw'ebikolwa bye eby'amaanyi, mumutendereze olw'obukulu bwe obutuukirivu." 
Psalms150:3 Mumutendereze mu ddoboozi ery'eŋŋombe, mumutendereze mu ndere ne mu nnanga." 
Psalms150:4 Mumutendereze mu ŋŋoma ne mu kuzina, mumutendereze mu bivuga eby'enkoba n'amakondeere." 
Psalms150:5 Mumutendereze mu nsaasi ezivuga ennyo, mumutendereze mu nsaasi ezisaala." 
Psalms150:6 Ebiramu byonna bitendereze Mukama. Mutendereze Mukama. 
Proverbs1:1 Zino ze ngero za Solomooni mutabani wa Dawudi, era kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Ziyamba abantu okufuna amagezi n'okuyigirizibwa, n'okutegeera ebigambo eby'amakulu amakusike." 
Proverbs1:3 Ziyigiriza amagezi ag'okukola ebituufu, n'okusala ensonga mu bwenkanya, n'okuba abeesimbu." 
Proverbs1:4 Ziyigiriza amagezi abatalina bumanyirivu, ziwa abavubuka okumanya n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs1:5 Omugezi bw'aziwulira, yeeyongera okuyiga, era zibuulirira abategeevu," 
Proverbs1:6 ne beeyongera okutegeera amakulu g'engero agoomunda, n'ebigambo ebyogerwa abakugu." 
Proverbs1:7 Mu kutya Mukama, okumanya mwe kusookera. naye abasiru banyooma amagezi, era tebaagala kuyiga." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wange, wulira kitaawo by'akuyigiriza, era tova ku ebyo nnyoko by'akukuutira." 
Proverbs1:9 Birungiya empisa zo, ng'ekiremba ky'oku mutwe n'emikuufu gy'omu bulago, bwe biwoomera abirina." 
Proverbs1:10 Ababi bwe bakusendasendanga, mwana wange, tokkirizanga." 
Proverbs1:11 Singa bagamba nti: “Jjangu tuyite ffenna, tuteegeyo gwe tunatta, tugwikirize abataliiko musango, tubalumbe awatali nsonga," 
Proverbs1:12 tubafuukire amagombe tubamire, basaanewo ng'abakka mu bunnya." 
Proverbs1:13 Tuneezuulira ebintu eby'omuwendo ennyo, tujjuze amayumba gaffe omunyago." 
Proverbs1:14 Jjangu otwegatteko naawe, tugabanire wamu ebibbe.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wange togezanga n'oyita nabo, era tobeesemberezanga," 
Proverbs1:16 kubanga tewaliyita bbanga nga tebannakola bya mbyone. Tebalirwa kuyiwa musaayi. 
Proverbs1:17 Ekitimba otegera bwereere, ng'ennyonyi gy'otega ekulaba." 
Proverbs1:18 Naye abantu ng'abo, bateega bulamu bwabwe bwennyini, era be bafiira mu nkwe zaabwe." 
Proverbs1:19 Bwe kityo bwe kiba ku buli afuna eby'obunyazi: ababifuna, biribatta." 
Proverbs1:20 Amagezi galeekaanira mu nguudo, gakoowoolera mu bifo ebyalukale." 
Proverbs1:21 Googera n'eddoboozi ery'omwanguka awayingirirwa mu kibuga, n'abangi we bakuŋŋaanira. Ne gagamba nti:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Mmwe abatalina magezi, mulituusa wa okwagala obutamanya? Nammwe abanyoomi mulituusa wa okusanyukira obunyoomi? Era nammwe abasiru mulituusa wa okukyawa okumanya?" 
Proverbs1:23 Musseeyo omwoyo ku bye mbanenya. Era nja kubabuulirira, mbamanyise ekindi ku mwoyo, mbagabanyize ku bye mmanyi." 
Proverbs1:24 Mbayise ne mugaana okujja. Mbawenyezzaako n'omukono, ne wataba afaayo." 
Proverbs1:25 Temuwulirizza bye mbabuulirira, temwagadde mbanenye n'akatono." 
Proverbs1:26 Kale nange bwe mulikaaba, ndiseka; ndikudaala nga muli mu ntiisa." 
Proverbs1:27 Entiisa bw'eribajjira ng'omuyaga, akabi ne kabeetooloola ng'embuyaga ey'akazimu, obuyinike n'obulumi ne bibagwira," 
Proverbs1:28 olwo mulimpanjagira, naye siribaddamu; mulinnoonya, naye temulinzuula," 
Proverbs1:29 kubanga mwakyawanga okumanya, era temwalondawo kutya Mukama." 
Proverbs1:30 Temwayagalanga mbabuulirire n'akatono, temwakkirizanga mbanenyeeko n'akamu." 
Proverbs1:31 Kyemuliva mufuna empeera egwanira bye mwakola, mulyoke mwetamwe enkwe zammwe," 
Proverbs1:32 kubanga ekitta ababuyabuya, kuva ku bituufu; n'ekizikiriza abasiru, buteefiirayo." 
Proverbs1:33 Naye buli awuliriza bye ŋŋamba, anaabanga mirembe, era anaatereeranga nga tewali kabi k'atya.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wange, singa ossa omwoyo ku bye nkuyigiriza, n'oteerabiranga bye nkulagira okukola;" 
Proverbs2:2 n'owuliranga ebigambo eby'amagezi, era n'ofubanga okubitegeera;" 
Proverbs2:3 n'osabanga ofune amagezi, ne weegayiriranga oweebwe okutegeera;" 
Proverbs2:4 amagezi n'oganoonyanga ng'anoonya ffeeza, era ng'awenja ebyobugagga ebyakwekebwa," 
Proverbs2:5 olwo olitegeera okutya Mukama, n'ovumbula okumanya Katonda," 
Proverbs2:6 kubanga Mukama ye agaba amagezi, ye atuwa okumanya n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs2:7 Amagezi amatuufu agaterekera abalongoofu, n'akuuma abeewala okwonoona," 
Proverbs2:8 alyoke akuume obwenkanya, alabirire abo abakola by'ayagala." 
Proverbs2:9 Bw'ossa omwoyo ku bye nkutegeeza, olimanya ebituufu n'eby'amazima, n'eby'obwenkanya. Olimanya by'osaanidde okukola." 
Proverbs2:10 Olifuuka mugezi, okumanya ne kukusanyusa." 
Proverbs2:11 Okuteesa obulungi kunaakulabiriranga, n'okutegeera kukukuumenga," 
Proverbs2:12 kukuwonyenga okukola ebitasaana, era kukuwonyenga abo aboogera ebitabula abantu." 
Proverbs2:13 Kubakuwonyenga abo abavudde ku kukolanga ebituufu, ne badda mu kukolanga ebibi," 
Proverbs2:14 abasanyuka okwonoona, era abaaniriza ebikolwa by'abantu aboonoonefu." 
Proverbs2:15 Bo bantu abakyukakyuka, era abatayinza kwesigika." 
Proverbs2:16 Olisobola okuwona omukazi ow'empisa embi, agezaako okukusendasenda n'akalimi akawoomerevu." 
Proverbs2:17 Omukazi ow'engeri eyo, aleka bba gwe yafumbirwa mu buvubuka, ne yeerabira Katonda bye yalagira." 
Proverbs2:18 Kale okugenda ku nnyumba ye, kuba kugenda magombe. Ekkubo erigenda ewuwe, likutwala mu bafu." 
Proverbs2:19 Abamukyalira tebadda, tebakomawo mu kkubo ery'obulamu." 
Proverbs2:20 Kale goberera ekyokulabirako eky'abantu abalungi, okwatenga empisa z'abakola ebituufu," 
Proverbs2:21 kubanga ab'omwoyo omulongoofu be banakkaliranga mu nsi; abataliiko kamogo, be baligisigalamu." 
Proverbs2:22 Naye Katonda alimalawo ababi mu nsi, n'aboonoonyi balisimbulibwamu." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wange, teweerabiranga bye nkuyigiriza, naye okwatanga bye nkulagira okukola," 
Proverbs3:2 lw'oliwangaala emyaka emingi, n'oba mu bulamu obw'emirembe." 
Proverbs3:3 Tovanga ku mazima ne ku bwesigwa. Bisibenga mu bulago bwo, biwandiikenga ku mutima gwo." 
Proverbs3:4 Olwo olisiimibwa era n'oyagalibwa Katonda n'abantu. 
Proverbs3:5 Weesigenga Mukama n'omutima gwo gwonna, teweesiganga kutegeera kwo." 
Proverbs3:6 Gonderanga Mukama mu byonna by'okola, anaakulaganga ky'osaanye okukola." 
Proverbs3:7 Teweefuulanga mugezi. Otyanga Mukama, n'ova mu bibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Ekyo kye kinaabanga eddagala eriwonya ebiwundu byo, era erikkakkanya obulumi bwo." 
Proverbs3:9 Ossangamu Mukama ekitiibwa ng'omutonera ku bibyo, owangayo ebisinga obulungi ku by'okungula byonna;" 
Proverbs3:10 amawanika go lwe ganajjulanga by'obazizza, n'amasogolero go ne gajjula omwenge omusu." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wange, Mukama by'akubuulirira tobinyoomanga, era teweetamwanga ng'akunenyezza," 
Proverbs3:12 kubanga Mukama b'ayagala abakangavvula, ng'omuzadde bw'akangavvula omwana we gw'ayagala." 
Proverbs3:13 Wa mukisa oyo aba n'amagezi, wa mukisa afuna okutegeera," 
Proverbs3:14 kubanga bya muwendo okusinga ffeeza, bya magoba okusinga zaabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Amagezi ga muwendo okusinga amayinja ag'omuwendo. Tewali kye weegomba, ky'oyinza kugeraageranya ku go." 
Proverbs3:16 Amagezi gakuwangaaza, ne gakuwa obugagga n'ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs3:17 Amagezi gakuwa obulamu obweyagaza, n'obubeeramu ng'oli mirembe." 
Proverbs3:18 Abafuna amagezi, bafuna obulamu; abaganywereramu beesiimye." 
Proverbs3:19 Mukama ensi eno yagitondesa magezi, n'eggulu yaliwangisa kutegeera." 
Proverbs3:20 Amagezi ge, ge gaakulukusa emigga, ne gatonnyesa n'enkuba ku nsi." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wange, weekwatenga ku magezi amatuufu n'okugoba ensonga; tobiganyanga kukuvaako." 
Proverbs3:22 Birikuwa obulamu, ne binyiriza embeera yo." 
Proverbs3:23 Olwo olitambula bulungi mu lugendo lwo, ng'ekigere kyo tewali we kyekoona." 
Proverbs3:24 Bw'onoogalamiranga okwebaka, tootyenga. Oneebakanga otulo ne tukuwoomera." 
Proverbs3:25 Teweeraliikirirenga kugwibwako bubenje, wadde okuzikirira okujjira ababi," 
Proverbs3:26 kubanga Mukama ye anaakukuumanga n'atakuleka kugwa mu kitimba. 
Proverbs3:27 Buli lw'oba osobola, tommanga buyambi bantu babusaanidde." 
Proverbs3:28 Togambanga muliraanwa wo nti: “Kati genda, okomewo enkya,” ng'osobola okumuyamba olwaleero." 
Proverbs3:29 Tokolanga ntegeka kukola munno kabi ng'ali naawe mirembe. 
Proverbs3:30 Toyombanga na muntu awatali nsonga, awatali kabi k'akukoze." 
Proverbs3:31 Tokwatirwanga buggya oyo anyigiriza abalala, era tosalangawo kukola nga ye by'akola," 
Proverbs3:32 kubanga Mukama akyawa abakola ebibi, naye abalongoofu b'amanyisa ekyama kye." 
Proverbs3:33 Mukama akolimira amaka g'ababi, naye ag'abalungi agawa omukisa." 
Proverbs3:34 Abeemanyi bokka abanyooma, naye abeetoowaze abakwatirwa ekisa." 
Proverbs3:35 Abagezi balifuna ekitiibwa, naye abasiru balyeyongera kuswazibwa." 
Proverbs4:1 Abaana, muwulirize kitammwe by'abayigiriza. Mubisseeko omwoyo, mulyoke mube n'okutegeera," 
Proverbs4:2 kubanga bye mbawa birungi. Temuvanga ku bye mbayigiriza. 
Proverbs4:3 Bwe nali nkyali mulenzi muto, nali muganzi ewa kitange ne mmange." 
Proverbs4:4 Era kitange yanjigirizanga n'aŋŋamba nti: “Jjukiranga bye ŋŋamba, tobyerabiranga. Kolanga bye nkulagira, oliwangaala." 
Proverbs4:5 Funa amagezi n'okutegeera. Teweerabiranga wadde okulagajjalira bye ŋŋamba. 
Proverbs4:6 Tovanga ku magezi, ganaakukuumanga; ogaagalanga, ganaakubeezangawo mirembe." 
Proverbs4:7 Amagezi, kye kintu ekisinga obukulu. Kale funanga amagezi; era mu byobugagga bwo byonna, beeranga n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs4:8 Yagalanga amagezi, galikufuula mukulu. Gawambaatirenga, galikuweesa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs4:9 Galikutikkira engule ey'ebimuli, engule erikuweesa ekitiibwa.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Wulira mwana wange era okkirize bye ŋŋamba, lw'oliwangaala emyaka emingi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nkuyigirizza eby'amagezi, nkulaze ekkubo ettuufu." 
Proverbs4:12 Tewali kineekiikanga mu kkubo mw'otambulira, era teweekoonenga ng'odduka." 
Proverbs4:13 By'oyize tobirekanga, bikuumenga. Bikwatenga, kubanga bwe bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs4:14 Ekkubo ly'ababi tolikwatanga, era toyitanga na boonoonyi." 
Proverbs4:15 Ekkubo lyabwe lyesambenga. Lyewalenga, okwatenga liryo ogende," 
Proverbs4:16 kubanga tebeebaka nga tebamaze kukola bya ffujjo. Otulo tebatufuna, nga tebalina gwe basudde mu kibi." 
Proverbs4:17 Bawoomerwa kukola bibi na kwonoona, nga bwe bawoomerwa emmere n'omwenge." 
Proverbs4:18 Naye ekkubo abalungi mwe bayita, lyaka ng'enjuba etandiikiriza okuvaayo, egenda nga yeeyongera okwaka okutuuka mu ttuntu." 
Proverbs4:19 Ekkubo ly'ababi liri nga kazigizigi wa nzikiza. Beesittala ne bagwa, nga tebamanyi kye beesittaaddeko." 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wange, ssaayo omwoyo ku bigambo byange, wuliriza bulungi bye ŋŋamba." 
Proverbs4:21 Toyawukananga nabyo, era bikuumenga mu mutima gwo," 
Proverbs4:22 kubanga ababizuula, bibawa obulamu, era biwonya omubiri gwabwe gwonna endwadde." 
Proverbs4:23 Weegenderezenga endowooza yo, kubanga obulamu bwo, bufugibwa ebyo by'olowooza." 
Proverbs4:24 Toyogeranga bya bulimba, weewalenga ebiwubisa abalala." 
Proverbs4:25 Tunulanga n'obwesige mu maaso gy'olaga, tomagamaganga." 
Proverbs4:26 Bulijjo malanga kweteesa, nga tonnabaako ky'okola, by'okola byonna lwe binaalamanga." 
Proverbs4:27 Weewale ebibi, otambulire mu kkubo ettuufu. Towunjawunjanga kulivaamu." 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wange, ssaayo omwoyo, owulirize amagezi gange n'okwetegereza kwange," 
Proverbs5:2 olyoke omanyenga engeri y'okuyisaamu, era ebigambo byo biryoke biragenga ng'oliko ky'omanyi." 
Proverbs5:3 Emimwa gya muka bandi, gyandikuwoomera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki, n'ebigambo by'ayogera ne bisinga omuzigo gw'emizayiti okuweweera," 
Proverbs5:4 naye mu nkomerero, akuleka ng'okaayirirwa ng'oli ng'alidde omususa, era ng'obalagalwa obulumi." 
Proverbs5:5 Akuserengesa mu kufa, n'ekkubo ly'akukwasa, likkirira magombe." 
Proverbs5:6 Tali mu kkubo lya bulamu, alivuddemu nga ye takimanyi!" 
Proverbs5:7 Kale baana bange, mumpulirenga, era temuvanga ku bye ŋŋamba." 
Proverbs5:8 Omukazi ng'oyo, omwewalanga, n'oluggi lw'ennyumba ye tolusembereranga." 
Proverbs5:9 Bw'otomwewala, abalala balitwala ekitiibwa kyo, n'ottibwa abakambwe ng'okyali muvubuka." 
Proverbs5:10 Abagwira balyefunira by'okoleredde, bye wateganira bifuuke bya balala!" 
Proverbs5:11 Olifa ng'onakuwadde, ng'owedde ku magumba, okenenye." 
Proverbs5:12 Olyevuma ng'ogamba nti: “Lwaki nakyawa okubuulirirwa, ne nnyoomanga okunenyezebwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Saawulirizanga bayigiriza bange, sassangayo mwoyo ku bye baŋŋamba." 
Proverbs5:14 Mbuzeeko katono nneesange nga nswadde awali abakuŋŋaanye!” 
Proverbs5:15 Mukazi wo ye ali ng'oluzzi olw'amazzi amayonjo. Nywanga amazzi ag'omu luzzi olulwo, amazzi agakulukuta, ag'omu luzzi olwo." 
Proverbs5:16 Lwaki ensulo zo okusaasaanyizibwa eno n'eri, mukoka n'akulukutira mu nguudo?" 
Proverbs5:17 Amazzi ag'omu luzzi olwo gabe gago wekka sso si ga balala wamu naawe. 
Proverbs5:18 Ensulo yo ebeerenga n'omukisa, era osanyukenga n'omukazi gwe wawasa mu buvubuka bwo," 
Proverbs5:19 omulungi ng'ennangaazi, omubalagavu ng'empeewo. Akusanyusenga ennaku zonna, bulijjo osanyusibwenga okwagala kwe." 
Proverbs5:20 Kale lwaki ggwe mwana wange, okusanyukiranga muk'omulala, n'ogwa mu kifuba ky'atali wuwo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Mukama by'okola abiraba, era yeetegereza buli kkubo ly'okwata." 
Proverbs5:22 Ebibi by'omuntu omubi miguwa, egimusiba nga ye ye agyerangidde." 
Proverbs5:23 Obutayiga bulimutta, aliwaba agwe mu ntaana, olw'obusiru bwe obungi." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wange, bwe weeyimirira munno, n'omuteerawo akabega," 
Proverbs6:2 weesiba mu by'oyogera, ng'akamwa ko lye kkomera." 
Proverbs6:3 Kale nno mwana wange, kola kino weewonye, kubanga oli mu buyinza bwa mulala: genda gy'ali weetoowaze, omwegayirire akuddiremu." 
Proverbs6:4 Tomalanga kwebaka ku tulo, na kudda ku bbali owummuleko." 
Proverbs6:5 Weewonye ng'empeewo edduka omuyizzi, era ng'ekinyonyi ekyetakkuluza mu mikono gy'omutezi." 
Proverbs6:6 Kale ggwe omugayaavu, genda olabe enkuyege, weetegereze enkola yaazo, oziyigireko amagezi." 
Proverbs6:7 Tezirina mukulembeze, newaakubadde omulabirizi, wadde omufuzi," 
Proverbs6:8 naye zeeterekera akamere nga bakungula ebirimwa. 
Proverbs6:9 Kale ggwe omugayaavu, olyebakanga kutuusa ddi? Olizuukuka ddi mu tulo two?" 
Proverbs6:10 Owoza: “Ka ngira neebakamu, nfunye ku mikono, ngalamiremu katono!”" 
Proverbs6:11 Naye ng'oli mu kubongoota, obwavu bulikwesibako, n'ebyetaago bikuzinde ggwe, ng'omutemu azze n'ebissi." 
Proverbs6:12 Omuntu omubi entagasa, agenda abungeesa obulimba." 
Proverbs6:13 Atemya ku maaso, aseesa ebigere, n'awenya n'emikono gye." 
Proverbs6:14 Mu ndowooza ye enkyamu, ateesa kukola bya ffujjo! Asiga bya bukyayi mu balala." 
Proverbs6:15 Kyaliva agwa ku kibabu ky'aliba talindiridde. Alimenyekawo mangu, nga tewali w'awonera." 
Proverbs6:16 Waliwo ebintu mukaaga, oba nga musanvu Mukama by'akyawa, mazima bye yeenyinyala:" 
Proverbs6:17 entunula ey'amalala, olulimi olulimba, emikono egitta abatalina musango;" 
Proverbs6:18 omutima oguteesa eby'enkwe, ebigere ebiwenyuka okukola ebitajja nsa;" 
Proverbs6:19 omujulizi awa obujulizi obw'obulimba, n'omuntu asiga mu banne ebireeta okuyombagana." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wange, kwatanga ebyo kitaawo by'akulagira, era okolenga ebyo nnyoko by'akuyigiriza." 
Proverbs6:21 Bikuumenga bulijjo mu mutima gwo, era obyesibenga mu bulago." 
Proverbs6:22 Binaakuluŋŋamyanga ng'otambula. Binaakukuumanga nga weebase, byogerenga naawe ng'ozuukuse," 
Proverbs6:23 kubanga ekiragiro, ttaala, okuyigiriza, kitangaala, n'amateeka agakangavvula, lye kkubo erituusa mu bulamu." 
Proverbs6:24 Obikuumanga, olyoke owonenga omukazi ow'empisa embi, n'akalimi ka muk'omusajja akasikiriza." 
Proverbs6:25 Teweegombanga bulungi bwe mu mutima gwo, n'ebisige by'amaaso ge biremenga kukusikiriza." 
Proverbs6:26 Omukazi malaaya akunoonyaako nsimbi egula kaakulya; naye omukazi muk'omusajja, aleetera bulamu bwo bwennyini okuzikirira." 
Proverbs6:27 Omuntu ayinza okuwambaatira omuliro mu kifuba kye, ebyambalo bye ne bitaggya?" 
Proverbs6:28 Oba omuntu ayinza okulinnya ku manda agookya, ebigere bye ne bitababuka?" 
Proverbs6:29 Bwe kityo bwe kiri ne ku muntu eyeebaka ne muka munne: mazima buli akikola, talirema kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tebanyooma omubbi abbye emmere ng'alumwa enjala? 
Proverbs6:31 Era bwe baba bamukutte, aliwa emirundi musanvu, awaayo buli ky'alina mu maka ge." 
Proverbs6:32 Kyokka ayenda ku muka bandi, aba talina magezi. Oyo akikola, azikiriza bulamu bwe bwennyini." 
Proverbs6:33 Alinyoomebwa n'akubibwa, n'okuswala kwe tekulikoma," 
Proverbs6:34 kubanga obuggya butaamuusa omusajja nnyini mukazi, n'atabaako gw'addiramu mu kuwoolera eggwanga." 
Proverbs6:35 Talibaako ky'akkiriza nti okiwaayo weenunule. N'ebirabo byo ebingi, tebirimunyiigulula." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wange, kwatanga ebyo bye nkubuulirira; togezanga kwerabira bye nkulagira okukola." 
Proverbs7:2 Ebyo bw'obituukiriza, oliwangaala. Bye nkuyigiriza bikuumenga, nga bw'okuuma emmunye y'eriiso lyo." 
Proverbs7:3 Byesibenga ku mikono, obiwandiikenga mu mutima gwo munda." 
Proverbs7:4 Gambanga amagezi nti: “Ggwe mwannyinaze,” oyitenga okutegeera omuntu w'ekika kyammwe." 
Proverbs7:5 Birikukuuma bikuwonye omukazi muka bandi era na buli mukazi akusikiriza n'ebigambo ebiwoomerevu. 
Proverbs7:6 Olumu nalingiza mu ddirisa, eddirisa ery'oku nnyumba yange." 
Proverbs7:7 Ne ndaba ababuyabuya, omwali omuvubuka eyali talina magezi." 
Proverbs7:8 Yali atambula mu luguudo ng'ayita mu kakoona, awali ennyumba y'omukazi." 
Proverbs7:9 Bwali buzibye nga kiro, ekizikiza nga kikutte." 
Proverbs7:10 Omukazi n'amusisinkana ng'ayambadde eby'obwamalaaya, era ng'akoze entegeka." 
Proverbs7:11 Yayogeranga aleekaana, era nga muntu muzibu, bulijjo aba yeewuuba mu nguudo." 
Proverbs7:12 Oluusi ng'ayimirira n'ateegera mu kasonda, oluusi mu bifo ebyalukale." 
Proverbs7:13 Awo n'awambaatira omuvubuka, n'amunywegera, n'amusimba amaaso, n'amugamba nti:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Mpaddeyo olwaleero ebiweebwayo olw'okutabagana, ne ntuukiriza obweyamo bwange, era nninawo ennyama nnyingi;" 
Proverbs7:15 kyenvudde nzija nkusisinkane. Nfubye okukunoonya era nkulabye. 
Proverbs7:16 Obuliri bwange mbwazeeko essuuka ennungi ez'ebikuubo, eza ppamba omulungi ava e Misiri." 
Proverbs7:17 Mu buliri ntaddemu ebyakawoowo, eby'obubaane n'omugavu, n'ebyobuwoowo ebirala." 
Proverbs7:18 Jjangu tusanyuke, ekiro kyonna tukimale mu kusinda mukwano," 
Proverbs7:19 kubanga baze taliiyo eka, yagenda lugendo, ali wala." 
Proverbs7:20 Yagenda n'ensimbi nnyingi nnyo. Kale ajja kumalayo wiiki bbiri, alyoke akomewo.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Omukazi n'akanya akalimi, n'akkirizisa evvubuka eryo, ne limugondera olw'ebigambo ebisikiriza." 
Proverbs7:22 Ne limugoberera amangwago, ng'ente gye batwala okutta, oba ng'ensolo egwa mu mutego," 
Proverbs7:23 mw'eneefumitirwa akasaale efe. Yali ng'ekinyonyi ekyanguwa okugwa mu kitimba. Yali tamanyi nti afa, nti obulamu bwe buggwaawo!" 
Proverbs7:24 Kale baana bange, muwulire bye ŋŋamba, mubisseeko omwoyo." 
Proverbs7:25 Tokkirizanga mukazi ng'oyo kuwugula mutima gwo, n'ogoberera enkola ye," 
Proverbs7:26 kubanga abasajja yazikiriza bangi. Abaafumitibwa ne bafa, abo tobabala n'omalayo." 
Proverbs7:27 Okugenda ku nnyumba ye, kuba kusemberera magombe, kuba kusemberera kufa!" 
Proverbs8:1 Amagezi gakoowoolera, n'okutegeera kuleekaanira" 
Proverbs8:2 ku butunnumba okumpi n'ekkubo, mu masaŋŋanzira g'enguudo." 
Proverbs8:3 Galeekaanira ku miryango awayingirirwa mu kibuga nti: 
Proverbs8:4 “Mmwe abantu, mbakoowoola, buli ali ku nsi mmuyita." 
Proverbs8:5 Mmwe ababuyabuya, muyige okwegendereza. Nammwe abasirusiru, mufube okuba abategeevu." 
Proverbs8:6 Muwulire bye njogera ebirungi ebiyitirivu. Byonna bye mbabuulira nze, bituufu." 
Proverbs8:7 Byenjogera bya mazima, era sikolagana na bulimba." 
Proverbs8:8 Njogera bituufu byereere, temuli kikyamu wadde ekikyukakyuka." 
Proverbs8:9 Byanguyira omutegeevu, era bitangaavu ku alina obumanyirivu." 
Proverbs8:10 Mwagale bye njigiriza okusinga ffeeza, era mwagale okumanya okusinga zaabu omuyooyoote," 
Proverbs8:11 kubanga amagezi gasinga nnyo amayinja ag'omuwendo. Tewali na kye weegomba ekyo, ky'oyinza kugeraageranya nago." 
Proverbs8:12 “Ayogera ye nze Amagezi. Nsangibwa mu bwegendereza. Mu kusala obulungi ensonga, mwe njoleseza okutegeera." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutya Mukama, kwe kukyawa ebibi. Nkyawa okwekuza n'okwepanka, n'empisa embi, n'eby'obulimba." 
Proverbs8:14 Mbuulirira bulungi ne mpa amagezi amatuufu. Ntegeera, era nnina amaanyi." 
Proverbs8:15 Nnyamba bakabaka okufuga, n'abafuzi okuteeka amateeka amalungi." 
Proverbs8:16 Buli mufuzi ku nsi, nze mmuyamba okufuga, k'abe mukungu, k'abe mulamuzi." 
Proverbs8:17 Abanjagala nange be njagala, era nzuulibwa abo, abanyiikira okunnoonya." 
Proverbs8:18 Nnina obugagga n'ekitiibwa, obugagga obutuufu era obwenkalakkalira." 
Proverbs8:19 Kye ngaba kisinga zaabu asingira ddala obulungi, kisinga ffeeza omuyooyoote." 
Proverbs8:20 Amazima lye kkubo lyange, nkolera ku bwenkanya bwereere." 
Proverbs8:21 Abanjagala mbawa obugagga, ne nzijuza amawanika gaabwe." 
Proverbs8:22 “Mukama ng'atonda, yasookera ku nze. Ndi mulimu gwe ogw'edda, ogw'olubereberye." 
Proverbs8:23 Nateekebwawo kuva dda. Naliwo okuva olubereberye, ng'ensi tennaba na kubaawo." 
Proverbs8:24 Najja tewannabaawo nnyanja, wadde ensulo ezireeta amazzi;" 
Proverbs8:25 ensozi zaali tezinnassibwawo, n'obusozi nabusookawo." 
Proverbs8:26 Katonda yali tannatonda nsi, na kuteekawo nnimiro, wadde enfuufu embereberye." 
Proverbs8:27 Bwe yali abamba eggulu, naliwo, era ng'assaawo enkulungo ku nnyanja." 
Proverbs8:28 Bwe yawanika ebire mu bbanga, n'aggulira ensulo eziri mu nnyanja," 
Proverbs8:29 bwe yakugira ennyanja, amayengo galemenga okubuuka ensalo zaayo, n'assaawo emisingi gy'ensi," 
Proverbs8:30 namuli ku lusegere ng'akaana ke akato, nga nze ndabirira omulimu. Era yansanyukiranga bulijjo, nga ndigitira w'ali," 
Proverbs8:31 nga nsanyukira mu nsi ye n'ebigirimu, ng'essanyu lyange kwe kubeera wamu n'abantu." 
Proverbs8:32 “Kale nno baana bange, muwulirize bye ŋŋamba, kubanga balina omukisa abakwata bye mbabuulirira." 
Proverbs8:33 Muwulirizenga ebibayigirizibwa, mubenga n'amagezi; era amagezi, temugagayaaliriranga." 
Proverbs8:34 Wa mukisa oyo awuliriza bye ŋŋamba, abeera ku luggi lwange bulijjo, ng'alindira ku mulyango gw'enju yange," 
Proverbs8:35 kubanga buli anzuula aba azudde bulamu, era alyagalibwa Mukama." 
Proverbs8:36 Naye oyo akola ekibi n'annyiiza, yeerumya yekka. Bonna abankyawa, baba booya kufa.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Amagezi gazimbye ennyumba yaago, ne gagikolera empagi musanvu." 
Proverbs9:2 Gasse ensolo zaago, gayiisizza omwenge era gategese olujjuliro." 
Proverbs9:3 Gasindise abawala baago abaweereza, bagende mu bifo by'ekibuga, ebisinga obugulumivu balangirire nti:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Buli mubuyabuya, ayingire muno!” N'atali mugezi gamugamba nti:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Jjangu olye ku mmere gye nfumbye, onywe ne ku mwenge gwe njiisizza." 
Proverbs9:6 Vva mu batalina magezi, lw'oliwangaala. Tambuliranga wamu n'abategeevu.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Buli anenya omwepansi, yeereetera okuvumibwa; n'oyo abuulirira omubi, yeerumya yekka." 
Proverbs9:8 Tobuuliriranga mwepansi, aleme okukukyawa. Buuliriranga ow'amagezi, anaakwagalanga." 
Proverbs9:9 Bw'oyigiriza omugezi, yeeyongera kuba wa magezi. Bw'oyigiriza omuntu omulungi, yeeyongera okuyiga." 
Proverbs9:10 Mu kutya Mukama, amagezi mwe gasookera, n'okugondera Oyo Omutuukirivu, kwe kuba omutegeevu." 
Proverbs9:11 Okuba n'amagezi kyongera ku bungi bw'emyaka omuntu gy'awangaala," 
Proverbs9:12 Kigasa ggwe okuba n'amagezi. Bw'oganyooma, weerumya wekka." 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi omusirusiru, aleekaana. Talina magezi, era taliiko ky'amanyi" 
Proverbs9:14 Atuula ku mulyango gw'ennyumba ye, ku katebe mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'omu kibuga," 
Proverbs9:15 n'akoowoola abayitawo, abali ku ŋŋendo zaabwe nti:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Buli omubuyabuya, ajje wano.” N'agamba n'oyo atali mutegeevu nti:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Amazzi amabbe ge gawooma okunywa, n'emmere eriirwa mu nkukutu, ye esanyusa.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Naye abo b'agamba tebamanyi ng'abayingira omumwe, bafiiramu; nga n'abagenyi be, bali magombe!" 
Proverbs10:1 Omwana ow'amagezi, asanyusa kitaawe; naye omwana omusiru, anakuwaza nnyina." 
Proverbs10:2 Obugagga obufunibwa mu bukumpanya, tebuliiko kye bugasa; naye okuba omwesimbu, kutaasa obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs10:3 Mukama taalekenga muntu mulungi kufa njala; naye ababi, abaziyiza okufuna bye beegomba." 
Proverbs10:4 Emikono eminafu gissa nnyinigyo obwavu; naye emikono gy'omunyiikivu, gimuwa endulundu y'ebintu." 
Proverbs10:5 Omuntu ow'amagezi akungula mu budde obw'ekyeya; naye eyeebaka mu bw'amakungula, akwasa abantu ensonyi." 
Proverbs10:6 Omuntu omulungi, afuna emikisa; naye ababi, boogera bya bukambwe." 
Proverbs10:7 Omuntu omulungi, anajjukirwanga nti wa mukisa; naye omubi, alyerabirwa." 
Proverbs10:8 Omuntu omutegeevu, ayaniriza ebimulagirwa; naye omubuyabuya, alizikirira." 
Proverbs10:9 Omuntu akolera ku mazima, aba bulungi, era aba mirembe; naye omukumpanya, alimanyibwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Oyo abikkirira amazima ng'atemya ku liiso, aleeta okunakuwala; n'oyo ayogera eby'obusiru, alizikirira." 
Proverbs10:11 Ebigambo by'omuntu omulungi, biba nsulo ya bulamu; naye eby'omubi, bikweka bukambwe." 
Proverbs10:12 Obukyayi buleeta ennyombo; naye okwagala, kusonyiwa ebisobyo byonna." 
Proverbs10:13 Mu bigambo by'omutegeevu, mubaamu amagezi; naye omugongo gw'omusiru, gusaanira kukubwa miggo." 
Proverbs10:14 Abantu ab'amagezi, tebasamwassamwa na bigambo; naye omusiru by'ayogera, bimuleetera okuzikirira." 
Proverbs10:15 Omugagga, by'alina bimukuuma; naye obwavu, buzikiriza oyo abulina." 
Proverbs10:16 Omuntu ow'empisa ennungi, by'akola bimuleetera kuba mulamu; naye omwonoonyi, yeeyongera kukola bibi." 
Proverbs10:17 Oyo akkiriza okubuulirirwa, akuuma obulamu bwe; naye oyo agaana okunenyezebwa, talema kuwaba." 
Proverbs10:18 Omuntu akweka obukyayi, aba mulimba; n'oyo awaayiriza munne, aba musirusiru." 
Proverbs10:19 Mu kwogera ebigambo ebingi, temubulamu bisoba; naye asirika, ye aba omwegendereza." 
Proverbs10:20 Omuntu omulungi by'ayogera, biba nga ffeeza omuyooyoote; naye ebirowoozo by'ababi, tebiriiko kye bigasa." 
Proverbs10:21 Ebigambo by'omuntu omulungi, bigasa bangi; naye abasiru bafa, olw'okubulwa okutegeera." 
Proverbs10:22 Omukisa gwa Mukama gwe gugaggawaza, era tegujjirako buyinike." 
Proverbs10:23 Okukola ebibi, gwe muzannyo gw'abasiru; naye okukola eby'amagezi, kye kisanyusa abategeevu." 
Proverbs10:24 Omuntu omubi, alituukibwako ekyo ky'atya; naye abalungi, baliweebwa bye beegomba." 
Proverbs10:25 Kibuyaga bw'akunta, ababi bamenyebwawo; naye abalungi, musingi mugumu ogw'olubeerera." 
Proverbs10:26 Bw'otuma omugayaavu, akulumya ng'omwenge omukaatuufu bwe gunyenyeeza amannyo, era ng'omukka, bwe gubalagala mu maaso." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutya Mukama kuwangaaza omuntu; naye emyaka gy'ababi, girisalibwako." 
Proverbs10:28 Abalungi basuubira okusanyuka gye bujja; naye ababi, tebalina kalungi ke basuubirayo." 
Proverbs10:29 Mukama akuuma abalungi; naye ababi, abazikiriza." 
Proverbs10:30 Abantu abalungi, tebalisengulwa ennaku zonna; naye ababi, tebalikkalira mu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Abantu abalungi, boogera eby'amagezi; naye abalimba, balisirisibwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Abantu abalungi bamanya ebisaanye okwogerwa; naye ababi, boogera ebitabula abantu." 
Proverbs11:1 Mukama akyawa abakozesa ebipimo ebikyamu; naye abakozesa ebipimo ebituufu, b'asiima." 
Proverbs11:2 Kasita weepanka, tolema kuswala; naye omwetoowaze, ye w'amagezi." 
Proverbs11:3 Okuba omwesimbu, kuluŋŋamya omuntu; naye obukumpanya, buzikiriza ab'enkwe." 
Proverbs11:4 Mukama Katonda bw'asunguwala, obugagga tebukuyamba; naye okuba omwesimbu, kutaasa obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs11:5 Obwesimbu bw'omuntu omulungi, buluŋŋamya obulamu bwe; naye omuntu omubi, yeezikiriza yekka." 
Proverbs11:6 Abataliiko kamogo, obwesimbu bwabwe bulibawonya; naye ab'enkwe, balikwatirwa mu bye beegomba." 
Proverbs11:7 Omuntu omubi bw'afa, bye yali asuubira bizikirira. Ateesiga Mukama, taliiko ky'aganyulwa." 
Proverbs11:8 Omuntu omulungi, awonyezebwa ennaku ye, n'eddira omubi." 
Proverbs11:9 Atatya Katonda ayogera ebizikiriza abalala; naye abantu abalungi, okumanya kubawonya." 
Proverbs11:10 Abantu abeesigwa bwe bafuna ebirungi, ekibuga kisanyuka. Era omubi bw'afa, wabaawo okuleekaana olw'essanyu." 
Proverbs11:11 Abantu abalungi, baleetera ekibuga omukisa; naye ebigambo by'ababi, bikireetera okuzikirira." 
Proverbs11:12 Kya busiru okunyooma abalala; naye omuntu omugezi, asirika." 
Proverbs11:13 Omubungeesa w'eŋŋambo, abotola ebyama; naye omwesigwa, asirikira ekigambo." 
Proverbs11:14 Abantu bazikirira awatali wa magezi abaluŋŋamya; naye awali abawi b'amagezi abangi, we waba emirembe." 
Proverbs11:15 Eyeeyimirira gw'atamanyi, talirema kwejjusa, akyawa okweyingiza mu by'abalala, ye aliba emirembe." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi ow'ekisa, assibwamu ekitiibwa; n'abasajja abakakaalukanyi, bafuna obugagga." 
Proverbs11:17 Mu kubeera n'ekisa, oganyulwa; naye omukambwe, yeerumya yekka." 
Proverbs11:18 Akola ebibi yeerimba nti alibiggyamu omugaso. Akola ebirungi, ye aweebwa empeera yennyini emugasa." 
Proverbs11:19 Anywerera mu mpisa ennungi, aliba mulamu; naye ow'empisa embi, yetta yekka." 
Proverbs11:20 Mukama akyawa ab'emitima egitali mirongoofu; naye asanyukira abo, abakola ebituufu." 
Proverbs11:21 Awatali kubuusabuusa, ababi balibonerezebwa; naye abantu abalungi, tebalituukibwako kabi." 
Proverbs11:22 Obulungi bw'omukazi atalina mpisa, buli ng'empeta ya zaabu, eri mu nnyindo y'embizzi." 
Proverbs11:23 Abantu abalungi beegomba birungi byereere; naye ababi kye basuubirayo, kusunguwalirwa Mukama." 
Proverbs11:24 Waliwo abasaasaanya ensimbi, ne beeyongera kugaggawala; era waliwo abazikodowalira okusinga bwe kisaanidde, naye ne beeyongera kwavuwala." 
Proverbs11:25 Omugabi aligaggawala; n'oyo awa abalala obuyambi, talibulako bamuyamba." 
Proverbs11:26 Amma banne emmere ye akolimirwa abantu; naye oyo aguzaako abalala, bamusabira omukisa." 
Proverbs11:27 Bw'oba nga ky'ogoba kirungi, olisiimibwa abalala; naye ky'ogoba bwe kiba nga kibi, era kibi ky'olifuna." 
Proverbs11:28 Eyeesiga obugagga, alikunkumuka ng'amakoola g'omuti oguwaatula; naye omuntu omulungi, alinyirira ng'omuti ogutojjedde." 
Proverbs11:29 Atawaanya ab'omu maka ge, alisikira bbanga; era omusiru, anaafugibwanga oyo ow'amagezi." 
Proverbs11:30 Omuntu omulungi, aleetera banne obulamu; n'oyo alina amagezi, asika emitima gy'abantu." 
Proverbs11:31 Oba nga abantu abalungi mu nsi baweebwa empeera ebasaanira, kale omubi n'omwonoonyi balirema batya okufuna ekibasaanira!" 
Proverbs12:1 Ayagala okubuulirirwa, ye mukwano gw'okumanya; naye akyawa okunenyezebwa, aba nsolo busolo." 
Proverbs12:2 Mukama asiima abantu abalungi; naye ab'enkwe, abasingisa omusango." 
Proverbs12:3 Okwonoona tekulamya muntu; omuntu omulungi ye anywera. 
Proverbs12:4 Omukazi omwegendereza aba kitiibwa kya bba, naye omukazi aswaza, aba kookolo mu magumba ga bba." 
Proverbs12:5 Ebirowoozo by'abantu abalungi biba bituufu; naye eby'ababi bya bulimba. 
Proverbs12:6 Ebigambo by'ababi bya butemu; naye abenkanya, boogera bya kuwonya bantu." 
Proverbs12:7 Ababi bazikirira, ne batalekaawo basika; naye ab'ennyumba z'abalungi abo balirama." 
Proverbs12:8 Omuntu omwegendereza asiimibwa; naye ow'omutima omubi, oyo anyoomebwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Omuntu omwetoowaze alina bye yeetaaga, akira eyeegulumiza, sso nga talina ky'alya." 
Proverbs12:10 Omuntu omulungi, alabirira ensolo ze; naye omubi tazisaasira, aba mukambwe." 
Proverbs12:11 Alima ettaka lye, aliba n'emmere nnyingi; agoberera ebitaliimu, oyo taba mutegeevu." 
Proverbs12:12 Omunaala gw'ababi, gumenyeka ne gugwa; naye omusingi gw'abalungi, ogwo gunywera." 
Proverbs12:13 Ebigambo by'omubi; gwe mutego ogumukwata naye omulungi awona emitawaana. 
Proverbs12:14 Omuntu alifuna empeera, esaanira by'akola ne by'ayogera." 
Proverbs12:15 Omusiru by'akola, alaba nga bituufu; naye ow'amagezi, awuliriza bye bamubuulirira." 
Proverbs12:16 Omusiru olusunguwala, buli muntu n'akimanya; naye ow'amagezi, asirika ne bw'avumibwa." 
Proverbs12:17 Ayogera amazima, ayolesa obwenkanya; naye obujulizi obw'obulimba, buleeta okusaliriza." 
Proverbs12:18 Ayogera nga talowoozezza, ebigambo bye biba kitala ekifumita abalala; naye ebigambo by'ab'amagezi, biwonya." 
Proverbs12:19 Ebigambo eby'obulimba, biba bya kaseera buseera; naye eby'amazima, bibeerera ennaku zonna." 
Proverbs12:20 Abateesa okukola ebibi, abo beerimba; naye essanyu liba ly'abo, abateesa eby'emirembe." 
Proverbs12:21 Omuntu omulungi, talituukibwako kabi; naye ababi, tebaabulwengako mitawaana." 
Proverbs12:22 Mukama akyayira ddala aboogera eby'obulimba; kyokka asanyukira abakolera ku mazima. 
Proverbs12:23 Omuntu omutegeevu, talaalaasa buli ky'amanyi; naye omusiru, alangirira obutamanya bwe." 
Proverbs12:24 Okunyiikirira okukola, kukufuula wa buyinza; naye obugayaavu, bukufuula muddu." 
Proverbs12:25 Ennaku y'oku mutima, ereeta okwennyamira; naye ekigambo ekirungi, kisanyusa omuntu." 
Proverbs12:26 Omuntu omulungi aluŋŋamya banne, naye omubi, abawabya." 
Proverbs12:27 Omugayaavu alemwa okufumba ky'ayizze; naye omunyiikivu, afuna ebyobugagga bingi." 
Proverbs12:28 Okugoberera empisa ennungi, mwe muli obulamu; era azigoberera tazikirira." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana ow'amagezi assaayo omwoyo ku ebyo, kitaawe by'amubuulirira; naye omunyoomi, tawuliriza kunenyezebwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Omuntu omulungi afuna ebirungi olw'ebigambo by'ayogera; naye ab'enkwe beegomba kukola bya bukambwe. 
Proverbs13:3 Eyeegendereza by'ayogera, akuuma obulamu bwe; naye enjogeziyogezi, yeereetera okuzikirira." 
Proverbs13:4 Omuntu omugayaavu, tafuna bye yeegomba; naye omunyiikivu, agaggawala." 
Proverbs13:5 Omuntu omulungi, akyawa obulimba; naye omubi mugwagwa, era akola ebiswaza." 
Proverbs13:6 Obwegendereza, bukuuma omulongoofu; naye obubambaavu, busuula omwonoonyi." 
Proverbs13:7 Waliwo abeeyisa ekigagga, naye nga tebalina kantu. Waliwo abeeyisa ng'abaavu, naye nga bagagga babifeekeera." 
Proverbs13:8 Omugagga by'alina bye bimununula; naye omwavu, tawuliriza kunenyezebwa." 
Proverbs13:9 Abantu abalungi, bali ng'ettaala ekoleezeddwa n'eyaka; naye bo ababi, bali ng'ettaala ezikidde." 
Proverbs13:10 Okwekuza kuleeta kuwakana, naye eky'amagezi, kwe kukkiriza okubuulirirwa" 
Proverbs13:11 Obugagga obujja amangu, era buggwaawo mangu; naye obwo bw'okuŋŋaanya empolampola ng'okola emirimu, bulyeyongera okwala." 
Proverbs13:12 Okulwawo okufuna ky'osuubira, kirwaza ebirowoozo; naye afuna kye yeegomba, oyo addamu obulamu." 
Proverbs13:13 Anyooma okubuulirirwa, yeereetera okuzikirira; naye agondera ekiragiro, aliweebwa empeera." 
Proverbs13:14 Enjigiriza y'ab'amagezi, eba nsulo ya bulamu, eggya abantu mu kufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Okutetenkanya okulungi, kwagazisa omuntu; naye okuba ow'enkwe, kibi." 
Proverbs13:16 Abantu abategeevu, bamala kulowooza ne balyoka bakola; naye omusiru, ayolesa obutamanya bwe." 
Proverbs13:17 Omubaka ateesigwa, aleeta emitawaana; naye omutume omwesigwa, aleetawo emirembe." 
Proverbs13:18 Atayagala kubuulirirwa, ayavuwala era aswala; naye akkiriza okunenyezebwa, assibwamu ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Omuntu asanyuka okufuna kye yeegomba; naye ababi tebaagalira ddala kulekayo kwonoona. 
Proverbs13:20 Otambulanga n'ab'amagezi, naawe obe wa magezi; naye bw'olikwana abasiru, oli wa kulaba nnaku." 
Proverbs13:21 Emitawaana gyesiba ku boonoonyi; naye abantu abalongoofu, baliweerwa ebirungi." 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu omulungi afuna obugagga bw'alirekera n'abazzukulu; naye obugagga bw'aboonoonyi, bulitwalibwa abo abalungi." 
Proverbs13:23 Ennimiro z'abaavu, zibala emmere nnyingi; naye abatali benkanya tebabaganya kugirya." 
Proverbs13:24 Atabonereza mwana we, aba amukyaye; naye amwagala, assaayo omwoyo okumukangavvula." 
Proverbs13:25 Omuntu omulungi, afuna by'alya n'akkuta; naye omuntu omubi alumwa enjala bulijjo." 
Proverbs14:1 Amaka gatereezebwa magezi ga bakazi, naye obusiru bugazikiriza." 
Proverbs14:2 Omwesimbu mu mpisa ze, ye alaga bw'atya Mukama; naye atali mwesimbu, alaga bw'atassaamu Mukama kitiibwa." 
Proverbs14:3 Omusiru by'ayogera, bye biba omuggo ogukuba okwekuza kwe; naye ebigambo by'ow'amagezi, bimukuuma." 
Proverbs14:4 Awatali nte zirima amaterekero g'emmere gaba makalu; naye alina ente ezirima ez'amaanyi, amawanika ge gajjula eŋŋaano." 
Proverbs14:5 Omujulizi omwesigwa, talimba; naye omujulizi ow'obulimba, ayogera byabulimba byereere" 
Proverbs14:6 Omuntu omunyoomi, anoonya amagezi, kyokka tagafuna naye omutegeevu, ayiga mangu." 
Proverbs14:7 Vva awali omusiru, talina kirungi ky'akuyigiriza." 
Proverbs14:8 Amagezi g'omutegeevu, gamumanyisa eky'okukola; naye obubuyabuya bw'abasiru, bubalimbalimba." 
Proverbs14:9 Abasiru tebafaayo bwe bazza omusango; naye abantu abalungi, basaba okusonyiyibwa." 
Proverbs14:10 Ennaku gw'eruma, ye agimanya; era n'essanyu ly'omu, teritegeerebwa mulala." 
Proverbs14:11 Ennyumba y'omubi ng'egudde, ey'omulungi erisigala eyimiridde." 
Proverbs14:12 Oluusi ekkubo omuntu ly'ayita ettuufu lye limutwala mu kufa. 
Proverbs14:13 Enseko zandikweka obuyinike, n'essanyu ne livaamu okunakuwala." 
Proverbs14:14 Omuntu omubi alifuna ekimugwanira; n'omuntu omulungi, aliweebwa empeera egwanira ebikolwa bye." 
Proverbs14:15 Omuntu omusiru amala gakkiriza buli kintu; naye omutegeevu, amala kwetegereza." 
Proverbs14:16 Ab'amagezi beegendereza ne beewala okukola ebitasaana; naye abasiru tebassaayo mwoyo, era bafubutukira bye bakola." 
Proverbs14:17 Oyo ayanguwa okusunguwala, akola ebitajja nsa; n'omuntu asalira banne enkwe, akyayibwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Abasiru baba babuyabuya; naye ab'amagezi bamanya bingi. 
Proverbs14:19 Ababi balifukaamirira abalungi; n'aboonoonyi balyeguya abo abatya Mukama. 
Proverbs14:20 Omuntu omwavu, ne mikwano gye gimukyawa; naye omugagga, aba n'emikwano mingi." 
Proverbs14:21 Kiba kibi omuntu okunyooma munne; naye asaasira abaavu, aba n'omukisa." 
Proverbs14:22 Abateesa okukola ebibi bawaba; naye abateesa okukola ebirungi, balyesigibwa ne baagalibwa bannaabwe." 
Proverbs14:23 Okubaako omulimu gw'okola, kigasa; naye okwogera obwogezi, kwavuwaza." 
Proverbs14:24 Ab'amagezi bagaggawala; naye ababuyabuya, basiruwala." 
Proverbs14:25 Omujulizi ayogera amazima, awonya obulamu bw'omuntu; naye aleeta eby'obulimba, abulyamu olukwe." 
Proverbs14:26 Okutya Mukama, kugumya nnyo omuntu; era kumukuuma n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Proverbs14:27 Okutya Mukama, nsulo ya bulamu era kuwonya omuntu okufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Abantu abafugibwa gye bakoma okuba abangi, n'ekitiibwa kya kabaka waabwe gye kikoma okuba ekinene. Eky'atalina b'afuga, tekibaawo." 
Proverbs14:29 Atasunguwala mangu, yeetegereza bulungi ebintu; naye alina akasunguyira, akola n'ebitajja nsa." 
Proverbs14:30 Alina emirembe mu mutima, n'omubiri gwe guba mulamu; naye obuggya, bugulya nga kookolo." 
Proverbs14:31 Omuntu ajooga abaavu, aba anyooma Oyo eyabatonda; naye omuntu amussaamu ekitiibwa, asaasira abali mu bwetaavu." 
Proverbs14:32 Abakola ebibi bibazikiriza; naye omuntu omulungi, afa alina essuubi." 
Proverbs14:33 Abategeevu baba n'amagezi; naye ekiri mu mitima gy'abasiru, kimanyiddwa." 
Proverbs14:34 Empisa ennungi ziweesa eggwanga ekitiibwa; naye okwonoona, kulivumaganya." 
Proverbs14:35 Bakabaka basanyukira abaweereza abalungi; naye basunguwalira ababaswaza. 
Proverbs15:1 Okuddamu n'eggonjebwa kukkakkanya ekiruyi; naye ebigambo eby'ekkabyo, bisaanuula obusungu." 
Proverbs15:2 Ab'amagezi boogera ebisaanidde; naye abasiru bamokkola buli kye basanga. 
Proverbs15:3 Mukama alaba buli wantu, ng'alabirira abalungi n'ababi." 
Proverbs15:4 Okwogera eby'ekisa, kiwa obulamu; naye ebigambo eby'obukambwe, bikosa omutima." 
Proverbs15:5 Omusiru anyooma ebyo kitaawe by'amubuulirira; naye omutegeevu, akkiriza okunenyezebwa." 
Proverbs15:6 Amaka g'abantu abalungi, gabaamu ebyobugagga bingi; naye amagoba g'omubi, tagafunamu mirembe." 
Proverbs15:7 Ab'amagezi bye boogera, bibunyisa okumanya; naye ebirowoozo by'abasiru, si bwe bikola." 
Proverbs15:8 Mukama yeenyinyala ebitambiro by'aboonoonyi; wabula asanyukira okwegayirira kw'abantu abalungi. 
Proverbs15:9 Mukama akyawa enneeyisa y'abantu ababi; naye ayagala abafuba okukola ebituufu. 
Proverbs15:10 Ava mu kkubo ettuufu, wa kukangavvulwa nnyo. Akyawa okunenyezebwa, afa." 
Proverbs15:11 Oba ng'ebiri emagombe awali okuzikirira, Mukama nabyo abimanya, kale kiki ekimwekweka mu mitima gy'abantu?" 
Proverbs15:12 Omunyoomi tayagala kunenyezebwa, era tayagala kwebuuza ku bamusingako okuba abagezi." 
Proverbs15:13 Asanyuka mu mutima, ne ku maaso amwenya; naye ali mu buyinike, atunuza bwennyamivu." 
Proverbs15:14 Ab'amagezi baagala okuyiga; naye abo abasiru, basanyukira mu butamanya." 
Proverbs15:15 Ennaku zonna ez'ababonyaabonyezebwa, ziba mbi; naye omusanyufu, aba ng'ali ku mbaga ey'olubeerera." 
Proverbs15:16 Okuba omwavu naye ng'otya Mukama, kisinga okuba omugagga naye nga tolina mirembe." 
Proverbs15:17 Waakiri okulya amaluma, ne mulya nga mwagalana; okusinga okulya ebisava, awali okukyawagana." 
Proverbs15:18 Omuntu w'akasunguyira, asaanuula ennyombo; naye omukwatampola, akkakkanya empaka." 
Proverbs15:19 Ekkubo ly'omugayaavu, lukomera lwa maggwa; naye oluwenda lw'abagolokofu, lwe luguudo oluyooyoote." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana omugezi, ssanyu lya kitaawe; naye omuntu omusiru, ye anyooma nnyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Atalina magezi, asanyukira obubuyabuya; naye omuntu omutegeevu, ayagala okukola ekituufu." 
Proverbs15:22 Awatali muwi wa magezi, bye muteesa tebirama; naye bitereera, awali abawabuzi abangi." 
Proverbs15:23 Okuddamu ekituufu mu kaseera akatuufu, kisanyusa omuntu." 
Proverbs15:24 Abantu ab'amagezi bakwata ekkubo eryambuka awali obulamu, ne beewala eriserengeta mu kufa." 
Proverbs15:25 Mukama azikiriza amaka g'abeekulumbaza; naye akuuma n'anyweza ebintu bya bannamwandu. 
Proverbs15:26 Mukama yeenyinyala buli kirowoozo ekibi; naye ebigambo ebirungi, ebyo abisanyukira." 
Proverbs15:27 Alulunkanira amagoba g'afuna mu bukumpanya, amaka ge agaleetera mitawaana; naye atalya nguzi, ye aliba omuwangaazi." 
Proverbs15:28 Abantu abalungi bamala kulowooza nga tebannaba kwanukula; naye abo ababi boogera ebitasaana. 
Proverbs15:29 Abantu abalungi bwe basaba, Mukama abawuliriza; naye ababi, abeesamba." 
Proverbs15:30 Atunuza essanyu, asanyusa; n'amawulire amalungi, tegalema kweyagaza." 
Proverbs15:31 Omuntu akkiriza okubuulirirwa ebimuzimba, abalirwa mu b'amagezi." 
Proverbs15:32 Agaana okubuulirirwa, yeefiiriza yekka. Akkiriza okunenyezebwa, yeeyongera okugeziwala." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutya Mukama, kwe kuyigiriza omuntu amagezi; n'okwetoowaza, kwe kukulembera okukuzibwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Omuntu ateekateeka by'anaakola; naye Mukama ye asalawo eky'enkomerero. 
Proverbs16:2 Wandirowooza nti buli ky'okola kituufu; naye Mukama ye alamula ekikuli mu mmeeme. 
Proverbs16:3 Buli ky'okola kikwase Mukama, ebyo by'oba otegese lwe binaatuukiriranga." 
Proverbs16:4 Buli kintu Mukama yakikola, ng'alina ekigendererwa; era wamma n'ababi, ye abateerawo olunaku kwe balifunira ebizibu." 
Proverbs16:5 Abeekuza bonna we bafa benkana, Mukama abakyawa. Teri na gye baliddukira kibonerezo ky'alibawa." 
Proverbs16:6 Okuba n'ekisa n'amazima, bye bitukuza omwonoonyi; era n'okutya Mukama, kwe kuggya omuntu mu bibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Bw'okola ebisanyusa Mukama, n'abalabe b'oba nabo, abafuula mikwano gyo." 
Proverbs16:8 Akatono ak'obwenkanya, kakira by'ofuna ebingi nga tokozesa mazima." 
Proverbs16:9 Weewaawo omuntu ye ateesa by'anaakola, naye Mukama ye abiruŋŋamya okulama." 
Proverbs16:10 Katonda ye aluŋŋamya Kabaka mu by'ayogera; ye amuyamba mu by'asalawo, n'atawubwa mu nnamula." 
Proverbs16:11 Mukama ayagala minzaani n'ebipimo ebirala byonna bibe bituufu; era buli buguzi bwonna ayagala bube bwa bwenkanya. 
Proverbs16:12 Kabaka okukola ebintu ebibi kyennyamiza, kubanga obuyinza bwe obw'okufuga, bumuweebwa kukola birungi." 
Proverbs16:13 Bakabaka basanyukira abo, abababuulira amazima; era baagala abantu aboogera ebituufu." 
Proverbs16:14 Kabaka bw'asunguwala, yandituuka n'okutta; naye omugezi ky'ayiiya, kumuwooyawooya mangu." 
Proverbs16:15 Kabaka bw'asanyuka, olwo n'ababe balama. Oyo leero gw'aganza, atonnyerwa nkuba egimusa." 
Proverbs16:16 Alina amagezi n'okutegeera, akira wala eyafuna ffeeza wamu ne zaabu." 
Proverbs16:17 Abantu abalongoofu, beewala okukola ebibi; era oyo anaawonya obulamu bwe yeegendereza empisa ze." 
Proverbs16:18 Okwekuza kuleeta okuzikirira; n'okwegulumiza kuvaamu okugwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Okwetoowaza n'oba wamu n'abaavu, okira agabana omunyago awamu n'abeekulumbaza." 
Proverbs16:20 Omwegendereza mu buli kimu, anaabeeranga bulungi; era eyeesiga Mukama, aba wa mukisa." 
Proverbs16:21 Omuntu ow'amagezi, gwe bayita omutegeevu; ow'ebigambo ebiseeneekerevu, mwangu okumatiza abantu." 
Proverbs16:22 Amagezi g'omutegeevu, gamuviiramu obulamu; naye okusomesa omusiru, oteganira bwereere." 
Proverbs16:23 Ow'amagezi ayogera bya makulu, ne by'ayogera, ne bimatiza abantu." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebigambo eby'ekisa, nga biba biwoomerevu! Bizzaamu amaanyi, ne bireeta n'obulamu." 
Proverbs16:25 Oluusi ekkubo omuntu ly'ayita ettuufu, lye limutwala mu kufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Obwetaavu buleetera omuntu okukola, afune k'alya." 
Proverbs16:27 Omuntu omubi entagasa, aba n'ettima, ne by'ayogera lubabu kattira." 
Proverbs16:28 Abantu ababi bagenda bakoleeza ennyombo; n'abageyi baawukanya ab'omukwano ogutinta ennyo. 
Proverbs16:29 Omukozi w'eby'obukambwe asendasenda munne, n'amukozesa ebya mbyone." 
Proverbs16:30 Weerinde oyo atta ku liiso, by'ateesa biba bya kyejo; era bw'aluma emimwa omwekeka, abaako akabi k'ategeka." 
Proverbs16:31 Envi ez'obukadde, ngule ya kitiibwa; era efunibwa oyo, akola Katonda by'ayagala." 
Proverbs16:32 Omugumiikiriza aba muzira okusinga omulwanyi nnamige; era eyeefuga mu mutima, asinga awangula ekibuga." 
Proverbs16:33 Abantu bakuba akalulu, balabe ekinaavaamu; naye Mukama ye asalawo gwe kaba kalonzeewo." 
Proverbs17:1 Akatono k'olya ng'olina emirembe, ne bwe kaba ka maluma, kakira embaga gy'oliira mu maka omuli okuyomba." 
Proverbs17:2 Omuweereza atuukiriza obulungi emirimu, alifuga omwana ow'omu nju ow'eddalu, era alifuna omugabo gw'obusika ng'omu ku booluganda." 
Proverbs17:3 Zaabu wamu ne ffeeza, bamugereza mu kabiga; naye omutima gw'omuntu, Mukama ye agugeza." 
Proverbs17:4 Abakola ebibi, be bawuliriza emboozi embi; n'omulimba, ye anyumirwa okuwuliriza eby'ettima." 
Proverbs17:5 Aduulira abaavu, avvoola Omutonzi waabwe; n'oyo asanyukira ennaku ya banne, talirema kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Abakadde beeyagalira mu bazzukulu baabwe, n'abaana beenyumiririza mu bakitaabwe." 
Proverbs17:7 Okwogera eby'amakulu, tekikolebwa musiru; n'omuntu oweekitiibwa, tagwanira kuba mulimba." 
Proverbs17:8 Eriyo abalowooza nti okuwanga enguzi kubasobozesa byonna, era ne beesigula nti enguzi terina ky'eremererwa." 
Proverbs17:9 Anoonya okwagalibwa, asonyiwa abasobya; naye ajjukiza ebisobyo, ayawukanya ab'omukwano." 
Proverbs17:10 Omuntu ow'amagezi anenyezebwa lumu n'ayiga, okusinga omusiru, akubwa emiggo ekikumi." 
Proverbs17:11 Omuntu omubi, buli kiseera ajeema. Kyebaliva bamutumira omubaka omukambwe, amukwate." 
Proverbs17:12 Waakiri osisinkana eddubu eggyiddwako abaana baayo, n'otosisinkana musiru ng'akola eby'obusiru bwe." 
Proverbs17:13 Bw'okolera ekibi omuntu akukoledde ekirungi, akabi tekaliva mu nnyumba yo." 
Proverbs17:14 Okutandikawo empaka, kuli nga kuggulira mazzi. Kale towakananga, waleme kubaawo kuyomba." 
Proverbs17:15 Eyejjeereza omuntu eyazza omusango, n'oyo agusala ne gusinga ataguzzanga, Mukama bombi abeenyinyala." 
Proverbs17:16 Ensimbi omusiru z'awaayo asasulire eby'okuyiga, zimufa bwereere: kuba tayinza kubitegeera." 
Proverbs17:17 Ab'omukwano baagalana ennaku zonna, n'abooluganda babaawo kuyambagana mu bizibu." 
Proverbs17:18 Buba busiru okwewaayo okweyimirira omulala, ng'omuteerawo akabega." 
Proverbs17:19 Ayagala ennyombo, ayoya mitawaana; n'oyo eyeekulumbaza, anoonya kuzikirira." 
Proverbs17:20 Alina endowooza embi, talifuna birungi; n'ow'enjogerambi, yeesombera akabi." 
Proverbs17:21 Azaala omusiru, yeereetera ennaku; era kitaawe w'omusiru, tabeera na ssanyu." 
Proverbs17:22 Okuba omusanyufu, nakwo ddagala eriwonya; naye okuba omunakuwavu, kukozza omubiri." 
Proverbs17:23 Omulamuzi omubi, akkiriza enguzi mu nkukutu, n'atasala musango mu mazima." 
Proverbs17:24 Omuntu omutegeevu, ategeka n'akola eby'amagezi; naye omusiru, amala gatandika kino na kiri." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana omusiru, anakuwaza kitaawe, era aleetera nnyina obulumi." 
Proverbs17:26 Si kituufu okutanza atazzizza musango, era kibi okubonereza akoze ekirungi." 
Proverbs17:27 Ow'amagezi yeefuga mu by'ayogera; era omukkakkamu, mutegeevu." 
Proverbs17:28 Omusirusiru asirise, bandimuyita omugezi; bw'abunira n'atavaamu kigambo, yandibalwa okuba omutegeevu." 
Proverbs18:1 Eyeeyawula ku balala, aba yeenoonyeza bibye yekka, era aba awakanya ebyo abalala bye bayita ebituufu." 
Proverbs18:2 Omusiru tafaayo kutegeera; ky'alumirwa, kwe kwogera ekiri mu mutima gwe." 
Proverbs18:3 Okukola ekibi, kuleeta okunyoomebwa; era awaba okuswazibwa, tewabulawo kuvumibwa." 
Proverbs18:4 Omuntu ebigambo by'ayogera, biyinza okubaamu amagezi agakka ng'ennyanja ey'eddubi, amalungi ng'amazzi agakulukuta." 
Proverbs18:5 Si kirungi okuginya omubi, n'okusaliriza ataliiko musango." 
Proverbs18:6 Omusiru bw'atandika oluyombo, aba yeesabira kukubibwa miggo." 
Proverbs18:7 Omusiru by'ayogera, bye bimuzikiriza; ebigambo bye, ye nvuba emusiba." 
Proverbs18:8 Ow'olugambo by'ayogera, biwoomera nnyo awulira, nga bw'olya emmere ewooma, n'ekukkalira mu lubuto." 
Proverbs18:9 Akola emirimu n'obugayaavu talina njawulo n'oyo agyonoona. 
Proverbs18:10 Mukama, kigo ekigumu abantu abalungi mwe baddukira, ne bakuumibwa mirembe." 
Proverbs18:11 Abagagga, balowooza nti ebyobugagga bye balina, kye kibuga kyabwe ekigumu, era nti kye kisenge ekigulumivu ekibataasa." 
Proverbs18:12 Okwekulumbaza, kwe kukulembera okuzikirira; n'okwetoowaza, kwe kukulembera okukuzibwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Addamu nga tannawulira, aba musiru, era aswala." 
Proverbs18:14 Obumalirivu bw'omulwadde, buwanirira obulamu bwe; naye bw'aterebuka, nga n'endasi zimuggwaamu." 
Proverbs18:15 Abantu abategeevu, bayigga bya kuyiga; abantu ab'amagezi, banoonya bya kumanya." 
Proverbs18:16 Aleeta ekirabo, bamuleka n'ayitawo, n'atuuka mu maaso g'abakulu." 
Proverbs18:17 Asooka okuwoza, yeetukuza, okutuusa addako lw'ajja, n'amulumiriza." 
Proverbs18:18 Akalulu kakomya empaka, era kalamula ab'amaanyi." 
Proverbs18:19 Okuddamu okutabagana n'owooluganda anyiize, kizibu okusinga okuwaguza mu kisenge ekigumu ekyetoolodde ekibuga; era ennyombo z'abooluganda, ziba nzibu okutawulula, nga bw'olaba okukutula oba okumenya bye basibisa ekigo ekigumu." 
Proverbs18:20 Omuntu asaanidde okugumira byonna ebiva mu by'ayogera. 
Proverbs18:21 Olulimi lwa buyinza okuleeta okufa oba obulamu. Kale omuntu abenga n'obuvunaanyizibwa, ku bintu byonna by'ayogera." 
Proverbs18:22 Azuula omukazi ow'okuwasa aba azudde ekirungi, era Mukama aba amuwadde omukisa." 
Proverbs18:23 Omuntu omwavu, akozesa ggonjebwa ng'ayogera; naye omugagga, addamu na bboggo." 
Proverbs18:24 Ab'omukwano abamu, baba ba kiseera buseera; sso eriyo akunywererako n'okusinga owooluganda." 
Proverbs19:1 Omwavu akolera ku mazima, akira omulimba omusiru." 
Proverbs19:2 Si kirungi okukola nga tomaze kulowooza; n'okubuguutanira ebintu, kukuleetera okuwubwa." 
Proverbs19:3 Abamu bakola eby'obusiru, ne beereetera emitawaana, ate ne banenya Mukama." 
Proverbs19:4 Omuntu omugagga, yeeyongera kufuna mikwano; kyokka oyo omwavu, ne gy'alina gimwabulira." 
Proverbs19:5 Awa obujulizi obw'obulimba, talirema kubonerezebwa. Omulimba talibaako w'awonera." 
Proverbs19:6 Bangi abaagala okuganza omugabi, era buli muntu yeegomba okukwana agaba ebirabo." 
Proverbs19:7 Omwavu akyayibwa baganda be bonna; leero alabisa mikwano gye! Abo bamwewala. Akanda kubakoowoola, olugenda tebadda!" 
Proverbs19:8 Afuna amagezi, yeegasa; anyweza by'ayize, afuna ebirungi." 
Proverbs19:9 Awa obujulizi obw'obulimba, talirema kubonerezebwa. Omulimba ddala alizikirira." 
Proverbs19:10 Omusiru tasaanira kuba mu byakwejalabya, era n'omuddu tasaanidde kufuga bakungu." 
Proverbs19:11 Omalanga kwekkaanya, n'otomala gasunguwala; era kiba kya kitiibwa, okusonyiwa abasobya." 
Proverbs19:12 Obusungu bwa kabaka butiisa, ng'okuwuluguma kw'empologoma; naye okusaasira kwe kuweweeza ng'omusulo ogunnyikiza omuddo." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana omusiru, nnaku ya kitaawe; n'okuyomba kw'omukazi, ye nkuba etekya." 
Proverbs19:14 Ennyumba n'obugagga, obisikira ku kitaawo; naye okufuna omukazi omutegeevu, kiba kirabo kya Mukama." 
Proverbs19:15 Omuntu omugayaavu, yeebaka otulo tungi; kyokka atakola, alirumwa enjala." 
Proverbs19:16 Akuuma ebiragiro, aba mirembe; atabissaako mwoyo, afa." 
Proverbs19:17 Agabira abaavu, awola Mukama: era Mukama alimusasula ebirungi by'abakoledde." 
Proverbs19:18 Bonereza omwana wo, nga wakyaliwo essuubi ery'okumugolola, oleme kumuleka kuzikirira." 
Proverbs19:19 Omuntu ow'obusungu aliriwa: kubanga ne bw'omuwonya omulundi ogusooka, kirikwetaagisa okuddamu okumuwonya." 
Proverbs19:20 Wulirizanga ebikubuulirirwa, okkirizenga okuwabulwa, lw'olibeera omugezi gye bujja." 
Proverbs19:21 Abantu bategeka bingi eby'okukola, naye Mukama by'ayagala, bye bituukirira." 
Proverbs19:22 Ekireetera omuntu okwagalibwa, kiba kisa kye; n'omwavu, akira omulimba." 
Proverbs19:23 Okussaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, kuleeta okuwangaala; ali nakwo aba mumativu, era aba mirembe." 
Proverbs19:24 Omugayaavu akoza emmere mu nva, n'alemwa okugyeteeka mu kamwa!" 
Proverbs19:25 Bonereza omunyoomi, abatalina magezi bayige. Bw'obuulirira omutegeevu, yeeyongera okutegeera." 
Proverbs19:26 Atulugunya kitaawe, oba agoba nnyina mu maka ge; aba mwana kaggwensonyi, era asaanye okuvumirirwa." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wange, bw'okomya okuyiga, olyerabira ne bye wali omanyi." 
Proverbs19:28 Omuntu awa obujulizi obw'obulimba, anyooma obwenkanya, n'abantu ababi, bawoomerwa okukola ekibi." 
Proverbs19:29 Abanyoomi tebalirema kusingibwa musango, n'abasiru tebalirema kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs20:1 Omwenge gukudaalira abagunywa, n'ebitamiiza bibaleekaanya; n'ababyettanira, si ba magezi." 
Proverbs20:2 Kabaka bw'asunguwala, atiisa ng'empologoma ewuluguma; kale okumusunguwaza, kuba kwetta wekka." 
Proverbs20:3 Kya kitiibwa okwewala ennyombo, era abasiru be baagala okuyombanga." 
Proverbs20:4 Omugayaavu atalima ng'enkuba etonnye alinoonya ky'akungula, nga takiraba." 
Proverbs20:5 Omuntu by'alowooza, biri ng'amazzi agali mu luzzi oluwanvu; omutetenkanya, ye agasenayo." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu bangi abeeyita ab'ekisa; naye omuntu omwesigwa ani ayinza okumuzuula? 
Proverbs20:7 Abaana ba mukisa abalisikira kitaabwe omulungi era omwesigwa. 
Proverbs20:8 Kabaka bw'atuula okusala emisango, apima n'azuula ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Proverbs20:9 Ani ayinza okugamba nti: “Ntukuzizza omutima gwange, kati ndi mulongoofu, sirina kibi na kimu?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Mukama akyayira ddala abakozesa minzaani n'ebipimo ebirala ebikyamu. 
Proverbs20:11 N'omwana omuto by'akola, biraga bw'ali: oba nga mulongoofu, era nga mwesimbu." 
Proverbs20:12 Amatu ge tuwuliza, n'amaaso ge tulabisa, byonna Mukama ye yabitonda." 
Proverbs20:13 Tomalanga biseera byo mu tulo, sikulwa ng'ojjirwa obwavu. Beeranga mulabufu, ofunenga emmere gy'olya." 
Proverbs20:14 Omuguzi, ajerega ky'alamuza, naye bw'amala okugula, agenda yewaana bw'akisuuzizza obusuuza." 
Proverbs20:15 Eriyo zaabu, era eriyo amayinja ag'omuwendo mangi, naye eky'omuwendo ekitasangikasangika, ye muntu ayogera eby'amagezi." 
Proverbs20:16 Omuntu eyeeyimirira gw'atamanyi, asaana aggyibweko ky'asinzeewo." 
Proverbs20:17 Oyo awoomerwa by'afunye mu butali bwenkanya, oluvannyuma bimufuukira ng'alya omusenyu." 
Proverbs20:18 Kyagala okubuulirirwa mu by'oteekateeka okukola; n'okulwana olutalo, kyetaaga abawi b'amagezi." 
Proverbs20:19 Abunza eŋŋambo, takuuma byama; n'oyo enjogeziyogezi, tomwesemberezanga." 
Proverbs20:20 Akolimira kitaawe oba nnyina, obulamu bwe buliba ng'ettaala, ezikizibwa mu kizikiza ekikutte ennyo." 
Proverbs20:21 Bw'ofuna by'otosoose kuteganira, mu nkomerero, tebiba bya mukisa." 
Proverbs20:22 Teweewereranga kuwoolera ggwanga; olekeranga Mukama, n'akulwanirira." 
Proverbs20:23 Mukama akyawa abakozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu. Minzaani epima ebikyamu, mbi." 
Proverbs20:24 Mukama ye afuga entambula yaffe. Kale omuntu ayinza atya okutegeera ekkubo mu bulamu bwe ly'akwata? 
Proverbs20:25 Kuba kwesuula mu mutego, okwanguwa okusuubiza Mukama ekintu, n'olyoka weerowooza ng'omaze okweyama." 
Proverbs20:26 Kabaka ow'amagezi azuula abasobya, n'ababonereza n'obukambwe." 
Proverbs20:27 Omwoyo gw'omuntu, ye ttaala Mukama gye yamussaamu, emulisa ne munda." 
Proverbs20:28 Ekisa n'obwesigwa, bye biwanirira kabaka; era obusaasizi, bwe bunyweza entebe ye." 
Proverbs20:29 Ekyenyumirizisa abavubuka, maanyi gaabwe; n'omutwe ogw'envi, gwe gulungiya abakadde." 
Proverbs20:30 Emiggo egibalagala, gigolola empisa embi; n'okuswanyuulwa, kuggyamu emize." 
Proverbs21:1 Omutima gwa kabaka, guba mu buyinza bwa Mukama: agukyusa n'aguzza buli gy'ayagala, nga bwe bakyusa amazzi agafukirira ennimiro." 
Proverbs21:2 Omuntu ayinza okulowooza nti buli ky'akola kituufu; naye Mukama ye apima ekigendererwa ky'omutima. 
Proverbs21:3 Okukola ekituufu era eky'obwenkanya, kusiimibwa Mukama, okusinga okumuwa ebitambiro." 
Proverbs21:4 Ababi bafugibwa kwekulumbaza, na kwegomba okubi; era ebyo byonna, bibi." 
Proverbs21:5 Entegeka z'omunyiikivu, zimuviiramu amagoba; naye oyo abuguutanira ebintu, yeereetako obwavu." 
Proverbs21:6 Obugagga obufunibwa mu bulimba, buyita nga mpewo, tebusimba; abwagala, anoonya kufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Ababi bamalibwawo obukambwe bwabwe, kubanga bagaana okukola eby'obwenkanya." 
Proverbs21:8 Obulamu bw'ababi, tebubaamu bwesimbu; naye omulongoofu, akola ebituufu." 
Proverbs21:9 Waakiri okubeera mu kasonda waggulu ku nnyumba, n'otaba na mukazi muyombi, mu nnyumba awagazi." 
Proverbs21:10 Omubi, yeegomba okukola ebibi; tabaako n'omu gw'alumirwa." 
Proverbs21:11 Omunyoomi bw'abonerezebwa, n'atabadde mulabufu ayiga; era ow'amagezi bw'ayigirizibwa, yeeyongera okumanya." 
Proverbs21:12 Katonda Omutuukirivu, amanyi ebiri mu maka g'ababi; era alibamegga ne bazikirira." 
Proverbs21:13 Agaana okuwuliriza omwavu ng'akaaba, naye yennyini alikaaba n'atawulirwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekirabo ekiweere mu kyama, kikkakkanya obusungu; n'okuwa omuntu ekiyiiyize, kimumalako ekiruyi." 
Proverbs21:15 Abantu abalungi, basanyukira obwenkanya; naye abo ababi, bubazikiriza." 
Proverbs21:16 Omuntu awaba, n'aggwaamu okutegeera, alyesanga ali mu bafu." 
Proverbs21:17 Ayagala eby'amasanyu, wa kwavuwala; awoomerwa omwenge n'ebyokulya ebisava, si wa kugaggawala." 
Proverbs21:18 Abantu ababi, batuukibwako emitawaana gye baba baagadde okutuusa ku balungi." 
Proverbs21:19 Waakiri okubeera mu nsi ey'eddungu, n'otobeera na mukazi muyombi, era anyiiganyiiga." 
Proverbs21:20 Omuzigo n'ebyobugagga ebirala, bibeera mu maka g'ow'amagezi; naye omusiru, abimalawo byonna." 
Proverbs21:21 Afuba okukola ebirungi, n'okuba ow'ekisa, awangaala; assibwamu ekitiibwa, era ayisibwa bulungi." 
Proverbs21:22 Omutabaazi ow'amagezi, awangula ekibuga ky'ab'amaanyi, n'amenya ebisenge byakyo bye beesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Buli eyeegendereza mu by'ayogera, yeewonya emitawaana." 
Proverbs21:24 Eyeekuza ne yeegulumiza, ayitibwa munyoomi; aba yeepanka, era talina gw'alumirwa." 
Proverbs21:25 Omuntu omugayaavu, attibwa okwegomba kwe, kubanga tayagala kukola." 
Proverbs21:26 Olunaku lwonna, omubi yeegomba kubaako by'afuna; naye omulungi agaba, era takodowala." 
Proverbs21:27 Mukama yeenyinyala ekitambiro ky'ababi, naddala bwe bakireeta n'ekigendererwa ekitali kirungi." 
Proverbs21:28 Omuntu awa obujulizi obw'obulimba, alibonerezebwa; naye oyo awuliriza ensonga, by'ayogera bikkirizibwa." 
Proverbs21:29 Omuntu omubi, yeekazaakaza ku maaso; naye omulungi, teyeetya." 
Proverbs21:30 Tewali magezi na kutegeera, wadde okuteesa kw'omuntu, ebiyinza okuwakanya ne biwangula Mukama." 
Proverbs21:31 Oyinza okutegeka embalaasi olw'okulwana olutalo, naye Mukama ye agaba obuwanguzi." 
Proverbs22:1 Bw'oba wa kulondawo, londawo erinnya eddungi, okusinga okulondawo obugagga. Era okuganja n'okwagalibwa, kusinga okuba ne zaabu ne ffeeza." 
Proverbs22:2 Omugagga n'omwavu, balina ekibagatta: Ye Mukama, bonna eyabatonda." 
Proverbs22:3 Omuntu omutegeevu alaba akabi nga kajja, n'akeewala; naye abatalina magezi, bagenda bugenzi ne bakagwamu." 
Proverbs22:4 Abantu abeetoowaza n'abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, bafuna obugagga n'ekitiibwa, era n'obuwangaazi." 
Proverbs22:5 Amaggwa n'emitego, biri mu kkubo ly'ababi. Ayagala okukuuma obulamu bwe, abyewala." 
Proverbs22:6 Yigiriza omwana wo, nga bw'asaanye okweyisa mu bulamu bwe; ekyo talikivaako ne mu bukadde bwe." 
Proverbs22:7 Omuntu omugagga, ye afuga omwavu; n'oyo eyeewola, aba muddu w'oyo amuwola." 
Proverbs22:8 Asiga obutali bwenkanya, alikungula mitawaana, n'okukambuwalira banne, kuliggwaawo." 
Proverbs22:9 Wa mukisa oyo ow'ekisa, kubanga abaavu abagabira ku mmere ye." 
Proverbs22:10 Bw'ogobawo omunyoomi, n'entalo ziggwaawo; era empaka n'okuswala bikoma." 
Proverbs22:11 Ayagala omutima omulongoofu n'okwogera ebigambo eby'ekisa, afuuka mukwano gwa kabaka." 
Proverbs22:12 Mukama yeekaliriza okulaba ng'amazima gakuumibwa; era azikiriza enkwe z'abalimba. 
Proverbs22:13 Omugayaavu agamba nti: “Ebweru eriyo empologoma, ejja kunzitira mu nguudo.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Akalimi k'omukazi atali wuwo, bunnya buwanvu: abo Mukama b'asunguwalidde, babugwamu." 
Proverbs22:15 Kya butonde omwana omuto okukola ebitali bya magezi; naye okubonerezebwa, kubimuggyamu." 
Proverbs22:16 Anyigiriza omwavu, ye yeegaggawaze, n'oyo agabira abagagga ebirabo, tebalirema kwavuwala." 
Proverbs22:17 Wuliriza ebigambo, ab'amagezi bye baayogera; ssaayo omwoyo, oyige bye nkuyigiriza." 
Proverbs22:18 Kiba kirungi, singa osobola okubijjukira, nga tosikattira na mu kubijuliza." 
Proverbs22:19 Ŋŋenda okubikuyigiriza kaakano olyoke oyige okwesiganga Mukama. 
Proverbs22:20 Nkuwandiikidde emboozi amakumi asatu, ezijjudde eby'okuyiga n'ebibuulirira." 
Proverbs22:21 Zijja kukuyigiriza, omanye amazima g'otobuusabuusaamu, olwo abakutumye okuganoonya, onoobakomezangawo g'ozudde." 
Proverbs22:22 Toyiikirizanga mwavu, olw'okuba nga ye teyeesobola; wadde okunyigiriza omunaku awasalirwa omusango;" 
Proverbs22:23 kubanga Mukama ye ajja okubalwanirira, era ajja kwesimba mu buli abatiisatiisa." 
Proverbs22:24 Tokwananga bantu ba kasunguyira, abasunguwala ne basuukira;" 
Proverbs22:25 sikulwa ng'oyiga emize gyabwe ate n'olemwa okugivaamu. 
Proverbs22:26 Tobanga omu ku abo abeeyama, okusasula amabanja g'abalala." 
Proverbs22:27 Bw'olemwa okugasasula, batwala n'ekitanda ky'osulako." 
Proverbs22:28 Tojjululanga kabonero ka nsalo ez'edda, bajjajjaabo ke baasimba." 
Proverbs22:29 Omuntu anyiikira okukola, aba takyali mu bantu ba bulijjo; asaanira kubeeranga mu maaso ga bakabaka." 
Proverbs23:1 Bw'otuulanga okuliira awamu n'omukungu, gendereranga nnyo ebiteekeddwa mu maaso go." 
Proverbs23:2 Weefugenga bw'oba nga oli muyala nnyo. 
Proverbs23:3 Tolulunkaniranga byassava by'agabula ayinza okuba ng'ayagala kukugeza alabe bw'ofaanana. 
Proverbs23:4 Mu kukolereranga obugagga, beeranga mugezi olemenga kwetawaanya ekiyitiridde." 
Proverbs23:5 Osimbira ki amaaso ku binaayita obuyisi? Kubanga mazima obugagga bwefunira ebiwaawaatiro ng'empungu, ne bubuuka mu bbanga." 
Proverbs23:6 Tolyanga mmere ya muntu eyeefaako yekka, wadde okululunkanira ebyassava by'agabula!" 
Proverbs23:7 Kubanga nga bw'alowooza mu nda ye, era ne kungulu bw'ali! Akugamba nti: “Lya, nywa,” naye mu mutima gwe, nga tali wamu naawe." 
Proverbs23:8 Ojja kusesema by'olidde; n'ebigambo ebirungi by'oyogedde, bijja kukufa bwereere." 
Proverbs23:9 Tobangako ky'obuulira omusiru, kubanga eby'amagezi by'oyogera ajja kubinyooma." 
Proverbs23:10 Tojjululanga kabonero ka nsalo ak'edda, era toyingiriranga kibanja kya bamulekwa;" 
Proverbs23:11 kubanga Omulwanirizi waabwe, wa maanyi; omusango gwabwe, ye aliguwoza naawe." 
Proverbs23:12 Ossangayo omwoyo ku bikuyigirizibwa, era obiwulirizanga." 
Proverbs23:13 Tolekangayo kugolola mwana wo; okumukubako n'omuggo, tekijja kumutta," 
Proverbs23:14 ate era okumukuba, kye kijja okuwonya obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wange, bw'obeera ow'amagezi, nange nsanyuka." 
Proverbs23:16 Ddala nja kusanyukanga, bw'onooyogeranga eby'amagezi." 
Proverbs23:17 Aboonoonyi tobakwatirwanga buggya, naye lumirwanga kussaamu Mukama kitiibwa ebbanga lyonna;" 
Proverbs23:18 kubanga ddala empeera weeri, n'essuubi lyo teririkufa bwereere." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wange, teganga okutu kwo, obeerenga wa magezi; ofubenga okuluŋŋamya obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs23:20 Tobanga mu abo abeekamirira omwenge, wadde mu abo abalulunkanira ennyama," 
Proverbs23:21 kubanga omutamiivu n'omuluvu, balifuuka baavu, ne batuuka n'okwambala enziina." 
Proverbs23:22 Wuliranga kitaawo eyakuzaala; era tonyoomanga nnyoko wadde ng'akaddiye. 
Proverbs23:23 Owangayo ensimbi, okugula amazima n'amagezi, obuyigirize n'obugunjufu, naye tobitundanga." 
Proverbs23:24 Kitaawe w'omuntu omulungi, anaasanyukanga nnyo; n'oyo azaala ow'amagezi, anaamwenyumiririzangamu." 
Proverbs23:25 Osaanye osanyuse kitaawo ne nnyoko, omukazi eyakuzaala ajaganye." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wange, ssaayo nnyo omwoyo ku bye nkugamba, era weetegereze empisa zange." 
Proverbs23:27 Omukazi malaaya, lukonko oluwanvu; n'abakazi abenzi, bunnya bwa kanyigo." 
Proverbs23:28 Bakuteega ng'abanyazi, era baleetera abasajja bangi okusuula obwesigwa." 
Proverbs23:29 Ennaku n'obuyinike bigwira ani? Baani ababeera n'ennyombo? Abeemulugunya be baani, n'abakubirwa obwereere embale? Bantu ki abamyuka amaaso?" 
Proverbs23:30 Be bantu abateekuula ku mwenge; abanoonya okunywa omuka ogw'ekika kino na kiri. 
Proverbs23:31 Tokemebwa ng'otunuulira omwenge ogumyuse obulungi, ogunyirira mu giraasi, ogukka omumiro n'obuseeneekerevu." 
Proverbs23:32 Oluvannyuma ofuna kubalagalwa, ng'ava okubojjebwa omusota; owulira kusonsomolwa, ng'alumiddwa embalasaasa." 
Proverbs23:33 Olwo ojja kulaba ebintuntu ebitategeerekeka, otandike okwogera ebitakwatagana." 
Proverbs23:34 Owulire ng'oli ng'agalamidde wakati mu nnyanja, era ng'oli ng'eyeewuubira waggulu, ku mulongooti." 
Proverbs23:35 Ojja kugamba nti: “Bankubye ne sirumwa. Bankubye ne siwulira kantu. Nnaazuukuka ddi, nzireyo ngunoonye nate?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Tokwatirwanga bakozi ba bibi buggya, era teweegombanga kubeera nabo," 
Proverbs24:2 kubanga balowooza bya bukambwe, era boogera bya kutabulatabula." 
Proverbs24:3 Kyetaagisa amagezi, okussaawo omusingi gw'ennyumba, era kyetaagisa okuyiiya n'okutetenkanya, okugizimba;" 
Proverbs24:4 awali okumanya, ebisenge byayo bijjuzibwa ebyobugagga amakula, era ebirungi ebiteŋŋeenya." 
Proverbs24:5 Omuntu omugezi ye wa maanyi, ddala omuntu omutegeevu ye w'obuyinza," 
Proverbs24:6 kubanga okulwana olutalo, kyetaagisa okukola entegeka ez'ekikugu; era awaba abawi b'amagezi abangi, we wabeera emirembe." 
Proverbs24:7 Eby'amagezi bisukkiridde nnyo omusiru era talina ky'ayinza kwogera, we basalira emisango." 
Proverbs24:8 Ateekateeka okukola akabi, balimuyita kalinkwe." 
Proverbs24:9 Omusiru buli ky'ateekateeka okukola, kiba kibi; era abantu beetamwa omunyoomi." 
Proverbs24:10 Bw'onafuyira mu kiseera mw'ofunidde ebizibu, ddala amaanyi go gaba matono." 
Proverbs24:11 Yamba abagenda okuttirwa obwemage, obawonye, baleme kutirimbulwa." 
Proverbs24:12 Oyinza okugamba nti: “Ekyo saakitegeerako.” Oyo apima ekiri mu mutima takulaba? Oyo akuuma obulamu bwo akumanyi, era alikusasula, okusinziira ku by'okola." 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wange, lyanga omubisi gw'enjuki, kubanga mulungi. Ebisenge byagwo nga bwe bikuwoomera," 
Proverbs24:14 manya nti n'amagezi bwe gatyo bwe gawoomera obulamu bwo. Bw'ogafuna, oliba bulungi gye bujja, by'osuubira birituukirira." 
Proverbs24:15 Weewale okuba ng'abantu ababi: abateegera mu maka g'omulungi, era abateesa okumunyagako amaka ge mw'abeera." 
Proverbs24:16 Omulungi ne bw'agwa emirundi emingi, ayimukawo buli mulundi; naye omuntu omubi bw'alijjirwa emitawaana, girimuzikiriza." 
Proverbs24:17 Tosanyukanga, omulabe wo bw'agwibwako akabi; tojaganyanga, ng'asirittuse n'agwa," 
Proverbs24:18 kubanga Mukama bw'alaba ng'okoze bw'otyo, anyiiga, n'alekera awo okumusunguwalira." 
Proverbs24:19 Toggweebwangako mirembe olw'abo abakola ebibi, era tobakwatirwanga buggya," 
Proverbs24:20 kubanga omubi talifuna birungi gye bujja, era alizikira ng'ettaala." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wange, ossangamu ekitiibwa Mukama ne kabaka; era teweetabanga n'abo abaagala okujeema," 
Proverbs24:22 kubanga emitawaana egiribajjira giribagwako bugwi, era tewali amanyi bwe giryenkana." 
Proverbs24:23 Era na bino byayogerwa abo ab'amagezi: okusosola mu bantu ng'osala emisango, si kituufu." 
Proverbs24:24 Oyo agamba eyazza omusango nti: “Ggwe mutuufu,” abantu banaamukolimiranga, era anaakyayibwanga buli omu." 
Proverbs24:25 Naye abo ababonereza omusobya, banaafunanga essanyu, era banaabeeranga n'omukisa." 
Proverbs24:26 Okuddamu ekituufu, ke kabonero k'omukwano." 
Proverbs24:27 Sooka oteeketeeke bulungi emirimu gyo egy'ebweru, otereeze bulungi ennimiro yo, olyoke weezimbire ennyumba." 
Proverbs24:28 Tolumirizanga muntu munno awatali nsonga ntuufu, era toyogeranga bya bulimba." 
Proverbs24:29 Togambanga nti: “Ky'ankoze nange ndikimukola, ndimulumya nga bw'annumizza.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Nayita mu kibanja ky'omugayaavu, mu nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu," 
Proverbs24:31 amaggwa nga gaduumuukidde omwo, ng'ebunye omuddo yonna, n'olukomera lwayo olw'amayinja nga lugudde." 
Proverbs24:32 Nagitunuulira ne ndowooza nnyo, ne mbaako kye njiga nti:" 
Proverbs24:33 oba oyagala, sumagira weebakeko, zinga emikono, owummuleko!" 
Proverbs24:34 Naye obwavu n'obwetaavu, birikulumba ng'omunyazi akutte ebyokulwanyisa." 
Proverbs25:1 Era na zino ngero za Solomooni, basajja ba Heezeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ze baakoppolola." 
Proverbs25:2 Tussaamu Katonda ekitiibwa, olw'ebyo bye yakisa. Naye Kabaka, ekitiibwa tukimussaamu olw'ebyo by'annyonnyola." 
Proverbs25:3 Kabaka by'alowooza, bizibu okumanya; bitwesudde ng'eggulu mu bbanga, era ng'okukka kw'entobo y'ennyanja." 
Proverbs25:4 Bw'oyokya n'oggyamu obucaafu mu ffeeza, omuweesi amukuweesezaamu ky'oyagala." 
Proverbs25:5 Ggyawo mu maaso ga kabaka abawi b'amagezi ababi, olabe obufuzi bwe bwe bujjula obwenkanya." 
Proverbs25:6 Teweekuzanga mu maaso ga kabaka, era teweeteekanga mu kifo kya bakulu." 
Proverbs25:7 Kiba kirungi okukuyita nti: “Sembera eno”, okusinga lwe bakutoowaza mu maaso g'omukungu. By'oba olabye" 
Proverbs25:8 toyanguwanga kubiraalaasa, balemenga kubikutuuzaamu n'obulwa eky'okukola!" 
Proverbs25:9 Bw'obangako ensonga ne munno, muginnyonnyolaganenga mwembi. Ebadde ey'ekyama, togimanyisanga balala," 
Proverbs25:10 awulira ekyama ekyo alemenga kukusunga, n'osigala ng'oswadde." 
Proverbs25:11 Ekigambo ekirungi ekyogerwa mu kaseera akatuufu, kiri ng'ebibala ebyengedde ebifaanana zaabu, era ebiteekeddwa ku ssowaani eya ffeeza." 
Proverbs25:12 Ow'amagezi by'abuulirira omuntu eyeetegese okuwuliriza, biri ng'empeta y'omu kutu eya zaabu, oba eby'obuyonjo ebirala ebya zaabu." 
Proverbs25:13 Omubaka omwesigwa, azzaamu amaanyi abaamutuma, ng'amazzi ag'okunywa agannyogoga, bwe gaweweeza abaganywa mu budde obw'ebbugumu." 
Proverbs25:14 Oyo asuubiza ebirabo by'atagaba, ali ng'ebire n'empewo ebitavaamu nkuba." 
Proverbs25:15 Okugumiikiriza, kuwooyawooya omufuzi; n'olulimi olugonvu, lugonza ow'obuyinza." 
Proverbs25:16 Bw'osanga omubisi gw'enjuki, lyangako ogukumala obumazi, oleme kugukkuta kiyitiridde n'ogusesema." 
Proverbs25:17 Tokyaliranga munno mirundi mingi, alemenga okukwetamwa n'akukyawa." 
Proverbs25:18 Omuntu awaayiriza munne wa kabi ng'ennyondo n'ekitala, oba ng'akasaale akoogi." 
Proverbs25:19 Okwesiga omuntu atali mwesigwa mu biseera eby'obuyinike, kuli ng'erinnyo erirwadde, n'okugulu okunuuse." 
Proverbs25:20 Okuyimbira omuntu ali mu nnaku, kuba ng'okweyambulamu engoye, mu budde obw'empewo, oba okusiiga omunnyo mu kiwundu." 
Proverbs25:21 Omulabe wo bw'alumwanga enjala, omuwanga emmere n'alya; era bw'alumwanga ennyonta, omuwanga amazzi n'anywa." 
Proverbs25:22 Bw'okola bw'otyo, olimuleetera okuwulira ennyo ensonyi; era Mukama alikuwa empeera." 
Proverbs25:23 Okugeya kuleeta obusungu, ng'embuyaga ez'obukiikakkono, bwe zireeta enkuba."
