Proverbs25:24 Waakiri okubeera mu kasonda waggulu ku nnyumba, n'otaba na mukazi muyombi, mu nnyumba awagazi." 
Proverbs25:25 Okuwulira amawulire amalungi agava mu nsi ey'ewala, kuli ng'okunywa amazzi amannyogovu ng'obadde olumwa ennyonta." 
Proverbs25:26 Omuntu omulungi eyekkiriranya n'omubi, aba ng'oluzzi olusiikuuse, n'ensulo y'amazzi etabanguse." 
Proverbs25:27 Nga bwe kitali kirungi okulya omubisi gw'enjuki omungi, era bwe kityo bwe kiri, omuntu okunoonya okuwaanibwa." 
Proverbs25:28 Atamanyi kwetangira, ali ng'ekibuga ekirumbiddwa nga tekiriiko kigo." 
Proverbs26:1 Ekitiibwa tekisaanira musiru, ng'omuzira bwe gutasaana kubaawo mu kyeya, n'enkuba mu budde obw'amakungula." 
Proverbs26:2 Ebikolimo by'oteegwanyizza, tebikukwata. Biba nga nkazaluggya n'akataayi, ezimala gabuukabuuka." 
Proverbs26:3 Ng'embalaasi bw'erina okukubibwa, n'endogoyi okusibwa enkoba, bw'atyo nno n'omusiru, bw'alina okuweweenyulwa emiggo." 
Proverbs26:4 Ekibuuzo ky'omusiru tokiddangamu mu ngeri ya busiru, naawe oleme kumufaanana busiru." 
Proverbs26:5 Wabula omusiru omuddangamu nga bw'asaanidde, ategeere ekibuuzo kye bwe kitabadde kya magezi nga bw'alowooza." 
Proverbs26:6 Atuma omusiru okutwala obubaka, aba ng'eyeesalako ebigere, era yeereetera mitawaana." 
Proverbs26:7 Omusiru okukozesa enjogera ey'amakulu, kiri ng'omulema okukozesa amagulu ge agaleebeeta obuleebeesi." 
Proverbs26:8 Okussaamu omusiru ekitiibwa, kuba ng'okusibira ejjinja mu nvuumuulo." 
Proverbs26:9 Omusiru okukozesa enjogera ey'amakulu, kiba ng'omutamiivu bw'agezaako okwetundula eriggwa mu kibatu kye." 
Proverbs26:10 Ateekawo omusiru okumukolera omulimu, oba buli muyise gw'asanze obusanzi, aba ng'omulasi w'obusaale, alasa buli muntu." 
Proverbs26:11 Omusiru addiŋŋana eby'obusiru, ali ng'embwa erya nate ebisesemye byayo." 
Proverbs26:12 Omusiru wandibaako k'omusuubiramu, okusinga omuntu eyeeyita omugezi." 
Proverbs26:13 Omugayaavu agamba nti: “Ebweru waliyo empologoma, siyinza kuva mu nnyumba kugenda kukola mirimu.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Omugayaavu yeekyusiza ku kitanda kye, ng'oluggi bwe lwekyusiza ku ppata zaalwo." 
Proverbs26:15 Omugayaavu akoza emmere mu kibya, ne yeekanasa okugiteeka mu kamwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Omugayaavu alowooza nti mugezi okusinga abantu abangi, aboogera batereeza ensonga." 
Proverbs26:17 Omuntu ayitawo ne yeeyingiza mu mpaka ezitamukwatako, aba ng'omuntu akwata ku matu g'embwa gy'atamanyi;" 
Proverbs26:18 ali ng'omulalu akasuka amanda, agaaka omuliro, oba obusaale n'ebissi ebirala." 
Proverbs26:19 N'oyo awubisa munne, n'agamba nti: “Mbadde nsaaga busaazi,” bw'atyo bw'aba." 
Proverbs26:20 Ng'okumalawo enku zo bwe kuzikiza omuliro, n'omugeyi bw'avaawo, okuyomba kuggwaawo." 
Proverbs26:21 Omuntu ow'empaka, akoleeza oluyombo, ng'amanda n'enku ebyo ebyongerwa mu kyoto, bwe bikoleeza omuliro." 
Proverbs26:22 Emboozi y'ow'olugambo ewooma ng'emmere ekka omuntu mu lubuto. 
Proverbs26:23 Ebigambo ebiwoomerevu ebikweka omutima omubi, biri ng'ekintu eky'ebbumba, ekisiigiddwako ffeeza." 
Proverbs26:24 Omukuusa akweka obukyayi bwe mu bigambo ebikwenyakwenya. 
Proverbs26:25 Bw'ayogera eby'ekisa, tobikkiriza, kubanga omutima gwe gukubyeko obukyayi." 
Proverbs26:26 Obukyayi bwe, ne bw'abubikkako mu bukuusa, ebibi by'akola, biribwoleka abantu bonna mu lwatu." 
Proverbs26:27 Oyo asima obunnya, alibugwamu; n'oyo ayiringisa ejjinja, lirimuddira." 
Proverbs26:28 Omulimba akyawa abo b'alimba; era n'okuwaanawaana, kuleeta okuzikirira." 
Proverbs27:1 Teweenyumirizanga lwa binaabaawo nkya, kubanga olunaku bye lunaaleeta tobimanyi." 
Proverbs27:2 Lekanga abalaba, wadde bagwira, bakutendereze, naye sso si ggwe kwetendereza." 
Proverbs27:3 Ejjinja n'omusenyu weewaawo bizitowa, naye emitawaana egireetebwa omusiru, gibisinga byombi obuzito." 
Proverbs27:4 Obusungu n'ekiruyi bikambwe, era bizikiriza ebintu; naye tebyenkana buggya." 
Proverbs27:5 Akubuulira ensobi yo n'atagikukisa akira agikukweka ng'ayagala okukulaga nti akwagala. 
Proverbs27:6 Weesige mukwano gwo akunenya, naye sso si mulabe wo akuwaana." 
Proverbs27:7 Wadde ebisenge by'omubisi gw'enjuki, omukkufu tabyetaaga; naye omuyala, n'ebyokulya ebikaayirira, abiyita biwoomerevu." 
Proverbs27:8 Omuntu abuze n'ava awaka waabwe ali ng'ennyonyi ebuze n'eva mu kisu kyayo. 
Proverbs27:9 Okubuulirirwa ow'omukwano akulumirwa, kusanyusa ng'omuzigo, n'ebyakawoowo ebyesiigibwa." 
Proverbs27:10 Toyabuliranga mukwano gwo, wadde mukwano gwa kitaawo. Togendanga wa muganda wo ng'ofunye ekizibu. Muliraanwa akuli okumpi, akira owooluganda ali ewala." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wange, beeranga wa magezi, onsanyusenga; olwo buli ananvumanga, ndyokenga nfune kye mmuddamu." 
Proverbs27:12 Omuntu omwegendereza, alaba akabi nga kajja n'akeewala; naye oyo atalowooza, akatambaala, ne yejjusa luvannyuma." 
Proverbs27:13 Kituufu otwale ekyambalo ky'oyo akiwaayo ng'omusingo, okweyimirira gw'atamanyi." 
Proverbs27:14 Azuukuka ku makya ennyo n'aleekaana okulamusa munne, abalwa ng'amukolimira." 
Proverbs27:15 Omukazi omuyombi, ali nga nkuba nnyingi, etonnya nga tekya," 
Proverbs27:16 kizibu nnyo okumusirisa; kiba nga kuziyiza mpewo ekunta, oba okunyweza ekintu mu mukono, nga kiseerera amafuta." 
Proverbs27:17 Kale ng'ekyuma bwe kiwagala kinnaakyo, n'omuntu bw'atyo bw'ayigiriza muntu munne." 
Proverbs27:18 Alabirira omuti ogw'ebibala, anaalyanga ku bibala byagwo; n'oyo aweereza mukama we, anassibwangamu ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Ng'omuntu bwe yeeraba ng'atunudde mu mazzi, bwe gutyo n'omutima gwe bwe gumwoleka bw'ali." 
Proverbs27:20 Era ng'emagombe bwe watajjula baafa, n'amaaso g'abantu, bwe gatakkuta kulaba." 
Proverbs27:21 Nga ffeeza ne zaabu bwe bitukuzibwa akabiga k'omuliro, n'omuntu gwe batendereza, bw'atyo bw'amala okugezebwa." 
Proverbs27:22 Omusiru ne bw'omukuba okujula okumutta obussi, era obusiru bwe tebumuvaako." 
Proverbs27:23 Beera munyiikivu okulabirira embuzi zo, n'endiga zo n'ente zo," 
Proverbs27:24 kubanga obugagga tebubeerera, n'engule y'obwakabaka, tesikirwa mirembe gyonna." 
Proverbs27:25 Omuddo bwe gukala n'omulala ne gumera, n'ogw'oku nsozi ne gukuŋŋaanyizibwa," 
Proverbs27:26 lw'olyekolera ebyokwambala, mu byoya by'endiga zo; n'otunda ne ku mbuzi zo, ne weegulira ebibanja." 
Proverbs27:27 Onoofunanga amata agakumala ggwe n'ab'omu maka go, ne ganywebwako n'abakozi bo." 
Proverbs28:1 Ababi badduka nga tewali abagoba; naye abalungi, baba bazira ng'empologoma." 
Proverbs28:2 Eggwanga omuba obutabanguko liba n'abafuzi bangi; naye bwe lifuna omufuzi ow'amagezi era omutegeevu, litebenkera." 
Proverbs28:3 Ow'obuyinza anyigiriza abaavu, ali ng'enkuba erimu kibuyaga, ezikiriza emmere yonna." 
Proverbs28:4 Atassaamu mateeka kitiibwa, awagira ababi; naye oyo agakwata, abalwanyisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu ababi, tebategeera bwenkanya; naye abassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, babutegeera bulungi." 
Proverbs28:6 Okuba omwavu omwesimbu, kusinga okuba omugagga omukumpanya." 
Proverbs28:7 Omwana akwata amateeka, wa magezi; naye akwana bakirimululu, aswaza kitaawe." 
Proverbs28:8 Eyeegaggawaza ng'aseera afune amagoba, obugagga bwe abukuŋŋaanyiza oyo, akwatirwa ekisa abaavu." 
Proverbs28:9 Agaana okuwulira amateeka, okwegayirira kwe, Katonda akwenyinyala." 
Proverbs28:10 Akyamya omulungi n'amukozesa ekibi, yennyini aligwa mu bunnya bw'asimye; naye abatalina musango, balifuna ebirungi." 
Proverbs28:11 Omugagga alowooza nti wa magezi; naye omwavu eyeetegereza, amutegeera." 
Proverbs28:12 Omulungi bw'afuna obuyinza, wabaawo okujaguza; naye omubi bw'akuzibwa, abantu beekweka." 
Proverbs28:13 Akweka ebibi bye yakola, taliba bulungi; naye buli abyatula n'abyenenya, abisonyiyibwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Assaamu Mukama ekitiibwa bulijjo, aliba wa mukisa; naye amujeemera, aligwa mu kabi." 
Proverbs28:15 Omufuzi omubi afuga abaavu, ali ng'empologoma ewuluguma, n'eddubu eyeetala okutaagula." 
Proverbs28:16 Omufuzi atafa ku bantu, aba mukambwe; naye oyo akyawa obulyake, anaalwanga ku bufuzi." 
Proverbs28:17 Omuntu bw'azza ogw'obutemu, asaana abenga mubungeese okutuusa lw'alifa, era walemenga kubaawo amuyamba." 
Proverbs28:18 Akolera ku bwesimbu, aliba bulungi; naye atali mwenkanya, alimenyekawo mangu." 
Proverbs28:19 Omulimi omunyiikivu, aliba n'emmere nnyingi; naye ayita n'abagayaavu, anabeeranga mwavu." 
Proverbs28:20 Omuntu omwesigwa, alifuna emikisa; naye abuguutanira okugaggawala, talirema kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Okusosola mu bantu, kibi; naye abantu bakola ebibi olw'okufuna ke banaalya." 
Proverbs28:22 Omuntu eyeefaako yekka, abuguutanira okwegaggawaza, sso n'atamanya nti obwetaavu bulimutuukako." 
Proverbs28:23 Agolola munne ensobi, oluvannyuma aliganja, okusinga amuwaanawaana." 
Proverbs28:24 Buli alowooza nti si musango okubba ebintu bya kitaawe oba ebya nnyina, aba wa kinywi kimu n'omutemu." 
Proverbs28:25 Alulunkanira ebintu, aleeta ennyombo; naye eyeesiga Mukama, anaabanga n'omukisa." 
Proverbs28:26 Eyeesiga ye by'alowooza, oyo aba musiru; naye oyo agoberera ebimuyigirizibwa ab'amagezi, ye aliba obulungi." 
Proverbs28:27 Agabira abaavu, taabenga mu bwetaavu; naye omuntu abalaba n'atabafaako, alikolimirwa bangi." 
Proverbs28:28 Ababi bwe baba mu buyinza, abantu beekweka; naye bwe bawanulwa ku bufuzi, abantu abalungi beeyongera okwala." 
Proverbs29:1 Omuntu anenyezebwa emirundi emingi n'akakanyalira mu nsobi, alimenyeka nga tamanyiridde, n'atasobola kuwonyezebwa." 
Proverbs29:2 Ng'abantu abalungi be bafuga, abantu basanyuka; naye ababi bwe baba mu buyinza, abantu basinda." 
Proverbs29:3 Ayagala amagezi, asanyusa kitaawe; naye abeera ne bamalaaya, amalawo ebintu bye." 
Proverbs29:4 Kabaka bw'alumirwa obwenkanya, ensi ye etereera; naye bw'aba asaba enguzi, ensi agittattana." 
Proverbs29:5 Omuntu awaanawaana munne, aba amutega kitimba." 
Proverbs29:6 Omuntu omubi, akwatirwa mu nsobi ze; naye omulungi, asanyuka n'ayimba." 
Proverbs29:7 Omulungi amanya ebyo, abaavu bye bagwanira okuweebwa; naye omubi, tabirowoozanako." 
Proverbs29:8 Abantu abatalumirwa balala basasamaza ekibuga; naye abantu abategeevu, bakkakkanya obusungu." 
Proverbs29:9 Omuntu ow'amagezi bw'awakana n'omusiru, omusiru asunguwala, oba asekereza, n'aleetawo okucankalana." 
Proverbs29:10 Abaagala okutemula, bakyawa atalina musango; naye abantu abalungi, bafuba okutaasa obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs29:11 Omusiru alaga obusungu bwe bwonna, naye ow'amagezi abuziyiza n'abukkakkanya." 
Proverbs29:12 Omufuzi bw'awuliriza eby'obulimba, abakungu be bonna baba babi." 
Proverbs29:13 Omwavu, n'oyo amunyigiriza, balina ekibagatta: bombi Mukama ye abawa ekitangaala ne balaba." 
Proverbs29:14 Kabaka asala emisango gy'abaavu mu bwenkanya, obwakabaka bwe bunaanyweranga ennaku zonna." 
Proverbs29:15 Okugolola n'okukangavvula, biyigiriza; naye omwana alekerwa awo, aswaza nnyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Ababi bwe baba mu buyinza, okuzza emisango kweyongera; naye abalungi baliraba okugwa kw'ababi abo." 
Proverbs29:17 Kangavvulanga omwana wo, anaakweyagazanga, era anaakuleeteranga okuwulira essanyu." 
Proverbs29:18 Awatali kuluŋŋamizibwa Katonda, abantu bacankalana; naye akwata Amateeka, wa mukisa." 
Proverbs29:19 Omuddu takangavvulwa na bigambo bugambo, kubanga ne bw'ategeera, tassaayo mwoyo." 
Proverbs29:20 Omusiru wandibaako k'omusuubiramu, okusinga oyo afubutukira ebigambo." 
Proverbs29:21 Aginya omuweereza we okuva nga muto, oluvannyuma alimukikinalako." 
Proverbs29:22 Omuntu ow'akasunguyira, awakula ennyombo; n'ow'ekiruyi, agwa mu nsobi nnyingi." 
Proverbs29:23 Okwekuza kw'omuntu, kumutoowaza; naye omwetoowaze mu mutima, aweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Assa ekimu n'omubbi, akyawa bulamu bwe; ne bwe bamulayiza, takwekula mazima." 
Proverbs29:25 Oyo atya obutyi abantu, yeesuula mu kabi; naye eyeesiga Mukama, aba n'emirembe." 
Proverbs29:26 Bangi abaagala okuganja mu bakulu; naye Mukama ye atufuula abenkanya. 
Proverbs29:27 Omuntu omubi, akyawa ow'empisa ennungi, n'ow'empisa ennungi, akyawa omuntu omubi." 
Proverbs30:1 Bino bye bigambo bya Aguri, mutabani wa Yaake ow'e Messa, bye yagamba Yitiyeeli, Yitiyeeli oyo ne Wukali, nti:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Mazima nze muntu asingayo obusiru era siriimu magezi ga muntu. 
Proverbs30:3 Siyiganga magezi, wadde okumanya ebifa ku Katonda." 
Proverbs30:4 Ani yali alinnye mu ggulu, ate n'awanukayo n'akka? Ani yali awumbidde empewo mu bikonde bye? Ani yali akuumidde amazzi mu kyambalo kye? Ani yateekawo ensalo zonna ez'ensi? Erinnya lye ye ani, ne mutabani we ye ani, oba ng'omanyi?" 
Proverbs30:5 Katonda atuukiriza buli ky'asuubiza; era Ye, ye ngabo, ekuuma abamwesiga." 
Proverbs30:6 Era ebigambo bye, tobikookerangako bibyo, aleme okukunenyanga n'ayoleka obulimba bwo.”" 
Proverbs30:7 Nkusaba ebintu bibiri, ayi Katonda, obimpe nga sinnafa:" 
Proverbs30:8 mponya ebikyamu n'obulimba, tompanga bwavu, wadde obugagga, naye ompenga ebyokulya bye neetaaga;" 
Proverbs30:9 nnemenga okukkuta ekiyitiridde, ne nkwegaana ng'aŋŋamba nti: “Mukama ye ani? Simwetaaga”; era nnemenga okuba omwavu ne nziba, ne nvumaganya erinnya lyo, ayi Katonda wange." 
Proverbs30:10 Towaayirizanga muweereza eri mukama we, alemenga okukukolimira, n'ovunaanibwa omusango." 
Proverbs30:11 Waliwo abakolimira bakitaabwe, era ne batasabira bannyaabwe mikisa." 
Proverbs30:12 Waliwo abalowooza nti balongoofu, sso nga balina ebibi, bye basaanye okwenenya, bibasonyiyibwe." 
Proverbs30:13 Waliwo abantu abalaba nti bo ba waggulu nnyo, era ne balowooza nti be basinga abalala bonna." 
Proverbs30:14 Waliwo abakozesa obukambwe okunyuunyunta abaavu n'abateeyamba, bo beefunire ebibayimirizaawo." 
Proverbs30:15 Okwegomba kumanyi ebigambo bibiri byokka: ekisooka, “Mpa” n'ekyokubiri, “Mpa.” Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebitakkuta ennaku zonna, ddala biri bina ebitamatira:" 
Proverbs30:16 Ebyo ge magombe, n'enda y'omukazi omugumba, ensi enkalu erakasidde, n'omuliro mutakkutanku." 
Proverbs30:17 Amaaso g'oyo anyooma kitaawe, oba ag'oyo agaana okuwulira nnyina, gasaanye gaggyibwemu binnamuŋŋoona eby'omu kiwonvu, era gabojjogolwe ensega." 
Proverbs30:18 Ebintu bisatu ebyannema okutegeera, ddala biri bina bye simanyi:" 
Proverbs30:19 engeri bino gye bimanyaamu ekkubo lye binaayitamu: empungu ebuukira mu bbanga, omusota ogwewalulira ku lwazi, eryato eriseeyeeya mu buziba bw'ennyanja, n'engeri omukwano gye gujja wakati w'omusajja n'omukazi!" 
Proverbs30:20 Eno ye nkola y'omukazi omwenzi: olumala okwenda, anaaba ne yeesaanya, olwo n'agamba nti: “Siriiko kibi kye nkoze.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebikankanya ensi, biri bina by'eteyinza kugumiikiriza:" 
Proverbs30:22 omuddu okufuuka kabaka, n'omusiru okuba na buli kye yeetaaga;" 
Proverbs30:23 omukazi kibijjigiri okufumbirwa, n'omuzaana okusikira mugole we." 
Proverbs30:24 Ku nsi kuliko ebintu bina ebitono, naye ebirina amagezi amangi ennyo:" 
Proverbs30:25 enkuyege, kale buntu obutalina maanyi, naye bweterekera bye bunaalya mu kyeya." 
Proverbs30:26 Obumyu nabwo si bwa maanyi, naye bwezimbira amaka mu mayinja." 
Proverbs30:27 Enzige tezirina kabaka, naye zikumbira mu bibinja." 
Proverbs30:28 Omunya mwangu okukwata, n'oguteeka mu kibatu; naye gubeera ne mu mbiri za bakabaka." 
Proverbs30:29 Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebikumba n'oyagala, ddala biri bina ebitambuza essimbo:" 
Proverbs30:30 empologoma ekira amaanyi mu nsolo endala zonna, tewali ndala gy'etya;" 
Proverbs30:31 embwa enjizzi, ennyonyi muzinge, sekkokko empanga, n'embuzi ennume, ne kabaka ali n'eggye lye." 
Proverbs30:32 Bw'obanga okoze eky'obusiru ne weekuluntaza, oba n'oteesa okukola ekibi, osirikanga n'olowooza;" 
Proverbs30:33 kubanga okusunda amata nga bwe kuleeta omuzigo, n'okunyigiriza ennyindo nga bwe kugireeta omusaayi, bwe kutyo n'okusitula obusungu, bwe kuvaamu ennyombo." 
Proverbs31:1 Bino bye bigambo bya Lamweli Kabaka wa Massa, nnyina bye yamuyigiriza:" 
Proverbs31:2 ayi mwana wange gwe nneezaalira, omwana wange ow'obulenzi, omwana gwe nawongera Mukama!" 
Proverbs31:3 Amaanyi go, togamaliranga ku bakazi; bazikirizza ne bakabaka!" 
Proverbs31:4 Lamweli, wulira: tekigwanira bakabaka okunywanga omwenge, n'okululunkanira buli ekitamiiza." 
Proverbs31:5 Sikulwa nga bwe bagunywa, beerabira amateeka; era abanyigirizibwa, ne batabasalira mazima." 
Proverbs31:6 Omwenge nno guwenga ayagala okuzikirira, n'omuntu oyo alina ennyo obuyinike." 
Proverbs31:7 Oyo anywe, yeerabire obwavu bwe, era alemenga okujjukira ennaku ye." 
Proverbs31:8 Yogereranga abatalina bwogerero, olwanirirenga abataliiko mwasirizi." 
Proverbs31:9 Yogeranga, olwanirire obwenkanya, otaasenga eby'abaavu n'eby'abali mu bwetaavu." 
Proverbs31:10 Ani ayinza okuzuula omukazi ow'empisa ennungi? Omukazi oyo asinga wala amayinja ag'omuwendo ennyo. 
Proverbs31:11 Bba amwesiga, era amufunamu omugaso." 
Proverbs31:12 Omukazi oyo, mu bulamu bwe bwonna, ayisa bulungi bba, era tamutuusaako kabi." 
Proverbs31:13 Anoonya ebyoya by'endiga era ne ppamba, n'aluka engoye ng'asanyuka." 
Proverbs31:14 Ali ng'amaato g'abasuubuzi; emmere agiggya n'ebunaayira. 
Proverbs31:15 Azuukuka ku makya nga tebunnalaba, n'ategekera ab'omu maka ge ebyokulya, era n'alaga abakozi be abawala eby'okukola." 
Proverbs31:16 Alaba ekibanja n'akigula, n'akozesa ensimbi ze n'akisimbamu emizabbibu." 
Proverbs31:17 Anyiikira okukola n'amaanyi, ng'akozesa emikono gye." 
Proverbs31:18 Alaba omugaso gw'ebyo by'akola, n'alyoka akola n'ekiro ku ttaala." 
Proverbs31:19 Yeerangira ewuzi ze, yennyini n'aluka engoye ze." 
Proverbs31:20 Wa kisa mu kugabira abaavu, era ayamba abali mu bwetaavu." 
Proverbs31:21 Obudde ne bwe bunnyogoga, tabutya, kubanga ab'omu maka ge, abambaza ne babuguma." 
Proverbs31:22 Yeekolera engoye ennungi, ayambala ziri ennyirivu eza ppamba, awamu n'eza siliki." 
Proverbs31:23 Bba, amanyiddwa bulungi, bw'atuula ne banne abataka awaba embuga ku miryango." 
Proverbs31:24 Omukazi oyo atunga ebyambalo n'atunda. Akola n'enkoba, n'aziguza omusuubuzi azeetaaga." 
Proverbs31:25 Wa maanyi era waakitiibwa, atatya ebigenda okujja." 
Proverbs31:26 Ayogera bya magezi, era abuulirira na kisa." 
Proverbs31:27 Alabirira ab'omu maka ge, era tali ku bya bugayaavu." 
Proverbs31:28 Abaana be bagamba nti nnyaabwe wa mukisa. Ne bba amutendereza nti: 
Proverbs31:29 “Abakyala bangi abeegendereza, naye ggwe obasinga bonna!”" 
Proverbs31:30 Okuba n'amaaso agasikiriza, kulimbalimba, n'obubalagavu tebugasa; naye omukazi assaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, ye agwanira okutenderezebwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Oyo mumuwe ku by'akoleredde, era kituufu atenderezebwe, bonna we bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Bino bye bigambo by'Omubuulizi eyali mutabani wa Dawudi, era nga kabaka mu Yerusaalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Omubuulizi oyo agamba nti tewali kirimu makulu, ddala byonna temuli makulu." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Magoba ki omuntu g'afuna mu kutegana kwe kwonna kw'ateganira ku nsi? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Omulembe gugenda, omulembe omulala ne gujja, kyokka yo ensi ebeerawo ennaku zonna." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Enjuba evaayo, era n'egwa, ne yeeyuna okudda mu kifo kyayo gy'eva." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Empewo ekunta ng'edda ebukiikaddyo, n'ekyuka n'edda ebukiikakkono, ne yeetooloola ng'ekunta, n'edda gye yavudde." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Emigga gyonna gikulukuta giyiwa mu nnyanja, kyokka ennyanja tejjula. Emigga gye giyiwa amazzi gaagyo, era eyo gye gyongera okuyiwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebintu byonna bikooya, bireetera omuntu okwetamwa mu ngeri eteyogerekeka. Amaaso tegakkuta kulaba, n'amatu tegakkuta kuwulira." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ebyali bibaddewo bye binaddangamu okubaawo, era ebyali bikoleddwa bye binaddangamu okukolebwa. Tewali kintu kipya ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Waliwo ekintu kye bayinza okwogerako nti: “Laba kino kipya?” Tekiba kipya, kiba kyabaawo dda mu mirembe egy'edda, ffe nga tetunnabaawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Eby'edda tebijjukirwa, era n'ebyo ebirijja tebirijjukirwa abo abalibaawo nga byo bimaze okubaawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nze Omubuulizi nali kabaka wa Yisirayeli mu Yerusaalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nassaayo nnyo omwoyo, ne nkozesa amagezi gange okunoonyereza n'okwetegereza byonna ebikolebwa ku nsi, ne nzuula nga byonna gwe mulimu omuzibu era omukalubo, Katonda gwe yateerawo abantu." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Natunuulira emirimu gyonna egikolebwa ku nsi, ne ndaba nga gyonna gikooyeza bwereere, era okugikola, kuba nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ekikyamye tekiyinza kugololwa, n'ebitaliiwo tebiyinza kubalibwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nalowooza mu mutima gwange nti: “Nfuuse muntu waakitiibwa nnyo, era omugezi okusinga bonna abansooka okufuga mu Yerusaalemu. Ddala nfunye amagezi mangi era n'okutegeera.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nassaayo nnyo omwoyo okumanya ebifa ku magezi, n'okumanya ebifa ku ddalu n'obusiru, ne ndaba nga nabyo kuba nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Kubanga gy'okoma okuba n'amagezi amangi, gy'okoma n'okusoberwa, era gy'okoma okumanya ebingi gy'okoma n'okunyolwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nalowooza mu mutima gwange nti: “Kale nno ka ngezeeko ebinyumu, nneesanyuse.” Naye ne ndaba nga n'ekyo temuli makulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nagamba nti: “Okudda awo okusekereza, ddalu jjereere, n'amasanyu tegalina kalungi kagavaamu.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Era mu kunoonya amagezi, aganaaluŋŋamya omutima gwange, nalowooza ku ky'okwesanyusa nga nnywa omwenge, mmalirewo ebiseera byange, nga ndowooza nti oboolyawo ekyo abantu kye bagwanira okukola ku nsi ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwabwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Neekolera ebintu ebikulu: nazimba amayumba, nasimba ennimiro z'emizabbibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nalima ensuku n'ennimiro, ne nsimbamu emiti egy'ebibala ebya buli ngeri." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Nasima ebidiba by'amazzi okufukiriranga ekibira mwe gyasimbibwa. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nagula abaddu n'abazaana, era n'abamu baazaalirwa mu maka gange. Nalina amagana mangi ag'ente n'endiga n'embuzi okusinga bonna abansooka okubeera mu Yerusaalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Nakuŋŋaanya ffeeza ne zaabu n'ebyobugagga ebirala bingi okuva mu matwale ge nfuga, era neeteekerawo abasajja n'abakazi abaakolanga ogw'okunnyimbira ennyimba, era nalina byonna ebiyinza okusanyusa omuntu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nali waakitiibwa nnyo okusinga bonna abansooka okubeera mu Yerusaalemu, era nasigala nga ndi mugezi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Buli kintu kye neegombanga, nakyetuusangako. Siriiko ssanyu na limu lye nagaana kwewa. Nasanyukira byonna bye nakola, era ekyo ne kiba omugabo gwange olwa byonna bye nakola." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ebyo nga biwedde, natunuulira ebyo byonna bye nali nkoze, era n'okutegana kwange kwonna, ne ndaba nga byonna kwali kuteganira bwereere. Ddala kwali nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate. Ate ndaba nga ku nsi kuno tewali kintu na kimu kirina mugaso." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Bwe nava awo, ne ngeraageranya amagezi n'eddalu n'obusiru, kubanga kabaka talina kipya ky'ayinza kukola ekitaakolebwa dda bakabaka abaamusooka." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Awo ne ndaba ng'amagezi malungi okusinga obusiru, ng'ekitangaala bwe kiri ekirungi okusinga ekizikiza." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Omuntu omugezi alaba gy'agenda, naye omusiru atambulira mu kizikiza. Wabula era mmanyi ng'enkomerero yaabwe ye emu." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Olwo ne ndowooza mu mutima gwange nti: “Ekituuka ku musiru, nange kye kirintuukako. Kale nze nabeerera ki omugezi?” Kyennava ŋŋamba mu mutima gwange nti n'ekyo tekiriimu mugaso." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Omugezi tajjukirwa, era ng'omusiru bw'atajjukirwa mirembe gyonna, kubanga byonna ebiriwo kati biryerabirwa mu biseera ebigenda okujja, era buli muntu alifa, k'abe mugezi oba musiru." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ekyo kyankyayisa obulamu, kubanga byonna ebikolebwa ku nsi byantama. Byonna tebiriimu mugaso, era biri nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Awo ne nkyawa byonna bye nali nkoze ku nsi, kubanga ndi wa kubirekera oyo alinziririra." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Era ani amanyi oba ng'oyo aliba mugezi oba aliba musiru? Kyokka oyo ye alyefuga byonna bye nakola ku nsi, era bye nayolesezaamu amagezi gange. Era n'ekyo tekiriimu mugaso." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 N'olwekyo natuuka n'okwejjusa nti: “Natawaanira ki bwe ntyo ku nsi!” 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kubanga omuntu ayinza okukola emirimu n'amagezi n'obukugu era n'obwegendereza, kyokka byonna by'akoze n'abirekera muntu mulala atabiteganidde. Ekyo nakyo tekiriimu mugaso, era kibi nnyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kale omuntu afuna ki mu kufuba kwe n'okutegana kwe kw'ateganamu ku nsi? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kubanga ekiseera kyonna eky'obulamu bwe akimala mu buyinike bwereere, na mu kweraliikirira, n'atawummula emisana n'ekiro. N'ekyo nakyo tekiriimu mugaso." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ekisinga okugasa omuntu kwe kulya n'okunywa n'okwesanyusiza mu ebyo by'akoleredde. Era n'ekyo nalaba ng'okusobola okukikola, guba mukisa Katonda gw'awa omuntu." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Kubanga Katonda w'atali, ani ayinza okulya n'okusanyuka?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Katonda, abamusanyusa abawa amagezi n'okutegeera era n'essanyu, kyokka aboonoonyi abawa gwa kukuŋŋaanya na kutereka bugagga, babuwe abo abamusanyusa. Era n'ekyo tekiriimu mugaso, kiri nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Buli kintu ekibeerawo ku nsi, kiba n'obudde bwakyo, na buli ekikolebwa, kiba n'ekiseera kyakyo ekituufu." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ekiseera eky'okuzaalirwamu, n'ekiseera eky'okufiiramu; ekiseera eky'okusimbiramu n'ekiseera eky'okusimbuliramu" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 ekiseera eky'okuttiramu n'ekiseera eky'okuwonyezaamu; ekiseera eky'okumenyeramu, n'ekiseera eky'okuzimbiramu;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 ekiseera eky'okukaabiramu amaziga, n'ekiseera eky'okusekeramu; ekiseera eky'okukungubagiramu, n'ekiseera eky'okuziniramu;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 ekiseera eky'okusaasaanyizaamu amayinja, n'ekiseera eky'okukuŋŋaanyizaamu amayinja; ekiseera eky'okugwiramu mu kifuba, n'ekiseera eky'obutagwiramu mu kifuba;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 ekiseera eky'okuzuuliramu, n'ekiseera eky'okubulirwamu, ekiseera eky'okukuumiramu ekintu, n'ekiseera eky'okusuuliramu ekintu;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 ekiseera eky'okuyulizaamu, n'ekiseera eky'okutungiramu; ekiseera eky'okusirikiramu, n'ekiseera eky'okwogereramu;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 ekiseera eky'okwagaliramu, n'ekiseera eky'okukyayiramu; ekiseera eky'olutalo, n'ekiseera eky'emirembe." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Magoba ki omuntu g'afuna mu by'ateganira? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nalaba okutegana Katonda kwe yateerawo abantu okuteganangamu. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Yakola buli kintu, nga kigya bulungi mu kiseera kyakyo. Abantu yabateekamu omutima ogwagala okumanya ebyaliwo, n'ebiriwo, n'ebiribaawo, kyokka n'atabawa kumanya ye Katonda by'akola, okuva ku ntandikwa okutuuka ku nkomerero." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Mmamyi nga tewali kigasa muntu okusinga okusanyuka n'okukola ebirungi ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Era omuntu okulya n'okunywa n'okusanyukira mu birungi by'ateganidde, kiba kirabo kya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mmanyi nga buli kintu Katonda ky'akola, kibeerawo ennaku zonna, era tewali kiyinza kukyongerwako, wadde okukikendeezebwako. Katonda yakola bw'atyo, abantu balyoke bamussengamu ekitiibwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ebiriwo byali bibaddewo, era n'ebiribaawo byali bibaddewo edda. Katonda alagira ebyali bibaddewo ne biddamu okubaawo." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Era nalaba nga ku nsi awandibadde amazima n'obwenkanya, wabeerawo bikolwa bibi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ne ŋŋamba mu mutima gwange nti Katonda alisalira abalungi n'ababi omusango, kubanga buli kintu na buli kikolwa kiba n'ekiseera kyakyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ne ŋŋamba mu mutima gwange nti Katonda ageza abantu, alyoke abalage nti nabo bennyini bali ng'ebisolo," 
Ecclesiastes3:19 kubanga ekituuka ku bantu kye kimu ekyo era ekituuka ku bisolo. Ng'ensolo bw'efa, n'omuntu bw'atyo bw'afa, era omukka omuntu gw'assa, n'ensolo gw'essa, ne kiraga nti omuntu talina nkizo ku nsolo, era obulamu bw'omuntu n'obw'ensolo tebuliimu makulu." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Byombi, omuntu n'ensolo, bidda mu kifo kye kimu: mu nfuufu mwe byava. Byava mu nfuufu, era bigenda kudda mu nfuufu." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ani amanyi oba ng'omwoyo gw'omuntu gwambuka waggulu, ate nga ogw'ensolo gwo gukka wansi mu ttaka?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 N'olwekyo, neetegerezza ne ndaba ng'ekisinga obulungi, omuntu kwe kusanyukira mu ebyo by'akoze, kubanga eyo ye mpeera ye, kubanga ani alimukomyawo okulaba ebinaabangawo, ye ng'amaze okuvaawo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Bwe nava ku ebyo, ne ndowooza ku butali bwenkanya obuli mu nsi. Abanyigirizibwa bakaaba amaziga, ne batafuna abayamba. Tebafuna abayamba, kubanga abo ababanyigiriza be bali mu buyinza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ekyo kyandeetera okulowooza nti abafu abaafa edda, beesiimye okusinga abo abakyali abalamu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Naye eyeesiimye okusinga abo ab'emirundi egyo gyombi, ye oyo atabangawo, atalabanga bibi ebikolebwa ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Era nalowooza ku kikozesa abantu emirimu: bakola nnyo kubanga beegomba okufuna ebirungi ebiri ng'ebya bannaabwe, oba n'ebisingawo. Naye n'ekyo temuli makulu, era kiri nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Omusiru azinga emikono, ne yessa enjala." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Okufuna ebijjuza olubatu olumu ng'olina emirembe, kisinga okufuna ebijjuza embatu ebbiri ng'otegana, ng'oli ng'agoba empewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Awo ne nziramu okulowooza ku birala ebitaliimu mugaso ku nsi. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Wabaawo omuntu abeera yekka nga talina mwana wadde owooluganda, sso ng'akola obutaweera, era nga tamatira na bugagga bw'alina. Kale mba nteganira ani okwenkana awo, ne nemma okusanyukako? Kino nakyo tekiriimu makulu, era kwerumya bwerumya!" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Abantu ababiri basinga omuntu omu, kubanga bwe bakolera awamu, bayambagana." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Bwe bagwa, omu ayamba munne okuyimuka. Naye omuntu bw'aba yekka, n'agwa, ziba zimusanze, kubanga tewaba amuyamba kuyimuka." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Mu budde obw'empewo, ababiri bwe beebaka awamu mu buliri, babuguma; naye omu yekka ayinza atya okubuguma!" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Abantu ababiri basobola okulwanyisa omulabe eyandiwangudde omuntu omu ng'alwana yekka, n'omuguwa ogw'emiyondo esatu si mwangu kukutula." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omuvubuka omwavu naye nga mugezi, asinga kabaka omukadde atalina magezi era atakyayagala kubuulirirwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Omuntu ayinza okuzaalibwa mu nsi ye nga mwavu oba okuva mu kkomera, n'afuuka kabaka." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nalaba abantu bonna ku nsi nga bali wamu n'omuvubuka omulala eyadda mu bigere bya kabaka. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Kabaka ayinza okuba n'abantu abangi b'afuga, naye bw'akisa omukono, tewali ajjukira birungi bye yakola. Kino nakyo tekiriimu makulu, era kiri nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Weegenderezenga ng'oyingidde mu Ssinzizo. Okusembera okumpi n'owuliriza oyige, kisinga okumala gawaayo bitambiro ng'abatategeera bwe bakola, kubanga tebamanyi nga kye bakola kibi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ofuganga olulimi lwo, era toyanguyirizanga kubaako ky'oyogera mu maaso ga Katonda, kubanga Katonda ali mu ggulu, ggwe oli ku nsi. Kale ebigambo byo bibeerenga bitono," 
Ecclesiastes5:3 kubanga omuntu by'atawaanamu, by'aloota. N'omusiru amanyirwa ku bingi by'ayogera." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Bw'obangako kye weeyamye eri Katonda, oyanguwanga okukituukiriza, kubanga Katonda tasanyukira basiru. Tuukirizanga kye weeyamye okukola." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Waakiri oleme kweyama, okusinga lwe weeyama n'ototuukiriza." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Toganyanga kamwa ko kukukozesa kibi, oluvannyuma n'ogamba omubaka wa Katonda nti wayogedde togenderedde. Lwaki oyogera ebinaasunguwaza Katonda n'azikiriza bye wakolerera!" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Okulowooza ebingi ng'oli ng'aloota, kye kireetera omuntu okwogera ebitaliimu makulu. Naye ggwe otyanga Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Bw'olabanga abaavu nga banyigirizibwa, era nga tebakolerwa bya bwenkanya na mazima mu ggwanga, teweewuunyanga, kubanga omukungu atunuulirwa oyo amusinga, era n'oyo n'atunuulirwa abo abamusinga okuba n'obuyinza." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Okutwalira awamu, ettaka ligasa bonna, ne kabaka yennyini aganyulwa ebiva mu nnimiro." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Omuntu ayagala ensimbi tayinza kuzikkuta, era n'oyo ayagala obugagga, n'amagoba gaamu, taabikkutenga. Era n'ekyo tekiriimu makulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ebintu bwe byeyongera okwala, n'abo ababirya beeyongera okuba abangi. Kale bannyini byo bafunamu magoba ki, okuggyako okubirabako obulabi n'amaaso!" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Omuntu akola n'emikono gye, yeebaka otulo ne tumuwoomera, ne bw'aba talina byakulya bimumala; kyokka omugagga asula teyeebase, ng'alowooza." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Waliwo ekintu ekibi ennyo kye ndabye ekibeerawo mu nsi: bwe bugagga obuterekebwa nnyini bwo mu kwerumya okungi," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 kyokka obugagga obwo ne buzikirira olw'ebizibu ebitaalengererwawo, n'azaala omwana nga tewakyali ky'alinawo." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Nga bwe yava mu lubuto lwa nnyina ng'ali bwereere, bw'atyo bw'aliva ku nsi nga bwe yajja. Talibaako ky'ayinza kutwala ku bye yateganira byonna." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Mazima ekyo si kya bwenkanya. Omuntu agenda ngalo nsa nga bwe yajja. Ategana, kyokka ali ng'agoba empewo agikwate! Kale magoba ki g'afuna?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ennaku ze zonna, alya munyiikaavu, yeeraliikirira nnyo, aba mulwadde, era musunguwavu." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ekirungi kye nalaba omuntu ky'asaanidde okukola, kwe kulya n'okunywa era n'okusanyukira mu birungi byonna bye yateganira obulamu bwe bwonna, Katonda bwe yamuwa ku nsi, kubanga ogwo gwe mugabo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Buli muntu Katonda gw'awadde obugagga n'ebintu, n'amusobozesa okubiryako, n'akkiriza omugabo gwe, n'okusanyukira mu by'ateganidde, ekyo kirabo kya Katonda," 
Ecclesiastes5:20 kubanga omuntu oyo tajja kulowoozanga ku kiseera kya bulamu bwe, kubanga Katonda amukuuma nga musanyufu mu mutima gwe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Waliwo ekintu ekibi kye nalaba ku nsi, era ekikaluubirira abantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 kye ky'omuntu Katonda gw'awa obugagga, n'ebintu, n'ekitiibwa, ne watabaawo muntu oyo ky'ajula, kyokka Katonda n'atakkiriza muntu oyo kubyeyagaliramu, wabula omuntu omulala ow'ebweru n'abyeyagaliramu. Ekyo tekiriimu makulu, era kiruma nnyo." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Omuntu ayinza okuzaala abaana kikumi, era n'amala emyaka mingi ku nsi. Kyokka ne bw'awangaala atya, bw'aba tafunye ssanyu mu bulamu bwe, era nga taziikiddwa mu ngeri esaanidde, nze ŋŋamba nti omwana azaalibwa ng'afudde, asinga omuntu oyo." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Omwana oyo weewaawo talina ky'agasibwa okuzaalibwa. Azaalibwa ng'ali mu kizikiza, n'agenda ng'ali mu kizikiza." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Wabula newaakubadde aba talabye kitangaala, era nga takitegedde, aba awummudde okusinga oli," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 atasanyukidde mu birungi, wadde ng'awangadde emyaka enkumi bbiri. Ye n'ekirala, bombi tebagenda mu kifo kye kimu?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Omuntu mu mirimu gye gyonna, ateganira kufuna kyakulya, wabula okwegomba kwe tekumatira." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Omuntu ow'amagezi kiki ky'asingamu omusiru? N'omwavu kimugasa ki okuba omwegendereza? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Okumatira ne ky'olabako, kusinga okululunkanira bye weegomba obwegombi. Ekyo tekiriimu makulu, kiri nga kugoba mpewo ogikwate." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Buli kyali kibaddewo, kyatuumibwa dda erinnya. N'embeera y'abantu emanyiddwa: omuntu tayinza kuwakanya oyo amusinga amaanyi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ebyogerwa gye bikoma obungi, gye bikoma n'obutabaamu makulu, kale omuntu bimugasa ki?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ani amanyi ekisaanira omuntu mu bulamu bwe obumpi obutaliimu makulu, era obuyita obuyisi ng'ekisiikirize? Era ani ayinza okubuulira omuntu ebiribaawo ku nsi, omuntu oyo ng'amaze okugivaako?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Erinnya eddungi lisinga omuzigo ogw'akawoowo, n'olunaku omuntu lw'afiirako, lulungi okusinga lw'azaalibwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Okuyingira mu nnyumba mwe bakungubagira afudde, kisinga okuyingira mu nnyumba mwe bagabulira obugenyi, kubanga okufa ye nkomerero ya bonna, era kirungi abalamu okugirowoozangako." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Okulaba ennaku kugasa okusinga okusanyuka, kubanga ennaku ebangula omutima gw'omuntu." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Omuntu omugezi afuna ekiseera okulowooza ku nnaku ye, naye omusiru yeemalira mu binyumu." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Okunenyezebwa abagezi kusinga okutendebwa abasiru," 
Ecclesiastes7:6 kubanga enku ez'amaggwa nga bwe zitulikira mu kyoto wansi w'entamu, n'okuseka kw'omusiru bwe kutyo bwe kuba: tekubaamu makulu." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Okunyigiriza abantu, omugezi kumufuula musiru, n'enguzi emalamu omuntu okutegeera." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ekintu ekiwedde obulungi, kisinga ekitandika obutandisi, n'omugumiikiriza asinga omwekuza." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Toyanguwanga kusunguwala, kubanga omusiru ye abeera n'obusungu." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Tobuuzanga nti: “Lwaki ebiseera ebyayita byali birungi okusinga bino ebiriwo kati?” Ekyo si kibuuzo kya magezi. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Amagezi malungi ng'okusikira ebintu, era abalamu bonna gabagasa," 
Ecclesiastes7:12 kubanga amagezi kigo ekikuuma omuntu ng'ensimbi bwe zimukuuma. Naye okumanya kyekuva kusinga omugaso, kubanga amagezi gakuuma obulamu bwa nnyini go." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Lowooza ku ebyo Katonda bye yakola. Ani ayinza okugolola ekyo ye kye yaweta? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ebintu lwe bigenze obulungi, sanyuka; ate lwe bigenze obubi, manya nga Katonda ye ataddewo ebyo byombi, abantu baleme kutegeera bigenda kubaawo." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Bino byombi mbirabidde mu bulamu bwange obutaliimu makulu: abantu abalungi bafa mangu, ate ababi ne bawangaala." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 N'olwekyo toyitirizanga kuba mulungi, wadde omugezi. Kale oba wettira ki?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Wabula era toyitirizanga kuba mubi wadde omusiru, oleme kufa ng'ekiseera kyo tekinnatuuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kirungi weefugenga mu ebyo byombi, kubanga oyo atya Katonda, talema kubyewala." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Alina amagezi, gamufuula wa maanyi okusinga abafuzi kkumi abali mu kibuga." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Mazima tewali muntu mutuukirivu ku nsi akola ebirungi ebyereere, n'atayonoona." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Tossangayo mwoyo ku buli kimu abantu kye boogera, sikulwa ng'owulira n'omuddu wo ng'akwekokkola," 
Ecclesiastes7:22 kubanga omanyi bulungi nga naawe emirundi mingi weekokkola abalala. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ebyo byonna nabigezesa nga nkozesa amagezi gange, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Mmaliridde okuba omugezi.” Naye amagezi ne sigatuukako." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Buli ekiriwo, kisukkiridde amagezi gaffe. Tetuyinza kukitegeerera ddala kukimalayo. Ani ayinza okukinoonyerezaako, n'akikomekkereza?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nneemalira ku kunoonya, n'okwekkaanya, n'okumanya amagezi, n'okutegeera ebintu nga bwe biri, era n'okumanya ng'okuba omubi kya busiru, era ng'obusiru ddalu." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Era nalaba ekikakali okusinga olumbe kattira: ye mukazi. Okwagala kw'akulaga, kukukwata ng'omutego oba ng'ekitimba. Emikono gye gy'akuwambaatiza, gikusiba ng'enjegere. Oyo akola ebyo Katonda by'asiima, ye aliwona omukazi, kyokka oyo atali mwegendereza, aliwambibwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Omubuulizi agamba nti: “Ekyo nakituukako nga nkubaganya nzekka ebirowoozo, okuzuula ekituufu.”" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Kye nayagala okumanya, naye nga sinnakizuula kye kino: mu bantu olukumi, nalabamu omusajja omu asaanira, naye mu abo bonna, omukazi simulabangamu." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Wabula kino kyokka kye nalaba: Katonda yatonda abantu nga batereevu, naye bo ne beegunjirawo obukyamu obwa buli ngeri." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ani yenkana omugezi? Oba ani amanyi okunnyonnyola amakulu g'ebintu? Amagezi ganyiriza entunula y'omuntu, n'obunyiikaavu bwe bwonna ne buggwaawo." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nze ŋŋamba nti gonderanga ekiragiro kya kabaka, kubanga bw'otyo bwe walayirira Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Toyanguyirizanga kweggya ku kabaka, era tobeeranga ku ludda lwa bamuwakanya, kubanga kabaka ayinza okukola buli ky'ayagala." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kabaka ky'alagira, tekiddibwamu, era tewali ayinza kumubuuza nti: “Lwaki olagidde bw'otyo?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Abagondera ekiragiro kye, tebatuukibwako kabi, era omuntu omugezi, amanya obudde obutuufu, n'engeri esaanira okukituukiririzaamu." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kubanga buli kintu kiba n'ekiseera kyakyo ekituufu okukikoleramu, newaakubadde ng'omuntu aba n'obuzibu bungi," 
Ecclesiastes8:7 kubanga tamanya bigenda kubaawo, era tewali ayinza kumutegeeza we biribeererawo." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Tewali muntu alina buyinza kwesigaliza bulamu bwe, era tewali alina buyinza kusalawo lunaku lw'alifiirako. Ng'olutalo bwe lutaganya muntu kuluvaamu, n'ekibi bwe kityo tekita oyo akyewadde." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ebyo byonna nabiraba nga ndowoolereza ku byonna abantu bye bakola ku nsi, nga ndaba abantu bwe bafugisa bannaabwe obukambwe ne babalumya." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 N'ekirala, abantu ababi, kyokka abaagendanga emirundi emingi mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, nalaba nga baziikibwa mu kitiibwa era nga tebajjukirwa nti baali babi mu kibuga kyennyini mwe baakoleranga eby'effujjo. Kale n'ekyo tekiriimu makulu." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ekibonerezo ekisalirwa akoze ekikolwa ekibi bwe kitaweebwa mangu, abantu beeyongerera ddala okukola ebibi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Omwonoonyi newaakubadde akola ebibi emirundi kikumi n'awangaala nnyo, kyokka era mazima mmanyi ng'abatya Katonda, abamussaamu ekitiibwa, be banaabeeranga obulungi." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Naye omubi taabenga bulungi, era obulamu bwe, bunaayitanga mangu nga kisiikirize." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Waliwo era ekirala ekitaliimu makulu ekibaawo ku nsi: abantu abalungi okuweebwa ekibonerezo ekyandiweereddwa abakoze ebibi, n'abantu ababi okuweebwa empeera eyandiweereddwa abakoze ebirungi. Ekyo nakyo ŋŋamba nti tekiriimu makulu." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 N'olwekyo nsemba okwesanyusa, kubanga omuntu talina kirungi kirala ku nsi, okuggyako okulya, n'okunywa, n'okusanyuka, kubanga eryo, lye ssanyu ly'alibeera nalyo mu kutegana kwe, ekiseera kyonna eky'obulamu bwe, Katonda bw'amuwa ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Bwe nafuba ennyo okufuna amagezi, n'okumanya emirimu gyonna egikolebwa ku nsi, nalaba ng'omuntu ayinza okumalako olunaku n'ekiro kyonna nga teyeebase," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 n'atasobola kutegeera ebyo byonna Katonda by'akola. Ne bw'ategana atya okunoonyereza, tayinza kubizuula. Abantu abagezi bayinza okugamba nti babimanyi, naye mu mazima tebabimanyi." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ebyo byonna nabirowooza ne mbyetegereza, ne ndaba nga Katonda ye afuga abantu abalungi n'abagezi era ne bye bakola, kyokka nga tebayinza kusinziira ku bibatuukako kumanya ng'abaagala, oba nga tabaagala." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ebituuka ku bantu bonna bye bimu awatali kusosolamu: bituuka ku beegendereza ne ku boonoonyi, ku balungi, ku abo abafaayo okwenenya ebibi byabwe, ne ku abo abatafaayo kubyenenya, ku bawaayo ebitambiro ne ku batawaayo bitambiro. Omuntu omulungi n'atali mulungi, oyo alayira n'oyo atya okulayira, bonna baba kye kimu." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ekibi ekiri mu byonna ebikolebwa ku nsi, kwe kuba nti ekintu kye kimu ekituuka ku bonna kyenkanyi. Era emitima gy'abantu bonna abalamu gijjudde ebibi n'eddalu, n'ekiddirira kufa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Naye buli akyali omulamu, aba n'essuubi, kubanga n'embwa ennamu esinga empologoma enfu." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Weewaawo abalamu bamanyi nga balifa, naye bo abafu tebaliiko na kye bamanyi. Baba tebakyalinayo na mpeera, kubanga baba tebakyajjukirwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Okwagala kwabwe, n'okukyawa kwabwe, n'okwegomba kwabwe, biba olwo tebikyaliwo, era baba tebakyaddayo kwetaba mu kintu na kimu ekikolebwa ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Genda olye emmere yo ng'osanyuka, onywe omwenge gwo ng'ojaguza, kubanga Katonda amaze okusiima by'okola." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ebyambalo byo bibenga biyonjo bulijjo, era tolemanga kwesiiga kazigo mu maaso n'onyirira." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Omukazi gw'oyagala sanyukanga naye ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwo obutaliimu makulu, Katonda bw'akuwadde ku nsi, kubanga ogwo gwe mugabo mu bulamu bwo, ne mu kutegana kwo kwoteganamu ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Buli mulimu gw'okola, gukole n'amaanyi go gonna, kubanga emagombe gy'ogenda, tewaliba kukola, wadde okulowooza, tewaliba kumanya, wadde amagezi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Era neetegereza ne ndaba nga ku nsi kuno, abawenyuka ennyo emisinde, si be bawangula empaka z'okudduka; ab'amaanyi, si be bawangula olutalo; n'abagezi si be bafuna ebibayimirizaawo; n'abategeevu, si be bafuna obugagga; era n'abalina obumanyirivu, si be bafuna emirimu egya waggulu. Naye omukisa n'ebiseera ebigwawo, bonna bibagwako bugwi," 
Ecclesiastes9:12 kubanga omuntu tamanya kiseera kye we kituukira. Ng'ebyennyanja bwe bikwatibwa mu katimba, era ng'ebinyonyi bwe bikwatibwa mu mutego, n'abantu bwe bakwatibwa bwe batyo mu kiseera ekibi nga tebakirindiridde." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Era n'ekyokulabirako kino kye nafuna ku nsi, ekyogera ku magezi, nalaba nga kikulu." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Waaliwo ekibuga ekitono, era n'abatuuze baamu nga si bangi, kabaka ow'amaanyi n'akirumba. N'akizingiza, n'ategekawo ebinaamenya ebisenge byakyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Mu kibuga ekyo, mwalimu omusajja omwavu, naye nga mugezi. N'akozesa amagezi ge n'awonya ekibuga ekyo, kyokka ne wataba ajjukira musajja oyo omwavu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kale ne ŋŋamba nti weewaawo amagezi gagasa okusinga amaanyi, naye amagezi g'omwavu ganyoomebwa, n'ebigambo bye tewaba abiwuliriza." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ebigambo abagezi bye boogera ekimpoowooze, biwulirizibwa okusinga eby'omufuzi w'abasiru aleekaana." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Mu lutalo, amagezi gagasa okusinga ebyokulwanyisa, naye n'omuntu omu bw'ati bw'akola ensobi, azikiriza ebirungi bingi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ebyakawoowo ebitegekeddwa omutabuzi waabyo, bwe bibaamu ensowera enfu, zibiwunyisa ekivundu. N'eky'obusiru ekitonotono, kimalawo amagezi amangi era n'ekitiibwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Omugezi akola bituufu, naye omusiru akola bikyamu." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Omusiru ne bw'aba atambula mu kkubo, teyeegendereza; era alaga abantu bw'ali omusiru." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Oyo akufuga bw'akusunguwaliranga, tolekuliranga kifo kyo, kubanga okumenyeka kusonyiyisa n'ensobi ennene." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Waliwo ekibi kye ndaba ku nsi, ye nsobi abafuzi gye bakola:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 abantu abasiru baweebwa ebifo eby'obuvunaanyizibwa obunene, abagagga ne baweebwa ebifo ebya wansi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nalaba abaddu nga beebagadde embalaasi, ng'abakungu be batambuza ebigere ng'abaddu." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Asima obunnya ayinza okubugwamu, n'oyo awaguza ekisenge, ayinza okubojjebwa omusota." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Asimula amayinja, gayinza okumusala, n'oyo ayasa enku ziyinza okumutuusaako akabi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ekyuma bwe kiggwaako obwogi n'otokiwagala, kikuwaliriza okwongeramu amaanyi ng'okikozesa, naye amagezi gasobozesa omuntu okuwangula." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Omusota bwe gumala okubojja, oyo aloga emisota ne gitabojja, aba takyagasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ebigambo omugezi by'ayogera, bimuweesa ekitiibwa, naye omusiru by'ayogera bimuzikiriza." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Mu kusooka, ebigambo bye biba bya busiru, ku nkomerero ne biba bya ddalu ery'akabi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Omusiru ayogera nga tasalako. Tewali amanyi bigenda kubaawo, era tewali ayinza kututegeeza biribaawo nga tumaze okufa." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Omusiru by'akola bimukooya nnyo, n'atasobola na kumanya kkubo mw'ayinza kuyita okuyingira mu kibuga." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ensi ziba zigisanze, omufuzi waayo bw'aba nga mwana muto, ate n'abakungu baayo nga bakeera bukeezi mu binyumu." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ensi eyo erina omukisa, omufuzi waayo bw'aba omukulembeze omulungi, era ng'abakungu baayo bakola ebinyumu mu kiseera kyabyo ekituufu, era nga babikola lwa kwewummuzaamu bafune amaanyi, sso si lwa ttamiiro." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Omugayaavu olw'obutayagala kukola, ennyumba ye etonnya n'ebotokera ddala n'akasolya." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ebijjulo bikolebwa lwa kwesanyusa, n'omwenge gusanyusa obulamu, naye ekifuga byonna ze ssente." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Toyogeranga bubi ku mufuzi newaakubadde mu kyama, era toyogeranga bubi ku mugagga, wadde ng'oli mu kisenge ky'osulamu, sikulwa ng'ebinyonyi ebibuuka n'ebiwaawaatiro mu bbanga, bitwala eddoboozi lyo, ne byasanguza ky'oyogedde." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Beeranga mugabi, osuulenga emmere yo ku mazzi, nga wayise ekiseera, erikuddizibwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ku bintu byo gabirangako abantu bangi, nga musanvu oba munaana, kubanga tomanyi kabi kayinza kukutuukako ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ebire bwe bikwata ne bifuuka amatondo g'amazzi, ng'olwo enkuba etonnya ku nsi. N'omuti bwe gugwa okwolekera ebukiikaddyo oba ebukiikakkono, mu kifo we gugwa, mwe gubeera." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Alinda embuyaga n'embeera y'obudde bimale kutereera, talisiga, era talibaako ky'akungula." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nga bw'otoyinza kumanya kkubo mpewo ly'eyitamu, wadde okumanya amagumba bwe gakulira mu nda y'omukazi ali olubuto, era bw'otyo bw'otoyinza kumanya ebyo byonna Katonda by'akola." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Siganga ensigo zo ku makya, era nga n'olweggulo toddirira, kubanga tomanyi oba z'osize ku makya, oba z'osize olweggulo ze ziriba n'omukisa, oba ng'ez'emirundi gyombi ziryenkana okuba ennungi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ekitangaala kirungi, era omuntu okulaba enjuba asanyuka." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Omuntu bw'awangaala emyaka emingi, asaanye agisanyukirengamu gyonna, wabula ajjukire nti ennaku ez'ekizikiza ky'alibeeramu ng'afudde, ziriba nnyingi. Byonna ebijja temuli makulu." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Kale omuvubuka, sanyukiranga mu buvubuka bwo, weeyagalenga ng'okyali muvubuka. Kolanga byonna by'oyagala okukola, era weetuusengako ebyo byonna omutima gwo bye gwegomba. Kyokka tegeera nga Katonda alikusalira omusango olw'ebyo byonna." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Kale weggyengako ebikweraliikiriza mu mwoyo, n'ebikuleetera obulumi mu mubiri, kubanga obuto n'obuvubuka buyita luwunguko." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kale jjukiranga Omutonzi wo ng'okyali muvubuka, ennaku enzibu nga tezinnatuuka, n'emyaka nga teginnatuuka mw'oligambira nti: “Sikyanyumirwa bulamu.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirimala okutuuka, olwo oliraba enjuba, n'ekitangaala, n'omwezi, n'emmunyeenye, nga bizimedde, ebire ne bikomawo enkuba ng'ekedde." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Emikono gyo egibadde gikutaasa, girikankana. Amagulu go kati ag'amaanyi, galinafuwa. Amannyo olisigazaamu matono, nga tokyasobola na kugaaya mmere, n'amaaso go galiba tegakyasobola kulaba bulungi." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Amatu go, galiba tegakyasobola kuwulira abaleekaanira mu nguudo, wadde okuwulira okusa kw'olubengo era n'amaloboozi g'abantu abayimba, wabula n'akanyonyi akayimba, kalikuzuukusa mu tulo." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Olitandika okutya okulinnya obusozi, era onookaluubirirwanga okutambula. Ng'omutwe gwo gumaze okutukula envi, onoowuliranga nga n'amagulu gakuzitoowerera okusitula, owalula mawalule, era oliba tokyaliko kye weegomba kulya. Olwo omuntu ng'agenda mu kiwummulo kye eky'olubeerera, era n'amakubo nga galeeta abakungubazi!" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Omuguwa ogwa ffeeza guliba gukutuse, n'ettaala eya zaabu eriba egudde n'eyatika. Era n'omuguwa ogusibwako ensuwa esena mu luzzi guliba gukutuse, n'ensuwa ng'eyatiseyatise." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Olwo omubiri gulidda mu ttaka mwe gwava, n'omwoyo ne gudda ewa Katonda eyagugaba." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Omubuulizi agamba nti: “Tewali kirimu makulu, ddala byonna temuli makulu!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Kyokka omubuulizi nga bwe yali mugezi, yeeyongera okuyigirizanga abantu ebyo bye yali amanyi. Yawulirizanga nnyo nga boogera engero, n'azeetegereza, n'atereeza nnyingi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Yagezaako okuwandiika ebigambo ebinyuma, kyokka nga bituufu era nga bya mazima." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ebigambo by'abagezi, biri ng'omuggo omusongovu omusumba gw'agobesa ensolo ze. Ebigambo ebyo, omusumba abigaba ali omu, era bwe bikuŋŋaanyizibwa awamu, biba ng'emisumaali egikomereddwa obulungi." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwana wange waliwo n'ekirala ky'osaanidde okulabukamu: okuwandiika ebitabo tekukoma, naye okusoma okusukkiridde kukooya omubiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ebigambo byange bikomye awo, era byonna obiwulidde. Ossangamu Katonda ekitiibwa, era ogonderanga ebiragiro bye. Ekyo buli muntu ky'ateekwa okukola," 
Ecclesiastes12:14 kubanga Katonda alisala omusango ogwa buli kintu kye tukola, omuli na buli ekikolebwa mu nkiso, ka kibe kirungi oba kibi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Oluyimba Ssennyimba, lwe luyimba lwa Solomooni." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Emimwa gyo ginnywegere, kubanga okwagala kwo kusinga omwenge okuwooma." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Omuzigo gwe weesiize guwunya kawoowo keereere. Erinnya lyo liri ng'omuzigo omusaanuuse. Abawala abatannafumbirwa kyebava bakwegomba. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ntwala gy'olaga tudduke tweggyewo. Ayi Ssaabasajja, nfuula owuwo, onnyingize mu kisenge kyo, tusanyukire wamu naawe, okwagala kwo tukutendereze okusinga omwenge. Abakwegomba baba batuufu." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Abawala b'e Yerusaalemu, ngubye langi, naye ndi mulungi ng'eweema z'omu ddungu ly'e Kedari, ng'entimbe z'omu lubiri lwa Solomooni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Temunziimuula olw'okuguba langi, kubanga okwokebwa omusana kwe kundeetedde ekyo. Bannyinaze bansunguwalira ne banteeka ku gw'okulabirira ennimiro y'emizabbibu, kale olususu lwange ne sirulabirira." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ayi muganzi wange, mbuulira gy'olundira eggana lyo, gy'oliwummuliza mu ttuntu, nneme kukunoonyezanga eri banno gye balundira." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ayi Nnalulungi mu bakazi bonna, oba nga tomanyi gye nnundira, fuluma ogoberere ekisinde ky'eggana, olundire embuzi zo okumpi n'eweema z'abasumba." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ayi muganzi wange, osikiriza abasajja ng'embalaasi enkazi bwe zisikiriza ensajja ezisika ebigaali ebya kabaka wa Misiri." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Amatama go ganyiridde n'emivumbo gy'enviiri ennange. Obulago bwo buwundiddwa n'ebyobuyonjo ebiteŋŋeenya. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tujja kukukolera emivumbo egya zaabu, egitimbiddwamu ne ffeeza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kabaka bwe yali agalamidde ku katanda ke, omuzigo gwange ogw'omugavu ne guwunya akawoowo kaagwo." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Muganzi wange ali ng'akawoowo ke ntadde wakati w'amabeere gange. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Muganzi wange ali ng'ekisaaganda eky'ebimuli eby'omu ttale, ebimulisa mu nnimiro ez'emizabbibu mu Engedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Laba, oli mulungi ggwe gwe njagala! Amaaso go malungi ng'enjiibwa!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ddala oli mulungi. Ayi muganzi wange, osanyusa! Ekitanda kyaffe kinaaba kya muddo." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Emivule gye ginaabeera empagi z'enju yaffe, ng'emirabba gya nkanaga." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Nze ndi kimuli kya mu ttale eky'omu kiwonvu ky'e Saroni, ndi ddanga ery'omu biwonvu." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Muganzi wange, mu bakazi ali ng'eddanga mu maggwa." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ng'omucungwa mu miti egy'omu kibira, ne muganzi wange bw'ali mu balenzi. Nnyumirwa okutuula mu kisiikirize kyagwo, n'ebibala byagwo bimpoomera." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yannyingiza mu ddiiro lye omuliirwa obubaga. Okwagala ye bbendera gye yampuubira. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mumpe ndye ku mizabbibu emikalu, munkamulire ku micungwa nnyweko, kubanga okwagala kunzita kummalawo!" 
SongOfSongs2:6 Omukono gwe ogwa kkono guli wansi w'omutwe gwange; n'omukono gwe ogwa ddyo gumpambaatidde. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Mmwe abawala b'e Yerusaalemu, mbalayiza empeewo n'enjaza ez'omu ttale: temugolokosanga wadde okuzuukusa okwagala, ng'ekiseera kyakwo ekituufu tekinnatuuka." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Mpulira eddoboozi lya muganzi wange! Laba, ajja abuukirabuukira ku nsozi, ajja azinira ku busozi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Muganzi wange ali ng'empeewo, oba ng'ennangaazi ento. Laba, ayimiridde kumpi n'olukomera lwaffe, alingiza mu ddirisa, atunuulira mu kamooli." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Muganzi wange aŋŋamba nti: “Jjangu ggwe omulungi gwe njagala, situka omwagalwa tugende wamu," 
SongOfSongs2:11 kubanga ebiseera by'obutiti biibino byeggyeewo, n'enkuba eyise egenze;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 era n'ebimuli kati wonna byanyizza. Buno bwe budde ebinyonyi mwe biyimbira, era n'amayiba gawulirwa nga gayimbira mu nsi yaffe." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Emitiini gitandise okubala. Empewo ejjudde akaloosa k'emizabbibu egimulisizza. Jjangu ggwe omulungi gwe njagala, situka tugende wamu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Oli ng'ejjiba eryekwese mu njatika z'omu jjinja, mu kifo ekyekusifu eky'omu lwazi olugulumivu. Leka ndabe amaaso go, leka mpulire eddoboozi lyo kubanga ddungi, n'amaaso go gasanyusa." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutukwatire ebibe ebito era n'ebikulu, ebyonoona emizabbibu gyaffe egimulisizza." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Muganzi wange, ye wange, nange nze wuwe. Aliisiza amagana ge mu malanga," 
SongOfSongs2:17 okutuusa obudde lwe bunaakya, ne waggweerawo ddala enzikiza. Muganzi wange, kyusa odde ng'empeewo, oba ng'ennangaazi ento ku nsozi ez'e Beteli." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ekiro ku kitanda kyange naloota oyo gwe njagala, nga mmunoonya ne simuzuula." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Namalirira nsituke ŋŋende ntambule ekibuga, mu nguudo zaakyo ne mu mpya, mmunoonyeeyo gwe njagala. Namunoonya n'ambulayo." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abakuumi abalawuna ekibuga, bandaba. Olwo ne mbuuza nti: “Mulabye ku mwagalwa wange?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Nali naakabayitako bwe nti, gwe njagala ne mmulaba. Ne mmunyweza ne simuta, okutuusa lwe namuleeta mu nnyumba ya mmange, mu kisenge ky'oyo anzaala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Mmwe abawala b'e Yerusaalemu, mbalayiza empeewo n'enjaza ez'omu ttale: temugolokosanga, wadde okuzuukusa okwagala, ng'ekiseera kyakwo ekituufu tekinnatuuka." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Oyo ani ayambuka okuva mu ddungu, ng'ali ng'empagi ey'omukka, ng'asiigiddwa ebyakawoowo ebya mirra n'omugavu, n'ebyakawoowo byonna ebyo omusuubuzi by'atunda?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Solomooni ye avaayo ng'asituddwa ku ntebe ye, eyeebunguluddwa abakuumi be nkaaga ab'omu batabaazi ba Yisirayeli abasingayo obuzira." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Bonna bakwasi ba bitala abamanyirivu mu kulwana. Buli omu yeesibye ekitala nga mwetegefu okulwana, bwe balumbibwa mu kiro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kabaka Solomooni yeekolera entebe ye ey'emiti egy'e Lebanooni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Ebikondo byayo yakola bya ffeeza, ekyesigamibwako kya zaabu, ekituulibwako kya lugoye lwa kakobe olulukiddwa n'obukugu abakazi b'e Yerusaalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Abawala b'omu Siyooni, mujje mulabe Kabaka Solomooni. Alina engule ku mutwe nnyina gy'amutikidde ku lunaku lw'embaga ye, olunaku lw'afuniddeko essanyu lye." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ng'oli mulungi, muganzi wange! Ddala oli mulungi! Mu katimba, ke weebisseeko, amaaso go gali ng'enjiibwa. Enviiri zo zinyereketa ng'eggana ly'embuzi nga likkirira olusozi Gileyaadi!" 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amannyo go meeru: gatukula ng'eggana ly'endiga ezaakasalibwako ebyoya, ezambuka nga ziva okunaazibwa. Tezitambula kinneemu: buli emu eba ne ginnaayo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Emimwa gyo giri ng'ewuzi emmyufu, n'ebigambo byo biwoomerevu. Amatama go mu katimba k'ogabisseeko, galabika bulungi ng'ekkomamawanga erisaliddwamu awabiri." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Obulago bwo buli g'omunaala gwa Dawudi, ogwazimbibwa baterekemu ebyokulwanyisa. Nabwo butimbiddwamu akakuufu akali ng'engabo olukumi ez'abatabaazi abazira, ezitimbiddwa mu munaala guli." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabeere go gombi, gali ng'empeewo ento ebbiri ennongo eziriira mu malanga." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Nja kugenda mbeere ku lusozi okuli akawoowo akayitibwa mirra, ne ku kasozi okuli akawoowo k'obubaane, okutuusa empewo z'oku makya lwe zinaafuuwa, n'enzikiza lw'eneggwaawo." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ng'oli mulungi wenna, muganzi wange! Nga toliiko kamogo!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mugole wange vvaayo ku nsozi z'e Lebanooni, ojje tugende ffembi. Wanukayo ku ntikko z'olusozi Amaani, ku Lusozi Seneri, ne ku Lusozi Herumooni, awabeera empologoma n'engo." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Eriiso ly'ontunuuliza, ayi muganzi wange era mugole wange, n'omukuufu gwo mu bulago, bibbye omutima gwange!" 
SongOfSongs4:10 Okwagala kwo nga kulungi, ayi muganzi wange era mugole wange! Okwagala kwo kusinga nnyo omwenge. Ebyobuwoowo byo bye biwunya obulungi okusinga ebyobuwoowo ebirala byonna." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Emimwa gyo, ayi muganzi wange, giwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki. Olulimi lwo luliko amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki. Ebyambalo byo birina akawoowo konna aka Lebanooni!" 
SongOfSongs4:12 Muganzi wange era mugole wange, ye nnimiro eriko enkomera; ye nnimiro eyeetooloddwa ekisenge, era lwe luzzi olusenebwako nze nzekka." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Wagisimbamu mikomamawanga egy'ebibala ebirungi ennyo. Erimu amazzi n'emiti egy'omugavu 
SongOfSongs4:14 n'ebyobuwoowo ebiyitibwa saffurooni, kulamu, ne cinnammoni, n'obubaane obwa buli ngeri. Mirra ne alowe bisangibwa omwo, n'ebyobuwoowo byonna ebisinga okuwunya obulungi." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ensulo z'amazzi amalungi, n'emigga egikulukuta okuva mu Lebanooni, bye bifukirira ennimiro eyo." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Zuukuka ggwe embuyaga ey'ebukiikakkono, naawe ggwe embuyaga ey'ebukiikaddyo, mukuntire mu nnimiro yange, akawoowo k'ebigirimu kasaasaanire wonna. Muganzi wange ajje mu nnimiro ye, alye ku bibala byayo ebirungi ennyo." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ayi muganzi wange era mugole wange, nzize mu nnimiro yange. Nnoze mirra n'ebyakawoowo byange, ndidde ku mubisi gw'enjuki, ne ku bisasala byazo. Nnywedde omwenge gwange, n'amata gange. Mulye, mmwe abaagalana, munywe; munywe mukkute omukwano!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nali neebase, sso nga ntunula, ne mpulira muganzi wange ng'akonkona ku luggi, ng'agamba nti: “Nziguliraawo, muganzi wange, kabiite, omulungi wange, ataliiko kamogo! Omutwe gwange gutobye omusulo, enviiri zange zijjudde ssuulwe.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Nga nneeyambudde dda nze! Nziremu ate nnyambale? Nanaabye dda ebigere! Nziremu ate mbiddugaze? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Muganzi wange n'ayisa omukono mu kituli mu luggi, nzenna ne mbugaana essanyu, kubanga ali awo." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ne ngolokoka okumuggulirawo, ebibatu byange n'engalo zange nga bitobye omuzigo ogw'akawoowo oguyitibwa mirra, ne gukulukutira ku kisiba oluggi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ne nzigulirawo muganzi wange, kyokka nga yabuzeewo dda! Ne njagala mpulire bw'ayogera, ne mmunoonya, nga sikyamulaba! Ne mmuyita, nga tanziramu." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abakuumi ne bansanga nga balawuna ekibuga, ne bankuba, ne banteekako ebiwundu. Abakuumi b'ekibuga abo, ne bannyagako omunagiro gwange!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Mbalayiza mmwe abawala b'omu Yerusaalemu, bwe mulaba muganzi wange, mumugamba nti okwagala nze kunzita, kummalawo!" 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ggwe nnalulungi, mu bakazi bonna, kiki ekyawula muganzi wo ku bantu abalala? Kiki ky'alina ekyenjawulo olyoke otulayize bw'otyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Muganzi wange mulungi era wa maanyi. Ali omu yekka mu bantu omutwalo! 
SongOfSongs5:11 Omutwe gwe guli nga zaabu omulungi ennyo nnyini. Enviiri ze za mayengo, nzirugavu nga nnamuŋŋoona." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaaso ge gali ng'enjiibwa eziri ku mabbali g'obugga obukulukuta amazzi, nga ziri ng'ezinaaziddwa mu mata, ziri awo ziwummudde." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Amatama ge gali ng'ennimiro omuli ebimera ebyobuwoowo, n'ebirungo by'enva ebyakaloosa. Emimwa gye giri ng'amalanga agatonnyolokokako eky'akawoowo ekiyitibwa mirra." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Emikono gye giri ng'empeta eza zaabu eziwundiddwamu amayinja ga berulo. Omubiri gwe guli ng'ogwakolebwa mu ssanga eriwundiddwamu amayinja ga safiro. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amagulu ge gali ng'empagi ez'amayinja amayooyoote, ezisimbiddwa mu binnya ebya zaabu omulungi ennyo. Waakitiibwa ng'ensozi z'e Lebanooni, okuli emivule emiwagguufu." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Emboozi ye mpoomerevu, na buli ekimuliko kinsanyusa. Mmwe abawala b'e Yerusaalemu, bw'atyo bw'ali muganzi wange, ye wuuyo mukwano gwange." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Ggwe nnalulungi mu bakazi bonna, muganzi wo alaze wa? Kkubo ki ly'akutte, tumunoonyeze wamu naawe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Muganzi wange aserengese mu nnimiro ye, omuli ebimera ebyakawoowo, okulundira eyo eggana lye n'okunogayo ku malanga." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Muganzi wange, ye wange, nange nze wuwe. Alundira eggana lye mu malanga." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Oli mulungi, ayi muganzi wange, ng'Ekibuga Tiruza; onyirira nga Yerusaalemu. Otiisa ng'eggye eritaze okulwana!" 
SongOfSongs6:5 Tontunuulira, kubanga amaaso go gampangudde. Enviiri zo ziri ng'eggana ly'embuzi, erikkirira olusozi Gileyaadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amannyo go meeru. Gatukula ng'eggana ly'endiga enkazi ezambuka nga ziva okunaazibwa. Tezitambula kinneemu: buli emu eba ne ginnaayo. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Amatama go mu katimba k'ogabisseeko, galabika bulungi ng'ekkomamawanga erisaliddwamu awabiri." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Ka wabeewo abakyala abeekitiibwa nkaaga, n'abazaana kinaana, era n'abawala abaweereza butabala;" 
SongOfSongs6:9 naye muganzi wange ataliiko kamogo, ali omu. Ye muwala yekka nnyina gwe yazaala. Mu baana be, ye gw'ayagala ennyo. Abawala abamutunulako bonna bamutenda omukisa. Abakyala abeekitiibwa wamu n'abazaana, bonna bamutendereza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ono ye ani asala nga mmambya, omulungi ng'omwezi, atemagana ng'enjuba evaayo, atiisa ng'eggye eritaze okulwana?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Naserengeta mu nnimiro ey'ebinyeebwa eby'oku muti, ndabe ebimera ebikulira mu kiwonvu, ndabe n'emizabbibu oba nga gimulisizza, n'emikomamawanga oba nga gyanyizza." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Okugenda okwejjuukiriza nga mu birowoozo byange, ntudde mu bigaali okumpi ne kabiite wange!" 
SongOfSongs6:13 Komawo, komawo omuwala w'e Sulamu! Komawo, komawo tukulabe! Munsimbira ki amaaso, ng'omugole ayita mu nnyiriri z'abatunuulizi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Ebigere byo nga birungi mu ngatto, ayi muwala w'omulangira! Ennyingo z'ebisambi byo, ziri ng'amayinja ag'omuwendo agayooyooteddwa obulungi!" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ekkundi lyo, liri ng'ekikopo ekyekulungirivu, kye bataddemu omwenge ogutabuddwamu ebiguwoomesa. Olubuto lwo luli ng'ekiganda ky'eŋŋaano ekyetooloddwa amalanga." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabeere go gombi gali ng'empeewo ebbiri ennongo. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ensingo yo eri ng'omunaala ogw'essanga! Amaaso go gali ng'ebidiba by'e Hesubooni ebiri okumpi n'omulyango gw'e Batirabbimu. Ennyindo yo eri ng'omunaala gw'e Lebanooni, ogutunudde e Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Omutwe gwo musitufu ng'Olusozi Kalumeeli. Enviiri zo ziri ng'olugoye olwekitiibwa. Obulungi bwo busikiriza ne kabaka. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ng'oli mulungi mubalagavu, ayi muganzi wange! Ng'okwagala kwo kunsanyusa!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Wakula weegolodde ng'olukindu, amabeere go bye birimba eby'empirivuma zaakwo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nagamba nti: “Nja kulinnya olukindu nnogeyo ebibala byalwo.” Amabeere go gandabikira ng'ebirimba by'emizabbibu, n'akawoowo k'omukka gw'ossa, kali ng'ak'emicungwa." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Ebigambo by'oyogera biri ng'omwenge ogusingira ddala okuwooma. Ogwo gwe mwenge ogusaanidde okunywebwa muganzi wange, emimwa gye n'amannyo ge biryoke byenuguune!" 
SongOfSongs7:10 Nze ndi wa muganzi wange, naye yeegomba nze." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Jjangu muganzi wange tugende mu nnimiro; tugende tubeereko mu kyalo. 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tukeere mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu ku makya, tulabe oba nga gimulisizza, oba ng'ekimuli kyagyo kyanjuluzza, era oba ng'emikomamawanga gyanjuluzza. Eyo gye nnaakulagira okwagala kwange." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Onoowunya ku kawoowo k'amandalake. Ebibala byonna ebirungi ennyo binaabeera awo kumpi n'oluggi lwaffe. Nkuterekedde, ayi muganzi wange, ebisanyusa ebiggya era n'ebikadde." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ha, singa nno wali mwannyinaze eyayonka ku mabeere ga mmange! Twandisisinkanye ebweru ne nkugwa mu kifuba, ne watabaawo ansunga." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nandikututte ne nkuyingiza mu nnyumba ya mmange, n'onjigiririza eyo okwagala. Nandikuwadde ku mwenge omuwoomu n'onywako, ne ku mubisi omusogole mu makomamawanga." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Omukono gwo ogwa kkono guli wansi wa mutwe gwange, omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gumpambaatidde." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Mbalayiza mmwe abawala b'e Yerusaalemu: temugolokosanga wadde okuzuukusa okwagala, ng'ekiseera kyakwo ekituufu tekinnatuuka." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ono ani ava mu ddungu nga yeesigamye muganzi we? Nazuukusa okwagala kwo wansi w'omucungwa, mu kifo mwe wazaalirwa, nnyoko mwe yalumirwa ng'akuzaala." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Siba omutima gwo oyagale nze nzekka; emikono gyo gireme kuwambaatira mulala wabula nze nzekka, kubanga okwagala kwenkanya okufa amaanyi. Obuggya bukambwe, okwenkana amagombe. Okwagala kukoleera ne kwaka ng'omuliro, ogulina ennimi ezeememula!" 
SongOfSongs8:7 Omujjuzo gw'amazzi wadde engezi, tebiyinza kuzikiza kwagala. Oyo awaayo obugagga bwonna bw'aba nabwo mu nnyumba agule okwagala, afuna kunyoomebwa kwokka." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Mwannyinaffe muto tannamera bbeere! Tunaamukolera ki bwe wajja amwogereza? 
SongOfSongs8:9 Mwannyinaffe oyo bw'anaaba ekisenge, tunaamuzimbako omunaala ogwa ffeeza; bw'anaaba oluggi, tunaamusiba n'emikiikiro egy'omuvule." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndi kisenge, amabeere gange gye minaala gyakwo. Bwe mba ne muganzi wange mmatira, mba mirembe." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomooni yalina ennimiro ey'emizabbibu e Baali Hammoni, abalimi ne bagipangisa, buli omu ng'asasula sekeli lukumi eza ffeeza." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Solomooni k'afunenga sekeli ze olukumi eza ffeeza, n'abapangisa bafunengamu ebikumi ebibiri, naye ennimiro eyange, nze njeerabiririra nzekka!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 Ggwe abeera eyo mu nnimiro, bannange balindiridde okuwulira ku ddoboozi lyo. Kale yogera ndiwulireko." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Jjangu gye ndi, ayi muganzi wange, ng'oyanguwa ng'empeewo oba ng'ennangaazi ento, ku nsozi awakula ebyakawoowo." 
Isaiah1:1 Buno bwe bubaka obufa ku Ggwanga lya Buyudaaya n'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu, Katonda bwe yawa Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi, mu kiseera ky'obufuzi bwa bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya bano: Wuzziya, Yotamu, Ahazi, ne Heezeekiya. 26:1-23; 27:1-9; 28:1-27; 29:1–32:33" 
Isaiah1:2 Mukama yagamba nti: “Ggwe eggulu wulira, naawe ensi tega okutu, muwulirize kye ŋŋamba! Abaana be nayola ne mbakuza, banjeemedde." 
Isaiah1:3 Ente emanya nnyini yo, n'endogoyi emanya ekifo mukama waayo w'agiriisiza, naye ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, okumanya kwabwe tekutuuka awo. Abantu bange tebalowooza.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Zikusanze ggwe Eggwanga eryonoonyi, abantu abeetuumyeko ebibi, bazzukulu b'abakozi b'ebibi, abaana aboonoonefu. Muvudde ku Mukama. Munyoomodde Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli, ne mumukuba amabega." 
Isaiah1:5 Lwaki mwongera okuba abajeemu? Mwagala mwongere okubonerezebwa? Yisirayeli, omutwe gwo gwonna gujjudde biwundu, omutima gwo gunafuye." 
Isaiah1:6 Okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere, tolinaawo katundu kalamu. Ojjudde binuubule, bikalabule, na biwundu. Ebiwundu byo si binaaze, wadde okusibibwako akawero. Tewali ddagala libiteekeddwako." 
Isaiah1:7 Ensi yammwe yonna efuuse matongo, n'ebibuga byammwe byokeddwa omuliro ne bisirikka. Abagwira balumbye ensi yammwe ne bagiwamba, era ne bazikiriza ebirimu, mmwe nga mulaba." 
Isaiah1:8 Siyooni kisigadde ng'akasiisira akali mu nnimiro y'emizabbibu, ng'ekiyumba ekikuumirwamu ennimiro y'emyungu, oba ng'ekibuga ekizingiziddwa." 
Isaiah1:9 Singa Mukama Nnannyinimagye teyatulekerawo ku bantu abatono ennyo b'atalizza, twandibadde ng'ab'e Sodoma, twandifuuse ng'ab'e Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Muwulire Mukama ky'agamba, mmwe abakulembeze ba Yerusaalemu, abali ng'ab'e Sodoma; mutege amatu mmwe abantu abali ng'ab'e Gomora, muwulire ebyo Katonda waffe by'abayigiriza." 
Isaiah1:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Ebitambiro byammwe ebingi, bingasa ki? Neetamiddwa ebitambiro ebyokebwa eby'endiga ennume, n'amasavu g'ensolo zammwe ezassava. Saagala musaayi gwa nte, wadde ogw'endiga ento, n'ogw'embuzi ennume." 
Isaiah1:12 Ani yabalagira eky'okujjanga obuzzi okulabika mu maaso gange, nnyini okulinnyirira empya zange?" 
Isaiah1:13 Temwongera kuleeta bitone bitalina makulu. Neetamiddwa obubaane bwe munjotereza, n'embaga zammwe ez'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ne Sabbaato zammwe, era n'okuyita enkuŋŋaana. Sisobola kugumiikiriza nkuŋŋaana za ddiini, wamu n'ebibi." 
Isaiah1:14 Nkyayira ddala embaga zammwe ez'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'ez'ennaku zammwe enkulu. Mbyetamiddwa, nkooye okubigumiikiriza." 
Isaiah1:15 “N'olwekyo bwe munaagololanga emikono gyammwe nga muliko kye munsaba, sijjanga kubatunuulira, era ne bwe munaasabanga okwenkana wa, sijjanga kuwuliriza, kubanga engalo zammwe zisaabaanye omusaayi." 
Isaiah1:16 Munaabe, mutukule. Mukomye obutali butuukirivu bwonna bwe ndaba mukola. Mulekere awo okukola ebibi," 
Isaiah1:17 muyige okukolanga ebirungi. Mufube okukolanga ebituufu, mugololenga abanyigiriza abalala, mulwanirirenga bamulekwa, muwolerezenga bannamwandu.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Mukama agamba nti: “Kale mujje tuteese, tukkaanye. Ebibi byammwe ne bwe binaaba ebimyufu ng'omusaayi, nja kubanaaza mutukule ng'omuzira. Ne bwe binaaba bya langi mmyufu enkwafu, binaayamuka ne biba byeru ng'ennyange." 
Isaiah1:19 Bwe munaabanga abagonvu era abawulize, munaalyanga ebirungi ensi yammwe by'ebabaliza." 
Isaiah1:20 Naye bwe muneeremanga ne mujeema, munattibwanga. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Ekibuga ekyali ekyesigwa, nga kifuuse ng'omukazi omwenzi! Edda ekyali kijjuddemu abantu abagoberera obwenkanya era abakola ebituufu, kaakati kirimu batemu." 
Isaiah1:22 Yerusaalemu, wali wa muwendo nga ffeeza, naye kati toliiko ky'ogasa; oli ng'omwenge ogutabuddwamu amazzi." 
Isaiah1:23 Abakulembeze bo bajeemu, era mikwano gya babbi. Bafa ku nguzi na ku birabo ebibaweebwa. Tebafaayo kulwanirira bamulekwa, wadde okuwuliriza bannamwandu bwe baleeta ensonga zaabwe." 
Isaiah1:24 Kale Mukama, Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye, Omuzira wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: “Nja kuwoolera eggwanga ku mmwe abalabe bange, muleme kuddayo kuntawaanya." 
Isaiah1:25 Nja kubakolako, mbasengejje ng'ekyuma bwe kisengejjebwa, mbamalemu obukyafu bwammwe bwonna." 
Isaiah1:26 Nja kubawa abakulembeze n'abawi b'amagezi abalungi, nga bali be mwalina edda. Olwo Yerusaalemu kiriddamu okuyitibwa ekitukuvu era ekyesigwa.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Mukama omwenkanya era omutuukirivu, ajja kununula Yerusaalemu, n'abaamu bonna abakyuka ne beenenya." 
Isaiah1:28 Wabula abajeemu n'abakola ebibi, balizikiririzibwa wamu, era n'abo abeggya ku Mukama, balimalibwawo." 
Isaiah1:29 Ensonyi ziribakwata mmwe olw'emiti gye mwasinzanga, n'olw'ennimiro ze mwawongera balubaale." 
Isaiah1:30 Muliba ng'omuti oguwotoka amakoola, era ng'ennimiro gye batafukirira." 
Isaiah1:31 Ab'amaanyi baliba ng'essubi ekkalu, ebibi bye bakola bibe ng'ensasi z'omuliro, baggyiire wamu nabyo, era tewaliba ayinza kuziyiza kuzikirizibwa kwabwe." 
Isaiah2:1 Buno bwe bubaka Katonda bwe yawa Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi, obufa ku Ggwanga lya Bayudaaya, ne ku Kibuga Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah2:2 Mu biseera eby'oluvannyuma, olusozi okuli Essinzizo lulifuulibwa olusinga zonna obugulumivu, ne lusoolooba ku busozi bwonna, era amawanga galikuluumulukukira ku lwo." 
Isaiah2:3 Abantu bangi balijja ne bagamba nti: “Mujje twambuke ku lusozi lwa Mukama, mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda wa Yakobo, atuyigirize empisa z'ayagala tubeere nazo; naffe tunaayisanga nga bw'ayagala, kubanga Mukama ayigiriza ng'asinziira ku Lusozi Siyooni, era amateeka ge agaweera mu Yerusaalemu.”" 
Isaiah2:4 Aliramula amawanga, abantu bangi n'abatabaganya. Ebibadde ebyokulwanyisa byabwe balibiweesa, ne babifuula ebintu ebirala: ebibadde ebitala byabwe, balibiweesa, ne babifuula enkumbi, n'amafumu gaabwe ne bagafuula ebiwabyo. Tewaliba ggwanga likwata byakulwanyisa kulumba ggwanga linnaalyo, era tewaliba nate kutendekebwa mu bya ntalo." 
Isaiah2:5 Kale, mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo, mujje tutambulire mu kitangaala kya Mukama." 
Isaiah2:6 Ayi Katonda, oyabulidde abantu bo, bazzukulu ba Yakobo, kubanga ensi yaabwe yonna bagijjuzizza eby'obulogo ebiva ebuvanjuba, era bafuuse balaguzi ng'Abafilistiya, era bassa kimu n'abagwira." 
Isaiah2:7 Ensi yaabwe ejjudde ffeeza ne zaabu, era obugagga bwabwe tebuliiko kkomo. Ensi yaabwe ejjudde embalaasi, n'amagaali gaabwe nago tegaliiko kkomo." 
Isaiah2:8 Ensi yaabwe ejjudde ebifaananyi bya balubaale, abantu basinza ebyo, bo bennyini bye bakoze n'emikono gyabwe," 
Isaiah2:9 omuntu owaabulijjo n'avuunama, n'omukungu ne yeetoowaza. N'olwekyo, Ayi Mukama tobasonyiwa n'akatono." 
Isaiah2:10 Mudduke muyingire mu mpuku z'omu njazi, mwekweke mu nfuufu, nga mudduka Mukama ow'entiisa, era oweekitiibwa n'obuyinza." 
Isaiah2:11 Olunaku lujja kutuuka, okwekuluntaza kw'abantu lwe kulimalibwawo, n'okwegulumiza kwabwe lwe kulizikirizibwa. Okuva olwo, Mukama yekka ye aligulumizibwa," 
Isaiah2:12 kubanga walibaawo olunaku, Mukama Nnannyinimagye kw'alitoowaliza bonna abeekuza ne beewanika, na buli eyeekulumbaza ne yeegulumiza." 
Isaiah2:13 Mukama alizikiriza emiti gyonna emiwanvu egy'omu Lebanooni, n'emivule gyonna egy'e Basani." 
Isaiah2:14 Aliseeteeza ensozi zonna empanvu, n'obusozi bwonna obugulumivu," 
Isaiah2:15 buli munaala omuwanvu, na buli kisenge eky'ekigo ekigumu." 
Isaiah2:16 Alibbika mu nnyanja emmeeri zonna ez'e Tarusiisi, n'azikiriza byonna ebyakolebwa, ebisanyusa okulaba." 
Isaiah2:17 Okugulumizibwa kw'abantu kulitoowazibwa, n'okwekulumbaza kwabwe kwonna kulimenyebwa. Ku lunaku olwo, Mukama yekka ye aligulumizibwa." 
Isaiah2:18 N'ebifaananyi byonna bye basinza, biriggweerawo ddala." 
Isaiah2:19 Abantu baliyingira mu mpuku ez'omu njazi, ne mu bunnya obusime mu ttaka, okwekweka Mukama ow'entiisa era n'ekitiibwa n'obuyinza, bw'alyesowolayo okukuba ensi entiisa." 
Isaiah2:20 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu balisuula eri ebifaananyi bye basinza, ebikole mu zaabu ne mu ffeeza, era balibirekera mmese na buwundo," 
Isaiah2:21 ne bayingira mu mpuku ez'omu njazi, ne mu mpompogoma z'amayinja agaayatika, okwekweka Mukama ow'entiisa era oweekitiibwa n'obuyinza, bw'alyesowolayo okukuba ensi entiisa." 
Isaiah2:22 Mulemenga kwesiga bantu. Okuggyako okussiza mu nnyindo, kiki eky'omuwendo kye balina?" 
Isaiah3:1 Abange, mulabe Mukama, Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye, anaatera okuggya ku Yerusaalemu ne ku Buyudaaya, buli kintu kye mwetaaga okweyimirizaawo. Agenda okubaggyako emmere n'amazzi," 
Isaiah3:2 abaggyeko abantu ab'amaanyi n'abazira, abalamuzi n'abalanzi, abalaguzi n'abakulembeze," 
Isaiah3:3 abakulira abantu ataano ataano mu magye, n'abantu abakulu abeekitiibwa, n'abawi b'amagezi, n'abakola emirimu egyekikugu, n'abagezigezi abawanuuza ebinaabaawo." 
Isaiah3:4 Mukama alireka abantu be okukulemberwa abalenzi abato, abafuga nga bakyukakyuka mu nkola yaabwe awatali nsonga." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu tebalissaŋŋanamu kitiibwa. Abaana abato balijooga abantu abakulu, n'abatwalibwa balinyooma bakama baabwe." 
Isaiah3:6 Ekiseera kirituuka abazaalibwa mu nnyumba emu, ne bagamba omu ku baganda baabwe nti: “Waakiri ggwe nga bw'olina k'oyambala, ggwe oba otukulira, olabirire bino ebifaafaaganye.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Ku olwo, alyerwanako ng'agamba nti: “Sijja kubaako kye nnyamba, kubanga ewange nange sirinaayo mmere, wadde olugoye olw'okwambala. Temunnonda kubakulira.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Weewaawo Yerusaalemu zikisanze, n'Obuyudaaya buzikiridde! Kubanga byonna abantu bye bakola ne bye boogera, biwakanya Mukama, binyooma ekitiibwa kye." 
Isaiah3:9 Entunula yaabwe yennyini, ebalumiriza omusango. Ebibi byabwe babikola kyere ng'ab'e Sodoma, tebabikisa. Zibasanze, kubanga beereetedde bokka akabi." 
Isaiah3:10 Mubuulire abayisa obulungi nti baliba bulungi, kubanga baliganyulwa ebiva mu birungi bye bakoze." 
Isaiah3:11 Naye ababi zibasanze, banaabeeranga bubi, kubanga bye bakoze, nabo bye binaabakolwangako." 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bange, abanyigirizibwa baana bato, era bakazi be babafuga! Ayi mmwe abantu bange, abakulembeze bammwe babakyamya, babaggya ku bituufu, ne babakozesa ebikyamu." 
Isaiah3:13 Mukama asituse n'ajja okulumiriza abantu be, ayimiridde okubasalira omusango." 
Isaiah3:14 Mukama anaasalira abakulembeze n'abakungu b'abantu be omusango. Abalumiriza bw'ati: “Munyaguludde ennimiro z'emizabbibu, era amayumba gammwe gajjudde ebintu bye munyaze ku baavu." 
Isaiah3:15 Mubadde mutya, mmwe ababetenta abantu bange, ne munyigira abaavu ku lwala ng'enkukunyi? Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye, Nze mbuuza.”" 
Isaiah3:16 Mukama era n'agamba nti: “Abakazi b'omu Yerusaalemu balina amalala. Batambula balalambazizza ensingo, era nga batunuza bukaba. Batambuza ssimbo, nga bagenda batta ku bigere, nga bakoona engatto ziwulirwe." 
Isaiah3:17 N'olwekyo, Nze Mukama, emitwe gyabwe ndigifuula gya biwalaata, ne gisigala nga tekuli nviiri, baswale.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, Mukama aliggya ku bakazi b'e Yerusaalemu eby'obuyonjo byonna ebibaleetera okwekulumbaza: bye bambala ku bukongovvule, bye batikkira ku mitwe gyabwe, ne bye beenaanika mu bulago," 
Isaiah3:19 ne ku mikono gyabwe, n'ebitambaala bye beebikkirira ku maaso," 
Isaiah3:20 ne bye beesiba ku mitwe, n'obukomo obw'emikisa bwe bambala ku mikono, n'embira ze beesiba mu biwato;" 
Isaiah3:21 n'empeta ze beenaanika ku ngalo, ne ze beetunga mu nnyindo," 
Isaiah3:22 n'engoye ez'ebbeeyi, n'eminagiro, n'essuuka ze basuulira, n'ensawo ez'omu ngalo;" 
Isaiah3:23 endabirwamu, n'engoye ez'obutimba, n'ezo enjeru ennungi, n'ebiremba eby'omu mutwe, n'engoye ez'okwebikkirira." 
Isaiah3:24 Mu kifo ky'ebyakawoowo, baliwunya kivundu. Mu kifo ky'olwebagyo, balyesibya miguwa. Mu kifo ky'enviiri ensunsule obulungi, baliba na biwalaata. Ne mu kifo ky'engoye ennungi, balyambala bikutiya. Obubalagavu bwabwe bulifuuka nsonyi." 
Isaiah3:25 Bo abasajja b'omu Yerusaalemu, wadde abo abazira, balittirwa mu lutalo." 
Isaiah3:26 Enzigi za Yerusaalemu zirikungubaga, ne zitema emiranga. Yerusaalemu kyennyini kiriba ng'omukazi akubiddwa ennaku, atuula ku ttaka ng'asobeddwa." 
Isaiah4:1 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abakazi musanvu balyekwata ku musajja omu, nga bagamba nti: “Ffe tuneenoonyezanga ebyokulya n'ebyokwambala, naye kkiriza tuyitibwenga bakyala bo, otuwonye okuswala olw'obutafumbirwa.”"
