Isaiah4:2 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ebimera byonna n'emiti, Mukama bye yameza, biriba birungi era byakitiibwa, n'ebibala ebiribala mu nsi biriba birungi era biriwoomera nnyo abo abaliba bawonyeewo mu Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Buli aliba asigaddewo mu Siyooni, Katonda gw'aliba alonze okusigala nga mulamu mu Yerusaalemu, aliyitibwa mutukuvu." 
Isaiah4:4 Mukama bw'aliba amaze okukozesa obuyinza bwe okusalira omusango abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu n'okubanaazaako ebibi byabwe, n'okuggya ku Yerusaalemu obutemu obwakikolerwamu." 
Isaiah4:5 Ku Lusozi Siyooni, ne ku bonna abakuŋŋaaniddeko, Mukama alireeta ekire n'omukka emisana, n'okutangalijja kw'omuliro ogubuubuuka ekiro. Ekitiibwa kya Katonda kiribikka ekibuga kyonna, ne kikikuuma." 
Isaiah4:6 Ekitiibwa ekyo kirisiikiriza ekibuga okukiwonya ebbugumu emisana, ne kikifuula ekifo ekyekusifu, omwekwekebwa okuwona enkuba ne kibuyaga." 
Isaiah5:1 Kaakano ka nnyimbire muganzi wange oluyimba olufa ku nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu. Muganzi wange yalina ennimiro ey'emizabbibu ku lusozi olugimu ennyo. 
Isaiah5:2 Yagikabala bulungi n'alondalondamu amayinja agaalimu, n'agisimbamu emizabbibu emirungi ddala. N'azimba wakati mu yo omunaala ogw'okukuumiramu, n'asimamu essogolero. N'asuubira ng'eneemubalira emizabbibu emirungi, kyokka n'emubalira gikaawa ng'egy'omu nsiko." 
Isaiah5:3 Muganzi wange oyo agamba nti: “Kale mmwe abatuuze b'omu Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya bwonna, mbasaba musale omusango wakati wange n'ennimiro yange ey'emizabbibu." 
Isaiah5:4 Kiki ekirala kye nandikoledde ennimiro yange eyo ey'emizabbibu kye saagikolera? Kale lwaki bwe nasuubira ebale emizabbibu emirungi, ate yabala gikaawa ng'egy'omu nsiko?" 
Isaiah5:5 “Kaakano ka mbategeeze kye nnaakolera ennimiro yange eyo: nja kuggyawo olukomera lwayo mmenyewo ekigo ekigikuuma ebisolo biriiremu era bigirinnyirire. 
Isaiah5:6 Era nja kugizisa: emizabbibu tegiisalirwenga, n'omuddo tebaagulimenga. Erimeramu emyeramannyo n'amaggwa, era ndiziyiza n'ebire okugitonnyesangako enkuba.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli ye nnimiro y'emizabbibu eya Mukama Nnannyinimagye, n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, kye kirime kye yalima ekimusanyusa. Yabasuubiramu okukola eby'obwenkanya, naye bo baakola bya butemu. Yabasuubiramu okukola ebituufu naye baakola bya kukaabya bantu." 
Isaiah5:8 Zibasanze mmwe abagula ennyumba ne muzongera ku ezo ze mulina, era abongera ennimiro ku ezo ze mubadde nazo, okutuusa lwe munaamalawo buli kafo, ensi ne mugibeeramu mwekka." 
Isaiah5:9 Mpulidde Mukama Nnannyinimagye ng'agamba nti: “Ennyumba zino zonna ennyingi, zirifuuka bifulukwa. Ezo ennene era ennungi, tewaliba azibeeramu." 
Isaiah5:10 Ennimiro y'emizabbibu eya yiika ekkumi, eneevangamu ekibbo kimu. N'ekisero ky'ensigo, kinaavangamu akabbo kamu.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Zibasanze abo abazuukuka ku makya ne bakeera okunoonya ebyokunywa ebitamiiza. Banywa omwenge okuzibya obudde, ne gubalalusa." 
Isaiah5:12 Embaga zaabwe zibaako ennanga n'entongooli, ebitaasa n'endere n'omwenge. Naye tebalowooza ku ebyo Mukama by'akola era tebabifaako." 
Isaiah5:13 Kale abantu bange kyebavudde batwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse olw'obutabaako kye bamanyi. Abakungu baabwe balifa enjala, n'abantu baabwe bonna ne battibwa ennyonta." 
Isaiah5:14 Amagombe kye galiva gabeegomba, ne gaasamya akamwa okubamira, abakungu baabwe n'abantu baabwe abangi ababadde bakuba embeekuulo nga basanyuka mu bo, bonna ne bakkirira omwo." 
Isaiah5:15 Buli muntu aliswazibwa, n'abeekulumbaza balitoowazibwa." 
Isaiah5:16 Naye Mukama Nnannyinimagye agulumizibwa mu kusalira abantu omusango, era alaga obutuukirivu bwe, ng'akola ebituufu." 
Isaiah5:17 Endiga ento ziriira mu bifo ebyazika, nga bwe ziriira mu malundiro; era ebifo ebyo eby'abagevvu, abagwira balibyefunira." 
Isaiah5:18 Zibasanze abo abalemwa okuva mu bibi byabwe, ne bakulula ebibi nga bwe bakulula ekigaali kye basibyemu emiguwa." 
Isaiah5:19 Bagamba nti: “Mukama ayanguyeeko by'akola tubirabe, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli asambyeko, by'ateesa okutuukiriza tubimanye.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Zibasanze abo abayita ekibi ekirungi n'ekirungi ne bakiyita ekibi; abateeka ekizikiza mu kifo ky'ekitangaala, n'ekitangaala mu kifo ky'ekizikiza, era abateeka ekikaawa mu kifo ky'ekiwoomerera, n'ekiwoomerera mu kifo ky'ekikaawa." 
Isaiah5:21 Zibasanze abo abeemanyi bwe bali abagezi, abeetenda obutegeevu." 
Isaiah5:22 Zibasanze abo ab'amaanyi mu kunywa omwenge, abazira mu kutabula ebitamiiza." 
Isaiah5:23 Baggya omusango ku babi olw'enguzi, omutuufu ne batamuwa kimusaanidde." 
Isaiah5:24 Kale ng'omuliro bwe gwokya ensambu n'essubi ekkalu, bwe bityo ne bye beesigamyeko bwe birivunda, ne bye bakola bwe birifuumuuka ng'enfuufu, kubanga baagaana amateeka ga Mukama Nnannyinimagye; banyooma ekigambo ky'Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah5:25 N'olwekyo Mukama asunguwalidde abantu be, era agolodde omukono gwe okubabonereza. Ensozi zijja kukankana, n'emirambo gy'abo abattiddwa gisigale ng'ebisasiro mu nguudo. N'ebyo byonna nga bimaze okubaawo, era obusungu bwe buliba tebunnaggwaawo." 
Isaiah5:26 Alitemya ku b'omu mawanga agali ewala. Alibakoowoola okuva mu buli nsonda y'ensi, ne banguwa mangu okujja." 
Isaiah5:27 Mu bo tewaliba akoowa, era tewaliba yeesittala kugwa. Tewaliba abongoota, wadde eyeebaka. Enkoba ze beesiba teziriddirira, wadde obuwuzi bw'engatto okukutuka." 
Isaiah5:28 Obusaale bwabwe bwogi, n'emitego gyabwo gyonna mireege. Ebinuulo by'embalaasi zaabwe, bigumu nga mayinja; ne nnamuziga z'amagaali gaabwe, zidduka nga mbuyaga." 
Isaiah5:29 Bawuluguma nga mpologoma ekutte ensolo gy'eyizze, n'egyetwalira kyere, ne watabaawo agiwonya." 
Isaiah5:30 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, baliwuumira ku Yisirayeli, ng'ennyanja bwewuuma. Omuntu bw'alitunuulira ensi eyo, aliraba kizikiza na buyinike, ng'ebire biziyizizza omusana okwaka." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka Kabaka Wuzziya mwe yakisiza omukono, nalaba Mukama ng'atudde ku ntebe empanvu era engulumivu, ng'ekirenge ky'ekyambalo kye kijjuzizza Essinzizo." 
Isaiah6:2 Waggulu w'entebe eyo, waali wayimiriddewo baserafi, buli omu ng'alina ebiwaawaatiro mukaaga, ebibiri nga bibisse ku maaso ge, ebibiri nga bibisse ku bigere bye, ebibiri nga bye yeeyambisa okubuuka." 
Isaiah6:3 Baali bagambagana nti: “Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu, Mutuukirivu Mukama Nnannyinimagye. Ensi yonna ejjudde ekitiibwa kye.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Eddoboozi lyabwe ekkangufu ne likankanya emisingi gy'emiryango gy'Essinzizo. Essinzizo ne lijjula omukka. 
Isaiah6:5 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Zinsanze, nfudde nze, kubanga buli kigambo kye njogera, si kirongoofu, era ndi mu bantu aboogera ebitali birongoofu. Naye ate nzuuno ndabye Kabaka, Mukama Nnannyinimagye.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Awo omu ku baserafi, n'abuuka, n'ajja gye ndi, ng'alina eryanda eryaka, lye yali aggye ku alutaari, ng'alitoozaamu nnamagalo." 
Isaiah6:7 N'alikoonya ku mimwa gyange, n'agamba nti: “Eryanda lino nga bwe likoonye ku mimwa gyo, obutali bulongoofu bwo buggyiddwawo, n'ekibi kyo kisonyiyiddwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ne mpulira eddoboozi lya Afugabyonna ng'agamba nti: “Nnaatuma ani? Ani anaaba omubaka waffe?” Nze ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nze, nzuuno, tuma nze.”" 
Isaiah6:9 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Genda ogambe abantu abo nti: ‘Weewaawo mujja kuwulira, naye temujja kutegeera. Weewaawo mujja kulaba, naye temujja kwetegereza.’ ”" 
Isaiah6:10 Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Gubya omutima gw'abantu abo, oggale amatu gaabwe, era ozibe amaaso gaabwe, sikulwa nga balaba n'amaaso gaabwe, nga bawulira n'amatu gaabwe, era nga bategeera n'omutima gwabwe ne bakyuka, ne bawonyezebwa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Nze ne mbuuza nti: “Mukama wange, ekyo kirituusa ddi okuba bwe kityo?” N'addamu nti: “Okutuusa ng'ebibuga bifuuse amatongo, nga tewali babibeeramu, n'amayumba nga tegakyalimu bantu, n'ensi ng'ezikidde ddala." 
Isaiah6:12 Nze Mukama ndisengula abantu ne mbatwala wala, ebifulukwa ne biba bingi mu nsi eyo." 
Isaiah6:13 Naye ekimu eky'ekkumi eky'abantu abo kiriba nga kikyasigaddewo. Newaakubadde nga kiryokebwa, era ne kyokebwa, naye kiriba ng'omunyinya oba omuvule ogutemebwa, ne gusigazaawo ekikolo, ekikolo ekyo ne kiba ensigo kwe gusibukira.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Awo olwatuuka, Ahazi mutabani wa Yotamu era muzzukulu wa Wuzziya, bwe yali nga ye afuga Buyudaaya, Rezini kabaka wa Siriya, ne Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya era kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ne balumba Yerusaalemu, naye ne kibalema okuwangula." 
Isaiah7:2 Ab'ennyumba ya Dawudi bwe baawulira nga Siriya yeekobaanye n'Abeefurayimu, kabaka n'abantu be emitima ne gibeewuuba ng'emiti egy'omu kibira bwe ginyeenyezebwa embuyaga." 
Isaiah7:3 Mukama n'agamba Yisaaya nti: “Genda ne mutabani wo Seyariyasubu, osisinkane Ahazi, mu kifo omukutu gw'ekidiba ky'amazzi eky'engulu we gukoma, mu luguudo olugenda ku kibanja ky'omwozi w'engoye." 
Isaiah7:4 Omugambe nti: ‘Weekuume, kkakkana, totya, era toggwaamu maanyi. Obusungu obukambwe obwa Rezini n'Abassiriya, n'obwa Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya, buli ng'omukka ogw'emimuli ebiri egiggweeredde, ogunyooka." 
Isaiah7:5 Siriya ne Yisirayeli ne kabaka waayo bakukoledde olukwe nga bagamba nti 
Isaiah7:6 mugende mulumbe Buyudaaya mugitiise, mugyewangulire, muteekewo mutabani wa Tabeeli abe kabaka waayo.’" 
Isaiah7:7 “Naye Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti ekyo tekijja kubaawo, tekijja kutuukirira," 
Isaiah7:8 kubanga Rezini afuga Siriya yokka n'ekibuga kyayo ekikulu Damasiko. Ate mu myaka nkaaga mu etaano, Yisirayeli eriba yeekutuddekutuddemu, nga terikyali ggwanga limu." 
Isaiah7:9 Ekibuga ekikulu ekya Yisirayeli ye Samariya, ne kabaka wa Yisirayeli ye Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya. “Bwe muligaana okukkiriza, mazima temulinywera.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Awo Mukama n'atumira Ahazi obubaka obulala ng'amugamba nti: 
Isaiah7:11 “Saba Mukama Katonda wo akuwe akabonero, kave oba ewala ekuzimu, oba waggulu mu bbanga.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Ahazi n'addamu nti: “Sijja kusaba kabonero, era sijja kukema Mukama.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Yisaaya n'amuddamu nti: “Muwulire mmwe, ab'ennyumba ya Dawudi. Tekibamala okukooya abantu ababagumiikiriza mmwe, ne mwagala n'okukooya era ne Katonda wange?" 
Isaiah7:14 Kale Mukama ye ku bubwe alibawa akabonero: omuwala embeerera aliba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi, era n'amutuuma erinnya Emmanweli." 
Isaiah7:15 W'alituukira okwawula ekirungi n'ekibi, amata n'omubisi gw'enjuki, ye eriba emmere y'abantu," 
Isaiah7:16 era olwo ensi z'okyawamu bakabaka baamu bombi, ziriba zaabuliddwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Ku ggwe, ne ku bantu bo, ne ku b'ennyumba ya kitaawo, Mukama alireeta ennaku ez'ebizibu ebisinga ku byali bizze, okuva obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli bweyawula ku bwa Buyudaaya. Ajja kubaleetera kabaka wa Assiriya." 
Isaiah7:18 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, Mukama alikoowoola Abamisiri okujja ng'ensowera, nga bava mu bifo eby'ewala, eby'oku mugga gw'e Misiri, n'Abasiriya okujja ng'enjuki, nga bava mu nsi yaabwe." 
Isaiah7:19 Balijja ne beeyiwa bonna mu biwonvu ebyazika, ne mu mpuku ez'omu njazi, ne mu bisaka byonna eby'amaggwa, ne mu malundiro gonna." 
Isaiah7:20 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, Mukama alimwesa akamwano k'aligula mu bifo eby'emitala w'Omugga Ewufuraate, ako ye Kabaka wa Assiriya, n'alyoka abamwako enviiri ku mutwe, n'ebirevu, n'obwoya obw'oku mibiri gyammwe." 
Isaiah7:21 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, omuntu ne bw'aliba asigazizzaawo ente eyonsa ento, n'endiga bbiri," 
Isaiah7:22 amata ge zirigabiza galimumala, n'agasundamu n'omuzigo. Ddala buli aliba asigadde mu nsi eyo, anaalyanga omuzigo, n'omubisi gw'enjuki." 
Isaiah7:23 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, buli kifo awaabanga emizabbibu olukumi, buli gumu nga gwa sekeli lukumi, kirizika, nga kimezeemu emyeramannyo n'amaggwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Abantu banaayiggiranga omwo n'emitego n'obusaale, kubanga ensi eyo yonna eriba ejjudde myeramannyo n'amaggwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Obusozi bwonna okwalimwanga, buliba buzise emyeramannyo n'amaggwa, ng'omuntu tasobola kugendayo. Waliba wa kusindikayo nte na kulinnyirirwa ndiga.”" 
Isaiah8:1 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kwata ekipande ekinene, okiwandiikeko mu ganyukuta aganene, nti: KUNYAGA MU BWANGU, KUTWALA MU BWANGU." 
Isaiah8:2 Nze nja kuleeta Wuriya kabona, ne Zekariya mutabani wa Yeberekiya, babe abajulizi bange abeesigwa, okukikakasa.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Awo ne neegatta ne mukyala wange, n'aba olubuto, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi. Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mutuume erinnya Kunyagamubwangukutwalamangu," 
Isaiah8:4 kubanga omwana oyo aliba tannamanya kuyita nti ‘Taata’ oba nti ‘Maama’, obugagga bw'e Damasiko, n'ebyo byonna Samariya bye yanyaga, biriba bitwaliddwa kabaka wa Assiriya.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Mukama era n'ayogera nange omulundi omulala, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Isaiah8:6 “Abantu bano nga bwe bagaanye amazzi g'akagga Silowa agakulukuta empola, ne basanyukira Rezini ne Peka mutabani wa Remaaliya bajje babayambe," 
Isaiah8:7 kale Nze Afugabyonna nja kuleeta ku bo amazzi amangi era ag'amaanyi ag'Omugga Ewufuraate, ye kabaka wa Assiriya n'ekitiibwa kye kyonna. Amazzi ago galijja ne gajjuza emikutu gya Buyudaaya gyonna, ne gaalaala ku mbalama zaayo zonna." 
Isaiah8:8 Galyeyongera ne gakulukuta okutuuka mu Buyudaaya. Galyalaala ne gasituka ne gakoma mu bulago, ne gatuuka eyo n'eyo, ne gajjuza ensi yo yonna gy'ekoma obugazi, ggwe Emmanweli.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Mwekuŋŋaanye mmwe amawanga, naye mulimenyekamenyeka. Mutege amatu mmwe mwenna ab'omu nsi ez'ewala, mwetegeke okulwana, naye mulimenyekamenyeka. Mwetegeke okulwana, naye mulimenyekamenyeka." 
Isaiah8:10 Mukolere wamu olukwe, naye lujja kugwa butaka; mukkaanye ku kye munaakola, naye tekijja kutuukirira, kubanga Mukama ali wamu naffe." 
Isaiah8:11 Mukama yayogera nange n'obuyinza bwe obw'amaanyi, n'andabula nneme kugoberera mpisa za bantu bano. Yagamba nti:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Ekyo abantu bano kye bayita okwekobaana, ggwe tokiyita kwekobaana, era totya bye batya, era totekemuka." 
Isaiah8:13 Mumanye nga Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ndi mutuukirivu. Nze mubanga mutya, era munzisengamu ekitiibwa." 
Isaiah8:14 Nze kifo ekitukuvu mwe muliwonera. Naye ab'omu bwakabaka bwombi: obwa Yisirayeli n'obwa Buyudaaya, era n'abatuuze b'omu Yerusaalemu nga bwe batakkirizza Nze kubalabirira, ndibafuukira ejjinja kwe beesittala, n'olwazi kwe beekoona ne bagwa, era ndibafuukira omutego n'ekyambika ebibakwasa." 
Isaiah8:15 Ddala bangi abalinneesittalako ne bagwa, ne bamenyeka. Balitegebwa, ne bakwasibwa.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Mmwe abayigirizwa bange, mukuumire ddala bye mbategeezezza, era munyweze bye mbayigirizza." 
Isaiah8:17 Nja kulindirira Mukama atuyambe, newaakubadde kaakano akyekwese ab'ennyumba ya Yakobo, kyokka era mu ye mwe nnassa essuubi lyange." 
Isaiah8:18 Tuutuno, nze n'abaana bange Mukama be yampa. Mukama Nnannyinimagye atuula ku ntebe ye ku Lusozi Siyooni, yatuteekawo tube obubonero n'ebyamagero mu Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah8:19 Kale bwe babagambanga nti: “Mwebuuze ku basamize n'abalaguzi, abakaaba ng'ebinyonyi era aboogera obwama,” temumanyi ng'abantu basaana kwebuuza ku Katonda waabwe? Ebifa ku bulamu ate byebuuzibwa ku bafu?" 
Isaiah8:20 Mubaddangamu nti: “Tunywerere ku Mateeka n'ebyokulabirako Katonda bye yatuwa.” Abo aboogera ne batajuliza ebyo nga bwe biri, mazima balifiira mu kizikiza nga tebunnakya." 
Isaiah8:21 Era banaabungeeteranga mu nsi nga beeraliikirira nnyo, era nga balumwa enjala. Nga bali mu kulumwa enjala, banaanyiiganga ne bakolimira kabaka waabwe ne Katonda waabwe. Wadde balitunula waggulu," 
Isaiah8:22 oba ne batunula wansi ku ttaka, naye tebalibaako kirala kye balaba wabula ennaku n'ekizikiza, kazigizigi ow'okubonyaabonyezebwa, era baligoberwa mu kizikiza ekikutte." 
Isaiah9:1 Naye ekizikiza tekiribeerera eyo awali okubonyaabonyezebwa. Ensi ya Zebbulooni n'ensi ya Nafutaali edda zaali zinyoomebwa, naye gye bujja ekitundu ekyo kiriba kyakitiibwa, okuva ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati, okudda ebuvanjuba emitala wa Yorudaani, n'okutuuka e Galilaaya ey'ab'amawanga amalala." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaabeeranga mu kizikiza, balabye ekitangaala ekingi. N'abaabeeranga mu nsi ekutte kazigizigi ng'ow'emagombe, ekitangaala kibaakidde." 
Isaiah9:3 Oyongedde ab'omu ggwanga okwala, n'obongera okusanyuka. Basanyukira mu maaso go nga bwe basanyuka nga bakungula, oba ng'abasajja bwe basanyuka nga bagabana omunyago." 
Isaiah9:4 Kubanga ekikoligo ekyali kibazitoowerera, n'omuggo ogwabakubanga ku bibegabega, n'oluga lw'abo ababatulugunya, obimenyeemenye ng'edda bwe wamenyaamenya eggye ly'Abamidiyaani." 
Isaiah9:5 Ebigatto by'abaserikale abasaatuuka okulumba, era n'ebyambalo ebikulunguddwa mu musaayi, birifuulibwa enku ne byokebwa omuliro." 
Isaiah9:6 Kubanga omwana atuzaaliddwa ffe, omwana ow'obulenzi atuweereddwa anaabanga omufuzi waffe. Aliyitibwa wa kitalo, Muwi wa magezi Katonda ow'obuyinza, Kitaffe ow'olubeerera, Omulangira ow'Emirembe." 
Isaiah9:7 Okweyongera kw'obufuzi bwe n'okw'emirembe gy'alireeta, tekulibaako kkomo. Alifuga nga ye musika wa Dawudi, era ng'obuyinza bwe abwesigamya ku mazima na bwenkanya, okuva lw'alitandika okufuga n'okutuusa emirembe n'emirembe. Ekyo Mukama Nnannyinimagye alikituukiriza." 
Isaiah9:8 Mukama bye yalabulamu bazzukulu ba Yakobo, bituukiridde ku Ggwanga lya Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Abantu bonna ab'omu Yisirayeli n'abatuuze b'omu Samariya balimanya. Kati boogera n'okwekuza era n'obukakanyavu bw'omutima, nga bagamba nti:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Ebizimbe by'amatoffaali bigudde, naye tujja kuzimbisa mayinja amaase. Enkoma zitemeddwa, naye mu kifo kyazo, tunazzaawo ensambya.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Mukama kyaliva akunga abalabe ba Rezini, n'abakubiriza okulumba Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiriya ebuvanjuba, n'Abafilistiya ebugwanjuba, balyasamya akamwa kaabwe okumira Yisirayeli. Ebyo nga bimaze okuba bwe bityo, Mukama era aliba akyabasunguwalidde. Aliba akyagolodde omukono gwe okubonereza." 
Isaiah9:13 Naye Abayisirayeli tebeenenya newaakubadde nga Mukama Nnannyinimagye yababonereza, era tebaakyuka kudda gy'ali." 
Isaiah9:14 Mukama kyaliva asala ku Yisirayeli omutwe n'omukira, amatabi n'ebikoola mu lunaku lumu." 
Isaiah9:15 Abasajja abakadde era abeekitiibwa gwe mutwe, n'abalanzi abayigiriza eby'obulimba gwe mukira." 
Isaiah9:16 Abo abakulembera abantu bano babakyamya, abo abakulemberwa ne babuzibwabuzibwa." 
Isaiah9:17 N'olwekyo Mukama talireka na bavubuka baabwe kubaako buwonero, era talisaasira bannamwandu baabwe, wadde abaana abafiiriddwako bakitaabwe, kubanga abantu bonna bavvoola era bakola ebibi, era bonna boogera eby'obusiru. Ebyo nga bimaze okubaawo, era Mukama aliba akyabasunguwalidde, era ng'akyagolodde omukono gwe okubonereza." 
Isaiah9:18 Ebyonoono by'abantu, byokya ng'omuliro ogusaanyaawo emyeramannyo n'amaggwa. Gukoleera ne gwokya ebibira, ebire eby'omukka ebikutte ne binyooka, ne birinnya waggulu." 
Isaiah9:19 Olw'obusungu bwa Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ensi ekoledde omuliro, abantu ne baba ng'enku ze gwokya. Tewali n'omu asonyiwa muganda we." 
Isaiah9:20 Buli wantu mu nsi eyo, abantu balinyaga buli kamere ke basanga ne bakalya, era ne batakkuta. Balituuka n'okulya abaana baabwe bennyini." 
Isaiah9:21 Abamanasse n'Abeefurayimu balirumbagana, era balyegatta wamu ne balumba ab'omu Kika kya Yuda. Ebyo byonna nga bimaze okubaawo, era Mukama aliba akyabasunguwalidde, era ng'akyagolodde omukono gwe okubonereza." 
Isaiah10:1 Zibasanze mmwe abateeka amateeka agatali ga bwenkanya, ne muwandiika ebinyigiriza abantu," 
Isaiah10:2 ne mulemesa abanaku okusalirwa amazima, era abaavu ababeera mu bantu bange ne mu banyagako ebyabwe, ebya bannamwandu n'ebya bamulekwa ne mu bifuula omunyago gwammwe." 
Isaiah10:3 Mulikola mutya ku lunaku Mukama lw'aliweerako ekibonerezo? Mulikola mutya lw'alibatuusaako akabi akaliva mu nsi ey'ewala? Muliddukira w'ani okufuna obuyambi? Era mulikweka wa obugagga bwammwe? 
Isaiah10:4 Temuliba na kirala kya kukola wabula okubeera awamu n'abasibe, oba okuttirwa mu lutalo ng'abalala. Ebyo byonna nga bimaze okubaawo, Mukama era aliba akyabasunguwalidde, era aliba akyagolodde omukono okubonereza." 
Isaiah10:5 “Ggwe Assiriya, oli luga lwe nkwata nga nsuguwadde. Omuggo oguli mu ngalo zo, gwe mbonerezesa be nninako ekiruyi." 
Isaiah10:6 Ndituma Assiriya okulumba eggwanga eritanzisaamu kitiibwa, alumbe abantu be nsunguwalidde. Ndimutuma okunyaga ebintu by'abantu abo, okubatulugunya, n'okubalinnyirira ng'ebitoomi eby'omu nguudo.”" 
Isaiah10:7 “Kyokka Assiriya tagenderera kukola Nze kye njagala, era ye takirowoozanako, wabula ekiri mu mutima gwe, kwe kuzikiriza n'okusaanyaawo amawanga amangi." 
Isaiah10:8 Yeewaana nti: ‘Abakulu b'amagye gange bonna, bakabaka." 
Isaiah10:9 Nawangula Ekibuga Kalino, nga bwe nawangula Karukemisi, n'Ekibuga Hamati, nga bwe nawangula Arupaadi. Nawangula ne Samariya nga bwe nawangula Damasiko," 
Isaiah10:10 era nagolola omukono gwange ne nfufuggaza ensi za bakabaka ezisinza ebifaananyi ebibajje, ebisinga n'ebyo ebiri mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Samariya." 
Isaiah10:11 Nga bwe nazikiriza Samariya n'ebifaananyi byamu bye basinza, era bwe ntyo bwe ndizikiriza Yerusaalemu n'ebifaananyi byamu bye basinza.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Bwe ndimaliriza kye nkola ku Lusozi Siyooni ne ku Yerusaalemu, ne ndyoka mbonereza kabaka w'Assiriya olw'okwewaana n'okwekuza kwe." 
Isaiah10:13 Kubanga agamba nti: ‘Ekyo nze nakikola. Ndi wa maanyi, ndi mugezi, era ndi mukalabakalaba. Naggyawo ensalo z'amawanga, ne nnyaga ebyobugagga byago, era ng'omusajja kirimaanyi, ne nninnyirira abatuuze baayo." 
Isaiah10:14 Amawanga mu nsi yonna nasanga gali ng'ekisu ky'ekinyonyi, ne nkuŋŋaanya obugagga bwago ng'akuŋŋaanya amagi agalekeddwa awo, awatali kinyonyi kipapaza kiwaawaatiro, wadde ekyasamya kamwa okukaaba okukanga!’" 
Isaiah10:15 Embazzi eyinza okwewaana nti ye esinga oyo agitemesa? Omusumeeno guyinza okwegulumiza ku muntu agusazisa? N'oluga si lwe luwuuba oyo alukwata, wadde omuggo okusitula omuntu.”" 
Isaiah10:16 N'olwekyo Mukama Afugabyonna Nnannyinimagye alisindika obulwadde obukozza mu basajja abagevvu aba kabaka w'Assiriya. Era mu kifo ky'ekitiibwa ky'abadde yeemanyi, Mukama alikoleezaawo omuliro ogulimwokya." 
Isaiah10:17 Mukama oyo ekitangaala kya Yisirayeli, aliba omuliro. Katonda Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli aliba ennimi z'omuliro, ogulyokya ne gumalawo mu lunaku lumu abo abali ng'amaggwa n'emyeramannyo." 
Isaiah10:18 Alizikiriza eggye eriri ng'ekibira n'ennimiro eŋŋimu, ebiweesa Assiriya ekitiibwa, n'asaanyaawo obulamu n'omubiri, ng'ekirwadde kattira bwe kizikiriza omuntu." 
Isaiah10:19 Emiti egirisigalawo mu kibira ekyo ekya Assiriya, giriba gyamunaganwa, n'omwana omuto ng'ayinza okugibala." 
Isaiah10:20 Ekiseera kirituuka, abo abaliba basigaddewo ku Bayisirayeli, abawonyeewo ku bazzukulu ba Yakobo, ng'obwesige bwabwe tebakyabuteeka mu ggwanga eryo eryabawangula, wabula nga mu mazima babuteeka mu Mukama, Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Abatonotono abaliwonawo ku bazzukulu ba Yakobo, balidda eri Katonda ow'amaanyi." 
Isaiah10:22 Newaakubadde nga kaakano Abayisirayeli bangi ng'omusenyu ogw'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja, naye kitundu butundu ekiriwonawo ku bo kye kirikomawo. Katonda yakisalawo bazikirizibwe nga kibasaanidde." 
Isaiah10:23 Ddala Mukama Afugabyonna Nnannyinimagye ajja kuleeta okuzikirira mu ggwanga lyonna, nga bwe yategeka okukikola." 
Isaiah10:24 N'olwekyo Mukama Afugabyonna Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Mmwe abantu bange, ababeera mu Siyooni, temutya Bassiriya, newaakubadde nga babanyigiriza ne babatulugunya, ng'Abamisiri bwe baakolanga." 
Isaiah10:25 Kubanga akaseera kasigadde katono nnyo, ndekere awo okubasunguwalira mmwe, olwo bo obusungu bwange bulyoke bubazikirize." 
Isaiah10:26 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye ndibakuba bo ne mbabonereza, nga bwe nattira Abamidiyaani ku Lwazi lw'e Orebu. Ndibatta nga bwe nattira Abamisiri mu nnyanja." 
Isaiah10:27 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ndibatikkula mmwe omugugu, Abassiriya gwe baabatikka ku kibegabega, n'ekikoligo kye baabambika mu bulago. Ekikoligo kirizikirizibwa olw'obugevvu bwammwe.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Omulabe atuuse e Ayi, ayise mu Migironi, ebintu bye abiterese e Mikumasi." 
Isaiah10:29 Bayisizza awavvuunukirwa, ne basula e Geba. Ab'omu Kibuga Raama bakankana olw'okutya, ab'omu Kibuga kya Kabaka Sawulo eky'e Gibeya badduse." 
Isaiah10:30 Muleekaane mmwe ab'e Gallimu! Mutege amatu mmwe ab'e Layisa! Nga zibasanze mmwe ab'e Anatooti! 
Isaiah10:31 Ab'e Madumenna badduse, n'ab'omu Gebimu banoonya gye banaddukira." 
Isaiah10:32 Olwaleero omulabe anaasula Noobu. Yeewerera Olusozi Siyooni, aluubirira Ekibuga Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Laba, Mukama Afugabyonna Nnannyinimagye alibawanulayo ng'ettabi eritemwa ku muti ne ligwa. Abawanvu abawagguufu, balitemebwa ne bagwa, n'abagulumivu balitoowazibwa." 
Isaiah10:34 Mukama alibatema n'embazzi, ng'atema emiti mu kibira wakati, Lebanooni ne kisuulibwa ow'amaanyi." 
Isaiah11:1 Ng'akatabi bwe kasibukira ku kikonge ky'omuti ogutemeddwa, ne mu bazzukulu ba Yesse bwe mulisibukamu Kabaka." 
Isaiah11:2 Mwoyo wa Mukama aliba ku ye okumuwa amagezi n'okutegeera, era n'okubuulirira. Alimuwa amaanyi era alimusobozesa okumanya Mukama n'okumussangamu ekitiibwa." 
Isaiah11:3 Essanyu lye linaabeeranga mu kugondera Mukama. Taasalenga misango nga yeesigama ku byakungulu by'alaba oba ku by'awulidde obuwulizi. 
Isaiah11:4 Kyokka anaasalanga emisango gy'abaavu ng'agoberera mazima, era anaataasanga eby'abatalina mwasirizi ng'akolera ku bwenkanya. Aliwa ekiragiro mu nsi, abantu ne babonerezebwa era ababi ne battibwa." 
Isaiah11:5 Obufuzi bwe alibwesigamya ku bwenkanya na ku bwesigwa. 
Isaiah11:6 Omusege n'endiga ento binaabeeranga wamu mu ddembe, era engo n'embuzi ento binaagalamiranga wamu. Ennyana empologoma, n'ente eyassava, zinaabanga wamu ng'omwana omuto ye azirunda." 
Isaiah11:7 N'ente n'eddubu zinaaliranga wamu, n'abaana baazo bagalamirenga wamu mu ddembe. N'empologoma eneeryanga muddo ng'ente." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana akyayonka anaazannyiranga ku kinnya ky'enswera, n'omuto eyaakava ku mabeere, anaateekanga omukono gwe mu kinnya omuli essalambwa." 
Isaiah11:9 Ku Siyooni, Olusozi lwa Katonda Olutukuvu, tewaliba kikola bulabe wadde okuzikiriza, kubanga ensi erijjula okumanya Mukama, ng'ennyanja bw'ejjula amazzi." 
Isaiah11:10 Olunaku lulituuka, oyo asibuka mu Yesse, n'aba akabonero eri amawanga. Amawanga ago galikuŋŋaanira w'ali, era ekifo mw'afugira kiriba kyakitiibwa." 
Isaiah11:11 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Mukama aliddamu okukozesa obuyinza bwe, abantu be abaliba basigaddewo n'abakomyawo ng'abaggya mu Assiriya, ne mu Misiri ne mu Paturoosi, ne mu Kuusi, ne mu Elamu, ne mu Sinaari, ne mu Hamati, ne mu bizinga ebiri mu nnyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Mukama aliwanikira amawanga bbendera, okubalaga nti alikuŋŋaanya n'aleeta wamu abo abaagobebwa mu Yisirayeli ne mu Buyudaaya, ng'abaggya gye baasaasaanyizibwa mu njuyi zonna ennya ez'ensi." 
Isaiah11:13 Obuggya bw'Abeefurayimu buliggwaawo, n'abalabe ba Buyudaaya balizikirizibwa. Obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli tebulikwatirwa bwakabaka bwa Buyudaaya buggya, ne Buyudaaya teriba mulabe wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah11:14 Balyetaba wamu ne balumba Abafilistiya ebugwanjuba, era ne banyaga abantu ab'ebuvanjuba. Baliwangula Abeedomu n'Abamowaabu, era Abammoni balibagondera." 
Isaiah11:15 Mukama alikozesa empewo ye ey'amaanyi, n'akaliza ddala ekikono ky'ennyanja y'e Misiri. Era aligolola omukono gwe ku Mugga Ewufuraate, n'agwawulamu obugga musanvu, abantu bwe basomoka nga tebatobye na bigere," 
Isaiah11:16 ne walyoka wabaawo oluguudo, abantu be Abayisirayeli abaliwonawo mwe baliyita, nga bava mu Assiriya, nga bwe waaliwo olwo Abayisirayeli mwe baayita, nga bava mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu baliyimba nti: “Nnaakwebaza, ayi Mukama. Ggwe eyali ansunguwalidde, obusungu bwo buweddewo, era kaakati onsanyusizza." 
Isaiah12:2 Ddala Katonda ye Mulokozi wange, nnaamwesiganga ne sitya. Mukama Oyo ow'Olubeerera ge maanyi gange, era Ye gwe nnyimba, Ye wuuyo Omulokozi wange." 
Isaiah12:3 Ng'amazzi amalungi bwe gasanyusa abayonta, n'abantu ba Katonda bwe basanyuka ng'abalokodde.”" 
Isaiah12:4 Olunaku lulituuka ne mugamba nti: “Mwebaze Mukama, mumutendereze. Mumanyise ab'omu mawanga ebyamagero by'akola. Mubategeeze nga bw'ali oweekitiibwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Muyimbe nga mutendereza Mukama, olw'ebikulu by'akoze. Mubimanyise ensi yonna." 
Isaiah12:6 Muyimbe n'essanyu musaakaanye mmwe abatuuze b'omu Siyooni, kubanga Katonda Omutuukirivu owa Yisirayeli, mukulu, ate ali wakati mu mmwe.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Buno bwe bubaka obufa ku Babilooni, Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi bwe yafuna mu kulabikirwa." 
Isaiah13:2 “Muwanike bbendera y'olutalo ku lusozi olutaliiko muddo. Mukoowoole abaserikale, mubawenye n'omukono, bayingire mu miryango gy'ekibuga ekirimu abakungu." 
Isaiah13:3 Nze Mukama, ndagidde abawonge bange, era basajja bange ab'amaanyi, abeenyumiririza mu kitiibwa kyange, mbayise okubonereza abo be nsunguwalidde.”" 
Isaiah13:4 Muwulire okuyoogaana okuli ku nsozi, okuyoogaana ng'okw'ekibiina ky'abantu ekinene, okuyoogaana kw'obwakabaka bw'amawanga agakuŋŋaanye. Mukama Nnannyinimagye akuŋŋaanyizza eggye okulwana olutalo." 
Isaiah13:5 Bava mu nsi y'ewala, ku nkomerero y'ensi. Mukama ng'ali wamu n'abo b'akozesa bw'asunguwala, ajja okuzikiriza ensi yonna." 
Isaiah13:6 Mukube ebiwoobe, kubanga olunaku lwa Mukama luli kumpi, olunaku Omuyinzawaabyonna lw'alireeterako okuzikirira." 
Isaiah13:7 Emikono gya buli muntu giritekemuka, era omutima gwa buli omu guliyenjebuka." 
Isaiah13:8 Abantu bonna balitya, era balijjula obulumi, ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala. Balitunulaganako mu kutya, amaaso gaabwe ne gajjula ensonyi." 
Isaiah13:9 Olunaku lwa Mukama luulwo lujja, olunaku olukambwe, luliraga obusungu bwe n'ekiruyi kye, okusaanyaawo ensi, okuzikiriza n'okugimaliramu ddala abalina ebibi." 
Isaiah13:10 Emmunyeenye kinneemu, ne mu bibinja byazo, zirirekera awo okwaka, n'enjuba erikwata ekizikiza ng'evaayo, n'omwezi teguliwa kitangaala kyagwo." 
Isaiah13:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndituusa akabi ku nsi, era ndibonereza abantu olw'ebibi byabwe. Ndikomya olwetumbu lw'abeegulumiza, era nditoowaza buli eyeekulumbaza n'atiisatiisa abalala." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndifuula abantu okuba ab'omuwendo okusinga zaabu omulungi, ddala baliba ba bbula okusinga zaabu ow'e Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ndikankanya eggulu, n'ensi erinyeenyezebwa n'eva mu kifo kyayo, ku lunaku Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye lwe ndiragirako obusungu bwange n'ekiruyi." 
Isaiah13:14 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abagwira balidduka, nga bali ng'empeewo egobebwa abayizzi, era nga basaasaanye ng'endiga ezitaliiko musumba, buli omu okudda mu bantu be mu nsi y'ewaabwe." 
Isaiah13:15 Buli gwe baligwikiriza, alifumitibwa, na buli gwe baliwamba, aliba wa kuttibwa." 
Isaiah13:16 Abaana baabwe abawere balikubwa wansi ne babetentebwa, nga bo bennyini balaba. Ennyumba zaabwe zirinyagibwamu ebintu, ne bakazi baabwe balikwatibwa olw'empaka.”" 
Isaiah13:17 Mukama agamba nti: “Laba ndibawendulira Abameedi abatafa ku ffeeza, era abatasikirizibwa zaabu, ne babalumba." 
Isaiah13:18 Balikozesa emitego n'obusaale, ne batta abavubuka. Tebalisaasira mabujje, wadde okubaako omwana omuto gwe basonyiwa.”" 
Isaiah13:19 Babilooni ekiweesa obwakabaka ekitiibwa, era ekirungi ekyeyagaza Abakaludaaya, kiriba nga Sodoma ne Gomora, Katonda bye yazikiriza." 
Isaiah13:20 Tekiriddamu kubeeramu bantu emirembe gyonna. Tewaliba Muwarabu asimbayo weema, wadde abasumba abalundirayo amagana gaabwe." 
Isaiah13:21 Ensolo enkambwe ez'omu ddungu ze zinaabeerangayo, n'ennyumba zaabwe zirijjulamu ebintu ebisindogoma. Ne bimmaaya binaabeeranga eyo, n'emisambwa ginaaziniranga eyo." 
Isaiah13:22 Emisege gye ginaakaabiranga mu minaala gyabwe, n'ebibe mu mayumba gaabwe ag'ekinyumu. Ekiseera kya Babilooni eky'enkomerero kiri kumpi kutuuka, n'ennaku zaakyo zinaatera okuggwaako." 
Isaiah14:1 Mukama aliddamu okukwatirwa ekisa aba Yakobo, addemu okulonda Abayisirayeli babe bantu be, era alibazzaayo mu nsi yaabwe, mwe baba babeera. N'abagwira balijja ne babeeranga wamu ne bazzukulu ba Yakobo abo, ne babeekwatirako ddala." 
Isaiah14:2 Amawanga mangi galiyamba Abayisirayeli okuddayo mu nsi yaabwe, Mukama gye yabawa, era ab'amawanga amalala baliba abaddu n'abazaana okubaweerezanga. Abayisirayeli baliwamba abo abaabawambanga, era banaafuganga abo abaabajoonyesanga." 
Isaiah14:3 Ekiseera kirituuka, Mukama n'abawa mmwe okuwummula mu kubonaabona ne mu kutegana, ne mu mirimu emikakali gye mwawalirizibwanga okukola." 
Isaiah14:4 Mulikudaalira kabaka wa Babilooniya, nga mugamba nti: “Omufuzi kalibukambwe akomye? N'obukambwe bwe kati lufumo?" 
Isaiah14:5 Mukama akomezza obuyinza bw'ab'effugabbi, amenye omuggo gw'obwakabaka bwabwe" 
Isaiah14:6 abaatulugunyanga n'obukambwe amawanga olutata, abaafuganga n'ekiruyi amawanga nga bafuuse bannantagambwako?" 
Isaiah14:7 Ensi yonna kaakano ewummudde, eteredde ntende. Abantu babaguka ne bayimba." 
Isaiah14:8 Ddala emisizi gijaganya olw'okugwa kwo, n'emivule gy'oku Lebanooni gigamba nti: ‘Kasookedde ofa, tewakyali atutema!’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Ab'emagombe wansi, bagugumuse ku lulwo, okukwaniriza ng'ojja. Bagolokosa bonna abaliyo, abaali abafuzi ku nsi. Bonna abaali bakabaka, basituse ku ntebe zaabwe." 
Isaiah14:10 Bonna abo balisaakaanya ne bakugamba nti: ‘Leero naawe ofuuse munafu nga ffe? Ofaananira ddala nga ffe? 
Isaiah14:11 Ekitiibwa kyo n'ennyimba ze bakuyimbira, bisse, biri magombe! Weeyalidde nvunyu, era nvunyu ze weebisse!’" 
Isaiah14:12 “Ggwe emmunyeenye y'oku makya, ayaka ennyo n'omyansa, owanuse ku ggulu n'ogwa! Ggwe eyafufuggazanga amawanga, oli ku ttaka omeggeddwa!" 
Isaiah14:13 “Mu mutima gwo walowoozanga ng'olirinnya mu ggulu, osse entebe yo waggulu w'emmunyeenye za Katonda, era ng'olituula ku lusozi balubaale lwe bakuŋŋaanirako, ewala eyo mu bukiikakkono." 
Isaiah14:14 Wagamba nti olirinnya n'otumbiira era n'ebire n'obiyisa, n'obeerera ddala ng'Oli Atenkanika." 
Isaiah14:15 Naye ossiddwa magombe, wansi ku ntobo y'obunnya." 
Isaiah14:16 “Eyo abakulaba, baneewuunyanga ne bagamba nti: ‘Ono ye wuuyo eyakankanyanga ensi, obwakabaka ne buyuuguuma?" 
Isaiah14:17 Ye ono eyazikirizanga ebibuga, ensi n'agifuula eddungu? Ye wuuno ataatanga basibe, kubaleka badde ewaabwe?’" 
Isaiah14:18 “Bakabaka bonna ab'ensi, baziikibwa mu kitiibwa mu masiro ge babazimbidde." 
Isaiah14:19 Naye ggwe toliiko malaalo, osuuliddwa kuvundira bweru. Obikkiddwa mirambo gy'abo abattiddwa mu lutalo, ng'osuuliddwa wamu nabo mu kinnya ky'amayinja, n'oba omulambo ogulinnyirirwa n'ebigere." 
Isaiah14:20 Nga bwe wazikiriza ensi yo, abantu bo n'obatta, toliziikibwa nga bakabaka banno. Ezzadde ly'abakozi b'ebibi liryerabirwa ennaku zonna." 
Isaiah14:21 Mutegekere abaana be okuttibwa olw'ebibi bya bajjajjaabwe, baleme kuyimuka ne balya ensi, ne bagijjuza yonna ebibuga.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ndirumba Babilooni ne nkizikiriza, kibuleko erinnya n'abawonyeewo, kibuleko omwana n'omuzzukulu. Nze Mukama, bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋambye." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndifuula Babilooni amaka ga nnamunnungu n'ebidiba by'amazzi, era ndikyera n'olweyo oluzikiriza. Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋambye.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Mukama Nnannyinimagye alayidde nti: “Mazima nga bwe ntegese, bwe kinaatuukirira; era nga bwe nsazeewo, bwe kinaakolebwa." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndittira Abassiriya mu nsi yange, ne mbalinnyirira n'ebigere ku nsozi zange. Olwo ekikoligo kiribavaako mmwe, kye babasibye; n'omugugu gwe babatisse, guliva ku bibegabega byammwe." 
Isaiah14:26 Ekyo kye ntegekedde ensi, era ngolodde omukono gwange, mbonereze amawanga gonna.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Mukama Nnannyinimagye ky'ateesezza, tewali ayinza kukijjulula, n'omukono gwe ogugoloddwa, tewali ayinza kuguzzaayo." 
Isaiah14:28 Bino byalangwa mu mwaka, Kabaka Ahazi mwe yafiira." 
Isaiah14:29 “Mmwe Abafilistiya, temusanyuka wadde ng'omuggo ogwabakuba mwenna gumenyese. Awabadde omusota ogwa nnawandagala waliddawo ssalambwa! Ne mu ggi lyalyo mulivaamu musota ogubuuka mu bbanga, era oguwandula omuliro. 2:4-7; Zek 9:5-7" 
Isaiah14:30 Mukama ye aliba omusumba aliisa abantu be abanaku ennyo; n'abatalina kantu, balibeera mirembe. Kyokka mmwe Abafilistiya, Mukama alibassa enjala. N'abaliba bawonyeewo nabo balittibwa." 
Isaiah14:31 Muwowoggane, mukaabe mmwe ababeera mu bibuga! Mujja kusaanawo mmwe, Abafilistiya mwenna! Kubanga ekire eky'enfuufu ekiva ebukiikakkono kijja. Eryo lye ggye ly'abalabe, omutali mutiitiizi!" 
Isaiah14:32 Kale ababaka b'eggwanga eryo balyanukulwa batya? Nti ‘Mukama yateekawo Siyooni era mu kyo abantu be abateeyamba mwe baliddukira.’ ” 
Isaiah15:1 Buno obubaka bufa ku Mowaabu. Ebibuga bya Mowaabu Ari ne Kiiri birizikirira mu kiro kimu, ne bifuuka matongo. 2:8-11" 
Isaiah15:2 Abantu b'e Diboni balinnye akasozi, bakaabire eyo amaziga. Abamowaabu bakungubagira ebibuga Nebo ne Medeba. Era okulaga obunakuwavu, basazeeko enviiri n'ebirevu." 
Isaiah15:3 Abantu bonna mu nguudo, bikutiya bye bambadde. Waggulu ku nnyumba zaabwe ne mu bibangirizi by'ebibuga biwoobe bye bakuba, nga bakaaba nnyo amaziga." 
Isaiah15:4 Ab'e Hesubooni ne Eleyaale batema miranga myereere, era eddoboozi lyabwe liwulirwa okutuukira ddala e Yahazi. N'abaserikale ba Mowaabu bakaaba nga baleekaana, olw'encukwe muli ebakubye." 
Isaiah15:5 Nnumirwa Abamowaabu abo! Abakungu baabwe baddukira e Zowari, n'e Egulaati Selisiya. Abamu bambukidde mu kkubo ly'e Luhiiti nga bambuka bakaaba amaziga. Abalala bakutte ly'e Horonayimu, nga bakaaba olw'obutaba na ssuubi lya kuwona." 
Isaiah15:6 Akagga Nimurimu kakalidde. Omuddo ku mabbali gaako guwotose, ebimera ebigimu biweddewo, tewakyali kintu kimerawo." 
Isaiah15:7 Ebintu ebingi bye bafunye, n'ebyo bye baali baterese, kyebaliva babiddusa nga babiyisa mu Kiwonvu ky'emiti egy'enzingu." 
Isaiah15:8 Okukaaba kuwulirwa wonna ku nsalo za Mowaabu, okuwoggana kwayo kuwulirwa ne mu Yegulayiimu, ne mu Beereliimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Amazzi g'e Dimoni gajjudde omusaayi, era Mukama alireeta n'akabi akalala ku bantu baayo. Empologoma zirirya abaliwonawo ku Bamowaabu, abasigaddewo mu nsi eyo." 
Isaiah16:1 Okuva mu Kibuga Seela ekiri mu ddungu, muweereze ekirabo eky'endiga ento eri Oyo afuga mu Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah16:2 Abamowaabu balindira ku mbalama z'Omugga Arunoni, nga babungeetera okwo ng'ennyonyi ezigobeddwa mu kisu ne zisaasaana." 
Isaiah16:3 Bagamba ab'omu Buyudaaya nti: “Mutubuulire eky'okukola. Mutubikkirire ng'omuti oguwa ekisiikirize mu ttuntu ery'ekyeya. Muleke twewogome mu kyo. Tuli babungeese, mutukweke aweekusifu we bataatulabe." 
Isaiah16:4 Mutuleke tubeere mu nsi yammwe mutuwonye oyo atuzikiriza, kubanga okunyigiriza n'okuzikiriza bwe birikoma, abo abanyagulula ensi baligenda.”" 
Isaiah16:5 Olwo omu ku b'ezzadde lya Dawudi, alituula ku ntebe ey'obwakabaka. Alifuga abantu nga musaasizi, era ng'alamuza mazima. Aliba mwangu mu kukola ebituufu, era alifugisa bwenkanya." 
Isaiah16:6 Ab'omu Buyudaaya bagamba nti: “Tuwulidde Abamowaabu nga bwe bali abeekuza. Tumanyi nga beekulumbaza nnyo, era beepanka, kyokka beewaanira bwereere.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Abamowaabu balikaaba, bonna balikaaba olw'okubonaabona. Balinakuwala bwe balijjukira emmere ennungi gye baalyanga mu Kibuga Kiiri Hareseeti. Balituuka okuterebuka." 
Isaiah16:8 Eby'omu nnimiro z'e Hesubooni biwotose, era n'emizabbibu gy'e Sibuma. Egyo mwe mwasogolwanga omwenge ogwatamiizanga abafuzi b'amawanga. Amatabi gaagyo gaalanda okutuukira ddala e Yazeri ne gatuuka mu ddungu, ne galanda ne ku ludda olulala, ne gasomoka Ennyanja Enfu." 
Isaiah16:9 Kale ndikaabira emizabbibu gy'e Sibuma, nga bwe ndikaabira Yazeri. Ndifukumula amaziga olwa Hesubooni n'olwa Eleyaale, kubanga amakungula gammwe galisaanikirwa emiranga gy'olutalo." 
Isaiah16:10 Kaakano tewali asanyuka mu misiri emigimu, tewali ayimba olw'essanyu mu nnimiro z'emizabbibu. Tewali asogola mizabbibu kugikolamu mwenge. Nkomezza emizira gy'abasogozi." 
Isaiah16:11 Kyenva nnyolwa olwa Mowaabu, ne nennyamira olwa Kiiri Heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Abamowaabu balyekooyeza bwereere okugenda mu bifo ebigulumivu okusaba balubaale baabwe. Tebalifunamu mugaso. 
Isaiah16:13 Obwo bwe bubaka Mukama bwe yawa ku Mowaabu edda. 
Isaiah16:14 Naye kaakano Mukama agamba nti: “Emyaka esatu, ng'egiragaanibwa oyo akolera empeera, oluliggwaako, ekitiibwa kya Mowaabu kiriba tekikyaliwo. Ku bantu ba Mowaabu abangi, waliba wasigaddewo batono nnyo, era nga tebakyalina maanyi.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Bino bye byalangibwa ku Damasiko: “Laba Damasiko kiggyiddwawo, tekikyali kibuga era kinaabanga ntuumu ey'ebimenyeddwamenyeddwa." 
Isaiah17:2 Ebibuga bya Aroweri birekeddwawo ttayo. Binaabeeranga malundiro ga ndiga na mbuzi, mwe zinaagalamiranga awatali azikanga." 
Isaiah17:3 Abeefurayimu banaabanga tebakyaliko bigo bibataasa, nga ne Damasiko tekikyalina bwakabaka. Abasiriya abaliwonawo nabo baliba mu kuswala ng'ab'omu Yisirayeli. Mukama Nnannyinimagye, bw'atyo bw'agambye." 
Isaiah17:4 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ekitiibwa kya Yakobo kirikendeera, ne mu kifo ky'okugejja, n'akogga." 
Isaiah17:5 Yisirayeli eriba ng'ennimiro esaliddwamu eŋŋaano ekunguddwa. Eriba nkalu ng'omusiri gw'omu Kiwonvu Refayiimu, gwe bamaze okulondamu ebirimba." 
Isaiah17:6 Naye mu Yisirayeli mulisigalamu abantu abatonotono ng'omuzayiti ogunogeddwako ebibala bwe gusigazaako ebibiri oba ebisatu waggulu ku busongezo obukomererayo, n'ebibala ebina oba ebitaano mu matabi gaagwo amaziyivu. Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, bw'atyo bw'agambye.”" 
Isaiah17:7 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abantu balissa omutima ku Mutonzi waabwe, amaaso bagakyusize eri Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Baliba tebakyesiga zaalutaari ze beekolera n'emikono gyabwe, oba okwesiga ebirala bye bakoze, oba ebifaananyi bya lubaale Asera wadde zaalutaari kwe banyookereza obubaane." 
Isaiah17:9 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ebibuga eby'amaanyi biriba ebifulukwa ng'ebiri mu bibira n'ebiri ku ntikko z'ensozi, ebyayabulirwa ng'Abayisirayeli batuuka, era birizika ne bifuuka matongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Ggwe Yisirayeli, weerabidde Katonda akuwonya, era ali ng'olwazi olugumu mwe weewogoma, kyovudde osimba emiti egisanyusa n'ogiwongera balubaale." 
Isaiah17:11 Naye ne bwe ginaakulirawo ne gimulisizaawo ku makya g'olunaku lw'ogisimbiddeko, era tewaliba bikungulwa, wabula okunakuwala era n'okukungubaga." 
Isaiah17:12 Ha, wulira okuyira kw'abantu abangi, kuli ng'okuyira kw'ennyanja! Wulira okuwuluguma kw'amawanga, kuli ng'okuwuluguma kw'amayengo ag'amaanyi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Amawanga gawuluguma ng'amayengo g'amazzi amangi. Kyokka Katonda aligakomako, ne gaddukira wala. Galiba ng'ebisusunku ku lusozi ebikuŋŋunsibwa kibuyaga, era galiba ng'enfuufu mu mbuyaga ey'akazimu." 
Isaiah17:14 Balireeta entiisa akawungeezi, naye we bulikeerera, baliba tebakyaliwo. Ogwo gwe guliba omugabo gw'abo abatunyaga, era ye eriba empeera y'abo abatubbako ebyaffe." 
Isaiah18:1 Emitala w'emigga gy'e Kuusi, waaliwo ensi ewulirwamu okukubagana kw'ebiwaawaatiro." 
Isaiah18:2 Ensi eyo etuma ababaka ku nnyanja bayite ku mazzi mu bibaya, ng'egamba nti: “Mugende mu bwangu mu nsi eyawulwamu emigga, mutwalire obubaka abantu abawanvu era ab'olususu oluweweevu, abaakuba ensi yonna entiisa kasookedde babaawo n'okutuusa kati. Obubaka bugamba nti:" 
Isaiah18:3 ‘Mwenna abatuuze b'omu nsi, abantu abali mu buli ggwanga, mutunulanga ne mulaba nga bbendera esimbiddwa ku nsozi, ng'ekkondeere lifuuyiddwa.’" 
Isaiah18:4 Kubanga Mukama aŋŋambye nti: ‘Mu kifo kyange mwe mpummulira, ndisirika ne ntunuulira, nga ndi ng'ebbugumu eribuubuukira mu kasana akeememula, era ng'omusulo ogusitukira mu lubugumu lw'obudde obw'amakungula.’" 
Isaiah18:5 Alizikiriza abaserikale b'abantu abo nga tebannalumba, nga bwe kyandikoleddwa ku muti ng'okumulisa kuwedde, n'ebimuli nga bifuuse ebibala ebyengedde, naye okukungula nga tekunnabaawo, oli n'atema amatabi n'agawanulayo yonna gye galandidde." 
Isaiah18:6 Emirambo gyabwe girirekebwa awo okuvaabirwa ebinyonyi eby'oku nsozi n'ebisolo ebikambwe ebiruvu. Ebinyonyi birigyeriira mu kyeya, n'ebisolo ne bigyekavvulira mu biseera eby'obutiti." 
Isaiah18:7 Abantu abo abawanvu ab'olususu oluweweevu abaakuba ensi yonna entiisa kasookedde babaawo n'okutuusa kati, era abalina ensi eyawulwamu emigga, ekiseera kirituuka ne baleetera ekirabo Mukama Nnannyinimagye mu kifo kye bamusinzizaamu ku Lusozi Siyooni.”" 
Isaiah19:1 Bino bye byalangibwa ku Misiri. Laba Mukama yeebagadde ekire ekidduka emisinde, ajja e Misiri. Ebifaananyi bya balubaale baayo, birikankanira mu maaso ge, era Abamisiri baliggwaamu omutima." 
Isaiah19:2 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndireeta olutalo mu Bamisiri buli muntu n'alwana ne muganda we era buli omu ne muliraanwa we, ekibuga ne kirwana n'ekibuga kinnaakyo, ne bakabaka ne bavuganya ku buyinza." 
Isaiah19:3 Nditabulatabula ebyo Abamisiri bye bategeka, ne mbamalamu amaanyi. Balyebuuza ku balubaale ne ku basamize n'abalogo, ne ku boogererwako emizimu." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndiwaayo Abamisiri ne bafugibwa omufuzi musibiramubbwa; kabaka omukambwe alibafuga. Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Nze ŋŋambye.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Amazzi ga Kiyira galikendeera, mpolampola omugga ogwo gulikalira." 
Isaiah19:6 N'emikutu gyagwo giriwunya nga giggwaamu mpola amazzi, ebitoogo n'ebisaalu ne biwotoka." 
Isaiah19:7 Omuddo n'ebisigibwa byonna ku lubalama lw'omugga ogwo, biriwotoka ne bifa, ne bisaanawo ne bivaawo." 
Isaiah19:8 Era abaloba n'abavubiramu, balinakuwala ne bakaaba. Amalobo n'obutimba bye balina, biriba tebikyabagasa." 
Isaiah19:9 Abakola ebirukibwa mu bugoogwa, n'abatunga engoye eza ppamba, biribabula ne basoberwa." 
Isaiah19:10 Era n'empagi kwe balukira zirimenyebwa zonna, era abo abakolera empeera balibulwa olwo essuubi." 
Isaiah19:11 Abakulembeze b'e Zowani, gabaweddeko amagezi. Abawabuzi ba Kabaka w'e Misiri bamubuulira bimuwubisa. Kale bamugamba batya nti ddala bo be basika ab'abawi b'amagezi, n'aba bassekabaka ab'edda?" 
Isaiah19:12 Kale kabaka w'e Misiri, baluwa abakuwa amagezi? Kaakano oba bamanyi, bakubuulire Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye kye nteeseza Misiri." 
Isaiah19:13 Abakulembeze b'e Zowani gabaweddeko amagezi, n'abakulira Menfiisi nabo bawubisiddwa. Misiri abandigiwabudde, kati baabo bagikyamizza!" 
Isaiah19:14 Mukama abataddemu omwoyo ogw'okuwubisawubisa, ne bawubisa Misiri mu bikolebwa byonna, n'etaga ng'omutamiivu avuyira mu by'asesemye!" 
Isaiah19:15 Kati mu nsi ya Misiri temuli mukulu oba muto, mukulembeze oba afugibwa, akola ebinaagigasa." 
Isaiah19:16 Ekiseera kirituuka, Abamisiri ne batya ng'abakazi. Balitya ne bakankana, bwe baliraba nga Mukama Nnannyinimagye agolodde omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah19:17 Eggwanga lya Buyudaaya lirikwasa Abamisiri entiisa. Buli awulira nga balyogerako anaatyanga, olw'ebyo Mukama Nnannyinimagye by'ategese okubatuusaako." 
Isaiah19:18 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, olulimi Olukanaani lulyogerwa mu bibuga bya Misiri bitaano, ng'abantu baayo balayira Mukama Nnannyinimagye. Ekibuga ekimu ku byo kiriyitibwa “Kibuga kya Kuzikirira.”" 
Isaiah19:19 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, mu nsi y'e Misiri mulibaamu alutaari ewongereddwa Mukama, era ku nsalo y'ensi eyo kulibaako empagi ey'ejjinja emuwongereddwa." 
Isaiah19:20 Obwo buliba bubonero era obujulizi obulaga Mukama Nnannyinimagye nga bw'ali mu nsi y'e Misiri. Era Abamisiri bwe balikoowoola Mukama nga banyigirizibwa, alibatumira omuyambi ow'amaanyi alibataasa, n'abawonya." 
Isaiah19:21 Mukama alyemanyisa mu Bamisiri, ne bamumanya mu kiseera ekyo, ne bamusinza, ne bawaayo gy'ali ebitambiro n'ekitone. Balibaako ne bye bamusuubiza nga beeyama, era bye beeyamye, balibituukiriza." 
Isaiah19:22 Mukama alibonereza Abamisiri, kyokka ate b'abonerezza alibawonya. Balikyukira gy'ali, ne bamwegayirira, n'abawonya." 
Isaiah19:23 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, walibaawo oluguudo oluva mu Misiri okugenda mu Assiriya. Abassiriya balijja mu Misiri, n'Abamisiri ne bagenda mu Assiriya, era Abamisiri n'Abassiriya balisinziza wamu Mukama." 
Isaiah19:24 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, Yisirayeli aliba ku lubu lwe lumu ne Misiri era ne Assiriya, era amawanga ago gonsatule, galiweesa ensi yonna omukisa," 
Isaiah19:25 kubanga Mukama Nnannyinimagye aligawa omukisa ng'agamba nti: “Misiri Eggwanga lyange, ne Assiriya Nze Nzennyini lye natonda, ne Yisirayeli lye neeroboza okuba eryange, gaweebwe omukisa.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Mu mwaka omuduumizi w'eggye mwe yalumbira Ekibuga Asudoodi, ng'atumiddwa Sarugoni Kabaka wa Assiriya, omuduumizi oyo yakikuba n'akiwamba." 
Isaiah20:2 Mu kiseera kye kimu ekyo, Mukama n'agamba Yisaaya mutabani wa Amozi nti: “Genda weeyambulemu ekikutiya ky'oyambadde, era weenaanulemu n'engatto mu bigere.” Yisaaya n'akola bw'atyo, n'atambula ng'ali bwereere era nga tayambadde na ngatto." 
Isaiah20:3 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Omuweereza wange Yisaaya amaze emyaka esatu ng'atambula ali bukunya, okulaga ebirituuka ku b'e Misiri n'ab'e Kuusi." 
Isaiah20:4 Ne kabaka wa Assiriya bw'atyo bw'alitwala abasibe ab'e Misiri n'ab'e Kuusi, abato n'abakulu, nga bali bukunya era nga tebambadde na ngatto, n'amakugunyu gaabwe nga tegabikkiddwako, ekyo kiswazeswaze Misiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Abo abaali beesiga Kuusi okubayamba, n'abaali beenyumiririza mu Misiri, balisoberwa ne baswala." 
Isaiah20:6 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abantu ab'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja baligamba nti: ‘Mulabe ekituuse ku be twali twesiga okututaasa Kabaka wa Assiriya! Kale olwo ffe tuliwona tutya?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Bino bye byalangibwa nga bifa ku Ddungu Eririraanye Ennyanja. Nga kibuyaga ava ebukiikaddyo bw'ayitira mu ddungu, n'akabi bwe kaliva katyo mu nsi ey'entiisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Ndabidde mu kulabikirwa ebizibu ebirigwawo. Ndabye omulyazaamaanyi ng'alyazaamaanya, n'oyo azikiriza, ng'azikiriza! Ggwe eggye lya Elamu, lumba; naawe eggye lya Mediya, zingiza, Katonda amalewo ennaku yonna Babilooni gy'aleeta." 
Isaiah21:3 Obulumi bwe mpulira, bujula na kunzita! Ndi ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala, obulumi tebuŋŋanya kulaba na kuwulira." 
Isaiah21:4 Mpejjawejja nzenna, okwesisiwala kunkanze. Akazikiza ke mbadde neegomba, kati kanfuukidde ka ntiisa." 
Isaiah21:5 Ndaba ekijjulo ekitegekeddwa, bataddewo abakuumi, batuula ne balya, ne banywa, ne babalagira amangwago nti: “Abakulu mu ggye, musituke, musiige engabo zammwe omuzigo!”" 
Isaiah21:6 Awo Mukama n'agamba nti: “Genda oteekewo omukuumi, alangirire ky'anaalabayo." 
Isaiah21:7 Bw'alaba ekibinja ky'ababiribabiri, abeebagadde embalaasi, n'abali ku ndogoyi era n'abali ku ŋŋamiya, yeetegereze bulungi, yekkaanye.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Omukuumi n'aleekaana mu ddoboozi ng'ery'empologoma, nti: “Mukama wange, nkuuma wano emisana n'ekiro!”" 
Isaiah21:9 Amangwago ne wajja babiribabiri abeebagadde embalaasi. Omukuumi n'agamba nti: “Babilooni kigudde, kigudde, n'ebifaananyi byonna ebyole ebya balubaale baakyo bimenyese, biri ku ttaka we bigudde.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Ayi abantu bange Abayisirayeli, mubadde muwuulibwa ng'eŋŋaano eri mu gguuliro lyange. Naye kati mbatuusizzaako amawulire ag'ebyo bye mpulidde, ebivudde eri Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah21:11 Bino bye byalangibwa ku Edomu. Waliwo ampita ng'asinziira ku Lusozi Seyiri nti: “Omukuumi, omukuumi ekiro kyagenze kitya? Ekiro kyakuyisizza kitya?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Omukuumi n'agamba nti: “Bujja kukya era buzibe. Bwe mwagala okubuuza, mubuuze, mukyuke, mujje.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Bino bye byalangibwa ku Buwarabu: “Mmwe ebibinja by'Abadedani abatambula, mu malungu g'e Buwarabu mwe mulisula." 
Isaiah21:14 Mmwe abatuuze b'e Teema, abayonta abaddukira gye muli mubawe amazzi, n'abayala mubawe kye banaalya." 
Isaiah21:15 Badduka bitala ebisowoddwa, na mitego gya busaale eginaanuddwa; badduka kibambulira kya lutalo.”" 
Isaiah21:16 Afugabyonna aŋŋambye nti: “Omwaka gumu olunaggwaako gumu ng'ogulagaanibwa akolera empeera, tewaliba kitiibwa kya Bakedari kyonna." 
Isaiah21:17 Abalasi b'obusaale mu Bakedari be basingayo obuzira, naye abaliwonawo batono. Nze Mukama Katonda bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋambye.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Bino bye byalangibwa nga bifa ku kiwonvu ky'Okulabikirwa: Kiki ekibatuuseeko, ekibalinnyisizza ku busolya bw'ennyumba?" 
Isaiah22:2 Ggwe ekibuga ekijjudde okuleekaana, ekikyankalanye, ekiri mu kwesiima, abantu bo abattiddwa tebattiddwa kitala, wadde okufiira mu lutalo." 
Isaiah22:3 Abakulembeze bo bonna, baddukira wamu ne bawambibwa nga tebalasizza na kasaale, bonna abasangiddwa mu ggwe bawambiddwa wamu, wadde baali baddukidde wala." 
Isaiah22:4 Kyenva ŋŋamba nti: Muveewo, temuntunuulira! Mundeke ndire, nkungubage. N'okunkubagiza temutegana olw'abantu bange be nfiiriddwa." 
Isaiah22:5 Kino kiseera kya kwaziirana era kya kunyigirizibwa; kiseera kya kusoberwa, Mukama, Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye ky'atutuusizzaako mu Kiwonvu ky'Okulabikirwa! Ebisenge by'ekibuga kyaffe bimenyeddwa, emiranga gy'abasaba obuyambi ne giwulirwa mu nsozi." 
Isaiah22:6 Abaserikale ab'omu nsi Elamu bajjira ku magaali wamu n'abeebagadde embalaasi nga bambalidde emitego n'obusaale. N'abaserikale ab'e Kiiri, engabo, bajja na nsabuukulule." 
Isaiah22:7 Awo ebiwonvu bya Buyudaaya ebisingayo obugimu, amagaali ne gabijjulamu. Abeebagadde embalaasi ne batalira mu miryango gy'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah22:8 Eby'okwerinda kwa Buyudaaya ne biba nga biggyiddwawo. Kale ebyo bwe byaba bityo, olwo ne mukyukira ebyokulwanyisa ebyali mu luyitibwa Olubiri lw'ekibira." 
Isaiah22:9 Mwalaba ebituli ebingi ebyakubwa mu Kibuga kya Dawudi, era ne mukuŋŋaanyiza wamu amazzi ag'omu Kidiba Ekyawansi." 
Isaiah22:10 Ne mubala mu Yerusaalemu amayumba gaamu gonna agalimu, ne mumenyaamenya ku gamu, mugafunemu bye mukozesa okuziba buli awaabomoka." 
Isaiah22:11 Ne musima oluzzi mu kibuga wakati, mwe muba mukuumira amazzi agava mu kidiba kye mwalinawo edda. Naye ne mutafa ku Oyo eyategeka bino obw'edda, era eyasalawo nti bibeewo." 
Isaiah22:12 Era mu kiseera ekyo, Mukama Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye yali abayita mmwe mukaabe amaziga mukungubage, mwemwe emitwe, mwambale ebikutiya." 
Isaiah22:13 Naye mu kifo ky'ebyo, mmwe muzze mu ssanyu na kujaguza, kwettira nte na ndiga ne mulya ennyama, ne munywa omwenge, nga mugamba nti: “Ka tulye era tunywe kubanga enkya tujja kufa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Mukama Nnannyinimagye yennyini yaŋŋamba nti: “Mazima ekyonoono ekyo tekiribasonyiyibwa mmwe, okutuusa lwe mulifa.” Mukama Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Isaiah22:15 Mukama Afugabyonna, Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Genda eri Sebuna oyo omuwanika akulira abakungu mu Ggwanga, omugambe nti:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Wano olinawo ki era olinawo ani otuuke n'okwesimira entaana mu lwazi? 
Isaiah22:17 Kale Mukama alikuvumbagira wadde wafuna obukulu, n'akukasuka lwa maanyi." 
Isaiah22:18 Ddala alikyuka n'akuwuuba n'akukasuka ng'omupiira n'akusuula mu nsi engazi. Eyo gy'olifiira, era eyo ye walisigala amagaali ge weenyumirizaamu. Olikwasa ensonyi ab'ennyumba ya mukama wo." 
Isaiah22:19 Mukama alikuggya ku bukulu bwo, n'akuwanula mu kifo kyo ekyawaggulu.’ ”" 
Isaiah22:20 Mukama yagamba Sebuna nti: “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka ndiyita omuweereza wange Eliyakimu mutabani wa Hilukiya," 
Isaiah22:21 ne mmwambaza ekyambalo kyo, ne mmunyweza n'olukoba lwo ne mmuwa obuyinza bwonna bw'obadde olina. Aliba nga kitaawe w'abo ababeera mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndimuwa obuyinza obujjuvu okulabirira eby'omu bwakabaka bwa Dawudi, ne mmuwa ebisumuluzo, nga bw'aggulawo tewaba mulala aggalawo, era nga bw'aggalawo tewaba mulala aggulawo." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndimukomerera ng'enkondo n'anywera mu kifo kye, era aliweesa ekitiibwa ab'ennyumba ya kitaawe." 
Isaiah22:24 “Naye baganda be bonna na buli wa lulyo lwe, balimutikka buli kizibu eky'ab'ennyumba ya kitaawe. Bonna balyerippa ku ye ng'obuleku n'ennyendo era n'ebita byonna bwe biwanikibwa ku nkondo.”" 
Isaiah22:25 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, enkondo eyali ekomereddwa mu kifo kyayo n'enywera, erisimbukayo n'egwa, era eyo ye eriba enkomerero y'ebyo ebigiwanikiddwako.” Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Isaiah23:1 Bino bye byalangibwa ku Tiiro: Mukube ebiwoobe mmwe emmeeri z'e Tarusiisi! Ekibuga kyammwe Tiiro kizikiridde: tewakyali mayumba na mwalo. Amawulire ago gabatuuseeko, nga muva mu nsi y'e Kittimu. 11:21-22; Luk 10:13-14" 
Isaiah23:2 Musiriikirire olw'ennaku mmwe abatuuze b'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja, mmwe abasuubuzi b'e Sidoni ekigaggawazibwa abantu abawunguka ennyanja." 
Isaiah23:3 Eŋŋaano y'e Misiri era ekibala kya Kiyira gye bayisa ku nnyanja, y'ekireetera amagoba nga kisuubulagana n'amawanga." 
Isaiah23:4 Kwatibwa ensonyi ggwe Sidoni, ekibuga ky'ennyanja ekigumu, kubanga weegaanye nti: “Sirumwanga kuzaala era sizaalanga ku mwana. Siyonsanga mwana wa bulenzi, wadde okwola ow'obuwala.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Amawulire agafa ku Tiiro bwe galituuka e Misiri, abaayo balinakuwala nnyo." 
Isaiah23:6 Mukube ebiwoobe mmwe abatuuze b'oku kizinga, mugende e Tarusiisi." 
Isaiah23:7 Kino kye kibuga kyammwe ekyabasanyusanga, ekyazimbibwa mu mirembe egy'edda? Kye kyaweerezanga abatuuze baakyo bagende basenge mu bifo eby'ewala?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ani yategeka okukola ebyo ku Tiiro ekibuga ekisuza bakabaka, nga n'abasuubuzi baamu baakitiibwa mu nsi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye yakitegeka amalewo okwekuza okuli mu bitiibwa byonna, era alage bw'anyooma abeebitiibwa bonna ku nsi." 
Isaiah23:10 Mwanjaale mu nsi yammwe ng'Omugga Kiyira mmwe abatuuze b'e Tarusiisi. Tewakyaliwo abaziyiza. 
Isaiah23:11 Mukama agolodde omukono gwe ku nnyanja, n'ayuuguumya obwakabaka. Alagidde ebigo ebigumu eby'Ekibuga Kanaani bizikirizibwe." 
Isaiah23:12 Kaakano agambye nti: “Ggwe Ekibuga Sidoni okusanyuka kwo kukomye, n'abantu bo banyigirizibwa. Ne bwe banaddukira e Kittimu, nayo tebalifuna kiwummulo.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Baali Bakaludaaya sso si Bassiriya abafuula Tiiro eky'ensolo ez'omu nsiko. Baakizimbako eminaala okukizingiza, ne bamenya amayumba gaamu, ne bazikiriza byonna ebirimu." 
Isaiah23:14 Mukube ebiwoobe mmwe emmeeri z'e Tarusiisi, kubanga ekibuga kyammwe ekigumu kizikiriziddwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Ekiseera kijja kutuuka, Tiiro kyerabirwe okumala emyaka nsanvu, ng'egya kabaka omu gy'awangaala. Ensanvu egyo bwe giriggwaako, ebiribeera mu Tiiro, biriba ng'ebiri mu luyimba oluyimbibwa ku malaaya:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Kwata ennanga yo oyiteeyite mu kibuga ng'oli nayo, ggwe malaaya eyeerabirwa, ogikube bulungi nga bw'oyimba oluyimba oluseeneekerevu, balyoke bakujjukire.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Emyaka ensanvu bwe giriggwaako, Mukama alireka Tiiro kidde ku bye kyakolanga edda. Kiriddamu okusuubulagana n'obwakabaka bwonna mu nsi, yonna gye busaasaanidde." 
Isaiah23:18 Bye kirisuubula byonna era n'amagoba, biriwongerwa Mukama. Tekiribyetuumako, wadde okubyeterekera mu mawanika, naye abasinza Mukama be balibikozesa okugula emmere gye balya ebamala, n'engoye ennungi." 
Isaiah24:1 Laba, Mukama ensi aligimalamu buli kintu, aligizikiriza n'agifuula matongo. Aligivuunika n'asaasaanya abagibeeramu bonna." 
Isaiah24:2 Ekiseera kirituuka abantu bonna ne bayisibwa bumu: abantu baabulijjo ne bakabona, abaddu ne bakama baabwe, abazaana ne bagole baabwe, abaguzi n'abatunzi, abawola n'abo abeewola, asasula era n'oyo asasulwa." 
Isaiah24:3 Ensi eriggyibwamu buli kintu, n'eba ng'enyaguluddwa. Ekyo Mukama ye akyogedde, tekirirema kutuukirira." 
Isaiah24:4 Era ensi yonna ekala, ebigiriko ne biwotoka. Ensi eggwaamu amaanyi, buli kyayo ne kiyongobera. Abantu abeekitiibwa nabo balitoowazibwa." 
Isaiah24:5 Ensi abantu bagyonoonye olw'okumenya amateeka ga Mukama n'olw'okusobya by'alagira, ne bateekako n'okumenya endagaano ye eteri ya kuggwaawo." 
Isaiah24:6 Ensi kyevudde ekolimirwa, n'abatuuze baamu ne basingibwa omusango era bangi ne bazikirizibwa. Abasigalawo be batono." 
Isaiah24:7 Emizabbibu egisogolwa giwotose, omwenge gwagyo ne gukendeera. Abaali basanyuka bonna, kati bali mu kuwuubaala." 
Isaiah24:8 Abaali bakola ebinyumu nga bakubiramu ebivuga ng'eno bwe baleekaana, ebyo tebakyabikola." 
Isaiah24:9 Baakomya okunywa omwenge nga bayimba n'ennyimba. Abaali bagunywa batamiire, kati gubakaayirira." 
Isaiah24:10 Ekibuga kikyankalanye, buli omu yeggalira mumwe, abayingira tabakkiriza." 
Isaiah24:11 Abali mu nguudo baleekaana kubanga tebalina mwenge. Ebinyumu tebikyakolebwa, essanyu lyonna ligenze." 
Isaiah24:12 Ekibuga kisigadde matongo. Emiryango gyakyo bagikubye, balese egyo bagimenye." 
Isaiah24:13 Bwe kityo bwe kiriba mu nsi, mu buli ggwanga. Kiriba nga bwe kibeera amakungula nga gawedde: ng'emizayiti ginogeddwa, nga n'emizabbibu tekukyali." 
Isaiah24:14 Abo abaliba bawonyeewo, baliyimusa amaloboozi ne bayimba n'essanyu eringi, ne batenda ekitiibwa kya Mukama nga ku ludda oluliko ennyanja gye basinziira." 
Isaiah24:15 N'abebuvanjuba balimutendereza. Abo ababeera okumpi n'ennyanja baligulumiza Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Tuliwulira ennyimba eziva ku nkomerero y'ensi nga zitenda Omutuukirivu. Kyokka nze ŋŋamba nti: Nzigwerera, nzigwerera, nga zinsanze nze! Kubanga abalyamu enkwe beeyongera okulyamu enkwe, era enkwe zaabwe zeeyongera bweyongezi!" 
Isaiah24:17 Ggwe omutuuze w'omu nsi entiisa era n'obunnya wamu n'omutego biteeze ggwe. 
Isaiah24:18 Ebyo nga bimaze okubaawo olwo buli alidduka awone entiisa, aligwa ate mu bunnya. Oyo asituka n'avaayo mu bunnya, alikwatibwa olwo mu mutego. Enkuba erifukumuka okuva mu bire, emisingi gy'ensi ne ginyeenyezebwa." 
Isaiah24:19 Ensi eryetemeramu ddala, era erimerengukira ddala. Ensi erinyeenyezebwa nnyo." 
Isaiah24:20 Ensi eritagatta ng'omutamiivu, eriyuuguumizibwa ng'ensiisira, erizitoowererwa ebibi byayo, erigwa n'eteddayo kuyimuka." 
Isaiah24:21 Ekiseera kijja kutuuka, Mukama abonereze ab'obuyinza abali eyo mu bbanga, n'abafuzi abali ku nsi." 
Isaiah24:22 Ab'obuyinza abo n'abafuzi, balikuŋŋaanyizibwa wamu ng'abasibe abateekeddwa mu bunnya. Balisibirwa mu kkomera, era balibonerezebwa nga wayiseewo ennaku eziwera." 
Isaiah24:23 Olwo omwezi gulikwata ekizikiza n'enjuba erigaana okwaka, kubanga Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye aliba kabaka ku Lusozi Siyooni, ne mu Yerusaalemu kyonna, ne mu maaso g'abakulembeze ekitiibwa kye kiryeyoleka." 
Isaiah25:1 Ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda wange. Nnaakugulumizanga, nnaatenderezanga erinnya lyo, kubanga okoze ebyamagero. Otuukirizza n'obwesigwa n'amazima ebyo bye wateesa edda." 
Isaiah25:2 Kubanga ekibuga okifudde matongo. Omenyewo ebigo byakyo ebigumu. Embiri z'abalabe baffe tebikyali bibuga era teziriddamu kuzimbibwa. 
Isaiah25:3 Kale abantu ab'amaanyi banaakussangamu ekitiibwa, n'ebibuga by'amawanga amakambwe tebiiremenga kukutya." 
Isaiah25:4 Kubanga oli kigo ekigumu abantu abanaku n'abaavu mwe bafunira ekiddukiro, ne bawonera omwo kibuyaga; ng'era kye kisiikirize mwe bawonera ebbugumu, kubanga obusungu bw'abakambwe buli ng'enkuba ekuba ku bisenge ng'erimu ne kibuyaga," 
Isaiah25:5 era buli ng'ebbugumu mu nsi enkalu. Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, osirisizza abalabe baffe. Okkakkanya okuleekaana kw'abakambwe ng'ekire bwe kiweweeza ebbugumu ery'omu ttuntu." 
Isaiah25:6 Ku Lusozi luno Siyooni Mukama Nnannyinimagye alifumbira amawanga gonna ekijjulo eky'ebyassava omuli ebirungo, era eky'omwenge omuka omuwoomu." 
Isaiah25:7 Alizikiririza ku lusozi luno ennaku esaanikidde abantu, era ebuutikidde amawanga gonna." 
Isaiah25:8 Mukama Afugabyonna, alizikiriza okufa kuggweewo, obutaddawo ennaku zonna. Alisangula amaziga mu maaso gonna, era alimalawo obuswavu bw'abantu be bwe baalina mu nsi yonna. Mukama yennyini ye ayogedde." 
Isaiah25:9 Kale bwe kirituukirira, baligamba nti: “Mulabe, Katonda waffe wuuno. Tubadde tumulindirira, era anaatuwonya. Ye ye Mukama. Tubadde tumulindirira, era kaakano tusanyuka, era tujaguza, kubanga atuwonyezza.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Mukama alikuuma Olusozi luno Siyooni, naye Abamowaabu balirinnyirirwa ng'ebisubi bwe birinnyirirwa ku ntuumu y'obusa okukolamu ebigimisa. Zef 2:8-11" 
Isaiah25:11 Balyanjuluza emikono gyabwe, ng'omuntu awuga bw'agyanjuluza, kyokka Mukama alibamalamu olwetumbu lwabwe, emikono gyabwe ne gibulwa ageeyamba." 
Isaiah25:12 Alizikiriza ebigo byabwe ebigumu era eby'ebisenge ebigulumivu, abisuule wansi ku ttaka okutuukira ddala mu nfuufu." 
Isaiah26:1 Olunaku lulituuka, oluyimba luno ne luyimbirwa mu Buyudaaya nti: “Tulina ekibuga eky'amaanyi. Katonda yennyini ye yakiteekako ebigo n'enkomera ebikitaasa." 
Isaiah26:2 Mugguleewo emiryango gyakyo ab'eggwanga eryesigwa, era abakola ebituufu, bayingire." 
Isaiah26:3 Ayi Mukama, okuuma mu mirembe emijjuvu oyo asuubira mu ggwe, kubanga akwesiga." 
Isaiah26:4 Mwesigenga Mukama ennaku zonna kubanga Mukama lwe lwazi omwewogomwa emirembe gyonna. 
Isaiah26:5 Atoowazizza abo abaali beegulumiza. Azikirizza ekibuga kyabwe ekigumu, akissizza wansi ku ttaka, ne kituukira ddala mu nfuufu." 
Isaiah26:6 Kaakano kirinnyirirwa bigere bya baavu n'eby'abali mu bwetaavu. 
Isaiah26:7 “Ekkubo ly'abeesimbu ggolokofu, era ggwe ayi Mukama nnannyini bugolokofu, ggwe olibaluŋŋamya." 
Isaiah26:8 Weewaawo ayi Mukama, tugoberera ky'oyagala, ne tusuubira mu ggwe. Era mu kukujjukira mwe tufunira bye twegomba." 
Isaiah26:9 Omutima gwange gukwegomba ekiro, omwoyo gwange ne gwewaayo okukunoonya, kubanga bw'osala emisango mu nsi abatuuze baamu lwe bayiga obwenkanya." 
Isaiah26:10 Ababi ne bwe bakolerwa eby'ekisa, era tebayiga kukola bituufu. Ne mu nsi y'abantu abeesimbu era bakoleramu ebikyamu, ne batalaba bukulu bwa Mukama." 
Isaiah26:11 Ayi Mukama, omukono gwo ogugolola okubabonereza, naye tebalaba. Leka baswale era baboneebone. Bawe ekibonerezo ky'otegekedde abalabe bo. Balage bw'olumirwa abantu bo." 
Isaiah26:12 “Ayi Mukama, ggwe otuteerawo emirembe kubanga ne bye tukola, ggwe obisobozesa okulama." 
Isaiah26:13 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, tufugiddwako n'abalala abatali ggwe, naye ggwe wekka, ggwe tumanyi ng'Omufuzi waffe ow'oku ntikko." 
Isaiah26:14 Abo kaakano bafudde, tebakyali balamu; bafuuse bagenzi era tebakyadda, kubanga wababonereza n'obazikiriza, era tewaliba abajjukira." 
Isaiah26:15 Ogaziyizza Eggwanga lyaffe, ayi Mukama oligaziyizza; ogaziyizza ensalo zaalyo zonna, ekyo ne kikwongerako okuweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Isaiah26:16 Ayi Mukama, abantu bo bwe baalaba ennaku, ne bajja gy'oli; bwe wababonereza, ne bakuwanjagira." 
Isaiah26:17 Ng'omukazi ali olubuto bw'alumwa ebisa n'akaaba ng'ebiseera bye eby'okuzaala bituuse, naffe bwe tutyo, ayi Mukama, bwe twabanga mu maaso go." 
Isaiah26:18 Twali lubuto, ne tulumwa okuzaala, naye tewali kye twazaala. Tetulina kya mugaso kye tukoledde nsi, n'abatuuze baamu tetubayigirizza kituufu." 
Isaiah26:19 “Abantu bo abafudde baliddamu obulamu, abafu abo balizuukira. Bonna abeebase mu nfuufu, balizuukuka ne bayimba olw'essanyu. Ng'amatondo g'omusulo gw'oku makya bwe gaweweeza ensi, ne Mukama bw'atyo bw'alizzaamu abo obulamu abaafa edda.”" 
Isaiah26:20 Mujje mmwe abantu bange muyingire mu bisenge byammwe, mweggalire okumala akaseera, okutuusa obusungu bwa Katonda lwe buliggwaawo." 
Isaiah26:21 Kubanga Mukama wuuyo avudde mu ggulu gy'abeera n'ajja okubonereza abantu ku nsi, olw'ebibi byabwe. Obutemu obwakolebwa ku nsi mu nkukutu bulimanyibwa mu lwatu. Ettaka teriryeyongera kukweka abo abattibwa." 
Isaiah27:1 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, Mukama alikozesa ekitala kye ekinene eky'amaanyi era eky'obwogi, okubonereza Lukwata ogusota ogwenyogootola, Lukwata ogusota oguzinga amakata, era alitta gugoonya ogubeera mu nnyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Ku lunaku olwo, Mukama aligamba nti: “Mulabe ennimiro yange ennungi ey'emizabbibu. Mugiyimbire." 
Isaiah27:3 Ngikuuma era ngifukirira amazzi buli kaseera. Ngirabirira emisana n'ekiro, waleme kubaawo kintu na kimu kigyonoona." 
Isaiah27:4 Ndekedde awo okugisunguwalira. Singa gabadde maggwa na katazzamiti nga bye nnina okulwanyisa, nandibyokedde wamu byonna." 
Isaiah27:5 Naye oba ng'abalabe b'abantu bange baagala okubakuuma, batabagane nange. Weewaawo, batabagane nange.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Mu biseera ebirijja, Abayisirayeli bazzukulu ba Yakobo, balisimba emirandira ng'omuti, balimulisa ne baanya, era balijjuza ensi yonna ebibala." 
Isaiah27:7 Yisirayeli, Mukama tagibonerezza nnyo na bukambwe, nga bw'abonerezza abalabe baayo, era yo tefiiriddwa bantu baayo bangi." 
Isaiah27:8 Mukama yabonereza abantu be ng'abawaŋŋangusa. Yabakuŋŋunsa ne kibuyaga we omukambwe, ava ebuvanjuba." 
Isaiah27:9 Abayisirayeli bwe balimenyaamenya alutaari za balubaale, amayinja gaazo ne bagasekulasekula ng'ennoni, alutaari ezo ne zitaddayo kwoterezebwako bubaane, era ne watasigalawo kabonero ka Asera, lubaale omukazi, olwo lwe balisonyiyibwa ebibi byabwe." 
Isaiah27:10 Ekibuga ekyabangako ebigo ebigumu kaakano kifuuse kifulukwa, matongo agalekeddwawo ng'eddungu. Lifuuse ddundiro, amagana mwe gawummulira, ne geeriira ku makoola g'emiti." 
Isaiah27:11 Amatabi g'emiti gyamu bwe galiwotoka, galiwogolwa, abakazi ne bagatyaba enku. Abantu nga bwe batalina magezi, tebalisaasirwa yabatonda, wadde okukwatirwa ekisa." 
Isaiah27:12 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Mukama alikuŋŋaanya abantu be Abayisirayeli okuva ku Mugga Ewufuraate, okutuuka ku kagga ak'oku nsalo n'e Misiri, ng'omuntu bw'akuŋŋunta eŋŋaano n'agyawula mu bisusunku." 
Isaiah27:13 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ekkondeere eddene lirifuuyibwa okuyita Abayisirayeli bonna ababadde banaatera okufiira mu nsi ya Assiriya, n'ababadde ababoole mu Misiri, ne bajja basinziza Mukama ku lusozi olutukuvu mu Yerusaalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli obw'abeekuza era abatamiivu, nga zibusanze! Ekitiibwa kyabwe kiseebengeredde. Kiri ng'engule ez'ebimuli ebiwotose, eziri ku mitwe gy'abakulembeze baakyo abeemalidde mu kunywa omwenge." 
Isaiah28:2 Ddala Mukama alinawo ow'amaanyi era omuzira, anaatera okubalumba. Oyo ali nga kibuyaga alimu omuzira n'embuyaga ezikiriza, ali ng'amazzi amangi ag'amaanyi, agajja ne ganjaala ennyo. Bw'atyo alitalaaga ensi n'agizikiriza." 
Isaiah28:3 Okwekuza kw'abakulembeze abatamiivu kulirinnyirirwa n'ebigere. 
Isaiah28:4 Ekitiibwa ky'abakulembeze abo abatamiivu, ekiseebengerera, kiriggwaawo ng'ebibala by'emitiini ebisooka okwengera ng'ekyeya tekinnatuuka, ebinogebwa ne biriibwa amangu ddala nga byakengera." 
Isaiah28:5 Ekiseera kijja kutuuka Mukama Nnannyinimagye abe engule eyeekitiibwa era ennungi amakula, ey'abantu be abaliwonawo." 
Isaiah28:6 Aliwa omwoyo ogw'obwenkanya abalamuzi abasala emisango, era aliwa amaanyi abaserikale abataasa emiryango gy'ekibuga, okukitaasa mu lutalo." 
Isaiah28:7 Bakabona n'abalanzi nabo boonooneddwa omwenge: ebitamiiza bibawabizza, omwenge gubasaanyizzaawo. Batambula batagatta olw'obutamiivu, abalanzi ne batategeera bibalagibwa mu kulabikirwa, ne bakabona abatamidde ne batasala bulungi nsonga eziba zibaleeteddwa." 
Isaiah28:8 Emmeeza eziri we batudde zonna zijjudde bisesemye, tewakyali kifo kiyonjo." 
Isaiah28:9 Banneemulugunyiza nga bagamba nti: “Oyo ayigiriza ani? Era ani gw'ajja okubuulirira? Mpozzi asomese abo abato abaakava ku mabeere! 
Isaiah28:10 Kubanga ayigiriza kiragiro ku kiragiro, lunyiriri ku lunyiriri. Wano n'akuwaayo katono, era ne wali, katono.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Oba tebaagala kuwulira bye ŋŋamba, Mukama alikozesa abagwira aboogera olulimi olulala, n'abategeeza ky'ayagala." 
Isaiah28:12 Yabagamba nti abo abakooye babawenga ekiwummulo, naye ne bagaana okuwulira." 
Isaiah28:13 Mukama kyaliva abayigiriza kiragiro ku kiragiro, lunyiriri ku lunyiriri, wano n'abawaayo katono, era ne wali katono, balyoke bagende bagwe kyabugazi bamenyeke, bategebwe, bakwasibwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Kale mmwe abanyoomi abafuga abantu bano ab'omu Yerusaalemu, muwulire, Mukama ky'agamba nti:" 
Isaiah28:15 “Nga bwe mwewaanye nti mukoze endagaano n'olumbe, mutegeeraganye n'amagombe, era nti ekikangabwa ekyanjaala bwe kiriyita mu nsi tekiribatuukako mmwe, kubanga eby'obulimba bye mufudde ekiddukiro kyammwe era mwekwese wansi w'obulimba!”" 
Isaiah28:16 Mukama Afugabyonna kyava agamba nti: “Mulabe, nteeka ejjinja mu Siyooni, ejjinja erimaze okugezesebwa, libe ejjinja ery'omu nsonda ery'omuwendo ennyo, erinywerezeddwa ddala wansi. Oyo eyeesiga ejjinja eryo taterebuka." 
Isaiah28:17 Obwenkanya bwe ndifuula olukoba olugera, n'obutuufu bwe buliba omuguwa ogutereeza.” Amayinja ag'omuzira galyerawo obulimba bwe mwewogomamu, n'amazzi galyanjaala ne gazikiriza ekifo kye mwekwekamu." 
Isaiah28:18 Endagaano yammwe gye mwakola n'okufa erimenyebwawo, n'okutegeeragana kwammwe kwe mwategeeragana n'amagombe, kulikoma. Ekikangabwa ekiryanjaala bwe kiriyita mu nsi, kirireka kibalinnyiridde wansi" 
Isaiah28:19 Buli lwe kinaayitanga mu nsi, kinaabalinnyiriranga buli lukya, ka bube misana, ka bube kiro. Era buli bubaka obuva eri Katonda, bunaabanga bwa ntiisa nsa." 
Isaiah28:20 Muliba ng'omuntu asula ku kitanda ekimpi ky'atayinza kwegolorerako, nga n'ekyokwebikka kyakwo kifunda, tekimubunya." 
Isaiah28:21 Mukama alisituka n'alwana, nga bwe yalwana ku Lusozi Peraziimu. Alisunguwala nga bwe yasunguwala mu kiwonvu kye Gibiyoni, alyoke akole ky'ayagala okukola, akole omulimu gwe ogwewuunyisa era ebikolwa bye eby'amagero." 
Isaiah28:22 Kale okulabula temukunyooma, enjegere ezibasibye zireme kunywezebwa, kubanga mpulidde nga Mukama Nnannyinimagye Afugabyonna, amaliridde okusaanyaawo ensi eno." 
Isaiah28:23 Mutege amatu muwulire kye ŋŋamba, musseeyo omwoyo ku kye mbategeeza." 
Isaiah28:24 Omulimi bw'alima ennimiro ze nga yeetegekera okusiga, tazitegeka lutata. Obudde bwonna tabumala mu kukabala, na kukuba mavuunike, na kwanjala." 
Isaiah28:25 Bw'amala okuttaanya ettaka lyonna, asigamu ensigo ze z'ayagala: ng'ez'ebijanjaalo, soya, oba kasooli. Asiga eŋŋaano ne bbaale ng'abitegeka mu nnyiriri, ne ku nsalosalo y'ennimiro ze n'asimbako ebirime ebirala." 
Isaiah28:26 Amanya okukola omulimu gwe, kubanga Katonda we amuyigiriza." 
Isaiah28:27 Ebijanjaalo tebiwuulibwa na musekuzo muzito, kye kimu era ne kawo. Naye bakozesa muggo ogutaabisekulesekule." 
Isaiah28:28 N'eŋŋaano ey'emigaati tagiwuula ng'agibetenta, wabula agyegendereza, empeke ne zisigala nga nnamba." 
Isaiah28:29 Era ago gonna amagezi gava wa Mukama Nnannyinimagye, omuwi w'amagezi ow'ekitalo ategeka eby'amagezi ebyereere era bulijjo ebituukirira." 
Isaiah29:1 Katonda agamba nti: “Zikusanze ggwe, Ariyeeli, Yerusaalemu ekibuga Dawudi mwe yakuba ensiisira ye. Mugatte omwaka ku mwaka, n'embaga enkulu muleke zibeewo nga bwe ziddiriŋŋana," 
Isaiah29:2 olwo mbonereze Ariyeeli. Walibaawo okukaaba n'okunakuwala, era ekibuga ekyo kiriba ng'alutaari yange yennyini." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndikirumba ku buli ludda, ne nkisiisirako, era ne nkizimbako ekigo, ne nkizingiza enjuyi zonna." 
Isaiah29:4 Yerusaalemu, oliba ng'omuzimu ogufuba okwogera nga gusinziira wansi mu ttaka, eddoboozi lyo nga lya kaama, okuva eyo mu nfuufu." 
Isaiah29:5 “Naye ebbiina ly'abalabe bo lirifuumuulwa ng'enfuufu, n'ebibinja byabwe eby'entiisa birifuumuuka ng'ebisusunku, ate mu kaseera mpawekaaga." 
Isaiah29:6 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye ndikutaasa nga nkozesa okubwatuka n'okukankana kw'ensi, ne kibuyaga akunta, n'ennimi ez'omuliro." 
Isaiah29:7 Amagye g'amawanga gonna agalwanyisa ekibuga ky'alutaari ya Katonda, ne galumba ebigo byakyo ebigumu, ne gakiteganya bulala, galivaawo ng'ekirooto, oba ng'ebyefaanaanyirizibwa mu kiro." 
Isaiah29:8 Ng'omuyala bw'aloota ng'alya, n'azuukuka ng'enjala emuluma; oba ng'omuyonta bw'aloota ng'anywa, kyokka w'azuukukira mu tulo ng'ennyonta emuli bubi, azirika, ng'emukazizza n'emimiro, n'amagye gonna agakuŋŋaana okulwanyisa Olusozi Siyooni nago bwe galiba bwe gatyo.”" 
Isaiah29:9 Mudde awo mwewuunye! Mwesiruwaze, muzibe amaaso! Mutamiire, nga temunywedde mwenge! Mutagatte, nga temukombye ku kitamiiza!" 
Isaiah29:10 Kubanga Mukama abataddemu omwoyo oguleeta otulo otungi era abazibye amaaso, mmwe abalanzi, asibye kantuntunu ku mmwe; nammwe abalaguzi emitwe gyammwe agibisseeko." 
Isaiah29:11 Amakulu gonna ag'okulabikirwa, gafuuse ng'ekitabo ekisibiddwako envumbo. Bwe kitwalirwa amanyi okusoma ne bamusaba nti: “Soma kino,” abaddamu nti: “Sisobola, kubanga kisibiddwako envumbo.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Bwe bakiwa ataayiga kusoma ne bamusaba nti: “Soma kino,” abaddamu nti: “Ssaayigirizibwa kusoma.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Awo Mukama n'agamba nti: “Abantu bano bansemberera ne banzisaamu ekitiibwa kya ku mumwa, nga kikoma mu bigambo bugambo, naye emitima gyabwe tegindiiko. N'okwandibadde okunsinza, bakuuma bulombolombo obubalagirwa abantu." 
Isaiah29:14 Kale ndikola mu bantu bano ekyamagero kye balyewuunya. Amagezi g'abagezi mu bo, galibula, n'okutegeera kw'abakungu baabwe, kulikwekebwa.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Zibasanze abo abeerimba mbu bakweka Mukama bye bateesa, era abalina bye bakolera mu kizikiza. Bagamba nti: “Ani atulaba? Ne bye tukola ani abimanyi?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Muvuunikira ddala ebintu! Omubumbi ageraageranyizibwa n'ebbumba? Ekintu omuntu ky'akoze, kiyinza okumugamba nti: “Tewankola?” Oba ekintu ekibumbibwa, kiyinza okugamba akibumba nti tategeera?" 
Isaiah29:17 Ng'enjogera bw'egamba, akaseera kabulayo katono nnyo, ekibira ekikwafu eky'e Lebanooni kifuulibwe ennimiro eŋŋimu, n'ennimiro eŋŋimu eddemu okuba ekibira." 
Isaiah29:18 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, kiggala aliwulira ebimusomerwa mu kitabo, n'amaaso ga muzibe agabadde mu kizikiza, galitunula ne galaba." 
Isaiah29:19 Abantu abeetoowaze balyeyongera okusanyukira mu Mukama, n'abaavu balyesiimira mu Mutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli," 
Isaiah29:20 kubanga omulabe ow'entiisa alidibizibwa, n'omunyoomi alikomezebwa; n'abo bonna abatafa ku bya butuukirivu balizikirira." 
Isaiah29:21 Katonda alizikiriza abo abawaayiriza bannaabwe emisango gye batazzizza, n'abo abazibira eyagizza aleme kubonerezebwa, era ne balemesa omutuufu okusalirwa amazima." 
Isaiah29:22 Mukama eyanunula Aburaamu kyava ayogera ku nnyumba ya Yakobo, nti: “Aba Yakobo tebaliddamu kuswazibwa, n'amaaso gaabwe tegaliddamu kusiiwuuka." 
Isaiah29:23 Bwe muliraba ku baana be ndibawa mmwe, mulitegeera bwe ndi Omutuukirivu wa Yakobo. Mulinzisaamu ekitiibwa Nze Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Isaiah29:24 N'abo abasirusiru balifuuka abategeevu, n'abeemulugunya balikkiriza okuyigirizibwa.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Zibasanze abaana abajeemu, abagoberera entegeka ze sikoze, era abakola endagaano ey'enkolagana n'abalala nga Nze sikkirizza, ne bongera ekibi ku kibi." 
Isaiah30:2 Bagenda basabe obuyambi e Misiri nga tebanneebuuzizzaako. Beesize amaanyi ga Misiri, ne bagenda eri Kabaka waayo okumusaba abakuume." 
Isaiah30:3 Amaanyi ga kabaka w'e Misiri kyegaliva gabafuukira ensonyi, n'okwesiga okukuumibwa Misiri, ne kubaleetera okuswala." 
Isaiah30:4 Newaakubadde ababaka baabwe bamaze okutuuka mu bibuga Zowani ne Hanesi ebya Misiri," 
Isaiah30:5 abantu ba Buyudaaya balikwatibwa ensonyi, olw'okwesiga abantu abatayinza kubagasa wadde okubayamba, naye ab'okubaswaza n'okubaleetera okunenyezebwa.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Kino kye kyalangibwa nga kifa ku nsolo ez'omu bukiikaddyo: ababaka bayita mu nsi ey'emitawaana n'obubenje, erimu empologoma ensajja n'enkazi, n'emisota egy'obusagwa, n'egibuuka era egiwandula omuliro. Batikka ebyobugagga byabwe ku ndogoyi n'ebintu byabwe eby'omuwendo ennyo ku mabango g'eŋŋamiya, babitwalire abantu abo abatagenda ku bagasa." 
Isaiah30:7 Obuyambi bwe banaafuna e Misiri bujja kubafa bwereere, tebuliiko kye bugasa. Kyenvudde mpita Misiri Ekikulejje Rahabu ekitaluma." 
Isaiah30:8 “Kale genda okiwandiike ku kipande nga balaba, era okiwandiike ne mu kitabo, kibe obujulizi obw'olubeerera obukakasa obujeemu bw'abantu bano." 
Isaiah30:9 Bulijjo abantu bano bajeemu, abakolera ku bulimba. Bulijjo tebakkiriza kugondera Mateeka ga Mukama." 
Isaiah30:10 Bagamba abalabikirwa era n'abalanzi nti: ‘Mukomye okulabikirwa Temulanga bituufu bye mulaba. Temutubuulira bya mazima wabula ebyo ebitunyumira. Mulange ebitulimba. 
Isaiah30:11 Temutwekiika mu maaso, kuziba kkubo lyaffe. Mulekere awo okutulaga Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:12 Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli kyava agamba nti: “Nga bwe munyoomye ebyange ne musiima okujooga n'okukola eby'effujjo, ne mweyinula ebyo," 
Isaiah30:13 muzzizza musango ogubafudde ekisenge ekigulumivu ekizzeemu olwatika. Mujja kubomoka mugwe mangwago. 
Isaiah30:14 Mulyatika ng'ekintu eky'ebbumba ne mumenyekamenyeka, obutasigalawo katundu ka luggyo kayinza kusena muliro mu kyoto, wadde amazzi mu kidiba.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Mukama Afugabyonna Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli kyava agamba nti: “Mudde gye ndi, muweere, olwo Nze ndyoke mbayambe. Mutereere, munneesige, mulyoke mube ba maanyi.” Naye mmwe mugaanye!" 
Isaiah30:16 Mugamba nti: “Nedda! Tujja kwebagala embalaasi tudduke abalabe baffe.” Kituufu mujja kudduka. Embalaasi zammwe mulowooza nga zidduka nnyo. Naye ez'abo ababawondera ze zisinga okuba n'embiro. 
Isaiah30:17 Omu bw'alibaboggolera, mmwe mulidduka lukumi. Bwe muliboggolerwa abataano, olwo mwenna mulidduka, ne musigala kinnoomu ng'omulongooti oguli ku ntikko y'olusozi, ne bbendera eri ku kasozi." 
Isaiah30:18 Wabula Ye Mukama alinze ng'ayagala abakwatirwe ekisa. Yeetegese okubasaasira, kubanga Mukama Katonda bulijjo by'akola byonna bituufu. Beesiimye wamma bonna abamwesiga." 
Isaiah30:19 Mmwe abantu ba Siyooni ababeera mu Yerusaalemu, temukyaddamu kukaaba maziga. Mukama alibakwatirwa ekisa: alibawa kye mumusaba oluliwulira nga mukaaba."
