Jeremiah10:14 Abantu bonna basiruwadde, baweddemu amagezi. Abakola ebifaananyi ebya zaabu ensonyi zibakutte, kubanga ebifaananyi byabwe bya bulimba, temuli bulamu." 
Jeremiah10:15 Tebiriiko kye bigasa, bya bulimba bwereere. Birizikirizibwa ku olwo lwe birisalirwako omusango." 
Jeremiah10:16 Katonda wa Yakobo tali nga byo, kubanga ye yatonda byonna; era yalondamu Yisirayeli okuba eggwanga erirye ku bubwe. Mukama Nnannyinimagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah10:17 Mmwe ab'omu Yerusaalemu, muzingiziddwa! Mukuŋŋaanye ebyammwe," 
Jeremiah10:18 kubanga Mukama agamba nti: “Mu kiseera kino, nja kugoba abantu mu nsi eno. Nja kubatuusaako obuyinike baboneebone.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Nga zitusanze okufumitibwa ebiwundu! Ebiwundu byaffe si bya kuwona! Naye tunaagamba ki? Buno bwe buyinike bwaffe, tuteekwa okubugumira." 
Jeremiah10:20 Eweema zaffe zoonooneddwa, emiguwa egizireega gikutuse. Abaana baffe batuvuddeko, tewali anaatuleegera weema, n'okuwanika entimbe mu zo!" 
Jeremiah10:21 Abakulembeze basiruwadde obuteebuuza ku Mukama, kye kibaviirako okulemwa, be batwala ne basaasaana." 
Jeremiah10:22 Amawulire gaagano agazze: waliwo akasattiro ak'amaanyi akava mu nsi ey'ebukiikakkono, akanaafuula ebibuga bya Buyudaaya amatongo omusula ebibe!" 
Jeremiah10:23 Mmanyi, ayi Mukama, ng'obulamu bw'omuntu tebuli mu buyinza bwe, era nga tewali ayinza kweruŋŋamya yekka." 
Jeremiah10:24 Tugolole, ayi Mukama, naye tokambuwala nnyo. Tobonereza na busungu, oleme kutusaanyaawo." 
Jeremiah10:25 Amawanga agatakusinza g'oba osunguwalira n'abantu abakweggyako, kubanga basse abantu bo, babasaanyirizzaawo ddala, ensi yaffe esigadde matongo!" 
Jeremiah11:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nze Yeremiya nti: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Wulira ebigambo by'endagaano eno. Gamba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu 
Jeremiah11:3 nti Nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nkolimidde buli muntu atagondera bigambo bya ndagaano eno," 
Jeremiah11:4 gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe, bwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, eyali ebafuukidde ng'ekyoto eky'ekyuma ekyengeredde omuliro. Nabagamba nti: ‘Mumpulirenga era mukolenga bye mbalagira.’ Nabagamba nti bwe banampuliranga, banaabanga bantu bange, Nze ne mba Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah11:5 Olwo nnaatuukirizanga kye n'asuubiza bajjajjaabwe, nti ndibawa ensi engimu, era gye balimu kaakano.” Awo nze ne nziramu nti: “Weewaawo, ayi Mukama.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Genda olangirire bino byonna mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne mu nguudo za Yerusaalemu, otegeeze abantu nti: ‘Muwulire ebigambo by'endagaano eno, era mubikolereko.’" 
Jeremiah11:7 Bwe naggya bajjajjaabwe mu nsi y'e Misiri, nabakuutira okumpuliranga, era nkyabakuutira n'okutuusa kaakano." 
Jeremiah11:8 Naye tebawuliriza era tebawulira, wabula buli omu ayongera kugoberera mutima gwe omukakanyavu era omubi. Nabalagira okukuumanga endagaano eno, naye bo ne bagaana. Kyennava mbatuusaako ebibonerezo byonna ebyogerwako mu yo.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, banneekobera." 
Jeremiah11:10 Bazzeeyo mu bibi bya bajjajjaabwe, abaagaana okuwulira bye mbagamba. Bazze mu kuweereza balubaale. Ab'omu Yisirayeli, n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, bamenye endagaano gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe." 
Jeremiah11:11 Kale kaakano, Nze Mukama, kyenva mbalabula nti nja kubatuusaako akabi, ke batayinza kuwona. Bwe balinkaabirira okubayamba, siribawuliriza." 
Jeremiah11:12 Awo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, baligenda ne bakaabirira balubaale, be bootereza obubaane. Naye tebalisobola kubawonya mu biseera eby'obuyinike." 
Jeremiah11:13 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya balina balubaale, abenkana ebibuga byabwe obungi. N'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, bazimbye alutaari ezenkana enguudo z'omu kibuga kyabwe obungi, nga za kwoterezaako bubaane eri Baali, lubaale eyeenyinyalwa." 
Jeremiah11:14 Kale ggwe Yeremiya, tosabira bantu bano, wadde okwegayirira ku lwabwe, kubanga bwe baliba mu buzibu ne bankoowoola, siribawuliriza." 
Jeremiah11:15 Abantu be njagala, bakoze ebibi. Bakyasaanira batya okubeera mu Ssinzizo lyange? Obweyamo n'ebitambiro eby'ensolo binaabayamba? Olwo lwe banaasanyuka?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Waliwo lwe nabayitanga omuti omuzayiti oguliko amakoola amalungi, n'ebibala ebirungi. Naye kaakano, nja kubwatuka nga laddu, ngukumeko omuliro, amatabi gaagwo gaggye." 
Jeremiah11:17 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye eyasimba ab'omu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, Nze nnangiridde akabi akajja okubatuukako. Be bakeeretedde bennyini, kubanga bakoze ebibi. Bansunguwazizza, olw'okwotereza Baali obubaane.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Awo Mukama n'ammanyisa enkwe ze bakoze okunzita. 
Jeremiah11:19 Nali ng'omwana gw'endiga omuwombeefu, ogutwalibwa, nga simanyi nti nze basalidde enkwe, nga bagamba nti: “Tuteme omuti nga gukyali mulamu. Tumutte, waleme kubaawo bongera kumujjukira.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Naye, ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ggwe mulamuzi omwenkanya, ageza ebirowoozo n'emitima gy'abantu. Ggwe nkwasizza ensonga zange. Ka nninde ndabe bw'owoolera eggwanga ku bantu bano." 
Jeremiah11:21 Bino Mukama by'agamba ab'omu Anatooti, abaagala okunzita, nga bagamba nti: “Bw'onoolagula ku lwa Mukama, tujja kukutta.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Nja kubabonereza. Abavubuka baabwe balittirwa mu lutalo, abaana baabwe abalenzi n'abawala balifa enjala." 
Jeremiah11:23 Ntaddewo ekiseera kye ndituusizaako abantu b'omu Anatooti akabi, era ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ku bo tekuliba awonawo n'omu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Singa mpakana naawe, ggwe obeera omutuufu. Naye era ka njogereko naawe ku bwenkanya bwo. Lwaki ababi bali bulungi? Lwaki abakumpanya bali mirembe?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Wabasimba ne bamera, ne beeyongera okukula era ne babala ebibala. Bakwogerako bulijjo, naye tebakufaako" 
Jeremiah12:3 Naye nze ommanyi, ayi Mukama. Olaba bye nkola, era omanyi bwe nkwagala. Sika abantu abo ng'endiga ez'okusalibwa. Bakuume butiribiri okutuusa ku lunaku olw'okuttirwako." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ensi erituusa wa okukala n'omuddo gwonna okuwotoka? Ebisolo n'ebinyonyi bifa olw'obubi bw'abantu baffe. Ate bo nga bagamba nti: “Katonda talaba bye tukola.” 
Jeremiah12:5 Mukama agamba nti: “Yeremiya, oba ng'oddukidde wamu n'ab'ebigere n'okoowa, kale onoosobola otya okuddukira awamu n'abali ku mbalaasi? Oba tosobola kuyimirira watereevu, olikola otya mu lusaalu lwa Yorudaani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Baganda bo bennyini n'ab'ekika kyo, bakuliddemu olukwe, nabo beetabye n'abakuyigganya. Tobakkiriza ne bwe bakugamba ebigambo ebirungi.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Mukama agamba nti: “Njabulidde Yisirayeli, ndese eggwanga lye nalondamu. Abantu be njagala ennyo mbawaddeyo mu mikono gy'abalabe." 
Jeremiah12:8 Abantu bange be nalondamu banfuukidde ng'empologoma mu kibira: bamboggoledde, kyenvudde mbakyawa." 
Jeremiah12:9 Abantu bange be nalondamu bali ng'ekinyonyi ekirumbiddwa kamunye erudda n'erudda. Mugende mukuŋŋaanye ensolo zonna ez'omu ttale muzireete zirye. 
Jeremiah12:10 Abafuzi bangi boonoonye ennimiro yange ey'emizabbibu, balinnyiridde obulime bwange. Ensi yange ennungi bagifudde ddungu nga tekyalimu bantu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Bagifudde matongo, ensiko obusiko gye ntunulako. Ensi yonna efuuse matongo, naye tewali afaayo!" 
Jeremiah12:12 Abanyazi batalaaze ensozi zonna eziri mu ddungu. Nze Mukama nsindise olutalo okuzikiriza ensi eyo yonna. Tewali n'omu alina emirembe. 
Jeremiah12:13 Baasiga eŋŋaano, bakungudde maggwa. Bateganye nnyo, ne batafunamu mugaso. Olw'obusungu bwange obungi, ebirime byabwe bifudde.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Mukama agamba nti: “Nnina kye ŋŋamba ku baliraanwa ba Yisirayeli, abaayonoona ensi gye nawa abantu bange Abayisirayeli. Abantu abo ababi ndibaggya mu nsi zaabwe ng'ekimera ekikuuliddwa, era ndiggya Buyudaaya mu mikono gyabwe." 
Jeremiah12:15 Naye bwe ndimala okubaggya mu nsi zaabwe, ndiddamu okubakwatirwa ekisa. Ndikomyawo buli ggwanga mu kitundu kyalyo, ne mu nsi yaalyo." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ate bwe balinyiikira okuyiga empisa z'abantu bange, ne balayiranga nti: ‘Nga Mukama bw'ali omulamu,’ nga bwe baayigiriza abantu bange okulayiranga lubaale Baali, olwo baliba kitundu kya bantu bange." 
Jeremiah12:17 Naye eggwanga eririgaana okuwulira, ndiriggyirawo ddala, ne ndizikiriza. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Genda weegulire ekimyu eky'olugoye, okyesibe mu kiwato, naye tokyozaamu.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Awo ne ngula ekimyu, ne nkyesiba mu kiwato." 
Jeremiah13:3 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba omulundi ogwokubiri nti: 
Jeremiah13:4 “Ddira ekimyu kye wagula, era kye weesibye mu kiwato, ogende okikweke mu lwatika lw'olwazi, ku Mugga Ewufuraate.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ne ŋŋenda ne nkikweka okumpi n'Omugga Ewufuraate, nga Mukama bwe yandagira." 
Jeremiah13:6 Awo olwatuuka, nga wayiseewo ebbanga ddene, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Situka ogende ku Ewufuraate, oggyeyo ekimyu kye nakulagira okukwekayo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Awo ne ŋŋenda ku Ewufuraate, ne nsima, ne nzigyayo ekimyu, mu kifo mwe nali nkikwese, ne nsanga nga kyonoonese, tekikyaliko kye kigasa." 
Jeremiah13:8 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah13:9 “Bwe ntyo bwe ndizikiriza okwekulumbaza kwa Buyudaaya, n'okwekulumbaza kwa Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Abantu abo ababi, baagaana okuwulira bye mbagamba. Baagoberera obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyabwe, ne basinza era ne baweereza balubaale. Kale baliba ng'ekimyu ekyo, ekitakyaliko kye kigasa." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ng'ekimyu bwe kyekwatira ddala ku kiwato ky'omuntu, bwe kityo bwe nayagala abantu b'omu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya okwekwatira ddala ku Nze, balyoke babenga bantu bange, baleetere erinnya lyange ettendo n'ekitiibwa. Naye ne batayagala kuwulira.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, gamba abantu b'omu Yisirayeli nti: ‘Buli kita kijjuzibwa omwenge.’ Bajja kukuddamu nti: ‘Tetumanyi nga buli kita kijjuzibwa omwenge?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Awo n'olyoka obagamba nti Nze Mukama mbagambye nti abatuuze b'omu nsi eno bonna, kwe kugamba bakabaka abatuula ku ntebe ya Dawudi, bakabona n'abalanzi, n'abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu bonna, ndibajjuza omwenge batamiire." 
Jeremiah13:14 Olwo ndyoke mbaaseeyase nga mbatomereganya bonna, abato n'abakulu. Sirisaasira, sirisonyiwa wadde okukwatirwa ekisa, wabula okubazikiriza.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Mukama ayogedde, muleme kwekulumbaza. Muwulire, musseeyo omwoyo." 
Jeremiah13:16 Muwe ekitiibwa Mukama Katonda wammwe, nga tannaleeta kizikiza, ne mwekoona ku nsozi, era nga n'ekitangaala kye musuubira, tannakifuula nzikiza ekutte." 
Jeremiah13:17 Bwe munaagaana okuwulira, nja kukaabira mu kyama olw'okwekulumbaza kwammwe. Nja kukaaba nnyo nkulukuse amaziga, kubanga abantu ba Mukama batwaliddwa nga basibe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Gamba kabaka ne nnamasole nti: ‘Muwanuke ku ntebe zammwe, kubanga engule zammwe ennungi zivudde ku mitwe gyammwe.’" 
Jeremiah13:19 Ebibuga eby'omu bukiikakkono bizingiziddwa, tewali ayinza kuwaguza kubituukako. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bonna batwaliddwa nga basibe.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Yerusaalemu, laba! Abalabe bo bajja, nga bava mu bukiikakkono. Abantu bo abaakukwasibwa okulabirira, abantu bo abakweyagaza baluwa?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Oligamba otya, ng'abo be wayitanga mikwano gyo bakuwangudde, era nga be bakufuga? Toliba mu buyinike ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Weebuuza akabi ako konna kyekavudde kakutuukako, ne bakubikkula engoye zo, ne bakuwemula? Kakutuuseeko kubanga ekibi kyo kinene nnyo." 
Jeremiah13:23 Omuntu omuddugavu ayinza okukyusa langi y'olususu lwe? Oba engo okukyusa amabala gaayo? Oba ekyo kisoboka, kale nammwe, abaamanyiira okukola ebibi, muyinza okukola ebirungi!" 
Jeremiah13:24 Mukama kyaliva abasaasaanya mmwe, ng'empewo eva mu ddungu bw'esaasaanya ebisusunku." 
Jeremiah13:25 Agambye nti ekyo kye kiribatuukako. Ekyo ky'asazeewo okubakolako mmwe, kubanga mumwerabidde, ne mwesiga balubaale." 
Jeremiah13:26 Mukama alibabikkula engoye zammwe, ne muswala." 
Jeremiah13:27 Yabalaba nga mukola eby'ensonyi by'akyawa. Mwagenda eri balubaale mu nsozi ne mu ttale, ne muba ng'abenzi n'abakaba. Zibasanze, mmwe abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu! Mulibeerako ddi abalongoofu?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Awo Mukama n'antegeeza ebifa ku kyeya nti: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Obuyudaaya buli mu kukungubaga: ebibuga byabwo biwuubadde. Abantu baabwo batuula ku ttaka nga banakuwadde. Yerusaalemu kitema miranga. 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakungu batuma abaweereza baabwe emugga, ne batuuka ku nzizi ne baddayo eka ng'ensuwa nkalu. Ensonyi zibakwata ne beebikka ku maaso nga baswadde." 
Jeremiah14:4 Abalimi basobeddwa! Babikka ku maaso nga baswadde, kubanga enkuba tekyatonnya, era ettaka likaze." 
Jeremiah14:5 N'empeewo ereka ku ttale omwana gwayo gw'ezadde, kubanga tewali muddo." 
Jeremiah14:6 N'entulege ziyimirira ku nsozi okutakyali muddo ne ziwankawanka ng'ebibe, nga teziraba bimera bye zirya.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 Wadde ebibi byaffe bitulumiriza, tuyambe, ayi Mukama, nga bwe watusuubiza. Twakuvaako emirundi mingi, twakola ebibi ebikunyiiza." 
Jeremiah14:8 Ggwe essuubi ly'abantu ba Yisirayeli ggwe abaggya mu biseera ebizibu, lwaki oba ng'omuyise mu nsi eno, ng'omutambuze asula olumu?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Lwaki oli ng'omuntu asamaaliridde, ng'omuzira atayinza kutaasa? Naye, ayi Mukama, oli wakati mu ffe. Tuli babo, totwabulira." 
Jeremiah14:10 Abantu bano, Mukama aboogerako bw'ati nti: “Banyumirwa okunvaako, era tebeefuga. Kyenva sibasanyukira. Nja kujjukira ensobi zaabwe, mbabonereze olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Tosabira bantu bano kuweebwa birungi. 
Jeremiah14:12 Ne bwe banaasiiba, sijja kuwuliriza bye basaba. Ne bwe banampa ebitambiro n'ebirabo, sijja kubasanyukira, wabula nja kubazikiriza mu lutalo era mbasse enjala n'endwadde.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Mukama Katonda, kino kitalo! Abalanzi bategeeza abantu nti tebaliba na lutalo wadde enjala, kubanga wabakakasa kubawa mirembe mu nsi eno.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Abalanzi balagula bya bulimba nga bajuliza erinnya lyange. Sibatumanga era sibalagiranga, wadde okwogera nabo. Okulabikirwa kwe boogerako, tekwava gye ndi. Ne bye balagula, bye bintu ebitagasa, bye beefaanaanyiriza obwefaanaanyiriza mu mitima gyabwe." 
Jeremiah14:15 Nze Mukama, nkutegeeza kye ŋŋenda okukola abalanzi abo be situmanga, naye ne balagula nga bajuliza erinnya lyange, ne bagamba nti olutalo n'enjala tebiriba mu nsi eno. Ndibattira mu lutalo, era ndibassa enjala." 
Jeremiah14:16 N'abantu be balagula, balittibwa mu ngeri ye emu. Emirambo gyabwe, wamu n'egya bakazi baabwe, n'egya batabani baabwe era n'egya bawala baabwe, girigwa mu nguudo z'omu Yerusaalemu, ne wataba agiziika, bwe ntyo mbasasuze olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Awo Mukama n'andagira ntegeeze abantu obuyinike bwabwe, mbagambe nti: “Amaaso gange gakulukuta amaziga emisana n'ekiro, nneme kulekayo kukaaba maziga, kubanga abantu bange bafumitiddwa ebiwundu binene, era balumiziddwa nnyo." 
Jeremiah14:18 Bwe ntambulako mu ttale, nsangayo emirambo gy'abo abattiddwa mu lutalo. Bwe nnyingira mu kibuga, ndaba abafa enjala. Abalanzi ne bakabona batwalibwa mu nsi, gye batamanyi n'akatono.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Ayi Mukama, ab'omu Buyudaaya obasuulidde ddala? Ab'omu Yerusaalemu obakyaye? Otufumitidde ki bw'otyo, ne tutasobola kuwonyezebwa? Twasuubira emirembe, ne wataba kalungi ke tufuna. Twasuubira okuwonyezebwa, ne tujjirwa kikangabwa." 
Jeremiah14:20 Twakola ebibi ne tukunyiiza, tukkirizza ebibi byaffe n'ebibi bya bajjajjaffe." 
Jeremiah14:21 Jjukira bye wasuubiza oleme kutusuula. Toswaza Yerusaalemu, ekifo eky'entebe yo eyeekitiibwa. Tomenya ndagaano gye wakola naffe." 
Jeremiah14:22 Mu balubaale b'amawanga, tewali ayinza kutonnyesa nkuba. N'eggulu ku bwalyo, teriyinza kuleeta luwandaggirize. Twesiga ggwe, ayi Mukama Katonda, kubanga ggwe okola ebyo byonna." 
Jeremiah15:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Musa ne Samweli ne bwe bandiyimiridde mu maaso gange ne beegayirira, era sandikwatiddwa bantu bano kisa. Bagobe mu maaso gange bagende." 
Jeremiah15:2 Bwe bakubuuza nti: ‘Tugende, tulage wa?’ Bategeeze nti Mukama agambye nti: ‘Ab'okufa kawumpuli, bagende eri kawumpuli. Ab'okufiira mu lutalo, bagende eri olutalo. Ab'okufa enjala, bagende eri enjala. Ab'okutwalibwa mu busibe bagende mu busibe.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 Nze Mukama mbateereddewo engeri nnya ez'okubazikiriza: okufiira mu lutalo n'okutaagulwa embwa, okubojjogolwa ebinyonyi, n'okukavvulwa ebisolo eby'omu ttale." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndibafuula ekyekango eri abantu bonna ku nsi, olw'ebyo Manasse mutabani wa Heezeekiya bye yakola mu Yerusaalemu, nga ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya.”" 
Jeremiah15:5 Mukama agamba nti: “Ggwe Yerusaalemu, alikusaasira ani? Wadde alikyama ani abuuze ggwe bw'oli?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Ggwe waŋŋaana n'onkuba amabega. Kyenvudde nkugololera omukono ne nkuzikiriza. Nkooye okusaasira. 
Jeremiah15:7 Mu buli kibuga mu nsi eno mmwe abantu bange nabawewa ng'ebisusunku. Natta abaana bammwe ne mbazikiriza mmwe, kubanga mwalemera mu mpisa zammwe embi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Bannamwandu mu nsi yammwe bangi okusinga omusenyu ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. Nattira abavubuka bammwe mu maanyi, bannyaabwe ne balumwa. Nabatuusaako obuyinike n'entiisa nga tebamanyiridde." 
Jeremiah15:9 Eyazaala abaana omusanvu azirise, obulamu bumuggwaamu! Obudde bwe obw'emisana bumufuukidde bwa kiro. Akwatiddwa ensonyi, aswadde! Ndireka abalabe bammwe ne batta nammwe abakyali abalamu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Nga zinsanze nze! Mmange yanzaalira ki? Ndi wa kuyomba na kuwakana na buli omu ku nsi? Siwolanga nsimbi era tewali yali ampoze, naye buli muntu ankolimira." 
Jeremiah15:11 Kale ayi Mukama, ebikolimo byabwe bituukirire bwe mba nga saakuweereza bulungi, era bwe mba nga saasabira mulabe wange ng'ali mu buzibu ne mu buyinike." 
Jeremiah15:12 Tewali ayinza kumenya kyuma naddala ekyuma ekiva mu nsi y'ebukiikakkono, ekitabuddwamu ekikomo." 
Jeremiah15:13 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebintu n'obugagga eby'abantu bange, nja kubiwaayo binyagibwe, olw'ebibi bye bakoze mu ggwanga lyonna." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndibafuula baddu ba balabe baabwe, mu nsi gye batamanyi, kubanga obusungu bwange, bwaka ng'omuliro, era tegujja kuzikira.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, ggwe omanyi. Nzijukira onnyambe, owoolere eggwanga ku abo abangigganya. Tobagumiikiriza, kubawa budde bwa kunzita. Jjukira nga nvumibwa ku lulwo." 
Jeremiah15:16 Wayogera nange, ne mpuliriza buli kigambo. Ndi wuwo, ayi Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye. Ebigambo byo kyebyava bireetera omutima gwange essanyu n'okujaganya." 
Jeremiah15:17 Saatuula na bantu balala mu kusanyuka ne mu binyumu. Naye nga bwe wandagira, natuula nzekka nga nzijudde obusungu." 
Jeremiah15:18 Lwaki mba mu bulumi obw'olubeerera? Lwaki ekiwundu kyange tekiwona? Lwaki kisamba eddagala? Onfuukidde kagga akateesigwa akaggwaamu amazzi mu kyeya?” 
Jeremiah15:19 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Bw'olidda gye ndi, ndikuzza ku mulimu n'oddamu okumpeerezanga. Bw'onoova ku kwogera ebitagasa, n'oyogera eby'omugaso, oliddamu okwogera ku lwange. Abantu balidda gy'oli n'oteetaaga kugenda gye bali." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndikufuula ekisenge eky'ekikomo gye bali. Balikulwanyisa, naye tebalikuwangula. Ndi wamu naawe okukukuuma n'okukuwonya." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndikutaasa obuyinza bw'ababi, era ndikuwonya abakambwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah16:2 “Towasa mukazi, era tozaala baana mu kifo nga kino." 
Jeremiah16:3 Nja kukutegeeza ebirituuka ku baana abazaalibwa wano, ne ku bazadde baabwe." 
Jeremiah16:4 Balifa endwadde embi ennyo. Tebalikungubagirwa, era tebaliziikibwa. Emirambo gyabwe girigalamira ku ttaka, ne giba ng'entuumu y'obusa. Balittirwa mu lutalo, oba okuttibwa enjala, emirambo gyabwe ne giba emmere y'ebinyonyi, n'ebisolo eby'omu ttale." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Toyingira mu nnyumba mwe bakungubagira. Tokaabira muntu n'omu. Abantu bange mbaggyeeko emirembe gye nali mbawadde, sikyabaagala, era sikyabakwatirwa kisa." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abagagga n'abaavu balifiira mu nsi eno, naye tewaliba abaziika, wadde abakungubagira. Tewaliba yeesala misale, wadde yeemwa nviiri ku lwabwe." 
Jeremiah16:7 Tewaliba awa munne kyakulya, okumukubagiza ng'afiiriddwa, wadde okumuwa ekyokunywa, ne bw'aliba ng'afiiriddwa kitaawe oba nnyina." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Era toyingira mu nnyumba mwe baliira mbaga, okutuula nabo okulya n'okunywa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Wulira Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli kye ŋŋamba. Nga nammwe mukyali balamu, era nga mulaba, ŋŋenda kukomya mu kifo kino amaloboozi ag'ekinyumu n'okusanyuka, nsirise amaloboozi g'abawasa abagole, n'ag'abagole." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Bw'onootegeeza abantu ebigambo bino byonna, bajja kukubuuza nti: ‘Lwaki Mukama alangiridde nti akabi akanene bwe katyo kajja kututuukako? Tuzzizza musango ki, era tukoze kibi ki ekinyiizizza Mukama Katonda waffe?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Awo ggwe ojja kubagamba nti Mukama agamba nti: ‘Bajjajjammwe banvaako, ne basinza era ne baweereza balubaale. Nze bansuula, ne batakwata mateeka gange." 
Jeremiah16:12 Naye mmwe mukoze ebibi okusinga ne bajjajjammwe. Buli omu mu mmwe mukakanyavu wa mutima, era mubi, era tampulira." 
Jeremiah16:13 Kyendiva mbagoba mu nsi eno, ne mbasuula mu nsi gye mutamanyi, era ne bajjajjammwe gye bataamanya. Eyo gye munaaweererezanga balubaale ekiro n'emisana, era ndiba sikyabakwatirwa kisa n'akatono.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kijja kutuuka, mube nga temukyandayira nga Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, eyaggya abantu ba Yisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Jeremiah16:15 Naye banandayiranga nga Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, eyakomyawo abantu ba Yisirayeli okuva mu nsi ey'omu bukiikakkono, ne mu nsi endala zonna gye nabasaasaanyiza, ne mbakomyawo mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjaabwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 Mukama agamba nti: “Ŋŋenda okutumya abavubi bangi bajje bavube abantu bano. Oluvannyuma nditumya abayizzi bangi, babayigge ku buli lusozi ne ku buli kasozi, ne mu mpuku ez'omu njazi." 
Jeremiah16:17 Buli kye bakola nkiraba. Tewali kinkisibwa. N'ebibi byabwe tebikwekeddwa mu maaso gange. 
Jeremiah16:18 “Ndibasasuza emirundi ebiri olw'omusango gwabwe n'olw'ekibi kyabwe, kubanga boonoonye ensi yange, nga bagijjuza ebifaananyi ebyo bye basinza, ebiri ng'emirambo, era nga bagijjuza balubaale.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Mukama, ggwe onkuuma, era ggwe ompa amaanyi. Ggwe onnyamba mu biseera ebizibu. Ab'omu mawanga mu buli nsonda y'ensi, balijja gy'oli, ne bagamba nti: “Bajjajjaffe baalina bya bulimba bwereere ebitaliimu magoba, era ebitalina mugaso." 
Jeremiah16:20 Omuntu ayinza okwekolera Katonda? Nedda. Bw'amwekolera, oyo taba Katonda.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 Mukama agamba nti: “Kale abo ndibamanyisiza ddala obuyinza bwange n'amaanyi gange. Balimanya nga Nze Mukama.” 
Jeremiah17:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Mmwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, ekibi kyammwe kiwandiikiddwa n'ekkalaamu ey'ekyuma, kyoleddwa ku mitima gyammwe n'ejjinja ery'omuwendo essongovu, ne ku nsonda z'alutaari zammwe." 
Jeremiah17:2 Asera, lubaale omukazi, abantu bammwe bamusinza ku alutaari, ne ku bubonero bwe obwateekebwa mu buli muti omubisi, ne ku busozi," 
Jeremiah17:3 ne ku nsozi eziri mu ttale. Abalabe bammwe ndibagabula ebintu byammwe n'obugagga bwammwe, okubasasuza olw'ebibi bye mwakola mu nsi yammwe yonna." 
Jeremiah17:4 Muliteekwa okuwaayo ensi yammwe gye nabawa, era muliweereza abalabe bammwe mu nsi gye mutamanyi, kubanga mukoleezezza omuliro mu busungu bwange, obunaabuubuukanga olubeerera.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Mukama agamba nti: “Zimusanze oyo anvaako ne yeesiga era ne yeeyinula omuntu obuntu. 
Jeremiah17:6 Afaanaanyirizibwa n'omuti oguli mu ddungu, ogukulira awakalu mu lunnyo awatali kirala kikulirawo. Tagenda kutuukibwako birungi." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Naye wa mukisa oyo anneesiga Nze Mukama, era asuubira mu Nze." 
Jeremiah17:8 Afaanaanyirizibwa n'omuti ogwasimbibwa okumpi n'omugga, emirandira gyagwo ne gikula nga gidda eri amazzi. Tegulitya musana ne bwe gwaka ennyo. Ebikoola byagwo bisigala biddugazza. Tegulina kye gweraliikirira mu biseera eby'ekyeya: tegulekaayo kubala bibala." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Ani ayinza okutegeera omutima gw'omuntu? Teri kirimbalimba nga gwo. Mubi gwa lubeerera. 
Jeremiah17:10 “Nze Mukama mmanya buli muntu ky'alowooza mu mutima gwe. Buli omu mbaako kye mmuwa, okusinziira ku bikolwa bye.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Omuntu afuna obugagga ng'ayita mu bukumpanya, aba ng'enkwale eyalula amagi g'etaabiika. Obugagga obwo bulimuggwaako nga tannakaddiwa, ne yeeraga bw'ali omusirusiru." 
Jeremiah17:12 Essinzizo lyaffe liri ng'entebe eyeekitiibwa, eyateekebwa awagulumivu okuviira ddala mu kusooka." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ayi Mukama, ggwe ssuubi lya Yisirayeli. Bonna abakuvaako balikwatibwa ensonyi. Amannya g'abo bonna abakusenguka galiwandiikibwa mu nfuufu, kubanga bakuvuddeko ggwe Mukama, oluzzi olw'amazzi amalungi." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ayi Mukama, mponya mbeere bulungi. Ndokola, ndokolerwe ddala, kubanga ye ggwe gwe ntendereza." 
Jeremiah17:15 Abantu baŋŋamba nti: “Mukama bye yayogera biruwa? Kale bituukirire!” 
Jeremiah17:16 Naye ayi Mukama, sikufukuutiriranga kubatuusaako kabi. Sibaagalizanga kiseera kya kubonaaboneramu. Mukama, ekyo okimanyi. Bye nayogera obimanyi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Tonfuukira ntiisa, ggwe kiddukiro kyange mu biseera ebizibu." 
Jeremiah17:18 Abangigganya be baba bakwatibwa ensonyi, naye si nze. Be baba beeraliikirira, naye si nze. Obatuuseeko akabi, obakutulemu ebitundu." 
Jeremiah17:19 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, genda olangirire obubaka bwange ku Mulyango gw'Abantu, bakabaka ba Buyudaaya gwe bayitamu okuyingira n'okufuluma ekibuga. Era okole bw'otyo ne ku miryango emirala gyonna egya Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah17:20 Tegeeza bakabaka n'abantu bonna ab'omu Yerusaalemu abayingirira mu miryango gino, bawulire kye ŋŋamba." 
Jeremiah17:21 Bategeeze nti oba nga baagala obulamu bwabwe, beekuume, baleme kusitula migugu ku Sabbaato, era baleme kugiyisanga mu miryango gya Yerusaalemu," 
Jeremiah17:22 wadde okufulumyanga omugugu mu nnyumba zaabwe ku Sabbaato. Balemenga kukola mirimu ku Sabbaato. Naye batukuzenga olunaku lwa Sabbaato, nga bwe nalagira bajjajjaabwe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Bajjajjaabwe tebaawulira era tebaafaayo, naye baakakanyaza emitima gyabwe, ne bagaana okumpulira n'okukwata bye mbayigiriza." 
Jeremiah17:24 Tegeeza abantu bano nti bateekwa okuwulira ebiragiro byange byonna. Balemenga kwetikka migugu, kugiyisa mu miryango gya kibuga. Bateekwa okutukuzanga olunaku lwa Sabbaato, n'obutalukolerangako mirimu n'akatono." 
Jeremiah17:25 Olwo bakabaka baabwe n'abalangira banaayitanga mu miryango gy'ekibuga kino, era banaabeeranga n'obuyinza nga Dawudi bwe yalina. Awamu n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu banaatambuliranga mu magaali era baneebagalanga embalaasi, era ekibuga Yerusaalemu kinaabangamu abantu bulijjo." 
Jeremiah17:26 Abantu banaavanga mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya ne mu miriraano gya Yerusaalemu, era banaavanga mu kitundu kya Benyamiini, ne mu kitundu eky'ensenyi, ne mu nsozi, ne mu bukiikaddyo obwa Buyudaaya, ne bajja mu Ssinzizo, okuwaayo ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ekitambiro n'ebirabo eby'emmere ey'empeke, n'obubaane, nga beebaza." 
Jeremiah17:27 Naye bateekwa okumpulira n'okutukuza olunaku lwa Sabbaato. Mbagaanye okuyitanga mu miryango gya Yerusaalemu nga balina emigugu ku Sabbaato. Bwe balikikola ekyo kye mbagaanye, emiryango egyo ndigiteekera omuliro. Gulyokya amayumba g'omu Yerusaalemu, era tegulizikizibwa.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Situka oserengete ew'omubumbi, era eyo gye nnaakuweera obubaka bwange.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Awo ne nserengeta ew'omubumbi, ne nsanga ng'akolera ku nnamuziga ze." 
Jeremiah18:4 Kye yabumbanga bwe kyayonoonekanga, ng'ebbumba lyakyo alibumbamu ekintu ekirala." 
Jeremiah18:5 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, Nze siyinza kubakolako ng'ekyo omubumbi ky'akola ku bbumba? Muli mu ngalo zange, ng'ebbumba bwe liri mu ngalo z'omubumbi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Singa mba ŋŋambye okusimbula n'okumenya n'okuzikiriza eggwanga oba obwakabaka," 
Jeremiah18:8 naye eggwanga eryo ne likyuka, ne lirekayo okukola ebibi, sirikola kye mba ŋŋambye kukola." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ate singa mba ŋŋambye okusimba oba okuzimba eggwanga oba obwakabaka," 
Jeremiah18:10 naye eggwanga eryo ne litampulira era ne likola ebibi, sirikola kye mba ŋŋambye kukola." 
Jeremiah18:11 Kale kaakano, tegeeza abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu nti nteesezza okubakolako akabi, era nteekateeka okubabonereza. Bategeeze beenenye, buli omu ave mu mpisa ze embi. Balongoose empisa zaabwe n'ebikolwa byabwe." 
Jeremiah18:12 Naye bajja kukuddamu nti: ‘Nedda, tetujja kukyuka n'akatono. Tujja kukola kye twagala era buli omu ajja kukola ekiri mu mutima gwe omukakanyavu era omubi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Mukama agamba nti: “Mubuuze mu mawanga. Eriyo eyali awulidde ekiri ng'ekyo? Abantu ba Yisirayeli bakoze eby'ekivve! 
Jeremiah18:14 Enjazi z'oku ntikko ya Lebanooni ziggweebwako omuzira? Amazzi amannyogovu agava mu nsozi eza Lebanooni galekayo okukulukuta? 
Jeremiah18:15 Naye abantu bange banneerabidde. Booterezza balubaale obubaane. Beesittadde mu makubo gaabwe ge baatambuliramu okuva edda, ne batambulira mu bisinde ne mu bukubo obuzise." 
Jeremiah18:16 Ensi yaabwe bagifudde ya ntiisa, era eneenyoomebwanga bulijjo. Buli muyise aneewuunyanga nga bw'anyeenya n'omutwe." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndisaasaanya abantu bange mu maaso g'abalabe baabwe, ng'enfuufu bw'etwalibwa embuyaga eva mu buvanjuba. Nga bali mu buyinike, ndibakuba mabega, siribakyukira kubayamba.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Awo abantu ne bagamba nti: “Mujje tubeeko kye tukola ku Yeremiya. Bwe tumuggyawo, tewaabulengawo kabona kutuyigirizanga, n'omuntu omugezi okutubuuliriranga, wadde omulanzi okutuwanga obubaka bwa Katonda. Mujje tumusibeko emisango, era tulekere awo okuwuliriza by'agamba.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Awo ne nsaba nti: “Ayi Mukama, wulira bye ŋŋamba. Wulira abalabe bange bye banjogerako." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ekirungi kisasulwamu kibi? Basimye obunnya nga baagala ngweemu. Jjukira bwe nayimirira mu maaso go, ayi Mukama, ne mbawolereza oleme kubasunguwalira." 
Jeremiah18:21 Kale kaakano, ayi Mukama, leka abaana baabwe bafe enjala. Leka battirwe mu lutalo. Abakazi basigale nga tebalina baana, era bafiirwe babbaabwe. Abasajja bafe endwadde, abavubuka bafiire mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Basindikire ekibinja ky'abanyazi kigende kinyage ebyabwe, nga tebamanyiridde, emiranga giryoke giwulirwe mu mayumba gaabwe, kubanga basimye obunnya nga baagala ngweemu, era bateze emitego nga baagala ginkwase." 
Jeremiah18:23 Naye, ayi Mukama, omanyi enkwe zaabwe. Tobasonyiwa kibi kyabwe, era tobaggyaako musango. Bamegge mu maaso go, obakoleko ng'obasunguwalidde.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, genda ogule ensumbi ey'ebbumba, otwale abamu ku bantu abakulu mu ggwanga, n'abamu ku bakabona abakulu," 
Jeremiah19:2 ofulumire mu mulyango gw'Enzigyo, olage mu kiwonvu Beninnomu. Eyo gy'onoolangiririra obubaka bwe nnaakuwa." 
Jeremiah19:3 Ojja kugamba nti: ‘Mmwe bakabaka ba Buyudaaya, nammwe abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, muwulire obubaka bwa Mukama. Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: Nja kuleeta akabi ku kifo kino, akaliwaawaaza amatu ga buli omu alikawulirako." 
Jeremiah19:4 Nja kukola ekyo, kubanga abantu bange banvaako ne bootereza balubaale obubaane, bo bennyini ne bajjajjaabwe, wadde bakabaka ba Buyudaaya, be batamanyangako, era bajjuzza ekifo kino omusaayi gw'abantu abatalina musango." 
Jeremiah19:5 Era bazimbidde lubaale Baali ebifo ebigulumivu, okwokerako batabani baabwe ng'ebitambiro eri lubaale oyo. Ekyo Nze sikibalagiranga, era tekinzijirangako na mu birowoozo." 
Jeremiah19:6 Kale ekiseera kijja kutuuka, ekifo kino kibe nga tekikyayitibwa Tofeti oba Ekiwonvu Beninnomu, naye kinaayitibwanga Kiwonvu kya Ttambiro." 
Jeremiah19:7 Mu kiwonvu kino, mwe ndisaanyizaawo ebyo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu bye bateesa. Ndireka abalabe baabwe ne babawangula, era ne babattira mu lutalo. Emirambo gyabwe ndigigabula ebinyonyi n'ebisolo ne bigirya." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ndizikiriza ekibuga kino. Buli ayitawo anaakwatanga mu mumwa, nga yeewuunya eby'entiisa ebikituuseeko." 
Jeremiah19:9 Abalabe balikizingiza okutta abakirimu. Mu kuzingizibwa okwo, abakirimu baliryaŋŋana, era balirya n'abaana baabwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Awo n'olyoka oyasa ensumbi eyo, ng'abantu abaagenze naawe balaba," 
Jeremiah19:11 n'obagamba nti Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: ‘Bwe ntyo bwe ndibetenta abantu bano n'ekibuga kino, ng'omuntu bw'ayasa ekintu eky'ebbumba, ekitayinza kuddamu kuyungibwa. Abantu baliziika ne mu Tofeti, olw'obutaba na kifo kirala kya kuziikamu." 
Jeremiah19:12 Bwe ntyo bwe ndikola ekifo kino n'abakibeeramu, ne nfuula ekibuga kino nga Tofeti." 
Jeremiah19:13 Ennyumba z'omu Yerusaalemu, n'eza bakabaka ba Buyudaaya, era n'ennyumba zonna mwe baayoterezanga obubaane eri emmunyeenye, n'ezo mwe baafukiranga ebyokunywa ebiweebwayo eri balubaale, zonna ziriba nnyonoonefu nga Tofeti.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Awo ne nva e Tofeti, Mukama gye yali antumye okulangirira obubaka bwe." 
Jeremiah19:15 Ne ŋŋenda ne nnyimirira mu luggya lw'Essinzizo, ne ntegeeza abantu nti: “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Ndituusa akabi ku kibuga kino, ne ku bubuga obukiriraanye, ke nagamba okukituusaako, kubanga abantu bakakanyazizza emitima gyabwe, ne batawuliriza bye mbagamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Awo kabona Pasuhuuri, mutabani wa Yimmeri, eyali akulira abakuuma Essinzizo, bwe yawulira Yeremiya omulanzi ng'alangirira ebyo," 
Jeremiah20:2 n'ajja n'alagira ne bamukuba era ne bamusiba mu nvuba, eyali ku mulyango ogw'engulu ogwa Benyamiini mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah20:3 Enkeera Pasuhuuri n'asumulula Yeremiya mu nvuba. Yeremiya n'amugamba nti: “Mukama takuyise linnya lyo Pasuhuuri, wabula akuyise Ntiisabuliwantu." 
Jeremiah20:4 Mukama agamba nti: ‘Ndikufuula eky'entiisa eri ggwe wennyini, n'eri mikwano gyo, era oliraba bwe battibwa abalabe baabwe mu lutalo. Ndiwaayo Obuyudaaya bwonna mu mikono gya kabaka wa Babilooni. Abamu alibatwala mu nsi ye nga basibe, abalala alibattira mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah20:5 Obugagga bwonna n'ebintu byonna eby'omuwendo mu kibuga kino, omuli n'ebya bakabaka ba Buyudaaya, ndibiwaayo ne binyagibwa abalabe, buli kimu bakitwale e Babilooni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Naawe Pasuhuuri, olikwatibwa n'otwalibwa e Babilooni ng'oli musibe n'ab'omu nnyumba yo bonna. Eyo gy'olifiira era gy'oliziikibwa, ggwe ne mikwano gyo bonna be walagulanga eby'obulimba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Ayi Mukama wannimba ne nzikiriza! Onsinza amaanyi, era ompangudde. Nfuuse kisekererwa buli kadde, buli muntu ankudaalira." 
Jeremiah20:8 Buli lwe njogera, ndeekaana ne nnangirira nti “Okunyaga n'okuzikiriza bijja!” Obubaka bwo, ayi Mukama, bunvumisa, era bunsekereza buli kadde." 
Jeremiah20:9 Naye bwe ŋŋamba nti “Mukama ka mmwerabire, ndekere awo n'okumwogerera,” obubaka bwo buba ng'omuliro ogubuubuukira mu nze. Nfuba okubuzibiikiriza, ne siyinza kubuziyiza." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mpulira nga bonna boogera obwama nti: “Buli wantu wabunye entiisa! Tumuloope mu b'obuyinza!” Ne mikwano gyange ennyo balindiridde kulaba bwe ngwa. Be bamu bagamba nti: “Singa asendebwasendebwa ne tumukwatiriza, ne tuwoolera eggwanga!”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Naye Mukama ali wamu nange ye muzira nnantalumbwa, era abanjigganya bajja kulumwa. Baliswala nnyo, kubanga tebayinza kuwangula. Balikwatibwa ensonyi ennaku zonna." 
Jeremiah20:12 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ogeza abantu mu bwenkanya. Olaba bye balowooza mu mitima gyabwe. Kale ndaga nga bw'owoolera eggwanga, kubanga ensonga zange nzikwasizza ggwe." 
Jeremiah20:13 Muyimbire Mukama, mutendereze Mukama, kubanga ataasa omunaku mu mikono gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Olunaku kwe nazaalirwa lukolimirwe! Olunaku mmange kwe yanzaalira, luvumirirwe!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Oyo akolimirwe, eyaleetera kitange amawulire agamusanyusa nti: “Ozaaliddwa omwana wa bulenzi.”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Omuntu oyo abe ng'ebibuga Mukama bye yazikiriza nga tasaasira. Awulire emiranga ku makya, n'enduulu z'abaserikale mu ttuntu," 
Jeremiah20:17 kubanga teyanzita nga sinnazaalibwa. Mmange ye yandibadde entaana yange! 
Jeremiah20:18 Kale nazaalirwa ki? Okulaba ennaku n'okubonaabona, n'okufiira mu buswavu?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya, n'antumira Pasuhuuri mutabani wa Malukiya, ne Kabona Zefaniya mutabani wa Maaseya ng'agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah21:2 “Nkwegayiridde, twogerereyo eri Mukama, kubanga Kabaka Nebukadunezzari atutabadde. Oboolyawo Mukama anaatukolera ekyamagero, Nebukadunezzari n'atuvaako.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Awo ne mbagamba nti: “Mugambe Zeddeekiya nti: 
Jeremiah21:4 Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Nja kuwangula eggye lyammwe erirwanyisa kabaka wa Babilooni n'eggye lye. Nja kukuŋŋaanyiza ebyokulwanyisa byammwe mu kibuga wakati. 
Jeremiah21:5 Nja kubalwanyisa mmwe n'amaanyi gange gonna, mu busungu n'ekiruyi, era n'obukambwe bungi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Nja kutta abali mu kibuga kino. Abantu n'ensolo bajja kufa kawumpuli ow'amaanyi. 
Jeremiah21:7 Oluvannyuma ggwe Zeddeekiya n'abakungu bo, n'abantu bonna abaliwonawo mu lutalo, n'abaliwona enjala ne kawumpuli n'endwadde, ndireka ne muwambibwa Kabaka Nebukadunezzari, n'abalabe bammwe abaagala okubatta. Alibatta awatali kusonyiwa na kukwatirwa kisa, wadde okusaasira. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba ntegeeze abantu nti: “Mulabe, Nze Mukama nteeka mu maaso gammwe, ekkubo erituusa mu bulamu, n'ekkubo erituusa mu kufa. Mulondeewo." 
Jeremiah21:9 Buli asigala mu kibuga, ajja kuttirwa mu lutalo, oba anaafa enjala, oba endwadde. Naye buli anaakivaamu, ne yeewaayo eri Abakaludaaya ababazinze, ye atattibwe. Obulamu bwe, bwe bunaaba ng'omunyago gwe." 
Jeremiah21:10 Nsazeewo obutasaasira kibuga kino, wabula okukizikiriza. Kinaaweebwayo mu buyinza bwa kabaka wa Babilooni, n'akyokya omuliro. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba okutuusa obubaka buno ku b'omu lulyo olulangira mu Buyudaaya nti: “Muwulire Nze Mukama kye ŋŋamba 
Jeremiah21:12 mmwe bazzukulu ba Dawudi. Musalenga emisango buli lunaku. Mutaase oyo gwe bayiikiriza, obusungu bwange buleme kubuubuuka ng'omuliro, n'okubookya, olw'ebikolwa byammwe ebibi, ne wataba ayinza kubuziyiza." 
Jeremiah21:13 “Ggwe Yerusaalemu, ogulumidde waggulu w'ebiwonvu, ng'olwazi olugulumivu mu lusenyi. Ogamba nti: ‘Tewali ayinza kukulumba n'okutuuka gy'oli.’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Naye ndibonereza abakulimu olw'ebyo bye baakola. Nditeekera omuliro ku kibira kyo, ne gwokya byonna ebikyetoolodde. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Serengeta mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Buyudaaya, otwaleyo obubaka buno," 
Jeremiah22:2 ogambe nti: Ggwe kabaka wa Buyudaaya, muzzukulu wa Dawudi, wulira obubaka bwa Mukama, ggwe n'abakungu bo, n'abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah22:3 Mukama agamba nti mukolenga eby'obwenkanya era ebituufu. Mutaasenga oyo gwe bayiikiriza. Temulyazaamaanyanga bagwira ne bamulekwa, ne bannamwandu, wadde okubanyigirizanga. Era mu kifo kino, temuttanga bantu batalina musango" 
Jeremiah22:4 Bwe mulituukiriza bye mbalagira, olwo bazzukulu ba Dawudi balyongera okuba bakabaka. Bo wamu n'abakungu baabwe, n'abantu baabwe, balyongera okuyitanga mu miryango gy'olubiri luno, nga bali mu magaali era nga beebagadde embalaasi." 
Jeremiah22:5 Naye bwe mutaliwulira kukola bye ndagira, nneerayira nzennyini nti olubiri luno lulifuuka matongo. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah22:6 “Ku lwange, olubiri lwa kabaka wa Buyudaaya lulungi ng'ensi ya Gileyaadi, era ng'ensozi za Lebanooni. Naye ndirufuula ekifo ekyabuliddwa, ekitakyalimu bantu," 
Jeremiah22:7 era ntegeka abaliruzikiriza. Bonna balireeta embazzi, ne batema empagi zaalwo ennungi eza keduro ne bazisuula mu muliro." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Oluvannyuma abagwira bangi bwe baliyita ku kibuga kino, balyebuuzaganya nti: ‘Lwaki Mukama, ekibuga kino ekikulu, yakikola bw'atyo?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Awo baliddamu nti: ‘Kubanga baaleka endagaano gye baakola ne Katonda waabwe, ne basinza balubaale, era ne babaweereza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, temukaabira Kabaka Yosiya eyafa, era temumukungubagira, naye mukaabire nnyo mutabani we Yehoyahaazi, kubanga bamutwala mu buwaŋŋanguse, naye si wa kudda. Taliddamu kulaba nsi y'ewaabwe." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ebifa ku Yehoyahaazi, eyasikira kitaawe Yosiya ku bwakabaka bwa Buyudaaya, eyaggyibwa kuno, Mukama agamba nti: “Si wa kudda." 
Jeremiah22:12 Alifiira eyo gye baamutwala nga musibe. Taliddayo kulaba ku nsi eno.” 
Jeremiah22:13 Zimusanze oyo azimba ennyumba ye ng'ayita mu bulyazaamaanyi, n'agigaziya ng'akozesa obulyake, ng'akozeseza munne obwereere, n'atamuwa mpeera ye." 
Jeremiah22:14 Zimusanze oyo agamba nti: “Nja kwezimbira ennyumba ennene eya kalina, erimu ebisenge ebigazi.” Olwo n'agiteekako amadirisa n'agitindiza embaawo ez'omuvule n'agisiiga langi emmyufu." 
Jeremiah22:15 Olowooza nti oliba kabaka kubanga ozimbisizza omuvule ogusinga ogw'abalala? Kitaawo yalyanga n'anywa, n'akola eby'obwenkanya, ebituufu, n'aba bulungi." 
Jeremiah22:16 Emisango gy'abaavu n'abanaku yagisalanga bulungi, n'aba n'emirembe mu mutima. Okwo nno kwe kumanya Mukama." 
Jeremiah22:17 Naye ggwe weemalira ku bibyo byokka. Otta abatalina musango, otulugunya abantu bo n'obukambwe. Mukama ye ayogedde ebyo." 
Jeremiah22:18 Bino Mukama by'ayogera ku Yehoyakiimu, mutabani wa Yosiya, kabaka wa Buyudaaya nti: “Tebalimukungubagira, wadde okugamba nti: ‘Nga kitalo sseruganda, nga kitalo mwannyinaze!’ Tebalimukubira biwoobe nti: ‘Woowe, mukama wange! Woowe, kabaka waffe!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Aliziikibwa nga ndogoyi. Balimukulula ne basuula ebweru w'emiryango gya Yerusaalemu.” 
Jeremiah22:20 Abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, mulinnye ku Lebanooni muleekaane; mugende mu nsi y'e Basani muyimuse eddoboozi. Mukaabire ku nsozi z'e Mowaabu, kubanga mikwano gyammwe bonna bazikiriziddwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Mukama yayogera nammwe nga muli bulungi, ne mugaana okuwuliriza. Bwe mutyo bwe mwamanyiira okukolanga obulamu bwammwe bwonna, mwagaanira ddala okuwuliranga by'agamba." 
Jeremiah22:22 Abakulembeze bammwe bonna balitwalibwa embuyaga, ne mikwano gyammwe baliwambibwa mu lutalo. Mulikwatibwa ensonyi ne muswala olw'ebibi byonna bye mwakola!" 
Jeremiah22:23 Mwe abawulira emirembe mu miti gy'emivule gye mwaggya mu Lebanooni, muliba ba kusaasirwa nnyo. Obulumi bulibakwata, ne mubalagalwa ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Mukama agamba nti: “Nga bwe ndi omulamu, ggwe Koniya, mutabani wa Yehoyakiimu kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ne bwe wandibadde empeta eri ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, nandikunaanuddeko" 
Jeremiah22:25 ne nkuwaayo eri ababi b'otya era abaagala okukutta. Ndikuwaayo mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni ne mu gy'abaserikale be. 
Jeremiah22:26 Ggwe ne nnyoko akuzaala ndibagobera mu nsi endala gye mutaazaalibwamu, era mulifiira eyo." 
Jeremiah22:27 Mulyegomba okudda mu nsi eno, naye temulidda.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Omusajja ono Koniya afuuse ng'ekibya ekyatifu, ekisuuliddwa ekitaliiko akyagala? Ye n'ezzadde lye kyebavudde bagobebwa ne basindikibwa mu nsi gye batamanyi?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Ayi ensi, ensi, ensi! Wulira Mukama ky'agambye nti:" 
Jeremiah22:30 “Mubalire omusajja ono mu batalina baana. Mu bulamu bwe, nga teyafuna mukisa! Mu b'omusaayi gwe tewali alifuga nate Obuyudaaya ng'omusika wa Dawudi. Nze Mukama, Nze nkyogedde.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Zibasanze abakulembeze abo, abazikiriza era abasaasaanya abantu ba Mukama!" 
Jeremiah23:2 Bino Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, by'ayogera ku bakulembeze abalabirira abantu be, agamba nti: “Temwalabirira bantu bange. Mwabagoba ne mubasaasaanya. Kaakano ŋŋenda okubabonereza mmwe, olw'ekibi kye mwakola." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ndikuŋŋaanya abantu bange abasigaddewo okubaggya mu nsi zonna gye nabasaasaanyiza, mbakomyewo mu nsi yaabwe. Balizaala nnyo ne baala." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndissaawo abakulembeze okubalabiriranga, balemenga kutya na kweraliikirira, era waleme kubaawo n'omu abula. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, ne nnonda omuzzukulu omutuukirivu owa Dawudi, n'afuga nga ye kabaka. Kabaka oyo alifugisa magezi, n'akola ebituufu era eby'obwenkanya mu nsi ye." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mu mirembe gye, abantu b'omu Buyudaaya balibeera bulungi, n'abantu b'omu Yisirayeli balibeera mirembe. Erinnya lye aliyitibwa ‘Mukama, Omulokozi atuwa obutuukirivu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, abantu nga tebakyandayira nti: ‘Nga Mukama bw'ali omulamu eyaggya Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri.’" 
Jeremiah23:8 Naye banandayiranga nti: ‘Nga Mukama bw'ali omulamu, eyaggya Abayisirayeli mu nsi ez'omu bukiikakkono, ne mu nsi zonna gye yabasaasaanyiza.’ Era balibeera mu nsi eyaabwe.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Omutima gwange gumenyese, nzenna nkankana ku lwa Mukama, n'olw'ebigambo bye ebitukuvu. Ndi ng'omutamiivu, ng'omuntu afugiddwa omwenge." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ensi ejjudde abantu abatanywerera ku Mukama. Ba mpisa mbi mu bulamu bwabwe, bakozesa bubi obuyinza bwe balina. Ensi ekungubaga, n'amalundiro gakaze olw'okukolimirwa Mukama." 
Jeremiah23:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Abalanzi ne bakabona boonoonefu. Nabasanga bakola ebibi ne mu Ssinzizo mwennyini. 
Jeremiah23:12 Kale amakubo ge bakwata galiba maseerevu, ga nzikiza. Balisindikibwa mu go ne bagwa. Ndibatuusaako akabi mu kiseera eky'okubonereza. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah23:13 Era ndabye ekibi ky'abalanzi b'e Samariya: balagula ku lwa Baali ne bakyamya abantu bange. 
Jeremiah23:14 Naye ndabye n'abalanzi ab'omu Yerusaalemu nga bakola eby'ekivve. Bakola eby'obwenzi, era balimba. Bawagira abantu abakola ebibi, ne wataba akyuka kulekayo bibi bye. Bonna ndaba nga babi ng'ab'e Sodoma ne Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Kale Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, kiikino kye ŋŋamba ku balanzi b'omu Yerusaalemu: ndibaliisa ebimera ebikaawa, era ndibanywesa obutwa kubanga babunyisizza obwonoonefu mu ggwanga lyonna.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Awo Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'agamba ab'omu Yerusaalemu nti: “Temuwuliriza ebyo abalanzi bye babalagula, nga babasuubiza ebitajja kubagasa. Babategeeza ebyo bo bennyini bye balowoozezza, sso si ebyo Nze bye njogedde." 
Jeremiah23:17 Abantu abanyooma bye njogedde, abalanzi abo babategeeza bulijjo nti: ‘Mujja kubeera bulungi.’ Era buli mukakanyavu wa mutima bamutegeeza nti tewali kabi kalimujjira.”" 
Jeremiah23:18 “Naye ani ku balanzi abo eyali amanye ebirowoozo bya Mukama? Tekuli yali awulidde bubaka bwe, wadde eyali awulirizza n'assaayo omwoyo ku ebyo Mukama by'agamba." 
Jeremiah23:19 Obusungu bwa Mukama buli nga kibuyaga: ye mbuyaga ey'amaanyi, erikuntira ku mitwe gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Era obusungu bwe tebulikka nga tannatuukiriza ky'amaliridde okukola. Kino abantu be mu biseera ebijja balikitegeera bulungi.” 
Jeremiah23:21 Awo Mukama n'agamba nti: “Saatuma balanzi abo, naye ne bagenda. Saabawa bubaka, naye ne boogera mu linnya lyange." 
Jeremiah23:22 Singa baamanya ebirowoozo byange, kale bandituusizza obubaka bwange ku bantu bange, ne babakyusa okuva mu mpisa zaabwe embi, n'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ndi Katonda ali okumpi n'ewala. 
Jeremiah23:24 Tewali ayinza kwekweka we yeekisizza, ne simulaba. Temumanyi nga ndi buli wantu, mu ggulu ne mu nsi?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Mmanyi abalanzi abo bye boogedde, abalanga eby'obulimba, nga bakozesa erinnya lyange, nga bagamba nti: ‘Mukama yandoosezza, Mukama yandoosezza.’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Abalanzi abo balituusa wa okukyamya abantu bange, nga babategeeza eby'obulimba bye beeyiiyiza?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Balowooza nti ebirooto byabwe bye banyumya, binaaleetera abantu okunneerabira, badde eri Baali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Omulanzi aloose ekirooto, ayogerenga nti kirooto bulooto. N'oyo afunye obubaka, abulangirirenga n'obwesigwa. Ebisusunku biba birungi ng'eŋŋaano?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Obubaka bwange buli ng'omuliro, era ng'ennyondo eyasaayasa olwazi." 
Jeremiah23:30 Nkyawa abalanzi abo abaddira ebigambo bya bannaabwe, ne babirangirira ng'obubaka bwange." 
Jeremiah23:31 Era nkyawa n'abalanzi bange abo, abaddira ebigambo ebyabwe ku bwabwe, ne bagamba nti Nze mbyogedde." 
Jeremiah23:32 Muwulire Nze Mukama kye ŋŋamba: nkyawa abalanzi aboogera ebirooto byabwe eby'obulimba, ne bakyamya abantu bange olw'obulimba bwabwe obwo, n'okwenyumiriza mu bitaliimu. Sibatumanga, era sibalagiranga. Era tebalina kye bagasa mu bantu bange. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, omu ku bantu bange, oba omulanzi, oba kabona, bw'akubuuza nti: ‘Obubaka bwa Mukama bwe buluwa?’ Ggwe muddemu nti: ‘Oli mugugu eri Mukama, era agenda kukusuula eri.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Singa omulanzi oba kabona oba omulala yenna alikozesa ebigambo: ‘Omugugu gwa Mukama,’ ndimubonereza ye n'ab'ennyumba ye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Wabula buli omu abuuzenga mikwano gye n'ab'eŋŋanda ze nti: ‘Mukama azzeemu ki? Mukama agambye ki?’ 
Jeremiah23:36 Tebakozesanga nate bigambo bino nti: ‘Omugugu gwa Mukama,’ kubanga oyo alibikozesa, obubaka bwange bulimufuukira omugugu. Abantu bakyamya ebigambo bya Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah23:37 Ggwe Yeremiya, buuza abalanzi nti: ‘Mukama akuzzeemu ki? Mukama agambye ki?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Naye bwe bajeemera ekiragiro kyange, ne bakozesa ebigambo: ‘Omugugu gwa Mukama,’ bategeeze nti" 
Jeremiah23:39 nja kubasitula mbakanyuge wala, bo bennyini n'ekibuga kyabwe kye nabawa, ne bajjajjaabwe." 
Jeremiah23:40 Era ndibaleetako ensonyi n'okuswala, ebitalyerabirwa.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Awo Mukama n'andaga ebisero bibiri eby'emitiini, nga biteekeddwa mu maaso g'Essinzizo. Ekyo kyaliwo nga Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni amaze okuggya mu Yerusaalemu Kabaka Yekoniya, mutabani wa Yehoyakiimu, n'amutwala mu buwaŋŋanguse, awamu n'abakulembeze ba Buyudaaya, n'abakungu, era n'abamanyirivu mu mirimu." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ekisero ekisooka, kyalimu emitiini emirungi, egisooka okwengera. Ekirala kyalimu emitiini emibi ennyo, egitayinza kuliika." 
Jeremiah24:3 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, olaba ki?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ndaba emitiini emirungi ennyo, ate n'emibi ennyo egitayinza kuliika.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah24:5 “Nze Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ndaba ng'abantu be nasindiikiriza okuva mu Buyudaaya, ne batwalibwa mu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, bali ng'emitiini emirungi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Era ndibakwatirwa ekisa, ne mbakomyawo mu nsi eno. Ndibazimba ne sibaabuluza. Ndibasimba ne sibasimbula." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndibaagazisa okumanya nga Nze Mukama. Banaabanga bantu bange, ne mba Katonda waabwe, kubanga balidda gye ndi n'omutima gwabwe gwonna." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Naye Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya n'abakungu be, n'abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, abaasigala mu nsi eno, oba abaddukira mu nsi y'e Misiri, Nze Mukama, bonna ndibayisa ng'emitiini gino emibi egitayinza kuliika." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndibatuusaako akabi, amawanga gonna ku nsi galyoke gatye. Abantu balibavuma, ne babayisizaako engero, ne babasekerera, era ne bakozesanga erinnya lyabwe nga bakolima, buli gye ndibasaasaanyiza." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndisindika mu bo olutalo n'enjala n'endwadde, okutuusa lwe baliggwaawo mu nsi gye nabawa bo ne bajjajjaabwe.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ne nfuna obubaka bwa Mukama obufa ku bantu b'omu Buyudaaya. Ogwo gwe gwali omwaka ogusooka, nga Nebukadunezzari ye kabaka wa Babilooni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Ne ŋŋamba ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu nti: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Okuva mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'esatu nga Yosiya mutabani wa Ammoni ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, n'okutuusa kati, gye myaka amakumi abiri mu esatu, Mukama abadde ayogera nange, era sirekangayo kubategeeza by'ayogedde. Naye mmwe mwagaana okuwuliriza." 
Jeremiah25:4 Mwagaana okuwuliriza, wadde okussaayo omwoyo, newaakubadde nga Mukama yayongera okubatumiranga abaweereza be abalanzi." 
Jeremiah25:5 Baabagambanga nti: ‘Buli muntu ave mu mpisa ze embi, era alekeyo ebikolwa bye ebibi, mulyoke musobole okubeeranga mu nsi, Mukama gye yabawa mmwe ne bajjajjammwe, okuba obutaka bwammwe." 
Jeremiah25:6 Temuusinzenga balubaale, wadde okubaweerezanga, muleme kunyiiza Mukama nga musinza ebyo abantu bye bakola. Mukama bwe mulimuwulira, talibakolako kabi.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 Naye Mukama yennyini agamba nti mwagaana okumuwulira. Bwe mutyo ne mumusunguwaza olw'ebyo bye mukola, ne mwereetera okubonerezebwa." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Mukama Nnannyinimagye kyava agamba nti: ‘Nga bwe mugaanye okuwulira bye ŋŋamba," 
Jeremiah25:9 nja kutumya abantu bonna ab'omu bukiikakkono, n'omuweereza wange Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni, mbaleete, balwanyise ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu mawanga gonna agaliraanyeewo. Ndizikiririza ddala eggwanga lino, n'agaliriraanye, ne ngafuula eky'entiisa, ekinyoomebwa, era amatongo ag'olubeerera. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah25:10 “ ‘Ndisirisa amaloboozi g'abajaguza n'abajaganya, n'essanyu ly'abali ku mbaga z'obugole. Tebalisiga ŋŋaano, era tebaliba na mafuta ga ttaala." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ensi eno yonna eriba matongo ag'entiisa, era amawanga agaliraanyeewo galiweereza kabaka wa Babilooni okumala emyaka nsanvu." 
Jeremiah25:12 Emyaka ensanvu bwe giriyitawo, ne mbonereza kabaka wa Babilooni n'ab'omu ggwanga eryo, olw'ebibi byabwe. Ndizikiriza eggwanga eryo, ne ndifuula amatongo ennaku zonna." 
Jeremiah25:13 Era ndituusa ku nsi eyo byonna bye nalangirira ku mawanga gonna, nga mpita mu Yeremiya, ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kino." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ndyesasuza ku Bakaludaaya olw'ebyo bye baakola. Amawanga mangi, ne bakabaka abakulu, balibafuula abaddu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Awo Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kwata ekikopo ekiri mu ngalo zange, ekijjudde obusungu bwange, okinyweseeko ab'amawanga gonna gye nkutuma." 
Jeremiah25:16 Balikinywako ne batagatta, ne balaluka olw'olutalo lwe ndisindika mu bo.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Awo ne nzigya ekikopo mu ngalo za Mukama, ne nkinywesaako ab'amawanga gonna, Mukama gye yantuma." 
Jeremiah25:18 Ab'omu Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu bibuga byonna ebya Buyudaaya, wamu ne bakabaka n'abakungu baamu, ne bakinywesebwako, ebibuga ebyo biryoke bifuuke matongo ag'entiisa era aganyoomebwa, abantu bakozesenga amannya gaabyo nga bakolima, ng'era bwe bakola kaakano." 
Jeremiah25:19 Abalala abalinywesebwa ku kikopo ekyo be bano: kabaka wa Misiri, n'abaweereza be, n'abakungu be, n'abantu be bonna," 
Jeremiah25:20 n'abagwira bonna abali mu Misiri, ne bakabaka bonna ab'omu nsi ya Wuuzi, ne bakabaka bonna ab'omu bibuga by'Abafilistiya eby'e Asukelooni ne Gaaza ne Ekurooni, n'abasigaddewo mu Asudoodi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 abantu bonna ab'omu Edomu, ne Mowaabu ne Ammoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 ne bakabaka bonna ab'e Tiiro ne Sidoni; ne bakabaka bonna ab'ensi ezeetoolodde Ennyanja Eyaawakati," 
Jeremiah25:23 n'ab'omu bibuga Dedani ne Tema ne Buuzi, n'abantu bonna abasala ku nviiri zaabwe;" 
Jeremiah25:24 ne bakabaka bonna ab'e Buwarabu, ne bakabaka bonna ab'abantu ababeera mu ddungu," 
Jeremiah25:25 ne bakabaka bonna ab'e Zimuri ne Elamu ne Mediya; 
Jeremiah25:26 ne bakabaka bonna ab'omu bukiikakkono, ab'ewala n'ab'okumpi, buli kinnoomu. Ab'omu mawanga gonna balikinywesebwako. Kabaka wa Sesaki ye alisembayo okukinywako." 
Jeremiah25:27 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Tegeeza abantu nti Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Munywe, mutamiire, museseme, mugwe wansi, muleme kusitukawo, olw'olutalo lwe ndisindika mu mmwe.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Bwe baligaana okukwata ekiri mu mukono gwo okukinywako, olibagamba nti: ‘Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti muteekwa okukinywako,’" 
Jeremiah25:29 kubanga nditandikira ku kibuga kyange kyennyini okukola akabi. Balowooza nti bo be baliwona okubonerezebwa? Nedda, tebaliwona kubonerezebwa, kubanga ndisindika olutalo mu bantu bonna abali ku nsi. Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Kale ggwe Yeremiya, olirangirira byonna bye njogedde. Oligamba abantu abo nti: ‘Mukama aliwuluguma ng'asinzira mu ggulu, alibwatuka ng'asinziira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu. Alibwatukira abantu be n'aleekaana ng'abo abasamba emizabbibu, awulize bonna abali ku nsi." 
Jeremiah25:31 Eddoboozi lye lirituuka ensi gy'ekoma, kubanga waliwo omusango Mukama gw'avunaana amawanga. Aliwozesa abantu bonna. Ababi alibawaayo okuttibwa. Mukama ye ayogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Akabi kaliranda, okuva ku ggwanga erimu, okudda ku ddala, era kibuyaga ow'amaanyi alikunta, okuva ku nsonda z'ensi ez'ewala." 
Jeremiah25:33 Ku lunaku olwo, emirambo gy'abo Mukama b'alitta, girisaasaanira wonna, okuva ensi gy'etandikira, okutuuka gy'ekoma. Tebalikungubagirwa, era tebalikuŋŋanyizibwa ne baziikibwa. Balisigala kungulu ng'obusa." 
Jeremiah25:34 Muleekaane mmwe abakulembeze, mukube ebiwoobe! Mmwe abalabirira abantu bange mwekulukuunye mu nfuufu, kubanga ekiseera kituuse muttibwe era mwasibweyasibwe ng'ekibya eky'omuwendo ekigudde ne kyatikayatika." 
Jeremiah25:35 Temulibaako buddukiro, era temulibaako we muwonera." 
Jeremiah25:36 Muwulire emiranga abakulembeze gye batema, n'okuleekaana kw'abo abalabirira abantu! Mukama asaanyizzaawo eggwanga lyabwe," 
Jeremiah25:37 era ensi yaabwe eyabeerangamu emirembe, Mukama mu busungu bwe agifudde matongo." 
Jeremiah25:38 Mukama ayabulidde abantu be, ng'empologoma bw'eva mu mpuku yaayo. Entiisa y'olutalo n'ekiruyi kya Mukama, ensi yaabwe bigifudde matongo!”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya, bwe yali nga yaakafuuka kabaka wa Buyudaaya," 
Jeremiah26:2 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yimirira mu luggya lw'Essinzizo, olangirire byonna bye nkulagidde okutegeeza abantu abava mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne bajja okunsinziza mu Ssinzizo. Tolekaayo kigambo na kimu." 
Jeremiah26:3 Oboolyawo banaawulira, ne bakyuka okulekayo empisa zaabwe embi. Olwo nja kukyusa kye mbadde nteesezza okubakolako olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi." 
Jeremiah26:4 “Era bagambe nti Nze Mukama mbagambye nti mumpulire, mukwate amateeka ge mbateereddewo." 
Jeremiah26:5 Era muwulirizenga ebyo abaweereza bange abalanzi, be mbatumira awatali kwosa, bye babategeeza. Naye mmwe temuwuliriza bye bagamba." 
Jeremiah26:6 Bwe mutaalekere awo kunjeemera, ndikola ku Ssinzizo lino, kye nakola ku Siilo, era amawanga gonna ku nsi, ganaakozesanga erinnya ly'ekibuga kino nga gakolima.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Awo bakabona n'abalanzi, n'abantu bonna, ne bawulira nga njogera ebigambo ebyo mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:8 Era olwamaliriza okwogera, ne bankwata, nga bagamba nti: “Oli wa kuttibwa." 
Jeremiah26:9 Oyinza otya okwogera mu linnya lya Mukama nti Essinzizo lino lirifuuka nga Siilo, era nti ekibuga kino kirizikirizibwa, ne wataba muntu akibeeramu?” Abantu bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira we ndi mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:10 Awo abakungu ba Buyudaaya bwe baawulira ebiguddewo, ne bava mu lubiri lwa kabaka, ne bambuka ku Ssinzizo. Ne batuula ku ntebe zaabwe, mu Mulyango Omuggya ogw'Essinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:11 Awo bakabona n'abalanzi ne bagamba abakungu n'abantu bonna nti: “Omusajja ono asaanidde okusalirwa ogw'okuttibwa, kubanga ayogedde bubi ku kibuga kyaffe, nga nammwe mwennyini bwe muwulidde.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Awo nze Yeremiya ne ŋŋamba abakungu bonna, n'abantu bonna nti: “Mukama ye yantuma okulangirira ebigambo byonna bye muwulidde, ebifa ku Ssinzizo lino, ne ku kibuga kino." 
Jeremiah26:13 Kale mulongoose empisa zammwe n'ebikolwa byammwe, era muwulire Mukama Katonda wammwe. Olwo Mukama alikyusa ky'abadde ateesezza okubakolako.”" 
Jeremiah26:14 “Naye nze, nzuuno, ndi mu mikono gyammwe. Munkoleko kye mulaba nga kirungi era nga kituufu." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kyokka mukimanyire ddala nti bwe munzita, mmwe n'abantu b'omu kibuga kino, muneereetako ekibi eky'okutta omuntu ataliiko musango, kubanga Mukama ye yantuma okubategeeza ebyo byonna.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Awo abakungu b'abantu ne bagamba bakabona n'abalanzi nti: “Omusajja ono tasaanidde kuttibwa, kubanga ayogedde naffe mu linnya lya Mukama Katonda waffe.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Awo abamu ku bantu abakulu mu ggwanga ne basituka, ne bagamba abantu abakuŋŋaanye nti:" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Heezeekiya bwe yali nga ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Mikka ow'e Moreseti yategeeza abantu bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya nti Mukama Nnannyinimagye agambye nti: ‘Olusozi Siyooni lulirimibwa ng'ennimiro, n'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu kirifuuka ntuumu ya bisasiro, n'olusozi okuli Essinzizo lulimerako ekibira.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Kabaka Heezeekiya n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, tebatta Mikka. Naye Heezeekiya yassaamu Mukama ekitiibwa, n'amusaba abe wa kisa. Ne Mukama n'akyusa ekirowoozo kye, n'ataleeta kabi ke yali agambye okubatuusaako. Naye ffe tugenda okwereetera akabi!”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Kale era waaliwo omusajja omulala ayitibwa Wuriya, mutabani wa Semaaya ow'e Kiriyati Yeyariimu, eyalagula mu linnya lya Mukama ebifa ku kibuga kino ne ku ggwanga lino, nga Yeremiya bwe yakola." 
Jeremiah26:21 Kabaka Yehoyakiimu ne basajja be ab'amaanyi n'abakungu be bonna bwe baawulira Wuriya bye yayogera, kabaka n'ayagala okumutta. Wuriya bwe yakimanya, n'atya, n'addukira mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Kabaka n'atuma Elunatani mutabani wa Akuboori, n'abantu abalala e Misiri okukimayo Wuriya." 
Jeremiah26:23 Ne bamuleeta eri Yehoyakiimu kabaka. Kabaka n'alagira ne bamutta, omulambo gwe ne bagusuula mu kifo ekiziikibwamu ekya lukale." 
Jeremiah26:24 Naye nze Yeremiya, olw'okuyambibwa Ahikaamu mutabani wa Safani, ssaaweebwayo mu bantu kuttibwa." 
Jeremiah27:1 Zeddeekiya mutabani wa Yosiya, bwe yali nga yaakafuulibwa kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah27:2 weekolere ekikoligo mu miti emikiike era emisibise enkoba, okyeyambike mu bulago." 
Jeremiah27:3 Oweereze obubaka eri bakabaka: ow'e Edomu, n'ow'e Mowaabu, n'ow'e Ammoni, n'ow'e Tiiro, n'ow'e Sidoni, ng'oyita mu babaka baabwe abajja e Yerusaalemu okulaba Kabaka Zeddeekiya." 
Jeremiah27:4 Obawe obubaka obw'okutwalira bakama baabwe nti Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti mugambe bakama bammwe nti:" 
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Olw'obuyinza bwange obungi, n'amaanyi gange, Nze natonda ensi erimu abantu n'ensolo, era ngiwa oyo gwe nsiima." 
Jeremiah27:6 Era kaakano ensi zino zonna nziwadde omuweereza wange Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya okuzifuga. Era mmuwadde n'ensolo ez'omu ttale okumuweereza. 
Jeremiah27:7 Amawanga gonna galimuweereza, ye ne mutabani we, n'omwana wa mutabani we, okutuusa ekiseera kye nategekera eggwanga lye lwe kiriggwaako, olwo nalyo ne liryoka liweereza amawanga mangi, aga bakabaka abakulu." 
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘Ab'eggwanga oba obwakabaka abaligaana okuweereza kabaka oyo Nebukadunezzari owa Babilooniya, n'okugondera obuyinza bwe, ndibabonereza n'olutalo n'enjala n'endwadde, okutuusa lwe ndireka Nebukadunezzari okubusaanyizaawo ddala." 
Jeremiah27:9 Kale temuwuliriza balanzi bammwe n'abalaguzi bammwe, wadde omulala yenna agamba nti ayinza okulanga ebirijja, ng'avvuunula ebirooto oba nga yeebuuza ku mizimu oba ng'akozesa eby'amalogo. Abo bonna babagamba nti temuliweereza kabaka wa Babilooniya." 
Jeremiah27:10 Babalagula bya bulimba era balibaleetera okutwalibwa ewala w'ensi yammwe, ngibagobemu mmwe, era mbazikirize." 
Jeremiah27:11 Naye ab'eggwanga eririgondera obufuzi bwa kabaka wa Babilooniya, ne limuweereza, ndibaleka okusigala mu nsi yaabwe, okugirima n'okugibeeramu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Awo ebintu ebyo bye bimu, ne mbitegeeza Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya, ne mmugamba nti: “Mukkirize okufugibwa kabaka wa Babilooniya. Mumuweereze ye n'abantu be, lwe munaalama." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ggwe n'abantu bo, mwagalira ki okufiira mu lutalo, oba okufa enjala oba endwadde, nga Mukama bw'agambye nti ebyo bye birituuka ku ggwanga eritalikkiriza kufugibwa kabaka wa Babilooniya?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Temuwuliriza balanzi babagamba nti temuliweereza kabaka wa Babilooniya, kubanga babalagula bya bulimba." 
Jeremiah27:15 Mukama yennyini agamba nti tabatumanga, wabula boogera bya bulimba mu linnya lye. Kale ajja kubagoba mmwe mu nsi ye, muzikirire wamu n'abalanzi abo ababalagula.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Era ne ntegeeza bakabona n'abantu bano bonna, Mukama by'agambye nti: “Temuwuliriza bya balanzi bammwe ababalagula nti ebintu by'Essinzizo bijja kuzzibwa mangu okuva e Babilooni. Babalagula bya bulimba." 
Jeremiah27:17 Temubawuliriza. Mugondere kabaka wa Babilooniya, lwe munaalama. Ekibuga kino kinaafuukira ki amatongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Oba ddala balanzi era nga balina obubaka bwange, kale beegayirire Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ebintu ebisigaddewo mu Ssinzizo ne mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Buyudaaya ne mu Yerusaalemu bireme kutwalibwa mu Babilooniya.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Mukama Nnannyinimagye bw'atyo bw'ayogera ku mpagi ne tanka n'ebikondo by'ebinaabiro, n'ebintu ebirala ebyasigala mu Kibuga Yerusaalemu," 
Jeremiah27:20 Nebukadunezzari kabaka w'e Babilooni bwe yatwala e Babilooni mu busibe kabaka wa Buyudaaya Yekoniya mutabani wa Yehoyakiimu n'abakungu bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya ne mu Yerusaalemu. 
Jeremiah27:21 Mukama agamba nti: “Muwulire ebyo Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, bye ŋŋamba, ebifa ku bintu ebyasigala mu Ssinzizo ne mu lubiri lwa kabaka e Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah27:22 Bijja kutwalibwa e Babilooni, era bibeere eyo okutuusa lwe ndibissaako omwoyo, ne mbikomyawo, ne mbiteeka mu kifo kino. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Mu mwaka ogwo gwennyini, mu mwezi ogwokutaano ogw'omwaka ogwokuna nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Ananiya mutabani wa Azzuri era omulanzi ow'e Gibiyoni, n'ayogera nange mu Ssinzizo, bakabona n'abantu bonna nga weebali. N'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah28:2 “Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: ‘Mmenyeewo obuyinza bwa kabaka wa Babilooni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Mu bbanga lya myaka ebiri, nja kukomyawo mu kifo kino ebintu byonna eby'Essinzizo, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari bye yaggyamu n'abitwala e Babilooni." 
Jeremiah28:4 Era nja kukomyawo kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Yekoniya mutabani wa Yehoyakiimu, awamu n'abantu bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya, abaatwalibwa mu Babilooni nga basibe. Nja kumenyawo obuyinza bwa kabaka wa Babilooni. Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Bakabona n'abantu bonna nga weebali, ne ŋŋamba omulanzi Ananiya nti:" 
Jeremiah28:6 “Weewaawo. Ka tusuubire nti Mukama anaakola bw'atyo, era nti anaatuukiriza by'olagudde, n'akomyawo okuva e Babilooni ebintu by'Essinzizo n'abantu bonna abaatwalibwayo okusibirwayo." 
Jeremiah28:7 Naye wulira kye nkugamba ggwe Ananiya era kye ŋŋamba abantu bonna. 
Jeremiah28:8 Abalanzi abaatusooka ggwe nange, baalanga entalo n'enjala n'endwadde eby'okujjira amawanga amangi n'obwakabaka obw'amaanyi." 
Jeremiah28:9 Naye omulanzi alanga emirembe, akakasibwa nti ddala mulanzi eyatumibwa Mukama, nga ky'alanze kimaze kutuukirira.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Awo Ananiya n'aggya ekikoligo mu bulago bwange, n'akimenyaamenyamu." 
Jeremiah28:11 N'ayogera ng'abantu bonna weebali, n'agamba nti: “Mukama agamba nti bw'ati bw'alimenya ekikoligo, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ky'atadde mu bulago bw'amawanga gonna. Era ekyo ajja kukikola mu bbanga lya myaka ebiri.” Olwo nze ne nvaawo." 
Jeremiah28:12 Bwe waayitawo ekiseera, Mukama n'aŋŋamba" 
Jeremiah28:13 ŋŋende ntegeeze Ananiya nti: “Mukama agamba nti omenye ekikoligo eky'omuti, naye olikola ekikoligo eky'ekyuma, ne kidda mu kifo kya kino." 
Jeremiah28:14 Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti aliteeka ekikoligo eky'ekyuma mu bulago bw'amawanga gano gonna, gaweerezenga Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni. Mukama agamba nti n'ebisolo eby'omu ttale, nabyo biriweereza Nebukadunezzari.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Awo ne ntegeeza Ananiya ebigambo ebyo, era ne mugamba nti: “Wulira ggwe Ananiya! Mukama takutumanga, n'oleetera abantu bano okwesiga eby'obulimba." 
Jeremiah28:16 Kale nno Mukama yennyini agamba nti ajja kukuggya ku nsi. Ojja kufa ng'omwaka guno tegunnaggwaako, kubanga oyogedde ebiwakanya Mukama.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Awo Ananiya n'afa mu mwaka ogwo gwennyini, mu mwezi ogw'omusanvu." 
Jeremiah29:1 Eno ye bbaluwa gye nawandiikira bakabona n'abalanzi n'abantu abakulu mu ggwanga, n'abalala bonna Nebukadunezzari be yaggya e Yerusaalemu, n'abatwala e Babilooni mu busibe." 
Jeremiah29:2 Nagiwandiika nga Kabaka Yekoniya, ne nnyina, n'abakungu b'omu lubiri, n'abakulembeze b'omu Buyudaaya ne Yerusaalemu, n'abafundi n'abaweesi, bamaze okuggyibwa e Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Nagikwasa Elasa mutabani wa Safani, era ne Gemariya mutabani wa Yilikiya, Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya be yatuma e Babilooni eri Kabaka Nebukadunezzari. Yali egamba bw'eti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Mukama Nnannyinimagye Katonda wa Yisirayeli, abasibe bonna abaggyibwa e Yerusaalemu ne batwalibwa e Babilooni, abagamba nti:" 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Muzimbe amayumba, mukkalire. Musimbe ensuku, mulye emmere yaamu." 
Jeremiah29:6 Muwase abakazi, muzaale abaana. Muwasize batabani bammwe abakazi, era mufumbize bawala bammwe, bazaale, mweyongere obungi, muleme kukendeera." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mukolere obulungi bw'ebibuga gye nabatwala mu busibe. Munsabenga, mbiwenga omukisa, kubanga bwe biriba emirembe, nammwe muliba mirembe." 
Jeremiah29:8 “ ‘Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, mbalabula muleme kulimbibwa balanzi abali mu mmwe, wadde abalala bonna, abagamba nti bayinza okulanga ebirijja. Temuwuliriza birooto byabwe bye baloota," 
Jeremiah29:9 kubanga bye babalagula, nga bajuliza erinnya lyange, bya bulimba. Nze sibatumanga. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Emyaka nsanvu gye nawa Babilooni bwe giriggwaako, ne ndyoka ndaga bwe mbalumirwa mmwe era ne ntuukiriza kye nabasuubiza eky'okubakomyawo ku butaka." 
Jeremiah29:11 Mmanyi bulungi bye mbategekedde mmwe. Bye mbategekedde si bya kabi, naye bya mirembe, egirimu okusuubira ebirungi gye bujja." 
Jeremiah29:12 Olwo mulinkoowoola, ne mujja okunneegayirira, ne mbawulira." 
Jeremiah29:13 Mulinnoonya ne mundaba, kubanga mulinnoonya n'omutima gwammwe gwonna." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ddala mulindaba, era ndibaggya mu busibe. Ndibakuŋŋaanya okubaggya mu mawanga gonna ne mu bifo byonna gye nabaasaanyiza, ne mbakomyawo mu nsi mwe nabaggya okubatwala mu busibe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Mugamba nti: ‘Mukama atuwadde abalanzi mu Babilooni.’ 
Jeremiah29:16 Muwulire ekyo Mukama ky'agamba ku kabaka afuga obwakabaka bwa Dawudi, ne ku baganda bammwe, abataatwalibwa wamu nammwe mu busibe." 
Jeremiah29:17 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: ‘Ndisindika mu bo olutalo n'enjala n'endwadde, era ndibafuula ng'emitiini emivundu, egitakyayinza kuliibwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndibayigganya n'olutalo, n'enjala, n'endwadde, era amawanga gonna galyesisiwala okulaba ekyo. Buli gye ndibasaasaanyiza, abantu balitya era balyekanga olw'ebyo ebibatuuseeko. Balibasekerera, era balikozesa erinnya lyabwe mu kukolima." 
Jeremiah29:19 Ebyo biribatuukako, kubanga tebaawuliriza bubaka bwange bwe nabaweerezanga awatali kwosa, nga mbuyisa ku baweereza bange abalanzi, naye bo ne batakkiriza kuwulira." 
Jeremiah29:20 Kale mmwe mwenna be naggya e Yerusaalemu ne mbasindika e Babilooni mu buwaŋŋanguse, muwulire ebyo Nze Mukama bye ŋŋamba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:21 Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ayogedde ku Akabu, mutabani wa Kalaya ne ku Zeddeekiya mutabani wa Maaseya, ababategeeza eby'obulimba nga bajuliza erinnya lye. Agambye nti alibawaayo mu mikono gya Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni n'abatta nga mulaba." 
Jeremiah29:22 Era abasibe bonna abaava mu Buyudaaya abali e Babilooni, bwe banaabangako gwe bakolimira, banaagambanga nti: “Mukama akufuule nga Zeddeekiya ne Akabu, kabaka wa Babilooni be yayokya omuliro!”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Ekyo kijja kubatuukako, kubanga bakoze eby'obusirusiru mu Yisirayeli. Benze ku baka bannaabwe, era boogedde eby'obulimba nga bajuliza erinnya lya Mukama. Mukama tabibalagiranga. Amanyi bye bakoze, era ye mujulirwa. Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Jeremiah29:24 Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli yampa obubaka obufa ku Semaaya ow'e Nehelamu, eyaweereza ebbaluwa ku bubwe eri abantu bonna mu Yerusaalemu, n'eri Kabona Zefaniya, mutabani wa Maaseya, n'eri bakabona abalala bonna. Ebbaluwa eyo Semaaya yagiwandiikira Zefaniya nti:" 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “Mukama akufudde kabona mu kifo kya Yekoyaada, obe mukulu mu Ssinzizo. Mulimu gwo okulaba nga buli mulalu eyeefuula omulanzi ateekebwa mu nvuba asibwe mu kkomera." 
Jeremiah29:27 Kale lwaki tokoze bw'otyo ku Yeremiya ow'e Anatooti, eyeefuula omulanzi, n'ayogera gye muli?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Yeremiya oyo, yatutumira mu Babilooni ng'agamba nti: ‘Obusibe bwa kulwawo. Muzimbe amayumba mukkalire, era musimbe ensuku, mulyenga emmere yaamu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Awo Zefaniya kabona, n'ansomera ebbaluwa eyo." 
Jeremiah29:30 Mukama n'aŋŋamba 
Jeremiah29:31 okutumira abasibe bonna mu Babilooni obubaka buno obufa ku Semaaya nti: “Nze Mukama, nja kubonereza Semaaya n'ezzadde lye. Nze simutumanga, kyokka n'ayogera gye muli ng'omulanzi, era n'abaleetera okwesiga eby'obulimba. Taliba na muzzukulu we mu mmwe. Era taliwangaala kulaba ku birungi bye ndikolera abantu bange, kubanga yayogera ebibaleetera okunjeemera. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah29:32  
Jeremiah30:1 Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah30:2 “Wandiika mu kitabo, ebigambo byonna, bye nkubuulidde," 
Jeremiah30:3 kubanga ekiseera kijja kutuuka, nnunule abantu bange aba Yisirayeli, n'aba Buyudaaya. Ndibakomyawo mu nsi yaabwe, gye nawa bajjajjaabwe era eriddamu okuba eyaabwe.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Mukama agamba abantu ba Yisirayeli, n'aba Buyudaaya nti:" 
Jeremiah30:5 “Mpulidde eddoboozi ery'okukankana, ery'okutya, sso si lya mirembe." 
Jeremiah30:6 Mulowooze, mwebuuze, oba omusajja alumwa okuzaala. Kale lwaki ndaba buli musajja nga yeekutte ku lubuto, ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala? N'amaaso gakyuse langi yaago!" 
Jeremiah30:7 Olunaku olukulu lujja, era tewali lulwenkana. Luliba lwa buyinike ku ba Yakobo. Kyokka baliluvvuunuka.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ndimenya ekikoligo ekiri mu bulago bwabwe. Ndikutula enjegere ezibasibye. Tebaliddayo kuba baddu ba bagwira," 
Jeremiah30:9 naye baliweereza Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, ne muzzukulu wa Dawudi, gwe ndibateerawo ku bwakabaka." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Kale mmwe abantu bange, abaweereza bange, temutya. Abayisirayeli, temweraliikirira. Ndibanunula, ne mbaggya mu nsi ey'ewala, mu nsi eyo gye mwasibirwa. Mulidda ewaabommwe, ne mubeera mu ddembe, nga tewali abatiisa," 
Jeremiah30:11 kubanga ndi wamu nammwe okubalokola. Ndizikiriza amawanga gonna, gye nabasaasaanyiza mmwe. Naye mmwe siribasaanyaawo. Siribaleka kubaginya, naye ndibabonereza ekisaanidde. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Mukama agamba abantu be nti: “Ebbwa lyammwe teriwonyezeka, n'ebiwundu byammwe si byakuwona." 
Jeremiah30:13 Tewali anaabijjanjaba, tewali ddagala linaabagasa, tewali ssuubi lya kuwona!" 
Jeremiah30:14 Baganzi bammwe bonna babeerabidde, tebakyabafaako, kubanga mmwe mbalumbaganye ng'omulabe, mbabonerezza n'obukambwe olw'ebibi byammwe ebingi n'olw'emisango gyammwe eminene." 
Jeremiah30:15 Temwemulugunya olw'ebiwundu byammwe; obulumi bwammwe si bwa kuwona. Nababonereza bwe ntyo olw'ebibi byammwe ebingi, n'olw'emisango gyammwe eminene." 
Jeremiah30:16 Naye kaakati bonna abo ababakavvula mmwe, balikavvulwa. Abalabe bammwe bonna balitwalibwa mu busibe. Bonna ababanyigiriza mmwe, n'ababanyaga, balinyagibwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ndibongeramu mmwe obulamu, ndiwonya ebiwundu byammwe. Newaakubadde abalabe bammwe, bagamba nti: ‘Siyooni agobeddwa, tewakyali amufaako.’ Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndizzaayo abantu bange mu nsi yaabwe ne nkwatirwa ekisa buli maka. Yerusaalemu kirizimbibwa buggya, n'olubiri lwakyo lulizzibwawo we lwali." 
Jeremiah30:19 Abantu ababeeramu baliyimba ennyimba ez'okutendereza. Balireekaana olw'essanyu. Ndibawa omukisa, ne beeyongera obungi awatali kukendeera. Baliweebwa ekitiibwa awatali kutoowazibwa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Ndizzaawo obuyinza bw'eggwanga lyabwe, ne mbunywereza ddala. Ndibonereza bonna ababanyigiriza." 
Jeremiah30:21 Oyo alibafuga, aliva mu ggwanga lyabwe. Kabaka waabwe, aliba wa lulyo lwabwe. Ndimuyita n'ansemberera, kubanga ani gwe siyise, aguma okunsemberera? Baliba bantu bange ne mba Katonda waabwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah30:22  
Jeremiah30:23 Obusungu bwa Mukama ye kibuyaga ow'amaanyi alikuntira ku mitwe gy'ababi. Tebulikoma, okutuusa lwe bulituukiriza ky'ayagala okukola. Mu kiseera ekijja abantu be balikitegeera bulungi." 
Jeremiah30:24  
Jeremiah31:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, ne mba Katonda w'ebika byonna ebya Yisirayeli, bo ne baba bantu bange." 
Jeremiah31:2 Mu ddungu, nakwatirwa ekisa abantu abaawonawo okuttibwa. Abayisirayeli bwe beegomba ekiwummulo," 
Jeremiah31:3 nabalabikira nga ndi wala. Mmwe Abayisirayeli, nabaagala n'okwagala okutaliggwaawo, kyenvudde nnyongera okubakwatirwa ekisa." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndiddamu okubazimba, ne muzzibwa buggya. Mulyambalira ebivuga byammwe, ne muzina nga musanyuka." 
Jeremiah31:5 Muliddamu okusimba emisiri gy'emizabbibu ku nsozi z'e Samariya, era abo abalisimba balirya ebibala byamu." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ddala ekiseera kirituuka, abakuumi b'oku nsozi lwe balikoowoolera ku busozi bwa Efurayimu nti: ‘Twambuke e Siyooni eri Mukama Katonda waffe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Mukama agamba nti: “Muyimbire Yisirayeli n'essanyu. Mumukubire emizira, akulira amawanga gonna. Muyimbe nga mukungiriza nti: ‘Mukama alokodde abantu be, Abayisirayeli abawonyeewo!’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Ndibaggya mu bukiikakkono, ndibakuŋŋaanya okuva ku nkomerero y'ensi. Mu bo mulijjiramu bamuzibe n'abalema, abakazi abali embuto, n'abanaatera okuzaala. Ndibakomyawo wano mu kibiina kinene." 
Jeremiah31:9 Abantu bange balidda nga bakaaba amaziga, ndibazza nga beegayirira. Ndibayisa ku mabbali g'emigga egirimu amazzi, mu kkubo eggolokofu, mwe batalyesittala, kubanga ndi kitaawe wa Yisirayeli, ne Efurayimu ye muggulanda wange.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Muwulire mmwe amawanga ebigambo byange, mubirangirire ku bizinga ebiri ewala, mugambe nti: ‘Mukama eyasaasaanya Abayisirayeli ye alibakuŋŋaanya, era anaabakuumanga ng'omusumba bw'akuuma eggana lye.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Nnunudde Abayisirayeli ne mbawonya eggwanga eribasinga amaanyi. 
Jeremiah31:12 Balijja ne bayimba n'essanyu ku Lusozi Siyooni. Era balisanyukira ebirabo bye mbawa eby'eŋŋaano n'omwenge gw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo gw'emizayiti, n'ebirabo eby'embuzi n'ente. Baliba ng'ennimiro efukirirwa amazzi, tebaliba na buyinike n'akatono." 
Jeremiah31:13 Abawala balisanyuka ne bazina, n'abasajja abavubuka n'abakadde balisanyuka. Ndibakubagiza ne mbasanyusa, ne mbaggya mu buyinike bwabwe." 
Jeremiah31:14 Bakabona ndibawa ebyassava bingi ne bibanyiwa. Abantu bange ndibajjuza ebirungi. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Mukama agamba nti: “Mu Raama baawulira eddoboozi, okukaaba n'okukungubaga okungi, Raakeeli ng'akabira abaana be era nga tayagala akubagizibwe, kubanga tebakyaliwo." 
Jeremiah31:16 Lekera wo okwaziirana era weesangule amaziga. Byonna by'okoledde abaana bo biriweerwa empeera. Balikomawo okuva mu nsi y'omulabe. 
Jeremiah31:17 Waliwo essuubi mu biseera byo ebijja. Abaana bo balikomawo mu nsi yaaboobwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Mpulira Abayisirayeli abakaaba nga banakuwavu, nti: ‘Twali ng'ensolo etaatendekebwa, naye otuyigirizza okuwulira! Twetegese okudda gy'oli, kubanga ggwe Mukama Katonda waffe." 
Jeremiah31:19 Twakukuba amabega, naye twenenya mangu. Bwe watubonereza, ne twekuba mu kifuba. Twakwatibwa ensonyi ne tuswala, kubanga twayonoona tukyali bato.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Yisirayeli, ggwe mutabani wange omwagalwa, ggwe mwana wange ansanyusa, kubanga buli lwe nkunenyaako nkulumirwa omwoyo ne nkukwatirwa ekisa." 
Jeremiah31:21 Musimbe obubonero, mulambe ekkubo lye mwayitamu okugenda. Mukomeewo Abayisirayeli, mudde mu bibuga byammwe bye mwaleka." 
Jeremiah31:22 Mulituusa wa okutambula mmwe abantu abateesigibwa? Nga mudda eno n'eri Nze Mukama ntonzeewo ekiggya ku nsi: eky'omukazi okukuuma omusajja.” 
Jeremiah31:23 Mukama Nnannyinimagye Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: “Bwe ndikomyawo Abayisirayeli mu nsi yaabwe, mu Buyudaaya ne mu bibuga byayo, baliddamu okugamba nti: ‘Mukama akuwe omukisa, ggwe ekifo omubeera obutuukirivu, olusozi okuli obutukuvu.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Abantu balibeera mu Buyudaaya, ne mu bibuga byayo byonna. Mulibeeramu abalimi n'abalunzi abalina amagana." 
Jeremiah31:25 Bonna abakooye, ndibazzaamu endasi. Ndikkusa buli aweddemu amaanyi olw'okulumwa enjala." 
Jeremiah31:26 Kyebanaavanga bagamba nti: ‘Nagenze okwebaka, ne nzuukuka nga nzizeemu amaanyi.’" 
Jeremiah31:27 “Nze Mukama ŋŋamba nti ekiseera kirituuka, ne nzijuza abantu n'ensolo mu nsi ya Yisirayeli ne mu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah31:28 Nga bwe nassaayo omwoyo okubasimbula n'okubamenyaamenya, n'okubasuula n'okubazikiriza, n'okubabonyaabonya, bwe ntyo bwe ndissaayo omwoyo okubasimba, n'okubazimba."
