Jeremiah31:29 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, nga tebakyagamba nti: ‘Abazadde baalya emizabbibu eginyuunyuntula, amannyo g'abaana ne ganyenyeera.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Naye buli alya emizabbibu eginyuunyuntula, amannyo ge, ge galinyenyeera, era buli muntu alifa lwa bibi bye.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka lwe ndikola endagaano empya n'abantu ba Yisirayeli n'aba Buyudaaya. 
Jeremiah31:32 Teriba ng'eyo gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe, lwe nabakwata ku mukono, ne mbaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Newaakubadde nali nga bbaabwe, era tebaakuuma ndagaano eyo." 
Jeremiah31:33 Naye ekiseera bwe kirituuka, eno ye ndagaano gye ndikola n'Abayisirayeli: nditeeka amateeka gange mu bo munda, ngawandiike mu mitima gyabwe. Ndiba Katonda waabwe, ne baba bantu bange." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kiriba tekikyetaagisa buli omu kuyigiriza munne okumanya Mukama, kubanga bonna balimmanya, okuviira ddala ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu. Ndisonyiwa ebibi byabwe, ne nneerabira ensobi zaabwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Mukama yassaawo enjuba eyakenga emisana. Yalagira omwezi n'emmunyeenye byakenga ekiro. Afuukuula ennyanja, amayengo gaayo ne gayira. Mukama Nnannyinimagye lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah31:36 Yasuubiza nti entereeza eyo, ng'ekyali bw'etyo mu maaso ge, n'ezzadde lya Yisirayeli liriba ggwanga." 
Jeremiah31:37 Lwe kiriyinzika okupima eggulu n'okuzuula emisingi gy'ensi, olwo ne Mukama lw'aliyinza okusuula Abayisirayeli bonna olwa byonna bye baakola. Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Jeremiah31:38 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, ekibuga Yerusaalemu lwe kirizimbirwa Mukama, okuva ku munaala gwa Anameli, okutuuka ku Mulyango gw'Ensonda." 
Jeremiah31:39 Ensalo yaakyo n'eva awo n'egenda okutuuka ku kasozi Garebu, ate n'ekyuka okudda ku Gowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ekiwonvu kyonna, abafu mwe baziikibwa, n'ennimiro zonna okutuuka ku kagga Kedurooni, n'okutuuka ku nsonda y'Omulyango gw'Embalaasi, okwolekera ebuvanjuba, biriwongerwa Nze Mukama. Ekibuga ekyo tekiriddayo kumenyebwa, wadde okuzikirizibwa ennaku zonna.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Mukama n'ayogera nange mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, era nga gwe mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana, nga Nebukadunezzari ye kabaka wa Babilooniya." 
Jeremiah32:2 Mu kiseera ekyo, eggye lya kabaka wa Babilooniya lyali lizingizza Yerusaalemu, nga nange nsibiddwa mu luggya lw'olubiri." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zeddeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya yali ansibye ng'anvunaana okulangirira nti Mukama agambye nti: “Nja kuwaayo ekibuga kino mu mikono gya kabaka wa Babilooniya. 
Jeremiah32:4 Ne Zeddeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya, talisumattuka Bakaludaaya. Aliweebwayo eri kabaka wa Babilooniya, n'amulabira ddala yennyini, era n'ayogera naye butereevu." 
Jeremiah32:5 Zeddeekiya alitwalibwa e Babilooni, n'abeerayo okutuusa lwe ndimujjukira. Ne bwe munaalwanyisa Abakaludaaya, temujja kuwangula. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah32:7 “Anameli mutabani wa Sallumu kojjaawo, wuuyo ajja gy'oli okukusaba ogule ennimiro ye eri mu Anatooti, kubanga ggwe wooluganda olw'okumpi, asaanidde okugigula.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Awo Anameli n'ajja gye ndi mu luggya, nga Mukama bwe yali agambye, n'ansaba okugula ennimiro." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ne ngula ennimiro eyo ku Anameli, ne musasula ensimbi, eziweza ebitundu kkumi na musanvu ebya ffeeza." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ne nteeka omukono ku ndagaano, ne ngisiba, ne mpita abajulizi, ne mmupimira ffeeza mu minzaani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Awo ne nkwata endagaano y'obuguzi nga nsibe, ne kopi yaayo nga si nsibe, ng'etteeka n'empisa bwe biri," 
Jeremiah32:12 ne mbikwasa Baruku, mutabani wa Neriya era muzzukulu wa Naseya. Nabimukwasa nga waliwo Anameli n'abajulizi bonna abassa emikono gyabwe ku ndagaano eyo, era nga waliwo Abayudaaya bonna abaali batudde mu luggya lw'olubiri." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ne nkuutira Baruku mu maaso gaabwe, nga ŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah32:14 “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli akulagidde okutwala endagaano zino: endagaano eyo ey'obuguzi ensibe, ne kopi eteri nsibe, ozitereke mu kintu ekibumbe, zisobole okukuumibwa emyaka mingi," 
Jeremiah32:15 kubanga Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agambye nti amayumba, n'ebibanja, n'ennimiro z'emizabbibu, biriddamu okugulibwanga mu nsi eno.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Awo nga mmaze okuwa Baruku mutabani wa Neriya endagaano ey'obuguzi, ne nsaba Mukama nti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 “Ayi Mukama Katonda, watonda eggulu n'ensi ng'okozesa obuyinza bwo obungi n'amaanyi go. Tewali kikulema." 
Jeremiah32:18 Olaga abantu enkumi n'enkumi ekisa, naye n'obonereza abaana olw'ebibi by'abazadde baabwe. Ayi Katonda, oli mukulu era wa maanyi. Mukama Nnannyinimagye lye linnya lyo." 
Jeremiah32:19 By'oteesa bikulu, era by'okola bya maanyi. Olaba buli kimu, abantu kye bakola, era n'obawa empeera okusinziira ku bye bakola." 
Jeremiah32:20 Edda wakola ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero mu nsi y'e Misiri, era n'oyongera okubikola n'okutuusa kati, mu Yisirayeli ne mu mawanga amalala gonna. Bw'otyo n'omanyibwa kati buli wantu." 
Jeremiah32:21 Olw'ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero ebyatiisa abalabe baffe, wakozesa obuyinza bwo n'amaanyi go, n'oggya abantu bo Abayisirayeli mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Jeremiah32:22 Wabawa ensi eno engimu era engagga nga bwe wagisuubiza bajjajjaabwe. 
Jeremiah32:23 Naye bwe baagiyingiramu ne bagifuna, tebaakwata biragiro byo, wadde okukolera ku by'oyigiriza. Tebaabaako kye bakola ku ebyo bye wabalagira okukola. Kyewava obatuusa ku kuzikirira kuno kwonna." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Abakaludaaya bakoze entuumu okutaayiza ekibuga bakiwambe, era bakirumbye. Olw'olutalo n'enjala era n'endwadde, ekibuga kiweereddwayo mu mikono gyabwe. Era olaba nga byonna bye wayogera bituukiridde." 
Jeremiah32:25 Naye ate, ayi Mukama Katonda, ggwe ondagidde okwegulira ennimiro nga waliwo n'abajulizi, newaakubadde ng'ekibuga kinaatera okuwambibwa Abakaludaaya.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah32:27 “Nze Mukama Katonda w'abantu bonna. Tewali kintu na kimu kinzibuwalira. 
Jeremiah32:28 Nja kuwaayo ekibuga kino mu mikono gya Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni, ne mu mikono gya basajja be Abakaludaaya. Bajja kukiwamba," 
Jeremiah32:29 era bakyokye omuliro. Era balyokya n'amayumba, abantu ge bansunguwalizaamu nga bootereza lubaale Baali obubaane waggulu ku mayumba ago, era nga bafuka ebyokunywa bye bawaayo eri balubaale." 
Jeremiah32:30 Abantu b'omu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya okuviira ddala eggwanga lyabwe lwe lyatandikawo, bannyiiza era bansunguwaza olw'ebyo bye bakola." 
Jeremiah32:31 Abantu b'omu kibuga kino bansunguwaza nnyo okuviira ddala lwe kyazimbibwa. Nsazeewo okukizikiriza," 
Jeremiah32:32 olw'ebibi byonna abantu b'omu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu bye baakola, awamu ne bakabaka baabwe n'abakungu, ne bakabona era n'abalanzi baabwe." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bandaga nkoona, era newaakubadde nga nabayigirizanga awatali kwosa, naye tebakkiriza kuwuliriza bayige." 
Jeremiah32:34 Baateeka n'ebyenyinyalwa mu nnyumba, eyazimbirwa okunsinzirizangamu, ne bagyonoona." 
Jeremiah32:35 Baazimbira Baali alutaari mu Kiwonvu kya Hinnomu, okutambiranga batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe eri lubaale Moleki. Sibalagiranga kukola ekyo era sirowoozangako nti bandikoze ekyenyinyalwa ng'ekyo, okukozesa abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ekibi.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yeremiya, abantu bagamba nti olutalo, n'enjala, n'endwadde bijja kuweesaayo ekibuga mu mikono gya kabaka wa Babilooniya. Kaakano ŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah32:37 nja kukuŋŋaanya abantu bange okubaggya mu nsi zonna gye nabasaasaanyiza nga mbasunguwalidde nnyo, era nga mbakambuwalidde, mbakomyewo mu kifo kino, mbaleke bakibeeremu mirembe." 
Jeremiah32:38 Olwo baliba bantu bange, Nze ne mba Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndibawa omutima gumu n'ekiruubirirwa kimu, kwe kunzisangamu ekitiibwa ennaku zonna, balyoke babenga bulungi, bo n'abaana baabwe abaliddawo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndikola nabo endagaano ey'olubeerera, siirekengayo kubakolera birungi. Ndibasobozesa okunzisangamu ekitiibwa, balemenga kunvaako." 
Jeremiah32:41 Nnaasanyukiranga okubakolera ebirungi, era ndibanywereza ddala mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Nga bwe ntuusizza akabi kano akanene ku bantu bano, bwe ntyo bwe ndibawa ebirungi byonna bye nabasuubiza." 
Jeremiah32:43 Abantu bagamba nti ensi eno efuuse nga ddungu, nga teriimu bantu, wadde ensolo, era ejja kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludaaya. Naye ebibanja binaagulibwanga mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ebibanja binaagulwanga, endagaano ne zissibwangako emikono, ne ziteekebwako n'akabonero nga waliwo n'abajulizi mu kitundu kya Benyamiini, ne mu byalo ebiriraanye Yerusaalemu, ne mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne mu bibuga eby'omu kitundu eky'ensozi, ne mu bibuga eby'omu nsenyi, ne mu bibuga eby'omu bukiikaddyo. Ndikomyawo abantu mu nsi yaabwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Bwe nali nga nkyasibiddwa mu kkomera mu luggya lw'olubiri, Mukama n'ampa obubaka bwe nate." 
Jeremiah33:2 Mukama eyatonda ensi n'agibumba, n'agitereeza mu kifo kyayo erinnya lye nga ye Mukama, yaŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah33:3 “Mpita, nnaakuyitaba, ne nkutegeeza ebikulu n'ebikisiddwa, by'otomanyi." 
Jeremiah33:4 Nze Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ŋŋamba nti amayumba g'omu Yerusaalemu, n'olubiri lwa bakabaka ba Buyudaaya, bya kumenyebwa. Ekyo kye kinaava mu ntuumu ezibeetooloozeddwa, era ne mu kulumbibwa." 
Jeremiah33:5 Okulwanyisa Abakaludaaya, kijja kuba kujjuza bujjuza kibuga mirambo gya bantu, be ŋŋenda okutta mu busungu bwange n'ekiruyi. Ekibuga kino nkikubye amabega, olw'ebibi byonna abantu baamu bye bakoze." 
Jeremiah33:6 Naye ndizzaamu ekibuga kino obulamu ne nkiwonya. Abaamu ndibalaga emirembe emingi ne baba bulungi. 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndizzaawo ebirungi mu Buyudaaya ne mu Yisirayeli, byonna mbizimbe biddewo nga bwe byali edda." 
Jeremiah33:8 Abantu ndibanaazaako ebibi byabwe byonna bye baakola mu maaso gange, era ndibasonyiwa ensobi zaabwe n'obujeemu bwabwe." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ekibuga kino kirinsanyusa ne kimpeesa ekitiibwa n'ettendo. Ab'omu mawanga gonna agali ku nsi, balitya ne bakankana bwe baliwulira ebirungi byonna bye nkolera ab'omu Yerusaalemu, n'emirembe gyonna gye mbawa.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Abantu bagamba nti ekifo kino kifuuse ng'eddungu, nga tekiriimu muntu wadde ensolo. Ddala batuufu. Ebibuga bya Buyudaaya, n'enguudo za Yerusaalemu bizise, tebikyabeeramu muntu wadde ensolo. Naye mu bifo ebyo, muliddamu okuwulirwa" 
Jeremiah33:11 amaloboozi ag'essanyu n'okujaguza, n'ebinyumu by'oku mbaga z'obugole. Abantu baliwulirwa nga bayimba, nga bwe baleeta mu Ssinzizo lyange ebirabo eby'okwebaza nga bagamba nti: ‘Mwebaze Mukama Nnannyinimagye kubanga mulungi, n'ekisa kye kya mirembe gyonna.’ Ndizzaawo ebirungi mu nsi eno, nga bwe byali mu kusooka. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'agamba nti: “Ensi eno efuuse ng'eddungu, nga teriimu bantu wadde ensolo, eriddamu okubaamu amalundiro, abasumba mwe bakuumira amagana gaabwe." 
Jeremiah33:13 Abasumba baliddamu okubalira ebisolo byabwe mu bibuga by'omu kitundu eky'ensozi, n'eby'omu kitundu eky'ensenyi, n'eby'omu bukiikaddyo, ne mu kitundu kya Benyamiini, ne mu byalo ebiriraanye Yerusaalemu, ne mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kijja kutuuka, lwe ndituukiriza ebyo bye nasuubiza ab'omu Yisirayeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mu kiseera ekyo, ndironda muzzukulu wa Dawudi, nga mwenkanya, n'aba kabaka. Era kabaka oyo alikola eby'obwenkanya n'eby'amazima mu nsi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu balirokolebwa, era baliba mirembe. Era ekibuga ekyo kirituumibwa erinnya ‘Mukama ye atulokola.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Nze Mukama, nsuubiza nti bulijjo wanaabangawo muzzukulu wa Dawudi anaabanga kabaka wa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah33:18 Era bulijjo wanaabangawo bakabona ab'omu kika kya Leevi abanampeerezanga okuwaayo ebirabo ebyokebwa, n'ebirabo eby'emmere ey'empeke era n'ebitambiro.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah33:20 “Nakola endagaano eteyinza kumenyebwa nti obudde obw'emisana, n'obudde obw'ekiro bunaabeerangawo mu biseera byabwo." 
Jeremiah33:21 Bwe ntyo era bwe nkoze endagaano nti omuweereza wange Dawudi, bulijjo anaabanga ne muzzukulu we afugira ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka. Era bwe ntyo bwe nkoze endagaano nti bakabona ab'omu kika kya Leevi banampeerezanga bulijjo." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ng'emmunyeenye ez'oku ggulu bwe zitayinza kubalika, era ng'omusenyu gw'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja bwe gutayinza kupimika, bwe ntyo bwe ndyaza ezzadde lya Dawudi omuweereza wange, ne bakabona ab'omu Kika kya Leevi.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah33:24 “Yeremiya, tonnaba kuwulira bantu bwe bagamba nti nsudde Yisirayeli ne Buyudaaya, amaka gombi ge nalonda? Bwe batyo bwe banyoomoola abantu bange, nga tebakyababala nga ggwanga." 
Jeremiah33:25 Naye endagaano gye nakola nti obudde obw'emisana n'obudde obw'ekiro bunaabangawo mu biseera byabwo, bw'erimenyebwa," 
Jeremiah33:26 kale olwo nange ndisuula ezzadde lya Yakobo n'erya Dawudi omuweereza wange, ne sironda omu ku bazzukulu be kufuganga bazzukulu ba Aburahamu ne Yisaaka ne Yakobo. Ddala ndikwatirwa ekisa abantu bange, ne baddamu okuba obulungi.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Mukama yayogera nange, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni n'eggye lye, awamu n'amagye gonna agaava mu nsi zonna, ne mu mawanga gonna Nebukadunezzari g'afuga bwe baalumba Yerusaalemu n'ebibuga ebikiriraanye." 
Jeremiah34:2 Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli yandagira okugenda ŋŋambe Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya nti: “Nze Mukama, ndiwaayo ekibuga kino mu mikono gya kabaka wa Babilooni, era alikyokya omuliro." 
Jeremiah34:3 Naawe toliwona. Olikwatibwa n'oweebwayo mu mikono gye. Olimulaba maaso na maaso, era olyogera naye yennyini, era oligenda e Babilooni." 
Jeremiah34:4 “Zeddeekiya, wulira bye ŋŋamba ebifa ku ggwe. Tolittirwa mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah34:5 Olifa mirembe. Era ng'abantu bwe baayotereza obubaane nga baziika bajjajjaabo, bassekabaka, naawe bwe balikwotereza obubaane. Balikukungubagira nga bagamba nti: ‘Kabaka waffe afudde!’ Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Awo ne mpa Kabaka Zeddeekiya obubaka obwo mu Yerusaalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 ng'eggye lya kabaka wa Babilooni lirumbye ekibuga ekyo, era nga lirumbye ne Lakisi ne Azeka, ebibuga byokka ebya Buyudaaya ebyali bikyanywezeddwa." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kabaka Zeddeekiya yali akkaanyizza n'abantu bonna ab'omu Yerusaalemu okuta abaddu. 
Jeremiah34:9 Buli muntu yali wa kuta abaddu be n'abazaana be Abeebureeyi, waleme kubaawo afuga Mwebureeyi munne buddu." 
Jeremiah34:10 Awo abantu bonna n'abakungu baabwe nga bakkaanyizza okuta abaddu baabwe n'abazaana baabwe, obutaddayo kubafuga buddu, ne babata." 
Jeremiah34:11 Naye oluvannyuma ne bakyusa ebirowoozo byabwe, ne bakomyawo abaddu be baali batadde, ne baddamu okubafuga obuddu." 
Jeremiah34:12 Awo Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'aŋŋamba okutegeeza abantu nti: 
Jeremiah34:13 “Nakola ne bajjajjammwe endagaano, bwe nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, gye baali mu buddu. Ne mbagamba nti" 
Jeremiah34:14 buli myaka musanvu, banaatanga buli muddu Omwebureeyi anaabanga abaweerezza emyaka mukaaga, n'aba wa ddembe. Naye bajjajjammwe ne batampulira, era ne batassaayo mwoyo." 
Jeremiah34:15 Nammwe ennaku ntono eziyise, mwali mukyuse, ne mukola ekinsanyusa, buli omu ku mmwe bwe yalangirira nga bw'atadde ab'eggwanga lye okuba ab'eddembe, era ne mukola endagaano mu maaso gange mu Ssinzizo lyange." 
Jeremiah34:16 Naye ate ne mukyusa ebirowoozo byammwe, ne munvumaganya. Buli omu mu mmwe n'akomyawo abaddu n'abazaana, be yali atadde okugenda nga ba ddembe nga bwe baagala, ne mubawaliriza okuddamu okufugibwa obuddu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nze Mukama ŋŋamba nti munjeemedde, ne mutawa bantu ba ggwanga lyammwe ddembe lyabwe. Kale kaakano Nze nja kubawa mmwe eddembe: eddembe okukwatirwa mu lutalo, oba okufa endwadde, oba okufa enjala. Ndyesisiwaza ab'amawanga gonna olw'ebyo bye ŋŋenda okubakolako mmwe." 
Jeremiah34:18 Abakungu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, n'abaweereza b'omu lubiri, n'abantu bonna, abaakola nange endagaano, nga bayita wakati w'ebitundu by'ennyana gye baasalamu ebitundu ebibiri, naye ne batatuukiriza ndagaano eyo, nange ndibasalamu nga bwe baasalamu ennyana." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Ndibawaayo mu mikono gy'abalabe baabwe abaagala okubatta, era emirambo gyabwe giririibwa ebinyonyi n'ebisolo." 
Jeremiah34:21 Era ndiwaayo Kabaka Zeddeekiya owa Buyudaaya n'abakungu be, mu mikono gy'abo abaagala okubatta. Ndibawaayo eri eggye ly'Abakaludaaya, erirekedde awo okubalumba mmwe." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ndiragira, ne bakomawo okulumba ekibuga kino, era balikirwanyisa, ne bakiwamba, era ne bakyokya omuliro. Era ebibuga bya Buyudaaya ndibifuula matongo, ne wataba abibeeramu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya bwe yali nga ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Yeremiya, genda eri ab'ekika kya Rehabu, oyogere nabo, obayingize mu kisenge ekimu mu Ssinzizo, obawe omwenge ogw'emizabbibu banywe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Kale ne ntwala Abarehabu bonna: Yaazaniya, mutabani wa Yeremiya, omwana wa Habaziniya, ne baganda be, ne batabani be bonna," 
Jeremiah35:4 ne mbayingiza mu Ssinzizo, mu kisenge ky'abayigirizwa b'omulanzi Anani, mutabani wa Yigudaliya. Ekisenge kino kyali waggulu w'ekisenge kya Maaseya, mutabani wa Sallumu omuggazi, era okumpi n'ekisenge ky'abakungu." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ne nteeka amacupa g'omwenge gw'emizabbibu n'ebikopo mu maaso g'Abarehabu, ne mbagamba nti: “Munywe omwenge gwe mizabbibu.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Naye bo ne baddamu nti: “Tetujja kunywa mwenge gwa mizabbibu, kubanga jjajjaffe Yonadaabu, mutabani wa Rehabu, yatugamba ffe, n'ezzadde lyaffe, obutanywanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Era yatugamba obutazimbanga mayumba, n'obutalimanga n'obutasimbanga nnimiro za mizabbibu, wadde okuzigula. Yatulagira kubeeranga mu weema bulijjo, tulyoke tusigalenga mu nsi gye tubeeramu, nga tuli ng'abayise." 
Jeremiah35:8 Era twawulira ebyo byonna Yonadaabu bye yatukuutira. Tetunywera ddala ku mwenge, ffe ne bakazi baffe, ne batabani baffe, ne bawala baffe." 
Jeremiah35:9 Tetwezimbira mayumba ga kubeeramu, era tetuba na nnimiro za mizabbibu, newaakubadde ebibanja, wadde ensigo." 
Jeremiah35:10 Naye tubeera mu weema. Twawulira era ne tutuukiriza byonna, jjajjaffe Yonadaabu bye yatulagira." 
Jeremiah35:11 Naye Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni bwe yalumba ensi eno, ne tusalawo okujja e Yerusaalemu olw'okutya eggye ly'Abakaludaaya, n'eggye ly'Abasiriya, kyetuva tubeera mu Yerusaalemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Awo Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, n'andagira okugenda ŋŋambe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu nti: “Nze Mukama, mbabuuza mmwe nti temuliyiga, ne mutuukirizanga bye mbalagira?" 
Jeremiah35:13  
Jeremiah35:14 Bazzukulu ba Yonadaabu mutabani wa Rehabu baawulira kye yalagira, obutanywanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu, era n'okutuusa kaakati tebagunywerako ddala n'akatono. Naye Nze njogedde nammwe awatali kwosa, naye mmwe temumpuliriza." 
Jeremiah35:15 Siyosanga kubatumira baweereza bange abalanzi, ne babagamba nti buli omu mu mmwe alekeyo empisa ze embi, era akole ebituufu. Temuugobererenga era temuuweerezenga balubaale, mulyoke mubeerenga mu nsi gye nabawa mmwe, ne bajjajjammwe. Naye temumpulirizanga era temussangayo mwoyo." 
Jeremiah35:16 Bazzukulu ba Yonadaabu mutabani wa Rehabu batuukirizza ekiragiro jjajjaabwe kye yabalagira, naye abantu bange tebafuddeeyo ku kye mbalagira." 
Jeremiah35:17 Kale kaakano Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ndituusa ku mmwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu akabi konna ke nagamba okubatuusaako, kubanga nayogera nammwe, ne mutawuliriza, era nabayita, ne mutayitaba.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Awo ne ŋŋamba Abarehabu nti: “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agambye nti: ‘Nga bwe mugondedde ekiragiro kya Yonadaabu jjajjammwe, ne mukwata byonna bye yabakuutira, era ne mutuukiriza byonna nga bwe yabalagira," 
Jeremiah35:19 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nsuubiza nti Yonadaabu mutabani wa Rehabu, bulijjo anaabanga ne muzzukulu we ow'obulenzi okumpeerezanga ennaku zonna.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Ddira omuzingo gw'ekitabo, owandiikeko byonna bye nkutegeezezza, ebifa ku Yisirayeli ne ku Buyudaaya, ne ku mawanga gonna, okuva ku lunaku lwe natandika okwogera naawe, nga Yosiya ye kabaka, n'okutuusa kati." 
Jeremiah36:3 Oboolyawo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bwe baliwulira ku kabi konna ke nteesa okubatuusaako, balikyuka ne bava mu mpisa zaabwe embi, ne mbasonyiwa ebibi byabwe n'emisango gyabwe.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Awo ne mpita Baruku mutabani wa Neriya, ne mubuulira byonna Mukama bye yayogera nange, n'abiwandiika ku muzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Jeremiah36:5 Awo ne ndagira Baruku nti: “Sikyakkirizibwa kuyingira mu Ssinzizo. 
Jeremiah36:6 Kale ggwe gendayo, ku lunaku abantu lwe basiibirako, osome mu lwatu, bonna bawulire ebigambo bya Mukama bye nkutegeezezza n'obiwandiika ku muzingo gw'ekitabo. Obisome nga n'abo bonna abavudde mu bibuga byabwe ebirala eby'omu Buyudaaya bawulira." 
Jeremiah36:7 Oboolyawo balyegayirira Mukama, ne bava mu mpisa zaabwe embi, kubanga Mukama by'agambye okubakolako mu busungu ne mu kiruyi kye, binene.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Awo Baruku mutabani wa Neriya n'akola nga bwe namulagira. N'asoma mu muzingo gw'ekitabo, ebigambo bya Mukama mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah36:9 Mu mwezi ogw'omwenda ogw'omwaka ogwokutaano nga Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, baalangirira ekisiibo mu maaso ga Mukama. Abantu bonna ab'omu Yerusaalemu, n'abajjayo nga bava mu bibuga ebirala ebya Buyudaaya, ne basiiba." 
Jeremiah36:10 Awo Baruku n'asoma mu muzingo gw'ekitabo, ebigambo byonna bye namugamba. Yabisomera mu Ssinzizo, ng'ali mu kisenge kya Gemariya, mutabani wa Safani era omuwandiisi, ekyali waggulu w'oluggya, okumpi n'Omulyango Omuggya ogw'Essinzizo." 
Jeremiah36:11 Awo Mikaaya mutabani wa Gemariya, era muzzukulu wa Safani, n'awulira Baruku ng'asoma mu muzingo gw'ekitabo, ebigambo byonna Mukama bye yayogera." 
Jeremiah36:12 N'aserengeta mu lubiri, n'atuuka mu kisenge ky'omuwandiisi, abakungu bonna mwe baali batudde. Elisaama omuwandiisi, ne Delaaya mutabani wa Semaaya, ne Elunatani mutabani wa Akuboori, ne Gamariya mutabani wa Safani, ne Zeddeekiya mutabani wa Ananiya, n'abakungu abalala bonna, baaliyo." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaaya n'ababuulira byonna bye yawulira nga Baruku abisomera abantu. 
Jeremiah36:14 Awo abakungu ne batuma Yehudi, mutabani wa Netaniya, muzzukulu wa Selemiya, era muzzukulu wa Kuusi, okugamba Baruku okuleeta omuzingo gw'ekitabo gwe yasomera abantu. Baruku n'aguleeta." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ne bamugamba nti: “Tuula, obisome nga tuwulira.” Baruku n'abisoma nga bawulira." 
Jeremiah36:16 Bwe baamala okubiwulira byonna, ne batunulaganako nga batidde. Ne bagamba Baruku nti: “Ebigambo ebyo byonna tetuuleme kubitegeeza kabaka.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Awo ne babuuza Baruku nti: “Tubuulire, wasobodde otya okuwandiika ebigambo ebyo byonna? Yeremiya ye yabikugambye, ggwe nga bw'owandiika?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku n'addamu nti: “Yeremiya yennyini ye yambuulidde ebigambo ebyo, ne nkwata akafumu ne bwino ne mbiwandiika.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Abakungu ne bagamba Baruku nti: “Ggwe ne Yeremiya mugende mwekweke, waleme kubaawo amanya gye muli.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Awo abakungu ne batereka omuzingo gw'ekitabo mu kisenge kya Elisaama omuwandiisi, ne bagenda eri kabaka mu luggya, ne bamutegeeza byonna." 
Jeremiah36:21 Kabaka n'atuma Yekudi aleete omuzingo gw'ekitabo. Yehudi n'aguggya mu kisenge kya Elisaama omuwandiisi, n'agusomera kabaka n'abakungu be bonna abaali bayimiridde nga bamwetoolodde." 
Jeremiah36:22 Gwali mwezi gwa mwenda. Kabaka yali atudde mu maaso g'ekyoto omuli omuliro ogwaka, mu nnyumba mw'abeera mu budde obw'obutiti." 
Jeremiah36:23 Awo Yehudi bwe yamalanga okusoma empapula ssatu oba nnya, kabaka n'azisazisaako akambe k'omuwandiisi, n'azisuula mu muliro, okutuusa omuzingo gw'ekitabo gwonna lwe gwaggyiira mu muliro." 
Jeremiah36:24 Naye kabaka, wadde omu bw'ati ku bakungu be abaawulira ebigambo ebyo byonna, tebaatya wadde okulaga akabonero konna ak'okunakuwala." 
Jeremiah36:25 Newaakubadde nga Elunatani ne Delaaya ne Gemariya beegayirira kabaka aleme kwokya muzingo gwa kitabo, kyokka teyabawuliriza." 
Jeremiah36:26 Awo n'alagira omulangira Yerameeli, ne Seraya mutabani wa Azuriyeeli, ne Selemiya mutabani wa Abudeeli okukwata Baruku omuwandiisi, nange, Yeremiya omulanzi. Kyokka Mukama n'atukweka." 
Jeremiah36:27 Nga kabaka amaze okwokya omuzingo gw'ekitabo, omwali ebigambo bye nabuulira Baruku n'abiwandiika, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Ddira omuzingo gw'ekitabo omulala, oguwandiikeko ebigambo byonna ebyali ku guli, Yehoyakiimu kabaka wa Buyudaaya gw'ayokezza." 
Jeremiah36:29 Era kabaka oyo omugambe nti: ‘Oyokezza omuzingo gw'ekitabo, n'obuuza Yeremiya kyeyava awandiika nti kabaka w'e Babilooni alijja n'azikiriza ensi eno, n'atta n'amalamu abantu n'ensolo." 
Jeremiah36:30 Kale kaakano, Nze Mukama nkugamba ggwe Kabaka Yehoyakiimu nti toliba na wa zzadde lyo alifuga bwakabaka bwa Dawudi. Omulambo gwo gulisuulibwa wabweru, gubeerenga mu bbugumu emisana, ate mu mpewo ekiro." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndikubonereza ggwe n'ezzadde lyo, era n'abakungu bo olw'ebibi bye mwakola. Ndituusa ku mmwe ne ku batuuze b'omu Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya akabi konna ke nagamba okubatuusaako, kubanga nabalabula ne mutafaayo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Awo ne nzirira omuzingo gw'ekitabo omulala, ne nguwa Baruku omuwandiisi wange, n'awandiika byonna ebyali mu muzingo gw'ekitabo Yehoyakiimu gwe yayokya mu muliro, nga kwongeddwako n'ebirala bingi ebibifaanana." 
Jeremiah37:1 Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni, obwakabaka bwa Buyudaaya yabuwa Zeddeekiya mutabani wa Yosiya, mu kifo kya Yehoyakiini, mutabani wa Yehoyakiimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Naye Zeddeekiya n'abakungu be era n'abantu abalala mu ggwanga, tebaawulira bubaka, Mukama bwe yayogerera mu nze." 
Jeremiah37:3 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'antumira Yehukaali mutabani wa Selemiya, ne kabona Zefaniya, mutabani wa Maaseya, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Tusabire eri Mukama Katonda waffe.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Nali sinnateekebwa mu kkomera, era nga ntambula nga bwe njagala mu bantu." 
Jeremiah37:5 Abakaludaaya baali bazingizizza Yerusaalemu. Naye bwe baawulira ng'eggye lya Misiri livudde mu Misiri, ne bavaawo." 
Jeremiah37:6 Awo Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Jeremiah37:7 “Kabaka wa Buyudaaya eyakutuma gye ndi okumbuuza, mugambe nti: ‘Eggye lya Misiri eribadde lijja okubayamba, lijja kuddayo mu nsi yaalyo Misiri." 
Jeremiah37:8 Era Abakaludaaya bajja kudda, balumbe ekibuga kino bakiwambe, era bakyokye omuliro." 
Jeremiah37:9 Nze Mukama mbalabula muleme kwerimba nti Abakaludaaya tebajja kudda, kubanga bajja kudda." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ne bwe munaawangula eggye lyonna ery'Abakaludaaya ababalwanyisa, ne wasigalwo mu bo ab'ebiwundu bokka, abagalamidde mu weema zaabwe, era abo banaagolokoka ne bookya ekibuga kino omuliro.’ ”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Eggye ly'Abakaludaaya bwe lyava e Yerusaalemu, ng'eggye ly'Abamisiri lisembedde," 
Jeremiah37:12 ne nva mu Yerusaalemu okugenda mu kitundu kya Benyamiini okufuna omugabo gwange mu bantu bange. 
Jeremiah37:13 Naye bwe natuuka mu Mulyango gwa Benyamiini, omukulu w'abakuumi eyali awo, erinnya lye Yiriya, mutabani wa Selemiya, era muzzukulu wa Ananiya, n'annyimiriza ng'agamba nti: “Otoloka weegatte ku Bakaludaaya!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Ne nziramu nti: “Sitoloka kwegatta ku Bakaludaaya.” Naye Yiriya n'atampuliriza, wabula n'ankwata era n'antwala eri abakungu." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abakungu ne bankambuwalira ne bankuba, era ne bansibira mu nnyumba ya Yonataani omuwandiisi, kubanga ennyumba eyo gye baali bafudde ekkomera." 
Jeremiah37:16 Banteeka mu kasenge ak'omu bunnya ne mmalamu ennaku nnyingi. 
Jeremiah37:17 Awo kabaka Zeddeekiya n'antumya. Era nga tuli mu lubiri, kabaka n'ambuza mu kyama nti: “Waliwo obubaka obuvudde eri Mukama?” Ne nziramu nti: “Weebuli. Ojja kuweebwayo mu mikono gya kabaka wa Babilooni.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Awo ne mbuuza Kabaka Zeddeekiya nti: “Kibi ki kye nakukola ggwe, oba kye nakola abaweereza bo, oba abantu bano, olyoke onsibe mu kkomera?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Abalanzi bammwe bali ludda wa abaabalagula nti kabaka w'e Babilooni talibalumba mmwe, wadde okulumba ensi eno?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kale kaakano, Ssaabasajja, nkwegayiridde, okkirize kye nkusaba: tonzizaayo mu nnyumba ya Yonataani, nneme okufiira omwo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'alagira, ne bansibira mu luggya lw'olubiri. Ne mbeera omwo, ne mpeebwanga buli lunaku omugaati gumu, okuva mu bafumbi b'emigaati, okutuusa emigaati gyonna lwe gyaggwaawo mu kibuga." 
Jeremiah38:1 Awo Safatiya mutabani wa Mattani, ne Gadaliya mutabani wa Pasuhuuri, ne Yuhukaali mutabani wa Selemiya, ne Pasuhuuri mutabani wa Malukiya, ne bawulira ebigambo bye nategeeza abantu bonna nti" 
Jeremiah38:2 Mukama agamba nti: “Buli anaasigala mu kibuga kino, wa kufiira mu lutalo, oba anaafa enjala, oba endwadde. Naye buli anaafuluma ne yeewaayo eri Abakaludaaya, tattibwe. Oyo waakiri anaawonya obulamu bwe.”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Era ne mbagamba nti Mukama agambye nti: “Tewali kubuusabuusa, ekibuga kino nja kukiwaayo eri eggye ly'Abakaludaaya likiwambe.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Awo abakungu abo ne bagamba kabaka nti: “Omusajja ono attibwe, kubanga abaserikale era n'abantu abalala abasigadde mu kibuga kino, abamalamu amaanyi ng'abagamba ebigambo ebifaanana bwe bityo. Omusajja ono tayagaliza bantu bano mirembe, wabula akabi.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'abaddamu nti: “Wuuyo, ali mu mikono gyammwe. Nze nga kabaka, sirina kye nnyinza kubaziyiza.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Awo ne bankwata, ne banzisa n'emiguwa mu luzzi lw'omulangira Malukiya, olwali mu luggya lw'olubiri, nga teruliimu mazzi, wabula ettosi." 
Jeremiah38:7 Naye Ebedumeleki Omwetiyopiya omulaawe, eyakolanga mu lubiri lwa kabaka, n'awulira nti bansudde mu luzzi. Mu kiseera ekyo, kabaka yali mu lukiiko ku Mulyango gwa Benyamiini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Awo Ebedumeleki n'agendayo n'agamba kabaka nti: 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ssaabasajja, basajja bo bakoze bubi nnyo. Yeremiya omulanzi bamusudde mu luzzi, mw'ajja okufiira enjala, kubanga tewakyali mmere mu kibuga.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Awo kabaka n'alagira Ebedumeleki Omwetiyopiya nti: “Genda n'abasajja basatu, muggyeyo omulanzi Yeremiya mu luzzi, nga tannafa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedumeleki n'agenda n'abasajja abo, n'ayingira mu ggwanika ly'omu lubiri, n'aggyayo ebigoye ebikadde ebiyulise, n'abinsuulira mu luzzi, ng'abissiza ku muguwa." 
Jeremiah38:12 Awo Ebedumeleki Omwetiyopiya n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigoye ebyo ebikadde, era ebiyulifu, biteeke mu nkwawa zo, emiguwa gireme kukusala.” Ne nkola bwe ntyo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Ne bansikayo mu luzzi nga bakozesa emiguwa, ne nkuumirwa mu luggya." 
Jeremiah38:14 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'antumya okujja gy'ali ku mulyango ogwokusatu ogw'Essinzizo, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Nnina kye njagala okubuuza, era okinziremu nga tonkisa.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Ne nziramu nti: “Bwe nnaakubuulira nga sikukisa ojja kunzita, era bwe nnaakuwa amagezi, tojja kumpuliriza.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'andayirira mu kyama nti: “Ndayidde Katonda Nnannyinibulamu, era eyatuwa obulamu, nti sijja kukutta era sijja kukuwaayo eri abo abatakwagaliza bulamu.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Awo ne ndyoka ŋŋamba Zeddeekiya nti: “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Bw'onoofuluma n'ogenda weewaayo eri abakungu ba kabaka wa Babilooni, onoowonya obulamu bwo, era ekibuga kino tekijja kwokebwa muliro. Ggwe n'ab'ennyumba yo mujja kuba balamu." 
Jeremiah38:18 Naye bw'onoogaana okufuluma era n'oteewaayo eri abakungu ba kabaka wa Babilooni, ekibuga kino kijja kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'Abakaludaaya, bakyokye omuliro, era naawe togenda kubasumattuka.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Awo Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'addamu nti: “Ntya Abayudaaya abeewaayo mu Bakaludaaya. Nnyinza okuweebwayo mu mikono gyabwe ne bambonyaabonya.” 
Jeremiah38:20 Naye nze ne ŋŋamba nti “Tojja kuweebwayo. Nkwegayiridde, gondera obubaka bwa Mukama mu ekyo kye nkugamba, lw'onoobeera obulungi, era onoowonya obulamu bwo." 
Jeremiah38:21 Naye bw'onoogaana okugenda okwewaayo, kino Mukama ky'andaze nti" 
Jeremiah38:22 abakazi bonna abasigadde mu lubiri lwa kabaka wa Buyudaaya, bajja kutwalibwa eri abakungu ba kabaka wa Babilooni era bajja kugenda nga bayimba nti: ‘Mikwano gya kabaka be yeesiganga baamuwubisa bwe baamulimbalimba. Balabye atubidde mu bitosi, kaakati bo beddukidde.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 “Era bajja kufulumya bakazi bo bonna n'abaana bo babaweeyo eri Abakaludaaya. Era naawe wennyini tojja kubeesumattulako, naye bajja kukuwamba, bakuweeyo eri kabaka w'e Babilooni, ate ekibuga kino kyokebwe omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Awo Zeddeekiya n'aŋŋamba nti: “Tobaako n'omu gw'obuulirako ku bigambo ebyo, olwo tootuukibweko kabi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Abakungu bwe banaawulira nti njogedde naawe, ne bajja okukubuuza bye twogedde, nga bakusuubiza obutakutta singa onoobabuulira byonna," 
Jeremiah38:26 obaddamu nti obadde onsaba butakuzza mu nnyumba ya Yonataani okufiira omwo.” 
Jeremiah38:27 Awo abakungu bonna ne bajja gye ndi ne bambuuza, ne mbaddiramu ddala kabaka bye yali andagidde okwogera. Awo ne bandeka kubanga tewali yali awulidde byayogerwa." 
Jeremiah38:28 Awo ne nsigala mu luggya lw'olubiri okutuusa ku lunaku Yerusaalemu lwe kyawambibwa. 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu mwezi ogw'ekkumi ogw'omwaka ogw'omwenda nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari ow'e Babilooni n'ajja n'eggye lye lyonna, n'alumba Yerusaalemu, n'akizingiza." 
Jeremiah39:2 Ku lunaku olw'omwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka, Abakaludaaya ne bakuba ekituli mu kisenge ky'ekibuga." 
Jeremiah39:3 Awo abakungu ba kabaka wa Babilooni bonna, omwali Nerugalusarezeeri ne Samugaruneebo, ne Sarusekimu Rabusarisi, ne Nerugalusarezeeri Rabumagi, ne bayingira, ne batuula mu Mulyango Ogwawakati." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kabaka Zeddeekiya n'abakungu be bonna bwe baalaba ebiguddewo, ne badduka, bave mu kibuga ekiro. Baayitira mu kkubo ery'omu nnimiro ya kabaka, ne bafulumira mu mulyango ogugatta ebisenge ebibiri, ne babomba nga boolekedde Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Naye eggye ly'Abakaludaaya ne libawondera, ne liwambira Zeddeekiya mu nsenyi z'e Yeriko. Awo ne bamutwala eri Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni e Ribula mu kitundu ky'e Amati, n'amusalira omusango." 
Jeremiah39:6 Eyo e Ribula kabaka wa Babilooni gye yattira abaana ba Zeddeekiya nga Zeddeekiya yennyini alaba. N'atta n'abakungu ba Buyudaaya bonna. 
Jeremiah39:7 N'atungulamu Zeddeekiya amaaso, n'amusiba n'enjegere okumutwala e Babilooni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Awo Abakaludaaya ne bookya olubiri lwa kabaka, n'amayumba g'abantu, era ne bamenya ebisenge bya Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Abantu bonna abaali basigadde mu kibuga, n'abaali badduse ne beewaayo, Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye n'abatwala e Babilooni mu busibe." 
Jeremiah39:10 Mu Buyudaaya yalekamu abamu ku baavu abataalina kantu, n'abawa ennimiro z'emizabbibu n'ebibanja." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooni n'alagira Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye nti: “Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah39:12 mutwale omulabirire bulungi, era tomukolako kabi, naye mukolere ky'akusaba.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Awo Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye, ne Nebusazubaani Rabusarisi, ne Nerugalusarezeeri Rabumagi, n'abakungu ba kabaka wa Babilooni abalala," 
Jeremiah39:14 ne bantumya, ne banzigya mu luggya lw'olubiri, ne bankwasa Gedaliya mutabani wa Ahikaamu era muzzukulu wa Safani, antwale ewange. Awo ne mbeera mu bantu bange." 
Jeremiah39:15 Bwe nali nga nkyasibiddwa mu luggya lw'olubiri, Mukama n'aŋŋamba" 
Jeremiah39:16 okutegeeza Ebedumeleki Omwetiyopiya nti: “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agambye nti: ‘Nja kutuusa akabi sso si birungi ku kibuga kino, nga bwe nagamba okukola. Kino bwe kinaatuukirira, naawe ojja kukirabako n'amaaso go." 
Jeremiah39:17 Naye Nze Mukama, nja kukuwonya ggwe, era sirikuwaayo mu mikono gy'abantu b'otya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Nja kukutaliza, tojja kuttibwa. Ojja kuwonya obulamu bwo, kubanga onneesize. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, nga Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye amaze okunteera mu Raama, gye nali ntwaliddwa nga ndi musibe n'enjegere, awamu n'abantu bonna abaava mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya, ne batwalibwa e Babilooniya nga basibe." 
Jeremiah40:2 Awo omuduumizi w'eggye n'anziza ku bbali, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Mukama Katonda wo yalangirira akabi kano eri ensi eno," 
Jeremiah40:3 era akatuukirizza nga bwe yagamba okukola. Bino byonna biguddewo, kubanga abantu bo baayonoona mu maaso ga Mukama, era baamujeemera." 
Jeremiah40:4 Kale kaakano, laba, nkusumululako enjegere ezisibye emikono gyo. Bw'oyagala okugenda nange e Babilooniya, jjangu tugende, era nja kukulabiriranga bulungi. Naye bw'oba nga toyagala kugenda nange e Babilooni lekayo. Laba ensi yonna eri mu maaso go. Yonna gy'osiima okugenda, era gy'osinga okwagala, gy'oba ogenda.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Awo n'agamba nti: “Oyinza okuddayo eri Gedaliya, mutabani wa Ahikaamu era muzzukulu wa Safani, kabaka wa Babilooniya gw'awadde okufuga ebibuga bya Buyudaaya, oyinza okusigala naye mu bantu, oba oyinza okulaga awalala yonna gy'oyagala.” Awo omuduumizi w'eggye n'ampa ebyokulya, n'ekirabo, n'anta." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ne ŋŋenda eri Gedaliya e Mizupa, ne mbeera naye mu bantu abaalekebwa mu nsi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Abakungu abamu abaali mu byalo ne basajja baabwe, ne bawulira nga kabaka wa Babilooniya awadde Gedaliya mutabani wa Ahikaamu okufuga ensi, n'okulabirira abantu abasingirayo ddala obwavu, abataatwalibwa Babilooniya." 
Jeremiah40:8 Awo Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya, ne Yohanaani mutabani wa Kareya, ne Seraya mutabani wa Tanuhumeti ne batabani ba Efayi ow'e Netafa, ne Yezaniya ow'e Maaka, ne bagenda ne basajja baabwe eri Gedaliya e Mizupa." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya n'abalayirira bo ne basajja baabwe ng'agamba nti: “Temutya kuweereza Bakaludaaya. Mukkalire mu nsi eno, muweereze kabaka wa Babilooniya, mujja kuba bulungi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Nze nja kubeera e Mizupa, okubakiikiriranga mmwe, ng'Abakaludaaya bazze gye tuli. Naye mmwe mukuŋŋaanye era mweterekere omwenge gw'emizabbibu, n'ebibala n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, mubeere mu bibuga byammwe mukkalire.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Bwe batyo Abayudaaya abalala abaali mu Mowaabu ne mu Ammoni ne mu Edomu, ne mu nsi endala, ne bawulira nga kabaka wa Babilooniya yakkiriza Abayudaaya abamu okusigala mu Buyudaaya era nga Gedaliya gwe yawa okubafuga." 
Jeremiah40:12 Awo ne bava mu bifo byonna gye baali basaasaanidde, ne badda mu Buyudaaya. Ne bajja eri Gedaliya e Mizupa, ne bakuŋŋaanya omwenge gw'emizabbibu era n'ebibala bingi nnyo ddala." 
Jeremiah40:13 Awo Yohanaani mutabani wa Kareya, n'abakulembeze b'abaserikale ne bajja eri Gedaliya e Mizupa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ne bamugamba nti: “Okimanyi nga Baalisi kabaka wa Ammoni atumye Yisimayeli okukutemula?” Naye Gedaliya n'atakkiriza. 
Jeremiah40:15 Awo Yohanaani n'amugamba mu kyama nti: “Ka ŋŋende nzite Yisimayeli, tewali ajja kumanya amusse. Lwaki yandikusse, Abayudaaya bonna abakukuŋŋaaniddeko ne basaasaana, era n'abantu bonna abasigadde mu Buyudaaya ne bazikirira?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Naye Gedaliya n'addamu nti: “Tokola ekyo. By'oyogera ku Yisimayeli si bituufu.” 
Jeremiah41:1 Mu mwezi ogw'omusanvu mu mwaka ogwo, Yisimayeli, mutabani wa Netaniya, era muzzukulu wa Elisaama, ow'olulyo olulangira, era omu ku bakungu ba kabaka abakulu, n'agenda e Mizupa n'abasajja kkumi okulaba Gedaliya. Bwe baali eyo nga baliira wamu emmere," 
Jeremiah41:2 Yisimayeli n'abasajja ekkumi ne basowolayo ebitala byabwe ne batta Gedaliya, kabaka wa Babilooniya gwe yali awadde okufuga ensi eyo." 
Jeremiah41:3 Yisimayeli era n'atta n'Abayudaaya bonna abaali ne Gedaliya e Mizupa, n'abaserikale Abakaludaaya abaasangibwayo" 
Jeremiah41:4 Ku lunaku olwaddirira nga tewannabaawo amanya kuttibwa kwa Gedaliya," 
Jeremiah41:5 abasajja kinaana ne batuuka nga bava e Sekemu n'e Siilo n'e Samariya. Baali bamweddeko ebirevu byabwe, nga bayuzizza ebyambalo byabwe, era nga beesaze emisale, nga baleese ebirabo eby'emmere ey'empeke, era n'obubaane eby'okuwaayo mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah41:6 Awo Yisimayeli n'ava e Mizupa okubasisinkana, ng'agenda akaaba amaziga. Bwe yabatuukako, n'abagamba nti: “Mujje mulabe Gedaliya!”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Olwali okutuuka mu kibuga wakati, Yisimayeli ne basajja be ne babatta, ne basuula emirambo gyabwe mu luzzi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Naye mu bo mwalimu abasajja kkumi abaagamba Yisimayeli nti: “Tukwegayiridde, totutta. Tulina eŋŋaano ne bbaale, n'omuzigo gw'emizayiti, n'omubisi gw'enjuki ebikwekeddwa mu nnimiro.” Bo n'abaleka, n'atabatta." 
Jeremiah41:9 Oluzzi Yisimayeli mwe yasuula emirambo gy'abasajja be yatta, lwe lugazi, kabaka Asa lwe yali asimye, bwe yalumbibwa Baasa, kabaka wa Yisirayeli. Yisimayeli n'alujjuza emirambo gy'abo abattibwa." 
Jeremiah41:10 Bawala ba kabaka n'abantu bonna abaasigalawo e Mizupa, Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye be yali alekedde Gedaliya okubalabirira, Yisimayeli n'abatwala nga basibe, n'akwata eriraga mu nsi y'Abammoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Awo Yohanaani mutabani wa Kareya, n'abakulu b'ebitongole ebyali naye, ne bawulira obutemu bwa Yisimayeli." 
Jeremiah41:12 Ne bagenda ne basajja baabwe bonna, okulwanyisa Yisimayeli, ne bamusanga awali ekidiba ekinene e Gibiyoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abasibe ba Yisimayeli bwe baalaba Yohanaani n'abakulu b'ebibinja ebyali naye, ne basanyuka," 
Jeremiah41:14 ne bakyuka ne badduka okudda gye bali. 
Jeremiah41:15 Naye Yisimayeli ne basajja be ekinaana, ne basumattuka Yohanaani, ne baddukira mu nsi y'Abammoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Awo Yohanaani n'abakulu b'ebibinja ebyali naye ne balabirira abantu bonna, abaserikale, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'abalaawe, Yisimayeli be yali atutte nga basibe okubaggya e Mizupa, ng'amaze okutta Gedaliya. Ne babakomyawo okuva e Gibiyoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Ne bagenda ne babeera e Geruti Kimuhaamu, okumpi ne Betilehemu, nga baagala okulaga mu Misiri," 
Jeremiah41:18 olw'okweraliikirira Abakaludaaya, be baatya, kubanga Yisimayeli mutabani wa Netaniya yali asse Gedaliya, kabaka wa Babilooniya gwe yali awadde okufuga ensi eyo." 
Jeremiah42:1 Awo abakulu b'ebibinja bonna, ne Yohanaani mutabani wa Kareya, ne Yezaniya, mutabani wa Osaaya, n'abantu bonna abakulu n'abato," 
Jeremiah42:2 ne bajja ne bagamba Yeremiya omulanzi nti: “Tukwegayiridde okole kye tukusaba. Tusabire eri Mukama, Katonda waffe, osabire ffe ffenna abasigaddewo, kubanga abaabanga abangi, otulaba tusigadde batono." 
Jeremiah42:3 Osabe Mukama atulage ekkubo lye tugwanira okukwata, era atulage kye tugwanira okukola.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Awo Yeremiya omulanzi n'abaddamu nti: “Mbiwulidde. Kale nja kusaba Mukama, Katonda waffe nga bwe mugambye, era buli ky'anaddamu, nja kukibategeeza. Sijja kubaako kye mbakisa.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Awo ne bagamba nti: “Mukama abe omujulizi omutuufu era ow'amazima, atulumiriza omusango, bwe tutalikola byonna Mukama, Katonda waffe by'anaakutuma okutugamba." 
Jeremiah42:6 Oba kinaatusanyusa, oba tekiitusanyuse, tujja kuwulira Mukama, Katonda waffe, gwe tukusaba okutwegayiririra, tulyoke tubenga bulungi, nga tuwulira by'atulagira.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Bwe waayitawo ennaku kkumi, Mukama n'ayogera ne Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Awo n'ayita Yohanaani n'abakulu b'ebibinja bonna abaali naye, n'abantu abalala bonna" 
Jeremiah42:9 n'abagamba nti: “Mukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli gwe mwantuma okubasabira, agambye nti:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Bwe mukkiriza okubeeranga mu nsi eno, ndibanyweza ne sibayuuyayuuya, kubanga akabi ke nabatuusaako, kannakuwazizza nnyo." 
Jeremiah42:11 Mulekere awo okutya kabaka wa Babilooniya, kubanga Nze ndi wamu nammwe okubawonya n'okubaggya mu mikono gye." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndibawa mmwe okusaasirwa, abakwatirwe ekisa, abaleke musigale mu nsi yammwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Muleme kujeemera Mukama, Katonda wammwe, nga mugaana okusigala mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah42:14 Singa mugamba nti: ‘Nedda, tujja kugenda mu nsi y'e Misiri tubeerenga eyo, gye tutajja kusanga lutalo, oba okuwulira eŋŋoma ezirawa, era gye tutalifiira njala,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 kale mmwe abasigaddewo mu Buyudaaya, muwulire kino. Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Oba nga mumaliridde okugenda e Misiri," 
Jeremiah42:16 olutalo lwe mutya lulibasanga eyo. N'enjala gye mweraliikirira eribagoberera, era mulifiira eyo mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah42:17 Bonna abamaliridde okugenda e Misiri okubeera eyo, balifiira mu lutalo, oba balifa enjala, oba endwadde. Tewaliba n'omu ku bo aliwonawo. Tewaliba n'omu awona kabi ke ndibatuusaako.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: ‘Nga bwe nasunguwalira ennyo abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, bwe ntyo bwe ndibasunguwalira ennyo mmwe, singa mugenda e Misiri. Muliba kyenyinyalwa, abantu balibanyooma, balikozesa erinnya lyammwe nga bakolima, era temuliddayo kulaba kifo kino.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Mmwe abasigaddewo mu Buyudaaya, Mukama abagambye obutagenda Misiri. Mumanyire ddala nti olwaleero nze mbalabudde" 
Jeremiah42:20 nti musobezza nnyo okuba abakuusa, kubanga mwantuma okubasabira eri Mukama, Katonda waffe, nga mugamba nti: ‘Tusabire eri Mukama, Katonda waffe, era buli ky'anaddamu okitubuulire, ffe tujja kukikola.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Kaakano mbibategeezezza, naye mujeemedde byonna Mukama Katonda wammwe byantumye okubategeeza." 
Jeremiah42:22 Kale mutegeerere ddala nti mujja kufiira mu lutalo, oba okufa enjala, oba endwadde mu nsi gye mwagala okugenda okubeeramu.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Awo ne mmaliriza okutegeeza abantu byonna Mukama Katonda bye yantuma okubategeeza. 
Jeremiah43:2 Awo Azariya mutabani wa Osaaya, ne Yohanaani mutabani wa Kareya, n'abasajja bonna abeekulumbaza, ne baŋŋamba nti: “Olimba! Mukama, Katonda waffe takutumye kutugamba nti: ‘Temugenda Misiri okubeera eyo.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Baruku mutabani wa Neriya ye akutuwendulidde okutugabula mu mikono gy'Abakaludaaya, balyoke batutte oba batutwale e Babilooniya tube basibe.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Bwe batyo Yohanaani n'abakulu b'ebibinja bonna, n'abantu abalala bonna, ne batawulira Mukama ky'abalagidde, okusigala mu nsi Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah43:5 Awo Yohanaani n'abakulu b'ebibinja bonna, ne batwala e Misiri abantu bonna abaali balekeddwa mu Buyudaaya, wamu n'abo abaali bakomyewo okuva mu mawanga gye baali basaasaanidde," 
Jeremiah43:6 abasajja, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, ne bawala ba kabaka. Ne batwala bonna, Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye be yali alekedde Gedaliya okubalabirira, omwali Baruku, nange." 
Jeremiah43:7 Ne bajeemera ekya Mukama kye yabalagira, ne bayingira mu nsi y'e Misiri, okutuukira ddala ne mu kibuga Tapaneesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋambira e Tapaneesi nti: 
Jeremiah43:9 “Ddira amayinja amanene ogaziike mu matoffaali agali awayingirirwa mu lubiri lwa kabaka, wano e Tapaneesi, ng'abamu ku Bayudaaya bakulaba," 
Jeremiah43:10 obagambe nti Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nja kutumya omuweereza wange Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya, ajje ateeke entebe ye ey'obwakabaka ku mayinja gano ge nziise, era atimbe eweema ye eya kabaka ku go." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukadunezzari oyo alijja n'awangula Misiri. Ab'okufa endwadde bafe, ab'okutwalibwa mu busibe batwalibwe mu busibe, n'ab'okufiira mu lutalo bafiire mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah43:12 “Ndikuma omuliro mu masabo ga balubaale b'e Misiri, era kabaka wa Babilooniya, balubaale alibookya, oba alibasibako n'abatwala. Ng'omusumba bw'ayonja olugoye lwe ng'alondalondamu ensekere n'azimalamu, ne kabaka wa Babilooniya bw'atyo bw'alireka alonzelonze buli kantu mu Misiri, n'agitukuza, n'alyoka agenda, nga tewali amukuba ku mukono." 
Jeremiah43:13 Alimenya empagi ez'e Heliyopoli mu nsi y'e Misiri, era alyokya omuliro amasabo ga balubaale b'e Misiri.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Mukama n'ayogera nange ebikwata ku Bayudaaya bonna abaali mu nsi y'e Misiri mu bibuga Migidooli ne Tapaneesi ne Menfiisi, mu kitundu ky'e Paturoosi." 
Jeremiah44:2 Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli n'agamba nti: “Mulabye akabi ke natuusa ku Yerusaalemu ne ku bibuga ebirala byonna ebya Buyudaaya. N'okutuusa kaakano byasigala matongo, tewali muntu abibeeramu," 
Jeremiah44:3 kubanga abantu baamu baakola ebibi, ne bansunguwaza nga bootereza balubaale obubaane, era nga baweereza balubaale abo, bo bennyini be batamanyangako, newaakubadde mmwe, wadde bajjajjammwe." 
Jeremiah44:4 Nabatumiranga abaweereza bange abalanzi obutasalako, okubategeeza nti ‘Temukola kintu ekyo ekyenyinyalwa kye nkyawa.’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Naye ne batawuliriza, era ne batassaayo mwoyo kulekayo bibi byabwe." 
Jeremiah44:6 Kyennava nkwatibwa obusungu n'ekiruyi, ne mbiyiwa ku bibuga bya Buyudaaya ne mu nguudo z'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu, ne bikoleera omuliro, ne bifuuka matongo, ne birekebwa awo nga bwe biri kaakano." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Kale Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kaakano mbabuuza mmwe nti: ‘Lwaki mwesombera akabi akenkanidde awo obunene? Lwaki mwagala okuzikiriza abasajja, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'abawere, waleme kusigalawo n'omu ku b'olulyo lwammwe?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Lwaki munsunguwaza olw'ebyo bye mukola, nga musinza balubaale mu nsi y'e Misiri gye mwajja okubeeramu? Lwaki mukola bwe mutyo, okwezikiriza, n'okunyoomebwa, era n'okuvumibwa ab'omu mawanga gonna ku nsi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mwerabidde ebibi byonna bajjajjammwe ne bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya ne bakazi baabwe, ne bakazi bammwe bye baakolera mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne mu nguudo za Yerusaalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Naye n'okutuusa kaakano temunnaggwaamu kwekulumbaza. Temunnanzisaamu kitiibwa, wadde okukolera ku mateeka gange, ge nabawa mmwe ne bajjajjammwe.’" 
Jeremiah44:11 “Kale nno Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, nja kubatunuuliza bukambwe, nzikirize Buyudaaya yonna." 
Jeremiah44:12 Era abantu ba Buyudaaya abasigaddewo ne bamalirira okugenda okubeera mu nsi y'e Misiri, nja kubasaanyaawo. Bonna abakulu n'abato, balifiira mu nsi y'e Misiri, nga battirwa mu lutalo oba nga bafa enjala. Baliba ekyenyinyalwa, era ekinyoomebwa. Abantu banaabavumanga, era banaabayitanga ekikolimo." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndibonereza abo ababeera mu nsi y'e Misiri, nga bwe nabonereza Yerusaalemu, nga nkozesa olutalo, n'enjala, n'endwadde." 
Jeremiah44:14 Ku bantu b'omu Buyudaaya abasigaddewo, ne bagenda okubeera mu nsi y'e Misiri, tekuliba awonawo wadde asigalawo. Tekuliba alikomawo mu Buyudaaya gye beegomba okudda okubeera. Tewaliba akomawo okuggyako abatono abalidduka.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Awo abasajja bonna abaamanya nga bakazi baabwe bootereza balubaale obubaane, n'abakazi bonna abaali bayimiridde awo, n'ekibiina ekinene eky'Abayisirayeli abaali babeera mu nsi y'e Misiri e Paturoosi, ne baŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Tetwagala kuwuliriza bigambo ebyo by'otubuulidde mu linnya lya Mukama. 
Jeremiah44:17 Naye tujja kwongera okukola ebyo bye tweyama okukola. Tujja kwoterezanga obubaane lubaale nnaabakyala w'eggulu, era tunaamufukiranga ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa, nga ffe ne bajjajjaffe ne bassekabaka baffe, n'abakungu baffe, bwe twakolanga mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya ne mu nguudo za Yerusaalemu, kubanga olwo lwe twabanga n'ebyokulya ebingi, ne tuba bulungi, awatali bitutawaanya." 
Jeremiah44:18 Naye okuva lwe twalekayo okwotereza obubaane lubaale nnaabakyala w'eggulu, n'okumufukira ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa, tetukyalina kantu, era abantu baffe bafiiridde mu lutalo oba bafudde enjala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Abakazi ne bongerako nti: “Bwe twafumbanga emigaati egiwumbiddwa mu kifaananyi kya lubaale nnaabakyala w'eggulu, ne tumwotereza obubaane, era ne tumufukira ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa, babbaffe baabangawo nga bawagira bye tukola.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Awo abantu bonna abasajja n'abakazi abaali banzizeemu bwe batyo ne mbagamba nti: 
Jeremiah44:21 “Obubaane bwe mwayotereza mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, ne mu nguudo za Yerusaalemu mmwe ne bajjajjammwe, ne bassekabaka bammwe, n'abakungu bammwe, n'abantu ab'omu ggwanga, mulowooza nti Mukama teyabumanya, oba nti yabwerabira?" 
Jeremiah44:22 N'okutuusa ku lunaku lwaleero, ensi yammwe yasigala matongo, nga tewali agibeeramu. Efuuse kyenyinyalwa era ekinyoomebwa. Abantu bagivuma era bagiyita kikolimo, kubanga Mukama yali takyayinza kugumiikiriza bibi byammwe n'ebyenyinyalwa bye mwakolanga." 
Jeremiah44:23 Akabi kano ke mulimu, kabaguddeko kubanga mwayotereza balubaale obubaane, ne munyiiza Mukama, nga mugaana okukolera ku mateeka ge, ne ku ebyo byonna bye yabalagira.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Era ne ntegeeza abantu bonna, naddala abakazi, ebyo Mukama by'agamba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya abali mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Jeremiah44:25 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, agamba nti: ‘Mmwe, ne bakazi bammwe, mukoze obweyamo eri nnaabakyala w'eggulu nti munaamwoterezanga obubaane, era munaamufukiranga ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa.’ Kale mukole bye musuubizza. Mutuukirize obweyamo bwammwe." 
Jeremiah44:26 “Kale mwenna Abayisirayeli abali mu nsi y'e Misiri, muwulire kye nneeyamye mu linnya lyange ekkulu. Siriddayo kukkiriza n'omu ku mmwe ab'omu Buyudaaya abali mu nsi y'e Misiri, kulayira linnya lyange ng'agamba nti: ‘Nga Mukama Katonda bw'ali omulamu.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ndibatuusaako kabi, sso si birungi. Abasajja bonna Abayisirayeli abali mu nsi y'e Misiri, balifiira mu lutalo, oba balifa endwadde, okutuusa lwe baliggwaawo." 
Jeremiah44:28 Naye abatono ku mmwe baliwona okufa ne bava mu Misiri, ne baddayo mu Buyudaaya. Olwo abaliba basigaddewo, balimanya oba ng'ebigambo ebyange bye bituukiridde, oba ebyabwe." 
Jeremiah44:29 Nze Mukama, nja kubawa akabonero kwe munaakakasiza nga bwe ŋŋenda okubabonereza mu kifo kino, era ng'ebigambo byange, ebirangirira akabi ke ndibatuusaako mmwe, bya kutuukirira." 
Jeremiah44:30 Nja kuwaayo Hofera kabaka wa Misiri mu mikono gy'abalabe be abaagala okumutta, nga bwe nawaayo Zeddeekiya kabaka wa Buyudaaya, mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari, kabaka wa Babilooniya, omulabe we era eyali ayagala okumutta.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoyakiimu mutabani wa Yosiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Baruku n'awandiika ebigambo nga bwe nabimugamba. Awo ne ŋŋamba Baruku oyo nti" 
Jeremiah45:2 Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: “Baruku," 
Jeremiah45:3 wagamba nti: ‘Zinsanze, kubanga Mukama annyongedde obuyinike ku kubonaabona. Okusinda kwange kunkooyezza, era sifuna kiwummulo n'akatono!’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Naye Nze Mukama, nzimbulula kye nazimba, era nsimbula kye nasimba. Nja kukola bwe ntyo mu nsi yonna." 
Jeremiah45:5 Naye ggwe onoonya kutalizibwa? Nedda, biveeko. Nja kutuusa akabi ku bantu bonna. Naye ggwe, ndikuwa waakiri okusigaza obulamu bwo, buli gy'oliraga yonna. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Awo Mukama n'antegeeza ebifa ku mawanga," 
Jeremiah46:2 ng'asookera ku Misiri. Bino bye yayogera ku ggye lya Neko kabaka wa Misiri, Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya lye yawangulira e Karukemisi, okumpi n'Omugga Ewufuraate, mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoyakiimu ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Abaduumizi Abamisiri baleekaana nti: ‘Mukwate engabo zammwe, mutale okulwana." 
Jeremiah46:4 Muteeke amatandiiko ku mbalaasi, mmwe abeebagazi, muzeebagale, mutale nga mwetikkidde enkuufiira ez'ebyuma. Muwagale amafumu gammwe, mwambale ebizibawo eby'ebyuma.’" 
Jeremiah46:5 “Naye Mukama yeebuuza nti: ‘Ate kaakati ndaba ki? Batidde, bazze emabega! Abalwanyi baabwe ab'amaanyi basuuliddwa wansi. Entiisa eri ku njuyi zonna! Badduse nga tebatunula mabega!" 
Jeremiah46:6 Abasinga embiro balemeddwa okudduka. Abazira tebasobola kwewonya! Mu bukiikakkono obw'Omugga Ewufuraate, gye beesittadde, bagudde!" 
Jeremiah46:7 Ani ayambuka nga Kiyira omugga ogw'amazzi agaalaala? 
Jeremiah46:8 Misiri ye ayambuka nga Kiyira omugga ogw'amazzi agaalaala!’ Misiri yagamba nti: ‘Ndyambuka mbuutikire ensi, ndizibikira ebibuga n'ababibeeramu bonna." 
Jeremiah46:9 Mmwe embalaasi, mulumbe! Mmwe ebigaali, mutomere! Mmwe abaserikale, mutale! Abakwatangabo, ab'e Kuusi n'e Puuti, n'abalasabusaale, b'e Luudi!’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Luno lwe lunaku lwa Mukama, Mukama Nnannyinimagye. Ku luno anaawoolera eggwanga, era anaabonereza abalabe be. Ekitala kye kinaabalya kyekkutire. Ku luno Mukama Nnannyinimagye, asalidde ekitambiro kye mu bukiikakkono, ku lubalama lw'Omugga Ewufuraate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Abantu b'e Misiri mugendeeko e Gileyaadi mwefunireyo eddagala. Naye eddagala eringi lye mukozesa libatawaanyiza bwereere, temuli ba kuwona!" 
Jeremiah46:12 Amawanga gawulidde bw'oswadde, bonna bawulidde bw'okaaba. Omuserikale yeesittadde ku munne ne bagwa wamu bombi!" 
Jeremiah46:13 Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya bwe yajja okulumba Misiri, Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Mulangirire mu bibuga by'e Misiri mu Migidooli, Menfiisi ne Tapaneesi nti: ‘Mwetegeke okwetaasa. Bye mulina byonna bya kuzikirizibwa mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah46:15 Lwaki lubaale wammwe Apiisi agudde? Mukama ye amusudde wansi.’ 
Jeremiah46:16 Abaserikale bammwe beesittadde ne bagwa! Buli omu agamba munne nti: ‘Situka tuddeyo eri ab'ewaffe, tuwone ekitala ky'omulabe!’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Kabaka wa Misiri mumuwe erinnya: ‘Luyoogaano buyoogaano, Eyasubwa omukisa gwe.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, ndi Kabaka. Nze Katonda Nnannyinibulamu. Ng'Olusozi Tabori bwe lugulumidde mu nsozi, Ne Karumeeli bwe lwesimbye ku lubalama lw'ennyanja, n'amaanyi g'oyo ajja okulumba bwe galiba." 
Jeremiah46:19 Mmwe abantu b'e Misiri mwesibirire okugenda mu busibe. Menfiisi kirifuuka matongo, eddungu omutabeera bantu." 
Jeremiah46:20 Misiri eri ng'ennyana ennungi ennyo erumiddwa ekivu ekivudde mu bukiikakkono. 
Jeremiah46:21 Abaserikale be abapangise nabo bali ng'ennyana eziri mu kisibo, kubanga tebaayimirirawo kulwana. Baakyuka ne badduka bonna. Olunaku olw'obuyinike lubatuukiridde! Kye kiseera eky'okuzikirizibwa kwabwe." 
Jeremiah46:22 Abamisiri badduka nga bafuuwa oluwa ng'omusota, ng'eggye ly'omulabe lisembera, ne libalumba nga lirina embazzi, ng'abo abatema emiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Balitema ekibira kya Misiri newaakubadde kikwafu nnyo, kubanga abaserikale be tebabalika, basinga enzige obungi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Abantu b'e Misiri baswadde: bawanguddwa abantu ab'omu bukiikakkono. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: “Nja kubonereza Ammoni lubaale w'e Tebesi, awamu ne Misiri, ne balubaale ne bakabaka baamu. Nja kubonereza kabaka wa Misiri, ne bonna abamwesiga," 
Jeremiah46:26 mbaweeyo mu mikono gy'abo abaagala okubatta, mu mikono gya Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya n'eggye lye. Naye oluvannyuma, Misiri eriddamu okubaamu abantu, nga bwe baabeerangamu edda. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Naye mmwe abaweereza bange, temutya. Abayisirayeli, temweraliikirira. Ndibawonyeza gye muli ewala, mu nsi gye muli mu busibe. Mulidda mu nsi yammwe, ne mubeera mirembe nga muli bulungi, awatali abatiisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ndijja gye muli ne mbawonya. Ndizikiriza amawanga gonna gye nabasaasaanyiza mmwe, naye mmwe siribazikiriza. Ndibabonereza mmwe, naye mpola ne sibazikiririza ddala. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Nga kabaka wa Misiri tannalumba Gaaza, Mukama n'ayogera nange ku Bafilistiya." 
Jeremiah47:2 N'agamba nti: “Mulabe, amazzi gatumbiira mu bukiikakkono. Galiba ng'omugga ogwanjaala ne gubikka ensi n'ebigiriko byonna, ebibuga n'ababirimu. Abantu balireekaana, abali ku nsi bonna balikuba ebiwoobe." 
Jeremiah47:3 Baliwulira omusinde gw'ebinuulo by'embalaasi, n'okuwuluguma kw'amagaali, n'okwekulula kwa zinnamuziga. Bakitaabwe b'abaana tebalitunula mabega kulabirira baana abo. Balitekena emikono nga giweddemu amaanyi." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ekiseera kisembedde okuzikiriza Filistiya, okumala ku Tiiro ne Sidoni obuyambi obusigaddewo. Nze Mukama ndizikiriza Abafilistiya bonna abasigaddewo ku kizinga Kafutoori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ab'e Gaaza bamweddeko enviiri! Ab'e Asukelooni basirisiddwa! Abafilistiya abasigaddewo balituusa wa okukungubaga? 
Jeremiah47:6 Muleekaane nti: ‘Kitala kya Mukama, oliwummulako ddi? Ddayo mu kiraato kyo, owummule osirike!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Naye kinaawummula kitya nga nkiragidde okukola! Nkiragidde okulumba Asukelooni n'olubalama lw'ennyanja.” 
Jeremiah48:1 Bino Mukama Nnannyinimagye bye yayogera ku Mowaabu: “Zibasanze ab'e Nebo, ekibuga kyabwe kizikiriziddwa! Kiriyatayiimu kiwambiddwa, ekigo kyakyo ekigumu kimenyeddwa, abantu baamu ne baswazibwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ekitiibwa kya Mowaabu kiweddewo. Abalabe bawambye Hesubooni, gye bateesereza okusaanyaawo eggwanga lya Mowaabu. Ekibuga ky'e Madumeeni kisirisiddwa, amagye gajja kukirumba." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ab'e Horonayimu baleekaana nti: ‘Okunyaga n'okuzikiriza okw'amaanyi!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 “Ensi Mowaabu ezikiridde! Wulira abaana baayo abato bakaaba. 
Jeremiah48:5 Abalinnyalinnya Luhiti, bagenda bakaaba amaziga. Bakuba ebiwoobe olw'obuyinike, nga baserengeta Horonayimu." 
Jeremiah48:6 Bagamba nti: ‘Mudduke muwonye obulamu bwammwe. Mufuumuuke ng'entulege ey'omu ddungu!’ 
Jeremiah48:7 “Mowaabu,edda weesiganga amaanyi go n'obugagga bwo. Naye kaakano naawe oli wa kuwangulwa. Lubaale wo Kemosi alitwalibwa mu busibe, awamu ne bakabona be n'abakungu be." 
Jeremiah48:8 Azikiriza talitaliza kibuga. Ekiwonvu n'olusenyi birizikirizibwa. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah48:9 “Mowaabu eneetera okuzikirira! Mugisimire entaana! Ebibuga byayo bisigale matongo omutakyali babibeeramu.” 
Jeremiah48:10 Oyo akolimiddwa agayaalirira omulimu gwa Mukama! N'oyo akolimiddwa aziyiza ekitala okuyiwa omusaayi! 
Jeremiah48:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Abamowaabu baabeeranga mirembe bulijjo. Tebatwalibwangako mu busibe. Bali ng'omwenge ogulekeddwa okuteeka, nga teguttululwa kuva mu nsuwa kudda mu ndala, obuwoomi bwagwo ne butayonooneka n'akatono, n'akawoowo kaagwo, ne kasigala nga kalungi." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Kale kaakano, ekiseera kituuse ntume abanattulula Mowaabu ng'omwenge. Balittulula ensuwa ze, zikale era bazaaseeyase." 
Jeremiah48:13 Olwo Abamowaabu balikwatirwa lubaale waabwe Kemosi ensonyi, ng'Abayisirayeli bwe baakwatirwa ensonyi Beteli, gwe baali beesiga." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Abasajja b'e Mowaabu, lwaki mweyita ab'amaanyi era abazira mu kulwana?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Ensi Mowaabu ezikiriziddwa n'ebibuga byayo. Abavubuka baayo embulakalevu nabo batirimbuddwa. Nze Kabaka, Nze njogedde, Mukama Nnannyinimagye!" 
Jeremiah48:16 Akabi kasemberedde Mowaabu! Okuzikirira kwayo, kuli kumpi okutuuka." 
Jeremiah48:17 “Mukungubagire eggwanga eryo mmwe baliraanwa baalyo! Mmwe mwenna abamanyi ettutumu lyalyo, mugambe nti: ‘Obufuzi bwalyo obw'amaanyi era obwekitiibwa bumenyeddwawo!’ ”" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Mmwe ababeera mu Diboni, muve mu kifo ekyekitiibwa, mukke wansi mu nfuufu, kubanga azikiriza Mowaabu atuuse, azikirizza ebigo byammwe!" 
Jeremiah48:19 Mmwe ababeera mu Aroweri muyimirire ku mabbali g'ekkubo mulinde mubuuze abayitawo ku misinde nti: ‘Kiki ekiguddewo?’ 
Jeremiah48:20 Banaabaddamu nti: ‘Ensi Mowaabu emenyeddwa, eswadde. Muteme emiranga, mukaabe ku lubalama lw'Omugga Arunoni, nti Mowaabu ezikiriziddwa!’" 
Jeremiah48:21 “Omusango gumaze okusalirwa ebibuga by'omu museetwe: Holoni, Yaaza, ne Mefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni, Nebo ne Betudibulatayimu;" 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyatayiimu, Betugamuli ne Betumyoni;" 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriyooti, Buzura, n'ebibuga byonna eby'omu nsi ya Mowaabu ebiri okumpi n'ewala!" 
Jeremiah48:25 Amaanyi ga Mowaabu gamenyese, obuyinza bwayo buzikiridde. Nze mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah48:26 Mukama agamba nti: “Mutamiize Mowaabu, kubanga enjeemedde. Mowaabu eryekulukuunya mu bisesemye byayo, era nayo erisekererwa." 
Jeremiah48:27 Ggwe Mowaabu lwaki wasekerera Yisirayeli? Yali mu kibinja ky'ababbi? Buli lw'ogitunulako ggwe oginyeenyeza omutwe! 
Jeremiah48:28 “Mmwe Abamowaabu, muve mu bibuga byammwe. Mugende mubeere mu njazi. Mube ng'ejjiba erizimba mu njatika z'amayinja." 
Jeremiah48:29 Mpulidde okwekulumbaza okw'ab'e Mowaabu. Beekulumbaza nnyo, beekuza, ba lwetumbu, ba lunkulu era ba mputtu." 
Jeremiah48:30 Nze Mukama nkimanyi nga bwe beekuza. Beenyumiririza bwereere. Bye bakola temuli nsa. 
Jeremiah48:31 Kyennava nkungubagira buli Mumowaabu, n'abantu b'e Kiruheresi!" 
Jeremiah48:32 “Ndikaabira ab'e Sibuma n'okusinga ab'e Yazeri! Ggwe ekibuga ky'e Sibuma, oli ng'omuzabbibu ogw'amatabi agatuuka ku Nnyanja Enfu, era agatuuka n'e Yazeri! Naye omuzikiriza agudde mu bibala byo eby'ekyeya ne mu makungula go!" 
Jeremiah48:33 Essanyu n'okujaganya biggyiddwa mu nsi engimu eya Mowaabu. Nkomezza omwenge gw'emizabbibu okukulukutira mu masogolero. Tewakyali asogola mwenge, ng'aleekaana olw'essanyu." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Ab'e Hesubooni ne Eleyaale bakuba ebiwoobe ne biwulirwa okutuuka n'e Yakazi. Biwulirwa n'ab'e Zowari era ne mu Horonayimu, ne mu Egulaati Selisiya." 
Jeremiah48:35 Nja kukomya ab'e Mowaabu okuwaayo ebitambiro ebyokebwa, n'okwotereza obubaane balubaale baabwe. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Kyenva nkungubagira Mowaabu era n'abantu b'e Kiru Eresi, ng'omuntu afuuwa ku ndere oluyimba olw'ennaku, kubanga buli kintu kye balina kizikiridde!" 
Jeremiah48:37 Bonna bamweddeko enviiri, basazeeko n'ebirevu! Beesaze emisale ku mikono, era bambadde ebikutiya." 
Jeremiah48:38 Ku ntikko z'amayumba mu Mowaabu ne mu nguudo zaayo zonna, waliwo kukungubaga, kubanga njasizza Mowaabu ng'ekibya ekitasanyusa!" 
Jeremiah48:39 Mowaabu abetenteddwa, abantu baaziirana! Kaakati efuuse matongo, abagyetoolodde beesekera! Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Mukama agamba nti: “Eggwanga lirirumba Mowaabu, ng'empungu ebuuka ng'eyanjuluzza ebiwaawaatiro byayo," 
Jeremiah48:41 ebibuga n'ebigo ne biwambibwa. Ku lunaku olwo, abaserikale ba Mowaabu balitya ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Mowaabu alizikirizibwa, n'akoma okuba eggwanga, kubanga yanjeemera." 
Jeremiah48:43 Entiisa n'obunnya n'emitego birinze abantu ba Mowaabu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Buli agezaako okudduka entiisa, aligwa mu bunnya, n'oyo ava mu bunnya, alikwatibwa mu mutego, kubanga ntaddewo ekiseera eky'okuzikiririzaamu Mowaabu." 
Jeremiah48:45 Abadduka beewogomako mu Hesubooni, nga baweddemu amaanyi, kubanga Mowaabu kyaka omuliro, n'olubiri lwa Sihoni lwaka omuliro. Omuliro gwokezza ensalo n'entikko z'ensozi ez'abantu ba Mowaabu, abaagazi b'entalo." 
Jeremiah48:46 Zikusanze ggwe Mowaabu! Abantu abasinza Kemosi bazikiridde, batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe, batwaliddwa nga basibe!" 
Jeremiah48:47 “Naye gye bujja, ndizzaawo ebirungi bya Mowaabu.” Ebyo bye byogerwa ku Mowaabu." 
Jeremiah49:1 Bino Mukama bye yayogera ku Bammoni: “Tewali basajja mu Yisirayeli? Tewali bayinza kutaasa nsi yaabwe? Kale lwaki baleka abantu abasinza Milukomu okwefuga ekitundu ky'ab'Ekika kya Gaadi, ne bakisengamu?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Naye ekiseera kijja kutuuka, lwe ndiwuliza eŋŋoma z'olutalo nga zirayira mu Rabba, ekibuga ky'Abammoni ekikulu. Era kirirekebwa matongo, n'abantu baamu balyokebwa omuliro. Olwo Yisirayeli alyeddiza ekitundu kye ekyamunyagibwako." 
Jeremiah49:3 Ab'e Hesubooni, mukube ebiwoobe, kubanga Ayi kinyagiddwa. Abakazi b'e Rabba, mwambale ebikutiya mukungubage. Mudduke nga mubuna emiwabo mu bisaakaate. Lubaale wammwe Milukomu anaatwalibwa mu busibe, awamu ne bakabona be, n'abakungu be." 
Jeremiah49:4 Bantu mmwe abatali beesigwa, lwaki mwenyumiriza? Amaanyi gabawedde! Mwesigira ki obugagga bwammwe, nga mugamba nti: ‘Ani anaatulumba?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye ŋŋamba nti nja kubaleetera entiisa okuva mu bonna ababeetoolodde. Mwenna mulidduka ne wataba akumaakuma magye gammwe. 
Jeremiah49:6 “Naye oluvannyuma ndizzaawo ebirungi by'Abammoni. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Bino Mukama, Nnannyinimagye bye yayogera ku Edomu: “Mu bantu b'e Temani temukyali bagezi? Abajagujagu tebakyamanyi kuteesa? Amagezi gaabwe gagenze?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Mmwe ab'e Dedani, mukyuke mudduke! Mwekweke! Ŋŋenda okuzikiriza bazzukulu ba Esawu, kubanga ekiseera kituuse, mbabonereze." 
Jeremiah49:9 Abanoga emizabbibu balekako egimu, n'ababbi bwe bajja ekiro, batwalako ebyo bye baagala." 
Jeremiah49:10 Naye Nze nnyambulidde ddala bazzukulu ba Esawu ne mbaleka bwereere, ne mbikkula ebifo bye beekwekamu, nga tebakyayinza kwekweka. Abantu ba Edomu bazikiriziddwa bonna, tewasigaddeewo n'omu." 
Jeremiah49:11 Muleke bamulekwa bammwe, Nze nja kubalabirira. Ne bannamwandu bammwe banneesige." 
Jeremiah49:12 “Oba nga n'abatasaanidde kubonerezebwa, nabo babonerezebwa, ne mulowooza nti temulibonerezebwa? Temugenda kutalizibwa, naye mulibonerezebwa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Nneerayiridde nzennyini nti ekibuga Bozura kirifuuka ekyennyamiza, matongo, kivumo, era kikolimo. N'ebyalo ebiriraanyeewo biriba matongo ga lubeerera. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ne ŋŋamba nti: “Edomu, mpulidde obubaka obuva eri Mukama. Atumye omubaka okutegeeza amawanga gakuŋŋaanye amagye gaago okukulwanyisa." 
Jeremiah49:15 Mukama agenda kukufuula mutono mu mawanga, onyoomebwenga mu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Okwekulumbaza kwo kukulimbye. Tewali akutya nga ggwe bw'olowooza. Obeera mu njatika ez'omu lwazi, waggulu ku ntikko z'ensozi. Naye ne bw'onoobeera waggulu ng'empungu, Mukama alikuwanulayo.”" 
Jeremiah49:17 Mukama agamba nti: “Akabi akalituuka ku Edomu, kaliba ka ntiisa, buli anaayitangawo okumpi, aneewuunyanga n'awuniikirira." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nga Sodoma ne Gomora n'ebibuga ebiriraanyeewo bwe byazikirizibwa, n'ensi Edomu bw'erizikirizibwa n'eteddayo kubeerangamu bantu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Ng'empologoma bw'efubutuka mu bisaka ebikwafu eby'oku Mugga Yorudaani, n'erumba amalundiro amalungi, nange bwe ndijja ne ngoba Abeedomu mu nsi yaabwe amangwago. Olwo omukulembeze gwe ndironda ye alifuga mu Edomu. Ani ayinza okwegeza ku Nze? Ani ayinza okunvuganya? Mufuzi ki ayinza okumpakanya?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Kale muwulire kye nteesezza okukola ku bantu ba Edomu, ne kye mmaliridde okukola ku bantu b'omu Kibuga Temani. N'abaana baabwe abato balikululibwa, buli omu ne yeesisiwala." 
Jeremiah49:21 Edomu bw'aligwa, walibaawo okwedomola okulikankanya ensi, n'eddoboozi ly'okukaaba kwabwe liriwulirwa ku Nnyanja Emmyufu." 
Jeremiah49:22 Omulabe alirumba Bozura ng'empungu ekka ng'eyanjuluzza ebiwaawaatiro. Ku lunaku olwo abaserikale ba Edomu balitya ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala.” 
Jeremiah49:23 Bino Mukama bye yayogera ku Damasiko: “Ab'omu bibuga Amati ne Arapaadi beeraliikiridde, era basobeddwa, kubanga bafunye amawulire agatiisa. Okweraliikirira kubasiikudde emitima, ng'amayengo bwe gasiikuula ennyanja. Tebayinza kutereera." 
Jeremiah49:24 Abantu b'e Damasiko baweddemu amaanyi, era badduse nga batidde. Bali mu bulumi ne mu buyinike, ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ekibuga ekimanyifu era ekyabeerangamu essanyu, kirekeddwa awo ttayo." 
Jeremiah49:26 Ku lunaku olwo abavubuka baakyo balittirwa mu nguudo zaakyo, n'abaserikale baakyo bonna balizikirizibwa. Bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋamba Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye." 
Jeremiah49:27 Nditeekera omuliro ku bisenge bya Damasiko, ne gwokya amayumba ga Kabaka Benadaadi. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Bino Mukama bye yayogera ku Kika kya Kedari ne ku bitundu ebifugibwa Azori, Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya bye yawangula: “Mulumbe abantu b'e Kedari, muzikirize ekika ky'abantu b'ebuvanjuba." 
Jeremiah49:29 Munyage eweema zaabwe n'embuzi zaabwe, mutwale entimbe zaabwe, n'ebintu ebirala mu weema zaabwe. Mutwale eŋŋamiya zaabwe, mugambe abantu nti: ‘Entiisa ebali ku njuyi zonna!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Abantu be Azori, Nze Mukama mbalabula nti mudduke, mugende mwekweke wala, kubanga Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya abeekobedde okubakola akabi, era agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah49:31 ‘Mujje tulumbe abantu abo abawulira nga bali mirembe. Ekibuga kyabwe tekiriiko nzigi, wadde ebisiba, era tekikuumibwa.’" 
Jeremiah49:32 “Munyage eŋŋamiya n'ensolo zaabwe endala zonna. Nja kusaasaanyiza mu njuyi zonna abantu abo abasala ku nviiri zaabwe ne baziyimpawaza. Era ndibatusaako akabi nga kava mu njuyi zonna. 
Jeremiah49:33 Azori kirifuuka ddungu lya lubeerera, ekifo omubeera ebibe. Abantu tebaliddayo kusengamu. Temuubeerenga muntu n'omu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Zeddeekiya nga kyajje afuuke kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Mukama, n'ayogera nange ebifa ku nsi ya Elamu, n'agamba nti:" 
Jeremiah49:35 “Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye ŋŋamba nti nditta abalasi b'obusaale bonna, abafudde Elamu ey'amaanyi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndikunsiza Elamu embuyaga eva ku njuyi zonna, ndisaasaanya abantu baayo, ne watabeera ggwanga na limu lye bataddukiddeemu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndireetera ab'e Elamu okutya abalabe baabwe abaagala okubatta. Ndibatuusaako akabi mu busungu bwange obungi, era ndisindika amagye gye bali, okutuusa lwe ndibasaanyaawo." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndizikiriza bakabaka baabwe, ne nteekayo entebe yange ey'obwakabaka." 
Jeremiah49:39 Naye oluvannyuma, ndizzaawo ebirungi bya Elamu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Buno bwe bubaka Mukama bwe yampa nga bufa ku kibuga Babilooni: ne ku bantu baamu: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Mubunyise amawulire mu mawanga, mugalangirire. Mutimbe ebipande, musaasaanye amawulire, temugakisa, mugambe nti: ‘Babilooni kiwambiddwa, lubaale waakyo Baali aswadde, ne Merodaki atokomose! Ebifaananyi byakyo n'ebirala byonna ebisinzibwa bizikiriziddwa!’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Mu bukiikakkono evuddeyo eggwanga okulumba ensi Babilooniya. Lijja kugifuula matongo, eddukibwemu abantu n'ensolo, wabulewo n'omu agibeeramu.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abantu ba Yisirayeli n'aba Buyudaaya balijja nga bakaaba amaziga, nga banoonya Nze Katonda waabwe." 
Jeremiah50:5 Balibuuza awali ekkubo erigenda e Siyooni, ne boolekera eyo, nga bagamba nti: ‘Mujje twegatte ne Mukama, tukole naye endagaano ey'olubeerera etalyerabirwa.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abantu bange bali ng'endiga, abasumba baazo ze baawabya, ne bazibuliza mu nsozi. Babungeeta okuva ku lusozi okudda ku lulala, ne beerabira n'ewaabwe." 
Jeremiah50:7 Balumbibwa bonna ababasanga. Abalabe baabwe bagamba nti: ‘Kye tukoze si kibi, kubanga baasobya mu maaso ga Mukama, bajjajjaabwe gwe beesiganga, era nabo bennyini gwe bandinywereddengako.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, mudduke muve mu Babilooni. Mufulume ensi y'Abakaludaaya. Mube ababereberye mu kugivaamu," 
Jeremiah50:9 kubanga nja kusiikuula nsitule ekibinja ky'amawanga ag'amaanyi mu bukiikakkono, bajje balumbe Babilooniya. Balitala okulwanyisa ensi eyo bagiwangule. Bamanyirivu mu kulasa obusaale, era mu kuteeba tebasubwa." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ensi y'Abakaludaaya erinyagibwa. Era abo abaginyaga, balitwala buli kye baagala. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Mmwe abaanyaga eggwanga lyange, musanyuse ne mujaganya, ne muligita ng'ennyana y'ente ewuula eŋŋaano, ne mufugula ng'embalaasi ez'amaanyi." 
Jeremiah50:12 Naye ekibuga kyammwe ekikulu kiritoowazibwa. Eggwanga lyammwe lye lirisembayo mu mawanga gonna. Lirifuuka olukoola, ensi enkalu ey'eddungu." 
Jeremiah50:13 Olw'obusungu bwange, ensi yammwe teebeerengamu muntu n'omu. Erirekebwa awo matongo, era bonna abanaayitanga mu Babilooni, banaasamaaliriranga ne beewuunya okubonaabona kwakyo." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Mmwe mwenna abalasi b'obusaale, mutale okulwanyisa Babilooni, mukizikirize. Mukirase obusaale bwammwe bwonna, kubanga kyakola ekibi mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mukireekaanireko ku buli ludda. Kaakano kijeemulukuse. Ebigo byakyo biyiise, n'ebisenge byakyo bimenyeddwa, kubanga mpoolera eggwanga ku Bakaludaaya. Muwoolere eggwanga ku bo. Mubakoleko bye baakolanga ku balala." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mu Babilooni mumaleemu buli asiga ensigo, ne buli akutte ekiwabyo mu budde obw'amakungula. Buli mugwira abeeramu alitya eggye eddumbi, n'addayo ewaabwe.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli bali ng'endiga ezigobeddwa empologoma ne zibuna emiwabo. Kabaka w'Assiriya ye yasooka okubakavvula, ate ne Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya n'abaasaayasa amagumba." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, kyenva ŋŋamba nti: ndibonereza Kabaka Nebukadunezzari n'ensi ye, nga bwe nabonereza kabaka w'Assiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndikomyawo Abayisirayeli mu nsi yaabwe. Balirya emmere erimwa ku Lusozi Karumeeli, ne mu kitundu ky'e Basani, era balirya ne bakkuta ebirimwa mu bitundu bya Efurayimu ne Gileyaadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, tewaliba kwonoona mu Yisirayeli, era tewaliba bibi mu Buyudaaya, kubanga ndisonyiwa abo be nditalizaawo okuba abalamu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 Mukama agamba nti: “Mulumbe ab'e Meratayimu n'ab'e Pekodi. Mubawondere mubatte, mubazikirize. Mukole byonna bye mbalagira. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah50:22 Okuleekaana okw'olutalo kuwulirwa mu nsi eyo, era okuzikirira kunene." 
Jeremiah50:23 Babilooni yali nnyondo eyayasaayasanga ensi yonna, kaakati nayo eyasiddwa. Amawanga gonna geekanze olw'ebyo ebiguddewo mu nsi eyo." 
Jeremiah50:24 Ggwe Babilooni eyannwanyisa, okwatiddwa mu mutego gwe nakutega nga totegedde." 
Jeremiah50:25 Nziguddewo etterekero ly'ebyokulwanyisa byange, era mbifulumizza nga nsunguwadde, kubanga Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, nnina omulimu gwe ŋŋenda okukola mu nsi y'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mugirumbe nga muva buli ludda, mugguleewo amawanika gaayo gonna. Omunyago mugutuume entuumu ng'ez'eŋŋaano. Muzikirize ensi eyo. Temubaako kintu na kimu kye mulekawo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Mutte abaserikale baayo bonna, mubatirimbule. Zibasanze abo! Ekiseera kituuse babonerezebwe.”" 
Jeremiah50:28 Abadduse ne bawona e Babilooni, ba kutuuka mu Siyooni balombojje nga Mukama Katonda waffe, bwe yawoolera eggwanga olw'ebyo ebyakolebwa ku Ssinzizo lye." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Mukuŋŋaanye bonna abakugu mu kulasa obusaale, balumbe Babilooni. Bakyetooloole, era tebaleka muntu n'omu kudduka. Mwesasuze byonna bye kyakola, kubanga kyanneekulumbalizaako, Nze Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Abavubuka baakyo kyebaliva battirwa mu nguudo zaakyo, n'abaserikale baakyo ne battibwa ku lunaku olwo. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ggwe Babilooni, weekulumbaza. Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, kyenva nkulwanyisa. Ekiseera kituuse nkubonereze." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ggwe eyeekulumbaza, olyesittala n'ogwa, ne watabaawo akuyimusa. Ebibuga byo ndibikoleezaako omuliro, guzikirize ebintu byonna ebyetooloddewo.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, agamba nti: “Abantu ba Yisirayeli n'aba Buyudaaya banyigirizibwa. Bonna abaabanyaga babakuuma butiribiri, tebakkiriza kubata kugenda." 
Jeremiah50:34 Naye alibanunula, wa maanyi. Erinnya lye ye Mukama, Nnannyinimagye. Ye yennyini alibalwanirira, n'aleeta emirembe ku nsi, kyokka alyeraliikiriza ab'e Babilooni.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Mukama agamba nti: “Abakaludaaya bafe, n'abatuuze b'e Babilooni, n'abakungu n'abagezi baamu." 
Jeremiah50:36 Abalanzi baakyo ab'obulimba basiruwale, bafe, n'abaserikale battibwe bazikirire!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Muzikirize embalaasi zaakyo, n'amagaali gaakyo. Abaserikale baakyo abapangise, batye ng'abakazi, bafe! Mulumbe ebintu byamu ebyobugagga mubinyage." 
Jeremiah50:38 Ekyeya kyake kikalize amazzi gaamu, kubanga abaamu basinza ebitaliimu nsa, era bibalalusizza!" 
Jeremiah50:39 Babilooni kyanaavanga abeeramu emmondo, n'empisi, n'ebiwuugulu. Tekiriddamu kubeeramu bantu mu biseera byonna ebijja." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ndizikiriza Babilooni nga bwe nazikiriza Sodoma ne Gomora n'ebibuga ebiriraanyeewo. Tekiriddayo kubeerangamu muntu n'omu. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Abantu baliva mu ggwanga ery'amaanyi ery'omu bukiikakkono, ne bakabaka bangi baliva mu nsi ez'ewala," 
Jeremiah50:42 nga bakutte emitego gy'obusaale era n'amafumu. Bakambwe, tebaliiko kisa. Omusinde gwabwe guwuuma ng'ennyanja. Bajja beebagadde embalaasi, nga beetegekedde okulwanyisa Babilooni." 
Jeremiah50:43 “Kabaka wa Babilooni amawulire gamutuuse, emikono gye ne giragaya! Obubalagaze n'obulumi bimukutte ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ng'empologoma bw'efubutuka mu bisaka ebikwafu eby'oku Mugga Yorudaani, n'erumba amalundiro amalungi, nange, Nze Mukama, bwe ndijja ne ngoba amangwago Abakaludaaya mu kibuga kyabwe. Omufuzi gwe ndironda, ye alifuga eggwanga. Ani ayinza okunneegeranyaako? Oba ani aguma okunnwanyisa?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Kale muwulire kye nteesezza okukola ku Babilooni, ne ku bantu baakyo n'abaana baabwe abato: nabo balirumwa, buli omu ne yeesisiwala." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babilooni bwe kirigwa, ensi yonna erikankana olw'okwedomola kwakyo! N'emiranga gye balikitemera giriwulirwa wonna.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndisindika e Babilooni, ne mu Bakaludaaya embuyaga ezikiriza."
