Jeremiah51:2 Ndisindika bannamawanga e Babilooni ne bakizikiriza, nga kibuyaga akuŋŋunsa ebisusunku. Olunaku olwo olw'akabi bwe lulituuka, balirumba okuva ku buli ludda, eggwanga ne balimalamu ebintu byonna." 
Jeremiah51:3 Temuganya baserikale baalyo kulasa busaale bwabwe, wadde okwambala ebizibawo byabwe eby'ekyuma. Temutaliza bavubuka baalyo. Musaanyeewo eggye lyalyo lyonna." 
Jeremiah51:4 Balifumitibwa ebiwundu ne bafiira mu nguudo z'ebibuga byabwe," 
Jeremiah51:5 kubanga Nze Mukama, Katonda, Nnannyinimagye, ssaabulidde bantu ba Yisirayeli na ba Buyudaaya, newaakubadde nga bazza omusango gye ndi, Nze Omutuukirivu wa Yisirayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Mudduke muve mu Babilooni, buli omu awonye obulamu bwe, muleme okuzikirizibwa olw'ekibi kya Babilooni, kubanga kye kiseera mpoolere eggwanga, era mbonereze ekibuga ekyo nga bwe kisaanira." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilooni kyali ng'ekikopo ekya zaabu mu ngalo zange, ekyatamiizanga ensi yonna. Amawanga gaanywa ku mwenge gwakyo ne galaluka." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babilooni kigudde mangwago, era kizikiridde. Mukikungubagire. Mukifunire eddagala olw'obulumi bwakyo, oboolyawo kinaawona." 
Jeremiah51:9 Abagwira abakibeeramu baagamba nti: ‘Twandiwonyezza Babilooni, naye tekiwonye. Tukiveemu, buli omu addeyo mu nsi y'ewaabwe, kubanga Katonda abonerezza nnyo Babilooni, era akisaanyizzaawo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu bange baleekaana nti: ‘Mukama alaze nga ffe batuufu. Tugende tutegeeze ab'omu Yerusaalemu, Mukama Katonda waffe by'akoze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:11 Mukama akumye omuliro mu bakabaka b'e Mediya, kubanga ayagala okuzikiriza Babilooni. Bw'atyo Mukama bw'anaawoolera eggwanga olw'okuzikirizibwa kw'Essinzizo lye. Abaduumizi b'eggye eddunuzi balagira nti: “Muwagale obusaale bwammwe! Mukwate engabo zammwe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Muwanike bbendera okulumba ebisenge bya Babilooni. Mutegeke abanaateega!” Mukama atuukirizza bye yagamba okukola ku bantu b'omu Babilooni. 
Jeremiah51:13 Ggwe ensi erina emigga emingi, n'ebyobugagga ebingi ennyo, enkomerero yo etuuse, akawuzi k'obulamu bwo kakutuddwa." 
Jeremiah51:14 Mukama Nnannyinimagye alayidde obulamu bwe bwennyini nti alireeta abasajja abangi ng'enzige, okulumba Babilooni, era balikuba olwogoolo nga bawangudde." 
Jeremiah51:15 Mukama ye w'obuyinza eyatonda ensi. Ye w'amagezi n'okutegeera eyanyweza byonna, era eyabamba eggulu." 
Jeremiah51:16 Bw'awa ekiragiro kye, amazzi agali mu bbanga gawuluguma. Akuŋŋaanya ebire okuva mu nsonda zonna ez'ensi. Aleeta okumyansa mu nkuba ng'etonnya. Era aggya embuyaga mu mawanika ge." 
Jeremiah51:17 Abantu bonna basirusiru, tebaliiko kye bamanyi. Abakola ebifaananyi ebisinzibwa bibakwasa ensonyi, kubanga bye bakola temuli nsa, era tebirina bulamu." 
Jeremiah51:18 Tebirina mugaso, bya bulimba bwereere. Ekiseera kyabyo eky'okubonerezebwa bwe kirituuka, birizikirizibwa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Katonda wa Yakobo tafaanana ng'ebyo, kubanga ye, ye yakola buli kintu. Era yalonda Abayisirayeli okuba abantu be. Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, lye linnya lye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Mukama agamba nti: “Babilooni, ggwe nnyondo yange, ggwe byokulwanyisa byange. Nakukozesa okubetenta amawanga n'obwakabaka," 
Jeremiah51:21 okumenyaamenya embalaasi n'abeebagazi baazo, okumenyaamenya amagaali n'abagatambuliramu." 
Jeremiah51:22 Nakozesa ggwe okutta abasajja n'abakazi, n'abakadde n'abavubuka, era n'abalenzi n'abawala." 
Jeremiah51:23 Nakozesa ggwe okusaanyaawo abasumba n'amagana gaabwe, okutta abalimi n'emigogo gyabwe egy'ente, n'okubetenta abafuzi n'abaduumizi b'eggye.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 Mukama agamba nti: “Muliraba bwe nsasula Babilooni n'Abakaludaaya bonna, olw'ebibi byonna bye baakola mu Siyooni." 
Jeremiah51:25 Ggwe Babilooni, oli ng'olusozi oluzikiriza ensi yonna. Naye Nze Mukama ndikulwanyisa. Ndikukwatako engalo, ne nkumulungula, ne nkufuula vvu." 
Jeremiah51:26 Tebalikuggyako jjinja kulizimbisa. Onoobanga matongo ga lubeerera. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Muwanike bbendera mu nsi, mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu mawanga, mutegeke amawanga okulwanyisa Babilooni. Muyite obwakabaka bw'e Ararati, obw'e Minni, n'obw'e Asukenaazi okukirumba. Mulonde omugabe anaaduumira. Muleete embalaasi ennyingi ng'ebibinja by'enzige." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mutegeke amawanga okulwanyisa Babilooni. Mutumye bakabaka b'Abameedi, wamu n'abakulembeze n'abakungu ababaddirira, n'amagye g'ensi zonna ze bafuga." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ensi ekankana n'ejjula obulumi, kubanga Mukama ajja kutuukiriza kye yamalirira, okufuula Babilooni amatongo omutabeera muntu n'omu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abaserikale ba Babilooni baleseeyo okulwana, basigadde mu bigo byabwe ebigumu. Amaanyi gabaweddemu, bafuuse ng'abakazi. Enzigi z'ekibuga zimenyeddwa, ennyumba zaakyo zikoleezeddwako omuliro." 
Jeremiah51:31 Ababaka bajjira kumukumu okutegeeza kabaka wa Babilooni ng'ekibuga kye bwe kimenyeddwa enjuyi zonna. 
Jeremiah51:32 Abalabe bawambye entindo, era ebigo ebigumu babikumyeko omuliro. Abaserikale ba Babilooni batidde." 
Jeremiah51:33 Akaseera kasigadde katono omulabe alinnyirire ab'omu Babilooni ng'eŋŋaano mu gguuliro. Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya yasalaasala Yerusaalemu n'akirya. Yakikaliza n'akyasaayasa ng'ensumbi. Yafuuka ng'ogusota, n'akimira. Yatwala buli kye yeerobozaamu, ebyo by'atayagala n'asuula." 
Jeremiah51:35 Ab'omu Siyooni bagambe nti: “Obukambwe obwatukolwako, ka buddire Babilooni!” Ab'omu Yerusaalemu bagambe nti: “Omusaayi gw'abantu baffe ogwayiika, guddire Abakaludaaya.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Mukama kyeyava agamba abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu nti: “Nja kubalwanirira, era ndiwoolera eggwanga ku lwammwe. Ndikaliza ennyanja y'abalabe bammwe, era ndikaliza ensulo zaabwe ez'amazzi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babilooni kirifuuka ntuumu ya bisasiro, ekifo omubeera ebibe, ekitiisa, era ekyesisiwaza okulaba, era ekitabeeramu muntu n'omu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abakaludaaya baliwuluguma ng'empologoma enkulu, era balivuuma ng'empologoma ento." 
Jeremiah51:39 Nga bwe balina omululu, ndibafumbira embaga, ne mbatamiiza ne basanyuka. Balyebaka obutaddayo kuzuukuka." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndibatwala okuttibwa ng'abaana b'endiga, era ng'endiga n'embuzi eza sseddume. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 Mukama ayogera ku Babilooni nti: “Ekibuga ekitenderezebwa ensi yonna, kiwambiddwa. Babilooni nga kifuuse matongo mu mawanga!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Ennyanja ekuluggukidde ku Babilooni, amayengo gaayo agawuluguma, gakisaanikidde." 
Jeremiah51:43 Ebibuga byakyo bifuuse matongo, eddungu omutali mazzi, eritaliimu alibeeramu, wadde aliyitamu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndibonereza Beli, lubaale w'e Babilooni, ne mmuzzisaayo bye yabba. Amawanga galiba tegakyaddamu kumusinza. “Ebisenge bya Babilooni bigudde!" 
Jeremiah51:45 Abantu ba Yisirayeli, mudduke muveeyo, mwewonye obusungu bwange." 
Jeremiah51:46 Temuggwaamu maanyi era temutya olw'amawulire ge muwulira mu nsi, kubanga buli mwaka muliwulira amawulire ag'enjawulo, ag'obukambwe mu nsi, n'aga kabaka omu okulwanyisa omulala." 
Jeremiah51:47 Kale ekiseera kirituuka, ne nkola ku kusinza ebitaliimu nsa okuli mu Babilooniya. Ensi eyo yonna erikwatibwa ensonyi, n'abantu baamu balittibwa." 
Jeremiah51:48 Eggulu n'ensi na byonna ebibirimu biriyimba olw'essanyu nga Babilooni kizikiriziddwa abantu abaliva mu bukiikakkono. 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilooni kyatta abantu mu nsi yonna. Kale kaakano Babilooni kya kuzikirizibwa olw'okutta Abayisirayeli abangi. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 Mukama agamba abantu be abali mu Babilooniya nti: “Muwonye okuttibwa. Kaakano mugende, temulinda. Newaakubadde nga muli wala n'ewammwe, naye mujjukire Nze, Mukama, era mulowooze ku Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Mugamba nti: ‘Twavumibwa ne tuswazibwa. Tukwatiddwa ensonyi kubanga bannamawanga baayingira mu bifo ebitukuvu mu Ssinzizo.’ 
Jeremiah51:52 Kale nno, Nze ŋŋamba nti ekiseera kirituuka, ne nkola ku kusinza ebitaliimu nsa okuli mu Babilooni, era mu nsi eyo abaliko ebiwundu, balisinda." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babilooni ne bw'alirinnya okutuuka ku ggulu, ne yeezimbira eyo ebigo ebigumu, era ndisindikayo abantu okukizikiriza. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Mukama agamba nti: “Muwulire ebiwoobe mu Babilooni n'emiranga egy'okuzikirira mu nsi y'Abakaludaaya," 
Jeremiah51:55 kubanga nzikiriza Babilooni era nkisirisiza ddala. Amagye gakiyiikamu ng'amayengo agawuluguma, ne gakirumba nga galeekaana." 
Jeremiah51:56 Omulabe azze okuzikiriza Babilooni. Abaserikale baamu bawambiddwa, n'emitego gyabwe egy'obusaale gimenyeddwa, kubanga Nze Mukama, ndi Katonda aweera empeera. Ndisasula Babilooni nga bwe kisaanira." 
Jeremiah51:57 Nditamiiza abakungu baamu, n'abagezi baamu n'abafuzi, n'abaduumizi b'eggye n'abaserikale. Balyebaka otulo otw'olubeerera, era tebalizuukuka. Nze Kabaka, Mukama, Nnannyinimagye Nze njogedde.”" 
Jeremiah51:58 Nze Mukama, Nnannyinimagye, ŋŋamba nti: “Ebisenge bya Babilooni ebigumu, birisuulibwa wansi, n'emiryango gyakyo emiwanvu giryokebwa omuliro. Abantu bateganira bwereere, n'amawanga bye gakola, bya kwokebwa omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Omuweereza eyabeeranga ku lusegere lwa Kabaka Zeddeekiya, yali Seraya mutabani wa Neriya era muzzukulu wa Maasaya. Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, Seraya bwe yali ng'agenda e Babilooniya wamu ne Zeddeekiya, ne mbaako bye mmulagira." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ne mpandiika mu kitabo, ebifa ku kabi konna ak'okutuuka ku Babilooniya, era ne bino ebirala byonna ebifa ku Babilooniya." 
Jeremiah51:61 Ne ŋŋamba Seraya nti: “Bw'olituuka mu Babilooni, osomeranga abantu mu lwatu ebigambo bino byonna," 
Jeremiah51:62 n'olyoka ogamba nti: ‘Ayi Mukama, wagamba nti olizikiriza ekifo kino, ne kitasigalamu kiramu na kimu, k'abe omuntu wadde ensolo, naye kibe matongo ennaku zonna.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Bw'olimala okusoma ekitabo kino, n'olyoka okisibako ejjinja, n'okisuula mu Mugga Ewufuraate wakati." 
Jeremiah51:64 N'oyogera nti: ‘Babilooni bwe kirikka bwe kityo, era tekiriddayo kubbulukuka, olw'okuzikirira Mukama kw'alikituusaako.’ ” Ebigambo bya Yeremiya wano we bikoma." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zeddeekiya yali wa myaka amakumi abiri mu gumu we yafuukira kabaka wa Buyudaaya, n'afugira emyaka kkumi na gumu mu Yerusaalemu. Nnyina yali Amutali, muwala wa Yeremiya ow'e Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Zeddeekiya yakola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, nga Yehoyakiimu bye yali akoze." 
Jeremiah52:3 Mukama n'asunguwalira nnyo ab'omu Yerusaalemu, n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, era n'abagoba mu maaso ge. Zeddeekiya n'ajeemera Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya." 
Jeremiah52:4 N'olwekyo ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi, mu mwaka ogw'omwenda nga Zeddeekiya ye kabaka, Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya n'ajja n'eggye lye lyonna okulumba Yerusaalemu. N'asiisira ebweru waakyo, n'akizimbako ebigo okukyetooloola," 
Jeremiah52:5 n'akizingiza okutuuka mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu ogw'obwa kabaka bwa Zeddeekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ku lunaku olw'omwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna, mu mwaka ogwo, enjala n'eba nnyingi nnyo mu kibuga, ng'abantu tebakyalina ke balya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Ne bakuba ekituli mu kisenge ky'ekibuga. Newaakubadde ng'Abakaludaaya baali bazingizizza ekibuga, abaserikale bonna ne badduka ne bafuluma ekibuga ekiro, nga bayita mu kkubo ery'omu nnimiro ya kabaka, ne bafulumira mu mulyango ogugatta ebisenge ebibiri, ne boolekera Ekiwonvu kya Yorudaani." 
Jeremiah52:8 Naye eggye ly'Abakaludaaya ne liwondera Kabaka Zeddeekiya, ne limukwatira mu nsenyi ez'e Yeriko, eggye lye lyonna ne limwabulira, ne lisaasaana." 
Jeremiah52:9 Awo ne bakwata Zeddeekiya, ne bamutwala eri Kabaka Nebukadunezzari e Ribula mu kitundu ky'e Hamati, n'amusalira omusango." 
Jeremiah52:10 Nebukadunezzari n'atta batabani ba Zeddeekiya, nga Zeddeekiya yennyini alaba, era n'attira awo e Ribula abakungu ba Buyudaaya bonna." 
Jeremiah52:11 N'atungulamu Zeddeekiya amaaso, n'amusiba mu njegere, n'amutwala e Babilooni. Zeddeekiya n'asigala mu kkomera okutuusiza ddala ku lunaku lwe yafiirako." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi, olw'omwezi ogwokutaano, mu mwaka ogw'omwenda nga Nebukadunezzari ye kabaka wa Babilooniya, Nebuzaradaani omukungu we, era omuduumizi w'eggye lye, n'ayingira mu Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 N'ayokya Essinzizo, n'olubiri lwa kabaka, n'ennyumba zonna ez'omu Yerusaalemu. Buli nnyumba ennene yagyokya omuliro." 
Jeremiah52:14 Eggye lyonna eryali naye, ne limenya ekisenge kyonna, ekyetoolodde Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Awo Nebuzaradaani n'atwala e Babilooni abamu ku bantu abaavu, abali basigadde mu kibuga, n'abo abaali bamaze okwewaayo mu Bakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah52:16 Abamu ku baavu ennyo, abataalina kantu, n'abaleka mu Buyudaaya, okulabiriranga emizabbibu, n'okulimanga." 
Jeremiah52:17 Abakaludaaya ne bamenyaamenya empagi ez'ekikomo, ezaali mu Ssinzizo, n'ebikondo, era n'ettanka y'amazzi ennene, ebyalimu, ne batwala e Babilooni, ekikomo kyabyo kyonna." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ne batwala n'entamu, n'ebitiiyo ebiyoola evvu, n'ebijiiko, n'ebibya omwanyookerezebwanga obubaane, n'ebintu ebirala byonna eby'ekikomo, ebyakozesebwanga okuweereza mu Ssinzizo." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ne batwala n'ebintu byonna ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza, ebibya ebitono, n'ensaniya okuyoolerwa amanda, ebbenseni n'entamu, n'ebikondo by'ettaala, n'ebibya by'obubaane, n'ebikopo." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ebintu eby'ekikomo, Kabaka Solomooni bye yakolera Essinzizo: empagi ebbiri, entebe, tanka y'amazzi ennene, n'ente ennume ekkumi n'ebbiri ezigiwanirira, byali bizito nnyo okupima." 
Jeremiah52:21 Empagi zombi zaali zenkana, nga buli emu ya mita munaana obuwanvu, ne mita ttaano n'obutundu busatu okugyetooloola. Zaalimu omutuli, ng'omubiri gwazo gwa milimita nsanvu mu ttaano. Ku ntikko ya buli mpagi kwaliko omutwe ogw'ekikomo, obuwanvu bwagwo mita bbiri n'obutundu bubiri, nga gutimbiddwa n'amakomamawanga okugwetoolooza, era nga byonna bya kikomo." 
Jeremiah52:22  
Jeremiah52:23 Era mu mbiriizi za buli mpagi, kwaliko amakomamawanga kyenda mu mukaaga. Amakomamawanga gonna gaali kikumi agatimbye buli mpagi okugyetoolooza." 
Jeremiah52:24 Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye, era yatwala ne Seraya Ssaabakabona, ne Zefaniya, kabona addirira mu bukulu, n'abaggazi abakulu abasatu." 
Jeremiah52:25 N'aggya mu kibuga omukungu eyali aduumira abaserikale, n'abasajja musanvu abaawanga kabaka amagezi, abaali bakyali mu kibuga, n'oyo addirira omuduumizi w'eggye, eyawandiikanga abantu mu ggye, n'abakungu abalala nkaaga." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradaani n'abatwala eri kabaka wa Babilooni eyali e Ribula," 
Jeremiah52:27 mu kitundu ky'e Hamati. Kabaka wa Babilooniya n'abakuba n'abattira eyo. Bwe batyo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ne baggyibwa mu nsi yaabwe, ne batwalibwa mu busibe." 
Jeremiah52:28 Bano be bantu Nebukadunezzari be yatwala mu busibe: mu mwaka gwe ogw'omusanvu nga ye kabaka, yatwala Abayudaaya enkumi ssatu mu amakumi abiri mu basatu." 
Jeremiah52:29 Mu mwaka gwe ogw'ekkumi n'omunaana yatwala abasibe lunaana mu amakumi asatu mu babiri, ng'abaggya mu Yerusaalemu." 
Jeremiah52:30 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri mu esatu ogw'obufuzi bwa Nebukadunezzari, Nebuzaradaani omuduumizi w'eggye yatwala abasibe lusanvu mu amakumi ana mu bataano. Abantu bonna abaatwalibwa baawera enkumi nnya mu lukaaga." 
Jeremiah52:31 Mu mwaka ogwo Evilumerodaaki gwe yafuukiramu kabaka, n'akwatirwa ekisa Kabaka Yehoyakiini owa Buyudaaya, n'amuggya mu kkomera. Lwali lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ettaano olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri, nga Yehoyakiini atwaliddwa mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Jeremiah52:32 Evilumerodaaki n'alaga Yehoyakiini ekisa, era n'amuwa ekifo ekyekitiibwa okusinga ekya bakabaka abalala, abaali naye e Babilooni mu busibe." 
Jeremiah52:33 Bw'atyo Yehoyakiini n'akkirizibwa okuggyamu ebyambalo bye eby'obusibe, n'aliiranga ku lujjuliro lwa kabaka ennaku zonna ez'obulamu bwe." 
Jeremiah52:34 Ebbanga lyonna lye yamala nga mulamu, yaweebwanga omugabo gw'ebintu bye yeetaaga buli lunaku." 
Lamentations1:1 Ekibuga ekyali kikubyeko abantu, nga kirekeddwawo awo ttayo! Ekyali Nnaabakyala mu mawanga, kifuuse nga nnamwandu! Ekyali ekimbejja mu bibuga, kati kye kiwa omusolo!" 
Lamentations1:2 Mu kiro, kikaaba amaziga, ne gakibuna amatama! Mu baganzi baakyo ab'edda tewali akikubagiza. Abeetabanga nakyo, bakiriddemu olukwe kaakati balabe baakyo!" 
Lamentations1:3 Ab'omu Buyudaaya batwaliddwa mu busibe. Bafuuliddwa abaddu, tebakyalina waabwe. Beetooloddwa abalabe, awatali buddukiro." 
Lamentations1:4 Enguudo ezituuka mu Siyooni kaakano zikungubaga: abaziyitamu tewali okwambuka okusinza Katonda. Emiryango gyakyo myereere. Abawala abaakiyimbirangamu, kati bakulukusa maziga. Bakabona bali mu kusinda!" 
Lamentations1:5 Abalabe baakyo bawangudde, kiri mu mikono gyabwe, kubanga Mukama akibonerezza olw'ebibi byakyo ebingi. Abaana baakyo bawambiddwa, ne batwalibwa omulabe." 
Lamentations1:6 Ekyali ekitiibwa kya Siyooni, kati kifumwa bufumwa. Abakungu baakyo bali ng'ennangaazi ezitakyalina muddo, era eziweddemu amaanyi nga zigobebwa abayizzi." 
Lamentations1:7 Yerusaalemu ajjuukirira mu nnaku ye ne mu buyinike bwe obungi ekitiibwa kye eky'edda. Bwe yalumbibwa abalabe ne wataba bamudduukirira, abalabe be beesekera, ne bamukudaalira ng'agudde." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusaalemu yayonoona nnyo, afuuse atali mulongoofu. Abaamussangamu ekitiibwa, bonna bamunyoomoola nga balaba ali bwereere. Naye yennyini alinda, ne yeebwalabwala ng'aswadde." 
Lamentations1:9 Obwonoonefu bwe bwalabika, kyokka n'atafaayonako ku kabi akaliddirira. Ekyo ne kimusuula wala, nga takyakubagizika. Abalabe bamuwangudde, olwo kwe kuwanjagako nti: “Zinsanze! Ayi Mukama nnyamba!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Abalabe beenyagidde ebyobugagga bye byonna. Alabye nga bayimiridde mu Ssinzizo lyennyini, Mukama lye yagaanamu bannamawanga." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu be bonna basinda nga banoonya ebyokulya. Bawaayo obugagga bwabwe, bafuneyo akamere kwe banaakuumira obulamu. Ekibuga kikaaba nti: “Ayi Mukama, tunulako gye ndi! Laba sikyaliko bwe ndi!”" 
Lamentations1:12 Era ne kigamba nti: “Abange, temufaayo mmwe, abayitawo mwenna? Eriyo alina obulumi obwenkana buno obwange, Mukama bwe yantuusaako, ng'ansunguwalidde?" 
Lamentations1:13 “Yaweereza omuliro okuva waggulu n'agusindika mu magumba gange. Yantega ekitimba n'ankuba wansi, n'anjabulira nga ndi mu bulumi!" 
Lamentations1:14 “Yekkaanya ebibi byange byonna, n'abisiba ng'ekikoligo n'akinsiba mu bulago. Obuzito bwakyo bummazeemu amaanyi. Mukama yampaayo mu balabe, be siyinza kulwanyisa n'akatono." 
Lamentations1:15 “Mukama asekeredde abaserikale be nnina abasingira ddala amaanyi. Ansindikidde eggye okuzikiriza abavubuka bange. Asambiridde abantu bange, ng'emizabbibu mu ssogolero." 
Lamentations1:16 “Kyenva nkaaba olw'ebyo ne nkulukusa amaziga. Tewali ayinza kunkubagiza, wadde anzizaamu amaanyi. Abalabe bampangudde, abantu bange basigalidde awo." 
Lamentations1:17 “Nkanda kuwanika mikono, naye tewali ampa buyambi. Mukama alagidde baliraanwa bange bafuuke abalabe bange. Bambalira mu batali balongoofu." 
Lamentations1:18 “Naye Mukama mwenkanya, kubanga nze najeemera ebiragiro bye. Muwulire mmwe amawanga gonna, mutunuulire obuyinike bwange. Batabani bange ne bawala bange batwaliddwa nga basibe." 
Lamentations1:19 “Nayita mikwano gyange naye ne batannyamba. Bakabona n'abakulembeze bange baafiira mu nguudo z'ekibuga, nga bagenda beenoonyeza akamere kwe banaakuumira obulamu." 
Lamentations1:20 “Laba, ayi Mukama, obuyinike bwange, era nneeraliikirira nnyo. Omutima gwange gumenyese, nga nneenenya olw'ebibi byange. Obutemu bwe buli mu nguudo, n'okufa kwe kuli mu nnyumba." 
Lamentations1:21 “Bawulidde bwe nsinda ne wataba ankubagiza. Abalabe bange basanyuse olw'akabi k'ontuusizzaako. Tuusa olunaku lwe walangirira, nabo baboneebone nga nze." 
Lamentations1:22 “Basingise omusango olw'ebibi byabwe, obabonereze nga bw'obonerezza nze olw'ebibi byange. Nsinda olw'obuyinike, omutima gunnyongobedde.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Mukama mu busungu bwe abisse ekire ku Siyooni. Obulungi bwa Yisirayeli obwawaggulu Mukama abusudde wansi. Ku lunaku olw'obusungu bwe, tafudde wadde ku Ssinzizo lye." 
Lamentations2:2 Mukama azikirizza awatali kisa ebyalo by'omu Buyudaaya byonna. Mu busungu bwe obungi, amenyeewo ebigo ebigumu ebikuuma ab'omu Buyudaaya. Aswazizza obwakabaka obwo n'abakungu baamu." 
Lamentations2:3 Amazeewo amaanyi ga Yisirayeli, ng'aliko ekiruyi. Yagaana okutukwatirako nga tuzindiddwa abalabe. Yatusunguwalira ng'omuliro ogwaka ennyo ne gwokya buli kimu." 
Lamentations2:4 Yatuleegamu obusaale bwe ng'omulabe. Bonna abaatusanyusanga yabatta. Wano mu Yerusaalemu tuwulidde obukambwe bw'obusungu bwe! 
Lamentations2:5 Mukama yeefudde ng'omulabe n'azikiriza Yisirayeli. Embiri n'ebigo ebigumu ebyo alese nga matongo. Atuusizza ku b'omu Buyudaaya obulumi obutalojjeka! 
Lamentations2:6 Amenyeewo Essinzizo mwe twamusinzizanga. Akomezza ennaku enkulu ne Sabbaato, asunguwalidde kabaka ne bakabona." 
Lamentations2:7 Mukama yesammudde alutaari ye era atamiddwa ekifo kye ekitukuvu. Abalabe abakkirizza okumenya ebisenge by'ennyumba zaamu. Bawangudde ne baleekaanira mwe twasinzizanga nga tusanyuka. 
Lamentations2:8 Mukama yamalirira okuzikiriza ebisenge bya Siyooni. Yapima nga bwe binaamenyebwa, n'atayimiriza ba kubizikiriza. Eminaala n'ebisenge bigudde wamu mu matongo." 
Lamentations2:9 Emiryango gyakyo gibulidde mu ttaka. Ebisiba byagyo bimenyeddwa. Kabaka waakyo n'abakungu be bali mu busibe. Amateeka tegakyayigirizibwa. Abalanzi baakyo Mukama takyaliko ky'abalaga. 
Lamentations2:10 Abantu abakulu mu Yerusaalemu batuula ku ttaka nga basirise, nga beesiize enfuufu ku mitwe era nga beesibye ebikutiya. Abawala abato bakoteka mitwe." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaaso gange galiko ekifu olw'okukaaba amaziga. Omutima gwange munakuwavu, olw'okuzikirira kw'abantu bange. Abaana abato n'abayonka bazirikira mu nguudo z'ekibuga." 
Lamentations2:12 Bakaabirira bannyaabwe nga balumwa enjala n'ennyonta. Bazirikira mu nguudo z'ekibuga ng'abafumitiddwa ebiwundu, olwo ne batondokera mu mikono gya bannyaabwe." 
Lamentations2:13 Leero ŋŋambe ntya, ggwe Yerusaalemu! Nnaakukubagiza ntya? Nkugeraageranye ku ani? Ani yali abonyeebonye nga ggwe? Obuyinike bwo tebukoma, buli nga nnyanja! Essuubi lyo linaava wa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abalanzi bo baakulimbalimbanga ne batakulaganga bibi byo. Ne bakulowoozesanga nti teweetaaga kwenenya. 
Lamentations2:15 Bonna abayitawo bakusunga. Banyeenya emitwe gyabwe ne basekerera Yerusaalemu nti: “Kino kye kibuga nno kye baayitanga ekirungi ennyo, ekitenderezebwa ensi yonna?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Abalabe bo bonna bakwogezaako bukyayi. Beesooza ne baluma obujiji, ne bagamba nti: “Tukizikirizza! Luno lwe lunaku lwe twalindiriranga!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Mukama akoze kye yateesa, atuzikirizza awatali kisa nga bwe yatulabula edda. Awadde abalabe baffe okutweyagalirako, ng'abatuusa ku buwanguzi." 
Lamentations2:18 Ayi Yerusaalemu ebisenge byo byennyini bikaabirire Mukama! Amaziga go gakulukute ng'emigga ekiro n'emisana! Towummula n'akatono, wadde okusumagirako." 
Lamentations2:19 Zuukuka emirundi mingi mu kiro kyonna, weegayirire Mukama. Fukumula ebikuli ku mutima, osabire abaana bo abato obulamu abakufiirako enjala buli w'oyita mu nguudo." 
Lamentations2:20 Tunula olabe ayi Mukama, abo b'obonereza bw'otyo. Ddala abakazi abazadde balye abaana baabwe be balera? Era bakabona n'abalanzi battirwe mu Ssinzizo mwennyini?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abavubuka n'abakadde balambaalidde mu nguudo. Abalenzi era n'abawala battiddwa mu lutalo. Obasse n'otosaasirako ku lunaku lw'obusungu bwo. 
Lamentations2:22 Oyise abalabe bange okuva ku njuyi zonna bajje beekole ekigenyi! Tewali yawonawo wadde eyasigalawo ku lunaku lw'obusungu bwo. Batta abaana bange be nalera nga mbaagala nnyo! 
Lamentations3:1 Ndi muntu eyabonaabona olw'okubonerezebwa Mukama. 
Lamentations3:2 Yantambuliza mu kizikiza, omutali katangaala." 
Lamentations3:3 Tata kumbonereza olunaku lwonna. 
Lamentations3:4 Ankaddiyizza omubiri n'olususu, ammenyeemenye amagumba." 
Lamentations3:5 Ansibidde mu kkomera, omuli obuyinike n'obulumi." 
Lamentations3:6 Antadde mu kizikiza ng'abo abaafa edda. 
Lamentations3:7 Antaddeko olukomera sirina bwe ntoloka. Ansibye ku lujegere olunene. 
Lamentations3:8 Ne bwe neekubira ku nduulu okumusaba annyambe, bye nsaba abiziimuula." 
Lamentations3:9 Akomedde amakubo gange ng'agazimbamu ebisenge eby'amayinja amaase. 
Lamentations3:10 Anfuukidde eddubu eteega, anfubutukidde ng'empologoma." 
Lamentations3:11 Angobye n'ankwatira ku mabbali g'ekkubo. Antaaguddetaagudde n'andeka awo! 
Lamentations3:12 Anaanudde omutego gwe n'andeegamu akasaale ke. 
Lamentations3:13 Afumise obusaale bwe mu mubiri gwange. 
Lamentations3:14 Abantu bonna bansekerera, era bannyimba olunaku lwonna." 
Lamentations3:15 Anzikusizza obubalagaze, annyiyizza ebikaawa." 
Lamentations3:16 Ammekesezza oluyinjayinja, anjiye evvu mu maaso." 
Lamentations3:17 Mbuliddwako emirembe, neerabidde essanyu bwe lifaanana." 
Lamentations3:18 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Nzigweddemu amaanyi, n'essuubi mu Mukama libuze!" 
Lamentations3:19 “Okulowooza ku bulumi ne ku kubungeeta, binkaayirira ng'omususa." 
Lamentations3:20 Era mbirowoozaako lunye ne sirema kwennyamira. 
Lamentations3:21 Naye ate nziramu essuubi, bwe nzijukira kino nti" 
Lamentations3:22 olw'okusaasirwa Mukama tetusaanyizibwawo, kubanga ekisa kye tekiggwaawo." 
Lamentations3:23 Kibeera kiggya buli nkya. Kigumu nnyo kyesigika. 
Lamentations3:24 Mukama bwe bugagga bwange Kyenva nsuubira mu ye. 
Lamentations3:25 “Mukama mulungi eri buli amwesiga. 
Lamentations3:26 Kirungi omuntu agumiikirizenga asuubire era alindirire Mukama okumulokola. 
Lamentations3:27 Era kirungi omuntu okuva obuto ng'ayize obugumiikiriza. 
Lamentations3:28 “Omuntu ng'abonaabona kirungi atuuleko yekka asirike," 
Lamentations3:29 agonde yeetoowaze, wandiba nga wakyaliwo essuubi." 
Lamentations3:30 Ne bw'avumwa n'akubibwa, abigumira byonna." 
Lamentations3:31 “Mukama ajjudde ekisa tatusuulirira lubeerera. 
Lamentations3:32 Newaakubadde atuleetera okunakuwala naye atukwatirwa ekisa, kubanga okwagala kwe kungi." 
Lamentations3:33 Ky'agenderera si kulumya na kubonyaabonya bantu. 
Lamentations3:34 “Okulinnyirira abasibe mu makomera gonna," 
Lamentations3:35 abantu okummibwa ebyabwe ebyabaweebwa Omutonzi," 
Lamentations3:36 n'okusaliriza mu misango, ebyo Mukama tabisiima." 
Lamentations3:37 “Ani aliko ky'atuukiriza Mukama nga takkirizza? 
Lamentations3:38 Ka kibe kirungi oba kibi, Lugaba amala kukkiriza." 
Lamentations3:39 Omuntu akyali omulamu, yeemulugunyiza ki bw'abonerezebwa olw'ebibi bye?" 
Lamentations3:40 “Twekebere tulabe empisa zaffe, tukyuke tudde eri Mukama." 
Lamentations3:41 Tuyimuse emitima n'emikono gyaffe eri Katonda mu ggulu tugambe nti: 
Lamentations3:42 ‘Tukoze ebibi era tujeemye, era ggwe totusonyiye.’" 
Lamentations3:43 “Otusibidde obusungu n'otuyigganya, n'otutta nga tosaasira." 
Lamentations3:44 Weebisseeko ekire, okusaba kwaffe kuleme kukutuukako." 
Lamentations3:45 Otufudde ntuumu ya busa na bisasiro mu bantu bonna ku nsi. 
Lamentations3:46 “Tunyoomebwa ne tuvumibwa abalabe baffe bonna. 
Lamentations3:47 Entiisa n'okunyagibwa bitutuuseeko tuli mu kabi ka kuzikirira. 
Lamentations3:48 Amaaso gange gakulukusa emigga gy'amaziga olw'okuzikirizibwa kw'abantu bange. 
Lamentations3:49 “Amaziga gange ganaakulukuta mu ngezi etakalira," 
Lamentations3:50 okutuusa Mukama mu ggulu lw'anaatunulako wansi n'atulaba. 
Lamentations3:51 Omutima gwange gwennyamira olw'ebyo ebituuse ku bantu ab'omu kibuga kyaffe. 
Lamentations3:52 “Abalabe bange banjizze ng'abayigga ekinyonyi, awatali kye bannanga." 
Lamentations3:53 Bankutte ndi mulamu, ne bansuula mu bunnya, ne basaanikirako ejjinja." 
Lamentations3:54 Amazzi gaakulukuta, nga gayita ku mutwe gwange ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Nfudde biwedde!’" 
Lamentations3:55 “Nakukoowoola, ayi Mukama, nga nsinziira ku ntobo y'obunnya." 
Lamentations3:56 Nasaba owulire bwe nkaaba, era n'owulira." 
Lamentations3:57 Wanziramu n'oŋŋamba nti: ‘Totya!’ 
Lamentations3:58 “Wanziruukirira, ayi Mukama, n'owonya obulamu bwange." 
Lamentations3:59 Nsalira omusango nsinge, olabye okujoogebwa kwange." 
Lamentations3:60 Olabye bwe bampalana, n'enkwe zonna ze bansalira." 
Lamentations3:61 “Owulidde bwe banvuma, ayi Mukama, n'enkwe zonna ze bansalira." 
Lamentations3:62 Banjogerako olunaku lwonna, ne banteesaako." 
Lamentations3:63 Laba, bannyimba nga banjeeyereza buli we babeera." 
Lamentations3:64 “Ayi Mukama, babonereze, olw'ebyo bye bakoze." 
Lamentations3:65 Bakolimire, obakakanyaze emitima." 
Lamentations3:66 Bayigganye, ayi Mukama, obasaanyeewo wansi w'eggulu lyo.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Zaabu waffe ng'afumye! Zaabu omulungi afuuse! Amayinja ag'Essinzizo gasaasaanyiziddwa mu nguudo. 
Lamentations4:2 Abavubuka b'omu Siyooni abaali ab'omuwendo nga zaabu bayisibwa nga ebisuwa eby'ebbumba. 
Lamentations4:3 Era n'emisege giyonsa abaana baagyo, naye abantu bange bali nga mmaaya akambuwalira abaana be." 
Lamentations4:4 Baleka abaana baabwe abawere okufa enjala n'ennyonta. Abaana abato basaba emmere, ne watabaawo agibawa." 
Lamentations4:5 Abantu abaalyanga emmere esingira ddala obulungi, bafiira enjala mu nguudo. Abaakuzibwa mu kwejalabya, kati beenoonyeza kye banaalya mu ntuumu z'ebisaaniiko!" 
Lamentations4:6 Abantu bange babonerezeddwa n'okusinga abantu b'e Sodoma, Mukama kye yasaanyaawo mu kaseera akatono." 
Lamentations4:7 Abakungu baffe baali batukula okusinga omuzira, nga beeru okusinga amata. Emibiri gyabwe gyali mimyufu okusinga amayinja amatwakaavu; era baali banyirivu nga kinya ekyakeeyubula." 
Lamentations4:8 Kati bagubye ku maaso okusinga n'ebisiriiza. Tewakyaliwo abamanya gye bagudde mu nguudo! Olususu lwabwe lwerangidde ku magumba, lukaze ng'oluku." 
Lamentations4:9 Abattirwa mu lutalo abo kalekaleko okusinga bano abakalambadde enjala, abatondose empolampola olw'okubulwa kye balya." 
Lamentations4:10 Akabi akatuuse ku bantu bange nga katiisa! Abakazi abazadde abajjudde okwagala okungi, bafumbye abaana baabwe ne babalya!" 
Lamentations4:11 Mukama asumuludde obusungu bwe obukambwe n'akoleeza omuliro ku Siyooni, ne gukyokya okuggwaawo!" 
Lamentations4:12 Teri n'omu yakkiriza wadde abafuzi mu mawanga, nti omulabe yandiyinzizza okuwaguza n'ayingira mu miryango gya Yerusaalemu!" 
Lamentations4:13 Naye ekyo kyasoboka olw'ebibi by'abalanzi ne bakabona baamu, abattiramu abantu abatalina musango." 
Lamentations4:14 Baabungeetera mu nguudo zaakyo nga bali nga bamuzibe, nga tebayinza kukwatikako, kubanga boonoonese olw'omusaayi." 
Lamentations4:15 Abantu ne babeegobako nti: “Muveewo, temutusemberera! Temutukoonanako, temuli balongoofu.” Ne babungeetera mu mawanga nga teri babaaniriza." 
Lamentations4:16 Mukama takyabaliko: yennyini yabasaasaanya. Bakabona n'abakulembeze tebakyassibwamu kitiibwa. 
Lamentations4:17 Twakanda kutunula ne tukoowa nga tulinda obuyambi obutajja. Twalindirira obuyambi bw'eggwanga eritayinza kutuwonya. 
Lamentations4:18 Omulabe yali atukuuma butiribiri nga tetuyinza kutambula mu nguudo zaffe. Obwaffe bwali bukomye, ng'enkomerero yaffe etuuse." 
Lamentations4:19 Abatuyigganya baasinga empungu mu kuwenyuka amangu; baatusimbako emisinde mu nsozi, era baatuteegera mu ddungu!" 
Lamentations4:20 Baakwasa mu bunnya bwabwe kabaka waffe era obulamu bwaffe, omusiige wa Mukama: oyo gwe twali twesiga okututaasa mu mawanga." 
Lamentations4:21 Musanyuke mujaguze mmwe Abeedomu n'ab'e Wuuzi! Naye akabi kalibajjira nammwe! Mulitagatta, mweyambule, muswale!" 
Lamentations4:22 Siyooni asasudde olw'ebibi bye, Mukama talituleka mu busibe. Naye mmwe Abeedomu Mukama alibabonereza! Alibikkula ebibi byammwe!" 
Lamentations5:1 Jjukira ayi Mukama, ebitutuuseeko, tunuulira olabe okuswala kwaffe." 
Lamentations5:2 Ebintu byaffe bitwaliddwa bannamawanga, ennyumba zaffe zirimu bagwira." 
Lamentations5:3 Bakitaffe battiddwa omulabe, bannyaffe bannamwandu kati." 
Lamentations5:4 Amazzi tusasulira ge tunywa, era tugula n'enku." 
Lamentations5:5 Tusibibwa nga mbuzi mu bulago, tukoowa ne tutafuna kiwummulo." 
Lamentations5:6 Okufuna ke tulya obutafa, tukasaba Bamisiri era n'Abassiriya." 
Lamentations5:7 Bajjajjaffe abaayonoona tebakyaliwo, naye tubonaabona olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Lamentations5:8 Tufugibwa baddu, nga tewali wa kutununula mu buyinza bwabwe." 
Lamentations5:9 Okunoonya emmere tuwaayo bulamu bwaffe, kubanga abatemu babunye buli wantu." 
Lamentations5:10 Enjala etulwazizza omusujja, ne twokya ng'akabiga!" 
Lamentations5:11 Baakwatira olw'empaka abakazi mu Siyooni, n'abawala mu byalo bya Buyudaaya." 
Lamentations5:12 Abakungu baffe batwalibwa okuttibwa. Abantu abakulu tebassibwamu kitiibwa. 
Lamentations5:13 Abavubuka babawaliriza okusa ku lubengo. Abalenzi abato batalantuka nga beetisse ebinywa by'enku. 
Lamentations5:14 Abantu abakulu tebakyatuula kuteeseza ku mulyango. N'abalenzi n'abawala tebakyayimba. 
Lamentations5:15 Essanyu mu bulamu bwaffe likomye, tukungubaga mu kifo ky'okuzina." 
Lamentations5:16 Tetukyalina kituweesa kitiibwa. Zitusanze, kubanga twayonoona." 
Lamentations5:17 Olw'ekyo twennyamidde mu mitima, amaaso gaffe gazzeeko ekifu," 
Lamentations5:18 kubanga Olusozi Siyooni lulekeddwa awo ttayo, ebibe bye bikumbirako." 
Lamentations5:19 Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama, oli kabaka ennaku zonna, era onoofuganga bulijjo." 
Lamentations5:20 Lwaki okutwerabira bw'otyo! Toliddayo kutujjukira? 
Lamentations5:21 Tukomyewo gy'oli, ayi Mukama, ozzeewo ebirungi byaffe eby'edda!" 
Lamentations5:22 Oba otusuulidde ddala? Obusungu bwo tebukkakkaneko? 
Ezekiel1:1 Awo olwatuuka ku lunaku olwokutaano olw'omwezi ogwokuna, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu, bwe nali nga ndi wamu n'abasibe abalala ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari mu Babilooniya, eggulu ne libikkulibwa, ne ndaba ebyo Katonda bye yansobozesa okulaba." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ku lunaku olwo olwokutaano mu mwezi, nga gwe mwaka ogwokutaano bukya Kabaka Yehoyakiini atwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse," 
Ezekiel1:3 nze Ezeekyeli kabona, mutabani wa Buuzi, Mukama n'ayogera nange nga ndi mu nsi eyo ey'Abakaludaaya, ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari. Amaanyi ga Mukama ne gajja ku nze." 
Ezekiel1:4 Awo ne ntunula, ne ndaba embuyaga ey'amaanyi, ekunta ng'eva ebukiikakkono. Ekire ekinene ekyetooloddwa okutangalijja, kyali kirimu omuliro ogumyansa obutasalako. Wakati mu muliro ogwo, mwalimu ekifaanana ng'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel1:5 Mu kyo wakati, ne ndabamu ebifaanana ng'ebintu ebiramu bina, ebirabika ng'abantu," 
Ezekiel1:6 naye nga buli kimu kirina obwenyi buna n'ebiwaawaatiro bina. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amagulu gaabyo gaali magolokofu, n'ebigere byabyo byali ng'ebinuulo by'ennyana, era nga bitangalijja ng'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ebintu ebyo ebiramu ebina ebyalina obwenyi n'ebiwaawaatiro, era byalina emikono ng'egy'abantu, nga giri wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byabyo, ku njuyi zaabyo ennya." 
Ezekiel1:9 Ebiwaawaatiro byabyo byagattibwa buli kimu ku kinnaakyo era ebiramu ebyo byagendanga butereevu mu maaso, nga buli kimu tekikyuka." 
Ezekiel1:10 Byalina ekifaanana ng'obwenyi. Buli kimu kyalina obwenyi ng'obw'omuntu mu maaso, n'obwenyi ng'obw'empologoma ku ludda olwa ddyo, n'obwenyi ng'obw'ente ku ludda olwa kkono, ate n'obwenyi ng'obw'empungu emabega." 
Ezekiel1:11 Bwe bityo bwe byali bifaanana mu bwenyi bwabyo. Ebiwaawaatiro byabyo bwe byeyanjuluzanga waggulu, ebibiri ebya buli kimu ne byekoona ku bya kinnaakyo ekikiriraanye, n'ebirala ebibiri ne bibikka omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Buli kiramu kyagendanga butereevu omwoyo gye gubiraza, awatali kukyuka nga bigenda." 
Ezekiel1:13 Wakati w'ebiramu ebyo ebina, waaliwo ekintu ekifaanana ng'amanda ag'omuliro agaaka ng'emimuli. Kyatambulanga ne kidda eno n'eri wakati mu biramu ebyo, era omuliro ogwo, gwayakanga nga guvaamu enjota." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ebiramu ebyo byaddukanga embiro ate ne bidda, nga bw'olaba okumyansa kw'eggulu." 
Ezekiel1:15 Bwe nali nga nkyatunuulira ebiramu ebyo, ne ndaba nnamuziga nnya nga ziri ku ttaka, nnamuziga emu emu ku mabbali ga buli kiramu." 
Ezekiel1:16 Nnamuziga zonna ennya zaali zifaanana. Buli emu yali etangalijja ng'ejjinja ery'omuwendo, era ng'erabika ng'erimu nnamuziga endala wakati waayo." 
Ezekiel1:17 Bwe zityo zaasobolanga okutambulira mu njuyi zonna ennya, awatali kumala kukyuka." 
Ezekiel1:18 Empanka za nnamuziga ezo ennya, zaali mpanvu, nga zitiisa, era nga zijjudde amaaso enjuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ebiramu ebyo bwe byatambulanga, nga nnamuziga zigendera ku mabbali gaabyo era bwe byasitukanga mu bbanga nga ne nnamuziga nazo zisituka." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ebiramu gye byayagalanga okugenda, nga gye bigenda, era nga ne nnamuziga nazo gye zigenda, kubanga omwoyo gw'ebiramu gwali mu zo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ebyo bwe byatambulanga, oba bwe byayimiriranga, oba bwe byasitukanga mu bbanga, nga ne nnamuziga zikola kyekimu, kubanga omwoyo gwabyo gwali mu zo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Waggulu w'emitwe gy'ebiramu, waaliyo ekifaanana ng'ebbanga ery'oku ggulu, eritangalijja ng'ekirawuli, era nga litiisa." 
Ezekiel1:23 Wansi w'ebbanga eryo ery'oku ggulu, we waali ebiramu ebyo, nga buli kimu kigolodde ebiwaawaatiro bibiri, ebiwaawaatiro ebyo ne bikoona ku bya kinnewaakyo ekikiriraanye, ate ebibiri ne kibyebikka." 
Ezekiel1:24 Bwe byabuukanga, ne mpulira okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawaatiro byabyo, nga biwuuma ng'okuyira kw'amazzi amangi, ng'oluyoogaano lw'eggye, era ng'eddoboozi ly'Omuyinzawaabyonna. Bwe byalekeranga awo okubuuka, ne bissa ebiwaawaatiro byabyo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Bwe byalekeranga awo okubuuka, era nga bissizza wansi ebiwaawaatiro byabyo, ne wabaawo eddoboozi mu bbanga ery'oku ggulu waggulu w'emitwe gyabyo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Era waggulu w'ebbanga eryali waggulu w'emitwe gyabyo, waaliwo ekifaanana ng'entebe ya kabaka, etemagana ng'ejjinja ery'omuwendo erya bbululu. Ku ekyo ekifaanana ng'entebe ya kabaka, kwali kutuddeko afaanana ng'omuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Waggulu okuva ku kyalabika ng'ekiwato kye, ne ndaba ng'amasamasa ng'ekikomo ekizigule, ekiri ng'omuliro ku njuyi zonna. Ate wansi okuva ku kyalabika ng'ekiwato kye, ne ndaba ekiri ng'omuliro, era nga waliwo okutangalijja wonna w'ali," 
Ezekiel1:28 okufaanana nga musoke mu kire ku lunaku olw'enkuba. Ekyo kye kyali ekifaananyi ky'ekitiibwa kya Mukama. Bwe nakiraba, ne nneevuunika ku ttaka. Ne mpulira eddoboozi ly'oyo eyayogera." 
Ezekiel2:1 Oyo eyayogera, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, yimirira njogere naawe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Bwe yayogera nange, ne wabaawo omwoyo ogwannyingiramu, ne gunnyimiriza, ne mpulira oyo eyayogera nange." 
Ezekiel2:3 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, nkutuma eri Abayisirayeli, ab'eggwanga ejjeemu. Bo ne bajjajjaabwe banvaako ne banjeemera, era bakyanjeemedde n'okutuusa kati." 
Ezekiel2:4 Bantu bakakanyavu, era tebanzisaamu kitiibwa. Nkutuma gye bali obategeeze Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye mbagamba." 
Ezekiel2:5 Abajeemu abo, oba banaawuliriza, oba banaagaana okuwuliriza, naye balimanya nga waliwo omulanzi mu bo." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Naye ggwe omuntu, tobatyanga, wadde okutyanga bye boogera, ne bw'onoobeeranga mu myeramannyo n'amaggwa, era n'obeera ne mu njaba ez'obusagwa. Totyanga bye boogera, era totiisibwatiisibwanga bukambwe bwa ntunula ya bajeemu abo." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ojja kubategeeza bye mbagamba, oba bawuliriza oba bagaana okuwuliriza, kubanga bajeemu nnyo nnyini." 
Ezekiel2:8 Naye ggwe omuntu, wulira kye nkugamba. Toba mujeemu nga bo. Yasamya akamwa ko, olye kye nkuwa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba omukono ogugoloddwa gye ndi, nga gukutte omuzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Ezekiel2:10 N'agwanjululiza mu maaso gange. Gwali guwandiikiddwako munda ne kungulu, nga muwandikiddwamu ebigambo by'okukungubaga, n'okukuba ebiwoobe, n'obuyinike." 
Ezekiel3:1 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, lya ekyo ky'olaba, lya omuzingo gw'ekitabo guno, bw'omala, ogende oyogere n'ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Awo ne njasamya akamwa kange, n'andiisa omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogwo." 
Ezekiel3:3 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Gwe omuntu, lya ojjuze olubuto lwo omuzingo gw'ekitabo guno gwe nkuwa, okkute.” Ne ngulya, ne guwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki mu kamwa kange." 
Ezekiel3:4 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, genda eri ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, obategeeze bye njagala okubagamba." 
Ezekiel3:5 Totumiddwa eri eggwanga erikozesa enjogera gy'otomanyi oba olulimi oluzibu, wabula eri ab'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Singa nkutumye mu b'amawanga amangi, ab'enjogera gy'otamanyi era ab'ennimi enzibu, bo bandiwulirizza by'ogamba." 
Ezekiel3:7 Naye ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, tebajja kuwuliriza by'obagamba, kubanga tebaagala kuwuliriza nze bye mbagamba. Ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli lyonna ba mputtu, era bakakanyavu." 
Ezekiel3:8 Kaakano naawe nkufudde mukakanyavu nga bo, lw'onoobasobola, ng'okolagana nabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Nkufudde mugumu nga jjinja ery'embaalebaale. Tobatyanga, era totiisibwatiisibwanga bajeemu abo.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, ssaayo omwoyo ku byonna bye ŋŋenda okukutegeeza, era obigondere." 
Ezekiel3:11 Era genda eri ab'eggwanga lyo abali mu buwaŋŋanguse, oyogere nabo, obabuulire bye njagala okubategeeza, oba nga banaabiwuliriza, oba nga banaagaana okubiwuliriza.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Awo Mwoyo n'ansitula, era ne mpulira emabega wange eddoboozi ery'omwanguka ennyo, erigamba nti: “Ekitiibwa kya Mukama kitenderezebwe mu ggulu.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Awo ne mpulira eddoboozi ly'ebiwaawaatiro by'ebiramu nga bikubaganako, n'okuwuuma kwa zinnamuziga ku mabbali gaabyo, n'okuwuluguma okungi ng'okw'okukankana kw'ensi." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mwoyo n'ansitula n'antwala, ne ŋŋenda nga ndiko obuyinike n'obusungu. Amaanyi ga Mukama ne ganfuga." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ne ndyoka nzija e Telabiibu, ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari awaali abaatwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse, ne mbeera awo mu bo okumala ennaku musanvu, nga nsamaaliridde olw'ebyo bye nalaba ne bye nawulira." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ennaku omusanvu bwe zaayitawo, Mukama n'ayogera nange. N'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Ggwe omuntu, nkufudde omukuumi w'ab'Eggwamga lya Yisirayeli. Kale wuliranga bye ŋŋamba, obatuuseeko bye mbagamba nga mbalabula." 
Ezekiel3:18 Bwe ŋŋamba omuntu omubi nti: ‘Mazima oli wa kufa,’ naye ggwe n'otomulabula kuva mu bibi bye asobole okuwonya obulamu bwe, talirema kufiira mu bibi bye. Naye okufa kwe, ndikuvunaana ggwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kyokka bw'olabula omubi, ye n'atakyuka kuleka bibi bye, wadde okuva mu mpisa ze embi, alifiira mu bibi bye, naye ggwe obulamu obubwo oliba obuwonyezza." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Ate omuntu omulungi bw'akyuka n'ava mu bulungi bwe n'akola ebibi, nange ne mmuleka mu kizibu ekyo n'agwa, alifa. Bw'oliba tomulabudde, alifiira mu bibi bye, n'ebikolwa bye ebirungi bye yakola, tebirijjukirwa. Naye okufa kwe, ndikuvunaana ggwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kyokka bw'olabula omuntu omulungi, aleme kukola kibi, n'alabuka n'atakikola, mazima aliba mulamu, era naawe oliba owonyezza obulamu bwo.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Awo ne mpulira mu nze ng'amaanyi ga Mukama gankutteko, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Situka ogende mu lusenyi, eyo gye ndyogerera naawe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Ne nsituka, ne ŋŋenda mu lusenyi. Ne ndabirayo ekitiibwa kya Mukama, nga bwe nali nkirabidde ku lubalama lw'Omugga Kebari. Ne ngwa ku ttaka nga nneevuunise." 
Ezekiel3:24 Mwoyo n'annyingiramu, n'annyimiriza ku bigere byange, n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Genda weggalire mu nnyumba yo." 
Ezekiel3:25 Laba, ggwe omuntu, ojja kuteekebwako emiguwa, bagikusibise, oleme kufuluma mu bo." 
Ezekiel3:26 Nja kusannyalaza olulimi lwo, lukwatire ku kibuno kyo, okwogera kukuleme, oleme okulabula abantu abo abajeemu." 
Ezekiel3:27 Naye bwe nnaayogera naawe, nja kusumulula olulimi lwo, osobole okwogera, obagambe nti: ‘Mukama, Katonda agamba nti ayagala okuwulira awulire, atayagala kuwulira alekeyo,’ kubanga ab'eggwanga lino, bajeemu.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Era, ggwe Omuntu, kwata ettoffaali, oliteeke mu maaso go, olikubeko ekifaananyi ky'Ekibuga Yerusaalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Era okulaga okuzingizibwa kw'ekibuga ekyo, ekifaananyi kyakyo ekyo, kizimbeko ebigo, okituumireko ekifunvu, oteekewo ensiisira ez'okukirumba, okisimbeko eby'okutomera ebisenge byakyo enjuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kwata olusaniya olw'ekyuma, oluteekewo okuba ekigo eky'ekyuma wakati wo n'ekibuga. Otunuulire ekibuga kibe nga kizingiziddwa, nga ggwe okizingizizza. Ako ke kanaaba akabonero akalabula Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Weebakire ku ludda lwo olwa kkono oluteekeko ebibi by'ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli. Ennaku z'onoomala ng'olwebakiddeko, onoosasuliramu olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Ezekiel4:5 Nkusalidde omuwendo gwa nnaku ebikumi bisatu mu kyenda, ogwenkana n'omuwendo gw'emyaka gye balimala nga babonerezebwa. Bw'otyo bw'onoomala ennaku ezo nga weetisse ebibi by'ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Bw'olimalako ennaku ezo, olyebakira ku ludda lwo olwa ddyo, oboneebone olw'ebibi by'ab'omu Buyudaaya, okumala ennaku amakumi ana, buli lunaku mwaka ogw'ekibonerezo kyabwe." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Simba amaaso go ku Yerusaalemu ekizingiziddwa, okigalulire ekikonde ky'okifunyidde, olange ebigenda okukituukako." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nja kukusiba n'emiguwa, obe nga tosobola kwekyusa okwebakira ku ludda olulala, okutuusa ennaku z'olizingizibwa lwe ziriggwaako." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Kaakano twala eŋŋaano, ne bbaale, n'ebijanjaalo, ne kawo, n'omuwemba, n'obulo, obitabule wamu, obifumbemu emmere ey'omugoyo, gy'onoolyanga mu nnaku ebikumi ebisatu mu ekyenda, z'olimala nga weebakidde ku ludda lwo olwa kkono." 
Ezekiel4:10 Emmere gy'onoolyanga, ebenga mpime. Ebenga kimu kyakutaano ekya kilo olunaku, ng'ogiriira mu kiseera kye kimu buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel4:11 N'amazzi onoonywanga mapime, ebitundu bibiri byakusatu ebya lita, ng'oganywera mu kiseera kye kimu buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel4:12 Emmere onoolyanga nkalirire nga migaati gya bbaale, era onoogikaliriranga ku manda ga mpitambi ya bantu, ng'ogikalirira abantu balaba.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Awo Mukama n'agamba nti: “Bwe batyo Abayisirayeli bwe banaalyanga emmere eteri nnongoofu, nga bali mu mawanga gye ndibasaasaanyiza.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Woowe, Mukama, Katonda! Laba, nze sseeyonoonanga, kubanga okuviira ddala mu buto bwange n'okutuusa kati, siryanga ku nnyama ya nsolo efudde yokka, wadde etaaguddwa nsolo ginnaayo, era siryanga ku kintu ekiyitibwa eky'omuzizo.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Awo Mukama n'alyoka aŋŋamba nti: “Kale nkukkirizza okozese obusa bw'ente, mu kifo ky'empitambi y'abantu, obwo bw'oba ofumbisa emmere yo.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Era n'ayongera okuŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, ndikendeeza emmere mu Yerusaalemu. Banaalyanga mpime nga beeraliikirivu. N'amazzi banaanywanga magere bugezi, nga bennyamivu." 
Ezekiel4:17 Balibulwa emmere n'amazzi, batunulaganeko nga basobeddwa, bayongobere olw'ebibi byabwe.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, kwata ekitala ekyogi, okikozese ng'akamwano k'omumwi w'enviiri, okimwese enviiri zo n'ekirevu kyo. Olwo okwate minzaani, opime enviiri ezo, era ozigabanyeemu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu okyokere mu kifaananyi ky'ekibuga kye wakubye ku toffaali, ennaku ez'okuzingiza ekibuga ekyo nga ziweddeko. Ekimu ekyokusatu ekirala okikwate, ogende ng'okisalaasala n'ekitala nga weetooloola ekibuga. N'ekimu ekyokusatu ekisigaddewo, okisaasaanyize mu bbanga, kitwalibwe embuyaga, nze nsowoleyo ekitala kizigoberere." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ku nviiri ezo, sigazaawo entonotono, ozisibe mu kikondoolo ky'omunagiro gwo." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ne ku ezo, otwaleko ezimu ozisuule mu muliro, ziggye, ziveeko omuliro gusaasaanire eggwanga lya Yisirayeli lyonna.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Mukama Katonda n'agamba nti: “Ekibuga kino Yerusaalemu, nakiteeka wakati w'amawanga era n'ensi ezikyetoolodde." 
Ezekiel5:6 Naye kijeemedde ebiragiro byange n'amateeka gange, ne kikola ebibi n'ensi ezikyetoolodde. Ab'omu Yerusaalemu bajeemedde ebiragiro byange, era bagaanye okukwata amateeka gange." 
Ezekiel5:7 N'olwekyo Nze Mukama Katonda ŋŋamba nti nga bwe muli ab'amawaggali okusinga ab'amawanga agabeetoolodde, ne mujeemera ebiragiro byange, ne mutakwata mateeka gange, oba waakiri okukwata amateeka ag'amawanga agabeetoolodde," 
Ezekiel5:8 kale kaakano nze nzennyini ndi mulabe wammwe, era ndisala omusango okubasinga mmwe, ng'amawanga gonna galaba." 
Ezekiel5:9 Olw'ebyo byonna bye mukola ate nga nze mbikyayira ddala, ndikolera mu mmwe kye sikolanga, era kye siriddamu kukola." 
Ezekiel5:10 Abazadde, baliriira abaana baabwe mu Yerusaalemu, n'abaana balirya bazadde baabwe. Bwe ntyo bwe ndibabonereza mmwe, era abaliba basigaddewo nga balamu ndibasaasaanyiza buli ludda embuyaga gye zikuntira." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Kale Nze Mukama Katonda, ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, bino bye ŋŋamba nti ggwe Yerusaalemu, nga bwe wayonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu ng'okikoleramu ebibi byonna n'ebyenyinyalwa byonna, kyendiva nsanjaga abantu abakulimu, awatali kusaasira." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ekimu ekyokusatu eky'abantu bo balifa endwadde, era balimalibwawo enjala mu ggwe. N'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu kirittibwa mu lutalo okukwetooloola. N'ekitundu ekimu ekyokusatu ndikisaasaanyiza wonna embuyaga w'ekuntira, ne nsowola ekitala ekiribalondoola." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Obusungu bwange bwe butyo bwe bulituukirira ku bo, ne ndyoka mmatira nga mbamaliddeko ekiruyi kyange. Bwe ndimala okubamalirako ekiruyi kyange, olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama, nze njogedde nammwe, kubanga munnyiizizza." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ab'omu mawanga gonna agakwetoolodde baliyitawo, ne balaba bwe nkufudde amatongo, ne bakuvuma." 
Ezekiel5:15 Bwe ndikubonereza nga ndi mu busungu n'ekiruyi, ab'amawanga gonna agakwetoolodde balitya. Balikutunulako ne beewuunya, ne bakunyooma. Nze Mukama nkyogedde." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ndikendeeza emmere gye mubadde mufuna, olwo ne mulumwa enjala. Enjala eribaluma, ne muwulira ng'obusaale obusongovu obuweerezebwa okubazikiriza." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndisindika enjala n'ensolo enkambwe, ne bitta abantu bo. Era endwadde, n'obutemu, n'entalo, birijja mu ggwe. Nze Mukama njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel6:2 “Ggwe omuntu, tunula ku nsozi za Yisirayeli, ozivumirire," 
Ezekiel6:3 ozigambe nti: ‘Mmwe ensozi za Yisirayeli, muwulire Mukama Katonda ky'agamba. Mukama Katonda agamba ensozi n'obusozi, emigga n'ebiwonvu nti mulabe, nze nzennyini ndireeta olutalo ku mmwe, ne nsaanyaawo ebifo byammwe ebigulumivu, abantu mwe basinziza balubaale." 
Ezekiel6:4 Alutaari za balubaale bammwe zirirekebwa ttayo, ebifo mwe banyookereza obubaane birimenyebwa. Abantu bammwe abalittibwa ndibasuula mu maaso g'ebifaananyi bye basinza." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndituuma emirambo gy'Abayisirayeli mu maaso g'ebifaananyi bye basinza, era ndisaasaanya amagumba gaabwe okwetooloola alutaari zammwe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Yonna Abayisirayeli gye babeera, ebibuga byabwe birizikirizibwa, ebifo ebigulumivu mwe basinziza balubaale birekebwewo ttayo, alutaari zaabwe zoonoonebwe zifuuke matongo, ebifaananyi bye basinza bimenyebwe biggweewo, n'ebifo omwoterezebwa obubaane bizikirizibwe, n'ebintu byonna bye baakola bimalibwewo." 
Ezekiel6:7 Abalittibwa baligwa wakati mu mmwe, mulyoke mumanye nga Nze Mukama.’" 
Ezekiel6:8 “Naye nditalizaawo abamu ne batattibwa mu lutalo, ne basaasaanyizibwa mu mawanga," 
Ezekiel6:9 gye balitwalibwa nga basibe. Kale abo abaliba bawonyeewo, balinzijukira nga bali eyo mu mawanga, ne bamanya bwe namenya emitima gyabwe egitali myesigwa egyanvaako, n'amaaso gaabwe ge baalalambaza nga bagazza ku bitali Nze Katonda, ne babisinza. Kale balyetamwa bo bennyini olw'ebibi byabwe, n'olw'ebyenyinyalwa bye bakola." 
Ezekiel6:10 Balimanya nga Nze Mukama, era nga saatiisatiisa butiisatiisa bwe nagamba okubatusaako akabi ako.”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Kunya engalo zo, era osambesambe wansi ku ttaka, okungubage olw'ebibi byonna, n'olw'ebyenyinyalwa Abayisirayeli bye baakola, bajja kufiira mu lutalo, battibwe enjala n'endwadde." 
Ezekiel6:12 Abali ewala, bajja kulwala bafe; abali okumpi, bajja kuttirwa mu lutalo; n'abo abaliwonawo ne bazingizibwa, balifa enjala. Bwe ntyo bwe ndimalira ekiruyi kyange ku bo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Emirambo gy'abattiddwa bwe giriba nga gigaŋŋalamye wakati mu bifaananyi bye basinza, okwetooloola alutaari zaabwe, ku buli kasozi akawanvu, ne ku ntikko zonna ez'ensozi, ne wansi wa buli muti ogw'amakoola, ne wansi wa buli muvule omuziyivu, mu buli kifo mwe baaweerangayo ebitambiro ebyokebwa eri ebifaananyi bye basinza, olwo lwe mulimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndigolola omukono gwange okubalwanyisa, ne nfaafaaganya ensi yaabwe gye babeeramu, n'ezika n'eba matongo, okuva ku ddungu okutuuka e Ribula. Olwo lwe balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Ezekiel7:2 “Ggwe omuntu, Mukama Katonda agamba ensi ya Yisirayeli nti: enkomerero etuuse ku nsi eno yonna." 
Ezekiel7:3 Kaakano enkomerero yo etuuse, era nja kukulaga obusungu bwange, nkusalire omusango nga nsinziira ku ebyo bye wakola, nkubonereze olw'ebyenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola." 
Ezekiel7:4 Sirikusaasira wadde okukukwatirwa ekisa, naye ndikubonereza olw'ebyenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola, olyoke otegeere nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Akabi kajja, era kaddirirwe akabi, kaako katuuse!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Enkomerero etuuse, ddala etuuse era ejjiridde ggwe, yiiyo etuuse!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Mmwe abatuuze b'omu nsi eno, akabi kaboolekedde. Ekiseera kituuse, olunaku lusembedde, olunaku olw'okubonaabona, sso si olw'okujaganyizaako ku nsozi!" 
Ezekiel7:8 “Kaakano nnaatera okukulaga obusungu bwange, nkumalireko ekiruyi kyange, nkusalire omusango okusinziira ku nneeyisa yo, era nkubonereze olw'ebyenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola." 
Ezekiel7:9 Sijja kukusaasira wadde okukukwatirwa ekisa. Nja kukubonereza olw'ebyenyinyalwa bye wakola. Kale mulimanya nga Nze Mukama, era nga Nze mbonereza.”" 
Ezekiel7:10 Laba olunaku luuluno lutuuse. Okusalirwa omusango kutuuse. Okukola eby'obukambwe kweyongedde. Okwekulumbaza kuyitiridde. 
Ezekiel7:11 Okukola eby'obukambwe kweyongedde, ne kuviiramu abantu okukola akabi ku balala. Ku byabwe tewaliba kisigalawo, ka bube bungi bwabwe, ka bube bugagga bwabwe, era ku bo tewaliba mulungi wadde waakitiibwa asigalawo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Ekiseera kituuse, olunaku lusembedde, agula aleme kusanyuka, wadde atunda okunakuwala, kubanga Mukama asunguwalidde bonna." 
Ezekiel7:13 Omusuubuzi talisobola kuddamu kufuna by'afiiriddwa ne bw'aliwangaala, kubanga obusungu bwa Mukama butwaliramu bonna, era tewali alinyweza bulamu bwe nga yeesigamye ku kukola bibi." 
Ezekiel7:14 Bafuuye eŋŋombe bonna okwetegeka, naye tewali agenda mu lutalo, kubanga Mukama abasunguwalidde bonna." 
Ezekiel7:15 Waliwo okuttiŋŋana ebweru, n'abali munda bafa endwadde n'enjala. Ali mu ttale alittibwa enjala n'endwadde." 
Ezekiel7:16 Naye n'abo abaliwonawo ne baddukira ku nsozi, baliba nga bukaamukuukulu obutidde mu biwonvu ne buddukayo. Bonna balinakuwala, buli omu ng'anyolwa olw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Emikono gyabwe giriyongobera, amaviivi gaabwe ne gatekemuka, ne gakubagana." 
Ezekiel7:18 Balyambala ebikutiya ne bakwatibwa ensisi. Balimwa emitwe gyabwe gyonna, ne bawulira ensonyi n'okuswala." 
Ezekiel7:19 Balisuula ffeeza waabwe mu nguudo, beggyeko ne zaabu waabwe ng'ekitagasa, kubanga zaabu ne ffeeza tebiriyinza kubawonya, ku lunaku Mukama lw'aliragirako obusungu bwe. Ensimbi zaabwe tebalizikozesa kwekkusa na kumatira, kubanga ze zaabaviirako okugwa mu bibi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Mukama yazibawa bakolemu ebintu ebiyonjo ebyekitiibwa, naye bo baakolamu bifaananyi ebitasaana, na bintu byabwe ebyenyinyalwa. Mukama kyavudde aleka zibafuukire ekintu ekitali kirongoofu." 
Ezekiel7:21 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndireka abagwira okunyaga ebyobugagga ebyo, n'abamenyi b'amateeka mu nsi eyo okubifuula omugabo gwabwe n'okubyonoona." 
Ezekiel7:22 Siritunulanayo nga boonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, era abanyazi baliyingiramu ne bakyonoona, ne bakifuula matongo." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Kola olujegere, kubanga ensi ejjudde emisango gy'obutemu, n'ekibuga kijjudde ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Ezekiel7:24 Kyendiva ndeeta abagwira abasinga obubi, ne beefunira amaka gammwe, era ndikomya okwekuza kw'abalwanyi bammwe ab'amaanyi, n'ebifo byammwe mwe musinziza biryonoonebwa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Okuzikirira kujja, era balinoonya emirembe, naye nga tegiriiwo." 
Ezekiel7:26 Akabi kaliddirira akabi, n'eŋŋambo ne ziddirira eŋŋambo. Balisaba abalanzi okubamanyisa bye bafunidde mu kulabikirwa, naye kabona aliba takyalina mateeka g'ayigiriza bantu, n'abakadde balibulwa amagezi ge bawa abantu." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kabaka alikungubaga, n'abakungu baliggwaamu essuubi. Abantu balikankana olw'okutya. Ndibabonereza okusinziira ku byonna bye baakola. Ndibasalira omusango nga bwe bagusalidde abalala. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Ku lunaku olwokutaano olw'omwezi ogw'omukaaga mu mwaka ogw'omukaaga nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, bwe nali nga ntudde mu nnyumba yange, era n'abakulembeze ba Buyudaaya nga batudde awo mu maaso gange, amaanyi ga Mukama Afugabyonna ne gajja ku nze." 
Ezekiel8:2 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba ekyanfaananira ng'omuntu ayakaayakana ng'omuliro. Okuva ku kiwato kye okukka wansi, yali afaanana ng'omuliro. N'okuva ku kiwato kye okwambuka, yali amasamasa ng'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel8:3 N'agolola ekyandabikira ng'omukono, n'ankwata omuvumbo gw'enviiri. Mu kulabikirwa kuno, Mwoyo wa Katonda n'ansitula waggulu mu bbanga, n'antwala e Yerusaalemu, ku luggi olw'omulyango gw'oluggya lw'Essinzizo olwomunda olw'ebukiikakkono, awaali ekifaananyi ekinyiiza ennyo Katonda." 
Ezekiel8:4 Eyo ne ndabirayo ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ekyali kifaanana nga kye nalabira mu lusenyi." 
Ezekiel8:5 Katonda n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, yimusa amaaso go, otunule ebukiikakkono.” Awo ne nnyimusa amaaso gange, ne ntunula ebukiikakkono, ne ndabayo ekifaananyi ekinyiiza ennyo Katonda. Kyali ku mulyango ogw'ebukiikakkono, okumpi ne alutaari." 
Ezekiel8:6 Katonda n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, olaba kye bakola? Olaba ebyenyinyalwa ebyenkanidde awo, Abayisirayeli bye bakolera wano, ebindeetera okwesamba mbeere wala n'ekifo kyange ekitukuvu? Naye ojja kulaba n'ebyenyinyalwa ebirala ebisingawo.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 N'antwala ku mulyango gw'oluggya olw'ebweru. Bwe natunula, ne ndaba ekituli ekikubiddwa mu kisenge." 
Ezekiel8:8 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, kuba ekituli mu kisenge.” Ne nkikubamu, ne kifuuka omulyango." 
Ezekiel8:9 N'aŋŋamba nti, “Yingira olabe ebibi ebyenyinyalwa bye bakolera wano.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ne nnyingira, ne ndaba ng'ebisenge eby'enjuyi zonna byali bitoneddwako ebifaananyi by'ebyewalula ebya buli ngeri, n'eby'ensolo ezitali nnongoofu, n'eby'ebintu ebirala Abayisirayeli bye basinza." 
Ezekiel8:11 Mu maaso gaabyo, waali wayimiriddewo abasajja nsanvu, abamu ku bakulembeze b'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, omwali ne Yaazaniya mutabani wa Safani. Buli omu yali akutte ekyoterezo ky'obubaane, omukka gw'ebyoterezo ebyo nga gunyooka." 
Ezekiel8:12 Katonda n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, olabye abakulembeze b'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli kye bakolera mu nkukutu, buli omu mu kisenge omuli ebifaananyi by'asinza? Kubanga bagamba nti, ‘Mukama tatulaba. Mukama yayabulira ensi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Mukama era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ojja kulaba n'ebyenyinyalwa ebirala bye bakola.” 
Ezekiel8:14 Awo n'antwala ku mulyango gw'Essinzizo ogw'obukiikakkono, ng'eriyo abakazi abakaabira Lubaale Tammuzi" 
Ezekiel8:15 Awo n'ambuuza nti: “Obirabye ebyo, ggwe omuntu? Era nno ojja kwongera okulaba ebyenyinyalwa ebisinga ne ku ebyo.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Olwo n'antwala mu luggya olwomunda olw'Essinzizo lya Mukama. Eyo okumpi n'omulyango gw'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, wakati w'ekisasi ne alutaari, waaliwo abasajja ng'amakumi abiri mu bataano. Baali bakubye amabega Ekifo Ekitukuvu, nga batunudde ebuvanjuba, era nga basinza enjuba evaayo." 
Ezekiel8:17 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Obirabye ebyo, ggwe omuntu? Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya tekibamala okukola ebyenyinyalwa ebyo byonna by'olabye wano, naye bongerako n'okujjuza ebikolwa eby'obukambwe mu nsi yaabwe, ne bansosonkereza okusunguwala. Laba bwe banvuma mu ngeri esingira ddala okuba ey'obujoozi!" 
Ezekiel8:18 Kale nno nange ndibamalirako ekiruyi kyange. Siribatunuuliza kisa na busaasizi, era ne bwe balinneegayirira nga baleekaana, siribawuliriza.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Awo ne mpulira nga Mukama ayogera mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Mujje mmwe abagenda okubonereza ekibuga. Buli omu ajje ng'akutte mu mukono gwe ekyokulwanyisa kye nnamuzisa.” 
Ezekiel9:2 Amangwago abasajja mukaaga ne bayita mu mulyango gw'Essinzizo ogw'engulu, ogutunudde ebukiikakkono, ne bajja nga buli omu akutte ekissi. Mu bo mwajjiramu omusajja ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, ng'alina ku lusegere lwe eccupa erimu bwino ow'okuwandiisa. Ne bayingira, ne bayimirira ku mabbali ga alutaari ey'ekikomo." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ekitangaala ekimasamasa ekiraga ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli ne ndaba nga kyali kivudde waggulu ku bakerubi kwe kyali, ne kidda ku mulyango gw'Essinzizo. Mukama n'ayita omusajja ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, eyalina ku lusegere lwe eccupa ya bwino ow'okuwandiisa." 
Ezekiel9:4 Mukama n'amugamba nti: “Genda oyiteeyite mu kibuga Yerusaalemu, oteeke akabonero ku byenyi by'abantu abanakuwadde era abakaaba olw'ebyenyinyalwa ebikolerwa mu kyo.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 N'abalala n'abagamba, nga nze mpulira, nti: “Mmwe, muyiteeyite mu kibuga nga mumuvaako emabega, mutte. Temusonyiwa n'omu. Temubaako gwe mukwatirwa kisa." 
Ezekiel9:6 Mutte abakadde, n'abalenzi n'abawala, n'abaana abato, n'abakazi, naye buli aliko akabonero temumusemberera. Era mutandikire mu Kifo kyange Ekitukuvu.” Awo ne batandikira ku bakadde abaali mu maaso g'Essinzizo." 
Ezekiel9:7 Era n'abagamba nti: “Essinzizo mulyonoone mujjuze empya zaalyo emirambo gy'abattiddwa. Kale mugende.” Awo ne bagenda, ne batta abantu mu kibuga." 
Ezekiel9:8 Awo olwatuuka, bwe baali nga batta, era nga nze nsigadde awo nzekka, ne nvuunama nga nneevuunise ku ttaka, ne nkuba ekiwoobe, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Woowe, ayi Mukama Afugabyonna! Olw'obusungu obungi bw'olina ku Yerusaalemu, onotta Abayisirayeli bonna abasigaddewo, obamalewo?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Mukama n'anziramu nti: “Ebibi by'ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli ne Buyudaaya biyitiridde obungi! Ensi ejjudde omusaayi gw'abatemuddwa, n'ekibuga kikubyeko ebitali bya bwenkanya. Bagamba nti Nze Mukama nayabulira ensi yaabwe, n'olwekyo siraba bye bakola." 
Ezekiel9:10 Bwe ntyo nno nange sijja kubasonyiwa, wadde okubakwatirwa ekisa. Nja kuwoolera eggwanga ku bo olw'ebyo bye bakoze.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Awo omusajja ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru, alina ku lusegere lwe eccupa erimu bwino ow'okuwandiisa, n'akomawo, n'azza obubaka, n'agamba nti: “Nkoze nga bw'ondagidde.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Bwe natunula mu bbanga eryali waggulu w'emitwe gy'abakerubi, ne ndaba waggulu waabwe ekifaanana ng'entebe ey'obwakabaka ekoleddwa mu jjinja eriyitibwa Safiro." 
Ezekiel10:2 Katonda n'agamba omusajja ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru nti: “Yingira wakati wa zinnamuziga ezeetooloolera wansi w'abakerubi, oggyeyo amanda agakoledde omuliro, agajjuza ebibatu byo byombi, ogamansire ku kibuga.” N'ayingira nga mmulaba." 
Ezekiel10:3 Omusajja bwe yayingira, bakerubi baali bayimiridde ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'Essinzizo. Ekire ne kijjuza oluggya olwomunda." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ekitangaala ekimasamasa eky'ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kisituka okuva ku bakerubi, ne kiyimirira waggulu ku mulyango gw'Essinzizo, Essinzizo lyonna ne lijjula ekire, oluggya ne lujjula ekitangaala ky'ekitiibwa kya Mukama." 
Ezekiel10:5 Okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawaatiro by'abakerubi ne kuwulirwa ne mu luggya olw'ebweru, nga kuli ng'eddoboozi lya Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna bw'aba ng'ayogera." 
Ezekiel10:6 Awo olwatuuka, Mukama bwe yalagira omusajja ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru nti: “Ggya omuliro wakati wa zinnamuziga ezeetooloolera wakati w'abakerubi,” omusajja n'ayingira, n'ayimirira ku mabbali ga nnamuziga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Awo omu ku bakerubi n'agolola omukono gwe ng'asinziira wakati w'abakerubi, n'atoola ku muliro ogwali wakati w'abakerubi, n'aguteeka mu bibatu by'oyo ayambadde ebyambalo ebyeru. Oyo n'agutwala, n'afuluma." 
Ezekiel10:8 Awo ne ndaba mu bakerubi ekifaanana ng'omukono gw'omuntu wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe. 
Ezekiel10:9 Bwe natunula, ne ndaba zinnamuziga nnya ku mabbali ga bakerubi, nnamuziga emu emu ku mabbali ga buli kerubi. Zinnamuziga ezo zaali zifaanana ng'amayinja ag'omuwendo agayitibwa berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Zonna ennya zaali zifaanana mu ndabika yaazo, nga gy'obeera nti nnamuziga eri munda wa nnamuziga." 
Ezekiel10:11 Mu kutambula, bakerubi baayinzanga okugenda ku buli ludda, ku njuyi zaazo zonna ennya, nga tebamaze kukyuka balyoke bagende, wabula nga bwe baagala okugenda, buli omutwe gwabwe gye gutunudde nga gye bagenda, awatali kumala kukyuka." 
Ezekiel10:12 Omubiri gwabwe gwonna, n'amabega, n'emikono n'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe, ne zinnamuziga zaabwe ezo ennya ze baalina, byali bijjudde amaaso enjuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel10:13 Nawulira nga zinnamuziga baziyita “Zinnamuziga ezeetooloola.” 
Ezekiel10:14 Buli kerubi yalina obwenyi buna. Obusooka bwali bwenyi bw'ente, obwokubiri bwali bwenyi bwa muntu, obwokusatu bwali bwenyi bwa mpologoma, n'obwokuna bwali bwenyi bwa mpungu." 
Ezekiel10:15 Bakerubi abo ne babuuka ne bagenda waggulu mu bbanga. Bakerubi abo bye biramu bye nali ndabidde ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Bakerubi abo bwe baabuukanga ne bagenda mu bbanga, zinnamuziga ne zigendera ku mabbali gaabwe. Bwe baayanjuluzanga ebiwaawaatiro byabwe okubuuka okuva ku ttaka, era zinnamuziga zaagendanga nabo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Bwe baayimiriranga, nazo ne ziyimirira, era bwe baabuukanga waggulu mu bbanga nazo ne zibuuka wamu nabo, kubanga omwoyo gw'ebiramu ebyo gwali mu zo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Awo ekitangaala ky'Ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kiva waggulu ku mulyango gw'Essinzizo, ne kiyimirira waggulu wa bakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Bakerubi ne banjuluza ebiwaawaatiro byabwe, ne babuuka okuva ku ttaka nga ndaba, ne zinnamuziga ne zigenda wamu nabo. Ne bayimirira ku luggi lw'Omulyango Ogw'ebuvanjuba ogw'Essinzizo, ng'ekitangaala ky'Ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli kibali waggulu." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ebyo bye biramu bye nalaba wansi wa Katonda wa Yisirayeli ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari, ne mmanya nga be bakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Buli omu yalina obwenyi buna, era buli omu yalina ebiwaawaatiro bina. Wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byabwe, waaliwo ekifaanana ng'emikono gy'abantu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Endabika y'obwenyi bwabwe yali ddala ng'obwenyi bwe nalabira ku mabbali g'Omugga Kebari. Mu ndabika yaabwe yennyini, baatambulanga beesimbye." 
Ezekiel11:1 Mwoyo wa Mukama era n'ansitula n'antwala ku Mulyango Ogw'ebuvanjuba ogw'Essinzizo, ogutunula ebuvanjuba. Eyo ku mulyango ogwo we guggulira, ne ndabayo abasajja amakumi abiri mu bataano, nga mu bo mulimu ne Yaazaniya mutabani wa Azzuri, ne Pelatiya mutabani wa Benaaya, abakulembeze b'abantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, bano be bantu abateesa okukola ebibi, era abawa amagezi amabi mu kibuga kino." 
Ezekiel11:3 Bagamba nti: ‘Ekiseera kinaatera okutuuka eky'okuzimba amayumba. Ekibuga kino ye ntamu efumba, era ffe nnyama efumbwamu.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Kale langa, ggwe omuntu, langa obavumirire.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Awo Mwoyo wa Mukama n'ajja ku nze, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Yogera nti Mukama agamba nti: ‘Mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, mmanyi bye mugamba, ne bye mulowooza." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mweyongedde okutta abantu mu kibuga kino, enguudo zaakyo ne muzijjuza emirambo.’" 
Ezekiel11:7 “Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kyenva ŋŋamba nti ddala ekibuga ntamu, era abantu be mutirimbula ne bagaŋŋalama mu kyo, abo ye nnyama. Naye mmwe ndikibagobamu." 
Ezekiel11:8 Mutidde ekitala, naye ndireeta abalina ebitala ne babalumba." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndibaggya mu kibuga kino, ne mbawaayo mu mikono gy'abagwira, ne mbabonereza olw'emisango gye mwazza." 
Ezekiel11:10 Mulittibwa mu lutalo wano mu nsi ya Yisirayeli. Olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel11:11 Ekibuga kino tekiribakuuma ng'entamu bw'ekuuma ennyama mu yo. Ndibabonerereza buli we mulibeera mu Yisirayeli. 
Ezekiel11:12 Kale mulimanya nga Nze Mukama, era nga mu kukolera ku biragiro by'ab'amawanga agabeetoolodde, mujeemedde amateeka gange, era temutuukirizza bye mbakuutira.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Awo olwatuuka, bwe nali nga nkyalanga ebyo, Pelatiya mutabani wa Benaaya n'afa. Ne ngwa ku ttaka nga nneevuunise, ne ndeekaana mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Woowe, ayi Mukama, Katonda! Onoomalirawo ddala Abayisirayeli abasigaddewo?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Ggwe omuntu, baganda bo, n'ab'eggwanga lyammwe bwe muli mu buwaŋŋanguse, be Bayisirayeli bonna, abantu ababeera mu Yerusaalemu baboogerako nga bagamba nti mmwe muvudde awali Mukama, era nti bo Mukama b'awadde ensi eyo ebe yaabwe." 
Ezekiel11:16 “Kale kaakano tegeeza abo bwe muli mu buwaŋŋanguse nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti newaakubadde nga nabaggya mu nsi yaabwe ne mbatwala ewala mu mawanga, ne mbasaasaanyiza mu nsi nnyingi, naye mu kiseera kino ekiriwo nja kubeera wamu nabo mu nsi ze balimu." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Kale bategeeze Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ndibakuŋŋaanya okubaggya mu mawanga, ne mu nsi mwe mwasaasaanyizibwa, era ndibawa ensi ya Yisirayeli.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Kale bwe balikomawo, baliggyayo ebintu byonna eby'ekivve n'ebyenyinyalwa bye balisangawo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndibawa omutima omuggya n'endowooza empya. Ndiggya mu bo omutima omukalubo ng'ejjinja, ne mbawa omutima omuwulize." 
Ezekiel11:20 Olwo banaakwatanga amateeka gange, bakolenga bye nabalagira. Banaabanga bantu bange, nze ne mba Katonda waabwe." 
Ezekiel11:21 Naye abo kaakano abamalidde omutima gwabwe ku by'ekivve n'ebyenyinyalwa, ndibabonereza olw'ebibi bye bakola. Bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋamba Nze Mukama Afugabyonna.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Awo bakerubi ne basitula ebiwaawaatiro byabwe ne babuuka mu bbanga, ne zinnamuziga nga zibali ku mabbali, n'ekitangaala eky'ekitiibwa kya Katonda wa Yisirayeli kyali ku bo waggulu." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ekitangaala eky'ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kisituka ne kiva wakati w'Ekibuga, ne kiyimirira ku lusozi oluli ku ludda lw'ekibuga olw'ebuvanjuba." 
Ezekiel11:24 Mu kulabikirwa, Mwoyo wa Katonda n'ansitula, n'ankomyawo eri abaali mu buwaŋŋanguse e Babilooniya. Olwo ebyo bye nalabira mu kulabikirwa ne bikoma." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ne ntegeeza abaali mu buwaŋŋanguse, ebintu byonna Mukama bye yali andaze." 
Ezekiel12:1 Era Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel12:2 “Ggwe omuntu, obeera mu bantu abajeemu. Balina amaaso, naye tebalaba. Balina amatu naye tebawulira, kubanga bajeemu." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Kale kaakano, ggwe omuntu, siba omugugu, ng'omuntu adduka okunoonya obubudamo gwe yandisibye, osituke osenguke misana ng'abantu balaba. Osenguke mu kifo kyo, odde mu kifo ekirala, nga balaba. Oboolyawo banaabaako kye balabukamu, newaakubadde nga bajeemu." 
Ezekiel12:4 Era emisana nga balaba, siba ebintu, ng'omuntu adduka okunoonya obubudamo, ositule oveeyo akawungeezi nga balaba, ogende ng'abantu bwe bava ewaabwe okugenda mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Ezekiel12:5 Kuba ekituli mu kisenge, oyiseemu ebintu byo nga balaba." 
Ezekiel12:6 Bisitulire ku kibegabega kyo nga bakulaba, obifulumye ekizikiza nga kikutte era nga weebisse ku maaso, nga tolaba gy'olaga, kubanga nkutaddewo obe akabonero akalabula Abayisirayeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Awo ne nkola nga Mukama bwe yandagira. Ku olwo, naggyamu ebintu byange, ne nsiba omugugu ng'omuntu agenda mu buwaŋŋanguse. Akawungeezi ako, nze nzennyini ne nkuba ekituli mu kisenge, ne nfulumya ebintu byange ng'obudde bukwata, ne mbisitulira ku kibegabega kyange ng'abantu balaba." 
Ezekiel12:8 Awo enkeera Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel12:9 “Ggwe omuntu, Abayisirayeli abajeemu, tebakubuuzizza nti: ‘Okola ki?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Bategeeze ekyo Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye ŋŋamba nti: ‘Obubaka buno bwa kabaka afuga mu Yerusaalemu, era bwa Bayisirayeli bonna abali mu Yerusaalemu omwo.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Bategeeze nti ky'okoze, ke kabonero k'ekyo ekigenda okubatuukako: baligobebwa ewaabwe, ne bagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
Ezekiel12:12 Ne kabaka afuga mu bo alisitulira omugugu gwe ku kibegabega mu kizikiza, n'afuluma. Balikuba ekituli mu kisenge okuyisaamu ebintu okubifulumya. Kabaka alyebikka ku maaso n'atalaba kkubo ly'akwata kugenda." 
Ezekiel12:13 Era ndimutega ne mmukwasa mu kitimba kyange. Ndimutwala e Babilooni, mu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, gy'alifiira nga talabye kibuga ekyo." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndisaasaanyiza buli ludda abo bonna abamwetoolodde okumuyamba, n'abagoberezi be bonna, era nditeekawo abantu ababawondera okubatta." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Bwe ndibasaasaanyiza mu mawanga amalala ne mbabunya mu nsi nnyingi, balimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel12:16 Naye ndirekawo abamu ku bo abatonotono, abaliwona okuttibwa mu lutalo, n'okuttibwa enjala, n'endwadde, balyoke bategeere, nga bali eyo mu mawanga, nga bye baakola byali byenyinyalwa, era bamanye nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Era Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel12:18 “Ggwe omuntu, emmere yo girye ng'okankana, n'amazzi oganywe ng'ojugumira, era nga weeraliikirira," 
Ezekiel12:19 ogambe abantu ab'omu nsi eno nti: ‘Mukama Afugabyonna agamba abo abali mu Yerusaalemu, mu nsi ya Yisirayeli nti balirya emmere nga beeraliikirira, era balinywa amazzi nga bali mu kutya. Ensi yaabwe eriggyibwamu byonna ebirimu, kubanga bonna abagibeeramu bakoze ebitasaana." 
Ezekiel12:20 N'ebibuga ebirimu abantu kaakano birizikirizibwa, ensi n'efuulibwa amatongo. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel12:22 “Ggwe omuntu, lugero ki luno lwe mulina mu nsi ya Yisirayeli lwe mugera nti: ‘Ebiseera biyita, naye ebiragibwa mu kulabikirwa ne bitatuukirira.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Kale kaakano bategeeze nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ndikomya olugero olwo. Tebaliddayo kulukozesa mu Yisirayeli. Naye bagambe nti: ‘Ennaku zinaatera okutuuka, ekyalagibwa mu kulabikirwa kituukirizibwe." 
Ezekiel12:24 Kubanga mu Yisirayeli tewaliddayo kubaawo kulabikirwa okw'obwereere, wadde obulanzi obw'okubuzaabuza." 
Ezekiel12:25 Nze Mukama, nze nnaayogeranga, era kye ŋŋamba, kinaatuukirizibwanga. Wanaabanga tewakyaliwo kulwa, naye mu kiseera kyammwe, bajeemu mmwe, kye njogera ndikituukiriza.’ Bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋambye, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Era Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel12:27 “Ggwe omuntu, laba, ab'omu nsi ya Yisirayeli bagamba nti by'olaba mu kulabikirwa si bya kutuukirira mu nnaku zino, era ne by'olanga bya mu biseera ebikyali ewala." 
Ezekiel12:28 Kale bagambe nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti: ‘Mu bye njogedde, tewali kinaayongera kulwawo, naye buli kye njogera, kijja kutuukirira. Bwe ntyo, Nze Mukama, Katonda, bwe ŋŋambye.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Ezekiel13:2 “Ggwe omuntu, langa ovumirire abalanzi b'omu Yisirayeli, abalanga ebyo bo bye beeyiiyiza mu mutima. Bagambe bawulire Nze Mukama kye ŋŋamba.”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Zibasanze abo abalanzi abasirusiru, abeeyiiyiza ebyabwe, nga tebalina kye balabye." 
Ezekiel13:4 Mmwe Abayisirayeli, abalanzi bammwe bali ng'ebibe ebiri mu matongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Tebakuuma bifo ebisenge we byawomoggolwa ebituli, wadde okuddaabiriza ebisenge ebyo basobole okutaasa ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli mu lutalo, olunaku lwa Mukama nga lutuuse." 
Ezekiel13:6 Okulabikirwa kwabwe tekuliiwo, era balanga bya bulimba abo abagamba nti boogera bubaka bwange, Nze Mukama, sso nga nze sibatumye, ne basuubiza abantu nti kye boogedde kijja kutuukirira." 
Ezekiel13:7 Abo mbagamba nti: ‘Tewali kulabikirwa kwe mufunye, ne bye mwogedde bya bulanzi bwa bulimba. Mugamba nti ebyo nze mbyogedde, sso nga sibyogeranga.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Kale Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Nga bwe mwogedde ebitaliiwo, era nga bwe mulabye eby'obulimba, kaakano ndi mulabe wammwe." 
Ezekiel13:9 Nja kubonereza abalanzi abo abalaba ebitaliiwo, era abalanga eby'obulimba. Tebaliba mu bantu bange nga bakuŋŋaanye okuteesa, amannya gaabwe tegaliwandiikibwa mu ga ba ggwanga lya Yisirayeli, era tebaliyingira mu nsi ya Yisirayeli. Olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama Afugabyonna." 
Ezekiel13:10 Abalanzi abo, mazima bawubisizza abantu bange, nga bagamba nti: ‘Mirembe’, sso nga tewali mirembe. Abantu bwe bazimba ekisenge ekitagumye, abalanzi abo ne bakisiigako langi kinyirire." 
Ezekiel13:11 Abo abakisiigako langi, bagambe nti kijja kugwa. Wajja kutonnya enkuba ey'amaanyi, wagwe n'amayinja ag'omuzira amanene, wakunte ne kibuyaga omungi." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ekisenge bwe kirimala okugwa, balibabuuza nti langi gye mwasiigako egasizza ki?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Kale Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Nga nzijjudde obusungu n'ekiruyi, ndireeta kibuyaga mungi n'akunta, ne ntonnyesa enkuba efukumuka, erimu n'amayinja ag'omuzira amanene, ne nkimenyerawo ddala ne kivaawo." 
Ezekiel13:14 Bwe ntyo bwe ndimenyerawo ddala ekisenge kye musiizeeko langi, ne nkisuula wansi, omusingi gwakyo ne gusigala nga gweyerudde mu bbanga. Kirigwa, nammwe ne kibazikiriza mwenna. Olwo buli muntu alimanya nga nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel13:15 Bwe ntyo bwe ndimalira obusungu bwange ku kisenge ekyo, ne ku abo abaakisiiga langi, era ndibagamba mmwe nti: ‘Ekisenge tekikyaliwo era n'abo abaakisiiga langi," 
Ezekiel13:16 be balanzi ba Yisirayeli abaalanga ebifa ku Yerusaalemu, nga bwe bafunye okulabikirwa nti kinaaba mirembe nga sso tewali mirembe.’ Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba.”" 
Ezekiel13:17 “Kale, ggwe omuntu, kyukira abakazi abo ab'omu bantu bo, abeeyiiyiza bye balanga, olange ng'obavumirira." 
Ezekiel13:18 Ogambe nti: ‘Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: Zibasanze mmwe abakazi abatungira buli muntu ensiriba ez'okwesiba ku mikono, era abakolera abantu aba buli ngeri ebiwero eby'amalogo okwetimba ku mitwe, basobole okufuga obulamu bw'abalala. Mwagala okuba n'obuyinza okukola kye mwagala ku bulamu bw'abantu bange, mmwe mwewonye okufa?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Mummalamu ekitiibwa mu maaso g'abantu, nga munoonya okwefunira embatu za bbaale n'ebitundu by'emigaati, nga mutta abantu abatagwanira kufa, ne muwonya abo abatagwanira kuba balamu, ne mulimba abantu bange abawuliriza eby'obulimba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Kale nno Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndi mulabe wa nsiriba ezo ze mukozesa okutawaanya obulamu bw'abantu, era n'okutta, era ndizisika ne nziggya ku mikono gyammwe, ne nta abo be mubadde mutigomya." 
Ezekiel13:21 N'ebiwero byammwe ebyo eby'amalogo ndibiyuza, ne nzigya abantu bange mu mikono gyammwe, ne bawona okuyiggibwa. Olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel13:22 Kubanga mu bulimba bwammwe, munakuwaza abantu abalungi, nze be saagadde kunakuwaza, ne munyweza ababi baleme kukyuka okuva mu bibi byabwe, bawonye obulamu bwabwe." 
Ezekiel13:23 Kale kaakano okulabikirwa kwammwe okutaliiwo, n'okulanga kwammwe okw'okubuzaabuza, biweddewo. Nja kuwonya abantu bange mbaggye mu buyinza bwammwe, mulyoke mumanye nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Awo abamu ku bakulembeze ba Yisirayeli ne bajja gye ndi okunneebuuzaako, ne batuula mu maaso gange." 
Ezekiel14:2 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel14:3 “Ggwe omuntu, abasajja abo emitima gyabwe bagimalidde ku kusinza ebitali Nze Katonda, ne bibaleetera okukola ebibi. Nnyinza ntya okubaleka babeeko kye banneebuuzaako?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Kale yogera nabo, obategeeze Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye mbagamba nti: ‘Buli wa ggwanga lya Yisirayeli amalira omutima gwe mu kusinza ebitali Nze Katonda, ne yeereetera okukola ebibi, n'ajja okwebuuza ku mulanzi, Nze Mukama ndimuddamu mu ngeri esaanira obungi bw'ebyo ebitali Katonda bye yeemaliddeko," 
Ezekiel14:5 ndyoke neddize ab'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli bonna abaneggyeeko, ne beemalira ku ebyo ebitali Nze Katonda.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kale kaakano tegeeza Abayisirayeli nti Nze Mukama Katonda mbagamba nti: ‘Mukyuke mudde, muve ku bitali Nze Katonda, era muve ku ebyo byonna ebyenyinyalwa bye mwemaliddeko.’" 
Ezekiel14:7 Kubanga buli Muyisirayeli oba ow'eggwanga eddala abeera mu Yisirayeli, anneggyako n'amalira omutima gwe ku bitali Nze Katonda, ne yeereetera okukola ebibi, n'ajja eri omulanzi okunneebuuzaako, Nze Mukama ndimuddamu Nze nzennyini." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndimukyukira ne mmufuula akabonero ak'okulabirako, era olugero. Ndimuggyawo mu bantu bange, mulyoke mutegeere nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Omulanzi singa alimbibwa, n'abaako by'ayogera, nze Mukama, nze mba nnimbye omulanzi oyo, era ndimuggyawo mu bantu bange Abayisirayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Omulanzi n'oyo amwebuuzaako, bombi balibonerezebwa olw'ekibi kyabwe. Ekibonerezo ky'omulanzi kiriba kye kimu n'eky'oyo amwebuuzaako." 
Ezekiel14:11 Ekyo ndikikola, ab'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli baleme kuddamu kunvaako, n'okweyonoona nga bakola ebibi, naye babeerenga bantu bange, nze mbenga Katonda waabwe.” Mukama bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel14:12 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel14:13 “Ggwe omuntu, ensi bw'ekola ebibi n'ennyiiza, ndigolola omukono gwange ne ngibonereza, ne ngimma emmere gye yeetaaga. Ndigireetamu enjala, ne ngimalamu abantu era n'ensolo."
