Ezekiel14:14 Abantu abo abasatu: Noowa, ne Daniyeli ne Yobu, ne bwe bandibadde bali mu yo, bandiwonyezza bulamu bwabwe bwokka olw'obulungi bwabwe.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Singa mpisa ensolo enkambwe mu nsi ne zigyonoona, n'efuuka ensiko nga tekyayinza kuyitibwamu bantu olw'okutya ensolo ezo," 
Ezekiel14:16 abasajja abo bonsatule ne bwe bandibadde nga bali omwo, Nze Mukama ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, tebandiwonyezza wadde abaana abaabwe. Bandyewonyezza bokka, naye ensi n'ezika." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Oba singa ndeeta olutalo mu nsi, ne ndagira nti lutte era lumalewo abantu n'ensolo," 
Ezekiel14:18 abasatu abo ne bwe bandibadde mu nsi eyo, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, tebandiwonyezza wadde abaana abaabwe, wabula bo bennyini be bandiwonyeewo bokka olw'obulungi bwabwe." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Oba singa nsindika kawumpuli mu nsi nga ngisunguwalidde, okuttamu n'okumalamu abantu n'ensolo," 
Ezekiel14:20 Noowa ne Daniyeli ne Yobu ne bwe bandibadde nga bali omwo, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, tebandiwonyezza wadde abaana abaabwe. Bandiwonyezza bulamu bwabwe bwokka olw'obulungi bwabwe.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Kale tekirisingawo obubi bwe ndisindika ku Yerusaalemu ebibonerezo byange ebina ebisingayo obukambwe: olutalo, n'enjala, n'ensolo enkambwe ne kawumpuli, okukimalamu abantu n'ensolo?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Naye walibaawo abatonotono abaliwonawo, bo n'abaana baabwe. Abo bwe balivaayo ne bajja gye muli, muliraba emize gyabwe n'ebibi bye bakola, ne mumanya ng'ekibonerezo kye mpadde Yerusaalemu kisaanidde." 
Ezekiel14:23 Olwo mulikakasa nga nalina ensonga entuufu okukituusaako ebyo byonna bye nakola mu kyo.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba. 
Ezekiel15:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange n'agamba nti: 
Ezekiel15:2 “Ggwe omuntu, omuzabbibu olina bw'ogugeraageranya n'omuti, oba n'ettabi lyonna, ery'omuti ogw'omu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Omuzabbibu bayinza okuguggyako emiti ne babaako kye bagibajjamu? Oba bayinza okuggyako wadde enkondo okubaako kye bagiwanikako? 
Ezekiel15:4 Bayinza kugukumisa bukumisa muliro. Era bwe gumala okwokebwa gye gusemba erudda n'erudda, era nga ne wakati guyidde, olina eky'omugaso ky'oyinza okugukolamu?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Oba nga tegwaliko kye gugasa nga gukyali mulamba, kale omuliro nga gumaze okugwokya ne guggya, lwe gunaaba n'omugaso?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Kale Mukama Afugabyonna kyava agamba nti: “Nga bwe mpaayo omuzabbibu oguggyibwa mu miti egy'omu kibira okukumisa omuliro, bwe ntyo bwe ndiwaayo abantu ababeera mu Yerusaalemu, ne mbabonereza." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ne bwe balidduka omuliro, era gulibookya. Bwe ndibabonereza, kale mulimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndizisa ensi, kubanga abantu baamu bagaanye okuba abeesigwa.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:1 Awo Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel16:2 “Ggwe omuntu, manyisa Yerusaalemu ebyenyinyalwa bye kikola," 
Ezekiel16:3 okigambe nti: ‘Mukama Afugabyonna akugamba ggwe Yerusaalemu nti wazaalibwa era osibuka mu nsi y'e Kanaani. Kitaawo yali Mwamori, ne nnyoko yali Muhiiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Bwe wazaalibwa, tewasalibwa kalira, era tewanaazibwa na mazzi kukutukuza. Tebaakusiiga munnyo, wadde okukubikkako obugoye." 
Ezekiel16:5 Tewali yakukwatirwa kisa kukukolako wadde ekimu ku ebyo byonna. Bwe wazaalibwa tewali yakwagala. Wasuulibwa bweru mu ttale. 
Ezekiel16:6 “ ‘Nze bwe nali mpitawo, ne nkulaba ng'osambagalira mu musaayi gwo. Ng'okyali mu musaayi gwo ogwo, ne nkugamba nti sijja kukuleka kufa, ba mulamu." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ne nkulabirira n'okula ng'ekimera eky'omu nnimiro. N'osuumuka, n'okulira ddala n'ofuuka muwala mukulu, omuyonjo ennyo. N'osuna amabeere, n'okuza enviiri, naye ng'oli bwereere, toyambadde." 
Ezekiel16:8 “ ‘Era bwe nali nga mpitawo ne nkulaba ng'otuusizza ekiseera eky'okwogerezebwamu, ne nkubikkako omunagiro gwange oleme kusigala ng'oli bwereere. Weewaawo nakola naawe endagaano ey'okufumbiriganwa, n'ofuuka wange.’ ” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Awo ne nkunaaza n'amazzi, ne nkumalirako ddala omusaayi gwo, ne nkusiiga omuzigo," 
Ezekiel16:10 ne nkwambaza engoye ezirukiddwa obulungi, ne nkunaanika engatto ez'amaliba agasinga obulungi, ne nkubikkirira olugoye olw'ebbeeyi, ne nkusiba ekitambaala ekirungi ennyo." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ne nkwambaza amatiribona agakuwoomya: obukomo ku mikono, n'omukuufu mu bulago." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ne nkuteekako empeta ey'oku nnyindo, n'eby'oku matu ne nkutikkira n'engule ennungi ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Bwe wamala okuweebwa ebikuwoomesa ebya zaabu ne ffeeza, n'ebyambalo byo eby'engoye ezisingirayo ddala obulungi, n'olyanga emmere esinga obulungi, okuli n'omubisi gw'enjuki, n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, leero n'olungiwa n'okamala, n'onyirira nga muka kabaka." 
Ezekiel16:14 N'oba wa ttutumu mu mawanga gonna olw'obulungi bw'endabika yo, obwali busukkiridde olw'ebyo bye nakukolako.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Naye ggwe weeyinula obulungi bwo n'ettutumu lyo, n'okola obwamalaaya, n'okabawaliranga ku buli muntu ayitawo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Watoola ku byambalo byo, okutimba ebifo byo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, bw'otyo n'okolerayo obwamalaaya mu ngeri etebangawo era eteriddamu kubaawo ng'osinza ebyo byonna, ebitali Nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel16:17 Waddira ebirungi eby'okwewoomya ebya zaabu n'ebya ffeeza bye nakuwa, ne weekoleramu ebifaananyi eby'abasajja, n'ogenda nabyo n'obisinza, nze kye mbala nti wayenda nabyo." 
Ezekiel16:18 N'otwala engoye ezirukiddwa obulungi, ze nakuwa, n'obikka ebifaananyi ebyo, n'obitonera n'omuzigo n'obubaane bwange." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ebyokulya bye nakuwa okulyangako: obuwunga obukuŋŋuntiddwa obulungi, omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, n'omubisi gw'enjuki, wabitoola obiwengayo bibe ekiweebwayo ebiwunyira ebifaananyi ebyo akaloosa.” Mukama Katonda bw'agamba bw'atyo." 
Ezekiel16:20 “ ‘Era watoola abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala be wanzaalira, n'obawaayo babe ebitambiro eri ebifaananyi ebyo. Obutali bwesigwa bwo obwo walaba nga kintu kitono," 
Ezekiel16:21 olyoke ogatteko n'okutta abaana bange ng'obayisa mu muliro okubatambirira ebifaananyi ebyo? 
Ezekiel16:22 Mu kukola ebyenyinyalwa n'eby'obwamalaaya bwo, ebyo byonna, tewajjukira nnaku za mu buto bwo, bwe wali obwereere, nga tewali k'obikkiddwako, era ng'osambagalira mu musaayi gwo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Zikusanze, zikusanze! Bwe wamala okukola ebibi ebyo byonna," 
Ezekiel16:24 n'oyongerako n'okwezimbira ku mabbali ga buli luguudo, ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebitali Nze Katonda, n'okukoleramu obwamalaaya." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ozimbye ebifo ebyo buli luguudo we lutandikira, n'ojaajaamiza omwo obulungi bwo, amagulu go n'oganjululiza buli ayitawo, ne weeyongera okuba malaaya." 
Ezekiel16:26 Era oyenze ne ku Bamisiri baliraanwa bo abalina amaddu g'omubiri amangi, ne weeyongera mu bwamalaaya, okunsunguwaza." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Kale kaakano ngolodde omukono gwange okukubonereza, era nkendeezezza ku mugabo gwo, ne nkuwaayo eri abakukyawa bakukoleko kye baagala, be Bafilistiya abo, abakwatibwa ensonyi olw'ebikolwa byo eby'obukaba." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Oyenze ne ku Bassiriya, kubanga toyinza kumatira. Ddala oyenze ku bo, naye era nabo ne batakumatiza." 
Ezekiel16:29 Ne weeyongera okukola obwamalaaya mu Bukaludaaya, ensi y'abasuubuzi, era n'osigala nga tomatidde.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Omutima gwo nga mukaba nnyo, n'okola ebyo byonna ebikolebwa omukazi malaaya kaggwensonyi!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Kubanga ozimba buli luguudo we lutandikira ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebitali Nze Katonda, okoleremu obwamalaaya. Sso nno nga tonoonya nsimbi ng'omukazi malaaya eyeetunda." 
Ezekiel16:32 Oli mukazi mwenzi, alekerera okwagala bba, n'ayenda ku basajja abalala." 
Ezekiel16:33 Mu nkola eyaabulijjo, abasajja be bawa bamalaaya ebirabo, naye ggwe, ggwe owa baganzi bo bonna ebirabo, n'obagulirira olw'obwenzi bwo, bajje gy'oli okuva mu njuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel16:34 Oli wanjawulo ku bakazi abalala abenzi, kabanga tewali akuwaliriza ggwe okwenda, wabula ggwe ogulirira abasajja, sso si bo kukusasula, kyova obeera malaaya owenjawulo!”" 
Ezekiel16:35 Kale ggwe Yerusaalemu omwenzi, wulira Mukama ky'agamba." 
Ezekiel16:36 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Weeyambulamu engoye era olw'obwenzi bwo ne weewa baganzi bo, n'ebifaananyi ebyenyinyalwa by'osinza era bye watambirira abaana bo." 
Ezekiel16:37 Olw'ebyo, ndikuŋŋaanya baganzi bo bonna be wasanyuka nabo, abo bonna be wayagala, wamu n'abo bonna be wakyawa. Ndikwambulamu engoye zo bakulabe ng'oli bwereere." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndikusalira omusango gwe basalira abakazi aboonoona obufumbo, ne batta n'abantu, ne nkuwa ekibonerezo eky'okuttibwa, nga nzijudde obusungu n'ekiruyi." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndikuwaayo mu mikono gyabwe, era balimenya amayumba go agagulumidde, balimenyaamenya ebifo byo ebigulumivu by'osinzizaamu ebitali Nze Katonda. Balikwambulamu engoye zo, ne banyaga eby'okwewoomya by'olina ebirungi, ne bakuleka ng'oli bwereere, toliiko k'obikkiddwako." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Balireeta ebbiina ly'abantu ne likukuba amayinja, ne bakufumitira ddala n'ebitala byabwe." 
Ezekiel16:41 Balyokya amayumba go omuliro, ne bakubonereza ng'abakazi bangi balaba. Ndikulesaayo obwenzi, n'olekera awo n'okusasula baganzi bo omusaala." 
Ezekiel16:42 Bwe ntyo bwe ndikumalirako ekiruyi kyange kye mpulira olw'okukububira, ne ntereera, ne siddamu kukusunguwalira." 
Ezekiel16:43 Olw'okwerabira bye nakukolera mu buto bwo, n'onnyiiza mu bino byonna, kyendiva mbikuvunaana. Wakola bubi nnyo okugatta obwenzi ku byenyinyalwa byonna bye wakola!” Ebyo Mukama Afugabyonna ye abyogera." 
Ezekiel16:44 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu balikugerako olugero luno, ggwe Yerusaalemu nti: ‘Omuwala ne nnyina be bamu.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Ddala oli muwala wa nnyoko, eyatamwa bba n'abaana be. Era oli nga baganda bo, abaakyawa babbaabwe n'abaana baabwe. Nnyammwe yali Muhiiti, ne kitammwe yali Mwamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukulu wo ye Samariya akuli mu bukiikakkono, wamu n'obubuga bwe. Muto wo akuli mu bukiikaddyo n'obubuga bwe, ye Sodoma." 
Ezekiel16:47 Tekyakumala okweyisa nga bo, n'okukola ebyenyinyalwa nga bo, naye mu kaseera mpawekaaga, wayonooneka okusinga bo mu byonna by'okola.”" 
Ezekiel16:48 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, muganda wo Sodoma n'obubuga bwe, tebaakola nga ggwe n'obubuga bwo bye mukoze." 
Ezekiel16:49 Muganda wo Sodoma n'obubuga bwe, ekibi abaamu kye baakola kyali kya kwekulumbaza kubanga baalina emmere nnyingi, n'emirembe nga beebaka ne beegolola, naye ne batafa ku baavu n'abali mu bwetaavu." 
Ezekiel16:50 Era baalina olwetumbu ne bakola bye nkyawa, kyennava mbasaanyaawo nga ndabye ebyo." 
Ezekiel16:51 “N'ab'e Samariya tebaakola wadde ekimu ekyokubiri eky'ebibi byo. Okoze ebyenyinyalwa bingi okusinga bye baali bakoze. Ebibi byonna bye wakola bw'obigeraageranya n'ebya baganda bo, bo balabika ng'abatalina musango." 
Ezekiel16:52 Kaakano ojja kugumira ensonyi zo. Ebibi byo byenyinyalwa okusinga ebya baganda bo, ne balabika nga balungi okukusinga. Kaakati swala ofe ensonyi, kubanga olaze nti bo baganda bo balungi.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Mukama n'agamba Yerusaalemu nti: “Ndikomyawo abantu baabwe okuva mu buwaŋŋanguse: aba Sodoma n'obubuga bwakyo, n'aba Samariya n'obubuga bwakyo. N'ababo ndibakomyawo wamu nabo." 
Ezekiel16:54 Olikwatibwa ensonyi n'oswala olw'ebyo byonna bye wakola, ebiraga nti bo baganda bo bali bulungi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Baganda bo Sodoma ne Samariya n'obubuga bwabyo baliddawo mu mbeera yaabwe ey'edda, era naawe wamu n'obubuga bwo, oliddawo mu mbeera yo ey'edda." 
Ezekiel16:56 Kubanga muganda wo Sodoma tewayogeranga ng'omunyooma mu biseera bye weekulizangamu," 
Ezekiel16:57 ebibi byo nga tebinnamanyika? Kaakano naawe Abeedomu n'Abafilistiya n'abalala bonna abakukyawa abakwetoolodde, bakuyisaamu emimwa." 
Ezekiel16:58 N'olwekyo osaanye okugumira ebiva mu by'ensonyi ne mu byenyinyalwa bye wakola.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba. 
Ezekiel16:59 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Nja kukuyisa nga bw'osaanidde ggwe, anyooma kye weeyama, n'omenya endagaano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Wabula nze ndikuuma endagaano gye nakola naawe ng'okyali muto, era ndikola naawe endagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Ezekiel16:61 Bw'oliddizibwa baganda bo, mukulu wo ne muto wo, olikwatibwa ensonyi olw'ebyo bye wakola. Ndibakuwa ne baba nga bawala bo, newaakubadde ng'ekyo tekiri mu ndagaano gye nkoze naawe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndikuuma endagaano gye nkoze naawe, n'omanya nga nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel16:63 Ndikusonyiwa byonna bye wakola, olibijjukira n'okwatibwa ensonyi, n'olemwa n'okubaako ky'oyogera olw'okuswala.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel17:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel17:2 “Ggwe omuntu, buulira Abayisirayeli olugero luno," 
Ezekiel17:3 bamanye Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye mbagamba: Empungu ennene, erina ebyoya ebingi ebya langi ennyingi, erina n'ebiwaawaatiro ebinene era ebiwanvu, yajja ku lusozi Lebanooni, n'eggyayo akatabi akasembayo waggulu ku mutwe gw'omuvule." 
Ezekiel17:4 N'ekatwala mu nsi erimu obusuubuzi, n'ekasimba mu kibuga ky'abasuubuzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Era n'etwala n'akalokwa k'omuzabbibu ogw'omu nsi Yisirayeli, n'ekasimba mu ttaka eggimu awali amazzi amangi agaakayamba okukula." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ne kakwata bulungi, ne kavaamu omuzabbibu ogukulira wansinsi, ne gulanda, ne gwagaagala. Amatabi gaagwo ne gatunula waggulu empungu eyo gy'eri, emirandira ne gisimba wansi mu ttaka. Omuzabbibu ne guleeta amatabi, ne gujjula amakoola." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Waaliwo n'empungu ennene endala, ng'erina ebiwaawaatiro binene n'ebyoya bingi. Awo olwatuuka, omuzabbibu ogwo ne guweta emirandira gyagwo okugiggya mu nnimiro mwe gwasimbibwa, okugizza empungu eyo endala gy'eri. Ne gukyusa n'amatabi gaagwo okugatunuza gy'eri egufukirirenga amazzi," 
Ezekiel17:8 sso nga gwali gusimbiddwa mu ttaka ddungi awali amazzi amangi, gusuule amatabi era gubale ebibala, gubeere nga omuzabbibu omulungi." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Bagambe nti: ‘Mukama Afugabyonna abuuza nti omuzabbibu ogwo guliba bulungi? Empungu eyagusimba terigukuulayo n'emirandira gyagwo, n'esalako ebibala byagwo, n'amatabi gaagwo, amakoola gaagwo gonna amabisi gawotoke? Tekiryetaagisa na maanyi mangi, wadde abantu abangi okugukuulayo n'emirandira gyagwo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Ogwo gw'olaba, bwe gusimbibwa guyinza okudda obulungi? Teguukalire ddala nga gufuuyiddwako empewo z'ebuvanjuba? Gulikalira mu nnimiro mwe gusimbiddwa okukulira.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Era Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel17:12 “Buuza abantu b'eggwanga lino ejjeemu, oba nga bategeera amakulu g'olugero luno. Babuulire nti Kabaka w'e Babilooniya yajja e Yerusaalemu n'awamba Kabaka waayo n'abakungu baayo, n'agenda nabo, n'addayo e Babilooniya." 
Ezekiel17:13 N'atwala omu ku b'olulyo olulangira, n'akola naye endagaano, era n'amulayiza okuba omwesigwa gy'ali. N'aggyayo abantu ab'amaanyi ab'omu nsi eyo," 
Ezekiel17:14 obwakabaka obwo bukkakkane buleme okwegugunga, naye bukuume endagaano busobole okunywera." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kyokka Kabaka wa Buyudaaya n'ajeema, n'atuma ababaka be mu Misiri, okufunayo embalaasi n'eggye eddene. Kabaka oyo aliba bulungi? Omuntu akola ebiri ng'ebyo ayinza okuwona? Ayinza okumenya endagaano, n'atabonerezebwa?”" 
Ezekiel17:16 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, kabaka oyo alifiira Babilooniya, kubanga yamenya endagaano gye yakola ne Kabaka w'e Babilooniya eyamuteeka ku ntebe y'obwakabaka." 
Ezekiel17:17 Era ne kabaka w'e Misiri, n'eggye lye ery'amaanyi ery'abaserikale be abangi, talisobola kumuyamba mu lutalo, ab'e Babilooniya bwe balituuma ebbibiro, ne bazimba ebigo okuzikiriza abantu bangi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Taliwona kubanga yanyooma ekirayiro ye yennyini kye yakola, n'amenya endagaano ey'okuba omwesigwa, n'akola ebyo byonna.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Mazima ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, ndimubonereza olw'okumenya endagaano gye yakola ng'alayira erinnya lyange nti aligituukiriza." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndimutega ne mmukwasa mu kitimba kyange, ne mmutwala e Babilooniya, ne mmubonerereza eyo, kubanga yagaana, okuba omwesigwa gye ndi." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ab'omu magye ge abadduka, balittirwa mu lutalo, n'abo abalisigalawo balibuna emiwabo. Olwo mulimanya nga nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Nditwala akatabi akato akasembayo waggulu ku mutwe gw'omuvule, ne nkasimba ku lusozi oluwanvu olugulumivu." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ku lusozi lwa Yisirayeli olusingira ddala obuwanvu kwe ndikasimba, kakule kasuule amatabi era kabale ebibala, kafuuke omuti amakula; ebinyonyi ebya buli ngeri bijje byewogomenga mu kisiikirize ky'amatabi gaagwo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Emiti gyonna egy'omu ttale gimanye nga Nze Mukama mpeta emiti emiwanvu, ne mpanvuya emimpi. Era nkaza omuti omubisi ne ntojjeza omuti omukalu. Nze Mukama, nze njogedde, era kye njogedde, nkikoze.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel18:2 “Mubadde mutya abagera olugero luno mu nsi ya Yisirayeli nga mugamba nti: ‘Abazadde baalya enkenene ezikambagga, amannyo g'abaana ne ganyenyeera?’" 
Ezekiel18:3 Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ndayira nti nga Nze bwe ndi omulamu, mpeze olugero olwo, temuliddayo kulukozesa mu Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Nze nfuga obulamu bwa buli muntu, obw'omuzadde n'obw'omwana. Oyo anaakolanga ekibi ye anaafanga." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Omuntu omulungi ye oyo atuukiriza by'alagirwa okukola. 
Ezekiel18:6 Tasinza bitali Nze Katonda, ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli bye basinza, wadde okuliira ku nsozi ebyo bye babitambirira. Tasigula muka munne, era teyeebaka na mukazi ali mu biseera bye ebya buli mwezi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Talyazaamaanya muntu n'omu, era tabaako gw'anyagako bibye. Omuntu amwewolako amuddiza omusingo gwe. Abayala abawa ebyokulya, n'abali obwereere abawa ebyokwambala." 
Ezekiel18:8 Tawola lwa kufunamu magoba na kwegaggawaza. Takkiriza kukola kibi, era asala emisango gy'abantu mu bwenkanya." 
Ezekiel18:9 Akwata amateeka gange, era atuukiriza bye nalagira. Oyo ye muntu omulungi, era talirema kuba mulamu.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Naye omuntu oyo, omwana we ayinza okuba omwana omunyazi era omutemu," 
Ezekiel18:11 era atatuukiriza by'agwanidde kukola, wabula aliira mu bifo eby'oku nsozi ebyawerebwa, era asigula baka banne." 
Ezekiel18:12 Omwana ayinza okulyazaamaanya abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, omuntu amwewolako n'atamuddiza musingo gwe, n'agenda mu masabo, n'asinza ebyo ebitali Nze Katonda, era n'akola ebyenyinyalwa," 
Ezekiel18:13 n'awola ensimbi olw'okufuna amagoba n'okwegaggawaza. Oyo aliba mulamu? Nedda, taliba mulamu. Akoze ebyenyinyalwa ebyo byonna, talirema kufa, nga ye yennyini ye yeereetedde okufa okwo." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Naye ka tugambe nti ow'engeri eyo alina omwana, omwana n'alaba ebibi kitaawe by'akola, wabula n'atya, ye n'atabikola:" 
Ezekiel18:15 n'atasinza bitali Nze Katonda, ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli bye basinza, era n'ataliira ku nsozi bye babitambirira; n'atasigula muka munne," 
Ezekiel18:16 wadde okubaako gw'alyazaamaanya; n'atabaako musingo gw'atwala wadde okubaako ky'anyaga olw'amaanyi, kyokka n'agabiranga abayala emmere, n'abali obwereere n'abawanga ebyokwambala." 
Ezekiel18:17 Ne yeewala okuyisa obubi abaavu, era n'atakkiriza kuwola lwa kufuna magoba na kwegaggawaza; n'akwata amateeka gange era n'atuukiriza bye ndagira, oyo talifa lwa bibi bya kitaawe, wabula ddala aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kitaawe nga bwe yayisa obubi, era n'anyaga bantu banne n'obukambwe, n'akola ebyo ebitali birungi mu banne, oyo alifiira mu bibi bye." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Naye mwebuuza nti: ‘Omwana lwaki tavunaanibwa bibi bya kitaawe?’ Omwana bw'aba ng'akoze ebituufu by'agwanira okukola, era ng'akutte amateeka gange gonna n'agatuukiriza, talirema kuba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Omuntu akola ebibi ye alifa. Omwana taavunaanibwenga lwa bibi bya muzadde we, n'omuzadde taavunaanibwenga lwa bibi bya mwana we. Omuntu omulungi anaaweebwanga empeera olw'ebirungi by'akola, n'omwonoonyi anaavunaanibwanga olw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Naye omuntu omubi bw'anaakyukanga n'alekayo ebibi bye byonna bye yakola, n'akwata amateeka gange gonna, n'akola ebituufu bye ndagira, talifa, mazima aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ebibi bye byonna bye yakola birimusonyiyibwa, n'aba mulamu, kubanga akoze ebituufu." 
Ezekiel18:23 Mulowooza nga nsanyukira okufa kw'omwonoonyi? Nedda, wabula njagala yeenenye, abe mulamu.” Mukama Katonda bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Kyokka omuntu omulungi bw'akyuka n'alekayo okuba omulungi, n'akola ebibi, era ebyenyinyalwa byonna, abantu ababi bye bakola, aliba mulamu? Nedda, tewali na kimu ku bikolwa bye ebirungi bye yakola, ekirijjukirwa. Alifa olw'obutakuuma bwesigwa, n'olw'ebibi by'akoze." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Naye mmwe mugamba nti: ‘Mukama ky'akola si kya bwenkanya.’ Muwulire mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli. Kye nkola si kya bwenkanya? Enkola yammwe ye eteri ya bwenkanya. 
Ezekiel18:26 Omuntu omulungi bw'akyuka n'alekayo okuba omulungi, n'akola ebibi, n'afiira mu byo, aba afudde lwa bibi bye by'akoze." 
Ezekiel18:27 Naye omubi bw'akyuka, n'aleka ebibi by'akoze, n'akola ebyo ebituufu ebyalagirwa, aliwonya obulamu bwe," 
Ezekiel18:28 kubanga aba yeerowoozezza n'alekayo ebibi bye byonna by'akoze. N'olwekyo talifa, wabula aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:29 Naye mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli ne mugamba nti: ‘Mukama ky'akola si kya bwenkanya?’ Yii, mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, kye nkola kye kitali kya bwenkanya? Nedda. Enkola eyammwe ye eteri ya bwenkanya." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, mbagamba mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli nti ndisalira buli omu ku mmwe omusango nga nsinziira ku by'akoze. Mukyuke, muve mu bibi byammwe byonna, ebibi byammwe ebyo bireme kubazikiriza." 
Ezekiel18:31 Mweggyeeko ebibi byammwe byonna bye mukoze, mufune omutima omuggya n'omwoyo omuggya. Mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, lwaki mwagala okufa?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nze sisanyukira n'omu kufa. Kale mukyuke muve mu bibi byammwe, mube balamu.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel19:1 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kati tandika okukungubagira abakungu ba Yisirayeli," 
Ezekiel19:2 ogambe nti: ‘Nnyoko yali ng'empologoma enkazi ey'amaanyi mu mpologoma ensajja. Yayonseza abaana baayo wakati mu mpologoma envubuka," 
Ezekiel19:3 n'ekuza omu ku bo n'aba empologoma envubuka, n'eyiga okuyigga, n'etandika okulya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Amawanga ne gagikubira enduulu ne gagikwasa mu bunnya ne bagisika n'amalobo ne bagitwala mu nsi y'e Misiri. 
Ezekiel19:5 Nnyina waayo n'erinda. Yalaba tewakyali ssuubi, n'eyola omwana gwayo omulala ne gufuuka empologoma envubuka." 
Ezekiel19:6 Bwe yakulira ddala, n'ekumbira mu zinnewaayo, n'eyiga okuyigganga wamu n'okulya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Amayumba gaabwe n'egamenya, ebibuga byabwe n'ebizisa. Ng'ewulugumye, ne batya, ne baleka ttayo ebyabwe. Ensi eyo ne bagiddukamu." 
Ezekiel19:8 Amawanga ne gakuŋŋaana, ne gagitaayiza wonna n'etegebwa ebitimba, ne bagikwasa mu bunnya." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ne bagisika n'amalobo ne bagisibira mu kiyumba, ne bagitwalira kabaka w'e Babilooni. Ne bagikuumira mu kigo, okuwuluguma kwayo baleme kuddayo kukuwulira mu nsozi za Yisirayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Nnyoko yali ng'omuzabbibu ogusimbiddwa mu nnimiro, okumpi n'awali amazzi ne gujjula obutabitabi obutabala." 
Ezekiel19:11 Mu matabi gaagwo amagumu, ne mutemwa emiggo egy'obwakabaka ne gikwatibwa abafuzi. Omuzabbibu ne guwanvuwa ne gugulumira amatabi, ne galengerwa amangi bwe gaziyidde amakoola." 
Ezekiel19:12 Naye ne gukuulibwayo abo abagulinako ekiruyi, ne gusuulibwa wansi. Empewo z'ebuvanjuba zajja ne zigukaza ebibala. Ne guwogolwa amatabi, ne guwotoka ne bagwokya." 
Ezekiel19:13 Kaakano gusimbiddwa mu nsi enkalu ey'eddungu. 
Ezekiel19:14 Omuliro guvudde mu muggo ogwatemwa mu matabi agaagwo, ne gwokya ebibala byagwo. Tekukyali matabi magumu mutemwa miggo gya bwakabaka.’ Luno lwe luyimba olw'okukungubaga olunaayimbibwanga bulijjo.”" 
Ezekiel20:1 Awo olwatuuka, ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogwokutaano, mu mwaka ogw'omusanvu nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, abamu ku bakulembeze b'Abayisirayeli ne bajja okwebuuza ku Mukama, ne batuula mu maaso gange." 
Ezekiel20:2 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel20:3 “Ggwe omuntu, yogera n'abakulembeze b'Abayisirayeli obategeeze nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti: ‘Muzze okunneebuuzaako? Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, sijja kubakkiriza mmwe kunneebuuzaako. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, bwe ntyo bwe ŋŋamba.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Onoobasalira omusango, ggwe omuntu? Kale bajjukize ebyenyinyalwa, bajjajjaabwe bye baakola." 
Ezekiel20:5 Bategeeze nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna mbagamba nti bwe neeroboza Yisirayeli, nalayirira ab'Eggwanga lya Yakobo eryo. Nabeemanyisiza mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mbagamba nti nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe." 
Ezekiel20:6 Ku olwo, lwe nabalayirira okubaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri okubatwala mu nsi gye nali mbategekedde, engimu era engagga, esinga ensi endala zonna ekitiibwa." 
Ezekiel20:7 Nabagamba basuule ebintu ebyenyinyalwa ebibasikiriza, era baleme kwejaajaamya na bifaananyi bya balubaale b'e Misiri, kubanga Nze Mukama, Nze Katonda waabwe." 
Ezekiel20:8 Naye ne banjeemera, ne bagaana okuwulira bye mbagamba, ne batasuula bintu ebyenyinyalwa ebibasikiriza, wadde okuleka ebifaananyi bya balubaale b'e Misiri. Kale ne nteekateeka okubamalirako obusungu bwange eyo mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Naye ne sikola ekyo, kubanga kyandivumaganyizza erinnya lyange mu mawanga mwe baali, mwe nabamanyisiza nti nja kubaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Awo ne mbaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mbatwala mu ddungu." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ne mbawa ebiragiro byange, ne mbayigiriza amateeka gange, omuntu nga bw'agatuukiriza, gamuwa obulamu." 
Ezekiel20:12 Era nabateerawo okumanya Sabbaato, kabe akabonero k'endagaano wakati wange nabo, balyoke bamanye nga nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Naye ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli ne banjeemera ne mu ddungu. Ne bamenya amateeka gange, ne bagaana okukola bye ndagira, ebiwa obulamu ababituukiriza. Ne boonoona nnyo Sabbaato gye nabateerawo. Kale ne nteekateeka okubamalirako obusungu bwange mu ddungu okubamalawo." 
Ezekiel20:14 Naye ne nkola ekigwanira erinnya lyange, lireme okuvumaganibwa mu mawanga agaalaba bwe mbaggya mu Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ne mbalayirira mu ddungu nga sigenda kubatwala mu nsi gye nali mbawadde, engimu era engagga, esinga ensi endala zonna ekitiibwa," 
Ezekiel20:16 kubanga baagaana ebiragiro byange, ne batakwata mateeka gange, ne boonoonanga Sabbaato gye nabateerawo, ng'omutima bagumalidde ku bifaananyi bya balubaale." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Naye ne mbakwatirwa ekisa ne sibazikiririza mu ddungu kubamalirawo ddala. 
Ezekiel20:18 Awo ne ŋŋambira abaana baabwe mu ddungu nti: Temukolera ku mateeka bajjajjammwe ge baateekawo, temukwata mpisa zaabwe, era temweyonoona nga musinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye baasinzanga." 
Ezekiel20:19 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, mukwatenga amateeka gange, mukolenga bye ndagira." 
Ezekiel20:20 Olwa Sabbaato mulukuumenga nga lunaku lutukuvu, lubenga akabonero akalaga endagaano gye nakola nammwe, era lubajjukizenga nga Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Naye n'abaana ne banjeemera. Ne batakwata mateeka gange, era ne batakola bye mbalagira, ebiwa obulamu omuntu abikola. Baayonoonanga Sabbaato gye nabateerawo. Kale ne ŋŋamba okubamalirako obusungu bwange mbasaanyeewo nga bali mu ddungu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Naye ne sikikola, nneme okuvumaganya erinnya lyange mu mawanga agaalaba nga bwe nabaggya mu Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ne nziramu okubalayirira mu ddungu nga ndibasaasaanya mu mawanga, mbabunye mu nsi nnyingi," 
Ezekiel20:24 kubanga baali tebakoze bye mbalagira, nga bagaanye amateeka gange, era nga bajaajaamizza Sabbaato gye nabateerawo, era ng'omutima bagumalidde ku bifaananyi bya balubaale, bajjajjaabwe bye baasinzanga." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Awo ne mbaleka bagoberere amateeka agatali malungi, n'ebiragiro mwe batagenda kufunira bulamu." 
Ezekiel20:26 Ne mbaleka beejaajaamye nga bawaayo ebirabo eri ebifaananyi bya balubaale, kubanga baatambiranga abaana baabwe abaggulanda nga babookya, ndyoke mbabonereze mbalage nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Kale kaakano, ggwe omuntu, yogera n'ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, obategeeze Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye mbagamba, nti era eno ye emu ku ngeri bajjajjammwe mwe banvumiranga, nga bagaana okuba abeesigwa." 
Ezekiel20:28 Kubanga bwe nabaleeta mu nsi gye nneerayirira okubawa, ne balaba obusozi obuwanvu n'emiti emiziyivu, ne baweeranga eyo ebitambiro byabwe. Ne bansunguwaza olw'ebyo bye baaweerangayo, n'ebyakaloosa bye baayoterezangayo, n'ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa bye baayiwangayo." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ne mbabuuza nti: ‘Kifo ki ekyo ekigulumivu gye mugenda bulijjo okusinziza?’ Okuva olwo ne kiyitibwanga Ekifo Ekigulumivu kye Basinzizaamu. 
Ezekiel20:30 Kale kaakano tegeeza ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, nze Mukama Katonda kye mbagamba nti: ‘Nammwe mwagala kweyonoona nga bajjajjammwe, nga mugoberera emize gyabwe egy'obutaba beesigwa?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Bwe muwaayo ebirabo byammwe, ne mutambira abaana bammwe be mwokya, nammwe mwejaajaamya olw'okusinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale. Kale mmwe ab'eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, olwo nnyinza ntya okubakkiriza munneebuuzeeko? Nze Mukama Katonda ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, sijja kubakkiriza kunneebuuzaako." 
Ezekiel20:32 N'ekyo kye mulowooza ne mugamba nti munaabeera ng'ab'amawanga amalala, ng'abantu ab'omu nsi endala, ne musinza emiti n'amayinja, tekijja kubaawo n'akatono.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:33 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Nze ndayira nti nga bwe ndi omulamu, mazima ndiba Kabaka wammwe, mbafugenga n'obuyinza obungi, n'amaanyi era n'obusungu," 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndikozesa obuyinza bwange obungi n'amaanyi era n'obusungu, ne mbaggya mu mawanga, era ne mbakomyawo okuva mu nsi ezo mwe mwasaasaanyizibwa." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndibateeka mu ddungu ly'eyo mu mawanga, mbawozese nga nze nammwe tutunuuliganye maaso ku maaso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Ndibawozesa nga bwe nawozesa bajjajjammwe mu ddungu ly'ensi y'e Misiri.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ndibayisa wansi w'omuggo ne mbabala n'obwegendereza, ne mbayingiza mu ndagaano gye muteekwa okukuuma." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndibamaliramu ddala abajeemu, n'abo abakola ebibi ne bannyiiza. Abo ndibaggya mu nsi ze balimu kaakano, naye siribaleeta mu nsi ya Yisirayeli. Olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Kale kaakano mmwe Abayisirayeli oba nga temukkiriza kumpulira, buli omu ku mmwe agende abe muweereza w'ebifaananyi bya balubaale by'alina. Naye temuddangamu kujaajaamya linnya lyange ettukuvu nga mumpa ebirabo byammwe, ate ng'erudda musinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye mulina." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, olusozi olwo entikko ya Yisirayeli, mwenna mwenna ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli we mufa mwenkana, kwe mulinsinziza mu nsi eyo, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna. Eyo gye ndibasiimira, era ne mbasalira ebiweebwayo bye munandeetera, n'ebibala byammwe ebisooka okukungulwa era n'ebitone byammwe byonna bye mumpongera." 
Ezekiel20:41 Bwe ndimala okubakuŋŋaanya okubaggya mu mawanga ne mbakomyawo okuva mu nsi ezo mwe mwasaasaanyizibwa, ndisiima ebitambiro byammwe ebyokebwa, era muliraga amawanga nga bwe ndi omutuukirivu." 
Ezekiel20:42 “Bwe ndibatuusa mu Yisirayeli, ensi gye nneerayirira okuwa bajjajjammwe, mulimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel20:43 Olwo mulijjukira emize gyammwe, n'ebikolwa byammwe byonna ebyenyinyalwa bye mwejaajaamyamu, era mulyetamwa mmwe mwennyini olw'ebibi byammwe byonna bye mwakola." 
Ezekiel20:44 Bwe ndimala okubayisa mu ngeri eweesa erinnya lyange ekitiibwa, sso si mu ngeri egwanira enneeyisa yammwe embi, n'ebikolwa byammwe ebikyamu, mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, mulimanya nga Nze Mukama.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel20:45 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel20:46 “Ggwe omuntu, tunula ebukiikaddyo olaamirize ebirituuka ku bantu baayo, olange ebirituuka ku kibira ky'omu bukiikaddyo." 
Ezekiel20:47 Gamba ekibira eky'omu bukiikaddyo kiwulire, Nze Mukama kye ŋŋamba. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti: ‘Laba, ndikuma omuliro mu ggwe, ne gwokya buli muti oguli mu ggwe, omubisi n'omukalu. Ennimi z'omuliro ogwo, tewaliba kiyinza kuzizikiza. Guliranda okuva ebukiikaddyo, okutuuka ebukiikakkono, gwokye buli omu." 
Ezekiel20:48 Abantu bonna baliraba nga Nze Mukama, nze ngukumye. Tewali kiriyinza kuguzikiza.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Afugabyonna, banjogerako nti: ‘Ono ayogerera mu ngero!’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel21:2 “Ggwe omuntu, tunula e Yerusaalemu, olaamirize ebirituuka ku bifo bye basinzizaamu, era olange ng'olabula ensi ya Yisirayeli," 
Ezekiel21:3 ogigambe nti Mukama agamba nti: ‘Nfuuse mulabe wo, era ndisowola ekitala kyange mu kiraato kyakyo, ne nkumaliramu ddala abantu abalungi n'ababi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Olw'okumalirawo ddala mu ggwe abalungi n'ababi, ndisowolayo ekitala kyange mu kiraato kyakyo, ne nnwanyisa abantu bonna okuva ebukiikaddyo okutuuka ebukiikakkono." 
Ezekiel21:5 Abantu bonna balimanya nga Nze Mukama, nsowodde ekitala kyange mu kiraato kyakyo, era sijja kukizzaamu.’" 
Ezekiel21:6 “Kale ggwe omuntu, sinda ng'omuntu alina obuyinike obungi mu mutima, sinda nga bonna balaba." 
Ezekiel21:7 Bwe banaakubuuza nti: ‘Lwaki osinda?’ Obagambe, nti: ‘Nsinda olw'amawulire ge mpulidde, ag'ebyo ebijja. Bwe binaatuuka, buli muntu ajja kwewanika omutima, ayongobere emikono, aggweemu amaanyi, era amaviivi ge gakubagane. Ebyo bijja kubaawo, ddala bijja kutuukirira.’ ” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel21:8 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel21:9 “Ggwe omuntu, langa ogambe nti: Mukama agamba nti: ‘Gamba nti: Ekitala! Ekitala kiwagaddwa era kiziguddwa!" 
Ezekiel21:10 Kiwagaddwa kitte, kiziguddwa kimyanse ng'enjota. Kale olwo tunaasanyuka? Abantu bange banyoomye buli kibonerezo n'okulabulwa." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ekitala kiziguddwa kitegekebwe okukozesebwa. Ddala kiwagaddwa ne kizigulwa kiryoke kikwasibwe anaakikozesa okutta.’ 
Ezekiel21:12 Kaaba owowoggane, ggwe omuntu, kubanga ekitala kino kijjiridde bantu bange n'abakungu bonna aba Yisirayeli. Baweereddwayo okuttibwa, wamu n'abantu bange abalala bonna. Kale weekubeekube ku bisambi nga weesansabaga." 
Ezekiel21:13 Abantu bange nja kusooka kubageza. Singa banyooma okulabulwa, ebyo byonna bijja kubaawo.” Mukama Afugabyonna bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Kale kaakano, ggwe omuntu, langa, okube mu ngalo, ekitala kiteme ab'okutta, kiteme ogwokubiri n'ogwokusatu. Kye kitala ekitta, ekitala eky'entiisa ekizikiriza." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ntadde omumwa gwakyo ku miryango gy'abantu bange gyonna, ne kibaleetera okweraliikirira n'okwesittala ne bagwa. Kimyansa ng'enjota, kifuuliddwa kisongovu kitte." 
Ezekiel21:16 Weekaaliise, oteme ku ludda olwa ddyo, tala oteme ku ludda olwa kkono, yonna yonna amaaso go gye goolekera." 
Ezekiel21:17 Nze nja kukuba mu ngalo, nneemale ekiruyi. Nze Mukama, Nze nkyogedde.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel21:19 “Kale ggwe omuntu, weeteerewo amakubo abiri, kabaka wa Babilooniya mw'ayinza okuyita ng'akutte ekitala kye, gombi gabe nga gatandikira mu nsi emu, olambe ekifo amakubo ago we geegattira." 
Ezekiel21:20 Olage ekkubo kabaka mw'anaayisa ekitala okutuuka mu Kibuga Rabba eky'Abammoni, n'ekkubo mw'anaayita okutuuka mu Buyudaaya mu Kibuga Yerusaalemu ekiriko ebigo ebigumu." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kubanga kabaka wa Babilooniya ayimiridde mu masaŋŋanzira amakubo gombi we gagattira okusobola okuzuula ekkubo ly'anaakwata, azunzazunza obusaale, ne yeebuuza ku balubaale be ab'omu maka, n'akebera ekibumba ky'ensolo etambiddwa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo mulimu akasaale akalambiddwako ‘Yerusaalemu’. Kamulagula okusimba ebitomera, okulagira okutta, okukangula amaloboozi baleekaane, okusimba ebitomera enzigi z'emiryango gyakyo, okutuuma entuumu ez'okukiwalampirako, n'okukizimbako ekigo okukitaayiza." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ab'omu Yerusaalemu bino bajja kubiyita bulanzi obutaliimu makulu, olw'obweyamo obwabakolerwa. Naye obulanzi buno buzze okubajjukiza ebibi byabwe bye baakola, n'okubalabula nga bajja kukwatibwa." 
Ezekiel21:24 Kale kino, Nze Mukama Katonda kye ŋŋamba, nti ebibi byammwe bibikkuddwa. Buli omu amanyi bwe muli aboonoonyi. Ebibi byammwe mubiragidde mu bikolwa byammwe byonna. Kale nga bwe mubinzijukiza buli kaseera, nja kubawaayo mukwatibwe abalabe bammwe." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Naawe ggwe omubi, omufuzi wa Yisirayeli, olunaku lwo olw'okusalirwako omusango ogw'enkomerero, lutuuse." 
Ezekiel21:26 Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti ggyako engule n'ekitambaala ku mutwe gwo, kubanga ebintu tebirisigala nga bwe biri. Abagayibwa be balikuzibwa, abeekitiibwa bazzibwe wansi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ekibuga ekyo ndikizikiriza ne kiggwaawo, era tekiriddawo okutuusa nnyini kyo lw'alijja ne nkimuwa." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Ggwe omuntu, langa oyogere Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye ŋŋamba Abammoni abavuma Abayisirayeli. Bagambe nti: ‘Ekitala kisowoddwa okutta, kiziguddwa okuzikiriza, era kimyansa ng'enjota." 
Ezekiel21:29 Okulabikirwa kwe mufuna si kwa mazima, ne bye babalagula bya bulimba. Muli babi era boonoonefu, era olunaku olw'enkomerero, olw'okuweerwako ekibonerezo kyammwe, lutuuse. Ekitala kijja kusala obulago bwammwe." 
Ezekiel21:30 “ ‘Muzze ekitala mu kiraato kyakyo. Mu kifo mwe mwatonderwa, mu nsi mwe mwasibuka, mwe ndibasalira omusango." 
Ezekiel21:31 Era ndibayiirako ddala obusungu bwange, bubookye ng'olunyata lw'omuliro. Era ndibawaayo mu mikono gy'abantu abakambwe ng'ensolo, abamanyirivu mu kuzikiriza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Mulisaanyizibwawo omuliro. Omusaayi gwammwe guliyiibwa mu nsi yammwe, ne mutaddamu kujjukirwa.’ Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel22:2 “Ggwe omuntu, onoosalira omusango ekibuga ekyo ekijjudde obutemu? Kale kimanyise byonna ebyenyinyalwa bye kikola." 
Ezekiel22:3 Kitegeeze nti: Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti nga bw'otemudde abantu bo abangi, ne weejaajaamya ng'osinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale, ekiseera kyo kituuse." 
Ezekiel22:4 Ozzizza omusango gw'obutemu, era weejaajaamizza olw'ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye wakola, ekiseera kyo ne kituuka, era kiweddeko, kyenvudde nkuleka okuvumibwa amawanga n'okusekererwa ensi zonna." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abakuli okumpi n'abakuli ewala, balikusekerera kubanga olina erinnya ebbi era ojjudde obusasamalo." 
Ezekiel22:6 Abakulembeze ba Yisirayeli bonna beesiganga obuyinza bwabwe, ne battira abantu mu ggwe." 
Ezekiel22:7 Mu ggwe, abaana mwe banyoomera bakitaabwe ne bannyaabwe. Mu ggwe, mwe bayiikiririza abagwira, ne balyazaamaanya bannamwandu ne bamulekwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Onyooma ebintu byange ebitukuvu, era tokuuma Sabbaato ze nateekawo." 
Ezekiel22:9 Abawaayiriza bannaabwe battibwe, bali mu ggwe. Mu ggwe, mwe muli abalya ebitambiriddwa balubaale, era mu ggwe mwe bakolera eby'obukaba." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mu ggwe, mwe muli abeebaka ne bakaabakitaabwe. Mu ggwe, abasajja mwe bakwatira abakazi olw'empaka nga bali mu biseera byabwe ebya buli mwezi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mu ggwe mulimu abenda ku bakaabasajja, n'abasigula bakaabaana baabwe, era n'abakwata bannyinaabwe bwe bagatta bakitaabwe." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mu ggwe, mulimu abagulirirwa okutemula abantu, n'abamu basaba amagoba ku nsimbi ze bawola Bayisirayeli bannaabwe, ne babagaggawalirako. Banneerabidde.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Kale ndikubonereza n'amaanyi olw'obunyazi bwo n'obutemu bwo. 
Ezekiel22:14 Olowooza oliba okyalimu amaanyi, era ng'okyayinza wadde okugolola omukono gwo, mu biseera mwe ndikukangavvulira? Nze Mukama nkyogedde, era ndikituukiriza." 
Ezekiel22:15 Abantu bo ndibabunya mu mawanga, ne mbasaasaanya mu nsi nnyingi, ne mmalawo ebikolwa byo ebibi." 
Ezekiel22:16 Awo oliggwaamu ekitiibwa mu mawanga amalala, n'omanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange n'aŋŋamba nti: 
Ezekiel22:18 “Ggwe omuntu, ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli banfuukidde abatalina mugaso. Bo masengere agaggyiddwamu ekikomo, amasasi, ekyuma, ebbaati oba ffeeza mu kabiga k'omuliro." 
Ezekiel22:19 Kale kaakano Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti: nga mwenna bwe mufuuse amasengere, ndibakuŋŋaanya ne mbaggya mu Yerusaalemu," 
Ezekiel22:20 nga bwe bakuŋŋaanya ebiyinjayinja ebirimu ffeeza, oba ekikomo, oba ekyuma, oba ebbaati oba essasi, ne babiteeka mu kabiga k'omuliro ne bafukuta okubisaanuusa, nange bwe ntyo bwe ndibakuŋŋaanya mmwe, nga nnina obusungu n'ekiruyi, ne mbateeka awo, ne mbasaanuusa." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ddala ndibakuŋŋaanya ne mbafukutako omuliro gw'obusungu bwange, ne musaanuukira mu Yerusaalemu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nga ffeeza bw'asaanuukira mu kabiga k'omuliro, nammwe bwe mulisaanuukira mu Yerusaalemu, ne mulyoka mumanya nga Nze Mukama, nze mbamaliddeko ekiruyi kyange.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel22:24 “Ggwe omuntu, gamba Abayisirayeli nti ensi yaabwe si nnongoofu, era teritonnyebwamu nkuba mu kiseera kye ndigibonererezaamu nga nsunguwadde." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abalanzi abagirimu beekobye, ne baba ng'empologoma ewuluguma, etaagulataagula ensolo z'eyizze. Basse abantu, ne banyaga ensimbi n'ebyobugagga, na buli kintu eky'omuwendo, ne baleka ng'abakazi bangi bafuuse bannamwandu." 
Ezekiel22:26 Bakabona baamu, bamenya amateeka gange, era bajaajaamizza ebintu byange ebitukuvu. Tebaawula bitukuvu ku bitali bitukuvu. Tebayigiriza bantu kwawula birongoofu na bitali birongoofu, era tebassaayo mwoyo kukuuma Sabbaato ze nateekawo, kale ne bandeetera obutassibwamu kitiibwa." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abafuzi baamu bali ng'emisege egitaagulataagula ensolo ze giyizze. Batta abantu ne babazikiriza, balyoke beetwalire ebintu byabwe bagaggawale." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abalanzi baamu babikkirira ebibi ebyo, ng'abantu bwe babikkirira ekisenge nga bakisiigako langi. Bafuna okulabikirwa okutaliiwo, ne balanga eby'obulimba. Bagamba nti: ‘Mukama Afugabyonna agamba bw'ati,’ sso nga Nze Mukama, sirina kye njogedde." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abatuuze b'omu nsi eyo bayiikiriza bannaabwe, ne babanyagako ebyabwe. Banyigiriza abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, ne bayiikiriza abagwira awatali kubasaasira." 
Ezekiel22:30 Nanoonya mu bo omuntu ayinza okuddaabiriza ekisenge, n'ayimirira mu maaso gange mu kituli ekikubiddwa mu kisenge ekyo, awolereze ensi eyo nneme okugizikiriza, kyokka ne sirabayo n'omu." 
Ezekiel22:31 N'olwekyo mbasunguwalidde nnyo, era nja kubasaanyaawo n'omuliro gw'obusungu bwange, nga mbalanga bye bakoze.” Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, njogedde." 
Ezekiel23:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti:" 
Ezekiel23:2 “Ggwe omuntu, waaliwo abakazi babiri abazaalibwa nnyaabwe omu." 
Ezekiel23:3 Bwe baali bakyali bato nga bali e Misiri, ne bakola obwamalaaya, ne bakoma okuba embeerera." 
Ezekiel23:4 Amannya gaabwe, omukulu yali ayitibwa Ohola, ne muto we ng'ayitibwa Oholiba. Bombi nabawasa, ne banzaalira abaana ab'obulenzi n'ab'obuwala. Ng'amannya gaabwe bwe gali, Ohola ye Samariya, Oholiba ye Yerusaalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Newaakubadde Ohola yali mukazi wange, yakola obwamalaaya, ne yeerigomba ne baganzi be Abassiriya baliraanwa be." 
Ezekiel23:6 Baali batabaazi abambala ebya kakobe, abakungu era ab'amadaala agaawaggulu mu magye, bonna abavubuka abalabika obulungi, abeebagala embalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Bw'atyo n'akola obwamalaaya n'abasajja Abassiriya, bonna abasinga okwegombebwa. Okubasuusuuta ne kumuleetera okweyonoona ng'asinza ebifaananyi byonna ebya balubaale baabwe." 
Ezekiel23:8 Teyalekayo bwamalaaya bwe, bwe yatandika ng'ali e Misiri, gye yeebakira n'abasajja ng'akyali muto, n'afiirwa obubeererevu bwe." 
Ezekiel23:9 Kyennava mmuwaayo mu mikono gya baganzi be Abassiriya be yeerigombanga nabo. 
Ezekiel23:10 Baamwambula ne bamuleka bwereere ne batwala batabani be ne bawala be, ye ne bamutta n'ekitala. Bwe yamala okusalirwa omusango okumusinga, n'afuuka emboozi y'abakazi nga bageya abakoze eby'obuwemu." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Newaakubadde muganda we Oholiba ekyo yakiraba, kyokka Oholiba oyo, n'ayitiriza nnyo okukyama mu kwerigomba kwe, ne mu bwamalaaya bwe n'okusinga muganda we." 
Ezekiel23:12 Naye yasuusuuta Abassiriya baliraanwa be, abakungu, n'abakulu mu magye, abaayambalanga engoye ezinekaaneka ennyo, abeebagala embalaasi, bonna abavubuka abalabika obulungi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ne ndaba ng'agwagwawadde. Bombi baakwata ekkubo limu. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Oholiba ne yeeyongera mu bwamalaaya bwe, kubanga yalaba ebifaananyi by'abasajja Abakaludaaya abasiigiddwa mu langi emmyufu ku kisenge," 
Ezekiel23:15 nga beesibye enkoba mu biwato, nga bagaziyizza ebitambaala byabwe ku mitwe, ng'ennyambala y'abakungu b'e Babilooni mu nsi y'Abakaludaaya mwe baazaalibwa, bw'eri." 
Ezekiel23:16 Olwabalaba, n'abasuusuuta, n'abatumira ababaka mu Babilooniya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abababilooni ne bajja ne beebaka naye mu kitanda kye, ne bakola naye obwamalaaya. Bwe baamala okumwonoona, n'abatamwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Bwe yeeyongera okukola obwamalaaya mu lwatu, ne yeeyambulanga awatakyali nsonyi, ne mmutamwa nga bwe natamwa muganda we." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ne yeeyongerera ddala okukola obwamalaaya, nga bwe yabukolanga nga muwala muto e Misiri." 
Ezekiel23:20 N'asuusuuta baganzi be abalulunkanira okwebaka n'abakazi ng'endogoyi, n'embalaasi ennume bwe zirina omulugube gw'okulinnyira enkazi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Bw'otyo Oholiba n'ottukiza obukaba bwo bwe walina e Misiri, abasajja baayo bwe baakutigaatiga amabeere go n'ofiirwa obubeererevu bwo." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Kale ggwe Oholiba, kino Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, kye nkugamba: ndisitula ne ndeeta baganzi bo abo b'otamiddwa, ne bakulumba ku njuyi zonna." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ndireeta Abababilooni n'Abakaludaaya bonna, abasajja abava e Pekodi, n'e Sowa, n'e Kowa, n'Abassiriya bonna. Ndikuŋŋaanya abavubuka abo bonna abalabika obulungi, abakungu n'abakulu mu magye abalangira n'abasajja ab'ettutumu bonna nga beebagadde embalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Balikulumba nga babagalidde ebyokulwanyisa nga bava mu bukiikakkono nga balina amagaali agasikibwa embalaasi n'amalala ge bawalulira ku zinnamuziga, n'eggye eddene erivudde mu mawanga. Balijja balina enkuufiira n'engatto ennene n'entono, eby'okwetaasa. Balikutaayiza ku buli ludda. Ndikuwaayo mu mikono gyabwe, ne bakusalira omusango nga bakolera ku mateeka gaabwe." 
Ezekiel23:25 Okukulaga bwe nkusunguwalidde, ndibaleka ne bakumalirako ekiruyi kyabwe. Balikusalako ennyindo n'amatu, ne batta abaana bo. Ddala balitwala batabani bo ne bawala bo ne babookya omuliro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Balikwambulamu ebyambalo byo, ne bakuggyako amajolobera go agakuwoomya." 
Ezekiel23:27 Bwe ntyo bwe ndimalawo obukaba bwo, n'obwamalaaya bwo bwe wava nabwo e Misiri. Toliddamu kutunuulira bifaananyi bya balubaale b'e Misiri, wadde okuddamu okujjukira Misiri.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndikuwaayo mu mikono gy'abantu b'okyaye era b'otamiddwa. 
Ezekiel23:29 Era nga bwe bakukyaye, balikuggyako ebibyo byonna bye wateganira, balikwambula ne bakuleka ng'oli bwereere, ng'ebikolwa byo eby'obwenzi n'eby'obwamalaaya byanikiddwa. Obukaba bwo n'obwenzi n'obwamalaaya bwo," 
Ezekiel23:30 bwe bukutuusizza ku ebyo kubanga wayenda n'amawanga, ne weeyonoona ng'osinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale baago." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wagoberera emize gya muganda wo, kyendiva nkuwa ekibonerezo ng'ekikye.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Olinywa ku kikopo kya muganda wo eky'okubonaabona, ekiwanvu era ekinene. Olisekererwa n'okudaalirwa. Ekikopo ekyo kijjuvu." 
Ezekiel23:33 Kirikujjuza obutamiivu n'obuyinike. Ekikopo kya muganda wo Samariya, kye kikopo eky'ekikangabwa n'okwabulirwa." 
Ezekiel23:34 Olikinywa kyonna n'okikaliza, n'ebibajjo byakyo ebyatise n'obyeyaguza amabeere. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, Nze njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Mukama Afugabyonna, agamba nti: “Nga bw'onneerabidde n'onkuba amabega, kale ojja kubonaabona olw'obukaba bwo n'obwamalaaya bwo.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ggwe omuntu, onoosala omusango gwa Ohola ne Oholiba? Kale bategeeze ebyenyinyalwa bye baakola." 
Ezekiel23:37 Baayenda era ne batemula. Baayenda n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale. Baatemula batabani baabwe be banzaalira. Baabookya babe ebitambiro bye bagabula balubaale baabwe okulya. 
Ezekiel23:38 Era bankoze na kino: ku lunaku lwe lumu bajaajaamizza Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, era boonoonye Sabbaato gye nateekawo." 
Ezekiel23:39 “Bwe baamala okutta abaana baabwe ne babatambirira ebifaananyi bya balubaale, ne bajja ku lunaku olwo mu Kifo kyange Ekitukuvu ne bakijaajaamya!" 
Ezekiel23:40 “Emirundi n'emirundi baatuma ababaka okuyita abasajja abava ewala, ne bajja. Abakazi bombi abooluganda, ne banaaba ne beenyiriza, era ne beewoomya n'ebyobuyonjo" 
Ezekiel23:41 ne batuula ku kitanda ekyekitiibwa, emmeeza ng'etegekeddwa mu maaso gaakyo, kwe batadde obubaane n'omuzigo gw'emizayiti bye nabawa." 
Ezekiel23:42 Eddoboozi ly'ekibinja ky'abantu abali mu ddembe lyabwe, ne liwulirwa, abasajja abakopi omuli n'abatamiivu, ne baleetebwa okuva mu ddungu. Ne bateeka obukomo ku mikono gy'abakazi abo bombi, n'engule ennungi ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Abakaddiye banaayenda, ne bakola obwamalaaya n'abasajja ng'abo?’ Ne njogera ku oyo eyali akaddiyidde mu bwenzi nti: ‘Kaakano nabo banaakola naye obwamalaaya?’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Kyokka ne bagenda emirundi n'emirundi eri bamalaaya bano, Ohola ne Oholiba, abakazi abagwenyufu." 
Ezekiel23:45 Abantu ab'empisa ennungi, be balibasalira ogw'obwenzi n'ogw'obutemu ne gibasinga, kubanga benzi era batemu.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndibasindikira ogubinja gw'abantu ne nguleka ne gubayuuguumya era ne gubanyagulula. 
Ezekiel23:47 Kale ogubinja ogwo gulibakuba amayinja, ne gubafumita n'ebitala. Gulitta abaana baabwe abalenzi n'abawala, ne gwokya ennyumba zaabwe omuliro." 
Ezekiel23:48 Bwe ntyo bwe ndikomya obugwenyufu mu nsi eno, okulabula abakazi bonna obutakolanga bya bwenzi nga mmwe." 
Ezekiel23:49 Era mmwe abakazi ababiri, mulibonerezebwa olw'obukaba bwammwe, n'okusinza ebifaananyi bya balubaale. Kale olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama, Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi, mu mwaka ogw'omwenda nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Ggwe omuntu, wandiika olunaku lw'omwezi olw'olwaleero, kubanga luno lwe lunaku kabaka wa Babilooniya lw'atandikiddeko okuzingiza Yerusaalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Gerera ab'eggwanga eryo ejjeemu olugero, obagambe nti Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti: ‘Teeka sseffuliya ku kyoto, giteekeko ogifukemu amazzi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Giteekemu ebifi by'ennyama buli kifi ekirungi: ekisambi n'omukono. Gijjuze amagumba agasinga obulungi. 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwata mu ggana oggyemu eyo esingamu obulungi, oteekemu enku wansi, ofumbe bulungi byesere, ennyama n'amagumba biggye.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Mukama Afugabyonna, kyava agamba nti: “Ekibuga ekitemu zikisanze! Kiri nga sseffuliya erimu obutalagge, ng'obutalagge bwayo tebugivaamu. Gitoolemu kifi ku kifi, awatali kweroboza," 
Ezekiel24:7 kubanga waaliwo obutemu mu kyo. Naye omusaayi tekyaguyiwa ku ttaka kubikkibwako nfuufu. Kyaguteeka ku lwazi olwereere. 
Ezekiel24:8 Omusaayi ogwo ngutadde ku lwazi olwereere guleme okubikkibwako, gusitule obusungu bwange okuwoolera eggwanga.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Mukama Afugabyonna kyava agamba nti: “Zikusanze ggwe ekibuga ekitemu. Nange nzennyini ndikola entuumu ennene ey'enku. 
Ezekiel24:10 Yongerako enku nnyingi, okumemu omuliro. Teekamu ebirungo. Fumba okalize amazzi, ebifi bisiriire." 
Ezekiel24:11 Sseffuliya enkalu giteeke ku manda ebugume, ekikomo kyayo kyengerere, obujama bwayo busaanuukire mu kyo, obutalagge bwayo buggweewo." 
Ezekiel24:12 Wadde nga kikooya, kitawaanyiza bwereere: obutalagge bwakyo obungi tebukivaamu. Obutalagge bwakyo tebukivaamu na muliro." 
Ezekiel24:13 Obukaba bwo, Yerusaalemu bukwonoonye. Wadde nafuba nkulongoose, naye tewalongooka. Toliddamu kulongooka okutuusa lwe ndikumalirako ekiruyi kyange." 
Ezekiel24:14 Nze Mukama njogedde. Ekiseera kirituuka, ne nkola. Siridda mabega, sirisonyiwa, era sirikwatibwa kisa. Ndikusalira omusango nga nsinziira ku mpisa zo, ne ku bikolwa byo.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel24:15 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel24:16 “Ggwe omuntu, laba, nja kukuggyako mbagirawo, oyo gw'otunulako n'osanyuka. Naye tojja kukungubaga wadde okukulukusa amaziga." 
Ezekiel24:17 Sindira muli kasirise. Tokungubagira afudde. Weesibe ekiremba kyo ku mutwe, onaanike engatto mu bigere. Teweebikka ku maaso, era tolya ku mmere ya bakungubazi.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Awo ne njogera n'abantu mu budde obw'enkya. Ku olwo akawungeezi, mukazi wange n'afa. Ku lunaku olwaddirira, ne nkola nga Mukama bwe yandagidde." 
Ezekiel24:19 Abantu ne ba mbuuza nti: “Tubuulire obubaka obutukwatako, obuli mu ebyo by'okola.”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Awo ne mbagamba nti: “Mukama yayogedde nange, n'aŋŋamba" 
Ezekiel24:21 okubagamba mmwe ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli nti: Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: ‘Ndyonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu ekibaleetera okwemanya bwe muli ab'amaanyi, era kye mwegomba okutunulako ne kibatwala omutima. Era batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe be mwaleka mu Yerusaalemu, balittirwa mu lutalo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Olwo nammwe mulikola nga nze bwe nkoze: temulibikka ku mitwe gyammwe, era temulirya ku mmere ya bakungubazi." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ebiremba byammwe birisigala ku mitwe gyammwe, n'engatto zammwe zirisigala mu bigere byammwe. Temulikungubaga era temulikaaba maziga, naye mulikogga olw'ebibi byammwe, buli muntu asindire munne ennaku." 
Ezekiel24:24 Kale Ezeekyeli aliba akabonero akabalabula mmwe: byonna by'akoze nammwe bye mulikola. Ekyo bwe kirituukirira, kale mulitegeera nga Nze Mukama Afugabyonna.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kale ggwe omuntu, ku lunaku olwo ndibaggyako ekyo ekibaleetera okwemanya bwe bali ab'amaanyi, ekibasanyusa, ekibeewaanya, kye beegomba okutunulako era ekibatwala omutima. Era ndibaggyako batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe." 
Ezekiel24:26 Ku lunaku olwo oyo aliba awonyeewo alijja gy'oli okukikutegeeza. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ku lunaku olwo, olulimi lwo lulisumulukuka n'osobola okuddamu okwogera n'oyo aliba awonyeewo. Bw'otyo bw'oliba akabonero akalabula abantu abo, era balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Ggwe omuntu, simba amaaso go okwolekera Abammoni, olange ebizibu ebiribatuukako." 
Ezekiel25:3 Obagambe nti: ‘Muwulire Mukama Afugabyonna ky'agamba. Agamba nti nga bwe mwasanyuka okulaba ng'Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu kyonooneddwa, n'okulaba ng'ensi ya Yisirayeli efuuse matongo, era ng'ab'Eggwanga lya Buyudaaya batwaliddwa mu buwaŋŋanguse nga basibe," 
Ezekiel25:4 kale ndibawaayo, abantu abava ebuvanjuba ne babawangula. Balikuba ensiisira zaabwe mu nsi yammwe, ne bagibeeramu. Balirya ebibala bye mulimye, era ne banywa amata g'ensolo zammwe." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndifuula Ekibuga Rabba ekisibo eky'eŋŋamiya, n'ensi ya Ammoni yonna, ne ngifuula ekifo omugalamira amagana g'endiga n'embuzi, mulyoke mumanye nga Nze Mukama.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:6 Mukama Afugabyonna, agamba nti: “Nga bwe mukubye mu ngalo ne musagambiza, ne mulaga ettima n'effutwa bye mulina ku nsi ya Yisirayeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 ndibabonereza ne mbawaayo mu buyinza bw'ab'amawanga amalala, babanyage. Ndibazikiririza ddala ne mutaddayo kuba ggwanga, wadde okuba n'ensi eyammwe ku bwammwe, mulyoke mumanye nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ab'e Mowaabu ne Seyiri nga bwe bagamba nti Buyudaaya eri ng'amawanga amalala gonna, Zef 2:8-11" 
Ezekiel25:9 ebibuga ebitaasa ensalo za Mowaabu omuli n'ebibuga Beti Yesimooti, ne Baali Mewooni ne Kiriyatayiimu ndibireka ne birumbibwa." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndireka abantu abava ebuvanjuba okulumba Abamowaabu n'Abammoni ne babawangula, ne bataddayo kuba ggwanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ndibonereza Abamowaabu, balyoke bamanye nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Abeedomu baakola bubi nnyo okuwoolera eggwanga ku b'omu Buyudaaya awatali kusaasira. Amo 1:11-12; Ob 1-14; Mal 1:2-5 
Ezekiel25:13 Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kyenva ŋŋamba nti ndibonereza Edomu ne ngimalamu abantu n'ensolo. Ndigifuula matongo. Abantu baamu balittirwa mu lutalo okuva e Temani okutuuka e Dedani. 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndikozesa abantu bange Abayisirayeli okuwoolera eggwanga ku Edomu, bakole ku Edomu nga bwe njagala, bagimalireko obusungu n'ekiruyi kyange, Abeedomu balyoke bamanye nga bwe mpoolera eggwanga.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel25:15 Mukama Afugabyonna, agamba nti: “Abafilistiya nga bwe bawooledde eggwanga ku balabe baabwe ab'olubeerera, ne babazikiriza nga bajjudde obukyayi, Zef 2:4-7; Zek 9:5-7" 
Ezekiel25:16 Nze Mukama Katonda kyenva ŋŋamba nti ndirumba Abafilistiya abo ne mbazikiriza. Ndimalirawo ddala Abakereti, nsaanyeewo n'abaliba bawonyeewo ku b'oku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndibabonereza n'obukambwe, mpoolere eggwanga ku bo. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama, bwe ndiwoolera eggwanga ku bo.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ku lunaku olw'olubereberye olw'omwezi, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: Mat 11:21-22; Luk 10:13-14" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Ggwe omuntu, Tiiro nga bwe kyayogera ku Yerusaalemu nti: ‘Otyo! Yerusaalemu ekyali omulyango gw'obusuubuzi bw'amawanga nga bwe kimenyeddwa ne kifuuka amatongo, nze nzize mu kifo kyakyo, kaakano nja kugaggawala.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kyenva ŋŋamba nti ndi mulabe wo ggwe Ekibuga Tiiro, era ng'ennyanja bw'esitula amayengo gaayo, nange ndisitula amawanga mangi, ne gajja ne gakulwanyisa." 
Ezekiel26:4 Galimenya ebigo byo, ne gazikiriza eminaala gyo. Galikukalakatako ettaka, n'osigala lwazi lwereere." 
Ezekiel26:5 Onoobanga kifo abavubi mwe baanika obutimba bwabwe, awo w'oli mu nnyanja. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, nze njogedde. Amawanga galyefunira omunyago mu Tiiro," 
Ezekiel26:6 era abantu abali mu bubuga bwakyo ku lukalu, balittirwa mu lutalo, Tiiro kiryoke kimanye nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndireeta Nebukadunezzari Kabaka wa Babilooniya, kabaka asinga bakabaka bonna amaanyi, ajje alumbe Tiiro. Aliva ebukiikakkono, ajje n'eggye eddene omuliba embalaasi, n'amagaali, n'abeebagadde embalaasi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Alittira mu lutalo abo ab'omu bubuga obuli ku lukalu. Alikuzimbako ebigo okukuzingiza, akutuumeko ebifunvu eby'okukuwalampirako, akulumbe ng'akutte engabo eŋŋumu ng'ekisenge." 
Ezekiel26:9 Alimenya ebigo byo ng'akozesa ebyuma ebitomera, era alimenyerawo ddala eminaala gyo ng'akozesa ensuuluulu ze." 
Ezekiel26:10 Embalaasi ze eziyinze obungi, zirisitula enfuufu n'ekubikka. Omusinde n'oluyoogaano lw'embalaasi, ne nnamuziga, n'amagaali, birikankanya ebisenge byo ng'ayingira mu miryango gyo, ng'ayita mu miryango gyo nga bwe bayita mu bisenge by'ekibuga ebikubiddwamu ebituli." 
Ezekiel26:11 Alirinnyirira enguudo zo zonna n'ebinuulo by'embalaasi ze, era alittira abantu bo mu lutalo. Empagi zo ez'amaanyi zirisuulibwa wansi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Ebibyo ebyobugagga n'eby'obusuubuzi, balibiwenja yonna gye biri ne babinyaga. Balimenyawo ebisenge byo, ne bazikiriza amayumba go amalungi. Amayinja go, n'embaawo zo, n'ebibyo ebirala byonna bye boonoonye, balibisuula mu nnyanja." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndikomya amaloboozi g'abayimbira mu ggwe, era ennanga zo teziriddayo kuwulirwa nate." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndikufuula lwazi olwereere, abavubi kwe banaayanikanga obutimba bwabwe, era toliddamu kuzimbibwa, kubanga nze Mukama Afugabyonna njogedde.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel26:15 Mukama agamba Tiiro nti: “Olowooza ab'okubizinga bwe baliwulira okubwatuka kwo ng'ogwa, n'okusindogoma kw'abafumitiddwa nga batirimbulirwa mu ggwe, tebalikankana?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Awo bakabaka bonna ab'ensi eziriraanye ennyanja, baliva ku ntebe zaabwe ez'obwakabaka, ne baggyako eminagiro gyabwe, ne bambulamu ebyambalo byabwe ebiriko amajolobera, nga bakankana, ne batuula wansi ku ttaka nga batintima buli kaseera, nga bawuniikiridde olw'ebikutuuseeko." 
Ezekiel26:17 Balikukungubagira nga bakugamba nti: ‘Ng'ozikiridde ggwe ekibuga ekyabeerangamu abalunnyanja! Nga wayatiikirira! Wali wa maanyi ku nnyanja: ggwe n'abatuuze bo, nga mutiisa abagisaabalako." 
Ezekiel26:18 Kaakano ebizinga bikankana ku lunaku lw'ogwiriddeko, weewaawo ebizinga ebiri mu nnyanja kati byeraliikirivu, nga biraba bw'oggwaawo!’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Bwe ndikufuula ekibuga ekyalekebwa awo ettayo, n'oba ng'ebibuga ebitakyabeeramu bantu, bwe ndikubunduggulako ennyanja, amazzi amangi ne gakubuutikira," 
Ezekiel26:20 kale ndikuserengesa mu bafu abakkirira emagombe, eri abantu ab'emirembe egy'edda. Ndikuteeka ku ntobo y'ensi ekuzimu, mu bifo ebyafuuka edda amatongo, obe wamu n'abafu abali emagombe, olemenga kusengebwangamu, wadde okubalirwanga mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndikutuusa ku nkomerero etiisa, oggweewo, ne bwe balikunoonya batya, oleme kuddayo kulabikako ennaku zonna.” Mukama Afugabyonna, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Ezekiel27:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Ggwe omuntu, kungubagira Ekibuga Tiiro," 
Ezekiel27:3 okigambe nti: Ggwe Tiiro, omwalo gw'ennyanja, era asuubulagana n'abantu ab'oku bizinga ebingi, Mukama Afugabyonna akugamba nti: ‘Ggwe Tiiro, ogamba nti oli mulungi, toliiko bbala." 
Ezekiel27:4 Wateekebwa mu nnyanja wakati, abazimbi bo ne bakuyooyoota." 
Ezekiel27:5 Embaawo zonna ze baakozesa, baaziggya mu miberosi gy'e Seniri. Mu muvule gw'e Lebanooni, mwe baakukolera omulongooti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Mu myera gye Basani mwe baakola enkasi zo. Baakwaliiramu embaawo ez'enzo, eziva mu bizinga by'e Kittimu, ze bawaayiddemu amasanga." 
Ezekiel27:7 Amatanga go baagakola mu lugoye olweru okuli emidalizo egyava e Misiri. Ago ye bbendera yo. Wabikkibwako engoye ennungi eza bbululu n'eza kakobe, ezaava ku bizinga bya Elisa." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abatuuze b'e Sidoni ne Aruvadi be baali abavuzi b'amaato go. Abakungu abaali mu ggwe, Tiiro, be baakuvugiranga emmeeri." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abantu abakulu mu Gebali n'abagezi baayo, baali mu ggwe, nga be baddaabiriza emmeeri zo. Emmeeri zonna ez'oku nnyanja n'abalunnyanja baazo, baabeeranga mu ggwe okusuubula ebyamaguzi byo." 
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Abaserikale Abaperusi, n'Abaluudi, n'Abapuuti, baali mu ggye lyo. Baawanikanga mu ggwe engabo n'enkuufiira ez'ebyuma, ne bakufunyisa ettutumu." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abaserikale b'e Aruvadi awamu n'eggye lyo, be baakuumanga ebigo byo. N'abasajja b'e Gamadi, be baabanga mu minaala gyo. Baatimbanga engabo zaabwe ku bisenge byo ne bakulungiya." 
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘Ab'e Tarusiisi baasuubulagananga naawe ebyamaguzi byo ebya buli ngeri, ne bakusasulamu ffeeza n'ekyuma, n'amabaati, n'amasasi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ab'e Yavani, Tubali ne Meseki, baasuubulagananga naawe. Baawangayo abaddu n'ekikomo, ne bakugulako ebintu." 
Ezekiel27:14 Ab'e Togaruma baagulanga eby'obusuubuzi bwo, nga bakuwa embalaasi ezaabulijjo, n'ezo ezikozesebwa mu ntalo, era n'ennyumbu." 
Ezekiel27:15 Abantu b'e Dedani be wasuubulagananga nabo; era ebizinga bingi wabirinamu akatale. Baakuleeteranga ebintu okuwaanyisaamu amasanga, n'embaawo z'emitoogo." 
Ezekiel27:16 Abassiriya baasuubulagananga naawe olw'ebintu ebingi bye wakolanga, bye baakuwangamu amayinja ag'omuwendo, aga kiragala, n'engoye eza kakobe, n'emidalizo, n'engoye enjeru ennungi, n'amayinja amalungi aga korali, n'amamyufu amatwakaavu." 
Ezekiel27:17 Buyudaaya n'ensi ya Yisirayeli zaasuubulagananga naawe. Baawangayo eŋŋaano eyavanga e Minniti, n'ebyakawoowo, n'omubisi gw'enjuki, n'omuzigo, n'envumbo okukugulako ebintu." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ab'e Damasiko baakugulangako ebintu bye wakolanga mu bungi, n'ebyobugagga bye walina ebingi ebya buli ngeri. Baabikusasulangamu omwenge gw'emizabbibu ogw'e Helubooni, n'ebyoya by'endiga ebyeru." 
Ezekiel27:19 Daani ne Yavani beetawulanga, ne bagula ebintu byo. Ekyuma ekimasamasa, ebyamaguzi ebiyitibwa Kassiya ne Keeni, bye bimu ku byali mu by'otunda." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ab'e Dedani, baasuubulagananga naawe mu ngoye ezikolwamu amatandiiko, ag'okuteeka ku mbalaasi ezeebagalwa." 
Ezekiel27:21 Wakolagananga n'Abawarabu era n'abakungu bonna ab'e Kedari, mu busuubuzi bw'endiga ento, ne sseddume z'endiga n'ez'embuzi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abasuubuzi b'e Seeba ne Raama, baaleetanga ebyakawoowo ebisinga obulungi, n'amayinja gonna ag'omuwendo, ne zaabu, okugula ebintu byo." 
Ezekiel27:23 Wasuubulagananga n'ebibuga Harani, ne Kanne, ne Edeni, n'abasuubuzi b'e Seeba n'e Assuri, n'e Kilumaadi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Wasuubulagananga nabo mu bintu ebirungi, engoye eza kakobe, ebyambalo ebiriko emidalizo, n'ebiwempe ebya langi ezinekaaneka, n'emiguwa emirange obulungi." 
Ezekiel27:25 Eby'obusuubuzi byo byatwalirwanga mu maato amanene, ag'e Tarusiisi. Wajjula ng'emmeeri, n'oba waakitiibwa mu nnyanja." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abavuzi b'enkasi zo baakutuusa mu mazzi amangi. Omuyaga gw'ebuvanjuba gukumenyedde mu buziba bw'ennyanja. 
Ezekiel27:27 Obugagga bwo, n'ebyamaguzi byo, abalunnyanja bo bonna, n'abagoba bo n'abakozi, n'abatambuza ebyamaguzi byo, n'abaserikale bo bonna abali mu ggwe, n'abantu abalala bonna abali mu ggwe, baligwa mu buziba bw'ennyanja, ku lunaku lw'olizikirira." 
Ezekiel27:28 Okuleekaana kw'abagoba bo, kulikankanya ebyalo ebiriraanyeewo.’" 
Ezekiel27:29 “Abakwata enkasi bonna, na buli mulunnyanja, emmeeri zaabwe balizaabulira, ne bayimirira ku lubalama." 
Ezekiel27:30 Balireekaana nga bakungubaga ku lulwo. Balyeyiira enfuufu mu mitwe gyabwe, ne beekulukuunya mu vvu." 
Ezekiel27:31 Ku lulwo balyemwako enviiri, ne bambala ebikutiya. Balikukaabira amaziga, emitima gyabwe ne gijjula ennyiike." 
Ezekiel27:32 Balikuba ebiwoobe mu kukungubaga, ne bakaaba ne basindogoma nti ani yenkana Tiiro, Tiiro oyo asirikkidde mu nnyanja!" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ebintu byo bwe byagobanga ku lukalu nga biggyiddwa mu nnyanja, wamalangawo obwetaavu bw'abangi, n'ogaggawaza bakabaka b'ensi, olwa nnamunkukumbo w'obugagga bwo, n'ow'eby'obusuubuzi bwo." 
Ezekiel27:34 Naye kaakano omenyekedde mu nnyanja, mu bwengula bw'amazzi amangi. Ebibyo n'abakozi bo bonna batokomokedde mu ggwe, mu nnyanja." 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonna abatuuze b'oku bizinga bakubiddwa encukwe ku lulwo, ne bakabaka baabwe batidde nnyo, era bonna batintima." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abasuubuzi b'omu mawanga bennyamivu ku lulwo. Obafuukidde kya ntiisa, kubanga tokyaddayo kubaawo nate!”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel28:2 “Ggwe omuntu, tegeeza omufuzi wa Tiiro, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna bye mmugamba nti: ‘Weegulumiza mu mutima gwo n'ogamba nti oli lubaale, era otudde ku ntebe ya lubaale mu nnyanja wakati. Kyokka oli muntu buntu sso si lubaale, newaakubadde ng'olowooza mu mutima gwo nti oli lubaale." 
Ezekiel28:3 Olowooza ng'oli mugezi okusinga Daniyeli, nga tewali kyama kye bayinza kukukisa." 
Ezekiel28:4 Amagezi go n'okutegeera byakufunyisa obugagga, n'otereka zaabu ne ffeeza mu mawanika go." 
Ezekiel28:5 Olw'amagezi go amangi mu byobusuubuzi, weeyongedde okugaggawala, ne weegulumiza olw'obugagga bwo." 
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna ŋŋamba nti nga bw'olowooza ng'olina amagezi ng'aga lubaale," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndisindika ab'amawanga agasingayo okuba amakambwe, ne bakulumba mu lutalo, ne bazikiriza ebintu ebirungi bye wafuna olw'amagezi go, ne boonoona ekitiibwa kyo." 
Ezekiel28:8 Balikutta ne bakussa mu bunnya, era olifa ng'abo abattirwa eyo mu nnyanja wakati." 
Ezekiel28:9 Era olyogerera mu maaso g'abo abakutta nti oli lubaale? Oliba muntu buntu sso si lubaale, mu mikono gy'abo abakufumita." 
Ezekiel28:10 Olifa ng'embwa mu mikono gya bannaggwanga abatamanyi Katonda. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, Nze njogedde.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel28:12 “Ggwe omuntu, kungubagira Kabaka wa Tiiro, omutegeeze Nze Mukama Afugabyonna bye mmugamba nti: ‘Wali kyakulabirako eky'omuntu atuukiridde, ng'ojjudde amagezi, era ng'oli mulungi nnyo mu ndabika." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wali obeera mu Edeni, ennimiro ya Katonda, ng'owundiddwa na buli jjinja ery'omuwendo ennyo: sarudiyo, topaazi, alimaasi, berulo, onikiso, yasipero, safiro n'ejjinja erya kiragala, ne kabunkulo, ne zaabu. Byakutegekerwa ku lunaku kwe watonderwa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nalonda kerubi ne mmuteekawo okukukuuma. N'obeera ku lusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu, n'otambulira wakati mu mayinja agamyamyansa ng'omuliro." 
Ezekiel28:15 Empisa zo zaali nnungi okuva lwe watondebwa, okutuusa lwe watandika okukola ebibi." 
Ezekiel28:16 Weemalira mu byobusuubuzi, ne bikuleetera obukambwe n'okola ebibi. Kyenvudde nkugoba ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu nga nkulanga obwonoonefu bwo, kerubi eyali akukuuma n'akugoba, n'oggyibwa ku mayinja agamyamyansa ng'omuliro." 
Ezekiel28:17 Weekulumbaza olw'obulungi bw'endabika yo, ettutumu lyo ne likuleetera okweyisa ng'omusiru. Kyennava nkusuula wansi, ne nkuteeka mu maaso ga bakabaka abalala, bakutunuleko balabuke." 
Ezekiel28:18 Olw'ebibi byo ebingi n'obukumpanya mu busuubuzi bwo, wavumaganya ebifo byo ebitukuvu. Kyenvudde nzigya omuliro wakati mu ggwe ne gukwokya, abakutunulako bonna ne balaba bw'ofuuse evvu." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ab'omu mawanga gonna abakumanyi balyewuunya ekikutuuseeko, n'obakwasa entiisa, ng'ozikiridde. Toliddamu kubaawo ennaku zonna!’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel28:21 “Ggwe omuntu, amaaso go goolekeze Ekibuga Sidoni, olange eby'akabi ebirikituukako." 
Ezekiel28:22 Okitegeeze, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, bye njogera ku kyo, nti nze ndi mulabe wo, ggwe Sidoni, era abantu balintendereza olw'ebyo bye ndikola mu ggwe. Balimanya nga Nze Mukama, bwe ndiraga bwe ndi omutuukirivu, nga mbonereza abo abakubeeramu." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndisindika ebirwadde ebibi mu ggwe, era omusaayi gulikulukutira mu nguudo zo. Abantu bo balittibwa ng'olumbiddwa ab'ebitala ku njuyi zonna. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel28:24 “Ku mawanga gonna ageetooloddewo agaali gajooga ab'Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli, tewaliba na limu liriba nga maggwa agabafumita mmwe wadde agabaagula. Kale balimanya nga nze Mukama Afugabyonna.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Mukama Afugabyonna, agamba nti: “Bwe ndimala okukuŋŋaanya Abayisirayeli ne mbaggya mu mawanga mwe baasaasaanyizibwa, ab'amawanga gonna, baliraba bwe ndi omutuukirivu. Olwo Abayisirayeli balibeera mu nsi yaabwe, gye nawa omuweereza wange Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Balikkalira mirembe mu yo, ne bazimba amayumba, ne basimba ennimiro z'emizabbibu. Ddala Abayisirayeli baliba mirembe, bwe ndimala okubonereza baliraanwa baabwe ababajooga. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama, Katonda waabwe.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ku lunaku olw'ekkumi n'ebbiri olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Ggwe omuntu, yolekeza amaaso go Kabaka w'e Misiri, olange eby'akabi ebirimutuukako, n'ebirituuka ku Misiri yonna." 
Ezekiel29:3 Yogera omutegeeze, Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kye ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ndi mulabe wo ggwe Kabaka wa Misiri, ggwe gugoonya ogunene, ogugalamira mu ngezi y'amazzi, n'ogamba nti: Omugga Kiyira gwange, era nze nagwekolera!’ “Nga bwe wagamba nti: Omugga Kiyira gugwo era ggwe wagukola," 
Ezekiel29:4 nditeeka amalobo mu mba zo, ne ndeetera ebyennyanja eby'omu mugga gwo okukwatira ku magamba go, ndyoke nkusikeyo mu mugga gwo wamu n'ebyennyanja byonna ebikwatidde ku ggwe." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndikuleka ng'osuuliddwa mu ddungu ggwe, n'ebyennyanja ebyo eby'omu mugga gwo. Oligwa ku ttale ebweru, ne wataba akuggyawo wadde akuziika. Nkuwaddeyo oliibwe ensolo ez'oku ttale, n'ebinyonyi ebibuuka mu bbanga." 
Ezekiel29:6 Kale abantu bonna abali mu Misiri balimanya nga nze Mukama, kubanga mmwe Abamisiri, Abayisirayeli baabeesiga, naye ne mubabeerera ng'omuggo ogw'olumuli." 
Ezekiel29:7 Bwe baabakwata okubeesimbaggirizaako, mwamenyeka, ne mubafumita mu nkwawa zaabwe. Bwe baabeesigamako, mwamenyeka, ne muleetera emigongo gyabwe okwekaaka." 
Ezekiel29:8 Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kyenva nkugamba ggwe Misiri, nti ndireeta ab'ebitala ne bakulumba, ne batta mu ggwe abantu n'ensolo." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ensi y'e Misiri erisigala matongo ng'ezise. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama. 
Ezekiel29:10 Kale ndi mulabe wo, era ndi mulabe wa migga gyo, era ndifuula ensi y'e Misiri ensiko enjereere era amatongo, okuva e Migidooli okutuuka e Siyeene, n'okutuuka ku nsalo ne Etiyopiya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Tewaliba kigere kya muntu wadde eky'ensolo ekiriyitamu. Teribeerebwamu okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
Ezekiel29:12 Ensi y'e Misiri ndigifuula amatongo n'okusinga ensi endala zonna ezaali zifuuse amatongo. N'ebibuga byayo birimala emyaka amakumi ana nga bizisiddwa okusinga ebirala byonna ebyali bifuuliddwa amatongo. Abamisiri ndibasaasaanya mu mawanga mangi ku nsi, ne banoonya obubudamo mu nsi nnyingi.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Emyaka amakumi ana bwe giriyitawo, ndikuŋŋaanya Abamisiri okubaggya mu mawanga gye baasaasaanyizibwa." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndikomyawo Abamisiri nga bava mu buwaŋŋanguse, ne mbazza mu nsi y'e Paturoosi, ensi mwe baazaalirwa, babeere eyo, nga bafuuse bwakabaka obunafu." 
Ezekiel29:15 Baliba obwakabaka obusingirayo ddala okuba obunafu, obutaliddayo kwekulumbaliza ku mawanga malala. Ndikendeeza omuwendo gwabwe, ne bataddayo kufuga mawanga malala." 
Ezekiel29:16 Eggwanga lya Yisirayeli teririddayo kubeesiga kuliwa buyambi. Ebituuse ku Misiri binajjukizanga Yisirayeli nga kyali kikyamu okubeesiganga. Olwo Abayisirayeli balimanya nga Nze Mukama Afugabyonna.” 
Ezekiel29:17 Ku lunaku olw'olubereberye olw'omwezi ogw'olubereberye, mu mwaka ogw'amakumi abiri mu omusanvu nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Ggwe omuntu, Kabaka Nebukadunezzari owa Babilooniya yasitula eggye lye ery'amaanyi okulwanyisa Tiiro. N'atikka abaserikale be emigugu emizito, buli mutwe ne gukutuka ekiwalaata, na buli kibegabega ne kinuubuka, kyokka ye, wadde abaserikale be, tebalina kye baaganyulwa mu kulumba Tiiro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Kale kaakano Nze Mukama Afugabyonna kino kye ŋŋamba nti Nebukadunezzari kabaka wa Babilooniya, ndimuwa ensi y'e Misiri. Alinyaga nnamunkukumbo w'obugagga, n'atwala omunyago nga ye mpeera y'abaserikale be." 
Ezekiel29:20 Mmuwadde ensi y'e Misiri ebe empeera ye gye yatabaalira, kubanga eggye lye lyakolera nze. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, njogedde." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ekyo bwe kirituukirira, Abayisirayeli ndibafuula ba maanyi, era ndikuleka ggwe Ezeekyeli, n'oyogerera buli muntu w'ayinza okukuwulirira. Olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Mukama era n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel30:2 “Ggwe omuntu langa oyogere Nze Mukama Afugabyonna bye ŋŋamba. Mukungubage nga mugamba nti: Olunaku olwo zirusanze! 
Ezekiel30:3 Olunaku olwo luli kumpi, olunaku Mukama lw'alikolerako eby'amaanyi. Luliba lunaku lwa bire, olunaku amawanga kwe galibonererezebwa." 
Ezekiel30:4 Walibaawo olutalo mu Misiri n'obulumi buligwira Kuusi. Bangi balittibwa mu Misiri, obugagga bwayo ne bunyagibwa; n'emisingi gyayo girimenyebwawo." 
Ezekiel30:5 Ab'e Kuusi ne Puuti ne Luudi Abawarabu n'Abalibiya, n'ab'ensi zonna ez'omukago, balifiira mu lutalo olwo.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Abo abawanirira Misiri baligwa, amaanyi agagireetera okwekuza galimenyebwawo, n'abantu baayo balittirwa mu lutalo, okuva e Migidooli okutuuka e Siyeene. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, njogedde." 
Ezekiel30:7 Erifuuka amatongo, n'okusinga ensi endala zonna ezaali zifuuse amatongo, n'ebibuga byayo birizika n'okusinga ebibuga ebirala byonna ebyali bizisiddwa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Bwe ndimala okukuma omuliro mu Misiri abagiyambako bonna ne bafa, olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel30:9 Ku lunaku olwo ndituma ababaka ne bagendera mu mmeeri, okutiisa ab'e Kuusi abatebenkedde. Balituukibwako obulumi ku lunaku Misiri kw'alibonererezebwa. Ddala olunaku olwo lujja.”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Mukama Afugabyonna agamba nti: “Ndikomya ebyobugagga bwa Misiri nga nkozesa Nebukadunezzari, Kabaka wa Babilooniya." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ye n'ab'eggye lye abasingayo mu mawanga okuba abakambwe, balijja ne bazikiriza ensi eyo. Balisowola ebitala byabwe ne balwanyisa Misiri, ne bagijjuza emirambo gy'abattiddwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndikaza Omugga Kiyira, ne nteeka ensi y'e Misiri mu mikono gy'abantu ababi. Ndireka abagwira boonoone ensi eyo ne byonna ebirimu. Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, njogedde.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Mukama Afugabyonna n'agamba nti: “Era ndizikiriza ebifaananyi bya balubaale e Misiri, mbimalewo mu Menfiisi. Tewalisigalawo n'omu alitwala bufuzi mu nsi eyo, era ndigireetamu entiisa." 
Ezekiel30:14 Paturoosi ndikifuula matongo, Zowani nkikumeko omuliro, ne Tebesi nkiwe ekibonerezo." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndimalira obusungu bwange ku Kibuga Siini, kye kigo kya Misiri eky'okwerindiramu ekisingayo obugumu, era ndimalirawo ddala abantu b'e Tebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndikuma omuliro ku Misiri, Siini kiribonaabona nnyo. Ebisenge bya Tebesi birikubwamu ebituli, n'Ekibuga Menfiisi, kinaabeeranga mu ntiisa buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abalenzi ab'omu bibuga Aveni ne Pibeseti balittirwa mu lutalo, abantu abalala ne batwalibwa nga basibe." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ekizikiza kirikwata e Tehafuneheesi bwe ndimenyerayo obuyinza bwa Misiri, ne nkomya amaanyi gaabwe agaali gabeeyagaza. Ekire kiribikka ku Misiri, abantu b'omu bibuga byayo ne batwalibwa nga basibe." 
Ezekiel30:19 Bwe ntyo bwe ndibonereza Misiri, ne balyoka bamanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Ku lunaku olw'omusanvu olw'omwezi ogw'olubereberye, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Ggwe omuntu, mmenye omukono gwa Kabaka wa Misiri. Tegusibiddwako ddagala wadde okuyungibwa gusobole okuwona n'okuba ogw'amaanyi, okuddamu okukwata ekitala." 
Ezekiel30:22 Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, ŋŋamba nti ndi mulabe wa Kabaka wa Misiri, era ndimenya emikono gye gyombi, ogw'amaanyi n'ogwo ogwamenyeka, mmusuuze ekitala ky'akutte." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndisaasaanya Abamisiri mu mawanga mangi ku nsi," 
Ezekiel30:24 era ndinyweza emikono gya kabaka wa Babilooniya, ne nteeka ekitala kyange mu mukono gwe. Kyokka ndimenya emikono gya kabaka wa Misiri, asindire mu maaso ga kabaka wa Babilooniya, ng'omuntu afumitiddwa ebiwundu eby'okumutta bw'asinda." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndiwa amaanyi emikono gya Kabaka wa Babilooniya, naye emikono gya kabaka wa Misiri girinafuwa ne gikka. Bwe nditeeka ekitala kyange mu ngalo za kabaka wa Babilooniya n'akyolekeza ensi y'e Misiri, olwo balimanya nga Nze Mukama." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndisaasaanya Abamisiri mu mawanga mangi ku nsi, kale balimanya nga Nze Mukama.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ku lunaku olw'olubereberye olw'omwezi ogwokusatu, mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu nga tuli mu buwaŋŋanguse, Mukama n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Ggwe omuntu, gamba Kabaka wa Misiri n'abantu be bonna nti: ‘Nnaakugeraageranya ku ani nno? Ng'oli wa buyinza, era wakitiibwa nnyo!" 
Ezekiel31:3 Nkugeraageranya ne Assiriya, eyali ng'omuvule ku Lusozi Lebanooni ogw'amatabi amalungi, agawa ekisiikirize; omuwanvu, ng'obusongezo bwago butuuka ne mu bire." 
Ezekiel31:4 Waaliwo amazzi kwe gwanywanga, ensulo z'amazzi agaagukuza. Zaakulukutanga okwetooloola ekifo mwe gwasimbwa, era zaatuukanga ne ku miti emirala egy'omu kibira." 
Ezekiel31:5 Olw'okuba gwafunanga bulungi amazzi, gwawanvuwa ne gugulumira okusinga emiti emirala gyonna egy'omu ttale. Amatabi gaagwo ne gaala, ne gagejja, ne gaagaagala." 
Ezekiel31:6 Ebinyonyi byonna ebibuuka mu bbanga ne bizimba omwo ebisu byabyo, n'ensolo zonna ez'omu ttale ne zizaaliranga abaana baazo wansi w'amatabi gaagwo. Amawanga gonna amakulu ne geewogomanga mu kisiikirize kyagwo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Omuti ogwo gwali mulungi, era nga gwa maanyi. Gwalina amatabi amawanvu kubanga emirandira gyagwo gyatuukanga awali amazzi amangi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Emivule mu nnimiro ya Katonda gyali tegiyinza kuvuganya nagwo. Emiberosi tegyalina matabi genkana gaagwo. Emiti emirala gyali tegyenkana wadde amatabi gaagwo. Tewali muti mu nnimiro ya Katonda ogwali omulungi ng'ogwo. 
Ezekiel31:9 Nagufuula mulungi ogwagaagala amatabi, n'emirala gyonna mu Edeni, ennimiro ya Katonda ne gigwegombanga.’ ”" 
Ezekiel31:10 “Kale Nze Mukama Afugabyonna, kyenva ŋŋamba nti omuti ogwo nga bwe guwanvuye ne gugulumira, obusanso bwagwo ne butuuka ne mu bire, ate ne gwekuluntaza olw'obuwanvu bwagwo," 
Ezekiel31:11 nze nguvuddemu, era ndiguwaayo mu mikono gy'ow'amaanyi, agubonereze olw'ebibi byagwo." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abagwira abakambwe baligutema ne baguleka awo. Amatabi gaagwo galigwa ku nsozi ne mu biwonvu. Obutabi bwagwo bulimenyekera mu myala gyonna egy'amazzi mu nsi eyo. N'ab'amawanga gonna agaali geewogoma mu kisiikirize kyagwo, baliguleka awo ne bagenda." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ebinyonyi byonna ebibuuka mu bbanga birijja ne bibeera ku muti ogwo nga gugudde, n'ensolo zonna ez'omu ttale ziririnnyirira amatabi gaagwo."
