Hosea1:11 Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yisirayeli balyegatta wamu, era balyerondera omukulembeze omu. Baliddamu okukulaakulana n'okuba obulungi mu nsi yaabwe, kubanga olunaku lwa Yezireeli luliba lukulu." 
Hosea2:1 Kale mugambe baganda bammwe nti: “Bantu bange”, ne bannyinammwe nti: “Mbakwatirwa ekisa.”" 
Hosea2:2 Mwegayirire nnyammwe, wadde nga takyali mukazi wange, era nga nange sikyali bba, mumwegayirire alekeyo obwenzi bwe n'obukaba bwe," 
Hosea2:3 nneme okumwambula, okumuleka obwereere nga bwe yali ku lunaku lwe yazaalirwako, ne mmufuula ng'ensi enkalu ey'eddungu, ne mmussa ennyonta." 
Hosea2:4 Abaana be siribakwatirwa kisa, kubanga nnyaabwe mwenzi." 
Hosea2:5 Nnyaabwe oyo omwenzi eyawemuka, yagamba nti: “Ndigenda eri baganzi bange abampa emmere n'amazzi, engoye ez'ebyoya by'endiga n'ez'enjaaye, omuzigo n'ebyokunywa.”" 
Hosea2:6 Kale ekkubo lye, ndiriteekamu amaggwa ne ndiziba, era ndikola olukomera abulwe w'ayita." 
Hosea2:7 Aligoberera baganzi be, naye talibatuukako. Alibanoonya, naye talibazuula. Olwo aligamba nti: “Nja kuddayo ewa baze eyasooka, kubanga luli nali bulungi okusinga bwe ndi kaakano.”" 
Hosea2:8 Teyamanya nga nze namuwanga eŋŋaano n'omwenge n'omuzigo, era nga nze namuwanga ffeeza ne zaabu bye yawangayo mu kusinza Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Kyendiva mmuggyako eŋŋaano yange n'omwenge mu kiseera eky'amakungula, era ne mmuggyako n'engoye ez'ebyoya by'endiga, n'ez'enjaaye ze namuwa okwambala." 
Hosea2:10 Ndimwambula n'asigala bwereere mu maaso ga baganzi be, era tewaliba amuggya mu buyinza bwange kumuwonya." 
Hosea2:11 Ndikomya ennaku ze enkulu n'embaga ze eza buli mwezi n'eza buli mwaka, n'okukuza Sabbaato n'enkuŋŋaana ze zonna ez'eddiini." 
Hosea2:12 Ndizikiriza emizabbibu gye n'emitiini gye, gye yayogerako nti: “Gino ye mpeera yange, baganzi bange gye bampadde.” Ndigizisa, era ensolo ez'omu ttale zirigirya." 
Hosea2:13 Ndimubonereza olw'ekiseera kye yamala ng'anneerabidde, ng'ayotereza Baali obubaane era nga yeewoomya n'empeta ez'omu matu n'ebyobuyonjo, n'agenda ne baganzi be. Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Hosea2:14 Kale ndimusendasenda ne mmutwala mu ddungu, ne mmugamba ebigambo ebisanyusa." 
Hosea2:15 Era nga tuli eyo, ndimuddiza ennimiro ze ez'emizabbibu. Ekiwonvu eky'Emitawaana ndikifuula oluggi olw'okusuubira. Era nga tuli eyo, aliddamu okumpulira nga bwe yakolanga mu nnaku ez'omu buvubuka bwe, mu kiseera kye yaviiramu e Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 Mu biro ebyo alimpita bba, nga takyampita mukama we," 
Hosea2:17 kubanga ndiba sikyamukkiriza kwogera wadde okwatula erinnya Baali. 
Hosea2:18 Mu nnaku ezo ndikola endagaano n'ensolo ez'omu ttale n'ebinyonyi era n'ebyewalula, biremenga kukola kabi ku bantu bange. Era ndiggyawo omutego gw'obusaale n'ekitala n'ebyokulwanyisa ebirala byonna mu nsi, ne mbaleka mubeere mirembe." 
Hosea2:19 Ndikuwasa ggwe Yisirayeli, n'oba mukazi wange ennaku zonna. Ndikulokola ne mba mwenkanya gy'oli. Ndikulaga ekisa ne nkusaasira." 
Hosea2:20 Ndiba mwesigwa gy'oli era olimmanya nga nze Mukama. 
Hosea2:21 Mu biro ebyo nditonnyesa enkuba ku nsi," 
Hosea2:22 era n'ensi eribaza eŋŋaano n'emizabbibu n'emizayiti. Ndyanukula okusaba kwa Yezireeli. 
Hosea2:23 Nditeeka Abayisirayeli mu nsi eno, era ndisaasira abo abaali batasaasirwa, era abo abaayitibwanga “Abatali bange” ndibagamba nti: “Muli bantu bange”. Nabo baligamba nti: “Oli Katonda waffe.”" 
Hosea3:1 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Genda nate, oyagale omukazi omwenzi alina muganzi we, omwagale nga nze bwe njagala Abayisirayeli, newaakubadde nga bakyukira balubaale, ne baagala obugaati obukoleddwa mu mizabbibu emikalu.”" 
Hosea3:2 Kale namugula ebitundu bya ffeeza kkumi na bitaano ne kilo kikumi mu ataano eza bbaale. 
Hosea3:3 Ne mmugamba nti: “Oteekwa okubeera awo ng'oli wange, okumala ekiseera kiwanvu, nga teweefuula malaaya wadde okuba n'omusajja omulala. Nange bwe ndyekuuma bwe ntyo ku lulwo.”" 
Hosea3:4 Kubanga Abayisirayeli balimala ekiseera kiwanvu nga tebalina kabaka wadde omukulembeze, nga tebalina kitambiro wadde empagi entukuvu, nga tebalina bifaananyi bikozesebwa mu kulagula, wadde balubaale ab'omu maka." 
Hosea3:5 Naye oluvannyuma Abayisirayeli balikyuka ne badda eri Mukama Katonda waabwe. Era mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma, balijja eri Mukama nga batya, ne bafuna ebirungi, Dawudi Kabaka waabwe by'agaba." 
Hosea4:1 Abayisirayeli muwulire Mukama ky'agamba, kubanga Mukama alina ky'avunaana abantu abali mu nsi eno. Tewali mazima wadde ekisa, era abantu tebamanyi Katonda mu nsi eno." 
Hosea4:2 Ekiriwo kwe kukolima, okulimba, okutemula, okubba n'okwenda. Okuzza emisango kweyongera bweyongezi era obutemu buddirira butemu." 
Hosea4:3 Ensi kyeriva ekala, na buli kiramu ekigiriko ne kifa. Ensolo zonna n'ebinyonyi n'ebyennyanja birifa." 
Hosea4:4 Mukama agamba nti: “Waleme kubaawo n'omu avunaana bantu, wadde abanenya. Be nvunaana ye mmwe bakabona." 
Hosea4:5 Mukola ensobi emisana n'ekiro, n'abalanzi nabo kye bakola nga mmwe. Nja kuzikiriza Yisirayeli nnyammwe." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bange bazikirizibwa, olw'obutamanya. Mmwe bakabona nga bwe mugaanye okummanya, nange ndibagaana okuba bakabona bange. Era nga bwe mwerabidde amateeka gange, nze Katonda wammwe, nange ndyerabira abaana bammwe." 
Hosea4:7 “Bakabona gye bakoma okweyongera obungi, gye bakoma n'okwonoona mu maaso gange. Ekitiibwa kyabwe ndikifuula ensonyi." 
Hosea4:8 Bagaggawalira ku bibi by'abantu bange, kyebava baagala abantu beeyongere okwonoona." 
Hosea4:9 Ng'abantu bwe bali, ne bakabona bwe baliba. Ndibabonereza olw'empisa zaabwe, mbasasuze olw'ebikolwa byabwe." 
Hosea4:10 Balirya naye tebalikkuta, balyenda naye tebalyala, kubanga banvuddeko nze Mukama, okusinza balubaale.”" 
Hosea4:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Omwenge omukulu n'omusu, gumalawo okutegeera." 
Hosea4:12 Abantu bange beebuuza ku kitiititi, omuggo gwabwe gwe gubabuulira kye baagala okumanya. Bakoze ng'omukazi omwenzi: banvuddeko nze Katonda waabwe, ne beewaayo mu balubaale." 
Hosea4:13 Basalira ebitambiro ku ntikko z'ensozi, ne bootereza obubaane ku busozi, wansi w'emiti emiwanvu n'emyagaagavu, kubanga ekisiikirize kyagyo kirungi. “Abaana bammwe abawala kyebava beefuula bamalaaya, ne bakazi bammwe ne benda." 
Hosea4:14 Siribonereza bawala bammwe bwe beefuula bamalaaya, wadde bakazi bammwe bwe beefuula abenzi, kubanga mmwe mwennyini mudda wabbali awamu n'abakazi bamalaaya ab'omu masabo, ne muweerayo wamu nabo ebitambiro. Abantu abatategeera balizikirira." 
Hosea4:15 “Newaakubadde mmwe Abayisirayeli temuli beesigwa gye ndi, naye ab'omu Buyudaaya baleme kusobya nga mmwe. Temusinzizanga Gilugaali, wadde e Betaveni. Era temulayiranga nti: ‘Nga Mukama bw'ali omulamu.’" 
Hosea4:16 Abayisirayeli babambaavu ng'ente enduusi. Kale nze Mukama nnaabaliisa ntya ng'omwana gw'endiga mu ddundiro eggazi? 
Hosea4:17 Abayisirayeli basikiriziddwa okusinza ebitali Katonda. Kale basigale nga bwe bali. 
Hosea4:18 Bwe bamala okutamiira, beemalira mu bwenzi. Baagala ensonyi okusinga bwe baagala ekitiibwa." 
Hosea4:19 Balitwalibwa embuyaga, era balikwatibwa ensonyi olw'ebitambiro byabwe." 
Hosea5:1 “Muwulire kino mmwe bakabona, muwulirize mmwe Abayisirayeli. Mutege amatu mmwe ab'ennyumba ya kabaka. Musaliddwa omusango okubasinga mmwe, kubanga mwafuuka omutego e Mizupa, n'ekitimba ekyategebwa ku Lusozi Tabori," 
Hosea5:2 era mwafuuka obuya obwasimibwa e Sittimu. Naye ndibabonereza mwenna. 
Hosea5:3 Mmanyi Yisirayeli nga bw'afaanana, tayinza kunkisibwa. Yisirayeli akoze eby'obutali bwesigwa era ayonoonese.”" 
Hosea5:4 Ebikolwa byabwe tebibaganya kudda eri Katonda waabwe, kubanga balimu omwoyo ogw'obutali bwesigwa, era tebamanyi Mukama." 
Hosea5:5 Okwekulumbaza kw'Abayisirayeli kubalumiriza. Baligwa olw'ebibi byabwe, era n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baligwa wamu nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Bwe baligenda okunoonya Mukama baweeyo ebitambiro byabwe eby'endiga n'ente, tebalimuzuula, kubanga abavuddeko." 
Hosea5:7 Tebabadde beesigwa eri Mukama, era bazadde abaana abatali babe. Kale kaakano bajja kuzikirizibwa mangu awamu n'ennimiro zaabwe." 
Hosea5:8 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu Gibeya, n'ekkondeere mu Raama! Mulaye eŋŋoma mu Betaveni, muyite Benyamiini mu lutalo." 
Hosea5:9 Yisirayeli alisigala matongo ku lunaku olw'okuweerako ekibonerezo. Nnangirira mu bika bya Yisirayeli nti ebyo bigenda kutuukirira. 
Hosea5:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Abakungu ba Buyudaaya banyaze ebitundu bya Yisirayeli, ne bakyusa ensalo zaayo. Nja kubayiwako obusungu bwange, ng'abayiwako amazzi." 
Hosea5:11 Yisirayeli anyigirizibwa n'anyagibwako ebitundu bye, kubanga yakkiriza okukolera ku kiragiro eky'abo abatandimulagidde." 
Hosea5:12 Kyennaava nsanyaawo Yisirayeli, era ne mmalirawo ddala abantu b'omu Buyudaaya." 
Hosea5:13 “Yisirayeli bwe yalaba ng'alwadde, ne Buyudaaya bwe yalaba ebiwundu bye, Yisirayeli n'alaga mu Assiriya okusaba kabaka waayo amuyambe. Kyokka tayinza kubavumula, wadde okuwonya ebiwundu byabwe." 
Hosea5:14 Kubanga ndiba ng'empologoma, nnumbe Yisirayeli ne Buyudaaya. Nze mwene ndibataagulataagula ne nvaawo. Bwe ndiba nga mbawalabanya, tewaliba abawonya." 
Hosea5:15 Ndibaabulira, ne nzirayo gye mbeera, okutuusa lwe balikkiriza ensobi yaabwe ne bannoonya. Bwe balibonaabona, balifuba okunnoonya.”" 
Hosea6:1 Abantu bagamba nti: “Mujje tudde eri Mukama, kubanga ye yatutaagulataagula, era ye alituwonya, ye yatufumita, era ye alitunyiga ebiwundu." 
Hosea6:2 Mu nnaku bbiri oba ssatu alituzzaamu obulamu ne tubeera balamu mu maaso ge. 
Hosea6:3 Tufube okumanya Mukama. Ajja kujja gye tuli awatali kubuusabuusa, ng'olunaku bwe lukya era ng'enkuba esooka mu mwaka bw'efukirira ettaka.”" 
Hosea6:4 Naye Mukama agamba nti: “Yisirayeli ne Buyudaaya nnaabakola ntya mmwe? Kubanga okwagala kwe munjagalamu, kuggwaawo mangu ng'olufu lw'oku makya, era ng'omusulo oguggwaawo, nga bukyali nkya." 
Hosea6:5 Kyennaavanga ntuma abalanzi bange gye muli n'obubaka obubalumiriza omusango, era obubazikiriza. Kye mbaagaza kimanyiddwa bulungi." 
Hosea6:6 Njagala kisa, sso si bitambiro. N'okumanya Katonda, kusinga ebitone ebyokebwa." 
Hosea6:7 “Naye nabo nga Adamu, baamenya endagaano gye nakola nabo." 
Hosea6:8 Gileyaadi kibuga ky'abo abakola ebibi era kijjudde ebitaba by'omusaayi. 
Hosea6:9 Bakabona bali ng'ekibinja ky'abanyazi abateega omuntu. Batemulira abantu mu kkubo erigenda a Sekemu. Ddala bakola ebiswaza. 
Hosea6:10 Ndabye eky'ekivve mu Yisirayeli: Abayisirayeli si beesigwa era boonoonese. 
Hosea6:11 Era nammwe ab'omu Buyudaaya, ntaddewo ekiseera eky'okubabonererezaamu olw'ebyo bye mukola." 
Hosea7:1 “Buli lwe njagala okuwonya abantu bange Abayisirayeli, kye ndaba gye misango gye bazza, n'ebibi ab'omu Samariya bye bakola. Bakolera ku bulimba. Bayingira mu mayumba ne babba, era n'ebweru banyaga ku bantu ebintu mu makubo." 
Hosea7:2 Tebakirowoozaako nti mmanyi ebibi byabwe byonna, sso ng'ebikolwa byabwe bibeetoolodde, era nga babikola mbiraba.”" 
Hosea7:3 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu basanyusa kabaka nga bakuusakuusa, era basanyusa abakungu be nga babalimbalimba." 
Hosea7:4 Bonna ba nkwe, era si beesigwa. Bali ng'akabiga akakumibwa omufumbi w'emigaati, akateetaaga kuseesaamu, okuva lw'amala okugoya obutta, okutuusa lwe buzimbulukuka." 
Hosea7:5 Ku lunaku kabaka lw'akola embaga, abanyoomi abo basiruwaza kabaka n'abakungu be, nga babatamiiza omwenge era nabo ne gubakwata." 
Hosea7:6 Ddala bengerera ng'akabiga nga bateesa okukola akabi. Obusungu bwabwe bwaka mpolampola ekiro kyonna, ku makya ne bubuubuuka." 
Hosea7:7 Mu bbugumu ery'obusungu bwabwe, batemula abafuzi baabwe. Bakabaka baabwe bonna battiddwa, naye tewali muntu n'omu ansaba buyambi.”" 
Hosea7:8 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli bali ng'omugaati oguyiddeko oluuyi olumu. Beetaba n'ab'amawanga amalala," 
Hosea7:9 ne batamanya ng'okwetaba n'abagwira kubamalamu amaanyi, era ng'eggwanga lyabwe lizikirira." 
Hosea7:10 Okwekulumbaza kw'Abayisirayeli kwe kubalumiriza. Newaakubadde ebyo byonna bibaddewo, naye tebakomyeewo gye ndi nze Mukama, Katonda waabwe." 
Hosea7:11 Yisirayeli ali ng'ejjiba essirusiru eritalina magezi: abantu be, beegayirira Misiri abayambe, ate ne baddukira eri Assiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Naye buli gye baddukira, nja kubatega ekitimba kyange, mbakwase ng'ebinyonyi. Nja kubabonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Hosea7:13 “Zibasanze, kubanga bawabye ne banvaako. Ka bazikirire, kubanga banjeemedde. Nayagala okubanunula, naye banjogerako bya bulimba." 
Hosea7:14 Tebaneegayiridde mu mazima, naye beekulukuunya ku ttaka ne bakaaba. Bettanira ŋŋaano na mwenge, ne banjeemera." 
Hosea7:15 Newaakubadde nga nze nabagunjula era ne mbawa amaanyi, naye era banneekobera." 
Hosea7:16 Badda eri ebyo ebitali Katonda. Bali ng'omutego omukyamu oguteesigika. Abakungu baabwe balittibwa olw'okwogera nga beewaana. Era balisekererwa mu nsi y'e Misiri.” 
Hosea8:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Mufuuwe eŋŋombe! Abalabe bajja ng'empungu okulumba ensi yange, kubanga abantu bange bamenye endagaano gye nakola nabo, era bajeemedde amateeka gange." 
Hosea8:2 Wadde balimpita Katonda waabwe, ne bagamba nti: ‘Ffe Abayisirayeli tukumanyi’," 
Hosea8:3 naye bagaanye ekirungi. N'olwekyo abalabe baabwe balibayigganya. 
Hosea8:4 “Bataddewo bakabaka, naye nga tebakikola ku lwange. Balonze abakulembeze nga tebantegeezezza. Baddidde ffeeza ne zaabu waabwe ne bakola ebifaananyi ebinaabaviirako okuzikirira." 
Hosea8:5 Nkyawa ente ennume eya zaabu, ab'omu Samariya gye basinza. Mbasunguwalidde. Balikoma ddi okwonoona?" 
Hosea8:6 Kubanga omukozi Omuyisirayeli ye yakola ekifaananyi ekyo, n'olwekyo ekifaananyi ekyo si Katonda n'akatono. Ente ennume eya zaabu, ab'omu Samariya gye basinza, eribetentebwa." 
Hosea8:7 Baasiga mpewo, balikungula mbuyaga. Eŋŋaano etebaze, tevaamu mmere. Ne bw'eriba ebaze, ab'amawanga amalala baligirya." 
Hosea8:8 “Yisirayeli efuuse ng'amawanga amalala, era tekyagasa: eri ng'ekibya ekyatise." 
Hosea8:9 Kubanga Abayisirayeli bagenze mu Assiriya okusaba obuyambi. Bali ng'entulege eyeewaggula, etambula yokka. Baguliridde ab'amawanga amalala okubakuuma." 
Hosea8:10 Kale nja kubakuŋŋaanyiza wamu mbabonereze, era banaatera okukaaba, kabaka w'Abassiriya bw'anaabanyigiriza." 
Hosea8:11 “Abayisirayeli gye bakoma okuzimba emyaliiro olw'okuggyawo ebibi, gye bakoma okwonoona." 
Hosea8:12 Newaakubadde mbawandiikira amateeka gange agatabalika olw'obungi, bagagaana ng'ekintu ekigwira." 
Hosea8:13 Banyumirwa okumpa ebitambiro. Batambira ensolo, ne balya ennyama ey'ebitambiro ebyo. Naye nze Mukama sibasanyukira, era kaakano, nja kujjukira ebibi byabwe mbabonereze olw'ebibi ebyo. Bajja kuddayo mu Misiri!" 
Hosea8:14 “Abayisirayeli bazimbye amayumba, naye beerabidde eyabatonda. Ab'omu Buyudaaya bongedde okuzimba ebibuga ebiriko ebigo. Naye nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ebibuga byabwe n'ebigo byabwe.”" 
Hosea9:1 Abayisirayeli muleme kusanyuka ng'ab'amawanga amalala, kubanga mweggye ku Katonda wammwe, ne mutaba beesigwa gy'ali. Mwetunze nga bamalaaya eri lubaale Baali, era mwagadde eŋŋaano ku buli gguuliro, nga gye mubala nti ye mpeera gy'abasasudde." 
Hosea9:2 Naye egguuliro n'essogolero binaatera obutabawa kimala, n'omwenge omusu gunaatera okubaggwaako." 
Hosea9:3 Abayisirayeli tebajja kusigala mu nsi ya Mukama, naye bajja kuddayo mu Misiri, era banaaliiranga mu Assiriya emmere eteri nnongoofu." 
Hosea9:4 Mu nsi ezo engwira, tebaasobolenga kutona mwenge eri Mukama, wadde okuleeta ebitambiro byabwe gy'ali. Emmere gye banaalyangako, eneebafuulanga abatali balongoofu, ng'emmere eriirwa awali omufu. Banaagiryanga kukkuta bukkusi, teetwalibwengako kuweebwayo ng'ekirabo mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama." 
Hosea9:5 Mulikola ki ku lunaku olukulu, olunaku olw'Embaga ya Mukama?" 
Hosea9:6 Okuzikirira bwe kulituuka, abantu ne basaasaana, Abamisiri balibakuŋŋaanya, ne baziikibwa abatuuze b'e Ninfiisi. Ebyobugagga byabwe ebya ffeeza ebisanyusa, n'eweema zaabwe, birimeramu omuddo n'amaggwa ne bizika." 
Hosea9:7 Ekiseera eky'okubonererezaamu kituuse. Kye kiseera, abantu mwe banaafunira ekibagwanira, era Yisirayeli ajja kukimanya. Mujja kugamba nti: “Omulanzi musirusiru. Omusajja ono afuuyirirwa mwoyo, alaluse.” Mugamba bwe mutyo, kubanga ekibi kyammwe kinene, era obukyayi bwammwe bungi." 
Hosea9:8 Nze mulanzi, Katonda gw'atumye okulabula abantu be Abayisirayeli. Naye buli we ndaga, bantega emitego, ng'abatega ekinyonyi. Ne mu nnyumba yennyini eya Katonda, abantu balabe ba mulanzi." 
Hosea9:9 Beeyonoonye nnyo, nga bwe beeyonoona e Gibeya. Katonda alijjukira okwonoona kwabwe, n'ababonereza olw'ebibi byabwe." 
Hosea9:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Nasanga Yisirayeli, ng'asanga emizabbibu egikulira mu ddungu. Nalaba bajjajjammwe, ng'alaba ebibala by'omutiini ebisooka okwengera mu mwaka. Naye bwe baatuuka ku Lusozi Pewori, ne batandika okusinza Baali, ne bafuuka ekyenyinyalwa, nga balubaale be baayagala." 
Hosea9:11 Ekitiibwa kya Yisirayeli kiribuuka mu bbanga, ne kigenda ng'ekinyonyi: tewaliba baana bazaalibwa, wadde abakazi abali embuto, wadde abazifuna." 
Hosea9:12 Naye ne bwe balizaala abaana, era ndibabaggyako, ne batasigazaawo mulamu. Abantu bano bwe ndibavaako, ziribasanga!”" 
Hosea9:13 Ndaba abaana ba Yisirayeli nga bayiggibwa ne battibwa. 
Hosea9:14 Ayi Mukama, kiki kye mba nkusaba okolere abantu bano? Leka bakazi baabwe baveemu embuto, era okaze amabeere gaabwe." 
Hosea9:15 Mukama agamba nti: “Baatandikira Gilugaali okukola ebibi. Eyo gye natandikira okubakyawa. Ndibagoba mu nsi yange olw'ebibi bye bakoze. Siriddayo kubaagala. Abakulembeze baabwe bonna bajeemu. 
Hosea9:16 Abayisirayeli bali ng'omuti ogutemeddwa ne gukala emirandira, ogutakyabala bibala. Tebalizaala baana. Naye ne bwe balizaala, nditta abaana baabwe abaagalwa.”" 
Hosea9:17 Katonda wange aliboola abantu be, kubanga tebamuwulira. Baliba babungeese mu mawanga." 
Hosea10:1 Abayisirayeli bali ng'omuzabbibu ogubala ennyo. Gye baakoma okweyongera obungi, gye baakoma n'okuzimba zaalutaari. Ensi yaabwe gye yakoma okweyongera okuba ennungi, gye baakoma n'okulungiya empagi ez'amayinja ze basinza." 
Hosea10:2 Emitima gyabwe tegitereera ku kimu. Kale kaakano bajja kubonaabona olw'ebibi byabwe. Katonda ajja kumenyawo zaalutaari zaabwe, era azikirize n'empagi ez'amayinja ze basinza." 
Hosea10:3 Banaatera okugamba nti: “Tetulina kabaka, kubanga tetutya Mukama. Naye kabaka kiki ky'ayinza okutukolera?”" 
Hosea10:4 Boogera bigambo bugambo, ne balayira eby'obulimba mu kukola endagaano. Ensala y'emisango eyonoonese, n'eba ng'omuddo ogw'obutwa, ogumera ku mbibiro z'ennimiro." 
Hosea10:5 Ab'e Samariya balitya, era balikungubaga olw'okuviibwako ennyana eya zaabu ey'e Betaveni. Bo awamu ne bakabona abagisinza, baligikaabira. Baliwuubaala bw'eriggyibwako ekitiibwa kyayo." 
Hosea10:6 Nayo eritwalibwa mu Assiriya, okuba ekirabo kya kabaka omukulu. Abayisirayeli balikwatibwa ensonyi ne baswala, olw'amagezi ge baagoberera." 
Hosea10:7 Kabaka w'e Samariya alitwalibwa ng'ekibajjo ky'omuti bwe kitwalibwa ku mazzi. 
Hosea10:8 N'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'omu Aveni, Abayisirayeli gye basinziza ebifaananyi, birizikirizibwa. Amaggwa n'omuddo birimera ku zaalutaari zaabwe. Baligamba ensozi nti: “Mutubuutikire!” n'obusozi nti: “Mutugweko!”" 
Hosea10:9 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli tebalekangayo kukola bibi, okuviira ddala mu kiseera kye baakoleramu ebibi e Gibeya. Kale olutalo lulibakwatira e Gibeya." 
Hosea10:10 Ndirumba abantu bano aboonoonyi, ne mbabonereza. Amawanga galikuŋŋaanyizibwa okubalwanyisa, era balibonerezebwa olw'ebibi byabwe ebingi." 
Hosea10:11 “Yisirayeli edda yali ng'ente ennyana eyigiriziddwa obulungi, eyagala okusamba eŋŋaano. Naye nasalawo okumuteeka ekikoligo mu bulago bwe obulungi, mmukozese emirimu egy'amaanyi. Ab'omu Buyudaaya balikabala, ab'omu Yisirayeli balikuba amavuunike." 
Hosea10:12 Nagamba nti: ‘Mukabale ettaka lyammwe eritali ddime, musige obutuukirivu, mukungule emikisa eginaava mu kunjagala. Kino kye kiseera mmwe okudda gye ndi nze Mukama. Nja kujja mbayiweko emikisa eginaabalokola.’" 
Hosea10:13 Naye musize ekibi ne mukungula ebibala byakyo. Mulidde ebibala eby'obulimba bwammwe, kubanga mwesiga amagaali gammwe, n'abatabaazi bammwe abangi." 
Hosea10:14 N'olwekyo olutalo lulisasamaza abantu bammwe, era ebigo byammwe byonna birizikirizibwa. Kiriba nga bwe kyali, Kabaka Salumaani bwe yazikiriza ekibuga Betirarubeeli mu lutalo, abakazi ne battibwa wamu n'abaana baabwe." 
Hosea10:15 Bwe kityo bwe kiriba ne ku mmwe abantu b'e Beteli, olw'ebibi byammwe ebyenkanidde awo obungi. Olutalo luliba lwakatandika, kabaka wa Yisirayeli alisaanyizibwawo.”" 
Hosea11:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Yisirayeli bwe yali ng'akyali mwana muto, namwagala, ne mmuyita okuva e Misiri, nga mwana wange." 
Hosea11:2 Naye gye nakoma okubayita, gye baakoma okunvaako. Baawaayo ebitambiro eri Baali, ne bootereza obubaane ebifaananyi ebyole." 
Hosea11:3 Sso nga nze nayigiriza Yisirayeli okutambula. Nabawambaatira mu mikono gyange, naye tebaategeera nga nze nabalabirira." 
Hosea11:4 Nabasika n'ekisa era n'okwagala bajje gye ndi. Nabasitula ne mbawambaatira ng'awambaatira omwana omuto, nakutama ne mbaliisa." 
Hosea11:5 “Baliddayo mu nsi y'e Misiri, era Assiriya ye alibafuga, kubanga baagaana okudda gye ndi." 
Hosea11:6 Olutalo luligwa mu bibuga byabwe, ne lumenya enzigi zaabyo, ne lubazikiriza, kubanga baakola ebyo bo bennyini bye baagala." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bange bamaliridde okunvaako. Balikaaba olw'ekikoligo ekibaliko, naye tewaliba akibaggyako." 
Hosea11:8 “Nnaakuwaayo ntya Yisirayeli? Nnaakwabulira ntya? Nnaakuzikiriza ntya nga bwe nazikiriza Aduma, wadde okukuyisa nga bwe nayisa Zeboyiimu? Omutima gwange teguŋŋanya kukikola, kubanga mpulira nkwagala nnyo." 
Hosea11:9 “Sirikubonereza nga nsunguwadde. Siriddayo kuzikiriza Yisirayeli, kubanga ndi Katonda sso si muntu. Nze Omutuukirivu ndi wamu naawe. Sirijja gy'oli nga nsunguwadde." 
Hosea11:10 “Abantu bange balingoberera nze Mukama, bwe ndiwuluguma ng'empologoma. Balyanguwa okujja gye ndi, nga bava ebugwanjuba." 
Hosea11:11 Baliva mu Misiri, nga banguwa ng'ebinyonyi, era ng'ejjiba, nga bava mu Assiriya, era ndibazzaayo mu maka gaabwe. Nze Mukama nze njogedde.”" 
Hosea11:12 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli banneetooloozezza obulimba n'obukuusa. Naye abantu b'omu Buyudaaya nkyabamanyi nze Katonda, era beesigwa gye ndi nze Omutuukirivu." 
Hosea12:1 “Abayisirayeli bagoba mpewo olunaku lwonna, bawondera mbuyaga y'ebuvanjuba. Beeyongera kukola bya bulimba na bya bukambwe. Bakola endagaano ne Assiriya, era batwala omuzigo mu Misiri.”" 
Hosea12:2 Mukama alina ky'avunaana abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya, era ajja kubonereza Yisirayeli, olw'engeri abantu baayo gye beeyisaamu. Ajja kubasasula olw'ebyo bye bakola." 
Hosea12:3 Jjajjaabwe Yakobo yalwana ne muganda we Esawu, nga bakyali mu lubuto lwa nnyaabwe. Yakobo bwe yakula, n'alwanyisa Katonda." 
Hosea12:4 Yalwana ne malayika, n'awangula. Yakaaba n'asaba okumuwa omukisa. E Beteli, Katonda yasisinkana Yakobo, era eyo gye yayogerera naffe." 
Hosea12:5 Mukama, Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna, erinnya lye ye Mukama." 
Hosea12:6 Kale mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo, mukyuke mudde eri Mukama, era mumwesige. Mubeerenga ba kisa era ba mazima. Bulijjo mwesigenga Katonda wammwe." 
Hosea12:7 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli si beesigwa. Bali ng'omusuubuzi akozesa minzaani eteri ntuufu, ayagala okunyaga." 
Hosea12:8 Bagamba nti: ‘Tuli bagagga, twefunidde ebintu. Tewali ayinza kutulumiriza nti twagaggawala mu bukumpanya.’" 
Hosea12:9 Naye nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ndiddamu okubasuza mu nsiisira, nga ze mwalimu, bwe najja gye muli mu ddungu." 
Hosea12:10 “Nayogeranga n'abalanzi, era ne mbongera okulabikirwa, era ne ndabula abantu bange, nga mpita mu balanzi." 
Hosea12:11 Abakola ebibi mu Gilugaali, gye basalira ente ennume ez'ebitambiro, zaalutaari zaabwe zirifuuka ng'entuumu z'amayinja ku mbibiro z'ennimiro.”" 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo yaddukira mu nsi ya Aramu. Era okusobola okuwasaayo omukazi, yakolera omuntu omulala, n'amulundira endiga ze." 
Hosea12:13 Mukama yatuma omulanzi okuggya Abayisirayeli mu buddu mu Misiri, n'okubalabirira." 
Hosea12:14 Abayisirayeli basunguwazizza nnyo Mukama. Basaanira kufa, olw'emisango gye bazza. Mukama alibabonereza olw'okumunyooma." 
Hosea13:1 Ab'omu kika kya Efurayimu bwe baayogeranga, ab'omu Bika ebirala mu Yisirayeli baakankananga. Abeefurayimu baatiibwanga. Naye nga bwe baayonoona nga basinza Baali, bajja kufa." 
Hosea13:2 Era kaakano beeyongera bweyongezi okwonoona, nga bakola mu byuma ebisaanuuse, ebifaananyi nga bya kusinza. Bakola ebifaananyi mu ffeeza, ebiyiiyizibwa amagezi g'abantu, era ebikolebwa abantu. Awo ne balyoka bagamba nti: “Mubiwe ebitambiro.” Abantu bayinza batya okunywegera ebifaananyi bino eby'ennyana?" 
Hosea13:3 N'olwekyo abantu bano, baliggwaawo nga kalenge ow'oku makya, era ng'omusulo oguggwaawo nga bukyali nkya. Baliba ng'ebisusunku, embuyaga y'akazimu by'eggya mu gguuliro n'ebitwala, era ng'omukka, oguyita mu kituli, ne gufuluma." 
Hosea13:4 Mukama agamba nti: “Nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri. Temulina Katonda mulala, wabula nze. Nze Mulokozi wammwe nzekka." 
Hosea13:5 Nabalabirira nga muli mu nsi enkalu ey'eddungu. 
Hosea13:6 Naye bwe mwayingira mu nsi ennungi, ne mulya ne mukkuta, olwo mwekulumbaza ne munneerabira." 
Hosea13:7 Kale ndibalumba ng'empologoma bw'erumba. Ndibateega mu kkubo ng'engo bw'eteega. 
Hosea13:8 Ndibalumba ng'eddubu enyagiddwako abaana baayo, ne mbayuzaamu. Ndibataagulataagula ng'ensolo ey'omu ttale, era ndibaliirawo ng'empologoma." 
Hosea13:9 “Ndibazikiriza mmwe Abayisirayeli. Ani aliyinza okuyamba? 
Hosea13:10 Mwasaba okubawa kabaka n'abakulembeze. Naye banaayinza batya okubawonya mmwe? 
Hosea13:11 Nabawa bakabaka nga nsuguwadde, era ne mbabaggyako nga ndiko ekiruyi." 
Hosea13:12 “Ekibi n'omusango ebya Yisirayeli bisibiddwako era biterekeddwa. 
Hosea13:13 Yisirayeli aweereddwa omukisa abe mulamu, naye talina magezi kugukozesa. Ali ng'omwana atuusizza okuzaalibwa, agaana okufuluma mu lubuto lwa nnyina." 
Hosea13:14 Sirinunula bantu bano mu magombe, wadde okubawonya okufa. Ggwe Walumbe, leeta ebibonyoobonyo byo!" 
Hosea13:15 Abayisirayeli ne bwe baliba obulungi mu baganda baabwe, nze Mukama ndisindika embuyaga ey'ebuvanjuba eva mu ddungu, n'ekaza ensulo zaabwe n'enzizi zaabwe. Erimalawo ebyobugagga byonna bye baatereka." 
Hosea13:16 Ab'omu Samariya bajja kubonerezebwa olw'okujeemera nze Katonda waabwe. Bajja kufiira mu lutalo. Abaana baabwe abawere bajja kutirimbulwa, n'abakazi abali embuto bajja kubaagibwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Mmwe Abayisirayeli, mudde eri Mukama Katonda wammwe, kubanga ebibi byammwe bibaleetedde okwesittala ne mugwa." 
Hosea14:2 Mujje nga muteeseteese okwegayirira kwammwe, mudde eri Mukama, mumugambe nti: “Tusonyiwe ebibi byaffe byonna, osanyukire ebirungi, tulyoke tusobole okukutendereza." 
Hosea14:3 Assiriya teyinza kutuwonya, era tetujja kwebagala mbalaasi za lutalo. Bye twakola n'emikono gyaffe tetukyaddayo kubiyita Katonda waffe, kubanga ggwe okwatirwa ekisa abo abatalina abayamba.”" 
Hosea14:4 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndikomyawo abantu bange gye ndi. Ndibaagala n'omutima gwange gwonna, kubanga sikyabalinako busungu." 
Hosea14:5 Ndinnyikiza Abayisirayeli ng'enkuba bw'ennyikiza ettaka. Balyanya ng'ebimuli, balisimba emirandira mu ttaka, ng'emiti gy'oku Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:6 Amatabi gaabwe galyagaagala, ne banyirira ng'omuti omuzayiti. Baliwunya akawoowo, ng'emiti egy'oku Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:7 Balikomawo ne babeera mu kisiikirize kyange. Balyanya ng'eŋŋaano, ne bamulisa ng'omuzabbibu. Balyatiikirira ng'omwenge ogw'e Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:8 Abayisirayeli tebaliddayo kusinza bifaananyi: nnaabawanga bye bansaba, era nnaabalabiriranga. Nnaabawanga ekisiikirize ng'omuti ogutaggwaako makoola. Nze nsibukamu emikisa gyabwe gyonna.”" 
Hosea14:9 Abalina amagezi bategeere ebyo, era babyekkaanye, kubanga Mukama by'akola bituufu, era abantu abakola ebituufu banaabigobereranga. Naye aboonoonyi baneesittalanga ne bagwa, kubanga tebabifaako." 
Joel1:1 Buno bwe bubaka Mukama bwe yawa Yoweeli, mutabani wa Petweli." 
Joel1:2 Muwulire kino mmwe abakadde, mutege amatu mmwe mwenna abatuuze b'omu Buyudaaya. Kino kyali kibaddewo mu mirembe gyammwe? Oba mu mirembe gya bajjajjammwe?" 
Joel1:3 Mubuulireko abaana bammwe, bo bakibuulireko be bazaala nabo bakibuulireko ab'omulembe oguddirira." 
Joel1:4 Ebibinja n'ebibinja by'enzige bizinze ebirime. Ebirekeddwawo ekibinja ekimu, ekibinja ekirala kibiwemmense." 
Joel1:5 Mmwe abatamiivu, muzuukuke, mukaabe amaziga. Mmwe abanywi b'omwenge, mukungubage, kubanga emizabbibu omukolebwa omwenge ogubawoomera, gizikiriziddwa!" 
Joel1:6 Eggye ly'enzige lizinze ensi yange. Za maanyi era nnyingi nnyo tezibalika. Amannyo gaazo masongovu, era moogi ng'ag'empologoma." 
Joel1:7 Zizikirizza emizabbibu gyange, zigisasambuddeko ebikuta, amatabi gaagyo gafuuse meeru." 
Joel1:8 Mukungubage ng'omuwala eyeesibye ekikutiya, okukungubagira omusajja gw'abadde agenda okufumbirwa." 
Joel1:9 Bakabona abaweereza ba Mukama bakungubaga, kubanga tewakyali mmere ya mpeke era n'ebyokunywa, ebiweebwayo mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama!" 
Joel1:10 Ennimiro zizise, ensi ewuubadde, kubanga eŋŋaano ezikiriziddwa, emizabbibu gikaze, n'emiti emizayiti giwotose." 
Joel1:11 Mmwe abalimi munakuwale, mmwe abalabirira emizabbibu, mukungubage. Kubanga eŋŋaano ne bbaale, n'ebirala byonna ebikungulwa bizikiridde." 
Joel1:12 Emizabbibu giwotose, emitiini giyongobedde, omukomamawanga n'olukindu n'emiti emirala gyonna egy'ebibala, gikaze." 
Joel1:13 Mmwe bakabona, mwesibe ebikutiya mukungubage. Mmwe abaweereza ku alutaari, mukube ebiwoobe. Mmwe abaweereza ba Katonda wange, muyingire mu Ssinzizo, musule nga mwambadde ebikutiya, kubanga emmere ey'empeke era n'ebyokunywa, ebiweebwayo mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda wammwe, tebikyaleetebwa." 
Joel1:14 Mulangirire okusiiba, muyite olukuŋŋaana. Mukuŋŋaanye abakulembeze n'abantu bonna ab'omu Buyudaaya. Bajje mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama, Katonda wammwe, mumukaabirire." 
Joel1:15 Olunaku lwa Mukama lunaatera okutuuka. Lwe lunaku lwa Mukama, Omuyinzawaabyonna, lw'alireeterako okuzikirira! Olunaku olwo nga lwa ntiisa!" 
Joel1:16 Ebirime byaffe bizikiriziddwa nga ffe tutunula. Essanyu n'okujaguza biweddewo mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda waffe. 
Joel1:17 Ensigo zifiira mu ttaka ekkalu. Amawanika galekeddwawo, amaterekero goonoonese, kubanga tewakyali mmere ya mpeke eterekebwa." 
Joel1:18 Ensolo zisinda, ente zisobeddwa, kubanga tezikyalina muddo. N'amagana g'endiga nago gabonaabona." 
Joel1:19 Ayi Mukama, nkukaabirira ggwe, kubanga omuddo ogw'omu ttale n'emiti egy'omu nnimiro bikaze, biri ng'ebyokeddwa omuliro." 
Joel1:20 N'ensolo ez'omu ttale zikukaabirira, kubanga emigga gikalidde amazzi, n'omuliro gwokezza omuddo ogw'omu ttale." 
Joel2:1 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe mu Siyooni, mukube enduulu ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu. Abatuuze b'omu Buyudaaya bonna bakankane, kubanga olunaku lwa Mukama lujja, lunaatera okutuuka." 
Joel2:2 Luliba lunaku lwa kifu n'ekikome, era lwa bire n'ekizikiza ekikutte. Eggye eddene ery'enzige lijja, nga liri ng'ekizikiza ekibikka ensozi. Tewabangawo zizenkana bungi, era teziribaawo nate emirembe gyonna." 
Joel2:3 We zirya ebimera waba ng'omuliro we gwokezza. Mu maaso gye ziraga, ensi eri ng'Ennimiro ya Edeni. Naye emabega gye ziva, lye ddungu ejjereere. Tezirina kye zitaliza." 
Joel2:4 Zifaanana ng'embalaasi, zidduka ng'embalaasi ez'omu lutalo." 
Joel2:5 Zibuukira ku ntikko z'ensozi, nga ziwuuma ng'amagaali. Zitulika ng'ekisambu ekyokebwa omuliro. Zisimbye ennyiriri ng'eggye ery'amaanyi eryetegese okulwana." 
Joel2:6 Abantu bakwatibwa entiisa nga zisembera. Amaaso ga buli omu gafuuka ebbala. 
Joel2:7 Zirumba ng'abalwanyi, zirinnya ebigo ng'abaserikale. Zitambulira mu kkubo lyazo, tewali n'emu eva ku mugendo." 
Joel2:8 Tewali eziyiza ginnaayo kugenda, buli emu etambulira mu kkubo lyayo. Ziwaguza awali abakuumi ne watabaawo aziziyiza." 
Joel2:9 Zifubutuka ne zizinda ekibuga. Ziwalampa ebibuga ne zirinnya, ne zituuka ku nnyumba ne ziyingirira mu madirisa ng'ababbi." 
Joel2:10 Ensi ekankana nga zisembera, eggulu lujugumira. Enjuba n'omwezi bibaako ekizikiza, n'emmunyeenye zirekayo okwaka." 
Joel2:11 Mukama aduumira eggye lye. Ebibinja ebimuwulira bingi nnyo era bya maanyi. Olunaku lwa Mukama lukulu, era lwa ntiisa nnyo! Ani ayinza okulugumira?" 
Joel2:12 Mukama agamba nti: “Naye ne kaakano, mwenenyereze ddala, mudde gye ndi nga musiiba, nga mukaaba amaziga." 
Joel2:13 Emitima gyammwe egimenyese gye giba giraga bwe muboneredde. Okuyuza ebyambalo byammwe tekumala.” Mudde eri Mukama, Katonda wammwe, kubanga wa kisa era ajjudde okusaasira. Alwawo okusunguwala, akwatirwa nnyo ekisa, era addiramu aboonoonyi." 
Joel2:14 Oboolyawo Mukama, Katonda wammwe, anaakyusa ekirowoozo kye n'abaddiramu, n'aleka ng'abawadde omukisa, ne mubaza ebibala, ne musobola okumutonera ebirabo eby'emmere ey'empeke n'ebyokunywa." 
Joel2:15 Mufuuyire eŋŋombe mu Siyooni, mulangirire okusiiba, era muyite olukuŋŋaana." 
Joel2:16 Mukuŋŋaanye abantu mulangirire olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu. Mukuŋŋaanye abakadde, muleete abaana abato, n'abawere abayonka. N'abagole abaakafumbiriganwa, bave mu bisenge byabwe bajje." 
Joel2:17 Bakabona abaweereza Mukama bakaabe amaziga nga bali wakati w'omulyango gw'Essinzizo ne alutaari bagambe nti: “Saasira abantu bo, ayi Mukama! Totuleka kunyoomebwa na kusekererwa ba mawanga malala nga bagamba nti: ‘Katonda wammwe ali ludda wa?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Awo Mukama n'alumirwa ensi ye, era n'asaasira abantu be." 
Joel2:19 N'addamu abantu be n'agamba nti: “Kaakano nja kubawa eŋŋaano n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, ebijja okubakkusa. Era sikyabaleka kunyoomebwa ba mawanga abalala." 
Joel2:20 Nja kubaggyako eggye ery'enzige eryava mu bukiikakkono. Ezimu nja kuzigobera mu ddungu: ebibinja ebikulembeddemu mbigobere mu Nnyanja Enfu. N'ebibinja ebisembayo emabega mbigobere mu Nnyanja Eyaawakati. Emirambo gyazo gijja kuwunya ekivundu. Nja kuzisaanyaawo olwa byonna bye zikoze. 
Joel2:21 “Totya ggwe ensi, sanyuka era ojaguze olw'ebikulu Mukama by'akoze." 
Joel2:22 “Temutya mmwe ensolo ez'omu ttale, kubanga omuddo ogw'omu ttale gumeze, emiti gibaze ebibala, emitiini n'emizayiti gibaze ebibala bingi." 
Joel2:23 Musanyuke mmwe abantu ba Siyooni, mujaguze olw'ebyo Mukama, Katonda wammwe by'abakoledde, kubanga abawa enkuba esooka mu kipimo ekituufu. Abatonnyeseza enkuba nnyingi: esooka n'eyo ejja oluvannyuma, nga bwe yagibatonnyesezanga edda." 
Joel2:24 Amawuuliro galijjula eŋŋaano, n'amasogolero galibooga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'omuzigo ogw'emizayiti." 
Joel2:25 Ndibaddizaawo bye mwafiirwa ebyaliibwa ebibinja by'enzige ez'eggye eddene, lye nasindika okubalumba." 
Joel2:26 Kale munaafunanga ebyokulya bingi, munaalyanga ne mukkuta, ne mutendereza Mukama, Katonda wammwe, abakoledde ebyewuunyisa. Abantu bange tebaliddayo kunyoomebwa." 
Joel2:27 Olwo mmwe Abayisirayeli lwe mulimanya nga ndi wakati mu mmwe, era nga nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, era tewali mulala. Abantu bange tebaliddayo kunyoomebwa." 
Joel2:28 “Oluvannyuma, ndigabira bonna mwoyo wange. Batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe baliranga ebirijja. N'abakadde mu mmwe baliroota ebirooto. Abavubuka bammwe balirabikirwa." 
Joel2:29 Era mu nnaku ezo, abaddu n'abazaana ndibagabira mwoyo wange." 
Joel2:30 “Ndiraga ebyamagero ku ggulu ne ku nsi. Walibaawo omusaayi n'omuliro, n'empagi ez'omukka." 
Joel2:31 Enjuba erifuuka ekizikiza, n'omwezi gulimyuka ng'omusaayi. Ebyo bye birikulembera olunaku lwa Mukama olukulu era olw'entiisa." 
Joel2:32 Era buli alikoowoola Mukama alirokolebwa, kubanga ku Lusozi Siyooni ne mu Yerusaalemu, walibaawo abaliwona nga Mukama bwe yagamba. Era mu baliwonawo, walibaawo Mukama b'ayita.”" 
Joel3:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Mu nnaku ezo, era mu kiseera ekyo, ndizzaawo emikisa gya Buyudaaya ne Yerusaalemu." 
Joel3:2 Ndikuŋŋaanya ab'amawanga gonna, ne mbaserengesa mu kiwonvu kya Yehosafaati, era nga bali eyo, ndibasalira omusango olwa byonna bye baakola abantu bange Abayisirayeli, kubanga baabasaasaanya mu mawanga, ne bagabana Yisirayeli ensi yange." 
Joel3:3 Baakubira abantu bange akalulu okubagabana. Baatunda abalenzi okusasulira abakazi bamalaaya, ne batunda abawala okugula omwenge, era ne bagunywa." 
Joel3:4 “Mwagala kunkola ki mmwe Tiiro ne Sidoni, n'ebitundu byonna ebya Filistiya? Mulina kye mwagala okunneesasuza? Bwe muba mwagala okunneesasuza, nange ndyanguwa mangu okubeesasuza," 
Joel3:5 kubanga mututte ffeeza wange ne zaabu wange, era mututte mu masabo gammwe ebintu byange ebirungi era eby'omuwendo." 
Joel3:6 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu mwabaggya mu nsi yaabwe, ne mubatwala ewala, ne mubatunda mu Bayonaani." 
Joel3:7 Naye kaakano nja kubakumamu omuliro, baveeyo gye mwabatunda, nammwe ndyoke mbakole ekyo kye mwabakola." 
Joel3:8 Nja kuleka batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe batundibwe mu bantu b'omu Buyudaaya, era nabo babatunde mu bantu b'e Seeba, eggwanga eriri ewala. Nze Mukama, Nze njogedde." 
Joel3:9 “Mulangirire kino mu mawanga, mutegeke olutalo. Muyite abasajja ab'amaanyi, abaserikale bonna beesowoleyo bajje." 
Joel3:10 Enkumbi zammwe muziweeseemu ebitala, n'ebiwabyo byammwe mubiweeseemu amafumu. N'omunafu agambe nti ‘Nja kulwana.’" 
Joel3:11 Mwanguwe mujje mmwe, ab'amawanga gonna ageetooloddewo, mukuŋŋaanire eyo mu kiwonvu.” Serengesa eyo, ayi Mukama, abasajja bo ab'amaanyi." 
Joel3:12 “Ab'amawanga gonna basituke baserengete mu kiwonvu kya Yehosafaati, kubanga eyo gye ndituula okusala omusango gw'amawanga gonna ageetooloddewo." 
Joel3:13 Boonoonye nnyo! Mubasale n'ebiwabyo ng'eŋŋaano etuuse okukungulwa, mubasogole ng'emizabbibu egijjudde mu ssogolero ne libooga.”" 
Joel3:14 Abantu enkumi n'enkumi bali mu kiwonvu eky'okusalirwamu omusango, kubanga eyo olunaku lwa Mukama lunaatera okutuuka." 
Joel3:15 Enjuba n'omwezi biriko ekizikiza, n'emmunyeenye zireseeyo okwaka." 
Joel3:16 Mukama awulugumira mu Siyooni, eddoboozi lye libwatukira mu Yerusaalemu, eggulu n'ensi ne bikankana. Naye Mukama ye aliba ekiddukiro ky'abantu be, ekigo ekitaasa Abayisirayeli." 
Joel3:17 “Kale olwo mulimanya nga Nze Mukama, Katonda wammwe, abeera mu Siyooni, olusozi lwange olutukuvu. Yerusaalemu kiriba kibuga kitukuvu, tewaliba bagwira bakiwangula nate." 
Joel3:18 “Mu nnaku ezo, ennimiro z'emizabbibu ziribikka ensozi, n'ente ez'amata ziriba ku buli kasozi. Amazzi galijjula mu bugga bwonna obw'omu Buyudaaya. N'ensulo y'amazzi erikulukuta okuva mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama, n'efukirira ekiwonvu Sittimu." 
Joel3:19 “Misiri erifuuka matongo, ne Edomu erifuuka ddungu, kubanga abantu b'omu nsi ezo baalumba Buyudaaya, ne batta abantu baamu abatalina musango." 
Joel3:20 Naye Buyudaaya ne Yerusaalemu binaabeerangamu abantu ennaku zonna. 
Joel3:21 Ndiwoolera eggwanga olw'abo abattibwa, siritaliza bazzizza musango, kubanga nze Mukama, nja kubeeranga ku Siyooni.”" 
Amos1:1 Bino bye bigambo bya Amosi, omu ku basumba b'e Tekowa. Bino byonna ebifa ku Yisirayeli Katonda yabiraga Amosi, nga Wuzziya ye kabaka wa Buyudaaya, ne Yerobowaamu, mutabani wa Yowaasi, nga ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ng'ekyabulayo emyaka ebiri okutuuka ku kukankana kw'ensi." 
Amos1:2 Amosi yagamba nti: “Mukama awulugumira ku Lusozi Siyooni, eddoboozi lye libwatukira mu Yerusaalemu. Amalundiro g'abasumba gakala, n'omuddo ku ntikko y'Olusozi Karumeeli guwotoka.”" 
Amos1:3 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Damasiko bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza. Baabonyaabonya abantu b'e Gileyaadi mu bukambwe obungi. 
Amos1:4 Kyendiva nkozesa omuliro ku lubiri lwa kabaka Azayeeli, ne njokya ebigo bya kabaka Benadaadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndimenya ebisiba enzigi z'ekibuga Damasiko, ne mmalawo ab'omu Kiwonvu ky'e Aveni, n'omufuzi w'e Betedeni. Abantu b'omu Siriya balitwalibwa nga basibe mu nsi y'e Kiiri.”" 
Amos1:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Gaaza bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga baatwala abantu ab'omu ggwanga lyonna nga basibe, ne babatunda mu Edomu. 2:4-7; Zek 9:5-7" 
Amos1:7 Kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku kigo ky'ekibuga Gaaza, ne gwokya amayumba gaakyo." 
Amos1:8 Ndimalawo abafuzi b'omu bibuga Asudoodi ne Asukelooni. Ndibonereza ekibuga Ekurooni, era n'Abafilistiya.”" 
Amos1:9 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Tiiro bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga baatwala abantu ab'omu ggwanga lyonna nga basibe, mu Edomu, ne batakuuma ndagaano ey'omukwano gye baakola nabo. 11:21-22; Luk 10:13-14" 
Amos1:10 Kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku bisenge by'ekibuga Tiiro, ne gwokya amayumba gaakyo.”" 
Amos1:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Edomu bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga baayigganya baganda baabwe Abayisirayeli, ne babatta awatali kusaasira n'akatono. Obusungu bwabwe ne butakendeerako, ne babeera nabwo ennaku zonna. 35:1-15; Ob 1-14; Mal 1:2-5" 
Amos1:12 Kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku kibuga Temani era gulyokya amayumba g'e Bozura.” 
Amos1:13 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Ammoni bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga mu ntalo ze baalwana okugaziya ensi yaabwe, baabaaga abakazi b'e Gileyaadi abali embuto." 
Amos1:14 Kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku bisenge by'ekibuga Rabba ne gwokya amayumba gaakyo. Walibaawo okuleekaana ku lunaku olw'olutalo, era okulwana kuliwuuma nga kibuyaga." 
Amos1:15 Kabaka waabwe aliwaŋŋangusibwa awamu n'abakungu be.” 
Amos2:1 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'e Mowaabu bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga baayokya amagumba ga kabaka w'e Edomu, ne gafuuka evvu. Zef 2:8-11" 
Amos2:2 Kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku nsi y'e Mowaabu, era gulyokya amayumba g'e Keriyooti. Abantu b'e Mowaabu balifiira mu kasasamalo k'olutalo, ng'abatabaazi baleekaana, era nga bafuuwa eŋŋombe." 
Amos2:3 Ndisaanyaawo omufuzi w'e Mowaabu awamu n'abakungu bonna ab'omu nsi eyo.” 
Amos2:4 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza kubanga bagaanye amateeka gange, era tebakutte biragiro byange. Eby'obulimba bajjajjaabwe bye baagobereranga, bibawubisizza," 
Amos2:5 kyendiva nkoleeza omuliro ku Buyudaaya, ne gwokya amayumba g'omu Yerusaalemu.”" 
Amos2:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Abayisirayeli bakoze ebibi emirundi n'emirundi. N'olwekyo sirirema kubabonereza, kubanga batunze mu buddu abantu abatalina bukuusa, naye abatasobola kusasula mabanja, era abaavu abatasobola kusasulira wadde omugogo gw'engatto." 
Amos2:7 Balinnyirira abateeyinza, ng'abalinnyirira enfuufu, ne bagoba omwavu mu kkubo. Omulenzi ne kitaawe benda ku muwala omu, bwe batyo ne boonoona erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Amos2:8 Ku mabbali ga buli alutaari, bagalamira ku byambalo bye baggye ku baavu ng'omusingo. Mu Ssinzizo lya Katonda waabwe mwe banywera omwenge ogw'omutango gwe baggye ku bantu ababalinako amabanja." 
Amos2:9 “Sso ng'olw'okulumirwa mmwe abantu bange, nasaanyizaawo ddala Abaamori nga mulaba, abantu abaali abawanvu ng'emivule, era ab'amaanyi ng'emyera." 
Amos2:10 Era nabaggya mmwe mu nsi ey'e Misiri, ne mbaluŋŋamiza emyaka amakumi ana okubayisa mu ddungu, ne ndyoka mbawa ensi y'Abaamori abo ebe yammwe." 
Amos2:11 Nalonda abamu ku batabani bammwe babe abalanzi, n'abamu ku bavubuka bammwe babe abawonge. Ekyo si bwe kiri, mmwe Abayisirayeli? Nze Mukama, nze njogedde." 
Amos2:12 Naye mwanywesa abawonge omwenge, ne mulagira abalanzi nti: ‘Temulanga.’" 
Amos2:13 Kale kaakano nja kubanyigiriza ku ttaka, mube ng'ekigaali ekyetisse ebinywa by'eŋŋaano." 
Amos2:14 Embiro tezirigasa baddusi, ab'amaanyi baliggwaamu endasi, n'abazira tebalyewonya." 
Amos2:15 Abalasi b'obusaale tebaliguma kuyimirirawo, abaddusi b'embiro tebalyewonya, wadde abeebagazi b'embalaasi okuwonya obulamu bwabwe." 
Amos2:16 Ku lunaku olwo, wadde n'abazira abasinga obuvumu balisuula ebyokulwanyisa ne badduka.” Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Amos3:1 Mmwe Abayisirayeli, muwulire ekigambo kino Mukama ky'aboogeddeko mmwe eggwanga lyonna lye yaggya mu nsi ey'e Misiri. Agamba nti:" 
Amos3:2 “Mmwe mwekka mu mawanga gonna agali ku nsi, mmwe naluŋŋamya. Kyendiva mbabonereza olw'ebibi byammwe byonna.”" 
Amos3:3 Ababiri bayinza okutambulira awamu nga tebamaze kukkaanya? 
Amos3:4 Empologoma a ewulugumira mu kibira nga terina ky'eyizze? Empologoma ekaabira mu mpuku yaayo nga terina ky'ekutte? 
Amos3:5 Ekinyonyi kikwasibwa mu mutego nga tewali kyakulya kye bakiteze? Omutego gumasuka nga tewali kigumasudde? 
Amos3:6 Bafuuyira eŋŋombe z'olutalo mu kibuga abantu ne batatya? Akabi kagwa mu kibuga nga Mukama si ye akasindise? 
Amos3:7 Mukama Katonda taliiko ky'akola wabula ng'amaze kukitegeezaako abaweereza be abalanzi. 
Amos3:8 Empologoma bw'ewuluguma, ani atatya? Mukama Katonda bw'ayogera, ani ayinza obutalangirira bubaka bwe?" 
Amos3:9 Mulangirire mu mbiri z'omu Asudoodi n'ez'omu Misiri, mugambe nti: “Mukuŋŋaanire ku nsozi z'e Samariya, mulabe omuvuyo omungi n'ejjoogo ebikirimu.”" 
Amos3:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Abantu abo tebamanyi kukolera ku mazima: bateeka mu mayumba gaabwe ebintu ebinyage n'ebibbe. 
Amos3:11 Omulabe kyaliva yeetooloola ensi yaabwe, n'amenya ebigo byabwe, n'anyaga eby'omu mayumba gaabwe.”" 
Amos3:12 Mukama agamba nti: “Ng'omusumba bw'asuuzaako amagulu abiri, oba ekitundu ky'okutu eky'endiga eriiriddwa empologoma, n'Abayisirayeli ababeera mu Samariya bwe baliwonawo abatono ku abo kaakati abagandaalira mu buliri obw'omuwendo omunene." 
Amos3:13 Mukama, Katonda Omuyinzawaabyonna agamba nti: ‘Muwulire era mulabule bazzukulu ba Yakobo.’" 
Amos3:14 Ku lunaku lwe ndibonereza eggwanga lya Yisirayeli olw'ebibi byalyo, ndisaanyaawo zaalutaari ez'e Beteli. Ensonda zaazo zonna zirimenyebwa ne zigwa wansi." 
Amos3:15 Ndizikiriza amayumba, ge babeeramu mu budde obw'obutiti, n'amayumba ge babeeramu mu budde obw'ekyeya. Amayumba agatimbiddwa amasanga galisaanawo, n'amayumba amanene galizikirizibwa.”" 
Amos4:1 Muwulire kino, mmwe abakazi b'e Samariya, abagezze ng'ente z'e Basani, mmwe abanyigiriza abo abateeyinza, era abakamula abaavu, mmwe abagamba babbammwe nti: “Muleete omwenge tunywe.”" 
Amos4:2 Nga Mukama Katonda bw'ali omutuukirivu, alayidde nti: “Ennaku zijja kutuuka, lwe balibatungamu amalobo, ne babaggyawo mwenna, nga babasika ng'ebyennyanja." 
Amos4:3 Balibawalula nga babayisa mu bituli ebiriraanyeewo, ebimogoddwa mu bisenge, ne babasuula mu Harumooni.” Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Amos4:4 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, mujje e Beteli mukole ebibi, mujje e Gilugaali mwongere okwonoona. Muleete ebitambiro byammwe buli nkya, n'ebitundu eby'ekkumi buli nnaku ssatu." 
Amos4:5 Muweeyo ekirabo eky'emigaati egizimbulukusiddwa, gyokebwe nga mwebaza Katonda, era mulangirire ebirabo bye muwaayo nga mweyagalidde. Mubirangirire, kubanga ekyo kye musiima okukola." 
Amos4:6 “Naleeta enjala mu bibuga byammwe byonna, emmere n'ebula ne mu byalo byammwe. Naye era ne mutadda gye ndi." 
Amos4:7 Naziyiza enkuba okutonnya, ng'ekyabula emyezi esatu okutuuka ku makungula. Natonnyesa enkuba mu kibuga ekimu, ne ngiziyiza okutonnya mu kibuga ekirala. Yatonnya mu kitundu ekimu, ekitundu ekirala ne kikala." 
Amos4:8 Ab'omu bibuga ebibiri oba ebisatu baatambulanga ne balaga mu kibuga ekirala okunywa amazzi, naye ne batasangayo gamala kuloga nnyonta. Naye era ne mutadda gye ndi." 
Amos4:9 Nababonereza nga nsindika okugengewala n'obukuku mu birime byammwe. Enzige zaalya ennimiro zammwe ez'emmere n'ez'emizabbibu, n'emiti gyammwe egy'emitiini n'egy'emizayiti. Naye era ne mutadda gye ndi." 
Amos4:10 “Nasindika kawumpuli mu mmwe nga gwe nasindika mu b'e Misiri. Natta abavubuka bammwe mu lutalo, embalaasi zammwe ne zinyagibwa. Najjuza ennyindo zammwe ekivundu ky'emirambo mu nsiisira zammwe. Naye era ne mutadda gye ndi." 
Amos4:11 “Nazikiriza abamu mu mmwe, nga bwe nazikiriza ab'e Sodoma ne Gomora. Mmwe abaawonawo ne muba ng'omumuli oguggyiddwa mu muliro. Naye era ne mutadda gye ndi." 
Amos4:12 Kale mmwe Abayisirayeli, nja kubabonereza. N'olwekyo mweteeketeeke okunsisinkana.”" 
Amos4:13 Katonda ye yabumba ensozi, era ye yatonda embuyaga, era ye ategeeza abantu ye by'alowooza. Obudde obubadde obw'emisana ye abufuula okuba obw'ekiro. Ye atambulira ku ntikko z'ensozi. Erinnya lye ye Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye." 
Amos5:1 Mmwe Abayisirayeli, muwulire bino bye nnyimba okubakungubagira:" 
Amos5:2 “Yisirayeli omuwala embeerera agudde, taliddayo kuyimuka. Agudde wansi mu nsi ye, anaamuyimusa tewali!”" 
Amos5:3 Mukama Katonda agamba nti: “Ekibuga ky'omu Yisirayeli ekisindika abalwanyi olukumi, kikumi bokka be balikomawo. Ekyo ekisindika ekikumi, abalwanyi kkumi bokka be balikomawo.”" 
Amos5:4 Mukama agamba Abayisirayeli nti: “Mujje gye ndi, munaabanga balamu." 
Amos5:5 Naye temugenda Beruseba kusinza. Temugenda Gilugaali, kubanga abaamu, ba kutwalibwa mu busibe. Temunnoonyeza Beseli, kubanga Beteli kya kuggwaawo.”" 
Amos5:6 Mugende eri Mukama, munaabanga balamu. Mukama aleme kubuubuuka ng'omuliro ku Bayisirayeli, ne gwokya abantu b'e Beteli, nga tewali ayinza kuguzikiza." 
Amos5:7 Zibasanze mmwe, abatasala mazima, era abatali benkanya." 
Amos5:8 Mukama ye yatonda emmunyeenye zi Puleyade ne Oriyoni. Ekibadde ekizikiza ye akifuula okuba omusana. N'obudde obubadde obw'emisana, ye abufuula okuba obw'ekiro. Ye ayita amazzi ag'omu nnyanja n'agayiwa ku lukalu. Erinnya lye ye Mukama." 
Amos5:9 Azikiriza ab'amaanyi awamu n'ebigo byabwe. 
Amos5:10 Mmwe mukyawa oyo alamula obulungi mu mbuga z'amateeka, era mutamwa oyo ayogera amazima." 
Amos5:11 Kale nga bwe munyigiriza abaavu, ne mubanyagako eŋŋaano yaabwe, amayumba ag'amayinja ge muzimbye, temuligabeeramu, era n'emizabbibu emirungi gye musimbye, temulinywa mwenge ogugivaamu." 
Amos5:12 Mmanyi ebibi byammwe we byenkana obungi, n'emisango gye muzzizza, we gye nkana obunene. Muyigganya abatuukirivu, mulya enguzi, era mugoba emisango gy'abaavu, ne mutabasalira mazima." 
Amos5:13 Omugezi kyava asirika busirisi mu biseera bino, kubanga biseera bibi." 
Amos5:14 Mufube okukola ebirungi, sso si ebibi, lwe munaabanga abalamu. Olwo Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye anaabanga nammwe, nga bwe mugamba nti ali nammwe." 
Amos5:15 Mukyawenga ebibi, mwagalenga ebirungi. Musalenga amazima mu mbuga zammwe. Oboolyawo Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye alikwatirwa ekisa Abayisirayeli abalisigalawo." 
Amos5:16 Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye kyava agamba nti: “Walibaawo okukuba ebiwoobe mu nguudo, era wonna mu makubo, baligamba nti: ‘Zitusanze!’ Baliyita abalimi okukungubagira awamu n'abo abasasulibwa olw'okukungubagira abafu." 
Amos5:17 Walibaawo okukuba ebiwoobe mu nnimiro zonna ez'emizabbibu, kubanga njija okubabonereza mmwe.” Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Amos5:18 Zibasanze mmwe abalindirira olunaku lwa Mukama. Mwagalira ki olunaku lwa Mukama? Luliba lwa kizikiza, sso si lwa kitangaala." 
Amos5:19 Kiriba ng'omuntu bw'adduka empologoma, ate n'asisinkana eddubu, oba ng'omuntu bw'ayingira mu nnyumba n'akwata ku kisenge, omusota ne gumubojja." 
Amos5:20 Olunaku lwa Mukama luliba lwa kizikiza, sso si lwa kitangaala, lwa kizikiza ekikutte, omutali katangaala." 
Amos5:21 Mukama agamba nti: Nkyawa era nnyooma embaga zammwe, era sisanyukira nkuŋŋaana zammwe." 
Amos5:22 Wadde mumpa ebitambiro byammwe ebyokebwa, oba ebirabo byammwe eby'emmere ey'empeke, sijja kubikkiriza, era sisanyukira nsolo zammwe ezassava ze mutambira." 
Amos5:23 Munzigyeeko oluyoogaano lw'ennyimba zammwe, sijja kuwuliriza maloboozi ga nnanga zammwe." 
Amos5:24 Naye muleke obwenkanya bukulukute ng'amazzi, n'obutuukirivu bube ng'omugga ogujjula ne gubooga." 
Amos5:25 “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, mwampanga ebitambiro n'ebirabo mu myaka amakumi ana, gye mwamala mu ddungu?" 
Amos5:26 Naye kaakano nga bwe musinzizza ebifaananyi bye mwekolera ebya Sakkuti, kabaka lubaale wammwe, n'ebya Kayiwaani, emmunyeenye lubaale wammwe, mulitwala ebifaananyi ebyo" 
Amos5:27 bwe ndibawaŋŋangusiza eyo, okuyisa e Damasiko.” Bw'atyo Mukama bw'agamba. Erinnya lye ye Katonda Nnannyinimagye." 
Amos6:1 Zibasanze mmwe abali obulungi mu Siyooni, nammwe abatalina kye mweraliikirira ku lusozi lwa Samariya, mmwe abakungu mu ggwanga lya Yisirayeli, ekkulu mu mawanga gonna, mmwe, abantu gye bajja okunoonya obuyambi." 
Amos6:2 Mugende mutunuulire ekibuga Kalune. Muve eyo mulage mu kibuga ekikulu Hamati, ate muserengete mu Gaati, ekibuga ky'Abafilistiya. Ebibuga ebyo bisinga obwakabaka bwa Buyudaaya n'obwa Yisirayeli obulungi? Oba bisinga ensi yammwe obugazi?" 
Amos6:3 Mugaanye okukkiriza nti olunaku olw'akabi lunaatera okutuuka, kyokka ne mukola ebirusembeza okumpi!" 
Amos6:4 Ziribasanga mmwe abagalamira ku bitanda eby'amasanga, ne mulya endiga ento, n'ennyana ez'omu magana gammwe." 
Amos6:5 Muyimbira ku ddoboozi ery'ennanga ennyimba ez'okwegayaaza, era mweyiiyiza ebivuga nga Dawudi bwe yakola." 
Amos6:6 Munywera Omwenge mu mpaawo, era mwesiiga omuzigo ogusingira ddala obulungi, naye ne mutalumirwa kuzikirira kwa Yisirayeli." 
Amos6:7 Kale mmwe mulikulemberamu olunyiriri lw'abalitwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse. N'ebinyumu byammwe, mmwe abagayaavu, birikoma." 
Amos6:8 Mukama, Katonda Nnannyinimagye alayidde nti: “Nkyawa okwekulumbaza kw'Abayisirayeli, ne ntamwa amayumba gaabwe. Kyendiva mpaayo eri omulabe ekibuga kyabwe ekikulu, ne byonna ebikirimu.”" 
Amos6:9 Abantu kkumi bwe balisigala mu nnyumba emu, balifa." 
Amos6:10 Owooluganda lw'omufu, era ateekwa okumuziika, bw'alifulumya omulambo mu nnyumba, alibuuza oyo akyasigadde mu nnyumba nti: “Wakyaliyo omulala ali naawe?” Oli aliddamu nti: “Nedda.” Ono aligamba nti: “Sirika, tuleme wadde okwatula erinnya lya Mukama.”" 
Amos6:11 Mukama bw'aliragira, ennyumba ennene n'entono zirimenyebwamenyebwa." 
Amos6:12 Embalaasi ziddukira ku lwazi? Abantu balimisa ente ku nnyanja? Naye mmwe, obwenkanya mubufudde butwa, n'ekituufu mukifudde kikyamu." 
Amos6:13 Musanyuka olw'okuwamba ekibuga Lodebari, era mwewaana nti: “Twefunidde ekibuga Karinayimu olw'amaanyi gaffe.”" 
Amos6:14 Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, nja kusindika ab'eggwanga eddala, beefuge ensi yammwe. Balibabonyaabonya mmwe, okuviira ddala mu Hamati, okutuuka ku kagga ak'e Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Bino Mukama Katonda bye yandaga: nalaba ng'ateekateeka ebibinja by'enzige, nga baakamala okusala omuddo gwa kabaka, era nga gutandika okuddamu okumera." 
Amos7:2 Bwe zaamala okulya buli kimera kyonna mu nsi, ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Katonda, nkwegayiridde, sonyiwa! Abayisirayeli banaasobola batya okulama? Kubanga tebaliiko bwe bali!”" 
Amos7:3 Awo Mukama n'akyusa ekirowoozo kye, n'agamba nti: “Ekyo tekijja kutuukirira.”" 
Amos7:4 Bino Mukama, Katonda bye yandaga: nalaba ng'ateekateeka omuliro okubonereza abantu. Omuliro ogwo ne gukaliza obuziba bw'ennyanja, ne gutandika n'okwokya olukalu." 
Amos7:5 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, Katonda, Abayisirayeli banaayinza batya okulama? Kubanga tebaliiko bwe bali!”" 
Amos7:6 Awo Mukama n'akyusa ekirowoozo kye, n'agamba nti: “Era n'ekyo tekijja kutuukirira.”" 
Amos7:7 Bino Mukama bye yandaga: nalaba Mukama ng'ayimiridde ku mabbali g'ekisenge, ekyazimbibwa nga bapimisa omuguwa ogugera. Yali akutte omuguwa ogugera." 
Amos7:8 N'ambuuza nti: “Amosi, olaba ki?” Ne nziramu nti: “Omuguwa ogugera.” Awo Mukama n'agamba nti: “Nkozesa omuguwa ogugera, okulaga Abayisirayeli nti: bali ng'ekisenge ekitateredde. Sikyaddamu kukyusa kirowoozo kyange, nja kubabonereza." 
Amos7:9 Ebifo ebigulumivu bazzukulu ba Yisaaka mwe basinziza, birizikirizibwa. Ne zaalutaari za Yisirayeli zirisaanyizibwawo. Era ab'ennyumba ya kabaka Yerobowaamu, ndibattira mu lutalo.”" 
Amos7:10 Awo Amaziya kabona w'e Beteli, n'atumira Yerobowaamu, kabaka wa Yisirayeli, ng'agamba nti: “Amosi akwekobera mu Bayisirayeli. Byonna by'ayogera, eggwanga teriyinza kubigumiikiriza," 
Amos7:11 kubanga Amosi agamba nti: ‘Yerobowaamu wa kufiira mu lutalo. Era Abayisirayeli, bajja kuggyibwa mu nsi yaabwe, batwalibwe mu buwaŋŋanguse.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Awo Amaziya n'agamba Amosi nti: “Ggwe omulanzi, genda, ddayo mu Buyudaaya, okolere eyo ogw'obulanzi, era eyo gy'oba ofuna emmere gy'olya." 
Amos7:13 Naye toddangamu kukolera gwa bulanzi wano mu Beteli, kubanga kino kye kifo, kabaka mw'asinziza, era lye Ssinzizo ly'eggwanga.”" 
Amos7:14 Awo Amosi n'addamu Amaziya nti: “Saali mulanzi, wadde omugoberezi w'abalanzi, wabula nali mulunzi era nga ndabirira miti emisikamoreya." 
Amos7:15 Naye Mukama yanzigya ku mulimu gwange ogw'obulunzi, n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Genda olange eri abantu bange Abayisirayeli.’" 
Amos7:16 Kale kaakano wulira Mukama ky'agamba. Oŋŋamba nti: ‘Tolanga bivumirira Bayisirayeli, toyogera bikosa bazzukulu ba Yisaaka.’" 
Amos7:17 Mukama kyava agamba nti: ‘Mukazi wo alifuuka malaaya mu kibuga. Batabani bo ne bawala bo balittirwa mu lutalo. Ettaka lyo lirigabanibwamu ne liweebwa abalala. Naawe kennyini olifiira mu nsi ey'abatali balongoofu, era Abayisirayeli tebalirema kuggyibwa mu nsi yaabwe, ne bawaŋŋangusibwa.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Bino, Mukama Katonda bye yandaga: ekibbo ky'ebibala eby'omu kyeya." 
Amos8:2 Mukama n'ambuuza nti: “Amosi, olaba ki?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ekibbo ky'ebibala eby'omu kyeya.” Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Abantu bange Abayisirayeli banaatera okuzikirizibwa. Sijja kuddamu kukyusa kirowoozo kyange, nja kubabonereza." 
Amos8:3 Ku lunaku olwo, ennyimba ez'omu Ssinzizo, zirifuuka kutema miranga. Emirambo giriba mingi. Baligisuula mu buli kifo nga basirise.”" 
Amos8:4 Muwulire kino, mmwe abalinnyirira bakateeyamba, era abasaanyaawo abaavu ab'omu ggwanga lino," 
Amos8:5 nga mugamba nti: “Ennaku enkulu zinaggwaako ddi, tulyoke tutunde eŋŋaano? Ne Sabbaato eneggwaako ddi, tulyoke tuddemu okutunda? Olwo tulyoke tukendeeze ekipimo, ate twongeze emiwendo, tukumpanye nga tukozesa minzaani ezitapima kituufu." 
Amos8:6 Tutunde ebisusunku by'eŋŋaano. Tulabe abaavu abatasobola kusasula mabanja, wadde okusasulira omugogo gw'engatto, tubagule bafuuke abaddu baffe.”" 
Amos8:7 Mukama, Katonda wa Yisirayeli alayidde nti: “Mazima siryerabira wadde ekimu ku bikolwa byabwe." 
Amos8:8 Ensi erikankana olw'ekyo, era buli muntu agirimu, alinakuwala. Yonna eritabanguka n'etumbiira, era n'ekka ng'Omugga Kiyira." 
Amos8:9 Ku lunaku olwo, ndiragira enjuba n'egwa mu budde obw'ettuntu, era ndireeta ekizikiza ku nsi emisana. Nze Mukama, Katonda, nze njogedde." 
Amos8:10 Embaga zammwe, ndizifuula za kukungubaga, n'ennyimba zammwe ez'essanyu, ndizifuula kutema miranga. Ndibamwesaako enviiri zammwe, ne mwambala ebikutiya, ne muba ng'abazadde abakungubagira omwana waabwe gwe babadde balina omu yekka. Olunaku olwo lwonna lulibeera lwa bulumi." 
Amos8:11 “Ekiseera kijja kutuuka, nsindike enjala mu nsi. Abantu balirumwa enjala naye nga si ya mmere. Balirumwa ennyonta, naye nga si ya mazzi, wabula nga ya kuwulira Kigambo kya Mukama. Nze Mukama, Katonda, nze njogedde." 
Amos8:12 Balitambula okuva ku Nnyanja Enfu okutuuka ku Nnyanja Eyaawakati, n'okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba. Era balidda eno n'eri, nga banoonya ekigambo kya Mukama. Naye tebalikizuula." 
Amos8:13 Ku lunaku olwo abawala abalungi n'abalenzi balizirika olw'ennyonta. 
Amos8:14 Abo abalayira balubaale b'e Samariya, ne bagamba nti: ‘Lubaale w'e Daani omulamu!’ Oba nti: ‘Lubaale w'e Beruseba omulamu!’ Baligwa, ne bataddamu kuyimuka.”" 
Amos9:1 Nalaba Mukama ng'ayimiridde ku mabbali g'alutaari, n'alagira nti: “Kuba emitwe gy'empagi z'essinzizo, emiryango gikankane. Era gimenye, gigwe ku mitwe gy'abantu. Abo abasigaddewo, ndibattira mu lutalo. Tewaliba n'omu ku bo adduka, wadde awonawo." 
Amos9:2 Ne bwe balisima okutuuka emagombe, era ndibakwata ne mbaggyayo. Ne bwe balirinnya waggulu mu ggulu, era ndibawanulayo." 
Amos9:3 Ne bwe balyekweka ku ntikko y'Olusozi Karumeeli, era ndibanoonya ne mbaggyayo. Ne bwe balinneekweka wansi mu buziba bw'ennyanja, era ndiragira ogusota gwamu ne gubabojja." 
Amos9:4 Ne bwe balitwalibwa abalabe baabwe mu buwaŋŋanguse, era ndiragira ne battirwa eyo. Mmaliridde kubakolako kabi, sso si kubakolera birungi.”" 
Amos9:5 Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, ye oyo akwata ku nsi n'ekankana, bonna abagiriko ne banakuwala, yonna n'etumbiira era n'ekka ng'Omugga Kiyira." 
Amos9:6 Mukama yazimba ennyumba ye mu ggulu, era waggulu w'ensi n'ateekawo ebbanga. Ye ayita amazzi g'omu nnyanja, n'agayiwa ku lukalu. Erinnya lye ye Mukama." 
Amos9:7 Mukama agamba nti: “Mmwe Abayisirayeli, ndowooza ku bantu b'e Etiyopiya, nga bwe ndowooza ku mmwe. Naggya Abafilistiya mu Kafutoori, n'Abasiriya mu Kiri, nga bwe naggya mmwe mu nsi y'e Misiri." 
Amos9:8 Nze Mukama Katonda, kaakano neekaliriza obwakabaka buno obwa Yisirayeli obukola ebibi, era ndibusaanyaawo ku nsi, naye sirizikiririza ddala bazzukulu ba Yakobo." 
Amos9:9 “Ndiragira era ne nkuŋŋaanya Abayisirayeli mu mawanga gonna, ng'eŋŋaano bw'ekuŋŋaanyizibwa mu kakuŋŋunta, okuggyamu bonna abatalina mugaso." 
Amos9:10 Mu bantu bange, abo bonna aboonoonyi, era abagamba nti: ‘Akabi tekalitutuukako, wadde okutusemberera’ balifiira mu lutalo.”" 
Amos9:11 “Olunaku lulituuka, ne nzizaawo obwakabaka bwa Dawudi, obuli ng'ennyumba eyagwa. Ndiddaabiriza ebisenge by'ennyumba eyo, ne ngizzaawo nga bwe yali edda." 
Amos9:12 Olwo Abayisirayeli baliwangula ensi ya Edomu esigaddewo era n'amawanga gonna agaabeerako agange. Mukama alikola ekyo, bw'atyo bw'agamba." 
Amos9:13 “Ennaku zirituuka, obudde obw'amakungula g'eŋŋaano n'obw'okusogola emizabbibu ne butuuka, ng'obw'okusiga tebunnaggwaawo. Omwenge omuwoomu gulikulukuta okuva ku nsozi ne ku busozi bwonna." 
Amos9:14 Era ndikomyawo abantu bange Abayisirayeli mu nsi yaabwe. Ebibuga byabwe ebyalekebwa awo ettayo, birizimbibwa ne babibeeramu. Balisimba emizabbibu, ne banywa omwenge gwayo. Balirima ennimiro, ne balya ebibala byamu." 
Amos9:15 Ndisenza abantu bange mu nsi gye nabawa, era tebaliddayo kugisengukamu.” Mukama Katonda wammwe bw'atyo bw'ayogedde." 
Obadiah1:1 Kuno kwe kulabikirwa kwa Obadiya. Mukama atumye omubaka we eri amawanga, era tuwulidde obubaka bwe nti: “Musituke, tulumbe Edomu, tumulwanyise!” Amo 1:11-12; Mal 1:2-5" 
Obadiah1:2 Mukama agamba Edomu nti: “Ndikufuula eggwanga etto, erinyoomebwa ennyo." 
Obadiah1:3 Okwekulumbaza kwo kukuwubisizza. Wazimba mu lwazi olugumu, osula mu nsozi engulumivu, era weebuuza nti: ‘Alimpanulayo ye ani?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Wadde weewanika waggulu ng'empungu, ekisu kyo ne kiba ng'ekiri mu mmunyeenye, era ndikuwanulayo ggwe!" 
Obadiah1:5 “Ababbi n'abanyazi bwe bajja ekiro, banditutteko bye baagala. N'abanoga emizabbibu, bandireseeko egimu. Naye ggwe abalabe bo bakusaanyirizzaawo ddala." 
Obadiah1:6 Ebya bazzukulu ba Esawu nga bikwekuddwa! Ebyobugagga byabwe nga binyagiddwa! 
Obadiah1:7 Abo abaakolagananga nammwe, babawubisizza mmwe, ne babagoba mu nsi yammwe. Be mwali nabo emirembe, kaakano babawangudde mmwe. N'abo be mwalyanga nabo, babateze mmwe omutego. Baboogerako mmwe nti: ‘Nga tebalina magezi!’" 
Obadiah1:8 “Ku lunaku lwe ndibonereza Edomu, ndizikiriza ab'amagezi baamu, okutegeera ne kuggwaawo ku lusozi lwa Esawu." 
Obadiah1:9 Abazira b'omu Temani balikwatibwa entiisa ku lusozi lwa Esawu, buli muntu alittibwa.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Olw'okukambuwalira baganda bammwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo, mulizikirizibwa ne muswazibwa ennaku zonna." 
Obadiah1:11 Ku lunaku abalabe lwe baamenya enzigi zaabwe, mwayimirira awo ku mabbali. Nammwe mwali babi ng'abagwira abo, abaanyaga ebintu mu Yerusaalemu ne babigabana." 
Obadiah1:12 Mwali temusaanidde kusanyukira lunaku baganda bammwe ab'omu Buyudaaya lwe baatuukibwako akabi, era lwe baazikirira. Mwali temusaanidde kubasekerera nga bali mu buyinike." 
Obadiah1:13 Mwali temusaanidde kuyingira mu kibuga kya bantu bange, okusanyuka nga babonaabona, n'okunyaga ebintu byabwe ku lunaku lwe baagwa mu kabi." 
Obadiah1:14 Mwali temusaanidde kuyimirira mu masaŋŋanzira okukwata abo abadduka, n'okubawaayo eri abalabe ku lunaku lwe baagwibwako akabi.”" 
Obadiah1:15 “Olunaku lunaatera okutuuka, nze Mukama lwe ndisalirako amawanga gonna omusango. Ggwe Edomu, kye wakola, naawe kye balikukola. Bye wakola birikuddira." 
Obadiah1:16 Abantu bange baanywera ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu ekikopo ekikaawa eky'okubonaabona. Naye amawanga gonna ageetooloddewo, galinywa ekikopo eky'okubonaabona ekikaawa okusingawo. Galikinywa kyonna, ne gasaanirawo ddala.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Naye ku Lusozi Siyooni abamu baliwonawo, era luliba lutukuvu. N'ab'ennyumba ya Yakobo balyeddiza ensi yaabwe." 
Obadiah1:18 Ab'ennyumba ya Yakobo ne Yosefu baliba ng'omuliro: balyokya ab'ennyumba ya Esawu ng'omuliro bwe gwokya ekisambu. Tewaliba n'omu ow'ennyumba ya Esawu alisigalawo nga mulamu. Nze Mukama, nze njogedde." 
Obadiah1:19 Ensi ya Edomu erifuuka y'abo ab'omu bukiikaddyo. N'ensi y'Abafilistiya eriba y'abo ab'omu bugwanjuba. Abayisirayeli balyefuga ensi ya Efurayimu n'ey'e Samariya. Era Gileyaadi eriba ya ba Benyamiini. 
Obadiah1:20 Ab'eggye ly'Abayisirayeli abaawaŋŋangukira mu Kanaani, balidda ne bawangula Fenikiya, okutuukira ddala e Zalefaati. N'eggye ly'abo abaava mu Yerusaalemu ne bawaŋŋangukira mu Sefaraadi, baliwamba ebibuga eby'omu bukiikaddyo obwa Buyudaaya." 
Obadiah1:21 Abawanguzi ab'omu Yerusaalemu be balifuga Edomu, era Mukama ye aliba Kabaka.”" 
Jonah1:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera ne Yona, mutabani wa Amittayi, n'agamba nti:" 
Jonah1:2 “Situka ogende e Nineeve, ekibuga ekyo ekinene, okirangirire nti mmanyi abantu baamu nga bwe bali aboonoonyi ennyo.”" 
Jonah1:3 Kyokka Yona n'asituka okuddukira e Tarusiisi, ave mu maaso ga Mukama. N'aserengeta e Yoppa, n'asangayo emmeeri egenda e Tarusiisi, n'asasula ebisale, n'asaabala omwo, agende nabo e Tarusiisi, ave mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Jonah1:4 Naye Mukama n'akunsa omuyaga ku nnyanja, ne guba gwa maanyi nnyo, emmeeri n'eyagala okumenyeka." 
Jonah1:5 Abavuzi baayo ne batya, buli omu n'akoowoola lubaale we amuyambe. Ne basuula mu nnyanja ebintu ebyali mu mmeeri, bagiwewule ku buzito. Naye Yona yali mu kisenge ekya wansi mu mmeeri, ng'agalamidde, yeebase otulo." 
Jonah1:6 Awo omugoba w'emmeeri n'ajja w'ali, n'amugamba nti: “Owange, obadde ki ggwe eyeebase? Golokoka, osabe lubaale wo, oboolyawo anaatusaasira, ne tutazikirira.”" 
Jonah1:7 Awo ne bagambagana nti: “Ka tukube akalulu, tutegeere atuleetedde akabi kano.” Ne bakuba akalulu, ne kalondamu Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Ne bamugamba nti: “Kale tubuulire atuleetedde akabi kano. Okola mulimu ki? Ova wa? Oli wa nsi ki? Oli wa ggwanga ki?” 
Jonah1:9 Yona n'abagamba nti: “Ndi Mwebureeyi. Nsinza Mukama Katonda ow'omu ggulu, eyakola ennyanja n'olukalu.”" 
Jonah1:10 Era n'ababuulira nti yali adduse, ave mu maaso ga Mukama. Ekyo bwe baakimanya, ne batya nnyo, ne bamugamba nti: “Kiki kino ky'okoze?”" 
Jonah1:11 Ennyanja yali egenda yeeyongera okufuukuuka ennyo. Awo ne bamugamba nti: “Tukukole ki ennyanja eryoke eteeke?” 
Jonah1:12 Yona n'agamba nti: “Munsitule munsuule mu nnyanja, olwo ennyanja ejja kuteeka, kubanga mmanyi nga nze mbaviiriddeko okulumbibwa omuyaga guno ogw'amaanyi.”" 
Jonah1:13 Naye bo ne bafuba nnyo okuvuga emmeeri okugoba ku ttale, kyokka ne balemwa, kubanga ennyanja yagenda yeeyongera bweyongezi okufuukuuka, n'ebalemesa." 
Jonah1:14 Kyebaava bakoowoola Mukama nti: “Tukwegayiridde, ayi Mukama, totuzikiriza olw'okuggyawo obulamu bw'omuntu ono, era totuvunaana kutta muntu ataliiko musango, kubanga ggwe, ayi Mukama, ggwe oyagadde kibe bwe kityo.”" 
Jonah1:15 Awo ne basitula Yona, ne bamusuula mu nnyanja, ennyanja n'eteeka." 
Jonah1:16 Ne batya nnyo Mukama, ne bamuwa ekitambiro era ne beeyama okumuweerezanga." 
Jonah1:17 Mukama n'asindika ekyennyanja ekinene, ne kimira Yona, Yona n'amala mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja ennaku ssatu emisana n'ekiro." 
Jonah2:1 Awo Yona n'asinza Mukama, Katonda we, ng'asinziira mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja," 
Jonah2:2 n'agamba nti: “Bwe nali mu buzibu, ayi Mukama, nakukaabirira onnyambe, n'onziramu. Nasinziira emagombe ne nkukoowoola, n'ompulira." 
Jonah2:3 Wansuula mu buziba wakati mu nnyanja, amazzi ne ganneetooloola, amayengo go ag'amaanyi ne gampita kungulu." 
Jonah2:4 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ngobeddwa mu maaso go. Ndiddayo ntya okulaba ku Ssinzizo lyo ettukuvu?’ 
Jonah2:5 Amazzi gansaanikira ne gaagala okunzita! Obuziba bw'ennyanja bwanneetooloola, omuddo ogw'omu nnyanja gwezingirira ku mutwe gwange." 
Jonah2:6 Nakka wansi ensozi we zisibuka, mu nsi, enzigi zaayo gye ziba ensibe ennaku zonna. Naye ggwe, ayi Mukama Katonda wange, n'onzigya mu bunnya nga ndi mulamu." 
Jonah2:7 Bwe nawulira ng'obulamu bunzigwamu ne nzijukira okukusaba, ayi Mukama, n'owulira kye nkusaba, ng'oli mu Ssinzizo lyo ettukuvu." 
Jonah2:8 Abo abeemalira ku by'obulimba ebitaliimu nsa, beggya ku ggwe eyandibasaasidde." 
Jonah2:9 Naye nze nja kukuwa ekitambiro nga bwe nkutendereza. Era nja kutuukiriza bye nasuubiza. Mukama ye alokola.” 
Jonah2:10 Awo Mukama n'alagira ekyennyanja, ne kisesema Yona ku lukalu." 
Jonah3:1 Awo Mukama n'ayogera ne Yona omulundi ogwokubiri," 
Jonah3:2 n'agamba nti: “Situka ogende e Nineeve, ekibuga ekyo ekinene, okirangirire obubaka bwe nkuwa.”" 
Jonah3:3 Awo Yona n'asituka, n'alaga e Nineeve nga Mukama bwe yamugamba. Nineeve kyali kibuga kinene nnyo, nga kya lugendo lwa nnaku ssatu okutambula okukiyitamu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona n'atandika okuyita mu kibuga. Bwe yatambulako olugendo lwa lunaku lumu, n'alangirira nti: “Esigadde ennaku amakumi ana, Nineeve kizikirire!”" 
Jonah3:5 Abantu b'e Nineeve ne bakkiriza obubaka bwa Katonda ne balangirira okusiiba. Ne bambala ebikutiya, bonna okuva ku mukulu okutuuka ku muto." 
Jonah3:6 Kabaka w'e Nineeve bwe yabiwulira, n'asituka ku ntebe ye ey'obwakabaka, n'ayambulamu ekyambalo kye, n'ayambala ekikutiya, n'atuula mu vvu." 
Jonah3:7 N'aweereza ekirangiriro wonna mu Nineeve nti: “Kino kye kiragiro kya kabaka n'abakungu be: tewaba n'omu abaako k'alya wadde k'anywa, k'abe muntu, oba ente, oba endiga, wadde ensolo endala yonna." 
Jonah3:8 Abantu bambale ebikutiya, beegayirire nnyo Katonda. Buli omu alekeyo empisa ze embi, n'ebikolwa bye ebibi." 
Jonah3:9 Oboolyawo Katonda anaakyusa ekirowoozo kye, n'alekayo obusungu bwe obukambwe, ne tutazikirira.”" 
Jonah3:10 Katonda n'alaba bye bakoze, era nga bwe baleseeyo empisa zaabwe embi, n'akyusa ekirowoozo kye, n'atababonereza, nga bwe yali agambye okubabonereza." 
Jonah4:1 Naye Yona n'atasiima n'akatono, n'asunguwala." 
Jonah4:2 Ne yeegayirira Mukama, n'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, saayogera nga nkyali mu nsi y'ewaffe nti ekyo kyennyini ky'olikola? Kyennava nnyanguwa okuddukira e Tarusiisi, kubanga namanya ng'oli Katonda wa kisa, era omusaasizi, alwawo okusunguwala, alina ekisa ekingi era eyeetegese bulijjo okukyusa ekirowoozo kyo, n'otobonereza." 
Jonah4:3 Kale kaakano, ayi Mukama, nkwegayiridde, ndeka nfe, kubanga kirungi nfe okusinga okuba omulamu.”" 
Jonah4:4 Mukama n'addamu nti: “Ggwe olowooza nti oli mutuufu okusunguwala?” 
Jonah4:5 Awo Yona n'afuluma ekibuga, n'atuula ku ludda lwakyo olw'ebuvanjuba, ne yeekolera eyo ekisiisira, n'atuula mu kisiikirize kyakyo, n'alinda okulaba ebinaatuuka ku kibuga Nineeve." 
Jonah4:6 Awo Mukama Katonda n'ameza ekimera, n'akirandiza waggulu w'ekifo Yona we yali, kimuwe ekisiikirize, kimusanyuse. Yona n'asanyuka nnyo olw'ekimera ekyo." 
Jonah4:7 Naye obudde bwe bwakya enkya, Katonda n'asindika ekiwuka, ne kiruma ekimera ekyo, ekimera ne kiwotoka." 
Jonah4:8 Enjuba bwe yavaayo, Katonda n'asindika embuyaga ey'omu buvanjuba, ey'ebbugumu, omusana ne gwokya Yona mu mutwe, n'abulako katono okuzirika. Ne yeesabira afe, n'agamba nti: “Kirungi nfe, okusinga okuba omulamu!”" 
Jonah4:9 Katonda n'agamba Yona nti: “Ggwe olowooza nti oli mutuufu okusunguwala olw'ekimera?” Yona n'addamu nti “Kituufu nze okusunguwala, era obusungu bwagala kunzita!”" 
Jonah4:10 Mukama n'agamba nti: “Olumirwa ekimera ky'ototeganidde, era ky'otaalandiza, ekyameze mu kiro ekimu, ne kifa mu kiro ekiddiridde." 
Jonah4:11 Kale nze sandisaasidde Nineeve, ekibuga ekinene, omuli abaana abato abasoba mu mitwalo ekkumi n'ebiri, abatasobola kwawula mukono gwabwe ogwa ddyo ku gwa kkono, era omuli n'ensolo ennyingi?”" 
Micah1:1 Mu mirembe gya Yotamu ne Ahazi ne Heezeekiya, bassekabaka ba Buyudaaya, Mukama yawa Mikka ow'omu kibuga ky'e Moreseti obubaka buno, obufa ku Samariya ne ku Yerusaalemu. 28:1–32:33" 
Micah1:2 Muwulire kino mmwe abali mu mawanga gonna. Ggwe ensi ne byonna ebikuliko, mutege amatu," 
Micah1:3 Mukama aliva mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, n'akka, n'atambulira ku ntikko z'ensozi." 
Micah1:4 Ensozi zirisaanuukira wansi we, ng'envumbo bw'esaanuukira mu muliro. Zirikuluggukira mu biwonvu, ng'amazzi agava ku kasozi." 
Micah1:5 Ebyo byonna biribaawo, kubanga Abayisirayeli bakoze ebibi, ne bajeemera Katonda. Ani avunaanibwa olw'ebibi bya Yisirayeli? Si Samariya ekibuga kyayo ekikulu? Ani avunaanibwa olw'ekibi kya Buyudaaya? Si Yerusaalemu?" 
Micah1:6 Kale Mukama agamba nti: “Ndifuula Samariya ekigulumu mu ttale, ekifo eky'okusimbamu emizabbibu. Ndisuula amayinja gaakyo mu kiwonvu, era ndisendawo emisingi gyakyo." 
Micah1:7 Ebifaananyi byonna bye kisinza, birimenyebwamenyebwa ne bizikirizibwa; era ebintu byonna bye kyafuna, birisaanyizibwawo omuliro. Kubanga kyabifuna okuva mu mpeera eweebwa bamalaaya baakyo. Kale biritwalibwa okukozesebwa awalala ng'empeera eweebwa bamalaaya.”" 
Micah1:8 Awo Mikka n'agamba nti: “Olw'ekyo nditema emiranga, ne nkuba ebiwoobe! Ndyeyambulamu engoye n'engatto, ne ntambula nga ndi bwereere. Ndiwowoggana ng'ebibe, ne nkaaba nga mmaaya," 
Micah1:9 kubanga ebiwundu bya Samariya, tebiyinza kuwonyezebwa. Ate ne Buyudaaya anaatera okubonaabona mu ngeri ye emu. Okubonaabona kutuuse ku luggi olwa wankaaki olwa Yerusaalemu, omuli abantu bange!”" 
Micah1:10 Okubonaabona kwaffe temukubuulirako balabe baffe ab'omu Gaati. Temukaaba maziga n'akatono. Mmwe ab'e Beeti Leyafura, mwekulukuunye mu nfuufu!" 
Micah1:11 Mmwe ab'omu Safiri, mukwate ekkubo mugende mu buwaŋŋanguse nga temwambadde era nga muswadde. Mmwe abatuuze b'omu Zaanani, muleme kuva mu kibuga kyammwe. Bwe muliwulira ebiwoobe mu Betezeeli, mulimanya nti eyo teriiyo buddukiro." 
Micah1:12 Abatuuze b'e Maroti beeraliikiridde, nga balindirira obuyambi, kubanga Mukama aleese akabi akatuuse okumpi ku luggi olwa wankaaki olwa Yerusaalemu." 
Micah1:13 Mmwe abatuuze b'e Lakisi, musibe embalaasi ku magaali: mwakoppa ebibi bya Yisirayeli ne muleetera Yerusaalemu okwonoona." 
Micah1:14 Kale musiibule ekibuga ky'e Moreseti Gaati. Bakabaka ba Yisirayeli tebalifuna buyambi mu kibuga ky'e Akuzibu. 
Micah1:15 Mmwe abatuuze b'e Maresa, Mukama alibawaayo eri abalabe, abaliwamba ekibuga kyammwe. Abeekitiibwa mu Yisirayeli baligenda ne beekweka mu mpuku y'e Adullamu." 
Micah1:16 Mwemweko enviiri okukungubagira abaana bammwe ababasanyusa. Mwefuule ba biwalaata ng'ensega, kubanga abaana bammwe balibaggyibwako ne bawaŋŋangusibwa." 
Micah2:1 Ziribasanga abo abagalamira ku bitanda byabwe, ne bakeesa obudde nga bateesa okukola ebibi, era ne babikola ng'obudde bukedde, kubanga basobola okubikola." 
Micah2:2 Bwe beegomba ennimiro, ezo nga bazinyaga; ka zibeere nnyumba nazo nga batwala. Tebatya na nnyinimu, wadde bye yasikira." 
Micah2:3 Mukama kyava agamba nti: “Ntegeka okubakolako mmwe akabi ke mutaliyinza kwewonya. Muliba temukyatambula nga mweyagala, kubanga ebiseera ebyo biriba bibi." 
Micah2:4 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, balibafuula mmwe olugero olw'abo abatuukibwako akabi, era balibayeeya mu luyimba olw'okukungubaga nti: ‘Tunyagiddwako buli kintu, Mukama atuggyeeko ensi yaffe n'agigabira abajeemu.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Kale ekiseera bwe kirituuka ensi eddizibwe abantu ba Mukama, mmwe tewaliba abapimira mugabo." 
Micah2:6 Waliwo abalangirira nga bagamba nti: “Totulagula! Omuntu tasaana kulanga ebyo! Tetugenda kuswazibwa. 
Micah2:7 Aba Yakobo bayinza okukolimirwa? Mukama takyagumiikiriza? Ayinza okukola ebiri ng'ebyo? Ebigambo bye tebisanyusa abo abakolera ku mazima?” 
Micah2:8 Mukama n'addamu nti: “Naye abantu bange, mufuuse ng'abalabe. Abo abatayagala kulwana, mubanyagako ebyambalo byabwe nga babayitako awatali kye beeraliikirira." 
Micah2:9 Abakazi b'abantu bange mubagoba mu maka gaabwe agabasanyusa. Abaana baabwe abato ekitiibwa kye nabawa, mukibaggyako ennaku zonna." 
Micah2:10 Musituke mugende, kubanga wano tewakyaliwo kiwummulo. Ebibi byammwe bizikirizza ekifo kino." 
Micah2:11 Abantu bano gwe baagala, ye mulanzi abalimba ng'agamba nti: ‘Nnanga nti mulifuna omwenge n'ebyokunywa ebirala ebitamiiza.’" 
Micah2:12 Naye ndibakuŋŋaanya mmwe mwenna Abayisirayeli abalisigalawo, ne mbaleeta wamu ng'endiga ezikomyewo mu kisibo. Ensi yammwe erijjula abantu ng'eddundiro erijjudde endiga. Balireekaana olw'obungi bwabwe”" 
Micah2:13 Abatemera ekkubo alibakulemberamu. Balimenya oluggi olwa wankaaki ne bayitawo. Kabaka waabwe, Mukama yennyini, alibakulemberamu." 
Micah3:1 Awo ne ŋŋamba nti: “Muwulire mmwe abafuzi ba Yisirayeli! Si mmwe mwandibadde mumanya obwenkanya? 
Micah3:2 Naye mukyawa ebirungi, ne mwagala ebibi. Mubaagako abantu bange eddiba, ne mubaggyako ennyama ku magumba!" 
Micah3:3 Mulya abantu bange! Mubabaagako eddiba, ne mumenyaamenya amagumba gaabwe, ne mubasalaasala ng'ennyama ey'okufumba mu ntamu!" 
Micah3:4 Ekiseera kirituuka ne mukaabirira Mukama, kyokka talibaddamu. Taliwuliriza kusaba kwammwe, kubanga mwakola ebikolwa bibi.”" 
Micah3:5 Abalanzi bawubisa abantu bange nga basuubiza emirembe eri buli abawa ekyokulya, ne balangirira olutalo ku abo abatabawadde mmere. Abalanzi abo Mukama abagamba nti:" 
Micah3:6 “Olw'ekyo balanzi mmwe, enjuba eneetera okugwa nga mutunula, obudde obw'emisana bubaddugalire, mulyoke mubeere mu kiro nga temukyalabikirwa; mube mu kizikiza nga temukyalanga.”" 
Micah3:7 Abalanzi balikwatibwa ensonyi, n'abalaguzi baliswala. Bonna balibikka ku mimwa gyabwe, kubanga Katonda talibaanukula." 
Micah3:8 Naye nze, Mukama anzijuza omwoyo gwe era n'amaanyi, n'amazima era n'obuvumu, okutegeeza Abayisirayeli ebibi byabwe nga bwe biri." 
Micah3:9 Muntegere amatu mmwe abakulira ennyumba ya Yakobo, abafuzi ba Yisirayeli, mmwe abakyawa amazima, ekirungi ne mukifuula ekibi!" 
Micah3:10 Mmwe abazimba Siyooni ku musingi ogw'obutemu, Yerusaalemu ku bwonoonyi." 
Micah3:11 Abakulu baakyo balamula lwa nguzi. Bakabona bayigiriza, n'abalanzi mu kyo balanga bafune ensimbi. Ng'olwo beeyinula Mukama nga bagamba nti: “Mukama tali wakati mu ffe? Tetulituukibwako kabi!”" 
Micah3:12 Kale olw'okubeera mmwe Olusozi Siyooni lulirimibwa ng'ennimiro. Ekibuga Yerusaalemu kirifuuka ntuumu ya bisasiro. Akasozi okuli Essinzizo kalimerako ekibira. 
Micah4:1 Mu biseera ebirijja olusozi okuli Essinzizo lwe luliba lusinga zonna obugulumivu. Lulitumbiira okuyisa obusozi bwonna. Ab'omu mawanga mangi balijja nga bakuluggukira ku lwo. 
Micah4:2 Era baligamba nti: “Mujje twambuke ku lusozi lwa Mukama, ku Ssinzizo lya Katonda wa Yisirayeli. Alituyigiriza by'ayagala tukole, tulitambulira mu makubo g'atulaga. Kubanga mu Siyooni mwe muva ebyo Mukama by'alagira. Asinziira mu Yerusaalemu okwogera n'abantu be.”" 
Micah4:3 Aliramula amawanga ag'amaanyi, agali okumpi n'agali ewala. Ebitala byabwe balibiweesaamu enkumbi, n'amafumu gaabwe baligaweesaamu ebiwabyo. Amawanga tegaalwanaganenga, era tewaabenga nate kutendekebwa mu bya ntalo." 
Micah4:4 Buli muntu anaabeeranga mu mizabbibu gye ne mu mitiini gye, nga tewali amutiisa. Mukama ow'obuyinza ye ayogedde." 
Micah4:5 Abantu aba buli ggwanga bakolera ku biragiro bya balubaale baabwe. Naye ffe tunaakoleranga ku biragiro bya Mukama, Katonda waffe ennaku zonna." 
Micah4:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, ne nkuŋŋaanya wamu abawenyera, ne nkomyawo abo abaagobwa n'abo be nabonereza." 
Micah4:7 Abawenyera ndibafuula bakaawonawo, n'abaali bagobeddwa ne babeera ewala n'ewaabwe, ndibafuula eggwanga ery'amaanyi. Okuva olwo nnaabafugiranga ku Lusozi Siyooni emirembe gyonna.”" 
Micah4:8 Naawe Yerusaalemu, omunaala okusinziirwa okulabirira eggwanga, ng'omusumba bw'alabirira eggana lye, oliddamu okuba ekibuga ekikulu eky'obwakabaka nga bwe wali edda." 
Micah4:9 Kale okaabira ki ennyo n'obalagalwa bw'otyo ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala? Lwa kuba nti tolina kabaka, wadde omuntu akuwa amagezi?" 
Micah4:10 Mulumwe nnyo musinde ng'omukazi alumwa okuzaala, mmwe abantu b'omu Siyooni, kubanga kaakano mujja kuva mu kibuga, musiisire ku ttale. Era muligenda e Babilooni. Naye eyo Mukama gy'alibanunulira mu balabe bammwe." 
Micah4:11 Kaakano ab'omu mawanga mangi bakuŋŋaanye okubalwanyisa mmwe, nga bagamba nti: “Yerusaalemu kyonoonebwe! Twagala tulabe nga kizikiridde!”" 
Micah4:12 Naye ab'omu mawanga ago tebamanyi Mukama by'alowooza. Tebamanyi ng'abakuŋŋaanyizza ng'ebinywa by'eŋŋaano, abakubire mu gguuliro." 
Micah4:13 Mukama agamba nti: “Mmwe ab'omu Yerusaalemu, mugende mubonereze abalabe bammwe. Ndibafuula ba maanyi mmwe, ng'ente eya sseddume erina amayembe ag'ekyuma, n'ebinuulo eby'ekikomo. Mulibetenta amawanga mangi, ebyobugagga byabwe ne mubiwongera Nze Mukama, Mukama w'ensi zonna.”"
