Micah5:1 Abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, mukuŋŋaanye eggye lyammwe. Batuzingizizza ffe! Balumbye omufuzi wa Yisirayeli!" 
Micah5:2 Mukama agamba nti: “Ggwe Betilehemu Efurata, akamu ku bubuga obusingayo obutono mu Buyudaaya, mu ggwe mwe ndiggya omufuzi wa Yisirayeli, asibuka mu lunyiriri olw'emirembe egy'edda ennyo.”" 
Micah5:3 Mukama kyaliva abawaayo okutuusa oyo alumwa okuzaala lw'alizaala. Olwo abantu b'ensi ye abaliba basigaddewo ne bakomawo eri Bayisirayeli bannaabwe. 
Micah5:4 Oyo bw'alijja, alifuga abantu be mu buyinza bwa Mukama n'obukulu bw'erinnya lya Mukama, Katonda we. Abantu be balibeera mu ddembe, kubanga aliba mukulu mu nsi yonna," 
Micah5:5 era alireeta emirembe. Abassiriya bwe balizinda ensi yaffe, ne basaatuukira mu nnyumba zaffe, tulisindika abakulembeze baffe musanvu n'abakungu baffe munaana, ne babalwanyisa." 
Micah5:6 Balirwana olutalo ne bawangula Assiriya, ensi ya Nimuroodi. Alituwonya Abassiriya, abaliba babuuse ensalo zaffe, ne bayingira ensi yaffe." 
Micah5:7 Abayisirayeli abaliwonawo, baliba wakati mu mawanga amangi ng'omusulo oguva eri Mukama, era ng'enkuba etonnya ku bimera ebirabirirwa Mukama, ebitalabirirwa bantu." 
Micah5:8 Abayisirayeli abaliwonawo baliba wakati mu mawanga amangi ng'empologoma eri wakati mu nsolo ez'omu ttale, oba mu magana g'endiga: z'egwamu n'ezitaagulataagula, ne wataba ayinza kuziwonya." 
Micah5:9 Muliwangula abalabe bammwe era mulibazikiriza bonna. 
Micah5:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Mu kiseera ekyo, ndibaggyako embalaasi zammwe, era ndisanyaawo amagaali gammwe." 
Micah5:11 Ndizikiriza ebibuga ebiri mu nsi yammwe, era ndimenya ebigo byammwe byonna." 
Micah5:12 Ndizikiriza eby'obulogo byammwe, temuliddayo kuba na balaguzi." 
Micah5:13 Ndiggyawo ebifaananyi byammwe, n'empagi zammwe, ebyo mmwe mmwennyini bye mwekolera, temuliddayo kubisinza." 
Micah5:14 Era ndisimbula mu nsi yammwe ebifaananyi bya lubaale Asera, era ndizikiriza ebibuga byammwe." 
Micah5:15 Mu busungu n'ekiruyi ndiwoolera eggwanga ku mawanga agatampulira.” 
Micah6:1 Kale muwulire ebyo Mukama by'agamba nti: “Situka oyombe mu maaso g'ensozi, n'obusozi buwulire ky'ogamba.”" 
Micah6:2 “Mmwe emisingi gy'ensi egy'olubeerera, muwulire okwemulugunya kwa Mukama, kubanga Mukama yeemulugunyiza abantu be. Ajja kulumiriza Yisirayeli.”" 
Micah6:3 Mukama agamba nti: “Mmwe abantu bange, kiki kye mbakoze? Kiki kye mbakaluubiriddemu? Munziremu." 
Micah6:4 Nabaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, ne mbanunula mu buddu. Natuma Musa ne Arooni ne Miriyamu okubakulembera." 
Micah6:5 Naye bantu bange, mujjukire ebyo Balaki, kabaka wa Mowaabu bye yateesa okubakolako, n'ebyo Balamu mutabani wa Bewori bye yamuddamu. Mujjukire ebyabaawo nga muva e Sittimu okutuuka e Gilugaali, mulyoke mumanye bye nkola okubalokola.”" 
Micah6:6 Kiki kye nnaaleetera Mukama, Katonda ow'omu ggulu nga nzija okuvuunama mu maaso ge? Nnaamuleetera nnyana ezaakamala omwaka ogumu, nziweeyo zibe ekitambiro ekyokebwa?" 
Micah6:7 Mukama anaasiima endiga za sseddume enkumi n'enkumi, oba omuzigo ogukulukuta ng'emigga? Omwana wange omuggulanda gwe mba mpaayo olw'ebibi byange?" 
Micah6:8 Mukama atubuulidde ekirungi ky'ayagala. Mukama tatwagaza kirala wabula okukolanga ebituufu, n'okubanga ab'ekisa era n'okumusinzanga Katonda waffe nga tuli beetoowaze." 
Micah6:9 Kya magezi okutya Mukama. Mukama akoowoola ekibuga nti: “Muwulire mmwe abakuŋŋaanira mu kibuga! 
Micah6:10 Mu mayumba g'ababi mulimu ebyobugagga bye baafuna mu bukumpanya. Bakozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu bye nvumirira. 
Micah6:11 Nnyinza ntya okusonyiwa abantu abakozesa minzaani n'ebipimo ebirala ebitali bituufu? 
Micah6:12 Kubanga abagagga mu mmwe banyigiriza abaavu, era mwenna muli balimba." 
Micah6:13 N'olwekyo ntandise okubabonereza n'okubazikiriza olw'ebibi byammwe. 
Micah6:14 Mulirya, naye temulikkuta. Mulisigala nga mukyalumwa enjala. Mulifiirwa bye mwatereka, ne bye muliwonyaawo ndibizikiririza mu lutalo." 
Micah6:15 Mulisiga, naye temulikungula. Mulisogola emizayiti ne muggyamu omuzigo, naye temuligukozesa. Mulisogola omwenge, naye temuligunywako." 
Micah6:16 Kubanga mugoberedde empisa embi eza Omuri n'ebikolwa eby'ab'ennyumba ya Ahabu, era mukoledde ku magezi gaabwe. Kale mmwe abantu bange ndibazikiriza. Mulinyoomebwa abantu bonna, era mulivumibwa buli wantu.”" 
Micah7:1 Nga zinsanze nze! Ndi ng'omuyala atasanga kibala kisigadde ku muti, wadde ekirimba kisigadde ku muzabbibu. Ebirimba by'emizabbibu byonna n'emitiini gye njagala egisooka okwengera, binogeddwa, tekukyali kya kulya." 
Micah7:2 Tewakyali mwesigwa mu nsi, tewakyali muntu mwesimbu. Buli muntu ateesa atemule, buli omu atega munne ekitimba." 
Micah7:3 Bonna bamanyirivu mu kukola ebibi. Abafuzi n'abalamuzi baagala kulya nguzi. Omukungu bw'ababuulira ku kibi ky'ateesa okukola, nga nabo bateesa wamu naye." 
Micah7:4 N'abo abasinga obulungi bo bali nga katazzamiti; abo abasingamu obwesimbu bali ng'olukomera lw'amaggwa. Kaakano ekiseera kituuse babonerezebwe nga bwe baalabulibwa abalanzi baabwe. Kaakano basobeddwa. 
Micah7:5 Temwesiga muliraanwa wammwe, wadde ow'omukwano. Mwegendereze bye mwogera ne bwe muba nga mwogera ne bakazi bammwe." 
Micah7:6 Kubanga omwana ow'obulenzi anyooma kitaawe, ow'obuwala akikinala ku nnyina. Muka mwana ayombesa nnyazaala we. Abalabe b'omuntu baba ba mu nnyumba ye." 
Micah7:7 Naye nze nnaatunuuliranga Mukama, nnaalindiriranga Katonda andokole. Katonda wange anampuliranga." 
Micah7:8 Ggwe omulabe wange osanyukira bwereere nga nfunye ebizibu. Ne bwe ngwa, nnaayimuka. Ne bwe tuba mu kizikiza, Mukama anampa ekitangaala." 
Micah7:9 Nnaagumikiriza obusungu bwa Mukama kubanga mmujeemedde. Oluvannyuma alinnwanirira, n'asalawo nti nze mutuufu. Alindeeta mu kitangaala, ne ndaba nga bw'ali omwenkanya." 
Micah7:10 Olwo nno omulabe wange eyaŋŋambanga nti: “Mukama Katonda wo ali ludda wa?” Aliraba ekyo n'aswala. Ndisanyuka okulaba bw'alinnyirirwa ng'ebitoomi eby'omu nguudo. 
Micah7:11 Ggwe Yerusaalemu, ekiseera eky'okuzimba ebisenge byo, kijja. Mu kiseera ekyo, ensalo zo zirigayizibwa." 
Micah7:12 Abantu bo balidda gy'oli, nga bava mu Assiriya ne mu bibuga bya Misiri, mu bitundu by'Omugga Ewufuraate, ne ku nnyanja, ne ku nsozi ez'ewala." 
Micah7:13 Naye ensi erifuuka ddungu olw'ebikolwa ebibi eby'abo abagibeeramu. 
Micah7:14 Mukama, abantu bo be weeroboza, balabirire ng'omusumba bw'alabirira endiga ze. Bali bokka mu kibira, nga beetooloddwa ensi engimu. Baleke baliirenga mu Basani ne mu Gileyaadi nga mu biseera eby'edda." 
Micah7:15 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndiraga abantu ebyamagero, nga bwe nakola nga muva mu nsi ey'e Misiri.”" 
Micah7:16 Ab'omu mawanga baliraba bino, ne batekemuka, newaakubadde nga ba maanyi. Balikwata ku mimwa, era baliziba amatu gaabwe nga beewuunya." 
Micah7:17 Balyewalula mu nfuufu ng'emisota, ne bava gye beekwese, ne bajja eri Mukama, Katonda waffe, nga batidde nga bakankana." 
Micah7:18 Teri Katonda mulala ali nga ggwe, ayi Mukama asonyiwa ebibi by'abantu bo abawonyeewo. Tolemera mu busungu bwo ennaku zonna, naye osanyuka okukwatirwa ekisa." 
Micah7:19 Oliddamu okutusaasira. Olirinnyirira ebibi byaffe, n'obisuula mu buziba bw'ennyanja." 
Micah7:20 Oliraga obwesigwa n'ekisa abantu bo, bazzukulu ba Aburahamu ne Yakobo nga bwe walayirira bajjajjaffe okuva edda n'edda." 
Nahum1:1 Buno bwe bubaka obufa ku Nineeve, kye kitabo omuli okulabikirwa kwa Nahumu ow'e Elukoosi." 
Nahum1:2 Mukama Katonda takkiriza kuvuganyizibwa. Mukama awoolera eggwanga, era wa busungu nnyo. Abonereza abo abamukyawa, era asibira abalabe be ekiruyi." 
Nahum1:3 Mukama alwawo okusunguwala, era alina obuyinza bungi. Buli azzizza omusango tamuleka: amubonereza. Ekkubo mw'atambulira, liri mu kikuŋŋunta ne mu kibuyaga, era ebire ye nfuufu ebigere bye gye bisitula." 
Nahum1:4 Alagira ennyanja n'ekalira, era emigga gyonna agikaza. Ettale ly'e Basani n'ery'oku Lusozi Karumeeli libabuse. Ebimuli by'oku Lebanooni biwotose." 
Nahum1:5 Ensozi zikankanira w'ali, obusozi ne busaanuuka. Ettaka likka bw'alabika. Ensi yonna yeekaaka, n'abagiriko ne batekemuka." 
Nahum1:6 Bw'asunguwala, ani ayinza okubeerawo? Ani ayinza okugumira obusungu bwe obuswakidde? Bwe bubuubuuka ng'omuliro, enjazi zaatikira w'ali." 
Nahum1:7 Mukama mulungi: akuuma abantu be mu biseera ebizibu. Alabirira abamwesiga. 
Nahum1:8 Abamukyawa alibasaanyizaawo ddala n'omujjuzo gw'amazzi, era abalabe be alibasindika emagombe." 
Nahum1:9 Kiki kye muteesa okukola ku Mukama? Ajja kubasaanyaawo! Tewali amwesimbamu mulundi mulala! 
Nahum1:10 Wadde bali ng'amaggwa agakwataganye, era ng'abanywi b'omwenge abatamidde, alibookya n'abasaanyaawo ng'ebisambu ebikaze." 
Nahum1:11 Mu ggwe Nineeve, mwavaamu alina endowooza embi, ateesa okukola akabi ku Mukama." 
Nahum1:12 Kino Mukama ky'agamba abantu be Abayisirayeli nti: “Wadde Abassiriya bangi era nga ba maanyi, banaazikirira baggweewo. Newaakubadde nababonyaabonya mmwe, naye sikyababonyaabonya nate." 
Nahum1:13 Kaakano nja kumenya ekikoligo kya Assiriya ekibanyigiriza, era nkutule enjegere ze ezibasibye.”" 
Nahum1:14 Kino Mukama ky'alagidde ekifa ku mmwe Abassiriya: “Temulifuna bazzukulu balituumibwa mannya gammwe. Ndizikiriza ebifaananyi ebyole era n'ebisaanuuse ebiri mu masabo ga balubaale bammwe. Ndibasimira entaana kuba temusaanira kuba balamu.” 
Nahum1:15 Mulabe omubaka ali ku nsozi ajja, aleeta amawulire amalungi, era alangirira emirembe! Mmwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, mukuume ennaku zammwe enkulu. Bye mweyama mubituukirize, kubanga ababi tebakyaddamu kubalumba mmwe. Bazikiririziddwa ddala." 
Nahum2:1 Nineeve, olumbiddwa, anaakumulungula atuuse! Kuuma ekigo kyo, labirira oluguudo! Weesibe wenyweze, funvubira n'amaanyi go gonna!" 
Nahum2:2 Mukama anaatera okuzzaawo ekitiibwa kya Yakobo: kye kitiibwa ky'Abayisirayeli. Abanyazi bajja ne baaya emizabbibu gyabwe, ne bamenya amatabi gaagyo." 
Nahum2:3 Abasajja be abazira bakutte engabo emmyufu: Abalwanyi be bambadde ebyambalo ebitwakaavu. Amagaali gaabwe gaakaayakana ng'omuliro. Embalaasi z'olutalo ziri bulindaala. 
Nahum2:4 Amagaali gabunye ekibuga geetawulira mu nguudo. Gaakaayakana ng'emimuli, gatemagana ng'ebimyanso." 
Nahum2:5 Abakungu bayitibwa, ne batambula nga bagwa. Abalumbi banguwako okutuuka ku kigo, bategeka okukiggunda." 
Nahum2:6 Enzigi ez'oku ludda lw'omugga ziggulibwawo, olubiri ne lujjula entiisa!" 
Nahum2:7 Nnaabakyala n'anyagibwa, n'atwalibwa nga musibe. Abazaana be bakaaba ng'amayiba, nga bwe beekuba mu bifuba, olw'okunakuwala." 
Nahum2:8 Abantu badduka okuva mu Nineeve ng'amazzi agava mu kidiba ekyabise. Bwe babakoowoola nti: “Muyimirire, muyimirire!” Tewali atunula mabega." 
Nahum2:9 Munyage ffeeza, munyage zaabu! Ebyobugagga tebiriiko kkomo! Ekibuga kijjudde ebintu: buli kirungi kiri omwo!" 
Nahum2:10 Nineeve kyabuliddwa, ebyamu binyagiddwa, kisigalidde awo! Tewali alaga buzira, amaviivi gabakubagana; n'ebiwato bibakankana era abantu bonna amaaso gabapeeruuse olw'entiisa!" 
Nahum2:11 Ekibuga kiri ludda wa ekyali kitiibwa ng'empuku y'empologoma, empologoma ento mwe zaaliiranga, era mwe zaasigalanga awatali azitiisa, ng'empologoma enkulu ensajja n'enkazi zitambudde?" 
Nahum2:12 Empologoma ensajja buli kye yattanga n'ekitaagula obulere, n'ekireetera ento ezo, era n'enkazi zaayo. N'ejjuza empuku yaayo, ensolo ezitaaguddwa!" 
Nahum2:13 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ndikubonereza ggwe! Ndyokya amagaali go ne ganyooka omukka, era abaserikale bo balittirwa mu lutalo. Nditwala byonna bye wanyaga. Eddoboozi ly'ababaka bo teriiwulirwenga nate.”" 
Nahum3:1 Zikisanze ekibuga ekitemu, ekijjudde obulimba, era ekikubyeko ebinyage! Obunyazi bwakyo tebukoma!" 
Nahum3:2 Wulira enkoba ezivuga, ezikuba embalaasi ze bagoba, nga zigenda ziguluba! Wulira nnamuziga ezeewagala, n'amagaali agakubagana!" 
Nahum3:3 Abeebagadde embalaasi bataze okulwana ng'ebitala bimasamasa, nga n'amafumu gamyansa! Abafudde be bangi, emirambo butabala, giri mu ntuumu na ntuumu, abadduka kwe beekoona!" 
Nahum3:4 Ebyo byonna byasibuka ku bwenzi bwa Nineeve malaaya asikiriza ennyo, eyaloga emitima gy'abantu, n'afuga amawanga olw'obwenzi bwe." 
Nahum3:5 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ndikubonereza ggwe Nineeve, ndikwambula osigale bwereere amawanga gakulabe gakusunge." 
Nahum3:6 Ndikusuulako ebyenyinyalwa era ne nkunyoomoola. Ndikufuula kyerolerwa eri buli akutunulako. 
Nahum3:7 Abakutunulako bonna balikudduka nga bagamba nti: ‘Mazima Nineeve kifuuse matongo! Anaakikaabira anaava wa? Tunaazuula wa akikubagiza?’ ” 
Nahum3:8 Nineeve ggwe mulungi okusinga Nowamoni ekibuga ky'e Misiri? Kyali kumpi n'Omugga Kiyira, nga kyetooloddwa amazzi ku njuyi zonna. Kyali kikomeddwa na nnyanja, ng'amazzi kye kigo kyakyo!" 
Nahum3:9 Amaanyi gaakyo gaakiri mu Etiyopiya ne Misiri. Ab'e Puuti n'ab'e Libiya nabo baakiyambanga. 
Nahum3:10 Wabula era kyanyagibwa: abantu baamu ne bawaŋŋangusibwa. Abaana baamu abato ne batirimbulwa mu buli masaŋŋanzira gaakyo. Abeekitiibwa mu kyo n'abakulembeze baakyo baasibibwa ku njegere, ne bagabanibwa abalabe nga bakubirwa akalulu!" 
Nahum3:11 Naawe Nineeve olitaga ng'omutamiivu, oliggwaamu amaanyi. Naawe olinoonya we weewogoma abalabe." 
Nahum3:12 Ebigo byo byonna biriba ng'emiti emitiini okuli ebibala ebisooka okwengera. Emiti egyo bwe ginyeenyezebwa, ebibala bikunkumuka, ababyagala ne balya." 
Nahum3:13 Laba abaserikale bo bali ng'abakazi: tewali bataasa nsi yo, kugigobako balabe! Omuliro gusaanyaawo emikiikiro gy'enzigi zo." 
Nahum3:14 Weekimire amazzi, weetegekere okuzingizibwa. Nyweza ebigo byo. Samba ebbumba obumbe amatoffaali, ogapange mu kyokero." 
Nahum3:15 Wabula ne bw'onookola ki, tewali kinaakugasa! Ojja kwokebwa omuliro, bakuttire mu lutalo wenna bakusaanyeewo, ng'ebirime mu nnimiro enzige bye zisaanyaawo. Wazaala nnyo ng'enzige!" 
Nahum3:16 Wayaza abasuubuzi bo okusinga emmunyeenye mu bungi. Naye kati babuuse ng'enzige ne bagenda. 
Nahum3:17 Abakulembeze mu ggwe bali ng'enseenene, n'abaduumira eggye lyo bali ng'ebibinja by'enzige ezeekukuma mu nkomera ng'obudde bunnyogovu. Naye enjuba bw'evaayo zibuuka ne zigenda, tewali amanya lye zikutte." 
Nahum3:18 Ggwe Kabaka w'Assiriya, abasumba bo nno bafudde! Abakungu bo bagaŋŋalamye. Abantu bo basaasaanidde mu nsozi, tewaliiwo abakuŋŋaanya!" 
Nahum3:19 Tewali kinaaweeza ku bulumi bw'owulira, ekiwundu kyo si kya kuwona. Bonna abawulira bw'owanguddwa, bakuba mu ngalo nga basanyuka, kubanga obukambwe bwo obutaaliko kkomo tewali gwe bwataliza." 
Habakkuk1:1 Buno bwe bubaka omulanzi Habakuuku bwe yafuna mu kulabikirwa. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ayi Mukama, ndituusa wa okukuyita nga towulira? Nkukaabirira nti: “Tulokole otuwonye obukambwe bw'abantu!” Wabula ggwe n'osirika!" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ondekera ki okulaba ebitali bya bwenkanya, n'otunula obutunuzi ng'ebikyamu bikolebwa? Kubanga obunyazi n'obukambwe bye ndaba buli we ntunula." 
Habakkuk1:4 Amateeka kyegavudde gaddirira, ne wataba kugoba nsonga, kubanga ababi be bakajjala kati ku batuukirivu! Kwe kulaba n'amazima nga ddala gasuuliddwa!" 
Habakkuk1:5 Mukama n'agamba abantu be nti: “Mutunuleeko mu mawanga mulabe, muneewuunya ne musamaalirira! Kubanga mu mirembe gyammwe gino nja kubaako kye nkolawo, kye mutayinza kukkiriza singa bababuulidde." 
Habakkuk1:6 Kale mulabe, nkulaakulanya Abakaludaaya, abantu abakambwe abo abatatuula kukkalira: abagenda batalaaga ensi okunyaga ebintu by'abalala." 
Habakkuk1:7 Baakitiibwa ba ntiisa, beemala era beeramula!" 
Habakkuk1:8 “Embalaasi zaabwe zidduka okusinga engo! Mu bukambwe zikirako emisege egy'akawungeezi. Abeebagazi baazo abeeyagazi bakka ng'empungu eyanguyira ky'eneerya! 
Habakkuk1:9 Bonna kye bajjirira, kukola bya bukambwe. We baba basembedde buli muntu ajjula entiisa! Abanyage be bakuŋŋaanya, bayitirira obungi ng'obuweke bw'omusenyu!" 
Habakkuk1:10 Banyooma bakabaka, ne basekerera abakungu. Tewali kigo kye batya: bakitindirako ettaka olwo ne bakiwamba!" 
Habakkuk1:11 Ne bafuumuuka ng'embuyaga ne babulawo! Bantu boonoonyi, amaanyi gaabwe ye Lubaale waabwe!”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, eyabeerawo okuva edda n'edda, oli mutuukirivu, era wa mirembe na mirembe. Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, walonda Abakaludaaya n'obafuula ba maanyi, balyoke batubonereze." 
Habakkuk1:13 Oli mutuukirivu nnyo atasaanye kutunuulira bibi, era atayinza kugumiikiriza bakola bikyamu. Kale lwaki osirika ng'ababi bamalawo abo ababasinga okuba abatuukirivu?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Abantu obayisa nga byannyanja oba ng'ebyewalula, ebitalina abirabirira?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Abakaludaaya abo bakwata abantu, nga bakozesa obutimba n'amalobo, ng'abakwata ebyennyanja. Babawalulira mu butimba, ne basanyuka nga bajaguza olw'abo be bakwasizza!" 
Habakkuk1:16 Kyebava bawaayo ebitambiro eri obutimba bwabwe obwo, ne babwotereza obubaane, kubanga bubawa omugabo ogusinga obusava, ne balya bye beeroboza." 
Habakkuk1:17 Banaakozesanga ebissi byabwe bazikirize amawanga olutata awatali kusaasira? 
Habakkuk2:1 Nja kulinnya waggulu ku munaala we nkuumira, nninde okumanya Mukama by'anampa okwogera, ne by'ananziramu ku kwemulugunya kwange." 
Habakkuk2:2 Awo Mukama n'anziramu nti: “Bye nkulaga biwandiike obyole bulungi ku bipande, bibe byangu okusoma." 
Habakkuk2:3 Bikuume mu buwandiike, kubanga bikyalinda ekiseera kyabyo kituuke. Naye ekiseera tekirirwa, bye nkulaga bituukirire. Ne bwe kirabika nti kirwawo kirindirire, tekirirema kujja, era kiryanguwako." 
Habakkuk2:4 Buno bwe bubaka nti: ‘Omwonoonyi talirama. Naye omutuukirivu aliba mulamu lwa kukkiriza kw'alina.’ ” 
Habakkuk2:5 Ng'omwenge bwe gulimbalimba abagunywa, n'abeekulumbaza bwe batyo bwe baba: tebamatira era tebatereera. Omululu gwe balina mugazi nga magombe! Bali nga Walumbe: nabo tebakkuta. Kyebava bawangula buli ggwanga, bafugenga abantu bonna." 
Habakkuk2:6 Abo bonna abawanguddwa bakudaalira abawangudde nga babayeeyereza nti: “Tezibasanze mmwe abeetuumako eby'abandi? Kale mulituusa wa okugenda nga mwebinika emisango gy'abalemwa okusasula amabanja?” 
Habakkuk2:7 Mmwe abawangudde, nammwe temuligwa ku bbanja ne musibibwa abababanja? Mulirumbibwa abalabe nga temumanyiridde, babakankanye nammwe, babanyage n'ebyammwe." 
Habakkuk2:8 Nga bwe mwanyaga abantu ab'amawanga amangi, abo abasigaddewo balibanyaga nammwe olw'okutemula abantu n'okukambuwalira ensi awamu era n'ebibuga, n'ababibeeramu bonna." 
Habakkuk2:9 Zibasanze mmwe abagaggawaza amaka gammwe nga munyaga eby'abalala, ne mwezimbira amayumba mu bifo ebinywezeddwa, nga tetuukibwayo babi." 
Habakkuk2:10 Wabula bye mwateesa biswaza maka gammwe. Mu kusaanyaawo abantu ab'amawanga amangi, mweretedde okuzikirira." 
Habakkuk2:11 N'amayinja gennyini mu bisenge galeekaana okubanenya mmwe, n'emiti egy'akasolya gigaanukula." 
Habakkuk2:12 Zibasanze mmwe abazimbira ekibuga ku kutemula abantu, ne mukinywezaawo nga muzza misango!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Mukama, Nnannyinimagye ye yakkiriza ab'amawanga ge muwangudde bateganire bwereere, ebizimbe byabwe nabyo babizimbire muliro." 
Habakkuk2:14 Naye abali ku nsi balijjula okumanya ekitiibwa kya Mukama, ng'ennyanja bw'ejjula amazzi." 
Habakkuk2:15 Zibasanze mmwe, kubanga mwasunguwala ne muswaza bannammwe, nga mubaleetera okutagatta ng'abatamiivu b'omwenge." 
Habakkuk2:16 Nammwe muliswazibwa mu kifo ky'okuweebwa ekitiibwa. Mulinywa omwenge ne mutagatta: Mukama alibanywesa ekikopo eky'obusungu bwe ababonereze, mu kifo ky'ekitiibwa, muswale." 
Habakkuk2:17 Eby'obukambwe bye mwakola mu Lebanooni, ka bibaddire mmwe kati. Nga bwe mwazikiriza ebisolo, mulitiisibwa ebisolo. Mulituukibwako ebyo olw'okutemula abantu n'okukambuwalira ensi awamu era n'ebibuga, n'ababibeeramu bonna." 
Habakkuk2:18 Ekifaananyi kigasa ki? Kintu buntu ekikolebwa omuntu. Tekiyigiriza mazima wabula obulimba. Eyakikola afunamu ki okwesiga ekitayogera? 
Habakkuk2:19 Zibasanze mmwe abagamba ekitittiriri nti: “Zuukuka!” Oba ejjinja nti: “Golokoka!” Kino kinaababuulira ki? Lwa kubikkibwako ffeeza ne zaabu, naye tekirina bulamu." 
Habakkuk2:20 Naye Mukama ali mu Ssinzizo lye ettukuvu. Abantu bonna ku nsi basirike mu maaso ge. 
Habakkuk3:1 Kuno kwe kusaba kw'omulanzi Habakuuku mu ddoboozi ng'ery'okukungubaga. 
Habakkuk3:2 Ayi Mukama, mpulidde ky'okoze ne ntya. Kaakati ddamu okukola ebyo bye wakolanga edda. Saasira ne bw'osunguwala!" 
Habakkuk3:3 Katonda omutuukirivu ajja ng'ava mu Temani ne ku Lusozi Parani. Ekitiibwa kye kibikka eggulu, n'ensi yonna emutendereza." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ekitiibwa kye kiri ng'enjuba evaayo. Omukono gwe omukwekeddwa obuyinza bwe, gumyamyansa." 
Habakkuk3:5 Atuma Kawumpuli okumukulemberamu, alagira Walumbe okumuvaako emabega." 
Habakkuk3:6 Bw'asibamu, n'akankanya ensi. Bw'atunula, amawanga gayuuguuma, ensozi ez'olubeerera ne ziggweerera, obusozi obutaggwaawo ne bubulira wansi. Ekkubo lye ne liba nga bwe lyali edda." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nalaba ab'e Kusani nga batidde, n'ab'e Midiyaani nga bakankana!" 
Habakkuk3:8 Ayi Mukama, okwebagala ku mbalaasi zo, ku magaali go ggwe omuwanguzi wasunguwalira migga? Oba wanyiigira nnyanja?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Wasowolayo omutego gwo n'oguteekako obusaale okulasa. Ensi wagyasaamu n'ekulukuta emigga. 
Habakkuk3:10 Ensozi zaakulaba ne zitya! Mukoka ow'amaanyi yakulugguka n'ayitawo. Ennyanja yayira, n'esitula amayengo gaayo." 
Habakkuk3:11 Enjuba n'omwezi tebyavaayo olw'okutangaala kw'obusaale bwo obuyita, n'okwakaayakana kw'effumu lyo erimasamasa." 
Habakkuk3:12 Watambula n'oyita mu nsi ng'oliko ekiruyi, n'olinnyirira amawanga ng'osunguwadde." 
Habakkuk3:13 Weesowolayo okulokola abantu bo, okulokola oyo omusiige wo. Wabetenta omukulembeze w'ababi, n'ozikiriza b'atwala." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wakozesa obusaale bwo n'ofumita omuduumizi w'eggye lye, eryajja ng'embuyaga y'akazimu okutusaanyaawo nga lisanyuka, ng'erigenda okutigomya abaavu, abatalina bwogerero." 
Habakkuk3:15 Walinnyirira ennyanja n'embalaasi zo, amayengo ag'amaanyi ne gabimba ejjovu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Nawulira ebyo byonna ne nkankana, emimwa ne ginjugumira olw'okutya, amagumba gange ne galemala. Ne nkankanira we nnyimiridde! Ndisirika ne nnindirira olunaku Katonda lw'alibonereza abatulumba." 
Habakkuk3:17 Emitiini ne bwe gitamulisa, n'emizabbibu ne gitabala, emizayiti ne bwe gifa, emmere mu nnimiro n'etekula, embuzi ne bwe ziggwa mu kisibo, n'ente ne zitaba mu biraalo" 
Habakkuk3:18 naye era ndisanyuka ne njaguza kubanga Mukama, Katonda, ye Mulokozi wange." 
Habakkuk3:19 Mukama, Katonda ye ampa amaanyi. Bwe ntambula ku nsozi, ye anyweza ebigere byange ng'eby'empeewo. Ebyo bya mukulu w'abayimbi, ebigendera ku bivuga byange eby'enkoba." 
Zephaniah1:1 Buno bwe bubaka, Mukama bwe yawa Zefaniya, mu mirembe gya Yosiya, mutabani wa Amoni, era kabaka wa Buyudaaya. Zefaniya yali mutabani wa Kuusi, Kuusi mutabani wa Gedaliya, Gedaliya mutabani wa Amariya, Amariya mutabani wa Heezeekiya." 
Zephaniah1:2 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndizikiriza ebintu byonna ku nsi," 
Zephaniah1:3 abantu bonna n'ensolo, n'ebinyonyi n'ebyennyanja era ndisanyaawo aboonoonyi. Ndizikiriza abantu obutalekaawo n'omu. Nze Mukama nze njogedde." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ndibonereza ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu bonna. Era ndizikiriza abasinza Baali, abakyasigaddewo mu kifo ekyo, waleme kubaawo wadde ajjukira bakabona be." 
Zephaniah1:5 Ndizikiriza buli muntu alinnya waggulu ku nnyumba n'asinza enjuba n'omwezi era n'emmunyeenye. Ndizikiriza n'abo abasinza nze Mukama, ng'ate balayira lubaale Milukomu." 
Zephaniah1:6 Ndizikiriza n'abo abanvuddeko, n'abatakyajja gye ndi wadde okunsaba okubayamba.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Musirike awali Mukama Katonda, kubanga olunaku lw'alikolerako lusembedde. Mukama ateeseteese ekitambiro, atukuzizza abagenyi be." 
Zephaniah1:8 Mukama agamba nti: “Ku lunaku olwo lwendittirako ekitambiro, ndibonereza abakungu n'abaana ba kabaka, n'abo bonna abeeyisa ng'abagwira." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ndibonereza abo bonna abaziza okulinnya ku mwango gw'omulyango, era abajjuza ennyumba ya mukama waabwe eby'obukambwe n'obukumpanya.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Ku lunaku olwo walibaawo okukaaba ku Mulyango gw'Ebyennyanja ogw'omu Yerusaalemu, n'okutema emiranga mu kitundu ekiggya eky'ekibuga, n'okubwatuka okw'amaanyi okuva ku busozi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Muteme emiranga mmwe ab'omu kitundu ekya wansinsi eky'ekibuga, kubanga abasuubuzi bonna bazikiridde!" 
Zephaniah1:12 “Awo mu kiseera ekyo ndikwata ettaala ne nfuuza Yerusaalemu. Ndibonereza abantu abali obulungi, abatalina kye beeraliikirira, era abagamba nti: ‘Mukama taliiko ky'akola, ka kibe kirungi oba ekibi.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Obugagga bwabwe bulinyagibwa, n'ennyumba zaabwe zirifuuka matongo. Tebalisula mu mayumba ge bazimbye, wadde okunywa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu gye basimbye.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Olunaku olukulu olwa Mukama luli kumpi okutuuka. Lusembedde, era lwanguwa mangu. Olunaku lwa Mukama luliba lwa kubonaabona! N'omulwanyi omuzira alikaaba olw'obuyinike." 
Zephaniah1:15 Luliba lunaku lwa busungu, lwa buyinike, na kubonaabona, lwa kuzikirira na kuggwaawo, lunaku lwa kizikiza n'ekikome, lwa bire n'enzikiza ekutte!" 
Zephaniah1:16 Luliba lunaku lwa kufuuwa ŋŋombe na kukuba nduulu ez'olutalo, nga balumba ebibuga ebiriko ebigo n'enkomera, n'eminaala emigulumivu." 
Zephaniah1:17 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndireeta obuyinike obwo ku bantu, batambule nga bamuzibe, kubanga bakoze ebibi ebinnyiiza. Omusaayi gwabwe guliyiibwa ng'amazzi, n'emirambo gyabwe girisuulibwa ng'obusa.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Ku lunaku olwo Mukama lw'aliragirako obusungu bwe, wadde ffeeza ne zaabu waabwe tebiriyinza kubawonya. Ensi yonna erizikirizibwa omuliro ogw'obusungu bwe, kubanga alisaanyaawo, alimalirawo ddala bonna abali ku nsi." 
Zephaniah2:1 Mmwe ab'omu ggwanga eritalina nsonyi, mukuŋŋaane," 
Zephaniah2:2 nga temunnasaasaanyizibwa ng'ebisusunku ebitwalibwa embuyaga, era nga Mukama tannabasunguwalira nnyo, nga n'olunaku terunnatuuka lw'aliragirako ekiruyi." 
Zephaniah2:3 Mudde eri Mukama mmwe mwenna abeetoowaze abali mu nsi, era abakola by'ayagala. Mukole ebituufu era mwetoowaze, oboolyawo muliwona ekibonerezo ku lunaku, Mukama lw'aliragirako obusungu bwe." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaaza kiryabulirwa, Asukelooni kirisigala matongo. Ab'omu Asudoodi baligobwamu mu ttuntu. Ne Ekurooni kirisaanyizibwawo. Amo 1:6-8; Zek 9:5-7" 
Zephaniah2:5 Zibasanze mmwe Abakereti, abali ku lubalama lw'ennyanja! Mukama akusalidde omusango ggwe Kanaani, ensi y'Abafilistiya: alikuzikiriza n'otosigalamu muntu!" 
Zephaniah2:6 Naawe olubalama lw'ennyanja, oliba malundiro omuli ensiisira z'abasumba, n'ebisibo by'embuzi n'endiga." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ab'omu Buyudaaya abaliwonawo, be balibeera omwo balundirengamu, era basulenga mu mayumba ag'omu Asukelooni, kubanga Mukama Katonda waabwe alibeera wamu nabo, n'abaddizaawo ebirungi." 
Zephaniah2:8 Mukama agamba nti: “Mpulidde ab'e Mowaabu n'ab'e Ammoni nga bavuma era nga bakudaalira abantu bange, era nga beewaana nga bwe bajja okunyaga ensi yaabwe. 21:28-32; 25:1-11; Amo 1:13-15" 
Zephaniah2:9 Kale nga bwe ndi omulamu, nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda wa Yisirayeli, ndayidde nti Mowaabu kiriba nga Sodoma, n'Abammoni baliba nga Gomora: ebifo omufuŋŋamye omwennyango, n'ebinnya omusimibwa omunnyo, era amatongo agataliggwaawo. Abantu bange abalisigalawo balinyaga ensi ezo. Bakaawonawo mu ggwanga lyange balizifuula zaabwe.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Abantu b'e Mowaabu n'ab'e Ammoni bwe batyo bwe balibonerezebwa olw'okwekulumbaza kwabwe, n'olw'okuvuma abantu ba Mukama Nnannyinimagye" 
Zephaniah2:11 Mukama alibatiisa. Alitoowaza balubaale bonna ku nsi. Ab'amawanga gonna balimusinza, nga basinziira mu nsi zaabwe." 
Zephaniah2:12 Nammwe ab'e Etiyopiya Mukama alibatta. 
Zephaniah2:13 Mukama alikozesa obuyinza bwe n'azikiriza Assiriya. Ekibuga ky'e Nineeve alikifuula matongo, era kikalu ng'eddungu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Kirifuuka ekifo omunaagalamiranga amagana, n'ebisolo byonna ebya buli ngeri. Ebiwuugulu binaasulanga mu bifulukwa byakyo, biwuugulirenga mu madirisa. Binnamuŋŋoona binaakaabiranga mu miryango. Emiti emyole egya keduro giriggyibwa ku bizimbe byakyo." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ebyo bye birituuka ku kibuga ekyenyumirizanga olw'obuyinza bwakyo, ne kirowooza nti tekirituukibwako kabi. Kyewaananga nti: “Nze tewali annenkana!” Nga kirifuuka matongo, ekifo ebisolo we biwummulira! Buli ayitawo aneesoozanga n'afunya ebikonde, n'anyeenya emikono gye." 
Zephaniah3:1 Yerusaalemu zikisanze ekibuga ekyo ekyonoonefu era ekijeemu, ekibonyaabonya abantu baakyo!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Tekyawuliriza n'omu era tekyakkiriza kubuulirirwa. Tekyesiga Mukama, era tekyeyuna eri Katonda waakyo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abakungu baamu bali ng'empologoma eziwuluguma, abalamuzi baamu bali ng'emisege egy'akawungeezi, egyayitirira amaddu obutafissaawo ggumba okutuusa enkeera!" 
Zephaniah3:4 Abalanzi baamu baggwaamu ensa, era ba nkwe. Bakabona baakyo boonoona ebitukuvu. Bafuulafuula amateeka ga Katonda, okufuna bye baagala." 
Zephaniah3:5 Naye Mukama akyali mu kibuga ekyo akola ebituufu, era talikola bikyamu. Buli nkya, awatali kwosa, alaga nga bw'ali omwenkanya. Naye abantu ababi tebakwatibwa nsonyi, bongera kukola bibi!" 
Zephaniah3:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Nsaanyizzaawo amawanga, ebigo byago ebigumu bisigadde matongo. Nzisizza enguudo zaago, ne wataba aziyitamu. Ebibuga byago byabuliddwa, tewakyali babibeeramu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Olwo ne ŋŋamba nti abantu bange bananzisaamu ekitiibwa, banakkiriza bye mbabuulirira, ennyumba zaabwe zireme kusaanawo olw'ebyo byonna bye nababonerezaamu. Naye beeyongera bweyongezi okukola ebikolwa ebibi!”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Mukama agamba nti: “Mugira munnindako okutuuka ku lunaku lwe ndisitukirako okutandika omuyiggo. Mmaliridde okukuŋŋaanya amawanga n'obwakabaka, mbimalireko essungu n'ekiruyi. Omuliro gw'obuggya bwe mpulira, gulizikiriza ensi zonna." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Mu biro ebyo ndikyusa emitima gy'abantu ab'omu mawanga, basinzenga nze nzekka, era bampeerezenga n'omutima gumu." 
Zephaniah3:10 Abalinneegayirira be bantu bange abaasaasaana. Banaavanga emitala w'emigga egy'omu Etiyopiya ne bandeetera ebirabo. 
Zephaniah3:11 Mu kiseera ekyo mmwe abantu bange temuliswazibwa olw'ebikolwa byammwe eby'okunjeemera, kubanga ndiggyawo mu mmwe abeekulumbaza era abeenyumiriza, ne mutaddamu kunjeemera ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Mu mmwe ndirekamu abo abeetoowaze era abaavu, abananneesiganga nze Mukama." 
Zephaniah3:13 Abayisirayeli abaliwonawo tebaakolenga bikyamu. Tebaalimbenga, era tebaayogerenga bya bukuusa. Banaabeeranga bulungi, era tewaliba abatiisa.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Abayisirayeli, muyimbe musaakaanye! Ab'omu Yerusaalemu, musanyuke, mujaganye n'omutima gwammwe gwonna." 
Zephaniah3:15 Mukama aggyeewo emisango gyammwe, agobye abalabe bammwe bonna. Mukama, Kabaka wa Yisirayeli ali wamu nammwe, tewakyali kibatiisa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ekiseera kijja kutuuka bagambe Yerusaalemu nti: “Totya, ggwe Siyooni! Emikono gyo gireme kuddirira!" 
Zephaniah3:17 Mukama, Katonda wo, ali wamu naawe, ye muzira akulwanirira n'owangula. Alikusanyukira nnyo, aliddamu okukulaga okwagala kwe, alikwaniriza ng'ayimba nga musanyufu," 
Zephaniah3:18 ng'abali ku mbaga bwe basanyuka.” Mukama agamba nti: “Nzigyeewo akabi akandikutuuseeko, era nkuggyeeko obuswavu." 
Zephaniah3:19 “Ekiseera kijja kutuuka mbonereze bonna abaakubonyaabonya. Ndiwonya abalema, ne nkuŋŋaanya abaasaasaanyizibwa. Okuswala kwabwe ndikufuula ekitiibwa, ensi zonna ne zibatendereza." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ekiseera kijja kutuuka mbakuŋŋaanye mmwe, mbakomyewo ewammwe. Ndibafuula abamanyiddwa mu bantu bonna ku nsi, bwe ndibaddizaawo ebirungi nga mulaba.” Mukama ye ayogedde." 
Haggai1:1 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri, nga Dariyo ye kabaka wa Perusiya, ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogw'omukaaga, Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'ayogerera mu Haggayi omulanzi. Bye yayogera byali bya kutwalira Zerubabbeeli, mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ne Yoswa Ssaabakabona, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki." 
Haggai1:2 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Abantu bano bagamba nti ekiseera tekinnatuuka okuzimba obuggya Essinzizo lya Mukama.” 
Haggai1:3 Mukama kyeyava ayogerera mu mulanzi Haggayi ng'agamba nti: 
Haggai1:4 “Lwaki mmwe musula mu mayumba agazimbiddwa obulungi, Essinzizo lyange nga lirekeddwa awo lityo?" 
Haggai1:5 Kale kaakano mulabe ebibatuuseeko. 
Haggai1:6 Mwasiga bingi, naye mwakungula bitono. Mulya, naye temukkuta. Munywa, naye byemunywa tebibamala nnyonta. Mwambala, naye temubuguma. Empeera omukozi gy'afuna, emuyita mu myagaanya gya ngalo." 
Haggai1:7 Temuyinza kulaba ekibatuusizza ku ebyo? 
Haggai1:8 Mwambuke ku lusozi, muleete emiti, muzimbe buggya Essinzizo, ndyoke nsanyuke, era mpeebwe ekitiibwa ekinsaanira." 
Haggai1:9 “Mwasuubira kukungula bingi, naye ne biba bitono. Bwe mwabireeta eka, ne mbyonoona. Nakola bwe ntyo, kubanga Essinzizo lyange lirekeddwa awo lityo, nga buli omu ku mmwe yeemalidde ku nnyumba ye." 
Haggai1:10 Enkuba kyevudde erema okutonnya, n'ettaka ne litabaza bibala." 
Haggai1:11 Ndeese ekyeya ku nsi: ku nsozi ne ku nnimiro z'eŋŋaano, n'ez'emizabbibu, n'ez'emizayiti, ne ku birime byonna, ne ku bantu ne ku nsolo, ne ku byonna bye mukola.”" 
Haggai1:12 Awo Zerubabbeeli mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, ne Yoswa Ssaabakabona, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki, n'abantu bonna abaakomawo, ne bakola nga Mukama Katonda waabwe bwe yabalagira. Baatya ne bagondera obubaka bwa Haggayi omulanzi, Mukama gwe yatuma." 
Haggai1:13 Awo Haggayi n'atuusa ku bantu obubaka bwa Mukama nti: “Mukama agamba nti: ‘Ndi wamu nammwe.’ ” 
Haggai1:14 Awo Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'ateeka mu Zerubabbeeli omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, era mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, mu Yoswa Ssaabakabona, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki, ne mu bantu bonna abaakomawo, omwoyo ogw'okukola ku Ssinzizo. Ne bajja ne bakola ku Ssinzizo lya Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Katonda waabwe," 
Haggai1:15 ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya, olw'omwezi ogw'omukaaga, mu mwaka ogwokubiri, nga Dariyo ye kabaka." 
Haggai2:1 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu olumu, olw'omwezi ogw'omusanvu, mu mwaka ogwo, Mukama era n'ayogerera mu Haggayi omulanzi." 
Haggai2:2 N'agamba Haggayi nti: “Tegeeza Zerubabbeeli mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ne Yoswa Ssaabakabona, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki, n'abantu bonna abaakomawo, obagambe nti:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Ani mu mmwe abasigaddewo, eyalaba ku Ssinzizo lino mu kitiibwa kyalyo ekyasooka? Era mukiraba mutya kaakano? Temulaba nga si lyakitiibwa?" 
Haggai2:4 Naye ggwe Zerubabbeeli, naawe Yoswa Ssaabakabona, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki, era nammwe mwenna abantu abali mu nsi eno, temuggwaamu maanyi. Mukole omulimu, kubanga ndi wamu nammwe, nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye." 
Haggai2:5 Bwe mwali muva e Misiri, nabasuubiza okubeeranga awamu nammwe bulijjo. N'olwekyo muleme kutya." 
Haggai2:6 “ ‘Esigadde ekiseera kitono, nkankanye eggulu n'ensi, n'ennyanja n'olukalu." 
Haggai2:7 Nja kukankanya amawanga gonna, ebyobugagga byago bireetebwe wano, Essinzizo ndijjuze ebyobugagga." 
Haggai2:8 Ffeeza yenna ne zaabu yenna wange. 
Haggai2:9 Essinzizo eriggya liriba lya kitiibwa okusinga liri eryasooka, era mu lyo mwe ndiweera abantu bange ebirungi n'emirembe.’ ” Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye ayogedde." 
Haggai2:10 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya, olw'omwezi ogw'omwenda, mu mwaka ogwokubiri, nga Dariyo ye kabaka, Mukama era n'ayogera ne Haggayi omulanzi." 
Haggai2:11 Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'agamba nti: “Buuza bakabona basalewo ku nsonga eno. 
Haggai2:12 Omuntu bw'asala ekifi ky'ennyama ku kitambiro ekitukuvu, ekifi ekyo n'akitwalira mu lugoye lw'ayambadde, ekirenge ky'olugoye olwo ne kikoona ku mugaati, oba ku mugoyo, oba ku muzigo, oba ku kyokulya ekirala kyonna, ekyokulya ekyo kifuuka kitukuvu?” Bakabona ne baddamu nti: “Nedda.”" 
Haggai2:13 Awo Haggayi n'abuuza nti: “Omuntu bw'afuuka atali mulongoofu olw'okukwata oba okukoona ku mulambo, n'akwata ku kimu ku byokulya ebyo, kifuuka ekitali kirongoofu?” Bakabona ne baddamu nti: “Ddala, kifuuka ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Haggai2:14 Awo Haggayi n'agamba nti: “Mukama agamba nti: Bwe kityo bwe kiri ne ku bantu b'eggwanga lino, ne ku byonna bye bakola. Buli kye baleeta wano mu maaso gange, si kirongoofu.”" 
Haggai2:15 Mukama agamba nti: “Temuyinza kulaba bibatuuseeko mmwe? Bwe mwali temunnatandika kuzimba buggya Ssinzizo lyange," 
Haggai2:16 omuntu bwe yajjanga ku ntuumu y'eŋŋaano, ng'asuubira okusangako kilo ebikumi bibiri, waabangawo kikumi kyokka. Bwe yajjanga ku ssogolero okusena lita ekikumi ez'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, yasenangamu amakumi ana gokka." 
Haggai2:17 Nababonereza nga nsindika okugengewala n'obukuku n'omuzira mu birime byammwe byonna, naye era temwakyuka kudda gye ndi." 
Haggai2:18 Olwaleero lwe lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya, olw'omwezi ogw'omwenda, olumaliriziddwako okuzimba omusingi gw'Essinzizo lyange. Mwekkaanye ekigenda okubaawo okuva leero." 
Haggai2:19 Newaakubadde nga mu ggwanika temukyali ŋŋaano ya kusiga, wadde ng'emizabbibu n'emitiini, n'emikomamawanga, n'emizayiti teginnabala, naye okuva ku lunaku lwaleero, nja kubawa omukisa.”" 
Haggai2:20 Ku lunaku olwo, olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya olw'omwezi, Mukama n'awa Haggayi obubaka omulundi ogwokubiri," 
Haggai2:21 agambe Zerubabbeeli, omufuzi wa Buyudaaya nti: “Nja kukankanya eggulu n'ensi," 
Haggai2:22 nzigyewo obwakabaka bw'amawanga, mmalewo n'obuyinza bwago. Nja kusuula amagaali n'abo abagatambuliramu. Embalaasi zijja kufa, n'abazeebagala bajja kuttiŋŋana." 
Haggai2:23 Ku lunaku olwo, ndikutwala ggwe Zerubabbeeli omuweereza wange, era mutabani wa Seyalutiyeli, ne nkuteekawo ofuge mu linnya lyange, kubanga ggwe nnonze.” Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye ayogedde." 
Zechariah1:1 Mu mwezi ogw'omunaana, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dariyo ye kabaka wa Perusiya, Mukama n'awa omulanzi Zekariya, mutabani wa Berekiya, era muzzukulu wa Yiddo, obubaka, ategeeze abantu nti:" 
Zechariah1:2 “Nze, Mukama, nasunguwalira nnyo bajjajjammwe." 
Zechariah1:3 Naye kaakano mbagamba nti: Mudde gye ndi, nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, nange nja kudda gye muli." 
Zechariah1:4 Muleme okuba nga bajjajjammwe. Abalanzi ab'edda baabatuusangako obubaka bwange, nga babagamba nti: Mukama Nnannyinimagye abagamba nti muve mu mpisa zammwe embi, era mulekere awo okukola ebikolwa ebibi. Naye bo ne batawuliriza bye mbagamba, wadde okukola bye mbalagira." 
Zechariah1:5 Bajjajjammwe bali ludda wa? N'abalanzi baba balamu emirembe gyonna? 
Zechariah1:6 Naye okulabula n'okukuutira bye nayisa mu baweereza bange abalanzi, tebyatuukirira ku bajjajjammwe? Olwo ne beenenya ne bagamba nti: ‘Mukama Nnannyinimagye atubonerezza nga bwe tusaanidde, era nga bwe yamalirira okutubonereza.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Ku lunaku olw'amakumi abiri mu ennya, olw'omwezi ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu, gwe mwezi ogwa Sebati, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dariyo ye kabaka, Mukama n'awa omulanzi Zekariya, mutabani wa Berekiya, era muzzukulu wa Yiddo, obubaka. Zekariya n'agamba nti:" 
Zechariah1:8 “Ekiro nalaba malayika wa Mukama nga yeebagadde embalaasi emmyufu, era ng'ayimiridde wakati mu miti emikadasi, egyali mu kiwonvu. Emabega we waaliwo embalaasi endala emmyufu, n'eza kikuusikuusi, era n'enjeru." 
Zechariah1:9 Awo ne mmubuuza nti: ‘Mukama wange, embalaasi ezo, kiki kye zitegeeza?’ Malayika oyo n'aŋŋamba nti: ‘Nja kukulaga kye zitegeeza.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Ezo Mukama ye azisindise okulambula ensi.” 
Zechariah1:11 Ne zigamba malayika oyo eyali ayimiridde wakati mu miti emikadasi nti: “Tulambudde ensi yonna, ne tusanga ng'etebenkedde mirembe.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Nnannyinimagye, osunguwalidde Yerusaalemu n'ebibuga bya Buyudaaya okumala emyaka nsanvu. Olimala bbanga ki nga tonnabikwatirwa kisa?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Mukama n'addamu malayika ebigambo ebirungi era ebigumya. 
Zechariah1:14 Malayika oyo n'aŋŋamba nnangirire ebyo Mukama Nnannyinimagye bye yayogera nti “Nnumirwa nnyo Yerusaalemu ne Siyooni," 
Zechariah1:15 era nsuguwalidde nnyo amawanga agatebenkedde, kubanga nanyiigako katono, ne bongera okulumya abantu bange." 
Zechariah1:16 Kyenvudde nkomawo mu Yerusaalemu, okukikwatirwa ekisa. Essinzizo lyange lijja kuzimbibwa buggya mu kyo, era nakyo kizimbibwe buggya.”" 
Zechariah1:17 Malayika era n'aŋŋamba okulangirira nti: “Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti ebibuga bye, biriddamu okuba obulungi, era nti aliddamu okuyamba Yerusaalemu, n'okukibala ng'ekibuga kye, kye yeeroboza.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Awo ne nnyimusa amaaso gange, ne ndaba amayembe ana." 
Zechariah1:19 Malayika eyali ayogera nange, ne mmubuuza nti: “Amayembe ago, gategeeza ki?” N'anziramu nti: “Gategeeza obuyinza obwasaasaanya abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yisirayeli, n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Awo Mukama n'andaga abaweesi bana. 
Zechariah1:21 Ne mbuuza nti: “Abo bazze kukola ki?” N'addamu nti: “Bazze okutiisa amawanga agaalinnyirira Buyudaaya, ne gasaasaanya abantu baamu, era bazze okusaanyaawo obuyinza bwago.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Awo ne nnyimusa amaaso gange, ne ndaba omuntu akutte omuguwa ogugera." 
Zechariah2:2 Ne mbuuza nti: “Ogenda wa?” N'anziramu nti: “Okugera Yerusaalemu, ndyoke ndabe bwe kyenkana obuwanvu n'obugazi.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Awo malayika eyali ayogera nange, bwe yali ng'agenda, malayika omulala n'ajja okumusisinkana," 
Zechariah2:4 n'amugamba nti “Dduka ogambe omuvubuka oyo akutte omuguwa ogugera, nti Yerusaalemu kiribaamu abantu abatagya mu kigo, kubanga baliba bangi era n'amagana mangi." 
Zechariah2:5 Mukama agamba nti ye yennyini ye aliba ekigo eky'omuliro okwetooloola ekibuga, era nti anaakibeerangamu mu kitiibwa kye kyonna.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Mukama n'agamba abantu be nti: “Musituke, musituke, muve mu nsi ey'omu bukiikakkono! Nabasaasaanyiza buli wantu, ng'empewo ennya ez'eggulu." 
Zechariah2:7 Musituke, mudduke muve mu batuuze b'e Babilooni, mudde mu Siyooni." 
Zechariah2:8 Buli akoona ku mmwe aba akoonye ku mmunye ya liiso lyange.” Mukama Nnannyinimagye, eyantuma olw'ekitiibwa kye, bino by'agamba amawanga agaanyaga abantu be. Agamba nti:" 
Zechariah2:9 “Mukama yennyini ye alibalwanyisa mmwe, era abantu abaali abaddu bammwe, balibanyaga mmwe.” Ekyo bwe kirituukirira, mulimanya nga Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye yantuma." 
Zechariah2:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Muyimbe olw'essanyu mmwe abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, kubanga nzija, mbeerenga wamu nammwe.”" 
Zechariah2:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, ab'omu mawanga mangi balijja eri Mukama, ne bafuuka bantu be. Mukama Nnannyinimagye anaabeeranga wamu nammwe, era mmwe mulitegeera nga ye yantuma gye muli." 
Zechariah2:12 Buyudaaya eriba ya Mukama mu ngeri ey'enjawulo, mu nsi ye entukuvu, era Yerusaalemu kiriddamu okuba ekibuga kyayo kye yeeroboza." 
Zechariah2:13 Musirike mu maaso ga Mukama, kubanga asituse okuva mu kifo kye ekitukuvu mw'abeera." 
Zechariah3:1 Awo Mukama n'andaga Yoswa Ssaabakabona, ng'ayimiridde mu maaso ga malayika wa Mukama. Ku ludda lwa Yoswa olwa ddyo waali wayimiriddewo Sitaani, nga yeetegese okulumiriza Yoswa." 
Zechariah3:2 Malayika wa Mukama n'agamba Sitaani nti: “Mukama akunenye, ggwe Sitaani! Ddala, Mukama eyeerobozezza Yerusaalemu akunenye! Omuntu ono ali ng'omumuli oguggyiddwa mu muliro.”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yoswa yali ayambadde ebyambalo ebijama, ng'ayimiridde mu maaso ga malayika." 
Zechariah3:4 Malayika n'agamba abo abaali bayimiridde mu maaso ge nti: “Mumwambulemu ebyambalo ebijama.” Awo n'agamba Yoswa nti: “Nkuggyeeko ekibi kyo, era nja kukwambaza ebyambalo ebyekitiibwa.”" 
Zechariah3:5 N'alagira nti: “Mumutikkire ku mutwe ekiremba ekitukula.” Awo ne bamutikkira ku mutwe ekiremba ekitukula, era ne bamwambaza ebyambalo nga malayika wa Mukama ayimiridde awo." 
Zechariah3:6 Awo malayika wa Mukama n'akuutira nnyo Yoswa nti: 
Zechariah3:7 “Bw'onookwatanga amateeka gange, era n'otuukirizanga bye nkulagira okukola, olwo ojja kwongera okulabiriranga Essinzizo lyange n'empya zaalyo, era nnaakukkirizanga okusembera we ndi mu ngeri ye emu nga bano abayimiridde wano." 
Zechariah3:8 Kale ggwe Yoswa Ssaabakabona, wulira. Era nammwe bakabona banne muwulire: mmwe kabonero ak'ebiseera eby'omu maaso ebirungi. Ndireeta omuweereza wange ayitibwa Ttabi." 
Zechariah3:9 Laba nteeka mu maaso ga Yoswa ejjinja limu nga lya njuyi musanvu. Ku lyo nja kwolako ekiwandiiko, era ndiggyawo ekibi ky'ensi eno mu lunaku lumu." 
Zechariah3:10 Okuva ku lunaku olwo, buli omu mu mmwe anaayitanga munne okujja basanyukireko wamu, nga bali wansi w'omuzabbibu oba wansi w'omutiini.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'akomawo, n'anzuukusa, nga bwe bazuukusa omuntu ali mu tulo." 
Zechariah4:2 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Olaba ki?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ndaba ekikondo ky'ettaala ekya zaabu, n'ekibya ekiri waggulu ku kyo. Ku kikondo ekyo kuliko ettaala musanvu, nga buli ttaala eriko entambi musanvu." 
Zechariah4:3 Ku mabbali gaakyo, waliwo emiti emizayiti ebiri, gumu ku buli ludda.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Olwo ne mbuuza malayika nti: “Mukama wange, ebyo bitegeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Malayika oyo n'ambuuza nti: “Tomanyi ebyo kye bitegeeza?” Ne nziramu nti: “Nedda, mukama wange.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Awo n'aŋŋamba okutwalira Zerubabbeeli obubaka buno obuva eri Mukama Nnannyinimagye, obugamba nti nti: “Oliwangula, si lwa kuba ng'oli wa maanyi mu kulwana, wadde ow'obuyinza, naye lwa mwoyo gwange." 
Zechariah4:7 Ebizibu ebigulumivu ng'olusozi, birivaawo mu maaso go. Olizimba Essinzizo obuggya, era bw'oliba ozimbako ejjinja erimaliriza, abantu balireekaana nti: ‘Nga ddungi, nga ddungi!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Era ne nfuna obubaka obulala obuva eri Mukama nga bugamba nti: 
Zechariah4:9 “Zerubabbeeli ataddewo omusingi gw'Essinzizo, era alirizimba n'alimaliriza. Olwo abantu bange balitegeera nga Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Nze nakutuma gye bali," 
Zechariah4:10 kubanga ababadde baterebuse olw'okulaba ng'ekikolebwa kitono, balisanyuka bwe baliraba nga Zerubabbeeli azimba Essinzizo.” Malayika oyo era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ettaala omusanvu ge maaso ga Mukama, agalaba wonna ku nsi.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Awo ne mmubuuza nti: “Emiti emizayiti gino ebiri egiri ku buli ludda lw'ekikondo ky'ettaala, gitegeeza ki?" 
Zechariah4:12 Era amatabi gano abiri ag'emizayiti agali ku mabbali g'enseke ebbiri eza zaabu, omuyita omuzigo ogw'emizayiti, gategeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah4:13 N'ambuuza nti: “Tomanyi kye gategeeza?” Ne nziramu nti: “Nedda, mukama wange.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Awo n'agamba nti: “Amatabi ago be bantu ababiri, Mukama w'ensi zonna be yalonda, n'abafukako omuzigo, okumuweerezanga.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Era nate ne nnyimusa amaaso gange, ne ndaba omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogubuuka mu bbanga." 
Zechariah5:2 Malayika n'ambuuza nti: “Kiki ky'olaba?” Ne nziramu nti: “Ndaba omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogubuuka mu bbanga, nga gwa mita mwenda obuwanvu, ne mita nnya n'ekitundu obugazi.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Awo n'aŋŋamba nti: “Guwandiikiddwako ekikolimo ekijja okubuna ensi yonna. Ku ludda olumu, omuzingo guwandiikiddwako nti buli abba, aliggyibwa mu nsi. Ku ludda olulala guwandiikiddwako nti buli alimba ng'alayira, naye aliggyibwamu." 
Zechariah5:4 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti alisindika ekikolimo ekyo, ne kiyingira mu nnyumba ya buli muntu abba, ne mu ya buli muntu alimba ng'alayira, era kiribeera mu nnyumba zaabwe, ne kizisaanyizaawo ddala.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Malayika eyali ayogera nange n'ajja n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kale yimusa amaaso go olabe ekyo ekijja.” 
Zechariah5:6 Ne mbuuza nti: “Kiki ekyo?” N'addamu nti: “Ekyo kisero, era kitegeeza ekibi ky'ensi yonna.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ekisero kyaliko ekisaanikira ekikoleddwa mu kyuma ekizito. Awo ekisaanikira ne kibikkulwa, mu kisero nga mulimu omukazi atudde." 
Zechariah5:8 Malayika n'agamba nti: “Omukazi ono kye kibi.” Awo n'amuzzaamu mu kisero, n'akibikkako ekisaanikira." 
Zechariah5:9 Bwe nayimusa amaaso gange ne ndaba abakazi babiri abajja nga baseeyeeya mu bbanga, nga balina ebiwaawaatiro, ne babuuka nakyo mu bbanga." 
Zechariah5:10 Malayika eyali ayogera nange, ne mmubuuza nti: “Ekisero bakitwala wa?”" 
Zechariah5:11 N'anziramu nti: “Bakitwala mu nsi y'e Sinaari okukizimbirayo ennyumba. Bw'eriggwa okuzimba ne bakiteeka omwo.” 
Zechariah6:1 Era nate ne nnyimusa amaaso gange ne ndaba amagaali ana, nga gava wakati w'ensozi bbiri ez'ekikomo." 
Zechariah6:2 Eggaali erisooka lyali lisikibwa embalaasi emmyufu, eryokubiri nga lisikibwa embalaasi enzirugavu," 
Zechariah6:3 eryokusatu nga lisikibwa embalaasi enjeru, n'eryokuna nga lisikibwa embalaasi ez'amabomboola." 
Zechariah6:4 Awo malayika eyali ayogera nange ne mmubuuza nti: “Mukama wange, amagaali ago gategeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah6:5 N'anziramu nti: “Ezo ze mbuyaga ennya, ezaakava mu maaso ga Mukama w'ensi yonna.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Eggaali erisikibwa embalaasi enzirugavu lyali liraga mu bukiikakkono, n'embalaasi enjeru nga zigoberera. Embalaasi ez'amabomboola zaali ziraga mu nsi ey'omu bukiikaddyo." 
Zechariah6:7 Embalaasi ezo ez'amabomboola zaavaayo nga zaagala nnyo okugenda okutalaaga ensi. Malayika n'agamba nti: “Mugende mutalaage ensi.” 
Zechariah6:8 Awo malayika n'aŋŋamba mu ddoboozi ery'omwanguka nti: “Embalaasi eziraze mu bukiikakkono zikkakkanyizza obusungu bwa Mukama.” 
Zechariah6:9 Awo Mukama n'ampa obubaka buno nti: 
Zechariah6:10 “Twala ebirabo ebireeteddwa Eludiya ne Tobiya ne Yedaaya, abakomyewo okuva e Babilooni, ogende ku lunaku olwo lwennyini oyingire mu nnyumba ya Yosiya, mutabani wa Zefaniya." 
Zechariah6:11 Otoole ku ffeeza ne zaabu gwe baleese, okolemu engule, ogitikkire ku mutwe gwa Ssaabakabona Yoswa, mutabani wa Yehozadaaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Omutegeeze nti Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: ‘Omuntu ayitibwa Ttabi alikulira mu kifo mw'ali, era alizimba Essinzizo lya Mukama." 
Zechariah6:13 Oyo ye alizimba Essinzizo eryo, n'aweebwa ekitiibwa ekya kabaka era ye alifuga abantu be. Walibaawo kabona ayimirira okumpi n'entebe ye ey'obwakabaka, ne bakolera wamu mu kuteesa okw'emirembe.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Engule eyo eneebeeranga mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama, okujjuukirirangako Helemu ne Tobiya ne Yedaaya, ne Heeni mutabani wa Zefaniya.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Awo abali ewala balijja ne bayamba okuzimba obuggya Essinzizo lya Mukama. Bwe lirimala okuzimbibwa obuggya, mulimanya nga Mukama Nnannyinimagye ye yantuma gye muli. Ebyo birituukirira, bwe mulinyiikira okuwulira ebiragiro bya Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Zechariah7:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Dariyo ye kabaka, ku lunaku olwokuna olw'omwezi ogw'omwenda, oguyitibwa Kisuleevu, Mukama n'ampa obubaka nze Zekariya." 
Zechariah7:2 Abantu b'e Beteli baali batumye Sarezeeri ne Regemmeleki n'abantu baabwe okwegayirira Mukama abakwatirwe ekisa," 
Zechariah7:3 n'okubuuza bakabona era n'abalanzi ab'omu Ssinzizo lya Mukama Nnannyinimagye ekibuuzo kino nti: “Twongere okukungubagira okuzikirizibwa kw'Essinzizo, nga tusiiba mu mwezi ogwokutaano nga bwe twakolanga edda?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Awo Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'ampa obubaka buno nti: 
Zechariah7:5 “Gamba abantu bonna abali mu nsi eno ne bakabona nti bwe mwasiibanga ne mukungubaga mu mwezi ogwokutaano ne mu gw'omusanvu mu myaka gino ensanvu, temwakikolanga lwa kussaamu nze kitiibwa." 
Zechariah7:6 Era bwe mwalyanga ne bwe mwanywanga, mwakikolanga lwa kwesanyusa mmwe mwennyini.”" 
Zechariah7:7 Bino Mukama bye yayogerera mu balanzi ab'edda, mu kiseera Yerusaalemu mwe kyabeerera obulungi nga kijjudde abantu, era abantu mwe baabeerera abangi mu byalo ebikiriraanye, ne mu kitundu eky'omu bukiikaddyo, ne mu nsenyi ez'omu bugwanjuba bwakyo." 
Zechariah7:8 Awo Mukama n'awa Zekariya obubaka buno nti: 
Zechariah7:9 “Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye ŋŋamba nti nawa abantu bange ebiragiro bino nti: ‘Musalenga emisango mu bwenkanya. Buli omu akwatirwenga munne ekisa, era amusaasirenga." 
Zechariah7:10 Mulemenga kunyigiriza bannamwandu ne bamulekwa, wadde abagwira n'abaavu. Era mulemenga kuteesa kukola kabi ku bannammwe.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Naye abantu bange ne beerema, ne bagaana bugaanyi okuwulira. Ne batassaayo mwoyo," 
Zechariah7:12 ne bakakanyaza emitima gyabwe ng'olwazi, baleme okuwulira amateeka n'ebiragiro, Nze Mukama Nnannyinimagye bye nabawanga, nga mpita mu balanzi ab'edda. Kyennava mbasunguwalira ennyo," 
Zechariah7:13 kubanga baagaana okuwulira bye nayogeranga, nange saabaddangamu bwe banneegayiriranga." 
Zechariah7:14 Ng'embuyaga ey'amaanyi, nabasaasaanya mu mawanga gonna ge baali batamanyi, ensi eno ennungi eyeegombebwa ne bagireka awo, n'efuuka matongo, nga tewakyali agibeeramu.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Awo Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'agamba nti: 
Zechariah8:2 “Nnumirwa nnyo ekibuga Yerusaalemu, era olw'okukyagala ennyo, kyenva nsunguwalira abalabe baakyo." 
Zechariah8:3 Nja kukomawo mu Yerusaalemu ekibuga kyange ekitukuvu, nkibeerengamu. Kinaayitibwanga Kibuga Kyesigwa, era Lusozi lwa Mukama Nnannyinimagye, Olusozi Olutukuvu." 
Zechariah8:4 Abakadde abasajja n'abakazi abatambula nga bakutte emiggo mu ngalo olw'okuba nga bakaddiye nnyo, baliddamu okutuula mu mpya za Yerusaalemu." 
Zechariah8:5 Era enguudo zaakyo ziriddamu okujjula abaana abalenzi n'abawala abazannyiramu. 
Zechariah8:6 “Ekyo abantu b'eggwanga lino abasigaddewo bayinza okukiraba ng'ekitasoboka, naye nze nkisobola." 
Zechariah8:7 Ndinunula abantu bange, ne mbaggya mu nsi ez'ebuvanjuba n'ez'ebugwanjuba gye baatwalibwa," 
Zechariah8:8 ne mbakomyawo mu Yerusaalemu. Baliba bantu bange, nze ne mba Katonda waabwe, nga mbafuga n'obwesigwa n'amazima." 
Zechariah8:9 “Mube ba maanyi mmwe, abawulira kaakano ebigambo bino, abalanzi bye baayogera kasookedde musingi gutandikibwawo, okuzimba obuggya Essinzizo lyange." 
Zechariah8:10 Ekiseera ekyo nga tekinnabaawo, tewaali kupangisa bantu wadde ensolo, era tewaali afuluma, wadde ayingira nga teyeeraliikirira mulabe, kubanga nakyawaganya abantu." 
Zechariah8:11 Naye kaakano abantu b'eggwanga lino abasigaddewo sikyabayisa nga bwe nabayisanga edda. 
Zechariah8:12 Banaasiganga ensigo nga bali mirembe. Emizabbibu ginaabalanga ebibala byagyo, ettaka linaabazanga ebirime, n'enkuba eneetonnyanga. Ndiwa abantu b'eggwanga lino abasigaddewo ebirungi ebyo byonna." 
Zechariah8:13 Mmwe ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yisirayeli, ab'amawanga amalala baakozesanga erinnya lyammwe nga bakolima. Naye kaakano nja kubanunula mmwe, abantu abo bakozesenga erinnya lyammwe nga bawa omukisa. Kale temutya, naye mube ba maanyi.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Bajjajjammwe bwe bansunguwaza, namalirira okubabonereza, era sakyusa kirowoozo kyange, wabula nakituukiriza." 
Zechariah8:15 Naye kaakano mmaliridde okuwa abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya omukisa. N'olwekyo temutya. 
Zechariah8:16 Bino bye muteekwa okukolanga: buli omu abuulirenga munne amazima. Mu mbuga z'amateeka, musalenga emisango mu bwenkanya mu ngeri ereeta emirembe." 
Zechariah8:17 Mulemenga kulowooza mu mitima gyammwe kukola kabi ku bannammwe. Mulemenga kulayira bya bulimba, kubanga nkyawa obulimba n'obutali bwenkanya, n'obukambwe.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'ampa obubaka buno nti: 
Zechariah8:19 “Okusiiba okw'omu mwezi ogwokuna n'ogwokutaano, n'okusiiba okw'omu mwezi ogw'omusanvu n'ogw'ekkumi, kulifuuka ennaku enkulu ez'okusanyuka n'okujaguza mu bantu b'omu Buyudaaya. Kale mwagalenga amazima era n'emirembe.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ekiseera kirituuka, abantu ababeera mu bibuga ebingi ne bajja e Yerusaalemu." 
Zechariah8:21 Ab'omu kibuga ekimu baligamba ab'omu kibuga ekirala nti: ‘Mujje tugende tusinze Mukama Nnannyinimagye, era tumusabe omukisa. Nange nja kugenda.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Amawanga ag'amaanyi n'abantu bangi balijja e Yerusaalemu okusinza Mukama Nnannyinimagye, n'okumusaba omukisa." 
Zechariah8:23 Mu nnaku ezo, abantu kkumi ab'amawanga amalala, n'ab'eddiini endala, balyekwata ku Muyudaaya, ne bagamba nti: ‘Twagala tugende naawe, kubanga tuwulidde nti Katonda ali nammwe.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Buno bwe bubaka bwa Mukama; amaliridde okubonereza ensi y'e Haduraki n'ekibuga ky'e Damasiko, kubanga ekibuga kya Siriya ekikulu, kya Mukama, ng'ebika bya Yisirayeli bwe biri ebibye. Mat 11:21-22; Luk 10:13-14" 
Zechariah9:2 Hamati ekiriraanye Haduraki nakyo kya Mukama, nga Tiiro ne Sidoni bwe biri ebibye, awamu n'amagezi gaabyo gonna." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiiro kyezimbidde ekigo ekigumu, ne kyekuŋŋaanyiza ffeeza omungi ng'enfuufu, ne zaabu omungi ng'ebitoomi eby'omu nguudo." 
Zechariah9:4 Naye Mukama alikiggyako ebyakyo byonna. Alisuula obugagga bwakyo mu nnyanja, era ekibuga kiryokebwa omuliro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ekibuga ky'e Asukelooni kiriraba ebyo, ne kitya. Ne Gaaza kirirumwa nnyo. Era ne Asukelooni nakyo kirirumwa, kubanga byonna bye kyali kisuubira, biriba bifudde. Gaaza kirifiirwa kabaka waakyo, ne Asukelooni tekiribaamu bantu. Amo 1:6-8; Zef 2:4-7" 
Zechariah9:6 Abantu ab'omusaayi omutabule balibeera mu Asudoodi. Mukama agamba nti: “Nditoowaza Abafilistiya abo bonna abeekulumbaza. 
Zechariah9:7 Ndibaziyiza okulya ennyama erimu omusaayi, n'ebyokulya ebirala eby'omuzizo. Abalisigalawo bonna, balifuuka kitundu kya bantu bange, babe ng'ab'omu Kika kya Yuda. Ab'omu Ekurooni balifuuka kitundu kya bantu bange, ng'Abayebusi bwe baafuuka." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndikuuma ensi yange, ne nziyiza amagye okugiyitamu. Sirireka bantu bakambwe kwongera kunyigirizanga bantu bange, kubanga kaakano ndabye engeri abantu bange gye babonaabonamu.”" 
Zechariah9:9 Musanyuke, musanyuke mmwe abantu b'omu Siyooni! Muleekaane olw'essanyu mmwe ab'omu Yerusaalemu! Mulabe, Kabaka wammwe ajja gye muli, ng'ajjira mu kitiibwa eky'omuwanguzi. Muteefu era yeebagadde endogoyi, yeebagadde omwana gw'endogoyi." 
Zechariah9:10 Mukama agamba nti: “Ndiggya amagaali g'entalo mu Yisirayeli, n'embalaasi mu Yerusaalemu, era ndiggyawo omutego gw'obusaale ogukozesebwa mu lutalo. Kabaka oyo aliwa amawanga emirembe. Alifuga okuva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja, okuva ku mugga Ewufuraate, okutuuka ensi gy'ekoma.”" 
Zechariah9:11 Mukama agamba nti: “Olw'endagaano gye nakola nammwe eyakakasibwa n'omusaayi gw'ebitambiro, abantu bammwe abaasibibwa ndibaggya mu bunnya obutaliimu mazzi." 
Zechariah9:12 Mukomeewo mmwe abasibe, kaakano abalina essuubi, mudde mu kigo ekigumu. Olwaleero mbagamba nti: ebyo byonna bye mwafiirwa mu kubonaabona, ndibibaddizaawo emirundi ebiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Ndikozesa Buyudaaya ng'omutego gw'obusaale, ne Yisirayeli ng'obusaale. Ndikozesa ab'omu Siyooni ng'ekitala okulwanyisa ab'omu Buyonaani.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Mukama alirabikira waggulu w'abantu be, alirasa obusaale ne buvaayo ng'okumyansa kw'eggulu. Mukama Katonda alifuuwa eŋŋombe. Alikumbira mu kibuyaga ow'omu bukiikakkono." 
Zechariah9:15 Mukama Nnannyinimagye alikuuma abantu be, ne bazikiriza abalabe baabwe. Nga bali mu lutalo, balireekaana ng'abatamiivu. Balitta abalabe baabwe, omusaayi ne gukulukuta ng'ogw'ebitambiro ogujjuza ekibya, ne gutobya ensonda z'alutaari." 
Zechariah9:16 Ku lunaku olwo Mukama Katonda alinunula abantu be ng'omusumba bw'awonya endiga ze akabi. Balimasamasa mu nsi ye ng'amayinja ag'omuwendo mu ngule. 
Zechariah9:17 Ensi eyo ng'eriba nnungi esikiriza! Abalenzi n'abawala tebalijula ŋŋaano na mwenge musu. 
Zechariah10:1 Musabe Mukama enkuba mu biseera byayo mw'etonnyera. Mukama ye agaba ebire by'enkuba etonnya n'emereza bonna ebimera mu nnimiro. 
Zechariah10:2 Abantu beebuuza ku mayembe ne ku balaguzi, ne ku bavvuunuzi b'ebirooto, naye bye babaddamu bya bulimba, biwubisa, era tebiriimu mugaso. Abantu kyebava batangatanga ng'endiga ezibuze. Babonaabona olw'obutaba na mukulembeze." 
Zechariah10:3 Mukama agamba nti: “Nsunguwalidde abakulembeze, abafuzi b'abantu bange, era nja kubabonereza. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bange, era Nze, Mukama Nnannyinimagye, nja kubalabirira. Nja kubafuula ng'embalaasi zange ez'omu lutalo ez'amaanyi." 
Zechariah10:4 Mu bo mulivaamu abafuzi n'abakulembeze n'abaduumizi b'eggye, abalifuga abantu bange." 
Zechariah10:5 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baliba ng'abalwanyi abazira, abalinnyirira abalabe baabwe mu bitoomi eby'omu nguudo. Balirwana, kubanga Mukama ali wamu nabo, era baliwangula n'abalabe abeebagala embalaasi." 
Zechariah10:6 “Ndiwa ab'omu Buyudaaya amaanyi, ndiwa ab'omu Yisirayeli obuwanguzi. Ndibakwatirwa ekisa, ne mbakomyawo ewaabwe. Baliba nga be sigobanga, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, era ndiwulira bye basaba." 
Zechariah10:7 Ab'omu Yisirayeli baliba ba maanyi ng'abalwanyi abazira. Balisanyuka ng'abanywedde omwenge. Bazzukulu baabwe banajjukiranga kino ne basanyuka olw'ebyo Mukama by'akoze. 
Zechariah10:8 “Ndiyita abantu bange, ne mbakuŋŋaanya. Ndibanunula era baliba bangi nga bwe baabanga edda." 
Zechariah10:9 Newaakubadde nabasaasaanya mu mawanga, naye balinzijukira nga bali mu nsi ez'ewala, era bo n'abaana baabwe baliba balamu era balikomawo." 
Zechariah10:10 “Ndibakuŋŋaanya nga mbaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri ne mu Assiriya, mbaleete mu nsi y'e Gileyaadi, ne mu Lebanooni, wonna wajjule abantu." 
Zechariah10:11 “Bwe baliba bayita mu nnyanja ey'okubonaabona, nze Mukama ndikuba amayengo. N'obuziba bwonna obwa Kiyira bulikalira. Assiriya eyeekulumbaza eritoowazibwa. N'obuyinza bwa Misiri buliggwaawo." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndiwa abantu bange amaanyi. Balinsinza era balimpulira.” Mukama ye ayogedde. 
Zechariah11:1 Ggulawo enzigi zo ggwe Lebanooni, omuliro gwokye emivule gyo." 
Zechariah11:2 Mukube ebiwoobe mmwe emiberosi, kubanga emivule gigudde, emiti emirungi ennyo gizikiriziddwa! Mukube ebiwoobe mmwe emyera gy'e Basani! Kubanga ekibira ekiwanvu kitemeddwa." 
Zechariah11:3 Abafuzi bakuba ebiwoobe kubanga ekitiibwa kyabwe kizikiriziddwa! Empologoma zisindogoma, kubanga ebisaka mwe zisula eby'omu Yorudaani bizikiriziddwa." 
Zechariah11:4 Mukama Katonda wange yaŋŋamba nti: “Lunda endiga ez'okuttibwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abazigula, bazitta ne batabonerezebwa. Batunda ennyama, ne bagamba nti: ‘Mukama atenderezebwe, kubanga tugaggawadde.’ Abasumba baazo nabo bennyini tebazisaasira.”" 
Zechariah11:6 Mukama agamba nti: “Sirisaasira nate muntu n'omu ku nsi. Ndiwaayo abantu bonna mu buyinza bw'abafuzi baabwe. Abafuzi abo balibonyaabonya ensi, era siriginunula mu buyinza bwabwe.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Abasuubuzi b'endiga banfuula omusumba, ne nnunda endiga ez'okuttibwa. Ne nkwata emiggo ebiri. Ogumu ne ngutuuma erinnya “Mukisa”. Omulala ne ngutuuma erinnya “Kwegatta”, ne nnunda endiga." 
Zechariah11:8 Ne neetamwa abasumba abalala basatu abankyawa, ne mbagoba mu mwezi gumu." 
Zechariah11:9 Awo ne ŋŋamba endiga nti: “Sikyabalunda. Ezo ezinaafa, zife. Ezinaazikirizibwa, zizikirizibwe. Ezo ezinaasigalawo ziryaŋŋane.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Awo ne nkwata omuggo gwange oguyitibwa “Mukisa”, ne ngumenyamu, okumenyawo endagaano, Mukama gye yakola n'amawanga gonna." 
Zechariah11:11 Endagaano n'emenyebwawo ku lunaku olwo. Awo abasuubuzi b'endiga abaali bantunuulira, ne bategeera nga Mukama yali ayogerera mu ebyo bye nkoze." 
Zechariah11:12 Ne mbagamba nti: “Oba mwagala, mumpe empeera yange. Oba temwagala, mugisigaze.” Ne bansasula ebitundu amakumi asatu ebya ffeeza, nga ye mpeera yange." 
Zechariah11:13 Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Bisuulire omubumbi.” Ne ntwala ebitundu amakumi asatu ebya ffeeza, omuwendo gwe baalamula nti gwe gungyaamu, ne mbisuula mu ggwanika ly'Essinzizo." 
Zechariah11:14 Awo ne mmenyamu omuggo ogwokubiri oguyitibwa “Kwegatta”, okwegatta kwa Buyudaaya ne Yisirayeli ne kuggwaawo." 
Zechariah11:15 Awo Mukama n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ddamu okukola omulimu gw'obusumba. Naye ku mulundi guno, okole ng'omusumba atagasa," 
Zechariah11:16 kubanga nteekawo omusumba anaalundanga endiga, naye taalabirirenga ezo ezigenda okutuukibwako akabi, wadde okunoonya ezo ezibuze. Era tajjanjabenga ezo ezirwadde, wadde okuliisa ezo ennamu, wabula anaalyangamu ezo ezassava, era alizinuulako ebinuulo." 
Zechariah11:17 Zimusanze omusumba atagasa, ayabulira endiga! Ekitala kifumite omukono gwe, n'eriiso lye erya ddyo! Omukono gwe gukale, n'eriiso lye erya ddyo lizibire ddala!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Buno bwe bubaka obufa ku Yisirayeli, obuva eri Mukama, eyabamba eggulu, eyatonda ensi, era eyawa abantu obulamu. Agamba nti:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Ndifuula Yerusaalemu ng'eggiraasi y'omwenge. Amawanga agakyetoolodde galiginywa, ne gatagatta ng'abatamiivu. Bwe galizingiza Yerusaalemu, ebibuga ebirala byonna eby'omu Buyudaaya nabyo biriba bizingiziddwa." 
Zechariah12:3 Naye ekiseera kirituuka, ne nfuula Yerusaalemu ng'ejjinja ezzito, buli ggwanga eririgezaako okulisitula, lirirumizibwa nnyo, era amawanga gonna ku nsi galyegatta okukirwanyisa." 
Zechariah12:4 Mu kiseera ekyo, nditiisa embalaasi zaabwe zonna, n'abazeebagala bonna ndibasuula eddalu. Ndirabirira abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, naye ndiziba amaaso g'embalaasi z'abalabe baabwe." 
Zechariah12:5 Olwo ebika ebiri mu Buyudaaya birigambagana nti: ‘Mukama Katonda Nnannyinimagye, awa abatuuze b'omu Buyudaaya amaanyi.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Mu kiseera ekyo, ebika ebiri mu Buyudaaya ndibifuula ng'omuliro ogukoleezeddwa ku kibira, oba ku binywa by'eŋŋaano. Ebika ebyo birisaanyaawo amawanga gonna agabyetoolodde. Abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu balikibeeramu mirembe." 
Zechariah12:7 “Nze Mukama, ndisooka kuwa ggye lya Buyudaaya obuwanguzi, ekitiibwa bazzukulu ba Dawudi n'abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu kye balifuna, kireme kusinga ekyo abalala ab'omu Buyudaaya kye balifuna." 
Zechariah12:8 Mu kiseera ekyo, nze Mukama ndikuuma abo abali mu Yerusaalemu. Aliba asingayo okuba omunafu mu bo, alifuuka wa maanyi nga Dawudi bwe yali. Bazzukulu ba Dawudi balibakulembera nga malayika wa Mukama, nga Katonda yennyini." 
Zechariah12:9 Mu kiseera ekyo ndizikiriza buli ggwanga eririgezaako okulumba Yerusaalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Bazzukulu ba Dawudi n'abantu abalala ab'omu Yerusaalemu ndibajjuza omwoyo omusaasizi n'ogw'okwegayirira. Balitunuulira oyo gwe baafumita, era balimukungubagira ng'abakungubagira omwana waabwe omu yekka. Balimukaabira nnyo, ng'abakaabira mutabani waabwe omuggulanda." 
Zechariah12:11 Mu kiseera ekyo okukungubaga kuliba kungi mu Yerusaalemu, ng'okukungubagira Adadurimmoni mu Lusenyi lw'e Megiddo." 
Zechariah12:12 Ensi eno erikungubaga, buli maka gakungubage lwago: ab'omu maka agasibuka mu Dawudi lwabwe, ne bakazi baabwe lwabwe; ab'omu maka agasibuka mu Natani lwabwe, ne bakazi baabwe lwabwe;" 
Zechariah12:13 ab'omu maka agasibuka mu Leevi lwabwe, ne bakazi baabwe lwabwe; ab'omu maka agasibuka mu Simeeyi lwabwe, ne bakazi baabwe lwabwe." 
Zechariah12:14 N'ab'omu maka amalala gonna balikungubaga lwabwe, ne bakazi baabwe lwabwe." 
Zechariah13:1 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, oluzzi luliggulibwawo okutukuza bazzukulu ba Dawudi n'abantu b'omu Yerusaalemu, banaazibweko ebibi byabwe, era n'obwonoonefu." 
Zechariah13:2 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Mu kiseera ekyo, ndiggyawo mu nsi eyo amannya g'ebyo bye basinza ebitali Katonda, era tegaliddayo kujjukirwa. Era ndiggyawo mu nsi abalanzi, n'omwoyo ogutali mulongoofu." 
Zechariah13:3 Bwe walibaawo akyayagala okulanga, kitaawe ne nnyina balimugamba nti ateekwa okuttibwa, kubanga agamba nti ayogera mu linnya lya Mukama, sso ng'alimba. Bw'aliragula, kitaawe ne nnyina bennyini balimufumita ne bamutta." 
Zechariah13:4 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, buli mulanzi alikwatibwa ensonyi olw'okulabikirwa kwe era n'okulanga. Talyambala munagiro gwe okulimba abantu." 
Zechariah13:5 Naye aligamba nti: ‘Nze siri mulanzi. Ndi mulimi. Ettaka bwe bugagga bwange okuva mu buto bwange.’ 
Zechariah13:6 Bwe walibaawo amubuuza nti: ‘Ebiwundu ebyo ebiri mu bibatu byaki?’ Aliddamu nti: ‘Nabifumitibwa mu nnyumba ya mikwano gyange.’ ” 
Zechariah13:7 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Situka ggwe ekitala olwanyise omusumba wange, ali ku lusegere lwange. Tema omusumba endiga zisaasaane. Ndigololera omukono gwange ku bato." 
Zechariah13:8 Awo mu nsi yonna, ebitundu ebyokusatu bibiri birifa, ekimu ekyokusatu kye kiriwonawo." 
Zechariah13:9 Ndigeza ekimu ekyokusatu ekyo, ne mbatukuza nga ffeeza bw'atukuzibwa mu muliro. Ndibageza nga zaabu bw'agezebwa. Olwo balinsaba ne mbaddamu. Ndibategeeza nti bantu bange, nabo ne baatula nti: ‘Mukama ye Katonda waffe.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Olunaku Mukama lw'alisalirako omusango lujja. Olwo ebintu by'omu Yerusaalemu birinyagibwa, ne bigabanibwa nga mulaba." 
Zechariah14:2 Mukama alikuŋŋaanya wamu amawanga okulwanyisa Yerusaalemu. Ekibuga kiriwangulwa, ennyumba ne zinyagibwamu ebintu, n'abakazi ne bakwatibwa lwa mpaka. Abantu kimu kyakubiri balitwalibwa mu busibe, naye abalisigalawo tebaliggyibwa mu kibuga." 
Zechariah14:3 Awo Mukama aligenda n'alwanyisa amawanga ago, nga bwe yalwana mu ntalo ez'edda." 
Zechariah14:4 Mu kiseera ekyo, aliyimirira ku lusozi oluyitibwa Olusozi olw'Emizayiti mu buvanjuba bwa Yerusaalemu. Olusozi olwo lulibejjukamu wabiri, okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba, ne lubaamu ekiwonvu ekigazi ennyo. Ekitundu ekimu eky'olusozi kiriseeseetuka, ne kigenda mu bukiikakkono, ate ekitundu ekirala ne kigenda mu bukiikaddyo." 
Zechariah14:5 Mulidduka nga muyita mu kiwonvu ekyo ekyawulamu olusozi. Mulidduka nga bajjajjammwe bwe badduka, ensi bwe yakankana mu mirembe gya Kabaka Wuzziya owa Buyudaaya. Mukama Katonda wange alijja ng'ali wamu n'abatukuvu bonna." 
Zechariah14:6 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, tewaliba nate bunnyogovu wadde olufu." 
Zechariah14:7 Era tewaliba kizikiza. Bunaabanga misana bulijjo. Ne mu budde obw'ekiro, wanaabangawo ekitangaala ng'emisana. Mukama yekka ye amanyi ekyo we kiribeererawo." 
Zechariah14:8 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, amazzi amalungi galikulukuta nga gava mu Yerusaalemu. Ekitundu kyago ekimu kirikulukutira mu nnyanja ey'ebuvanjuba, n'ekirala mu nnyanja ey'ebugwanjuba. Galikulukuta mu biseera eby'ekyeya n'eby'enkuba." 
Zechariah14:9 Olwo Mukama aliba Kabaka w'ensi zonna. Bonna gwe banaasinzanga era ye Mukama gwe banaamanyanga yekka. 
Zechariah14:10 Ekitundu kyonna okuva e Geba okutuuka e Rimmoni mu bukiikaddyo obwa Yerusaalemu kirifuulibwa kya museetwe. Yerusaalemu kiritumbiira ng'omunaala mu nsi ekyetoolodde. Ekibuga kiritandikira ku Mulyango gwa Benyamiini okutuuka ku Mulyango ogw'omu Nsonda, awaali omulyango ogwasooka, era okuva ku Munaala gwa Hananeeli, okutuuka ku masogolero g'emizabbibu aga kabaka." 
Zechariah14:11 Abantu balibeera mirembe mu Yerusaalemu nga tebatiisibwatiisibwa kuzikirizibwa. 
Zechariah14:12 Amawanga agalumba Yerusaalemu, Mukama aligalwaza ekirwadde ekibi. Emibiri gyabwe girivunda nga bakyayimiridde. Amaaso gaabwe galivundira mu bituli byago, n'ennimi zaabwe zirivundira mu kamwa kaabwe." 
Zechariah14:13 Mu biseera ebyo, Mukama alibateekamu okutabuka era n'okutya okungi, buli omu n'akwata amuliraanye n'amulwanyisa." 
Zechariah14:14 N'ab'omu Buyudaaya balirwanyisa Yerusaalemu. Obugagga bw'amawanga gonna bulikuŋŋaanyizibwa: zaabu ne ffeeza, n'ebyokwambala, nga bingi nnyo nnyini." 
Zechariah14:15 Ekirwadde ekibi kirikwata n'embalaasi, n'ennyumbu, n'eŋŋamiya n'endogoyi era n'ensolo zonna mu lusiisira lw'abalabe." 
Zechariah14:16 Olwo bonna abalisigalawo ku b'amawanga agazze okulwanyisa Yerusaalemu, banaayambukanga buli mwaka okusinza Mukama Nnannyinimagye era Kabaka, n'okukuza Embaga ey'Ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:17 Eggwanga eririgaana okwambuka e Yerusaalemu okusinza Mukama Nnannyinimagye era Kabaka, enkuba teritonnya mu lyo." 
Zechariah14:18 Abamisiri bwe baligaana okukuza Embaga ey'Ensiisira, balikwatibwa ekirwadde kye kimu ekyo Mukama ky'alirwaza amawanga amalala agagaana okukuza Embaga ey'Ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekyo kye kibonerezo ekiriweebwa Misiri n'amawanga amalala gonna agataayambukenga kukuza Mbaga ey'Ensiisira. 
Zechariah14:20 Mu nnaku ezo, wadde endege ezisibwa ku mbalaasi, ziriyolebwako nti: “Kyawuliddwa Mukama.” Entamu mu Ssinzizo ziriba ntukuvu ng'ebibya mu maaso g'alutaari." 
Zechariah14:21 Entamu zonna mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna ziryawulirwa Mukama Nnannyinimagye, abantu abawaayo ebitambiro ne batoolanga ku zo ne bafumbamu ennyama ey'ekitambiro. Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, tewaliba nate musuubuzi mu Ssinzizo lya Mukama Nnannyinimagye." 
Malachi1:1 Buno bwe bubaka Mukama bwe yawa Malaki okutegeeza Abayisirayeli. 
Malachi1:2 Mukama agamba abantu be nti: “Nabaagala. Naye ne mugamba nti: ‘Watwagala otya?’ Esawu ne Yakobo baali baaluganda. Naye nayagala Yakobo, Amo 1:11-12; Ob 1-14" 
Malachi1:3 ne nkyawa Esawu. Ensozi za Esawu nazifuula matongo, ensi ye ne ngiwa ebibe eby'omu ddungu.”" 
Malachi1:4 Singa bazzukulu ba Edomu bagamba nti: “Ebibuga byaffe bizikiriziddwa, naye tujja kubizimba buggya,” Mukama Nnannyinimagye ajja kugamba nti: “Ka bazimbe, naye nja kubimenyawo. Banaayitibwanga ‘Eggwanga erikola ebibi’, era ‘Abantu Mukama b'asunguwalira ennaku zonna.’ ”" 
Malachi1:5 Abayisirayeli baliraba kino, ne bagamba nti: “Mukama mukulu n'ebweru w'ensi ya Yisirayeli.”" 
Malachi1:6 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba bakabona nti: “Omwana assaamu kitaawe ekitiibwa, n'omuweereza assaamu mukama we ekitiibwa. Kale oba nga ndi kitammwe, lwaki temunzisaamu kitiibwa? Era oba nga ndi mukama wammwe, lwaki temuntya? Munnyooma, naye ne mubuuza nti: ‘Tukunyoomye tutya?’" 
Malachi1:7 Munnyoomye, kubanga muwaddeyo ku alutaari yange emigaati egyonoonese. Era mubuuza nti: ‘Tugyonoonye tutya?’ Mugyonoonye, kubanga mugamba nti: ‘Emmeeza ya Mukama si ya kitiibwa.’" 
Malachi1:8 Bwe muleeta ensolo ezizibye amaaso, oba ennema, oba endwadde okuzintambirira, mulowooza nti ekyo si kikyamu? Kale ensolo ng'ezo muzitonere abafuzi bammwe. Banaabasanyukira? Banaabasiima?”" 
Malachi1:9 Kaakano mmwe bakabona, musabe Katonda atukwatirwe ekisa, kubanga mmwe mwavaako omutawaana. Waliwo ku mmwe gw'anaasiima?" 
Malachi1:10 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Singa nno omu ku mmwe aggalawo enzigi z'Essinzizo, ne mutakumira bwereere muliro ku alutaari yange! Sibasanyukira n'akatono, era sikkiriza birabo bye muntonera." 
Malachi1:11 Okuva ebuvanjuba okutuuka ebugwanjuba, abantu banzisaamu ekitiibwa. Wonna wonna bannyookereza obubaane, era bampa ebitambiro ebirongoofu. Bonna banzisaamu ekitiibwa." 
Malachi1:12 Naye mmwe munnyooma, bwe mugamba nti: ‘Emmeeza ya Mukama eyonoonese, n'emmere yaakwo si ya kitiibwa.’" 
Malachi1:13 Mugamba nti: ‘Ebyo byonna tubikooye!’ Era ne mwesooza! Ensolo gye mwanyaga, oba ennema, oba endwadde, gye muleeta okuntonera. Mulowooza nti eyo nnyinza okugikkiriza?" 
Malachi1:14 Oyo omukumpanya, eyeeyama okumpa ennume ye ennungi gy'alina mu kisibo kye, ate n'antambirira ennema, akolimirwe, kubanga nze ndi Kabaka mukulu, era abantu ab'omu mawanga gonna bantya.”" 
Malachi2:1 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Kino kye kiragiro kye mbawa mmwe bakabona: 
Malachi2:2 muteekwa okunzisaamu ekitiibwa mu ebyo bye mukola. Bwe mutaafengayo kuwulira bye ŋŋamba, ndibateekako ekikolimo, era nditeeka ekikolimo ku bye mufuna okubayimirizaawo. Ddala mmaze okubiteekako ekikolimo, kubanga ekiragiro kyange temukissaako mwoyo." 
Malachi2:3 Ndibonereza abaana bammwe, era ndisiiga mu maaso gammwe obusa bw'ensolo ze mutambidde, ne muggyibwawo wamu nabwo." 
Malachi2:4 Olwo mulimanya nga nze nabawa mmwe ekiragiro kino, endagaano gye nakola ne bakabona, bazzukulu ba Leevi, ereme kumenyebwa." 
Malachi2:5 “Mu ndagaano yange, nabasuubiza okubawa obulamu n'emirembe. Era nabibawa balyoke banzisengamu ekitiibwa. Mu biro ebyo, banzisangamu ekitiibwa era bantyanga." 
Malachi2:6 Baayigirizanga bituufu sso si bikyamu. Baabeeranga wamu nange mu ddembe, nga ba mpisa nnungi, era baalesangayo bangi okukola ebibi," 
Malachi2:7 kubanga mulimu gwa bakabona okuyigiriza abantu bammanye. Era abantu bandigenzenga gye bali okuyiga bye njagala bakole, kubanga be babaka ba Mukama Nnannyinimagye." 
Malachi2:8 “Naye mmwe bakabona, muvudde mu kkubo ettuufu ne muwaba. Bye muyigiriza bireetedde bangi okukola ebikyamu. Mumenya endagaano gye nakola nammwe." 
Malachi2:9 Kyenvudde mbafuula aba wansi era abanyoomebwa mu bantu bonna, kubanga temukola bye mbalagira, era bwe muba muyigiriza abantu bange, mukozesa kusosola.”" 
Malachi2:10 Ffenna tetulina kitaffe omu? Katonda tali omu eyatutonda? Kale lwaki tuba abakuusa eri bannaffe? Era lwaki tunyooma endagaano, Katonda gye yakola ne bajjajjaffe?" 
Malachi2:11 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bafuuse bakuusa, ne bakola ekyenyinyalwa mu Yerusaalemu ne mu Yisirayeli yonna. Boonoonye Essinzizo lya Mukama ly'ayagala. Bawasizza abakazi abasinza balubaale." 
Malachi2:12 Buli musajja eyakola ekyo, Mukama amuggye mu Bayisirayeli, era aleme kumukkiriza kuddamu kwetaba wamu na ba ggwanga lyaffe nga batonera Mukama Nnannyinimagye ebirabo." 
Malachi2:13 Ekirala kye mukola kye kino: alutaari ya Mukama mugitobya amaziga, nga mukaaba era nga mukuba ebiwoobe, kubanga Mukama takyasiima bye mumuleetera." 
Malachi2:14 Mwebuuza ekimugaana okubisiima. Tabisiima, kubanga mumenyeewo endagaano ey'obufumbo gye mwakola n'abakazi be mwawasa mu buvubuka bwammwe. Be bannammwe be mwakola nabo endagaano nga Mukama ye mujulirwa, naye ne mutaba beesigwa." 
Malachi2:15 Katonda teyatonda omuntu ng'alina omubiri n'omwoyo ogw'obulamu? Ky'ayagala kwe kumuzaalira abaana abamutya. Kale mwekuumenga, waleme kubaawo atali mwesigwa eri omukazi gwe yawasa mu buvubuka bwe." 
Malachi2:16 Mukama Nnannyinimagye era Katonda wa Yisirayeli agamba nti: “Nkyawa okwawukana kw'abafumbo, ng'omusajja akola eky'obukambwe okugoba mukazi we. Kale mwekuumenga, waleme kubaawo atali mwesigwa.”" 
Malachi2:17 Mukooyezza Mukama n'ebigambo bye mwogera. Naye mwebuuza nti: “Tumukooyezza tutya?” Mumukooyezza nga mugamba nti: “Buli akola ebibi, aba mulungi mu maaso ga Mukama, era Mukama amusanyukira.” Oba nga mwebuuza nti: “Katonda omwenkanya ali ludda wa?”" 
Malachi3:1 Mukama Nnannyinimagye n'agamba nti: “Nja kutuma omubaka wange okunjerulira ekkubo, era Mukama gwe munoonya, alijja mu Ssinzizo lye nga tebamanyiridde. N'omubaka gwe mulindirira, alijja n'alangirira endagaano yange.”" 
Malachi3:2 Naye ani aliyinza okugumira olunaku lw'alijjirako? Era bw'alirabika, ani aliguma okuyimirira? Kubanga ali ng'omuliro ogutukuza ebyuma, era nga sabbuuni gwe boozesa." 
Malachi3:3 Alituula okusala omusango, ng'ali ng'oyo alongoosa ffeeza n'amutukuza. Alitukuza bazzukulu ba Leevi, balyoke bawengayo eri Mukama ebirabo ebituufu." 
Malachi3:4 Olwo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusaalemu, ebirabo bye bawaayo eri Mukama birimusanyusa, nga bwe gwali edda." 
Malachi3:5 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Ndijja mu mmwe ne nsala omusango. Era amangwago ndirumiriza abalogo n'abenzi, n'abalayira eby'obulimba, n'abalyazaamaanya empeera y'abakozi, n'ababonyaabonya bannamwandu ne bamulekwa, n'abanyaga eby'abagwira, era ndirumiriza n'abo bonna abatanzisaamu kitiibwa." 
Malachi3:6 “Nze Mukama, sikyukakyuka, era mmwe bazzukulu ba Yakobo kyemuva mulema okumalibwawo." 
Malachi3:7 Mmwe, nga bajjajjammwe, muvudde ku biragiro byange, ne mutabikwata. Mudde gye ndi, nange nja kudda gye muli. Naye mwebuuza nti: ‘Tukole ki okudda gy'oli?’" 
Malachi3:8 Si kituufu omuntu okunyaga ebya Katonda. Naye mmwe munnyagako ebyange, ate ne mubuuza nti: ‘Tubikunyagako tutya?’ Mubinnyagirako mu bitundu eby'ekkumi ne mu birabo bye muntonera." 
Malachi3:9 Muvumiriddwa, kubanga mmwe eggwanga eddamba munyaga ebyange." 
Malachi3:10 Muleete ebitundu eby'ekkumi ebijjuvu mu ggwanika ly'Essinzizo lyange, libeeremu emmere nnyingi. Mungeze mulabe oba nga siribaggulirawo ggulu, ne mbayiwako emikisa mingi nnyo." 
Malachi3:11 Sirireka biwuka kuzikiriza birime byammwe. N'emizabbibu mu nnimiro zammwe tegirirema kubala. 
Malachi3:12 Olwo abantu ab'omu mawanga gonna balibayita mmwe ba mukisa, kubanga ensi yammwe eriba nnungi okubeeramu.”" 
Malachi3:13 Mukama agamba nti: “Munjogeddeko ebitali birungi. Naye mugamba nti: ‘Tukwogeddeko ki?’ 
Malachi3:14 Mwagamba nti: ‘Okuweereza Katonda tekigasa. Kigasa ki okukola by'alagira, oba okulaga Mukama Nnannyinimagye nti tunakuwadde?" 
Malachi3:15 Era kaakano abo abeekulumbaza be tuyita ab'omukisa. Aboonoonyi tebakoma ku kya ku beera bulungi kyokka, naye era bakema Katonda ne batabonerezebwa.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Awo abantu abatya Mukama banyumiza wamu, Mukama n'awuliriza, n'awulira bye boogera. Mu maaso ge ne wabaawo ekitabo ekyawandiikibwa okujjukirirako abo abamutya, era abamussaamu ekitiibwa." 
Malachi3:17 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Baliba bantu bange. Ku lunaku lwe ndikolerako, baliba bange ddala. Ndibasaasira ng'omusajja bw'asaasira mutabani we amuweereza." 
Malachi3:18 Olwo muliddamu okulaba enjawulo wakati w'omutuukirivu n'omubi, wakati w'oyo ampeereza nze Katonda, n'oyo atampeereza.”" 
Malachi4:1 Mukama Nnannyinimagye agamba nti: “Olunaku lujja, abo bonna abeekulumbaza era n'aboonoonyi lwe balyokebwa ng'ebisasiro. Ku lunaku olwo balyokebwa ne baggweerawo ddala, obutasigalawo wadde akatundu." 
Malachi4:2 Naye mmwe abanzisaamu ekitiibwa, obuyinza bwange obulokola bulivaayo, ne bubaakira ng'enjuba erina amaanyi agawonya mu kwaka kwayo. Muliba ba ddembe, ne mubuukabuuka ng'ennyana eziyimbuddwa mu kisibo." 
Malachi4:3 Ku lunaku lwe ndikolerako, muliwangula ababi, ne mubalinnyirira wansi w'ebigere byammwe, kubanga baliba bafuuse vvu." 
Malachi4:4 “Mujjukire ebyo Musa omuweereza wange bye yabayigiriza: amateeka n'ebiragiro, bye namuweera ku Lusozi Horebu, abituuse ku Bayisirayeli bonna." 
Malachi4:5 “Olunaku lwa Mukama olukulu era olw'entiisa nga terunnatuuka, ndibatumira Eliya omulanzi." 
Malachi4:6 Alitabaganya bakitaabwe b'abaana n'abaana baabwe, nneme okujja okuzikiriza ensi yammwe.”" 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mutabani wa Mattatiya, Mattatiya mutabani wa Amosi, Amosi mutabani wa Nawumu, Nawumu mutabani wa Esili, Esili mutabani wa Nangayi."
